title: Uncommon Pathogens in Common Presentations: Genetic Profiling and Virulence Determinants of Vibrio alginolyticus Isolated from a Case of External Otitis.
abstract: Backgrunod/Objectives: Routine identification of common bacterial pathogens is typically efficient, utilizing standardized, cost-effective methods. However, the diagnostic process becomes significantly more complex when dealing with rare or unexpected microorganisms, especially as they can be considered colonizers in many cases. Methods: This study presents diagnostic details of an uncommon pathogen, Vibrio alginolyticus, isolated from auricular discharge in a patient with non-Hodgkin lymphoma diagnosed with persistent otitis externa and explores its identification through both conventional and modern laboratory approaches. Sequential ear discharge cultures resulted in phenotypically similar but genomically different Vibrio alginolyticus isolates. We complemented classical methods like conventional culture (on Columbia agar and CLED agar), Vitek2 Compact identification, and EUCAST disk diffusion antimicrobial susceptibility testing (following the EUCAST version 12.0 guidelines) with MALDI-TOF mass spectrometry and Illumina/Nanopore whole genome sequencing. Comparative analysis of the genomes was performed with the PeGAS pipeline, Unicycler, and 1928Diagnostics SNP analysis. Results: The Vitek2 analysis identified both isolates as V. alginolyticus with 99% confidence, and this was supported by the MALDI-TOF MS results. The first isolate (A) was fully susceptible to the antibiotics tested, while the second (B) showed resistance to ciprofloxacin. Whole genome sequencing revealed 99.23% and 98.60% nucleotide identity to the V. alginolyticus reference genome for isolates A and B, respectively, with a 99.8% match between them. Isolate B acquired a gyrA (c.1870C>T) mutation that correlates with the ciprofloxacin resistance (MIC > 0.5 mg/L). Both genomes carry hlyA (hemolysin), toxR (cholera toxin regulator), genes involved in biofilm formation (rpoN, relA, spoT, opp), luxS (motility), proA, vacB (virulence factors), and tet(34) (oxytetracycline resistance). A core genome SNP distance of <100 indicates clonal relatedness. Our integrated (phenotypic and genomic) diagnostic approach confirmed V. alginolyticus and documented host resistance evolution, with a virulence repertoire that could explain the clinical evolution. Conclusions: This case highlights the utility of molecular methods in confirming species identity, detecting resistance markers, characterizing virulence determinants, and differentiating a pathogen from a colonizer, supporting targeted clinical management.
authors: Radu Ovidiu Togănel, Razvan Lucian Coșeriu, Anca Delia Mare, Camelia Vintilă, Ioan-Ovidiu Sîrbu, Aimée Rodica Chis, Cristina Elena Gîrbovan, Adrian Man

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了从非霍奇金淋巴瘤患者耳道分泌物中分离出的罕见病原体副溶血性弧菌的诊断过程。通过传统和现代实验室方法确认了该菌种，并发现其耐药性突变与临床表现相关。
ai.translation: 背景/目的：常规识别常见细菌病原体通常高效，利用标准化、成本效益高的方法。然而，当处理罕见或意外的微生物时，诊断过程会显著复杂化，尤其是在这些微生物可能被视为定植菌的情况下。方法：本研究介绍了从一名患有持续性外耳炎的非霍奇金淋巴瘤患者耳道分泌物中分离出的罕见病原体副溶血性弧菌的诊断细节，并探讨了通过传统和现代实验室方法进行鉴定的过程。连续的耳道分泌物培养结果得到表型相似但基因组不同的副溶血性弧菌分离株。我们结合了传统方法，如常规培养（在哥伦比亚琼脂和CLED琼脂上）、Vitek2 Compact鉴定、以及根据EUCAST版本12.0指南进行的EUCAST盘扩散抗菌药物敏感性测试，同时使用了MALDI-TOF质谱和Illumina/Nanopore全基因组测序。通过PeGAS管道、Unicycler和1928Diagnostics SNP分析进行了基因组的比较分析。结果：Vitek2分析将两个分离株均鉴定为副溶血性弧菌，置信度为99%，并且这一结果得到了MALDI-TOF MS结果的支持。第一个分离株（A）对所有测试的抗生素均敏感，而第二个（B）对环丙沙星表现出耐药性。全基因组测序显示，分离株A和B分别与副溶血性弧菌参考基因组的核苷酸同源性为99.23%和98.60%，两者之间的匹配度为99.8%。分离株B获得了gyrA（c.1870C>T）突变，这与环丙沙星耐药性（MIC > 0.5 mg/L）相关。两个基因组均携带hlyA（溶血素）、toxR（霍乱毒素调节因子）等基因，这些基因涉及生物膜形成（rpoN、relA、spoT、opp）、luxS（运动性）、proA、vacB（毒力因子）以及tet(34)（氧四环素耐药性）。核心基因组SNP距离<100表明其克隆相关性。我们整合的（表型和基因组）诊断方法确认了副溶血性弧菌，并记录了宿主耐药性进化，其毒力谱可能解释了临床演变。结论：本案例突显了分子方法在确认物种身份、检测耐药性标记、表征毒力决定因子以及区分病原体与定植菌方面的实用性，支持了针对性的临床管理。

title: Molecular landscape of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus strains in clinical infections from hospitals in Lagos, Nigeria.
abstract:
BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVES: Multidrug-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) accounts for a significant proportion of antimicrobial resistance (AMR)-associated infections worldwide. This study investigated the molecular profile of MRSA in Nigeria, providing valuable genomic data to fill existing knowledge gaps and highlighting its importance in the context of the global AMR crisis.

METHODS: A total of 107 isolates were obtained from patient samples, including wound swabs/pus (65 isolates, 60.7%), blood cultures (16 isolates, 15%), urine/urinary catheter (8 isolates, 7.5%) and other sources. Species identification was performed using MALDI-TOF, and antimicrobial susceptibility testing was performed using the VITEK®2 system. Genomic DNA was extracted and subjected to whole-genome sequencing using short-read Illumina technology. In addition, a subset of isolates underwent long-read sequencing using Oxford Nanopore technology.

RESULTS: Among the 107 isolates, 63 (59%) were identified as MRSA, with 58 (92%) carrying the mecA gene. The MRSA isolates exhibited high resistance to non-β-lactam antibiotics, particularly trimethoprim/sulfamethoxazole (95.3%), erythromycin (76.6%), gentamicin (71.4%) and quinolones (69.8%). The most prevalent MRSA belonged to the Bengal Bay clone [t657/ST772/Staphylococcal Cassette Chromosome mec (SCCmec) V(5C2)/Panton-Valentine leukocidin (PVL) + methicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA)], followed by t4690/ST152/SCCmec Vc(5C2&5)/PVL + MRSA and ST8 (t008, n = 1; t064, n = 4)/SCCmec Vc(5C2&5). Phylogenetic analysis suggests both community/associated transmission and possible importation of strains.

CONCLUSIONS: This study highlights the significant burden of MRSA in Nigeria, with the high-risk Bengal Bay MRSA clone as the most common strain. The widespread resistance to non-β-lactam antibiotics underscores the urgent need for enhanced surveillance, infection control and antibiotic stewardship to mitigate its spread.
authors: Adesola Olalekan, Sébastien Boutin, Christopher Mark Watson, Luiza Galarion, Solayide Adesida, Bamidele Iwalokun, Olayiwola Popoola, Seraphine Esemu, Richard Adegbola, Dennis Nurjadi

ai.TLDR: 该研究探讨了尼日利亚MRSA的分子特征，发现其对非β-内酰胺类抗生素具有高耐药性，且Bengal Bay克隆是主要流行株。研究强调了加强监测、感染控制和抗生素管理的紧迫性。
keywords: 非β-内酰胺类抗生素耐药性
ai.translation:
背景与目的：多重耐药金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSA）在全球范围内是与抗微生物耐药性（AMR）相关感染的重要组成部分。本研究调查了尼日利亚MRSA的分子特征，提供了有价值的基因组数据以填补现有知识空白，并强调其在全球AMR危机中的重要性。

方法：总共获得了107株分离物，包括伤口拭子/脓液（65株，60.7%）、血液培养（16株，15%）、尿液/尿管（8株，7.5%）及其他来源。使用MALDI-TOF进行种属鉴定，使用VITEK®2系统进行抗菌药物敏感性测试。提取基因组DNA并使用短读长的Illumina技术进行全基因组测序。此外，部分分离物使用Oxford Nanopore技术进行长读长测序。

结果：在107株分离物中，63株（59%）被鉴定为MRSA，其中58株（92%）携带mecA基因。MRSA分离物对非β-内酰胺类抗生素表现出高度耐药性，特别是甲氧苄啶/磺胺甲噁唑（95.3%）、红霉素（76.6%）、庆大霉素（71.4%）和喹诺酮类（69.8%）。最常见的MRSA属于Bengal Bay克隆[t657/ST772/Staphylococcal Cassette Chromosome mec (SCCmec) V(5C2)/Panton-Valentine leukocidin (PVL) + methicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA)]，其次是t4690/ST152/SCCmec Vc(5C2&5)/PVL + MRSA和ST8 (t008, n = 1; t064, n = 4)/SCCmec Vc(5C2&5)。系统发育分析表明存在社区/相关传播以及可能的菌株输入。

结论：本研究突显了MRSA在尼日利亚的显著负担，其中高风险的Bengal Bay MRSA克隆是最常见的菌株。对非β-内酰胺类抗生素的广泛耐药性强调了加强监测、感染控制和抗生素管理的紧迫性，以遏制其传播。

title: Advances of nanopore sensors toward virus detection and diagnostic applications.
abstract: With the advantages of ultra-sensitivity and high throughput, nanopore technology has now evolved into a versatile tool for a wide range of practical applications, including genomic sequencing, proteomic analysis, and detection of various infectious and noninfectious diseases using biomarkers. Especially for infectious diseases, the rapid diagnosis of pathogenic microorganisms is a critical prerequisite for pandemic control and treatment. It is well known that the whole-genome sequences of some pandemic viruses have been accomplished to provide a high-resolution view of pathogen surveillance. This article reviews the progress of nanopore sensors towards virus detection and clinical applications, focusing on innovative strategies aimed at enhancing the detection efficiency. Intrinsically, the nanopore allows the single-molecule counting of viruses in nanofluidic channels. Some nucleic acid and protein components of the viruses are also potential target candidates for virus detection. Meanwhile, a variety of molecular probes involving aptamers, nucleic acids, peptides and nanoparticles have been designed to improve the detection sensitivity of target viruses. The stochastic sensing mode of nanopores further simplifies the conventional testing process, focusing on the rapid and qualitative identification of multiplex viruses, making it more feasible for portable, point-of-care diagnostics.
authors: Lingzhi Wu, Ke Qi, Wentao Yang, Guohao Xi, Jie Ma, Jing Tu

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术凭借超高灵敏度和高通量优势，已成为基因组测序、蛋白质组分析及多种传染病和非传染病检测的多功能工具。该技术在病毒检测和临床应用中展现出显著潜力，尤其在快速诊断病原微生物方面对疫情控制至关重要。
ai.translation: 凭借超高灵敏度和高通量的优势，纳米孔技术现已发展成为一种多功能工具，广泛应用于各种实际场景，包括基因组测序、蛋白质组分析以及利用生物标志物检测各种传染性和非传染性疾病。特别是在传染病领域，病原微生物的快速诊断是疫情控制和治疗的关键前提。众所周知，一些流行病毒的全基因组序列已被完成，为病原体监测提供了高分辨率的视角。本文综述了纳米孔传感器在病毒检测和临床应用中的进展，重点介绍了旨在提高检测效率的创新策略。本质上，纳米孔技术允许在纳米流体通道中对病毒进行单分子计数。一些病毒的核酸和蛋白质成分也是病毒检测的潜在目标候选物。同时，涉及适配体、核酸、肽和纳米颗粒等多种分子探针已被设计出来，以提高目标病毒的检测灵敏度。纳米孔的随机传感模式进一步简化了传统的检测流程，专注于多重病毒的快速和定性识别，使其更适用于便携式、即时检测（point-of-care diagnostics）。

title: PACLseq: A Standalone Diagnostic Method for Ph-Like Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia Using Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract: Timely and accurate detection of Philadelphia chromosome-like acute lymphoblastic leukemia (Ph-like ALL)-related fusion gene is essential for treatment decisions. However, due to the complexity of possible gene fusion combinations of Ph-like ALL, current diagnostic workflows face critical limitations: prolonged turnaround (7-14 days), high costs, and deficiency in degraded specimens. In this study, we introduce Partial Anchored Capture and Long-Read Sequencing (PACLseq), a nanopore-sequencing-technology-based approach. We designed a detection panel associated with Ph-like ALL, specifically ABL2, CSF1R, PDGFRB, JAK2, ABL1, EPOR, and CRLF2 as target genes. Validated on 47 clinical samples, PACLseq achieved 93.3% sensitivity and 100% specificity in 26 degraded RNA samples (RIN > 3). Crucially, PACLseq maintained detection accuracy in nine low-RIN samples (RIN ≤ 3) with fragmented transcripts. The method requires only 10 ng of RNA input, delivers results in 3 days (vs. 7-14 days for conventional methods), and reduces costs by 50%. By offering rapid and accurate fusion detection, PACLseq has the potential to significantly improve diagnostic efficiency, facilitate timely treatment decisions, and enhance patient outcomes in the management of Ph-like ALL.
authors: Hang Zhang, Huan Yu, Yanmei Chen, Kai Jiang, Beibei Huo, Jialin Li, Ting Liu, Dan Xie

ai.TLDR: Ph-like ALL相关融合基因的及时准确检测对治疗决策至关重要。然而，由于Ph-like ALL可能的基因融合组合复杂，现有诊断流程存在周转时间长、成本高和降解样本处理能力不足等问题。本研究提出了一种基于纳米孔测序技术的PACLseq方法，显著提高了检测效率和准确性。
ai.translation: 及时且准确地检测Philadelphia chromosome-like急性淋巴细胞白血病（Ph-like ALL）相关的融合基因对治疗决策至关重要。然而，由于Ph-like ALL可能的基因融合组合复杂，当前的诊断流程面临关键限制：周转时间较长（7-14天）、成本高昂以及在降解样本中的处理能力不足。在本研究中，我们引入了一种基于纳米孔测序技术的Partial Anchored Capture and Long-Read Sequencing（PACLseq）方法。我们设计了一个与Ph-like ALL相关的检测面板，具体包括ABL2、CSF1R、PDGFRB、JAK2、ABL1、EPOR和CRLF2作为目标基因。该方法在47个临床样本中得到验证，在26个降解RNA样本（RIN > 3）中实现了93.3%的灵敏度和100%的特异性。关键的是，PACLseq在9个低RIN样本（RIN ≤ 3）中仍能保持检测准确性，这些样本中的转录本碎片化严重。该方法仅需10 ng的RNA输入，可在3天内出结果（相比传统方法的7-14天），并使成本降低50%。通过提供快速且准确的融合基因检测，PACLseq有望显著提高诊断效率，促进及时的治疗决策，并改善Ph-like ALL管理中的患者预后。

title: Research note: Emergence of blaNDM-13 producing Escherichia coli from a broiler chicken and farm environment in Jiangsu Province, China.
abstract: Carbapenem-resistant bacteria, in particular NDM-producing Enterobacteriaceae, have become a great threat to the global public. The blaNDM-13 is a novel blaNDM variant with increasing dydrolytic activity against cefotaxime. This study aimed to investigate the molecular characteristics of blaNDM-13-positive E. coli in a chicken farm located in Jiangsu Province of China. Six blaNDM-13-positive E. coli strains were isolated from 83 samples, including cloacal samples (n = 4), cages (n = 1), and water dispensers (n = 1). Antimicrobial susceptibility testing showed that these isolates exhibited pan-resistance to β-lactams (meropenem MIC≥32 μg/mL), colistin, and six other antibiotic classes, retaining susceptibility only to tigecycline. Illumina sequencing showed that isolates harbored multiple resistance genes, with fosA3, aph(3')-IIa, oqxA, oqxB, and aph(6)-Id being present in all strains. Notably, blaCTX-M-65 (extended-spectrum β-lactamase), mcr-1.1 (colistin resistance), and qacE (disinfectant genes) were detected in 50 %, 66.67 %, and 66.67 % of blaNDM-13-positive E. coli strains, respectively. MLST classified the isolates into ST155 (n = 3), ST93 (n = 2), and ST1158 (n = 1), with blaNDM-13-positive ST155 E. coli isolates found to be horizontal transmission between chicken and environmental surface samples. Three representative isolates were subjected to Nanopore long-read sequencing; the blaNDM-13 was located on the IncFII plasmid, which showed high homology with clinical (pB5-1) and poultry-derived plasmids (YZLc23-1-NDM-13-96k), harboring conserved resistance gene clusters (IS91-blaNDM-13-bleMBL-IS50R-aph(3')-IIa-IS26-IS6-fosA3), and confirmed horizontal transfer via conjugation. The conjugants were stably inherited after 15 days of passage and exhibited no significant differences in growth rates when compared to E. coli J53. This study identifies blaNDM-13-carrying multidrug-resistant E. coli clones in poultry production systems, transmitted via poultry-environment interactions and plasmid-mediated gene transfer. Farm-level surveillance targeting high-risk transmission routes is essential to control antimicrobial resistance and protect poultry health.
authors: Mengjun Tang, Qian Zhou, Xiaoyan Zhang, Xiujun Tang, Junxian Lu, Yushi Gao

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现携带blaNDM-13的多重耐药大肠杆菌在江苏鸡场中广泛存在，通过禽类与环境之间的交互传播。研究通过宏基因组测序和质粒分析，揭示了blaNDM-13的传播机制及耐药基因簇的分布。
ai.translation: 碳青霉烯类耐药细菌，特别是产生NDM的肠杆菌科细菌，已成为全球公共卫生的重大威胁。blaNDM-13是一种新型的blaNDM变异体，其对头孢他啶的水解活性逐渐增强。本研究旨在调查中国江苏省某鸡场中携带blaNDM-13的大肠杆菌的分子特征。从83个样本中分离出6株携带blaNDM-13的大肠杆菌，包括泄殖腔样本（n = 4）、鸡舍（n = 1）和饮水器（n = 1）。抗菌药物敏感性测试显示，这些菌株对β-内酰胺类（美罗培南MIC≥32 μg/mL）、多粘菌素和六类其他抗生素表现出全耐药性，仅对替加环素保持敏感。Illumina测序显示，这些菌株携带多种耐药基因，其中fosA3、aph(3')-IIa、oqxA、oqxB和aph(6)-Id在所有菌株中均存在。值得注意的是，blaCTX-M-65（广谱β-内酰胺酶）、mcr-1.1（多粘菌素耐药）和qacE（消毒剂基因）分别在50%、66.67%和66.67%的blaNDM-13阳性大肠杆菌菌株中被检测到。MLST将这些菌株分为ST155（n = 3）、ST93（n = 2）和ST1158（n = 1），其中blaNDM-13阳性ST155大肠杆菌菌株被发现通过鸡与环境样本之间的水平传播。选取三株代表性菌株进行Nanopore长读长测序；blaNDM-13位于IncFII质粒上，该质粒与临床（pB5-1）和禽源质粒（YZLc23-1-NDM-13-96k）高度同源，携带保守的耐药基因簇（IS91-blaNDM-13-bleMBL-IS50R-aph(3')-IIa-IS26-IS6-fosA3），并通过接合确认了水平转移。接合子在15天传代后稳定遗传，并与大肠杆菌J53相比，生长速率无显著差异。本研究识别了在禽类生产系统中携带blaNDM-13的多重耐药大肠杆菌克隆，其通过禽类与环境之间的交互及质粒介导的基因转移传播。针对高风险传播途径的农场级监测对于控制抗生素耐药性和保护禽类健康至关重要。

title: E2-regulated transcriptome complexity revealed by long-read direct RNA sequencing: from isoform discovery to truncated proteins.
abstract: Oestrogen receptor alpha (ERα)-positive (ER+) breast cancers are driven by the binding of 17β-oestradiol (E2) to ERα, which transcriptionally regulates target genes. Although microarrays and conventional RNA sequencing have identified E2 target genes, pre-designed probes and short read lengths are limited in their ability to accurately capture complex transcript structures. Long-read sequencing offers a solution by spanning entire transcripts, providing a more complete view of the transcriptome. Here, we employed nanopore long-read direct RNA sequencing (DRS) complemented with 3'-end sequencing, in vitro experiments, and deep learning-based protein modelling to explore the landscape of the E2-responsive transcriptome and protein level implications. Our analysis revealed a range of E2-responsive non-coding and coding isoforms, including intronically polyadenylated (IPA) mRNAs. One of these IPA isoforms was detected for TLE1, which assists ERα-chromatin interactions for a subset of E2 targets. The IPA isoform produces a C-terminus truncated protein that lacks the WDR interaction domain but retains dimerization/tetramerization capacity through its intact N-terminal Q-domain. Structural modelling and protein-based assays confirmed the dimerization potential and nuclear localization of the truncated protein. Functional assays showed that the overexpression of truncated TLE1 reduced the E2-induced upregulation of TFF1 and GREB1, E2-responsive genes, thereby disrupting transcriptional regulation. Importantly, a lower IPA isoform ratio is associated with worse survival in ER+ breast cancers, highlighting clinical relevance. Our study revealed new layers of complexity in the E2-regulated transcriptome, providing insights into truncated proteins. These findings contribute to a deeper understanding of gene regulation and may help the development of new therapeutic strategies.
authors: Didem Naz Dioken, Ibrahim Ozgul, Irem Yilmazbilek, Elanur Almeric, Irem Cemile Eroglu, Mustafa Cicek, Utku Cem Yilmaz, Deniz Karagozoglu, Esra Cicek, Ezgi Karaca, Tolga Can, Ayse Elif Erson-Bensan

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术揭示了雌激素受体α（ERα）阳性乳腺癌中E2响应的转录组和蛋白层面的复杂性。研究发现了一些非编码和编码的异构体，其中一种内含子多聚腺苷酸化（IPA）异构体的截断蛋白影响了E2响应基因的表达，具有临床意义。
ai.translation: 雌激素受体α（ERα）阳性（ER+）乳腺癌是由17β-雌二醇（E2）与ERα结合所驱动的，这种结合通过转录调控靶基因。尽管微阵列和传统RNA测序已识别出E2靶基因，但预设探针和短读长限制了其准确捕捉复杂转录结构的能力。长读长测序通过跨越整个转录本，提供了更完整的转录组视图。在此，我们采用纳米孔长读长直接RNA测序（DRS）结合3'-端测序、体外实验和基于深度学习的蛋白质建模，探索E2响应的转录组和蛋白层面的影响。我们的分析揭示了一系列E2响应的非编码和编码异构体，包括内含子多聚腺苷酸化（IPA）mRNA。其中一种IPA异构体被检测到TLE1，它有助于ERα与染色质的相互作用，针对E2靶基因的一部分。IPA异构体产生一个C端截断的蛋白，缺乏WDR相互作用结构域，但通过其完整的N端Q结构域保留了二聚化/四聚化能力。结构建模和基于蛋白质的实验确认了截断蛋白的二聚化潜力和核定位。功能实验显示，截断TLE1的过表达减少了E2诱导的TFF1和GREB1（E2响应基因）的上调，从而破坏了转录调控。重要的是，较低的IPA异构体比例与ER+乳腺癌较差的生存率相关，突出了其临床意义。我们的研究揭示了E2调控转录组的新复杂层次，提供了对截断蛋白的见解。这些发现有助于更深入地理解基因调控，并可能有助于新治疗策略的开发。

title: ARID1A gene variants and fetal hydrocephalus: First evidence of mRNA decay escape.
abstract: Germline variants in ARID1A have been associated with the so-called BAFopathies, including Coffin-Siris syndrome, which is characterized by hypertrichosis, short fifth finger, thin upper lip, and thick lower lip, is associated with a unique episignature. Hydrocephalus has not been considered part of BAFopathy until recently, when ARID1A variants were implicated in prenatal-onset hydrocephalus. It remains unknown whether ARID1A-associated hydrocephalus is linked to a specific class of variants and whether it exhibits an episignature comparable to that of BAFopathies. We conducted genomic and epigenomic analyses on a fetus diagnosed with severe hydrocephalus on prenatal ultrasound at 19 weeks. After detailed genetic counseling, the pregnancy was terminated at 21 weeks. The delivered fetus exhibited short fifth fingers, thin upper lip, and thick lower lip. Postmortem exome sequencing using umbilical cord blood identified a de novo heterozygous frameshift variant in the last exon of ARID1A (NM_006015.6:c.5259_5262dupGTCT, p.(Ser1755Valfs*2)). The frameshift variant in the last exon was expected to escape nonsense-mediated mRNA decay (NMD), and we did confirm this through RNA-seq. Concurrent episignature analysis by nanopore sequencing and a support vector machine-based classifier showed that the fetus maps to the BAFopathy group rather than a separate position on the UMAP. Genotype-phenotype correlation analysis of unpublished data from previous reports regarding hydrocephalus and potential NMD escape, with input from the original authors, indicated that the association remains ambiguous. Hence, ARID1A-associated hydrocephalus occurs within the broader clinical and epigenomic spectrum of BAFopathies, but a distinct genetic mechanism caused by NMD escape is unlikely to play a role.
authors: Yuya Tanaka, Mamiko Yamada, Fuyuki Miya, Toshimitsu Otani, Yoshifumi Kasuga, Hisato Suzuki, Noboru Inagaki, Susan M White, Mamoru Tanaka, Kenjiro Kosaki

ai.TLDR: ARID1A基因变异与BAFopathy相关疾病有关，如Coffin-Siris综合征，其特征包括多毛、第五指短、上唇薄和下唇厚。最近发现ARID1A变异与先天性脑积水有关，但其是否与特定变异类型或表观特征相关尚不清楚。本研究通过基因组和表观组分析，发现一个新发的ARID1A移码变异，该变异可能逃逸无义介导的mRNA降解（NMD），并显示该胎儿属于BAFopathy组。
ai.translation: ARID1A基因的体细胞变异已被关联到所谓的BAFopathy（BAF复合体相关疾病），包括Coffin-Siris综合征，其特征包括多毛、第五指短、上唇薄和下唇厚，并且与独特的表观特征（episignature）相关。脑积水（hydrocephalus）尚未被纳入BAFopathy的范畴，直到最近发现ARID1A变异与先天性脑积水有关。目前尚不清楚ARID-1A相关的脑积水是否与特定类型的变异相关，以及是否表现出与BAFopathy相似的表观特征。我们对一名在产前超声检查中被诊断为严重脑积水的胎儿进行了基因组和表观组分析。在详细遗传咨询后，妊娠在21周时终止。出生的胎儿表现出第五指短、上唇薄和下唇厚。通过脐带血进行的死后外显子组测序发现了ARID1A最后一个外显子中的新发杂合移码变异（NM_006015.6:c.5259_5262dupGTCT, p.(Ser1755Valfs*2)）。该移码变异预计会逃逸无义介导的mRNA降解（NMD），并通过RNA-seq验证了这一点。通过纳米孔测序和基于支持向量机（SVM）的分类器进行的并发表观特征分析显示，该胎儿属于BAFopathy组，而不是UMAP图谱上的独立位置。通过与之前关于脑积水和潜在NMD逃逸的未发表数据的基因型-表型相关性分析，并结合原始作者的输入，表明这种关联仍不明确。因此，ARID1A相关的脑积水发生在BAFopathy更广泛的临床和表观组谱系中，但由NMD逃逸引起的独特遗传机制不太可能起作用。

title: An NGS-assisted diagnostic workflow for culture-independent detection of bloodstream pathogens and prediction of antimicrobial resistances in sepsis.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Timely and accurate identification of bloodstream pathogens is critical for targeted antimicrobial therapy in sepsis. Conventional blood cultures remain the Standard-of-Care (SoC) for pathogen identification but are limited by low sensitivity and prolonged turnaround times, hampering timely and targeted antimicrobial stewardship. Advances in next-generation sequencing (NGS) offer potential for culture-independent, rapid, and comprehensive detection of pathogens and prediction of antimicrobial resistance. This study evaluated the diagnostic performance of PISTE™ technology, an NGS-based diagnostic workflow combining full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing and metagenomic analysis for the diagnosis of circulating bacteria in sepsis.

METHODS: In this prospective, multicenter, phase IIa proof-of-concept study, adult patients with suspected sepsis were enrolled from four hospitals in Athens, Greece. Blood samples were collected prior to antibiotic initiation and processed using SoC cultures and PISTE platform. PISTE integrates automated DNA purification (KingFisher, Thermo Fisher Scientific), full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing, metagenomics analysis (SQK-PRB114.24, Oxford Nanopore Technologies), and real-time sequencing using Oxford Nanopore GridION Mk1b device. A dedicated analysis pipeline was developed for accurate pathogen detection and prediction of antimicrobial resistance profiles. The primary endpoint was the diagnostic concordance between PISTE and SoC cultures.

RESULTS: A total of 100 patients (median age 79 years, median Charlson's Comorbidity Index 5) were enrolled. Of these, 71 patients met Sepsis-3 criteria. In this subgroup, PISTE showed an overall accuracy of 95.7%, with a sensitivity of 91.7%, specificity of 96.5%, positive predictive value of 84.6%, and negative predictive value of 98.2% compared to SoC. The median time to pathogen identification and Antimicrobial Susceptibility Testing (AST) with PISTE was 12.0 hours, significantly faster than in SoC cultures (30.4 hours, p < 0.0001). Resistance gene profiling showed strong agreement with SoC AST results, particularly for β-lactam and carbapenem resistance.

CONCLUSIONS: PISTE technology exhibited high diagnostic accuracy and significantly reduced turnaround time compared to conventional cultures, supporting its potential as a short turnaround time and reliable diagnostic tool for bloodstream infections. Further optimization and validation in larger cohorts are warranted to enhance clinical implementation and improve antimicrobial stewardship in sepsis management.
authors: David Pinzauti, Manuele Biazzo, Christine Podrini, Antonia Alevizou, Asimina Safarika, Georgia Damoraki, Panagiotis Koufargyris, Elisavet Tasouli, Ilias Skopelitis, Garyfallia Poulakou, Styliani Sympardi, Evangelos J Giamarellos-Bourbolis

ai.TLDR: 及时准确识别血流病原体对脓毒症的靶向抗菌治疗至关重要。传统血培养仍是病原体识别的标准方法，但存在灵敏度低和周转时间长的问题。本研究评估了基于NGS的PISTE™技术的诊断性能，该技术结合全长16S rRNA基因测序和宏基因组分析，用于脓毒症循环细菌的诊断。结果显示，PISTE在诊断准确性和周转时间方面均优于传统方法。
ai.translation:
背景：及时且准确地识别血流病原体对脓毒症的靶向抗菌治疗至关重要。传统血培养仍是病原体识别的标准方法（Standard-of-Care, SoC），但其存在灵敏度低和周转时间长的局限性，阻碍了及时且针对性的抗菌治疗管理。下一代测序（Next-Generation Sequencing, NGS）技术的进步为无培养、快速且全面的病原体检测以及抗菌药物耐药性的预测提供了潜力。本研究评估了PISTE™技术的诊断性能，该技术是一种基于NGS的诊断流程，结合全长16S rRNA基因测序和宏基因组分析，用于脓毒症循环细菌的诊断。

方法：本研究是一项前瞻性、多中心、IIa期概念验证研究，从希腊雅典的四家医院招募了疑似脓毒症的成年患者。在开始抗生素治疗前采集血液样本，并使用SoC培养和PISTE平台进行处理。PISTE整合了自动化DNA纯化（KingFisher，Thermo Fisher Scientific）、全长16S rRNA基因测序、宏基因组分析（SQK-PRB114.24，Oxford Nanopore Technologies）以及使用Oxford Nanopore GridION Mk1b设备进行实时测序。开发了一个专用的分析流程，以准确检测病原体并预测抗菌药物耐药性谱。主要终点是PISTE与SoC培养之间的诊断一致性。

结果：共纳入100名患者（中位年龄79岁，中位Charlson合并症指数5）。其中71名患者符合Sepsis-3标准。在该亚组中，PISTE的总体准确率为95.7%，敏感性为91.7%，特异性为96.5%，阳性预测值为84.6%，阴性预测值为98.2%（与SoC相比）。使用PISTE进行病原体识别和抗菌药物敏感性试验（Antimicrobial Susceptibility Testing, AST）的中位周转时间为12.0小时，显著快于SoC培养（30.4小时，p < 0.0001）。耐药基因谱分析显示与SoC AST结果高度一致，尤其是β-内酰胺类和碳青霉烯类耐药性。

结论：PISTE技术表现出高诊断准确性和显著缩短的周转时间，相较于传统培养方法，支持其作为血流感染快速、可靠的诊断工具的潜力。进一步优化和在更大队列中的验证是必要的，以促进临床应用并改善脓毒症管理中的抗菌治疗管理。

title: The Full-Length Genomic Sequence of the HLA-DPA1*02:103 Allele Was Identified Using Oxford Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract: The sequence of HLA-DPA1*02:103 was identified using Oxford Nanopore sequencing in a Chinese kidney transplant patient.
authors: Gang Li, Junjie Xie, Yuan Yao, Rong Chen, Junsheng Ye

ai.TLDR: 研究利用Oxford Nanopore测序技术识别了一位中国肾移植患者的HLA-DPA1*02:103序列。该方法为HLA分型提供了高精度的解决方案。
ai.translation: 利用Oxford Nanopore测序技术，在一位中国肾移植患者中识别出了HLA-DPA1*02:103序列。

title: Human Papilloma Virus Infection and Vaginal Microbiome Profiles in Pre-menopausal Women: A Cross-Sectional Study.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Cervical cancer is a common cancer among women worldwide, especially in low- and middle-income countries. Persistent infection with high-risk human papillomavirus (HR-HPV) largely drives the development of cervical cancer. While Lactobacillus-dominant communities are considered protective, dysbiosis, marked by reduced Lactobacilli and increased anaerobic diversity (community state type (CST)-IV), may promote viral persistence. This study aims to assess HR-HPV prevalence and compare vaginal microbiome profiles in women with suspected HPV infection and healthy controls.

MATERIAL AND METHODS: Vaginal swabs were collected from pre-menopausal women with clinically suspected HPV infection and healthy controls. Samples underwent HR-HPV detection using the Truenat® HPV-HR RT-PCR (real-time polymerase chain reaction) assay (Molbio Diagnostics Limited, Goa, India). Vaginal microbiome profiling was performed using 16S rRNA gene amplicon sequencing on the GridION platform (Oxford Nanopore Technologies plc, Oxford, United Kingdom). Taxonomic classification was carried out using the EPI2ME 16S workflow with Kraken2 (Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, Maryland, United States), and CSTs were assigned using the VALENCIA (VAginaL community state typE Nearest CentroId clAssifier) algorithm. Statistical analyses and microbial community comparisons were performed using MicrobiomeAnalyst (Xia Lab, Sainte-Anne-de-Bellevue, Quebec, Canada).

RESULTS: A total of 86 clinically suspected HPV cases and 63 healthy pre-menopausal controls were enrolled. Overall, high-risk HPV (HPV 16/31 and HPV-18/45) was detected in 11.6% (10/86) of cases, with no positivity in the control group. Vaginal microbiome profiling revealed significantly higher alpha diversity in women with inflammatory cytology compared to healthy controls, and increased Shannon and Simpson diversity indices in HPV-positive and inflammatory groups. Beta diversity analysis showed distinct microbial clustering between all groups. Taxonomic analysis demonstrated a predominance of Lactobacillus spp. in healthy individuals, particularly Lactobacillus crispatus and Lactobacillus iners, whereas disease groups showed increased abundance of Pseudomonas, Rheinheimera, and Agrobacterium. CST-I was more common in healthy controls (7/17, 41.2%), while CST-IV-linked to dysbiosis-was predominant among suspected cases (9/21, 47.6%). Linear discriminant analysis effect size (LEfSe) analysis identified Lactobacillus, Anaerococcus, and Dialister as key genera in healthy individuals, whereas Pseudomonas, Rhizobium, and Rheinheimera were enriched in HPV-positive and inflammatory smear groups, highlighting potential microbial biomarkers of vaginal dysbiosis.

CONCLUSION: These findings underscore the importance of vaginal microbiome composition in cervical health and support further investigation into microbial biomarkers for early detection and targeted interventions in HPV-associated disease.
authors: Smriti Shende, Rashmita Das, Suvarna Joshi, Sushma Yanamandra, Nyabom Taji, Rajesh P Karyakarte

ai.TLDR: 宫颈癌是全球女性中常见的癌症，特别是在低收入和中等收入国家。高危人乳头瘤病毒（HR-HPV）的持续感染是宫颈癌发展的主要驱动因素。本研究评估了疑似HPV感染女性和健康对照组中HR-HPV的流行率，并比较了阴道微生物组的特征。结果显示，HPV阳性组和炎症组的α多样性显著增加，且CST-IV与微生物失调相关，可能作为阴道微生态紊乱的生物标志物。
ai.translation:
背景：宫颈癌是全球女性中常见的癌症，特别是在低收入和中等收入国家。持续感染高危人乳头瘤病毒（HR-HPV）是宫颈癌发展的主要驱动因素。虽然乳酸杆菌主导的微生物群被认为具有保护作用，但微生物失调（表现为乳酸杆菌减少和厌氧菌多样性增加，即社区状态类型（CST）-IV）可能促进病毒持续感染。本研究旨在评估HR-HPV的流行率，并比较疑似HPV感染女性和健康对照组的阴道微生物组特征。

材料与方法：从疑似HPV感染的绝经前女性和健康对照组中收集阴道拭子样本。使用Truenat® HPV-HR RT-PCR（实时聚合酶链反应）检测HR-HPV（Molbio Diagnostics Limited, Goa, India）。通过GridION平台（Oxford Nanopore Technologies plc, Oxford, United Kingdom）进行16S rRNA基因扩增子测序以分析阴道微生物组。使用EPI2ME 16S工作流程和Kraken2（Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, Maryland, United States）进行分类学分类，并使用VALENCIA（VAginaL community state typE Nearest CentroId clAssifier）算法分配CST。使用MicrobiomeAnalyst（Xia Lab, Sainte-Anne-de-Bellevue, Quebec, Canada）进行统计分析和微生物群落比较。

结果：共纳入86例疑似HPV感染病例和63例健康绝经前对照组。总体而言，11.6%（10/86）的病例检测到高危HPV（HPV 16/31和HPV-18/45），而对照组无阳性结果。阴道微生物组分析显示，炎症细胞学女性的α多样性显著高于健康对照组，且HPV阳性组和炎症组的香农指数和辛普森指数均显著增加。β多样性分析显示各组之间微生物群落存在显著差异。分类学分析显示健康个体中乳酸杆菌占主导地位，特别是乳酸杆菌crispatus和乳酸杆菌iners，而疾病组中假单胞菌、Rheinheimera和Agrobacterium的丰度增加。CST-I在健康对照组中更为常见（7/17, 41.2%），而与微生物失调相关的CST-IV在疑似病例中占主导地位（9/21, 47.6%）。线性判别分析效应大小（LEfSe）分析显示乳酸杆菌、Anaerococcus和Dialister是健康个体中的关键属，而假单胞菌、根瘤菌和Rheinheimera在HPV阳性组和炎症 smear 组中富集，突显了阴道微生态紊乱的潜在微生物生物标志物。

结论：这些发现强调了阴道微生物组组成在宫颈健康中的重要性，并支持进一步研究微生物生物标志物，以实现HPV相关疾病的早期检测和针对性干预。

title: Clinical translation of ctDNA epigenetic signatures in lung cancer: An integrated strategy for early detection, therapeutic guidance, and prognostic stratification.
abstract: Liquid biopsy, particularly through the analysis of circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) epigenetic signatures, is revolutionizing lung cancer management. This comprehensive review examines the pivotal role of DNA methylation, histone modifications, and non-coding RNAs in ctDNA for early detection, therapeutic monitoring, and prognostic prediction. We critically evaluate emerging technologies, including nanopore sequencing and microfluidic platforms, which address the sensitivity-specificity trade-offs inherent in current methodologies, and emphasize the imperative for standardized workflows. Through the integration of multi-omics data and single-cell epigenomics, we propose a comprehensive roadmap for clinical translation. Additionally, we discuss the ethical and regulatory challenges associated with global implementation of liquid biopsy. This review provides an in-depth analysis of the current state and future directions of ctDNA epigenetic markers in lung cancer management, offering strategic insights for optimizing detection technologies and enhancing clinical applications.
authors: Jun-Bo You, Shu-Min Shen, Jia-Hao Fan, Shuang-Shuang Zhen, Ji-Ming Sha

ai.TLDR: 液体活检，特别是通过循环肿瘤DNA（ctDNA）表观遗传特征的分析，正在革新肺癌管理。本文综述了DNA甲基化、组蛋白修饰和非编码RNA在ctDNA中的关键作用，涵盖早期检测、治疗监测和预后预测。
ai.translation: 液体活检，特别是通过循环肿瘤DNA（ctDNA）表观遗传特征的分析，正在革新肺癌管理。本文综述了DNA甲基化、组蛋白修饰和非编码RNA在ctDNA中的关键作用，涵盖早期检测、治疗监测和预后预测。我们批判性地评估了新兴技术，包括纳米孔测序和微流控平台，这些技术解决了当前方法中敏感性与特异性之间的权衡问题，并强调了标准化工作流程的必要性。通过整合多组学数据和单细胞表观基因组学，我们提出了一条全面的临床转化路线图。此外，我们讨论了液体活检在全球实施过程中涉及的伦理和监管挑战。本文提供了对ctDNA表观遗传标志物在肺癌管理中的当前状态和未来方向的深入分析，为优化检测技术和增强临床应用提供了战略见解。

title: Nanopore sequencing-derived methylation biomarker prediction for methylation-specific PCR in patients with head and neck squamous cell carcinoma.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: DNA methylation of CpG islands is altered in cancer cells. Hypermethylation of single CpG islands in the promoter regions of tumor-suppressor genes occurs already in the early stages of cancer. These methylation changes are cancer-type specific and therefore can serve as early cancer biomarker. Identifying good and reliable biomarkers is crucial for the development of diagnostic tests and their application in clinical practice and remains the most significant challenge to date.

RESULTS: Here, we present a generic workflow for the discovery and design of DNA methylation-specific PCR (MSP) biomarkers using nanopore sequencing. We show that nanopore sequencing of three control and three tumor tissue samples was sufficient to predict differentially methylated regions between head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) and healthy control tissue samples and to design functional MSP primers. When applied to a validation cohort of 48 HNSCC and 46 control samples, four out of six designed MSP singleplex assays achieved good sensitivity and specificity with an AUC above 0.8.

CONCLUSION: Our resulting DNA methylation-based workflow demonstrates how long-read methylation data enable the design of adaptable, clinically relevant epigenetic assays, even with low coverage and small initial sample numbers.
authors: Daria Meyer, Anne Hennig, Anna-Bawany Hums, Orlando Guntinas-Lichius, Martina Schmitz, Manja Marz

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化在癌症细胞中发生改变，特别是在肿瘤抑制基因的启动子区域，单个CpG岛的超甲基化可作为早期癌症生物标志物。本研究展示了一种基于纳米孔测序的通用工作流程，用于发现和设计DNA甲基化特异性PCR（MSP）生物标志物。
ai.translation:
背景：CpG岛的DNA甲基化在癌细胞中发生改变。肿瘤抑制基因启动子区域的单个CpG岛的超甲基化在癌症早期阶段就已经发生。这些甲基化变化具有癌症类型特异性，因此可以作为早期癌症生物标志物。识别良好且可靠的生物标志物对于诊断测试的开发及其在临床实践中的应用至关重要，这也是目前最具挑战性的任务。

结果：在这里，我们展示了一种通用的工作流程，用于利用纳米孔测序发现和设计DNA甲基化特异性PCR（MSP）生物标志物。我们表明，对三份对照组织和三份肿瘤组织样本进行纳米孔测序就足以预测头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）与健康对照组织样本之间的差异甲基化区域，并设计出功能性的MSP引物。当应用于包含48例HNSCC和46例对照样本的验证队列时，六种设计的MSP单plex检测中有四种表现出良好的敏感性和特异性，AUC值超过0.8。

结论：我们得出的基于DNA甲基化的流程展示了如何利用长读长甲基化数据设计出适应性强、具有临床相关性的表观遗传检测方法，即使在低覆盖度和小样本量的初始条件下也能实现。

title: The reference genome of the human diploid cell line RPE-1.
abstract: Recent technological advances have facilitated the assembly of telomere-to-telomere (T2T) genomes. The current T2T CHM13 showcases the complete architecture of the human genome, yet its use in functional experiments is limited by discrepancies with the actual genome of the specific biological system under study. Access to reference assemblies for experimentally relevant cell lines is therefore essential in advancing sequencing-based analyses and precise manipulation, particularly in highly variable regions such as centromeres. Here, we present RPE1v1.1, the near-complete diploid genome assembly of the hTERT RPE-1 cell line, a non-cancerous human retinal epithelial model with a stable karyotype. Using high-coverage Pacific Biosciences and Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-read sequencing, we generate a high-quality de novo assembly, validate it through multiple methods, and phase it by integrating high-throughput chromosome conformation capture (Hi-C) data. Our assembly includes chromosome-level scaffolds that span centromeres for all chromosomes. Comparing both haplotypes with the CHM13 genome, we detect haplotype-specific genomic variations, including the translocation between chromosome 10 and chromosome X t(X;10)(Xq28;10q21.2) characteristic of RPE-1 cells, and divergence peaking at centromeres. Altogether, the RPE1v1.1 genome provides a reference-quality diploid assembly of a widely used cell line, supporting high-precision genetic and epigenetic studies in this model system.
authors: Emilia Volpe, Alessio Colantoni, Luca Corda, Elena Di Tommaso, Franca Pelliccia, Riccardo Ottalevi, Andrea Guarracino, Danilo Licastro, Luigi Faino, Mattia Capulli, Giulio Formenti, Evelyne Tassone, Simona Giunta

ai.TLDR: RPE1v1.1 是一种近完整的二倍体基因组组装，适用于 hTERT RPE-1 细胞系，该细胞系是用于研究的非癌性人视网膜上皮模型。该基因组组装通过高覆盖率的长读长测序技术生成，并结合 Hi-C 数据进行相位分析，为高精度遗传和表观遗传研究提供了参考质量的基因组。
ai.translation: 近年来的技术进步促进了端粒到端粒（telomere-to-telomere, T2T）基因组的组装。目前的 T2T CHM13 展示了人类基因组的完整架构，但其在功能实验中的应用受到与特定生物系统实际基因组之间差异的限制。因此，获取实验相关细胞系的参考组装对于推进基于测序的分析和精确操作至关重要，尤其是在高度变异的区域如着丝粒。在此，我们介绍了 RPE1v1.1，这是 hTERT RPE-1 细胞系的近完整二倍体基因组组装，该细胞系是一种非癌性的人视网膜上皮模型，具有稳定的核型。我们利用高覆盖率的太平洋生物科学（Pacific Biosciences）和牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）长读长测序，生成高质量的从头组装，通过多种方法进行验证，并结合高通量染色体构象捕获（Hi-C）数据进行相位分析。我们的组装包括覆盖所有染色体着丝粒的染色体级 scaffold。通过将两种等位基因与 CHM13 基因组进行比较，我们检测到等位基因特异性的基因组变异，包括 RPE-1 细胞中染色体 10 与染色体 X 之间的易位（t(X;10)(Xq28;10q21.2)），以及在着丝粒区域达到峰值的分化。总体而言，RPE1v1.1 基因组为广泛使用的细胞系提供了参考质量的二倍体组装，支持在该模型系统中进行高精度的遗传和表观遗传研究。

title: Clinical and Molecular Presentation of a Patient with Paternal Uniparental Isodisomy of Chromosome 16.
abstract: Uniparental disomies (UPDs) are among the causes of imprinting disorders. Specific phenotypes of most causative UPDs have been described. Here, we describe the case of a 2-year-old female patient who presented a syndromic phenotype. Chromosomal microarray analysis revealed UPD of the whole chromosome 16. Microsatellite analysis demonstrated paternal origin of the UPD and its isodisomic pattern (UPiD (16) pat). Mosaic trisomy 16 was not detected using the FISH method. Whole-exome sequencing revealed no pathogenetic genetic variants sufficient to explain the syndromic phenotype nor unmasked pathogenic recessive genetic variants on chromosome 16. Whole-genome trio DNA sequencing revealed no additional candidate pathogenic genetic variants to those detected by whole-exome sequencing, including miRNAs and lncRNAs. Imprinting disorders at 6q24.2, 7p12.2, 7q32.2, 11p15.5, 14q32.2, 15q11.2, and 20q13.32, as well as multilocus imprinting disturbances (MLIDs), were excluded by Methylation-Specific Multiplex Ligation-Dependent Probe Amplification (MS-MLPA). At the same time, we detected abnormal hypermethylation of the ZNF597 transcription start site differentially methylated region (ZNF597:TSS-DMR), accompanied by hypomethylation of the neighbouring ZNF597:3' DMR. Both DMRs were normally imprinted, and the DNA alterations in our patient with UPD (16) pat are opposite to those previously described for maternal uniparental disomy (UPD (16) mat). To date, several cases of UPD (16) pat have been reported. Our case report describes the syndromic phenotype of a patient with paternal uniparental disomy of chromosome 16 in contrast to the previously described patients with a normal phenotype or with abnormal phenotypes caused by acquired homozygosity of pathogenic variants at autosomal recessive genes located on this chromosome. Reporting such observations will help systematize data on the phenotypes of imprinting disorders on chromosome 16.
authors: Elizaveta Panchenko, Natalia Semenova, Olga Sereda, Daria Guseva, Zhanna Markova, Nadezhda Shilova, Olga Simonova, Anton Smirnov, Dmitry Pustoshilov, Arina Khalilova, Vasilisa Udalova, Ilya Kanivets, Dmitry Zaletaev, Vladimir Strelnikov, Sergey Kutsev

ai.TLDR: 本研究描述了一例2岁女童因父源性单亲二体（UPD (16) pat）导致的综合征表型病例。通过染色体微阵列分析、微卫星分析、全外显子组测序和全基因组三联DNA测序等方法，排除了其他可能的致病因素。该病例的DNA改变与之前报道的母源性单亲二体（UPD (16) mat）相反，有助于系统化整理染色体16上的印记障碍表型。
keywords: 甲基化特异性多重连接依赖探针扩增
ai.translation: 单亲二体（UPDs）是印记障碍的原因之一。大多数致病性UPDs的特定表型已有描述。本文描述了一例2岁女童的病例，该患儿表现出综合征表型。染色体微阵列分析显示染色体16的全染色体单亲二体。微卫星分析显示该单亲二体来源于父方，并呈现等二体模式（UPiD (16) pat）。使用FISH方法未检测到染色体16的镶嵌三体。全外显子组测序未发现足以解释综合征表型的致病性遗传变异，也未发现染色体13上的致病性隐性遗传变异。全基因组三联DNA测序未发现额外的候选致病性遗传变异，包括miRNAs和lncRNAs。通过甲基化特异性多重连接依赖探针扩增（MS-MLPA）排除了6q24.2、7p12.2、7q32.2、11p15.5、14q32.2、15q11.2和20q13.32等位点的印记障碍，以及多基因印记障碍（MLIDs）。同时，我们检测到ZNF597转录起始位点差异甲基化区（ZNF597:TSS-DMR）的异常高甲基化，伴随邻近ZNF597:3' DMR的低甲基化。这两个DMR均正常印记，且该患者UPD (16) pat的DNA改变与之前报道的母源性单亲二体（UPD (16) mat）相反。截至目前，已报道了多个UPD (16) pat病例。本病例报告描述了一例染色体16父源性单亲二体患者的综合征表型，与之前报道的正常表型或由常染色体隐性基因的致病性变异获得性纯合导致的异常表型患者形成对比。报告此类观察结果有助于系统化整理染色体16上的印记障碍表型。

title: Nanopore 16S-Full Length and ITS Sequencing for Microbiota Identification in Intra-Abdominal Infections.
abstract: Background/Objectives: Intra-abdominal infections (IAIs) constitute significant clinical challenges that can rapidly progress to life-threatening conditions if not promptly diagnosed and treated. Traditional pathogen identification methodologies, predominantly culture-based, frequently necessitate extended turnaround times (TATs) and exhibit limitations in detecting polymicrobial or anaerobic infections. Methods: We implemented Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequencing to analyze the microbiota in patients with IAIs at Taichung Veterans General Hospital. The study cohort comprised sixteen patients with IAIs. Following specimen collection, DNA extraction was performed, and then full-length 16S rRNA and ITS region amplification and subsequent ONT sequencing were conducted. Results: Conventional clinical culture-based methodologies detected pathogens in 13 patients. Among the 14 successfully sequenced specimens, ONT sequencing elucidated a diverse spectrum of bacteria and fungi, with read counts ranging from 375 to 19,716. Polymicrobial and anaerobe-enriched communities were predominantly observed in lower gastrointestinal tract infections, specifically colonic or small bowel perforations, whereas upper gastrointestinal perforations, including those of the stomach or duodenum, were frequently dominated by Streptococcus, Granulicatella, or Candida species. The sequencing identified pathogens concordant with culture results, including Escherichia coli, Enterococcus, and Candida albicans. In addition, anaerobic or low-abundance taxa were exclusively identifiable through sequencing methodologies. Conclusions: ONT sequencing facilitated results within up to 24 h and successfully detected pathogens in culture-negative cases. These findings underscore the utility of ONT sequencing as an expeditious and comprehensive diagnostic modality for IAIs.
authors: Jian-Jhou Liao, Yong-Sian Chen, Hui-Chen Lin, Yi-Ju Chen, Kuo-Lung Lai, Yan-Chiao Mao, Po-Yu Liu, Han-Ni Chuang

ai.TLDR: 腹腔内感染（IAIs）是临床挑战，传统培养方法在检测多微生物或厌氧感染时存在局限。本研究采用Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序技术，快速检测IAIs患者的微生物群，结果表明ONT测序可在24小时内提供结果，并能检测到培养阴性病例中的病原体。
ai.translation: 背景/目标：腹腔内感染（IAIs）构成了重要的临床挑战，如果不能及时诊断和治疗，可能会迅速进展为危及生命的状况。传统的病原体鉴定方法，主要基于培养，通常需要较长的周转时间（TATs），并且在检测多微生物或厌氧感染时存在局限。方法：我们在台中荣民总医院对患有IAIs的患者实施了Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序，以分析其微生物群。研究队列包括16名患有IAIs的患者。在样本收集后，进行了DNA提取，然后进行全长16S rRNA和ITS区域扩增，随后进行ONT测序。结果：传统的临床培养方法在13名患者中检测到了病原体。在14个成功测序的样本中，ONT测序揭示了多种细菌和真菌，读数范围从375到19,716。多微生物和厌氧菌丰富的群落主要出现在下消化道感染中，特别是结肠或小肠穿孔，而上消化道穿孔，包括胃或十二指肠穿孔，通常由链球菌、Granulicatella或念珠菌属主导。测序识别出与培养结果一致的病原体，包括大肠杆菌、肠球菌和白色念珠菌。此外，厌氧菌或低丰度分类群只能通过测序方法识别。结论：ONT测序可在24小时内提供结果，并成功检测到培养阴性病例中的病原体。这些发现突显了ONT测序作为IAIs快速且全面诊断方法的实用性。

title: Identification of a Non-Coding Causative Variant Underlying Warsaw Breakage Syndrome Using Long-Read Based Genomic Sequencing and Transcriptome Analysis.
journal: American journal of medical genetics. Part A
abstract: Currently, exome and genome sequencing achieve a diagnostic rate of 30%-50% for rare genetic diseases. With multi-modal technologies profiling the genome, transcriptome, and epigenome, interrogation of genomic elements outside of protein-coding regions shows potential to improve this as demonstrated herein. Siblings with sensorineural hearing loss, microcephaly, intellectual impairment, and growth restriction were seen in consultation. Following extensive clinical testing, long-read whole genome and cDNA-based transcriptome sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore platform identified a homozygous 1.6 kb deletion of the 5' UTR and promoter region of DDX11, a gene associated with Warsaw breakage syndrome. The deletion included the hypomethylated CpG island regulating DDX11, led to a loss of expression of DDX11 mRNA and protein, and resulted in the characteristic "railroad chromosome." Identifying a causal variant for this family required expanding the search space for genomic variants beyond protein-coding regions, and multi-modal data integration enabled a more holistic approach to variant prioritization and classification prior to pursuing targeted protein and functional assays. This multi-modal genome-wide approach heralds promise for patients on the diagnostic odyssey and who have exhausted standard of care testing.
authors: Makenna DuBois, Katherine Dixon, Charlotte Sherlaw-Sturrock, Yaoqing Shen, Frank Probst, Lorne Clarke, Dmitry Lyalin, Cheryl Shuman, Steven Jones, Cornelius Boerkoel, Grant S Stewart, Phillip Richmond, Angela Myers

ai.TLDR: 目前，外显子组和全基因组测序在罕见遗传病的诊断中达到30%-50%的诊断率。通过多组学技术分析基因组、转录组和表观组，可以提高非蛋白质编码区域的基因组元素的检测能力。本研究通过多组学数据整合，识别出一个与Warsaw断裂综合征相关的DDX11基因的5' UTR和启动子区域的1.6 kb缺失，导致DDX11 mRNA和蛋白表达丢失，并表现出典型的'铁路染色体'表型。
ai.translation: 目前，外显子组和全基因组测序在罕见遗传病的诊断中达到30%-50%的诊断率。通过多组学技术分析基因组、转录组和表观组，可以提高非蛋白质编码区域的基因组元素的检测能力。在咨询中观察到有兄弟姐妹患有感音神经性耳聋、小头畸形、智力障碍和生长受限。经过广泛的临床检测，使用牛津纳米孔平台进行长读长全基因组和基于cDNA的转录组测序，识别出DDX11基因（与Warsaw断裂综合征相关）的5' UTR和启动子区域的1.6 kb纯合缺失。该缺失包括调控DDX11的低甲基化CpG岛，导致DDX11 mRNA和蛋白表达丢失，并表现出典型的“铁路染色体”表型。识别该家族的致病变异需要扩展基因组变异的搜索范围，超出蛋白质编码区域，并且多组学数据整合使在进行靶向蛋白和功能实验之前，能够更全面地进行变异优先级排序和分类。这种多组学全基因组方法为那些在诊断过程中经历了长期探索且已耗尽标准治疗检测的患者带来了希望。

title: Accurate and rapid single nucleotide variation detection in PCSK9 gene using nanopore sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Genetic testing is essential for disease screening, diagnosis, prognosis, and pharmacotherapy guidance. Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) offers a cost-effective platform for long-read sequencing, yet its routine use in clinical diagnostics remains under evaluation. We tested different nanopore sequencing pipelines aimed at accurately detecting single-nucleotide variants (SNV) in a gene locus spanning ⁓25 kb.

METHODS: As a proof of concept, PCSK9 was selected for its relevance to cardiovascular disease and suitable sequence structure. Twelve subjects were analyzed using different sequencing flow cells, basecalling models, and SNV calling algorithms. Sanger sequencing served as the reference for performance validation. Sequencing throughput per flow cell was also estimated.

RESULTS: The combination of super high accuracy (SUP) basecalling with Longshot variant calling demonstrated the highest performance across flow cells. MinION flow cell reached a perfect F1-score of 100%, while the more cost-effective Flongle flow cell remained a viable alternative (mean F1-score: 98.2% ± 4.2). Throughput analysis indicated that a single MinION flow cell could process up to 96 samples and ⁓40 long sequencing regions, whereas a Flongle flow cell could support sequencing of 96 samples and one long region.

CONCLUSION: The proposed nanopore-based SNV identification workflows may support the development of long-read, targeted gene panels, offering a promising tool for both diagnostic and discovery applications, particularly in multi-gene settings such as oncology and cardiology.
authors: Ilaria Massaiu, Vincenza Valerio, Valentina Rusconi, Francesca Bertolini, Donato De Giorgi, Veronika A Myasoedova, Paolo Poggio

ai.TLDR: 基因检测在疾病筛查、诊断、预后和药物治疗指导中至关重要。Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) 提供了一种成本效益高的长读长测序平台，但其在临床诊断中的常规使用仍需评估。本研究测试了不同的纳米孔测序流程，以准确检测基因位点中约25 kb范围内的单核苷酸变异 (SNV)。
ai.translation:
背景：基因检测在疾病筛查、诊断、预后和药物治疗指导中至关重要。Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) 提供了一种成本效益高的长读长测序平台，但其在临床诊断中的常规使用仍需评估。我们测试了不同的纳米孔测序流程，以准确检测基因位点中约25 kb范围内的单核苷酸变异 (SNV)。

方法：作为概念验证，选择PCSK9，因其与心血管疾病的相关性及适合的序列结构。使用不同的测序流细胞、碱基调用模型和SNV调用算法分析了12名受试者。Sanger测序作为性能验证的参考。同时估计了每个流细胞的测序通量。

结果：超级高精度 (SUP) 碱基调用与Longshot变异调用的组合在流细胞中表现出最佳性能。MinION流细胞达到了完美的F1分数（100%），而更具成本效益的Flongle流细胞仍然是一个可行的替代方案（平均F1分数：98.2% ± 4.2%）。通量分析表明，单个MinION流细胞可处理多达96个样本和约40个长测序区域，而Flongle流细胞可支持96个样本和一个长区域的测序。

结论：所提出的基于纳米孔的SNV识别工作流程可能支持长读长、靶向基因面板的开发，为诊断和发现应用提供了有前景的工具，特别是在肿瘤学和心脏病学等多基因设置中。

title: Fluctuating DNA methylation tracks cancer evolution at clinical scale.
abstract: Cancer development and response to treatment are evolutionary processes1,2, but characterizing evolutionary dynamics at a clinically meaningful scale has remained challenging3. Here we develop a new methodology called EVOFLUx, based on natural DNA methylation barcodes fluctuating over time4, that quantitatively infers evolutionary dynamics using only a bulk tumour methylation profile as input. We apply EVOFLUx to 1,976 well-characterized lymphoid cancer samples spanning a broad spectrum of diseases and show that initial tumour growth rate, malignancy age and epimutation rates vary by orders of magnitude across disease types. We measure that subclonal selection occurs only infrequently within bulk samples and detect occasional examples of multiple independent primary tumours. Clinically, we observe faster initial tumour growth in more aggressive disease subtypes, and that evolutionary histories are strong independent prognostic factors in two series of chronic lymphocytic leukaemia. Using EVOFLUx for phylogenetic analyses of aggressive Richter-transformed chronic lymphocytic leukaemia samples detected that the seed of the transformed clone existed decades before presentation. Orthogonal verification of EVOFLUx inferences is provided using additional genetic data, including long-read nanopore sequencing, and clinical variables. Collectively, we show how widely available, low-cost bulk DNA methylation data precisely measure cancer evolutionary dynamics, and provides new insights into cancer biology and clinical behaviour.
authors: Calum Gabbutt, Martí Duran-Ferrer, Heather E Grant, Diego Mallo, Ferran Nadeu, Jacob Househam, Neus Villamor, Madlen Müller, Simon Heath, Emanuele Raineri, Olga Krali, Jessica Nordlund, Thorsten Zenz, Ivo G Gut, Elias Campo, Armando Lopez-Guillermo, Jude Fitzgibbon, Chris P Barnes, Darryl Shibata, José I Martin-Subero, Trevor A Graham

ai.TLDR: 癌症的发展和治疗反应是进化过程，但以临床有意义的尺度表征进化动态一直具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新方法EVOFLUx，基于DNA甲基化条码随时间波动，仅使用肿瘤甲基化概况即可定量推断进化动态。研究发现不同疾病类型中肿瘤生长速率、恶性年龄和表观突变率差异显著。
ai.translation: 癌症的发展和治疗反应是进化过程，但以临床有意义的尺度表征进化动态一直具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新方法EVOFLUx，基于DNA甲基化条码随时间波动，仅使用肿瘤甲基化概况即可定量推断进化动态。我们应用EVOFLU，对1,976个经过良好表征的淋巴瘤样本进行分析，涵盖广泛疾病类型，并发现初始肿瘤生长速率、恶性年龄和表观突变率在不同疾病类型之间差异显著。我们测量到在整体样本中亚克隆选择仅偶尔发生，并检测到偶尔出现的多个独立原发肿瘤。临床观察发现更具侵袭性的疾病亚型具有更快的初始肿瘤生长速率，并且进化历史在两个慢性淋巴细胞白血病系列中是强有力的独立预后因素。使用EVOFLUx对侵袭性Richter转化的慢性淋巴细胞白血病样本进行系统发育分析，发现转化克隆的起源早在呈现前数十年。通过额外的遗传数据，包括长读长纳米孔测序和临床变量，对EVOFLUx推断结果进行了正交验证。总体而言，我们展示了广泛可用且低成本的整体DNA甲基化数据如何精确测量癌症进化动态，并提供了对癌症生物学和临床行为的新见解。

title: Long-Read Sequencing of a Neurodevelopmental Disorder Patient Reveals Complex Rearrangement Involving the ARID1B Gene.
journal: American journal of medical genetics. Part A
abstract: Long-read sequencing can identify disease-causing variants that are missed by short-read sequencing. Here, we report the use of Oxford Nanopore Technology long-read sequencing to resolve a complex translocation-inversion involving the ARID1B gene in a 5-year-old male with a history of febrile seizures, intractable epilepsy, epileptic encephalopathy, and speech delay. Prior clinical genetic testing included a karyotype with a t(6;11)(q25.3;q22.3) apparently balanced translocation and a chromosomal microarray with a 1.48 Mb interstitial deletion within 4p13 that were both deemed not clinically significant, normal fragile X and Prader-Willi/Angelman DNA assays, and no significant findings on epilepsy or neurotransmitter disorders gene panels. Extensive metabolic testing was also negative. The patient was enrolled in the University of North Carolina (UNC) Genetic Determinants of Neurological and Developmental Disorders (GDNDD) study. Research short-read genome single nucleotide and structural variant analysis was negative. Subsequent identification by long-read sequencing that the translocation interrupted the ARID1B gene highlights the use of long-read sequencing to identify and resolve complex rearrangements underlying genetic disorders and may be valuable in determining the pathogenicity of unexplained balanced translocations for other genetic disorders.
authors: Tam P Sneddon, Scott A Melville, Mai Xiong, Kimberly Foss, Emma B Cardwell, Kelly Rafferty, Karen E Weck, Ana Berglind, Erin L Heinzen, Matt L Tedder, Muge Gucsavas-Calikoglu, Yael Shiloh-Malawsky, Zheng Jane Fan, Bradford C Powell, Senyene E Hunter

ai.TLDR: 长读长序列测序能够识别短读长测序无法检测到的致病变异。本文报告了一例5岁男童因复杂转位-倒位涉及ARID1B基因而引起的癫痫和发育迟缓病例，通过长读长测序揭示了该基因的异常。
ai.translation: 长读长测序能够识别短读长测序无法检测到的致病变异。在此，我们报告了使用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technology）长读长测序解决一例5岁男童的复杂转位-倒位涉及ARID1B基因的病例。该男童有发热性癫痫、难治性癫痫、癫痫性脑病和语言发育迟缓的病史。此前的临床基因检测包括染色体核型分析显示t(6;11)(q25.3;q22.3)似乎为平衡性转位，以及染色体微阵列分析显示在4p13区域存在1.48 Mb的间质性缺失，均被判定为无临床意义。此外，脆性X综合征和普拉德-威利/安格曼综合征的DNA检测结果正常，癫痫或神经递质障碍相关基因面板也未发现显著异常。广泛的代谢检测结果也为阴性。该患者被纳入北卡罗来纳大学（University of North Carolina）神经发育障碍的遗传决定因素（Genetic Determinants of Neurological and Developmental Disorders, GDNDD）研究。研究中进行的短读长测序的单核苷酸和结构变异分析结果为阴性。随后通过长读长测序发现该转位中断了ARID1B基因，这突显了长读长测序在识别和解决遗传病相关复杂重排中的应用价值，并可能对其他遗传病中未解释的平衡性转位的致病性判断具有重要意义。

title: Whole-genome sequences of Achromobacter xylosoxidans NIH-016 isolates - a set of multidrug-resistant strains collected longitudinally from the same patient.
abstract: The complete genomes of three Achromobacter xylosoxidans isolates were collected from the same patient in 2014, 2015, and 2016. NIH-016-2 is susceptible to eight antibiotics, while the other two are resistant to 11 commonly used antibiotics. Isolates were sequenced using Nanopore and Illumina short-read technologies.
authors: Pooja Acharya, Sreejana Ray, Ngoc Thien Lam, Sanchita Das, Hanh Ngoc Lam

ai.TLDR: 研究者从同一名患者中收集了三种Achromobacter xylosoxidans菌株的完整基因组，分别来自2014、2015和2016年。其中NIH-016-2菌株对八种抗生素敏感，而另外两种菌株对11种常用抗生素耐药。菌株通过Nanopore和Illumina短读长测序技术进行测序。
ai.translation: 三种Achromobacter xylosoxidans菌株的完整基因组是从同一名患者中分别于2014年、2015年和2016年收集的。NIH-016-2菌株对八种抗生素敏感，而另外两种菌株对11种常用抗生素耐药。菌株通过Nanopore和Illumina短读长测序技术进行测序。

title: IBDV-SSA, a novel molecular approach for the recovery of infectious bursal disease virus whole genomes from FTA cards.
abstract: Infectious bursal disease (IBD), a highly contagious viral disease in young chickens, poses significant economic losses due to high mortality and immunosuppression. While IBD virus (IBDV) virulence is influenced by multiple genes, whole-genome sequencing (WGS) of IBDV is crucial for defining the strain pathotype and clinical profile. Flinders Technology Associates (FTA) cards are convenient for field sample collection, but their filter paper matrix can hinder nucleic acid recovery, impacting sequencing efficiency. This study evaluated two enrichment strategies, single primer amplification (SPA) and IBDV segment-specific amplification (SSA), coupled with short-read (Illumina) and long-read (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT) sequencing platforms, to optimize IBDV whole-genome recovery from FTA cards. Illumina sequencing produced comparable raw read counts for both methods, yet IBDV-SSA samples achieved significantly higher genome mapping rates (76%) than IBDV-SPA (12%). Genome coverage analysis revealed that IBDV-SSA provided uniform read distribution across both genomic segments, ensuring complete coverage, while IBDV-SPA exhibited significant bias, with most reads mapping to segment B, and limited coverage of segment A. Importantly, IBDV-SSA also proved compatible with ONT long-read sequencing, providing complete genome coverage. Notably, IBDV-SSA coupled with short-read sequencing successfully characterized coinfections in two samples. This optimized approach using IBDV-SSA enables efficient and comprehensive WGS of IBDV from FTA cards, facilitating strain characterization, virulence prediction, and epidemiological investigations.IMPORTANCEThis research tackles a significant problem for poultry farmers: a virus called infectious bursal disease virus (IBDV) that harms young chickens, causing high death rates and economic losses. To fight it effectively, scientists need to analyze its complete genetic makeup. Traditionally, collecting and preserving IBDV field samples was challenging. Flinders Technology Associates (FTA) cards have simplified this process, but getting usable genetic material from them has been difficult. This study introduces a new genome enrichment method, IBDV segment-specific amplification (IBDV-SSA), which successfully allows for IBDV complete genome recovery from FTA cards. By using this improved approach, scientists can accurately identify virus strains, assess how harmful they are, and monitor their spread. This, in turn, helps to improve vaccines and protect flocks. IBDV-SSA is a powerful tool for outbreak surveillance, supporting the poultry industry and ensuring a stable food supply.
authors: Islam Nour, Sonsiray Álvarez-Narváez, Arun Kulkarni, Sujit K Mohanty

ai.TLDR: 传染性法氏囊病（IBD）是一种在雏鸡中高传染性的病毒性疾病，会导致高死亡率和免疫抑制，造成重大经济损失。本研究提出了一种新的基因组富集方法，即IBDV段特异性扩增（IBDV-SSA），成功从FTA卡中恢复IBDV完整基因组，有助于病毒株鉴定、致病性评估和流行病学调查。
ai.translation: 传染性法氏囊病（Infectious Bursal Disease, IBD）是一种在雏鸡中高传染性的病毒性疾病，由于高死亡率和免疫抑制，导致显著的经济损失。虽然IBD病毒（IBDV）的致病性受多个基因影响，但IBDV的全基因组测序（Whole-Genome Sequencing, WGS）对于定义病毒株的致病类型和临床特征至关重要。Flinders Technology Associates (FTA) 卡便于现场样本收集，但其滤纸基质会阻碍核酸回收，影响测序效率。本研究评估了两种富集策略，即单引物扩增（Single Primer Amplification, SPA）和IBDV段特异性扩增（IBDV Segment-Specific Amplification, SSA），结合短读长（Illumina）和长读长（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）测序平台，以优化从FTA卡中恢复IBDV全基因组。Illumina测序在两种方法中产生了可比的原始读数，但IBDV-SSA样本的基因组映射率显著高于IBDV-SPA（76% vs. 12%）。基因组覆盖分析显示，IBDV-SSA在两个基因组片段中提供了均匀的读数分布，确保了完整的覆盖，而IBDV-SPA则表现出显著的偏差，大部分读数映射到片段B，而片段A的覆盖有限。重要的是，IBDV-SSA也证明与ONT长读长测序兼容，提供了完整的基因组覆盖。值得注意的是，IBDV-SSA结合短读长测序成功鉴定了两个样本中的共感染情况。这种优化的IBDV-SSA方法使得从FTA卡中高效、全面地进行IBDV全基因组测序成为可能，有助于病毒株鉴定、致病性预测和流行病学调查。这项研究解决了养鸡场面临的重要问题：一种称为传染性法氏囊病病毒（IBDV）的病毒对雏鸡造成伤害，导致高死亡率和经济损失。为了有效应对这一问题，科学家需要分析其完整的基因组。传统上，收集和保存IBDV现场样本具有挑战性。FTA卡简化了这一过程，但从中提取可用的遗传物质一直很困难。本研究引入了一种新的基因组富集方法，即IBDV段特异性扩增（IBDV-SSA），成功从FTA卡中恢复IBDV完整基因组。通过使用这种改进的方法，科学家可以准确识别病毒株，评估其危害性，并监测其传播。这反过来有助于改进疫苗并保护鸡群。IBDV-SSA是疫情监测的强大工具，支持养鸡业并确保稳定的粮食供应。

title: Genomic insights into multidrug-resistant extraintestinal pathogenic Escherichia coli O4: H12 harboring mcr-5 and blaSHV-12 on conjugative plasmids isolated from chicken meat in Japan.
abstract:
AIMS: This study aims to investigate the genomic profile of a multidrug-resistant Escherichia coli strain, 160-11H1, co-carrying an extended-spectrum β-lactamase (ESBL) and the plasmid-mediated mobile colistin resistance gene, mcr-5.

METHODS AND RESULTS: The entire genome of the strain was sequenced using Illumina MiSeq and Oxford Nanopore platforms, and de novo assembly was performed using Unicycler. The genome size was 5 031,330 bp and comprised 5 140 coding sequences. mcr-5 and an ESBL-encoding gene, blaSHV-12, providing resistance to clinically important antimicrobials, including colistin (minimum inhibitory concentration [MIC]: 8 µg ml-1) and extended-spectrum cephalosporins (MIC: >32 µg ml-1) were detected. mcr-5 was carried on a Tn3-type transposase, being in an operon with a ChrB-domain protein and an uncharacterized major facilitator superfamily (MFS)-type transporter on a conjugative plasmid of the IncFII backbone. The blaSHV-12 gene was inserted into tniA putative transposase gene in the IncFIA/FIB/FIC multi-replicon plasmid. The strain belonged to sequence type (ST) 10, CH-type fumC11/fimH54, serotype O4: H12, and phylogroup A, and carried several virulence genes associated with heat survival, colonization, fitness, and conjugation.

CONCLUSIONS: This study presents the first identification of polymyxin-resistant E. coli co-carrying mcr-5 and ESBL genes in meat from Japan, highlighting the critical need for routine investigations of these genes within food ecosystems.
authors: Christian Xedzro, Toshi Shimamoto, Ashraf M Ahmed, Liansheng Yu, Yo Sugawara, Motoyuki Sugai, Tadashi Shimamoto

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在探讨一种同时携带扩展谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）和质粒介导的移动性黏菌素耐药基因mcr-5的多重耐药大肠杆菌株160-11H1的基因组特征。研究通过Illumina MiSeq和Oxford Nanopore平台对菌株进行全基因组测序，并发现该菌株对多种临床重要抗生素具有耐药性。
ai.translation:
研究目的：本研究旨在探讨一种多重耐药大肠杆菌株160-11H1的基因组特征，该菌株同时携带扩展谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）和质粒介导的移动性黏菌素耐药基因mcr-5。

研究方法和结果：使用Illumina MiSeq和Oxford Nanopore平台对菌株进行全基因组测序，并通过Unicycler进行从头组装。菌株的基因组大小为5,031,330 bp，包含5,140个编码序列。检测到mcr-5和一个ESBL编码基因blaSHV-12，该基因可提供对临床重要抗生素的耐药性，包括黏菌素（最小抑菌浓度[MIC]：8 µg/ml）和广谱头孢菌素（MIC：>32 µg/ml）。mcr-5位于Tn3型转座子上，并与一个ChrB结构域蛋白和一个未表征的主要促进因子超家族（MFS）型转运蛋白共同组成一个接合质粒，其质粒骨架为IncFII型。blaSHV-12基因插入到IncFIA/FIB/FIC多复制子质粒中的tniA假定转座子基因中。该菌株属于序列类型（ST）10，CH型fumC11/fimH54，血清型O4: H12，进化群A，并携带多个与热应激存活、定植、适应性和接合相关的毒力基因。

结论：本研究首次在日本肉类中鉴定出同时携带mcr-5和ESBL基因的黏菌素耐药大肠杆菌，强调了在食品生态系统中对这些基因进行常规检测的迫切需求。

title: Recent advances in techniques used in the diagnosis of lumpy skin disease: a review.
journal: Journal of veterinary diagnostic investigation : official publication of the American Association of Veterinary Laboratory Diagnosticians, Inc
abstract: Lumpy skin disease (LSD) is a viral disease that affects livestock and is caused by the lumpy skin disease virus (LSDV). An outbreak of LSD in any country can lead to acute economic damage for livestock owners. The significance of prompt and accurate diagnosis in managing this viral disease cannot be overstated. Here we review the techniques used for the detection of LSDV and its application in the diagnosis of LSD. Nucleic acid detection, including conventional PCR, quantitative real-time PCR, and high-resolution melting assays, is used most often because of its strong sensitivity and specificity. These methods are expensive and require skilled personnel. Faster but less-sensitive tests include immunoassay formats, such as ELISA, virus neutralization test, immunoperoxidase monolayer assay, and indirect fluorescent antibody test. Various serologic and molecular tests are used to distinguish virulent strains of LSDV from vaccine strains. As well, sheeppox virus, goatpox virus, and LSDV share 96-97% genetic resemblance and must be differentiated reliably. New techniques, such as loop-mediated isothermal amplification, recombinase polymerase amplification, fluorescence assays based on CRISPR-Cas12a, nanopore sequencing, and lateral flow immunoassays, provide greater sensitivity in detecting lower quantities of viral nucleic acids, making them ideal for quick and economical tests in the field.
authors: Bilal A Bhat, Fatmah M Alqahtani, Majid Alhomrani, Sheikh Adil, Walaa F Alsanie, Abdulhakeem S Alamri, Luay M Alkazmi

ai.TLDR: 牛瘟病（LSD）是一种影响牲畜的病毒性疾病，快速准确的诊断对控制该病至关重要。目前常用的检测方法包括核酸检测和免疫检测，其中核酸检测因其高灵敏度和特异性被广泛使用，但成本较高且需要专业人员。
ai.translation: 牛瘟病（LSD）是一种影响牲畜的病毒性疾病，由牛瘟病病毒（LSDV）引起。任何国家发生LSD疫情都会对牲畜饲养者造成严重的经济损失。因此，快速且准确的诊断在管理这种病毒性疾病中具有重要意义。本文综述了用于检测LSDV及其在诊断LSD中的应用技术。核酸检测，包括常规PCR、实时定量PCR和高分辨率熔解曲线分析，因其强灵敏度和特异性而被最常使用。这些方法成本较高且需要专业人员操作。更快但灵敏度较低的检测方法包括免疫检测格式，如ELISA、病毒中和试验、免疫过氧化物酶单层细胞试验和间接荧光抗体试验。各种血清学和分子学检测方法被用于区分LSDV的致病株与疫苗株。此外，牛痘病毒、山羊痘病毒与LSDV在基因上具有96-97%的相似性，必须可靠地区分。新技术，如环介导等温扩增、重组酶聚合酶扩增、基于CRISPR-Cas12a的荧光检测、纳米孔测序和侧向流动免疫检测，能够更灵敏地检测低量的病毒核酸，使其成为现场快速且经济的检测方法。

title: Prognostic value of Nanopore sequencing-based metagenomics next-generation sequencing in clinical infectious cases: A retrospective observational study.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: This study aimed to evaluate the prognostic value of metagenomic next-generation sequencing(mNGS) using Nanopore sequencing technology (NST) versus traditional culture methods in infectious disease cases.

METHODS: We conducted a retrospective, single-center observational study comparing clinical outcomes between patients and specimen types in NST group and those in culture-based control group. Cox Proportional Hazards regression and Kaplan-Meier survival analysis were conducted to evaluate the association between diagnostic strategy and 28-day mortality. To minimize bias, Propensity Score Matching (PSM) and robust multivariate Cox regression analysis were employed to control for confounding factors. Diagnostic accuracy was quantified by calculating sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), and negative predictive value (NPV).

RESULTS: The NST-based diagnosis was independently associated with a significantly reduced 28-day mortality rate, as indicated by the robust multivariate Cox regression analysis. (HR = 0.29, 95 %CI:0.09-0.91, p = 0.033). The sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV) and negative predictive value (NPV) of NST in detecting bacterium were 0.93,0.54, 0.5and 0.94, respectively. Additionally, the NST group was associated with higher Antibiotic De-escalation Rate (ADE) and reduced Duration of Therapy (DOT), with p values of 0.0238 and 0.008, respectively.

CONCLUSION: NST-based mNGS demonstrated superior performance in diagnosing bacterial infections compared to traditional culture methods. The NST group and positive pathogen detection were associated with a reduced 28-day mortality rate. Additionally, higher APACHE II scores upon admission were identified as independent predictors of worse prognosis, highlighting the importance of early severity assessment in patient outcomes.
authors: Yunqi Ji, Jing Gu, Shuang Xiao, Manna Zhao, Jie Xu, Jing Lin, Juanjuan Cui, Weifeng Zhao

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了基于Nanopore测序技术(mNGS)的宏基因组下一代测序在感染性疾病中的预后价值，相较于传统培养方法，显示出更高的诊断准确性和更低的28天死亡率。研究结果表明，基于NST的诊断策略与改善患者预后密切相关。
ai.translation:
研究目的：本研究旨在评估使用Nanopore测序技术（NST）的宏基因组下一代测序（mNGS）在感染性疾病病例中的预后价值，与传统培养方法进行比较。

研究方法：我们进行了一项回顾性、单中心的观察性研究，比较NST组和基于培养的对照组患者及样本类型之间的临床结局。采用Cox比例风险回归和Kaplan-Meier生存分析来评估诊断策略与28天死亡率之间的关联。为减少偏倚，采用倾向评分匹配（PSM）和稳健的多变量Cox回归分析来控制混杂因素。通过计算敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值（PPV）和阴性预测值（NPV）来量化诊断准确性。

研究结果：基于NST的诊断与显著降低的28天死亡率独立相关，如稳健的多变量Cox回归分析所示（HR = 0.29，95%CI: 0.09-0.91，p = 0.033）。在检测细菌时，NST的敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值（PPV）和阴性预测值（NPV）分别为0.93、0.54、0.5和0.94。此外，NST组与更高的抗生素降级率（ADE）和更短的治疗持续时间（DOT）相关，p值分别为0.0238和0.008。

研究结论：基于NST的mNGS在诊断细菌感染方面表现出优于传统培养方法的性能。NST组和阳性病原体检测与降低的28天死亡率相关。此外，入院时更高的APACHE II评分被确定为预后较差的独立预测因子，突显了早期严重程度评估在患者预后中的重要性。

title: Performance of Rapid Clonotyping of Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia Using Flongle Flow-Cell Nanopore Sequencing of IGH Rearrangements.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Clonotyping of immunoglobulin heavy chain (IGH) gene rearrangements is critical for diagnosis, prognostication, and measurable residual disease monitoring in chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL). Although short-read next-generation sequencing (NGS) platforms, such as Illumina MiSeq, are widely used, they face challenges in spanning full VDJ rearrangements. Long-read sequencing via Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) offers a potential alternative using the compact and cost-effective flow cells.

METHODS: We evaluated IGH clonotyping in samples from 13 CLL patients using ONT MinION with Flongle flow cells and super-accuracy GPU-based base calling (Dorado), comparing results to MiSeq-based LymphoTrack assays. Amplicons were generated using the IGH FR1 assay and analyzed using Smith-Waterman alignment and IgBlast tools.

RESULTS: All major and minor clonotypes identified by MiSeq were matched with 100% sequence identity using Nanopore sequencing. Clonal burden estimates were strongly correlated (Pearson ρ = 0.87, p < 10-4), although with considerable variability. Somatic hypermutation status was reliably assessed with super-accuracy base calling (Q30: 76%). Fast or CPU-only base calling was insufficient for accurate mutation analysis.

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing enables accurate and rapid IGH clonotyping in CLL, offering comparable performance to MiSeq with lower cost and laboratory footprint. This supports its potential utility in routine and decentralized hematopathology workflows.
authors: Marcus Høy Hansen, Rona Gulmir, Oriane Cédile, Sara Kamuk Dahlmann, Sólja Remisdóttir Veyhe, Magnus Stougaard, Karen Juul-Jensen, Charlotte Guldborg Nyvold

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了使用Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) MinION平台进行免疫球蛋白重链（IGH）克隆型分析在慢性淋巴细胞白血病（CLL）中的应用。结果显示，ONT测序能够准确匹配MiSeq测序结果，且具有成本效益和快速分析的优势。
ai.translation:
背景：免疫球蛋白重链（IGH）基因重排的克隆型分析（clonotyping）在慢性淋巴细胞白血病（CLL）的诊断、预后评估以及可测量残留病监测中至关重要。尽管短读长的下一代测序（NGS）平台，如Illumina MiSeq，被广泛使用，但它们在跨越完整的VDJ重排方面面临挑战。通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）的长读长测序提供了一种潜在的替代方案，其使用紧凑且成本效益高的流细胞。

方法：我们使用ONT MinION平台与Flongle流细胞以及基于GPU的超准确基底调用（Dorado）对13例CLL患者的样本进行了IGH克隆型分析，并将结果与基于MiSeq的LymphoTrack检测方法进行了比较。使用IGH FR1检测引物生成扩增子，并通过Smith-Waterman比对和IgBlast工具进行分析。

结果：通过Nanopore测序，所有由MiSeq识别的主要和次要克隆型均以100%的序列一致性匹配。克隆负担估计值与MiSeq结果高度相关（Pearson ρ = 0.87，p < 10-4），尽管存在显著的变异性。使用超准确基底调用可可靠地评估体细胞超突变状态（Q30: 76%）。快速或仅CPU的基底调用不足以进行准确的突变分析。

结论：Nanopore测序能够实现CLL中IGH克隆型的准确和快速分析，其性能与MiSeq相当，但成本更低且实验室占用空间更小。这支持其在常规和分散式血液病理学工作流程中的潜在应用价值。

title: Next Generation Sequencing Improves Diagnostic 16S rRNA Amplicon-Based Microbiota Analyses of Clinical Samples Compared to Sanger Sequencing.
journal: APMIS : acta pathologica, microbiologica, et immunologica Scandinavica
abstract: Sequencing of the 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) gene is an important tool in addition to conventional methods for the identification of bacterial pathogens in human infections. In polymicrobial samples, Sanger sequencing can produce uninterpretable chromatograms. This limitation can be overcome by Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) of the 16S rRNA gene. We investigated the applicability of Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing of the partial 16S rRNA gene as a diagnostic routine method for pathogen detection in clinical samples. From June 2021 to August 2022, 101 clinical samples positive in PCR for partial 16S rRNA gene analysis were subjected to both Sanger and ONT sequencing. Sanger sequences were edited and compared with deposited sequences in the NCBI database using BLAST, while ONT data were processed using EPI2ME Fastq 16S. The positivity rate (clinically relevant pathogen) was higher for ONT vs. Sanger sequencing: 72% and 59%, respectively. Concordance between Sanger and ONT sequencing was 80%. Furthermore, ONT detected more samples with polymicrobial presence compared to Sanger (13 vs. 5) sequencing. Interestingly, in one joint fluid sample, Borrelia bissettiiae was identified by ONT but not by Sanger. The results show that the detection of both monobacterial and multiple bacterial species is improved using ONT.
authors: Huma Aftab, Christian H Schouw, Rimtas Dargis, Laus K Vejrum, Rikke L Johansen, Josefine Tange Møller, Tina V Madsen, Asta Lili Laugesen, Jens J Christensen, Michael Kemp, Xiaohui C Nielsen

ai.TLDR: 16S rRNA基因测序是识别人类感染细菌病原体的重要工具。与Sanger测序相比，ONT测序在检测单菌和多种细菌方面表现出更高的准确性和灵敏度。
ai.translation: 16S核糖体RNA（rRNA）基因测序是除传统方法外，用于识别人类感染中细菌病原体的重要工具。在多菌感染样本中，Sanger测序可能产生无法解释的电泳图谱。这种局限性可以通过16S rRNA基因的下一代测序（NGS）来克服。我们研究了牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序部分16S rRNA基因作为临床样本中病原体检测诊断常规方法的适用性。从2021年6月至2022年8月，101个用于部分16S rRNA基因分析的PCR阳性临床样本均接受了Sanger和ONT测序。Sanger测序结果经过编辑并与NCBI数据库中的已存序列通过BLAST进行比对，而ONT数据则使用EPI2ME Fastq 16S进行处理。ONT测序的阳性率（临床相关病原体）高于Sanger测序：分别为72%和59%。Sanger与ONT测序的一致性为80%。此外，ONT检测到的多菌感染样本数量多于Sanger测序（13 vs. 5）。有趣的是，在一个关节液样本中，ONT检测到了Borrelia bissettiae，而Sanger测序未能检测到。结果表明，使用ONT测序可以提高单菌和多种细菌的检测能力。

title: Genomic analysis and preclinical evaluation of two hydrogel-formulated novel virulent phages isolated against a carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii (CRAB) has recently become a serious cause for global concern because of non-susceptibility to multiple antimicrobial classes, its prevalence in nosocomial infections, and the lack of effective treatments against such a pathogen.

METHODS: This study isolated two lytic phages from hospital sewage, purified, propagated, characterized morphologically by transmission electron microscopy, and genomically by Oxford Nanopore Sequencing. The phage lysates were then formulated individually as carboxymethylcellulose (CMC) 5 % w/v hydrogels. The formulated hydrogels were in vitro and in vivo evaluated using a thermal injury animal model.

RESULTS: The phages belong to the class Caudovirectes whrere the virion Acinetobacter phage vB_AbaM-SPA has an icosahedral head 60 ± 5 nm in diameter, a tail of 128 ± 5 nm length, and a genome of 45,115 bp in length with 37.4 % G + C content and 70 ORFs. In comparison, the virion Acinetobacter phage vB_AbaM-SPB has an icosahedral head 64 ± 5 nm in diameter, a tail of 67 ± 5 nm length, and a 45,587 bp genome with 37.7 % G + C content and 70 ORFs. The animal groups treated with the phage hydrogels demonstrated a significant acceleration in the production of dermal mature collagen fibers, enhanced survival rates, and promoted wound healing when compared to the untreated groups.

CONCLUSION: The Acinetobacter phage vB_AbaM-SPA and Acinetobacter phage vB_AbaM-SPB formulated as hydrogels were able to treat the CRAB-infected burn wounds, to enhance healing, as demonstrated through histopathological analysis, and decrease the death rate of the animals. Consequently, these phage-hydrogels are regarded as encouraging formulations for clinical evaluation for potential use in humans.
authors: Ann A Elshamy, Sandra K Kamal, Mariam T Mahmoud, Aya M Elhasany, Aya A Shady, Sherok A Mohamed, Hasna A Abd-Elmaaboud, Nour E El-Awady, Rana A Mohamed, Sara A El-Mirghany, Sarraa W El-Hady, Mohamed M Abd-ElRahman, Bishoy T Saad, Mohammad Y Alshahrani, Khaled M Aboshanab, Samar S Mabrouk

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对耐碳青霉烯类铜绿假单胞菌（CRAB）感染的烧伤伤口，开发了两种噬菌体水凝胶制剂。通过体外和体内实验评估其治疗效果，结果显示噬菌体水凝胶能显著促进伤口愈合，提高动物存活率。该研究为临床应用提供了潜在的治疗方案。
keywords: 耐碳青霉烯类铜绿假单胞菌
ai.translation:
背景：耐碳青霉烯类铜绿假单胞菌（CRAB）最近已成为全球关注的严重问题，因其对多种抗菌药物的耐药性、在医院感染中的普遍性以及缺乏有效的治疗方法。

方法：本研究从医院污水中分离出两种裂解噬菌体，对其进行纯化、扩增、通过透射电子显微镜进行形态学表征，并通过牛津纳米孔测序进行基因组分析。随后，将这两种噬菌体裂解物分别制备为5% w/v羧甲基纤维素（CMC）水凝胶。所制备的水凝胶在热损伤动物模型中进行了体外和体内的评估。

结果：这两种噬菌体属于Caudovirectes类，其中噬菌体vB_AbaM-SPA具有直径为60±5 nm的二十面体头部、长度为128±5 nm的尾部，基因组长度为45,115 bp，G+C含量为37.4%，含有70个开放阅读框（ORFs）。相比之下，噬菌体vB_AbaM-SPB具有直径为64±5 nm的二十面体头部、长度为67±5 nm的尾部，基因组长度为45,587 bp，G+C含量为3.7%，含有70个开放阅读框（ORFs）。与未治疗组相比，使用噬菌体水凝胶治疗的动物组在真皮成熟胶原纤维的生成、存活率和伤口愈合方面均表现出显著的改善。

结论：将噬菌体vB_AbaM-SPA和vB_AbaM-SPB制备为水凝胶制剂，能够有效治疗CRAB感染的烧伤伤口，促进愈合，如组织病理学分析所示，并降低动物死亡率。因此，这些噬菌体水凝胶被认为是具有临床评估潜力的鼓励性制剂，可能用于人类治疗。

title: [Will nanopores also sequence proteins ?].
abstract: DNA sequencing using nanopores is now well established. Could the approach be extended to proteins ? There are a number of difficulties but work by many groups has shown proof-of-principle solutions for most of them. Further progress could indeed lead to a workable protein sequencing approach that would have many applications in research and in the clinic.
authors: Bertrand Jordan

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术已被成功应用于DNA测序，但将其扩展到蛋白质测序仍面临诸多挑战。然而，多个研究团队已展示了原理性解决方案，为未来开发实用的蛋白质测序方法奠定了基础，这将在科研和临床领域具有广泛应用。
ai.translation: 使用纳米孔进行DNA测序的技术现在已经非常成熟。那么，这种方法是否可以扩展到蛋白质的测序呢？虽然存在一些困难，但多个研究团队的工作已经展示了针对大多数问题的原理性解决方案。进一步的发展确实有可能实现一种可行的蛋白质测序方法，这将在科研和临床领域具有广泛的应用价值。

title: Quantification of residual plasmid DNA and SV40 promoter-enhancer sequences in Pfizer/BioNTech and Moderna modRNA COVID-19 vaccines from Ontario, Canada.
abstract: For some of the COVID-19 vaccines, the drug substances released to market were manufactured differently than those used in clinical trials. Manufacturing nucleoside-modified mRNA (modRNA) for commercial COVID-19 vaccines relies on RNA polymerase transcription of a plasmid DNA template. Previous studies identified high levels of plasmid DNA in vials of modRNA vaccines, suggesting that the removal of residual DNA template is problematic. Therefore, we quantified the DNA load in a limited number of Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna COVID-19 modRNA vaccine vials using two independent methods. Total DNA and specific DNA targets were quantified by Qubit fluorometry and quantitative polymerase chain reaction (qPCR), respectively on 32 vials representing 16 unique vaccine lots. RNase A treatment was used to assess the impact of RNA crosstalk in DNA fluorometry. A preliminary assessment of DNA fragment length and DNase I sensitivity were also performed. Total DNA ranged 371-1,548 ng/dose and 1,130-6,280 ng/dose in Pfizer and Moderna products, respectively. Specific DNA of multiple plasmid DNA targets ranged 0.22-7.28 ng/dose for Pfizer, and 0.01-0.78 ng/dose for Moderna. The SV40 promoter-enhancer-ori (0.25-23.72 ng/dose) was only detected in Pfizer vials. Oxford Nanopore sequencing of one vial found mean and maximum DNA fragment lengths of 214 bp and 3.5 kb, respectively. These data demonstrate the presence of 1.23 × 108 to 1.60 × 1011 plasmid DNA fragments per dose encapsulated in lipid nanoparticles. Using fluorometry, total DNA in all vials tested exceeded the regulatory limit for residual DNA set by the US Food & Drug Administration (FDA) and the World Health Authorization (WHO) by 36-153-fold for Pfizer and 112-627-fold for Moderna after accounting for nonspecific binding to modRNA. When tested by qPCR, all Moderna vials were within the regulatory limit, but 2/6 Pfizer lots (3 vials) exceeded the regulatory limit for the SV40 promoter-enhancer-ori by 2-fold. The presence of the SV40 promoter-enhancer element in Pfizer vials raises significant safety concerns. This study emphasizes the importance of methodological considerations when quantifying residual plasmid DNA in modRNA products, considering increased LNP transfection efficiency, and cumulative dosing presents significant and unquantified risks to human health.
authors: David J Speicher, Jessica Rose, Kevin McKernan

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现部分新冠疫苗中残留的质粒DNA含量超出监管标准，特别是辉瑞疫苗中检测到SV40启动子-增强子元件，引发安全担忧。研究通过多种方法量化了疫苗中残留DNA的含量，并指出其可能对人类健康造成潜在风险。
ai.translation: 对于一些新冠疫苗，上市的药物成分与临床试验中使用的成分制造方式不同。商业新冠疫苗中核苷修饰mRNA（modRNA）的制造依赖于RNA聚合酶对质粒DNA模板的转录。先前研究发现modRNA疫苗瓶中存在高水平的质粒DNA，表明去除残留DNA模板存在问题。因此，我们使用两种独立方法对有限数量的辉瑞-生物科技和莫德纳新冠modRNA疫苗瓶中的DNA负荷进行了量化。通过Qubit荧光计数和定量聚合酶链反应（qPCR）分别对32瓶疫苗（代表16个独特的疫苗批次）进行了总DNA和特定DNA靶标的量化。使用RNase A处理以评估DNA荧光计数中RNA交叉反应的影响。还进行了DNA片段长度和DNase I敏感性的初步评估。辉瑞和莫德纳产品的总DNA含量分别为每剂量371-1,548 ng和1,130-6,280 ng。多种质粒DNA靶标的特定DNA含量分别为辉瑞每剂量0.22-7.28 ng和莫德纳每剂量0.01-0.78 ng。SV40启动子-增强子-ori（0.25-23.72 ng/剂量）仅在辉瑞疫苗瓶中被检测到。对一瓶疫苗进行牛津纳米孔测序，发现平均和最大DNA片段长度分别为214 bp和3.5 kb。这些数据表明每剂量封装在脂质纳米颗粒中的质粒DNA片段数量为1.23 × 10^8至1.60 × 10^11。使用荧光计数法，所有测试瓶中的总DNA含量均超过美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）和世界卫生组织（WHO）设定的残留DNA监管限值，辉瑞疫苗超出36-153倍，莫德纳疫苗超出112-627倍（考虑非特异性结合到modRNA）。通过qPCR测试，所有莫德纳疫苗瓶均在监管限值内，但2/6个辉瑞批次（3瓶）的SV40启动子-增强子-ori含量超出监管限值2倍。辉瑞疫苗瓶中SV40启动子-增强子元件的存在引发了显著的安全担忧。本研究强调在量化modRNA产品中残留质粒DNA时，考虑方法学因素的重要性，特别是增加脂质纳米颗粒（LNP）转染效率和累积剂量可能对人类健康造成显著且未量化的风险。

title: De novo genome sequencing and comparative analyses of the clinically relevant species Mucor ardhlaengiktus, Mucor circinelloides, Mucor griseocyanus, and Mucor janssenii.
abstract:
Mucormycosis is predominantly caused by members of the genera Lichtheima, Mucor, and Rhizopus. Here, we report the genome assemblies and comparative analyses of the clinically relevant species Mucor ardhlaengiktus (CBS 210.80), Mucor circinelloides (CBS 195.68), Mucor janssenii (CBS 205.68), and Mucor griseocyanus (CBS 116.08) to enable molecular analyses.

Mucormycosis is predominantly caused by members of the genera Lichtheima, Mucor, and Rhizopus. So far, mainly industrially important species have been sequenced. Here, we report the genome sequences and analyses of four medically relevant Mucor species.
authors: Bert Gerrits van den Ende, Michaela Lackner, Ferry Hagen

ai.TLDR: 毛霉病主要由Lichtheima、Mucor和Rhizopus属的真菌引起。本研究报道了四种与临床相关的Mucor属真菌的基因组组装和比较分析，以支持分子研究。这些物种的基因组序列有助于理解其致病机制和开发诊断与治疗策略。
ai.translation: 毛霉病主要由Lichtheima、Mucor和Rhizopus属的真菌引起。在这里，我们报告了四种与临床相关的Mucor属真菌Mucor ardhlaengiktus (CBS 210.80)、Mucor circinelloides (CBS 195.68)、Mucor janssenii (CBS 205.68)和Mucor griseocyanus (CBS 116.08)的基因组组装和比较分析，以支持分子研究。毛霉病主要由Lichtheima、Mucor和Rhizopus属的真菌引起。到目前为止，主要对工业重要的物种进行了测序。在这里，我们报告了四种与医学相关的Mucor属真菌的基因组序列和分析。

title: Conserved methylation signature accurately predicts heavily irradiated CNS tumour with perplexing histopathology: A case report.
abstract: Diagnosing central nervous system (CNS) tumours post-radiation therapy is often complicated by treatment-induced histological changes. Molecular diagnostics, such as methylation profiling, offer robust tools to aid in accurate tumour classification. The present study reported a case of a 48-year-old woman with a recurrent parasellar mass previously treated with stereotactic radiosurgery. Despite imaging suggestive of meningioma, histopathology and immunohistochemistry yielded ambiguous findings. Low-coverage whole genome methylation profiling using Oxford Nanopore sequencing provided a conclusive diagnosis of meningioma, with a classifier confidence score of 0.791, supported by t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding clustering and characteristic copy number variations. The present case illustrated the diagnostic utility of methylation profiling in post-treatment CNS tumours with perplexing histopathology. Integration of molecular diagnostics can enhance classification accuracy and inform clinical decision-making.
