authors: Handoko Handoko, Eka Susanto, Renindra Ananda Aman, Tiara Aninditha, Heri Wibowo, Tiara Bunga Mayang Permata, Soehartati A Gondhowiardjo

ai.TLDR: 放射治疗后中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤的诊断常因治疗引起的组织学变化而复杂化。本研究通过低覆盖全基因组甲基化分析，成功诊断了一例放射治疗后疑似脑膜瘤的病例。甲基化分析在处理组织学不明确的肿瘤中具有重要诊断价值。
ai.translation: 放射治疗后中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤的诊断常因治疗引起的组织学变化而复杂化。分子诊断技术，如甲基化分析，提供了可靠的工具以帮助准确分类肿瘤。本研究报告了一例48岁女性患者的病例，其曾接受立体定向放射外科治疗，出现复发性旁蝶窦肿块。尽管影像学提示为脑膜瘤，但组织病理学和免疫组织化学检查结果不明确。通过使用牛津纳米孔测序进行低覆盖全基因组甲基化分析，得出脑膜瘤的明确诊断，分类器置信度评分为0.791，该结果由t分布随机邻域嵌入（t-SNE）聚类和特征性拷贝数变异所支持。本病例展示了甲基化分析在处理治疗后组织学不明确的CNS肿瘤中的诊断价值。分子诊断的整合可以提高分类准确性，并为临床决策提供信息。

title: Transcript isoform diversity defines molecular subtypes and prognosis in acute myeloid leukemia through long-read sequencing.
abstract: Acute myeloid leukemia (AML) is a genetically complex and clinically heterogeneous hematopoietic malignancy. This study employs long-read transcriptome analysis using oxford nanopore technologies sequencing on 60 primary AML bone marrow samples. This approach delivers comprehensive isoform-level resolution of splicing abnormalities and overcomes limitations of short-read sequencing. We detect extensive AML-specific splicing anomalies and identify 119,278 previously unannotated transcript isoforms. Of these, 80,294 (67.31%) contain complete open reading frames, with 9,812 (12.22%) validated using liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry. Quantitative analysis in 175 RNA sequencing samples enables non-negative matrix factorization clustering, defining distinct molecular subtypes. These isoform-defined subtypes exhibit strong correlations with patient prognosis, indicating their potential as biomarkers for clinical classification. The findings highlight alternative splicing as a major contributor to AML molecular heterogeneity and provide a valuable foundation for advancing precision medicine and developing innovative therapeutic strategies targeting splicing abnormalities in AML.
authors: Xiaoguang Shi, Shuai Wang, Shuting Yu, Fangying Jiang, Jinzeng Wang, Yao Dai, Jincan Li, Ruihong Zhang, Tong Yin, Yuting Dai, Hai Fang, Junmin Li, Hongming Zhu, Shengyue Wang

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术对60例急性髓系白血病（AML）骨髓样本进行转录组分析，揭示了广泛的AML特异性剪接异常，并鉴定出大量未注释的转录本异构体。这些异构体与患者预后密切相关，为精准医学和靶向剪接异常的治疗策略提供了基础。
ai.translation: 急性髓系白血病（AML）是一种遗传复杂且临床异质性的造血恶性肿瘤。本研究采用牛津纳米孔测序技术对60例原发性AML骨髓样本进行长读长转录组分析。该方法能够全面解析剪接异常的异构体水平，并克服短读长测序的局限性。我们检测到广泛的AML特异性剪接异常，并鉴定出119,278个此前未注释的转录本异构体。其中，80,294个（67.31%）包含完整的开放阅读框，有9,812个（12.22%）通过液相色谱-串联质谱法验证。在175个RNA测序样本中进行定量分析，通过非负矩阵因子化聚类，定义出不同的分子亚型。这些由异构体定义的亚型与患者预后具有显著相关性，表明其在临床分类中的潜在应用价值。研究结果突显了剪接异常在AML分子异质性中的重要作用，并为推进精准医学和开发针对AML剪接异常的创新治疗策略提供了宝贵的依据。

title: Cross-platform methylation-based site of origin classification for squamous cell carcinomas.
journal: Modern pathology : an official journal of the United States and Canadian Academy of Pathology, Inc
abstract: Squamous cell carcinomas (SCCs) are one of the most common cancer types and can arise at nearly any anatomic site. As SCCs are one of the most common metastases, do not have reliable site-specific morphologic or genomic features and have considerable morphologic and immunohistochemical overlap with urothelial carcinomas, distinguishing between primary and metastatic squamous appearing tumors can be challenging. This distinction can be critical to clinical management. We present SquaMOS (Squamous cell carcinoma Methylation for Origin Site), a methylation-based classifier to predict site-of-origin of squamous appearing carcinomas. Trained on publicly available array-based methylation data from 1062 primary SCCs (from lung, head & neck, cervix and esophagus) and urothelial carcinomas, SquaMOS predicted site-of-origin in primary tumors with 96.1% accuracy in an internal test set (n=458) and 97.4% accuracy in an external test set from three institutions (n=78). On metastatic tumors (n=51), SquaMOS predictions were 96.1% accurate. SquaMOS was directly applicable to shallow Nanopore sequencing data (CpG probe site coverage 0.25-2.88X) with an accuracy of 91.7% (n=36; 100% accurate for high-confidence predictions). When tested on SCCs outside the training set types (n=15, including 3 metastases to lung), no cases were misclassified as of lung origin, supporting accuracy of lung vs non-lung origin classification for diverse SCC types. Overall, we demonstrate highly accurate performance of the SquaMOS classifier on primary and metastatic tumors from multiple data sources, robust to suboptimal tumor purity. We illustrate transferability of our array-based classifier to low-depth Nanopore sequencing data, a potentially rapid means of site-of-origin determination in a clinical setting.
authors: Allen W Zhang, Vahid Akbari, Andrew Galbraith, Zoe Kore, YuQi Li, Samuel Leung, Jennifer X Ji, Kristy Dever, Julie MacIsaac, Hilary Brewis, Diane Pan, Cornelius Kürten, Andrew Ajisebutu, Alberto Contreras-Sanz, Alireza Moeen, Jeffrey A Zuccato, Vikas Patil, Peter C Black, Wan Lam, Erin Pleasance, Kieran O'Neill, Steven Jones, Marco Marra, Janessa Laskin, Gelareh Zadeh, Sheila Mansouri, Michael Kobor, Eitan Prisman, Anna McGuire, David G Huntsman, Stephen Yip, Julia R Naso

ai.TLDR: Squamous cell carcinomas (SCCs) 是一种常见的癌症类型，其原发部位和转移性肿瘤的区分具有挑战性。SquaMOS 是一种基于甲基化的分类器，能够准确预测 SCCs 的原发部位，适用于多种数据来源，并且在低深度测序数据中表现良好。
ai.translation: 鳞状细胞癌（Squamous cell carcinomas, SCCs）是其中最常见的癌症类型之一，可以在几乎任何解剖部位发生。由于 SCCs 是最常见的转移性癌症之一，缺乏可靠的部位特异性形态学或基因组特征，并且在形态学和免疫组织化学上与尿路上皮癌有显著重叠，因此区分原发性和转移性鳞状外观肿瘤具有挑战性。这种区分对临床管理至关重要。我们提出了 SquaMOS（鳞状细胞癌甲基化原发部位预测），这是一种基于甲基化的分类器，用于预测鳞状外观癌的原发部位。SquaMOS 在 1062 个原发性 SCCs（来自肺、头颈、宫颈和食管）和尿路上皮癌的公开可用的基于阵列的甲基化数据上进行训练，在内部测试集（n=458）中对原发性肿瘤的原发部位预测准确率为 96.1%，在三个机构的外部测试集（n=78）中准确率为 97.4%。在转移性肿瘤（n=51）中，SquaMOS 的预测准确率为 96.1%。SquaMOS 可直接应用于浅层纳米孔测序数据（CpG 探针位点覆盖度为 0.25-2.88X），准确率为 91.7%（n=36；高置信度预测准确率为 100%）。当在训练集类型以外的 SCCs 上测试（n=15，包括 3 例转移到肺的转移瘤）时，没有病例被错误分类为肺源性，支持了肺源性与非肺源性分类的准确性。总体而言，我们展示了 SquaMOS 分类器在多种数据来源的原发性和转移性肿瘤中具有高度准确的性能，并且对肿瘤纯度不足具有鲁棒性。我们展示了基于阵列的分类器向低深度纳米孔测序数据的可迁移性，这可能是一种在临床环境中快速确定原发部位的潜在方法。

title: The landscape of microbial associations in human cancer.
abstract: Oncomicrobes are estimated to cause 15% of cancers worldwide. When cancer whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data are collected, the microbes present are also sequenced, allowing the investigation of potential etiological and clinical associations. Interrogating the microbial community for 8908 patients encompassing 22 cancer types from the Genomics England WGS dataset revealed that only colorectal tumors exhibited unmistakably distinct microbial communities that can reliably be used to distinguish anatomical site [positive predictive value (PPV) = 0.95]. This pattern was validated in two independent datasets. Potential clinical relevance uncovered by our analyses included accurate detection of alphapapillomaviruses [human papillomavirus (HPV)] in oral cancers, when compared with current clinical standards, and the detection of rare, highly pathogenic viruses such as human T-lymphotropic virus-1. Biomarker investigations demonstrated statistically significant associations (P < 0.05) between a subset of anaerobic bacteria and survival in certain subtypes of sarcoma. Our results contradict previous claims that each cancer type has a distinct microbiological signature but highlight the potential value of microbial analysis for certain cancers as WGS of tumor samples becomes common in the clinic.
authors: Abraham Gihawi, Henry M Wood, Jeremy Clark, Justin O'Grady, Rosalind A Eeles, David C Wedge, G Maria Jakobsdottir, Gkikas Magiorkinis, Andrew G Schache, Liam Masterson, Matt Lechner, Tim R Fenton, Terry M Jones, Adrienne M Flanagan, Solange De Noon, Alex Rubinsteyn, Rachel Hurst, Colin S Cooper, Daniel S Brewer

ai.TLDR: 研究发现，结直肠肿瘤具有明显不同的微生物群，可可靠地区分解剖部位，阳性预测值为0.95。该模式在两个独立数据集中得到验证。分析还揭示了口腔癌中人乳头瘤病毒的准确检测以及罕见高致病性病毒的检测。部分厌氧菌与某些肉瘤亚型的生存率存在显著关联。
ai.translation: 据估计，肿瘤微生物在全球癌症发生中占15%。当收集癌症全基因组测序（WGS）数据时，同时也会对存在的微生物进行测序，从而可以研究潜在的病因和临床关联。通过分析Genomics England WGS数据集中的8908名患者（涵盖22种癌症类型）的微生物群，发现只有结直肠肿瘤表现出明显不同的微生物群，可以可靠地区分解剖部位（阳性预测值（PPV）= 0.95）。这一模式在两个独立数据集中得到验证。我们的分析揭示了潜在的临床相关性，包括与当前临床标准相比，在口腔癌中准确检测到α乳头瘤病毒（人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）），以及检测到罕见且高度致病性的病毒，如人类T细胞白血病病毒-1。生物标志物研究显示，某些厌氧菌与特定亚型肉瘤的生存率之间存在统计学显著关联（P < 0.05）。我们的结果反驳了之前关于每种癌症类型都有独特微生物学特征的说法，但强调了在肿瘤样本的全基因组测序在临床中变得普遍时，微生物分析对某些癌症的潜在价值。

title: Diagnostic accuracy of nanopore sequencing for the rapid diagnosis of extrapulmonary tuberculosis: a protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Extrapulmonary tuberculosis (EPTB) is a serious type of tuberculosis (TB) which can cause systemic clinical manifestations. Rapid diagnosis of EPTB for intervention is of great importance. Nanopore sequencing as a third-generation gene sequencing method is a new kind of rapid TB detection. Previous studies have shown that nanopore sequencing has higher diagnostic sensitivity and specificity for TB diagnosis compared with other diagnostic methods. The aim of this research is to develop a systematic review and meta-analysis protocol for assessing the accuracy of nanopore sequencing in diagnosing EPTB.

METHODS AND ANALYSIS: This protocol was conducted in strict adherence to the Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-analysis Protocols guidelines. The study protocol has been prospectively registered with the International Prospective Register of Systematic Reviews under the unique identifier CRD42024608415. We will search Chinese databases and English databases in June 2026. Chinese databases will include Wanfang database, China National Knowledge Infrastructure. English databases will include PubMed, EMBASE and the Cochrane Library. Adhering strictly to the reference standard outlined in this protocol, we will screen the literature. The Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies will be used by us to assess the methodological quality of the included studies. The statistical tools used are Stata with midas commands and RevMan, and we will perform meta-analysis, generate forest plots and Summary Receiver Operating Characteristic curves. A p value of less than 0.05 will be considered statistically significant. If significant heterogeneity exists and there is a sufficient number of studies, we will investigate its source through subgroup analysis and meta-regression.

ETHICS AND DISSEMINATION: This investigation uses publicly accessible data repositories, exempting it from ethical review board approval requirements. On finalisation of the analysis, findings will be prepared for dissemination through submission to a reputable medical journal employing rigorous peer review processes. The study methodology adheres to established protocols for systematic review and meta-analysis.

PROSPERO REGISTRATION NUMBER: CRD42024608415.
authors: Guocan Yu, Xudong Xu, Yanqin Shen, Yuyang Ling

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在开发一项系统综述和meta分析的协议，评估纳米孔测序在诊断肺外结核中的准确性。该研究遵循PRISMA-P指南，并在PROSPERO注册，以确保研究的系统性和透明性。
ai.translation:
背景：肺外结核（EPTB）是一种严重的结核病类型，可引起全身性临床表现。对EPTB进行快速诊断以进行干预具有重要意义。纳米孔测序作为一种第三代基因测序方法，是一种新型的快速结核病检测技术。先前的研究表明，与其它诊断方法相比，纳米孔测序在结核病诊断中具有更高的诊断敏感性和特异性。本研究的目的是开发一项系统综述和meta分析的协议，以评估纳米孔测序在诊断EPTB中的准确性。

方法与分析：本协议严格遵循PRISMA-P指南进行。该研究协议已在国际前瞻性系统综述注册中心（PROSPERO）注册，注册号为CRD42024608415。我们将在2026年6月搜索中文数据库和英文数据库。中文数据库包括万方数据库、中国知网；英文数据库包括PubMed、EMBASE和Cochrane Library。我们将严格遵循本协议中规定的参考标准筛选文献。我们将使用Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies（QUADAS-2）工具评估纳入研究的方法学质量。统计工具使用Stata（midas命令）和RevMan，我们将进行meta分析，生成森林图和总结接收者操作特征曲线。p值小于0.05将被视为统计学显著。如果存在显著异质性且研究数量足够，我们将通过亚组分析和meta回归调查其来源。

伦理与传播：本研究使用公开可访问的数据仓库，因此无需伦理审查委员会的批准。分析完成后，研究结果将通过提交至权威医学期刊进行传播，该期刊采用严格的同行评审流程。本研究的方法遵循系统综述和meta分析的既定协议。

PROSPERO注册号：CRD42024608415。

title: Using synthetic RNA to benchmark poly(A) length inference from direct RNA sequencing.
abstract: Polyadenylation is a dynamic process that is important in cellular physiology, which has implications in messenger RNA decay rates, translation efficiency, and isoform-specific regulation. Oxford Nanopore Technologies direct RNA sequencing provides a strategy for sequencing the full-length RNA molecule and analysis of the transcriptome. Several tools are currently available for poly(A) tail length estimation, including well-established methods like tailfindr and nanopolish, as well as more recent deep learning models like Dorado. However, there has been limited benchmarking of the accuracy of these tools against gold-standard datasets. In this article, we present our novel deep learning poly(A) estimation tool-BoostNano-and compare with 3 existing tools-tailfindr, nanopolish, and Dorado. We evaluate the 4 poly(A) estimation tools, using 2 sets of synthetic in vitro transcribed RNA standards with known poly(A) tail lengths-Sequin (30 or 60 nucleotides) and enhanced green fluorescent protein (10-150 nucleotides) RNA. Analyzing datasets with known ground-truth values is a valuable approach to measuring the accuracy of poly(A) length estimation. The tools demonstrated length- and sample-dependent performance, and accuracy was enhanced by averaging over multiple reads via estimation of the peak of the density distribution. Overall, Dorado is recommended as the preferred approach due to its relatively fast runtimes, low mean error, and ease of use with integration with base-calling. These results provide a reference for poly(A) tail length estimation analysis, aiding in improving our understanding of the transcriptome and the relationship between poly(A) tail length and other transcriptional mechanisms, including transcript stability or quantification.
authors: Jessie J-Y Chang, Xuan Yang, Haotian Teng, Jianshu Zhang, Benjamin Reames, Shuxin Zhang, Vincent Corbin, Lachlan J M Coin

ai.TLDR: Poly(A)尾长度估计是转录组分析中的关键步骤，本文提出了一种新的深度学习工具BoostNano，并与现有工具进行了比较。研究结果为poly(A)尾长度估计提供了参考，有助于理解转录组和poly(A)尾长度与其他转录机制的关系。
ai.translation: 多聚腺苷酸化（polyadenylation）是一个动态过程，在细胞生理中具有重要作用，影响mRNA降解速率、翻译效率以及等位基因特异性调控。牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的直接RNA测序提供了一种对全长RNA分子进行测序和转录组分析的策略。目前已有多种工具可用于poly(A)尾长度估计，包括已建立的方法如tailfindr和nanopolish，以及较新的深度学习模型如Dorado。然而，这些工具的准确性与金标准数据集的基准测试仍有限。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的深度学习poly(A)估计工具BoostNano，并与现有的三个工具tailfindr、nanopolish和Dorado进行了比较。我们使用了两组具有已知poly(A)尾长度的合成体外转录RNA标准——Sequin（30或60个核苷酸）和增强型绿色荧光蛋白（10-150个核苷酸）RNA，来评估这四个poly(A)估计工具。分析具有已知真实值的数据集是衡量poly(A)长度估计准确性的宝贵方法。这些工具表现出长度和样本依赖性的性能，通过估计密度分布的峰值并在多个读取中进行平均，可以提高准确性。总体而言，Dorado因其相对较快的运行时间、较低的平均误差以及与碱基调用集成的易用性而被推荐为首选方法。这些结果为poly(A)尾长度估计分析提供了参考，有助于改进我们对转录组的理解以及poly(A)尾长度与其他转录机制（包括转录稳定性或定量）之间的关系。

title: Nanopore- and AI-empowered microbial viability inference.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The ability to differentiate between viable and dead microorganisms in metagenomic data is crucial for various microbial inferences, ranging from assessing ecosystem functions of environmental microbiomes to inferring the virulence of potential pathogens from metagenomic analysis. Established viability-resolved genomic approaches are labor-intensive as well as biased and lacking in sensitivity.

RESULTS: We here introduce a new fully computational framework that leverages nanopore sequencing technology to assess microbial viability directly from freely available nanopore signal data. Our approach utilizes deep neural networks to learn features from such raw nanopore signal data that can distinguish DNA from viable and dead microorganisms in a controlled experimental setting of UV-induced Escherichia cell death. The application of explainable artificial intelligence (AI) tools then allows us to pinpoint the signal patterns in the nanopore raw data that allow the model to make viability predictions at high accuracy. Using the model predictions as well as explainable AI, we show that our framework can be leveraged in a real-world application to estimate the viability of obligate intracellular Chlamydia, where traditional culture-based methods suffer from inherently high false-negative rates. This application shows that our viability model captures predictive patterns in the nanopore signal that can be utilized to predict viability across taxonomic boundaries. We finally show the limits of our model's generalizability through antibiotic exposure of a simple mock microbial community, where a new model specific to the killing method had to be trained to obtain accurate viability predictions.

CONCLUSIONS: While the potential of our computational framework's generalizability and applicability to metagenomic studies needs to be assessed in more detail, we here demonstrate for the first time the analysis of freely available nanopore signal data to infer the viability of microorganisms, with many potential applications in environmental, veterinary, and clinical settings.
authors: Harika Ürel, Sabrina Benassou, Hanna Marti, Tim Reska, Ela Sauerborn, Yuri Pinheiro Alves De Souza, Albert Perlas, Enrique Rayo, Michael Biggel, Stefan Kesselheim, Nicole Borel, Edward J Martin, Constanza B Venegas, Michael Schloter, Kathrin Schröder, Jana Mittelstrass, Simone Prospero, James M Ferguson, Lara Urban

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出了一种基于纳米孔测序技术的全新计算框架，用于直接从公开的纳米孔信号数据中评估微生物的活性。该方法利用深度神经网络学习特征，以区分活菌与死菌，并在实际应用中展示了其在预测病原体活性方面的潜力。
ai.translation:
背景：在宏基因组数据中区分存活与死亡微生物的能力对于各种微生物推断至关重要，从评估环境微生物组的功能到通过宏基因组分析推断潜在病原体的毒力。现有的基于活性的基因组方法既繁琐又存在偏差，且灵敏度不足。

结果：我们在此介绍了一种全新的完全计算框架，该框架利用纳米孔测序技术直接从公开的纳米孔信号数据中评估微生物的活性。我们的方法利用深度神经网络从原始的纳米孔信号数据中学习特征，以在紫外线诱导大肠杆菌死亡的受控实验环境中区分存活与死亡的微生物。随后应用可解释人工智能（AI）工具，使我们能够定位纳米孔原始数据中的信号模式，从而实现高准确性的活性预测。利用模型预测和可解释AI，我们展示了该框架在实际应用中的潜力，用于估计专性内寄生的衣原体的活性，其中传统培养方法存在固有的高假阴性率。该应用表明，我们的活性模型能够捕捉到纳米孔信号中的预测模式，从而用于跨分类群预测活性。最后，我们通过对抗生素暴露的简单模拟微生物群落展示了该模型的泛化能力的局限性，其中必须训练新的特定于杀灭方法的模型才能获得准确的活性预测。

结论：尽管需要进一步评估该计算框架的泛化能力和在宏基因组研究中的适用性，但我们首次展示了如何利用公开的纳米孔信号数据推断微生物的活性，这在环境、兽医和临床等许多领域具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Repeat-associated ataxias in a German patient cohort analysed by targeted parallel long-read sequencing.
abstract: Hereditary adult-onset ataxias are a heterogeneous group of phenotypically overlapping conditions, often caused by pathogenic expansions of short tandem repeats. Currently, 18 repeat disorders with a core phenotype of adult-onset ataxia are known. Diagnosis typically relies on sequential PCR-based methods, which are labour-intensive and lack precision. Long-read sequencing (LRS) has the potential to overcome these limitations and is currently implemented and validated in clinical genetics. Using clinical nanopore Cas9-targeted sequencing (Clin-CATS) for parallel in-depth repeat analysis, we evaluated a diagnostic cohort of 513 adult-onset ataxia patients, determining frequencies of all known repeat-associated ataxias except Spinocerebellar ataxia 4 (SCA4), as well as the carrier frequencies for autosomal-recessive disorders, RFC1 spectrum disorder and Friedreich's ataxia (FRDA). Additionally, phenotypes of patients with established genetic diagnoses were characterized, especially those of patients living with RFC1 spectrum disorder and SCA27B. Repeat-associated ataxias were confirmed in 33.3% of cases, including rare ataxias, such as SCA10, SCA36 and SCA37, alongside as the most prevalent conditions SCA27B and RFC1 spectrum disorder. Potentially pathogenic expansions in FGF14 were identified in an additional 4.7% of patients. Testing of another 347 patients for ZFHX3 expansions linked to SCA4 did not identify any cases. Dual diagnoses were frequent, occuring in 6.4% of patients with repeat-associated ataxia. We confirmed a high RFC1 spectrum disorder carrier frequency (7.2%) and reclassified certain FXN expansions as likely non-pathogenic, resulting in a lower than estimated carrier frequency for FRDA of 0.8%. We also identified novel repeat configurations in several loci and illustrated the high heterogeneity of repeat expansions in RFC1, highlighting it as a potential source of false results when using PCR-based methods. This study underscores the diagnostic advantages of LRS for comprehensive repeat analysis and recommends its adoption as a standard in clinical genetics, replacing Southern blot and PCR-based approaches. Furthermore, based on our findings in a large patient cohort a re-evaluation of existing phenotype-genotype correlations is recommended as well as evaluating additional parameters besides repeat length to improve diagnostic precision of repeat analysis.
authors: Hannes Erdmann, Annalisa Schaub, Morghan C Lucas, Veronika Scholz, Anna Benet-Pages, Kerstin Becker, Christine Dineiger, Veronika Mayer, Inga van Buren, Eva Breithausen, Karl Akbari, Isabell Cordts, Mayra Sauer, Christine Schneider, Rosanna Krakowsky, Franziska Schnabel, Konstanze Dunker, Lena Fabritius, Johannes Gerb, Denis Grabova, Ken Möhwald, Marius Näher, Karoline Steinmetz, Franziska Thiessen, Alexander Jäck, Christiane Schneider-Gold, Simone Zittel, Christina Petersen, Isolde Schreyer, Larissa Mämecke, Sibylle Wilfling, Gilbert Wunderlich, David Brenner, Yorck Hellenbroich, Kirsten Muhle, Tessa Huchtemann, Inga Claus, Thomas Klopstock, Michael Strupp, Johannes Levin, Günter Höglinger, Doreen Huppert, Sandra Becker-Bense, Filipp Filippopulos, Fabian Kilpert, Elsa Leitão, Sabine Kaya, Christel Depienne, Florian Schöberl, Teresa Neuhann, Elke Holinski-Feder, Andreas Zwergal, Angela Abicht

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了长读长测序（LRS）在诊断成人发病性共济失调中的应用，发现33.3%的患者存在重复相关共济失调，包括罕见类型如SCA10、SCA36和SCA37。同时，研究还发现RFC1谱系障碍的携带频率较高，且部分FXN扩展可能非致病性，从而降低了FRDA的携带频率。LRS在临床遗传学中具有重要诊断优势。
ai.translation: 遗传性成人发病性共济失调是一组表型重叠的异质性疾病，通常由短串联重复（STR）的致病性扩展引起。目前已知有18种重复相关疾病，其核心表型为成人发病性共济失调。诊断通常依赖于基于PCR的顺序方法，这些方法费时且缺乏精确性。长读长测序（LRS）有潜力克服这些局限性，并已在临床遗传学中实施和验证。我们使用临床纳米孔Cas9靶向测序（Clin-CATS）进行并行深入重复分析，评估了513例成人发病性共济失调患者的诊断队列，确定了所有已知重复相关共济失调的频率，除了SCA4，同时确定了常染色体隐性疾病的携带频率，包括RFC1谱系障碍和弗里德赖希共济失调（FRDA）。此外，我们还对已建立遗传诊断的患者的表型进行了特征分析，特别是那些患有RFC1谱系障碍和SCA27B的患者。重复相关共济失调在33.3%的病例中得到确认，包括罕见的共济失调，如SCA10、SCA3、SCA36和SCA37，以及最常见的SCA27B和RFC1谱系障碍。此外，我们还在4.7%的患者中发现了FGF14的潜在致病性扩展。对另外347名患者进行ZFHX3扩展的检测，未发现任何SCA4病例。双重诊断在重复相关共济失调患者中较为常见，占6.4%。我们确认了RFC1谱系障碍的高携带频率（7.2%），并将某些FXN扩展重新分类为可能非致病性，从而降低了FRDA的携带频率至0.8%。我们还发现了多个位点的新重复配置，并展示了RFC1重复扩展的高度异质性，这表明其可能是使用基于PCR方法时产生假结果的潜在来源。本研究强调了LRS在全面重复分析中的诊断优势，并建议将其作为临床遗传学的标准方法，以取代Southern blot和基于PCR的方法。此外，基于我们在大患者队列中的发现，建议重新评估现有的表型-基因型相关性，并评估除重复长度外的其他参数，以提高重复分析的诊断精度。

title: Chromosomal-level assembly of Magnusiomyces clavatus: novel genetic insights on an emerging fungal pathogen.
abstract: Magnusiomyces clavatus is an emerging opportunistic fungal pathogen associated with severe systemic infections in immunocompromised patients, mostly among those suffering from hematological malignancies. Despite the increasing clinical significance, genomic data for M. clavatus remain limited. In this study, we report the first chromosomal-level genome assembly of M. clavatus using hybrid sequencing with Illumina and Oxford Nanopore technologies. Three clinical isolates obtained from ICU patients in Verona (Italy) were sequenced and analyzed. The M. clavatus genome was resolved into four nuclear chromosomes and one circular mitochondrial genome, with a total length of 17.6 Mb and with 4,065 predicted protein-coding genes. Comparative analyses revealed structural differences from its closely related species M. capitatus. Phylogenetic analysis of 40 strains assembled on the resolved genome identified a novel clade (D), distinct from the previously described clades A, B, and C. All isolates exhibited intrinsic resistance to echinocandins and fluconazole. Genetic analysis identified conserved mutations in the FKS1 hotspot region encoding 1,3-β-glucan synthase, mirroring resistance-associated substitutions in M. capitatus. Additionally, a putative cyp51 homologue was identified as a likely contributor to azole resistance, suggesting conserved resistance mechanisms across Magnusiomyces species. This study discloses a new chromosomal-level assembly for M. clavatus, providing a significant genomic framework. This resource could enhance the accuracy of diagnostic methods, enabling comparative genomics with closely related fungi and facilitate a deeper investigation into the mechanisms of antifungal resistance and pathogenicity of this rare but increasingly reported pathogen.
authors: Emil Tonon, Riccardo Cecchetto, Maya Carrera, Annarita Sorrentino, Guido Zeni, Giona Turri, Marco Mantoan, Asia Palmisano, Anna Lagni, Virginia Lotti, Erica Diani, Davide Gibellini

ai.TLDR: Magnusiomyces clavatus 是一种与免疫功能低下患者严重系统性感染相关的新兴机会性真菌病原体。本研究首次利用混合测序技术对 M. clavatus 进行了染色体级别的基因组组装，揭示了其基因组结构和抗真菌药物耐药机制。
keywords: 染色体级别基因组组装
ai.translation: Magnusiomyces clavatus 是一种与免疫功能低下患者严重系统性感染相关的新兴机会性真菌病原体，主要发生在血液系统恶性肿瘤患者中。尽管其临床重要性日益增加，但 M. clavatus 的基因组数据仍然有限。在本研究中，我们利用 Illumina 和 Oxford Nanopore 技术的混合测序方法，首次报道了 M. clavatus 的染色体级别基因组组装。从意大利维罗纳市 ICU 患者中获得的三个临床分离株被进行了测序和分析。M. clavatus 的基因组被解析为四个核染色体和一个环状线粒体基因组，总长度为 17.6 Mb，预测含有 4,065 个蛋白质编码基因。比较分析显示其与密切相关的物种 M. capitatus 存在结构差异。基于解析基因组的 40 株菌株系统发育分析识别出一个新的分支（D），与之前描述的分支 A、B 和 C 明显不同。所有分离株均表现出对棘白菌素和氟康唑的固有耐药性。遗传分析发现 FKS1 热点区域编码 1,3-β-葡聚糖合成酶的保守突变，与 M. capitatus 中的耐药相关取代相似。此外，一个可能的 cyp51 同源基因被鉴定为唑类耐药的潜在贡献者，表明 Magnusiomyces 物种之间存在保守的耐药机制。本研究揭示了 M. clavatus 的新染色体级别基因组组装，提供了重要的基因组框架。这一资源可以提高诊断方法的准确性，促进与密切相关的真菌的比较基因组学研究，并有助于深入探讨该罕见但日益报告的病原体的抗真菌耐药机制和致病性。

title: Creating an atlas of variant effects to resolve variants of uncertain significance and guide cardiovascular medicine.
abstract: Cardiovascular diseases are leading global causes of death and disability, often presenting as interrelated phenotypes of atherosclerotic vascular disease, heart failure and arrhythmias. Cardiovascular diseases arise from interactions between environmental factors and predisposing genotypes and include common Mendelian lipid disorders, cardiomyopathies and arrhythmia syndromes. The identification of a pathogenic variant through genetic testing can inform disease diagnosis, risk prediction, treatment and family screening. However, a major roadblock in genomic medicine is that for many variants, especially missense variants, we lack sufficient evidence to enable a definitive classification, and therefore these variants are deemed as 'variants of uncertain significance'. In this Review, we describe how multiplexed assays of variant effects can enable the functional assessment of nearly all coding variants in a target sequence, potentially offering a proactive approach to identifying the functional significance of gene variants that are observed later in a patient. We discuss validation, including the role of in silico variant effect predictors, and how multiplexed experimental methods are informing cardiovascular disease biology and ultimately resolving the problem of variants of uncertain significance at scale.
authors: Andrew M Glazer, Daniel R Tabet, Victoria N Parikh, Brett M Kroncke, Atina G Cote, Yuta Yamamoto, Qianru Wang, Ayesha Muhammad, Megan C Lancaster, Matthew J O'Neill, Jochen Weile, Tao Yang, Calum A Macrae, Euan A Ashley, Frederick P Roth, Dan M Roden

ai.TLDR: 心血管疾病是全球死亡和残疾的主要原因，通常表现为动脉粥样硬化性血管疾病、心力衰竭和心律失常等相互关联的表型。然而，由于许多变异（尤其是错义变异）缺乏足够的证据，导致其功能意义不确定。本文综述了如何通过多重变异效应检测方法，对目标序列中的几乎所有编码变异进行功能评估，从而主动识别基因变异的功能意义。
ai.translation: 心血管疾病是全球死亡和残疾的主要原因，通常表现为动脉粥样硬化性血管疾病、心力衰落和心律失常等相互关联的表型。心血管疾病的发生源于环境因素与易感基因型之间的相互作用，包括常见的孟德尔脂质紊乱、心肌病和心律失常综合征。通过基因检测识别致病性变异可以为疾病诊断、风险预测、治疗和家族筛查提供信息。然而，基因组医学面临的主要障碍是，对于许多变异，尤其是错义变异，我们缺乏足够的证据以进行明确分类，因此这些变异被归类为'功能意义不确定的变异'。在本综述中，我们描述了如何通过多重变异效应检测方法，对目标序列中的几乎所有编码变异进行功能评估，这可能为后续在患者中观察到的基因变异提供一种主动识别其功能意义的方法。我们讨论了验证方法，包括计算预测变异效应工具的作用，以及如何通过多重实验方法推动心血管疾病生物学研究，并最终大规模解决功能意义不确定的变异问题。

title: A metagenomic approach to One Health surveillance of antimicrobial resistance in a UK veterinary centre.
abstract: There are currently no standardized guidelines for genomic surveillance of One Health antimicrobial resistance (AMR). This project aimed to utilize metagenomics to identify AMR genes present in a companion animal hospital and compare these with phenotypic results from bacterial isolates from clinical specimens from the same veterinary hospital. Samples were collected from sites within a primary care companion animal veterinary hospital in London, UK. Metagenomic DNA was sequenced using Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION. The sequencing data were analysed for AMR genes, plasmids and clinically relevant pathogen species. These data were compared to phenotypic speciation and antibiotic susceptibility tests of bacterial isolates from patients. The most common resistance genes identified were aph (n=101 times genes were detected across 48 metagenomic samples), sul (84), bla CARB (63), tet (58) and bla TEM (46). In clinical isolates, a high proportion of isolates were phenotypically resistant to β-lactams. Rooms with the greatest mean number of resistance genes identified per swab site were the medical preparation room, dog ward and surgical preparation room. Twenty-four and four plasmids typically associated with Gram-positive and Enterobacteriaceae, respectively, were identified. Sequencing reads matched with 14 out of 22 (64%) of the phenotypically isolated bacterial species. Metagenomics identified AMR genes, plasmids and species of relevance to human and animal medicine. Communal animal-handling areas harboured more AMR genes than areas animals did not frequent. When considering infection prevention and control measures, adherence to, and frequency of, cleaning schedules, alongside potentially more comprehensive disinfection of animal-handling areas, may reduce the number of potentially harmful bacteria present.
authors: Linzy Elton, Alonso Dupuy Mateos, Siân Marie Frosini, Rosanne Jepson, Sylvia Rofael, Timothy D McHugh, Emmanuel Q Wey

ai.TLDR: 目前尚无针对One Health抗微生物耐药性（AMR）的基因组监测标准化指南。本研究利用宏基因组学技术识别了宠物医院中的AMR基因，并与临床样本中细菌分离物的表型结果进行了比较。研究发现，宏基因组学能够有效识别与人类和动物医学相关的AMR基因、质粒和病原体。
ai.translation: 目前尚无针对One Health抗微生物耐药性（AMR）的基因组监测标准化指南。本项目旨在利用宏基因组学技术识别宠物医院中的AMR基因，并将其与同一家兽医院临床样本中细菌分离物的表型结果进行比较。样本是从英国伦敦一家初级护理宠物兽医院内的不同地点收集的。使用牛津纳米孔技术MinION对宏基因组DNA进行测序。测序数据用于分析AMR基因、质粒和与临床相关的病原体种类。这些数据与患者细菌分离物的表型分类和抗生素敏感性测试结果进行了比较。鉴定出的最常见耐药基因包括aph（在48个宏基因组样本中检测到101次）、sul（84次）、bla CARB（63次）、tet（58次）和bla TEM（46次）。在临床分离物中，大多数分离物表型上对β-内酰胺类抗生素具有耐药性。在拭子采样点中，识别出最多耐药基因的房间是医疗准备室、狗病房和手术准备室。鉴定出24种通常与革兰氏阳性菌相关的质粒，以及4种与肠杆菌科相关的质粒。测序读取与22种表型分离的细菌物种中的14种（64%）匹配。宏基因组学识别了与人类和动物医学相关的AMR基因、质粒和病原体。共处的动物处理区域比动物不常去的区域含有更多的AMR基因。在考虑感染预防和控制措施时，遵守并频繁执行清洁计划，以及对动物处理区域进行更彻底的消毒，可能会减少潜在有害细菌的数量。

title: IDH1-dependent m6A methylation defines transcriptomic heterogeneity in glioma.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: Gliomas are biologically heterogeneous brain tumors with marked differences in clinical behavior based on the IDH1 mutation status. While epigenetic dysregulation is well characterized, the contribution of RNA modifications, particularly N6-methyladenosine (m6A), remains underexplored. Using direct RNA nanopore sequencing of patient-derived gliomas, we generated the first isoform-resolved m6A maps across IDH1-mutant and wild-type tumors. IDH1-mutant gliomas exhibited globally elevated m6A methylation, along with increased expression of methyltransferases (METTL3, METTL14) and stabilizing readers (YTHDF3). In contrast, wild-type glioblastomas showed enhanced expression of m6A erasers (ALKBH5, FTO) and RNA decay factors (YTHDF2). These subtype-specific differences in m6A architecture impacted transcript stability, isoform usage, and gene expression. Isoform-level analyses revealed stronger prognostic associations than gene-level parameter, including for IGF2BP2-202, PUF60-202, and GLUL-203. Our study establishes m6A as a critical, subtype-specific layer of RNA regulation in glioma with clinical and therapeutic implications.
authors: Syeda Maheen Batool, Hanna Lee, Koushik Muralidharan, Saad Murtaza Khan, Ana K Escobedo, Denalda Gashi, Kesli Faber, Emil Ekanayake, Tiffaney Hsia, Yana Al-Inaya, Aishwarya Kosgi, Julie J Miller, Daniel P Cahill, Gavin P Dunn, Bryan D Choi, Allegra S Petti, Bob S Carter, Leonora Balaj

ai.TLDR: 胶质瘤是一种生物异质性的脑肿瘤，其临床行为因IDH1突变状态而显著不同。本研究通过直接RNA纳米孔测序，首次绘制了IDH1突变型和野生型肿瘤的m6A图谱，揭示了m6A修饰在胶质瘤中的关键作用。研究发现，m6A修饰的差异影响了转录稳定性、剪接异构体使用和基因表达，具有重要的临床和治疗意义。
ai.translation: 胶质瘤是生物异质性的脑肿瘤，其临床行为因IDH1突变状态而显著不同。尽管表观遗传失调已被广泛研究，但RNA修饰，特别是N6-甲基腺苷（m6A）的贡献仍待深入探索。我们通过直接RNA纳米孔测序对患者来源的胶质瘤进行分析，首次绘制了IDH1突变型和野生型肿瘤的m6A图谱。IDH1突变型胶质瘤表现出全局性的m6A甲基化升高，同时甲基转移酶（METTL3、METTL14）和稳定读取蛋白（YTHDF3）的表达增加。相反，野生型胶质母细胞瘤则表现出m6A去甲基化酶（ALKBH5、FTO）和RNA降解因子（YTHDF2）的表达增强。这些亚型特异性的m6A结构差异影响了转录稳定性、剪接异构体使用和基因表达。在剪接异构体水平上的分析显示，其预后关联性比基因水平参数更强，包括IGF2BP2-202、PUF60-202和GLUL-203。我们的研究确立了m6A作为胶质瘤中关键的、亚型特异性的RNA调控层，具有重要的临床和治疗意义。

title: Long-read sequencing identifies FGF14 repeat expansions in Parkinson's disease.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: Pathogenic GAA repeat expansions in FGF14 are an established cause of late-onset cerebellar ataxia, but have not been linked to Parkinson's disease (PD). Given emerging evidence that repeat expansions in ataxia-associated genes like RFC1, can contribute to atypical or familial forms of PD, we investigated whether FGF14 expansions might play a similar role. Using long-read whole-genome sequencing on 411 individuals with PD and 197 neurologically healthy controls from the PPMI cohort, alongside 1,429 additional controls from the NIH CARD initiative, the 1000 Genomes Project, and the All of Us program, representing globally diverse populations. We identified pathogenic FGF14 GAA repeat expansions in five individuals with PD and one control. All five individuals fit the clinical criteria of PD and showed typical patterns of neurodegeneration on DaTSCAN imaging; α-synuclein aggregation was confirmed by a positive seeding assay among four individuals with available data. These findings broaden the phenotypic spectrum of FGF14 repeat-associated disease and suggest a rare, previously unrecognized genetic contributor to PD. To our knowledge, this is the first report implicating FGF14 in PD and underscores the utility of long-read sequencing for detecting hidden forms of pathogenic variation in unresolved cases.
authors: Fulya Akçimen, Kensuke Daida, Lara M Lange, Abraham Moller, Abigail Miano-Burkhardt, Laksh Malik, Kimberly Paquette, Pilar Alvarez Jerez, Jackson Mingle, Breeana Baker, Melissa Meredith, Cedric Kouam, Paige Jarreau, Androo Markham, Jessica Anderson, Miten Jain, Mark Chaisson, Mark Cookson, Bradford Casey, Hirotaka Iwaki, Sara Bandres-Ciga, Paula Saffie-Awad, Mike Nalls, Zih-Hua Fang, Andrew B Singleton, Cornelis Blauwendraat, Kimberley J Billingsley

ai.TLDR: FGF14基因中的致病性GAA重复扩展是晚发性小脑共济失调的已知原因，但尚未与帕金森病（PD）相关联。研究发现FGF14重复扩展可能在某些PD病例中起作用。通过长读长测序分析了多个队列中的样本，发现了五例PD患者和一名健康对照中存在致病性FGF14 GAA重复扩展。
ai.translation: FGF14基因中的致病性GAA重复扩展是晚发性小脑共济失调的已知原因，但尚未与帕金森病（PD）相关联。鉴于有证据表明，与共济失调相关基因（如RFC1）中的重复扩展可能与非典型或家族性PD有关，我们研究了FGF14重复扩展是否可能在PD中发挥类似作用。通过长读长全基因组测序分析了来自PPMI队列的411名PD患者和197名神经健康对照，以及来自NIH CARD计划、1000 Genomes项目和All of Us计划的1,429名额外对照，这些样本代表了全球多样化的群体。我们发现五名PD患者和一名对照中存在致病性FGF、14 GAA重复扩展。所有五名患者均符合PD的临床标准，并在DaTSCAN影像学检查中显示出典型的神经退行性病变模式；在四名有数据的患者中，通过阳性播种实验确认了α-突触核蛋白聚集。这些发现扩展了FGF14重复相关疾病的表型谱，并表明FGF14可能是PD的一个罕见、之前未被识别的遗传贡献因素。据我们所知，这是首次报告FGF14与PD相关，并强调了长读长测序在检测未解决病例中隐藏的致病变异方面的实用性。

title: Epidemiological dynamics of influenza B virus across multiple seasons in Kenya and Uganda inferred from sequence data, 2010-2021.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Influenza B virus (IBV) contributes significantly to morbidity and mortality during Influenza seasons annually. However, IBV genomic surveillance occurs unevenly across the globe, particularly within the African region, obscuring its epidemiology. This study aims to elucidate the epidemiological dynamics of IBV in Kenya and Uganda between 2010 and 2022.

METHODS: In this study, 83 near complete IBV genomes circulating in Kenya and Uganda between 2010 and 2022 were generated through Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing (ONT). Publicly available IBV datasets were incorporated to evaluate the public context of these genomes. Further evolutionary dynamics analysis investigated the antigenic mutation, reassortment and glycosylation patterns of IBVs circulating in Kenya and Uganda within this period.

RESULTS: Alternating IBV lineage predominance and clade turnover was observed consistent with global patterns. No B/Yamagata strains were detected at the study sites after 2019. Multiple B/Victoria clade/subclades (V1A, V1A.3, V1A.3a, V1A.3a.2) and B/Yamagata clades (Y2 and Y3) were identified with no inter-lineage reassortments observed. Over time, the clades/subclades appeared to diversify through the accumulation of amino acid changes along the hemagglutinin (HA) segment backbone, especially within the known antigenic sites. Local outbreak strains appeared to be putatively introduced from both within and outside Africa.

CONCLUSIONS: The congruence of local and global strains in circulating lineages and amino acid changes suggests potential effectiveness of vaccines recommended for the Northern and Southern Hemispheres in East Africa.
authors: Brenda K Nyarango, D Collins Owuor, Everlyne Isoe, Martin Mutunga, Robinson Cheruiyot, Esther N Katama, Timothy Makori, Arnold Lambisia, Joyce Nyiro, George Githinji, Sarah Kiguli, Peter Olupot-Olupot, Kathryn Maitland, Charles N Agoti

ai.TLDR: 本研究分析了肯尼亚和乌干达2010年至2022年间流感B病毒（IBV）的流行病学动态，发现其基因型分布与全球趋势一致。研究结果显示，IBV的抗原变异和基因重组模式对疫苗效果具有潜在影响。
ai.translation:
背景：流感B病毒（IBV）每年在流感季节中对发病率和死亡率有显著贡献。然而，全球范围内IBV的基因组监测存在不均衡，特别是在非洲地区，这掩盖了其流行病学特征。本研究旨在阐明2010年至2022年间肯尼亚和乌干达IBV的流行病学动态。

方法：本研究通过牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）测序，获得了肯尼亚和乌干达2010年至2022年间83个近完整的IBV基因组。同时整合了公开的IBV数据集，以评估这些基因组的公共背景。进一步的进化动态分析探讨了该时期内肯尼亚和乌干达流行IBV的抗原突变、基因重组和糖基化模式。

结果：观察到IBV谱系交替主导和分支更替，这与全球趋势一致。在2019年后，研究地点未检测到B/Yamagata毒株。识别出多个B/Victoria分支/亚分支（V1A, V1A.3, V1A.3a, V1A.3a.2）和B/Yamagata分支（Y2和Y3），未观察到跨谱系的基因重组。随着时间推移，这些分支/亚分支似乎通过血凝素（HA）段骨架上氨基酸变化的积累而多样化，尤其是在已知抗原表位区域。本地爆发毒株似乎来自非洲内部和外部。

结论：流行谱系和氨基酸变化的本地与全球一致性表明，推荐用于北半球和南半球的疫苗在东非地区可能具有潜在效果。

title: Identification of an F8 complex recombination in Chinese hemophilia a patient using long-read sequencing and optical genome mapping.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Hemophilia A (HA) is an X-linked recessive bleeding disorder caused by pathogenic variants in the F8 gene, resulting in deficient coagulation factor VIII activity. Although intron 22 and intron 1 inversions (Inv22 and Inv1) accounts for approximately 50% of severe HA cases, complex structural rearrangements mediated by intron 22 homologous region (int22h) repeats have rarely reported and poorly characterized.

METHODS: In this study, we investigated a Chinese severe HA pedigree with a complex rearrangement of F8 gene by integrating 750 K SNP arrays, long-read sequencing (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT), and optical genome mapping (OGM). This multi-platform strategy enabled comprehensive characterization of the structural variations affecting the F8 gene.

RESULTS: We identified a complex rearrangement in the proband’s F8 gene, characterized by sequential duplications inserted within intron 22. These include a 7.75 kb direct duplication involving a portion of int22h-1, a 78.78 kb inverted duplication containing partial sequences of int22h-3 and int22h-2, and an 86.56 kb direct duplication spanning a portion of int22h-3 and exons 2–8 of the TMLHE gene. The structural variation in the F8 gene of the proband was inherited from the mother.

CONCLUSION: Our findings revealed that the complex rearrangement of F8 is the genetic cause of HA in this pedigree. The combined use of OGM and ONT provides an effective approach for deciphering the characterization of complex structural variants and determining the orientation of inserted segments, although base-precision breakpoint mapping remains challenging in highly homologous regions.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: The online version contains supplementary material available at 10.1186/s12920-025-02202-8.
authors: Yuxin Zhang, Mingjie Yang, Lulu Yan, Chunxiao Han, Jiangyang Xue, Juan Geng, Changshui Chen, Lijun Bao, Bingqin Xu, Shanshan Wu, Haibo Li

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了一例中国严重血友病A（HA）家族中F8基因复杂重排的病例，通过整合750K SNP芯片、长读长测序和光学基因组映射技术，揭示了F8基因结构变异的遗传机制。研究发现，该家族的F8基因重排来源于母亲，并且复杂重排是导致HA的遗传原因。
ai.translation:
背景：血友病A（HA）是一种X染色体隐性出血性疾病，由F8基因中的致病变异引起，导致凝血因子VIII活性不足。尽管内含子22和内含子1倒位（Inv22和Inv1）约占严重HA病例的50%，但由内含子22同源区域（int22h）重复介导的复杂结构重排却很少被报道且研究不足。

方法：在本研究中，我们结合750K SNP芯片、长读长测序（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）和光学基因组映射（OGM）技术，对一例中国严重HA家族中F8基因的复杂重排进行了研究。这种多平台策略使得对影响F8基因的结构变异进行全面表征成为可能。

结果：我们发现该受试者F8基因中存在复杂的重排，表现为内含子22内的连续重复插入。这些重复包括：一个7.75 kb的直接重复，涉及int22h-1的一部分；一个78.78 kb的倒置重复，包含int22h-3和int22h-2的部分序列；以及一个86.56 kb的直接重复，覆盖int22h-3的一部分和TMLHE基因的外显子2-8。该F8基因的结构变异来源于母亲。

结论：我们的研究结果表明，F8基因的复杂重排是该家族HA的遗传原因。结合OGM和ONT技术，为解析复杂结构变异的特征和确定插入片段的方向提供了一种有效的方法，尽管在高度同源区域中精确的断点映射仍具挑战性。

补充信息：在线版本包含可在10.1186/s12920-025-02202-8获取的补充材料。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Tongue and Periodontal Pocket Microbiome in Relation to Helicobacter pylori Gastric Disease: 16S rRNA Gene Sequencing Analysis.
abstract: Objective: To analyze the composition of the oral microbiome in periodontal pocket lesions and on the tongue dorsum of patients with Helicobacter pylori-associated gastric disease. Materials and Methods: Patients diagnosed with gastric disease and H. pylori (HP+) were evaluated in comparison to a control group of H. pylori-negative patients without gastric disease (HP-). Periodontal and oral health clinical parameters (PPD, BoP, PSE, plaque score and modified DMFT) were assessed for each patient. Microbiological samples were collected from the deepest periodontal pockets and tongue dorsum, followed by DNA extraction, 16S rRNA PCR amplification, and Next-Generation-Sequencing (NGS) analyses. Results: Sixty-seven patients (27F; 40M, aged 35-85 years) were enrolled. Of these, 52 were HP+ and 15 were HP-. HP+ patients exhibited a significantly higher presence of decayed teeth (p < 0.05) and slightly fewer missing teeth (p > 0.05). The plaque score was significantly higher in HP+ patients (p < 0.05), while PPD and BoP showed no significant differences (p > 0.05). NGS analysis revealed no presence of H. pylori in any samples of both periodontal and tongue sites. HP+ patients showed a distinct microbial composition, including higher prevalence of Capnocytophaga, Fusobacterium, and Peptostreptococcus genera in both locations (pockets and tongue dorsum). Conclusions: The study demonstrated that HP+ patients exhibit distinct oral microbial profiles compared to HP- patients, especially in areas with deeper periodontal pockets. H. pylori was not detected in the oral microbiomes of either group.
authors: Fausto Zamparini, Alessio Buonavoglia, Francesco Pellegrini, Georgia Diakoudi, Matteo Pavoni, Giulia Fiorini, Vittorio Sambri, Andrea Spinelli, Dino Vaira, Maria Giovanna Gandolfi, Carlo Prati

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在分析与幽门螺杆菌相关胃病患者口腔微生物组的组成，包括牙周袋病变和舌背部位。研究发现，幽门螺杆菌阳性（HP+）患者在口腔微生物组成上表现出显著差异，但未在口腔微生物组中检测到幽门螺杆菌。
ai.translation: 目的：分析与幽门螺杆菌相关胃病患者牙周袋病变和舌背部位的口腔微生物组组成。材料与方法：评估被诊断为胃病并伴有幽门螺杆菌（HP+）的患者，与无胃病且幽门螺杆菌阴性（HP-）的对照组进行比较。对每位患者进行牙周和口腔健康临床参数（牙周探诊深度PPD、牙龈出血BoP、牙石PSE、牙菌斑评分和改良DMFT）的评估。从最深的牙周袋和舌背部位采集微生物样本，随后进行DNA提取、16S rRNA PCR扩增和下一代测序（NGS）分析。结果：共纳入67名患者（27名女性；40名男性，年龄35-85岁）。其中52名为HP+，15名为HP-。HP+患者表现出显著更高的龋齿发生率（p < 0.05），但缺失牙齿数量略少（p > 0.05）。HP+患者的牙菌斑评分显著更高（p < 0.05），而PPD和BoP未见显著差异（p > 0.05）。NGS分析显示，在牙周袋和舌背部位的样本中均未检测到幽门螺杆菌。HP+患者在两个部位（牙周袋和舌背）均表现出不同的微生物组成，包括Capnocytophaga、Fusobacterium和Peptostreptococcus属的更高流行率（p < 0.05）。结论：研究显示，HP+患者与HP-患者相比，在深牙周袋区域表现出不同的口腔微生物组成。在两组的口腔微生物组中均未检测到幽门螺杆菌。

title: Genomic Insights into Emerging Multidrug-Resistant Chryseobacterium indologenes Strains: First Report from Thailand.
abstract: Background: Chryseobacterium indologenes, an environmental bacterium, is increasingly recognized as an emerging nosocomial pathogen, particularly in Asia, and is often characterized by multidrug resistance. Objectives: This study aimed to investigate the genomic features of clinical C. indologenes isolates from Maharaj Nakorn Chiang Mai Hospital, Thailand, to understand their mechanisms of multidrug resistance, virulence factors, and mobile genetic elements (MGEs). Methods: Twelve C. indologenes isolates were identified, and their antibiotic susceptibility profiles were determined. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) was performed using a hybrid approach combining Illumina short-reads and Oxford Nanopore long-reads to generate complete bacterial genomes. The hybrid assembled genomes were subsequently analyzed to detect antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes, virulence factors, and MGEs. Results: C. indologenes isolates were primarily recovered from urine samples of hospitalized elderly male patients with underlying conditions. These isolates generally exhibited extensive drug resistance, which was subsequently explored and correlated with genomic determinants. With one exception, CMCI13 showed a lower resistance profile (Multidrug resistance, MDR). Genomic analysis revealed isolates with genome sizes of 4.83-5.00 Mb and GC content of 37.15-37.35%. Genomic characterization identified conserved resistance genes (blaIND-2, blaCIA-4, adeF, vanT, and qacG) and various virulence factors. Phylogenetic and pangenome analysis showed 11 isolates clustering closely with Chinese strain 3125, while one isolate (CMCI13) formed a distinct branch. Importantly, each isolate, except CMCI13, harbored a large genomic island (approximately 94-100 kb) carrying significant resistance genes (blaOXA-347, tetX, aadS, and ermF). The absence of this genomic island in CMCI13 correlated with its less resistant phenotype. No plasmids, integrons, or CRISPR-Cas systems were detected in any isolate. Conclusions: This study highlights the alarming emergence of multidrug-resistant C. indologenes in a hospital setting in Thailand. The genomic insights into specific resistance mechanisms, virulence factors, and potential horizontal gene transfer (HGT) events, particularly the association of a large genomic island with the XDR phenotype, underscore the critical need for continuous genomic surveillance to monitor transmission patterns and develop effective treatment strategies for this emerging pathogen.
authors: Orathai Yinsai, Sastra Yuantrakul, Punnaporn Srisithan, Wenting Zhou, Sorawit Chittaprapan, Natthawat Intajak, Thanakorn Kruayoo, Phadungkiat Khamnoi, Siripong Tongjai, Kwanjit Daungsonk

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了泰国某医院临床分离的铜绿假单胞菌的基因组特征，揭示了其多重耐药机制、毒力因子及移动遗传元件。研究发现，大部分菌株携带大型基因岛，与高度耐药表型相关，强调了持续基因组监测的重要性。
ai.translation: 背景：铜绿假单胞菌是一种环境细菌，近年来在亚洲地区被越来越多地认为是一种新兴的医院感染病原体，且常表现出多重耐药特性。目标：本研究旨在调查泰国玛哈·那空·柴迪隆医院临床分离的铜绿假单胞菌的基因组特征，以了解其多重耐药机制、毒力因子及移动遗传元件（MGEs）。方法：鉴定出12株铜绿假单胞菌，并确定其抗生素敏感性谱。采用结合Illumina短读和Oxford Nanopore长读的混合方法进行全基因组测序（WGS），以生成完整的细菌基因组。随后对混合组装的基因组进行分析，以检测抗菌耐药（AMR）基因、毒力因子及MGEs。结果：铜绿假单胞菌主要从住院老年男性患者的尿液样本中分离出来。这些菌株通常表现出广泛的耐药性，随后被探索并与基因组决定因素相关联。除CMCI13外，其他菌株均表现出较高的耐药性（多重耐药，MDR）。基因组分析显示，菌株的基因组大小为4.83-5.00 Mb，GC含量为37.15-37.35%。基因组特征识别出保守的耐药基因（blaIND-2、blaCIA-4、adeF、vanT和qacG）以及各种毒力因子。系统发育和泛基因组分析显示，11株菌与中国的菌株3125紧密聚类，而另一株（CMCI13）则形成一个独立的分支。重要的是，除CMCI13外，每株菌均携带一个大型基因岛（约94-100 kb），携带显著的耐药基因（blaOXA-347、tetX、aadS和ermF）。CMCI13中缺乏该基因岛与其较低的耐药表型相关。在任何菌株中均未检测到质粒、整合子或CRISPR-Cas系统。结论：本研究突显了泰国医院环境中多重耐药铜绿假单胞菌的令人担忧的出现。对特定耐药机制、毒力因子及潜在水平基因转移（HGT）事件的基因组见解，特别是大型基因岛与XDR表型的关联，强调了持续基因组监测以监测传播模式并开发针对这种新兴病原体的有效治疗策略的必要性。

title: Compound Heterozygous Structural Variants in Cases with Unsolved PRKN-Associated Parkinson's Disease.
journal: Movement disorders : official journal of the Movement Disorder Society
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Biallelic mutations in the PRKN gene are a common cause of early-onset Parkinson's disease (EOPD). In addition to single nucleotide variants, structural variants contribute substantially to the mutational profile of PRKN. A significant portion of patients with EOPD remains genetically unsolved.

OBJECTIVES: By using short-read whole genome sequencing (sr-WGS), we aimed to uncover complex genetic alterations at the PRKN locus in EOPD cases which tested negative for mutations in Mendelian PD genes with clinical exome sequencing (CES) and multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification (MLPA).

METHODS: We evaluated 498 unrelated EOPD patients, who tested negative using gold-standard diagnostic methods, using sr-WGS. In selected cases, long-read whole genome sequencing (lr-WGS) with Oxford Nanopore technology was employed for an in-depth analysis and validation. The Parkinson's Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) dataset was interrogated to assess the prevalence of any newly identified elusive pathogenic genetic configurations.

RESULTS: sr-WGS revealed elusive compound heterozygous structural variations, consisting of partially overlapping deletions and duplications within the PRKN gene in three unrelated EOPD cases (two familial, one sporadic). In familial cases, biallelic PRKN structural variants co-segregated with the disease. The exact structure of each variant was resolved using lr-WGS. Similar variants were absent in the large PPMI database, suggesting that they are a rare occurrence.

CONCLUSIONS: In this article we describe a rare configuration of compound heterozygous structural variations involving partially overlapping chromosomal regions at the PRKN locus, which are difficult to detect through standard diagnostic genetic technologies. This study highlights the importance of integrating WGS into clinical practice. © 2025 The Author(s). Movement Disorders published by Wiley Periodicals LLC on behalf of International Parkinson and Movement Disorder Society.
authors: Agata Fant, Sara Trova, Edoardo Monfrini, Gaia Treves, Francesco Musacchia, Fabio Landuzzi, Paola Mandich, Antonio Amoroso, Remo Sanges, Luca Pandolfini, Francesco Cavallieri, Franco Valzania, Valentina Fioravanti, Giulia Di Rauso, Gloria Brescia, Enza Maria Valente, Valeria Tiranti, Luigi Michele Romito, Chiara Reale, Barbara Garavaglia, Antonio Emanuele Elia, Andrea Cavalli, Alessio Di Fonzo, Manuela Vecchi, Stefano Gustincich

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用短读全基因组测序（sr-WGS）发现了早发性帕金森病（EOPD）患者中PRKN基因的复杂结构变异，这些变异在常规检测中难以识别。研究结果表明，这些结构变异在EOPD患者中较为罕见，强调了全基因组测序在临床诊断中的重要性。
ai.translation:
背景：PRKN基因的双等位突变是早发性帕金森病（EOPD）的常见原因。除了单核苷酸变异外，结构变异在PRKN的突变谱中也起着重要作用。许多EOPD患者在临床外显子组测序（CES）和多重连接依赖探针扩增（MLPA）检测中未发现突变。

目标：通过短读全基因组测序（sr-WGS），我们旨在揭示那些在孟德尔帕金森病基因检测中呈阴性的EOPD病例中PRKN位点的复杂遗传改变。

方法：我们评估了498例无关的EOPD患者，这些患者在使用金标准诊断方法后呈阴性，采用sr-WGS进行分析。在选定的病例中，使用牛津纳米孔技术的长读全基因组测序（lr-WGS）进行深入分析和验证。我们还查询了帕金森病进展标志物倡议（PPMI）数据集，以评估任何新发现的隐匿性致病遗传配置的普遍性。

结果：sr-WGS揭示了三例无关的EOPD病例（两例为家族性，一例为散发性）中PRKN基因内的部分重叠的缺失和重复的隐匿性复合杂合结构变异。在家族性病例中，双等位PRKN结构变异与疾病共分离。使用lr-WGS解析了每个变异的确切结构。在大型PPMI数据库中未发现类似的变异，表明这些变异较为罕见。

结论：本文描述了一种罕见的涉及PRKN位点部分重叠染色体区域的复合杂合结构变异配置，这些变异难以通过标准的诊断遗传技术检测。本研究强调了将全基因组测序整合到临床实践中的重要性。© 2025 The Author(s). Movement Disorders published by Wiley Periodicals LLC on behalf of International Parkinson and Movement Disorder Society.

title: Targeted Whole Genome Sequencing of African Swine Fever Virus and Classical Swine Fever Virus on the MinION Portable Sequencing Platform.
abstract: African swine fever virus (ASFV) and classical swine fever virus (CSFV) are important transboundary animal diseases (TADs) affecting swine. ASFV is a large DNA virus with a genome size of 170-190+ kilobases (kB) belonging to the family Asfarviridae, genus Asfivirus. CSFV is a single-stranded RNA virus with a genome size of approximately 12 kB, belonging to the family Flaviviridae, genus Pestivirus. Outbreaks involving either one of these viruses result in similar disease syndromes and significant economic impacts from: (i) high morbidity and mortality events; (ii) control measures which include culling and quarantine; and (iii) export restrictions of swine and pork products. Current detection methods during an outbreak provide minimal genetic information on the circulating virus strains/genotypes that are important for tracing and vaccine considerations. The increasing availability and reduced cost of next-generation sequencing (NGS) allow for the establishment of NGS protocols for the rapid identification and complete genetic characterization of outbreak strains during an investigation. NGS data provides a better understanding of viral spread and evolution, facilitating the development of novel and effective control measures. In this study, panels of primers spanning the genomes of ASFV and CSFV were independently developed to generate approximately 10 kB and 6 kB amplicons, respectively. The primer panels consisted of 19 primer pairs for ASFV and 2 primer pairs for CSFV, providing whole genome amplification of each pathogen. These primer pools were further optimized for batch pooling and thermocycling conditions, resulting in a total of 5 primer pools/reactions used for ASFV and 2 primer pairs/reactions for CSFV. The ASFV primer panel was tested on viral DNA extracted from blood collected from pigs experimentally infected with ASFV genotype I and genotype II viruses. The CSFV primer panel was tested on 11 different strains of CSFV representing the three known CSFV genotypes, and 21 clinical samples collected from pigs experimentally infected with two different genotype 1 CSF viruses. ASFV and CSFV amplicons from optimized PCR were subsequently sequenced on the Oxford Nanopore MinION platform. The targeted protocols for these viruses resulted in an average coverage greater than 1,000X for ASFV, with 99% of the genome covered, and 10,000X-20,000X for CSFV, with 97% to 99% of the genomes covered. The ASFV targeted whole genome sequencing protocol has been optimized for genotype II ASF viruses that have been responsible for the more recent outbreaks outside of Africa. The CSFV targeted whole genome sequencing protocol has universal applications for the detection of all CSFV genotypes. Protocols developed and evaluated here will be essential complementary tools for early pathogen detection and differentiation, as well as genetic characterization of these high-consequence swine viruses, globally and within the United States, should an outbreak occur.
authors: Chester D McDowell, Taeyong Kwon, Patricia Assato, Emily Mantlo, Jessie D Trujillo, Natasha N Gaudreault, Leonardo C Caserta, Igor Morozov, Jayme A Souza-Neto, Roman M Pogranichniy, Diego G Diel, Juergen A Richt

ai.TLDR: 非洲猪瘟病毒（ASFV）和经典猪瘟病毒（CSFV）是影响猪的重要跨境动物疾病。目前的检测方法在疫情中提供的病毒基因信息有限，而下一代测序（NGS）技术的普及使得快速鉴定和全面基因组分析成为可能。本研究开发了针对ASFV和CSFV的引物组，实现了高覆盖率的全基因组测序，为疫情中的病毒溯源和疫苗研发提供了重要工具。
ai.translation: 非洲猪瘟病毒（ASFV）和经典猪瘟病毒（CSFV）是影响猪的重要跨境动物疾病（TADs）。ASFV是一种大型DNA病毒，基因组大小为170-190+千碱基（kB），属于Asfarviridae科、Asfivirus属。CSFV是一种单链RNA病毒，基因组大小约为12 kB，属于Flaviviridae科、Pestivirus属。涉及这两种病毒的疫情会导致相似的疾病综合征，并造成显著的经济损失，包括：（i）高发病率和死亡率事件；（ii）控制措施，包括扑杀和隔离；以及（iii）猪和猪肉产品的出口限制。目前的检测方法在疫情中提供的病毒基因信息有限，无法有效追踪和考虑疫苗研发。随着下一代测序（NGS）技术的普及和成本的降低，可以建立NGS协议，用于疫情调查中快速鉴定和全面基因组分析。NGS数据有助于更好地理解病毒的传播和进化，从而促进新型和有效的控制措施的开发。在本研究中，开发了覆盖ASFV和CSFV基因组的引物组，分别生成约10 kB和6 kB的扩增子。引物组包括19对引物用于ASFV和2对引物用于CSFV，实现了每种病原体的全基因组扩增。这些引物池进一步优化了批量混合和热循环条件，最终用于ASFV的5个引物池/反应和CSFV的2对引物/反应。ASFV引物组在从感染ASFV基因型I和基因型II病毒的猪的血液中提取的病毒DNA上进行了测试。CSFV引物组在代表三种已知CSFV基因型的11种不同CSFV菌株上进行了测试，并在感染两种不同基因型1 CSF病毒的猪的21个临床样本上进行了测试。优化后的PCR扩增子随后在Oxford Nanopore MinION平台上进行测序。针对这些病毒的靶向协议在ASFV中实现了平均覆盖度大于1,000倍，覆盖了99%的基因组；在CSFV中实现了10,000-20,000倍的覆盖度，覆盖了97%至99%的基因组。针对ASFV的靶向全基因组测序协议已优化用于导致非洲以外近期疫情的基因型II ASF病毒。针对CSFV的靶向全基因组测序协议具有普遍应用价值，可用于检测所有CSFV基因型。在这里开发和评估的协议将成为早期病原体检测和区分以及这些高影响猪病毒的基因组特征分析的重要互补工具，无论是在全球范围内还是在美国，一旦发生疫情。

title: Detection of Multiple Nosocomial Trichosporon asahii Transmission Events via Microsatellite Typing Assay, South America.
abstract: The fungus Trichosporon asahii has emerged as a cause of nosocomial infections, particularly in immunocompromised patients. Given its rising prevalence, information on its genetic diversity and transmission dynamics is urgently needed. We developed a microsatellite typing tool to investigate the genetic relatedness of T. asahii isolates. We selected 6 microsatellite markers from nanopore long-read sequencing of the T. asahii type-strain CBS 2479. We applied those markers to 111 clinical and environmental isolates; microsatellite typing showed high variability among isolates (11-37 alleles per marker) and identified 71 genotypes with strong discriminatory power (Simpson index of 0.9793). We applied the microsatellite typing method to T. asahii isolates from South America and identified multiple nosocomial transmission events from hospitals in Brazil, including clusters spanning more than a decade. The panel we developed offers high reproducibility and specificity, making it an effective tool for tracking outbreaks and determining the public health effects of T. asahii infections.
authors: Elaine C Francisco, Norma B Fernández, Mauricio Carbia, Chendo Dieleman, Andra-Cristina Bostanaru-Iliescu, Jos Houbraken, Arnaldo L Colombo, Ferry Hagen

ai.TLDR: Trichosporon asahii已成为医院感染的重要病原体，尤其在免疫受损患者中。研究开发了微卫星分型工具，通过分析111株临床和环境分离株，发现其遗传多样性高且具有强区分能力，揭示了巴西医院中跨越十年的多次院内传播事件。
ai.translation: Trichosporon asahii已成为医院感染的重要病原体，尤其在免疫受损患者中。鉴于其发病率持续上升，亟需了解其遗传多样性及传播动力学。我们开发了一种微卫星分型工具以研究T. asahii分离株的遗传相关性。通过纳米孔长读长测序对T. asahii模式菌株CBS 2479进行分析，选取6个微卫星标记。将这些标记应用于111株临床和环境分离株，微卫星分型显示分离株间存在高度变异（每个标记11-37个等位基因），并鉴定出71种基因型，具有强区分能力（Simpson指数为0.9793）。将该微卫星分型方法应用于南美洲T. asahii分离株，发现巴西多家医院存在多次院内传播事件，包括跨越十年的传播簇。所开发的检测面板具有高可重复性和特异性，可作为追踪爆发和评估T. asahii感染公共卫生影响的有效工具。

title: Oxford Nanopore Technologies R10 sequencing enables accurate cgMLST-based bacterial outbreak investigation of
abstract:
UNLABELLED: Core-genome multi-locus sequence typing (cgMLST) is a well-established and standardized method for genomics-based cluster detection and phylogenomic analysis of bacteria. The reduced error rate of Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) R10 sequencing has prompted many laboratories to explore incorporating this technology into their activities. However, conflicting reports exist on the performance of ONT R10 sequencing for cgMLST analysis. This study evaluates the suitability of ONT R10 data for cgMLST allele calling and cluster detection for bacterial outbreak investigation. ONT and Illumina sequencing data were generated for 24

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technologies R10测序技术在细菌爆发调查中用于核心基因组多位点序列分型（cgMLST）等位基因调用和聚类检测的适用性。通过比较ONT与Illumina测序数据，发现ONT R10在cgMLST分析中存在误差率差异，但其在临床爆发调查和菌株追踪中的应用潜力仍需进一步验证。
ai.translation:
无标签：核心基因组多位点序列分型（cgMLST）是一种成熟且标准化的基于基因组学的细菌聚类检测和系统发生基因组学分析方法。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）R10测序错误率的降低促使许多实验室探索将其纳入常规工作流程。然而，关于ONT R10测序在cgMLST分析中的性能仍存在矛盾报告。本研究评估了ONT R10数据在细菌爆发调查中用于cgMLST等位基因调用和聚类检测的适用性。对24个样本进行了ONT和Illumina测序数据生成。

重要性：本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technologies R10测序技术在核心基因组多位点序列分型（cgMLST）中的适用性，这是一种在（临床）爆发调查和细菌菌株追踪中广泛应用的方法。我们对24个样本进行了测序，以验证ONT R10测序在cgMLST分析中的可靠性。

title: Universal amplification and sequencing of foot-and-mouth disease virus complete genomes using nanopore technology
abstract:
### Background

Foot-and-mouth disease virus (FMDV) is capable of causing explosive outbreaks among domestic and wild cloven-hoofed animals. Genomic characterisation of FMDV is a crucial component of disease control enabling accurate tracing of disease outbreaks to be undertaken. Nanopore sequencing is an affordable and accessible form of high-throughput sequencing (HTS) technology. However, most published methods for FMDV only sequence genomic fragments or focus upon specific lineages. In this study, a universal FMDV sequencing protocol was developed alongside a bespoke analytical pipeline to sequence any FMDV genome in the absence of prior knowledge regarding the identity of the serotype or lineage.

### Methods

Universal multiplex RT-PCRs were used to amplify overlapping tiles encompassing the entire FMDV genome. The PCR products were pooled and subjected to nanopore sequencing using the portable MinION sequencing device. A bioinformatics pipeline was used to assemble genomes based upon blastn and reference assembly.

### Results

Iterative changes in primer design and pooling resulted in two panels of primers; one set amplifying twenty short fragments (S_scheme), and another set amplifying six longer fragments (L_scheme). Both approaches were shown to be capable of generating FMDV genomes, however the L_scheme was simpler, more reliable and more cost-effective at generating complete genomes. The final L_scheme protocol was assessed using 30 FMDV isolates representing all the currently circulating lineages of FMDV. As part of the development, we successfully trialled the use of this technology in Uganda, a country endemic for FMD.

### Conclusions

The amplification, sequencing and bioinformatics strategy developed here has been assessed using a diverse array of FMDV lineages. Using two multiplex PCR reactions, this approach can successfully generate complete genomes of FMDV in a lineage agnostic fashion. Therefore, the primer sets and approaches described here represent a useful tool for expanding the capacity of laboratories to characterise FMDV at the genomic level.
authors: Andrew E. Shaw, Kebaneilwe Lebani, ... Donald P. King
citation: Shaw, A.E., Lebani, K., González Gordon, L. et al. Universal amplification and sequencing of foot-and-mouth disease virus complete genomes using nanopore technology. BMC Genomics 26 , 770 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-025-11938-7

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种无需已知血清型或谱系信息即可对口蹄疫病毒（FMDV）全基因组进行测序的通用方法。通过优化引物设计和PCR分组策略，L_scheme方案在成本、可靠性和完整性方面优于S_scheme方案，成功应用于乌干达等FMD流行地区。
ai.translation:
背景：口蹄疫病毒（FMDV）能在家畜和野生动物中引发爆发性疫情。FMDV的基因组特征分析是疾病控制的关键环节，可实现疫情溯源。纳米孔测序作为高通量测序技术，具有成本低和可及性强的优势。然而现有研究多集中于特定基因片段或谱系的测序，缺乏通用性。本研究开发了无需先验血清型或谱系信息即可对任意FMDV基因组进行测序的通用协议及配套分析流程。

方法：采用通用多重RT-PCR技术扩增覆盖FMDV全基因组的重叠片段。PCR产物经混合后使用便携式MinION纳米孔测序设备进行测序。通过blastn比对和参考组装构建生物信息学分析流程。

结果：通过迭代优化引物设计和PCR分组策略，最终获得两套引物方案：一套扩增20个短片段（S_scheme），另一套扩增6个长片段（L_scheme）。两种方案均能生成完整FMDV基因组，但L_scheme在操作简便性、可靠性及成本效益方面更具优势。经30株代表性FMDV毒株验证，L_scheme方案成功实现了所有现存谱系的全基因组测序。在乌干达等FMD流行地区成功验证了该技术的实用性。

结论：本研究开发的扩增、测序及生物信息学策略已通过多种FMDV谱系验证。通过两轮多重PCR反应，该方法可实现谱系无关的完整FMDV基因组测序。所描述的引物方案和方法为实验室开展FMDV基因组学分析提供了实用工具。

title: Antibiotic resistance genes, antibiotic residues, and microplastics in influent and effluent wastewater from treatment plants in Norway, Iceland, and Finland.
abstract: Monitoring antimicrobial resistance genes (ARGs) in wastewater influents (pre-treatment) and effluents (post-treatment) provides insights into community-level circulation, potential amplification during treatment, and risks associated with gene release into surface waters. Pollutants such as antibiotic residues and microplastics (MPs) may influence ARG dynamics, highlighting the need to assess their dynamics across wastewater environments. In this study, we analyzed ARGs and bacterial communities using Oxford Nanopore (ONP) metagenomics and qPCR in wastewater samples from Mekjarvik (Norway), Reykjavik (Iceland), and Mariehamn (Åland, Finland). Antibiotic residues were quantified via High-Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC), and MPs were characterized using Micro-Fourier Transform Infrared Spectroscopy (μ-FTIR) in Mekjarvik and Reykjavik. Metagenomic analysis identified 193 unique ARGs, with the highest average (±SD) in Reykjavik (66.3 ± 4.1), followed by Mekjarvik (61.3 ± 14.1) and Mariehamn (18.0 ± 2.2). ONP sequencing revealed that many ARGs were plasmid-associated, co-occurring with metal stress genes. Common plasmids were Col440I, IncQ2, and ColRNAI. Mercury-related genes dominated metal stress genes (64.9%), followed by multimetal (23.7%) and copper (6.4%). Of 45 antibiotics screened, only sulfamethoxazole and sulfapyridine were consistently detected. Polyethylene (∼60%) was the dominant MP type; Reykjavik influent had the highest MP load (8200 MPs/m
authors: Ananda Tiwari, Adrián Jaén-Gil, Anastasia Karavaeva, Alessio Gomiero, Ásta Margrét Ásmundsdóttir, Maria João Silva, Elisa Salmivirta, Thanh Tam Tran, Anniina Sarekoski, Jeremy Cook, Rolf Lood, Tarja Pitkänen, Adriana Krolicka

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过宏基因组学和qPCR分析，揭示了污水进水和出水中抗微生物耐药基因(ARGs)的动态变化，发现不同地区ARGs丰度差异显著，并识别出与重金属胁迫相关的基因主导现象。研究同时量化了抗生素残留和微塑料对ARGs传播的影响机制。
keywords: 显微傅里叶变换红外光谱(μ-FTIR)
ai.translation: 监测污水进水（预处理）和出水（处理后）中的抗微生物耐药基因(ARGs)可揭示群体水平的传播规律、处理过程中潜在的放大效应以及基因释放至地表水的风险。抗生素残留和微塑料(MPs)等污染物可能影响ARGs动态，凸显了评估其在污水环境中变化规律的重要性。本研究采用Oxford Nanopore宏基因组学和qPCR技术，分析了挪威Mekjarvik、冰岛Reykjavik和芬兰Åland Mariehamn地区的污水样本中ARGs和细菌群落。通过高通量液相色谱(HPLC)量化抗生素残留，利用显微傅里叶变换红外光谱(μ-FTIR)表征微塑料。宏基因组分析鉴定出193种独特ARGs，其中Reykjavik平均丰度最高（66.3±4.1），其次为Mekjarvik（61.3±14.1）和Mariehamn（18.0±2.2）。ONP测序显示多数ARGs与质粒相关，常与金属胁迫基因共存。常见质粒包括Col440I、IncQ2和ColRNAI。与汞相关的基因占金属胁迫基因的64.9%，其次为多金属（23.7%）和铜（6.4%）。45种抗生素筛选中仅磺胺甲氧唑和磺胺吡啶持续检出。聚乙烯（约60%）是主要微塑料类型；Reykjavik进水中微塑料负荷最高（8200个/m³）。

title: An Atypical Case of Burkitt Lymphoma With MYC Gain and Cryptic IGH::MYC Rearrangement Detected by Rapid Nanopore Sequencing.
authors: Ka Ngai Lau, Tsz Fung Wong, Lawrence Lap Chi Tsui, Ka Wai Wong, Yuen Ting Sin, Coty Hing Yau Cheung, Eleanor Koon Chun Hui, Joyce Sin Cheung, Alice Ching Ching Wong, Sze Fai Yip

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Long read whole genome sequencing-based discovery of structural variants and their role in aetiology of non-syndromic autism spectrum disorder in India.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Despite having heritability estimates of 80%, ~ 50% cases of autism spectrum disorders (ASD) remain without a genetic diagnosis. Structural variants (SVs) detected using long-read whole genome sequencing (lrWGS) are a relatively new class of variants implicated in neurodevelopmental disorders. Short read sequencing (SRS) and chromosomal microarray (CMA) are unable to resolve these SVs due to their inherent technological limitations. This study was aimed to detect and delineate the role of SVs in children with non-syndromic ASDs using lrWGS in whom prior traditional genetic tests did not yield a definitive genetic diagnosis.

METHODS: A total of 23 patients with no prior genetic diagnosis from karyotyping, Fragile-X analysis, CMA and short read whole exome sequencing (srWES) were selected for lrWGS using Oxford Nanopore based sequencing platform. Samples were sequenced at an average coverage of ~ 7x. Contigs generated from high accuracy base calling were aligned against GRCh38/hg38 human reference genome build. SVs were called using five variant callers- Sniffles2, cuteSV, NanoVar, SVIM, and npInv, and annotated using AnnotSV. Calls from cuteSV were used as benchmark to identify concordant calls across at least three variant callers.

RESULTS: An average whole genome coverage of ~ 7x and N50 read length of 6.65 ± 3.3 kb was obtained across 46 runs (two runs/ sample). On average, a total of approximately 235,163 calls were made across all callers for each sample. The average number of deletions, duplications, insertions, inversions and translocations were 54,787, 3,335, 62,459, 1,286, and 113,296, respectively, were detected across all callers per sample. Of 23 cases, a candidate SV, an inversion of approximately 2.7 Mb in size encompassing SNAP25-AS1 gene was observed. This gene is likely to be involved in the synaptic pathway and has previously been associated with autism.

CONCLUSION: This is the first study from India to assess the role of SVs in the aetiology of non-syndromic ASDs. Despite the small sample size, low-pass genome coverage, and modest N50 read length, the study indicates a modest contribution of SVs in the aetiology of non-syndromic ASD. Dearth of data supporting the role of SVs in non-syndromic ASDs in other cohorts from around the world further supports our conclusion.
authors: Jhanvi Shah, Debasrija Mondal, Deepika Jain, Priti Mhatre, Ketan Patel, Anand Iyer, Manoj Pandya, Bhargavi Menghani, Gayatri Dave, Jayesh Sheth, Frenny Sheth, Shweta Ramdas, Harsh Sheth

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长全基因组测序(lrWGS)探索非综合征性自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)中结构变异(SVs)的作用。通过分析23例传统遗传检测未确诊的ASD患者，发现SNAP25-AS1基因区域存在约2.7Mb的倒位，提示SVs可能参与ASD发病机制。
ai.translation:
背景：尽管自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)的遗传率估计为80%，仍有约50%的病例无法通过传统遗传检测确诊。短读长测序(SRS)和染色体微阵列(CMA)因技术局限无法解析结构变异(SVs)，本研究旨在利用长读长全基因组测序(lrWGS)探索非综合征性ASD中SVs的作用。

方法：选取23例未通过核型分析、脆X综合征检测、CMA和短读长全外显子组测序(srWES)确诊的ASD患者，使用Oxford Nanopore平台进行lrWGS。平均覆盖度约7x，通过高精度碱基调用生成contigs并与GRCh38/hg38参考基因组比对。采用Sniffles2、cuteSV、NanoVar、SVIM和npInv五种变异检测工具，结合AnnotSV注释，以cuteSV结果作为基准识别至少三种工具的一致性结果。

结果：46次运行（每样本2次）获得平均7x全基因组覆盖度和6.65±3.3kb的N50读长。每样本平均产生约235,163个变异检测结果，包含平均54,787个缺失、3,335个重复、62,459个插入、1,286个倒位和113,296个易位。23例中发现约2.7Mb的SNAP25-AS1基因区域倒位，该基因参与突触通路且与自闭症相关。

结论：这是印度首项评估SVs在非综合征性ASD发病机制中作用的研究。尽管样本量小、覆盖度有限且N50读长较短，研究仍显示SVs对非综合征性ASD有一定贡献。全球其他队列中支持SVs作用的数据匮乏进一步验证了本结论。

title: Interdisciplinary Collaboration to Develop a Custom Genomic Analysis Pipeline for the Clinical Laboratory: Hepatitis B Virus and Cytomegalovirus Antiviral Resistance Genotyping.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Next-generation sequencing for hepatitis B virus (HBV) and cytomegalovirus (CMV) antiviral drug resistance (AVDR) testing improves the sensitivity of variant detection, but availability of bioinformatics and analytical pipelines are key barriers to implementation.

METHODS: Plasma was extracted on MagNA Pure 24 (Roche Diagnostics) and next-generation sequencing performed on GridION (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) with R.10.4.1 flowcells. An in-house bioinformatics pipeline was developed using Nextflow and deployed on Microsoft Azure to process FASTQ files and automate reporting of HBV genotype and AVDR, as well as CMV AVDR (UL97/54).

RESULTS: A total of 71 samples for HBV genotyping and AVDR testing and 56 samples for CMV AVDR testing were analyzed and compared to reference pipelines (DeepChek® HBV and CMV). All HBV genotypes and resistant mutations were concordant. For CMV, 74 mutations were identified in the UL97/54 region by both pipelines. However, our in-house developed method identified an additional UL97 drug resistant mutation (del598-603) in one sample.

CONCLUSIONS: A custom bioinformatics pipeline was developed for HBV and CMV genotyping and AVDR sequencing, which could be adapted to other targets to enable our clinical laboratory to expand clinical testing using next-generation sequencing.
authors: Gordon Ritchie, Mahdi Mobini, Venkat S Malladi, Tanya Lawson, Matthew Young, Willson Jang, Helia Mohammadi, Michael Payne, Aleksandra Stefanovic, Patrick Tang, Marc G Romney, Daniel T Holmes, Nancy Matic, Christopher F Lowe

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了针对HBV和CMV抗病毒药物耐药性（AVDR）检测的定制化生物信息学流程，通过下一代测序技术实现了高灵敏度变异检测。与参考流程相比，内部方法在CMV UL97/54区域发现了额外的耐药突变（del598-603），验证了其在临床检测中的应用潜力。
ai.translation:
背景：针对乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）和巨细胞病毒（CMV）的抗病毒药物耐药性（AVDR）检测，下一代测序技术（NGS）显著提升了变异检测的灵敏度，但生物信息学分析流程的可用性仍是临床实施的关键障碍。

方法：采用MagNA Pure 24（Roche Diagnostics）提取血浆样本，并使用GridION（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）搭载R.10.4.1流细胞进行NGS测序。开发了基于Nextflow的内部生物信息学流程，并部署在Microsoft Azure平台，用于处理FASTQ文件及自动化报告HBV基因型和AVDR，以及CMV AVDR（UL97/54）。

结果：共分析了71份HBV基因分型和AVDR检测样本、56份CMV AVDR检测样本，并与参考流程（DeepChek® HBV和CMV）进行对比。所有HBV基因型及耐药突变均一致。对于CMV，两种流程均在UL97/54区域识别出74个突变。然而，我们的内部方法在1份样本中额外检测到UL97药物耐药突变（del598-603）。

结论：开发了适用于HBV和CMV基因分型及AVDR测序的定制化生物信息学流程，该流程可扩展至其他靶标，使临床实验室能够通过下一代测序技术拓展临床检测项目。

title: Clinical application of nanopore sequencing for haplotype linkage analysis in preimplantation genetic testing for Duchenne muscular dystrophy
abstract: Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) is an X-linked recessive disorder characterized by progressive muscular dystrophy, ultimately leading to paralysis and death from cardiac failure and/or respiratory insufficiency. Preimplantation genetic testing for monogenic disorders (PGT-M) has proven effective in helping families with complete pedigrees carrying *DMD* mutations to produce unaffected offspring. This study was designed to evaluate the feasibility of using nanopore sequencing as an effective PGT-M technique for DMD, particularly in cases involving *de novo* mutations or incomplete pedigrees that cannot be analyzed using second-generation sequencing (SGS) alone. Nanopore sequencing was performed on two DMD female carriers. The precise breakpoints of the *DMD* mutations were detected with nanopore sequencing, and haplotypes were constructed based on flanking single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs). Haplotype linkage analyses were subsequently performed by comparing parental SNPs with embryonic SNPs to determine whether the embryos inherited the maternal *DMD* mutation-carrying chromosome. We successfully identified disease-free euploid embryos for both pedigrees. These results were consistent with the data obtained using SGS and amniocentesis. Our results establish nanopore sequencing as a clinically applicable methodology for preimplantation haplotype linkage analysis in PGT-M for DMD, particularly valuable for families with non-informative pedigrees where traditional linkage analyses are not feasible. This finding is crucial for reducing the propagation of DMD in the population through the application of nanopore sequencing.
authors: Qiuping Xia, Tianli Chang, ... Zhongyuan Yao
citation: Xia, Q., Chang, T., Ding, T. et al. Clinical application of nanopore sequencing for haplotype linkage analysis in preimplantation genetic testing for Duchenne muscular dystrophy. Sci Rep 15 , 30498 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-16358-x

ai.TLDR: 杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）是一种X染色体隐性遗传病，会导致进行性肌肉萎缩和死亡。本研究验证了纳米孔测序在PGT-M中的可行性，成功识别无病胚胎，尤其适用于新发突变或不完整家系。结果与SGS和羊水穿刺数据一致，证明纳米孔测序可作为临床可行的PGT-M方法。
ai.translation: 杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）是一种X染色体隐性遗传病，以进行性肌肉萎缩为特征，最终导致因心力衰竭和/或呼吸衰竭而死亡。针对携带*DMD*突变的完整家系，植入前遗传学检测（PGT-M）已被证明能有效帮助生产无病后代。本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序作为PGT-M技术在DMD中的可行性，特别是针对新发突变或无法通过第二代测序（SGS）单独分析的不完整家系。对两名DMD女性携带者进行了纳米孔测序，通过检测*DMD*突变的精确断裂点并基于旁侧单核苷酸多态性（SNPs）构建单体型，比较父母SNPs与胚胎SNPs进行单体型连锁分析，确定胚胎是否继承携带*DMD*突变的母源染色体。成功为两个家系识别出无病整倍体胚胎，结果与SGS和羊水穿刺数据一致。本研究确立了纳米孔测序作为临床可行的植入前单体型连锁分析方法，对传统连锁分析不可行的非信息性家系具有特别价值。该发现通过纳米孔测序应用对减少人群DMD传播具有关键意义。

title: Familial patellar dislocation and concomitant short stature due to a loss of function inACANgene detected by nanopore long-read sequencing
abstract: We reported the use of PCR-free nanopore long-read DNA sequencing to identify the disruption of *ACAN* gene function subsequent to apparently balanced chromosomal translocation involving chromosomes 15 and 20. This low-depth whole genome long-read sequencing has yielded 12.2-Gbp sequencing reads at 48 h with breakpoint at intron 1 of the *ACAN* gene on chromosome 15q26.1 and a gene-free region on chromosome 20q13.33 after structural variant detection. The breakpoint at the long arm of chromosome 15 has disrupted the *ACAN* gene and led to recurrent patellar dislocation with concomitant short stature. The *ACAN* gene is inherited in an autosomal dominant manner as demonstrated in six affected members involving three generations in a Chinese family. In this study, we have demonstrated the use of advanced genomic technology to establish the molecular mechanism that benefits surgical management and improves patient care in individuals presenting with patellar dislocation and concomitant short stature.
authors: Lisa L. P. Siu, Henry C. M. Leung, ... Ho-ming Luk
citation: Siu, L.L.P., Leung, H.C.M., Ho, S.K.L. et al. Familial patellar dislocation and concomitant short stature due to a loss of function in ACAN gene detected by nanopore long-read sequencing. J Rare Dis 4 , 49 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s44162-025-00111-z

ai.translation: 我们报告了使用无需PCR的纳米孔长读长DNA测序技术，用于识别染色体15和20间看似平衡的染色体易位导致的ACAN基因功能中断。这种低深度全基因组长读长测序在48小时内产生了12.2-Gbp的测序数据，检测到染色体15q26.1处ACAN基因内含子1的断裂点，以及染色体20q13.33的基因无区域。染色体15长臂的断裂点破坏了ACAN基因，导致复发性髌骨脱位并伴随身材矮小。ACAN基因以常染色体显性方式遗传，这一结论在涉及三代六名受影响成员的中国家族中得到验证。本研究展示了先进基因组技术在建立分子机制方面的应用，该机制有助于髌骨脱位伴身材矮小患者的手术管理并改善患者护理。
