title: Targeted Whole Genome Sequencing of African Swine Fever Virus and Classical Swine Fever Virus on the MinION Portable Sequencing Platform.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: African swine fever virus (ASFV) and classical swine fever virus (CSFV) are important transboundary animal diseases (TADs) affecting swine. ASFV is a large DNA virus with a genome size of 170-190 kilobases (kB) belonging to the family Asfarviridae, genus Asfivirus. CSFV is a single-stranded RNA virus with genome size of approximately 12 kB belonging to the family Flaviviridae, genus Pestivirus. Outbreaks involving either one of these viruses result in similar disease syndromes and significant economic impacts from: (i) high morbidity and mortality events; (ii) control measures which include culling and quarantine; and (iii) export restrictions of swine and pork products. Current detection methods during an outbreak provide minimal genetic information on the circulating virus strains/genotypes that are important for tracing and vaccine considerations. The increasing availability and reduced cost of next-generation sequencing (NGS), allows for the establishment of vital NGS protocols for the rapid identification and complete genetic characterization of outbreak strains during an investigation. NGS data provides a better understanding of viral spread and evolution facilitating the development of novel and effective control measures. In this study, panels of primers spanning the genomes of ASFV and CSFV were independently developed to generate approximately 10kB and 6kB amplicons, respectively. The primer panels consisted of 19 primer pairs for ASFV and 2 primer pairs for CSFV providing whole genome amplification of each pathogen. These primer pools were further optimized for batch pooling and thermocycling conditions, resulting in a total of 5 primer pools/reactions used for ASFV and 2 primer pairs/reactions for CSFV. The ASFV primer panel was tested on viral DNA extracted from blood collected from pigs experimentally infected with ASFV genotype I and genotype II viruses. The CSFV primer panel was tested on 11 different strains of CSFV representing the 3 known CSFV genotypes, and 21 clinical samples collected from pigs experimentally infected with 2 different genotype 1 viruses. ASFV and CSFV amplicons from optimized PCR reactions were subsequently sequenced on the Oxford Nanopore MinION platform. The targeted protocols for these viruses resulted in an average coverage greater than 1000X for ASFV with 99% of the genome covered, and 10,000X-20,000X for CSFV with 97% to 99% of the genomes covered. The ASFV targeted whole genome sequencing protocol has been optimized for genotype II ASF viruses that have been responsible for the more recent outbreaks outside of Africa. The CSFV targeted whole genome sequencing protocol has universal applications for the detection of all CSFV genotypes. Protocols developed and evaluated here will be essential complementary tools for early pathogen detection and differentiation as well as genetic characterization of these high consequence swine viruses, globally and within the United States, should an outbreak occur.
authors: Chester D McDowell, Taeyong Kwon, Patricia Assato, Emily Mantlo, Jessie D Trujillo, Natasha N Gaudreault, Leonardo C Caserta, Igor Morozov, Jayme A Souza-Neto, Roman M Pogranichniy, Diego G Diel, Juergen A Richt

ai.TLDR: 非洲猪瘟病毒（ASFV）和经典猪瘟病毒（CSFV）是影响猪群的重要跨境动物疾病，其爆发会导致高发病率和经济损失。本研究开发了针对这两种病毒的全基因组扩增引物面板，并通过优化NGS协议实现了高覆盖率的全基因组测序，为疫情监测和疫苗研发提供关键数据。
ai.translation: 非洲猪瘟病毒（ASFV）和经典猪瘟病毒（CSFV）是影响猪群的重要跨境动物疾病（TADs）。ASFV是一种基因组大小为170-190千碱基（kB）的大型DNA病毒，属于Asfarviridae科Asfivirus属；CSFV是一种基因组大小约为12 kB的单链RNA病毒，属于Flaviviridae科Pestivirus属。两种病毒爆发均会导致相似的疾病综合征，并因高发病率和死亡率、控制措施（包括扑杀和隔离）以及猪肉出口限制造成显著经济损失。现有检测方法在疫情中提供的病毒株/基因型遗传信息有限，难以用于溯源和疫苗研发。随着下一代测序（NGS）技术成本降低和可用性提高，建立快速鉴定和全基因组特征分析的NGS协议成为可能。NGS数据有助于更深入理解病毒传播和进化，从而开发新型有效控制措施。本研究独立开发了覆盖ASFV和CSFV全基因组的引物面板，分别生成约10 kB和6 kB的扩增子。ASFV引物组包含19对引物，CSFV引物组包含2对引物，实现全基因组扩增。通过优化批量混合和热循环条件，最终形成5个引物池/反应用于ASFV检测，2对引物/反应用于CSFV检测。ASFV引物组在基因型I和II病毒感染猪的血液提取物中进行测试，CSFV引物组则针对11种代表3个已知基因型的CSFV株及21份感染两种基因型1病毒的临床样本进行验证。优化后的PCR扩增子在牛津纳米孔MinION平台进行测序，ASFV平均覆盖深度达1000倍（覆盖99%基因组），CSFV覆盖深度达10,000-20,000倍（覆盖97-99%基因组）。针对基因型II ASF病毒的全基因组测序协议已优化，该基因型是近期非洲以外地区疫情的主要病原体。CSFV全基因组测序协议具有普适性，可检测所有CSFV基因型。本研究开发的协议将成为全球（包括美国）疫情发生时早期病原体检测、鉴别及遗传特征分析的关键互补工具。

title: Isoform analysis of heterozygous putative splicing variants at the allele level using nanopore long-read sequencing
abstract: One of the challenges in clinical genetics for rare diseases and personalized medicine is evaluating isoform alterations arising from heterozygous putative splicing variants at the allele level. Our aim was to analyze these variants by dividing cDNA or direct RNA nanopore long reads into two alleles, referencing whole-genome sequencing data containing allele-informative single nucleotide variants and then comparing the allele-separated reads using Full-Length Alternative Isoform analysis of RNA (FLAIR), a previously published bioinformatics tool for isoform analysis. In this study, we developed an allele-separative bioinformatics pipeline and described its performance. We applied our pipeline to previously published nanopore direct RNA sequencing data, as well as 5’ cap-trapping full-length cDNA nanopore sequencing (CTR-seq) data from blood samples of three individuals. We successfully identified heterozygous splicing variants associated with significant isoform differences between alleles. Furthermore, we uncovered the effects of a novel pathogenic splicing variant in *PYGM* on isoforms in a compound-heterozygous case of McArdle disease using nanopore cDNA amplicon and targeted genomic sequencing. This study demonstrates the utility of nanopore long-read sequencing for isoform analysis at the allele level, providing a valuable approach to evaluating the direct consequences of heterozygous splicing variants in individuals.
authors: Kokoro Ozaki, Takashi Irioka, ... Takanori Yokota

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对罕见病和个性化医学中等位基因水平异质性剪接变异体的评估难题，开发了基于纳米孔长读长测序的等位基因分离分析流程。通过FLAIR工具结合纳米孔cDNA扩增子测序和靶向基因组测序，成功揭示了PYGM基因新型致病剪接变异体对麦卡德尔病复合杂合子的等位基因特异性剪接影响。
keywords: 全长替代等位基因分析
ai.translation: 临床遗传学在罕见病和个性化医学领域面临的重要挑战是评估等位基因水平上由杂合潜在剪接变异体引起的等位基因间异构体改变。本研究旨在通过将cDNA或直接RNA纳米孔长读长测序数据分割为两个等位基因，参考包含等位基因信息单核苷酸变异的全基因组测序数据，利用已发表的全长替代等位基因分析RNA（FLAIR）生物信息学工具进行等位基因分离读长比较。本研究开发了等位基因分离生物信息学分析流程并评估其性能，将该流程应用于先前发表的纳米孔直接RNA测序数据，以及来自三名个体血液样本的5'帽捕获全长cDNA纳米孔测序（CTR-seq）数据。成功鉴定了与等位基因间显著异构体差异相关的杂合剪接变异体。进一步通过纳米孔cDNA扩增子测序和靶向基因组测序，揭示了PYGM基因新型致病剪接变异体在麦卡德尔病复合杂合子中对等位基因特异性异构体的影响。本研究证明了纳米孔长读长测序在等位基因水平异构体分析中的应用价值，为评估杂合剪接变异体的直接效应提供了重要方法。

title: Pangenome discovery of missing autism variants.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: Autism spectrum disorders (ASDs) are genetically and phenotypically heterogeneous and the majority of cases still remain genetically unresolved. To better understand large-effect pathogenic variation, we generated long-read sequencing data to construct phased and near-complete genome assemblies (average contig N50=43 Mbp, QV=56) for 189 individuals from 51 families with unsolved cases of autism. ai.TLDR: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASDs）具有遗传和表型异质性，多数病例遗传原因尚未明确。研究通过长读长测序技术构建相位完整的基因组组装体，结合读取与组装策略实现变异的全面表征。
ai.translation: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASDs）在遗传和表型上表现出高度异质性，目前大多数病例的遗传原因仍不清楚。为更深入理解具有显著效应的致病变异，我们生成了长读长测序数据，构建了相位完整且接近完整的基因组组装体（平均contig N50=43 Mbp，QV=56），覆盖来自51个家庭的189名个体。我们应用基于读取和组装的策略，以实现对变异的全面表征。

title: Typhi Mykrobe: fast and accurate lineage identification and antimicrobial resistance genotyping directly from sequence reads for the typhoid fever agent
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Typhoid fever results from systemic infection with 

RESULTS: We validated Typhi Mykrobe lineage genotyping by comparison with the current standard read mapping-based approach and demonstrated 99.8% concordance across nearly 13,000 genomes sequenced with Illumina platforms. For the few isolates with discordant calls, we show that Typhi Mykrobe results are better supported by the evidence from raw sequence read data than the results generated using the mapping-based approach. We also demonstrate 99.9% concordance for detection of AMR determinants compared with the current standard assembly-based approach, with similar results for plasmid marker detection. Typhi Mykrobe predicts clinical resistance categorisation (S/I/R) for eight drug classes, and we show strong agreement with phenotypic categorisations generated from reference laboratory minimum inhibitory concentration (MIC) data for n=1,572 Illumina-sequenced isolates (>99% agreement within one doubling dilution). We show strong concordance (>96% for genotype and >98% for AMR and plasmid) between calls made from ONT reads and those made from Illumina reads for isolates sequenced on both platforms (n =93 genomes). Typhi Mykrobe takes less than a minute per sample and is available at https://github.com/typhoidgenomics/genotyphi.

CONCLUSIONS: Typhi Mykrobe provides rapid and sensitive genotyping of Typhi genomes direct from Illumina and ONT reads, although lower accuracy was observed for R9 ONT data. It demonstrated accurate assignment of GenoTyphi lineage, detection of AMR determinants and prediction of corresponding AMR phenotypes, and identification of plasmid replicons.

ai.TLDR: 本研究验证了Typhi Mykrobe谱系基因分型方法，通过与现有标准方法对比，在近13,000个基因组中实现99.8%的一致性。该工具在检测耐药基因和预测临床耐药表型方面表现出色，且在Illumina和ONT测序数据间实现高一致性。
ai.translation: 背景：伤寒热是由系统性感染引起的。结果：我们通过与现有标准的基于读取映射的方法对比验证了Typhi Mykrobe谱系基因分型方法，在使用Illumina平台测序的近13,000个基因组中实现了99.8%的一致性。对于少数存在不一致结果的菌株，我们证明Typhi Mykrobe的结果比基于映射方法的结果更受原始序列读取数据的支持。我们还展示了在检测耐药基因决定因子时与现有标准基于组装方法的一致性达到99.9%，且在质粒标记检测中结果相似。Typhi Mykrobe可预测8类药物的临床耐药分类（S/I/R），并展示了与参考实验室基于最小抑菌浓度（MIC）数据生成的表型分类在1,572个Illumina测序菌株中>99%的一致性（在1个倍增稀释度内）。对于同时在Illumina和ONT平台测序的93个菌株，我们展示了基于ONT读取和Illumina读取的分类结果在谱系（>96%）和耐药基因/质粒（>98%）方面高度一致。Typhi Mykrobe每个样本处理时间不足1分钟，可在https://github.com/typhoidgenomics/genotyphi获取。结论：Typhi Mykrobe可快速灵敏地对Typhi基因组进行基因分型，直接从Illumina和ONT读取数据中获取结果，尽管R9 ONT数据的准确性较低。该工具展示了准确的GenoTyphi谱系分类、耐药基因检测、对应耐药表型预测以及质粒复制子的识别能力。

title: Beyond the Cut: Long-read sequencing reveals complex genomic and transcriptomic changes in AAV-CRISPR therapy for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: Adeno associated virus (AAV)-mediated delivery of CRISPR associated nucleases (AAV-CRISPR) is a promising solution to treat genetic diseases such as Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD) and is now in early clinical trials. However, genotoxicity and immunogenicity concerns have hindered clinical translation. Due to the complex etiology associated with DMD, the post-transduction consequences of double-stranded breaks induced by AAV-CRISPR in disease models are unclear. This barrier is partially conferred by conventional sequencing methods where common outcomes of AAV-CRISPR editing often escape detection. However, recent reports of novel long-read sequencing approaches permit comprehensive variant detection using a broader sequence context. Here, we comprehensively investigated genomic and transcriptomic post-AAV-CRISPR transduction consequences in myoblast cells and a DMD mouse model following intramuscular and intravenous AAV-CRISPR therapy using both long- and short-read sequencing techniques. Structural variant characterization indicates that unintended on-target large insertions and inversions are common editing outcomes. We demonstrate that combining adaptive sampling with nanopore Cas9-targeted sequencing (AS-nCATS) for long-read quantification of AAV integration is synergistic for detecting difficult-to-amplify editing events. This unbiased data suggests that full-length AAV integration is equally as probable as the on-target deletion. Further, we develop a Nanopore Rapid Amplification of cDNA Ends (nRACE-seq) pipeline for long-read detection of unknown 5' or 3' ends of edited transcripts. The nRACE-seq approach effectively detects the presence of AAV-

ai.TLDR: AAV-CRISPR技术在治疗杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）中展现出潜力，但基因毒性和免疫原性限制了其临床转化。研究通过长读长测序技术揭示了AAV-CRISPR编辑后基因组和转录组的复杂变化，发现意外的大片段插入和倒位是常见编辑结果。

title: Rapid and reliable species-level identification from clinical samples using 16 S rRNA gene nanopore sequencing analysis
abstract: The detection and identification of bacterial species in clinical samples are crucial for patient management and antibiotic treatment. When culture-based identification methods fail, 16 S rRNA gene next-generation sequencing (NGS) serves as a valuable alternative. However, its clinical utility is often limited by prolonged time to results (TtR) and limited species-level resolution. This study aimed to develop and validate a faster, more discriminative 16 S rRNA gene NGS workflow. Our current 16 S rRNA gene NGS protocol uses micelle-based PCR (micPCR) targeting the V4 region, followed by Illumina sequencing. This method ensures accurate quantification of 16 S rRNA gene copies in (low biomass) clinical samples by reducing PCR artefacts and correcting for background DNA contamination. To shorten the TtR and improve species-level determination, the micPCR protocol was adapted to amplify full-length 16s rRNA genes, followed by nanopore sequencing using the Flongle Flow Cell with automated data analysis using the Genome Detective platform. Testing with a synthetic microbial community and six clinical samples showed that the 16 S rRNA gene micPCR/nanopore sequencing protocol maintains good accuracy and sensitivity, reducing TtR to 24 h and enhancing species-level resolution. This optimized workflow improves clinical diagnostics, making it a valuable tool for guiding patient treatment decisions.
authors: Marco J. R. Ivens, Sergio Kamminga, ... Stefan A. Boers
citation: Ivens, M.J.R., Kamminga, S., Benchamach, K. et al. Rapid and reliable species-level identification from clinical samples using 16 S rRNA gene nanopore sequencing analysis. Sci Rep 15 , 28606 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-14071-3

ai.TLDR: 临床样本中细菌物种的检测与鉴定对患者管理及抗生素治疗至关重要。传统培养法失效时，16S rRNA基因NGS是重要替代方案，但存在检测时间长和物种分辨率不足的问题。本研究开发并验证了基于micPCR和纳米孔测序的优化流程，将检测时间缩短至24小时并提升物种分辨率，为临床诊断提供更高效的工具。
ai.translation: 临床样本中细菌物种的检测与鉴定对患者管理及抗生素治疗至关重要。当基于培养的鉴定方法失效时，16S rRNA基因下一代测序（NGS）成为有价值的替代方案。然而，其临床应用常受限于较长的检测时间（TtR）和有限的物种水平分辨率。本研究旨在开发并验证一种更快、更具区分度的16S rRNA基因NGS工作流程。当前的16S rRNA基因NGS协议采用基于微胶体的PCR（micPCR）靶向V4区域，随后进行Illumina测序。该方法通过减少PCR假象和校正背景DNA污染，确保在（低生物量）临床样本中准确量化16S rRNA基因拷贝数。为缩短检测时间并提升物种水平鉴定能力，micPCR协议被优化以扩增全长16S rRNA基因，随后使用Flongle Flow Cell进行纳米孔测序，并通过Genome Detective平台实现自动化数据分析。通过合成微生物群和六个临床样本的测试显示，16S rRNA基因micPCR/纳米孔测序协议保持良好的准确性和灵敏度，将检测时间缩短至24小时并增强物种水平分辨率。该优化流程提升了临床诊断能力，使其成为指导患者治疗决策的有价值工具。

title: The Platinum Pedigree: a long-read benchmark for genetic variants
abstract: Recent advances in genome sequencing have improved variant calling in complex regions of the human genome. However, it is difficult to quantify variant calling performance because existing standards often focus on specificity, neglecting completeness in difficult-to-analyze regions. To create a more comprehensive truth set, we used Mendelian inheritance in a large pedigree (CEPH-1463) to filter variants across PacBio high-fidelity (HiFi), Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. This generated a variant map with over 4.7 million single-nucleotide variants, 767,795 insertions and deletions (indels), 537,486 tandem repeats and 24,315 structural variants, covering 2.77 Gb of the GRCh38 genome. This work adds ~200 Mb of high-confidence regions, including 8% more small variants, and introduces the first tandem repeat and structural variant truth sets for NA12878 and her family. As an example of the value of this improved benchmark, we retrained DeepVariant using these data to reduce genotyping errors by ~34%.
authors: Zev Kronenberg, Cillian Nolan, ... Michael A. Eberle
citation: Kronenberg, Z., Nolan, C., Porubsky, D. et al. The Platinum Pedigree: a long-read benchmark for genetic variants. Nat Methods 22 , 1669–1676 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-025-02750-y

ai.TLDR: 基因组测序技术的进步提升了复杂区域的变异检测能力，但现有标准忽视了难以分析区域的完整性。通过家系孟德尔遗传规律构建参考集，本研究生成了覆盖2.77 Gb基因组的变异图谱，新增约200 Mb高置信度区域，并显著降低了DeepVariant的基因型错误率。
ai.translation: 基因组测序技术的最新进展显著提升了人类基因组复杂区域的变异检测能力。然而，现有评估标准往往侧重特异性而忽视了难以分析区域的完整性量化。为构建更全面的参考集，我们利用大型家系（CEPH-1463）的孟德尔遗传规律，对PacBio高保真（HiFi）、Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台的变异进行过滤。该方法生成了包含470万多个单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、767,795个插入缺失（indels）、537,486个串联重复和24,315个结构变异的变异图谱，覆盖了GRCh38基因组的2.77 Gb区域。本研究为NA12878及其家系首次构建了串联重复和结构变异的参考集，并新增约200 Mb的高置信度区域，包含8%更多的小变异。作为改进基准的价值示例，我们利用这些数据重新训练DeepVariant模型，使基因型错误率降低了约34%。

title: Nanopore sequencing reveals the genomic diversity of the variants of concern of SARS-CoV-2 during 2021 disease outbreak in Pakistan
abstract: The global spread of SARS-CoV-2 was significantly impacted by the emergence of Variants of Concern (VOC), with Pakistan experiencing similar trends to other countries. To gain a comprehensive understanding of the genomic epidemiology of SARS-CoV-2 strains circulating during Pakistan’s third and fourth pandemic waves, we conducted the largest single sequencing effort in the country to date. Using the GridION platform (Oxford Nanopore Technologies), we performed whole genome sequencing on 1052 confirmed COVID-19 patient samples collected from multiple cities across Pakistan between March and October 2021. Our analysis revealed a clear temporal shift in variant dominance. The Alpha variant (B.1.1.7 lineage) predominated in the first half of 2021, while the Delta variant (B.1.617.2) became most prevalent in the latter half. This transition reflects global trends and provides crucial insights into the timing and dynamics of this shift within Pakistan. Mutational analysis revealed that the most frequent nucleotide mutations in Pakistani SARS-CoV-2 samples were A23403G (associated with the D614G mutation in the spike protein), C3037T, C14408T, and C241T, potentially contributing to increased disease transmission and evasion of host immune responses. The rapid evolution and spread of these circulating variants highlight the possibility of novel variants emerging with enhanced mutational fitness. The AY.108 lineage, which has been reported at relatively low frequencies globally including in Europe and North America, with Pakistan accounting for approximately 34% of global cases, suggesting potential regional evolution or specific introduction events. Our findings underscore the dynamic nature of SARS-CoV-2 and emphasize the critical importance of ongoing, large-scale genomic surveillance in Pakistan. This study demonstrates the feasibility and utility of using nanopore sequencing for comprehensive viral monitoring in Pakistan’s public health context. While we utilized the higher-throughput GridION platform for centralized processing, the Oxford Nanopore technology still provided distinct advantages through its simplified library preparation protocol, flexible run capacities, and reduced computational requirements for base-calling compared to traditional high-throughput sequencers. These benefits enabled efficient processing of our large sample batches collected from distributed sites across the country, demonstrating a scalable approach for genomic surveillance that balances throughput needs with resource availability. This could inform future public health strategies, including vaccine updates and targeted interventions. Continued monitoring and adaptive strategies are essential to keep pace with the evolving viral ecology and to enhance preparedness for future outbreaks.
authors: Zohaib Ul Hassan, Minkyu Park, ... Seil Kim
citation: Hassan, Z., Park, M., Park, D. et al. Nanopore sequencing reveals the genomic diversity of the variants of concern of SARS-CoV-2 during 2021 disease outbreak in Pakistan. Sci Rep 15 , 28129 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-12774-1
description: The global spread of SARS-CoV-2 was significantly impacted by the emergence of Variants of Concern (VOC), with Pakistan experiencing similar trends...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过大规模基因组测序揭示了巴基斯坦第三、四波疫情中SARS-CoV-2变异株的时空演变规律，发现Alpha和Delta变异株呈现显著的时间替代特征。研究结果为理解病毒演化动态提供了关键数据，强调了持续基因组监测对公共卫生策略制定的重要性。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2关注变异株（VOC）的全球传播对疫情发展产生了显著影响，巴基斯坦呈现出与他国相似的流行趋势。为全面解析巴基斯坦第三、四波疫情中SARS-CoV-2流行株的基因组流行病学特征，本研究开展了迄今为止该国规模最大的全基因组测序工作。通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies的GridION平台，对2021年3月至10月期间从巴基斯坦多个城市收集的1052例确诊新冠患者样本进行了全基因组测序。分析结果显示变异株主导地位存在明显的时间演变特征：2021年上半年Alpha变异株（B.1.1.7谱系）占主导地位，下半年Delta变异株（B.1.617.2谱系）成为主要流行株。这种转变与全球趋势一致，为理解巴基斯坦境内变异株更替的时间节点和动态提供了关键证据。突变分析显示，巴基斯坦SARS-CoV-2样本中最常见的核苷酸突变包括A23403G（与刺突蛋白D614G突变相关）、C3037T、C14408T和C241T，这些突变可能促进了疾病传播和宿主免疫逃逸。这些快速演化的流行株提示可能存在具有更高突变适应性的新型变异株出现风险。AY.108谱系虽在全球（包括欧洲和北美）报道频率较低，但巴基斯坦占全球病例的约34%，提示可能存在区域演化或特定引入事件。研究结果凸显了SARS-CoV-2的动态特性，强调了巴基斯坦持续开展大规模基因组监测的必要性。本研究验证了纳米孔测序技术在巴基斯坦公共卫生体系中进行全面病毒监测的可行性。尽管采用高通量GridION平台进行集中处理，但Oxford Nanopore技术仍因其简化文库制备流程、灵活的运行容量和较低的碱基调用计算需求相比传统高通量测序仪具有显著优势。这些优势使我们能够高效处理来自全国分散采样点的大批量样本，展示了在测序通量需求与资源可用性之间取得平衡的可扩展监测方案。该成果可为未来公共卫生策略（包括疫苗更新和针对性干预措施）提供决策依据。持续监测和适应性策略对于应对不断演变的病毒生态并提升未来疫情应对准备度至关重要。

title: Long-read RNA-sequencing reveals transcript-specific regulation in human-derived cortical neurons.
abstract: Long-read RNA sequencing has transformed transcriptome analysis by enabling comprehensive mapping of full-length transcripts, providing an unprecedented resolution of transcript diversity, alternative splicing and transcript-specific regulation. In this study, we employed nanopore long-read RNA sequencing to profile the transcriptomes of three cell types commonly used to model brain disorders, human fibroblasts, induced pluripotent stem cells and stem cell-derived cortical neurons, identifying extensive transcript diversity with 15 072 transcripts in stem cell-derived cortical neurons, 13 048 in fibroblasts and 12 759 in induced pluripotent stem cells. Our analyses uncovered 35 519 differential transcript expression events and 5135 differential transcript usage events, underscoring the complexity of transcriptomic regulation across these cell types. Importantly, by integrating differential transcript expression and usage analyses, we gained deeper insights into transcript dynamics that are not captured by gene-level expression analysis alone. Differential transcript usage analysis highlighted transcript-specific changes in disease-relevant genes such as
authors: Jishu Xu, Michaela Hörner, Elena Buena Atienza, Kalaivani Manibarathi, Maike Nagel, Stefan Hauser, Jakob Admard, Nicolas Casadei, Stephan Ossowski, Rebecca Schuele

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术，系统分析了三种脑疾病模型细胞的转录组多样性，揭示了转录调控的复杂性。通过整合差异转录表达与使用分析，发现了35,519个差异表达事件和5,135个差异使用事件，为疾病相关基因的转录动态变化提供了新见解。
ai.translation: 长读长RNA测序技术通过实现全长转录本的全面映射，显著提升了转录组分析的分辨率，为解析转录多样性、可变剪接及转录特异性调控提供了前所未有的洞察。本研究采用纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术，对三种常用于模拟脑疾病的细胞类型——人类成纤维细胞、诱导多能干细胞及干细胞来源的皮质神经元的转录组进行了分析，发现干细胞来源的皮质神经元中存在15,072个转录本，成纤维细胞中为13,048个，诱导多能干细胞中为12,759个。分析结果揭示了35,519个差异转录表达事件和5,135个差异转录使用事件，凸显了这些细胞类型间转录组调控的复杂性。重要的是，通过整合差异转录表达与使用分析，我们获得了基因层面表达分析无法捕捉的转录动态信息。差异转录使用分析特别突出了与疾病相关基因的转录特异性变化，例如...

title: Cost-effective promoter methylation analysis via target long-read bisulfite sequencing: a case study in severe preterm birth.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: DNA methylation plays a critical role in the dynamics of gene expression regulation and the development of various disorders. Whole-genome bisulfite sequencing can provide single-base resolution of CpG methylation levels and is the “gold standard” for DNA methylation quantification, but its high cost limits its widespread application. In contrast, targeted sequencing provides an optimal, cost-effective solution when focusing on specific candidate regions while providing sufficient sequencing depth. Here, we present a targeted bisulfite sequencing approach in which nanopore sequencing is used to study the methylation status of regions of interest.

METHODS: We applied this workflow to study the promoters of candidate genes associated with severe preterm delivery in a Latin American population. We amplified fragments greater than 1 kilobase in length from 12 genes via long PCR. Each sample was barcoded and pooled for sequencing in MinION flow cells.

RESULTS: This approach achieves high sequencing depths, ensuring robust DNA methylation (DNAm) estimates. We detected significant hypomethylation of MIR155HG and hypermethylation of the ANKRD24 gene promoter in severe preterm birth samples, which is concordant with previously reported gene expression changes.

CONCLUSIONS: This approach represents a scalable and cost-effective method suitable for targeted promoter methylation profiling across several samples. Our study provides a proof-of-concept for larger studies, demonstrating the broad applicability and scalability of our assay to any locus of interest. These features render the method especially apt for clinical diagnostics and precision medicine.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: The online version contains supplementary material available at 10.1186/s12920-025-02193-6.
authors: Silvana Pereyra, Angela Sardina, Rita Neumann, Celia May, Rossana Sapiro, Bernardo Bertoni, Mónica Cappetta

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化在基因表达调控和多种疾病的发展中起关键作用。全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序可以提供单碱基分辨率的CpG甲基化水平，是DNA甲基化定量的“金标准”，但其高成本限制了其广泛应用。相比之下，靶向测序在关注特定候选区域的同时提供足够的测序深度，是一种更优且成本效益更高的解决方案。本文提出了一种靶向亚硫酸氢盐测序方法，利用纳米孔测序研究感兴趣区域的甲基化状态。
ai.translation:
背景：DNA甲基化在基因表达调控的动态变化和多种疾病的发展中起着关键作用。全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序可以提供单碱基分辨率的CpG甲基化水平，是DNA甲基化定量的“金标准”，但其高成本限制了其广泛应用。相比之下，靶向测序在关注特定候选区域的同时提供足够的测序深度，是一种更优且成本效益更高的解决方案。本文提出了一种靶向亚硫酸氢盐测序方法，利用纳米孔测序研究感兴趣区域的甲基化状态。

方法：我们应用了这一流程，研究了与拉丁美洲人群中严重早产相关的候选基因的启动子区域。我们通过长PCR扩增了12个基因中长度超过1千碱基的片段。每个样本均被条形码标记并混合后进行MinION流细胞测序。

结果：该方法实现了高测序深度，确保了稳健的DNA甲基化（DNAm）估计。我们在严重早产样本中检测到MIR155HG的显著低甲基化和ANKRD24基因启动子的高甲基化，这与之前报道的基因表达变化一致。

结论：该方法代表了一种可扩展且成本效益高的方法，适用于多个样本的靶向启动子甲基化分析。我们的研究为更大规模的研究提供了概念验证，展示了我们的检测方法在任何感兴趣位点的广泛应用和可扩展性。这些特性使该方法特别适用于临床诊断和精准医学。

补充信息：在线版本包含可在10.1186/s12920-025-02193-6获取的补充材料。

title: Extracellular Vesicles for Clinical Diagnostics: From Bulk Measurements to Single-Vesicle Analysis.
abstract: Extracellular vesicles (EVs) play a crucial role in intercellular communication, signaling pathways, and disease pathogenesis by transporting biomolecules such as DNA, RNA, proteins, and lipids derived from their cells of origin, and they have demonstrated substantial potential in clinical applications. Their clinical significance underscores the need for sensitive methods to fully harness their diagnostic potential. In this comprehensive review, we explore EV heterogeneity related to biogenesis, structure, content, origin, sample type, and function roles; the use of EVs as disease biomarkers; and the evolving landscape of EV measurement for clinical diagnostics, highlighting the progression from bulk measurement to single vesicle analysis. This review covers emerging technologies such as single-particle tracking microscopy, single-vesicle RNA sequencing, and various nanopore-, nanoplasmonic-, immuno-digital droplet-, microfluidic-, and nanomaterial-based techniques. Unlike traditional bulk analysis methods, these methods contribute uniquely to EV characterization. Techniques like droplet-based single EV-counting enzyme-linked immunosorbent assays (ELISA), proximity-dependent barcoding assays, and surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy further enhance our ability to precisely identify biomarkers, detect diseases earlier, and significantly improve clinical outcomes. These innovations provide access to intricate molecular details that expand our understanding of EV composition, with profound diagnostic implications. This review also examines key research challenges in the field, including the complexities of sample analysis, technique sensitivity and specificity, the level of detail provided by analytical methods, and practical applications, and we identify directions for future research. This review underscores the value of advanced EV analysis methods, which contribute to deep insights into EV-mediated pathological diversity and enhanced clinical diagnostics.
authors: Hai Linh Tran, Wenshu Zheng, David A Issadore, Hyungsoon Im, Yoon-Kyoung Cho, Yuanqing Zhang, Dingbin Liu, Yang Liu, Bo Li, Fei Liu, David Tai Wai Wong, Jiashu Sun, Kun Qian, Mei He, Meihua Wan, Yong Zeng, Ke Cheng, Tony Jun Huang, Daniel T Chiu, Luke P Lee, Lei Zheng, Andrew K Godwin, Raghu Kalluri, Steven A Soper, Tony Y Hu

ai.TLDR: 细胞外囊泡（EVs）在疾病发生机制和临床诊断中具有重要价值，本文系统综述了EVs的异质性特征、作为疾病生物标志物的应用及新型检测技术进展，重点探讨了从群体分析到单囊泡分析的技术革新。研究强调了单粒子追踪显微镜、单囊泡RNA测序等新兴技术对提升疾病早期检测和临床预后的重要性。
ai.translation: 细胞外囊泡（Extracellular vesicles, EVs）通过运输其来源细胞的DNA、RNA、蛋白质和脂质等生物分子，在细胞间通讯、信号通路和疾病发病机制中发挥关键作用，展现出显著的临床应用潜力。其临床重要性凸显了开发高灵敏度检测方法以充分挖掘诊断价值的迫切需求。本综述系统探讨了EVs的异质性特征，包括生物发生、结构、内容物、来源、样本类型及功能角色；分析了EVs作为疾病生物标志物的应用；并阐述了EV检测技术从群体分析向单囊泡分析的发展趋势。文章覆盖单粒子追踪显微镜、单囊泡RNA测序以及基于纳米孔、纳米等离子体、免疫数字液滴、微流控和纳米材料等多种新兴技术。与传统群体分析方法不同，这些技术为EV表征提供了独特贡献。液滴基单EV计数酶联免疫吸附测定（droplet-based single EV-counting enzyme-linked immunosorbent assays, ELISA）、依赖性邻近测序技术（proximity-dependent barcoding assays）和表面增强拉曼光谱（surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy）等技术进一步提升了生物标志物精准识别能力，实现了疾病早期检测并显著改善临床结局。这些创新技术提供了对EV组成复杂分子细节的深入洞察，具有深远的诊断意义。本文还分析了该领域关键研究挑战，包括样本分析复杂性、技术灵敏度与特异性、分析方法提供的细节水平及实际应用，明确了未来研究方向。综述强调了先进EV分析技术的价值，其为揭示EV介导的病理多样性并提升临床诊断能力提供了深度见解。

title: Long-Range PCR and Nanopore Sequencing Enables High-Throughput Detection ofTCF4Trinucleotide Repeat Expansions in Fuchs Endothelial Corneal Dystrophy
abstract:
### Introduction

Trinucleotide repeat expansion in CTG18.1, in intron 2 of *TCF4* (MIM *602272, #613267), is the main cause of Fuchs endothelial corneal dystrophy (FECD), accounting for around 75% of cases in Caucasians. CTG18.1 repeat expansion has typically been detected in peripheral blood genomic DNA by Southern blotting or short tandem repeat polymerase chain reaction (STR-PCR) combined with triplet-repeat primed PCR (TP-PCR) if needed. However both methods estimate the size of the expanded repeat relative to a size standard, and the former requires microgram amounts of DNA. To support the development of therapies, a high-throughput screening approach for repeat expansions in FECD is required. Here, we present a sensitive assay using long-range PCR and nanopore sequencing of genomic DNA to accurately resolve the CTG18.1 repeat.

### Methods

The CTG18.1 locus was analysed in genomic DNA from peripheral blood leukocytes by two different methods, and results were compared. The first approach used STR-PCR and capillary electrophoresis, followed by confirmatory testing of apparent homozygotes by TP-PCR. The second used long-range PCR, library preparation and long-read sequencing on an Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION, with resolution of repeat length using the STRique algorithm.

### Results

CTG18.1 expansion was screened for in 119 patients with FECD and 83 controls, by STR/TP-PCR genotyping and, independently, by long-range PCR/long-read nanopore sequencing. Both methods gave comparable results, but the latter was also able to measure repeat length. A total of 73.1% of FECD cases (87/119) and 1.2% of age-matched controls (1/83) had at least one CTG18.1 expansion that was ≥ 50 repeats. The expanded CTG18.1 allele was inherited across multiple generations in four larger families, in a manner consistent with causing a dominant phenotype, revealing that some younger family members may be at risk. The G allele of SNP rs599550, ~1kb away from the expansion, is linked (in cis) with expanded alleles in 80.8% of FECD alleles with an expansion, compared with 12.5% in FECD alleles in cases without an expansion and 14.6% in Europeans.

### Discussion

We demonstrate that long-range PCR and long-read nanopore sequencing is a sensitive method requiring only nanograms of DNA, which can be scaled up for high-throughput detection and accurate sizing of CTG18.1 in peripheral blood DNA. The SNP, rs599550, is in linkage disequilibrium with the expansion and physically closer than rs613872, previously used in FECD association studies, making it better for use in diagnostic or association studies.
authors: Bushra Alayed, Salina Siddiqui, ... Manir Ali
citation: Alayed, B., Siddiqui, S., Anand, S. et al. Long-Range PCR and Nanopore Sequencing Enables High-Throughput Detection of TCF4 Trinucleotide Repeat Expansions in Fuchs Endothelial Corneal Dystrophy. Mol Diagn Ther (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s40291-025-00803-8

ai.TLDR: Fuchs角膜营养不良（FECD）的主要病因是CTG18.1三核苷酸重复扩展，传统Southern印迹法和STR-PCR检测方法存在灵敏度低、需大量DNA等局限。本研究开发了基于长距离PCR和纳米孔长读长测序的高通量检测方法，可精准量化重复长度并降低DNA用量，为疾病机制研究和治疗开发提供新工具。
ai.translation:
CTG18.1三核苷酸重复扩展位于TCF4基因（MIM *602272, #613267）内含子2，是导致Fuchs角膜营养不良（FECD）的主要原因，约占白种人病例的75%。传统检测方法通常采用Southern印迹法或结合三联体重复引物PCR（TP-PCR）的短串联重复PCR（STR-PCR）技术，但这些方法均需依赖标准参照物估算重复长度，且Southern印迹法需要微克级DNA。为支持治疗开发，亟需建立高通量的FECD重复扩展筛查方案。本研究提出了一种基于长距离PCR和纳米孔长读长测序的高灵敏度检测方法，可精准解析CTG18.1重复序列。

研究通过两种方法分析了外周血白细胞基因组DNA中的CTG18.1位点：第一种方法采用STR-PCR结合毛细管电泳，再通过TP-PCR验证疑似纯合子；第二种方法使用长距离PCR、文库制备及牛津纳米孔技术MinION平台的长读长测序，结合STRique算法解析重复长度。

在119例FECD患者和83例对照组中，通过STR/TP-PCR分型和独立的长距离PCR/纳米孔长读长测序筛查CTG18.1扩展。两种方法结果具有一致性，但后者可直接量化重复长度。结果显示，73.1%的FECD病例（87/119）和1.2%的年龄匹配对照组（1/83）存在≥50重复的CTG18.1扩展。在四个大型家族中，扩展的CTG18.1等位基因呈显性遗传模式跨代传递，提示部分年轻家族成员可能面临风险。SNP rs599550（距离扩展位点约1kb）在80.8%的FECD扩展等位基因中与扩展等位基因呈共显性关联，显著高于无扩展等位基因的12.5%和欧洲人群的14.6%。

研究证实，长距离PCR结合纳米孔长读长测序是一种灵敏度高、仅需纳克级DNA的检测方法，可扩展用于高通量检测和CTG18.1精准量化。SNP rs599550相较于先前用于FECD关联研究的rs613872，与扩展位点物理距离更近且处于连锁不平衡状态，更适合用于诊断或关联研究。

title: Clinical Characteristics and Genomic Analysis of a Trichophyton indotineae Strain Resistant to Terbinafine and Fluconazole Isolated in Italy.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Antifungal resistance is an expanding and increasingly significant issue representing a global threat for public health. In the last few years, different cases of dermatophytosis infections due to terbinafine-resistant Trichophyton mentagrophytes have been reported worldwide. In particular, T. mentagrophytes genotype VIII, proposed as T. indotineae, represents an emerging pathogen showing increasing spread worldwide that exhibits reduced susceptibility to different antifungal agents.

OBJECTIVES: Here, we characterise the genome of a T. indotineae clinical strain (named PG11NEG-TBRES) resistant to terbinafine and fluconazole isolated in the northern part of Italy.

METHODS: Whole genome sequencing was performed with the Illumina MiSeq and Oxford Nanopore MinION systems, and hybrid genome assembly was executed with Unicycler. Phylogenomic and copy number analyses were performed by core genome SNPs analysis and coverage depth of mapping reads.

RESULTS: PG11NEG-TBRES belonged to the T. mentagrophytes genotype VIII (known as T. indotineae) and analysis of SQLE gene showed that the PG11NEG-TBRES strain harboured Leu

CONCLUSIONS: Our work highlights the importance of genomic characterisation to define the mechanism related to antifungal resistance and to monitor the spread of emerging dermatophytosis infections.
authors: Paolo Gaibani, Paolo Cattaneo, Michela Deiana, Caterina Signoretto, Annamaria Sorrentino, Denise Lavezzari, Gloria Burlacchini, Elena Locatelli, Simone Malagò, Pierantonio Orza, Chiara Piubelli, Luca Rossi, Tamara Ursini, Francesca Perandin

ai.TLDR: 抗真菌耐药性已成为全球公共卫生威胁，特别是T. mentagrophytes基因型VIII（T. indotineae）对特比萘芬和氟康唑表现出耐药性。本研究通过全基因组测序揭示了该临床菌株的基因组特征及其SQLE基因突变机制。
ai.translation:
背景：抗真菌耐药性是一个日益严重的全球公共卫生威胁。近年来，全球多地报告了由特比萘芬耐药的T. mentagrophytes引起的皮肤真菌感染病例。特别是被提议为T. indotineae的T. mentagrophytes基因型VIII，作为一种新兴病原体，正在全球范围内迅速传播，并表现出对多种抗真菌药物的耐药性。

目标：本研究旨在表征一种对特比萘芬和氟康唑耐药的T. indotineae临床菌株（命名为PG11NEG-TBRES），该菌株在意大利北部被分离。

方法：使用Illumina MiSeq和Oxford Nanopore MinION系统进行全基因组测序，并通过Unicycler执行混合基因组组装。通过核心基因组SNP分析和比对读段覆盖深度进行系统发育组学和拷贝数分析。

结果：PG11NEG-TBRES属于T. mentagrophy, 基因型VIII（即T. indotineae），SQLE基因分析显示该菌株携带Leu突变。

结论：本研究强调了基因组特征分析在阐明抗真菌耐药机制和监测新兴皮肤真菌感染传播中的重要性。

title: Interlaboratory evaluation of high molecular weight DNA extraction methods for long-read sequencing and structural variant analysis
abstract:
### Background

Long-read sequencing technologies enable resolution of structural variants (SV) and long-range genome assembly, but require high molecular weight (HMW) DNA of both high quantity and quality to produce optimal sequencing results. New DNA extraction methods have been developed but these have not been assessed for use in routine testing. The interlaboratory study described here tested four commonly used methods: Fire Monkey, Nanobind, Puregene and Genomic-tip with a reference cell line containing known chromosomal alterations. Samples were assessed with commonly applied approaches for evaluating DNA purity and integrity as well as a method based on linkage using digital PCR. Sequencing performance was evaluated and the impact of extraction method on structural variant calling investigated.

### Results

All methods generally produced samples of acceptable purity although yield varied considerably between laboratories. Library preparation and sequencing were successful for all four methods, with Fire Monkey extracts achieving the highest N50 values, Genomic Tip giving the highest sequencing yields and Nanobind, the highest proportion of ultra-long reads (> 100 kb). The dPCR assay with duplexes at 100 kb and 150 kb distances was predictive of ultra-long reads and provides a more quantitative read-out (% linkage) than pulse-field gel electrophoresis (PFGE) which varied in performance between instruments and gel dyes. Neither PFGE nor dPCR were predictive of the proportion of short reads (< 10 kb). Coverage was a key factor in the success of SV calling, but this was dependent on SV caller. Megabase scale SVs were challenging to analyse with SV callers and required confirmation based on coverage plots and mapping of junction sequences, and the findings of earlier studies were only partially confirmed.

### Conclusions

This study highlights some of the challenges of HMW DNA extraction as well as the need for robust sample QC metrics to ensure optimal sequencing yield and read length which in turn influence the success of SV analysis. dPCR approaches for DNA integrity showed potential but require further development. As long-read methods are increasingly applied in routine settings such as clinical testing laboratories, cellular reference samples with well-characterised SVs are recommended as controls for the full long-read sequencing workflow.
authors: Alison S. Devonshire, Jordi Morata, ... Carole A. Foy
citation: Devonshire, A.S., Morata, J., Jubin, C. et al. Interlaboratory evaluation of high molecular weight DNA extraction methods for long-read sequencing and structural variant analysis. BMC Genomics 26 , 698 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-025-11792-7
description: Long-read sequencing technologies enable resolution of structural variants (SV) and long-range genome assembly, but require high molecular...

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了四种长读长测序技术中高分子量DNA提取方法的性能差异，发现不同方法在产量和超长读长比例上存在显著差异。dPCR检测方法比PFGE更能准确预测超长读长，但短读长比例检测仍存在局限性。
ai.translation:
背景：长读长测序技术能够解析结构变异(SV)并实现长程基因组组装，但需要高质量的高分子量(HMW)DNA才能获得最佳测序结果。尽管开发了新的DNA提取方法，但这些方法在常规检测中的应用尚未经过评估。本研究通过实验室间试验测试了四种常用方法：Fire Monkey、Nanobind、Puregene和Genomic-tip，使用包含已知染色体改变的参考细胞系进行评估。样本通过常规DNA纯度和完整性评估方法以及基于数字PCR的连锁分析方法进行检测，测序性能和提取方法对结构变异检测的影响均被评估。

结果：所有方法均能产生可接受的纯度样本，但实验室间产量差异显著。四种方法的文库制备和测序均成功，其中Fire Monkey提取物获得最高N50值，Genomic Tip提供最高测序产量，Nanobind获得最高比例的超长读长(>100 kb)。采用100 kb和150 kb距离双链的dPCR检测方法能预测超长读长，且提供比PFGE更定量的%连锁读数，而PFGE在不同仪器和凝胶染料间表现差异显著。PFGE和dPCR均无法预测短读长(<10 kb)比例。覆盖度是SV检测成功的关键因素，但依赖于SV分析工具。兆碱基尺度SV分析面临挑战，需结合覆盖度图谱和接头序列映射进行验证，且部分早期研究结果未被完全证实。

结论：本研究突显了HMW DNA提取的挑战，以及需要稳健的样本质量控制指标以确保最佳测序产量和读长，从而影响SV分析的成功率。dPCR检测DNA完整性的方法展现出潜力但需进一步发展。随着长读长方法在临床检测实验室等常规场景的广泛应用，建议使用具有明确SV特征的细胞参考样本作为全长读长测序流程的对照。

title: An expanded method for malaria parasite genetic surveillance using targeted nanopore sequencing.
abstract:
Malaria causes around 250 million cases and over 600,000 deaths annually, with the heaviest burden falling on young children living in sub-Saharan Africa. Molecular surveillance of 

Malaria is a major cause of disease and death globally, especially for young children living in Africa. Affected countries aim to reduce the spread of the malaria parasite, which is transmitted by mosquitoes, and to treat infected people using drugs. However, the parasites can develop resistance to the drugs, making them less effective. Newly approved malaria vaccines are also being deployed at scale. It is therefore important to monitor parasites for the development and spread of drug resistance and for any changes relevant to the vaccine, to ensure treatment outcomes remain optimal. This study describes a laboratory method for monitoring malaria parasites suitable for use in tropical areas where malaria is common. Starting from a blood sample taken from an infected person, targeted sections of malaria parasite DNA are amplified and sequenced using nanopore technology. The genes analysed provide information on drug resistance, the current vaccine target, and which malaria species are present. The study also describes laboratory practices to ensure high quality standards are maintained consistently. In summary, this study reports a method for monitoring malaria parasites using a streamlined DNA sequencing workflow; further work can assess its performance in malaria zones and develop protocols suitable for clinical use.
authors: Alexandria J R Harrott, Collins M Morang'a, Richard D Pearson, Mona-Liza Sakyi, Ahmed Osumanu, Enock K Amoako, Fagdéba David Bara, Myra Hosmillo, Kess Rowe, Yaw Aniweh, Gordon A Awandare, Francis Zeukeng, Ian Goodfellow, Cristina V Ariani, Lucas N Amenga-Etego, William L Hamilton

ai.TLDR: 疟疾每年导致约2.5亿病例和60多万死亡，主要影响撒哈拉以南非洲儿童。本研究开发了一种适用于疟疾高发地区的分子监测方法，通过纳米孔测序技术分析疟原虫DNA，可检测药物抗药性、疫苗靶点及疟疾种类，为临床治疗提供关键信息。
ai.translation: 疟疾每年导致约250 million病例和超过600,000死亡，其中最沉重的负担落在撒哈拉以南非洲的儿童身上。疟疾是全球导致疾病和死亡的主要原因，尤其是对非洲地区的儿童。受影响国家旨在通过药物治疗感染者并减少疟疾原虫的传播，但原虫可能对药物产生抗药性，降低治疗效果。新批准的疟疾疫苗正在大规模部署，因此监测原虫的抗药性发展和疫苗相关变化至关重要，以确保治疗效果最优。本研究描述了一种适用于疟疾高发热带地区的实验室监测方法。从感染者的血液样本出发，利用纳米孔技术对疟疾原虫特定DNA片段进行扩增和测序。分析的基因可提供药物抗药性信息、当前疫苗靶点及存在的疟疾物种类型。研究还描述了确保实验室质量标准的实践方法。总结而言，本研究报告了一种通过简化DNA测序流程监测疟疾原虫的方法；后续工作可评估其在疟疾流行区的性能，并开发适用于临床使用的协议。

title: Evaluation of V3-V4 and FL-16S rRNA amplicon sequencing approach for microbiota community analysis of tracheostomy aspirates.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: Respiratory infections pose a significant risk for people requiring prolonged mechanical ventilation, yet limited information exists regarding the complex microbiome dynamics of people with tracheostomies during chronic critical illness. Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-read sequencing allows for full-length 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing, providing enhanced species-level understanding of the respiratory microbiome. We validated ONT-based FL-16S amplicon sequencing for microbial insights from tracheal aspirates by comparing results with those of Illumina V3-V4 amplicon sequencing. Comparisons were made on a standardized microbial community and tracheal aspirates using multiple DNA extraction kits. Conventional short-read bioinformatic pipelines are suboptimal for processing longer, error-prone ONT reads. The Emu bioinformatics pipeline, specifically designed for ONT FL-16S reads, enhances the accuracy but necessitates validation for tracheal aspirates. In this study, we compared the analysis of FL-16S reads using Emu to the standardized V3-V4 read analysis with QIIME2. Our findings demonstrate that at the same sequencing read depth, FL-16S sequencing analysis with Emu yields comparable alpha and taxonomic diversity metrics, while providing superior species-level resolution compared to V3-V4 amplicon sequencing of tracheal aspirates. Our results show that tracheal aspirates during chronic critical illness are low-diversity samples, with most pathogenic genera represented by a single species. However, members of the oral microbiota 

IMPORTANCE: The role of the respiratory microbiome in shaping outcomes for patients with chronic critical illness undergoing prolonged mechanical ventilation via a tracheostomy remains poorly understood, despite its potential to drive infections and complicate recovery. Current methods, such as short-read 16S rRNA sequencing, lack taxonomic resolution to track pathogens at the species level, limiting clinical insights. Our study addresses this gap by validating ONT-based full-length (FL)-16S rRNA sequencing, a method that achieves species-level taxonomic precision critical for analyzing complex respiratory microbiomes. We benchmarked the microbiome composition of tracheal aspirates from ONT FL-16S rRNA workflows against Illumina V3-V4 data to demonstrate that long-read sequencing delivers comparable diversity profiles while resolving species-level diversity of clinically relevant species and microbes associated with the oral microbiome.
authors: A Gupta, V S Cooper, A C Zemke

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了长期机械通气患者呼吸感染风险，通过比较ONT长读长测序与Illumina V3-V4测序方法，验证了FL-16S扩增子测序在分析气管吸引物微生物组的物种分辨率优势。研究发现慢性重症患者的气管吸引物样本具有低多样性特征，且口腔微生物群成员在病原体分类中占据重要地位。
ai.translation:
无标签：呼吸感染对需要长期机械通气的患者构成重大风险，但关于气管切开术患者在慢性重症期间复杂微生物组动态的现有信息有限。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的长读长测序能够实现全长16S rRNA扩增子测序，提供更深入的呼吸道微生物组物种水平分析。我们通过与Illumina V3-V4扩增子测序结果对比，验证了基于ONT的FL-16S扩增子测序在分析气管吸引物微生物特征的有效性。采用多种DNA提取试剂盒对标准化微生物群落和气管吸引物样本进行比较分析。传统短读长生物信息学流程在处理长且易出错的ONT数据时表现不佳。专为ONT FL-16S数据设计的Emu生物信息学流程虽能提升准确性，但需针对气管吸引物进行验证。本研究比较了使用Emu分析FL-16S数据与标准化V3-V4数据在QIIME2中的分析结果。研究发现，在相同测序读长深度下，使用Emu进行FL-16S测序分析可获得与V3-V4扩增子测序相当的α多样性及分类学多样性指标，同时在气管吸引物物种水平分辨率上表现更优。研究结果表明，慢性重症期间的气管吸引物样本具有低多样性特征，多数病原体属仅由单一物种代表。然而，口腔微生物群成员在...（原文后续内容）

重要性：尽管呼吸微生物组可能影响慢性重症患者经气管切开术长期机械通气后的预后，但其具体作用机制仍不明确。现有方法如短读长16S rRNA测序在物种水平追踪病原体方面存在分类分辨率不足的问题，限制了临床洞察。本研究通过验证基于ONT的全长（FL）-16S rRNA测序方法，填补了这一空白。该方法实现了对复杂呼吸道微生物组进行物种水平分类精度的关键分析。我们通过将ONT FL-16S rRNA流程获得的气管吸引物微生物组组成与Illumina V3-V4数据进行基准比较，证明长读长测序在保持多样性分析一致性的同时，能够解析与口腔微生物组相关的临床相关物种和微生物的物种水平多样性。

title: Nanopore full length 16S rRNA gene sequencing increases species resolution in bacterial biomarker discovery
abstract: Discovery of disease-related bacterial biomarkers could be a useful approach for early prevention or diagnosis of various afflictions, such as colorectal cancer. This typically involves analyzing small regions of the 16S rRNA gene (e.g. V3V4) through short-read technologies like Illumina, obtaining genus-level results. However, recent developments in third-generation sequencing, such as Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)’s new R10.4.1 chemistry and its improved basecalling models, are beginning to allow for a more complete and accessible species-level analysis through full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing (spanning regions V1-V9). Thus, the goal of this study was to compare and evaluate both approaches, using colorectal cancer biomarker discovery as a representative case. This was achieved through the analysis of feces from 123 subjects, comparing both methods (Illumina-V3V4 with DADA2 and QIIME2 vs. ONT-V1V9 with Emu), multiple Dorado basecalling models (fast, hac and sup) and multiple databases (SILVA vs. Emu’s Default database). Basecalling models broadly resulted in similar taxonomic output, but had significantly higher observed species and different taxonomic identification the lower the basecalling quality (*p*-value<0.05). Database choice with Emu influenced the identified species greatly, with Emu’s Default database obtaining significantly higher diversity and identified species than SILVA (*p*-value<0.05). However, it overconfidently classified at times what should be an unknown species as the closest match due to its database structure. Bacterial abundance between Illumina-V3V4 and ONT-V1V9 at the genus level correlated well (R2\(\ge\)0.8). Nanopore sequencing identified more specific bacterial biomarkers for colorectal cancer than those obtained with Illumina, such as *Parvimonas micra*, *Fusobacterium nucleatum*, *Peptostreptococcus stomatis*, *Peptostreptococcus anaerobius*, *Gemella morbillorum*, *Clostridium perfringens*, *Bacteroides fragilis* and *Sutterella wadsworthensis*. Prediction of colorectal cancer through manual feature selection and machine learning resulted in an AUC of 0.87 with 14 species or 0.82 with just 4 species (*P. micra*, *F. nucleatum*, *B. fragilis* and *Agathobaculum butyriciproducens*). Full 16S rRNA V1V9 sequencing through Oxford Nanopore and its new R10.4.1 chemistry achieved accurate species-level bacterial identification, facilitating the discovery of more precise disease-related biomarkers and increasing the taxonomic fidelity of future microbiome analyses.
authors: Pablo Aja-Macaya, Kelly Conde-Pérez, ... Margarita Poza
citation: Aja-Macaya, P., Conde-Pérez, K., Trigo-Tasende, N. et al. Nanopore full length 16S rRNA gene sequencing increases species resolution in bacterial biomarker discovery. Sci Rep 15 , 26486 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-10999-8

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过比较Illumina和Oxford Nanopore两种测序技术，发现第三代测序技术能更精确地识别结直肠癌相关细菌生物标志物。研究利用123例粪便样本，验证了全长16S rRNA基因测序在物种水平分析的优势。
ai.translation: 疾病相关细菌生物标志物的发现可为多种疾病的早期预防和诊断提供新途径，如结直肠癌。传统方法通常通过Illumina等短读长测序技术分析16S rRNA基因的小片段（如V3V4区），仅能获得属水平结果。然而，第三代测序技术（如Oxford Nanopore Technologies的R10.4.1化学体系及改进的碱基调用模型）已能实现全长16S rRNA基因（覆盖V1-V9区）的物种水平分析。本研究以结直肠癌生物标志物发现为案例，比较了两种方法：Illumina-V3V4（DADA2和QIIME2分析）与ONT-V1V9（Emu分析），并评估了多种碱基调用模型（fast/hac/sup）和数据库（SILVA vs Emu默认数据库）的影响。结果表明，碱基调用模型的分类学输出相似但物种多样性存在显著差异（p<0.05），Emu默认数据库在物种识别和多样性方面显著优于SILVA（p<0.05），但其数据库结构可能导致未知物种被错误归类。两种技术在属水平的细菌丰度相关性良好（R²≥0.8）。纳米孔测序发现的结直肠癌特异性细菌标志物（如Parvimonas micra、Fusobacterium nucleatum等）比Illumina方法更精确。通过特征选择和机器学习预测结直肠癌，14种物种组合AUC为0.87，4种核心物种（P. micra、F. nucleatum、B. fragilis和Agathobaculum butyriciproducens）AUC为0.82。Oxford Nanopore结合R10.4.1化学体系实现的全长16S rRNA测序，显著提升了物种水平的细菌识别准确性，为疾病相关生物标志物的精准发现和未来宏基因组分析的分类学准确性提供了新方法。

title: Decoding the Gut Microbiota in Multiple Sclerosis Using Nanopore Long-Read Sequencing: Insights into Disease Severity and Subtypes
abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease of the central nervous system (CNS), characterized by neuroinflammation and neurodegeneration. Emerging evidence links gut microbiota dysbiosis to immune dysregulation and MS progression. While extensive research has been conducted in Western populations, region-specific studies are needed to assess the influence of local genetic and environmental factors. This study investigates gut microbiota alterations in Egyptian MS patients using Oxford Nanopore sequencing to identify microbial signatures associated with disease progression. Fecal samples from 33 newly diagnosed MS patients (20 with relapsing–remitting MS [RRM] and 13 with Progressive MS [PMS]) and 10 healthy controls were analyzed using long-read Oxford Nanopore sequencing of the full 16S rRNA gene. MS patients exhibited increased microbial richness but reduced evenness, with distinct gut microbiome profiles. Progressive MS was characterized by an abundance of pro-inflammatory bacteria (e.g., *Enterococcus faecium* and *Romboutsia timonensis*) and a depletion of short-chain fatty acid (SCFA)–producing species (*Ruminococcus bromii* and *Faecalibacterium duncaniae*), potentially contributing to heightened neuroinflammation and disease progression. Relapsing MS exhibited microbial shifts indicative of immune dysregulation, including increased *Clostridium saudiense* and decreased levels of the gut-protective *Faecalibacterium butyricigenerans*. Functional analysis linked these microbial alterations to oxidative stress, neurotransmitter imbalance, and suppressed lipid and carbohydrate metabolism. These findings underscore the role of gut microbiota dysbiosis in MS pathogenesis and, by focusing on an underexplored Egyptian cohort, highlight region-specific microbial shifts that may inform targeted therapeutic strategies for both Progressive and Relapsing forms of MS.
authors: Ameera Saeed Alshinnawy, Elham A. Badiea, ... Mohamed R. Mohamed
citation: Alshinnawy, A.S., Badiea, E.A., Swelam, M.S. et al. Decoding the Gut Microbiota in Multiple Sclerosis Using Nanopore Long-Read Sequencing: Insights into Disease Severity and Subtypes. Mol Neurobiol (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s12035-025-05194-9
