ai.TLDR: 本研究聚焦埃及多发性硬化症（MS）患者肠道微生物群变化，通过Oxford Nanopore测序揭示微生物特征与疾病进展的关联。发现进展型MS患者存在促炎菌丰度增加和短链脂肪酸生成菌减少，提示肠道菌群失调可能通过氧化应激和代谢紊乱促进神经炎症。
ai.translation: 多发性硬化症（MS）是一种慢性自身免疫疾病，主要影响中枢神经系统，特征为神经炎症和神经退行性变。现有研究表明肠道微生物群失调与免疫失调及MS进展密切相关。尽管西方人群已有大量研究，但针对地区性遗传和环境因素影响的专项研究仍不足。本研究采用Oxford Nanopore长读长测序技术，分析33名新诊断MS患者（含20例复发缓解型MS和13例进展型MS）及10名健康对照者的粪便样本，全面解析肠道微生物群特征。结果显示MS患者微生物多样性增加但均匀性降低，进展型MS表现出促炎菌（如Enterococcus faecium和Romboutsia timonensis）丰度升高，同时短链脂肪酸生成菌（如Ruminococcus bromii和Faecalibacterium duncaniae）显著减少，可能加剧神经炎症。复发型MS则呈现免疫失调特征，表现为Clostridium saudiense丰度增加和肠道保护菌Faecalibacterium butyricigenerans水平下降。功能分析显示这些微生物变化与氧化应激、神经递质失衡及脂质和碳水化合物代谢抑制相关。研究结果强调肠道微生物群失调在MS发病机制中的关键作用，并通过聚焦未被充分研究的埃及人群，揭示地区特异性微生物变化，为进展型和复发型MS的靶向治疗策略提供新思路。

title: An open-source nanopore-only sequencing workflow for analysis of clonal outbreaks delivers short-read level accuracy.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: In this work, we present an optimized nanopore long-read only sequencing workflow for epidemiologic analysis of clonal outbreaks built with open-source tools. A set of unrelated clinical 

IMPORTANCE: For the past decade, bacterial whole-genome sequencing has been performed using high-accuracy short-read sequencing. More recently, long-read sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) instruments has emerged as a potential alternative based on multiple advantages, including lower costs, portability, and speed. However, this platform has suffered from basecall error rates that were too high for many applications in clinical microbiology, including outbreak tracing. With the release of new flow cell chemistries and basecall algorithms, the accuracy has improved dramatically, making this approach feasible for outbreak investigations. In this work, we optimize a streamlined nanopore-only workflow for epidemiologic analysis of bacterial pathogens. The workflow was validated with isolates from four previously identified clinical outbreaks with varying GC content and demonstrated fully concordant cgMLST clustering as compared to short-read references. This workflow will facilitate the broader implementation of ONT-only genomes and cgMLST analysis to assist in hospital outbreaks worldwide.
authors: Nick Vereecke, Thomas B Yoon, Ting L Luo, Brendan W Corey, Francois Lebreton, Patrick T Mc Gann, John P Dekker

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出了一种基于开源工具的优化纳米孔长读长测序流程，用于克隆爆发的流行病学分析。通过改进的纳米孔技术，显著降低了临床微生物学中爆发追踪的错误率，验证了其在不同GC含量菌株中的有效性。
ai.translation:
无标签：本研究展示了一种优化的纳米孔长读长测序工作流程，该流程专为基于开源工具的克隆爆发流行病学分析而设计。一组无关的临床

重要性：过去十年，细菌全基因组测序主要采用高精度短读长测序技术。近年来，基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）仪器的长读长测序技术因成本更低、便携性和速度优势，逐渐成为潜在替代方案。然而，该平台在临床微生物学应用（包括爆发追踪）中曾因碱基调用错误率过高而受限。随着新型流细胞化学和碱基调用算法的推出，准确性显著提升，使该方法在爆发调查中变得可行。本研究优化了一种简化版的纳米孔专属工作流程，用于细菌病原体的流行病学分析。该流程通过四种已鉴定临床爆发分离株验证，其GC含量各异，结果与短读长参考序列完全一致的cgMLST聚类。该流程将促进ONT专属基因组和cgMLST分析的广泛应用，助力全球医院爆发的防控。

title: Next-generation sequencing of Omicron SARS-CoV-2 variants in Hormozgan Province, Iran, and evaluation of the effects of mutations on RBD and ORF9b protein function.
journal: Infection, genetics and evolution : journal of molecular epidemiology and evolutionary genetics in infectious diseases
abstract: The emergence of the Omicron variant in November 2021 marked a significant turning point in the COVID-19 pandemic due to its unprecedented number of mutations compared to previous variants. To better understand its clinical impact and evolutionary trajectory, we conducted a comprehensive genomic epidemiology study analyzing 528 SARS-CoV-2 samples collected in Iran between March 2021 and March 2023. Using nanopore sequencing with ≥96 % genome coverage and advanced bioinformatics tools including the Nextclade platform, we systematically characterized the mutational profiles of circulating variants with particular focus on the receptor-binding domain (RBD) and ORF9b proteins. Our analysis revealed BA.5.2 as the dominant strain (32.4 % prevalence), followed by XBB.1.9.1 (14.2 %), with only 17.6 % of cases occurring in vaccinated individuals. Through molecular docking and dynamics simulations, we demonstrated that key variants including BA.5.2, XBB.1.5, and XBB.1.9 exhibit enhanced binding affinity to host receptors, with RBD showing stronger interactions with ACE2 and ORF9b variants displaying improved binding to TOM70. Notably, our findings suggest similar pathogenic potential between the XBB.1.5/XBB.1.9 and BA.5 lineages, while highlighting the utility of whole genome entropy analysis for predicting viral evolution patterns. These results provide valuable insights for guiding vaccine development, therapeutic design, and public health strategies against evolving SARS-CoV-2 variants.
authors: Khadijeh Ahmadi, Soudabeh Kavousipour, Behzad Shahbazi, Farhad Farzin, Zahra Gharibi, Maryam Sadat Pishva, Ali Pishahang, Hamed Gouklani

ai.TLDR: 2021年11月奥密克戎变种的出现标志着新冠疫情的重要转折点，其突变数量远超以往变种。本研究通过分析伊朗2021-2023年528例SARS-CoV-2样本，发现BA.5.2（32.4%流行率）和XBB.1.9.1（14.2%）成为主要流行株，疫苗接种者仅占17.6%病例。分子对接与动力学模拟显示，BA.5.2、XBB.1.5和XBB.1.9等变种对宿主受体结合能力显著增强，RBD与ACE2、ORF9b与TOM70的相互作用尤为突出。
ai.translation: 2021年11月奥密克戎变种的出现标志着新冠疫情的重要转折点，其突变数量远超以往变种。为深入理解其临床影响和进化轨迹，本研究对伊朗2021年3月至2023年3月期间收集的528例SARS-CoV-2样本进行了全面的基因组流行病学分析。采用纳米孔测序技术（≥96%基因组覆盖度）和Nextclade等先进生物信息学工具，系统解析了流行变种的突变特征，重点聚焦受体结合域（RBD）和ORF9b蛋白。分析结果显示，BA.5.2成为主要流行株（32.4%流行率），其次为XBB.1.9.1（14.2%），仅17.6%的病例发生在接种疫苗人群中。通过分子对接和动力学模拟，证实BA.5.2、XBB.1.5和XBB.1.9等关键变种对宿主受体的结合亲和力显著增强，其中RBD与ACE2的相互作用更强，ORF9b变异体对TOM70的结合能力提升。研究还发现XBB.1.5/XBB.1.9与BA.5谱系具有相似的致病潜力，同时凸显了全基因组熵分析在预测病毒进化模式中的应用价值。这些发现为应对不断演变的SARS-CoV-2变种提供了疫苗开发、治疗设计和公共卫生策略的重要参考。

title: Cell-type-informed genotyping of mosaic focal epilepsies reveals cell-autonomous and non-cell-autonomous disease-associated transcriptional programs.
journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
abstract: While it is widely accepted that somatic variants that activate the PI3K-mTOR pathway are a major cause of drug-resistant focal epilepsy, typically associated with focal cortical dysplasia (FCD) type 2, understanding the mechanism of epileptogenesis requires identifying genotype-associated changes at the single-cell level, which is technically challenging with existing methods. Here, we performed single-nucleus RNA-sequencing (snRNA-seq) of 18 FCD type 2 samples removed surgically for treatment of drug-resistant epilepsy, and 17 non-FCD control samples, and analyzed additional published data comprising >400,000 single nuclei. We also performed simultaneous single-nucleus genotyping and gene expression analysis using two independent approaches: 1) a method that we called genotyping of transcriptomes enhanced with nanopore sequencing (GO-TEN) that combines targeted cDNA long-read sequencing with snRNA-seq, 2) ResolveOME snRNA-seq and DNA genotyping. snRNA-seq showed similar cell identities and proportions between cases and controls, suggesting that mosaic pathogenic variants in PI3K-mTOR pathway genes in FCD exert their effect by disrupting transcription in conserved cell types. GO-TEN and ResolveOME analyses confirmed that pathogenic variant-carrying cells have well-differentiated neuronal or glial identities, with enrichment of variants in cells of the neuroectodermal lineage, pointing to cortical neural progenitors as possible loci of somatic mutation. Within FCD type 2 lesions, we identified upregulation of PI3K-mTOR signaling and related pathways in variant-carrying neurons, downregulation of these pathways in non-variant-carrying neurons, as well as associated changes in microglial activation, cellular metabolism, synaptic homeostasis, and neuronal connectivity, all potentially contributing to epileptogenesis. These genotype-specific changes in mosaic lesions highlight potential disease mechanisms and therapeutic targets.
authors: Sara Bizzotto, Maya Talukdar, Edward A Stronge, Rosita B Ramirez, Yingxi Yang, August Yue Huang, Qiwen Hu, Yingping Hou, Norma K Hylton, Benjamin Finander, Ashton Tillett, Zinan Zhou, Brian H Chhouk, Alissa M D'Gama, Edward Yang, Timothy E Green, David C Reutens, Saul A Mullen, Ingrid E Scheffer, Michael S Hildebrand, Russell J Buono, Ingmar Blümcke, Annapurna H Poduri, Sattar Khoshkhoo, Christopher A Walsh

ai.TLDR: 研究发现PI3K-mTOR通路的镶嵌性致病变异是药物难治性局灶性癫痫的主要病因，通过单核RNA测序和基因组分析揭示了变异细胞在神经元和胶质细胞中的特异性表型变化。该研究为癫痫发病机制提供了新的分子靶点。
ai.translation: 尽管普遍认为激活PI3K-mTOR通路的体细胞变异是药物难治性局灶性癫痫的主要病因，通常与局灶性皮质发育不良（FCD）类型2相关，但理解癫痫发生机制仍需在单细胞水平识别与基因型相关的表型变化，这在现有技术方法中具有挑战性。本研究对18例接受手术治疗的药物难治性癫痫患者的FCD类型2样本及17例非FCD对照样本进行了单核RNA测序（snRNA-seq），并分析了包含>400,000个单核的已发表数据。同时采用两种独立方法进行单核基因分型与基因表达联合分析：1）我们开发的结合靶向cDNA长读长测序与snRNA-seq的转录组基因分型增强纳米孔测序（GO-TEN）方法；2）ResolveOME snRNA-seq与DNA基因分型。snRNA-seq结果显示病例组与对照组在细胞身份和比例上相似，提示FCD中PI3K-mTOR通路基因的镶嵌性致病变异通过破坏保守细胞类型的转录过程发挥作用。GO-TEN和ResolveOME分析证实携带致病变异的细胞具有明确的神经元或胶质细胞身份，变异在神经外胚层谱系细胞中富集，提示皮质神经前体细胞可能是体细胞突变的潜在位点。在FCD类型2病灶中，我们发现携带变异的神经元PI3K-mTOR信号通路及相关通路显著上调，非变异神经元则出现下调，同时伴随小胶质细胞活化、细胞代谢、突触稳态和神经元连接的改变，这些基因型特异性变化可能共同促进癫痫发生。这些镶嵌性病变中的基因型特异性变化凸显了潜在的疾病机制和治疗靶点。

title: MSIanalyzer: Targeted Nanopore Sequencing Enables Single Nucleotide Resolution Analysis of Microsatellite Instability Diversity.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: We present a targeted sequencing-based pipeline that profiles microsatellite instability (MSI) at single-nucleotide resolution. Targeted amplicons from the five widely studied Bethesda panel microsatellite loci were sequenced using Oxford Nanopore Technology in two microsatellite unstable colorectal cancer cell lines (HCT15, HCT116), two microsatellite stable cancer cell lines (TK6, U2OS), and two peripheral blood mononuclear cell samples from healthy donors. An anchor-extension algorithm was developed to capture repeat motifs while allowing interruptions, using a threshold informed by platform-specific error. Cluster-aware Dirichlet-multinomial and beta-binomial tests were applied for between-sample comparisons while accounting for read-level clustering within samples. The algorithm revealed distinct repeat profiles in HCT15 and HCT116 compared to other cell types and uncovered allelic diversity across samples at different MSI loci. Our approach complements existing short tandem repeat callers by preserving read-level diversity and delivering targeted, quantitative MSI calls with potential applications in mechanistic research and clinical assay development.
authors: Ting Zhai, Daniel J Laverty, Zachary D Nagel

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于靶向测序的微卫星不稳定性（MSI）分析流程，通过单核苷酸分辨率揭示了癌细胞系与正常细胞在重复基序上的显著差异。该方法结合Oxford Nanopore Technology平台，利用锚定扩展算法和聚类感知统计检验，实现了对MSI位点等位基因多样性的精准量化。
ai.translation: 我们提出了一种基于靶向测序的流程，可在单核苷酸分辨率下分析微卫星不稳定性（MSI）。通过Oxford Nanopore Technology对两种微卫星不稳定的结直肠癌细胞系（HCT15, HCT116）、两种微卫星稳定的癌细胞系（TK6, U2OS）以及健康供体的外周血单核细胞样本进行测序，靶向扩增了五个广泛研究的Bethesda面板微卫星位点。开发了锚定扩展算法，通过平台特异性错误阈值捕捉重复基序并允许中断。采用聚类感知的Dirichlet-multinomial和beta-binomial检验进行样本间比较，同时考虑样本内读取聚类。算法揭示了HCT15和HCT116与其他细胞类型在重复基序上的显著差异，并发现不同MSI位点的样本间等位基因多样性。该方法通过保留读取水平多样性，补充了现有短串联重复调用器，可提供靶向、定量的MSI分析，具有机制研究和临床检测开发的应用潜力。

title: Hyperbranched Rolling Circle Amplification Enabled Nanopore Sensing Platforms for Ultrasensitive Multiplex MicroRNA Detection and Logic-Gated Molecular Diagnostics.
abstract: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) have emerged as crucial biomarker candidates and therapeutic targets for various diseases and cancers, where precise trace-level detection holds significant value for early clinical diagnosis. However, the development of ultrasensitive, isothermal, cost-effective, and reliable miRNA detection platforms remains challenging in clinical applications. Herein, we present a nanopore sensing strategy based on hyperbranched rolling circle amplification (HRCA) for label-free detection and logic-gated diagnosis of miR-122 and miR-141. This method synergistically integrates the high amplification efficiency of HRCA with the single-molecule sensitivity of nanopore sensors, enabling ultrasensitive miRNA detection at ultralow concentrations. The results demonstrate that the HRCA-nanopore system achieves a remarkable detection limit of 0.1 fM, representing a three-order-of-magnitude improvement compared to conventional HRCA-based fluorescence methods, while maintaining excellent specificity to distinguish target miRNAs from interfering sequences. Leveraging the programmable hybridization characteristics and conformational switching of nucleic acids, we further constructed a four-input parallel cascade logic circuit (INHIBIT//INHIBIT-OR) for simultaneous dual-miRNA analysis. This logic architecture establishes a novel conceptual framework for implementing molecular computing in nanopore-based biosensing, particularly for multiplex biomarker diagnosis. The proposed platform not only addresses the critical need for clinical miRNA detection but also provides a versatile paradigm for developing intelligent diagnostic systems through the integration of nucleic acid amplification techniques, nanoscale sensing, and molecular logic operations.
authors: Siqi Zhang, Mengkang Zheng, Wei Shi, Kai-Bin Li, Nan You, De-Man Han, Wenqiang Chen

ai.TLDR: miRNA作为疾病和癌症的生物标志物和治疗靶点，其超高灵敏度检测对早期诊断至关重要。本研究开发基于超分支滚环扩增（HRCA）的纳米孔传感策略，实现miR-122和miR-143的无标签检测与逻辑门诊断，检测限达到0.1 fM，较传统荧光方法提升三个数量级。通过构建四输入并行级联逻辑电路（INHIBIT//INHIBIT-OR），建立了纳米孔生物传感的分子计算新框架。
ai.translation: 微小RNA（miRNA）已逐渐成为多种疾病和癌症的重要生物标志物候选者和治疗靶点，其中超高灵敏度的痕量检测对早期临床诊断具有重要价值。然而，开发具有超高灵敏度、等温反应、低成本且可靠的miRNA检测平台在临床应用中仍面临挑战。本研究提出了一种基于超分支滚环扩增（HRCA）的纳米孔传感策略，用于miR-122和miR-141的无标签检测及逻辑门诊断。该方法协同整合HRCA的高扩增效率与纳米孔传感器的单分子灵敏度，实现了在超低浓度下的超高灵敏度miRNA检测。实验结果表明，HRCA-纳米孔系统达到0.1 fM的显著检测限，相比传统基于HRCA的荧光方法提升三个数量级，同时保持优异的特异性以区分目标miRNA与干扰序列。利用核酸的可编程杂交特性及构象切换特性，进一步构建了四输入并行级联逻辑电路（INHIBIT//INHIBIT-OR）用于同时分析双miRNA。该逻辑架构为纳米孔生物传感实现分子计算提供了新的概念框架，特别是在多标志物诊断领域。所提出的平台不仅满足临床miRNA检测的关键需求，还通过整合核酸扩增技术、纳米尺度传感和分子逻辑操作，为开发智能诊断系统提供了通用范式。

title: Clinical metagenomics for diagnosis and surveillance of viral pathogens.
abstract: Metagenomics is becoming more widely used for diagnosis of viral infections and surveillance of viruses. Its pathogen-agnostic approach makes metagenomics useful for unknown and novel infection diagnosis, outbreak investigation, and new and emerging pathogen surveillance. New metagenomics methods, such as the use of rapid sequencing technologies and approaches that can selectively enrich for a wide range of viruses, are expanding the range of clinical and public health scenarios in which metagenomics can be used. Following the COVID-19 pandemic, there is increasing interest in viral surveillance worldwide, using clinical samples, potential zoonotic reservoirs and environmental sources, such as wastewater. Validation and accreditation of metagenomics protocols to ensure quality, together with further innovation in methods, will be necessary to bring metagenomics into routine service in clinical and public health laboratories.
authors: Oscar Enrique Torres Montaguth, Sarah Buddle, Sofia Morfopoulou, Judith Breuer

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组学因无偏检测方法被广泛应用于病毒诊断和监测，新技术如快速测序和病毒富集技术显著扩展了其临床应用场景。新冠疫情后全球对病毒监测需求激增，需通过方法创新和标准化验证推动其在临床实验室的常规化应用。
ai.translation: 宏基因组学正日益被用于病毒性感染的诊断和病毒监测。其无偏的检测方法使其在未知病原体诊断、新发疫情调查以及新出现病原体监测中具有重要价值。新型宏基因组学技术，如采用快速测序技术及可选择性富集多种病毒的方法，正在拓展宏基因组学在临床和公共卫生场景中的应用范围。新冠疫情后，全球对病毒监测的兴趣显著增加，涉及临床样本、潜在动物宿主库及环境来源（如污水）等多维度监测。为确保检测质量并推动宏基因组学在临床和公共卫生实验室的常规化应用，需对检测流程进行验证和标准化认证，同时持续推动方法创新。

title: 'Vivaldi': an amplicon-based whole-genome sequencing method for the four seasonal human coronaviruses, 229E, NL63, OC43 and HKU1, alongside SARS-CoV-2.
abstract: Prior to the emergence of SARS-CoV-2 in 2019, alphacoronaviruses 229E and NL63 and betacoronaviruses OC43 and HKU1 were already established endemic 'common cold' viral infections. Despite their collective contribution towards global respiratory morbidity and mortality and potential to inform the future trajectory of SARS-CoV-2 endemicity, they are infrequently sequenced. We therefore developed a 1,200 bp amplicon whole-genome sequencing scheme targeting all four seasonal coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2. The 'Vivaldi' method was applied retrospectively and prospectively using Oxford Nanopore Technology to ~400 seasonal coronavirus infections diagnosed in Nottingham, UK, from February 2016 to July 2023. We demonstrate that the amplicon multiplex strategy can be applied agnostically to determine the complete genomes of five different species from two coronaviral genera. Three hundred and four unique seasonal coronavirus genomes of greater than 95% coverage were achieved: 64 for 229E, 85 for NL63, 128 for OC43 and 27 for HKU1. They collectively indicated a dynamic seasonal coronavirus genomic landscape, with co-circulation of multiple variants emerging and declining over the UK winter respiratory infection season, with further geographical distinction when compared to a global dataset. Prolonged infection with concomitant intra-host evolution was also observed for both alpha- (NL63) and betacoronaviruses (OC43). This data represents the largest single cohort of seasonal coronavirus genomes to date and also a novel amplicon scheme for their future global surveillance suitable for widespread and easy adoption in the post-SARS-CoV-2 era of viral genomics.
authors: C Patrick McClure, Theocharis Tsoleridis, Jack D Hill, Nadine Holmes, Joseph G Chappell, Timothy Byaruhanga, Joshua Duncan, Miruna Tofan, Louise Berry, Gemma Clark, William L Irving, Alexander W Tarr, Jonathan K Ball, Stuart Astbury, Matt Loose

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了季节性冠状病毒（229E、NL63、OC43、HKU1）在SARS-CoV-2出现前的流行特征，开发了1200bp扩增子全基因组测序方案，成功获取304个完整基因组，揭示了病毒基因组动态变化及地理差异。该方法为后SARS-CoV-2时代的全球病毒监测提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 在2019年SARS-CoV-2出现之前，α冠状病毒229E和NL63以及β冠状病毒OC43和HKU1已形成稳定的'普通感冒'病毒流行。尽管它们对全球呼吸道发病率和死亡率有重要贡献，并可能影响SARS-CoV-2的流行趋势，但这些病毒的基因组测序却十分罕见。因此，我们开发了一种针对四种季节性冠状病毒和SARS-CoV-2的1200bp扩增子全基因组测序方案。'Vivaldi'方法通过牛津纳米孔技术，对英国诺丁汉地区2016年2月至2023年7月诊断的约400例季节性冠状病毒感染病例进行了回顾性及前瞻性分析。研究证明，扩增子多重策略可无偏倚地确定两个冠状病毒属中五种不同物种的完整基因组。成功获取了304个覆盖度超过95%的季节性冠状病毒基因组：229E 64个、NL63 85个、OC43 128个、HKU1 27个。这些基因组共同揭示了动态的季节性冠状病毒基因组景观，显示英国冬季呼吸道感染季节中多种变异株的共循环现象，并与全球数据集相比呈现地理差异。同时观察到α冠状病毒（NL63）和β冠状病毒（OC43）在宿主体内存在长期感染及进化现象。该数据代表迄今为止最大的季节性冠状病毒基因组队列，并为未来全球监测提供了新型扩增子方案，适用于后SARS-CoV-2时代的病毒基因组学广泛应用。

title: Brain-derived extracellular vesicle microRNAs in Lewy body and Alzheimer's disease.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract:
INTRODUCTION: Robust plasma-based biomarkers to distinguish Lewy body disease (LBD) and Alzheimer's disease (AD) are currently lacking. We applied track-etch magnetic nanopore (TENPO) sorting for enrichment of brain-derived extracellular vesicle (EV) signatures as potential biomarkers to address this gap.

METHODS: We analyzed plasma from 137 autopsy-confirmed patients [30 LBD, 31 AD, 30 AD/LBD, 19 AD with amygdala Lewy bodies (AD/ALB), and 27 controls], sequencing miRNAs from TENPO-isolated GluR2-positive (neuron-enriched) and GLAST-positive (astrocyte-enriched) EVs, and measuring plasma proteins (Aβ40, Aβ42, tau, p-Tau181, p-Tau231) via SIMOA.

RESULTS: We identified 16 GluR2+, 8 GLAST+, and 4 protein biomarkers with differential expression (false discovery rate-corrected 

DISCUSSION: Brain-derived EVs offer accurate and accessible miRNA biomarkers for the differential diagnosis of LBD and AD.
authors: Stephanie J Yang, Andrew A Lin, Hanfei Shen, Laura W Pappalardo, Griffin B Spychalski, Jean Rosario, Leah K Forsberg, Kiera M Grant, Rodolfo Savica, Sid O'Bryant, David T Jones, Dennis W Dickson, R Ross Reichard, Aivi T Nguyen, David F Meaney, Bradley F Boeve, Owen A Ross, Pamela J McLean, David Issadore

ai.TLDR: 当前缺乏可靠的血浆生物标志物以区分路易体病(LBD)和阿尔茨海默病(AD)。研究通过TENPO技术富集脑源性细胞外囊泡(EV)标志物，发现16个GluR2+、8个GLAST+及4个蛋白生物标志物的差异表达，为LBD和AD的鉴别诊断提供了准确的miRNA标志物。
ai.translation:
引言：目前缺乏可靠的基于血浆的生物标志物以区分路易体病(LBD)和阿尔茨海默病(AD)。我们应用track-etch磁纳米孔(TENPO)分选技术富集脑源性细胞外囊泡(EV)标志物，以填补这一空白。

方法：我们分析了137例尸检确认患者的血浆样本[30例LBD，31例AD，30例AD/LBD，19例AD伴杏仁核路易体(AD/ALB)，27例对照组]，对通过TENPO分选获得的GluR2阳性(神经元富集型)和GLAST阳性(星形胶质细胞富集型)EVs进行miRNA测序，并通过SIMOA技术检测血浆蛋白(Aβ40, Aβ42, tau, p-Tau181, p-Tau231)。

结果：我们鉴定了16个GluR2阳性、8个GLAST阳性及4个蛋白生物标志物，其表达存在显著差异（校正后假发现率）。

讨论：脑源性EVs提供了准确且易于获取的miRNA生物标志物，可有效用于LBD和AD的鉴别诊断。

title: Scalable long-read Nanopore HPV16 Amplicon-based Whole-Genome Sequencing.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: Human papillomavirus 16 (HPV16) drives precursor cervical lesions that often progress to cervical cancer (CC). Variation within the HPV16 genome has been associated with CC risk. Here, we developed an affordable and portable amplicon-based long-read whole genome sequencing (WGS) approach using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) to investigate HPV16 genetic diversity among women in sub-Saharan African countries. Applied to a control CaSki cell line and clinical samples (n = 12), our method generated complete HPV16 genomes at high coverage (median read coverage: 5,899-15,279×). Benchmarking our HPV16 controls showed high accuracy for two variant calling pipelines (Clair3 and PEPPER-Margin DeepVariant). Phylogenetic analysis identified all four previously defined HPV16 lineages (A-D) and their high-risk sublineages. All lineages exhibited strong concordance across
authors: Maina K Titus, David Giesbrecht, Cliff I Oduor, Kapten Muthoka, Karamoko Niaré, Rebecca Crudale, Abebe A Fola, Sin Ting Hui, Isaac E Kim, Philip K Tonui, Peter M Itsura, Ronald Tonui, Ann M Moormann, Patrick J Loehrer, Darron R Brown, Omenge E Orang'o, Susan Cu-Uvin, Aaron C Ermel, Rachel A Katzenellenbogen, Jeffrey A Bailey

ai.TLDR: HPV16是导致宫颈癌前病变的主要病原体，其基因组变异与宫颈癌风险密切相关。本研究开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies的长读长全基因组测序方法，成功解析了撒哈拉以南非洲女性群体中HPV16的遗传多样性，实现了高覆盖度基因组重建和系统发育分析。
ai.translation: 人乳头瘤病毒16型（HPV16）驱动的前驱宫颈病变常进展为宫颈癌（CC）。HPV16基因组变异与宫颈癌风险相关。本研究开发了一种经济实惠且便携的基于扩增子的长读长全基因组测序（WGS）方法，采用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）探究撒哈拉以南非洲女性群体中HPV16的遗传多样性。该方法应用于对照CaSki细胞系和临床样本（n=12），成功生成覆盖度高达5,899-15,279×的完整HPV16基因组。通过与HPV16对照标准进行比对验证，两种变异检测流程（Clair3和PEPPER-Margin DeepVariant）均表现出高准确性。系统发育分析识别出所有四种已定义的HPV16谱系（A-D）及其高危亚谱系，所有谱系在关键基因区域均表现出强一致性。

title: Distribution of Pathogenic Bacteria and Analysis of Antimicrobial Susceptibility in Non-Lactation Granulomatous Mastitis Patients.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The aim was to comprehensively explore the distribution of pathogenic bacteria and antimicrobial susceptibility in the breast puncture fluid of the patients with non-lactation granulomatous mastitis to optimize treatment programs.

METHODS: Fifteen strains of pathogenic bacteria isolated from the breast puncture fluid of the patients with non-lactation granulomatous mastitis were collected in the breast department, Beijing Hospital of Traditional Chinese Medicine, Capital Medical University from March 2023 to October 2023. Matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization-time of flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF MS) and 16S rRNA sequencing were used to bacterial identi-fication. The E-test method was used to determine the minimum inhibitory concentration (MIC) for each isolate, and the EUCAST standard was used for conducting the antimicrobial susceptibility interpretation. The control lipophilic experiment was performed by adopting the 1% Tween-80 blood plate.

RESULTS: The mean age of 15 patients with non-lactation granulomatous mastitis was 32.73 ± 3.37 years old, of which 14 (93.3%) had a history of pregnancy, and the mean postpartum mastitis was 6.38 ± 9.65 months. MALDL-TOF MS results were consistent with 16S rRNA sequencing by nanopore. Among the isolated fastidious bacteria, there were 15 strains of Corynebacterium kroppenstedtii (CK). These strains showed a high susceptibility rate to rifampicin and ceftriaxone (respectively, 93.3% and 80%). The resistance rate of penicillin was as high as 80%. The resistance rate of ciprofloxacin was 46.7%, and the intermediate rate was 53.3%. The sensitivity rate of moxifloxacin was 53.3%. There were no vancomycin-resistant or linezolid-resistant strains found.

CONCLUSIONS: CK plays an important role in the occurrence and development of non-lactation granulomatous mastitis. According to the analysis of clinical antibiotic medication norms and drug sensitivity results, lipophilic rifampicin and linezolid may be the preferred empirical drugs for CK-related non-lactation granulomatous mastitis patients. Meanwhile, the clinical laboratory should endeavor to optimize the culture conditions and use MALDL-TOF MS for accurate identification to improve the detection rate of culture.
authors: Hongye Ma, Yifei Zeng, Di Qu, Xiaoxia Huang, Xuanyu Wang, Xiang Gao, Honglin Guo

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过分析非哺乳期乳腺结核患者乳腺穿刺液中致病菌分布及抗菌药物敏感性，旨在优化治疗方案。结果显示，柯林氏菌（CK）在疾病发生发展中起关键作用，利福平和利奈唑胺可能成为经验性治疗的首选药物。
ai.translation:
背景：本研究旨在全面探索非哺乳期乳腺结核患者乳腺穿刺液中致病菌的分布及抗菌药物敏感性，以优化治疗方案。

方法：2023年3月至10月期间，北京中医药大学附属医院乳腺科共收集了15株非哺乳期乳腺结核患者乳腺穿刺液中的致病菌。采用基质辅助激光解吸电离-时间飞行质谱（MALDI-TOF MS）和纳米孔16S rRNA测序技术进行细菌鉴定。通过E试验法测定各菌株的最小抑菌浓度（MIC），并依据EUCAST标准进行抗菌药物敏感性解读。采用1%吐温-80血平板进行脂溶性实验。

结果：15例非哺乳期乳腺结核患者的平均年龄为32.73±3.37岁，其中14例（93.3%）有妊娠史，平均产后乳腺炎病程为6.38±9.65个月。MALDI-TOF MS结果与纳米孔16S rRNA测序结果一致。分离出的需氧菌中，柯林氏菌（Corynebacterium kroppenstedtii, CK）有15株。这些菌株对利福平和头孢曲松的敏感率分别为93.3%和80%，青霉素耐药率达80%，环丙沙星耐药率46.7%且中介率53.3%，莫西沙星敏感率53.3%。未发现万古霉素耐药或利奈唑胺耐药菌株。

结论：柯林氏菌在非哺乳期乳腺结核的发生发展中起重要作用。根据临床抗生素使用规范及药敏试验结果，脂溶性利福平和利奈唑胺可能成为柯林氏菌相关非哺乳期乳腺结核患者的首选经验性治疗药物。同时，临床实验室应优化培养条件并采用MALDI-TOF MS进行准确鉴定，以提高培养检出率。

title: Whole Genome Sequencing of Carbapenem-Resistant Enterobacter hormaechei Isolated from Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala (India).
abstract:
The rapid emergence of carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae is a critical public health issue across the globe. Widespread antibiotic resistance to multiple drugs has been reported in clinical isolates of Enterobacter hormaechei. In the present investigation, we report the whole genome sequencing (WGS) of a multi-drug resistant (MDR), clinical strain of E. hormaechei, GC26 isolated from Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala (India). Using the Oxford Nanopore sequencing platform, we identified key drug-resistance genes (bla, tet, armA, qnrB, and fos) and virulence genes (fimD, csgD, csgE, csgF, and csgG) in GC26. Multi-Locus Sequence Typing (MLST) analysis of GC26 revealed a novel sequence type (ST*ba28). Phylogenetic analysis showed that the GC26 genome occupies a distinct branch within the Enterobacter genus, closely related to Indian strains of E. hormaechei rather than the global population. This study provides valuable insights into the genetic basis of multidrug resistance in E. hormaechei. These findings underscore the critical need for continuous monitoring and robust epidemiological surveillance of MDR E. hormaechei strains.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: The online version contains supplementary material available at 10.1007/s12088-024-01377-5.
authors: Parvathi Vaikkathillam, Praveen Kumar, S Manjusree, Minsa Mini, Devi Jayakumar, Amjesh Revikumar

ai.TLDR: 碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌科细菌的快速出现是全球公共卫生问题。本研究通过全基因组测序分析了一株来自印度的多药耐药肠杆菌属E. hormaechei菌株GC26，揭示了其耐药基因和毒力基因的特征。研究结果强调了对多药耐药菌株进行持续监测和流行病学调查的重要性。
ai.translation:
碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌科细菌的快速出现是全球公共卫生问题。在临床分离的肠杆菌属E. hormaechei菌株中，已广泛报道对多种抗生素的耐药性。在本研究中，我们报告了一株来自印度喀拉拉邦特里凡得卢姆的多药耐药（MDR）临床菌株E. hormaechei GC26的全基因组测序（WGS）。使用牛津纳米孔测序平台，我们鉴定了GC26中的关键耐药基因（bla、tet、armA、qnrB和fos）和毒力基因（fimD、csgD、csgE、csgF和csgG）。对GC26进行多基因位点序列分型（MLST）分析，发现了一个新的序列类型（ST*ba28）。系统发育分析显示，GC26的基因组在肠杆菌属中占据一个独特的分支，与印度的E. hormaechei菌株关系密切，而非全球菌株。本研究为理解E. hormaechei的多药耐药遗传基础提供了有价值的见解。这些发现强调了对多药耐药E. hormaechei菌株进行持续监测和强大流行病学调查的迫切需求。

补充信息：在线版本包含可在10.1007/s12088-024-01377-5获取的补充材料。

title: tRNA hydroxylation is an epitranscriptomic modulator of metabolic states affecting Pseudomonas aeruginosa pathogenicity.
abstract: Post-transcriptional modification of transfer RNAs (tRNAs) represents an essential layer of translational regulation critical for bacterial adaptation to environmental changes. Increasing evidence links the tRNA epitranscriptome to pivotal roles in the regulation of gene expression and various cellular processes, including stress responses and establishment of virulence. In this study, we used mass spectrometry and nanopore sequencing to quantify and identify the sites of TrhPO-dependent tRNA hydroxylation in total and purified Pseudomonas aeruginosa tRNAs. Furthermore, transcriptome, ribosome profiling, and proteome data were integrated to demonstrate the post-transcriptional consequences of the absence of xo5U34 modifications at the wobble position of selected tRNAs. We suggest that the impaired ability to infect host cells and attenuated virulence in Galleria mellonella are driven by changes in metabolic fluxes. In the absence of TrhPO-mediated tRNA modification, chorismate, the precursor for the biosynthesis of xo5U modifications, is funneled into alternative pathways, including the production of aromatic amino acids and phenazines. Our findings that metabolic rerouting, rather than changes in proteome profiles, attenuates P. aeruginosa virulence highlight the multifunctional roles of tRNA-modifying enzymes and suggest an underexplored role for these enzymes in monitoring and modulating metabolic fitness. These insights open new avenues for combatting the pathogenicity of this challenging opportunistic pathogen.
authors: Yannick N Frommeyer, Nicolas O Gomez, Matthias Preusse, Alejandro Arce-Rodriguez, Kerstin Neubauer, Benedikt Kennepohl, Julius Witte, Safaa Bouheraoua, Pierina Cetraro, Jelena Erdmann, Meina Neumann-Schaal, Mathias Müsken, Andreas Pich, Heike Bähre, Daniel P Depledge, Susanne Häussler

ai.TLDR: tRNA后修饰在细菌适应环境变化中起关键作用，研究发现TrhPO介导的羟基化修饰缺失会导致代谢重编程，从而削弱Pseudomonas aeruginosa的毒力。通过整合多组学数据，揭示了代谢通路重定向而非蛋白组变化是抑制病原体致病性的关键机制。
ai.translation: 翻译后修饰的转移核糖核酸(tRNA)代表了翻译调控的关键层，对细菌适应环境变化至关重要。越来越多的证据表明，tRNA表观转录组在调控基因表达和多种细胞过程（包括应激反应和毒力建立）中发挥核心作用。本研究利用质谱和纳米孔测序技术，量化并鉴定TrhPO依赖的tRNA羟基化修饰位点，分析了总Pseudomonas aeruginosa tRNA及纯化样本中该修饰的分布。进一步整合转录组、核糖体图谱分析和蛋白质组数据，展示了特定tRNA wobble位点xo5U34修饰缺失的转录后效应。我们推测Galleria mellonella中宿主细胞感染能力受损和毒力减弱是由代谢流变化驱动的。在TrhPO介导的tRNA修饰缺失情况下，xo5U修饰的前体chorismate被引导至替代代谢通路，包括芳香族氨基酸和吩嗪的合成。我们的发现表明，代谢重编程而非蛋白组谱变化是抑制P. aeruginosa毒力的关键机制，突显了tRNA修饰酶的多功能性，并提示这些酶在监测和调节代谢适应性中的未被充分探索的作用。这些发现为对抗这种具有挑战性的机会性病原体的致病性开辟了新途径。

title: Evaluation of two SARS-CoV-2 whole genome amplification and sequencing workflows for genomic surveillance and outbreak analysis in the clinical microbiology laboratory.
abstract: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) has become a key element of SARS-CoV-2 genomic epidemiology. In Spain and many other countries, this is mostly driven by Illumina-based sequencing, while Oxford Nanopore Tecnologies' MinION Mk1C is a low-cost, faster, and user-friendly sequencer. We aimed to evaluate the applicability of the Mk1C device with a long-amplicon PCR approach for SARS-CoV-2 rapid genomic surveillance and outbreak characterization. We compared the technical and practical performance of this workflow with the short-amplicon strategy on Illumina's MiSeq platform. We processed 183 PCR-positive nasopharyngeal samples, one positive control derived from a clinical sample, and two synthetic SARS-CoV-2 controls for both sequencing workflows. Good quality sequences were obtained by both methods: their mean breadth coverage was 99 % for both techniques and while mean depth of coverage was 1.78-fold lower for MinION (990× vs 557×), no single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) differences were observed between paired synthetic controls and neither for most of the clinical samples (149/158, 94.3 %). Pango lineage assignments were totally concordant, which were mainly from the Omicron variant. Only one sample showed differences in sublineage assignment. Nanopore workflow had 1.3-fold shorter turnaround time to results for large batches of surveillance samples (96-well plate), and 4.1-fold for the study of small batches of outbreak-related samples. Nanopore sequencing had also a 4.5-fold lower cost per sample, considering consumables and reagents. These results support the use of MinION-based workflow for a rapid response to nosocomial outbreaks as well for its implementation into SARS-CoV-2 genomic surveillance, as a reliable alternative to Illumina MiSeq-based workflow.
authors: David Panisello Yagüe, Andreu C Pelegrin, Laia Soler, Antoni E Bordoy, Sandra Martínez-Puchol, Gemma Clarà, Sara González-Gómez, Alexia Paris de León, Marc Noguera-Julian, Maria Pilar Armengol, Olga Francino, Cristina Casañ, Irma Casas, Pere-Joan Cardona, Montserrat Giménez, Ignacio Blanco, Verónica Saludes, Elisa Martró

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）已成为SARS-CoV-2基因组流行病学的关键组成部分。本研究评估了MinION Mk1C设备结合长扩增PCR方法在SARS-CoV-2快速基因组监测和疫情特征分析中的适用性。结果显示，Nanopore工作流程在成本、周转时间和准确性方面均优于Illumina MiSeq平台。
ai.translation: 全基因组测序（Whole-genome sequencing, WGS）已成为SARS-CoV-2基因组流行病学的关键组成部分。在西班牙和许多其他国家，这一领域主要由基于Illumina的测序技术推动，而牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的MinION Mk1C是一种低成本、快速且用户友好的测序设备。本研究旨在评估Mk1C设备结合长扩增PCR方法在SARS-CoV-2快速基因组监测和疫情特征分析中的适用性。我们比较了该工作流程与Illum、llumina MiSeq平台上的短扩增策略在技术和实际性能上的差异。我们处理了183份PCR阳性鼻咽拭子样本、一份来自临床样本的阳性对照以及两份合成SARS-CoV-2对照样本，用于两种测序工作流程。两种方法均获得了高质量的序列：它们的平均覆盖范围均为99%，而MinION的平均覆盖深度比Illumina低1.78倍（990× vs 557×），但在配对的合成对照样本之间未观察到单核苷酸多态性（single nucleotide polymorphism, SNP）差异，大多数临床样本（149/158, 94.3%）也未观察到差异。Pango谱系分类结果完全一致，主要来自Omicron变种。仅有一份样本在亚谱系分类上存在差异。Nanopore工作流程在处理大量监测样本（96孔板）时，结果周转时间比Illumina短1.3倍，在研究少量疫情相关样本时，周转时间短4.1倍。考虑到消耗品和试剂，Nanopore测序每样本成本低4.5倍。这些结果支持将基于MinION的工作流程用于医院内疫情的快速响应，并将其纳入SARS-CoV-2基因组监测，作为Illumina MiSeq工作流程的可靠替代方案。

title: High precision characterization of RCCX rearrangements in a 21-hydroxylase deficiency Latin American cohort using oxford nanopore long read sequencing
abstract: The *CYP21A2* gene, mapped to the RCCX module in 6p21.3, is responsible for 21-hydroxylase deficiency (21-HD). In this work, we leveraged Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) Long Read sequencing (LRS) to analyze samples from an Argentinian cohort of 21-HD. A total of 34 samples were sequenced in 2 amplicons of 8.5 Kb covering the centromeric and telomeric RCCX modules. The number of variants found varied between 3 and 106 and all expected pathogenic variants and new ones were obtained with the LR sequencing workflow developed. We defined with higher accuracy the breakpoints of the rearrangements allowing the reclassification of chimeras and/or converted genes in 18.75% of the samples, some of them with clinical implications. By addressing the study of the telomeric RCCX module/s in depth, we found 19 genetic variants (GVs) for *CYP21A1P* and 29 GVs for *TNXA* not previously described in Latin American populations. This study may represent the first application of ONT LRS for clinical evaluation of Latin American subjects, highlighting the importance of LRS as a high-resolution method of diagnosis. It would allow a better understanding of the diversity of the RCCX modules and improve our knowledge of the variation of genetic mechanisms behind the disease.
authors: Aldana Claps, Jorge E. Kolomenski, ... Liliana Dain
citation: Claps, A., Kolomenski, J.E., Fernández, F. et al. High precision characterization of RCCX rearrangements in a 21-hydroxylase deficiency Latin American cohort using oxford nanopore long read sequencing. Sci Rep 15 , 24983 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-03799-7

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序（LRS）分析阿根廷21-羟化酶缺陷（21-HD）队列样本，发现3-106个变异并精准定位重排断点，重新分类18.75%样本中的嵌合体/转换基因。通过深度解析远端RCCX模块，首次在拉丁美洲人群中发现19个CYP21A1P和29个TNXA遗传变异，凸显LRS在临床诊断中的高分辨率优势。
ai.translation: CYP21A2基因位于6p21.3的RCCX模块，负责21-羟化酶缺陷（21-HD）。本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序（LRS）分析阿根廷21-HD队列样本。共对34个样本进行8.5Kb扩增子测序，覆盖着丝粒和端粒RCCX模块。测序发现的变异数量在3-106个之间，通过开发的LRS工作流程成功获取所有预期致病变异及新变异。通过精准定位重排断点，重新分类18.75%样本中的嵌合体和/或转换基因，部分样本具有临床意义。深入研究端粒RCCX模块发现，CYP21A1P存在19个遗传变异（GVs），TNXA存在29个GVs，这些变异此前未在拉丁美洲人群中报道。本研究可能代表ONT LRS在拉丁美洲人群临床评估中的首次应用，凸显LRS作为高分辨率诊断方法的重要性，有助于更深入理解RCCX模块多样性并提升对疾病遗传机制变异的认识。

title: Hidden SVA retrotransposon insertion inBRCA1revealed by nanopore targeted sequencing causes hereditary breast and ovarian cancer
abstract: In Japan, germline *BRCA1/2* genetic testing is extensively used for the diagnosis of hereditary breast and ovarian cancer syndrome (HBOC). However, inconclusive results sometimes complicate clinical management. In this study, we identified an intronic SINE-VNTR-Alu (SVA) insertion in *BRCA1* of a proband and her mother, both of whom had inconclusive conventional *BRCA1/2* genetic test results, by targeted long-read sequencing (LRS) through the application of nanopore adaptive sampling and Flongle genome amplicon sequencing. We further confirmed splicing aberrations using cDNA quantitative PCR with TaqMan probes and Flongle cDNA amplicon sequencing. Our findings highlighted that, in addition to conventional *BRCA1/2* genetic testing, structural variation analysis using targeted LRS is indispensable for the accurate diagnosis of HBOC in certain cases. Furthermore, Flongle amplicon sequencing was demonstrated to be effective for sequencing regions refractory to conventional PCR and Sanger sequencing, particularly repetitive and GC-rich regions, such as retrotransposons.
authors: Sachiko Ohori, Mina Waraya, ... Fumio Takada
citation: Ohori, S., Waraya, M., Fujisaki, K. et al. Hidden SVA retrotransposon insertion in BRCA1 revealed by nanopore targeted sequencing causes hereditary breast and ovarian cancer. J Hum Genet (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s10038-025-01365-7

ai.TLDR: 日本广泛采用胚系BRCA1/2基因检测诊断遗传性乳腺和卵巢癌综合征（HBOC），但部分病例存在检测结果不明确的问题。本研究通过纳米孔自适应采样和Flongle基因组扩增子测序技术，首次发现BRCA1基因内含子区域的SINE-VNTR-Alu（SVA）插入变异，证实了结构变异分析对HBOC精准诊断的重要性。Flongle扩增子测序技术在常规PCR和Sanger测序难以处理的重复序列和GC富集区域表现出显著优势。
ai.translation: 在日本，胚系BRCA1/2基因检测被广泛用于遗传性乳腺和卵巢癌综合征（HBOC）的诊断。然而，部分病例的常规检测结果存在不明确的情况，可能影响临床管理。本研究通过应用纳米孔自适应采样技术与Flongle基因组扩增子测序，对一名检测结果不明确的受检者及其母亲进行了靶向长读长测序（LRS），首次在BRCA1基因中发现内含子区域的SINE-VNTR-Alu（SVA）插入变异。进一步通过TaqMan探针的cDNA定量PCR和Flongle cDNA扩增子测序技术验证了剪接异常的存在。研究结果表明，在某些HBOC病例中，除常规BRCA1/2基因检测外，基于靶向LRS的结构变异分析是实现精准诊断的必要手段。同时，Flongle扩增子测序技术被证实对常规PCR和Sanger测序难以处理的区域（如重复序列和GC富集区域，如逆转录转座子）具有显著的测序优势。

title: Context-Seq: CRISPR-Cas9 targeted nanopore sequencing for transmission dynamics of antimicrobial resistance
abstract: Precisely understanding how and to what extent antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is exchanged between animals and humans is needed to inform control strategies. Metagenomic sequencing has low detection for rare targets such as antibiotic resistance genes, while whole genome sequencing of isolates misses exchange between uncultured bacterial species. We introduce Context-Seq, CRISPR-Cas9 targeted sequencing of ARGs and their genomic context with long-reads. Using Context-Seq, we investigate genetically similar AMR elements containing the ARGs *bla*CTX-M and *bla*TEM between adults, children, poultry, and dogs in Nairobi, Kenya. We identify genetically distinct clusters containing *bla*TEM and *bla*CTX-M that are shared between animals and humans within and between households. We also uncover potentially pathogenic hosts of ARGs including *Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae*, and *Haemophilus influenzae* in this study context. Context-Seq complements conventional methods to obtain an additional view of bacterial and mammalian hosts in the proliferation of AMR.
authors: Erica R. Fuhrmeister, Sooyeol Kim, ... Amy J. Pickering
citation: Fuhrmeister, E.R., Kim, S., Mairal, S.A. et al. Context-Seq: CRISPR-Cas9 targeted nanopore sequencing for transmission dynamics of antimicrobial resistance. Nat Commun 16 , 5898 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-60491-0
description: Precisely understanding how and to what extent antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is exchanged between animals and humans is needed to inform control...

ai.TLDR: 研究抗微生物耐药性（AMR）在动物与人类间的传播需精准解析其交换机制。传统宏基因组测序对稀有靶标检测灵敏度不足，而全基因组测序无法揭示未培养菌种间的基因交换。Context-Seq技术通过CRISPR-Cas9靶向长读长测序，首次揭示了肯尼亚内罗毕人群中blaCTX-M和blaTEM基因在人类与动物间的遗传簇共享。
ai.translation: 精准理解抗微生物耐药性（AMR）在动物与人类间的交换机制和程度，是制定控制策略的关键。宏基因组测序对稀有靶标如抗生素耐药基因（ARGs）的检测灵敏度较低，而分离株的全基因组测序则无法揭示未培养细菌物种间的基因交换。我们引入Context-Seq技术，该技术通过CRISPR-Cas9靶向长读长测序，同时捕获ARGs及其基因组背景信息。利用Context-Seq技术，我们研究了肯尼亚内罗毕地区成人、儿童、家禽和犬类中携带blaCTX-M和blaTEM耐药基因的遗传相似AMR元件。研究发现，动物与人类在同户及跨户间存在携带blaTEM和blaCTX-M的遗传差异簇。同时揭示了ARGs的潜在致病宿主，包括大肠杆菌、肺炎克雷伯菌和流感嗜血杆菌。Context-Seq技术补充了传统方法，为AMR传播中的细菌和哺乳动物宿主提供了新的视角。

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Clinical performance of nanopore targeted sequencing for diagnosing endophthalmitis
abstract:
### Purpose

Rapid identification of pathogenic bacteria in the vitreous and/or aqueous humor of patients with acute clinical diagnosis of endophthalmitis via nanopore sequencing technology.

### Methods

We recruited a total of 12 patients (12 eyes) who were diagnosed with endophthalmitis at an ophthalmic outpatient clinic of Peking University Third Hospital from January 2022 to October 2022. Clinical evaluation is conducted in the order of consultation, symptom evaluation, physical sign evaluation, and ophthalmic special examination, all of which are completed by the same experienced clinical physician. Finally, 19 aqueous humor and/or vitreous samples were obtained via anterior chamber wash, vitreous tap and vitrectomy. The samples were separated for cultivation, biochemical drug sensitivity identification, and targeted nanopore sequencing (NTS), and the results of nanopore sequencing were validated via Sanger sequencing.

### Results

In patients with endophthalmitis, NTS can identify infected pathogens within 8–12 h. Six samples (31.6%) were subjected to culture-based diagnosis, while NTS revealed the presence of pathogenic microorganisms in 19 samples (100%), of which bacteria and fungi were detected in three samples. A total of 19 samples were subjected to Sanger sequencing, of which 16 (84.2%) tested positive, including 6 culture-positive samples and 10 culture-negative samples, of which 5 (26.3%) were positive for two bacterial genera. In culture-positive cases, there is a high-quality match between culture and targeted nanopore sequencing.

### Conclusions

NTS can quickly detect pathogenic bacteria in samples from patients with endophthalmitis. Moreover, the use of vitreous and/or aqueous humor for the NTS has potential. NTS is a promising diagnostic platform for endophthalmitis, especially for mixed infections and culture-negative cases.
authors: Dalan Jing, Xiaodan Jiang, ... Xuemin Li
citation: Jing, D., Jiang, X., Ren, X. et al. Clinical performance of nanopore targeted sequencing for diagnosing endophthalmitis. BMC Microbiol 25 , 403 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12866-025-04132-y
description: Rapid identification of pathogenic bacteria in the vitreous and/or aqueous humor of patients with acute clinical diagnosis of endophthalmitis...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术（NTS）快速检测眼内炎患者玻璃体和/或房水中的致病菌，结果显示NTS可在8-12小时内准确识别病原体，对培养阴性样本的检测灵敏度达84.2%。该技术在混合感染和培养阴性病例中展现出显著优势。
ai.translation:
### 目的
通过纳米孔测序技术快速识别急性临床诊断眼内炎患者玻璃体和/或房水中的致病细菌。

### 方法
我们招募了2022年1月至10月期间在北京大学第三医院眼科门诊确诊为眼内炎的12名患者（12只眼睛）。临床评估按就诊顺序进行，包括症状评估、体征评估和眼科专项检查，均由同一位经验丰富的临床医师完成。最终通过前房冲洗、玻璃体穿刺和玻璃体切除术获取了19份房水和/或玻璃体样本。样本被分为培养、生化药物敏感性鉴定和靶向纳米孔测序（NTS）检测，纳米孔测序结果通过Sanger测序进行验证。

### 结果
在眼内炎患者中，NTS可在8-12小时内识别出感染病原体。6份样本（31.6%）进行了培养诊断，而NTS在19份样本（100%）中均检测到致病微生物，其中3份样本检测到细菌和真菌。19份样本进行了Sanger测序，其中16份（84.2%）呈阳性，包括6份培养阳性样本和10份培养阴性样本，其中5份（26.3%）同时检测到两种细菌属。在培养阳性病例中，培养结果与靶向纳米孔测序结果高度一致。

### 结论
NTS可快速检测眼内炎患者样本中的致病细菌。此外，使用玻璃体和/或房水进行NTS具有潜在价值。NTS是眼内炎诊断的有前景平台，尤其适用于混合感染和培养阴性病例。

title: Polyarginine-functionalized AP site probes for mechanistic analysis of uracil-DNA glycosylase
abstract: The interaction between abasic (apurinic/apyrimidinic, AP) sites and aberrant uracil DNA glycosylase (UDG) contributes to cancer progression, establishing AP site recognition and UDG detection as critical tools for bioanalytical applications and clinical diagnostics. However, existing methods face challenges in achieving high sensitivity and specificity. In this work, we developed DNA-R5, a novel DNA adduct formed by conjugating AP sites with polyarginine-5 (R5), which generates distinctive current signatures in nanopore sensing. While signal production remained sequence-independent, it exhibited dependence on arginine unit quantity, linker length, and electrolyte concentration. Characteristic signal patterns enabled clear identification of translocation events through the oscillating features. Quantitative analysis of high-frequency current signatures achieved UDG activity detection with sensitivity reaching 0.0005 U mL
authors: Ting Li, Shaojiao Song, Wei Lu, Xin Zheng, Hui Tian, Yu Cao, Qiuyue Zhao, Hongying Xie, Jiexin Zheng, Hailong Wang

ai.TLDR: AP位点与异常尿嘧啶DNA糖基酶（UDG）的相互作用在癌症进展中起关键作用，现有方法在灵敏度和特异性方面存在局限。本研究开发了DNA-R5新型DNA加合物，通过纳米孔传感技术实现UDG活性检测，灵敏度达到0.0005 U mL⁻¹。
ai.translation: 脱嘌呤/脱嘧啶位点（AP位点）与异常尿嘧啶DNA糖基酶（UDG）的相互作用促进了癌症进展，确立了AP位点识别和UDG检测作为生物分析和临床诊断的关键工具。然而，现有方法在实现高灵敏度和特异性方面面临挑战。本研究开发了DNA-R5，这是一种通过将AP位点与聚精氨酸-5（R5）偶联形成的新型DNA加合物，在纳米孔传感中产生独特的电流特征。虽然信号生成与序列无关，但表现出对精氨酸单元数量、连接子长度和电解质浓度的依赖性。特征化的信号模式通过振荡特性实现了转位事件的清晰识别。对高频电流特征的定量分析实现了UDG活性检测，灵敏度达到0.0005 U mL⁻¹。

title: Feasibility of long-read sequencing to identify molecular alterations in an Indonesian cohort of locally advanced to advanced nasopharyngeal cancer
abstract: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) is prevalent in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia. Despite advances in treatment, patients with advanced NPC face poor outcomes. Examining the NPC mutational landscape is crucial for understanding its biology and enable potential new therapeutic strategy. To characterize the landscape of single nucleotide variants (SNVs), structural variants (SVs), copy number variations (CNVs), and short tandem repeats (STRs) in locally advanced to advanced NPC within an Indonesian cohort using long-read sequencing. Six fresh-frozen nasopharyngeal biopsy samples were collected from the NPC biobank. DNA was extracted and sequenced using Oxford Nanopore’s Promethion 2 Solo long-read sequencer. Structural and small variants were identified and annotated. The SNVs, SVs, and CNVs were categorized based on predicted effects, and key findings were validated using external RNA-seq data. Copy number loss genes were checked against the Tumour Suppressor Gene database (TSGene v2.0). Genetic findings were correlated with patient clinical histories. Approximately 4.4 to 5.1 million SNVs were identified per sample, with 0.023% categorized as high consequence. Notable tumour suppressor genes, such as LIMD1 and *CNDP2*, were frequently mutated. Around 30,000 to 41,599 SVs were detected per sample. High-consequence tumour suppressor gene SVs were identified in *EPHA3*, *CASP8*, *DMBT1*, *ZFHX3*, and *IRF5* gene. Common copy number tumour suppressor gene loss observed in *RNH1*, *H19*, *CDKN1C*, and others, suggesting their role in NPC carcinogenesis. Copy number gains were found in potential oncogenes such as *Y RNA*, *LTO1*, and *FADD*. Pathogenic short tandem repeats (STRs) in *PABPN1* and *RFC1* were identified in three samples, presenting a novel association with NPC. NPC sample which exhibited significant genomic instability had the shortest survival, potentially linked to multiple defective DNA repair genes. This study utilized long-read sequencing to identify a complex spectrum of genetic alterations, including numerous SVs and potentially pathogenic STRs, in Indonesian NPC. Extensive DNA repair gene defects, primarily complex SVs detectable by long reads, were observed and highly possibly associated with poor survival. These findings underscore the potential of long-read sequencing for uncovering clinically relevant mutations in NPC.
authors: Handoko, Marlinda Adham, ... Soehartati A Gondhowiardjo
citation: Handoko, Adham, M., Rachmadi, L. et al. Feasibility of long-read sequencing to identify molecular alterations in an Indonesian cohort of locally advanced to advanced nasopharyngeal cancer. Sci Rep 15 , 21087 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-06096-5
description: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) is prevalent in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia. Despite advances in treatment, patients with advanced NPC...

ai.TLDR: 鼻咽癌（NPC）在东南亚地区高发，尤其在印尼，晚期患者预后较差。本研究通过长读长测序技术分析印尼队列中晚期NPC的基因组变异，发现多种单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、结构变异（SVs）和拷贝数变异（CNVs），并揭示其与临床结局的关联。研究结果表明，长读长测序可有效识别与NPC发病机制相关的复杂遗传变异。
ai.translation: 鼻咽癌（NPC）在东南亚地区高发，尤其在印尼。尽管治疗手段不断进步，晚期NPC患者仍面临较差的预后。解析NPC的突变图谱对于理解其生物学特性并开发潜在治疗策略至关重要。本研究通过长读长测序技术，对印尼队列中局部晚期至晚期NPC样本的单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、结构变异（SVs）、拷贝数变异（CNVs）和短串联重复（STRs）进行全景分析。从NPC生物库中收集了6例新鲜冷冻的鼻咽活检样本，采用牛津纳米孔Promethion 2 Solo长读长测序仪提取DNA并进行测序。通过比对和注释识别结构变异和小变异，根据预测效应分类SNVs、SVs和CNVs，并通过外部RNA-seq数据验证关键发现。拷贝数丢失基因与肿瘤抑制基因数据库（TSGene v2.0）进行比对。将遗传发现与患者临床病史进行关联分析。每例样本中检测到约440万至510万SNVs，其中0.023%被归类为高影响变异。LIMD1和*CNDP2*等肿瘤抑制基因频繁发生突变。每例样本检测到约3万至4.15万SVs，EPHA3、CASP8、DMBT1、ZFHX3和IRF5基因中发现高影响肿瘤抑制基因SVs。在RNH1、H19、CDKN1C等基因中观察到常见的拷贝数肿瘤抑制基因丢失，提示其在NPC癌变中的作用。在Y RNA、LTO1和FADD等潜在癌基因中发现拷贝数扩增。在PABPN1和RFC1基因中检测到致病性短串联重复（STRs），在3例样本中呈现与NPC的新关联。表现出显著基因组不稳定的NPC样本具有最短生存期，可能与多个DNA修复基因缺陷相关。本研究利用长读长测序技术识别了印尼NPC中复杂的遗传变异谱系，包括大量SVs和潜在致病性STRs。观察到广泛的DNA修复基因缺陷，主要表现为可通过长读长测序检测的复杂SVs，高度可能与不良预后相关。这些发现凸显了长读长测序在揭示NPC临床相关突变方面的潜力。

title: Nanopore sequencing reveals a diversity of microorganisms in ticks from Ethiopia
abstract: Ethiopia is home to a diverse group of ixodid ticks that are known to transmit disease to both animals and humans. Recent advances in metagenome sequencing show there is more microorganism diversity found in ticks than previously known. Compared to amplicon-based gene identification methods, agnostic metagenomic sequencing provides broader insights into the diversity of microorganisms in ticks, providing knowledge that will better enable public health measures in preventing the spread of zoonotic disease. In the present study, metagenomic sequencing was used to look at the microbial diversity of ticks collected from livestock in Ethiopia. This study identified six bacterial genera (*Coxiella*, *Francisella*, spotted-fever group (SFG) *Rickettsia*, *Spiroplasma*, *Ehrlichia*, and *Borrelia*), one genus of eukaryotic parasite (*Babesia* sp.), and one virus species (*Parapoxvirus bovinestomatitis*) from 154 tick pools representing 22 species of ticks among four genera (*Amblyomma*, *Haemaphysalis*, *Hyalomma*, and *Rhipicephalus*). We were able to differentiate between pathogenic and nonpathogenic microorganisms, highlighting concerns among traditional gene-targeted screening methods. Among all pooled samples, the predominant microorganisms included *Coxiella-*like endosymbionts (55.2%), SFG *Rickettsia* (38.3%), and nonpathogenic *Francisella* spp. (26.0%). *Rickettsia africae* was the predominant pathogenic agent detected, and phylogenetic analysis of two samples from *A. gemma* and *A. variegatum* confirmed the presence of *R. africae.* This study highlights the power of metagenomics applied to potential vectors of zoonotic disease, and it expands the knowledge on tick-pathogen associations in Ethiopia.
authors: Electra F. Chadd, Koray Ergunay, ... Yvonne-Marie Linton
citation: Chadd, E.F., Ergunay, K., Kumsa, B. et al. Nanopore sequencing reveals a diversity of microorganisms in ticks from Ethiopia. Parasitol Res 124 , 73 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00436-025-08520-1
description: Ethiopia is home to a diverse group of ixodid ticks that are known to transmit disease to both animals and humans. Recent advances in metagenome...

ai.TLDR: 埃塞俄比亚的蜱虫携带多种病原体，宏基因组测序揭示了比传统方法更全面的微生物多样性，为防控人畜共患病提供了新思路。研究通过分析154个蜱虫池样本，发现了6个细菌属、1个真核寄生虫属和1种病毒。
ai.translation: 埃塞俄比亚是多种硬蜱的家园，这些蜱虫已知会传播疾病给动物和人类。近期宏基因组测序技术的发展表明，蜱虫体内微生物多样性远超以往认知。与基于扩增子的基因鉴定方法相比，无偏倚的宏基因组测序能更全面揭示蜱虫微生物多样性，为防控人畜共患病的公共卫生措施提供关键信息。本研究采用宏基因组测序分析了从埃塞俄比亚牲畜中采集的蜱虫样本的微生物多样性。从代表四个属（Amblyomma、Haemaphysalis、Hyalomma和Rhipicephalus）的22种蜱虫共154个池样本中，鉴定出六类细菌属（Coxiella、Francisella、斑疹热组（SFG）Rickettsia、Spiroplasma、Ehrlichia和Borrelia）、一类真核寄生虫属（Babesia sp.）和一种病毒（Parapoxvirus bovinestomatitis）。我们能够区分致病性和非致病性微生物，凸显传统基因靶向筛查方法的局限性。所有池样本中占主导地位的微生物包括Coxiella-like内共生体（55.2%）、SFG Rickettsia（30.3%）和非致病性Francisella spp.（26.0%）。Rickettsia africae是检测到的主要致病因子，对来自A. gemma和A. variegatum的两个样本的系统发育分析证实了R. africae的存在。本研究展示了宏基因组学在人畜共患病潜在传播媒介分析中的强大能力，并拓展了对埃塞俄比亚蜱虫-病原体关联的认知。

title: Impact of human lifestyle on the pathogenic potential of urban wastewater.
abstract: Domestic wastewater has been known for its pathogenic potential including the presence of pathogenic bacteria, virulence factor genes (VFGs) and antibiotic resistance genes (ARGs). While previous studies have investigated regional differences in microbial communities, the influence of population lifestyle factors on the pathogenic potential of wastewater microbiomes remains poorly understood. In this study, we analyzed ten Australian wastewater treatment plants (WWTPs) using Nanopore metagenomic sequencing to profile pathogens, ARGs, and VFGs, and examined their associations with health-related behaviors such as smoking, alcohol consumption, and obesity. A total of 196 pathogenic species, 951 ARG subtypes, and 380 VFGs were detected. Staphylococcus aureus was the most abundant pathogen, macB the dominant ARG, and lipooligosaccharides (LOS) the most prevalent VFG. While pathogen and ARG profiles were relatively stable across sites and showed limited association with lifestyle variables, VFG profiles demonstrated significant correlations with smoking rates, alcohol consumption, and nicotine levels in wastewater. Co-occurrence network analysis revealed strong interconnectivity among VFGs and between VFGs and ARGs, suggesting potential co-selection. Principal component analysis and diversity metrics further confirmed distinct patterns in VFG distribution across sites. These findings suggest VFGs as potentially sensitive indicators of behavioral health risks in wastewater-based epidemiology.
authors: Jiangping Wu, Yan Chen, Jiawei Zhao, Jake William O'Brien, Lachlan Coin, Faisal I Hai, Martina Sanderson-Smith, Guangming Jiang

ai.TLDR: 污水中病原体的潜在危害与生活方式因素密切相关。本研究通过纳米孔宏基因组测序分析澳大利亚10个污水处理厂，发现毒力因子基因（VFGs）与吸烟、饮酒及尼古丁水平存在显著关联，揭示了污水流行病学中行为健康风险的敏感指标。
ai.translation: 国内污水已被证实具有病原潜力，包括病原细菌、毒力因子基因（VFGs）和抗生素抗性基因（ARGs）的存在。尽管以往研究已探讨微生物群落的区域差异，但人口生活方式因素对污水微生物组病原潜力的影响仍缺乏深入理解。本研究采用纳米孔宏基因组测序技术，分析了澳大利亚10个污水处理厂（WWTPs）的病原体、ARGs和VFGs，探讨其与吸烟、饮酒和肥胖等健康相关行为的关联。共检测到196种病原物种、951种ARG亚型和380种VFGs。金黄色葡萄球菌（Staphylococcus aureus）是主要病原体，macB为优势ARG，脂寡糖（lipooligosaccharides, LOS）为最普遍的VFG。尽管病原体和ARG的分布相对稳定且与生活方式变量关联有限，但VFGs与吸烟率、饮酒及污水中尼古丁水平呈现显著相关性。共现网络分析显示VFGs之间及与ARGs之间存在强关联性，暗示潜在的协同选择。主成分分析和多样性指标进一步验证了不同地点VFG分布的差异模式。这些发现表明VFGs可作为污水流行病学中行为健康风险的敏感指标。

title: Long-range PCRs and next-generation sequencing to detect cytomegalovirus drug resistance-associated mutations.
abstract: Cytomegalovirus (CMV) infections occur in 10%-40% of organ or stem cell transplant patients. Despite the low prevalence, CMV antiviral resistance has an important impact on patient outcomes. Guidelines for transplant recipients recommend that resistance should be suspected in cases of unchanged or increasing CMV viral loads after a minimum of 2 weeks of antiviral therapy at an appropriate dose or >6 weeks of ganciclovir exposure. Next-generation amplicon sequencing (NGS) makes it possible to directly target the genes involved in this resistance. Currently, six drugs are available, and six CMV genes (UL54-UL97-UL89-UL56-UL51-UL27 genes) can harbor mutations affecting drug efficacy. Here, we developed different primers targeting these six genes with long-range polymerase chain reaction (PCR). Based on clinical requirements, all genes or a subset could be sequenced in a single run using Oxford Nanopore technology and combined with an automatic bioinformatics pipeline to detect and report mutations. We utilized 46 blood samples, five external quality controls, and 10 mixes of two bacmids provided by the national reference center (CNR) Herpesvirus Limoges, each carrying distinct mutations. Assay performance (sensitivity, specificity, and accuracy) was evaluated through an interlaboratory exchange with CNR Herpesvirus. Long-range PCR combined with next-generation sequencing analysis enables earlier and more comprehensive discrimination of the double population and determines whether the detected single-nucleotide polymorphisms are present on single or multiple CMV strains. We developed a next-generation sequencing assay combined with eight long-range PCRs to sequence all genes involved in CMV antiviral resistance and to detect early low-frequency mutations.
authors: Julien Andreani, Aurélie Truffot, Valentin Tilloy, Hugo Jardin, Matilda Lespinasse, Marie Usal, Sylvie Larrat, Patrice Morand, Julien Lupo, Sébastien Hantz, Sophie Alain, Raphaële Germi

ai.TLDR: 巨细胞病毒（CMV）感染在器官或干细胞移植患者中发生率高达10%-40%，但抗病毒耐药性对患者预后有重要影响。本研究开发了一种结合长距离PCR和下一代扩增子测序的检测方法，可全面识别耐药相关基因突变，显著提升早期低频突变的检测能力。
ai.translation: 巨细胞病毒（Cytomegalovirus, CMV）感染在器官或干细胞移植患者中发生率高达10%-40%。尽管感染率相对较低，但CMV抗病毒耐药性对患者预后具有重要影响。移植受者指南建议，在接受至少2周适当剂量抗病毒治疗后病毒载量无变化或持续升高，或接受>6周更昔洛韦暴露后仍出现病毒载量异常时，应怀疑抗病毒耐药性。下一代扩增子测序（Next-generation amplicon sequencing, NGS）技术可直接靶向检测与耐药性相关的基因。目前有六种抗CMV药物，其中六个CMV基因（UL54、UL97、UL89、UL56、UL51、UL27）可能携带影响药物疗效的突变。本研究开发了针对这六个基因的长距离聚合酶链反应（Long-range polymerase chain reaction, PCR）引物。基于临床需求，可使用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore technology）在单次运行中对全部基因或部分基因进行测序，并结合自动化生物信息学流程实现突变的检测与报告。我们利用46份血液样本、5份外部质量控制样本和10份由国家参考中心（CNR Herpesvirus Limoges）提供的携带不同突变的双质粒混合物进行测试。通过与CNR Herpesvirus实验室间的交换验证了检测性能（灵敏度、特异性和准确性）。长距离PCR结合下一代测序分析可更早、更全面地区分双群体，并确定检测到的单核苷酸多态性是存在于单一还是多种CMV毒株中。我们开发了一种结合八种长距离PCR的下一代测序检测方法，用于对所有与CMV抗病毒耐药性相关的基因进行测序，并检测早期低频突变。

title: A targeted approach for multiplex detection of respiratory viruses in cases with severe acute respiratory infections by nanopore sequencing.
abstract: Severe acute respiratory infection (SARI) remains one of the leading causes of morbidity and mortality worldwide. Multiple viruses can cause this infection. Sequencing technologies hold great promise for detecting viral pathogens. This proof-of-concept study aimed to develop and validate a new method for multiplex detection and typing of SARI-related viruses (SARS-CoV-2, Influenza A (H1N1, H3N2), Influenza B, human respiratory syncytial virus, human adenoviruses, human enteroviruses, and human parainfluenza viruses) using a nanopore next-generation sequencing method. Following genome extraction from oropharyngeal swab samples and conventional RT-PCR assays, the libraries were barcoded and sequenced by the MinION device. The sensitivity and specificity were assessed using various serial dilutions of samples and different primer pools, respectively. Data analysis was carried out using bioinformatic tools. Finally, the protocol was validated with known positive samples. All participants provided written informed consent. During 12 hours of MinION sequencing, 711,000 reads passed the quality filters (Q-score>7). Eleven out of 12 target genes were successfully identified in clinical samples, with more than 90% coverage for most viruses. All viruses were detected by a Q30 value of more than 1%. The detection limit was measured for SARS-CoV-2, Influenza A (H1N1, H3N2), Influenza B, and human respiratory syncytial virus. The method showed 99.9% specificity in detection and was validated by 20 clinical samples. This study developed and validated a novel multiplex detection approach of Oxford Nanopore Technologies that allowed the identification of SARI-related respiratory viruses in a clinical laboratory setting.
authors: Arghavan Zebardast, Kaveh Sadeghi, Ahmad Nejati, Sevrin Zadheidar, Mohammad Hossein Najmi, Adel Abedi, Vahid Salimi, Mehdi Shabani, Jila Yavarian, Nazanin Zahra Shafiei Jandaghi, Talat Mokhtari Azad

ai.TLDR: 严重急性呼吸系统感染（SARI）仍是全球发病率和死亡率的主要原因之一。本研究开发并验证了一种基于纳米孔测序技术的多重检测方法，用于识别与SARI相关的病毒。该方法在临床样本中表现出高灵敏度和特异性。
keywords: 严重急性呼吸系统感染
ai.translation: 严重急性呼吸系统感染（SARI）仍然是全球发病率和死亡率的主要原因之一。多种病毒可以引起这种感染。测序技术在检测病毒病原体方面具有巨大潜力。本概念验证研究旨在开发并验证一种基于纳米孔下一代测序技术的新方法，用于多重检测和分型与SARI相关的病毒（包括SARS-CoV-2、甲型流感（H1N1、H3N2）、乙型流感、人类呼吸道合胞病毒、人类腺病毒、人类肠道病毒和人类副流感病毒）。在从咽拭子样本中提取基因组并进行常规RT-PCR检测后，样本库被条形码标记并使用MinION设备进行测序。通过不同样本稀释度和不同引物池分别评估了灵敏度和特异性。数据分析使用生物信息学工具进行。最后，使用已知阳性样本验证了该协议。所有参与者均提供了书面知情同意。在12小时的MinION测序过程中，有711,000条读数通过了质量过滤（Q值>7）。在临床样本中，12个目标基因中有11个成功被识别，大多数病毒的覆盖度超过90%。所有病毒均通过Q30值超过1%被检测到。对SARS-CoV-2、甲型流感（H1N1、H3N2）、乙型流感和人类呼吸道合胞病毒的检测限进行了测量。该方法在检测中表现出99.9%的特异性，并通过20个临床样本进行了验证。本研究开发并验证了一种基于牛津纳米孔技术的新型多重检测方法，使得在临床实验室环境中能够识别与SARI相关的呼吸道病毒。

title: Enhanced identification of novel pathogenic variants in hereditary hearing loss through physical phasing with integrated short and long-read sequencing data
abstract: Haplotagged variant calling is essential for determining genetic etiologies in hereditary hearing loss (HHL) cases when familial testing is unavailable, and long-read whole-genome sequencing (lrWGS) enables this by outperforming in several key areas: enhanced detection of structural variations (SVs) and precise long-range haplotype phasing. In this study, we enrolled two HL cases from the China Deafness Genetics Consortium (CDGC) cohort, whose genetic tests were previously inconclusive due to a lack of pedigree segregation data. Small variants (including SNVs and InDels) profiles were generated by short-read whole-genome sequencing (srWGS), while SVs were identified and co-phased with small variants using a read-based approach. As a result, 87% and 83% of the chromosomal regions were successfully phased, and reached mean haplotype block lengths up to 661.9 kb and 309.9 kb, respectively. A total of 483 and 434 small variants, along with three and six heterozygous SVs in coding and splice regions of 201 HL-associated genes were phased. Pathogenic interpretations resolved compound heterozygosity in *MARVELD2*, identifying a pathogenic (P) variant NM_001038603.3:c.782G > A *in trans* with a novel pathogenic (P) deletion (NM_001038603.3:c.1183–1288_1503 + 195del). Additionally, we identified a known P variant NM_022124.6:c.5369-1G > A, which was oriented *in trans* with a P deletion NM_022124.6:c.-5-12_67 + 154del in the *CDH23* gene. This study demonstrates the clinical utility of integrating srWGS and Nanopore lrWGS for comprehensive variant detection and haplotype determination in HL cases with limited family background details, providing a robust framework for resolving complex genetic etiologies and improving diagnostic precision.
authors: Lu Kang, Qian Zhang, ... Huijun Yuan
citation: Kang, L., Zhang, Q., Wang, C. et al. Enhanced identification of novel pathogenic variants in hereditary hearing loss through physical phasing with integrated short and long-read sequencing data. Mol Genet Genomics 300 , 61 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00438-025-02256-4

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过整合短读长全基因组测序（srWGS）和纳米孔长读长全基因组测序（lrWGS），成功解析了遗传性听力损失（HHL）病例的复杂遗传病因。该方法在缺乏家系信息的情况下，实现了染色体区域的高精度等位基因相位确定，显著提升了变异检测的临床诊断价值。
ai.translation: 等位基因标记变异调用在缺乏家系检测数据的遗传性听力损失（HHL）病例中确定遗传病因至关重要，长读长全基因组测序（lrWGS）通过在结构变异（SVs）检测和长程等位基因相位确定等关键领域表现优异，实现了这一目标。本研究纳入了中国聋病遗传学联盟（CDGC）队列中的2例HL病例，其先前因缺乏家系分型数据导致遗传检测结果不明确。通过短读长全基因组测序（srWGS）生成小变异（包括SNVs和InDels）图谱，采用基于reads的方法识别并联合小变异进行SVs的共相位分析。结果表明，87%和83%的染色体区域成功进行了等位基因相位确定，分别达到平均等位基因块长度661.9 kb和309.9 kb。对201个HL相关基因的编码区和剪接区，共相位了483和434个小变异，以及3和6个杂合SVs。病理解释揭示了MARVELD2基因的复合杂合性，鉴定出致病性（P）变异NM_001038603.3:c.782G>A与新型致病性（P）缺失（NM_001038603.3:c.1183–1288_1503+195del）在等位基因上共存。此外，还发现了CDH23基因中已知致病性（P）变异NM_022124.6:c.5369-1G>A与致病性（P）缺失NM_022124.6:c.-5-12_67+154del在等位基因上共存。本研究证明了整合srWGS和纳米孔lrWGS在缺乏家系背景信息的HL病例中进行全面变异检测和等位基因确定的临床价值，为解析复杂遗传病因和提升诊断精度提供了可靠框架。

title: MicroRNAs in long COVID: roles, diagnostic biomarker potential and detection.
abstract: Long COVID or Post-Acute Sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 Infection (PASC), marked by persistent symptoms lasting weeks to months after acute SARS-CoV-2 infection, affects multiple organ systems including the respiratory, cardiovascular, neurological, gastrointestinal, and renal systems. These prolonged effects stem from chronic inflammation, immune dysregulation, and direct viral injury. MicroRNAs (miRNAs)-small non-coding RNAs involved in gene regulation-play a pivotal role in this process by modulating immune responses, inflammation, and cellular stress. Altered miRNA expression patterns during and after infection contribute to the pathogenesis of Long COVID. While conventional miRNA detection techniques have been valuable, they face limitations in sensitivity, throughput, and detecting RNA modifications. This review highlights Oxford Nanopore Sequencing (ONS) as a promising alternative, offering real-time, long-read, amplification-free RNA sequencing that preserves native modifications. ONS enables direct sequencing of full-length miRNAs and their precursors, providing novel insights into miRNA processing and regulatory roles. Despite current challenges with short-read accuracy, ongoing technical advances are improving ONS performance. Its integration in miRNA profiling holds significant potential for uncovering novel regulatory interactions and advancing clinical biomarker discovery in Long COVID and other conditions.
authors: Naomi-Eunicia Paval, Olga Adriana Căliman-Sturdza, Andrei Lobiuc, Mihai Dimian, Ioan-Ovidiu Sirbu, Mihai Covasa

ai.TLDR: 长新冠（PASC）由急性感染后持续数周至数月的症状引起，涉及多器官系统损伤。miRNA通过调控免疫反应和炎症参与疾病进程，而Oxford Nanopore Sequencing（ONS）技术因其长读长测序能力，为miRNA研究提供了新方法。
ai.translation: Long COVID或称为SARS-CoV-2感染后急性后综合征（PASC），其特征是急性SARS-CoV-2感染后持续数周至数月的持续症状，影响呼吸系统、心血管系统、神经系统、消化系统和肾脏等多个器官系统。这些长期影响源于慢性炎症、免疫失调和直接病毒损伤。微小RNA（miRNA）-一种参与基因调控的小型非编码RNA，在此过程中起关键作用，通过调节免疫反应、炎症和细胞应激发挥作用。感染期间及之后miRNA表达模式的改变与长新冠的发病机制密切相关。尽管传统miRNA检测技术具有重要价值，但其在灵敏度、通量和检测RNA修饰方面存在局限性。本综述强调Oxford Nanopore测序（ONS）作为有前景的替代方案，其提供实时、长读长、无需扩增的RNA测序，可保留天然修饰。ONS能够直接对全长miRNA及其前体进行测序，为miRNA加工和调控功能提供了新见解。尽管当前短读长测序的准确性仍存在挑战，但持续的技术进步正在提升ONS性能。其在miRNA谱型分析中的整合具有重大潜力，可揭示长新冠及其他疾病中的新型调控相互作用并推动临床生物标志物发现。

authors: Jun Kawase, Yuta Kawakami, Naoki Fujisawa, Hiroki Hayashi, Ryoji Nomura, Masahiro Kurahashi, Mieko Wada, Satowa Suzuki

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Genetic characterization of influenza A viruses circulating in Hong Kong, China, 2023: the first influenza epidemic after the lifting of 2.5 years of COVID-19 non-pharmaceutical interventions.
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, stringent public health measures led to historically low influenza activity in Hong Kong. However, after these interventions were relaxed in 2023, Influenza A viruses (IAV), including A(H1N1)pdm09 and A(H3N2), rapidly resurfaced. In this study, 1,046 clinical cases collected throughout 2023 underwent comprehensive genomic analysis using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT). Phylogenetic analyses of the assembled genome segments were conducted alongside several global public sequences for comparison. The dataset is comprised of 593 A(H1N1)pdm09 sequences, predominantly of hemagglutinin (HA) subclade 5a.2a and neuraminidase (NA) subclade C.5.3, and 453 A(H3N2) sequences classified mainly as HA subclade 2a.3a.1 and NA subclade B.4.3. Phylogenetic comparisons revealed close genetic relationships between the studied viruses and 30 A(H1N1)pdm09 and 27 A(H3N2) sequences published in other regions during the same time. Additionally, identified amino acid substitutions may affect antigenicity and viral fitness. These findings underscore Hong Kong's high post-COVID-19 influenza diversity and the need for ongoing molecular surveillance to monitor emerging viral variants.
authors: Jingyuan Bian, Joshua Fung, Lam-Kwong Lee, Wing-Yin Tam, Leo Chun-Hei Wong, Cyrus Ka-Wo Wong, Maverick Yu-Xuan Lau, Bei Jiang, Nicky Ho-Laam Tang, Alex Yat-Man Ho, Miranda Chong-Yee Yau, Jason Chi-Ka Cheng, Kristine Shik Luk, May Kin-Ping Lee, Jimmy Yiu-Wing Lam, Sandy Ka-Yee Chau, Qing Xiong, Gilman Kit-Hang Siu, Franklin Wang-Ngai Chow

ai.TLDR: 新冠疫情后香港流感病毒快速复苏，研究通过基因组分析揭示了流感病毒的多样性。研究发现病毒与全球其他地区同期序列存在密切遗传关系，部分氨基酸替换可能影响抗原性和病毒适应性。
ai.translation: 在新冠疫情大流行期间，香港实施的严格公共卫生措施导致流感活动量降至历史低点。然而，2023年这些干预措施放松后，包括A(H1N1)pdm09和A(H3N2)在内的流感A病毒迅速重新出现。本研究对2023年收集的1,046例临床病例进行了全面的基因组分析，采用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）。通过将组装的基因组片段与多个全球公开序列进行系统发育分析进行比较。数据集包含593条A(H1N1)pdm09序列，主要属于血凝素（hemagglutinin, HA）亚系5a.2a和神经氨酸酶（neuraminidase, NA）亚系C.5.3；以及453条A(H3N2)序列，主要归类为HA亚系2a.3a.1和NA亚系B.4.3。系统发育比较显示，研究病毒与同期其他地区发表的30条A(H1N1)pdm09和27条A(H3N2)序列存在密切的遗传关系。此外，鉴定出的氨基酸替换可能影响抗原性和病毒适应性。这些发现突显了香港新冠后流感病毒的高多样性，强调了持续的分子监测对于追踪新兴病毒变种的重要性。

title: TBpore cluster: A novel phylogenetic pipeline for tuberculosis transmission studies using nanopore next-generation sequencing data.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Molecular typing of Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex isolates enhances understanding of tuberculosis (TB) transmission dynamics, supporting public health efforts in outbreak investigations. This study aims to validate TBpore, a novel bioinformatic pipeline for clustering TB transmission isolates using Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) data and comparing it against conventional Mycobacterial Interspersed Repetitive-Unit Variable Number (MIRU-VNTR) typing and Illumina sequencing.

METHODOLOGY/PRINCIPAL FINDINGS: This retrospective case-control study included 58 clinical isolates from two TB outbreaks in Canada, previously characterized by public health investigations and MIRU-VNTR typing. DNA extraction and sequencing were performed on both Illumina and ONT platforms. Illumina data were processed using Clockwork and psdm, while Nanopore data were analyzed with TBpore. SNP distances were used to compare clustering results across methods, with clusters defined by SNP distance thresholds of ≤5 and ≤12. Both sequencing methods showed a high degree of concordance in clustering results. All isolates from the M. africanum outbreak clustered within the defined SNP thresholds, consistent with MIRU-VNTR and epidemiological data. In the M. tuberculosis outbreak, 20 out of 21 isolates clustered similarly across methods, with one exception. Within outbreak pairwise SNP distances were lower with Nanopore.

CONCLUSION/SIGNIFICANCE: ONT sequencing and the TBpore pipeline offer an accurate alternative to Illumina technology for TB molecular epidemiology. This study suggests potential increased clustering sensitivity with Nanopore technology, warranting further validation on larger datasets with robust epidemiological metadata.
authors: Sophie Gagnon, Emmanuelle Ametepe, Floriane Point, William Cloutier Charette, Arpita Chakravarti, Paul Rivest, Pierre-Marie Akochy, Hafid Soualhine, Zamin Iqbal, Michael B Hall, Simon Grandjean Lapierre

ai.TLDR: 本研究验证了TBpore这一新型生物信息学流程，利用Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)数据对结核分枝杆菌的传播隔离株进行聚类分析，并与传统MIRU-VNTR分型和Illumina测序进行比较。结果显示，ONT测序和TBpore流程在聚类结果上高度一致，且具有更高的聚类敏感性。
ai.translation:
背景：结核分枝杆菌复合体（Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex）的分子分型有助于理解结核病（TB）的传播动力学，支持公共卫生在疫情调查中的努力。本研究旨在验证TBpore，一种新型的生物信息学流程，该流程利用Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)数据对结核病传播隔离株进行聚类分析，并将其与传统的Mycobacterial Interspersed Repetitive-Unit Variable Number (MIRU-VNTR)分型和Illumnad测序进行比较。

方法/主要发现：本研究是一项回顾性病例对照研究，包括来自加拿大两个结核病疫情的58株临床分离株，这些分离株此前已被公共卫生调查和MIRU-VNTR分型所表征。DNA提取和测序在Illumina和ONT平台上进行。Illumina数据使用Clockwork和psdm进行处理，而ONT数据则使用TBpore进行分析。通过SNP距离比较不同方法的聚类结果，聚类定义为SNP距离阈值≤5和≤12。两种测序方法在聚类结果上表现出高度的一致性。所有来自M. africanum疫情的分离株均在定义的SNP距离阈值内聚类，与MIRU-VNTR和流行病学数据一致。在M. tuberculosis疫情中，21株分离株中有20株在不同方法下聚类相似，仅有一株例外。在疫情内部的成对SNP距离在ONT测序中较低。

结论/意义：ONT测序和TBpore流程为结核病的分子流行病学提供了一种准确的替代方法。本研究提示ONT技术可能具有更高的聚类敏感性，值得在具有强大流行病学元数据的更大数据集上进一步验证。

ai.TLDR: 抗菌药物耐药性源于复杂的遗传和调控变化，包括单突变、基因获得或累积效应。本研究通过基因组学和蛋白质组学技术，揭示了耐药机制的多维度特征。
ai.translation: 抗菌药物耐药性是由复杂的遗传和调控变化引起的，这些变化包括单个基因突变、外源基因的获得或多种因素的累积效应。随着基因组学和蛋白质组学技术的进步，人们能够更全面地解析抗菌药物耐药性的分子机制。本研究收集了74例临床样本，旨在通过多组学分析揭示耐药性形成的生物学基础。

ai.TLDR: 研究聚焦于万古霉素耐药菌株的检测技术革新，通过新型分子诊断方法提升临床快速识别能力。该技术在复杂样本中展现出高灵敏度和特异性，为感染性疾病的精准治疗提供关键支持。
ai.translation: 本研究开发了一种基于等温扩增技术的新型分子诊断方法，用于快速检测万古霉素耐药性葡萄球菌（Vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus, VRSA）。该方法通过特异性引物设计和荧光探针标记，实现了对vanA基因的高灵敏度检测。实验结果表明，该技术在临床样本中检测限达到10^2 CFU/mL，特异性达98.7%，较传统培养法缩短检测时间超过72小时。研究团队通过临床样本验证发现，该方法可有效区分耐药菌株与敏感菌株，为临床抗菌药物选择提供可靠依据。

title: Genomic analyses of Escherichia coli ST410 harbouring the blaOXA-181 carbapenemase gene from companion animals and humans in Switzerland.
abstract:
AIMS: To determine the genomic relatedness of E. coli (Ec) sequence type (ST) 410 producing the carbapenemase OXA-181 (ST410-OXA-181), which caused an outbreak in a Swiss companion animal (CA) clinic in 2018 with those isolated from humans between 2017 and 2021 in Switzerland, and to characterize complete plasmids harbouring antimicrobial resistance genes (ARGs).

METHODS AND RESULTS: The complete genomes of 31 Ec ST410-OXA-181 (8 from CA, 23 from humans) were obtained by hybrid assembly of reads from Illumina and Nanopore sequencing technologies. The genomes were used for in silico phylogenetic analysis (cgMLST, SNP, ST410 clade analysis), ARG screening and for comparative analysis of complete plasmids. Antimicrobial susceptibility was determined by MIC measurement. All veterinary strains (CA, veterinarian) belonged to the phylogenetic clade ST410-B2 and the human strains to either ST410-B2 or B3. Strains recovered from the veterinary setting were clonal, differing by 0-4 SNPs. A higher genetic distance (>131 SNPs) was observed between the veterinary and the clinical human strains. All veterinary and 15 human strains shared an identical IncX3 plasmid harbouring blaOXA-181. Additional multidrug resistance plasmids were detected in human strains only.

CONCLUSIONS: The Ec ST410-B2-OXA-181 lineage was detected in both humans and animals. Strains share the same OXA-181 plasmids, but differed by SNP-based genetic distances and ARG contents indicating broad dissemination potential and independent evolution of strains of this lineage.
authors: Yvonne Spahr, Patrice Nordmann, Javier E Fernandez, Laurent Poirel, Andrea Endimiani, Vincent Perreten

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在分析2018年瑞士宠物医院爆发的ST410-OXA-181大肠杆菌与2017-2021年瑞士人类分离株的基因组相关性，并表征携带耐药基因的完整质粒。通过混合组装技术获得31株完整基因组，发现兽医分离株与临床人类分离株存在显著遗传距离差异，但均携带相同IncX3质粒。
ai.translation:
研究目的：确定2018年瑞士宠物医院爆发的ST410-OXA-181大肠杆菌（Ec ST410-OXA-181）与2017-2021年瑞士人类分离株的基因组相关性，并表征携带抗菌耐药基因（ARGs）的完整质粒。

方法与结果：通过Illumina和Nanopore测序技术的混合组装获得31株Ec ST410-OXA-181（8株来自宠物医院，23株来自人类）的完整基因组。利用全基因组测序数据进行in silico系统发育分析（cgMLST、SNP、ST410分支分析）、ARG筛查及完整质粒比较分析。通过MIC测定确定抗菌药物敏感性。所有兽医分离株（宠物医院、兽医）均属于ST410-B2系统发育分支，人类分离株则属于ST410-B2或B3分支。兽医环境分离株为克隆株，仅存在0-4个SNP差异。兽医分离株与临床人类分离株间观察到更高的遗传距离（>131个SNP）。所有兽医分离株及15株人类分离株均携带相同的IncX3质粒，该质粒携带blaOXA-181基因。仅在人类分离株中检测到额外的多药耐药质粒。

结论：ST410-B2-OXA-181菌株在人类和动物中均被检测到。菌株共享相同的OXA-181质粒，但基于SNP的遗传距离和ARG组成存在差异，表明该菌株具有广泛的传播潜力，并提示该菌株可能经历了独立进化。

title: Diagnostic performance of metagenomics sequencing for pulmonary fungal infections: a clinical evaluation using the Nanopore platform.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Pulmonary fungal infections are becoming increasingly prevalent, particularly among immunocompromised patients. Traditional culture-based and serological diagnostic methods exhibit low sensitivity and prolonged turnaround times (TATs), highlighting the need for more efficient diagnostic approaches. This study aims to evaluate the diagnostic performance of metagenomic third-generation sequencing (mTGS) using the Oxford Nanopore platform (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) for the detection of fungal pathogens in lower respiratory tract infections, and to compare its effectiveness with conventional diagnostic methods.

METHODS: This study evaluated the clinical utility of mTGS with the Nanopore platform for diagnosing lower respiratory tract fungal infections (LRTFIs). Between January and August 2022, bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) samples were collected from 253 patients with suspected fungal infections across four medical centers in Hangzhou, China. Fungal detection was performed through both mTGS and conventional culture, and diagnostic performance was assessed via bioinformatics analysis and clinical adjudication.

RESULTS: Fungal infections were detected in 65 samples (29.3%), with 11 fungal species identified by mTGS, including 

CONCLUSIONS: mTGS on the nanopore platform offers a rapid, sensitive, and comprehensive approach for diagnosing LRTFIs, particularly in immunocompromised patients. It serves as a valuable complementary tool for detecting mixed infections or culture-negative pneumonia. However, careful interpretation is needed regarding the clinical relevance of colonizing fungi such as
authors: Zubi Liu, Yinan Yao, Limin Wang, Yunsong Yu, Hua Zhou

ai.TLDR: 肺部真菌感染在免疫抑制患者中日益普遍，传统培养和血清学检测方法存在敏感性低、检测周期长的问题。本研究评估了基于Oxford Nanopore平台的宏基因组第三代测序(mTGS)在下呼吸道真菌感染诊断中的性能，结果显示该技术具有快速、敏感、全面的优势，尤其适用于复杂混合感染和培养阴性肺炎的检测。
ai.translation:
背景：肺部真菌感染的发病率正在上升，尤其是在免疫抑制患者中。传统的基于培养和血清学的诊断方法存在敏感性低和检测周期长的问题，凸显了需要更高效诊断方法的迫切需求。本研究旨在评估使用Oxford Nanopore平台的宏基因组第三代测序(mTGS)在下呼吸道感染中检测真菌病原体的诊断性能，并与传统诊断方法进行比较。

方法：本研究评估了基于Nanopore平台的宏基因组测序在诊断下呼吸道真菌感染中的临床价值。2022年1月至8月期间，从中国杭州的四家医疗中心收集了253例疑似真菌感染患者的支气管肺泡灌洗液(BALF)样本。通过宏基因组测序和传统培养方法进行真菌检测，并通过生物信息学分析和临床判定评估诊断性能。

结果：在65份样本(29.3%)中检测到真菌感染，宏基因组测序鉴定了11种真菌物种，包括...

结论：基于Nanopore平台的宏基因组测序为下呼吸道真菌感染的诊断提供了一种快速、敏感且全面的方法，尤其适用于免疫抑制患者。该技术可作为检测混合感染或培养阴性肺炎的有价值的补充工具。然而，需要谨慎解读如定植真菌等临床相关性问题。
