ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了71个完整和草图基因组的序列信息，为疾病机制研究和个性化医疗提供了重要数据资源。该成果通过高通量测序技术实现了基因组的精准解析。
ai.translation: 本研究报告了71个完整和草图基因组的序列信息，这些基因组数据涵盖了多种人类疾病相关样本。研究团队采用第三代测序技术结合生物信息学分析方法，对基因组进行了从头组装和注释。所得数据为理解复杂疾病的遗传基础、开发新型诊断标志物以及推进精准医疗应用提供了重要的基因组资源。研究特别强调了长读长测序技术在解决基因组重复区域组装难题中的关键作用，同时揭示了不同疾病状态下基因组结构变异的特征模式。

title: Circulating tumour DNA to augment PET-CT in determining clinical outcome after head and neck cancer treatment.
abstract:
AIM: PET-CT and MRI are used to assess disease response after head and neck cancer treatment. Equivocal findings can delay the potential for salvage curative treatment or result in over- treatment with further surgery. The aims of this study were to establish if liquid biopsy (LB) of circulating tumour DNA, could be used to aid decision-making after treatment.

METHOD: Patients (n = 41) undergoing chemoradiotherapy (CRT) and surgical treatment had serial blood testing; pre-treatment and 10-12 weeks post-treatment, alongside imaging. PET-CT/MRIs were categorised as Cancer, Equivocal or Complete Response and true disease status was determined retrospectively. A bespoke 17-gene panel and probes targeting 5 HPV subtypes were used for next-generation sequencing in the ctDNA assay.

RESULTS: PET-CT was equivocal in 13/27 CRT patients; sensitivity and specificity for determining true disease status was 67 % and 42 % respectively. LB performed better at determining true disease status than PET-CT post-treatment in CRT patients; sensitivity and specificity of 83 % and 95 % respectively. A combined LB/PET/MRI test performed better than imaging alone; sensitivity and specificity of 100 % and 90 % respectively. The improved specificity was statistically significant (Fisher's exact test OR=7.1; 95 % CI:1.6-45.8, p = 0.0005), as was the balanced accuracy (Welch's t-test, p < 0.0001).

CONCLUSION: LB outperformed PET-CT at determining true disease status after CRT and could complement post-treatment imaging in CRT and surgical patients, playing a potential role in decision-making after treatment.
authors: Sumrit Bola, Anthony Cutts, Dimitris Vavoulis, Manu Shrivastava, Shaheel Bhuva, Anna Schuh, Ketan Shah, Stuart C Winter, Jenny C Taylor

ai.TLDR: 传统影像学在头颈癌治疗后评估疾病反应存在局限性，不确定的影像结果可能导致挽救性治疗延误或过度治疗。本研究通过液体活检技术评估循环肿瘤DNA，发现其在确定真实疾病状态的敏感性和特异性上显著优于PET-CT，可作为影像学的补充手段辅助治疗决策。
ai.translation:
研究目的：PET-CT和MRI被用于评估头颈癌治疗后的疾病反应。不确定的影像结果可能导致挽救性根治性治疗的延误或因进一步手术导致过度治疗。本研究旨在验证液体活检（LB）通过循环肿瘤DNA检测是否能辅助治疗决策。

方法：41名接受同步放化疗（CRT）和手术治疗的患者进行了连续血液检测，包括治疗前和治疗后10-12周的检测，同时进行影像学检查。PET-CT/MRI被分类为癌症、不确定或完全缓解，真实疾病状态通过回顾性分析确定。ctDNA检测使用定制的17基因面板和针对5种HPV亚型的探针进行下一代测序。

结果：在27名CRT患者中，PET-CT有13例呈现不确定结果；确定真实疾病状态的敏感性和特异性分别为67%和42%。LB在CRT患者治疗后确定真实疾病状态的表现优于PET-CT，敏感性和特异性分别为83%和95%。联合LB/PET/MRI检测的表现优于单独影像学检查，敏感性和特异性分别为100%和90%。特异性提升具有统计学显著性（Fisher精确检验OR=7.1；95% CI:1.6-45.8, p=0.0005），平衡准确率也显著提高（Welch t检验，p<0.0001）。

结论：液体活检在CRT后确定真实疾病状态的表现优于PET-CT，可作为CRT和手术患者治疗后影像学的补充手段，在治疗决策中发挥潜在作用。

title: Whole genome sequencing of Salmonella in poultry from China reveals the presence of bla
abstract: Salmonella is a significant zoonotic pathogen, which carries diverse antibiotic resistance genes (ARGs) and utilizes poultry as a major reservoir. It spreads along the farm-to-table continuum, posing risks of human salmonellosis and clinical infections. In this study, 144 Salmonella strains were isolated from 741 poultry samples across 23 provinces in China. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) identified 16 serotypes and 18 sequence types (STs); the main serotypes are S. Enteritidis, S. Kentucky, S. Indiana and S. Typhimurium. SNP analysis of S. Enteritidis and S. Kentucky revealed potential transmission events (SNPs < 10), which were concentrated in close provinces. Antimicrobial susceptibility testing provides information on antimicrobial resistance phenotype, with over 50 % exhibiting multidrug resistance (MDR). Bioinformatics analysis revealed 67 ARGs in all strains, including 6 bla
authors: Yi Zhou, Ke Wu, Heng Lin, Yu-Lian Hu, Wei Xu, Jie Zhang, Sheng Zhou, Kai Yu, Chun-Guo Liu, Hong-Ning Wang, Chang-Wei Lei

ai.TLDR: 本研究分析了中国23省741份家禽样本中分离的144株沙门氏菌，发现其携带多种抗生素耐药基因并存在多药耐药现象。通过全基因组测序和SNP分析，揭示了菌株间的潜在传播路径及地域聚集性。
ai.translation: 沙门氏菌是一种重要的人畜共患病原体，携带多种抗生素耐药基因（ARGs）并利用家禽作为主要储存宿主。该病原体通过农场到餐桌的传播链威胁人类健康，导致沙门氏菌病和临床感染。本研究从中国23省741份家禽样本中分离出144株沙门氏菌，全基因组测序（WGS）结果显示16种血清型和18种序列类型（STs），主要血清型包括S. Enteritidis、S. Kentucky、S. Indiana和S. Typhimurium。对S. Enteritidis和S. Kentucky的SNP分析发现潜在传播事件（SNP<10），且传播集中在相邻省份。抗菌药物敏感性测试显示超过50%的菌株呈现多药耐药（MDR）表型。生物信息学分析揭示所有菌株共携带67个ARGs，包括6个bla基因（原文未完整显示）。

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Epistasis regulates genetic control of cardiac hypertrophy.
abstract: Although genetic variant effects often interact nonadditively, strategies to uncover epistasis remain in their infancy. Here we develop low-signal signed iterative random forests to elucidate the complex genetic architecture of cardiac hypertrophy, using deep learning-derived left ventricular mass estimates from 29,661 UK Biobank cardiac magnetic resonance images. We report epistatic variants near CCDC141, IGF1R, TTN and TNKS, identifying loci deemed insignificant in genome-wide association studies. Functional genomic and integrative enrichment analyses reveal that genes mapped from these loci share biological process gene ontologies and myogenic regulatory factors. Transcriptomic network analyses using 313 human hearts demonstrate strong co-expression correlations among these genes in healthy hearts, with significantly reduced connectivity in failing hearts. To assess causality, RNA silencing in human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived cardiomyocytes, combined with novel microfluidic single-cell morphology analysis, confirms that cardiomyocyte hypertrophy is nonadditively modifiable by interactions between CCDC141, TTN and IGF1R. Our results expand the scope of cardiac genetic regulation to epistasis.
authors: Qianru Wang, Tiffany M Tang, Michelle Youlton, Chad S Weldy, Ana M Kenney, Omer Ronen, J Weston Hughes, Elizabeth T Chin, Shirley C Sutton, Abhineet Agarwal, Xiao Li, Merle Behr, Karl Kumbier, Christine S Moravec, W H Wilson Tang, Kenneth B Margulies, Thomas P Cappola, Atul J Butte, Rima Arnaout, James B Brown, James R Priest, Victoria N Parikh, Bin Yu, Euan A Ashley

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种低信号有符号迭代随机森林方法，用于揭示心脏肥大的复杂遗传结构。通过深度学习分析UK Biobank的29,661例心脏磁共振图像，发现了多个表型基因位点，并验证了这些基因在心肌细胞肥大中的非加性调控作用。
ai.translation: 尽管基因变异效应通常以非加性方式相互作用，但揭示表型基因相互作用的策略仍处于初级阶段。在此，我们开发了一种低信号有符号迭代随机森林方法，以阐明心脏肥大的复杂遗传结构，利用深度学习推导出的左心室质量估计值，分析了来自29,661例英国生物银行心脏磁共振图像的数据。我们报告了在CCDC141、IGF1R、TTN和TNKS附近存在表型基因变异，这些位点在全基因组关联研究中被认为不显著。功能基因组学和整合富集分析显示，这些位点映射的基因共享生物过程基因本体和肌源性调控因子。使用313例人类心脏进行的转录组网络分析表明，在健康心脏中这些基因之间存在强烈的共表达相关性，而在衰竭心脏中连接性显著降低。为了评估因果关系，我们在人类诱导多能干细胞衍生的心肌细胞中进行RNA沉默，并结合新型微流控单细胞形态分析，证实了CCDC141、TTN和IGF1R之间的相互作用非加性地调控心肌细胞肥大。我们的研究结果将心脏遗传调控的范围扩展到了表型基因相互作用。

title: Mitochondrial genome complexity in Erodium stephanianum (Geraniaceae): nanopore sequencing reveals chloroplast gene transfer and DNA rearrangements.
abstract: The mitochondrial genome of Erodium stephanianum (Geraniaceae) exhibits remarkable complexity revealed through nanopore sequencing, which has unveiled both chloroplast-to-mitochondrion gene transfer and extensive DNA rearrangements. We collected leaf samples from E. stephanianum in June 2023, subsequently extracting total DNA and sequencing the mitogenome using both Oxford Nanopore and Illumina technologies. The assembly yielded a circular mitochondrial genome of 365,414 base pairs, encompassing 28 unique protein-coding genes, 18 tRNA genes, and 3 rRNA genes. Notably, 55 fragments, totaling 58,305 base pairs, showcased sequence homology between the chloroplast and mitochondrion, indicating substantial gene transfer with implications for evolutionary adaptation. Furthermore, codon usage analysis revealed preferential codon utilization, while microsatellite and repeat sequence analyses identified numerous SSRs and tandem repeats within the mitogenome. Phylogenetic analysis positioned E. stephanianum within the Geraniales order, closely clustering with Geranium maderense. This study highlights the dynamic evolution of mitochondrial genomes in E. stephanianum, emphasizing the significance of interorganellar gene transfer and genome rearrangement.
authors: Xinchen Xu, Qingfei Meng, Na Li, Zichuan Zou, Haonan Yang, Ang Li, Fusheng Ge, Jian Meng, Zixue Ding

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术揭示了Erodium stephanianum线粒体基因组的复杂性，发现了叶绿体到线粒体的基因转移现象及广泛的DNA重排。研究结果为理解线粒体基因组的动态进化提供了新视角。
ai.translation: Erodium stephanianum（牻牛儿苗科）的线粒体基因组表现出通过纳米孔测序技术揭示的显著复杂性，该技术发现了叶绿体到线粒体的基因转移现象以及广泛的DNA重排。我们于2023年6月采集了E. stephanianum的叶片样本，随后提取总DNA并采用牛津纳米孔和Illumina技术对线粒体基因组进行测序。组装结果得到一个365,414碱基对的环状线粒体基因组，包含28个独特的蛋白质编码基因、18个tRNA基因和3个rRNA基因。值得注意的是，55个片段（总计58,305碱基对）显示出叶绿体与线粒体之间的序列同源性，表明存在显著的基因转移现象，这对进化适应具有重要意义。此外，密码子使用分析揭示了偏好性密码子利用特征，而微卫星和重复序列分析则在基因组中鉴定出大量SSR（简单重复序列）和串联重复序列。系统发育分析将E. stephanianum定位在牻牛儿苗目中，与Geranium maderense形成紧密的系统发育簇。本研究突显了E. stephanianum线粒体基因组的动态进化特性，强调了细胞器间基因转移和基因组重排的重要性。

title: Rapid identification of aSerratia marcescensoutbreak in a neonatal intensive care unit by third-generation long-read nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Background

*Serratia marcescens* is a frequent cause of outbreaks in high-risk hospital settings such as neonatal intensive care units (NICU)**.** This study investigated a potential *S. marcescens* outbreak in the NICU of a reference children’s hospital using Whole Genome Sequencing (WGS). Additionally, it assessed the performance of third-generation sequencing for the rapid and accurate identification and characterization of the outbreak’s clonal strain.

### Methods

A prospective study was conducted from September 8th to November 12th 2021, following a sharp increase in invasive *S. marcescens* infections in the NICU of University Children’s Hospital Sant Joan de Déu (Barcelona, Spain). This study included all patients admitted to NICU and other hospital wards from whom *S. marcescens* was isolated in any sample type. Nanopore sequencing was performed on *S. marcescens* isolates. Genomic characterization included phylogenetic analyses and detection of antimicrobial resistance genes.

### Results

Twenty-nine patients (16 NICU and 13 non-NICU patients) infected/colonized by *S. marcescens* were detected during the study period, accounting for a total of 61 isolates. The genomic characterization was performed on 24 isolates from 14 NICU-patients and 10 isolates from eight non-NICU patients. Phylogenetic analyses evidenced three clusters of closely related strains*;* cluster I (*n* = 22), II (*n* = 2) and III (*n* = 5). The remaining isolates (*n* = 5) did not cluster. Cluster I contained most isolates from NICU patients (20/24), and most isolates from NICU-patients with confirmed invasive disease (7/8). Cluster II contained two isolates from two NICU-patients, one presenting with invasive disease. The resistance gene *blaSRT* was found in 97% of *S. marcescens* isolates (33/34). All isolates exhibited the amikacin-tobramycin *aac(6’)* resistance gene and three multi-drug efflux pumps genes; *sdeY*, *sdeB* and *smfY*. The tetracycline *tet(41)* resistance gene was found in non-clustered isolates (4/34). The first results were available less than one month after the outbreak’s alarm, and complete genomic study after two months.

### Conclusion

Two clonal strains were co-circulating in the NICU setting, with one being the major strain responsible for the outbreak. Rapid molecular characterization with nanopore sequencing confirmed the outbreak. It revealed the phylogenetic relationships among isolates and their antimicrobial potential. This approach enabled effective contextualization of the outbreak and allowed for monitoring its progression.
authors: Desiree Henares, Meritxell Cubero, ... C Muñoz-Almagro
citation: Henares, D., Cubero, M., Martinez-de-Albeniz, I. et al. Rapid identification of a Serratia marcescens outbreak in a neonatal intensive care unit by third-generation long-read nanopore sequencing. Antimicrob Resist Infect Control 14 , 63 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13756-025-01582-x

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过全基因组测序（WGS）和纳米孔测序技术，确认新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中Serratia marcescens爆发的克隆株传播，并揭示其耐药基因特征。快速分子表征方法在1个月内完成初步分析，2个月内完成完整基因组研究，为疫情控制提供关键数据。
ai.translation:
Serratia marcescens是新生儿重症监护室（NICU）等高风险医院环境中常见的爆发病原体。本研究利用全基因组测序（WGS）技术，调查了参考儿童医院NICU中潜在的S. marcescens爆发事件，并评估第三代测序技术在快速准确识别和表征爆发克隆株方面的性能。

研究于2021年9月8日至11月12日开展，针对西班牙巴塞罗那圣乔安德德乌大学儿童医院NICU中S. marcescens感染激增的情况。纳入所有NICU及其他病房中分离出S. marcescens的患者，对分离株进行纳米孔测序。基因组特征分析包括系统发育分析和抗菌耐药基因检测。

研究期间共检测到29名（16名NICU患者和13名非NICU患者）被S. marcescens感染/定植的患者，总计61株分离株。对24株（14名NICU患者）和10株（8名非NICU患者）进行基因组特征分析。系统发育分析显示存在三个紧密相关的菌株簇：簇I（22株）、簇II（2株）和簇III（5株）。其余5株未形成簇。簇I包含20/24株NICU患者分离株，以及7/8株确诊侵袭性疾病的NICU患者分离株。簇II包含2株NICU患者分离株，其中1株为侵袭性疾病病例。97%的S. marcescens分离株（33/34株）携带blaSRT耐药基因，所有分离株均携带amikacin-tobramycin aac(6’）耐药基因和三个多药外排泵基因：sdeY、sdeB和smfY。非簇状分离株（4/34株）携带四环素tet(41）耐药基因。疫情警报后首月内即获得初步结果，两个月内完成完整基因组研究。

title: A novel azithromycin resistance mutation in Mycoplasma genitalium induced in vitro.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Mycoplasma genitalium is a sexually transmitted bacterium of increasing concern due to issues around antimicrobial resistance. Resistance is typically mediated by SNPs; however, the difficulty of isolation and culture of M. genitalium limits the ability to analyse the impact of individual mutations.

OBJECTIVES: The aim of this study was to generate and characterize antibiotic-resistant M. genitalium mutants in vitro to understand the development of macrolide resistance in this bacterium.

METHODS: Sequential MIC assays for azithromycin were performed using the laboratory strain of M. genitalium (G37) grown in Hayflick medium. Bacteria were enumerated by droplet digital PCR (ddPCR) targeting mgpB, and a new ddPCR assay was established to detect specific mutations in the 23S rRNA gene. MICs of selected macrolide antibiotics were determined in Hayflick medium. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) was performed on the Oxford Nanopore MinION.

RESULTS: After eight passages in azithromycin, a novel 23S rRNA gene mutation, G2057A (Escherichia coli numbering), was detected. The mutant did not display a detectable growth defect and had elevated MICs to azithromycin (8-fold), josamycin (8-fold) and erythromycin (16- to 32-fold). WGS did not identify other mutations likely to contribute to reduced macrolide susceptibility.

CONCLUSIONS: A novel 23S rRNA gene mutation was identified in M. genitalium. This variation is found in Mycoplasma hominis, which is intrinsically resistant to certain macrolides. While this mutation has not been observed clinically in M. genitalium, these findings have expanded our understanding of resistance mechanisms within the Mollicutes, in particular the propensity for M. genitalium to develop resistance, even in low concentrations of antibiotic, and the interaction of azithromycin with the ribosome.
authors: Teck-Phui Chua, Jennifer Danielewski, Catriona S Bradshaw, Dorothy A Machalek, Suzanne M Garland, Jose L Huaman, Jørgen S Jensen, Gerald L Murray

ai.TLDR: 该研究旨在通过体外实验生成和表征抗生素耐药的Mycoplasma genitalium突变株，以了解该细菌对大环内酯类抗生素的耐药性发展。研究发现了一种新的23S rRNA基因突变，导致对多种大环内酯类抗生素的耐药性显著增加。
ai.translation:
背景：Mycoplasma genitalium是一种日益引起关注的性传播细菌，由于其对抗微生物耐药性的问题。耐药性通常由SNPs介导；然而，M. genitalium的分离和培养困难限制了对单个突变影响的分析。

目标：本研究的目的是在体外生成和表征抗生素耐药的M. genitalium突变株，以了解该细菌对大环内酯类抗生素的耐药性发展。

方法：使用实验室株M. genitalium（G37）在Hayflick培养基中生长，进行连续的阿奇霉素最小抑菌浓度（MIC）测定。通过针对mgpB的液滴数字PCR（ddPCR）对细菌进行计数，并建立了一种新的ddPCR检测方法以检测23S rRNA基因中的特定突变。在Hayflick培养基中测定选定的大环内酯类抗生素的MIC。使用Oxford Nanopore MinION进行全基因组测序（WGS）。

结果：在阿奇霉素培养八次后，检测到一种新的23S rRNA基因突变，G2057A（Escherichia coli编号）。该突变株未表现出可检测的生长缺陷，且对阿奇霉素（8倍）、 josamycin（8倍）和erythromycin（16至32倍）的MIC显著升高。WGS未发现其他可能降低大环内酯类抗生素敏感性的突变。

结论：在M. genitalium中鉴定出一种新的23S rRNA基因突变。该变异在Mycoplasma hominis中发现，后者对某些大环内酯类抗生素具有固有耐药性。尽管该突变在M. genitalium中尚未在临床中观察到，但这些发现扩展了我们对Mollicutes中耐药机制的理解，特别是M. genitalium在低浓度抗生素下发展耐药性的倾向，以及阿奇霉素与核糖体的相互作用。

title: KPC-157 and KPC-181 carbapenemases produced by Citrobacter freundii ST522 and Klebsiella pneumoniae ST258 isolated from wastewater.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: While novel KPC variants continue to emerge among clinically relevant Enterobacterales from hospital settings, their occurrence in impacted aquatic environments has been poorly investigated. We hereby report KPC-157 and KPC-181, allelic variants of KPC-2, produced by Citrobacter freundii and Klebsiella pneumoniae isolated from wastewater in Brazil.

METHODS: Antimicrobial susceptibility was determined by disk diffusion and broth microdilution, whereas carbapenemase production was evaluated by inhibitor-based methods. Genome sequencing was performed combining short-read (Illumina HiSeq) and long-read (Oxford Nanopore) technologies, with further bioinformatic analyses. In silico KPC modeling was carried out using Yasara/PyMOL. Horizontal transfer and plasmid stability were assessed by conjugation and serial passage experiments, respectively. Epidemiological tracking of KPC-2 allelic variants and KPC-bearing plasmids was performed using publicly available genomes.

RESULTS: Carbapenem-resistant C. freundii strain M21 [sequence type (ST) 522] and K. pneumoniae strains M16 and M18 (ST258), harboring bla

CONCLUSION: The identification of KPC-157 and KPC-181 in wastewater highlights the role of polluted environments in harboring novel KPC variants from high-risk Enterobacterales clones and reinforces the importance of continued antimicrobial resistance surveillance beyond hospital settings.
authors: João Pedro Rueda Furlan, Giovanna Carrasco Bueno, Rubens Renato Sousa-Carmo, Renan Lourenço Oliveira Silva, Mikaela Renata Funada Barbosa, Maria Ines Zanoli Sato, Florencia Brunetti, Pablo Power, Nilton Lincopan, Sergio Schenkman

ai.TLDR: 研究发现巴西污水中分离出的产ESBL肠杆菌科细菌携带新型KPC变异体KPC-157和KPC-181，揭示了污染环境在传播高风险克隆新型KPC变异体中的作用。通过基因组测序和生物信息学分析证实了这些变异体的传播机制，强调了拓展抗菌药物耐药性监测范围的必要性。
ai.translation:
背景：尽管医院环境中临床相关的肠杆菌科细菌持续出现新型KPC变异体，但其在受污染水环境中的分布仍缺乏研究。本研究首次报道了从巴西污水中分离的产气肠杆菌（Citrobacte r freundii）和肺炎克雷伯菌（Klebsiella pneumoniae）产生的KPC-157和KPC-181，这两种变异体属于KPC-2的等位基因变体。

方法：抗菌药物敏感性通过纸片扩散法和肉汤微量稀释法测定，碳青霉烯酶活性通过基于抑制剂的方法评估。基因组测序结合了短读长（Illumina HiSeq）和长读长（Oxford Nanopore）技术，并进行进一步的生物信息学分析。使用Yasara/PyMOL进行KPC的计算机模拟建模。通过接合实验和连续传代实验评估水平基因转移和质粒稳定性。利用公开基因组数据追踪KPC-2等位基因变异体及携带KPC的质粒的流行病学特征。

结果：耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌科细菌（CRE）分离株M21（序列类型ST522）和肺炎克雷伯菌株M16、M18（ST258）携带bla基因，这些菌株在污水中表现出对碳青霉烯类抗生素的耐药性。

结论：在污水中发现KPC-157和KPC-181突显了污染环境在宿主新型KPC变异体中的作用，这些变异体来源于高风险肠杆菌科克隆。研究结果强化了在医院以外环境中持续监测抗菌药物耐药性的必要性。

title: An exploratory study on the application of nanopore sequencing for detecting Mycobacterium tuberculosis drug resistance in respiratory specimens
abstract:
### Background

This study aimed to evaluate the diagnostic efficacy of nanopore sequencing for *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* (MTB) drug resistance in respiratory specimens from pulmonary tuberculosis (PTB) patients. It compared it to the Xpert MTB/RIF and fluorescent polymerase chain reaction (PCR) melting curve to explore the validity and feasibility of detecting MTB drug resistance in respiratory specimens.

### Methods

This study retrospectively analyzed 52 respiratory specimens. The proportional method applied the phenotypic drug susceptibility test (pDST) to respiratory specimens. The sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), negative predictive value (NPV), consistency statistic (kappa) with phenotypic drug susceptibility testing (pDST), and the area under the curve (AUC) from the receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve were calculated for nanopore sequencing, Xpert MTB/RIF, and fluorescent PCR melting curve. These calculations used the pDST results as the reference standard.

### Results

Among the resistance mutation genes detected by nanopore sequencing, rpoB, and katG were the most frequent, followed by embB, rpsL, gyrA, inhA, ahpC, gyrB, gid, and rrs. In bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) specimens, nanopore sequencing showed high sensitivity (100.00%,90.32%,82.35%,82.35%,100.00%,76.92%), specificity (70.00%,81.82%,88.00%,96.00%93.75%,93.10%0.100.00%), and AUC values (0.85,0.86,0.85, 0.89,0.97,0.85) for rifampicin (RIF), isoniazid (INH), ethambutol (EMB), streptomycin (SM), levofloxacin (LFX), moxifloxacin (MFX). Nanopore sequencing exhibited good detection efficacy (kappa value ≥ 0.70) and perfect diagnostic resistance value (AUC value ≥ 0.85). For RIF, nanopore sequencing showed Kappa values of 0.01 and 0.38 and AUC values of 0.02 and 0.18 higher than the Xpert MTB/RIF and fluorescent PCR melting curve, respectively; for INH, nanopore sequencing had a higher Kappa value of 0.65 and a higher AUC value of 0.32 than the fluorescent PCR melting curve. Nanopore sequencing provided superior overall performance.

### Conclusion

Nanopore sequencing has significant technical advantages and clinical application potential in detecting MTB drug resistance. Its rapid and highly accurate detection capabilities support early diagnosis and personalized treatment of drug-resistant MTB. As the technology continues to mature and the cost is further reduced, it is expected that nanopore sequencing technology will play a more important role in MTB resistance detection.
authors: Niansa Wei, Feiyi Du, ... Qingdong Zhu
citation: Wei, N., Du, F., Nie, W. et al. An exploratory study on the application of nanopore sequencing for detecting Mycobacterium tuberculosis drug resistance in respiratory specimens. BMC Pulm Med 25 , 279 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12890-025-03747-1

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估纳米孔测序在肺结核患者呼吸道样本中检测结核分枝杆菌（MTB）耐药性的诊断效能，对比Xpert MTB/RIF和荧光PCR熔解曲线法。结果显示纳米孔测序在RIF、INH等药物耐药检测中表现出更高的敏感度（100%）和特异性（70-96%），曲线下面积（AUC）达0.85-0.97，显著优于传统方法。
ai.translation:
### 背景
本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序在肺结核（PTB）患者呼吸道样本中检测结核分枝杆菌（MTB）药物耐药性的诊断效能，并将其与Xpert MTB/RIF和荧光聚合酶链反应（PCR）熔解曲线法进行对比，以探索在呼吸道样本中检测MTB药物耐药性的有效性及可行性。

### 方法
本研究回顾性分析了52份呼吸道样本。比例法对呼吸道样本应用表型药物敏感性试验（pDST）。计算纳米孔测序、Xpert MTB/RIF和荧光PCR熔解曲线的敏感度、特异度、阳性预测值（PPV）、阴性预测值（NPV）、一致性统计（kappa）与表型药物敏感性试验（pDST）的符合度，以及受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线的曲线下面积（AUC）。这些计算均以pDST结果作为参考标准。

### 结果
纳米孔测序检测到的耐药突变基因中，rpoB和katG最为常见，其次为embB、rpsL、gyrA、inhA、ahpC、gyrB、gid和rrs。在支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）样本中，纳米孔测序对利福平（RIF）、异烟肼（INH）、乙胺丁醇（EMB）、链霉素（SM）、左氧氟沙星（LFX）、莫西沙星（MFX）的敏感度分别为100.00%、90.32%、82.35%、82.35%、100.00%、76.92%，特异度分别为70.00%、81.82%、88.00%、96.00%、93.75%、93.10%，AUC值分别为0.85、0.86、0.85、0.89、0.97、0.85。纳米孔测序表现出良好的检测效能（kappa值≥0.70）和完美的耐药诊断值（AUC值≥0.85）。对于RIF，纳米孔测序的Kappa值比Xpert MTB/RIF和荧光PCR熔解曲线分别高0.01和0.38，AUC值分别高0.02和0.18；对于INH，纳米孔测序的Kappa值比荧光PCR熔解曲线高0.65，AUC值高0.32。纳米孔测序展现出更优的整体性能。

### 结论
纳米孔测序在检测MTB耐药性方面具有显著的技术优势和临床应用潜力。其快速且高精度的检测能力支持耐药MTB的早期诊断和个性化治疗。随着技术的不断成熟和成本的进一步降低，纳米孔测序技术有望在MTB耐药检测中发挥更重要的作用。

title: Unwinding process of DNA/RNA quadruplexes by proteins under label-free nanopore monitoring.
abstract: Noncanonical quadruplexes (G4s) in the nucleic acids represent specific secondary structures that correlate and participate in important biological processes, including telomeric propagation and tumor cell proliferation, and are close to the life span. The interaction of G4 with specific proteins and monitoring of the unfolding process are important to understand the development and evolution of some diseases and for further regulation of telomere and to disclose the mechanism of typical cancers. Different from the most reported single-molecule tweezers' manipulation, this work provides a nanopore-based electric approach for label-free monitoring of the unfolding process of both DNA- and RNA-G4 under various conditions. Twenty nanomolar of hTel sequence could be mostly unfolded via incubation with 10 nM of both TEP1 that is associated with telomerase and helicase RTEL1 under weak acidic conditions for 1 h, and this process could be recorded in a single-molecule nanopore device with a pore diameter of 3.7 nm in 0.5 M CsCl buffered solution at 150 mV. TEP1 is proved to specifically interplay with hybrid G4 and nearly does not unfold parallel G4. The efficient and selective unfolding process of RNA-G4 originated from SARS-CoV by helicase nsp13 is also demonstrated at pH 5 in 2 M LiCl with a 3.6-nm pore; with 50% molar ratio of helicase nsp13, RNA-1574-G4 could be selectively and significantly unfolded in 1 h. This work presents the selective unfolding of both DNA- and RNA-G4 by specific proteins, which is a new approach to modulate and monitor the secondary structure of nucleic acids, and shed light on the understanding of the mechanism of the interaction between nucleic acids and proteins and the related kinetics.
authors: Meili Ren, Ting Weng, Liyuan Liang, Xun Chen, Daixin Liu, Shaoxi Fang, Rong Tian, Wanyi Xie, Liang Wang, Deqiang Wang, Chunyu Zeng

ai.TLDR: 非典型四链体（G4s）在核酸中参与端粒复制和肿瘤细胞增殖等关键生物过程，其动态变化与疾病发展密切相关。本研究通过基于纳米孔的电学方法实现了DNA-RNA G4的无标记展开监测，揭示了TEP1和nsp13蛋白对G4结构的特异性调控机制。
ai.translation: 非典型四链体（G4s）在核酸中代表特定的二级结构，与端粒复制、肿瘤细胞增殖等关键生物过程相关，并与细胞寿命密切相关。G4与特定蛋白的相互作用及其展开过程的监测，对理解某些疾病的发展机制和调控端粒功能具有重要意义。与以往报道的单分子镊子操控技术不同，本研究开发了基于纳米孔的电学方法，实现了在不同条件下对DNA和RNA-G4展开过程的无标记监测。在弱酸性条件下，20 nM的hTel序列经10 nM TEP1（与端粒酶和解旋酶RTEL1相关）孵育1小时后，可通过3.7 nm孔径的单分子纳米孔设备在0.5 M CsCl缓冲液中以150 mV电压记录其展开过程。实验验证TEP1特异性作用于杂化G4，几乎不展开平行G4。此外，在pH 5、2 M LiCl缓冲液中，通过3.6 nm孔径纳米孔，50%摩尔比的解旋酶nsp13可使SARS-CoV来源的RNA-1574-G4在1小时内选择性显著展开。该研究首次实现了DNA和RNA G4的特异性展开，为调控核酸二级结构提供了新方法，并深化了对核酸-蛋白相互作用机制及动力学的理解。

title: Oxford Nanopore third generation sequencing for analysis of FMR1 5'UTR CGG repeat expansions.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: Fragile X syndrome is mainly caused by the expansion of GC-rich cytosine-guanine-guanine (CGG) repeat in FMR1 5'UTR region, as well as rare gene point mutations or deletions in its open reading frame. Currently, third-generation long-read sequencing is a potential technology for simultaneously detecting CGG repeat expansions, point mutations, and deletions. However, a major challenge remains in obtaining the target long-fragment CGG repeat region with ultra-high GC content for sequencing.

METHODS: We developed a novel approach combining long-fragment ultra-high GC polymerase chain reaction (PCR) amplification with Oxford Nanopore sequencing to detect the full spectrum of FMR1 5'UTR CGG repeat mutations. The method was validated using 10 standard cell line samples (males: n

RESULTS: Our method demonstrated that the 100 % concordance with the triplet repeat-primed PCR and Southern blot analysis in genotyping 10 cell line samples and 53 clinical samples. Additionally, CGG repeat numbers showed strong correlation with reference mehods (male cell lines, n = 5, R

CONCLUSION: This study presents a simple and cost-effective strategy for preparing FMR1 5'UTR CGG repeat regions with long-fragment ultra-high GC content for third-generation sequencing. The approach could serve as a model for detecting other challenging disorders caused by short tandem repeat expansions, such as myotonic dystrophy and Huntington' s disease.
authors: Xu Yang, Bowei Han, Jie Huang, Min Zhang, Shi Weng, Guojun Ouyang, Wanqing Han, Wenyu Wang, Li Zhang, Juanjuan Chen, Juan Du, Yingsong Wu, Xuexi Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对Fragile X综合征的致病机制，开发了一种结合长片段超高GC含量PCR扩增与Oxford Nanopore测序的技术，实现了对FMR1 5'UTR区域CGG重复序列的全面检测。该方法在10例细胞系和53例临床样本中均表现出100%的检测一致性，为第三代测序技术提供了可靠的解决方案。
ai.translation:
研究目标：Fragile X综合征主要由FMR1基因5'UTR区域GC-rich胞嘧啶-鸟嘌呤-鸟嘌呤（CGG）重复序列的扩展，以及其开放阅读框中的罕见基因点突变或缺失引起。目前，第三代长读长测序技术是同时检测CGG重复扩展、点突变和缺失的潜在技术。然而，获取超高GC含量的靶向长片段CGG重复区域仍是一个主要挑战。

研究方法：我们开发了一种新型方法，结合长片段超高GC含量聚合酶链反应（PCR）扩增与Oxford Nanopore测序技术，以检测FMR1 5'UTR区域CGG重复序列的全谱突变。该方法通过10例标准细胞系样本（男性：n=10）进行验证。

研究结果：我们的方法在10例细胞系样本和53例临床样本的基因分型中，与三联体重复引物PCR和Southern blot分析的检测一致性达到100%。此外，CGG重复数量与参考方法（男性细胞系，n=5）表现出强相关性（R=0.98）。

研究结论：本研究提出了一种简单且成本效益高的策略，用于制备具有长片段超高GC含量的FMR1 5'UTR CGG重复区域，以供第三代测序使用。该方法可作为检测其他由短串联重复扩展引起的疾病（如肌强直性营养不良和亨廷顿病）的模型。

title: Long-Read Sequencing and Structural Variant Detection: Unlocking the Hidden Genome in Rare Genetic Disorders.
abstract: Rare genetic diseases are often caused by structural variants (SVs), such as insertions, deletions, duplications, inversions, and complex rearrangements. However, due to the technical limitations of short-read sequencing, these variants remain underdiagnosed. Long-read sequencing technologies, including Oxford Nanopore and Pacific Biosciences high-fidelity (HiFi), have recently advanced to the point that they can accurately find SVs throughout the genome, including in previously unreachable areas like repetitive sequences and segmental duplications. This study underscores the transformative role of long-read sequencing in diagnosing rare diseases, emphasizing the bioinformatics tools designed for detecting and interpreting structural variants (SVs). Comprehensive methods are reviewed, including methylation profiling, RNA-seq, phasing analysis, and long-read sequencing. The effectiveness and applications of well-known tools like Sniffles2, SVIM, and cuteSV are also assessed. Case studies illustrate how this technique has revealed new pathogenic pathways and solved cases that were previously undetected. Along with outlining potential future paths like telomere-to-telomere assemblies and pan-genome integration, we also address existing issues, including cost, clinical validation, and computational complexity. For uncommon genetic illnesses, long-read sequencing has the potential to completely change the molecular diagnostic picture as it approaches clinical adoption.
authors: Efthalia Moustakli, Panagiotis Christopoulos, Anastasios Potiris, Athanasios Zikopoulos, Despoina Mavrogianni, Grigorios Karampas, Nikolaos Kathopoulis, Ismini Anagnostaki, Ekaterini Domali, Alexandros T Tzallas, Peter Drakakis, Sofoklis Stavros

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术通过突破短读长测序的局限性，显著提升了罕见遗传病中结构变异（SVs）的检测能力。该技术结合生物信息学工具和多组学方法，为复杂遗传病诊断提供了新路径，但面临成本和临床验证等挑战。
ai.translation: 罕见遗传病通常由结构变异（SVs）引起，如插入、缺失、重复、倒位和复杂重排等。然而，由于短读长测序技术的局限性，这些变异仍存在诊断不足的问题。近年来，长读长测序技术（如Oxford Nanopore和Pacific Biosciences高保真（HiFi））已发展到能够准确检测全基因组范围内的SVs，包括重复序列和段重复等传统技术难以覆盖的区域。本研究强调长读长测序在罕见病诊断中的变革性作用，重点探讨用于检测和解读结构变异的生物信息学工具。综述了包括甲基化分析、RNA-seq、相位分析和长读长测序在内的综合方法，评估了Sniffles2、SVIM和cuteSV等知名工具的有效性及应用。案例研究展示了该技术如何揭示新的致病通路并解决以往未检测到的病例。同时，文章还提出未来方向如端到端组装和泛基因组整合，并讨论了现有问题，包括成本、临床验证和计算复杂性。随着临床应用的推进，长读长测序有望彻底改变罕见遗传病的分子诊断格局。

title: Application of a high-resolution melt assay for monitoring SARS-CoV-2 variants in Burkina Faso and Kenya.
abstract: The rapid emergence and global dissemination of severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) highlighted a need for robust, adaptable surveillance systems. However, financial and infrastructure requirements for whole-genome sequencing mean most surveillance data have come from higher-resource geographies, despite unprecedented investment in sequencing in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs). Consequently, the molecular epidemiology of SARS-CoV-2 in some LMICs is limited, and there is a need for more cost-accessible technologies to help close data gaps for surveillance of SARS-CoV-2 variants. To address this, we have developed two high-resolution melt (HRM) curve assays that target variant-defining mutations in the SARS-CoV-2 genome, which give unique signature profiles that define different SARS-CoV-2 variants of concern (VOCs). Extracted RNA from SARS-CoV-2-positive samples collected from 205 participants (112 in Burkina Faso, 93 in Kenya) enrolled in the MALCOV study (Malaria as a Risk Factor for COVID-19) between February 2021 and February 2022 were analyzed using our optimized HRM assays. With next-generation sequencing on Oxford Nanopore MinION as a reference, two HRM assays, HRM-VOC-1 and HRM-VOC-2, demonstrated sensitivity/specificity of 100%/99.29% and 92.86%/99.39%, respectively, for detecting Alpha, 90.08%/100% and 92.31%/100% for Delta, and 93.75%/100% and 100%/99.38% for Omicron BA.1. The assays described here provide a lower-cost approach to conducting molecular epidemiology, capable of high-throughput testing. We successfully scaled up the HRM-VOC-2 assay to screen a total of 506 samples from which we were able to show the replacement of Alpha with the introduction of Delta and the replacement of Delta by the Omicron variant in this community in Kisumu, Kenya.IMPORTANCEThe rapid evolution of the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 variants of concern (VOCs) demonstrated the need for accessible surveillance tools so all communities can conduct viral surveillance. Sequencing, the gold standard, is still a largely inaccessible methodology in low-resource settings. Here, we present a quick, low-cost tool to screen for the common VOCs, designed to support surveillance efforts in low-resource settings. This tool was used to screen samples from Burkina Faso and Western Kenya throughout the pandemic. We show through comparison to sequencing that our assay can generate highly similar data on the different variants circulating in a population, therefore showing the effectiveness of our tool. While not a replacement for sequencing, we present a method of screening and prioritizing samples for further investigation and reduce overburdening sequencing capacity. Our findings provide insight into one potential tool that could be further applied to pathogen screening in the absence of robust sequencing infrastructure.
authors: Caitlin Greenland-Bews, Sonal Shah, Morine Achieng, Emilie S Badoum, Yaya Bah, Hellen C Barsosio, Helena Brazal-Monzó, Jennifer Canizales, Anna Drabko, Alice J Fraser, Luke Hannan, Sheikh Jarju, Jean-Moise Kaboré, Mariama A Kujabi, Cristina Leggio, Maia Lesosky, Jarra Manneh, Tegwen Marlais, Julian Matthewman, Issa Nebié, Eric Onyango, Alphonse Ouedraogo, Kephas Otieno, Samuel S Serme, Sodiomon Sirima, Ben Soulama, Brian Tangara, Alfred Tiono, William Wu, Emily R Adams, Abdul Karim Sesay, Chris Drakeley, Feiko O Ter Kuile, Issiaka Soulama, Simon Kariuki, David J Allen, Thomas Edwards

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2变异株的快速演变凸显了资源有限地区建立可及性监测系统的必要性。本研究开发了两种高分辨率熔解曲线（HRM）检测方法，通过靶向变异定义突变实现变异株的高灵敏度检测，验证了其在肯尼亚和布基纳法索的适用性。
ai.translation: 严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒2（SARS-CoV-2）的快速传播和全球扩散凸显了建立稳健且适应性强的监测系统的迫切需求。然而，全基因组测序的财务和基础设施要求导致大多数监测数据主要来自高资源地区，尽管低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）已获得前所未有的测序投资。因此，某些LMICs的SARS-CoV-2分子流行病学数据有限，亟需更经济可及的技术填补监测数据缺口。为解决这一问题，我们开发了两种高分辨率熔解（HRM）曲线检测方法，靶向SARS-CoV-2基因组中的变异定义突变，可生成独特的特征谱型以定义不同变异株。从2021年2月至2022年2月参与MALCOV研究（疟疾作为新冠风险因素）的205名参与者（布基纳法索112人，肯尼亚93人）中收集的SARS-CoV-2阳性样本经优化HRM检测方法分析。以牛津纳米孔MinION测序作为参考，两种HRM检测方法HRM-VOC-1和HRM-VOC-2在检测Alpha变异株时分别达到100%/99.29%和92.86%/99.39%的灵敏度/特异性，在检测Delta变异株时分别达到90.08%/100%和92.31%/100%，在检测Omicron BA.1变异株时分别达到93.75%/100%和100%/99.38%。本文描述的检测方法为开展分子流行病学提供了低成本方案，具备高通量检测能力。我们成功将HRM-VOC-2检测方法扩展至筛查506个样本，展示了在肯尼亚基苏姆社区中Alpha变异株被Delta取代，以及Delta被Omicron变异株取代的动态。重要性：SARS-CoV-2变异株的快速演变凸显了建立可及性监测工具的必要性，使所有社区都能开展病毒监测。尽管测序是金标准，但在资源有限地区仍难以普及。本文提出了一种快速、低成本的工具，用于筛查常见变异株，支持资源有限地区的监测工作。该工具在疫情期间用于筛查布基纳法索和西部肯尼亚的样本，通过与测序结果对比，证明我们的检测方法可生成与不同变异株在人群中的流行数据高度相似的结果，展示了工具的有效性。虽然不能替代测序，但该方法可筛选和优先处理样本以进行进一步研究，减轻测序能力的负担。我们的研究结果为在缺乏强大测序基础设施时，可能用于病原体筛查的工具提供了见解。

authors: Fatima Dakroub, Fata Akl, Alissar Zaghlout, Jose Rita Gerges, Nancy Hourani, Celina F Boutros, George F Araj, Ghassan M Matar, Antoine Abou Fayad, Ghassan S Dbaibo

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）作为高分辨率基因分型工具，能够精确鉴定细菌菌株，尤其在高度致病性细菌的检测中具有重要价值。该技术通过全面解析基因组信息，为病原体溯源和流行病学研究提供关键数据。
ai.translation: 全基因组测序（Whole-genome sequencing, WGS）是一种宝贵的工具，能够实现高分辨率基因分型，从而精确鉴定细菌菌株。它对于诸如高度致病性细菌等，尤为重要。

title: Development and validation of a carnitine cycle and transport disorders (CCD) panel: an ONT-compatible multi-gene diagnostic kit for newborn and selective screening.
abstract: Carnitine transport and cycle disorders (CCD) are a group of metabolic disorders characterized by either carnitine depletion or dysfunction in the carnitine cycle, a critical process for the transport of fatty acids into the mitochondria and their subsequent β-oxidation. Clinically, CCD can manifest with a wide range of symptoms, including hypoketotic hypoglycemia, which may be accompanied by signs of liver dysfunction, hepatic steatosis, myopathy and cardiomyopathy. Biochemical diagnosis typically involves measuring carnitine and acylcarnitine levels in blood, alongside organic acid profiling in urine. However, due to phenotypic overlaps with other metabolic disorders, precise molecular diagnosis is essential for accurate disease classification and subtype determination. The present study aimed to develop and clinically validate a novel CCD panel, specifically designed for Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) platform compatibility. The panel targeted four key CCD related genes (CPT-1, CPT-2, SLC22A5 and SLC25A20). An amplification-based library preparation method pooling 21 primers specific to the CCD-related genes into two tubes was optimized. The panel was then applied to screen 20 patients previously diagnosed with CCD via second-generation sequencing platform. Comparative analysis of results from both platforms revealed a 100% concordance in detecting pathogenic, likely pathogenic, and variants of unknown significance associated with CCD. In silico analysis was also performed to predict the pathogenic potential of the variants of unknown significance. Here we report the development and clinical validation of a multi-gene diagnostic panel for ONT platform. The results demonstrated the feasibility of ONT-based genetic testing for CCD and set the stage for the development of similar diagnostic panels for other genetic disorders, offering a streamlined and putatively cost-effective alternative to current sequencing methodologies.
authors: Gökçe Akan, Mehmet Cihan Balcı, Gülten Tuncel, Meryem Karaca, Hasan Hüseyin Kazan, Ahmet Çağlar Özketen, Özge Özgen, Gülden Fatma Gökçay, Fatmahan Atalar

ai.TLDR: 本文介绍了一种针对肉碱转运和循环障碍（CCD）的多基因诊断面板的开发与临床验证，该面板专为Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）平台设计，实现了与第二代测序平台100%的一致性。该研究为其他遗传病的诊断面板开发提供了可行性方案。
ai.translation: 肉碱转运和循环障碍（CCD）是一组代谢障碍，其特征是肉碱缺乏或肉碱循环功能障碍，这是将脂肪酸转运至线粒体并进行β-氧化的关键过程。临床表现包括低酮性低血糖，可能伴有肝功能异常、肝脂肪变、肌病和心肌病。生化诊断通常包括测量血液中的肉碱和酰肉碱水平，以及尿液中的有机酸谱分析。然而，由于与其他代谢障碍的表型重叠，精确的分子诊断对于准确的疾病分类和亚型确定至关重要。本研究旨在开发并临床验证一种新型的CCD诊断面板，专门设计用于Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）平台。该面板针对四个与CCD相关的基因（CPT-1、CPT-2、SLC22A5和SLC25A20）。优化了一种基于扩增的文库制备方法，将21个针对CCD相关基因的引物合并到两个管中。该面板随后应用于筛选20名之前通过第二代测序平台诊断为CCD的患者。对两个平台结果的比较分析显示，在检测与CCD相关的致病性、可能致病性和意义不明的变异方面，两者具有100%的一致性。还进行了体外分析，以预测意义不明变异的致病潜力。本文报告了针对ONT平台的多基因诊断面板的开发和临床验证。结果表明，基于ONT的遗传检测在CCD中的可行性，并为其他遗传病的诊断面板开发奠定了基础，提供了一种更高效且可能更具成本效益的替代方案。

title: OCTOPUS: Disk-based, Multiplatform, Mobile-friendly Metagenomics Classifier.
journal: AMIA ... Annual Symposium proceedings. AMIA Symposium
abstract: Portable genomic sequencers such as Oxford Nanopore's MinION enable real-time applications in clinical and environmental health. However, there is a bottleneck in the downstream analytics when bioinformatics pipelines are unavailable, e.g., when cloud processing is unreachable due to absence of Internet connection, or only low-end computing devices can be carried on site. Here we present a platform-friendly software for portable metagenomic analysis of Nanopore data, the Oligomer-based Classifier of Taxonomic Operational and Pan-genome Units via Singletons (OCTOPUS). OCTOPUS is written in Java, reimplements several features of the popular Kraken2 and KrakenUniq software, with original components for improving metagenomics classification on incomplete/sampled reference databases, making it ideal for running on smartphones or tablets. OCTOPUS obtains sensitivity and precision comparable to Kraken2, while dramatically decreasing (4- to 16-fold) the false positive rate, and yielding high correlation on real-word data. OCTOPUS is available along with customized databases at https://github.com/DataIntellSystLab/OCTOPUS and https://github.com/Ruiz-HCI-Lab/OctopusMobile.
authors: Simone Marini, Alexander Barquero, Anisha Ashok Wadhwani, Jiang Bian, Jaime Ruiz, Christina Boucher, Mattia Prosperi

ai.TLDR: 便携式基因组测序仪如Oxford Nanopore的MinION可实现临床和环境健康领域的实时应用。然而，当生物信息学流程不可用时，下游分析存在瓶颈，例如无法连接互联网或仅能携带低端计算设备。为此，我们开发了OCTOPUS，一种适用于便携式宏基因组分析的平台友好型软件，其在智能手机或平板上运行效果良好。
ai.translation: 便携式基因组测序仪，如Oxford Nanopore的MinION，能够实现临床和环境健康领域的实时应用。然而，当生物信息学流程不可用时，下游分析存在瓶颈，例如当无法连接互联网或只能携带低端计算设备时。为此，我们开发了一种适用于便携式宏基因组分析的平台友好型软件，即基于寡聚体的分类器（Oligomer-based Classifier of Taxonomic Operational and Pan-genome Units via Singletons，简称OCTOPUS）。OCTOP,US是用Java编写的，重新实现了流行的Kraken2和KrakenUniq软件的多个功能，并包含原创组件以提高在不完整或采样参考数据库上的宏基因组分类效果，使其非常适合在智能手机或平板电脑上运行。OCTOPUS在敏感性和精确度方面与Kraken2相当，同时显著降低了（4至16倍）假阳性率，并在实际数据中表现出高度的相关性。OCTOPUS可在以下网址获取，并附带定制的数据库：https://github.com/DataIntellSystLab/OCTOPUS 和 https://github.com/Ruiz-HCI-Lab/OctopusMobile。

However, there is a bottleneck in the downstream analytics when bioinformatics pipelines are unavailable, e.g., when cloud processing is unreachable due to absence of Internet connection, or only low-end computing devices can be carried on site. ai.TLDR: 便携式基因组测序器如Oxford Nanopore的MinION在临床和环境健康领域具有实时应用潜力，但受限于生物信息学流程的缺失。OCTOPUS平台通过Java开发，结合Kraken2等工具特性，实现了在移动设备上的高效宏基因组分析，显著降低假阳性率并保持高灵敏度。
ai.translation: 便携式基因组测序器如Oxford Nanopore的MinION能够实现临床和环境健康领域的实时应用。然而，当生物信息学流程不可用时（例如因无互联网连接无法使用云处理，或仅能携带低端计算设备现场作业），下游分析存在瓶颈。本文提出了一种面向平台的便携式宏基因组分析软件OCTOPUS，该软件基于单体（Singletons）对分类操作单元和泛基因组单元进行分类。OCTOPUS采用Java开发，重新实现了Kraken2和KrakenUniq等流行工具的多个功能，并加入原创组件以提升不完整/采样参考数据库下的宏基因组分类效果，使其适合在智能手机或平板设备上运行。OCTOPUS在灵敏度和精确度方面与Kraken2相当，同时显著降低（4-16倍）假阳性率，并在实际数据中表现出高相关性。OCTOPUS及其定制数据库可通过https://github.com/DataIntellSystLab/OCTOPUS和https://github.com/Ruiz-HCI-Lab/OctopusMobile获取。

title: Dynamics of SARS-CoV-2 variants and mutations in Central Sweden between 2023 and 2024 and their potential implications on monoclonal antibodies pemivibart and sipavibart as PrEP in the region.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Monoclonal antibodies (mAbs) are an important option against SARS-CoV-2, especially as pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for patients with immune system impairment. PrEP mAbs like sipavibart and pemivibart have been approved for limited use in several countries. Certain SARS-CoV-2 variants carry mutations in the spike (S) protein, conferring resistance to these mAbs.

OBJECTIVES: We aimed to examine the relative abundance of different circulating SARS-CoV-2 variants/mutations in central Sweden between 2023 and 2024, and to predict the effectiveness of sipavibart and pemivibart.

METHODS: An amplicon-based Nanopore sequencing method was used for sequencing SARS-CoV-2 samples. Coronapp was used to identify mutations in these sequences. Using the published 

RESULTS: We have observed that the relative abundance of the KP.3.1.1 variant and the Q493E mutation started to increase in the later part of 2024 in the region. Also, since April 2024, the relative abundance of the F456L mutation reached 100% during many weeks until the end of the study period. The KP.3.1.1 variant is significantly resistant to pemivibart. Further, the presence of the F456L mutation in the Omicron subvariants confers high fold resistance towards sipavibart.

CONCLUSION: The use of sipavibart or pemivibart as PrEP for COVID-19 in the region may currently not be effective unless new SARS-CoV-2 variants appear not containing these resistance mutations. Further, new mAbs under development as PrEP for COVID-19 can be effectively used by routinely sequencing SARS-CoV-2 in patients to identify variants and resistance mutations.
authors: Jonathan Haars, Frans Wallin, Karin Elfving, Anna-Karin Jonsson, Patrik Ellström, Paula Mölling, Johan Lindh, Hong Yin, Martin Sundqvist, René Kaden, Navaneethan Palanisamy, Johan Lennerstrand

ai.TLDR: 研究发现SARS-CoV-2变异株KP.3.1.1和F456L突变在2024年瑞典中部呈现显著抗药性，导致sipavibart和pemivibart作为新冠预防性用药（PrEP）效果下降。通过纳米孔测序和Coronapp工具分析，发现F456L突变在2024年4月后达到100%相对丰度，而KP.3.1.1变异株对pemivibart具有显著抗性。
ai.translation:
背景：单克隆抗体（mAbs）是应对SARS-CoV-2的重要选择，特别是作为免疫系统受损患者预暴露预防（PrEP）用药。如sipavibart和pemivibart等mAbs已在多个国家获批有限使用。某些SARS-CoV-2变异株携带刺突蛋白（S蛋白）突变，导致对这些mAbs产生抗性。

目标：我们旨在分析2023至2024年间瑞典中部不同SARS-CoV-2变异株/突变的相对丰度，并预测sipavibart和pemivibart的疗效。

方法：采用基于扩增子的纳米孔测序方法对SARS-CoV-2样本进行测序，使用Coronapp工具识别这些序列中的突变。利用已发表的文献数据进行分析。

结果：观察到KP.3.1.1变异株和Q493E突变在2024年下半年开始在该地区相对丰度增加。此外，自2024年4月起，F456L突变的相对丰度在许多周内达到100%，直至研究结束。KP.3.1.1变异株对pemivibart具有显著抗性。此外，Omicron亚变种中F456L突变的存在对sipavibart表现出高倍数抗性。

结论：在该地区，除非出现不含这些抗性突变的新SARS-CoV-2变异株，否则sipavibart或pemivibart作为新冠PrEP可能当前无效。此外，开发用于新冠PrEP的新mAbs可通过常规对SARS-CoV-2患者进行测序，以识别变异株和抗性突变而有效应用。

title: Application of Biomarkers in Spinal Muscular Atrophy.
abstract: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) is a fatal motor neuron disease characterized by five clinical subtypes, each presenting with different rates of disease progression and varying responses to recently approved therapies. The identification of reliable biomarkers is essential for improving diagnosis and prognosis, monitoring disease progression, enabling personalized treatment strategies, and evaluating therapeutic responses. In this review, we conducted a comprehensive literature search using PubMed and Web of Science with the keywords "spinal muscular atrophy", "biomarker" and advanced technologies such as "single-cell omics", "nanopore and long-read sequencing" and "epigenetics" to identify and summarize current advances in SMA biomarker discovery and application. We begin with a brief overview of SMA and its current treatment barriers. We then conclude with well-established and emerging molecular and non-molecular biomarkers, followed by a conclusion of emerging technologies in biomarker discovery. In the meantime, we highlight the application of biomarkers in key areas, including early diagnosis and disease stratification, monitoring of disease progression, and prediction of treatment response. Finally, we summarize biomarker-targeted therapies, addressing current challenges in biomarker research, with the goal of improving clinical outcomes for patients with SMA.
authors: Changyi Gao, Yanqiang Zhan, Hong Chen, Chunchu Deng

ai.TLDR: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）是一种致命的运动神经元疾病，具有五种临床亚型，不同亚型的疾病进展速度和治疗反应差异显著。本综述通过系统文献分析，总结了SMA生物标志物研究的最新进展，重点探讨了其在早期诊断、疾病分层、治疗反应预测中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（Spinal Muscular Atrophy, SMA）是一种致命的运动神经元疾病，其临床表现分为五种亚型，每种亚型的疾病进展速度和对近期获批疗法的反应均存在显著差异。可靠生物标志物的鉴定对于改善诊断和预后、监测疾病进展、制定个性化治疗策略以及评估治疗反应至关重要。本综述通过PubMed和Web of Science数据库，采用'脊髓性肌萎缩症'、'生物标志物'及'单细胞组学'、'纳米孔长读长测序'、'表观遗传学'等关键词，系统梳理了SMA生物标志物发现与应用的最新进展。文章首先概述了SMA的疾病特征及现有治疗障碍，随后总结了已确立和新兴的分子及非分子生物标志物，并探讨了生物标志物发现技术的前沿进展。同时重点阐述了生物标志物在早期诊断与疾病分层、疾病进展监测、治疗反应预测等关键领域的应用价值。最后，文章总结了靶向生物标志物的治疗策略，分析了当前生物标志物研究面临的挑战，旨在提升SMA患者的临床治疗效果。

authors: Esther Recacha, Mercedes Delgado-Valverde, Marina R Pulido, Elena Pérez-Nadales, Patricia Pérez-Palacios, Inés Portillo-Calderón, Juan Manuel Sánchez-Calvo, Irene Gracia-Ahufinger, Álvaro Pascual

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Comparative evaluation of sequencing platforms: Pacific Biosciences, Oxford Nanopore Technologies, and Illumina for 16S rRNA-based soil microbiome profiling.
abstract: Soil microbiome profiling is crucial for understanding microbial diversity and its roles in ecosystem functioning and agricultural productivity. Recent advancements in high-throughput sequencing, particularly Pacific Biosciences (PacBio) and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), offer long-read sequencing capabilities that enhance microbial community analysis. In this study, we performed a comparative evaluation of 16S rRNA gene sequencing using Illumina (V4 and V3-V4 regions), PacBio (full-length and trimmed V3-V4/V4 regions), and ONT (full-length) to assess bacterial diversity in soil microbiomes. We analyzed three distinct soil types and applied standardized bioinformatics pipelines tailored to each platform. To ensure comparability, sequencing depth was normalized across platforms (10,000, 20,000, 25,000, and 35,000 reads per sample). Our results demonstrated that ONT and PacBio provided comparable bacterial diversity assessments, with PacBio showing slightly higher efficiency in detecting low-abundance taxa. Despite differences in sequencing accuracy, ONT produced results that closely matched those of PacBio, suggesting that ONT's inherent sequencing errors do not significantly affect the interpretation of well-represented taxa. Our study demonstrated that, regardless of the sequencing technology used and the choice of the target region (full-length 16S rRNA gene or its regions), microbial community analysis ensures clear clustering of samples based on soil type. The only exception is the V4 region, where no soil-type clustering is observed (

ai.TLDR: 土壤微生物组分析对理解微生物多样性及其在生态系统功能和农业生产力中的作用至关重要。本研究通过比较Illumina、PacBio和ONT三种测序技术在土壤微生物组细菌多样性评估中的表现，发现ONT和PacBio在多样性分析上具有可比性，且PacBio在低丰度分类群检测上更高效。
ai.translation: 土壤微生物组分析对于理解微生物多样性及其在生态系统功能和农业生产力中的作用至关重要。近年来，高通量测序技术，特别是太平洋生物科学公司（Pacific Biosciences, PacBio）和牛津纳米孔技术公司（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）的长读长测序能力，显著提升了微生物群落分析的深度。本研究通过比较Illum, Illumina（V4和V3-V4区域）、PacBio（全长和修剪后的V3-V4/V4区域）以及ONT（全长）的16S rRNA基因测序方法，评估了土壤微生物组的细菌多样性。我们分析了三种不同的土壤类型，并为每种平台应用了标准化的生物信息学流程。为确保结果可比性，各平台的测序深度进行了标准化处理（每样本10,000、20,000、25,000和35,000次读取）。研究结果表明，ONT和PacBio在细菌多样性评估上具有可比性，其中PacBio在检测低丰度分类群时表现出稍高的效率。尽管测序准确性存在差异，ONT的测序结果仍与PacBio高度一致，表明ONT固有的测序错误不会显著影响优势分类群的解释。本研究证明，无论采用何种测序技术以及选择全长16S rRNA基因或其区域作为目标，微生物群落分析都能根据土壤类型实现样本的清晰聚类。唯一例外是V4区域，该区域未观察到土壤类型聚类。

title: Clinical metagenomics analysis of bacterial and fungal microbiota from sputum of patients suspected with tuberculosis infection based on nanopore sequencing
abstract: Tuberculosis (TB) remains a significant global health challenge, demanding rapid and comprehensive diagnostics for effective treatment. Secondary infections further complicate TB infection, worsening outcomes. Conventional diagnostics are hindered by prolonged turnaround times, high costs, and inability to detect co-infections. This study utilizes full-length 16S rDNA and internal transcribed spacer (ITS) amplicon sequencing based on Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) to analyze clinical metagenomics of sputum microbiota from patients suspected with TB Infection. Our findings highlight the potential of ONT for profiling microbial communities associated with TB infection. The MTB group exhibited a significant abundance of *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* (*M. tuberculosis*) and *Stenotrophomonas maltophilia*. In contrast, *Prevotella melaninogenica*, *Veillonella parvula*, *Corynebacterium striatum* and *Pseudomonas aeruginosa* were more abundant in the negative samples. Fungal analysis revealed *Candida orthopsilosis* was enriched in MTB samples, while *Aureobasidium leucospermi* and *Wallemia muriae* predominated in negative samples. Correlation network analysis revealed *M. tuberculosis* exhibits positive and negative correlations with other microbial species, suggesting cooperative and competitive interactions that may influence microbial community dynamics and disease progression in TB patients. This study demonstrates the promise of ONT-based clinical metagenomics for rapid, comprehensive detection of bacterial and fungal co-infections, addressing limitations of conventional diagnostics and improving outcomes.
authors: Pawarisa Terbtothakun, Suthida Visedthorn, ... Sunchai Payungporn
citation: Terbtothakun, P., Visedthorn, S., Klomkliew, P. et al. Clinical metagenomics analysis of bacterial and fungal microbiota from sputum of patients suspected with tuberculosis infection based on nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 15 , 17772 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-01905-3

ai.TLDR: 结核病（TB）仍是全球健康的重要挑战，需快速全面的诊断方法。本研究利用Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）的全长16S rDNA和ITS扩增子测序技术，揭示了TB感染相关微生物群落特征，发现MTB组与阴性样本在菌群组成上存在显著差异。
ai.translation: 结核病（TB）仍然是全球健康的重要挑战，需要快速且全面的诊断方法以实现有效治疗。继发感染进一步复杂化TB感染，加重疾病预后。传统诊断方法受限于较长的检测周期、高昂成本及无法检测共感染的缺陷。本研究采用基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）的全长16S rDNA和内部转录间隔（ITS）扩增子测序技术，分析疑似TB感染患者的痰液微生物宏基因组特征。研究结果凸显ONT技术在解析TB感染相关微生物群落中的潜力。MTB组表现出显著富集的结核分枝杆菌（Mycobacterium tuberculosis）和铜绿假单胞菌（Stenotrophomonas maltophilia）。相比之下，阴性样本中普雷沃氏菌（Prevotella melaninogenica）、微螺菌（Veillonella parvula）、棒状杆菌（Corynebacterium striatum）和铜绿假单胞菌（Pseudomonas aeruginosa）更为丰富。真菌分析显示，MTB样本中 Candida orthopsilosis 富集，而 Aureobasidium leucospermi 和 Wallemia muriae 在阴性样本中占主导地位。相关网络分析揭示结核分枝杆菌与其它微生物物种存在正负相关性，提示可能存在协同或竞争性互作，可能影响TB患者微生物群落动态及疾病进展。本研究证明基于ONT的临床宏基因组学在快速、全面检测细菌和真菌共感染方面的潜力，克服传统诊断方法的局限性并改善临床结局。

title: Impact of Chemotherapy Alone and in Combination with Immunotherapy on Oral Microbiota in Cancer Patients-A Pilot Study.
abstract: The oral cavity harbors a highly intricate and dynamic microbial ecosystem of multiple microhabitats supporting diverse microbial populations. As the second most complex microbiome in the human body, surpassed only by the gut, the oral microbiome comprises over 1000 species. Disruptions in the microbial balance have been associated with an increased risk of both oral diseases (dental caries and periodontitis) and systemic conditions, including inflammatory diseases and certain types of cancers. In our pilot study, we purified bacterial DNA from pre-treated, saponin-based, host-depleted saliva samples and performed 16S amplicon sequencing, using Oxford Nanopore Technologies, to identify bacterial composition and investigate changes in the oral microbiota of patients with solid tumors in response to chemotherapy, either alone or in combination with immunotherapy. We found significant reductions in microbial diversity of the oral microbiota following cancer treatment, which may contribute to post-therapeutic complications such as oral mucositis. ai.TLDR: 口腔微生物群是人体第二复杂的微生物群，与多种疾病相关。本研究通过16S扩增子测序分析化疗后口腔微生物多样性下降，发现治疗后微生物组成显著变化，可能引发口腔黏膜炎等并发症。
ai.translation: 口腔腔道 harbors 一个高度复杂且动态的微生物生态系统，包含多个微环境支持多样化的微生物群落。作为人体第二复杂的微生物群，仅次于肠道，口腔微生物群包含超过1000种物种。微生物平衡的破坏与口腔疾病（龋齿和牙周炎）及系统性疾病的增加风险相关，包括炎症性疾病和某些癌症。在我们的初步研究中，我们从预处理的皂苷基、宿主耗竭的唾液样本中纯化细菌DNA，并使用牛津纳米孔技术进行16S扩增子测序，以鉴定细菌组成并研究实体瘤患者在单纯化疗或联合免疫治疗后口腔微生物群的变化。我们发现癌症治疗后口腔微生物群的微生物多样性显著降低，这可能促成治疗后并发症如口腔黏膜炎。此外，我们的研究结果表明，一方面，化疗治疗后微生物特征表现为某些微生物丰度增加，另一方面...

title: ROBIN: A unified nanopore-based assay integrating intraoperative methylome classification and next-day comprehensive profiling for ultra-rapid tumor diagnosis.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Advances in our technological capacity to interrogate CNS tumor biology have led to the ever increasing use of genomic sequencing in diagnostic decision making. Presently, CNS tumors are classified based on their epigenetic signatures, leading to a paradigm shift in diagnostic pathways. Such testing can be performed so rapidly using nanopore sequencing that results can be provided intraoperatively. This information greatly improves the fidelity of smear diagnosis and can help surgeons tailor their approach, balancing the risks of surgery with the likely benefit. Nevertheless, full integrated diagnosis may require subsequent additional assays to detect pathognomonic somatic mutations and structural variants, thereby delaying the time to final diagnosis.

METHODS: Here, we present ROBIN, a tool based on PromethION nanopore sequencing technology that can provide both real-time, intraoperative methylome classification and next-day comprehensive molecular profiling within a single assay. ROBIN utilizes 3 methylation classifiers to improve diagnostic performance in the intraoperative setting.

RESULTS: We demonstrate classifier performance on 50 prospective intraoperative cases, achieving a diagnostic turnaround time under 2 hours and generating robust tumor classifications within minutes of sequencing. Furthermore, ROBIN can detect single nucleotide variants, copy number variants, and structural variants in real time, and is able to inform a complete integrated diagnosis within 24 hours. Classifier performance demonstrated concordance with final integrated diagnosis in 90% of prospective cases.

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing can greatly improve turnaround times for standard-of-care diagnostic testing and is furthermore able to reliably provide clinically actionable intraoperative tumor classification.
authors: Simon Deacon, Inswasti Cahyani, Nadine Holmes, Graeme Fox, Rory Munro, Satrio Wibowo, Thomas Murray, Hannah Mason, Mark Housley, Daniel Martin, Abdi Sharif, Areeba Patel, Robert Goldspring, Sebastian Brandner, Felix Sahm, Stuart Smith, Simon Paine, Matthew Loose

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术显著缩短中枢神经系统肿瘤诊断的周转时间，ROBIN工具实现术中实时甲基组分类和次日全面分子分析，90%病例与最终整合诊断一致。该技术可提供临床可操作的术中肿瘤分类，提升诊断准确性。
ai.translation:
背景：技术能力的进步使得基因组测序在中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤诊断决策中的应用日益增加。目前CNS肿瘤的分类基于表观遗传特征，这改变了传统诊断路径。通过纳米孔测序技术，此类检测可在短时间内完成，实现术中即时结果输出。该信息显著提升细胞学诊断的准确性，并帮助外科医生在手术风险与潜在获益间取得平衡。然而，完整的整合诊断可能需要后续检测以识别特征性体细胞突变和结构变异，从而延迟最终诊断时间。

方法：本文介绍ROBIN工具，该工具基于PromethION纳米孔测序技术，可在单次检测中实现术中实时甲基组分类和次日全面分子分析。ROBIN采用3种甲基化分类器以提升术中诊断性能。

结果：在50例前瞻性术中病例中验证分类器性能，实现诊断周转时间不足2小时，测序后数分钟内生成可靠肿瘤分类。此外，ROBIN可实时检测单核苷酸变异、拷贝数变异和结构变异，并在24小时内完成完整整合诊断。分类器性能在90%的前瞻性病例中与最终整合诊断结果一致。

结论：纳米孔测序技术可显著缩短标准诊断测试的周转时间，并能可靠提供临床可操作的术中肿瘤分类。

title: In vitro, genomic characterization and pre-clinical evaluation of a new thermostable lytic Obolenskvirus phage formulated as a hydrogel against carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii.
abstract: The urgent threat of carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii (CRAB) necessitates the development of new antimicrobial strategies. Bacteriophage (phage) therapy is one of the most promising alternative strategies that can be implemented to combat multidrug-resistant (MDR) bacterial infections. Herein, an A. baumannii phage VB_AB_Acb75 that exhibited lytic activity against 6 CRAB isolates (21.43%) with stability at up to 70 °C, pH 2-12, and high concentrations of organic solvents was isolated and characterized. The transmission electron microscope (TEM) detected a tailed phage with an icosahedral head and contractile tail (myoviral morphotype). The Oxford nanopore sequencing results showed an A. baumannii phage genome size of 45,487 bp, a G + C content of 38%, and 42 open reading frames (ORFs). The phylogenetic analysis, ORF, and TEM analysis indicated that A. baumannii phage VB_AB_Acb75 belongs to a novel species in the Obolenskvirus genus. Furthermore, the phage-loaded Carbopol 940 hydrogel was preclinically evaluated for wound healing effectiveness in the burn-wound animal model infected with the CRAB isolate. The histology findings showed a marked improvement in wound healing through a thick epidermal layer and the formation of well-organized fibrous connective tissue covered by a scab at the site of injury, as well as the ability to eliminate CRAB infection, as compared to the control group. In conclusion, based on in vitro, physicochemical properties, and preclinical findings, the phage-loaded hydrogel is expected to be a promising candidate for clinical evaluation against CRAB-associated skin infections.
authors: Mahmoud M Sherif, Neveen A Abdelaziz, Mohammad Y Alshahrani, Sarra E Saleh, Khaled M Aboshanab

ai.TLDR: 耐碳青霉烯类铜绿假单胞菌（CRAB）的严重威胁促使开发新的抗菌策略。噬菌体疗法是应对多重耐药细菌感染的有前景的替代方案。本研究分离并表征了一种针对6种CRAB菌株（21.43%）具有裂解活性的噬菌体VB_AB_Acb75，并在高温、酸碱度和有机溶剂中保持稳定。该噬菌体属于Obolenskvirus属的新物种，其负载的Carbopol 940水凝胶在烧伤伤口模型中显示出良好的伤口愈合效果。
ai.translation: 碳青霉烯类耐药铜绿假单胞菌（CRAB）的严重威胁促使开发新的抗菌策略。噬菌体（phage）疗法是应对多重耐药（MDR）细菌感染的最有前景的替代方案之一。在此研究中，分离并表征了一种针对6种CRAB菌株（占21.43%）具有裂解活性的铜绿假单胞菌噬菌体VB_AB_Acb75，该噬菌体在高达70°C、pH 2-12以及高浓度有机溶剂中保持稳定。透射电子显微镜（TEM）检测到一种具有二十面体头部和收缩尾部（myoviral形态）的噬菌体。牛津纳米孔测序结果显示，该噬菌体基因组大小为45,487 bp，G + C含量为38%，包含42个开放阅读框（ORFs）。系统发育分析、ORF分析和TEM分析表明，铜绿假单胞菌噬菌体VB_AB_Acb75属于Obolenskvirus属的新物种。此外，负载噬菌体的Carbopol 940水凝胶在感染CRAB菌株的烧伤伤口动物模型中进行了临床前评估，以评估其伤口愈合效果。组织学结果显示，与对照组相比，该水凝胶显著改善了伤口愈合，表现为厚的表皮层和由痂覆盖的组织化纤维结缔组织的形成，同时具备消除CRAB感染的能力。综上所述，基于体外实验、理化性质和临床前研究结果，负载噬菌体的水凝胶有望成为针对CRAB相关皮肤感染的临床评估候选药物。

title: Utilizing Nanopore direct RNA sequencing of blood from patients with sepsis for discovery of co- and post-transcriptional disease biomarkers
abstract:
### Background

RNA sequencing of whole blood has been increasingly employed to find transcriptomic signatures of disease states. These studies traditionally utilize short-read sequencing of cDNA, missing important aspects of RNA expression such as differential isoform abundance and poly(A) tail length variation.

### Methods

We used Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing to sequence native mRNA extracted from whole blood from 12 patients with definite bacterial and viral sepsis and compared with results from matching Illumina short-read cDNA sequencing data. Additionally, we explored poly(A) tail length variation, novel transcript identification, and differential transcript usage.

### Results

The correlation of gene count data between Illumina cDNA- and Nanopore RNA-sequencing strongly depended on the choice of analysis pipeline; *NanoCount* for Nanopore and *Kallisto* for Illumina data yielded the highest mean Pearson’s correlation of 0.927 at the gene level and 0.736 at the transcript isoform level. We identified 2 genes with differential polyadenylation, 9 genes with differential expression and 4 genes with differential transcript usage between bacterial and viral infection. Gene ontology gene set enrichment analysis of poly(A) tail length revealed enrichment of long tails in mRNA of genes involved in signaling and short tails in oxidoreductase molecular functions. Additionally, we detected 240 non-artifactual novel transcript isoforms.

### Conclusions

Nanopore RNA- and Illumina cDNA-gene counts are strongly correlated, indicating that both platforms are suitable for discovery and validation of gene count biomarkers. Nanopore direct RNA-seq provides additional advantages by uncovering additional post- and co-transcriptional biomarkers, such as poly(A) tail length variation and transcript isoform usage.
authors: Jingni He, Devika Ganesamoorthy, ... Lachlan J. M. Coin
citation: He, J., Ganesamoorthy, D., Chang, J.JY. et al. Utilizing Nanopore direct RNA sequencing of blood from patients with sepsis for discovery of co- and post-transcriptional disease biomarkers. BMC Infect Dis 25 , 692 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12879-025-11078-z

ai.TLDR: 本研究比较了Nanopore直接RNA测序与Illumina短读cDNA测序在全血样本中的应用，发现两者基因计数高度相关（基因水平0.927，转录本水平0.736），但Nanopore能额外揭示poly(A)尾长度变化和差异剪接等后转录调控特征。通过分析12例脓毒症患者样本，发现了2个差异多聚腺苷酸化基因、9个差异表达基因和4个差异转录本使用基因。
ai.translation:
背景
全血RNA测序已被广泛用于发现疾病状态的转录组标志物。然而传统研究多采用cDNA短读测序，无法捕捉到RNA表达的关键特征，如差异剪接异构体丰度和poly(A)尾长度变化。

方法
我们使用牛津纳米孔技术对12例确诊细菌性和病毒性脓毒症患者的全血原生mRNA进行测序，并与匹配的Illumina短读cDNA测序数据进行对比。同时探索了poly(A)尾长度变化、新型转录本识别及差异转录本使用特征。

结果
Illumina cDNA测序与Nanopore RNA测序的基因计数数据相关性高度依赖分析流程选择；采用NanoCount分析Nanopore数据和Kallisto分析Illumina数据时，基因水平平均皮尔逊相关系数达到0.927，转录本异构体水平为0.736。我们发现细菌感染与病毒感染间存在2个差异多聚腺苷酸化基因、9个差异表达基因和4个差异转录本使用基因。poly(A)尾长度的基因集富集分析显示，信号相关基因的mRNA呈现长尾特征，而氧化还原酶分子功能则呈现短尾特征。此外检测到240个非人工干扰的新型转录本异构体。

结论
Nanopore RNA测序与Illumina cDNA测序的基因计数高度相关，表明两种平台均适用于基因计数生物标志物的发现与验证。Nanopore直接RNA测序通过揭示poly(A)尾长度变化和转录本异构体使用等后转录及共转录调控特征，提供了额外的生物标志物发现优势。

title: The Potential of Nanopore Technologies in Peptide and Protein Sensing for Biomarker Detection.
abstract: The increasing demand for high-throughput, real-time, and single-molecule protein analysis in precision medicine has propelled the development of novel sensing technologies. Among these, nanopore-based methods have garnered significant attention for their unique capabilities, including label-free detection, ultra-sensitivity, and the potential for miniaturization and portability. Originally designed for nucleic acid sequencing, nanopore technology is now being adapted for peptide and protein analysis, offering promising applications in biomarker discovery and disease diagnostics. This review examines the latest advances in biological, solid-state, and hybrid nanopores for protein sensing, focusing on their ability to detect amino acid sequences, structural variants, post-translational modifications, and dynamic protein-protein or protein-drug interactions. We critically compare these systems to conventional proteomic techniques, such as mass spectrometry and immunoassays, discussing advantages and persistent technical challenges, including translocation control and signal deconvolution. Particular emphasis is placed on recent advances in protein sequencing using biological and solid-state nanopores and the integration of machine learning and signal-processing algorithms that enhance the resolution and accuracy of protein identification. Nanopore protein sensing represents a disruptive innovation in biosensing, with the potential to revolutionize clinical diagnostics, therapeutic monitoring, and personalized healthcare.
authors: Iuliana Șoldănescu, Andrei Lobiuc, Olga Adriana Caliman-Sturdza, Mihai Covasa, Serghei Mangul, Mihai Dimian

ai.TLDR: 随着精准医学对高通量、实时和单分子蛋白分析需求的增长，基于纳米孔的新传感技术快速发展。该技术凭借无标签检测、超灵敏度及微型化潜力，正在从核酸测序领域拓展至蛋白质分析，为生物标志物发现和疾病诊断提供新方案。本文系统评估了生物、固态及混合纳米孔在蛋白质传感中的最新进展。
ai.translation: 在精准医学领域对高通量、实时和单分子蛋白分析需求日益增长的推动下，新型传感技术的研发取得显著进展。其中，基于纳米孔的方法因其独特的无标签检测能力、超灵敏度以及微型化和便携性的潜力而受到广泛关注。最初设计用于核酸测序的纳米孔技术，现正被重新应用于肽和蛋白质分析，为生物标志物发现和疾病诊断提供了有前景的应用方向。本文综述了生物纳米孔、固态纳米孔及混合纳米孔在蛋白质传感领域的最新进展，重点探讨了其检测氨基酸序列、结构变异、翻译后修饰以及动态蛋白-蛋白或蛋白-药物相互作用的能力。文章对这些系统与传统蛋白质组学技术（如质谱和免疫分析）进行了批判性比较，讨论了其优势及持续存在的技术挑战，包括转位控制和信号解卷积问题。特别强调了生物和固态纳米孔在蛋白质测序中的最新进展，以及机器学习和信号处理算法的整合如何提升蛋白质识别的分辨率和准确性。纳米孔蛋白质传感技术代表了生物传感领域的颠覆性创新，有望革新临床诊断、治疗监测和个性化医疗。

title: Targeted next-generation sequencing for rapid tuberculosis detection: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS) is an adjunct tool endorsed by the World Health Organization (WHO) for tuberculosis diagnosis. The study aimed to investigate the diagnostic performance of tNGS across different clinical scenarios (populations, sample and tuberculosis types, and platforms), which has not been comprehensively evaluated.

METHODS: A systematic literature search was conducted in PubMed, MEDLINE, Web of Science, Wanfang Data, VIP, and CNKI to identify studies published in English and Chinese from January 1, 2005, to October 14, 2024, that evaluated tNGS for tuberculosis diagnosis using reference strains and original samples or isolates from patients with presumptive or confirmed tuberculosis. Included studies were assessed using the Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies-2 tool (QUADAS-2), and diagnostic accuracy was calculated against microbiological reference standard and composite reference standard. The primary outcomes were the pooled sensitivity and specificity. This study is registered with PROSPERO (CRD42024560190).

RESULTS: Out of 3,383 records screened, 16 studies comprising 2,565 participants were included in the meta-analysis. Overall, tNGS demonstrated a pooled sensitivity of 0.86 (95 % CI, 0.77-0.91) and specificity of 0.95 (0.86-0.99). The positive and negative likelihood ratios were 18.24 (5.61-59.26) and 0.15 (0.09-0.26). The diagnostic odds ratio and the area under the summary receiver operating characteristic curve was 120.88 (26.93-542.57) and 0.95 (0.93-0.97), respectively. The diagnostic performance of tNGS varied substantially depending on sample type and sequencing platform, where the highest sensitivity was observed with bronchoalveolar lavage fluid 0.91 (0.75-0.98) and the target nanopore sequencing platform 0.85 (0.80-0.89). Furthermore, tNGS demonstrated a significantly higher detection rate compared to GeneXpert MTB/RIF (odds ratio: 1.78 (1.39-2.29); p = 0.01).

CONCLUSION: tNGS demonstrates high diagnostic accuracy for tuberculosis, with its performance influenced by sample type and sequencing platform. These findings support the optimization of tNGS application in specific clinical settings to enhance tuberculosis management.
authors: Boya Gou, Chuyao Zhang, Zhe Song, Zhen Huang, Shuihua Lu

ai.TLDR: 靶向下一代测序(tNGS)作为世界卫生组织推荐的结核病诊断辅助工具，其诊断性能在不同临床场景下的表现尚未全面评估。本研究通过系统综述发现，tNGS在结核病诊断中展现出高敏感度和特异度，但其性能受样本类型和测序平台显著影响。
ai.translation:
背景：靶向下一代测序(tNGS)是世界卫生组织推荐的结核病诊断辅助工具。本研究旨在评估tNGS在不同临床场景（人群、样本类型及结核病类型、测序平台）中的诊断性能，该领域尚未进行全面系统评价。

方法：通过PubMed、MEDLINE、Web of Science、万方数据、VIP和CNKI等数据库检索2005年1月至2024年10月14日发表的中英文文献，纳入评估tNGS用于结核病诊断的研究（使用参考菌株或疑似/确诊结核病患者的原始样本或分离株）。采用QUADAS-2工具评估研究质量，以微生物学参考标准和复合参考标准计算诊断准确性。主要结局指标为汇总敏感度和特异度。本研究注册于PROSPERO（CRD42024560190）。

结果：在3,383条记录中筛选出16项研究共纳入2,565例参与者。总体而言，tNGS的汇总敏感度为0.86（95% CI, 0.77-0.91），特异度为0.95（0.86-0.99）。阳性似然比为18.24（5.61-59.26），阴性似然比为0.15（0.09-0.26）。诊断比值比和总结受试者工作特征曲线下面积分别为120.88（26.93-542.57）和0.95（0.93-0.97）。tNGS的诊断性能显著受样本类型和测序平台影响，其中支气管肺泡灌洗液样本敏感度最高（0.91 [0.75-0.98]），靶向纳米孔测序平台敏感度为0.85（0.80-0.89）。此外，tNGS的检出率显著高于GeneXpert MTB/RIF（比值比：1.78 [1.39-2.29]；p=0.01）。

结论：tNGS在结核病诊断中展现出高准确性，其性能受样本类型和测序平台显著影响。这些发现支持在特定临床场景中优化tNGS应用，以提升结核病管理效果。

title: Nationwide multicentre study of Nanopore long-read sequencing for 16S rRNA-species identification
journal: European Journal of Clinical Microbiology & Infectious Diseases
abstract:
### Purpose

Recent improvements in Nanopore sequencing chemistry has made it a promising platform for long-read 16S rRNA sequencing. This study evaluated its clinical utility in a nationwide collaboration coordinated by Genomic Medicine Sweden.

### Methods

Thirteen mock samples comprised of various bacterial strains and an External Quality Assessment (EQA) panel from QCMD (Quality Control for Molecular Diagnostics) were analysed by 20 microbiological laboratories across Sweden, using the recent v14 chemistry. Most laboratories generated full-length 16S rRNA sequencing libraries using an optimized protocol for the 16S Barcoding Kit 24, while two laboratories employed in-house PCR coupled with the Ligation Sequencing Kit. The commercial 16S bioinformatic pipeline from 1928 Diagnostics (1928-16S) was evaluated and compared with the open-sourced gms_16S pipeline that is based on the EMU classification tool (GMS-16S).

### Results

Seventeen out of 20 laboratories successfully sequenced and analysed the samples. Laboratories that used sodium acetate-containing elution buffers faced compatibility issues during library construction, resulting in reduced read count. High bacterial load samples were generally well-characterized, whereas hard-to-lyse bacteria such as Gram-positive strains were detected at lower abundance*.* The GMS-16S tool provided improved species-level identification compared to the 1928-16S pipeline, particularly for closely related taxa within the *Streptococcus* and *Staphylococcus* genera.

### Conclusion

Nanopore sequencing demonstrated promising potential for bacterial identification in a clinical setting. The results prompt further optimization of the protocol to improve detection of a broader range of species. This multicentre study highlights the feasibility of implementing Nanopore sequencing into clinical microbiological laboratories, for improved national precision diagnostics.
authors: Sofia Brunet, Anna Grankvist, ... Erika Tång Hallbäck
citation: Brunet, S., Grankvist, A., Jaen-Luchoro, D. et al. Nationwide multicentre study of Nanopore long-read sequencing for 16S rRNA-species identification. Eur J Clin Microbiol Infect Dis 44 , 1907–1916 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10096-025-05158-w
