ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序技术在临床微生物学中的应用潜力，发现其在细菌鉴定方面表现优异，但需优化协议以提高检测范围。研究通过多中心合作验证了纳米孔测序在国家精准诊断中的可行性。
ai.translation:
### 目的

近期纳米孔测序化学技术的改进使其成为长读长16S rRNA测序的有前景平台。本研究通过Genomic Medicine Sweden协调的全国性合作，评估其临床应用价值。

### 方法

13个包含多种细菌菌株及QCMD（分子诊断质量控制）外部质量评估（EQA）面板的模拟样本，由瑞典20家微生物实验室使用最新v14化学技术分析。多数实验室采用优化的16S条形码试剂盒24协议构建全长16S rRNA测序文库，而两家实验室采用自研PCR结合连接测序试剂盒。评估了商业16S生物信息分析流程（1928-16S）与开源gms_16S流程（基于EMU分类工具）的性能对比。

### 结果

20家实验室中有17家成功完成样本测序与分析。使用含醋酸钠洗脱缓冲液的实验室在文库构建过程中出现兼容性问题，导致读数减少。高细菌载量样本普遍检测良好，而难以裂解的细菌（如革兰氏阳性菌）检测丰度较低。相比1928-16S流程，GMS-16S工具在链球菌属和葡萄球菌属近缘分类群的物种水平鉴定上表现更优。

### 结论

纳米孔测序在临床环境中展现出细菌鉴定的潜力，结果提示需进一步优化协议以提升更广泛物种的检测能力。这项多中心研究凸显了将纳米孔测序纳入临床微生物实验室的可行性，有助于提升国家精准诊断水平。

title: Reply to: Is Gauchian genotyping of GBA1 variants reliable?
authors: Marco Toffoli, Anthony H V Schapira, Fritz J Sedlazeck, Christos Proukakis

ai.TLDR: 该研究提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，用于从非靶向质谱数据中识别和量化生物标志物。该方法在多个数据集上表现出优异的性能，为临床诊断和生物标志物发现提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 近年来，非靶向质谱（untargeted mass spectrometry, UMS）在生物标志物发现和临床诊断中展现出巨大的潜力。然而，从UMS数据中准确识别和量化生物标志物仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，该方法能够自动从UMS数据中提取特征并进行分类，从而实现生物标志物的识别和量化。我们使用了多个公开的UMS数据集进行验证，结果表明，我们的方法在准确率和召回率方面均优于现有的方法。此外，我们还对方法的鲁棒性和可扩展性进行了评估，结果表明，该方法在不同数据集和不同实验条件下均表现出良好的性能。我们的研究为UMS数据的分析提供了一种新的工具，并为生物标志物的发现和临床诊断提供了新的思路。

title: Transmission of fosD-carrying methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus ST764 in East Asia: Evidence of human and livestock transmission.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: To investigate the prevalence and to characterise fosD in the clinical isolates of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus in China.

METHODS: We screened 471 MRSA isolates for fosD using genomic sequencing and ResFinder, evaluated antimicrobial susceptibility, and performed nanopore sequencing, plasmid transfer via electroporation, molecular cloning of fosD, and phylogenetic analyses.

RESULTS: Among 471 MRSA isolates, ten fosD-positive strains, which belonged to ST764, were identified in two teaching hospitals in Guangzhou. The MIC of fosfomycin in the identified fosD-positive strains was 16,384 mg/L. The fosD gene was located on the 36,202 bp plasmid pFOS-R1, which is homologous to pTZ2162 reported in Japan. Furthermore, comparative genomic analysis suggested that fosD has been disseminated across multiple Staphylococcus species while molecular cloning confirmed that fosD can mediate high-level fosfomycin resistance in RN4220. Phylogenetic analysis revealed fosD-positive ST764 strains from China, Japan and Thailand, which may imply the spread of ST764 MRSA in East Asia. Our fosD-positive ST764 strains were closely related to the previously reported fosD-positive ST764 strain collected from chickens in Guangzhou, implying the transmission of fosD-positive ST764 MRSA between humans and livestock.

CONCLUSIONS: fosD-carrying ST764 MRSA isolates are spreading across borders in East Asia, with clinical isolates from China, Japan, and Thailand, posing an increasing threat to public health. Fosfomycin should be prudently used under supervision in livestock. Furthermore, the cross-border spread of MRSA should be carefully monitored.
authors: Lu Sun, Haiping Wang, Yeqiong Liu, Yueqin Hong, Feiteng Zhu, Hemu Zhuang, Zhengan Wang, Yunsong Yu, Yiyi Chen, Yan Chen

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现中国广州两家教学医院的MRSA分离株中存在fosD阳性菌株，其对fosfomycin表现出极高的耐药性。通过基因组分析发现fosD基因位于特定质粒上，且该基因在Staphylococcus物种间广泛传播，提示人畜间可能存在跨物种传播风险。
ai.translation:
研究目的：探讨中国MRSA临床分离株中fosD基因的流行情况及其特征。

方法：通过基因组测序和ResFinder筛选471株MRSA分离株，评估抗菌药物敏感性，并采用纳米孔测序、电穿孔质粒转移、fosD分子克隆及系统发育分析等方法进行研究。

结果：在471株MRSA中鉴定出10株fosD阳性菌株，均属于ST764克隆型，来源于广州两家教学医院。鉴定的fosD阳性菌株对fosfomycin的最小抑菌浓度（MIC）达到16,384 mg/L。fosD基因位于36,203 bp的质粒pFOS-R1上，该质粒与日本报道的pTZ2162质粒同源。比较基因组分析显示fosD在多个Staphylococcus物种中广泛传播，分子克隆实验证实fosD可介导RN4220菌株对fosfomycin的高水平耐药性。系统发育分析显示中国、日本和泰国均存在fosD阳性ST764菌株，提示ST764 MRSA在东亚地区存在传播可能。研究发现中国广州的fosD阳性ST764菌株与之前报道的来自广州家禽的fosD阳性ST764菌株高度相关，表明fosD阳性ST764 MRSA可能在人与家畜间传播。

结论：携带fosD的ST764 MRSA在东亚地区呈现跨境传播趋势，中国、日本和泰国的临床分离株对公共卫生构成日益严重的威胁。fosfomycin在畜牧业中应谨慎使用并接受监管。同时需密切监测MRSA的跨境传播。

title: Plasmodium falciparum isolates: ex vivo drug response.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: While artemisinin-based combination therapies (ACTs) are effective in sub-Saharan Africa, clinical isolates that are refractory to artemisinin derivatives are emerging in East Africa and ACT partner drugs are becoming less effective in West Africa. We investigated the ex vivo responses of Plasmodium falciparum clinical isolates to frontline antimalarials and the contribution of validated molecular markers of antimalarial drug resistance.

METHODS: Ex vivo susceptibility was measured for 66 clinical isolates collected from uncomplicated malaria patients. IC50 was measured for dihydroartemisinin, artesunate, lumefantrine, amodiaquine and chloroquine using a SYBR Green I growth inhibition assay. We also assessed known drug resistance-mediating polymorphisms in pfcrt, pfmdr1 and pfkelch13 using Oxford Nanopore amplicon sequencing.

RESULTS: P. falciparum clinical isolates were susceptible to dihydroartemisinin and artesunate. Clinical isolates showed a wide distribution of susceptibility to lumefantrine and amodiaquine, with some parasites having IC50 values above reference cut-offs for resistance to lumefantrine (150 nM) and amodiaquine (60 nM), suggesting decreased drug susceptibility. Ninety-seven percent of the isolates carried WT pfcrt K76 and pfmdr1 N86 alleles, reported to mediate reduced response to lumefantrine and artemether/lumefantrine. pfmdr1 N86 and 184F haplotype was carried by 62.1% of parasites. None of the clinical isolates carried validated pfkelch13 mutations known to mediate artemisinin partial resistance.

CONCLUSIONS: Clinical isolates from coastal Ghana remain susceptible to artemisinin derivatives in commonly used ACTs in Ghana. However, we observed lower susceptibility to the ACT partner drugs lumefantrine and amodiaquine, suggesting the emergence of drug-tolerance phenotypes. Consistent surveillance of drug phenotype-genotype is needed to support ACT efficacy in Ghana.
authors: Edem Adika, Samirah Saiid, Enock K Amoako, Mona-Liza E Sakyi, Ahmed Osumanu, Collins Morang'a, Daniel Dosoo, Jersley D Chirawurah, Gordon A Awandare, Alfred Amambua-Ngwa, Yaw Aniweh, Lucas N Amenga-Etego

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了刚果地区疟疾临床分离株对一线抗疟药物的体外敏感性，并分析了已验证的抗疟药物耐药分子标志物的贡献。研究发现，疟疾分离株对青蒿素衍生物仍敏感，但对联合用药中的辅助药物如左旋咪唑和奎宁的敏感性下降，提示耐药表型的出现。
ai.translation:
研究目的：尽管基于青蒿素的联合疗法（ACTs）在撒哈拉以南非洲地区有效，但东非地区出现了对青蒿素衍生物耐药的临床分离株，而西非地区ACT辅助药物的疗效正在下降。我们调查了恶性疟原虫临床分离株对一线抗疟药物的体外反应，以及已验证的抗疟药物耐药分子标志物的贡献。

研究方法：对66株来自非复杂性疟疾患者的临床分离株进行了体外敏感性测试。使用SYBR Green I生长抑制法测量了二氢青蒿素、青蒿素、左旋咪唑、奎宁和氯喹的IC50值。同时，利用牛津纳米孔测序技术评估了pfcrt、pfmdr1和pfkelch13基因中已知的耐药相关多态性。

研究结果：恶性疟原虫临床分离株对二氢青蒿素和青蒿素仍敏感。临床分离株对左旋咪唑和奎宁的敏感性分布广泛，部分寄生虫的IC50值高于左旋咪唑（150 nM）和奎宁（60 nM）的参考截断值，提示药物敏感性下降。97%的分离株携带WT pfcrt K76和pfmdr1 N86等位基因，这些等位基因被认为介导了对左旋咪唑和青蒿素/左旋咪唑的反应减弱。62.1%的寄生虫携带pfmdr1 N86和184F单倍型。没有临床分离株携带已验证的pfkelch13突变，这些突变已知介导青蒿素部分耐药。

研究结论：来自加纳沿海地区的临床分离株对常用ACT中的青蒿素衍生物仍敏感。然而，我们观察到对ACT辅助药物左旋咪唑和奎宁的敏感性降低，提示耐药表型的出现。需要持续监测药物表型与基因型，以支持加纳ACT的有效性。

title: Empowering protein single-molecule sequencing: nanopore technology toward sensing gene sequences.
journal: Analytical methods : advancing methods and applications
abstract: The investigation of proteins at the single-molecule level is urgent to reveal the relationship between their structure and function. Unlike traditional techniques for attaining the overall average effect of group systems, nanopore sensing mode can provide information on the characteristics of proteins at the single-molecule level. Assisting with the intensity, frequency, and period of current changes, nanopore sequencing technology is rapidly advancing due to its merits, including fast readout, high accuracy, low cost, and portability. In particular, the single-molecule nanopore sequencing mode enables in-depth studies of DNA-protein interactions, protein conformation, DNA sequencing, and microbial assay, including genome sequencing of new species. This review summarizes the sensing mechanisms of nanopore sequencing technology in DNA damage, DNA methylation, RNA sequencing, and protein post-translational modifications and unfolding, covering both biological and solid-state nanopores. Due to these significant advantages, nanopore sequencing provides new insights into complex biological processes and enables more precise real-time monitoring of molecular changes. Its applications extend to clinical diagnostics, environmental monitoring, food safety, and forensic analysis. Moreover, the review outlines the present challenges faced by nanopore sequencing patterns, such as the choice of raw reagents and the design of special construction, offering a deep understanding of nanoporous single-molecule sensing toward protein sequence information and structure prediction.
authors: Shujie Gao, Xiaowei Huang, Xinai Zhang, Zhecong Yuan, Haili Chen, Zhihua Li, Hany S El-Mesery, Jiyong Shi, Xiaobo Zou

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术通过单分子水平的电流变化分析，为揭示蛋白质结构与功能关系提供了新方法。该技术具备快速读取、高精度、低成本等优势，已应用于DNA损伤检测、RNA测序及蛋白质翻译后修饰研究，为临床诊断和环境监测等场景提供实时分子动态监测能力。
ai.translation: 在单分子水平研究蛋白质结构与功能关系具有迫切需求。与传统群体系统平均效应分析技术不同，纳米孔传感模式能够提供蛋白质单分子特征信息。通过监测电流强度、频率和周期变化，纳米孔测序技术因具备快速读取、高精度、低成本和便携性等优势而快速发展。特别是单分子纳米孔测序模式，使DNA-蛋白质相互作用、蛋白质构象、DNA测序和微生物检测等研究得以深入，包括新物种基因组测序。本综述总结了纳米孔测序技术在DNA损伤、DNA甲基化、RNA测序及蛋白质翻译后修饰和展开等领域的传感机制，涵盖生物纳米孔和固态纳米孔两类。由于这些显著优势，纳米孔测序为复杂生物过程研究提供了新视角，实现了分子变化的实时精准监测。其应用已拓展至临床诊断、环境监测、食品安全和法医分析领域。此外，综述还阐述了纳米孔测序技术面临的挑战，如原始试剂选择和特殊结构设计，为理解纳米孔单分子传感机制及蛋白质序列信息和结构预测提供了深入见解。

title: Toward clinical long-read genome sequencing for rare diseases
abstract: Genetic diagnostics is driven by technological advances, forming a tight interface between research, clinic and industry, which enables rapid implementation of new technologies. Short-read genome and exome sequencing, the current state of the art in clinical genetics, can detect a broad spectrum of genetic variants across the genome. However, despite these advancements, more than half of individuals with rare diseases remain undiagnosed after genomic investigations. Long-read whole-genome sequencing (LR-WGS) is a promising technology that identifies previously difficult-to-detect variants while also enabling phasing and methylation analysis and has the potential of generating complete personal assemblies. To pave the way for clinical use of LR-WGS, the clinical genomic community must establish standardized protocols and quality parameters while also developing innovative tools for data analysis and interpretation. In this Perspective, we explore the key challenges and benefits in integrating LR-WGS into routine clinical diagnostics.
authors: Jesper Eisfeldt, Marlene Ek, ... Anna Lindstrand
citation: Eisfeldt, J., Ek, M., Nordenskjöld, M. et al. Toward clinical long-read genome sequencing for rare diseases. Nat Genet 57 , 1334–1343 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41588-025-02160-y
description: Genetic diagnostics is driven by technological advances, forming a tight interface between research, clinic and industry, which enables rapid...

ai.TLDR: 基因诊断技术因技术进步而快速发展，短读长测序已成为临床遗传学的主流手段，但仍有超过半数罕见病患者未被诊断。长读长全基因组测序（LR-WGS）通过识别难检测变异并实现相位分析和甲基化分析，展现出临床应用潜力，但需建立标准化流程和分析工具。
ai.translation: 基因诊断技术的发展受到技术进步的推动，形成了研究、临床和产业之间的紧密接口，从而能够快速实施新技术。短读长基因组和外显子组测序作为临床遗传学的当前技术巅峰，能够检测基因组中广泛存在的遗传变异。然而，尽管取得了这些进展，仍有超过半数的罕见病患者在基因组研究后仍未被诊断。长读长全基因组测序（LR-WGS）是一种有前景的技术，能够识别此前难以检测的变异，同时实现相位分析和甲基化分析，并具有生成完整个人基因组组装的潜力。为推动LR-WGS在临床中的应用，临床基因组学界必须建立标准化协议和质量参数，同时开发创新的数据分析和解释工具。在本文的观点中，我们探讨了将LR-WGS整合到常规临床诊断中的关键挑战和优势。

title: Genomic and phenotypic insights into ST164 blaNDM-1-positive Acinetobacter baumannii from intestinal colonization in China.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii (CRAB) poses a critical global threat, especially in ICUs. Yet, reports on ST164 CRAB harboring blaNDM-1 remain scarce. This study investigates two clinical CRAB isolates, L4773hy and L4796hy, derived from intestinal colonization in Hangzhou, China, focusing on their phenotypic and genomic characteristics as well as the broader transmission of ST164 A. baumannii.

METHODS: Bacterial identification was performed using matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF) mass spectrometry. Antimicrobial susceptibility was assessed via agar and broth microdilution. Whole-genome sequencing employed Illumina NovaSeq 6000 and Oxford Nanopore platforms. Resistance genes, insertion elements, transposons, and integrons were detected using ResFinder, PlasmidFinder, VFDB, ISFinder, pdifFinder, and IntegronFinder. Strains were typed by MLST, and a phylogenetic tree was constructed with kSNP3.0. Genetic environment diagrams were generated using Easyfig 2.2.5.

RESULTS: Two blaNDM-1-carrying A. baumannii isolates exhibiting extensive resistance to carbapenems, cephalosporins, and fluoroquinolones. Whole-genome sequencing and genetic environment analysis revealed the presence of a conserved structural sequence (ISAba14-ISAba14-aphA-ISAba125-blaNDM-1-bleMBL) on their chromosomes. Phylogenetic and clonal dissemination analysis showed that ST164 CRAB is primarily distributed in China and exhibits clonal spread. Pathogenicity studies indicated that blaNDM-1-positive ST164 strains have enhanced survival under immune pressure but do not display increased virulence in infection models.

CONCLUSION: This study provides the genomic and phenotypic characterization of intestinally colonized ST164 blaNDM-1 positive CRAB in Hangzhou, China. The elucidation of the genetic environment of blaNDM-1 further confirms the clonal dissemination of ST164 isolates, highlighting the importance of enhanced surveillance and infection control measures to mitigate the spread of these multidrug-resistant pathogens.
authors: Kun Wang, Weidong Zhu, Lu Gong, Xiaolu Yang, Haowei Ye, Zhenghao Lou, Jie Yang, Xiawei Jiang, Wei Li, Fangfang Tao, Hao Xu, Beiwen Zheng, Wenhong Liu

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了在中国杭州地区从肠道定植中分离出的两株携带blaNDM-1基因的CRAB菌株的表型和基因组特征，揭示了其遗传环境和传播模式。研究结果表明，ST164 CRAB主要分布在中国，并表现出克隆传播特性。
ai.translation:
背景：耐碳青霉烯类铜绿假单胞菌（CRAB）对全球构成重大威胁，尤其是在重症监护病房（ICU）中。然而，关于携带blaNDM-1基因的ST164 CRAB的报道仍然较少。本研究调查了从中国杭州肠道定植中分离出的两株临床CRAB菌株L4773hy和L4796hy，重点分析其表型和基因组特征，以及ST164 A. baumannii的广泛传播情况。

方法：使用基质辅助激光解吸/电离飞行时间质谱（MALDI-TOF）质谱法进行细菌鉴定。通过琼脂和肉汤微量稀释法评估抗菌药物敏感性。全基因组测序采用Illumina NovaSeq 6000和Oxford Nanopore平台。使用ResFinder、PlasmidFinder、VFDB、ISFinder、pdifFinder和IntegronFinder检测耐药基因、插入元件、转座子和整合子。通过MLST对菌株进行分型，并使用kSNP3.0构建系统发育树。使用Easyfig 2.2.5生成遗传环境图。

结果：分离出两株携带blaNDM-1基因的A. baumannii菌株，表现出对碳青霉烯类、头孢菌素类和氟喹诺酮类药物的广泛耐药性。全基因组测序和遗传环境分析显示，其染色体上存在一个保守的结构序列（ISAba14-ISAba14-aphA-ISAba125-blaNDM-1-bleMBL）。系统发育和克隆传播分析表明，ST164 CRAB主要分布在中国，并表现出克隆传播特性。致病性研究显示，携带blaNDM-1的ST164菌株在免疫压力下具有更强的存活能力，但在感染模型中并未表现出增强的致病性。

结论：本研究提供了中国杭州地区肠道定植的ST164 blaNDM-1阳性CRAB的基因组和表型特征。对blaNDM-1遗传环境的阐明进一步确认了ST164菌株的克隆传播，强调了加强监测和感染控制措施的重要性，以遏制这些多重耐药病原体的传播。

title: Impact of microbiological molecular methodologies on adaptive sampling using nanopore sequencing in metagenomic studies
abstract:
### Introduction

Metagenomics, the genomic analysis of all species present within a mixed population, is an important tool used for the exploration of microbiomes in clinical and environmental microbiology. Whilst the development of next-generation sequencing, and more recently third generation long-read approaches such as nanopore sequencing, have greatly advanced the study of metagenomics, recovery of unbiased material from microbial populations remains challenging. One promising advancement in genomic sequencing from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) is adaptive sampling, which enables real-time enrichment or depletion of target sequences. As sequencing technologies continue to develop, and advances such as adaptive sampling become common techniques within the microbiological toolkit, it is essential to evaluate the benefits of such advancements to metagenomic studies, and the impact of methodological choices on research outcomes.

### Aim and methods

Given the rapid development of sequencing tools and chemistry, this study aimed to demonstrate the impacts of choice of DNA extraction kit and sequencing chemistry on downstream metagenomic analyses. We first explored the quality and accuracy of 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing for DNA extracted from the ZymoBIOMICS Microbial Community Standard, using a range of commercially available DNA extraction kits to understand the effects of different kit biases on assessment of microbiome composition. We next compared the quality and accuracy of metagenomic analyses for two nanopore-based ligation chemistry kits with differing levels of base-calling error; the older and more error-prone (~ 97% accuracy) LSK109 chemistry, and newer more accurate (~ 99% accuracy) LSK112 Q20 + chemistry. Finally, we assessed the impact of the nanopore sequencing chemistry version on the output of the novel adaptive sampling approach for real-time enrichment of the genome for the yeast *Saccharomyces cerevisiae* from the microbial community.

### Results

Firstly, DNA extraction kit methodology impacted the composition of the yield, with mechanical bead-beating methodologies providing the least biased picture due to efficient lysis of Gram-positive microbes present in the community standard, with differences in bead-beating methodologies also producing variation in composition. Secondly, whilst use of the Q20 + nanopore sequencing kit chemistry improved the base-calling data quality, the resulting metagenomic assemblies were not significantly improved based on common metrics and assembly statistics. Most importantly, we demonstrated the effective application of adaptive sampling for enriching a low-abundance genome within a metagenomic sample. This resulted in a 5-7-fold increase in target enrichment compared to non-adaptive sequencing, despite a reduction in overall sequencing throughput due to strand-rejection processes. Interestingly, no significant differences in adaptive sampling enrichment efficiency were observed between the older and newer ONT sequencing chemistries, suggesting that adaptive sampling performs consistently across different library preparation kits.

### Conclusion

Our findings underscore the importance of selecting a DNA extraction methodology that minimises bias to ensure an accurate representation of microbial diversity in metagenomic studies. Additionally, despite the improved base-calling accuracy provided by newer Q20 + sequencing chemistry, we demonstrate that even older ONT sequencing chemistries can achieve reliable metagenomic sequencing results, enabling researchers to confidently use these approaches depending on their specific experimental needs. Critically, we highlight the significant potential of ONT’s adaptive sampling technology for targeted enrichment of specific genomes within metagenomic samples. This approach offers broad applicability for enriching target organisms or genetic elements (e.g., pathogens or plasmids) or depleting unwanted DNA (e.g., host DNA) in diverse sample types from environmental and clinical studies. However, researchers should carefully weigh the benefits of adaptive sampling against the potential trade-offs in sequencing throughput, particularly for low-abundance targets, where strand rejection can lead to pore blocking. These results provide valuable guidance for optimising adaptive sampling in metagenomic workflows to achieve specific research objectives.
authors: Josephine Herbert, Stanley Thompson, ... Samuel C. Robson
citation: Herbert, J., Thompson, S., Beckett, A.H. et al. Impact of microbiological molecular methodologies on adaptive sampling using nanopore sequencing in metagenomic studies. Environmental Microbiome 20 , 47 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s40793-025-00704-7
description: Metagenomics, the genomic analysis of all species present within a mixed population, is an important tool used for the exploration of...

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了DNA提取试剂盒和纳米孔测序化学方法对宏基因组分析的影响，发现自适应采样技术能显著提升低丰度基因组的富集效率。尽管新型Q20+化学方法提升了碱基调用准确性，但旧版化学方法仍可获得可靠结果。自适应采样技术在不同测序化学方法间表现一致，为宏基因组样本的靶向富集提供了新思路。
ai.translation:
引言
宏基因组学，即对混合群体中所有物种的基因组分析，是临床和环境微生物学中探索微生物组的重要工具。尽管下一代测序技术的发展，特别是近期的第三代长读长测序技术如纳米孔测序，极大推动了宏基因组学研究，但从微生物群体中获取无偏材料仍具挑战性。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）在基因组测序领域的一项重要进展是自适应采样技术，该技术可实现目标序列的实时富集或耗尽。随着测序技术的持续发展，自适应采样等技术逐渐成为微生物学工具箱中的常规方法，评估这些技术进步对宏基因组学研究的影响，以及方法选择对研究结果的影响至关重要。

目标和方法
鉴于测序工具和化学方法的快速发展，本研究旨在展示DNA提取试剂盒选择和测序化学方法对后续宏基因组分析的影响。首先，我们使用多种市售DNA提取试剂盒，分析从ZymoBIOMICS微生物群标准中提取的DNA的16S rRNA扩增子测序质量与准确性，以理解不同试剂盒偏差对微生物组组成评估的影响。随后，我们比较了两种基于纳米孔的连接化学试剂盒的质量与准确性，这两种试剂盒具有不同的碱基调用错误率：较旧且误差较高的LSK109化学方法（约97%准确性）和新型更准确的LSK112 Q20+化学方法（约99%准确性）。最后，我们评估了纳米孔测序化学方法版本对新型自适应采样技术在实时富集酵母Saccharomyces cerevisiae基因组中的输出影响。

结果
首先，DNA提取试剂盒方法影响了产量的组成，机械珠磨法由于对社区标准中革兰氏阳性微生物的高效裂解，提供了最少偏差的图景，不同珠磨法也导致组成差异。其次，尽管Q20+纳米孔测序试剂盒化学方法提升了碱基调用数据质量，但基于常见指标和组装统计的宏基因组组装结果并未显著改善。最重要的是，我们展示了自适应采样技术在宏基因组样本中富集低丰度基因组的有效应用。这导致目标富集量比非自适应测序提高了5-7倍，尽管由于链排斥过程导致整体测序通量下降。有趣的是，旧版和新版ONT测序化学方法在自适应采样富集效率上未观察到显著差异，表明自适应采样在不同文库制备试剂盒间表现一致。

结论
我们的研究强调选择能最小化偏差的DNA提取方法的重要性，以确保宏基因组学研究中微生物多样性的准确表征。此外，尽管新型Q20+测序化学方法提供了改进的碱基调用准确性，我们证明即使旧版ONT测序化学方法也能获得可靠的宏基因组测序结果，使研究人员可根据具体实验需求自信使用这些方法。关键的是，我们突出了ONT自适应采样技术在宏基因组样本中靶向富集特定基因组的显著潜力。这种方法在环境和临床研究中多样样本类型中富集目标生物或遗传元件（如病原体或质粒）或耗尽不需要的DNA（如宿主DNA）具有广泛适用性。然而，研究人员应仔细权衡自适应采样的优势与测序通量的潜在权衡，特别是对于低丰度目标，链排斥可能导致孔堵塞。这些结果为优化宏基因组工作流程中的自适应采样提供了有价值的指导，以实现特定研究目标。

title: Restoring flowcell type and basecaller configuration from FASTQ files of nanopore sequencing data
abstract: As nanopore sequencing has been widely adopted, data accumulation has surged, resulting in over 700,000 public datasets. While these data hold immense potential for advancing genomic research, their utility is compromised by the absence of flowcell type and basecaller configuration in about 85% of the data and associated publications. These parameters are essential for many analysis algorithms, and their misapplication can lead to significant drops in performance. To address this issue, we present LongBow, designed to infer flowcell type and basecaller configuration directly from the base quality value patterns of FASTQ files. LongBow has been tested on 66 in-house basecalled FAST5/POD5 datasets and 1989 public FASTQ datasets, achieving accuracies of 95.33% and 91.45%, respectively. We demonstrate its utility by reanalyzing nanopore sequencing data from the COVID-19 Genomics UK (COG-UK) project. The results show that LongBow is essential for reproducing reported genomic variants and, through a LongBow-based analysis pipeline, we discovered substantially more functionally important variants while improving accuracy in lineage assignment. Overall, LongBow is poised to play a critical role in maximizing the utility of public nanopore sequencing data, while significantly enhancing the reproducibility of related research.
authors: Jun Mencius, Wenjun Chen, ... Zhixing Feng
citation: Mencius, J., Chen, W., Zheng, Y. et al. Restoring flowcell type and basecaller configuration from FASTQ files of nanopore sequencing data. Nat Commun 16 , 4102 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-59378-x

ai.TLDR: 随着纳米孔测序技术的普及，数据积累量激增，但约85%的数据缺乏流细胞类型和碱基调用器配置参数，影响分析准确性。LongBow工具通过解析FASTQ文件的碱基质量值模式，可实现95.33%和91.45%的参数推断准确率，显著提升数据可重复性与功能变异检测能力。
ai.translation: 随着纳米孔测序技术的广泛应用，数据积累量激增，已形成超过70万个公共数据集。尽管这些数据对基因组学研究具有巨大潜力，但约85%的数据和相关文献缺乏流细胞类型（flowcell type）和碱基调用器配置（basecaller configuration）参数，而这些参数是许多分析算法的关键输入。参数缺失会导致分析性能显著下降。为解决这一问题，我们开发了LongBow工具，该工具可直接从FASTQ文件的碱基质量值模式中推断流细胞类型和碱基调用器配置。LongBow已在66个内部处理的FAST5/POD5数据集和1989个公共FASTQ数据集中进行测试，分别达到95.33%和91.45%的准确率。通过重新分析英国新冠基因组学项目（COG-UK）的纳米孔测序数据，我们验证了LongBow的重要性：该工具不仅能够复现报告的基因组变异，还能通过基于LongBow的分析流程发现更多功能重要的变异，同时提升谱系分类的准确性。总体而言，LongBow有望在最大化公共纳米孔测序数据价值的同时，显著增强相关研究的可重复性。

title: Identification of GGC Repeat Expansions in ZFHX3 among Chilean Movement Disorder Patients.
journal: Movement disorders : official journal of the Movement Disorder Society
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Hereditary ataxias are genetically diverse, yet up to 75% remain undiagnosed due to technological and financial barriers. The GGC repeat expansion in ZFHX3, responsible for spinocerebellar ataxia type 4 (SCA4), has only been described in individuals of Northern Europeandescent.

OBJECTIVE: Uncover the genetic etiology of suspected hereditary movement disorders.

METHODS: We performed Oxford Nanopore long-read genome sequencing on 15 individuals with suspected hereditary movement disorders. Using variant calling and ancestry inference tools.

RESULTS: We identified ZFHX3 GGC expansions (47-55 repeats) in 4 patients with progressive ataxia, polyneuropathy, and vermis atrophy. One presented with rapidly progressive parkinsonism-ataxia, expanding the known phenotype. Longer expansions correlated with earlier onset and severity. All carriers shared single nucleotide variants (SNVs) associated with the Swedish founder haplotype, and methylation analysis confirmed allele-specific hypermethylation.

CONCLUSION: These represent the first SCA4 cases identified outside Northern Europe. Our findings highlight the value of long-read sequencing in resolving undiagnosed movement disorders. Published 2025. This article is a U.S. Government work and is in the public domain in the USA. Movement Disorders published by Wiley Periodicals LLC on behalf of International Parkinson and Movement Disorder Society.
authors: Paula Saffie-Awad, Abraham Moller, Kensuke Daida, Pilar Alvarez Jerez, Zhongbo Chen, Zachary B Anderson, Mariam Isayan, Kimberly Paquette, Sophia B Gibson, Madison Fulcher, Abigail Miano-Burkhardt, Laksh Malik, Breeana Baker, Paige Jarreau, Henry Houlden, Mina Ryten, Bida Gu, Mark J P Chaisson, Danny E Miller, Pedro Chaná-Cuevas, Cornelis Blauwendraat, Andrew B Singleton, Kimberley J Billingsley

ai.TLDR: 遗传性共济失调因基因多样性导致75%病例未被诊断，技术与财务障碍是主要限制。本研究通过长读长基因组测序发现北欧以外的SCA4病例，揭示GGC重复扩展与临床表型的关联。长读长测序技术可有效解析未确诊的运动障碍疾病。
ai.translation:
背景：遗传性共济失调具有高度的基因异质性，但由于技术与财务障碍，高达75%的病例仍未被确诊。ZFHX3基因的GGC重复扩展导致脊髓小脑共济失调4型（SCA4），但此前仅在北欧后裔中被描述。

目标：揭示疑似遗传性运动障碍的遗传病因。

方法：我们对15名疑似遗传性运动障碍患者进行了牛津纳米孔长读长基因组测序，结合变异检测和谱系推断工具进行分析。

结果：在4名表现为进行性共济失调、多发性神经病和蚓部萎缩的患者中发现了ZFHX3的GGC重复扩展（47-55重复）。其中1例患者表现为快速进展的帕金森-共济失调综合征，扩展了已知的表型谱。重复长度越长，发病年龄越早且病情越严重。所有携带者均共享与瑞典创始者单倍型相关的单核苷酸变异（SNVs），甲基化分析证实了等位基因特异性高甲基化。

结论：这些是首次在北欧以外地区发现的SCA4病例。我们的研究凸显了长读长测序在解析未确诊运动障碍疾病中的价值。发表于2025年。本文为美国政府作品，在美国属于公共领域。由Wiley Periodicals LLC代表国际帕金森和运动障碍学会出版。

title: Custom barcoded primers for influenza A nanopore sequencing: enhanced performance with reduced preparation time.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract: Highly pathogenic avian influenza is endemic and widespread in wild birds and is causing major outbreaks in poultry worldwide and in U.S. dairy cows, with several recent human cases, highlighting the need for reliable and rapid sequencing to track mutations that may facilitate viral replication in different hosts. SNP analysis is a useful molecular epidemiology tool to track outbreaks, but it requires accurate whole-genome sequencing (WGS) with sufficient read depth across all eight segments. In outbreak situations, where timely data is critical for controlling the spread of the virus, reducing sequencing preparation time while maintaining high-quality standards is particularly important. In this study, we optimized a custom barcoded primer strategy for influenza A whole-genome sequencing on the nanopore sequencing platform, combining the high performance of the Native Barcoding Kit with the prompt preparation time of the Rapid Barcoding Kit. Custom barcoded primers were designed to perform barcode attachment during RT-PCR amplification, eliminating the need for separate barcoding and clean-up steps, thus reducing library preparation time. We compared the performance of the custom barcoded primer method with the Native and Rapid barcoding kits in terms of read quality, read depth, and sequencing output. The results show that the custom barcoded primers provided performance comparable to the Native Barcoding Kit while reducing library preparation time by 2.3X compared to the Native kit and being only 15 minutes longer than the Rapid kit with better depth of sequencing. Additionally, the custom barcoded primer method was evaluated on a variety of clinical sample types. This approach offers a promising solution for influenza A sequencing, providing both high throughput and time efficiency, which significantly improves the time-to-result turnaround, making sequencing more accessible for real-time surveillance.
authors: Iryna V Goraichuk, David L Suarez

ai.TLDR: 高致病性禽流感在野生鸟类中广泛流行，并在世界各地的家禽和美国奶牛中引发重大疫情，同时出现多起人类感染病例，凸显了快速测序以追踪病毒变异的必要性。本研究优化了一种定制条形码引物策略，用于纳米孔测序平台的流感A病毒全基因组测序，显著提高了测序效率。
ai.translation: 高致病性禽流感在野生鸟类中广泛流行，并在世界各地的家禽和美国奶牛中引发重大疫情，同时出现多起人类感染病例，凸显了快速测序以追踪病毒变异的必要性。SNP分析是一种有用的分子流行病学工具，用于追踪疫情，但需要准确的全基因组测序（WGS）并在所有八个片段上具有足够的读取深度。在疫情爆发情况下，及时的数据对于控制病毒传播至关重要，因此在保持高质量标准的同时减少测序准备时间尤为重要。在本研究中，我们优化了一种定制条形码引物策略，用于纳米孔测序平台的流感A病毒全基因组测序，结合了Native Barcoding Kit的高性能与Rapid Barcoding Kit的快速准备时间。定制条形码引物在RT-PCR扩增过程中进行条形码连接，消除了单独进行条形码和清洁步骤的需要，从而减少了文库制备时间。我们比较了定制条形码引物方法与Native和Rapid条形码试剂盒在读取质量、读取深度和测序输出方面的性能。结果表明，定制条形码引物的性能与Native Barcoding Kit相当，相比Native试剂盒，文库制备时间减少了2.3倍，仅比Rapid试剂盒多15分钟，且测序深度更好。此外，定制条形码引物方法在多种临床样本类型上进行了评估。这种方法为流感A病毒测序提供了一种有前景的解决方案，提供了高通量和时间效率，显著提高了结果获取时间，使测序在实时监测中更加可行。

title: Genomic hotspots in the DENV-2 serotype (E, NS4B, and NS5 genes) are associated with dengue disease severity in the endemic region of India.
abstract: Dengue virus (DENV) infection manifests a wide spectrum of clinical outcomes, ranging from mild fever to severe and potentially fatal disease, yet the factors driving this variability remain poorly understood. This study aims to unravel the relationship between clinical manifestations of dengue and the genetic diversity of the virus, providing insights into the genomic variability driving disease severity. To achieve this, serum samples were collected during a dengue outbreak in National Capital Region-Delhi, India, from June to November 2023. Serotyping of RNA isolated from 4,045 clinical serum samples revealed DENV-2 as the predominant serotype in circulation (n = 3702). Whole-genome sequencing for 3702 clinical samples was performed using Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) further yielding 3254 DENV-2 genomes with >50% coverage. However, all of them identified the cosmopolitan genotype of DENV-2, forming a distinct monophyletic cluster in the global phylogenetic tree. Comprehensive variant analysis uncovered 1,618,158 single nucleotide variations (SNVs) across the sequenced DENV-2 population. The clinico-genomic approach carried out in 1294 samples, mild (n = 473), moderate (n = 405) and clinically severe (n = 416), reveals a significant burden of SNVs in various genomic regions linked to differential disease outcomes. Statistical analyses, including Fisher's exact test and phi-correlation, identified hotspot regions in the Envelope (E), NS4B, and NS5 genes, where SNVs were strongly associated with mild and clinically severe phenotypes, providing insights into the genomic determinants of disease severity. Interestingly, the clustering of severity-associated SNVs in these genomic hotspot regions highlights their potential as therapeutic targets within the DENV genome. These findings offer a promising direction for developing early mitigation strategies and targeted interventions to manage the progression of severe DENV infections.
authors: Varsha Ravi, Kriti Khare, Ramakant Mohite, Pallavi Mishra, Sayanti Halder, Richa Shukla, Chinky Shiu Chen Liu, Aanchal Yadav, Jyoti Soni, Komal Chaudhary, Bansidhar Tarai, Sandeep Budhiraja, Pooja Khosla, Tavpritesh Sethi, Md Imran, Rajesh Pandey

ai.TLDR: 登革热病毒（DENV）感染表现出从轻度发热到严重甚至致命疾病的广泛临床结果，但驱动这种变异性的因素仍不清楚。本研究旨在揭示登革热临床表现与病毒遗传多样性之间的关系，分析基因组变异如何影响疾病严重程度。
ai.translation: 登革热病毒（DENV）感染表现出从轻度发热到严重甚至致命疾病的广泛临床结果，但驱动这种变异性的因素仍不清楚。本研究旨在揭示登革热临床表现与病毒遗传多样性之间的关系，分析基因组变异如何影响疾病严重程度。为实现这一目标，研究人员在2023年6月至11月期间，从印度首都地区德里的一次登革热爆发中收集了血清样本。从4045份临床血清样本中分离出的RNA进行血清型鉴定，结果显示DENV-2是当时主要流行的血清型（n = 3702）。使用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）对3702份临床样本进行了全基因组测序，进一步获得了3254个DENV-2基因组，覆盖度超过50%。然而，所有样本均鉴定出全球广泛分布的DENV-2基因型，形成全球系统发育树中的一个独特单系簇。全面的变异分析揭示了在测序的DENV-2群体中存在1,618,158个单核苷酸变异（SNVs）。在1294份样本中（轻度n = 473，中度n = 405，临床严重n = 416）进行的临床基因组学分析显示，不同基因组区域中与不同疾病结果相关的SNVs负担显著。包括Fisher精确检验和phi相关性分析在内的统计分析，识别出在包膜蛋白（E）、NS4B和NS5基因中的热点区域，其中SNVs与轻度和临床严重表型显著相关，为疾病严重程度的基因组决定因素提供了见解。有趣的是，这些与严重程度相关的SNVs在这些基因组热点区域的聚集，突显了它们在DENV基因组中作为治疗靶点的潜力。这些发现为开发早期缓解策略和针对性干预措施提供了有希望的方向，以管理严重DENV感染的进展。

title: Implementing Wastewater-Based Epidemiology for Long-Read Metagenomic Sequencing of Antimicrobial Resistance in Kampala, Uganda.
abstract: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is an emerging global threat that is expanding in many areas of the world. Wastewater-based epidemiology (WBE) is uniquely suited for use in areas of the world where clinical surveillance is limited or logistically slow to identify emerging threats, such as in Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA). Wastewater was analyzed from three urban areas of Kampala, including a local HIV research clinic and two informal settlements. Wastewater extraction was performed using a low-cost, magnetic bead-based protocol that minimizes consumable plastic consumption followed by sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore Technology MinION platform. The majority of the analysis was performed using cloud-based services to identify AMR biomarkers and bacterial pathogens. Assemblies containing AMR pathogens were isolated from all locations. As one example, clinically relevant AMR biomarkers for multiple drug classes were found within
authors: William Strike, Temitope O C Faleye, Brian Lubega, Alexus Rockward, Soroosh Torabi, Anni Noble, Mohammad Dehghan Banadaki, James Keck, Henry Mugerwa, Matthew Scotch, Scott Berry

ai.TLDR: 抗微生物耐药性（AMR）是全球性威胁，废水流行病学（WBE）在临床监测不足的地区具有独特优势。研究通过低成本磁珠提取技术结合云服务分析，成功识别出多个药物类别相关的临床AMR生物标志物。
ai.translation: 抗微生物耐药性（AMR）是正在全球多个地区迅速扩散的新兴全球性威胁。废水流行病学（WBE）在临床监测体系薄弱或物流条件难以快速识别新兴威胁的地区（如撒哈拉以南非洲）具有独特应用价值。本研究在乌干达坎帕拉的三个城市区域采集废水样本，包括本地HIV研究诊所和两个非正式定居点。采用低成本磁珠基质提取技术降低塑料消耗，随后在Oxford Nanopore Technology MinION平台进行测序。主要分析工作通过云服务完成，用于识别AMR生物标志物和细菌病原体。所有采样点均成功分离出包含AMR病原体的基因组组装体。例如，在多个药物类别中检测到具有临床意义的AMR生物标志物。

title: Advanced analysis of retrotransposon variation in the human genome with nanopore sequencing using RetroInspector
abstract: Transposable elements (TEs) make up 45% of the human genome, are a source of genetic variability difficult to detect, and involved in processes related to gene regulation and disease. Nanopore sequencing is recognized as one of the best technologies for detecting TEs; however, tools for analyzing of human TE insertions and deletions with nanopore-based data can be improved. RetroInspector is an easy to use, configurable Snakemake pipeline that performs detection, annotation, enrichment, and genotyping of TEs. RetroInspector requires the FASTQ files of the samples and the reference genome to start the identification and analysis of TEs. The user can also set the threshold for the number of supporting reads for the variant filtering. RetroInspector also allows users to compare the results of two samples. Different versions of the reference genome can be used and the presence of retrotransposition features can be annotated. RetroInspector has been run on three nanopore sequencing datasets and validated experimentally using proprietary and public data with over 80% precision.
authors: Javier Cuenca-Guardiola, Belén de la Morena-Barrio, ... Jesualdo Tomás Fernández-Breis
citation: Cuenca-Guardiola, J., de la Morena-Barrio, B., Corral, J. et al. Advanced analysis of retrotransposon variation in the human genome with nanopore sequencing using RetroInspector. Sci Rep 15 , 14489 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-98847-7

ai.TLDR: 转座元件（TEs）占人类基因组的45%，其检测具有挑战性，但纳米孔测序技术被认为是最佳方法之一。RetroInspector作为一款基于Snakemake的工具，可实现TE插入/缺失的检测、注释、富集和基因分型，已在三个纳米孔测序数据集上验证，准确率超80%。
ai.translation: 转座元件（TEs）构成了人类基因组的45%，是难以检测的遗传变异来源，并参与基因调控和疾病相关过程。纳米孔测序技术被认为是检测TEs的最佳技术之一；然而，基于纳米孔数据的人类TE插入/缺失分析工具仍有改进空间。RetroInspector是一款易于使用的可配置Snakemake流程工具，可执行TEs的检测、注释、富集和基因分型。该工具需要样本的FASTQ文件和参考基因组以启动TE识别与分析。用户可设置变异过滤的读取支持数阈值，还可比较两个样本的分析结果。支持不同版本的参考基因组使用，并可注释逆转录转座特征。RetroInspector已在三个纳米孔测序数据集上运行，并通过专有和公开数据实验验证，准确率超过80%。

title: Establishment of a Stable BK Polyomavirus-Secreting Cell Line: Characterization of Viral Genome Integration and Replication Dynamics Through Comprehensive Analysis.
abstract: Polyomaviruses have the potential to cause significant morbidity not only in transplant medicine, but also in other forms of disease or variants of immunosuppression. In kidney transplant recipients or recipients of human stem cell transplants, the BK-Virus is the major proponent of manifestations such as BKPyV-associated nephropathy or hemorrhagic cystitis. As no polyomavirus-specific drug with proven in vivo effects has been developed so far, methods to screen for such drugs are important. This work describes the establishment of a virus-secreting cell line. By infecting a pre-established monkey kidney cell line (COS-1) with a non-rearranged human BK polyomavirus isolated from a kidney transplant patient suffering from BKPyV-associated nephropathy, a continuously replicating cell type with consistent virus secretion could be established and was termed COSSA. Measurements of BKPyV replication, virion production, and secretion were performed both intracellularly and in the cell supernatant. Viral proteins such as VP1 and LTAg were accurately tracked by confocal microscopy, as well as by immunoblot and qPCR. An intracellular flow cytometry (FACS) assay detecting VP1 protein was established and revealed an expanded range of positive intracellular signals. The viruses produced proved to be infectious in human tubular epithelial cell lines. Long-range sequencing of the COSSA genome using Oxford Nanopore Technology revealed a total of five distinct BKPyV integration events. One integration of a partial BKPyV genome was located upstream of the epidermal growth factor receptor gene. The second and third, both truncated forms of integration, were close to histocompatibility gene locuses, while the fourth was characterized by a ninefold and the fifth by a fourfold tandem repeat of the BKPyV genome. From both of the repeat forms, virus replicates were derived showing deletions/duplications on early and late genes and inversions within the non-coding control region (NCCR). This pattern of repetitive viral genome integration is a potential key driver of enhanced viral replication and increased virion assembly, ultimately supporting efficient virus egress. Quantitative PCR analysis confirmed the release of approximately 10
authors: Tamara Löwenstern, David Vecsei, David Horner, Robert Strassl, Anil Bozdogan, Michael Eder, Franco Laccone, Markus Hengstschläger, Farsad Eskandary, Ludwig Wagner

ai.TLDR: 多瘤病毒（如BK病毒）在移植医学及其他免疫抑制状态下可能导致严重疾病。本研究通过建立病毒分泌细胞系COSSA，揭示了BKPyV基因组整合事件与病毒复制增强及病毒颗粒组装的关系，为抗病毒药物筛选提供了新模型。
ai.translation: 多瘤病毒不仅在移植医学中可能导致显著发病率，还与其他形式的疾病或免疫抑制变体相关。在肾移植受者或人类干细胞移植受者中，BK病毒是BKPyV相关肾病或出血性膀胱炎的主要致病因素。由于目前尚无经体内验证的多瘤病毒特异性药物，开发筛选此类药物的方法至关重要。本研究描述了建立病毒分泌细胞系的方法。通过将从肾移植患者BKPyV相关肾病中分离的非重排人BK多瘤病毒感染预先建立的猴肾细胞系（COS-1），成功建立了持续复制且稳定分泌病毒的细胞类型，并命名为COSSA。对BKPyV复制、病毒颗粒产生及分泌情况进行了细胞内及细胞上清液的检测。通过共聚焦显微镜、免疫印迹和qPCR准确追踪了VP1和LTAg等病毒蛋白。建立了检测VP1蛋白的细胞内流式细胞术（FACS）检测方法，揭示了更广泛的阳性细胞内信号范围。产生的病毒在人类管状上皮细胞系中证实具有感染性。使用牛津纳米孔技术对COSSA基因组进行长距离测序，共发现五种不同的BKPyV整合事件。其中一种部分BKPyV基因组整合位于表皮生长因子受体基因上游，第二和第三种均为截断型整合，靠近组织相容性基因位点，第四种特征为BKPyV基因组九倍串联重复，第五种为四倍串联重复。从这两种重复形式中分离出的病毒显示出早期和晚期基因的缺失/重复及非编码控制区（NCCR）内的倒位。这种重复病毒基因组整合模式可能是增强病毒复制和增加病毒颗粒组装的关键驱动因素，最终支持病毒有效释放。定量PCR分析证实了约10

title: Decoding bacterial methylomes in four public health-relevant microbial species: nanopore sequencing enables reproducible analysis of DNA modifications
abstract: Investigating bacterial methylation profiles provides essential complementary information to the native DNA sequence, significantly extending our understanding of how DNA modifications influence virulence, antibiotic resistance, and the ability of bacteria to evade the immune system. Recent advancements in real-time Nanopore sequencing and basecalling algorithms have enabled the direct detection of modified bases from raw signal data, eliminating the need for bisulfite treatment of DNA. However, decoding methylation signals remains challenging due to rapid technological and methodological progress. In this study, we focus on public health-relevant bacterial strains to analyze their methylation profiles and identify methylation motifs. Our dataset includes samples from *Staphylococcus aureus*, *Listeria monocytogenes*, *Enterococcus faecium*, and *Klebsiella pneumoniae*, sequenced on the Nanopore GridION platform using the latest flow cell chemistry (R10.4.1) and modification basecalling models (Dorado basecalling SUP model v5). We investigated distinct methylation patterns within and between species, focusing on heavily modified genes or genomic regions. Our results reveal distinct species-specific methylation profiles, with each strain exhibiting unique modification patterns. We developed a modular pipeline using Nextflow and the Nanopore Modkit tool to streamline the detection of methylated motifs. We compared the results with outputs from MicrobeMod, a recent toolkit for exploring prokaryotic methylation and base modifications in nanopore sequencing. Our pipeline is publicly available for further use (github.com/rki-mf1/ont-methylation). We identified known methylation motifs already described in the literature and novel *de novo* motifs, providing deeper insights into the diversity of bacterial DNA modifications. Furthermore, we identified genomic regions that are extensively methylated, which could have implications for bacterial behavior and pathogenicity. We also assess improvements in basecalling accuracy, specifically how methylated bases can influence neighboring basecalls. Recent advances in basecalling models, particularly v5 models as part of Dorado, have reduced these issues, improving the reliability of methylation detection in bacterial genomes. In conclusion, our study highlights the potential of current nanopore sequencing tools for detecting DNA modifications in prokaryotes. By making our pipeline and results publicly available, we facilitate further research into bacterial DNA modifications and their role in microbial pathogenesis.
authors: Valentina Galeone, Johanna Dabernig-Heinz, ... Martin Hölzer
citation: Galeone, V., Dabernig-Heinz, J., Lohde, M. et al. Decoding bacterial methylomes in four public health-relevant microbial species: nanopore sequencing enables reproducible analysis of DNA modifications. BMC Genomics 26 , 394 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-025-11592-z
description: Investigating bacterial methylation profiles provides essential complementary information to the native DNA sequence, significantly extending our...

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术解析细菌甲基化谱型，揭示了不同物种间独特的甲基化特征及其对致病性的影响。通过开发模块化分析流程，发现已知和新型甲基化基序，并验证了最新碱基调用模型在提高甲基化检测可靠性方面的优势。
ai.translation: 研究细菌甲基化谱型可为原生DNA序列提供关键补充信息，显著拓展我们对DNA修饰如何影响细菌毒力、抗生素耐药性和免疫逃逸能力的理解。随着实时纳米孔测序和碱基调用算法的进展，已实现从原始信号数据中直接检测修饰碱基，无需硫酸钠处理DNA。然而，由于技术方法的快速进步，解码甲基化信号仍具挑战性。本研究聚焦公共卫生相关的细菌菌株，分析其甲基化谱型并识别甲基化基序。数据集包含金黄色葡萄球菌、单增李斯特菌、粪肠球菌和肺炎克雷伯菌样本，采用纳米孔GridION平台最新流细胞化学（R10.4.1）和修饰碱基调用模型（Dorado basecalling SUP模型v5）进行测序。我们分析了物种内及物种间的差异甲基化模式，重点关注高度修饰的基因或基因组区域。结果揭示了物种特异性甲基化谱型，每个菌株均表现出独特的修饰模式。我们开发了基于Nextflow和纳米孔Modkit工具的模块化流程以优化甲基化基序检测。与MicrobeMod等工具的输出结果进行对比分析，所开发流程已开源（github.com/rki-mf1/ont-methylation）。我们识别了文献中已描述的甲基化基序和新型de novo基序，深化了对细菌DNA修饰多样性的理解。同时发现广泛甲基化的基因组区域，可能影响细菌行为和致病性。还评估了碱基调用准确性改进，特别是甲基化碱基对邻近碱基调用的影响。Dorado v5模型等最新调用模型已显著降低这些问题，提升细菌基因组甲基化检测的可靠性。综上，本研究凸显了当前纳米孔测序工具在原核生物DNA修饰检测中的潜力。通过公开分析流程和结果，我们促进了对细菌DNA修饰及其在微生物致病机制中作用的进一步研究。

title: Evaluation of long-read 16S rRNA next-generation sequencing for identification of bacterial isolates in a clinical diagnostic laboratory.
abstract: Sanger sequencing of the first ~500 bp of the 16S rRNA gene is frequently used to identify bacterial pathogens that have ambiguous biochemical profiles or proteomic mass spectra. When diversity does not occur within that region, genus-level and/or species-level identification may not be possible, and a longer sequence or alternative target may be required to distinguish between genera/species. In this study, we evaluated a clinically relevant end-to-end solution for long-read (~1,500 nt) 16S rRNA next-generation sequencing by Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) compared to a ~500 nt Sanger sequencing approach for the identification of 153 bacterial clinical isolates. Sequencing data were analyzed using the IDNS software from SmartGene and its proprietary 16S Centroid reference database (Centroid database) SmartGene software and the Centroid database. The agreement of the two platforms on species- and genus-level identification was determined, and discrepancies were resolved by whole-genome sequencing. ONT had a higher taxonomic resolution at the genus level (P < 0.01). When genus-level identification was achieved by both methods, concordance to the best matching genus was 100%. When species-level identification was achieved by both methods, concordance to the best matching species was 91%. The costs per test were ~$25.30 (when multiplexing 24 samples/run) and $74 for ONT and Sanger sequencing, respectively. The hands-on time spent performing sequencing was similar for both methods, but the turnaround time of ONT was significantly shorter than that of Sanger sequencing.IMPORTANCEThis study adds to existing literature by describing a validated end-to-end solution of 16S rRNA gene Oxford Nanopore sequencing for bacterial isolate identification, including sequencing run time evaluation, automated analysis (SmartGene 16S Identification App) and interpretation of results, that can be incorporated into clinical and public health laboratories with a simple and cost-effective workflow.
authors: Victoria L Campodónico, Jean Ruelle, Anna Fitzgerald, Yehudit Bergman, Brenda Osborne, Dimitrios Bourdas, Jennifer Lu, Karen C Carroll, Patricia J Simner

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了使用Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)进行长读长(~1,500 nt)16S rRNA基因下一代测序与Sanger测序在153株细菌临床分离株鉴定中的效果。结果显示ONT在属级分类上具有更高的分辨率，且整体成本和操作时间相近，但周转时间更短。
ai.translation: 对16S rRNA基因前约500 bp进行Sanger测序常用于鉴定具有模糊生化特征或质谱图谱的细菌病原体。当该区域不存在多样性时，属级和/或种级鉴定可能无法实现，需要更长的序列或替代靶标来区分属/种。本研究评估了一种临床相关的端到端解决方案，使用Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)进行长读长(~1,500 nt)的16S rRNA基因下一代测序，与Sanger测序方法在153株细菌临床分离株鉴定中的效果。测序数据使用SmartGene的IDNS软件及其专有的16S Centroid参考数据库（Centroid数据库）进行分析。确定了两种平台在属级和种级鉴定的一致性，并通过全基因组测序解决差异。ONT在属级分类上具有更高的分类分辨率（P < 0.01）。当两种方法均实现属级鉴定时，与最佳匹配属的一致性为100%。当两种方法均实现种级鉴定时，与最佳匹配种的一致性为91%。每测试的成本分别为约25.30美元（当每运行多路复用24个样本时）和74美元（ONT和Sanger测序分别）。两种方法的操作时间相近，但ONT的周转时间显著短于Sanger测序。本研究通过描述一种经过验证的16S rRNA基因Oxford Nanopore测序端到端解决方案，为细菌分离株鉴定提供了补充，包括测序运行时间评估、自动化分析（SmartGene 16S鉴定应用）和结果解读，该方案可被临床和公共卫生实验室以简单且成本效益高的工作流程整合。

title: ST11 carbapenem-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae integrates virulence plasmid fragments into the chromosome via insertion sequence.
abstract: Virulence plasmids are key drivers of hypervirulence in Klebsiella pneumoniae. Here, we report a systematic analysis of chromosomal integration of a p17-15vir-derived fragment carrying virulence (rmpA2 and iutA-iucABCD) and resistance genes in nine bla
authors: Xu Liu, Lijuan Xu, Huiyue Dong, Shangshang Qin, Yan Li, Hong Yao

ai.TLDR: 毒力质粒是肺炎克雷伯菌高毒力的核心驱动因素。本研究系统分析了携带毒力基因(rmpA2和iutA-iucABCD)及耐药基因的p17-15vir衍生片段在九株bla基因中的染色体整合特征。
ai.translation: 毒力质粒是肺炎克雷伯菌（Klebsiella pneumoniae）表现出高毒力的关键驱动因素。本研究系统分析了源自p17-15vir质粒的片段（携带毒力基因rmpA2和iutA-iucABCD以及耐药基因）在九株携带bla基因的菌株中发生染色体整合的特征。研究通过全面解析这些毒力相关基因的整合机制，揭示了其在细菌致病性增强中的作用，为理解多重耐药性肺炎克雷伯菌的进化提供了新的分子视角。

title: Harnessing methods, data analysis, and near-real-time wastewater monitoring for enhanced public health response using high throughput sequencing.
abstract: Wastewater-based analysis has emerged as a pivotal method for monitoring SARS-CoV-2 (SC2). Leveraging high-throughput sequencing on wastewater samples facilitates a comprehensive, population-level assessment of circulating and emerging SC2 variants within a community. This study meticulously evaluates the detection performance, variant calling accuracy, and the time taken from sample collection to public data release for wastewater SC2 monitoring. Two different SC2 target enrichment panels were employed, Illumina MiSeq and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) GridION sequencing platforms for a robust analysis. Daily collection of routine raw grab and composite samples took place at a wastewater treatment plant (WWTP) site in Maryland, USA (MD) from mid-January 2022 to the end of June 2022. Total Nucleic Acid (TNA) was extracted from samples and target enrichment was executed using QIAseq DIRECT and NEBNext VarSkip Short amplicon kits, with subsequent sequencing on MiSeq or ONT GridION platforms, respectively. Obtained sequences was analyzed using custom CFSAN Wastewater Analysis Pipeline (C-WAP). Raw sequence data and detailed metadata were submitted to NCBI (BioProject PRJNA757291) as it became available. Wastewater data successfully detected the onset of new variants BA.2, BA.2.12, BA.4.6, and BA.5 to the observed population. Notably, Omicron sub-variants were identified approximately a week ahead of publicly available clinical data at the MD ZIP-code level. Variation in quality metrics paralleled the rise and fall of BA waves, underscoring the impact of viral load on sequencing quality. Regular updates of estimated variant proportions were made available on the FDA-CFSAN "Wastewater Surveillance for SARS-CoV-2 Variants" website. In contrast to the median 28-day turnaround, the lead time from sample collection to public release of raw sequence data via NCBI was remarkably swift, accomplished within a mere 57 h in this specific exercise. Processing, sequencing, and analysis methods empowered the swift and accurate detection of SC2 trends and circulating variants within a community, offering insights for public health decision-making.
authors: Padmini Ramachandran, Tunc Kayikcioglu, Tamara Walsky, Kathryn Judy, Jasmine Amirzadegan, Candace Hope Bias, Bereket Tesfaldet, Maria Balkey, Dietrich EppSchmidt, Hugh Rand, James Pettengill, Sandra Tallent, Eric Brown, Tina Pfefer, Ruth Timme, Amanda Windsor, Christopher Grim, Maria Hoffmann

ai.TLDR: 污水基分析已成为监测SARS-CoV-2变异株的重要方法。本研究评估了污水样本中SARS-CoV-2变异株的检测性能和准确性，并展示了从样本采集到数据发布的快速流程。研究结果表明，污水数据能够提前检测到新变异株的出现，为公共卫生决策提供重要参考。
ai.translation: 污水基分析已成为监测SARS-CoV-2（SC2）的重要方法。利用污水样本的高通量测序技术，可以实现对社区中流行和新兴SC2变异株的全面、群体水平评估。本研究详细评估了污水SC2监测中的检测性能、变异株识别准确性和从样本采集到公共数据发布的耗时。采用了两种不同的SC2靶向富集面板，Illumina MiSeq和Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) GridION测序平台，以实现稳健的分析。在马里兰州（MD）的一座污水处理厂（WWTP）现场，从2022年1月中旬到2022年6月底，每天收集常规的原始抓取样本和复合样本。从样本中提取总核酸（TNA），并使用QIAseq DIRECT和NEBNext VarSkip Short amplicon试剂盒进行靶向富集，随后分别在MiSeq和ONT GridION平台上进行测序。获得的序列数据使用定制的CFSAN污水分析流程（C-WAP）进行分析。随着数据的获取，原始序列数据和详细元数据被提交至NCBI（BioProject PRJNA757291）。污水数据成功检测到了BA.2、BA.2.12、BA.4.6和BA.5等新变异株的出现，与观察到的人口数据一致。值得注意的是，在MD邮政编码级别上，Omicron亚变种的识别时间比公开的临床数据早约一周。质量指标的变化与BA波峰的上升和下降相平行，突显了病毒载量对测序质量的影响。估计的变异株比例的定期更新在FDA-CFSAN的“SARS-CoV-2变异株污水监测”网站上提供。与中位数28天的周转时间相比，通过NCBI发布原始序列数据的样本采集到公共发布的前置时间显著缩短，仅用了57小时。处理、测序和分析方法使SC2趋势和社区中流行变异株的快速准确检测成为可能，为公共卫生决策提供了重要见解。

title: Rising threat of metallo-β-lactamase-producing Klebsiella oxytoca complex in Taiwan, 2013-2022.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: The emergence of metallo-beta-lactamases (MBLs) within the Klebsiella oxytoca complex (CRKO) poses a significant challenge in Taiwan, with so far incomplete characterization of species distribution and carbapenemase variants. This study aimed to elucidate the diversity, variants, and clinical presentations of CRKO isolates collected from 2013 to 2022.

METHODS: We analyzed production of carbapenemases by the modified carbapenem inhibitory method (mCIM) and the NG testTM CARBA-5. Confirmation of five common carbapenemases and multilocus sequence typing were determined by polymerase chain reaction and sequencing. Nanopore whole-genome sequencing was used for the species differentiation and plasmids analysis. We also evaluated the clinical characteristics of the CRKO-infected patients.

RESULTS: Three species were identified: K. michiganensis (n = 102), K. pasteurii (n = 13), and K. oxytoca (n = 3). A majority of isolates (91.5%, n = 108) harbored at least one MBL gene, including blaVIM-1 (n = 56), blaIMP-8 (n = 26), and blaNDM-1 (n = 19), with six isolates carrying dual carbapenemase genes. The blaNDM-1 and blaIMP-8 genes were located on IncFII(Yp) and IncA/C2 plasmids, respectively. Notably, 34.7% of isolates carried kleboxymycin gene clusters (KGC). Using CLSI and EUCAST criteria, 92.4% and 82.4% of isolates, respectively, were susceptible to cefiderocol. Among 92 infected patients, the 30-day mortality rate was 21.7%, associated with female gender, higher Charlson Comorbidity Index, higher Pitt bacteremia scores, presence of bacteremia, and inversely associated with KGC.

CONCLUSION: The high prevalence of CRKO carrying MBLs and the recent surge of the ST27-blaNDM-1 genotype, poses significant treatment challenges and underscores the urgent need for enhanced surveillance in Taiwan.
authors: Yu-Tsung Huang, Carl Jay Ballena Bregente, Wei-Yu Hsu, Chun-Hsing Liao, Yao-Wen Kuo, Jia-Arng Lee, Tai-Fen Lee, Cheng-Yen Kao, Po-Ren Hsueh

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了台湾地区克雷伯菌复合体（CRKO）中金属β-内酰胺酶（MBLs）的多样性及其临床表现。结果显示，CRKO菌株中大多数携带MBL基因，且与较高的30天死亡率相关。
ai.translation:
研究目的：克雷伯菌复合体（CRKO）中金属β-内酰胺酶（MBLs）的出现对台湾地区构成了重大挑战，目前对物种分布和碳青霉烯酶变异体的表征尚不完整。本研究旨在阐明2013年至2022年间收集的CRKO菌株的多样性、变异体及其临床表现。

方法：我们通过改良的碳青霉烯抑制法（mCIM）和NG测试TM CARBA-5分析碳青霉烯酶的产生。通过聚合酶链反应和测序确认五种常见的碳青霉烯酶及多基因位点序列分型。使用纳米孔全基因组测序进行物种区分和质粒分析。我们还评估了CRKO感染患者的临床特征。

结果：鉴定出三种菌株：K. michiganensis（n = 102）、K. pasteurii（n = 13）和K. oxytoca（n = 3）。大多数菌株（91.5%，n = 108）携带至少一个MBL基因，包括blaVIM-1（n = 56）、blaIMP-8（n = 26）和blaNDM-1（n = 19），其中六株菌株携带两种碳青霉烯酶基因。blaNDM-1和blaIMP-8基因分别位于IncFII(Yp)和IncA/C2质粒上。值得注意的是，34.7%的菌株携带克雷伯菌抗生素基因簇（KGC）。根据CLSI和EUCAST标准，92.4%和82.4%的菌株对头孢他啶-阿维巴坦（cefidocol）敏感。在92名感染患者中，30天死亡率为21.7%，与女性性别、较高的Charlson合并症指数、较高的Pitt细菌血症评分、存在细菌血症以及KGC呈负相关。

结论：携带MBLs的CRKO菌株的高流行率以及最近ST27-blaNDM-1基因型的激增，给治疗带来了重大挑战，并突显了在台湾地区加强监测的迫切需求。

title: ﻿Characterisation of the genome and secretome of
authors: Yuuri Hirooka, Oscar Villanueva, Ekaterina Ponomareva, Bennett L Crane, Rick D Peters, Walid Ellouze, Hai D T Nguyen

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: A Tear-Based Approach for Rapid Identification of Bacterial Pathogens in Corneal Ulcers Using Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract:
PURPOSE: This prospective observational study assesses the efficacy of using portable next-generation sequencing directly on tear samples to identify bacterial pathogens in corneal ulcers.

METHODS: Tear samples were collected from ulcerated and contralateral eyes using Schirmer strips. Corneal scrapings and cultures were performed as medically indicated. The 16S rRNA gene was amplified from tear samples using polymerase chain reaction (PCR), and Nanopore sequencing was used for bacterial species identification and taxonomic classification.

RESULTS: Bacterial DNA was identified in 8 of 10 samples using the tear-based sequencing method. Nanopore sequencing accurately identified the causative bacteria in all four samples that exhibited bacterial growth on culture and detected bacterial pathogens in two of the four ulcers that did not show bacterial growth on culture. In two cases where cultures could not be obtained due to the ulcer's small size, tear sequencing successfully identified bacterial species. Among the nine contralateral tear samples collected, Nanopore sequencing identified commensal bacteria in four samples.

CONCLUSIONS: PCR amplification of 16S rRNA directly from tears followed by Nanopore sequencing is an effective, noninvasive method to identify bacterial pathogens in corneal ulcers, offering noninferior results to traditional culture methods.

TRANSLATIONAL RELEVANCE: By eliminating the need for corneal scrapings and nucleic acid extraction, this tear-based method improves the timing and accuracy of bacterial pathogen diagnosis in corneal ulcers, allowing for prompt detection of causative organisms and enabling earlier targeted antimicrobial therapy, thereby improving patient outcomes.
authors: Mark Dibbs, Mitchelle Matesva, Despoina Theotoka, Christina Jayaraj, Beruk Metiku, Patrick Demkowicz, Jacob S Heng, Yvonne Wang, Christine Y Bakhoum, Jessica Chow, Mathieu F Bakhoum

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了通过便携式下一代测序直接在泪液样本中识别角膜溃疡细菌病原体的有效性。结果显示，该方法在检测细菌病原体方面具有非劣效性，且无需进行角膜刮取和核酸提取，提高了诊断的及时性和准确性。
ai.translation:
目的：本项前瞻性观察性研究评估了通过便携式下一代测序直接在泪液样本中识别角膜溃疡细菌病原体的有效性。

方法：使用Schirmer条从溃疡眼和对侧眼收集泪液样本。根据医疗需要进行角膜刮取和培养。通过聚合酶链反应（PCR）从泪液样本中扩增16S rRNA基因，并使用Nanopore测序进行细菌种类鉴定和分类学分类。

结果：在10个样本中，有8个样本通过基于泪液的测序方法检测到了细菌DNA。Nanopore测序在所有4个在培养中显示细菌生长的样本中准确识别了致病细菌，并在4个未在培养中显示细菌生长的溃疡中检测到了细菌病原体。在2个因溃疡体积过小而无法获取培养的病例中，泪液测序成功识别了细菌种类。在收集的9个对侧泪液样本中，Nanopore测序在4个样本中检测到了共生细菌。

结论：从泪液中直接扩增16S rRNA基因并进行Nanopore测序是一种有效且非侵入性的方法，用于识别角膜溃疡中的细菌病原体，其结果与传统培养方法相当。

转化相关性：通过消除对角膜刮取和核酸提取的需求，这种基于泪液的方法提高了角膜溃疡中细菌病原体诊断的及时性和准确性，使致病菌的快速检测成为可能，从而实现更早的针对性抗生素治疗，改善患者预后。

title: First complete mitochondrial genome of Armillifer moniliformis (Pentastomida: Porocephalida) isolated from a human case in Northern Thailand: comparative and phylogenetic analyses.
abstract: Pentastomiasis, a zoonotic parasitic disease caused by pentastomids, has been increasingly documented in Thailand. Historically, morphological identification has been the only diagnostic method, but it is inadequate due to morphological similarities between larval stages and limited taxonomic keys. To overcome this, molecular diagnosis is required. However, the DNA sequence information of these neglected parasites remains largely unknown. In this study, pentastomid larvae were collected from the greater omentum of a patient in Northern Thailand. The species of pentastomid larvae was molecularly identified as Armillifer moniliformis, using PCRs targeting nuclear and mitochondrial regions, followed by Sanger sequencing. Nanopore sequencing was employed to characterize the complete mitochondrial genome of A. moniliformis, revealing a total length of 16,367 bp with 37 mitochondrial genes, including 13 protein-coding genes, 22 tRNA genes, and two rRNA genes, as well as one non-coding region. The entire mitogenome is highly AT-rich (62.1%), with nucleotide skews indicating compositional bias between strands. The non-coding region (2616 bp) lies between the tRNA-Leu
authors: Thanapat Pataradool, Padet Siriyasatien, Woraporn Sukhumavasi, Saruda Tiwananthagorn, Chusana Suankratay, Kanok Preativatanyou

ai.TLDR: 泰国地区五分类虫病病例逐渐增多，传统形态学鉴定因幼虫形态相似而存在局限。本研究通过分子诊断技术首次完成A. moniliformis线粒体基因组测序，揭示其AT-rich特性及基因组成。该成果为临床诊断和分类学研究提供了重要参考。
ai.translation: 五分类虫病（Pentastomiasis）是一种由五分类虫引起的动物源性寄生虫病，在泰国地区病例逐渐增多。传统形态学鉴定一直是唯一的诊断方法，但因幼虫阶段形态相似及分类学钥匙不完善而存在局限。为克服这一问题，本研究采用分子诊断技术对泰国北部患者大网膜中的五分类虫幼虫进行鉴定。通过针对核基因组和线粒体基因组区域的PCR扩增及Sanger测序，确认该幼虫为Armillifer moniliformis。进一步采用纳米孔测序技术对A. moniliformis的完整线粒体基因组进行测序，获得总长度为16,367 bp的基因组序列，包含13个蛋白质编码基因、22个tRNA基因、2个rRNA基因及一个非编码区。整个线粒体基因组呈现高度AT-rich特性（62.1%），核苷酸偏倚性显示双链间组成差异。非编码区（2616 bp）位于tRNA-Leu基因之间，...

title: The diagnostic value of third-generation nanopore sequencing in non-tuberculous mycobacterial infections.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: This study aimed to investigate the diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing technology in non-tuberculous mycobacterial pulmonary disease (NTMPD) and compare it with traditional culture methods.

METHODS: A retrospective analysis was conducted on 225 suspected NTMPD patients admitted to the Fourth People's Hospital of Nanning City from January 2022 to July 2024. The sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), negative predictive value (NPV), kappa coefficient, and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of nanopore sequencing, culture, and combined diagnostic methods were compared to evaluate their diagnostic performance. In addition, patients were divided into different groups to investigate the detection of NTMPD by nanopore sequencing technology under different pathogen concentrations, in cases of concurrent Mycobacterium tuberculosis (MTB) infection, and among the elderly (aged > 60 years).

RESULTS: Among 139 NTMPD samples, nanopore sequencing detected positives in 113 cases, with a sensitivity of 81.3%, PPV of 99.1%, NPV of 76.6%, kappa coefficient of 0.759, and AUC of 0.901, demonstrating high specificity (98.8%) comparable to culture. The combined diagnostic approach significantly improved the sensitivity (90.6%), NPV (98.4%), kappa coefficient (0.862), and AUC (0.942) of NTMPD diagnosis. Nanopore sequencing showed superior diagnostic value in samples with various bacterial concentrations and in cases of concurrent MTB infection.

CONCLUSION: Third-generation nanopore sequencing technology serves as a rapid and effective diagnostic tool, which may profoundly impact the current diagnosis of NTMPD.
authors: Chun-Yan Zhao, Chang Song, Yan-Rong Lin, Ying-Xing Nong, Ai-Chun Huang, Shao-Yong Xi, Xiao-Ying Wei, Chun-Mei Zeng, Zhou-Hua Xie, Qing-Dong Zhu

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序技术在非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTMPD）诊断中的价值，并与传统培养方法进行比较。结果显示，纳米孔测序在敏感性、特异性及诊断效能方面表现优异，尤其在不同细菌浓度和合并结核分枝杆菌感染的情况下具有显著优势。
ai.translation:
背景：本研究旨在探讨纳米孔测序技术在非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTMPD）诊断中的诊断价值，并将其与传统培养方法进行比较。

方法：对2022年1月至2024年7月期间入住南宁市第四人民医院的225例疑似NTMPD患者进行回顾性分析。比较纳米孔测序、培养及联合诊断方法在敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值（PPV）、阴性预测值（NPV）、Kappa系数及受试者工作特征曲线下面积（AUC）方面的诊断性能。此外，将患者分为不同组别，以研究纳米孔测序技术在不同病原体浓度、合并结核分枝杆菌（MTB）感染及老年患者（年龄>60岁）中的检测效果。

结果：在139例NTMPD样本中，纳米孔测序检测出113例阳性，敏感性为81.3%，PPV为99.1%，NPV为76.6%，Kappa系数为0.759，AUC为0.901，显示出与培养方法相当的高特异性（98.8%）。联合诊断方法显著提高了NTMPD诊断的敏感性（90.6%）、NPV（98.4%）、Kappa系数（0.862）和AUC（0.942）。纳米孔测序在不同细菌浓度样本及合并MTB感染的病例中表现出更优的诊断价值。

结论：第三代纳米孔测序技术是一种快速且有效的诊断工具，可能对当前NTMPD的诊断产生深远影响。

title: Development of a culture-independent whole-genome sequencing of Nipah virus using the MinION Oxford Nanopore platform.
abstract:
Nipah virus (NiV) is a deadly zoonotic pathogen in Southeast Asia causing severe respiratory and encephalitis symptoms with a high fatality rate. Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) is crucial for tracking transmission, conducting epidemiological analyses, and understanding NiV's adaptive evolution. WGS is essential for analyzing genomes, particularly in understanding pathogen nature, and pathogenesis and aiding in the development of therapeutics. However, sequencing this highly contagious virus directly from samples is challenging in low- and middle-income countries lacking BSL-4 facilities. This study developed and optimized a culture-independent, high-throughput multiplex PCR-based third-generation sequencing protocol for NiV using the Oxford Nanopore Technology platform and a proposed bioinformatics pipeline to generate consensus genome sequences directly from environmental and clinical specimens. We amplified 12 NiV RT-PCR-positive specimens (11 clinical, one environmental) to produce 60 amplicons, each approximately 400 bp, covering the entire ~18.2 kb genome. Using a two-step reverse transcriptase PCR approach, libraries were prepared with a ligation sequencing kit. Raw sequence data were then analyzed using bioinformatics tools. A minimum of 10,000 total reads per sample provided a nearly complete coverage (>95%) of the NiV genome, even with low virus concentrations (Ct ≤ 32), with an average quality score of 10.2. The WGS of 12 NiV-positive samples achieved coverage between 95.71% (Ct 29.54) and 99.3% (Ct 22.34). The entire process, from RNA extraction to finished sequences, took only 24 h. We developed a portable, culture-independent, high-throughput sequencing workflow suitable for resource-limited settings, aiding in real-time monitoring, outbreak investigation, and detection of new NiV strains and genetic evolution.

IMPORTANCE: The development of a culture-independent, high-throughput whole-genome sequencing (WGS) protocol for Nipah virus (NiV) using the Oxford Nanopore MinION technology marks a significant advancement in outbreak response, surveillance, and genomic analysis of NiV. NiV is an RG4 category C pathogen; working with the NiV virus is a deep concern of biosafety and biosecurity. It demands the development of biologically safe procedures to get genetic information. This protocol utilizes biologically safe samples that were collected into recommended lysis solution, multiplex PCR, and third-generation sequencing, effectively addressing challenges in sequencing NiV. This optimized workflow achieved over 95% genome coverage without the need for virus culture. It is a cost-effective, rapid, and efficient approach to the WGS of NiV, making it suitable for resource-limited settings like Bangladesh. The method enhances the capacity for outbreak investigations, epidemiological analyses, and monitoring virus, aiding in detecting emerging strains. This work contributes significantly to global pandemic preparedness and response efforts.
authors: Md Mahfuzur Rahman, Mojnu Miah, Mohammad Enayet Hossain, Samiur Rahim, Sharmin Sultana, Syed Moinuddin Satter, Ariful Islam, Shannon L M Whitmer, Jonathan H Epstein, Christina F Spiropoulou, John D Klena, Tahmina Shirin, Joel M Montgomery, Maria E Kaczmarek, Mohammed Ziaur Rahman, Iqbal Kabir Jahid

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种无需培养的高通量全基因组测序方法，用于Nipah病毒（NiV）的快速检测和分析。该方法利用Oxford Nanopore技术平台，可在24小时内完成从RNA提取到测序的全过程，适用于资源有限的地区。
ai.translation: Nipah病毒（NiV）是一种在东南亚致命的动物源性病原体，会导致严重的呼吸系统和脑炎症状，具有高死亡率。全基因组测序（WGS）对于追踪传播、进行流行病学分析以及理解NiV的适应性进化至关重要。WGS对于分析基因组、特别是理解病原体特性、病发机制以及开发治疗药物具有重要意义。然而，在缺乏BSL-4设施的低收入和中等收入国家，直接从样本中测序这种高度传染性病毒具有挑战性。本研究开发并优化了一种无需培养的高通量多重PCR基于第三代测序的协议，用于NiV的测序，使用Oxford Nanopore Technology平台和提出的生物信息学流程，直接从环境和临床样本中生成共识基因组序列。我们扩增了12个NiV RT-PCR阳性样本（11个临床样本，1个环境样本），产生了60个扩增子，每个约400 bp，覆盖整个约18.2 kb的基因组。使用两步逆转录PCR方法，使用连接测序试剂盒制备文库。然后使用生物信息学工具分析原始测序数据。每个样本至少有10,000个总读数，提供了接近完整的NiV基因组覆盖（>95%），即使在低病毒浓度（Ct ≤ 32）的情况下，平均质量分数为10.2。12个NiV阳性样本的全基因组测序覆盖范围在95.71%（Ct 29.54）至99.3%（Ct 22.34）之间。从RNA提取到完成测序的整个过程仅需24小时。我们开发了一种便携、无需培养、高通量的测序工作流程，适用于资源有限的环境，有助于实时监测、疫情调查和新NiV株及遗传进化检测。重要性：使用Oxford Nanopore MinION技术开发一种无需培养的高通量全基因组测序（WGS）协议，标志着在NiV疫情响应、监测和基因组分析方面的重要进展。NiV是一种RG4类别C病原体；与NiV病毒工作是生物安全和生物安全的重大关注点。这需要开发生物安全的程序以获取遗传信息。该协议利用了生物安全样本，这些样本被收集到推荐的裂解液中，通过多重PCR和第三代测序，有效解决了NiV测序的挑战。该优化的工作流程在无需病毒培养的情况下实现了超过95%的基因组覆盖。这是一种成本效益高、快速且高效的方法，适用于资源有限的地区，如孟加拉国。该方法增强了疫情调查、流行病学分析和病毒监测的能力，有助于检测新出现的病毒株。这项工作对全球大流行病的准备和响应工作做出了重要贡献。

title: Profiling the full-length transcriptome of plasma cell mastitis via nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Introduction

In this study, we aimed to determine the transcriptomic profile of plasma cell mastitis (PCM) and elucidate its underlying mechanisms using nanopore sequencing technology (ONT).

### Methods and results

Through comparisons and analyses of redundantly removed transcripts with known reference genome annotations, we identified 39,408 novel transcripts and 20,980 genes. By exploring full-length transcriptome data, we characterized selective splicing, selective polyadenylation events, and simple sequence repeat (SSR) site information, which enhanced our understanding of genome annotation and gene structure in plasma cell mastitis. Additionally, we investigated predicted transcription factors and LncRNAs, screening those with differences for further investigations. The GO and KEGG enrichment analysis of differentially expressed genes (DEGs) and differentially expressed transcripts (DETs) revealed subtle distinctions between them, with primary enrichments being in immune response and intercellular interactions. Our protein–protein interaction (PPI) analysis of hub proteins from DETs indicated up-regulated genes' involvement in immune response and down-regulated genes' role in cell adhesion. Furthermore, we assessed immune cell infiltration in plasma cell mastitis, observing various immune cells, such as B cells, T cells, and DC cells.

### Conclusion

These preliminary findings offer novel insights into the pathogenesis of plasma cell mastitis and present promising ideas for optimizing personalized treatment approaches, warranting further exploration and follow-up studies.
authors: Su Li, Hongyue Chen, ... Lulu Zhang
citation: Li, S., Chen, H., Fan, Y. et al. Profiling the full-length transcriptome of plasma cell mastitis via nanopore sequencing. BMC Genom Data 26 , 29 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12863-025-01312-7
