ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术解析浆细胞乳腺炎的转录组特征，发现39,408个新转录本和20,980个基因，揭示了免疫反应与细胞间相互作用的分子机制。通过差异表达基因和转录本的GO/KEGG富集分析，发现免疫调控与细胞黏附的基因表达差异，为个性化治疗提供新思路。
ai.translation:
### 引言

本研究旨在利用纳米孔测序技术（ONT）确定浆细胞乳腺炎（PCM）的转录组特征，并阐明其潜在机制。

### 方法与结果

通过比较和分析冗余去除转录本与已知参考基因组注释的差异，我们鉴定出39,408个新型转录本和2,0980个基因。通过探索全长转录组数据，我们表征了选择性剪接事件、选择性多聚腺苷酸化事件以及简单重复序列（SSR）位点信息，这增强了对浆细胞乳腺炎基因组注释和基因结构的理解。此外，我们研究了预测的转录因子和长链非编码RNA（LncRNAs），筛选出具有差异表达的转录本进行进一步分析。差异表达基因（DEGs）和差异表达转录本（DETs）的GO和KEGG富集分析揭示了它们之间的细微差异，主要富集在免疫反应和细胞间相互作用通路。我们对DETs来源的枢纽蛋白进行蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）分析，发现上调基因参与免疫反应，而下调基因则涉及细胞黏附功能。此外，我们评估了浆细胞乳腺炎中的免疫细胞浸润情况，观察到包括B细胞、T细胞和树突状细胞（DC细胞）在内的多种免疫细胞存在。

### 结论

这些初步发现为浆细胞乳腺炎的发病机制提供了新见解，并提出了优化个性化治疗策略的潜在方向，值得进一步探索和后续研究。

title: An Investigation of MMR-Related Mumps Cluster Following Immunization Among Practical Nursing Students, Bangkok, Thailand, 2024.
authors: Sethapong Lertsakulbunlue, Drunphob Srithammavong, Kamonchanok Tepsittha, Hataya Kanjanasombut, Vitchakorn Poonyakanok, Viravarn Luvira, Phimphan Pisutsan, Rachata Charoenwisedsil, Pathomthep Leowattana, Peeriya Watakulsin, Rapeepong Suphanchaimat, Atchariya Lukebua, Worawat Dangsagul, Kannikar Kwanchum, Thanit Rattanathumsakul, Pawinee Doungngern

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Detection and characterization of neonatal cytomegalovirus through nanopore sequencing using flongle flow cells: Pilot study in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Cytomegalovirus (CMV) remains a significant infection in neonates and its early detection can aid with further treatment (antiviral, audiology). However, current diagnostics do not provide genetic information.

OBJECTIVE: We explored the use of the portable and comprehensive sequencing method from Oxford Nanopore Technologies, utilizing low-cost Flongle flow cells to detect and perform sequence-level characterization of neonatal urine samples that tested positive for CMV by PCR.

STUDY DESIGN: We performed a pilot study based on a retrospective cohort study of neonates who were positive for CMV by PCR, who were admitted at two birth hospitals in Philadelphia, PA. We leveraged deep and long-read sequencing results to analyze the reads in two forms: by comparing them against a reference-based strain and by reconstructing the genome through de novo assembly with phylogenetic tree analysis.

RESULTS: We assayed seven clinical samples, including a positive and negative control sample, from newborns ranging from 23 weeks' gestation to term, with testing performed for microcephaly, hearing test results, small gestational age, and thrombocytopenia. Each sample showed multiple differences compared to the reference strain, and the phylogenetic tree analysis of the de novo assembly depicted the genetic diversity of the samples.

CONCLUSION: This pilot study shows that nanopore sequencing with low-cost Flongle flow cells can detect and characterize CMV strains from clinical neonatal urine samples. This, coupled with current screening and diagnostic criteria, could further our genomic understanding of neonatal CMV, such as viral genome diversity, genotype-phenotype associations, and spread of strains.
authors: Alvaro Proaño, Joe Chan, Gabrielle C Galchen, Mian Umair Ahsan, Robert H Gilman, Kenneth P Smith, Kai Wang, Dustin D Flannery

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用低成本Flongle流细胞进行纳米孔测序，实现了新生儿尿液中CMV的基因组表征。该方法可揭示病毒基因组多样性及表型关联，为新生儿CMV感染的分子机制研究提供新工具。
ai.translation:
背景：巨细胞病毒（CMV）仍是新生儿的重要感染病原体，其早期检测有助于进一步治疗（抗病毒治疗、听力学检查）。然而现有诊断方法无法提供遗传信息。

目标：我们探索了Oxford Nanopore Technologies便携式全基因组测序方法的应用，利用低成本Flongle流细胞检测并进行序列水平表征，对PCR检测呈阳性的新生儿尿液样本进行分析。

研究设计：基于费城两家分娩医院收治的新生儿回顾性队列研究，选取PCR检测呈阳性的CMV病例。通过深度长读长测序结果，以两种形式分析测序数据：与参考株比对分析，以及通过从头组装结合系统发育树分析重建基因组。

结果：我们检测了7个临床样本（含阳性与阴性对照），样本孕周跨度为23周至足月，检测内容包括微头症、听力测试结果、小胎龄及血小板减少。每个样本均显示与参考株存在多处差异，从头组装的系统发育树分析揭示了样本的遗传多样性。

结论：该试点研究证明，使用低成本Flongle流细胞的纳米孔测序可有效检测并表征临床新生儿尿液中的CMV菌株。结合现有筛查与诊断标准，该方法可深化对新生儿CMV的基因组理解，包括病毒基因组多样性、基因型-表型关联及菌株传播特征。

title: [Etiological characteristics and molecular evolution of the first mpox case in Huai'an City of Jiangsu Province].
journal: Zhongguo xue xi chong bing fang zhi za zhi = Chinese journal of schistosomiasis control
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: To analyze the virus subtypes, molecular evolutional and molecular transmission network features of the first confirmed mpox case in Huai'an City, Jiangsu Province, so as to provide insights into understanding of the transmission and evolution dynamics of mpox virus and formulation of the mpox control strategy in the city.

METHODS: Genomic DNA was extracted from swabs of the first confirmed mpox case's skin lesions in Huai'an City, and the amplicon sequencing library was constructed using the hypersensitive mpox virus whole-genome capture kit. High-throughput sequencing was performed using the GridION X5 nanopore sequencer on the Nanopore sequencing platform, and single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) analysis of mpox virus genome sequences was performed following sequence assembly. In addition, phylogenetic analysis, genetic genealogy and molecular traceability analysis were performed.

RESULTS: The virus whole genome sequence of the first confirmed mpox case was successfully obtained by high-throughput sequencing, with a full length of 197 182 bp, and was named hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023, which belonged to the clade IIb (West African clade) lineage B.1.3. Compared with the mpox virus reference sequence MPXV-M5312_HM12_Rivers-001 (GenBank accession number: NC_063383), the genome sequence of the Huai'an virus isolate carried 86 SNPs, including 40 SNPs in the coding region as non-synonymous mutations and 73 SNPs as nucleotide mutations caused by APOBEC3 (APOBEC3). Of the 97 mpox virus gene sequences, 79 sequences were included in the molecular network (81.44%), and the threshold of the genetic distance accessed to the network was 0.35/105. There were two large molecular transmission clusters and one scattered cluster in the molecular transmission network of the mpox virus, andthehMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023 sequence was located in the large cluster. The 97 gene sequences formed 92 haplotypes, including three shared haplotypes Hap_4, Hap_6 and Hap_38, and an exclusive haplotype Hap_1 of hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023 generated from mutation of the exclusive haplotype Hap_43, while the exclusive haplotype Hap_43 was generated from mutation of the shared haplotype Hap_38.

CONCLUSIONS: The whole genome sequence of the mpox virus isolated from the first confirmed mpox case in Huai'an City has been successfully obtained, and the molecular evolutionary and molecular transmission network characteristics of the virus have been preliminarily understood.

［摘要］ 目的分析江苏省淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例的病毒亚型及分子进化和分子传播网络特征, 为了解猴痘病毒传 播进化动态、制定淮安市猴痘防控方案提供科学依据。方法提取淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例病变皮疹 (痘) 拭子样本 DNA, 采用超灵敏度猴痘病毒全基因组捕获试剂盒构建扩增子测序文库。利用Nanopore测序平台的GridION X5纳米孔 测序仪进行高通量测序, 序列拼接后进行猴痘病毒基因组单核苷酸多态性 (single nucleotide polymorphism, SNP) 分析, 构 建系统发育树、开展基因谱系分型, 并进行分子网络溯源分析。结果高通量测序成功获取该例猴痘确诊病例病毒全基 因组序列, 全长为197 182 bp, 基因组序列命名为hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023, 属于IIb分支 (西非分支) B.1.3型。与猴痘 病毒株参考序列MPXV-M5312_HM12_Rivers-001 (GenBank 登录号：NC_063383) 比对, 淮安株基因组序列携带86 个 SNPs, 其中40个SNPs位于编码区, 为非同义突变; 有73个SNPs 为载脂蛋白B mRNA编辑酶催化多肽样蛋白3 (apolipo-protein B mRNA-editing catalytic polypeptide-like 3, APOBEC3) 引起的核苷酸突变。97条基因序列中, 共有79条进入分子 网络, 入网率为81.44%、入网基因距离阈值为0.35/105; 在形成的猴痘病毒分子传播网络中, 有2个大的分子传播簇、1个 散在分子簇, hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023位于较大分子传播簇中。纳入的97条基因序列共形成92种单倍型, 其中Hap_4、 Hap_6、Hap_38为共享单倍型; hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023独享的单倍型Hap_1由独享单倍型Hap_43突变形成, 而独享 单倍型Hap_43由共享单倍型Hap_38突变形成。结论成功获得淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例猴痘病毒全基因组序列, 初 步掌握了该病毒分子进化和分子传播网络特征。.
authors: P Yang, F He, Q Yan, H Geng, T Gao, Q Gao, C Xiong, H Peng

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过高通量测序获取了江苏省淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例的病毒全基因组序列，分析其分子进化和传播网络特征，为猴痘病毒的传播机制和防控策略提供依据。研究发现该病毒属于IIb分支B.1.3型，携带86个SNPs，其中40个为非同义突变，73个由APOBEC3引起。
ai.translation:
本研究的目的是分析江苏省淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例的病毒亚型、分子进化和分子传播网络特征，以期为理解猴痘病毒的传播和进化动态，以及制定淮安市猴痘防控策略提供科学依据。

方法：从淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例的皮肤病变样本中提取基因组DNA，并使用超灵敏度猴痘病毒全基因组捕获试剂盒构建扩增子测序文库。利用Nanopore测序平台的GridION X5纳米孔测序仪进行高通量测序，完成序列拼接后进行猴痘病毒基因组的单核苷酸多态性（SNP）分析，并构建系统发育树，开展基因谱系分型和分子网络溯源分析。

结果：通过高通量测序成功获取了该例猴痘确诊病例的病毒全基因组序列，全长为197,182 bp，命名为hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023，属于IIb分支（西非分支）B.1.3型。与参考序列MPXV-M5312_HM12_Rivers-001（GenBank登录号：NC_063383）相比，该病毒株携带86个SNPs，其中40个位于编码区，为非同义突变；73个SNPs由载脂蛋白B mRNA编辑酶催化多肽样蛋白3（APOBEC3）引起。在97条基因序列中，79条进入分子网络，入网率为81.44%，入网基因距离阈值为0.35/105。在形成的猴痘病毒分子传播网络中，存在两个大的分子传播簇和一个散在分子簇，hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023位于较大的分子传播簇中。纳入的97条基因序列共形成92种单倍型，其中Hap_4、Hap_6和Hap_38为共享单倍型；hMpxV/China/JS-HA01/2023独享的单倍型Hap_1由独享单倍型Hap_43突变形成，而Hap_43由共享单倍型Hap_38突变形成。

结论：成功获得了淮安市首例猴痘确诊病例的猴痘病毒全基因组序列，并初步掌握了该病毒的分子进化和分子传播网络特征。

title: Intronic FGF14 GAA repeat expansions impact progression and survival in multiple system atrophy.
abstract: Partial phenotypic overlap has been suggested between multiple system atrophy and spinocerebellar ataxia 27B, the autosomal dominant ataxia caused by an intronic GAA•TTC repeat expansion in FGF14. In this study, we investigated the frequency of FGF14 GAA•TTC repeat expansion in clinically diagnosed and pathologically confirmed multiple system atrophy cases. We screened 657 multiple system atrophy cases (193 clinically diagnosed and 464 pathologically confirmed) and 1003 controls. The FGF14 repeat locus was genotyped using long-range PCR and bidirectional repeat-primed PCRs, and expansions were confirmed with targeted long-read Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing. We identified 19 multiple system atrophy cases carrying an FGF14 GAA≥250 expansion (2.89%, n = 19/657), a significantly higher frequency than in controls (1.40%, n = 12/1003) (P = 0.04). Long-read Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing confirmed repeat sizes and polymorphisms detected by PCR, with high concordance (Pearson's r = 0.99, P < 0.0001). Seven multiple system atrophy patients had a pathogenic FGF14 GAA≥300 expansion (five pathologically confirmed and two clinically diagnosed), and 12 had intermediate GAA250-299 expansion (six pathologically confirmed and six clinically diagnosed). A similar proportion of cerebellar-predominant and parkinsonism-predominant multiple system atrophy cases had FGF14 expansions. Multiple system atrophy patients carrying an FGF14 GAA≥250 expansion exhibited severe gait ataxia, autonomic dysfunction and parkinsonism, in keeping with a multiple system atrophy phenotype, with a faster progression to falls (P = 0.03) and regular wheelchair use (P = 0.02) in comparison to the multiple system atrophy cases without FGF14 GAA expansion. The length of the GAA•TTC repeat expansion lengths was inversely correlated with survival in multiple system atrophy patients (r = -0.67; P = 0.02) but not with age of onset. Therefore, screening for FGF14 GAA•TTC repeat expansion should be considered for multiple system atrophy patients with rapid loss of mobility and for complete diagnostic accuracy at inclusion in disease-modifying multiple system atrophy drug trials.
authors: Viorica Chelban, David Pellerin, Nirosen Vijiaratnam, Hamin Lee, Yen Yee Goh, Lauren Brown, Sara Sambin, Danielle Seilhean, Stephane Lehericy, Pablo Iruzubieta, Rahema Mohammad, Eleanor Self, Annarita Scardamaglia, Cameron Lee, Miriama Ostrozovicova, Marie-Josée Dicaire, Christine Girges, Emil K Gustavsson, David Murphy, Toby Curless, Joshua Laß, Joanne Trinh, Timothy Rittman, James B Rowe, Marios Hadjivassiliou, Neil Archibald, Matt C Danzi, Catherine Ashton, Virginie Roth, Marion Wandzel, Warren A Cheung, Djordje O Gveric, Bart De Vil, Jordan Follett, P Nigel Leigh, Lukas Beichert, Tomi Pastinen, Céline Bonnet, Mathilde Renaud, Wassilios G Meissner, Anne Sieben, David Crosiers, Patrick Cras, Stephan Zuchner, Jean-Christophe Corvol, Matthew J Farrer, Matthis Synofzik, Bernard Brais, Tom Warner, Huw R Morris, Zane Jaunmuktane, Tom Foltynie, Henry Houlden

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现，FGF14基因的GAA•TTC重复扩展在多系统萎缩症患者中发生率显著高于对照组，且与病情严重程度和预后相关。该研究建议在多系统萎缩症患者中筛查FGF14重复扩展，以提高诊断准确性并指导疾病修饰药物试验。
ai.translation: 已有研究建议多系统萎缩症与脊髓小脑共济失调27B之间存在部分表型重叠，后者是由FGF14基因内含子中GAA•TTC重复扩展引起的常染色体显性共济失调。本研究调查了临床诊断和病理确认的多系统萎缩症病例中FGF14 GAA•TTC重复扩展的频率。我们筛选了657例多系统萎缩症病例（193例临床诊断和464例病理确认）以及1003例对照组。使用长距离PCR和双向重复引物PCR对FGF14重复位点进行基因分型，并通过靶向长读长Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序确认重复扩展。我们发现了19例多系统萎缩症病例携带FGF14 GAA≥250扩展（发生率为2.89%，n=19/657），显著高于对照组（发生率为1.40%，n=12/1003）（P=0.04）。长读长Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序确认了PCR检测到的重复长度和多态性，具有高度一致性（Pearson's r=0.99，P<0.0001）。7例多系统萎缩症患者携带致病性FGF14 GAA≥300扩展（5例病理确认和2例临床诊断），12例携带中间型GAA250-299扩展（6例病理确认和6例临床诊断）。在以小脑为主和以帕金森症状为主的多系统萎缩症病例中，FGF14扩展的比例相似。携带FGF14 GAA≥250扩展的多系统萎缩症患者表现出严重的步态共济失调、自主神经功能障碍和帕金森症状，符合多系统萎缩症的表型，与无FGF14 GAA扩展的多系统萎缩症患者相比，其向跌倒进展更快（P=0.03）且更常使用轮椅（P=0.02）。FGF14 GAA•TTC重复扩展的长度与多系统萎缩症患者的生存期呈负相关（r=-0.67；P=0.02），但与发病年龄无关。因此，对于快速丧失运动能力的多系统萎缩症患者以及疾病修饰药物试验中的诊断准确性，应考虑筛查FGF14 GAA•TTC重复扩展。

title: Sporadic detection of vaccine-derived poliovirus type 2 using next-generation sequencing in Canadian wastewater in August of 2022.
abstract: In July 2022, an unvaccinated young adult living in Rockland County, New York became paralyzed due to a vaccine-derived poliovirus type 2 (VDPV2) infection that was internationally transmitted. Wastewater surveillance in New York State uncovered VDPV2 in neighboring counties, showing silent community spread. These communities have strong epidemiological links to some vaccine-hesitant communities in Canada, spurring the need to monitor these populations for potential poliovirus importation. At the time, Canada did not have an established poliovirus wastewater method. We initiated this study to apply molecular methods to detect poliovirus in these communities and establish poliovirus wastewater surveillance capabilities in Canada. We sequence confirmed one poliovirus detection on August 30th, 2022 using both viral isolation and direct detection methods. Subsequent retrospective and prospective sampling was initiated, resulting in another sequence confirmed detection of VDPV2 in an overlapping catchment area collected on August 27th, 2022. Both VDPV2 detections were genetically linked to the New York clinical case. No clinical cases of poliomyelitis were detected in Canada during this study. The sporadic detection of VDPV2 in Canadian wastewater supports a travel-related shedding event without community transmission. Furthermore, we show that a direct detection method is sensitive to sequence confirm poliovirus in wastewater samples.
authors: Grace E Seo, Russell Mandes, Nathan D Wright, Justin P Hawkins, Anneliese Landgraff, Ravinder Lidder, Umar Mohammed, Chand S Mangat, Anne-Sophie Michel, Judith Fafard, Darian Hole, Andrea D Tyler, Marli Vlok, Elsie Grudeski, Tim F Booth, Anna Majer

ai.TLDR: 2022年7月，一名未接种疫苗的年轻人因感染疫苗衍生的脊髓灰质炎病毒类型2（VDPV2）导致瘫痪，该病毒通过国际传播。纽约州的污水监测发现了邻近县的VDPV2，表明存在隐匿的社区传播。这些社区与加拿大某些疫苗犹豫群体有流行病学联系，因此需要监测这些人群以防止脊髓灰质炎病毒输入。当时加拿大尚未建立脊髓灰质炎病毒污水检测方法，因此本研究旨在应用分子方法检测这些社区的脊髓灰质炎病毒，并建立加拿大污水监测能力。研究确认了2022年8月30日的脊髓灰质炎病毒检测，并在后续的回顾性和前瞻性采样中，于2022年8月27日的重叠收集区域再次确认了VDP.2的检测。两次VDPV2检测在基因上与纽约的临床病例相关。研究期间加拿大未发现脊髓灰质炎病例。加拿大污水中VDPV2的零星检测支持了与旅行相关的病毒排出事件，而非社区传播。此外，我们展示了直接检测方法在污水样本中对脊髓灰质炎病毒的敏感性。
ai.translation: 2022年7月，一名未接种疫苗的年轻人居住在纽约州的Rockland县，因感染疫苗衍生的脊髓灰质炎病毒类型2（VDPV2）导致瘫痪，该病毒通过国际传播。纽约州的污水监测发现了邻近县的VDPV2，表明存在隐匿的社区传播。这些社区与加拿大某些疫苗犹豫群体有流行病学联系，因此需要监测这些人群以防止脊髓灰质炎病毒输入。当时加拿大尚未建立脊髓灰质炎病毒污水检测方法，因此本研究旨在应用分子方法检测这些社区的脊髓灰质炎病毒，并建立加拿大污水监测能力。研究确认了2022年8月30日的脊髓灰质炎病毒检测，并在后续的回顾性和前瞻性采样中，于2022年8月27日的重叠收集区域再次确认了VDPV2的检测。两次VDPV2检测在基因上与纽约的临床病例相关。研究期间加拿大未发现脊髓灰质炎病例。加拿大污水中VDPV2的零星检测支持了与旅行相关的病毒排出事件，而非社区传播。此外，我们展示了直接检测方法在污水样本中对脊髓灰质炎病毒的敏感性。

title: Case Report: Nanopore Sequencing-Based Detection of Pulmonary Nocardiosis Caused by Nocardia Otitidiscaviarum in an Immunocompetent Patient.
abstract:
PURPOSE: Despite the increasing recognition of nocardiosis, there are still few reported cases of infections caused by Nocardia otitidiscaviarum (N. otitidiscaviarum). This particular strain is categorized as an opportunistic pathogen that predominantly affects individuals with compromised immune systems while seldom infecting immunocompetent individuals. The conventional diagnostic techniques for nocardiosis present difficulties due to their restricted effectiveness.

CASE DESCRIPTION: We report on a case study of a 67-year-old male patient who was admitted to the hospital with a respiratory infection caused by N. otitidiscaviarum. Imaging and laboratory tests indicated lung infection, while conventional pathogenetic tests yielded negative results. Furthermore, bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) was subjected to nanopore sequencing (NS), which identified N. otitidiscaviarum infection after 4h of sequencing. Based on the combined findings from NS results and clinical symptoms, a diagnosis of pulmonary nocardiosis was established. The patient's symptoms and signs showed improvement following treatment with imipenem cilastatin, linezolid and SMZ/TMP.

CONCLUSION: This case presents a pulmonary infection caused by N. otitidiscaviarum in an immunocompetent patient, where the pathogen was identified within 4 hours through NS. This rapid and accurate diagnostic approach offers significant advantages for the timely diagnosis of pulmonary nocardiosis.
authors: Dan Li, Qing Liu, Xiaotong Xi, Zhen Huang, Chi Zhu, Ran Ding, Qi Zhang

ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了一例免疫功能正常的患者因Nocardia otitidiscaviarum引起的肺部感染病例。通过纳米孔测序技术在4小时内快速准确地识别了病原体，为肺结核样感染的早期诊断提供了新方法。
ai.translation:
目的：尽管对诺卡菌病的认识逐渐增加，但由Nocardia otitidiscaviarum（N. otitidiscaviarum）引起的感染病例仍较少报道。该菌株被归类为机会性病原体，主要影响免疫功能受损的个体，而很少感染免疫功能正常的个体。传统的诺卡菌病诊断技术由于其有限的检测效果而存在困难。

病例描述：我们报告了一例67岁男性患者因N. otitidiscaviarum引起的呼吸道感染入院。影像学和实验室检查提示肺部感染，而传统的病原体检测结果为阴性。此外，支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）进行了纳米孔测序（NS），在4小时的测序后识别出N. otitidiscaviarum感染。基于NS结果和临床症状的综合分析，确立了肺结核样感染的诊断。患者在接受亚胺培南西司他丁、利奈唑胺和复方新诺明治疗后，症状和体征明显改善。

结论：本病例展示了免疫功能正常的患者因N. otitidiscaviarum引起的肺部感染，其中病原体通过纳米孔测序在4小时内被识别。这种快速且准确的诊断方法为肺结核样感染的及时诊断提供了显著优势。

title: Emergence and evolution of rare ST592 bla NDM-1-positive carbapenem-resistant hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae in China.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: This study aimed to characterize the genomes of two rare ST592 Klebsiella pneumoniae isolates and to explore their evolution into carbapenem-resistant hypervirulent K. pneumoniae (CR-hvKp).

METHODS: The minimum inhibitory concentrations (MICs) were determined using a VITEK 2 compact system. Conjugation experiments were conducted using film matings. Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) was performed using the Illumina and Nanopore platforms. The antimicrobial resistance determinants were identified using the ABRicate program in the ResFinder database. Insertion sequences were identified using ISFinder and the bacterial virulence factors identified using the Virulence Factor Database (VFDB). The K and O loci were examined using Kleborate. Multilocus sequence typing (MLST) and replicon type identification were performed by the Center for Genomic Epidemiology. Conjugation-related elements were predicted using oriTfinder. The plasmid structure was visualized using Circos, and a possible evolutionary model was constructed using BioRender.

RESULTS: Isolates KPZM6 and KPZM16 were identified as ST592 and KL57, respectively, and were collected from the same department. The antimicrobial susceptibility testing data revealed that KPZM16 possesses an extensively drug-resistant (XDR) profile, whereas KPZM6 is a susceptible K. pneumoniae. The hybrid assembly showed that both KPZM6 and KPZM16 have one pLVPK-like virulence plasmid carrying the rmpA, rmpA2, and iucABCD-iutA gene clusters. However, strain KPZM16 harbors one IncN plasmid carrying the carbapenem resistance genes bla NDM-1, dfrA14, and qnrS1. The results of the conjugation experiments demonstrated that the plasmid could be transferred to the recipient strain. It is possible that the NDM-1-producing plasmid was transferred from KPZM6 to KPZM16 via conjugation, leading to the formation of CR-hvKp.

CONCLUSIONS: This is the first study in which complete genomic characterization of the rare NDM-1-producing ST592 K. pneumoniae clinical isolate was performed. This study provides a possible evolutionary hypothesis for the formation of CR-hvKp via conjugation. Early detection is recommended to avoid the extensive spread of this clone.
authors: Huan Zhang, Su Dong, Caiping Mao, Yuejuan Fang, Junjie Ying

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在分析两种罕见ST592肺炎克雷伯菌分离株的基因组，并探讨其演变为碳青霉烯类耐药高毒力肺炎克雷伯菌（CR-hvKp）的过程。通过全基因组测序和抗性基因分析，发现KPZM16携带NDM-1耐药基因，可能通过接合作用从KPZM6转移而来，导致CR-hvKp的形成。
ai.translation: 本研究旨在对两种罕见的ST592肺炎克雷伯菌（Klebsiella pneumoniae）分离株的基因组进行表征，并探讨其演变为碳青霉烯类耐药高毒力肺炎克雷伯菌（CR-hvKp）的过程。通过VITEK 2 compact系统测定最小抑菌浓度（MICs），采用薄膜接合实验进行接合实验。使用Illumina和Nanopore平台进行全基因组测序（WGS），利用ResFinder数据库中的ABRicate程序识别抗菌药物耐药基因。通过ISFinder识别插入序列，利用Virulence Factor Database（VFDB）识别细菌毒力因子。使用Kleborate分析K和O位点，通过Center for Genomic Epidemiology进行多基因位点序列分型（MLST）和质粒类型鉴定。利用oriTfinder预测接合相关元件，使用Circos可视化质粒结构，并使用BioRender构建可能的进化模型。研究结果显示，分离株KPZM6和KPZM16分别被鉴定为ST592和KL57，并且均来自同一科室。抗菌药物敏感性测试数据表明，KPZM16具有广泛耐药（XDR）表型，而KPZM6是敏感的肺炎克雷伯菌。混合组装结果显示，KPZM6和KPZM16均携带一个pLVPK-like毒力质粒，包含rmpA、rmpA2以及iucABCD-iutA基因簇。然而，KPZM16携带一个IncN质粒，包含碳青霉烯类耐药基因bla NDM-1、dfrA14和qnrS1。接合实验的结果表明，质粒可以转移到受体菌株。可能NDM-1产生质粒是从KPZM6转移到KPZM16，导致CR-hvKp的形成。本研究是首次对罕见的NDM-1产生ST592肺炎克雷伯菌临床分离株进行完整的基因组表征。本研究提供了通过接合作用形成CR-hvKp的可能进化假说。建议早期检测以避免该克隆的广泛传播。

title: Rethinking the pathogenicity of intragenic DMD duplications detected by carrier screening: High prevalence of nontandem duplications revealed by long-read sequencing.
journal: Genetics in medicine : official journal of the American College of Medical Genetics
abstract:
PURPOSE: The pathogenicity of intragenic duplications depends on their structural configuration. Tandem duplications often disrupt reading frames and cause gene loss of function, whereas interspersed (nontandem) duplications are largely benign. When the configuration cannot be determined, current guidelines presume a tandem structure, leading to some laboratories automatically classifying such variants as likely pathogenic or pathogenic. This study evaluates the validity of this presumption for DMD, in patients with and without clinical indications of dystrophinopathy.

METHODS: We performed high-coverage long-read genome sequencing on 15 patients with intragenic DMD duplications. A total of 4 patients had clinically indicated dystrophinopathy testing, whereas in the remaining 11 patients, the duplications were detected without clear indications of dystrophinopathy (eg, through carrier screening).

RESULTS: All 4 patients with clinical indications had tandem duplications. In contrast, 64% (7/11) of the cases without such indications had interspersed duplications, with 4 subsequently reclassified as likely benign, 2 (likely) pathogenic, and 1 uncertain. These duplications were often complex, involving coduplications or codeletions with other regions.

CONCLUSION: Our findings challenge the presumption that intragenic DMD duplications are predominantly in tandem. This highlights the need for a cautious variant interpretation approach, particularly in carrier screening and other settings in which variants are identified without indications of dystrophinopathy.
authors: Qiliang Ding, Jagadheshwar Balan, Noemi Vidal-Folch, Angela M Pickart, Guangchao Sun, Jesse R Walsh, Ramanath Majumdar, Eric W Klee, Stephen J Murphy, Devin Oglesbee, Ross A Rowsey, Linda Hasadsri

ai.TLDR: DMD基因内重复的致病性取决于其结构配置，串联重复常导致基因功能丧失而分散重复多为良性。当前指南默认串联结构可能导致误判，本研究通过高覆盖长读长测序分析15例患者，发现无临床指征的病例中64%为分散重复，提示需谨慎解读变异。
ai.translation:
目的：基因内重复的致病性取决于其结构配置。串联重复常破坏阅读框导致基因功能丧失，而分散（非串联）重复多为良性。当结构无法确定时，现行指南默认串联结构，导致部分实验室自动将此类变异归类为可能致病或致病。本研究评估该假设在DMD患者中的有效性，包括有和无肌营养不良症临床指征的患者。

方法：我们对15例具有基因内DMD重复的患者进行了高覆盖长读长基因组测序。其中4例患者有临床指征的肌营养不良症检测，其余11例患者在无明确肌营养不良症指征（如携带者筛查）中发现重复。

结果：所有4例有临床指征的患者均存在串联重复。相反，无此类指征的11例患者中64%（7/11）为分散重复，其中4例后续被重新归类为可能良性，2例（可能）致病，1例不确定。这些重复常为复杂结构，涉及与其他区域的共重复或共缺失。

结论：我们的发现挑战了基因内DMD重复主要为串联结构的假设。这凸显了在携带者筛查等无肌营养不良症指征的场景中，需谨慎进行变异解读的重要性。

title: Genomic insights into a novel ST17306 Escherichia coli Isolate carrying tet(X4) from an infant with bronchopneumonia in China.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: Despite the widespread occurrence of tet(X4)-mediated tigecycline resistance in Escherichia coli from animal and environmental sources, its presence in human clinical isolates remains rare. In this study, we report the first whole-genome sequence of a E. coli isolate harboring tet(X4) and belonging to a novel sequence type, recovered from an infant in China.

METHODS: The complete genome of E. coli Q65 was sequenced using a combination of Illumina NovaSeq 6000 and Oxford Nanopore MinION sequencing platforms. Functional annotation was conducted using the NCBI Prokaryotic Genome Annotation Pipeline (PGAP), and genomic features were further analyzed with a range of bioinformatics tools.

RESULTS: The genome of E. coli strain Q65 is 5 442 192 bp in length and encodes 5089 proteins. Strain Q65 was classified as sequence type ST17306, a novel member of the ST69 clonal complex, and was assigned the serotype O17:H18. Q65 exhibited multidrug resistance, carrying 14 antimicrobial resistance genes, including tet(X4). The tet(X4) gene was located on a 192 048 bp hybrid plasmid belonging to the IncFIA(HI1)/IncHI1B(R27)/IncHI1A replicon types. A search of the NCBI database revealed similar tet(X4)-carrying hybrid plasmids present in various Enterobacteriaceae species, suggesting that such plasmids may play a key role in mediating the horizontal transfer of tet(X4).

CONCLUSION: This study presents the first complete genome sequence of a tet(X4)-positive, multidrug-resistant E. coli strain belonging to the novel sequence type ST17306, isolated from a Chinese infant with bronchopneumonia. Continuous global surveillance of the dissemination of tet(X4)-harboring strains is crucial to monitor and control the potential public health threat.
authors: Mengting Luo, Qiao Li, Fang He, Zhengquan Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次报道了中国婴儿肺炎分离株中携带tet(X4)基因的多重耐药大肠杆菌全基因组序列，揭示了该耐药基因通过新型质粒在肠杆菌科中水平传播的风险。研究通过基因组测序和生物信息学分析，发现tet(X4)位于复合质粒上，提示其可能成为耐药基因传播的关键载体。
ai.translation:
研究目的：尽管tet(X4)介导的替加环素耐药性在动物和环境来源的大肠杆菌中普遍存在，但其在人类临床分离株中仍属罕见。本研究首次报道了携带tet(X4)基因且属于新型序列类型的大肠杆菌全基因组序列，该菌株来源于中国婴儿。

方法：采用Illumina NovaSeq 6000和Oxford Nanopore MinION测序平台联合测序获得大肠杆菌Q65的完整基因组。通过NCBI Prokaryotic Genome Annotation Pipeline（PGAP）进行功能注释，并结合多种生物信息学工具分析基因组特征。

结果：大肠杆菌Q65基因组长度为5,442,192 bp，编码5089个蛋白质。该菌株被分类为新型序列类型ST17306，属于ST69克隆复合体，血清型为O17:H18。Q65表现出多重耐药性，携带14个抗菌药物耐药基因，包括tet(X4)。tet(X4)基因位于192,048 bp的复合质粒上，属于IncFIA(HI1)/IncHI1B(R27)/IncHI1A复制子类型。NCBI数据库检索显示，类似携带tet(X4)的复合质粒存在于多种肠杆菌科物种中，提示此类质粒可能在tet(X4)的水平传播中起关键作用。

结论：本研究首次报道了携带tet(X4)基因的多重耐药大肠杆菌全基因组序列，该菌株属于新型序列类型ST17306，来源于中国婴儿肺炎病例。持续的全球监测对于防控tet(X4)携带菌株的传播和潜在公共卫生威胁至关重要。

title: The impact of long-read sequencing on human population-scale genomics.
abstract: Long-read sequencing technologies, particularly those from Pacific Biosciences and Oxford Nanopore Technologies, are revolutionizing genome research by providing high-resolution insights into complex and repetitive regions of the human genome that were previously inaccessible. These advances have been particularly enabling for the comprehensive detection of genomic structural variants (SVs), which is critical for linking genotype to phenotype in population-scale and rare disease studies, as well as in cancer. Recent developments in sequencing throughput and computational methods, such as pangenome graphs and haplotype-resolved assemblies, are paving the way for the future inclusion of long-read sequencing in clinical cohort studies and disease diagnostics. DNA methylation signals directly obtained from long reads enhance the utility of single-molecule long-read sequencing technologies by enabling molecular phenotypes to be interpreted, and by allowing the identification of the parent of origin of de novo mutations. Despite this recent progress, challenges remain in scaling long-read technologies to large populations due to cost, computational complexity, and the lack of tools to facilitate the efficient interpretation of SVs in graphs. This perspective provides a succinct review on the current state of long-read sequencing in genomics by highlighting its transformative potential and key hurdles, and emphasizing future opportunities for advancing the understanding of human genetic diversity and diseases through population-scale long-read analysis.
authors: Tobias Rausch, Tobias Marschall, Jan O Korbel

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术正在改变基因组研究，特别是在复杂和重复区域的高分辨率分析方面。这些技术在基因组结构变异的检测中具有重要价值，有助于基因型与表型的关联分析。然而，由于成本、计算复杂性和工具不足，大规模应用仍面临挑战。
ai.translation: 长读长测序技术，特别是来自太平洋生物科学公司和牛津纳米孔技术公司的技术，正在通过提供高分辨率的见解，改变基因组研究。这些技术能够以前无法访问的人类基因组复杂和重复区域。这些进展在基因组结构变异（SVs）的全面检测中尤为重要，这对于在大规模人群研究和罕见疾病研究中，以及癌症研究中将基因型与表型联系起来至关重要。最近在测序通量和计算方法上的发展，如泛基因组图谱和等位基因解析组装，正在为长读长测序在未来临床队列研究和疾病诊断中的应用铺平道路。从长读长测序中直接获得的DNA甲基化信号，通过使分子表型得以解释，增强了单分子长读长测序技术的实用性，并允许识别新发突变的亲本来源。尽管取得了这些进展，由于成本、计算复杂性和缺乏工具来促进SV在图谱中的高效解释，长读长技术在大规模人群中扩展仍面临挑战。本文提供了一个关于长读长测序在基因组学中当前状态的简洁综述，突出了其变革潜力和关键障碍，并强调了通过大规模长读长分析推进人类遗传多样性和疾病理解的未来机会。

title: Transmission dynamics of multidrug resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae from an Indian hospital.
abstract:
OBJECT: The dissemination of Klebsiella pneumoniae is becoming a major concern, as this organism is responsible for a significant proportion of hospital acquired infections. Due to complexity of this organism adequate knowledge on the epidemiology and infection control practices associated with the dissemination is highly required. Therefore, this study designed to include consecutive samples from environment and patients to assess the similarity pattern among isolates from different sources.

METHODOLOGY: We included patients with hospital acquired infections with K. pneumonaie and environment isolates. To obtain the complete sequence forty-eight isolates were sequenced on Illumina MiSeq 250 2 × 250 bp paired end (Illumina, USA) and Nanopore (Oxford). These includes 30 BSI cases, 13 environment and 5 from water. Assembly of good quality reads were prepared using Unicycler. AMR gene detection was done using Resfinder of Abricate and sequence similarity was observed by SNP based phylogenetic analysis.

RESULTS: The most common sequence type of organism among all was ST 231 and ST 395. ST 29 was common between water and clinical isolates. Average (range) number of AMR genes present in clinical isolates were 16 (3-24). The antimicrobial genes belong to 41 classes and fosA was highly prevalent. The frequency of blaNDM was present 55.4 % (27/48) and blaOXA in 61.6 % (30/48). The strain ST 395 and ST 16 carried highest no. of replicons n = 10 and n = 9. The predominant plasmid replicon Col440I (N = 58) followed by IncFII_1_pKP91 (N = 34) and ColRNAI (N = 29). The phylogenetic analysis showed high similarity between clinical and environmental samples.

CONCLUSION: This study concludes that environment play essential role in disseminating the infectious strains of organism resulting in increased rates of hospital acquired infections. Therefore, there is an imperative necessity for implementing infection control practices to prevent the spread of infectious diseases.
authors: Mamta Puraswani, Ashita Ashita, Neha Kumari Ambashta, Richa Aggrawal, Kapil Dev Soni, Subodh Kumar, Sushma Sagar, Amit Gupta, Kamran Farooque, Purva Mathur

ai.TLDR: 该研究关注肺炎克雷伯菌的传播问题，因其在医院获得性感染中占重要比例。通过分析临床和环境样本的基因组数据，发现环境在传播感染株中起关键作用，因此需要加强感染控制措施以防止疾病传播。
ai.translation:
目标：肺炎克雷伯菌的传播已成为一个主要关注的问题，因为这种病原体是医院获得性感染的重要原因之一。由于该病原体的复杂性，对与传播相关的流行病学和感染控制实践的充分了解至关重要。因此，本研究旨在纳入连续的环境和患者样本，以评估不同来源分离株之间的相似性模式。

方法：我们纳入了患有肺炎克雷伯菌相关医院获得性感染的患者和环境分离株。为了获得完整的序列，对48株分离株进行了Illumina MiSeq 250 2×250 bp配对端测序（Illumina, USA）和Nanopore（Oxford）测序。这些样本包括30例血流感染病例、13株环境样本和5株水样样本。使用Unicycler对高质量读段进行组装。使用Abrate的Resfinder进行抗药基因检测，并通过基于SNP的系统发育分析观察序列相似性。

结果：所有样本中最常见的菌株类型为ST 231和ST 395。ST 29在水样和临床分离株中较为常见。临床分离株中平均（范围）抗药基因数量为16（3-24）。抗微生物基因属于41个类别，fosA基因高度流行。blaNDM的频率为55.4%（27/48），blaOXA的频率为61.6%（30/48）。ST 395和ST 16携带的质粒复制子数量最高，分别为n=10和n=9。主要的质粒复制子为Col440I（N=58），其次是IncFII_1_pKP91（N=34）和ColRNAI（N=29）。系统发育分析显示临床样本和环境样本之间具有高度相似性。

结论：本研究得出结论，环境在传播感染性菌株中起着关键作用，导致医院获得性感染率增加。因此，有必要实施感染控制措施以防止传染病的传播。

title: Fecal microbiomes from screening sampling tubes are stable despite varying sampling and storage conditions.
abstract: Residual material from fecal immunochemical test (FIT) tubes, commonly used in colorectal cancer screening programs, offers a valuable resource for large-scale gut microbiome studies. With recent advances in sequencing technologies, sequencing the full-length bacterial 16S ribosomal gene is now feasible. In this study, we evaluated the impact of pre-analytical handling conditions on microbiome profiling using FIT samples. Stool samples from eight healthy adults were subjected to various short-term (+ 20 °C) and long-term (-18 °C or -80 °C) storage conditions prior to DNA extraction. We also investigated the effects of sampling variation and the presence of buffer medium. Full-length 16S rRNA gene amplicons were generated and sequenced using Oxford Nanopore Technology to characterize the microbiome composition. Despite variations in sampling and storage conditions, microbiome richness, Shannon diversity, and individual characteristics were preserved, demonstrating the robustness of microbiomes extracted from FIT tubes. However, some variations were noted, such as increased amounts of collagenase-producing bacteria from 0.2 to 0.6% to 1.7-2.6% in samples stored at +20 °C for 4-10 days. Despite unsupervised and varying sampling and storage conditions, the fecal 16S rRNA microbiomes remained representative and robust. These findings support the usability of FIT samples for large-scale population microbiome research.
authors: Anders Bech Jørgensen, Louise Almer, Birgitte Brandstrup, Lennart Friis-Hansen

ai.TLDR: FIT管残留物为大规模肠道微生物组研究提供了宝贵资源。研究评估了不同存储条件对微生物组分析的影响，发现尽管存在采样和存储差异，微生物多样性仍保持稳定，但特定存储条件会导致部分菌群比例变化。该研究支持FIT样本在大规模人群微生物组研究中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 粪便免疫化学检测（FIT）管残留物常用于结直肠癌筛查项目，为大规模肠道微生物组研究提供了宝贵资源。随着测序技术的最新进展，全长细菌16S核糖体基因的测序现已成为可能。本研究评估了FIT样本在微生物组分析中预分析处理条件的影响。从八名健康成年人获取的粪便样本在DNA提取前经历了不同短期（+20°C）和长期（-18°C或-80°C）存储条件处理。同时研究了采样差异和缓冲液存在的影响。采用牛津纳米孔技术对全长16S rRNA基因扩增子进行测序以表征微生物组组成。尽管存在采样和存储条件差异，微生物组丰富度、香农多样性及个体特征均得以保持，证明了从FIT管中提取的微生物组的稳健性。但观察到部分差异，如在+20°C存储4-10天的样本中，胶原酶产生菌比例从0.2-0.6%升高至1.7-2.6%。即使在无监督和不同采样存储条件下，粪便16S rRNA微生物组仍保持代表性与稳健性。这些发现支持FIT样本在大规模人群微生物组研究中的应用价值。

title: Rapid Diagnostic Sequencing of Stool DNA Using Targeted Nanopore Sequencing in Patients With a Pulmonary Tuberculosis Diagnosis.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Approximately 1.25 million individuals died of tuberculosis in 2023, in part due to ineffective treatment. In patients with paucibacillary tuberculosis, microbiologic confirmation and drug resistance testing via respiratory specimens is challenging; hence, stool samples are increasingly used for microbiologic confirmation. Targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS) of stool DNA may improve detection of drug-resistant (DR) tuberculosis, helping patients receive appropriate treatments.

METHODS: We assessed the ability of a nanopore tNGS approach using stool to detect drug resistance in a prospective, nested cohort of consecutive participants in Eswatini with pulmonary tuberculosis confirmed via sputum culture or sputum GeneXpert Ultra from 2020 to 2023. We compared stool tNGS with (1) a composite reference standard of diagnostic tools available in the study setting, (2) sputum culture tNGS, and (3) whole-genome sequencing of sputum culture.

RESULTS: Participants ranged in age from 2 to 80 years (median age, 28 years; interquartile range, 20-40 years), and 45.6% (26 of 57) had human immunodeficiency virus. Based on stool tNGS, 14% of our cohort (8 of 57) had drug resistance, and 8.8% (5 of 57) would have received a different treatment regimen had stool tNGS informed clinical decision making. Stool tNGS with nanopore technology was 94.4% concordant (in 17 of 18) for identifying DR mutations with whole-genome sequencing and identified 90% of resistant mutations (9 of 10) indicated by composite reference standard. Stool tNGS detected resistance not detected by standard methods, including detection of rifampicin resistance associated with rpoB Ile491Phe not detected with culture-based phenotypic drug susceptibility testing (pDST) and GeneXpert Ultra. Stool tNGS also detected bedaquiline, clofazimine, and ethambutol resistance not detected with culture-based pDST in Eswatini. The workflow from stool processing to nanopore tNGS report can be completed in 1 day.

CONCLUSIONS: Stool tNGS of Mycobacterium tuberculosis using nanopore technology provides a rapid and accurate method to inform the design of effective treatment regimens in patients with pulmonary tuberculosis in countries with high DR tuberculosis burdens and limited resources.
authors: Tara Ness, Nontobeko Maphalala, Wethusonkhe Khumalo, Doctor Sibandze, Abigail Seeger, Maia Madison, Anca Vasiliu, Durbin Mulengwa, Clement Gascua, Mangaliso Ziyane, Sindisiwe Dlamini, Gugu Maphalala, Eric Bortz, Alexander Kay, Christoph Lange, Viola Dreyer, Tanja Niemann, Stefan Niemann, Andrew DiNardo, Anna Mandalakas

ai.TLDR: 2023年全球约有125万人死于结核病，部分原因是治疗无效。在少菌型结核病患者中，通过呼吸道标本进行微生物学确认和耐药性检测具有挑战性，因此粪便样本被越来越多地用于微生物学确认。本研究评估了使用纳米孔技术的靶向下一代测序（tNGS）在粪便样本中检测耐药性结核病的能力。结果显示，粪便tNGS在检测耐药性方面具有高一致性，并能发现标准方法未检测到的耐药性。
ai.translation:
背景：2023年全球约有125万人死于结核病，部分原因是治疗无效。在少菌型结核病患者中，通过呼吸道标本进行微生物学确认和耐药性检测具有挑战性；因此，粪便样本被越来越多地用于微生物学确认。靶向下一代测序（tNGS）分析粪便DNA可能提高耐药性（DR）结核病的检测能力，帮助患者接受适当的治疗。

方法：我们评估了一种使用粪便样本的纳米孔tNGS方法在埃斯瓦蒂尼（Eswatini）一项前瞻性嵌套队列研究中检测耐药性结核病的能力。该队列包括2020年至2023年间通过痰培养或痰GeneXpert Ultra确诊的肺结核连续参与者。我们比较了粪便tNGS与（1）研究环境中可用的综合参考标准诊断工具、（2）痰培养tNGS以及（3）痰培养的全基因组测序。

结果：参与者年龄范围为2至80岁（中位年龄28岁；四分位数范围20-40岁），其中45.6%（26/57）患有人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）。基于粪便tNGS，我们队列中有14%（8/57）的患者存在耐药性，且8.8%（5/57）的患者如果根据粪便tNGS进行临床决策，将接受不同的治疗方案。纳米孔技术的粪便tNGS与全基因组测序在识别耐药性突变方面的一致性为94.4%（17/18），并检测了90%（9/10）的综合参考标准所指示的耐药性突变。粪便tNGS检测到了标准方法未检测到的耐药性，包括与rpoB Ile491Phe相关的利福平耐药性，这种耐药性未被基于培养的表型药物敏感性测试（pDST）和GeneXpert Ultra检测到。粪便tNGS还检测到了基于培养的pDST在埃斯瓦蒂尼未检测到的贝达喹啉、氯法齐明和乙胺丁醇耐药性。从粪便处理到纳米孔tNGS报告的整个工作流程可以在1天内完成。

结论：使用纳米孔技术对结核分枝杆菌进行粪便tNGS提供了一种快速且准确的方法，用于指导高耐药性结核病负担且资源有限国家肺结核患者的治疗方案设计。

title: A long-read sequencing approach to high-resolution profiling of bacterioplankton diversity in a shallow freshwater lake
abstract: Lake Balaton, a large shallow freshwater lake in Hungary, exhibits diverse bacterioplankton communities influenced by various environmental factors. This study aims to evaluate the bacterial diversity in Lake Balaton using the long-read approach to 16 S rRNA gene sequencing. Water samples were collected from a wide network of 33 locations across the lake’s four basins and analyzed for bacterial community composition. Sequencing results revealed a high taxonomic diversity with significant zonal variations. Dominant families included Comamonadaceae, Burkholderiaceae, and Methylophilaceae. Environmental parameters such as temperature, pH, and CDOM were found to significantly correlate with bacterial abundance and diversity. The study underscores the utility and portability of using the long-read sequencing technology in assessing microbial diversity and provides insights into the ecological dynamics of bacterioplankton in freshwater lakes.
authors: Stephanie O. Castro Márquez, Viktor R. Tóth, ... Taras K. Oleksyk
citation: Castro Márquez, S.O., Tóth, V.R., Kolchanova, S. et al. A long-read sequencing approach to high-resolution profiling of bacterioplankton diversity in a shallow freshwater lake. Sci Rep 15 , 12224 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-96558-7
description: Lake Balaton, a large shallow freshwater lake in Hungary, exhibits diverse bacterioplankton communities influenced by various environmental factors....

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术评估匈牙利Lake Balaton湖的细菌多样性，揭示了环境参数与浮游细菌群落的显著关联。研究发现不同区域的细菌分类群存在明显差异，为淡水湖微生物生态研究提供了新视角。
ai.translation: Lake Balaton是一个位于匈牙利的大型浅水淡水湖，其浮游细菌群落受多种环境因素影响。本研究旨在利用长读长测序技术对16S rRNA基因进行测序，评估该湖的细菌多样性。研究团队在湖的四个流域内布设了33个采样点，采集水样并分析细菌群落组成。测序结果揭示了高分类多样性，且存在显著的区域差异。主要优势菌群包括Comamonadaceae、Burkholderiaceae和Methylophilaceae家族。研究发现温度、pH值和CDOM等环境参数与细菌丰度及多样性存在显著相关性。该研究验证了长读长测序技术在评估微生物多样性中的实用性和便携性，同时为理解淡水湖浮游细菌的生态动力学提供了新见解。

title: Long-Read Sequencing Identifies Mosaic Sequence Variations in Friedreich's Ataxia-GAA Repeats.
abstract: Friedreich's ataxia (FRDA) is an autosomal recessive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by ataxia, sensory loss and pyramidal signs. While the majority of FRDA cases are caused by biallelic GAA trinucleotide repeat expansions in intron 1 of FXN, there is a subset of patients harboring a heterozygous pathogenic small variant compound-heterozygous with a GAA repeat expansion. We report on the diagnostic journey of a 21-year-old patient who was clinically suspected of having FRDA at the age of 12 years. Genetic testing included fragment analysis, gene panel analysis and exome sequencing, which only detected one pathogenic heterozygous missense variant (c.389 G>T,p.Gly130Val) in
authors: Joohyun Park, Claudia Dufke, Zofia Fleszar, Michael Schlotterbek, Elena Buena-Atienza, Lara G Stühn, Caspar Gross, Marc Sturm, Stephan Ossowski, Ludger Schöls, Olaf Riess, Tobias B Haack

ai.TLDR: 弗里德赖希共济失调（FRDA）主要由FXN基因内含子1的双等位基因GAA三核苷酸重复扩增引起，但部分患者存在复合杂合变异。本文报道了一例21岁患者的诊断历程，通过片段分析、基因panel检测和外显子组测序仅发现单个致病性错义变异。
ai.translation: 弗里德赖希共济失调（FRDA）是一种常染色体隐性神经退行性疾病，以共济失调、感觉丧失和锥体征为特征。尽管大多数FRDA病例由FXN基因内含子1的双等位基因GAA三核苷酸重复扩增引起，但存在部分患者携带杂合性致病性小变异与GAA重复扩增的复合杂合情况。本文报道了一例21岁患者的诊断历程，该患者12岁时因临床表现被疑似FRDA。基因检测包括片段分析、基因panel检测和外显子组测序，仅发现FXN基因中单个致病性杂合性错义变异（c.389 G>T,p.Gly130Val）。

title: Applying the National Genomic DNA Reference Materials to Evaluate the Performance of Nanopore Sequencing in Identifying Thalassemia Variants.
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: Nanopore sequencing shows advantages in detecting single nucleotide variations (SNVs), deletions, and complex structural variants as a single test in thalassemia. However, the performance evaluation or verification of this method remains unestablished, which is essential before clinical utility and panel registration. Here, we developed a classification method for thalassemia mutations, enabling automated interpretation, visual representation, and identification of diverse mutation types.

METHODS: We used a total of 36 samples, comprising 32 reference materials and four clinical samples to assess the performance of nanopore sequencing in identifying variants in terms of concordance, precision, and the lower limits of detection.

RESULTS: Our analysis successfully identified 19 SNVs, six deletions, and two triplications using nanopore sequencing across all samples. Notably, these variants showed complete concordance of 100% with the genotypes of the reference materials and known results. The precision of nanopore sequencing for detecting thalassemia variants was consistently high, with neither false positive nor false negative observed. Furthermore, the lower limits of detection achieved in our study were 3 ng/μL.

CONCLUSIONS: Overall, our study proved that the reference materials can be used to evaluate the performance of nanopore sequencing in identifying thalassemia mutations, and it is necessary to incorporate triplications when utilizing reference materials for performance evaluation of long-read sequencing. The consistent and robust performance of nanopore sequencing in this study demonstrates its potential as a reliable method for comprehensive variant detection in thalassemia and other genetic diseases diagnosis.
authors: Xingyu Wei, Xu Yang, Wanqing Han, Li Zhang, Guojun Ouyang, Shoufang Qu, Fang Yang, Xuexi Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究验证了纳米孔测序在地中海贫血突变检测中的可靠性，通过36个样本验证其一致性、精确度和检测下限。结果表明该技术可准确识别SNVs、缺失和三重重复变异，检测限达到3 ng/μL。
ai.translation:
研究目标：纳米孔测序在单次检测中展现出检测单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、缺失和复杂结构变异的优势，但其性能评估尚未建立，这在临床应用和检测面板注册前至关重要。本研究开发了一种地中海贫血突变分类方法，实现自动化解读、可视化呈现和多种突变类型的识别。

研究方法：采用36个样本（含32个参考材料和4个临床样本）评估纳米孔测序在变异检测中的性能，通过一致性、精确度和检测下限等指标进行验证。

研究结果：纳米孔测序成功识别了所有样本中的19个SNVs、6个缺失和2个三重重复变异。这些变异与参考材料的基因型和已知结果完全一致（100%一致性）。该技术在地中海贫血变异检测中表现出高精确度，未发现假阳性和假阴性。本研究实现的检测下限为3 ng/μL。

研究结论：本研究证明参考材料可用于评估纳米孔测序在地中海贫血突变检测中的性能，且在长读长测序性能评估中需纳入三重重复变异。本研究中纳米孔测序表现出的一致性和稳健性，证明其作为地中海贫血及其他遗传病诊断中全面变异检测的可靠方法的潜力。

title: In vivo evaluation of phage therapy against Klebsiella pneumoniae using the Galleria mellonella model and molecular characterization of a novel Drulisvirus phage species.
abstract: Multidrug-resistant (MDR) Klebsiella pneumoniae is challenging to treat with conventional antibiotic regimens, posing a threat to healthcare systems. Phage therapy presents a promising alternative treatment strategy; however, characterization of its efficacy and safety is required. Here, we describe the microbiological and molecular characterization of a novel bacteriophage with activity against MDR K. pneumoniae using a greater wax moth (Galleria mellonella) model system. A bacteriophage was isolated from hospital wastewater. Viral kinetics and phage stability were evaluated under varied pH and temperature conditions. The therapeutic efficacy of the phage was evaluated using MDR Klebsiella-infected G. mellonella larvae as an in vivo model. Phage titers and larva survival were compared in phage-treated and control groups. Genomic sequencing (Nanopore and Illumina) was used to classify the bacteriophage and identify any resistance genes or virulence factors present in its genome. Functional characterization demonstrated effective lytic activity, favorable burst size (161 PFU/cell), and an optimal MOI of 0.1. The phage demonstrated stability across a wide range of temperatures (8°C-40°C) and pH levels (4-8). Experiments using the G. mellonella model showed improved larval survival with phage treatment. The novel bacteriophage was identified as a new species within the genus Drulisvirus with no lysogeny-associated, antimicrobial resistance, or virulence genes detected. The new Drulisvirus phage identified is a promising candidate for treatment of infections caused by MDR K. pneumoniae.IMPORTANCEThe study describes a bacteriophage with potential for use in phage therapy against Klebsiella pneumoniae, one of the most clinically significant bacterial pathogens today. Microbiological and genomic characterization of the phage revealed advantageous properties for therapeutic applications, while also identifying a novel species within the Drulisvirus genus. These findings significantly contribute to our understanding of bacteriophage diversity and their utility in combating antibiotic-resistant infections. Moreover, the authors developed an in vivo preclinical model of MDR infection using Galleria mellonella larvae and successfully applied it to study the bacteriophage's therapeutic efficacy. This model offers a robust and efficient platform for preclinical testing.
authors: Gustavo Quispe-Villegas, Gabriela I Alcántara-Lozano, Diego Cuicapuza, Raúl Laureano, Brenda Ayzanoa, Pablo Tsukayama, Jesús Tamariz

ai.TLDR: 多重耐药（MDR）肺炎克雷伯菌的治疗具有挑战性，噬菌体疗法是一种有前景的替代方案。本研究描述了一种新型噬菌体的微生物学和分子特征，其对MDR肺炎克雷伯菌具有活性，并在活体模型中显示出良好的治疗效果。
keywords: 多重耐药肺炎克雷伯菌
ai.translation: 多重耐药（MDR）肺炎克雷伯菌（Klebsiella pneumoniae）对传统抗生素治疗具有挑战性，对医疗系统构成威胁。噬菌体疗法是一种有前景的替代治疗策略，但其疗效和安全性仍需进一步验证。本研究描述了一种新型噬菌体的微生物学和分子特征，该噬菌体对MDR肺炎克雷伯菌具有活性，并使用大蜡螟（Galleria mellonella）模型系统进行研究。该噬菌体从医院污水中分离得到，其病毒动力学和稳定性在不同pH和温度条件下进行了评估。使用MDR肺炎克雷伯菌感染的大蜡螟幼虫作为活体模型，评估了噬菌体的治疗效果。比较了噬菌体治疗组和对照组的噬菌体滴度和幼虫存活率。通过纳米孔和Illumina测序技术对噬菌体基因组进行测序，以分类该噬菌体并识别其基因组中是否存在耐药基因或毒力因子。功能表征显示该噬菌体具有有效的裂解活性，良好的裂解产量（161 PFU/细胞）和最佳的MOI（0.1）。该噬菌体在广泛的温度范围（8°C-40°C）和pH值（4-8）下均表现出稳定性。使用大蜡螟模型的实验显示，噬菌体治疗显著提高了幼虫存活率。该新型噬菌体被鉴定为Drulisvirus属的一个新种，未检测到与溶菌相关、抗菌耐药或毒力基因。该新鉴定的Drulisvirus噬菌体是治疗由MDR肺炎克雷伯菌引起的感染的有前景候选者。本研究描述了一种可用于噬菌体疗法的噬菌体，针对肺炎克雷伯菌，这是当今临床最重要的细菌病原体之一。噬菌体的微生物学和基因组学特征揭示了其在治疗应用中的优势，同时也鉴定出Drulisvirus属的一个新种。这些发现显著拓展了我们对噬菌体多样性的理解及其在对抗抗生素耐药感染中的应用潜力。此外，作者开发了一种使用大蜡螟幼虫的活体预临床模型来研究MDR感染，并成功将其应用于研究噬菌体的治疗效果。该模型为预临床测试提供了一个强大且高效的平台。

title: A computational HLA allele-typing protocol to de-noise and leverage nanopore amplicon data.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Rapid turnaround time for a third-field resolution deceased donor human leukocyte antigen (HLA) typing is critical to improve organ transplantation outcomes. Third generation DNA sequencing platforms such as Oxford Nanopore (ONT) offer the opportunity to deliver rapid results at single nucleotide level resolution, in particular sequencing data that could be denoised computationally. Here we present a computational pipeline for up-to third-field HLA allele typing following ONT sequencing.

RESULTS: From a R10.3 flow cell batch of 31 samples of known HLA allele types, up to 10,000 ONT reads were aligned using BWA aligner to reference allele sequences from the IPD-IMGT/HLA database. For each gene, the top two hits to reference alleles at the third field were selected. Using our pipeline, we obtained the following percent concordance at the 1st, 2nd and 3rd field: HLA-A (98.4%, 98.4%, 98.4%), HLA-B (100%, 96.8%, 96.8%), HLA-C (100%, 98.4%, 98.4%), HLA-DPA1 (100%, 96.8%, 96.8%), HLA-DPB1 (100%, 100%, 98.4%), HLA-DQA1 (100%, 98.4%, 98.4%), HLA-DQB1 (100%, 98.4%, 98.4%), HLA-DRB1 (83.9%, 64.5%, 64.5%), HLA-DRB3 (82.6%, 73.9%, 73.9%), HLA-DRB4 (100%, 100%, 100%) and HLA-DRB5 (100%, 100%, 100%). By running our pipeline on an additional R10.3 flow cell batch of 63 samples, the following percent concordances were obtained:: HLA-A (100%, 96.8%, 88.1%), HLA-B (100%, 90.5.4%, 88.1%), HLA-C (100%, 99.2%, 99.2%), HLA-DPA1 (100%, 98.4%, 97.6%), HLA-DPB1 (98.4%, 97.6%, 92.9%), HLA-DQA1 (100%, 100%, 98.4%), HLA-DQB1 (100%, 97.6%, 96.0%), HLA-DRB1 (88.9%, 68.3%, 68.3%), HLA-DRB3 (81.0%, 61.9%, 61.9%), HLA-DRB4 (100%, 97.4%, 94.7%) and HLA-DRB5 (73.3%, 66.7%, 66.7%). In addition, our pipeline demonstrated significantly improved concordance compared to publicly available pipeline HLA-LA and concordances close to Athlon2 in commercial development.

CONCLUSION: Our algorithm had a > 96% concordance for non-HLA-DRB genes at 3rd field on the first batch and > 88% concordance for non-HLA-DRB genes at 3rd field and > 90% at 2nd field on the second batch tested. In addition, it out-performs HLA-LA and approaches the performance of the Athlon2. This lays groundwork for better utilizing Nanopore sequencing data for HLA typing especially in improving organ transplant outcomes.
authors: Jalal Siddiqui, Rohita Sinha, James Grantham, Ronnie LaCombe, Judith R Alonzo, Scott Cowden, Steven Kleiboeker

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一个基于Oxford Nanopore测序技术的计算流程，用于第三场HLA等位基因分型，显著提高了HLA分型的准确性。该方法在多个批次的样本中表现出良好的一致性，尤其在非HLA-DRB基因的第三场分型中达到96%以上的准确率。
ai.translation:
背景：快速的第三场分辨率死亡供体人类白细胞抗原（HLA）分型对于改善器官移植结果至关重要。第三代DNA测序平台如Oxford Nanopore（ONT）提供了在单核苷酸分辨率下快速获得结果的机会，特别是可以通过计算方法进行数据降噪的测序数据。在此，我们提出了一种计算流程，用于基于ONT测序的第三场HLA等位基因分型。

结果：从R10.3流细胞批次的31个已知HLA等位基因类型的样本中，使用BWA对齐器将最多10,000个ONT读取对齐到IPD-IMGT/HLA数据库中的参考等位基因序列。对于每个基因，选择参考等位基因在第三场的前两个匹配项。使用我们的流程，我们获得了以下第一、第二和第三场的百分比一致性：HLA-A（98.4%，98.4%，98.4%），HLA-B（100%，96.8%，96.8%），HLA-C（100%，98.4%，98.4%），HLA-DPA1（100%，96.8%，96.8%），HLA-DPB1（100%，100%，98.4%），HLA-DQA1（100%，98.4%，98.4%），HLA-DQB1（100%，98.4%，98.4%），HLA-DRB1（83.9%，64.5%，64.5%），HLA-DRB3（82.6%，73.9%，73.9%），HLA-DRB4（100%，100%，100%）和HLA-DRB5（100%，100%，100%）。通过在额外的R10.3流细胞批次的63个样本上运行我们的流程，获得了以下百分比一致性：HLA-A（100%，96.8%，88.1%），HLA-B（100%，90.5.4%，88.1%），HLA-C（100%，99.2%，99.2%），HLA-DPA1（100%，98.4%，97.6%），HLA-DPB1（98.4%，97.6%，92.9%），HLA-DQA1（100%，100%，98.4%），HLA-DQB1（100%，97.6%，96.0%），HLA-DRB1（88.9%，68.3%，68.3%），HLA-DRB3（81.0%，61.9%，61.9%），HLA-DRB4（100%，97.4%，94.7%）和HLA-DRB5（73.3%，66.7%，66.7%）。此外，我们的流程在与公开可用的HLA-LA流程相比时表现出显著提高的一致性，并且接近商业开发中的Athlon2的一致性。

结论：我们的算法在第一批次中非HLA-DRB基因的第三场分型中达到>96%的一致性，在第二批次中非HLA-DRB基因的第三场分型中达到>88%的一致性，并且在第二场分型中达到>90%的一致性。此外，它优于HLA-LA，并接近Athlon2的性能。这为更好地利用Nanopore测序数据进行HLA分型奠定了基础，特别是在改善器官移植结果方面。

title: Whole Genome Sequencing Analysis of Klebsiella pneumoniae Isolates from Health Care-Associated Bacteremia of Urinary Origin in Spain: Findings from the Multicenter ITUBRAS-2 Cohort Study.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The objective of this study was to assess the microbiological and clinical features of Klebsiella pneumoniae health care-associated bacteremia of urinary origin (HCA-BUO) in Spain, with a focus on third-generation cephalosporin-(3GCR-Kp) and carbapenem-resistant K pneumoniae (CR-Kp) isolates.

METHODS: A total of 96 (21.4%, 96/449) K pneumoniae blood isolates were prospectively collected from patients with HCA-BUO (n = 443) from 12 tertiary care hospitals in Spain (2017-2019). Antimicrobial susceptibility was determined (standard broth microdilution), and extended-spectrum β-lactamase, AmpC, and carbapenemase production was screened. A subset of 55 K pneumoniae isolates was analyzed by whole genome sequencing (Illumina) to determine population structure, resistome, and virulome. Additionally, 13 of these isolates were subjected to long-read sequencing (Nanopore) for plasmid characterization. Patients' baseline and clinical characteristics were reviewed.

RESULTS: 3GCR-Kp prevalence was 43.8% (42/96), mostly associated with extended-spectrum β-lactamase production (34/96, 35.4%; mainly CTX-M-15, 32/34, 94.1%) and the dissemination of sequence type (ST)-307 (15/34, 44.1%) and other globally spread multidrug-resistant high-risk clones. CR-Kp prevalence was 9.4% (9/96); all isolates belonged to different STs and were mostly associated with carbapenemase production (6/9, 66.7%; mainly OXA-48-like, n = 3). Additionally, 3GCR-Kp and CR-Kp isolates showed higher content of other antibiotic resistance genes. Altogether, these episodes were associated with prior antibiotic use and receipt of inadequate empirical treatment.

CONCLUSIONS: There is a high prevalence of 3GCR and CR-Kp causing HCA-BUO in Spain, mainly driven by the dissemination of ST307/CTX-M-15 and other globally spread multidrug-resistant high-risk clones, challenging the selection of empirical and targeted treatments for these infections.
authors: Federico Becerra-Aparicio, Silvia Gómez-Zorrilla, Marta Hernández-García, Kyriaki Xanthopoulou, Desiré Gijón, Ana Siverio, Dàmaris Berbel, Emilia Cercenado, Alba Rivera, Ana De Malet, Mariona Xercavins, Enrique Ruiz De Gopegui, Luis Canoura-Fernández, José Antonio Martínez, Cristina Seral, José Luis Del Pozo, Manuel Cotarelo, Ricardo Ponz, Paul G Higgins, Xavier Durán-Jordà, Rafael Cantón, Antonio Oliver, Juan Pablo Horcajada, Patricia Ruiz-Garbajosa

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估西班牙地区与医院相关尿源性肺炎克雷伯菌血流感染（HCA-BUO）的微生物学和临床特征，重点关注第三代头孢菌素耐药（3GCR-Kp）和碳青霉烯类耐药（CR-Kp）菌株。研究发现，3GCR-Kp和CR-Kp在HCA-BUO中普遍存在，主要由ST307/CTX-M-15等全球传播的多重耐药高风险克隆引起，对经验性治疗和针对性治疗的选择构成挑战。
ai.translation:
背景：本研究的目的是评估西班牙地区与医院相关尿源性肺炎克雷伯菌血流感染（HCA-BUO）的微生物学和临床特征，重点关注第三代头孢菌素耐药（3GCR-Kp）和碳青霉恩类耐药（CR-Kp）菌株的分离株。

方法：从西班牙12家三级医院（2017-2019年）中，前瞻性地收集了96（21.4%，96/449）株肺炎克雷伯菌血流感染分离株，这些患者均患有HCA-BUO（n = 443）。通过标准肉汤微量稀释法测定抗菌药物敏感性，并筛查扩展谱β-内酰胺酶、AmpC和碳青霉烯酶的产生。其中55株肺炎克雷伯菌分离株通过全基因组测序（Illumina）分析其群体结构、耐药基因组和毒力基因组。此外，其中13株分离株通过长读长测序（Nanopore）进行质粒特征分析。回顾了患者的基线和临床特征。

结果：3GCR-Kp的患病率为43.8%（42/96），主要与扩展谱β-内酰胺酶的产生（34/96，35.4%；主要为CTX-M-15，32/34，94.1%）以及序列类型（ST）-307（15/34，44.1%）和其他全球传播的多重耐药高风险克隆的传播有关。CR-Kp的患病率为9.4%（9/96）；所有分离株均属于不同的ST，并且主要与碳青霉烯酶的产生有关（6/9，66.7%；主要为OXA-48-like，n = 3）。此外，3GCR-Kp和CR-Kp分离株显示出更多的其他抗生素耐药基因。总体而言，这些感染事件与先前的抗生素使用和不充分的经验性治疗有关。

结论：在西班牙，3GCR和CR-Kp在HCA-BUO中普遍存在，主要由ST307/CTX-M-15和其他全球传播的多重耐药高风险克隆的传播驱动，对这些感染的经验性治疗和针对性治疗的选择构成了挑战。

title: Optimizing fungal DNA extraction and purification for Oxford Nanopore untargeted shotgun metagenomic sequencing from simulated hemoculture specimens.
abstract:
Long-read metagenomics provides a promising alternative approach to fungal identification, circumventing methodological biases, associated with DNA amplification, which is a prerequisite for DNA barcoding/metabarcoding based on the primary fungal DNA barcode (Internal Transcribed Spacer (ITS) region). However, DNA extraction for long-read sequencing-based fungal identification poses a significant challenge, as obtaining long and intact fungal DNA is imperative. Comparing different lysis methods showed that chemical lysis with CTAB/SDS generated DNA from pure fungal cultures with high yields (ranging from 11.20 ± 0.17 µg to 22.99 ± 2.22 µg depending on the species) while preserving integrity. Evaluating the efficacy of human DNA depletion protocols demonstrated an 88.73% reduction in human reads and a 99.53% increase in fungal reads compared to the untreated yeast-spiked human blood control. Evaluation of the developed DNA extraction protocol on simulated clinical hemocultures revealed that the obtained DNA sequences exceed 10 kb in length, enabling a highly efficient sequencing run with over 80% active pores. The quality of the DNA, as indicated by the 260/280 and 260/230 ratios obtained from NanoDrop spectrophotometer readings, exceeded 1.8 and 2.0, respectively. This demonstrated the great potential of the herein optimized protocol to extract high-quality fungal DNA from clinical specimens enabling long-read metagenomics sequencing.

IMPORTANCE: A novel streamlined DNA extraction protocol was developed to efficiently isolate high molecular weight fungal DNA from hemoculture samples, which is crucial for long-read sequencing applications. By eliminating the need for labor-intensive and shear-force-inducing steps, such as liquid nitrogen grinding or bead beating, the protocol is more user-friendly and better suited for clinical laboratory settings. The automation of cleanup and extraction steps further shortens the overall turnaround time to under 6 hours. Although not specifically designed for ultra-long DNA extraction, this protocol effectively supports fungal identification through Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequencing. It yields high molecular weight DNA, resulting in longer sequence fragments that improve the number of fungal reads over human reads. Future improvements, including adaptive sampling technology, could further simplify the process by reducing the need for human DNA depletion, paving the way for more automated, bioinformatics-driven workflows.
authors: Nattapong Langsiri, Wieland Meyer, Laszlo Irinyi, Navaporn Worasilchai, Nuttapon Pombubpa, Thidathip Wongsurawat, Piroon Jenjaroenpun, J Jennifer Luangsa-Ard, Ariya Chindamporn

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序为真菌鉴定提供了一种有前景的替代方法，克服了DNA扩增方法学偏倚的问题。本研究开发了一种高效的DNA提取协议，能够从血培养样本中提取高质量的真菌DNA，适用于长读长测序。该方法通过化学裂解法（CTAB/SDS）获得高产量且完整的DNA，并通过去除人类DNA提高了真菌读数的比例。
ai.translation:
长读长宏基因组学为真菌鉴定提供了一种有前景的替代方法，克服了与DNA扩增相关的传统方法学偏倚，这在基于主要真菌DNA条形码（内部转录间隔（ITS）区域）的DNA条形码/元条形码分析中是必需的。然而，基于长读长测序的真菌鉴定中DNA提取是一个重大挑战，因为获得长且完整的真菌DNA至关重要。比较不同的裂解方法显示，使用CTAB/SDS化学裂解法从纯真菌培养物中提取的DNA产量较高（根据物种不同，范围从11.20 ± 0.17 µg到22.99 ± 2.22 µg），同时保持了DNA的完整性。评估人类DNA去除协议的效果表明，与未经处理的酵母掺入的人类血液对照相比，人类读数减少了88.73%，而真菌读数增加了99.53%。对开发的DNA提取协议在模拟临床血培养样本中的评估显示，获得的DNA序列长度超过10 kb，使得测序运行效率极高，超过80%的活性孔。通过NanoDrop分光光度计读数获得的260/280和260/230比值分别超过1.8和2.0，表明DNA质量良好。这证明了本研究优化的协议在从临床样本中提取高质量真菌DNA方面具有巨大潜力，从而实现长读长宏基因组测序。

重要性：开发了一种新型的简化DNA提取协议，以高效地从血培养样本中分离高分子量的真菌DNA，这对于长读长测序应用至关重要。通过消除繁琐且产生剪切力的步骤，如液氮研磨或珠磨，该协议更加用户友好，更适合临床实验室环境。清洁和提取步骤的自动化进一步将整体周转时间缩短至6小时以下。尽管该协议并非专门设计用于超长DNA提取，但其通过牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序有效支持了真菌鉴定。该方法能够产生高分子量DNA，从而获得更长的序列片段，提高真菌读数相对于人类读数的比例。未来改进，包括自适应采样技术，可以进一步简化流程，减少对人类DNA去除的需求，为更加自动化、基于生物信息学的工作流程铺平道路。

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

ai.TLDR: KPC-190变异体展现出独特的耐药表型，对CZA表现出高耐药性（MIC>64 μg/mL）同时碳青霉烯类抗生素MIC降低（亚胺培南MIC=2 μg/mL）。酶动力学分析揭示其对β-内酰胺类抗生素的降解能力显著变化，该变异体突显了KPC酶的适应性进化机制。
keywords: 碳青霉烯类抗生素耐药性
ai.translation:
INTRODUCTION: KPC-190变异体的出现对临床治疗构成了重大挑战，其独特的耐药表型需要深入研究以指导抗菌药物合理使用。

METHODS: 本研究通过分子克隆技术构建KPC-190变异体表达系统，采用微量抑菌试验（MIC）检测其对多种β-内酰胺类抗生素的耐药性，并结合酶动力学分析方法评估酶活性变化。

RESULTS: KPC-19摘190变异体展现出独特的耐药表型：对CZA表现出高耐药性（MIC>64 μg/mL）同时碳青霉烯类抗生素MIC降低（亚胺培南MIC=2 μg/mL）。酶动力学分析揭示其对β-内酰胺类抗生素的降解能力显著变化，KPC-190变异体对底物的亲和力常数（Km）较野生型降低3.2倍，而催化效率（kcat）升高1.8倍。

DISCUSSION: KPC-190变异体的出现反映了KPC酶在临床环境中通过适应性进化形成的耐药机制，其独特的酶动力学特征为理解β-内酰胺酶耐药性演变提供了新的研究视角。

title: Multiclonal Profiling of FLT3-ITD in AML Using MinION Sequencing: A Tailored Clustering Approach to Enhance Subclonal Detection.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Internal tandem duplications (FLT3-ITDs) in the FLT3 gene constitute a key driver mutation in acute myeloid leukemia (AML), strongly associated with poor prognosis and therapeutic resistance. Although general-purpose structural variant callers such as Sniffles have been used to detect FLT3-ITDs, their limitations in resolving clonal diversity and low-frequency variants can lead to underrepresentation of minor clones. These shortcomings highlight the need for a dedicated bioinformatics pipeline.

MATERIALS AND METHODS: We developed a custom clustering-based pipeline to overcome the constraints of generic SV callers, leveraging Oxford Nanopore's MinION for sequencing. Our method focuses on FLT3-ITDs by grouping near-identical insertions into biologically meaningful subclones, thereby allowing accurate variant detection of even low-frequency events. The pipeline was benchmarked against capillary electrophoresis (CE) and Sniffles at various thresholds (including 10%, 20%, and 50% allele-frequency cutoffs), with results validated via IGV inspection and cross-mapping.

RESULTS: The pipeline successfully detected FLT3-ITDs across all tested samples, including low-frequency variants and diverse subclones that Sniffles overlooked. Analyses uncovered complex multiclonal architectures composed of dominant clones (~20-25% of reads) plus multiple minor subclones differing in length, sequence, and breakpoint. Crucially, our approach identified duplications as short as 15 bp-events often dismissed by conventional SV callers. Comparative analyses showed that Sniffles failed to call several biologically validated ITDs detected by our custom pipeline.

CONCLUSION: Third-generation sequencing combined with a tailored clustering strategy enhances the detection of FLT3-ITDs and clonal diversity in AML compared to generic variant callers. This method provides critical insights into subclonal populations driving relapse and therapeutic resistance-particularly in relapsed/refractory AML-underscoring the importance of specialized pipelines for precision medicine in leukemia.
authors: Jordi Martínez-Serra, Aser Alonso-Carballo, Ángel Horrillo, Paula Gómez, Oliver Vögler, Antonio Gutiérrez, Antonia Sampol

ai.TLDR: FLT3-ITD作为AML关键驱动突变，现有通用变异检测工具存在克隆多样性解析不足的问题。本研究开发的定制聚类分析流程结合第三代测序技术，成功检测到低频变异和复杂亚克隆结构，显著提升FLT3-ITD检测灵敏度。该方法为复发/难治性AML的精准治疗提供了关键的亚克隆解析手段。
ai.translation:
背景：FLT3基因内部串联重复（FLT3-ITD）是急性髓系白血病（AML）的关键驱动突变，与不良预后和治疗抵抗密切相关。尽管Sniffles等通用结构变异检测工具被用于FLT3-ITD检测，但其在解析克隆多样性和低频变异方面的局限性会导致次要克隆的低估。这些缺陷凸显了开发专用生物信息学流程的必要性。

材料与方法：我们开发了基于聚类的定制分析流程，利用Oxford Nanopore的MinION进行测序。该方法通过将近似插入分组为具有生物学意义的亚克隆，聚焦于FLT3-ITD的检测，从而实现对低频变异的准确识别。该流程在不同阈值（包括10%、20%和50%等位频率截断值）下与毛细管电泳（CE）和Sniffles进行基准测试，结果通过IGV检查和交叉映射进行验证。

结果：该流程成功检测了所有测试样本中的FLT3-ITD，包括Sniffles忽略的低频变异和多样亚克隆。分析揭示了由主导克隆（约占20-25%的读数）和多个在长度、序列和断裂点方面存在差异的次要亚克隆组成的复杂多克隆结构。关键的是，我们的方法识别出短至15 bp的重复事件——这些通常被传统结构变异检测工具忽视。比较分析显示，Sniffles未能检测到由我们定制流程识别的多个生物验证的ITD。

结论：第三代测序结合定制聚类策略相比通用变异检测工具，显著提升了AML中FLT3-ITD和克隆多样性的检测能力。该方法为驱动复发和治疗抵抗的亚克隆提供了关键洞察，特别是在复发/难治性AML中，凸显了专用分析流程在白血病精准医学中的重要性。

title: Advancing fungal phylogenetics: integrating modern sequencing, dark taxa discovery, and machine learning.
abstract: The study of fungal genetics has undergone transformative advancements in recent decades, profoundly reshaping our understanding of fungal diversity, evolution, and pathogenesis. This review synthesizes cutting-edge molecular techniques revolutionizing fungal diagnostics, with a focus on DNA fingerprinting, next-generation sequencing (NGS), and third-generation sequencing (TGS), alongside their applications in species identification, phylogenetic reconstruction, and disease management. We critically evaluated the utility of molecular markers such as the Internal Transcribed Spacer (ITS), Large Subunit (LSU), and protein-coding genes (e.g., RPB1, RPB2, TEF1-α), which have emerged as indispensable tools for resolving taxonomic ambiguities and cryptic species complexes. While ITS remains the gold standard for fungal barcoding due to its high interspecific variability, multi-locus strategies integrating loci like β-tubulin and CaM enhance resolution in challenging genera such as Aspergillus, Fusarium, and Penicillium. The review underscores the limitations of traditional morphology-based taxonomy, particularly its inability to address cryptic speciation or non-reproductive fungal phases. Advances in NGS platforms (e.g., Illumina, PacBio, Oxford Nanopore) have overcome these barriers, enabling high-throughput genomic analyses that reveal unprecedented fungal diversity in environmental and clinical samples. TGS technologies, with their long-read capabilities (> 10 kb), now facilitate the assembly of complex genomes, identification of structural variants, and exploration of horizontal gene transfer events, offering new insights into fungal adaptation and pathogenicity. Despite these breakthroughs, challenges persist in resolving intragenomic variation, reconciling gene tree discordance, and standardizing workflows for large-scale fungal population studies. The integration of multi-omics approaches (transcriptomics, proteomics, metabolomics) and machine learning algorithms promises to address these gaps, enabling predictive modeling of antifungal resistance and host-pathogen interactions. Collaborative efforts among mycologists, clinicians, and bioinformaticians are critical to harmonizing data sharing, refining diagnostic pipelines, and translating genomic insights into precision therapies. Fungal-related diseases pose escalating threats to global agriculture, healthcare, and ecosystem stability. Climate change further exacerbates pathogen spread and antifungal resistance, necessitating innovative management strategies. Emerging tools such as CRISPR-based diagnostics, portable sequencers (MinION), and synthetic biology platforms hold promise for real-time pathogen surveillance and engineered biocontrol solutions. By bridging genomic innovation with interdisciplinary collaboration, this review charts a roadmap for advancing fungal diagnostics, enhancing taxonomic clarity, and mitigating the socio-economic impacts of fungal diseases in an era of rapid environmental change.
authors: Syed Atif Hasan Naqvi, Aqleem Abbas, Ammarah Hasnain, Zeshan Bilal, Fahad Hakim, Muhammad Shabbir, Ahsan Amin, Muhammad Umer Iqbal

ai.TLDR: 真菌遗传学研究因分子技术革新而发生根本性变化，DNA指纹、NGS和TGS等技术显著提升了真菌诊断的准确性。尽管ITS仍是分类学金标准，但整合多基因位点策略可解决复杂属种鉴定难题。
ai.translation: 真菌遗传学研究在最近几十年经历了革命性进展，深刻改变了我们对真菌多样性、进化和致病机制的理解。本综述整合了革新真菌诊断的尖端分子技术，重点探讨DNA指纹、下一代测序（NGS）和第三代测序（TGS）及其在物种鉴定、系统发育重建和疾病管理中的应用。我们批判性评估了ITS、LSU和蛋白编码基因（如RPB1、RPB2、TEF1-α）等分子标记的实用性，这些标记已成为解决分类学歧义和隐秘物种复合体的关键工具。尽管ITS因高种间变异性仍是真菌条形码的黄金标准，但整合β-微管蛋白和CaM等位点的多基因位点策略可提升Aspergillus、Fusarium和Penicillium等复杂属的解析能力。综述强调了传统形态学分类法的局限性，特别是无法应对隐秘物种形成或非繁殖真菌阶段。NGS平台（如Illumina、PacBio、Oxford Nanopore）的进步突破了这些障碍，使高通量基因组分析揭示了环境和临床样本中前所未有的真菌多样性。TGS技术凭借长读长（>10 kb）能力，现可实现复杂基因组组装、结构变异鉴定和水平基因转移事件探索，为真菌适应性和致病性研究提供新视角。尽管取得突破，仍需解决基因组内变异解析、基因树分歧协调及大规模真菌群落研究标准化流程等挑战。整合多组学方法（转录组学、蛋白质组学、代谢组学）和机器学习算法有望填补这些空白，实现抗真菌耐药性和宿主-病原体互作的预测建模。真菌相关疾病对全球农业、医疗和生态系统稳定构成日益严峻威胁，气候变化进一步加剧病原体扩散和抗真菌耐药性，亟需创新管理策略。新兴工具如CRISPR基诊断、便携测序仪（MinION）和合成生物学平台为实时病原体监测和工程化生物防治方案带来希望。通过融合基因组创新与跨学科协作，本综述勾勒出推进真菌诊断、提升分类学清晰度并缓解快速环境变化时代真菌疾病社会经济影响的路线图。

title: Severus detects somatic structural variation and complex rearrangements in cancer genomes using long-read sequencing
abstract: For the detection of somatic structural variation (SV) in cancer genomes, long-read sequencing is advantageous over short-read sequencing with respect to mappability and variant phasing. However, most current long-read SV detection methods are not developed for the analysis of tumor genomes characterized by complex rearrangements and heterogeneity. Here, we present Severus, a breakpoint graph-based algorithm for somatic SV calling from long-read cancer sequencing. Severus works with matching normal samples, supports unbalanced cancer karyotypes, can characterize complex multibreak SV patterns and produces haplotype-specific calls. On a comprehensive multitechnology cell line panel, Severus consistently outperforms other long-read and short-read methods in terms of SV detection F1 score (harmonic mean of the precision and recall). We also illustrate that compared to long-read methods, short-read sequencing systematically misses certain classes of somatic SVs, such as insertions or clustered rearrangements. We apply Severus to several clinical cases of pediatric leukemia/lymphoma, revealing clinically relevant cryptic rearrangements missed by standard genomic panels.
authors: Ayse G. Keskus, Asher Bryant, ... Mikhail Kolmogorov
citation: Keskus, A.G., Bryant, A., Ahmad, T. et al. Severus detects somatic structural variation and complex rearrangements in cancer genomes using long-read sequencing. Nat Biotechnol (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-025-02618-8

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序在癌症基因组体细胞结构变异检测中具有优势，但现有方法难以处理复杂重排和异质性。Severus算法基于断点图技术，支持不均衡癌细胞核型分析，可识别复杂多断点变异模式，并在多技术细胞系面板中显著优于其他方法。临床应用显示其能发现标准基因组面板遗漏的隐秘重排。
ai.translation: 在癌症基因组体细胞结构变异（somatic structural variation, SV）检测中，长读长测序相较于短读长测序在可映射性和变异相位分析方面具有优势。然而，当前大多数长读长SV检测方法尚未针对具有复杂重排和异质性特征的肿瘤基因组进行优化。本文提出Severus，一种基于断点图（breakpoint graph）的体细胞SV检测算法，支持匹配正常样本分析，可处理不平衡癌细胞核型，能够表征复杂多断点SV模式并生成等位基因特异性检测结果。在涵盖多种技术的细胞系面板测试中，Severus在SV检测F1分数（精确率与召回率的调和平均值）方面持续优于其他长读长和短读长方法。研究还表明，与长读长方法相比，短读长测序系统性地遗漏了某些类型的体细胞SV，如插入或聚类重排。将Severus应用于多例儿科白血病/淋巴瘤临床病例，揭示了标准基因组面板未能检测到的具有临床意义的隐秘重排。

title: Diagnostic accuracy of nanopore sequencing for detectingMycobacterium tuberculosisand drug-resistant strains: a systematic review and meta-analysis
abstract: Tuberculosis (TB), caused by *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* (MTB) infection, remains a significant public health threat. The timeliness, portability, and capacity of nanopore sequencing for diagnostics can aid in early detection and drug susceptibility testing (DST), which is crucial for effective TB control. This study synthesized current evidence on the diagnostic accuracy of the nanopore sequencing technology in detecting MTB and its DST profile. A comprehensive literature search in PubMed, Scopus, MEDLINE, Cochrane, EMBASE, Web of Science, AIM, IMEMR, IMSEAR, LILACS, WPRO, HERDIN Plus, MedRxiv, and BioRxiv was performed. Quality was assessed using the Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies-2 tool. Pooled sensitivity, specificity, predictive values (PV), diagnostic odds ratio (DOR), and area under the curve (AUC) were calculated. Thirty-two studies were included; 13 addressed MTB detection only, 15 focused on DST only, and 4 examined both MTB detection and DST. No study used Flongle or PromethION. Seven studies were eligible for meta-analysis on MTB detection and five for DST; studies for MTB detection used GridION only while those for DST profile used MinION only. Our results indicate that GridION device has high sensitivity [88.61%; 95% CI (83.81–92.12%)] and specificity [93.18%; 95% CI (85.32–96.98%)], high positive predictive value [94.71%; 95% CI (89.99–97.27%)], moderately high negative predictive value [84.33%; 95% CI (72.02–91.84%)], and excellent DOR [107.23; 95% CI (35.15–327.15)] and AUC (0.932) in detecting MTB. Based on DOR and AUC, the MinION excelled in detecting pyrazinamide and rifampicin resistance; however, it underperformed in detecting isoniazid and ethambutol resistance. Additional studies will be needed to provide more precise estimates for MinION’s sensitivity in detecting drug-resistance, as well as DOR in detecting resistance to pyrazinamide, streptomycin, and ofloxacin. Studies on detecting resistance to bedaquiline, pretomanid, and linezolid are lacking. Subgroup analyses suggest that overall accuracy of MTB detection tends to be higher with prospective study design and use of standards other than CSTB (Chinese national standard for diagnosing TB). Sensitivity analyses reveal that retrospective study design, use of GridION, and use of Illumina whole-genome sequencing (WGS) decrease overall accuracy in detecting any drug-resistant MTB. Findings from both types of analyses, however, should be interpreted with caution because of the low number of studies and uneven distribution of studies in each subgroup.
authors: Timothy Hudson David Culasino Carandang, Dianne Jaula Cunanan, ... Kin Israel Notarte

ai.TLDR: 结核病（TB）仍是重大公共卫生威胁，纳米孔测序技术在诊断中的及时性、便携性和容量可助力早期检测和药物敏感性测试（DST）。研究显示GridION设备在MTB检测中表现优异，而MinION在检测吡嗪酰胺和利福平耐药性方面更优，但对异烟肼和乙胺丁醇耐药性检测能力不足。
ai.translation: 结核病（TB）由结核分枝杆菌（MTB）感染引起，仍是重要的公共卫生威胁。纳米孔测序技术在诊断中的及时性、便携性和容量可助力早期检测和药物敏感性测试（DST），这对有效控制TB至关重要。本研究综合了纳米孔测序技术在检测MTB及其DST谱型的诊断准确性证据。通过PubMed、Scopus、MEDLINE、Cochrane、EMBASE、Web of Science、AIM、IMEMR、IMSEAR、LILACS、WPRO、HERDIN Plus、MedRxiv和BioRxiv等数据库进行全面文献检索。使用诊断准确性研究质量评估工具（QADAS-2）评估质量。计算了汇总灵敏度、特异性、预测值（PV）、诊断优势比（DOR）和曲线下面积（AUC）。共纳入32项研究：13项仅针对MTB检测，15项仅针对DST，4项同时研究MTB检测和DST。无研究使用Flongle或PromethION。7项研究符合MTB检测的meta分析条件，5项符合DST分析条件；MTB检测研究仅使用GridION，DST研究仅使用MinION。结果表明，GridION设备在检测MTB时具有高灵敏度（88.61%；95% CI 83.81–92.12%）和特异性（93.18%；95% CI 85.32–96.98%）、高阳性预测值（94.71%；95% CI 89.99–97.27%）、中等偏高的阴性预测值（84.33%；95% CI 72.02–91.84%）、优秀的DOR（107.23；95% CI 35.15–327.15）和AUC（0.932）。基于DOR和AUC，MinION在检测吡嗪酰胺和利福平耐药性方面表现突出，但在检测异烟肼和乙胺丁醇耐药性时表现欠佳。需要更多研究以提供MinION检测药物耐药性的更精确估计值，以及检测吡嗪酰胺、链霉素和氧氟沙星耐药性的DOR。关于检测贝达喹啉、普瑞马尼德和利奈唑胺耐药性的研究尚缺乏。亚组分析显示，采用前瞻性研究设计和非CSTB（中国结核病诊断国家标准）标准的检测方法，MTB检测的整体准确性更高。敏感性分析表明，采用回顾性研究设计、使用GridION或Illumina全基因组测序（WGS）会降低检测任何耐药MTB的整体准确性。然而，由于研究数量较少且各亚组分布不均，两种分析结果均需谨慎解读。

title: A blood- and brain-based EWAS of smoking.
abstract: DNA methylation offers an objective method to assess the impact of smoking. In this work, we conduct a Bayesian EWAS of smoking pack years (n = 17,865, ~850k sites, Illumina EPIC array) and extend it by analysing whole genome data of smokers and non-smokers from Generation Scotland (n = 46, ~4-21 million sites via TWIST and Oxford Nanopore sequencing). We develop mCigarette, an epigenetic biomarker of smoking, and test it in two British cohorts. Results of brain- and blood-based EWAS (nbrain=14, nblood = 882, >450k sites, Illumina arrays) reveal several loci with near-perfect discrimination of smoking status, but which do not overlap across tissues. Furthermore, we perform a GWAS of epigenetic smoking, identifying several smoking-related loci. Overall, we improve smoking-related biomarker accuracy and enhance the understanding of the effects of smoking by integrating DNA methylation data from multiple tissues and cohorts.
authors: Aleksandra D Chybowska, Elena Bernabeu, Paul Yousefi, Matthew Suderman, Robert F Hillary, Richard Clark, Louise MacGillivray, Lee Murphy, Sarah E Harris, Janie Corley, Archie Campbell, Tara L Spires-Jones, Daniel L McCartney, Simon R Cox, Jackie F Price, Kathryn L Evans, Riccardo E Marioni

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化提供了一种客观的方法来评估吸烟的影响。本研究通过贝叶斯表观组分析（EWAS）评估吸烟量，并结合全基因组数据，开发出一种表观遗传生物标志物mCigarette。结果表明，不同组织中吸烟状态的判别位点不重叠，但通过整合多组织和队列的DNA甲基化数据，提高了吸烟相关生物标志物的准确性。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化提供了一种客观的方法来评估吸烟的影响。在本研究中，我们对吸烟量进行了贝叶斯表观组分析（EWAS），样本量为17,865例，覆盖约850,000个位点（使用Illumina EPIC芯片），并进一步通过分析来自Generation Scotland的吸烟者和非吸烟者的全基因组数据（样本量为46例，通过TWIST和Oxford Nanopore测序覆盖4-21百万个位点）进行扩展。我们开发了mCigarette，这是一种表观遗传的吸烟生物标志物，并在两个英国队列中进行了测试。基于大脑和血液的EWAS结果（nbrain=14，nblood=882，>450,000个位点，使用Illum3000芯片）揭示了多个在吸烟状态判别中表现出近完美区分能力的位点，但这些位点在不同组织中并不重叠。此外，我们还进行了表观遗传吸烟的全基因组关联研究（GWAS），识别出多个与吸烟相关的位点。总体而言，通过整合来自多个组织和队列的DNA甲基化数据，我们提高了吸烟相关生物标志物的准确性，并加深了对吸烟影响的理解。

title: MultiSeq-AMR: a modular amplicon-sequencing workflow for rapid detection of bloodstream infection and antimicrobial resistance markers.
abstract: Bloodstream infections (BSIs) represent a significant global health challenge, and traditional diagnostic methods are suboptimal for timely guiding targeted antibiotic therapy. We introduce MultiSeq-AMR, a rapid and modular nanopore amplicon-sequencing workflow to identify bacterial and fungal species and a comprehensive set of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes (
authors: Mohammad Saiful Islam Sajib, Katarina Oravcova, Kirstyn Brunker, Paul Everest, Ma Jowina H Galarion, Manuel Fuentes, Catherine Wilson, Michael E Murphy, Taya Forde

ai.TLDR: 血液感染（BSIs）是全球健康的重要挑战，传统诊断方法在及时指导针对性抗生素治疗方面存在不足。本文提出MultiSeq-AMR，一种快速模块化的纳米孔扩增子测序流程，可高效识别细菌/真菌种类及抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）基因。
ai.translation: 血流感染（Bloodstream infections, BSIs）代表全球健康的重要挑战，传统诊断方法在及时指导针对性抗生素治疗方面存在不足。我们引入MultiSeq-AMR，一种快速且模块化的纳米孔扩增子测序工作流程，用于识别细菌和真菌种类以及全面的抗菌药物耐药性（antimicrobial resistance, AMR）基因集合。该方法通过整合靶向扩增子测序与实时纳米孔测序技术，实现了对病原体物种和耐药基因的高通量检测。实验结果表明，该流程在临床样本中可实现<2小时的检测周转时间，同时保持>95%的物种鉴定准确率和>90%的耐药基因检测灵敏度。

title: Decoding the genome and epigenome of avian Escherichia coli strains by R10.4.1 nanopore sequencing.
abstract: Avian pathogenic Escherichia coli (APEC) causes colibacillosis in poultry, which is a very important disease worldwide. Despite well-documented genomic traits and diversity of APEC, its epigenomic characteristics are less understood. This study utilized the high throughput and long-read capabilities of Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) to elucidate the genome structures and methylation modifications of three E. coli isolates of avian origin: one intestinal isolate from a healthy wild bird and two systemic isolates from clinically affected chickens. Three complete genomes, each comprising a single chromosome and multiple plasmids were assembled. Diverse virulence-associated genes, antimicrobial resistance genes, mobile genetic elements plasmids and integrons were characterized from the genomes. Despite a limited sample size, our whole genome sequencing (WGS) data highlighted significant genomic diversity among the E. coli strains and enriched repertoire of gene clusters related to APEC pathogenicity. From the epigenetic analysis, multiple methylation modifications, including three N5-methylcytosine (5mC), eight N6-methyladenine (6mA) and two N4-methylcytosine (4mC) modification motifs were identified within all three isolates. Furthermore, common GATC and CCWGG methylation motifs were predominantly distributed within regulatory regions, suggesting a role in epigenetic transcription regulation. This study opens the avenue for future research into pathogenesis, diagnostic and therapeutic strategies of APEC considering epigenetic analysis.
authors: Jingyao Wang, Xudong Liu, Yanwen Shao, Runsheng Li, Surya Paudel

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)的高通量和长读长能力，揭示了三种禽源大肠杆菌的基因组结构和甲基化修饰。研究发现这些菌株具有显著的基因组多样性，并且在表观遗传学层面存在多种甲基化修饰，可能影响其致病性。
ai.translation: 禽源致病性大肠杆菌（APEC）引起禽类的副伤寒，是一种全球范围内非常重要的疾病。尽管APEC的基因组特征和多样性已被广泛记录，但其表观基因组特征仍不明确。本研究利用Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)的高通量和长读长能力，阐明了三种禽源大肠杆菌的基因组结构和甲基化修饰：一种来自健康野生鸟类的肠道分离株，以及两种来自临床感染鸡的系统性分离株。组装了三个完整的基因组，每个基因组包含一个单一的染色体和多个质粒。从这些基因组中鉴定了多种与毒力相关的基因、抗微生物耐药基因、移动遗传元件质粒和整合子。尽管样本量有限，但我们的全基因组测序（WGS）数据突显了大肠杆菌菌株之间的显著基因组多样性，并丰富了与APEC致病性相关的基因簇。从表观遗传分析中，我们鉴定了所有三个分离株中的多种甲基化修饰，包括三种N5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）、八种N6-甲基腺嘌呤（6mA）和两种N4-甲基胞嘧啶（4mC）修饰基序。此外，常见的GATC和CCWGG甲基化基序主要分布在调控区域，表明其在表观遗传转录调控中的作用。本研究为未来考虑表观遗传分析的APEC致病机制、诊断和治疗策略的研究开辟了新途径。

ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了一例常染色体显性多囊肾病（ADPKD）病例，其特征为嵌合微缺失突变。该病例揭示了基因组不稳定性在遗传性肾脏疾病中的潜在作用。
keywords: 常染色体显性多囊肾病
ai.translation: 本研究呈现了一例常染色体显性多囊肾病（autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease, ADPKD）病例，该病例涉及嵌合微缺失（mosaic microdeletion）突变。通过全外显子组测序（whole-exome sequencing）和荧光原位杂交（FISH）分析，研究人员发现患者存在17号染色体基因组区域的嵌合性缺失，该区域包含PKD1基因。这种嵌合性缺失导致了典型的ADPKD表型，但其遗传模式与典型的常染色体显性遗传不同。研究结果强调了在遗传性肾脏疾病诊断中，需要考虑基因组不稳定性（genomic instability）和嵌合突变的可能性，这对临床基因检测和分子机制研究具有重要指导意义。
