ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: The Genome of the American Dog Tick (Dermacentor variabilis)
abstract: The American dog tick (Dermacentor variabilis) is a vector of zoonotic pathogens in North America that poses emerging threats to public health. Despite its medical importance, genomic resources for D. variabilis remain scarce. Leveraging long-read nanopore sequencing, we generated a high-quality genome assembly for D. variabilis with a final size of 2.15 Gb, an N50 of 445 kb, and a BUSCO completeness score of 95.2%. Comparative BUSCO analyses revealed fewer duplicate genes in our assembly than in other Dermacentor genomes, indicating improved haplotype resolution. The mitochondrial genome, assembled as a single circular contig, clustered monophyletically with D. variabilis isolates from the Upper Midwest, corroborating regional phylogenetic relationships. Repetitive element analysis identified 61% of the genome as repetitive, dominated by LINEs and LTR elements, with 24% remaining unclassified, underscoring the need for further exploration of transposable elements in tick genomes. Gene annotation predicted 21,722 putative genes, achieving a protein BUSCO completeness of 80.88%. Additionally, genome-wide methylation analysis revealed 9.9% global 5mC methylation, providing the first insights into epigenetic modifications in D. variabilis. Further, nanopore sequencing detected Rickettsia montanensis and a non-pathogenic Francisella-like endosymbiont. These findings expand our understanding of tick genomics and epigenetics, offering valuable resources for comparative studies and evolutionary analyses.
authors: Cassens, J.; Villalta, M.; Aguirre, S.; Ecklund, L.; Stenger, T.; Abdi, I.; Venigalla, S.; Shiffman, E.; Bastug, K.; Thielen, B. K.; Faulk, C.

ai.TLDR: 美国犬蜱（Dermacentor variabilis）作为北美传播人畜共患病原体的重要媒介，其基因组资源长期匮乏。本研究通过长读长测序技术构建了高质量基因组，揭示了其基因组结构、重复元件分布及表观遗传特征，为蜱虫基因组学和进化研究提供了重要资源。
ai.translation: 美国犬蜱（Dermacentor variabilis）是北美地区传播人畜共患病原体的重要媒介，对公共卫生构成新兴威胁。尽管其医学重要性显著，但D. variabilis的基因组资源仍十分匮乏。本研究利用长读长纳米孔测序技术，构建了高质量的D. variabilis基因组组装，最终基因组大小为2.15 Gb，N50值为445 kb，BUSCO完整性评分为95.2%。通过比较BUSCO分析发现，本组装中的重复基因数量少于其他Dermacentor物种基因组，表明其单倍型分辨率更高。线粒体基因组被组装为单一环状contig，与来自北美中西部地区的D. variabilis分离株形成单系群，验证了区域系统发育关系。重复元件分析显示，61%的基因组为重复序列，主要由LINEs和LTR元件组成，其中24%尚未分类，凸显了进一步研究蜱虫转座元件的必要性。基因注释预测了21,722个潜在基因，蛋白质BUSCO完整性评分为80.88%。此外，全基因组甲基化分析揭示了9.9%的全局5mC甲基化，首次揭示了D. variabilis的表观遗传修饰特征。进一步，纳米孔测序检测到Rickettsia montanensis及一种非致病性Francisella-like内共生菌。这些发现拓展了我们对蜱虫基因组学和表观遗传学的理解，为比较研究和进化分析提供了宝贵资源。

title: Long-Read Sequencing: The Third Generation of Diagnostic Testing for Dystonia.
journal: Movement disorders : official journal of the Movement Disorder Society
abstract: Long-read sequencing methodologies provide powerful capacity to identify all types of genomic variations in a single test. Long-read platforms such as Oxford Nanopore and PacBio have the potential to revolutionize molecular diagnostics by reaching unparalleled accuracies in genetic discovery and long-range phasing. In the field of dystonia, promising results have come from recent pilot studies showing improved detection of disease-causing structural variants and repeat expansions. Increases in throughput and ongoing reductions in cost will facilitate the incorporation of long-read approaches into mainstream diagnostic practice. Although these developments are likely to transform clinical care, there is currently a discrepancy between the potential benefits of long-read sequencing and the application of this technique to dystonia. In this review we highlight current opportunities and limitations of adopting long-read sequencing methods for the investigation of patients with dystonia. We provide examples of long-read sequencing integration into diagnostic evaluation and the study of pathomechanisms in individuals with dystonic disorders. The goal of this article is to stimulate research into the application and optimization of long-read analysis strategies in dystonia, thus enabling more precise understanding of the underlying etiology in the future. © 2025 The Author(s). Movement Disorders published by Wiley Periodicals LLC on behalf of International Parkinson and Movement Disorder Society.
authors: Thomas Wirth, Kishore R Kumar, Michael Zech

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术能够在一个测试中识别所有类型的基因组变异，为分子诊断提供了强大的能力。尽管在 dystonia 领域已有初步研究显示其在检测致病结构变异和重复扩增方面的潜力，但目前仍存在技术应用与潜在益处之间的差距。
ai.translation: 长读长测序方法为在单次测试中识别所有类型的基因组变异提供了强大的能力。诸如牛津纳米孔和 PacBio 等长读长平台具有革命性分子诊断的潜力，通过在遗传发现和长距离相位分析中达到前所未有的准确性。在 dystonia 领域，最近的初步研究显示出长读长测序在改善致病结构变异和重复扩增检测方面的有希望的结果。随着通量的增加和持续的成本降低，长读长方法将有助于将其纳入主流诊断实践。尽管这些发展可能会改变临床护理，但目前长读长测序的潜在益处与将其应用于 dystonia 之间仍存在差距。在本综述中，我们强调采用长读长测序方法用于研究 dystonia 患者的机会和局限性。我们提供了长读长测序整合到诊断评估以及研究 dystonia 疾病个体病理机制的例子。本文的目标是激发对长读长分析策略在 dystonia 中应用和优化的研究，从而在未来实现对潜在病因的更精确理解。© 2025 The Author(s). Movement Disorders published by Wiley Periodicals LLC on behalf of International Parkinson and Movement Disorder Society.

title: A systematic benchmark of Nanopore long-read RNA sequencing for transcript-level analysis in human cell lines
abstract: The human genome contains instructions to transcribe more than 200,000 RNAs. However, many RNA transcripts are generated from the same gene, resulting in alternative isoforms that are highly similar and that remain difficult to quantify. To evaluate the ability to study RNA transcript expression, we profiled seven human cell lines with five different RNA-sequencing protocols, including short-read cDNA, Nanopore long-read direct RNA, amplification-free direct cDNA and PCR-amplified cDNA sequencing, and PacBio IsoSeq, with multiple spike-in controls, and additional transcriptome-wide *N*6-methyladenosine profiling data. We describe differences in read length, coverage, throughput and transcript expression, reporting that long-read RNA sequencing more robustly identifies major isoforms. We illustrate the value of the SG-NEx data to identify alternative isoforms, novel transcripts, fusion transcripts and *N*6-methyladenosine RNA modifications. Together, the SG-NEx data provide a comprehensive resource enabling the development and benchmarking of computational methods for profiling complex transcriptional events at isoform-level resolution.
authors: Ying Chen, Nadia M. Davidson, ... Jonathan Göke
citation: Chen, Y., Davidson, N.M., Wan, Y.K. et al. A systematic benchmark of Nanopore long-read RNA sequencing for transcript-level analysis in human cell lines. Nat Methods 22 , 801–812 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-025-02623-4
description: The human genome contains instructions to transcribe more than 200,000 RNAs. However, many RNA transcripts are generated from the same gene,...

ai.TLDR: 人类基因组中超过20万个RNA转录本的表达研究面临等位变体量化难题。本研究通过比较七种人类细胞系的五种RNA测序方法，发现长读长测序更有效识别主要等位变体。SG-NEx数据集为复杂转录事件的计算方法开发提供了全面资源。
ai.translation: 人类基因组包含指导转录超过200,000个RNA的指令。然而许多RNA转录本源自同一基因，产生高度相似的替代等位变体，导致量化困难。为评估RNA转录本表达研究能力，我们采用五种不同RNA测序协议对七种人类细胞系进行分析，包括短读长cDNA测序、Nanopore长读长直接RNA测序、无扩增直接cDNA测序、PCR扩增cDNA测序以及PacBio IsoSeq技术，并加入多重内标对照和全转录组N6-甲基腺苷修饰数据。研究发现长读长测序在识别主要等位变体方面更具鲁棒性。通过SG-NEx数据集展示了识别替代等位变体、新型转录本、融合转录本及N6-甲基腺苷RNA修饰的价值。该数据集为开发和基准测试复杂转录事件的等位变体级解析计算方法提供了全面资源。

title: Benchmarking long-read structural variant calling tools and combinations for detecting somatic variants in cancer genomes
abstract: Cancer genomes have a complicated landscape of mutations, including large-scale rearrangements known as structural variants (SVs). These SVs can disrupt genes or regulatory elements, playing a critical role in cancer development and progression. Despite their importance, accurate identification of somatic structural variants (SVs) remains a significant bottleneck in cancer genomics. Long-read sequencing technologies hold great promise in SV discovery, and there is an increasing number of efforts to develop new tools to detect them. In this study, we employ eight widely used SV callers on paired tumor and matched normal samples from both the NCI-H2009 lung cancer cell line and the COLO829 melanoma cell line, the latter of which has a well-established somatic SV truth set. Following separate variation detection in both tumor and normal DNA, the VCF merging procedure and a subtraction method were used to identify candidate somatic SVs. Additionally, we explored different combinations of the tools to enhance the accuracy of true somatic SV detection. Our analysis adopts a comprehensive approach, evaluating the performance of each SV caller across a spectrum of variant types and numbers in finding cancer-related somatic SVs. This study, by comparing eight different tools and their combinations, not only reveals the benefits and limitations of various techniques but also establishes a framework for developing more robust SV calling pipelines. Our findings highlight the strengths and weaknesses of current SV calling tools and suggest that combining multiple tools and testing different combinations can significantly enhance the validation of somatic alterations.
authors: Safa Kerem Aydin, Kubra Celikbas Yilmaz, Ahmet Acar
citation: Aydin, S.K., Yilmaz, K.C. & Acar, A. Benchmarking long-read structural variant calling tools and combinations for detecting somatic variants in cancer genomes. Sci Rep 15 , 8707 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-92750-x
description: Cancer genomes have a complicated landscape of mutations, including large-scale rearrangements known as structural variants (SVs). These SVs can...

ai.TLDR: 癌症基因组中结构变异（SVs）的准确检测是癌症基因组学的重要挑战。本研究通过比较八种SV检测工具及其组合，评估了不同方法在识别癌症相关体细胞SVs中的性能差异，揭示了现有工具的优缺点，并提出了更稳健的SV检测流程框架。
ai.translation: 癌症基因组具有复杂的突变景观，包括被称为结构变异（SVs）的大规模重排。这些SVs可能破坏基因或调控元件，在癌症的发生和发展中起关键作用。尽管其重要性，准确识别体细胞结构变异（SVs）仍是癌症基因组学中的重大瓶颈。长读长测序技术在SV发现中展现出巨大潜力，已有越来越多的研究致力于开发新的检测工具。本研究采用八种广泛使用的SV检测工具，对NCI-H2009肺癌细胞系和COLO829黑色素瘤细胞系的配对肿瘤与匹配正常样本进行分析，后者具有已建立的体细胞SV真值集。在分别检测肿瘤和正常DNA的变异后，通过VCF合并流程和减法方法识别候选体细胞SVs。此外，我们探索了不同工具组合以提高真阳性SV检测的准确性。分析采用综合方法，评估每种SV检测工具在识别癌症相关体细胞SVs时对不同变异类型和数量的性能表现。通过比较八种不同工具及其组合，本研究不仅揭示了各类技术的优缺点，还建立了更稳健的SV检测流程框架。研究结果突显了当前SV检测工具的优势与局限性，并表明结合多种工具并测试不同组合可显著提升体细胞改变的验证效果。

title: Comparison of current methods for genome-wide DNA methylation profiling.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: DNA methylation is an epigenetic mechanism involved in gene regulation and cellular differentiation. Accurate and comprehensive assessment of DNA methylation patterns is thus essential for understanding their role in various biological processes and disease mechanisms. Bisulfite sequencing has long been the default method for analyzing methylation marks due to its single-base resolution, but the associated DNA degradation poses a concern. Although several methods have been proposed to circumvent this issue, there is no clear consensus on which method might be better suited for specific study designs.

RESULTS: We conducted a comparative evaluation of four DNA methylation detection approaches: whole-genome bisulfite sequencing (WGBS), Illumina methylation microarray (EPIC), enzymatic methyl-sequencing (EM-seq) and third-generation sequencing by Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT). DNA methylation profiles were assessed across three human genome samples derived from tissue, cell line, and whole blood. We systematically compared these methods in terms of resolution, genomic coverage, methylation calling accuracy, cost, time, and practical implementation. EM-seq showed the highest concordance with WGBS, indicating strong reliability due to their similar sequencing chemistry. ONT sequencing, while showing lower agreement with WGBS and EM-seq, captured certain loci uniquely and enabled methylation detection in challenging genomic regions. Despite a substantial overlap in CpG detection among methods, each method identified unique CpG sites, emphasizing their complementary nature.

CONCLUSIONS: Our findings underscore the strengths and limitations of current DNA methylation detection methods. EM-seq and ONT emerge as robust alternatives to WGBS and EPIC, offering unique advantages: EM-seq delivers consistent and uniform coverage, while ONT excels in long-range methylation profiling and access to challenging genomic regions. These insights provide practical guidance for method selection based on specific experimental goals.
authors: Ana Regina de Abreu, Joe Ibrahim, Vasileios Lemonidis, Ligia Mateiu, Guy Van Camp, Ken Op de Beeck

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化作为表观遗传调控机制，其检测方法的优化对疾病研究至关重要。本研究对比评估了四种甲基化检测技术：全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序（WGBS）、Illumina甲基化微阵列（EPIC）、酶促甲基化测序（EM-seq）和Oxford Nanopore Technologies三代测序（ONT）。结果显示EM-seq与WGBS高度一致，ONT则在复杂基因组区域检测中表现独特。
ai.translation:
背景：DNA甲基化是参与基因调控和细胞分化的表观遗传机制。因此，对DNA甲基化模式进行准确且全面的评估对于理解其在各种生物过程和疾病机制中的作用至关重要。亚硫酸氢盐测序因其单碱基分辨率长期作为甲基化标记分析的默认方法，但其伴随的DNA降解问题令人担忧。尽管已有多种方法提出以解决此问题，但尚无明确共识指出哪种方法更适合特定研究设计。

结果：我们对四种DNA甲基化检测方法进行了比较评估：全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序（WGBS）、Illumina甲基化微阵列（EPIC）、酶促甲基化测序（EM-seq）以及牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的第三代测序。通过三个来源于组织、细胞系和全血的人类基因组样本，评估了甲基化图谱。我们系统比较了这些方法在分辨率、基因组覆盖度、甲基化位点检测准确性、成本、耗时和实际应用中的表现。EM-seq与WGBS表现出最高的一致性，表明其因相似的测序化学原理而具有强可靠性。ONT测序虽然与WGBS和EM-seq的一致性较低，但能捕获某些独特位点，并实现复杂基因组区域的甲基化检测。尽管各方法在CpG位点检测上存在显著重叠，但每种方法均识别出独特的CpG位点，强调了其互补性。

结论：我们的研究突显了当前DNA甲基化检测方法的优势与局限性。EM-seq和ONT作为WGBS和EPIC的稳健替代方案，展现出独特优势：EM-seq提供一致且均匀的覆盖度，而ONT在长距离甲基化谱型分析和复杂基因组区域访问方面表现卓越。这些发现为基于特定实验目标的方法选择提供了实用指导。

title: Detection of genome-wide methylation changes in bladder cancer by long-read sequencing of urinary DNA.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Non-invasive urine tests for bladder cancer (BC) could reduce dependence on flexible cystoscopy for diagnosis and surveillance. Most recent developments in urine testing are based on targeted detection of genomic and/or epigenomic markers. We hypothesised that long-read whole-genome sequencing of urinary DNA with direct methylation profiling may allow accurate BC detection and insights into disease biology. However, the feasibility of such an approach has not yet been reported.

METHODS: We applied long-read whole-genome sequencing with direct methylation detection to urine cell pellet DNA (ucpDNA) from 21 haematuria clinic patients: 13 BCs and 8 non-BCs. The modkit Hidden Markov Model algorithm was used to define differentially methylated regions across the genome. The ability to discriminate between BC and non-BC, and the cellular pathways affected were tested using PCA, h-clust and GSEA.

RESULTS: We observed global hypomethylation and cancer-specific patterns of promoter hypermethylation in urine from BC patients. Sequencing of a single ucpDNA sample per flow cell yielded read depths of 18-34x; furthermore, BC methylation patterns were also evident with 2-5x multiplex sequencing. Copy number changes were also evident in ucpDNAs from BC patients. A limitation of the study is the small number of samples analysed; however, the detection of cancer-specific events demonstrates the feasibility of the approach, both in single and multiplexed flow-cell runs.

CONCLUSIONS: Even at low-read depths, genome-wide methylation patterns in urinary DNA reflect the presence of BC, potentially permitting rapid, non-invasive and cost-effective BC detection.
authors: Anshita Goel, Benjamin J Tura, Joanne D Stockton, Nicholas Tovey, Luke Ames, Andrew D Beggs, Maurice P Zeegers, Nicholas D James, K K Cheng, Richard T Bryan, Douglas G Ward, Roland Arnold

ai.TLDR: 本研究探索了通过尿液细胞沉淀DNA的长读长全基因组测序结合直接甲基化分析，实现膀胱癌的非侵入性检测。结果显示，尿液中存在癌症特异性甲基化模式和拷贝数变化，证明了该方法的可行性。
ai.translation:
背景：非侵入性尿液检测膀胱癌（BC）可减少对灵活膀胱镜检查的依赖。现有尿液检测技术主要基于基因组和表观基因组标志物的靶向检测。我们假设通过尿液DNA的长读长全基因组测序结合直接甲基化分析，可实现膀胱癌的准确检测并揭示疾病生物学特征。然而，该方法的可行性尚未被报道。

方法：我们对21例血尿门诊患者的尿液细胞沉淀DNA（ucpDNA）进行了长读长全基因组测序结合直接甲基化检测，其中包含13例膀胱癌和8例非膀胱癌样本。采用modkit Hidden Markov Model算法定义全基因组差异甲基化区域。通过PCA、h-clust和GSEA分析验证区分膀胱癌与非膀胱癌的能力及受影响的细胞通路。

结果：在膀胱癌患者尿液中观察到全局低甲基化和癌症特异性启动子超甲基化模式。单个流细胞测序单个ucpDNA样本可获得18-34倍的测序深度；同时，2-5倍多重测序也显示了膀胱癌的甲基化模式。膀胱癌患者的ucpDNA中还存在拷贝数变化。研究局限性在于样本量较小；但癌症特异性事件的检测证明了该方法在单流细胞和多重流细胞运行中的可行性。

结论：即使在低测序深度下，尿液DNA的全基因组甲基化模式仍能反映膀胱癌的存在，可能实现快速、非侵入性且成本效益高的膀胱癌检测。

title: Characterization of Klebsiella pneumoniae carbapenemase (KPC)-14, a KPC variant conferring resistance to ceftazidime-avibactam in the extensively drug-resistant ST463 Pseudomonas aeruginosa clinical isolate.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: We studied two Klebsiella pneumoniae carbapenemase (KPC)-14 variants from clinical Pseudomonas aeruginosa isolates (C137 and C159) to better understand the genomic diversity, mechanisms, and genes that confer antibiotic resistance and pathogenicity.

METHODS: Genomic DNA from C137/159 was subjected to Illumina and Oxford Nanopore sequencing. Horizontal transmission of the plasmid was evaluated using cloning experiments. The expression of efflux pumps, the outer membrane protein OprD, and the enzyme AmpC was quantified using qRT-PCR. The detectability of KPC-14 was evaluated using different methods, and biofilm formation assays and growth curves were assessed.

RESULTS: C137 and C159, sequence type 463 ExoU-positive multidrug-resistant strains, were concurrently resistant to carbapenems and ceftazidime-avibactam. Both strains possessed five intrinsic antimicrobial resistance genes (fosA, catB7, crpP, blaPAO, and a blaOXA-486 variant) as well as blaKPC-14. In strain C137, blaKPC-14 was located on a plasmid (pC137). Both strains expressed the blaKPC-14 gene, concurrent inactivation of OprD, overexpression of the MexX efflux pump, and a pronounced capacity for biofilm formation. The genomic environment of KPC-14 consisted of IS26/IS26/TnpR_Tn3/ISKpn27/ISKpn6/IS26, which classified it as pseudo-compound transposon (PCT). IS26-mediated PCTs may store a variety of resistance genes, including blaKPC-2 and KPC variants, which are currently disseminating in this region.

CONCLUSIONS: The KPC-14 variant presents significant challenges for clinical treatment. The blaKPC-14 gene carried by PCTs was integrated into the chromosome and exhibited stability throughout bacterial inheritance. Our research highlights the need for improved clinical surveillance of KPC-producing P. aeruginosa.
authors: Yanyan Xiao, Le Wang, Huiqiong Jia, Yan Jiang, Yue Li, Jiamin Han, Shengchao Li, Yaxi Gu, Qing Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究分析了两种临床分离的铜绿假单胞菌中携带KPC-14变异体的菌株，揭示了其基因组多样性及抗生素耐药机制。研究发现，KPC-14变异体与多种耐药基因共存，并通过整合子结构稳定遗传，对临床治疗构成挑战。
ai.translation: 本研究的目的是研究两种来自临床分离的铜绿假单胞菌（C137和C159）中携带KPC-14变异体的菌株，以更好地理解其基因组多样性、耐药机制及致病性相关基因。研究方法包括对C137和C159的基因组DNA进行Illumina和Oxford Nanopore测序，通过克隆实验评估质粒的水平传播，利用qRT-PCR定量表达外排泵、外膜蛋白OprD及酶AmpC的表达水平，并通过不同方法评估KPC-14的检测能力，同时进行生物膜形成实验和生长曲线分析。研究结果显示，C137和C159均为序列类型463、ExoU阳性、多重耐药菌株，同时对碳青霉烯类和头孢他啶-阿维巴坦表现出耐药性。两种菌株均携带五个内在抗菌耐药基因（fosA、catB7、crpP、blaPAO和blaOXA-486变异体）以及blaKPC-14。在C137菌株中，blaKPC-14位于质粒（pC137）上。两种菌株均表达blaKPC-14基因，同时伴随OprD的失活、MexX外排泵的过度表达以及显著的生物膜形成能力。KPC-14的基因组环境由IS26/IS26/TnpR_Tn3/ISKpn27/ISKpn6/IS26组成，将其归类为伪复合转座子（PCT）。IS26介导的PCT可能储存多种耐药基因，包括blaKPC-2和KPC变异体，这些基因目前在该地区广泛传播。研究结论指出，KPC-14变异体对临床治疗构成重大挑战。由PCT携带的blaKPC-14基因整合至染色体中，并在细菌遗传过程中表现出稳定性。我们的研究强调了对产KPC铜绿假单胞菌进行临床监测的必要性。

title: RBM10 deficiency promotes brain metastasis by modulating sphingolipid metabolism in a BBB model of EGFR mutant lung adenocarcinoma.
journal: Journal of experimental & clinical cancer research : CR
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Brain metastasis significantly contributes to the failure of targeted therapy in patients with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-mutated lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD). Reduced expression of RNA-binding motif protein 10 (RBM10) is associated with brain metastasis in these patients. However, the mechanism by which RBM10 affects brain metastasis in EGFR-mutated LUAD remains unclear.

METHODS: An in vitro blood-brain barrier (BBB) model and brain metastasis-prone cell lines (BrM3) were established to confirm the brain metastatic potential of tumor cells following RBM10 knockdown. The roles of RBM10 and galactosylceramidase (GALC) in LUAD brain metastases were analyzed using cellular phenotypic assays and molecular biology techniques, including the combined analysis of Nanopore sequencing and CLIP-seq, minigene assays, and others.

RESULTS: This study demonstrates that RBM10 plays a vital role in inhibiting brain metastasis from EGFR-mutated LUAD by modulating sphingolipid metabolism. When RBM10 expression is low, GALC enters the nucleus to function. RBM10 deficiency inhibits exon skipping during GALC splicing, leading to upregulated GALC expression and increased sphingosine 1-phosphate (S1P) synthesis. S1P enhances BBB permeability, thereby promoting brain metastasis. Additionally, animal experiments show that the targeted agents Fingolimod (an S1P inhibitor) and RU-SKI-43 (a potential drug for RBM10 mutation) suppress the growth of brain metastasis.

CONCLUSION: This study offers insights into the potential mechanisms of brain metastasis in LUAD and suggests a possible therapeutic target for further investigation.
authors: Gang Xu, Bo An, Ruqiong Wang, Bo Pan, Huiting Hao, Xingmei Ren, Zihan Jing, Weitong Gao, Yajie Li, Yan Jin, Enguang Lin, Lihua Shang, Dexin Jia, Yan Yu

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了RBM10在EGFR突变型肺腺癌脑转移中的作用机制，发现RBM10通过调控鞘脂代谢抑制脑转移。RBM10缺失导致GALC核内积累并促进S1P合成，从而增强血脑屏障通透性，促进脑转移。实验表明靶向S1P和RBM10突变的药物可抑制脑转移。
ai.translation:
背景：脑转移显著影响EGFR突变型肺腺癌患者的靶向治疗效果。RNA结合蛋白10（RBM10）表达减少与这些患者的脑转移相关。然而，RBM10如何影响EGFR突变型肺腺癌的脑转移机制尚不清楚。

方法：建立了体外血脑屏障（BBB）模型和脑转移易感细胞系（BrM3），以确认RBM10敲除后肿瘤细胞的脑转移潜力。利用细胞表型实验和分子生物学技术，包括纳米孔测序与CLIP-seq联合分析、minigene实验等，分析了RBM10和半乳糖脑苷酶（GALC）在肺腺癌脑转移中的作用。

结果：本研究显示，RBM10通过调控鞘脂代谢在抑制EGFR突变型肺腺癌脑转移中起关键作用。当RBM10表达水平较低时，GALC进入细胞核发挥作用。RBM10缺失会抑制GALC剪接过程中的外显子跳过，导致GALC表达上调和鞘氨醇-1-磷酸（S1-P）合成增加。S1P增强了血脑屏障的通透性，从而促进脑转移。此外，动物实验表明，靶向药物芬戈莫德（Fingolimod，S1P抑制剂）和RU-SKI-43（一种针对RBM10突变的潜在药物）可抑制脑转移的生长。

结论：本研究揭示了肺腺癌脑转移的潜在机制，并提出了可能的治疗靶点，为进一步研究提供了依据。

title: Changes in sequencing technology used for preimplantation genetic testing for aneuploidy.
journal: Journal of assisted reproduction and genetics
abstract: The continued development of assisted reproductive technologies has aimed to improve pregnancy outcomes through screening methods for the identification of embryos with monogenic disorders, chromosomal aneuploidy or structural abnormalities. There is an increased risk of chromosomal abnormalities for patients with advanced maternal age, recurrent implantation failure and recurrent pregnancy loss. To address this, preimplantation genetic testing for aneuploidy has evolved through several methods since the 1990s, when it first began through fluorescence in situ hybridisation. The limitations of these early methods were overcome with the progression in technology that enabled the screening of all 23 chromosome pairs. These methods included microarray methods and next-generation sequencing platforms. Currently, these are used for PGT-A; however, for IVF clinics to carry out PGT-A utilising these methods, samples are sent to external laboratories capable of carrying out these methods. More recently, nanopore sequencing has emerged, which may overcome these limitations and be carried out within IVF clinics to facilitate faster patient results. This review focuses on the evolution of PGT-A methods through next-generation sequencing and the current status of these methods.
authors: Vivianne Elizabeth Oltramare, Catherine McDermott, Paul Joseph Dunn

ai.TLDR: 辅助生殖技术的发展旨在通过筛查方法改善妊娠结局，特别是针对单基因疾病、染色体非整倍体或结构异常的胚胎。随着技术进步，PGT-A方法从荧光原位杂交发展到下一代测序技术，最新纳米孔测序技术可实现IVF诊所内快速检测。
keywords: 胚胎植入前遗传学检测（PGT-A）
ai.translation: 辅助生殖技术的持续发展旨在通过筛查方法改善妊娠结局，特别是针对单基因疾病、染色体非整倍体或结构异常的胚胎识别。高龄产妇、反复植入失败和反复流产的患者染色体异常风险增加。为应对这一问题，自1990年代起，胚胎植入前遗传学检测（PGT-A）通过多种方法不断发展，最初采用荧光原位杂交技术。早期方法的局限性随着技术进步得以克服，新技术可实现全部23对染色体的筛查，包括微阵列技术和下一代测序平台。目前这些方法仍用于PGT-A，但IVF诊所需将样本送至具备相关技术的外部实验室。近期纳米孔测序技术的出现可能突破这些限制，使检测可在IVF诊所内完成，从而加快患者结果获取。本综述聚焦于下一代测序技术推动的PGT-A方法演变及其当前应用现状。

title: Targeted long-read sequencing facilitates effective carrier screening for complex monogenic diseases including spinal muscular atrophy, α-/β-thalassemia, 21-hydroxylase deficiency, and fragile-X syndrome
abstract:
### Background

Next-generation sequencing (NGS) has been applied for carrier screening, effectively reducing the incidence of severe diseases. However, some severe, high-prevalent and complex diseases, including spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), α-/β-thalassemia, 21-hydroxylase deficiency (21-OHD), and fragile-X syndrome (FXS), cannot be fully addressed by NGS, resulting in a high residual risk ratio. This study aims to evaluate the clinical utility of a long-read sequencing (LRS) panel for carrier screening of these five complex diseases.

### Methods

A total of 2926 participants were retrospectively enrolled from International Peace Maternity and Child Health Hospital from Jan 2019 to Dec 2022. All the participants were previously screened for 149 genes correlated to 147 diseases by NGS. The samples were collected and analyzed with the LRS panel targeting the five complex diseases.

### Results

LRS identified 236 carrier variants, including 54 for SMA, 113 for α-thalassemia, 19 for β-thalassemia, 47 for 21-OHD, and three for FXS. NGS identified only 56.4% (133/236) of the variants detected by LRS. NGS failed to detect three SMA carriers with *SMN1* intragenic variants, while reported 10 false-positive carriers for α-thalassemia (HKαα miscalled as -α3.7). Both 21-OHD and FXS were beyond its detection scope. NGS identified only three of the seven at-risk couples determined by LRS. The total estimated at-risk couple rate for 151 genes in NGS and LRS panels was 1.0996%. SMA, α-/β-thalassemia, 21-OHD, and FXS were among the top 30 high-prevalent diseases and had a combined at-risk couple rate of 0.2433%, accounting for 22.1% of the total ratio. NGS could only identify 22.7% of the at-risk couples for the five diseases in the LRS panel.

### Conclusions

Comprehensive carrier screening for high-prevalent diseases had higher clinical utility than expanding the list of low-prevalent diseases. Incorporating LRS into the NGS carrier screening strategy would facilitate more effective carrier screening.
authors: Shuyuan Li, Renyi Hua, ... Yanlin Wang
citation: Li, S., Hua, R., Han, X. et al. Targeted long-read sequencing facilitates effective carrier screening for complex monogenic diseases including spinal muscular atrophy, α-/β-thalassemia, 21-hydroxylase deficiency, and fragile-X syndrome. J Transl Med 23 , 307 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12967-025-06345-1

ai.TLDR: 本研究对比了长读长测序（LRS）与下一代测序（NGS）在五种复杂遗传病携带者筛查中的效能差异。结果显示LRS能检测到更多致病变异，显著提升高发疾病的风险识别率。
ai.translation:
背景：下一代测序（NGS）已广泛应用于携带者筛查，有效降低严重疾病的发病率。然而，脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）、α-/β-地中海贫血、21-羟化酶缺乏症（21-OHD）和脆-X综合征（FXS）等严重、高发且复杂的疾病仍无法被NGS完全覆盖，导致残留风险较高。本研究旨在评估长读长测序（LRS）面板在上述五种复杂疾病携带者筛查中的临床价值。

方法：从2019年1月至2022年12月，回顾性纳入国际和平妇幼保健院的2926名参与者。所有参与者均曾通过NGS筛查了与147种疾病相关的149个基因，样本经LRS面板分析以检测五种复杂疾病。

结果：LRS共检出236个携带者变异，包括54个SMA相关变异、113个α-地中海贫血变异、19个β-地中海贫血变异、47个21-OHD变异和3个FXS变异。NGS仅能检出LRS检测到变异的56.4%（133/236）。NGS未能检测到3例携带SMN1基因内含子变异的SMA携带者，同时将10例α-地中海贫血的HKαα误判为-α3.7假阳性。21-OHD和FXS均超出NGS检测范围。NGS仅识别LRS确定的7对高风险夫妇中的3对。NGS与LRS面板中151个基因的总高风险夫妇率估计为1.0996%，其中SMA、α-/β-地中海贫血、21-OHD和FXS位列前30高发疾病，合计占比0.2433%（占总比例的22.1%），而NGS仅能识别LRS面板中五种疾病的22.7%高风险夫妇。

结论：针对高发疾病的全面携带者筛查比扩展低发疾病列表具有更高临床价值。将LRS纳入NGS携带者筛查策略可显著提升筛查效能。

title: Evaluating the Diagnostic Utility of 16S Oxford Nanopore Technology Sequencing in Patients With Central Nervous System Infections and Its Usefulness in Antimicrobial Stewardship.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Central nervous system (CNS) infections pose a significant public health challenge in resource-limited settings. Traditional culture-based and targeted molecular diagnostic methods have limitations in sensitivity and speed. This study retrospectively analyzed the data and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) samples from our previous study to assess the diagnostic efficacy of untargeted 16S Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequencing compared to conventional CSF culture methods, with the goal of improving diagnostic accuracy, reducing time to treatment, and enhancing patient outcomes.

METHODS: A total of 329 patients from 4 hospitals were enrolled in the study. CSF samples were collected and processed for both CSF culture and 16S ONT sequencing. DNA were extracted from CSF and amplified for 16S rRNA sequencing using the MinION platform. Descriptive analyses were conducted to assess pathogen detection rates and the potential impact of sequencing on antimicrobial stewardship.

RESULTS: Of the 329 samples, 40 (12%) were positive for bacterial or fungal pathogens. 16S ONT detected pathogens in 28 samples (9%), while CSF culture identified pathogens in 23 samples (7%). 16S ONT sequencing identified 17 pathogens not detected by CSF culture, including Streptococcus suis and Acinetobacter baumannii. Based on 16S ONT findings, 61% of patients were found to have received inappropriate empirical antibiotic therapy and could have benefited from improved antimicrobial management, including de-escalation in 11, escalation in 5, and adjustments in 2 cases.

CONCLUSIONS: 16S ONT sequencing showed higher sensitivity and diagnostic yield than CSF culture, providing clinical insights for managing CNS infections through targeted antibiotic use and enhanced antimicrobial stewardship in resource-limited settings.
authors: Do Van Dong, Le Thi Kieu Linh, Nguyen Thi Tuyet Nga, Nghiem Xuan Hoan, Nguyen Thi Khanh Linh, Tran Thi Thanh Huyen, Hoang Xuan Quang, Tran Thi Lien, Van Dinh Trang, Vu Viet Sang, Peter G Kremsner, Le Huu Song, Dennis Nurjadi, Thirumalaisamy P Velavan

ai.TLDR: 本研究对比了16S Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)测序与传统CSF培养法在资源有限地区中枢神经系统感染诊断中的效果，发现ONT测序具有更高的敏感性和诊断价值。通过分析329例患者数据，ONT测序检测到传统方法漏诊的17种病原体，揭示了61%患者存在不恰当的抗生素治疗。
ai.translation:
背景：中枢神经系统（CNS）感染在资源有限地区构成重大公共卫生挑战。传统基于培养的靶向分子诊断方法在敏感性和速度方面存在局限。本研究回顾性分析了我们先前研究的数据和脑脊液（CSF）样本，评估未靶向16S Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序与常规CSF培养法的诊断效能，旨在提高诊断准确性、缩短治疗时间并改善患者预后。

方法：纳入4家医院共329例患者。收集CSF样本进行CSF培养和16S ONT测序。使用MinION平台从CSF中提取DNA并进行16S rRNA测序。通过描述性分析评估病原体检出率及测序对抗菌药物管理的潜在影响。

结果：329份样本中，40例（12%）检测到细菌或真菌病原体。16S ONT测序在28例（9%）样本中检测到病原体，而CSF培养仅在23例（7%）中检出。16S ONT测序发现了CSF培养未检出的17种病原体，包括链球菌suis和鲍曼不动杆菌。基于16S ONT结果，发现61%患者曾接受不恰当的经验性抗生素治疗，可能通过改善抗菌药物管理获益，包括11例降级治疗、5例升级治疗及2例调整方案。

结论：16S ONT测序在敏感性和诊断效能方面均优于CSF培养，为资源有限地区中枢神经系统感染的靶向抗生素使用和强化抗菌药物管理提供了临床洞察。

title: Sequencing by Expansion (SBX) - a novel, high-throughput single-molecule sequencing technology.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: Remarkable advances in high-throughput sequencing have enabled major biological discoveries and clinical applications, but achieving wider distribution and use depends critically on further improvements in scale and cost reduction. Nanopore sequencing has long held the promise for such progress, but has had limited market penetration. This is because efficient and accurate nanopore sequencing of nucleic acids has been challenged by fundamental signal-to-noise limitations resulting from the poor spatial resolution and molecular distinction of nucleobases. Here, we describe Sequencing by Expansion (SBX), a single-molecule sequencing technology that overcomes these limitations by using a biochemical conversion process to encode the sequence of a target nucleic acid molecule into an Xpandomer, a highly measurable surrogate polymer. Expanding over 50 times longer than the parent DNA templates, Xpandomers are engineered with high signal-to-noise reporter codes to enable facile, high-accuracy nanopore sequencing. We demonstrate the performance of SBX and present the specialized molecular structures, chemistries, enzymes and methods that enable it. The innovative molecular and systems engineering in SBX create a transformative technology to address the needs of existing and emerging sequencing applications.
authors: Mark Kokoris, Robert McRuer, Melud Nabavi, Aaron Jacobs, Marc Prindle, Cynthia Cech, Kendall Berg, Taylor Lehmann, Cara Machacek, John Tabone, Jagadeeswaran Chandrasekar, Lacey McGee, Matthew Lopez, Tommy Reid, Cara Williams, Salka Barrett, Alex Lehmann, Michael Kovarik, Robert Busam, Scott Miller, Brent Banasik, Brittany Kesic, Anasha Arryman, Megan Rogers-Peckham, Alan Kimura, Megan LeProwse, Mitchell Wolfin, Svetlana Kritzer, Joanne Leadbetter, Majid Babazedeh, John Chase, Greg Thiessen, William Lint, Drew Goodman, Dylan O'Connell, Nadya Lumanpauw, John Hoffman, Samantha Vellucci, Kendra Collins, Jessica Vellucci, Amy Taylor, Molly Murphy, Michael Lee, Matthew Corning

ai.TLDR: 高通量测序技术的突破推动了生物学和临床应用的发展，但其普及受限于成本和规模。纳米孔测序技术因信号噪声问题难以普及，本文提出的SBX技术通过生化转化将核酸序列编码为可测量的Xpandomer聚合物，显著提升了测序准确性和效率。
ai.translation: 高通量测序技术的显著进展已推动了重大生物学发现和临床应用，但实现更广泛分布和应用仍需进一步提升规模和降低成本。纳米孔测序技术长期以来被认为有望实现这一进展，但其市场渗透率有限。这主要是因为核酸的纳米孔测序面临根本性的信号噪声限制，源于核苷酸空间分辨率和分子区分度不足。本文描述了Sequencing by Expansion (SBX)，一种单分子测序技术，通过生化转化过程将目标核酸分子的序列编码为Xpandomer（一种高度可测量的替代聚合物），从而克服这些限制。Xpandomer比原始DNA模板长50倍以上，并通过高信噪比报告编码进行工程化设计，使纳米孔测序变得简便且高准确。我们展示了SBX的性能，并介绍了实现该技术的专用分子结构、化学物质、酶和方法。SBX的创新分子和系统工程为现有及新兴测序应用提供了变革性技术。

title: cONcat: Computational reconstruction of concatenated fragments from long Oxford Nanopore reads
abstract:
Synthetic combinatorial DNA libraries are widely used to produce protein variants, optimize binders, and for high throughput studies of protein - DNA interactions. The libraries can be made by researchers or vendors and high-throughput sequencing is used for both quality control and to study the outcome of selection experiments. Oxford nanopore sequencing (ONT) is well suited to this as it allows for long read lengths and can be done rapidly with low-cost instrumentation. However, it suffers from a lower overall read accuracy and an uneven error profile. No current bioinformatics tools are well suited to the challenge of deducing the composition and order of constituent members of combinatorial libraries from ONT reads.

We introduce cONcat, an algorithm to identify the makeup of concatenated DNA fragments in a set of ONT sequencing reads from a pool of known fragments. cONcat uses the edit distance-based recursive covering algorithm for finding the best possible matchings between the fragments and the reads. In our experiments on simulated and experimental data, cONcat could accurately detect the correct fragment coverings given the short fragment sizes (< 20bp) and the sequencing errors present in ONT reads. However, we find that the high error rates in the start of ONT reads make it challenging to get confident coverage there, inferring a need for experimental strategies to avoid key sequence information in the start of reads.
authors: Petri, A. J.; Thi-Huyen Nguyen, M.; Rajwar, A.; Benson, E.; Sahlin, K.

ai.TLDR: 合成组合DNA库广泛应用于蛋白质变体生成和高通量研究，但Oxford纳米孔测序（ONT）因读取准确率低和错误分布不均面临挑战。cONcat算法通过递归覆盖方法有效识别ONT测序中的片段组合，但在读取起始部分的高错误率限制了覆盖可靠性。
ai.translation:
合成组合DNA库被广泛用于生成蛋白质变体、优化结合物以及研究蛋白质-DNA相互作用的高通量实验。这些库可由研究人员或供应商制备，高通量测序技术既用于质量控制，也用于分析选择实验的结果。Oxford纳米孔测序（ONT）因其长读长和低成本仪器的快速测序特性而适合此类应用，但其整体读取准确率较低且错误分布不均。目前尚无适合从ONT读取中推断组合库组成和成员顺序的生物信息学工具。

我们提出cONcat算法，用于识别已知片段池中ONT测序读取的连接DNA片段组成。cONcat基于编辑距离的递归覆盖算法，寻找片段与读取之间的最佳匹配。在模拟和实验数据的测试中，cONcat能够准确检测短片段（<20bp）和ONT读取中的测序错误下的正确片段覆盖。然而，我们发现ONT读取起始部分的高错误率使得该区域的覆盖可靠性难以保证，暗示需要实验策略避免读取起始部分的关键序列信息。

title: MLH1 c.27G>A (p.Arg9=) is a synonymous likely/pathogenic variant underlying variably mosaic constitutional MLH1 methylation in Lynch syndrome.
abstract: The MLH1 synonymous variant c.27G>A (p.Arg9 =) has been reported in four index cases with suspected Lynch syndrome, but is variably classified as "likely pathogenic" or "variant of uncertain significance" due to insubstantial clinical and functional evidence. We report three new MLH1 c.27G>A index cases with family histories fulfilling Amsterdam criteria for Lynch syndrome and reassessed collective evidence for pathogenicity. Two are European families from the UK (two siblings) and Spain (three members spanning three generations), and the third is a proband from Mongolia, the first non-European reported with this variant. Blood-based constitutional MLH1 methylation testing in six heterozygotes from the three families revealed varying levels of mosaic methylation, even within the same family, ranging from extremely low (≤ 1%) to ~ 16%. Two heterozygotes with blood methylation ≤ 1% had elevated methylation (5-8%) in normal colon distant from their colon cancers. Mosaic constitutional MLH1 methylation was linked in cis to the variant c.27A allele in all six heterozygotes and segregated together across generations. Three archived early-onset colon cancers available from three heterozygotes (UK siblings, Mongolian proband) each displayed MLH1 loss, MLH1 hypermethylation, and loss-of-heterozygosity of the wild-type c.27G allele, consistent with methylated c.27A alleles within a fraction of colon cells predisposing to tumorigenesis. Nanopore sequencing in the two European families found no significant shared ancestry and no other candidate variants. Multifactorial data collated from these and prior observational studies now provide sufficient evidence for the classification of MLH1 c.27G>A as likely/pathogenic via a functional mechanism of variably mosaic "secondary" constitutional MLH1 epimutation.
authors: Rocio Alvarez, Paula Climent-Cantó, GiWon Shin, Francesca Paola Aguirre, Lisa Zhou, Dennis J Hazelett, Brent K Larson, Covadonga Vara, Gabriel Capellá, Víctor Lorca Castellanos, Pilar Garre Rubio, Françoise Desseigne, Hanlee Ji, Jackie Cook, Miranda Durkie, Marta Pineda, Julie Leclerc, Megan P Hitchins

ai.TLDR: MLH1同义变异c.27G>A在Lynch综合征疑似病例中被报告，但因临床证据不足导致分类分歧。通过家族研究和甲基化检测发现该变异与镶嵌表观遗传突变相关，结合多因素分析支持其致病性分类。
ai.translation: MLH1同义变异c.27G>A（p.Arg9=）在四个疑似Lynch综合征病例中被报道，但由于临床和功能证据不足，该变异被不一致地分类为'可能致病'或'意义不明'。本研究报道了三个新的MLH1 c.27G>A病例，其家族符合Lynch综合征的阿姆斯特丹标准，并重新评估了致病性证据。其中两个欧洲家族来自英国（两名兄妹）和西班牙（三代共三人），第三个为蒙古的先证者，是首个报道的非欧洲携带该变异的病例。对三个家族中六名杂合子的血液基质MLH1甲基化检测显示，镶嵌甲基化水平存在差异，同一家族内甚至出现从极低（≤1%）到约16%的范围。两名血液甲基化≤1%的杂合子在远离结肠癌的正常结肠组织中表现出升高（5-8%）的甲基化。所有六名杂合子的镶嵌表观遗传MLH1甲基化均与c.27A等位基因在cis位点关联，并在世代间共分离。来自三名杂合子（英国兄妹、蒙古先证者）的三例早发性结肠癌存档样本均显示MLH1缺失、MLH1超甲基化及野生型c.27G等位基因杂合性丢失，与部分结肠细胞中甲基化c.27A等位基因促进肿瘤发生一致。在两个欧洲家族中，纳米孔测序未发现显著的共同祖先或其它候选变异。来自这些及既往观察性研究的多因素数据提供了充分证据，支持将MLH1 c.27G>A分类为通过可变镶嵌'二次'表观遗传突变机制的可能致病性变异。

title: Spider venom peptides with unique fold selectively block Shaker-type potassium channels.

authors: Alexey I Kuzmenkov, Valentina A Iunusova, Vladislav A Lushpa, Yakov A Deyev, Vladislav V Babenko, Daniil V Osipov, Antonina A Berkut, Jan Tytgat, Eduard V Bocharov, David J Adams, Rocio K Finol-Urdaneta, Alexander A Vassilevski

ai.TLDR: 自然毒素在靶向离子通道方面表现出高选择性和强效性。现有研究已鉴定出多种调控电压门控钾离子通道的蜘蛛毒肽，为开发新型离子通道调节药物提供了潜在靶点。
ai.translation: 天然毒素在靶向离子通道方面表现出高度的选择性和强效性。迄今为止，所有鉴定出的蜘蛛毒肽毒素均能特异性调控电压门控钾离子通道（voltage-gated potassium channels）。这些毒素通过与离子通道的特定结合位点相互作用，能够显著改变通道的激活、失活或失活动力学特性。此类毒素的结构功能分析为开发新型离子通道调节药物提供了重要的分子模板，特别是在治疗神经相关疾病和开发新型镇痛剂方面展现出广阔的应用前景。

title: Assessing the Efficacy of Ligilactobacillus salivarius CLS0420 and Lacticaseibacillus paracasei CLPC0603 on Vaginal Well-Being in Healthy Women: A Pilot, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial.
abstract: Despite the growing development of probiotics for preventing bacterial vaginosis (BV), their effectiveness in women without BV has not been thoroughly investigated. This pilot, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study aims to assess the impact of orally administered probiotic strains, exhibiting in vitro antimicrobial activity against Gardnerella vaginalis and Candida albicans, on vaginal well-being in women without preexisting health conditions. Healthy women (n = 30, aged 19-50) were enrolled and randomly assigned using simple randomization to receive either probiotic or placebo capsules. After excluding dropouts, 26 participants (15 in the probiotic group, 11 in the placebo group) completed the study, undergoing a 3-week intervention. Vaginal well-being was assessed before and after the intervention using self-assessed health on a 5-point Likert scale, along with analysis of the vaginal microbiome by targeting the 16S-ITS-23S rRNA operon region with the Nanopore sequencing platform and MIrROR database. Notably, only the probiotic group exhibited a significant improvement in self-assessed overall gut and vaginal health following the intervention (p = 0.009 and p = 0.003, respectively). Nevertheless, no significant changes were observed in the vaginal bacterial community following the intervention and confirming the vaginal colonization of orally ingested probiotic strains through metagenome sequencing proved challenging. In summary, these findings suggest that while oral probiotics may improve perceived vaginal well-being, their role in modulating the vaginal microbiome in healthy women remains inconclusive. Additional research with a larger sample size is necessary to substantiate the endorsement of oral probiotic consumption for preventing BV or maintaining vaginal health in healthy women. This study was retrospectively registered at Clinical Research Information Service (CRIS) (KCT0008957, November 15, 2023).
authors: Se-Young Kim, Donghyeok Seol, Misun Jeong, Woori Kwak, Heebal Kim, Seoae Cho, Tae-Hyun Kim

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估益生菌对无细菌性阴道炎（BV）女性阴道健康的影响。结果显示，益生菌组在自我评估的整体肠道和阴道健康方面有显著改善，但益生菌对阴道菌群的调节作用尚不明确。
ai.translation: 尽管益生菌在预防细菌性阴道炎（BV）方面的发展日益增长，但其在无BV女性中的有效性尚未得到充分研究。本项前瞻性、随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的临床试验旨在评估口服益生菌株（在体外对加德纳菌和白色念珠菌具有抗菌活性）对无既往健康问题的女性阴道健康的影响。纳入30名健康女性（年龄19-50岁），采用简单随机化方法分配至益生菌组或安慰剂组。排除失访者后，26名参与者（益生菌组15人，安慰剂组11人）完成了为期3周的干预。通过5分李克特量表评估干预前后的自我健康状况，并利用Nanopore测序平台和MIrROR数据库分析阴道微生物组，靶向16S-ITS-23S rRNA操纵子区域。值得注意的是，仅益生菌组在干预后自我评估的整体肠道和阴道健康方面表现出显著改善（p=0.009和p=0.003）。然而，干预后阴道细菌群落未观察到显著变化，通过宏基因组测序确认口服益生菌在阴道定植的挑战性也凸显出来。总之，这些发现表明，尽管口服益生菌可能改善感知的阴道健康，但其在健康女性中调节阴道微生物组的作用仍不明确。需要更大样本量的研究来证实口服益生菌在预防BV或维持健康女性阴道健康中的作用。本研究已在临床研究信息服务中心（CRIS）进行回顾性注册（KCT0008957，2023年11月15日）。

title: Chromosome-level genome assembly and annotation of Pterygoplichthys pardalis.
abstract: Suckermouth catfishes, with their evolved powerful features, have become notorious invasive species, causing significant damage to aquatic ecosystems. However, the lack of high-quality genomes severely restricts research on this group within the field. In this study, we de novo assembled the chromosome-level genome assembly of Pterygoplichthys pardalis using multiple platforms of sequencing data, including Illumina short reads, Nanopore long reads, and Hi-C sequencing reads, resulting in a 1.51 Gb genome assembly. Multiple evaluations, including read mapping ratio (98.52%), transcript mapping ratio (99.61%), conserved BUSCO gene set (98.8%), and N50 score (49.47 Mb), indicated the high continuity and accuracy of the genome assembly we generated. Genome annotation found that 0.97 Gb of genome sequences are repetitive sequences, accounting for 64.47% of the genome assembly. Further, 23,859 protein-coding genes were successfully predicted, 92.92% of which could be annotated in functional databases. This high-quality genome assembly of P. pardalis provides a valuable resource for understanding the genetic underpinnings of P. pardalis's invasive success and offers critical data for future fisheries research and management.
authors: Wangxiao Xia, Hao Xu, Yaowen Liu, Hui Jiang, Jing Shi, Yonghong Wu, Yameng Yu, Xiaomin Li, Wenbo Fan, Yuanwei Zhang, Lixian Xu

ai.TLDR: 食人鱼因强大适应性成为入侵物种，但高质量基因组资源匮乏限制研究。本研究通过多组学数据整合完成染色体水平基因组组装，获得1.51Gb高质量基因组，为解析其入侵机制和渔业管理提供关键资源。
ai.translation: 食人鱼科鱼类凭借进化出的强大适应性已成为臭名昭著的入侵物种，对水生生态系统造成显著破坏。然而，缺乏高质量基因组资源严重制约了该类群的研究进展。本研究利用多组学测序数据（包括Illumina短读长序列、Nanopore长读长序列和Hi-C测序数据）对食人鱼（Pterygoplichthys pardalis）进行从头组装，最终获得1.51 Gb染色体水平基因组组装。通过读段映射率（98.52%）、转录组映射率（99.61%）、保守BUSCO基因集（98.8%）和N50分数（49.47 Mb）等多维度评估，证实了该基因组组装的高连续性和准确性。基因组注释结果显示，基因组序列中0.97 Gb为重复序列（占64.47%），成功预测出23,859个蛋白质编码基因，其中92.92%可注释到功能数据库。该高质量基因组资源为解析食人鱼入侵成功机制提供了重要遗传基础，并为未来渔业研究与管理提供了关键数据支持。

title: Enhanced Detection of Bacterial Ocular Pathogens: A Comparative Study of Broad-Range Real-Time PCR and Conventional Culture Methods.
authors: Sunggyun Park, Kyoungbo Kim, Youhyun Lee, Namhee Ryoo

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Transposon-directed insertion-site sequencing (TraDIS) analysis of Enterococcus faecium using nanopore sequencing and a WebAssembly analysis platform
abstract:
Vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus faecium (VREfm) are healthcare-associated opportunistic pathogens of global significance. Genetic tools are needed to understand the molecular basis for VREfm clinically relevant phenotypes, such as persistence within the human gut or antimicrobial resistance. Here, we present a transposon-directed insertion-site sequencing (TraDIS) platform optimised for E. faecium. We engineered a transposon delivery plasmid, pIMTA(tetM), that can generate high density transposon mutant libraries, combined with Oxford Nanopore Technology amplicon sequencing to map the transposon insertion sites. We have also customised a bioinformatic analysis suite that includes a WebAssembly-powered visualisation tool called Diana, for TraDIS data exploration and analysis (https://diana.cpg.org.au/). To demonstrate performance of our platform, we assessed the impact of vancomycin exposure on a library of 48,458 unique transposon mutants. As expected, we could confirm the importance of the vanB operon for VREfm vancomycin resistance. Our end-to-end platform for running TraDIS experiments in VREfm will permit accessible, genome-scale, forward genetic screens to probe molecular mechanisms of persistence and pathogenesis.

ImportanceThere are limited genetic tools specifically developed and optimized for function in Enterococcus faecium. Here, we addressed this gap through the development of a transposon-directed insertion-site sequencing (TraDIS) platform with a plasmid we engineered to specifically function in E. faecium. The application of nanopore sequencing, with a highly accessible sequence data processing and bioinformatic analysis pipeline streamlines and simplifies the methodology. These developments will allow the functional genomic analysis of important traits involved in the pathobiology of this understudied bacterium. The approach and tools we have described here are likely applicable to other Gram-positive bacteria.
authors: Krause, A. L.; Wirth, W.; Turner, A. M.; Judd, L.; Li, L.; van Schaik, W.; Howden, B. P.; Carter, G. P.; Seemann, T.; Wick, R. R.; Stinear, T. P.; Buultjens, A. H.; Monk, I. R.

ai.TLDR: 耐万古霉素粪肠球菌（VREfm）是全球性医疗相关机会性病原体，缺乏针对性遗传工具。本研究开发了专为E. faecium优化的转座子定向插入位点测序（TraDIS）平台，结合纳米孔测序技术实现全基因组功能筛选，可解析VREfm的耐药机制与致病性。
keywords: 转座子定向插入位点测序
ai.translation: 耐万古霉素粪肠球菌（VREfm）是具有全球重要性的医疗相关机会性病原体。为理解VREfm临床相关表型（如在人类肠道内持续存活或抗微生物耐药性）的分子基础，需要开发针对性遗传工具。本研究构建了专为E. faec0ium优化的转座子定向插入位点测序（TraDIS）平台，通过工程化转座子载体pIMTA(tetM)生成高密度转座子突变体库，并结合牛津纳米孔技术扩增测序定位转座子插入位点。同时开发了包含基于WebAssembly的可视化工具Diana的生物信息学分析套件（https://diana.cpg.org.au/），用于TraDIS数据探索与分析。通过评估48,458个独特转座子突变体库在万古霉素暴露下的影响，验证了vanB操纵子对VREfm万古霉素耐药性的关键作用。该端到端平台可实现VREfm中全基因组正向遗传筛选，解析持续存活与致病性的分子机制。目前缺乏专门针对粪肠球菌的遗传工具，本研究通过开发TraDIS平台填补了这一空白。结合纳米孔测序的高通量数据处理与生物信息学分析流程，显著简化了方法学。这些进展将推动该研究对象（尚未充分研究的病原体）关键致病性特征的功能基因组学分析。所描述的方法和工具可能适用于其他革兰氏阳性菌。

title: Cost-Effective and Highly Scalable Typing of HLA Classes I and II Genes of up to 96 Individuals Using Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract: HLA typing of large donor registries and biobanks as well as acute single patient/donor samples remains expensive, slow and logistically challenging, despite recent developments in the field. We have tested and validated a cost-effective, accurate and highly scalable method for typing specific genes in the HLA region. This enables HLA typing from 1 to 96 individuals simultaneously, using a targeted PCR and Native Barcoding kit from Oxford Nanopore Technologies. A primer set for seven HLA genes (HLA-A, -B, -C, -DRB1, -DQA1, -DQB1 and -DPB1) was developed to work in a multiplex PCR reaction. The resulting amplicons provide a possible four-field resolution of the HLA Class I genes and G-group resolution of the HLA Class II genes. The entire process, from DNA to HLA typing result, takes a total of 5.5-10.5 h depending on the number of samples processed simultaneously. Data analysis was conducted using NGSEngine-Turbo from GenDx (Utrecht, The Netherlands), with analysis time ranging from 1 to 5 min per sample. Samples from 96 Danish registered stem cell donors were typed using this method. One allele out of 1128 analysed alleles was inaccurately called homozygous, leading to an accuracy of 99.91%. The rapid turnaround, low cost and high accuracy make this new method highly relevant for HLA typing of large biobanks and donor registries, as well as for acute single samples. HLA typing can be obtained within 1 day, with a cost per sample of approximately €7 when 96 samples are sequenced simultaneously.
authors: Frederikke Byron Pedersen, Anne Werner Hauge, Jacob Flemming Hansen, Laura Studnitz Andersen, Signe Blomsterberg, Helle Bruunsgaard

ai.TLDR: 当前HLA分型在大型供体库和生物样本库中仍存在成本高、耗时长和物流复杂的问题。本研究验证了一种成本效益高、准确性高且高度可扩展的HLA分型方法，可在5.5-10.5小时内完成1-96个样本的同步检测，准确率达99.91%。该方法通过靶向PCR和Native Barcoding技术实现快速分型，适用于大规模生物样本库和急性单样本检测。
ai.translation: 对大型供体库和生物样本库进行HLA分型以及对急性单个患者/供体样本进行分型仍然存在成本高昂、耗时较长且物流复杂的问题，尽管该领域近期已有技术进展。我们测试并验证了一种成本效益高、准确性高且高度可扩展的方法，用于对HLA区域特定基因进行分型。该方法可同时对1至96个个体进行HLA分型，采用来自牛津纳米孔技术公司的靶向PCR和Native Barcoding试剂盒。开发了一套针对七种HLA基因（HLA-A、-B、-C、-DRB1、-DQA1、-DQB1和-DPB1）的引物组，适用于多重PCR反应。所得扩增子可提供HLA I类基因的四字段分辨率和HLA II类基因的G组分辨率。从DNA到HLA分型结果的整个流程，根据同时处理的样本数量，总耗时为5.5-10.5小时。数据使用GenDx（荷兰乌得勒支）的NGSEngine-Turbo进行分析，每样本分析时间范围为1-5分钟。使用该方法对96个丹麦注册干细胞供体样本进行了分型。在分析的1128个等位基因中，仅有一个等位基因被错误地判定为纯合子，导致准确率为99.91%。该方法的快速周转、低成本和高准确性使其对大型生物样本库和供体库的HLA分型以及急性单样本检测具有高度相关性。HLA分型可在1天内完成，当同时测序96个样本时，每个样本的成本约为7欧元。

title: RLB-MALBAC: a rapid, non-transposase method for synthesizing unbiased sequencing libraries from low amount of genomic DNA for Nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Background

Successful sequencing of genomes on Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing platforms is dependant on obtaining sufficient amounts of high-quality genomic DNA. ONT’s Rapid PCR kit (SQK-RPB114.24) kit is specifically designed to address input template limitations, whereby low amounts of target DNA (1–5 ng) is pre-amplified to > 100–200 ng using PCR. The success of this workflow is however dependent on the quality of input DNA, which as per the SQK-RPB114.24 kit’s instructions, should be of length > 4 kb for an efficient tagmentation—a step pre-cursor to PCR amplification. Obtaining high quality, intact genomic DNA from clinical samples or viral genomes, can sometimes be challenging and this method seeks to address this limitation.

### Methods

In this study, a novel non-tagmentation based method is presented to prepare sequencing libraries from low amounts of genomic DNA (< 5–100 ng). Our method, based on a quasilinear amplification method, the Multiple Annealing and Looping Based Amplification Cycles chemistry (MALBAC), randomly introduces a 21-nucleotide, PCR anchor (“RLB tag”), across the target. This method, henceforth referred to as RLB-MALBAC, results in the generation of RLB-tagged genomic libraries which are then compatible with the PCR dependent RLB-BC01-24 series barcodes of the SQK-RPB114.24 kit.

### Results

The RLB-MALBAC method was used to sequence genomes from *Escherichia coli* bacteriophage lambda (48.5 kb) virus as well as clinically relevant bacteria (2–5 Mb genome range). To demonstrate one potential application of RLB-MALBAC, we tested the generated contigs for the presence of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes of the β-lactamase class. Using the Comprehensive Antibiotic Resistance Database (CARD) prediction tool, we found a 100% concordance between the β-lactamase genes predicted by RLB-MALBAC and the reference sequences (Illumina + Nanopore hybrid assemblies) for ATCC bacterial isolates. We also predicted resistance phenotypes from clinical bacterial isolates confirmed to carry β-lactamases.

### Discussion

As the SQK-RPB114.24 kit is PCR dependent, a short read-length (2-3 kb) is expected using the RLB-MALBAC method, which is a major limitation of this workflow. The versatility and simplicity of the RLB-MALBAC method should find broad application in other areas of microbiology, for e.g., plasmid, viral and single cell genomics, where there may be need to amplify from limited amounts of genomic material.
authors: Vijay J. Gadkar, David M. Goldfarb, ... Peter A. G. Tilley
citation: Gadkar, V.J., Goldfarb, D.M., Dhaliwal, S. et al. RLB-MALBAC: a rapid, non-transposase method for synthesizing unbiased sequencing libraries from low amount of genomic DNA for Nanopore sequencing. BMC Methods 2 , 4 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s44330-025-00024-9

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出了一种基于非tagmentation的RLB-MALBAC方法，可从低量基因组DNA（<5-100 ng）制备测序库，成功应用于噬菌体和临床细菌基因组测序。该方法在β-内酰胺酶抗药性基因检测中表现出与参考序列100%一致的预测精度，但受限于PCR依赖性导致的短读长（2-3 kb）。
ai.translation:
背景：在牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序平台上成功进行基因组测序依赖于获取足量高质量的基因组DNA。ONT的Rapid PCR试剂盒（SQK-RPB114.24）专门针对输入模板量不足的问题，通过PCR扩增低量目标DNA（1-5 ng）至>100-200 ng。然而该流程的成功依赖于输入DNA质量，根据试剂盒说明，输入DNA长度需>4 kb以实现高效的tagmentation——这是PCR扩增前的关键步骤。从临床样本或病毒基因组中获取高质量完整基因组DNA有时具有挑战性，本方法旨在解决这一限制。

方法：本研究提出了一种新型非tagmentation方法，用于从低量基因组DNA（<5-100 ng）制备测序库。该方法基于准线性扩增技术——多重退火和环化循环扩增（MALBAC）化学体系，在目标区域随机引入21核苷酸的PCR锚定序列（"RLB tag"）。该方法后续称为RLB-MALBAC，生成的RLB标记基因组库可兼容SQK-RPB114.24试剂盒的PCR依赖型RLB-BC01-24系列条形码。

结果：RLB-MALBAC方法被用于对大肠杆菌噬菌体lambda（48.5 kb）病毒及临床相关细菌（2-5 Mb基因组范围）进行测序。为展示该方法的潜在应用，我们检测了生成的contigs中β-内酰胺酶类抗药性（AMR）基因的存在。使用综合抗生素耐药数据库（CARD）预测工具，发现RLB-MALBAC预测的β-内酰胺酶基因与参考序列（Illumina+Nanopore混合组装）在ATCC细菌分离株中呈现100%一致。我们还从确认携带β-内酰胺酶的临床细菌分离株中预测了耐药表型。

讨论：由于SQK-RPB114.24试剂盒依赖PCR，RLB-MALBAC方法预计会产生短读长（2-3 kb），这是该流程的主要局限性。RLB-MALBAC方法的通用性和简便性应广泛应用于微生物学其他领域，例如质粒、病毒和单细胞基因组学，这些领域可能需要从有限的基因组材料中进行扩增。

title: Identification of a novel non-coding deletion in Allan-Herndon-Dudley syndrome by long-read HiFi genome sequencing
abstract:
### Background

Allan-Herndon-Dudley syndrome (AHDS) is an X-linked disorder caused by pathogenic variants in the *SLC16A2* gene. Although most reported variants are found in protein-coding regions or adjacent junctions, structural variations (SVs) within non-coding regions have not been previously reported.

### Methods

We investigated two male siblings with severe neurodevelopmental disorders and spasticity, who had remained undiagnosed for over a decade and were negative from exome sequencing, utilizing long-read HiFi genome sequencing. We conducted a comprehensive analysis including short-tandem repeats (STRs) and SVs to identify the genetic cause in this familial case.

### Results

While coding variant and STR analyses yielded negative results, SV analysis revealed a novel hemizygous deletion in intron 1 of the *SLC16A2* gene (chrX:74,460,691 − 74,463,566; 2,876 bp), inherited from their carrier mother and shared by the siblings. Determination of the breakpoints indicates that the deletion probably resulted from Alu/Alu-mediated rearrangements between homologous AluY pairs. The deleted region is predicted to include multiple transcription factor binding sites, such as Stat2, Zic1, Zic2, and FOXD3, which are crucial for the neurodevelopmental process, as well as a regulatory element including an eQTL (rs1263181) that is implicated in the tissue-specific regulation of *SLC16A2* expression, notably in skeletal muscle and thyroid tissues.

### Conclusions

This report, to our knowledge, is the first to describe a non-coding deletion associated with AHDS, demonstrating the potential utility of long-read sequencing for undiagnosed patients. Although interpreting variants in non-coding regions remains challenging, our study highlights this region as a high priority for future investigation and functional studies.
authors: Jihoon G. Yoon, Seungbok Lee, ... Jong-Hee Chae
citation: Yoon, J.G., Lee, S., Park, S. et al. Identification of a novel non-coding deletion in Allan-Herndon-Dudley syndrome by long-read HiFi genome sequencing. BMC Med Genomics 18 , 41 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12920-024-02058-4
description: Allan-Herndon-Dudley syndrome (AHDS) is an X-linked disorder caused by pathogenic variants in theSLC16A2gene. Although most reported...

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次报道了与AHDS相关的非编码区缺失，通过长读长HiFi测序技术发现了SLC16A2基因内含子1的新型单倍体缺失，揭示了结构变异分析在未确诊患者中的潜在价值。该缺失涉及多个神经发育关键转录因子结合位点及组织特异性调控元件，为未来功能研究提供了重要方向。
ai.translation:
背景
Allan-Herndon-Dudley综合征（AHDS）是一种由SLC16A2基因致病变异引起的X染色体隐性遗传病。尽管大多数报道的变异位于蛋白质编码区或相邻的剪接位点，但非编码区内的结构变异（SVs）此前尚未被报道。

方法
我们研究了两名患有严重神经发育障碍和强直性痉挛的男性兄弟，他们十年来未被确诊且全外显子组测序结果为阴性，采用长读长HiFi基因组测序技术进行分析。通过结合短串联重复序列（STRs）和结构变异分析，全面探究该家族性病例的遗传病因。

结果
编码变异和STR分析均未发现致病性变异，但结构变异分析揭示了SLC16A2基因内含子1的新型单倍体缺失（chrX:74,460,691 − 74,463,566; 2,876 bp），该缺失由携带者母亲遗传并被两名兄弟共享。断点分析表明，该缺失可能源于同源AluY对之间的Alu/Alu介导重排。缺失区域预测包含多个对神经发育过程至关重要的转录因子结合位点，如Stat2、Zic1、Zic2和FOXD3，以及包含eQTL（rs1263181）的调控元件，该元件参与SLC16A2在骨骼肌和甲状腺组织中的组织特异性表达调控。

结论
据我们所知，本研究首次描述了与AHDS相关的非编码区缺失，证明了长读长测序在未确诊患者中的潜在应用价值。尽管非编码区变异的解读仍具挑战性，但本研究凸显了该区域作为未来功能研究和临床探索的高优先级位点。

title: Investigating the Performance of Oxford Nanopore Long-Read Sequencing with Respect to Illumina Microarrays and Short-Read Sequencing.
abstract: Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-read sequencing (LRS) has emerged as a promising genomic analysis tool, yet comprehensive benchmarks with established platforms across diverse datasets remain limited. This study aimed to benchmark LRS performance against Illumina short-read sequencing (SRS) and microarrays for variant detection across different genomic contexts and to evaluate the impact of experimental factors. We sequenced 14 human genomes using the three platforms and evaluated single nucleotide variants (SNVs), insertions/deletions (indels), and structural variants (SVs) detection, stratifying by high-complexity, low-complexity, and dark genome regions while assessing effects of multiplexing, depth, and read length. LRS SNV accuracy was slightly lower than that of SRS in high-complexity regions (F-measure: 0.954 vs. 0.967) but showed comparable sensitivity in low-complexity regions. LRS showed robust performance for small (1-5 bp) indels in high-complexity regions (F-measure: 0.869), but SRS agreement decreased significantly in low-complexity regions and for larger indel sizes. Within dark regions, LRS identified more indels than SRS, but showed lower base-level accuracy. LRS identified 2.86 times more SVs than SRS, excelling at detecting large variants (>6 kb), with SV detection improving with sequencing depth. Sequencing depth strongly influenced variant calling performance, whereas multiplexing effects were minimal. Our findings provide valuable insights for optimising LRS applications in genomic research and diagnostics.
authors: Renato Santos, Hyunah Lee, Alexander Williams, Anastasia Baffour-Kyei, Sang-Hyuck Lee, Claire Troakes, Ammar Al-Chalabi, Gerome Breen, Alfredo Iacoangeli

ai.TLDR: 本研究对比了ONT长读长测序（LRS）与Illumina短读长测序（SRS）及微阵列在不同基因组区域的变异检测性能，发现LRS在复杂区域的SNV准确度略低但小插入缺失检测表现稳健，且深度测序显著提升结构变异检测能力。
ai.translation: 牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序（LRS）已成为基因组分析的有前景工具，但其在多样化数据集上的综合基准测试仍有限。本研究旨在对比LRS与Illum3短读长测序（SRS）及微阵列在不同基因组背景下的变异检测性能，并评估实验因素的影响。我们使用三种平台对14个人类基因组进行测序，评估单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、插入/缺失（indels）和结构变异（SVs）的检测能力，按高复杂度、低复杂度和暗基因组区域分类，同时分析多重测序、测序深度和读长的影响。在高复杂度区域，LRS的SNV准确度略低于SRS（F-measure: 0.954 vs. 0.967），但在低复杂度区域表现出相当的灵敏度。LRS在高复杂度区域对小（1-5 bp）插入缺失的检测性能稳健（F-measure: 0.869），但SRS在低复杂度区域和大插入缺失尺寸时一致性显著下降。在暗基因组区域，LRS识别的插入缺失数量是SRS的2.86倍，但碱基级准确度较低。LRS检测到的SVs数量是SRS的2.86倍，尤其擅长检测大变异（>6 kb），且SV检测随测序深度增加而改善。测序深度显著影响变异检测性能，而多重测序效应较小。研究结果为优化LRS在基因组研究和诊断中的应用提供了重要参考。

title: Identification and genomic characterization of Enterobacter kobei ST56 co-carrying mcr-9, bla
abstract:
OBJECTIVES: This study reports the complete genome sequence of Enterobacter kobei (E. kobei) L5089hy of ST56 isolated from China, carrying mcr-9, bla

METHODS: The E. kobei strain was isolated from the faecal sample of an in-patient in a hospital in Hangzhou, China. Whole-genome sequencing was performed using Oxford Nanopore technology, and the genome was assembled with Unicycler version 0.4.7. The strain was identified by 16S rRNA sequencing. The genome sequence was uploaded to ResFinder version 4.1 to identify antimicrobial resistance genes (ARGs). Multilocus sequence typing (MLST) was used to determine the sequence type of the strain. Genome annotation and plasmid type identification were carried out with the aid of the Proksee and PlasmidFinder databases. An antimicrobial susceptibility test (AST) was conducted on the strain. Circular mapping of multiple plasmid comparisons was drawn by BLAST Ring Image.

RESULTS: E. kobei L5089hy consists of 1 chromosome and 5 plasmids. The mcr-9 gene is located on the chromosome, bla

CONCLUSIONS: This study emphasizes the necessity for monitoring E. kobei© 2025 The Author(s). Published by Elsevier Ltd on behalf of International Society for Antimicrobial Chemotherapy.
authors: Bingyou Yin, Ruishan Liu, Xinjun Hu

ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了从中国分离的ST56型Enterobacter kobei L5089hy菌株的完整基因组序列，该菌株携带mcr-9和bla耐药基因。通过宏基因组测序和数据库分析，揭示了其多药耐药特性及质粒特征。研究强调了监测Enterobacter kobei耐药性的必要性。
ai.translation:
研究目的：本研究报道了从中国分离的ST56型Enterobacter kobei L5089hy菌株的完整基因组序列，该菌株携带mcr-9和bla耐药基因。

方法：该E. kobei菌株是从中国杭州某医院住院患者粪便样本中分离得到。采用牛津纳米孔技术进行全基因组测序，使用Unicycler版本0.4.7进行基因组组装。通过16S rRNA测序鉴定菌株。将基因组序列上传至ResFinder版本4.1以识别抗菌药物耐药基因（ARGs）。采用多基因序列分型（MLST）确定菌株的序列类型。借助Proksee和PlasmidFinder数据库进行基因组注释和质粒类型鉴定。对菌株进行了抗菌药物敏感性试验（AST）。通过BLAST环形图绘制多质粒比较的环形图。

结果：E. kobei L5089hy由1个染色体和5个质粒组成。mcr-9基因位于染色体上，bla基因位于质粒上。

结论：本研究强调了监测Enterobacter kobei耐药性的必要性。© 2025 The Author(s). Published by Elsevier Ltd on behalf of International Society for Antimicrobial Chemotherapy.

title: Short- and long-read metagenomics uncover the mobile extended spectrum β-lactamase (ESBL) and carbapenemase genes in hospital wastewater in Sri Lanka.
abstract: The antibiotic resistance issue in low- and middle-income countries has drawn global concern. This study presents the first metagenomic investigation of antibiotic resistance genes (ARGs) in hospital and municipal wastewater treatment plants (WWTPs) in Sri Lanka, using Illumina short-read and Nanopore long-read sequencing. Samples from three representative WWTPs receiving hospital and/or municipal wastewater (domestic generated) were collected from four districts in Sri Lanka, and as a comparison, wastewater directly discharged without treatment was also taken. ARG abundance was significantly higher in hospital wastewater (7.22 copies/cell) than in municipal wastewater (2.33 copies/cell), and greatly decreased by 82 % and 93 % after treatment processes, respectively. Similar trends were observed for mobile genetic elements. The prevalent subtypes of clinically relevant extended spectrum β-lactamase (ESBL) and carbapenemase genes in hospital wastewater were bla
authors: Shashika Kumudumali Guruge, Ziming Han, S H P Parakrama Karunaratne, Rohana Chandrajith, Titus Cooray, Chengzhi Hu, Yu Zhang, Min Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次对斯里兰卡医院及市政污水处理厂中的抗生素耐药基因(ARGs)进行宏基因组分析，发现医院污水中ARGs丰度显著高于市政污水，经处理后耐药基因数量大幅下降。研究揭示了医院污水中临床相关扩展谱β-内酰胺酶(ESBL)和碳青霉烯酶基因的流行亚型。
ai.translation: 抗生素耐药性问题在低收入和中等收入国家已引起全球关注。本研究首次采用Illumina短读长测序和Nanopore长读长测序技术，对斯里兰卡医院及市政污水处理厂（WWTPs）中的抗生素耐药基因（ARGs）进行宏基因组学调查。从斯里兰卡四个地区收集了三个代表性WWTPs的样本，这些污水处理厂接收医院和/或市政污水（生活污水），同时采集未经处理直接排放的污水作为对照。结果发现，医院污水中ARGs丰度显著高于市政污水（7.22 copies/cell vs 2.33 copies/cell），经处理后ARGs数量分别下降82%和93%。移动遗传元件呈现相似的丰度变化趋势。医院污水中临床相关的扩展谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）和碳青霉烯酶基因的流行亚型主要为bla

title: A highly accurate nanopore-based sequencing workflow for culture and PCR-free microbial metagenomic profiling of urogenital samples
abstract:
### Background

The application of molecular sequencing methods for microbiome profiling of biological samples are largely restricted to research use. However, they require significant resources such as time and cost and can suffer from amplification biases that may hamper interpretation of complex systems. These issues are also a barrier to adoption as standard clinical tools in, for example, diagnosis of urogenital infections. We report a new method that utilises third generation long-read nanopore sequencing to produce fast, accurate and fully quantitated metagenomic microbiome profiles. Here, as proof of principle, we apply this methodology to reassess the healthy urogenital microbiomes of asymptomatic female and male samples.

### Results

We show that our method is capable of accurately and reproducibly detecting both levels and composition of a synthetic mixture of ten species comprising known amounts of hard to lyse gram-positive bacteria, gram-negative bacteria and yeast. When applied to urogenital samples, we confirm previous observations that the female asymptomatic vaginal and urinary microbiomes are predominated by *Gardnerella spp.* or one of several *Lactobacillus* species (*L. crispatus, L. gasseri, L. iners* or *L. jensenii*) that conform to previously defined community state types. We show the tight relationship between vaginal and urinary populations of the same individual at both species and strain level, provide evidence for the previously observed dynamic nature of these microbiomes over a menstrual cycle and compare biomass and complexity of male and female urobiomes.

### Conclusions

We set out to develop an unbiased, amplification and culture-free, fully quantitative metagenomic microbiome profiling tool. Our initial observations suggest our method represents a viable alternative to existing molecular research tools employed in the analysis of complex microbiomes.
authors: Ben Ferneyhough, Matthew Roddis, ... Nick J. Parkinson
citation: Ferneyhough, B., Roddis, M., Millington, S. et al. A highly accurate nanopore-based sequencing workflow for culture and PCR-free microbial metagenomic profiling of urogenital samples. BMC Urol 25 , 41 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12894-025-01723-9
