ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于第三代长读长纳米孔测序的无偏倚、无需扩增和培养的全定量宏基因组微生物组分析方法，可有效解决传统分子检测在复杂微生物系统分析中的资源消耗和扩增偏差问题。该方法在尿生殖道微生物组分析中展现出高准确性和可重复性，揭示了女性无症状阴道和尿道微生物组的动态变化特征。
keywords: 宏基因组微生物组分析
ai.translation:
### 背景
分子测序方法在生物样本微生物组分析中的应用主要局限于研究用途。然而，这些方法需要大量资源如时间与成本，并可能因扩增偏差影响复杂系统的解读。这些问题也阻碍了其作为标准临床工具在如泌尿生殖道感染诊断中的应用。我们报告了一种新方法，利用第三代长读长纳米孔测序技术，可快速、准确且完全定量地生成宏基因组微生物组分析结果。作为原理验证，我们应用该方法重新评估无症状女性和男性的健康泌尿生殖道微生物组。

### 结果
我们证明该方法能够准确且可重复地检测包含十种已知数量难以裂解的革兰氏阳性菌、革兰氏阴性菌和酵母的合成混合物的水平和组成。当应用于泌尿生殖道样本时，我们确认了先前观察结果：无症状女性阴道和尿道微生物组主要由Gardnerella spp.或几种乳酸杆菌（L. crispatus, L. gasseri, L. iners或L. jensenii）主导，这些菌种符合先前定义的群落状态类型。我们展示了同一体内阴道和尿道菌群在物种和菌株水平上的紧密关联性，提供了泌尿生殖道微生物组在月经周期中动态变化的证据，并比较了男女尿道微生物组的生物量和复杂性。

### 结论
我们旨在开发一种无偏倚、无需扩增和培养的全定量宏基因组微生物组分析工具。初步观察表明，我们的方法可作为现有复杂微生物组分析分子研究工具的可行替代方案。

title: Are reads required? High-precision variant calling from bacterial genome assemblies
abstract:
1.Accurate nucleotide variant calling is essential in microbial genomics, particularly for outbreak tracking and phylogenetics. This study evaluates variant calls derived from genome assemblies compared to traditional read-based variant-calling methods, using seven closely related Staphylococcus aureus isolates sequenced on Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. By benchmarking multiple assembly and variant-calling pipelines against a ground truth dataset, we found that read-based methods consistently achieved high accuracy. Assembly-based approaches performed well in some cases but were highly dependent on assembly quality, as errors in the assembly led to false-positive variant calls. These findings underscore the need for improved assembly techniques before the potential benefits of assembly-based variant calling - such as reduced computational requirements and simpler data management - can be realised.

2. Impact statementVariant calling is foundational to microbial genomics, yet traditional workflows rely heavily on sequencing reads, which for a typical bacterial genome can be hundreds of megabytes. In contrast, genome assemblies are far smaller - usually just a few megabytes - making them significantly easier to manage. If accurate variant calls could be made directly from assemblies, this would reduce computational demands and, in some cases, may even eliminate the need to retain raw sequencing reads. This study addresses the key question of whether variant calling from assemblies is accurate enough to replace read-based methods. Our findings show that while assembly-based variant calling can achieve high accuracy, this is only possible with error-free assemblies. Since most assemblies contain errors, assembly-based variant-calling approaches should currently be used with caution. Nevertheless, as sequencing and assembly technologies continue to advance, improved assembly accuracy may make assembly-based variant calling a viable alternative, reducing data complexity and storage demands while streamlining microbial genomic analyses.

3. Data summarySupplementary methods, data, figures and tables are available at github.com/rrwick/Are-reads-required which is also archived on Zenodo (10.5281/zenodo.14868870). Reads and assemblies are available via BioProject PRJNA1193226.
authors: Wick, R. R.; Judd, L. M.; Stinear, T. P.; Monk, I. R.

ai.TLDR: 在微生物基因组学中，准确的变异检测对疫情追踪和系统发育分析至关重要。研究发现基于读取的方法在准确性上优于基于基因组组装的方法，后者依赖于高质量的组装以避免假阳性结果。随着测序技术进步，改进的组装准确性可能使基于组装的变异检测成为可行替代方案。
ai.translation:
1. 准确的核苷酸变异检测在微生物基因组学中至关重要，特别是在疫情追踪和系统发育分析中。本研究通过比较基因组组装衍生的变异检测结果与传统基于读取的变异检测方法，评估了七种紧密相关的金黄色葡萄球菌菌株（使用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台测序）的检测效果。通过将多种组装和变异检测流程与基准数据集进行比对，发现基于读取的方法始终能实现高准确性。基于组装的方法在某些情况下表现良好，但高度依赖于组装质量，因为组装错误会导致假阳性变异检测结果。这些发现强调了在实现基于组装的变异检测潜在优势（如降低计算需求和简化数据管理）之前，需要改进组装技术。

2. 变异检测是微生物基因组学的基础，但传统流程严重依赖测序读取，而典型细菌基因组的读取数据量可达数百兆字节。相比之下，基因组组装体积远小（通常仅数兆字节），管理更为便捷。如果能直接从组装中进行准确的变异检测，将显著降低计算需求，甚至可能无需保留原始测序数据。本研究探讨了基于组装的变异检测是否足够准确以替代基于读取的方法。研究结果表明，虽然基于组装的变异检测可实现高准确性，但仅在无错误的组装条件下成立。由于大多数组装存在错误，当前应谨慎使用基于组装的变异检测方法。然而，随着测序和组装技术的持续进步，提高的组装准确性可能使基于组装的变异检测成为可行替代方案，降低数据复杂性并减少存储需求，同时简化微生物基因组分析流程。

3. 补充方法、数据、图表和表格可在github.com/rrwick/Are-reads-required获取，该资源也存档于Zenodo（10.5281/zenodo.14868870）。测序读取和组装数据可通过BioProject PRJNA1193226获取。

title: Accurate and Reproducible Whole-Genome Genotyping for Bacterial Genomic Surveillance with Nanopore Sequencing Data
abstract:
Despite recent advances in error rate reduction, until recently Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequences lacked the accuracy required for fine scale bacterial genomic analysis. Here, recent software improvements of ONT and the ONT-cgMLST-Polisher within the SeqSphere+ software were evaluated.

We used short-(Illumina) and long-read ONT sequences of 80 multidrug-resistant bacteria (MDROs) for benchmarking. Illumina reads were de-novo-assembled using SKESA. For ONT, Dorado super accurate (SUP) model 4.3 or 5.0 basecalled reads were assembled with Flye and then polished with Medaka v1.12 m4.3 or Medaka v2.0 bacterial methylation model. In addition, the ONT-cgMLST-Polisher was run over all assemblies. The  ground truth (GT) hybrid assemblies were created using Hybracter v0.10.0. Sixteen isolates from four species out of the original 80 isolates were sent to six laboratories for a ring trial.

The 80 MDROs basecalled with SUP m4.3 had an average cgMLST allele distance (AD) to the GT of 4.94 with Medaka v1.12 and 1.78 with Medaka v2.0, respectively. After further polishing the Medaka v2.0 data with the ONT-cgMLST-Polisher, the AD dropped to 0.09. Using data basecalled with SUP m5.0 with Medaka v2.0 further reduced the AD significantly to 0.04. While the ring trial data basecalled with Dorado SUP m4.3 showed more variability and insufficient results for some samples, model 5.0 data resulted in average ADs of 0.36 and 0.17 without and with the ONT-cgMLST-Polisher, respectively. In conclusion, recent ONT Dorado and Medaka models combined with the ONT-cgMLST-Polisher improved ONT sequencing accuracy and made it sufficiently reproducible for genomic surveillance of bacteria.

Importance

Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing methodology is especially attractive for small and medium-sized laboratories due to its relatively low capital investment and price per sample consumable costs. However, until recently it lacked accuracy and reproducibility for bacterial genomic genotyping. Here, we present an evaluation of the most recent ONT bioinformatic (basecalling and polishing of consensus) improvements and a new ONT-cgMLST-Polisher tool. We demonstrate that by applying those procedures ONT whole-genome genotyping-based surveillance of bacteria is finally accurate and reproducible enough for routine application even in small laboratories
authors: Prior, K.; Becker, K.; Brandt, C.; Cabal Rosel, A.; Dabernig-Heinz, J.; Kohler, C.; Lohde, M.; Ruppitsch, W.; Schuler, F.; Wagner-Lichtenegger, G. E.; Mellmann, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了ONT技术通过软件改进（如ONT-cgMLST-Polisher和Medaka v2.0模型）在细菌基因组分析中的准确性提升，结果显示经过优化后ONT测序的cgMLST等位基因距离（AD）可降至0.04，达到临床应用标准。
ai.translation:
尽管近期在降低错误率方面取得进展，但直到最近Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序仍缺乏进行细菌精细基因组分析所需的准确性。本研究评估了ONT技术在SeqSphere+软件中最新软件改进（包括ONT-cgMLST-Polisher）的效果。

我们使用80株多药耐药菌（MDROs）的短读长（Illumina）和长读长（ONT）测序数据进行基准测试。Illumina读数通过SKESA进行从头组装，ONT数据则使用Dorado超准确（SUP）模型4.3或5.0进行碱基调用，再通过Flye进行组装，随后使用Medaka v1.12 m4.3或Medaka v2.0细菌甲基化模型进行校正。此外，所有组装数据均运行ONT-cgMLST-Polisher。通过Hybracter v0.10.0创建了包含真实数据（GT）的混合组装数据。从原始80株中选取16株（4种物种）送往6个实验室进行环试。

使用SUP m4.3碱基调用的80株MDROs，经Medaka v1.12校正后与GT的平均cgMLST等位基因距离（AD）为4.94，经Medaka v2.0校正后降至1.78。进一步使用ONT-cgMLST-Polisher校正后，AD降至0.09。使用SUP m5.0碱基调用的Medaka v2.0数据进一步将AD显著降至0.04。而使用Dorado SUP m4.3碱基调用的环试数据表现出更多变异性，部分样本结果不足，但使用模型5.0数据时，未校正的平均AD为0.36，校正后降至0.17。结论表明，结合最新ONT Dorado和Medaka模型及ONT-cgMLST-Polisher工具，ONT测序的准确性已显著提升，可满足细菌基因组监测的常规应用需求。

重要性：ONT测序技术因其较低的资本投入和单样本耗材成本，对中小型实验室具有吸引力。但此前其在细菌基因组分型中的准确性和可重复性不足。本研究展示了最新ONT生物信息学改进（碱基调用和校正）及ONT-cgMLST-Polisher工具的效果，证明通过这些流程，即使在小型实验室中，基于全基因组分型的细菌监测也可达到足够的准确性和可重复性。

title: Comparative evaluation of sequencing technologies and primer sets for mouse gut microbiota profiling.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Advancements in sequencing technologies, such as Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), have significantly improved microbiome research. However, variations in sequencing platforms, primer selection, and DNA quality may influence microbial diversity assessments, particularly in studies of gut microbiota. This study systematically evaluates these factors in mouse gut microbiota analysis, comparing 16S rRNA gene sequencing and metagenome sequencing (MS) across both platforms.

RESULTS: Our findings highlight the critical influence of primer selection on 16S rRNA sequencing results, with certain primer combinations detecting unique taxa that others miss. Despite these variations in taxonomic resolution, all tested primer sets consistently revealed significant differences between experimental groups, indicating that key microbial shifts induced by bacterial cultures remain detectable regardless of primer choice. A comparative analysis of Illumina and ONT 16S rRNA sequencing revealed notable differences in microbial diversity profiling, with ONT capturing a broader range of taxa. In contrast, MS on both platforms showed a high degree of correlation, indicating that ONT sequencing errors have minimal impact on taxonomic diversity estimations. Furthermore, the type of extracted DNA (high molecular weight vs. standard DNA) had little on microbial diversity outcomes, underscoring the robustness of these sequencing technologies.

CONCLUSION: These results highlight the advantages and limitations of different sequencing strategies in microbiota research. While 16S rRNA sequencing remains a cost-effective tool for assessing bacterial diversity, MS provides superior taxonomic resolution and more precise species identification. Our study advocates for a hybrid approach that combines multiple sequencing technologies to achieve a more comprehensive and accurate representation of microbial communities.
authors: Aleksandra Strokach, Polina Zoruk, Daria Boldyreva, Maxim Morozov, Evgenii Olekhnovich, Vladimir Veselovsky, Vladislav Babenko, Oksana Selezneva, Natalia Zakharevich, Andrey Larin, Severina Koldman, Vail Koldman, Maya Odorskaya, Roman Yunes, Vladislav Pavlov, Anna Kudryavtseva, Valeriy Danilenko, Ksenia Klimina

ai.TLDR: 本研究系统评估了测序平台、引物选择和DNA质量对小鼠肠道微生物组分析的影响，发现引物选择显著影响16S rRNA测序结果，但关键微生物变化仍可被检测。ONT平台在微生物多样性评估中表现出更广的分类群覆盖范围，而宏基因组测序（MS）在两个平台间具有高度一致性。
ai.translation:
背景：测序技术的进步，如Illumina和牛津纳米孔技术（ONT），显著推动了微生物组研究。然而，测序平台差异、引物选择和DNA质量等因素可能影响微生物多样性评估，特别是在肠道微生物组研究中。本研究系统评估了这些因素对小鼠肠道微生物组分析的影响，比较了两种平台上的16S rRNA基因测序和宏基因组测序（MS）方法。

结果：研究发现引物选择对16S rRNA测序结果具有关键影响，某些引物组合能检测到其他组合遗漏的特定分类群。尽管分类分辨率存在差异，所有测试引物集均一致显示实验组间存在显著差异，表明细菌培养诱导的关键微生物变化可被检测到。Illumina与ONT平台的16S rRNA测序比较显示，ONT在微生物多样性分析中捕捉到更广泛的分类群。相比之下，两个平台的MS结果高度相关，表明ONT测序错误对分类多样性估计影响较小。此外，提取的DNA类型（高分子量 vs. 标准DNA）对微生物多样性结果影响有限，凸显了这些测序技术的稳健性。

结论：研究结果凸显了不同测序策略在微生物组研究中的优劣。尽管16S rRNA测序仍是评估细菌多样性的经济工具，但宏基因组测序（MS）提供了更高的分类分辨率和更精确的物种鉴定能力。本研究建议采用结合多种测序技术的混合方法，以实现对微生物群落更全面准确的表征。

title: Evaluation of Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Sequencing for the Study of DNA Methylation in Alzheimer's Disease and Frontotemporal Dementia.
abstract: DNA methylation is a critical epigenetic mechanism involved in numerous physiological processes. Alterations in DNA methylation patterns are associated with various brain disorders, including dementias such as Alzheimer's disease (AD) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD). Investigating these alterations is essential for understanding the pathogenesis and progression of these disorders. Among the various methods for detecting DNA methylation, DNA sequencing is one of the most widely employed. Specifically, two main sequencing approaches are commonly used for DNA methylation analysis: bisulfite sequencing and single-molecule long-read sequencing. In this review, we compared the performances of CpG methylation detection obtained using two popular sequencing platforms, Illumina for bisulfite sequencing and Oxford Nanopore (ON) for long-read sequencing. Our comparison considers several factors, including accuracy, efficiency, genomic regions, costs, wet-lab protocols, and bioinformatics pipelines. We provide insights into the strengths and limitations of both methods with a particular focus on their application in research on AD and FTD.
authors: Lorenzo Pagano, Davide Lagrotteria, Alessandro Facconi, Claudia Saraceno, Antonio Longobardi, Sonia Bellini, Assunta Ingannato, Silvia Bagnoli, Tommaso Ducci, Alessandra Mingrino, Valentina Laganà, Ersilia Paparazzo, Barbara Borroni, Raffaele Maletta, Benedetta Nacmias, Alberto Montesanto, Roberta Ghidoni

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化作为表观遗传调控的关键机制，与脑部疾病如阿尔茨海默病（AD）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）密切相关。本研究对比了Illumina亚硫酸氢盐测序与Oxford Nanopore长读长测序在CpG甲基化检测中的性能差异，重点分析了两种技术在疾病研究中的优劣势。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化是一种参与多种生理过程的关键表观遗传机制。DNA甲基化模式的改变与多种脑部疾病密切相关，包括阿尔茨海默病（AD）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）等痴呆症。研究这些甲基化改变对于理解这些疾病的发病机制和疾病进展至关重要。在众多DNA甲基化检测方法中，DNA测序是最广泛采用的技术。具体而言，亚硫酸氢盐测序和单分子长读长测序是两种常用的DNA甲基化分析方法。本综述比较了两种主流测序平台在CpG甲基化检测中的性能表现：Illumina平台用于亚硫酸氢盐测序，Oxford Nanopore（ON）平台用于长读长测序。我们的比较分析涵盖了准确性、效率、基因组区域覆盖、成本、湿实验流程及生物信息学分析流程等多个维度。文章重点探讨了两种方法在AD和FTD研究中的应用优势与局限性。

title: Diagnostic Utility of Nanopore Sequencing for Tuberculous Serous Effusions.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: Early and precise diagnosis of tuberculous serous effusions is a huge challenge. Nanopore sequencing is a potentially efficient assay. The objective of the current study was to evaluate the diagnostic accuracy of nanopore sequencing for tuberculous serous effusions using clinical specimens directly, and to provide a new pathway for the early and precise diagnosis of tuberculous serous effusions.

METHODS: This was a retrospective analysis of the effectiveness of nanopore sequencing as a diagnostic method for tuberculous serous effusions using clinical specimens (pleural fluid, pericardial effusion, and ascitic fluid). Using clinical diagnosis as reference standard, the diagnostic accuracy indicators such as sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), negative predictive value (NPV), and area under the curve (AUC) for the tests in question were evaluated.

RESULTS: In total, 132 patients were eligible for inclusion. Nanopore sequencing showed sensitivity of 93.3%, specificity of 85.2%, PPV of 96.1%, NPV of 76.7%, and AUC of 0.89 for tuberculous serous effusions. The diagnostic accuracy of nanopore sequencing was significantly superior than that of Xpert MTB/RIF and culture. Similar results were observed in different types of tuberculous serous effusions (pleural tuberculosis, pericardial tuberculosis, and peritoneal tuberculosis).

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing was efficient for the rapid diagnosis of tuberculous serous effusions and had a very positive effect. For paucibacillary tuberculous serous effusions, nanopore sequencing might become an effective method for detecting pathogenic bacteria.
authors: Yu Chen, Yuyang Ling, Xudong Xu, Yanqin Shen, Kan Xu, Guocan Yu

ai.TLDR: 结核性渗出液的早期精准诊断面临重大挑战，纳米孔测序作为新型检测技术展现出显著优势。研究通过临床样本直接检测，证实纳米孔测序在结核性渗出液诊断中具有93.3%敏感度和85.2%特异度，显著优于Xpert MTB/RIF和培养法。
ai.translation:
研究目的：结核性渗出液的早期精准诊断是重大临床挑战，纳米孔测序作为潜在高效检测方法具有应用前景。本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序对结核性渗出液的诊断准确性，并为早期精准诊断提供新途径。

研究方法：本研究为回顾性分析，评估纳米孔测序作为结核性渗出液诊断方法的有效性。采用临床诊断作为参考标准，对敏感度、特异度、阳性预测值（PPV）、阴性预测值（NPV）及曲线下面积（AUC）等诊断准确性指标进行评估，样本类型包括胸腔积液、心包积液和腹水。

研究结果：共纳入132例患者，纳米孔测序对结核性渗出液的诊断结果显示：敏感度93.3%，特异度85.2%，PPV 96.1%，NPV 76.7%，AUC 0.89。其诊断准确性显著优于Xpert MTB/RIF和培养法。不同类型的结核性渗出液（胸膜结核、心包结核、腹膜结核）均呈现相似结果。

研究结论：纳米孔测序在结核性渗出液的快速诊断中表现出高效性，对低细菌载量的结核性渗出液可能成为检测致病菌的有效方法。

title: Combining long-read DNA and RNA sequencing to enhance molecular understanding of structural variations leading to copy gains.
abstract: Structural variants (SVs) significantly contribute to human disease, but their complexity often makes accurate characterization difficult with conventional methods. Advances in long-read sequencing (LRS) offer potential by spanning kilobases and directly resolving SVs. In this study, we examined two individuals with unresolved SVs. LRS on both DNA and cDNA provided single-base resolution of all breakpoint junctions, revealing detailed rearrangement structures and underlying mechanisms. Transcriptomic analyses identified abnormal fusion transcripts and clarified their functional consequences, including haploinsufficiency and potential dominant-negative effects. authors: Jade Fauqueux, Jean-Pascal Meneboo, Roseline Caumes, Luc Thomès, Emilie Ait Yahya, Caroline Thuillier, Elise Boudry, Celine Villenet, Martin Figeac, Jamal Ghoumid, Thomas Smol

ai.TLDR: 结构变异（SVs）在人类疾病中起着重要作用，但传统方法难以准确表征其复杂性。本研究通过长读长测序（LRS）技术，实现了单碱基分辨率的SVs解析，揭示了重排结构及功能机制。转录组分析发现异常融合转录本，明确了单倍体不足和显性负效应等病理机制。
ai.translation: 结构变异（SVs）在人类疾病中起着重要作用，但其复杂性常使传统方法难以准确表征。长读长测序（LRS）技术通过跨越千碱基并直接解析SVs，为研究提供了新途径。本研究分析了两名携带未解析SVs的个体，LRS在DNA和cDNA层面实现了所有断裂点接合处的单碱基分辨率，揭示了详细的重排结构及潜在机制。转录组分析鉴定了异常融合转录本，并阐明了其功能后果，包括单倍体不足和可能的显性负效应。在其中一个病例中，影响特定区域的三倍体现象被发现。

title: The Challenge of Developing a Test to Differentiate Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae Serotypes 9 and 11.
abstract: Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae is a major swine pathogen, classified into 19 serotypes based on capsular polysaccharide (CPS) loci. This study aimed to improve the diagnostic method to differentiate between serotypes 9 and 11, which are challenging to distinguish using conventional serological and molecular methods. A novel qPCR assay based on locked nucleic acid (LNA) probes was developed and validated using a collection of reference strains representing all known 19 serotypes. The assay demonstrated specificity in detecting the nucleotide variation characteristic of the serotype 9 reference strain. However, the analysis of a clinical isolate collection identified discrepancies between LNA-qPCR and serological results, prompting further investigation of the cps and O-Ag loci. Subsequent nanopore sequencing and whole-genome sequencing of a collection of 31 European clinical isolates, previously identified as serotype 9, 11, or undifferentiated 9/11, revealed significant genetic variations in the cps and O-Ag loci. Ten isolates had a cpsF sequence identical to that of the serotype 11 reference strain, while six isolates had single-nucleotide polymorphisms that were unlikely to cause significant coding changes. In contrast, 15 isolates had interruptions in the cpsF gene, distinct from that found in the serotype 9 reference strain, potentially leading to a serotype 9 CPS structure. In the O-Ag loci, differences between serotypes 9 and 11 were minimal, although some isolates had mutations potentially affecting O-Ag expression. Overall, these findings suggest that multiple genetic events can lead to the formation of a serotype 9 CPS structure, hindering the development of a single qPCR assay capable of detecting all cpsF gene mutations. Our results suggest that, currently, a comprehensive analysis of the cpsF gene is necessary to accurately determine whether the capsule of an isolate corresponds to serotype 9 or 11. Although such analyses are feasible with the advent of third-generation sequencing technologies, their accessibility, cost, and time to result limit their use in routine diagnostic applications. Under these circumstances, the designation of the hybrid serovar 9/11 remains a valid approach.
authors: José Luis Arnal Bernal, Ana Belén Fernández Ros, Sonia Lacouture, Janine T Bossé, László Fodor, Hubert Gantelet, Luis Solans Bernad, Yanwen Li, Paul R Langford, Marcelo Gottschalk

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在改进诊断方法，以区分猪肺炎支原体的血清型9和11，这两种血清型难以通过传统方法区分。开发了一种基于锁定核酸（LNA）探针的qPCR检测方法，但发现其与血清学结果存在差异，提示需要进一步分析cps和O-Ag基因位点。研究发现，血清型9的CPS结构可能由多种遗传事件形成，阻碍了单一qPCR检测方法的开发。
ai.translation: 猪肺炎支原体（Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae）是一种重要的猪病原体，根据荚膜多糖（capsular polysaccharide, CPS）基因位点被分为19种血清型。本研究旨在改进诊断方法，以区分血清型9和11，这两种血清型难以通过传统血清学和分子方法区分。开发了一种基于锁定核酸（locked nucleic acid, LNA）探针的新型qPCR检测方法，并使用代表所有已知19种血清型的参考菌株进行验证。该检测方法能够特异性地检测血清型9参考菌株的核苷酸变异。然而，对临床分离株的分析发现LNA-qPCR结果与血清学结果存在差异，提示需要进一步研究cps和O-Ag基因位点。随后，对31株欧洲临床分离株（先前鉴定为血清型9、11或未区分的9/11）进行纳米孔测序和全基因组测序，发现cps和O-Ag基因位点存在显著的遗传变异。其中10株分离株的cpsF序列与血清型11参考菌株相同，而6株分离株存在单核苷酸变异，这些变异不太可能导致显著的编码变化。相比之下，15株分离株的cpsF基因存在中断，与血清型9参考菌株的中断不同，可能形成血清型9的CPS结构。在O-Ag基因位点，血清型9和11之间的差异较小，但某些分离株存在可能影响O-Ag表达的突变。总体而言，这些发现表明，多种遗传事件可能导致血清型9的CPS结构形成，阻碍了开发能够检测所有cpsF基因突变的单一qPCR检测方法。我们的研究结果表明，目前需要对cpsF基因进行全面分析，以准确判断分离株的荚膜是否对应血清型9或11。尽管第三代测序技术使此类分析成为可能，但其可及性、成本和检测时间限制了其在常规诊断中的应用。在这种情况下，将血清型9/11作为混合血清型的命名方式仍然是一个有效的方法。

title: Targeted Long-Read Sequencing as a Single Assay Improves the Diagnosis of Spastic-Ataxia Disorders.
journal: Annals of clinical and translational neurology
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: The hereditary spastic-ataxia spectrum disorders are a group of disabling neurological diseases. The traditional genetic testing pathway is complex, multistep and leaves many cases unsolved. We aim to streamline and improve this process using long-read sequencing.

METHODS: We developed a targeted long-read sequencing strategy with the capacity to characterise the genetic variation of all types and sizes within 469 disease-associated genes, in a single assay. We applied this to a cohort of 34 individuals with unsolved spastic-ataxia. An additional five individuals with a known genetic diagnosis were included as positive controls.

RESULTS: We identified causative pathogenic variants that would be sufficient for genetic diagnosis in 14/34 (41%) unsolved participants. The success rate was 5/11 (45%) in those who were naïve to genetic testing and 9/23 (39%) in those who were undiagnosed after prior genetic testing, completed on a clinical basis. Short tandem repeat expansions in FGF14 were the most common (7/34, 21%). Two individuals (2/34, 6%) had biallelic pathogenic expansions in RFC1 and one individual had a monoallelic pathogenic expansion in ATXN8OS/ATXN8. Causative pathogenic sequence variants other than short tandem repeat expansions were found in four individuals, including in VCP, STUB1, ANO10 and SPG7. Furthermore, all five positive controls were identified.

INTERPRETATION: Our results demonstrate the utility of targeted long-read sequencing in the genetic evaluation of patients with spastic-ataxia spectrum disorders, highlighting both the capacity to increase overall diagnostic yield and to streamline the testing pathway by capturing all known genetic causes in a single assay.
authors: Laura Ivete Rudaks, Igor Stevanovski, Dennis Yeow, Andre L M Reis, Sanjog R Chintalaphani, Pak Leng Cheong, Hasindu Gamaarachchi, Lisa Worgan, Kate Ahmad, Michael Hayes, Andrew Hannaford, Samuel Kim, Victor S C Fung, Gabor M Halmagyi, Andrew Martin, David Manser, Michel Tchan, Karl Ng, Marina L Kennerson, Ira W Deveson, Kishore Raj Kumar

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过长读长测序技术优化遗传检测流程，以提高遗传性痉挛-共济失调谱系疾病的诊断率。结果显示，该方法在未接受过遗传检测的患者中成功率达45%，在已接受检测但未确诊的患者中成功率达39%。
ai.translation:
目标：遗传性痉挛-共济失调谱系疾病是一组具有致残性的神经系统疾病。传统的遗传检测流程复杂、多步骤，导致许多病例无法解决。我们旨在利用长读长测序技术优化并改进这一流程。

方法：我们开发了一种靶向长读长测序策略，能够在单次检测中对469个疾病相关基因的所有类型和大小的遗传变异进行表征。我们将该方法应用于34名未解决的痉挛-共济失调患者队列，并额外纳入5名已知遗传诊断的患者作为阳性对照。

结果：我们在14/34（41%）名未解决的患者中识别出足以进行遗传诊断的致病性变异。在未接受过遗传检测的患者中，成功率为5/11（45%），而在已接受检测但未确诊的患者中，成功率为9/23（39%）。FGF14中的短串联重复（STR）扩增是最常见的（7/34，21%）。两名患者（2/34，6%）在RFC1中具有双等位致病性扩增，一名患者在ATXN8OS/ATXN8中具有单等位致病性扩增。此外，还有四名患者发现了除STR扩增以外的致病性序列变异，包括VCP、STUB1、ANO10和SPG7。此外，所有五名阳性对照均被成功识别。

解读：我们的结果表明，靶向长读长测序在遗传性痉挛-共济失调谱系疾病的遗传评估中具有重要价值，突显了其提高整体诊断率和通过单次检测捕获所有已知遗传病因以简化检测流程的能力。

title: Comparison of Nanopore with Illumina Whole Genome Assemblies of the Epstein-Barr Virus in Burkitt Lymphoma
abstract: Endemic Burkitt lymphoma (eBL) is one of the most prevalent cancer in children in sub-Saharan Africa, and while prior studies have found that Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) type and variation may alter the tumor driver genes necessary for tumor survival, the precise relationship between EBV variation and EBV-associated tumorigenesis remains unclear due to lack of scalable, cost-effective, viral whole-genome sequencing from tumor samples. This study introduces a rapid and cost-effective method of enriching, sequencing, and assembling accurate EBV genomes in BL tumor cell lines through a combination of selective whole genome amplification (sWGA) and subsequent 2-tube multiplex polymerase chain reaction along with long-read sequencing with a portable sequencer. The method was optimized across a range of parameters to yield a high percentage of EBV reads and sufficient coverage across the EBV genome except for large repeat regions. After optimization, we applied our method to sequence 18 cell lines and 3 patient tumors from fine needle biopsies and assembled them with median coverages of 99.62 and 99.68%, respectively. The assemblies showed high concordance (99.61% similarity) to available Illumina-based assemblies. The improved method and assembly pipeline will allow for better understanding of EBV variation in relation to BL and is applicable more broadly for translational research studies, especially useful for laboratories in Africa where eBL is most widespread.
authors: Kim, I. E.; Fola, A. A.; Puig, E.; Maina, T. K.; Hui, S. T.; Ma, H.; Zuckerman, K.; Agwati, E.; Leonetti, A.; Crudale, R.; Luftig, M. A.; Moormann, A. M.; Oduor, C.; Bailey, J. A.

ai.TLDR: 伯基特淋巴瘤（eBL）是撒哈拉以南非洲儿童中最常见的癌症之一，但EBV变异与肿瘤发生的具体关系尚不明确。本研究开发了一种结合选择性全基因组扩增（sWGA）、多重PCR和长读长测序的高效方法，实现了EBV基因组的高覆盖率组装，覆盖度达99.62%-99.68%，为EBV变异研究提供了可靠的技术支持。
ai.translation: 地方性伯基特淋巴瘤（eBL）是撒哈拉以南非洲儿童中最常见的癌症之一。尽管先前研究发现爱泼斯坦-巴尔病毒（EBV）类型和变异可能影响肿瘤存活所需的驱动基因，但EBV变异与EBV相关肿瘤发生的具体关系仍不清楚，主要受限于缺乏可扩展且成本效益高的病毒全基因组测序方法。本研究提出了一种快速且经济高效的方法，通过结合选择性全基因组扩增（sWGA）、后续两管多重聚合酶链反应（PCR）以及便携式测序仪的长读长测序技术，实现BL肿瘤细胞系中EBV基因组的富集、测序和准确组装。该方法在多个参数范围内进行优化，实现了高比例的EBV读数和除大重复区域外的全基因组充分覆盖。优化后的方法应用于18个细胞系和3例患者细针活检样本的测序，分别获得99.62%和99.68%的中位覆盖度。组装结果与现有Illumina基组装高度一致（相似度99.61%）。改进的方法和组装流程将有助于更深入理解EBV变异与BL的关系，尤其适用于非洲地区eBL高发的实验室开展转化研究。

title: Long-read sequencing is required for precision diagnosis of incontinentia pigmenti.
abstract: Incontinentia pigmenti (IP) is caused by loss-of-function variants in IKBKG, with molecular genetic diagnosis complicated by a pseudogene. We describe seven individuals from three families with IP but negative clinical genetic testing in whom long-read sequencing identified causal variants, including one family with the common exon 4-10 deletion not identified by conventional clinical genetic testing. Concurrent methylation analysis explained disease severity in one individual who died from neurologic complications, identified a mosaic variant in an individual with an atypical presentation, and confirmed skewed X chromosome inactivation in an XXY individual.

ai.TLDR: Incontinentia Pigmenti（IP）由IKBKG基因功能丧失变异引起，但传统临床检测难以识别。长读长测序成功发现七例患者的致病变异，包括未被常规检测识别的常见外显子4-10缺失。甲基化分析揭示了疾病严重性与X染色体失衡等关键病理机制。
ai.translation: Incontinentia Pigmenti（IP）是由IKBKG基因功能丧失变异引起的遗传性疾病，其分子遗传诊断因假基因的存在而复杂化。本研究描述了三例家族中七位IP患者，其临床遗传检测结果为阴性，但通过长读长测序发现了致病性变异，包括一个传统临床检测未能识别的常见外显子4-10缺失。伴随的甲基化分析在一名因神经并发症死亡的患者中解释了疾病严重程度，在一名具有非典型表型的患者中识别出镶嵌变异，并在XXY个体中确认了X染色体失衡现象。

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Clinical application of targeted nanopore sequencing in pathogen detection in patients with sepsis
abstract:
### Background

Precision in detecting pathogens in sepsis patients is crucial for deploying targeted therapeutic strategies. The objective of the present investigation was to assess the efficacy of targeted nanopore sequencing (TNPseq) as a method for detecting sepsis pathogens.

### Methods

For this investigation, we stratified 90 patients with sepsis into ‘improved’ and ‘unimproved’ groups based on their clinical outcomes. Pathogenic microorganisms were detected in various sample types on the day of sepsis diagnosis, utilizing both conventional culture and TNPseq techniques. A comparative analysis of these methodologies was undertaken to assess their performance and efficacy in identifying pathogens in sepsis infections and discern pathogens with significant differences between the distinct patient groups.

### Results

The TNPseq analysis demonstrated superior performance in detecting pathogens in sepsis patients, achieving a significantly higher positivity rate (94.4%) compared to the culture method (30.0%, *p* < 0.001). TNPseq offered enhanced detection capabilities across a diverse array of pathogen types and sample types, outperforming culture particularly in the identification of fungi (35 vs. 8), viruses (46 vs. 1), and atypical pathogens. Both TNPseq and culture yielded concurrent positive results in 26 patient samples, yet TNPseq identified additional pathogens in 14 of these samples. A notable discrepancy in the types of infections was observed between the ‘improved’ and ‘unimproved’ groups, with a higher prevalence of single infections among the ‘improving’ cohort (*p* < 0.05). Significant differences in the incidence of *Acinetobacter baumannii* and *Clostridium striatum* were also evident between the two groups, underscoring the importance of focusing on these two pathogens in future clinical diagnostic efforts.

### Conclusion

This study underscores the versatility of TNPseq in identifying diverse pathogens in sepsis samples, ensuring its application as a diagnostic when pathogens elude conventional isolation or are difficult to culture. It particularly highlights the significant differences of *A. baumannii* and *C. striatum* in the two patient groups, pointing to potential research directions. TNPseq’s potential in sepsis diagnosis is promising.
authors: Mingdi Chen, Lei Bao, ... Xin Liu

ai.TLDR: 败血症患者病原体检测的精准性对制定靶向治疗策略至关重要。本研究通过比较传统培养法与靶向纳米孔测序（TNPseq）在败血症病原体检测中的表现，发现TNPseq在阳性率（94.4% vs 30.0%）和多类型病原体检测能力上显著优于传统培养法。研究特别指出A. baumannii和C. striatum在患者分组间的显著差异，为临床诊断提供了新方向。
ai.translation:
背景
败血症患者病原体检测的精准性对制定靶向治疗策略至关重要。本研究旨在评估靶向纳米孔测序（TNPseq）作为败血症病原体检测方法的有效性。

方法
本研究将90例败血症患者按临床结局分为'改善组'和'未改善组'。在败血症诊断当天，采用传统培养法和TNPseq技术对多种样本类型进行病原微生物检测，通过方法学比较分析评估其在败血症感染病原体识别中的性能及鉴别不同患者组间病原体差异的能力。

结果
TNPseq在败血症患者病原体检测中表现出卓越性能，阳性率（94.4%）显著高于传统培养法（30.0%，p<0.001）。TNPseq在多种病原体类型和样本类型检测中展现出更强的检测能力，尤其在真菌（35 vs 8）、病毒（46 vs 1）和非典型病原体识别方面显著优于传统培养法。两种方法在26例样本中获得同步阳性结果，但TNPseq在其中14例样本中额外识别出病原体。'改善组'与'未改善组'在感染类型分布上存在显著差异，'改善组'单感染比例更高（p<0.05）。两组间A. baumannii和C. striatum感染率差异显著，提示未来临床诊断应重点关注这两种病原体。

结论
本研究强调了TNPseq在败血症样本中识别多种病原体的通用性，证实其作为诊断工具在传统培养法无法分离或培养困难时的应用价值。研究特别指出A. baumannii和C. striatum在两组患者间的显著差异，指明了潜在的研究方向。TNPseq在败血症诊断中的应用前景令人期待。

title: DNAzyme-assisted the detection of rps27l mRNA in protein nanopores.
abstract: Quantifying mRNA is crucial for elucidating the physiological condition of organisms in life science research and clinical diagnostics. Recently, nanopore technology has been demonstrated as a versatile tool with a myriad of applications and successful implementations for genomic analyte identification. However, its application in mRNA quantification encounters challenges such as the presence of numerous background species, low expression levels, and complex mRNA structures. Herein, we propose the implementation of a DNAzyme-assisted approach for rp27l mRNA quantification in MspA protein nanopores. The strategy involves converting the quantification of mRNA through a DNAzyme reaction, where the sequence of GR-5 DNAzyme is integrated into Probe 2 (P2). The sandwich structure (P1-T-P2) is constructed between the target molecules and two types of probes, enabling the identification of target molecules and the retention of the enzyme strand in magnetic fields. As a result, GR-5 DNAzyme not only effectively hydrolyzes the corresponding substrates to yield external probes for subsequent nanopore analysis but also functions as an ingenious molecular amplification method by persistently digesting excess substrates to produce abundant external probes. This sensor acquires the amplification capability and attains a high sensitivity with a detection limit of 40 pM within 15-min measurements, improving the sensitivity of protein nanopores for nucleic acid detection. Thus, the proposed DNAzyme-based protein nanopore sensor for rp27l mRNA quantification demonstrates remarkable advantages in its label-free, rapid, and sensitive nature, which promotes the performance of protein nanopores in genomic analyte detection. Moreover, this sensor may open a novel approach for mRNA quantification, significantly impacting disease diagnosis, customized treatment, and metabolic studies.
authors: Kang Luo, Xu Wang, Ling Zheng, Ting Weng, Lan Sun, Xiaohan Chen, Youwen Zhang, Baoquan Zhao, Deqiang Wang

ai.TLDR: 本文提出了一种基于DNAzyme的蛋白质纳米孔传感器，用于rp27l mRNA的定量分析。该方法通过DNAzyme反应实现mRNA的检测，具有高灵敏度和快速检测能力，显著提升了蛋白质纳米孔在基因组分析物检测中的性能。
ai.translation: 在生命科学研究和临床诊断中，量化mRNA对于阐明生物体的生理状态至关重要。近年来，纳米孔技术已被证明是一种多功能工具，具有广泛的应用和成功的实施案例，用于基因组分析物的识别。然而，其在mRNA定量中的应用仍面临诸多挑战，例如背景物种的干扰、低表达水平以及复杂的mRNA结构。为此，本文提出了一种基于DNAzyme辅助的方法，用于在MspA蛋白纳米孔中对rp27l mRNA进行定量分析。该策略通过DNAzyme反应实现mRNA的定量，其中GR-5 DNAzyme的序列被整合到探针2（P2）中。在目标分子与两种探针之间构建了夹心结构（P1-T-P2），从而实现目标分子的识别，并在磁场中保留酶链。结果表明，GR-5 DNAzyme不仅能够有效水解相应的底物，产生可用于后续纳米孔分析的外部探针，还通过持续消化多余的底物，产生大量外部探针，从而实现分子放大。该传感器具备放大能力，在15分钟内可实现40 pM的检测限，显著提升了蛋白质纳米孔在核酸检测中的灵敏度。因此，所提出的基于DNAzyme的蛋白质纳米孔传感器在rp27l mRNA的定量分析中展现出无标签、快速和高灵敏度的优势，推动了蛋白质纳米孔在基因组分析物检测中的性能。此外，该传感器可能为mRNA定量提供一种全新的方法，对疾病诊断、个性化治疗和代谢研究产生重要影响。

title: Characterization of multidrug resistance in clinical Klebsiella pneumoniae strains carrying drug efflux pumps and multiple repetitive tandem bla
journal: Journal of infection and public health
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: To elucidate the mechanisms of multidrug resistance in clinical Klebsiella pneumoniae strains that harbor drug efflux pumps and contain multiple tandem repeats of the bla

METHODS: The characteristics of strains SC7, SC35, SC38, SC41, SC42, SC67, and SC173 were comprehensively examined. This analysis encompassed antimicrobial susceptibility testing, conjugative transfer experiments, and the detection of beta-lactamase and carbapenemase production. The genomes of these strains were sequenced using both Illumina and Nanopore platforms to generate high-quality genomic data. Subsequently, bioinformatics tools were employed to analyze the mobile genetic elements that carry antibiotic resistance genes.

RESULTS: The analyzed K. pneumoniae strains were found to produce class A carbapenemase and exhibited resistance to nearly all tested antibiotics. This resistance was primarily attributed to the presence of efflux pump genes, such as acrAB-tolC, located on the chromosomes. Additionally, these strains contained one or more repetitive tandem core structures of bla

CONCLUSIONS: The evolution of these strains is intricately linked to the core structures of bla
authors: Xiaoyu Ruan, Wenji Wang, Dongguo Wang, Liman Ma

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在阐明携带药物外排泵且含多个bla重复结构的临床肺炎克雷伯菌多药耐药机制。通过药敏测试、基因组测序和生物信息学分析发现，耐药性主要由染色体上的acrAB-tolC外排泵基因及bla重复结构共同驱动。
ai.translation: 研究目的：阐明携带药物外排泵且含多个bla重复结构的临床肺炎克雷伯菌多药耐药机制。研究方法：对SC7、SC35、SC38、SC41、SC42、SC67和SC173等菌株进行全面分析，包括抗菌药物敏感性测试、接合转移实验、β-内酰胺酶及碳青霉烯酶产酶检测。采用Illumina和Nanopore平台对菌株基因组进行测序，获取高质量基因组数据，并利用生物信息学工具分析携带抗生素耐药基因的移动遗传元件。研究结果：分析的肺炎克雷伯菌株均产生类A碳青霉烯酶，对几乎所有测试抗生素均表现出耐药性。该耐药性主要归因于染色体上如acrAB-tolC等外排泵基因的存在。此外，这些菌株含有一个或多个bla重复串联核心结构。研究结论：这些菌株的进化与bla核心结构的形成密切相关。

title: A One Health approach for the genomic characterization of antibiotic-resistant Campylobacter isolates using Nanopore whole-genome sequencing.
abstract: In response to the growing threat posed by the spread of antimicrobial resistance in zoonotic Campylobacter, a One Health approach was used to examine the genomic diversity, phylogenomic relationships, and the distribution of genetic determinants of resistance (GDR) in C. jejuni and C. coli isolates from humans, animals (ruminants, swine, and chickens), and avian food products collected during a regionally (Basque Country, Spain) and temporally (mostly 2021-2022) restricted sampling. Eighty-three C. jejuni and seventy-one C. coli isolates, most exhibiting resistance to ciprofloxacin and/or erythromycin, were whole-genome sequenced using Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-fragment sequencing (ONT). Multilocus sequence typing (MLST) analysis identified a high genomic diversity among isolates. Phylogenomic analysis showed that clustering based on the core genome was aligned with MLST profiles, regardless of the sample source. In contrast, accessory genome content sometimes discriminated isolates within the same STs and occasionally differentiated isolates from different sources. The majority of the identified GDRs were present in isolates from different sources, and a good correlation was observed between GDR distribution and phenotypic susceptibility profiles (based on minimum inhibitory concentrations interpreted according to the EUCAST epidemiological cutoff values). Genotypic resistance profiles were independent of genotypes, indicating no apparent association between resistance and phylogenetic origin. This study demonstrates that ONT sequencing is a powerful tool for molecular surveillance of bacterial pathogens in the One Health framework.
authors: Ana Hurtado, Medelin Ocejo, Beatriz Oporto, José Luis Lavín, Ruth Rodríguez, María Ángeles Marcos, Mikel Urrutikoetxea-Gutiérrez, Miriam Alkorta, José María Marimón

ai.TLDR: 本研究采用One Health方法，分析了人、动物和禽类食品中Campylobacter jejuni和Campylobacter coli菌株的基因组多样性、系统发育关系及耐药基因决定因子（GDR）分布。研究发现，GDR分布与表型耐药性特征密切相关，而基因型耐药性与系统发育起源无明显关联。
ai.translation: 为应对人畜共患病Campylobacter中抗生素耐药性传播带来的日益严重的威胁，本研究采用One Health方法，分析了来自人类、动物（反刍动物、猪和鸡）以及禽类食品产品中Campylobacter jejuni和Campylobacter coli菌株的基因组多样性、系统发育关系及耐药基因决定因子（GDR）的分布情况。采样范围限于西班牙巴斯克地区，并且时间主要集中在2021-2022年。通过牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）对83株Campylobacter jejuni和71株Campylobacter coli菌株进行了全基因组测序，其中大多数菌株对环丙沙星和/或红霉素表现出耐药性。多基因位点序列分型（Multilocus sequence typing, MLST）分析显示，菌株之间存在高度的基因组多样性。系统发育分析表明，基于核心基因组的聚类与MLST谱型一致，无论样本来源如何。相反，附加基因组内容有时能够区分同一ST（sequence type）内的菌株，偶尔也能区分不同来源的菌株。所鉴定的大多数GDR在不同来源的菌株中均存在，并且GDR分布与表型耐药性特征（基于欧盟抗微生物耐药性临床流行病学截断值解释的最小抑菌浓度）之间观察到良好的相关性。基因型耐药性特征与基因型无关，表明耐药性与系统发育起源之间没有明显的关联。本研究证明，ONT测序是One Health框架下细菌病原体分子监测的强大工具。

title: Potential and Limitations of the MinION Nanopore array for miRNA-Enabled Early Cancer Detection.
abstract: The 2024 Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine was awarded to the pioneers who reported that microRNAs (miRNAs) regulate and direct the switch between physiological and pathological pathways via their over- or under-expression. The discovery has not yielded any health benefit primarily due to raw data with no clear distinction between healthy and diseased blood samples. MiRNAs exist at femtomolar level in biological fluids, and typically quantified using amplification-based techniques. Experimental nanopores have illustrated potential for trace analysis including amplification-free miRNA quantification. We repurposed the MinION, the only commercially available nanopore-array device, and developed unique probes and protocols to quantify microRNAs in blood and urine. Our 2024 report revealed (i) miRNA copies are proportional to the total RNA isolated from the biospecimen, and (ii) several known miRNA cancer biomarkers were 1.8-fold overexpressed in blood samples from breast, prostate and pancreatic cancer patients compared to healthy. In contrast to literature reports sample variability was undetectable after normalization to the same RNA content. Here the earlier data were confirmed, and the conclusions extended to ovarian, lung, and colorectal cancer. The potential of the ready-to-use MinION/Yenos platform for multiple cancer early detection (MCED) using blood or urine is discussed.
authors: Kanavarioti, A.; Rafiq, A.

ai.TLDR: 2024年诺贝尔奖得主揭示miRNA通过过表达或低表达调控生理与病理通路转换，但原始数据因健康与疾病样本区分不清导致临床应用受限。研究团队利用纳米孔技术开发无扩增miRNA定量方法，证实miRNA拷贝数与总RNA含量相关，并在多种癌症中发现显著过表达。
ai.translation: 2024年诺贝尔生理学或医学奖授予揭示微小RNA（microRNAs, miRNAs）通过过表达或低表达调控生理与病理通路转换的先驱者。该发现尚未产生实际健康效益，主要由于原始数据缺乏健康与疾病血液样本的明确区分。miRNA在生物流体中存在飞摩尔级浓度，通常通过扩增技术进行定量。实验性纳米孔技术展示了用于痕量分析的潜力，包括无需扩增的miRNA定量。我们重新利用唯一商业化的纳米孔阵列设备MinION，开发独特探针与协议以量化血液和尿液中的miRNA。2024年报告揭示：(i) miRNA拷贝数与从生物样本中提取的总RNA量成正比；(ii) 相比健康个体，乳腺癌、前列腺癌和胰腺癌患者血液样本中多个已知miRNA癌症生物标志物呈现1.8倍过表达。与文献报道的样本变异不同，经相同RNA含量标准化后变异不可检测。本研究确认了早期数据，并将结论扩展至卵巢癌、肺癌和结直肠癌。讨论了即用型MinION/Yenos平台通过血液或尿液进行多种癌症早期检测（MCED）的潜力。

title: Single-Molecule Nanopore Sequencing of the CpG Island from the Promoter of O6-Methylguanine-DNA Methyltransferase Provides Insights into the Mechanism of De Novo Methylation of G/C-Rich Regions.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The methylation of cytosine residues at CpG sites within the O6-methylguanine-DNA methyltransferase (MGMT) promoter is a key biomarker in glioblastoma therapy. The MGMT promoter (MGMTp) contains multiple guanine-rich sequences capable of folding into G-quadruplexes (G4s), but their relevance for MGMTp methylation is poorly understood.

OBJECTIVES: Our study explores the impact of potential G-quadruplex-forming sequences (PQS) in the MGMT promoter CpG island on the activity of de novo DNA methyltransferase Dnmt3a. Additionally, we investigate their influence on the accuracy of methylation pattern detection using nanopore sequencing.

METHODS: Nanopore sequencing was employed to analyze the methylation of 94 clinically significant CpG sites in the human MGMTp using an in vitro de novo methylation system. Circular dichroism spectroscopy was used to identify G4 structures within the MGMTp CpG island. Interactions between the catalytic domain of Dnmt3a and the PQS from the MGMTp were examined by biolayer interferometry.

RESULTS: Guanine-rich DNA strands of the PQSs in the MGMTp were hypomethylated, while the complementary cytosine-rich strands were methylated by DNA methyltransferase Dnmt3a with higher efficiency. The accuracy of detecting modified bases in the PQS was significantly lower compared to surrounding sequences. Single-stranded guanine-rich DNA sequences from the MGMTp exhibited strong binding to Dnmt3a-CD, with an affinity approximately 10 times higher than their cytosine-rich complements (Kd = 3 × 10-8 M and 3 × 10-7 M, respectively). By binding to Dnmt3a, G4-forming oligonucleotides from MGMTp effectively inhibited the methylation reaction (IC50 6 × 10-7 M).

CONCLUSIONS: The obtained data indicate the role of PQSs in establishing de novo methylation of the MGMT promoter. They also highlight the challenges of sequencing guanine-rich regions and the impact of specific de novo methylation patterns on clinical data interpretation.
authors: Alexander V Sergeev, Daniil P Malyshev, Adelya I Genatullina, Galina V Pavlova, Elizaveta S Gromova, Maria I Zvereva

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了MGMT启动子中潜在G-四联体形成序列（PQS）对DNA甲基转移酶Dnmt3a活性的影响，并评估了其对纳米孔测序检测甲基化模式准确性的影响。结果显示，G-四联体形成序列在甲基化过程中表现出独特的结合特性，可能影响临床数据的解读。
ai.translation:
背景：在O6-甲基鸟嘌呤-DNA甲基转移酶（MGMT）启动子中的胞嘧啶残基在CpG位点的甲基化是胶质母细胞瘤治疗中的关键生物标志物。MGMT启动子（MGMTp）包含多个富含鸟嘌呤的序列，能够折叠成G-四联体（G4s），但这些序列与MGMTp甲基化之间的关系尚不清楚。

目标：本研究探讨了MGMT启动子CpG岛中潜在G-四联体形成序列（PQS）对新甲基化DNA甲基转移酶Dnmt3a活性的影响。此外，我们还研究了这些序列对纳米孔测序检测甲基化模式准确性的影响。

方法：采用纳米孔测序技术分析了人类MGMT启动子中94个临床相关的CpG位点的甲基化情况，使用体外新甲基化系统进行分析。利用圆二色光谱法鉴定MGMT启动子CpG岛中的G4结构。通过生物层干涉技术（Biolayer Interferometry）研究了Dnmt3a催化结构域与MGMT启动子PQS之间的相互作用。

结果：MGMT启动子中PQS的富含鸟嘌呤DNA链表现出低甲基化，而互补的富含胞嘧啶链则被DNA甲基转移酶Dnmt3a更高效地甲基化。在PQS中检测修饰碱基的准确性显著低于周围序列。来自MGMT启动子的单链富含鸟嘌呤DNA序列与Dnmt3a-CD表现出强结合，其亲和力约为互补富含胞嘧啶序列的10倍（Kd分别为3 × 10-8 M和3 × 10-7 M）。通过与Dnmt3a结合，来自MGMT启动子的G4形成寡核苷酸有效抑制了甲基化反应（IC50为6 × 10-7 M）。

结论：获得的数据表明PQS在建立MGMT启动子的新甲基化过程中起重要作用。同时，也突出了对富含鸟嘌呤区域测序的挑战，以及特定的新甲基化模式对临床数据解读的影响。

title: IS26-mediated cointegration generates a plasmid co-harbouring blaIMP-4 and blaKPC-2 in Klebsiella pneumoniae.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: This study aims to explore the phenotypic and genotypic characteristics of a plasmid that co-harbours blaIMP-4 and blaKPC-2 in a carbapenem-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae.

METHODS: Strain K194 was isolated from a 60-year-old patient. Species identification was performed with matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry, followed by antibiotic susceptibility testing. Antimicrobial resistance genes were detected and S1-pulsed-field gel electrophoresis with Southern blot experiments were performed to identify plasmids. Whole-genome sequencing was executed with the Illumina and Oxford Nanopore platforms.

RESULTS: K. pneumoniae K194 was resistant to multiple antibiotics, including carbapenems. This strain carried both blaIMP-4 and blaKPC-2 on a single 163 kb plasmid (pK194-P2). pK194-P2 was capable of conjugation with an efficiency of 3.4 × 10-7 in vitro conjugation experiments. Whole-genome analysis confirmed that pK194-P2 was a novel plasmid and had both IncFII- and IncN-type replicons. Sequence alignment revealed direct repeats of the sequences (GCCCAAGG) flanking a 109-kb region bounded by two copies of IS26. In vitro, evolution experiments showed that blaKPC-2 in pK194-P2 could be stably maintained in the transconjugants after 10 days of passage, while blaIMP-4 could be lost during repeated laboratory passage. Whole-genome sequencing and alignment of two blaIMP-4-negative plasmids with pK194-P2 revealed that they had a deletion of 81 or 94 kb adjacent to IS26.

CONCLUSIONS: Our study reports a novel plasmid co-harbouring blaIMP-4 and blaKPC-2 in K. pneumoniae, and highlights the potential role of IS26-mediated cointegration and deletion in plasmid formation and evolution.
authors: Jiawei Zhou, Xiaohua Meng, Shujun Ni, Yunxing Yang, Qiong Zhang, Lingjiao Wu, Qiong Chen

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了一种同时携带blaIMP-4和blaKPC-2基因的质粒在耐碳青霉烯类肺炎克雷伯菌中的表型和基因型特征。研究发现该质粒具有较高的接合效率，并且在体外实验中表现出稳定性。
ai.translation:
背景：本研究旨在探讨一种同时携带blaIMP-4和blaKPC-2基因的质粒在耐碳青霉烯类肺炎克雷伯菌中的表型和基因型特征。

方法：从一名60岁患者中分离出菌株K194。通过基质辅助激光解吸/离子化飞行时间质谱法进行种属鉴定，随后进行抗生素敏感性测试。通过抗微生物耐药基因检测、S1脉冲场凝胶电泳和Southern blot实验鉴定质粒。使用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore平台进行全基因组测序。

结果：肺炎克雷伯菌K194对多种抗生素，包括碳青霉烯类药物表现出耐药性。该菌株在单一163 kb质粒（pK194-P2）上同时携带blaIMP-4和blaKPC-2。pK194-P2在体外接合实验中具有3.4 × 10-7的接合效率。全基因组分析确认pK194-P2是一种新型质粒，具有IncFII和IncN型复制子。序列比对显示，在一个由两个IS26拷贝包围的109 kb区域两侧，存在直接重复的序列（GCCCAAGG）。体外进化实验表明，在10天的传代后，pK194-P2中的blaKPC-2能够在转导子中稳定维持，而blaIMP-4则可能在重复实验室传代过程中丢失。通过全基因组测序和将两个blaIMP-4阴性质粒与pK194-P2进行比对，发现它们在IS26附近存在81或94 kb的缺失。

结论：本研究报道了一种在肺炎克雷伯菌中同时携带blaIMP-4和blaKPC-2的新型质粒，并突出了IS26介导的共整合和缺失在质粒形成和进化中的潜在作用。

title: Host DNA depletion assisted metagenomic sequencing of bronchoalveolar lavage fluids for diagnosis of pulmonary tuberculosis.
journal: Annals of clinical microbiology and antimicrobials
abstract: Metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) has greatly improved our understanding of pathogens in infectious diseases such as pulmonary tuberculosis (PTB). However, high human DNA background (> 95%) impedes the detection sensitivity of mNGS in identifying intracellular Mycobacterium tuberculosis (MTB), posing a pressing challenge for MTB diagnosis. Therefore, there is an urgent need to improve MTB diagnosis performance in PTB patients. In this study, we optimized mNGS method for diagnosis of PTB. This led to the development of the host DNA depletion assisted mNGS (HDA-mNGS) technique, which we compared with conventional mNGS and the host DNA depletion-assisted Nanopore sequencing (HDA-Nanopore) in diagnostic performance. We collected 105 bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) samples from suspected PTB patients across three medical centers to assess the clinical performance of these methods. The results of our study showed that HDA-mNGS had the highest sensitivity (72.0%) and accuracy (74.5%) in PTB detection. This was significantly higher compared to mNGS (51.2%, 58.2%) and HDA-Nanopore (58.5%, 62.2%). Furthermore, HDA-mNGS provided an increased coverage of the MTB genome by up to 16-fold. Antibiotic resistance gene analysis indicated that HDA-mNGS could provide increased depth to the detection of Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) locus more effectively. These findings indicate that HDA-mNGS can significantly improve the clinical performance of PTB diagnosis for BALF samples, offering great potential in managing antibiotic resistance in PTB patients.
authors: Jinfeng Yuan, Liping Ma, Juan Du, Hailin Sun, Shanshan Li, Gang Zhou, Guanhua Rao, Fengshuo Sun, Wangyang Chen, Hui Miao, Dan Tian, Changhao Cheng, Yan Wang, Liang Li, Lifeng Li, Yu Pang

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过优化宏基因组下一代测序（mNGS）方法，开发了宿主DNA耗竭辅助mNGS（HDA-mNGS）技术，显著提高了肺结核（PTB）诊断的敏感性和准确性。HDA-mNGS在检测结核分枝杆菌（MTB）和抗生素耐药基因方面表现出更优的性能。
ai.translation: 宏基因组下一代测序（mNGS）在感染性疾病如肺结核（PTB）的病原体研究中发挥了重要作用。然而，高比例的人类DNA背景（> 95%）限制了mNGS在检测细胞内结核分枝杆菌（MTB）的灵敏度，这给MTB的诊断带来了严峻挑战。因此，迫切需要提高PTB患者的MTB诊断性能。在本研究中，我们优化了用于PTB诊断的mNGS方法，开发了宿主DNA耗竭辅助mNGS（HDA-mNGS）技术，并将其与传统mNGS和宿主DNA耗竭辅助纳米孔测序（HDA-Nanopore）在诊断性能上进行了比较。我们收集了来自三个医疗中心的105例疑似PTB患者的支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）样本，以评估这些方法的临床性能。研究结果表明，HDA-mNGS在PTB检测中具有最高的敏感性（72.0%）和准确性（75.5%），显著高于传统mNGS（51.2%，58.2%）和HDA-Nanopore（58.5%，62.2%）。此外，HDA-mNGS通过高达16倍的覆盖度提高了MTB基因组的覆盖范围。抗生素耐药基因分析表明，HDA-mNGS能够更有效地提高对抗生素耐药（AMR）位点的检测深度。这些发现表明，HDA-mNGS能够显著提高BALF样本中PTB诊断的临床性能，为管理PTB患者的抗生素耐药性提供了巨大潜力。

title: Diagnostic utility of single-locus DNA methylation mark in Sotos syndrome developed by nanopore sequencing-based episignature
abstract:
### Background

In various neurodevelopmental disorders (NDDs), sets of differential methylation marks (referred to as DNA methylation signatures or episignatures) are syndrome-specific and useful in evaluating the pathogenicity of detected genetic variants. These signatures have generally been tested using methylation arrays, requiring additional experimental and evaluation costs. As an alternative, long-read sequencing can simultaneously and accurately evaluate genetic and epigenetic changes. In addition, genome-wide DNA methylation profiling with more complete sets of CpG using long-read sequencing (than methylation arrays) may provide alternative but more comprehensive DNA methylation signatures, which have yet to be adequately investigated.

### Methods

Nine and seven cases of molecularly diagnosed Sotos syndrome and ATR-X syndrome, respectively, were sequenced using nanopore long-read sequencing, together with 22 controls. Genome-wide differential DNA methylation analysis was performed. Among these differential DNA methylation sites, a single-locus DNA methylation mark at part of the *NSD1* CpG island (CpGi) was subsequently studied in an additional 22 cases with a *NSD1* point mutation or a 5q35 submicroscopic deletion involving *NSD1*. To investigate the potential utility of a single-locus DNA methylation test at *NSD1* CpGi for differential diagnosis, nine cases with *NSD1*-negative clinically overlapping overgrowth intellectual disability syndromes (OGIDs) were also tested.

### Results

Long-read sequencing enabled the successful extraction of two sets of differential methylation marks unique to each of Sotos syndrome and ATR-X syndrome, referred to as long-read-based DNA methylation signatures (LR-DNAm signatures), as alternatives to reported DNA methylation signatures (obtained by methylation array). Additionally, we found that a part, but not all, of the *NSD1* CpGi were hypomethylated compared with the level in controls in both cases harboring *NSD1* point mutations and those with a 5q35 submicroscopic deletion. This difference in methylation is specific to Sotos syndrome and lacking in other OGIDs.

### Conclusions

Simultaneous evaluation of genetic and epigenetic alterations using long-read sequencing may improve the discovery of DNA methylation signatures, which may in turn increase the diagnostic yields. As an example of the outcomes of these analyses, we propose that a single-locus DNA methylation test at *NSD1* CpGi may streamline the molecular diagnosis of Sotos syndrome, regardless of the type of *NSD1* aberration.
authors: Takeshi Mizuguchi, Nobuhiko Okamoto, ... Naomichi Matsumoto
citation: Mizuguchi, T., Okamoto, N., Hara, T. et al. Diagnostic utility of single-locus DNA methylation mark in Sotos syndrome developed by nanopore sequencing-based episignature. Clin Epigenet 17 , 27 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13148-025-01832-0

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术揭示了Sotos综合征和ATR-X综合征特有的DNA甲基化签名，发现NSD1基因区域的甲基化差异可作为分子诊断的生物标志物。该方法相比传统甲基化阵列具有更高的检测精度和全面性，为神经发育障碍的分子诊断提供了新思路。
ai.translation:
在多种神经发育障碍（NDDs）中，差异甲基化标记（称为DNA甲基化签名或表观签名）具有综合征特异性，可有效评估检测到的遗传变异的致病性。这些签名通常通过甲基化阵列进行检测，但需要额外的实验和评估成本。作为替代方案，长读长测序能够同时准确评估遗传和表观遗传变化。此外，使用长读长测序进行全基因组DNA甲基化分析（相比甲基化阵列）可获得更完整的CpG集合，可能提供更全面的DNA甲基化签名，但尚未充分研究。

采用纳米孔长读长测序对9例分子确诊的Sotos综合征和7例ATR-X综合征病例进行分析，同时纳入22例对照组。进行全基因组差异DNA甲基化分析。在差异甲基化位点中，进一步研究了NSD1基因CpG岛（CpGi）部分区域的单一位点甲基化标记，分析了22例携带NSD1点突变或5q35亚微缺失的病例。为探讨NSD1 CpGi单一位点甲基化检测在鉴别诊断中的潜在价值，还对9例临床表型重叠的NSD1阴性过生长智力障碍综合征（OGIDs）病例进行了检测。

长读长测序成功提取了Sotos综合征和ATR-X综合征各自特有的两组差异甲基化标记，称为基于长读长测序的DNA甲基化签名（LR-DNAm签名），作为传统甲基化阵列获得的DNA甲基化签名的替代方案。此外，发现携带NSD1点突变和5q35亚微缺失的病例中，NSD1 CpG岛部分区域的甲基化水平较对照组显著降低，但并非全部区域均出现该现象。这种甲基化差异特异性地存在于Sotos综合征中，而在其他OGIDs中未观察到。

通过长读长测序同时评估遗传和表观遗传改变可能提高DNA甲基化签名的发现效率，从而提升诊断率。作为分析结果的示例，我们提出NSD1 CpGi单一位点甲基化检测可能简化Sotos综合征的分子诊断，无论NSD1异常类型如何。

title: Complete Genome Sequencing of a G3P[14] Rabbit Rotavirus.
journal: Animals : an open access journal from MDPI
abstract: Group A rotaviruses (RVAs) are a major cause of acute dehydrating diarrhea in infants and young animals worldwide. In rabbits, RVAs are associated with enteric disease, likely in combination with other pathogens. We report the identification and characterization of a lapine RVA strain in an Italian rabbit breeding farm. Increased mortality rates associated with enteric symptoms were reported in the facility in post-weaning rabbits around 40 days of age. By quantitative RT-PCR, an RVA strain was identified in the intestinal contents of deceased rabbits. A PCR-based enrichment protocol coupled with Nanopore sequencing allowed the reconstruction of the nearly complete genome of a rabbit RVA strain, Rabbit-wt/ITA/36-9/2022/G3P[14], with a genotype constellation (G3-P[14]-I2-R2-C2-M3-A9-N2-T6-E5-H3) conserved among lapine RVAs. Each of the 11 gene segments displayed high nucleotide identity and phylogenetic clustering with lapine rotavirus strains, as well as two Belgian human G3P[14] strains, which had been shown to have a zoonotic (lapine) origin. However, the NSP2 gene of strain 36-9 clustered closer with a group of rare human G3P[9] strains, suggesting a common path during their evolution. Gathering sequence data on animal RVAs is pivotal to reconstructing the history of homologous and heterologous RVAs in various mammals, including humans.
authors: Ahmed Hassan Omar, Francesco Pellegrini, Cristiana Catella, Georgia Diakoudi, Anna Salvaggiulo, Gaia Casalino, Elena Circella, Francesco D'Amico, Michele Schiavitto, Antonio Camarda, Michele Camero, Krisztián Bányai, Jelle Matthijnssens, Max Ciarlet, Vito Martella, Gianvito Lanave

ai.TLDR: 兔源轮状病毒（RVA）是全球婴幼儿和幼畜急性脱水性腹泻的主要病原体。本研究在意大利兔场发现了一株新型兔源RVA菌株，通过基因组测序揭示其与人类G3P[14]菌株的进化关系。该菌株的NSP2基因与罕见人类G3P[9]菌株聚类，提示其可能具有跨物种传播潜力。
ai.translation: A组轮状病毒（RVAs）是全球婴幼儿和幼畜急性脱水性腹泻的主要病原体。在兔子中，RVAs常与肠道疾病相关，可能与其他病原体共同作用。本研究报道了意大利兔繁育场中一株兔源RVA菌株的鉴定与表征。该兔场在断奶后约40日龄的兔子中出现肠道症状相关死亡率升高现象。通过定量RT-PCR在死亡兔子肠道内容物中检测到RVA菌株。基于PCR富集协议结合Nanopore测序技术，成功重建了近完整基因组（Rabbit-wt/ITA/36-9/2022/G3P[14]），其基因型组合（G3-P[14]-I2-R2-C2-M3-A9-N2-T6-E5-H3）在兔源RVA中高度保守。所有11个基因片段均与兔源轮状病毒株及两株比利时人类G3P[14]株呈现高核苷酸同源性和系统发育聚类，而菌株36-9的NSP2基因则与罕见人类G3P[9]株聚类，提示其进化过程中可能存在共同传播路径。收集动物RVA序列数据对重构哺乳动物（包括人类）同源及异源RVA的进化史具有关键意义。

title: Nanopore Sequencing Solves an Elusive Case of Sotos Syndrome.
journal: American journal of medical genetics. Part A
abstract: Sotos syndrome is a rare genetic disorder characterized by distinctive facial features, including a broad and prominent forehead, dolichocephaly, and learning disabilities ranging from mild to severe intellectual impairment. Affected individuals often show overgrowth in height and head circumference over two standard deviations. The syndrome is caused by haploinsufficiency of the NSD1 gene, with no evidence of genetic heterogeneity to date. Here we describe the unsolved case of a child of 4 years of age with a clinical diagnosis of Sotos syndrome. However, trio exome sequencing (ES) and exon chromosomal microarray (CMA) analysis excluded both small and large mutations in the NSD1 gene. As part of the Telethon Undiagnosed Programme, we used additional tools to investigate the possibility of new genes or elusive mutations that may have been missed by previous molecular diagnostic approaches. Therefore, we performed Nanopore long-read sequencing. This revealed a 447 bp insertion in exon 13 of the NSD1 gene. mRNA analysis confirmed in-frame skipping of exon 13 that encodes for two PHD domains. The genomic insertion shows 100% identity with an intronic region, although inverted, containing an AluSx1 element 2 kb upstream of the skipped exon, which may drive the event by masking the splice acceptor site of exon 13. Interestingly, this is the first case of Sotos syndrome linked to a pathogenic mechanism involving an insertion enclosing a transposable element generating a protein devoid of two PHDs, which are required for reading histone post-translational modifications.
authors: Pasquale Di Letto, Alberto Budillon, Sarah Iffat Rahman, Francesca Del Vecchio Blanco, Mariateresa Zanobio, Margherita Scarpato, Margherita Russo, Maria Elena Onore, Giulio Piluso, Vincenzo Nigro, Gioacchino Scarano, Annalaura Torella

ai.TLDR: Sotos综合征是一种由NSD1基因单倍体不足引起的罕见遗传病，表现为特殊面容和智力障碍。传统外显子组测序和染色体微阵列分析未能发现NSD1基因突变，通过Nanopore长读长测序首次发现13号外显子447bp插入，该插入包含可移动元件导致PHD结构域缺失，揭示了新的致病机制。
ai.translation: Sotos综合征是一种罕见的遗传性疾病，其特征是独特的面部特征，包括宽而突出的额头、矢状头型以及从轻度到重度的智力障碍。受影响的个体通常表现出身高和头围超过两个标准差的过度生长。该综合征由NSD1基因的单倍体不足引起，目前尚未发现遗传异质性。本文描述了一例4岁儿童的未解病例，临床诊断为Sotos综合征。然而，三联体外显子组测序（ES）和外显子染色体微阵列（CMA）分析排除了NSD1基因的小突变和大突变。作为Telethon未诊断计划的一部分，我们使用额外工具调查新基因或被遗漏的隐匿突变的可能性。因此，我们进行了Nanopore长读长测序。该测序揭示了NSD1基因13号外显子中447bp的插入。mRNA分析证实了13号外显子的框内跳跃，该外显子编码两个PHD结构域。基因组插入与内含子区域100%相同，尽管方向相反，包含一个位于跳过外显子上游2kb的AluSx1元件，这可能通过掩盖13号外显子的剪接供体位点驱动该事件。有趣的是，这是首个与插入包含可移动元件导致缺失两个PHD结构域的致病机制相关的Sotos综合征病例，而PHD结构域对于读取组蛋白翻译后修饰至关重要。

title: Whole genome sequencing of hepatitis B virus using tiled amplicon (HEPTILE) and probe based enrichment on Illumina and Nanopore platforms
abstract: Hepatitis B virus (HBV) whole genome sequencing (WGS) is currently limited as the DNA viral loads (VL) of many clinical samples are below the threshold required to generate full genomes using current sequencing methods. We developed two pan-genotypic viral enrichment methods, using probe-based capture and tiled amplicon PCR (HEP-TILE) for HBV WGS. We demonstrate using mock samples that both enrichment methods are pan-genotypic (genotypes A-J). Using clinical samples, we demonstrate that HEP-TILE amplification successfully amplifies full genomes at the lowest HBV VL tested (30 IU/ml), and the PCR products can be sequenced using both Nanopore and Illumina platforms. Probe-based capture with Illumina sequencing required VL > 300,000 IU/ml to generate full length HBV genomes. The capture-Illumina and HEP-TILE-Nanopore pipelines had consensus sequencing accuracy of 100% in mock samples with known DNA sequences. Together, these protocols will facilitate the generation of HBV sequence data, enabling a more accurate and representative picture of HBV molecular epidemiology, cast light on persistence and pathogenesis, and enhance understanding of the outcomes of infection and its treatment.
authors: Sheila F. Lumley, Chris Kent, ... Philippa C. Matthews
citation: Lumley, S.F., Kent, C., Jennings, D. et al. Whole genome sequencing of hepatitis B virus using tiled amplicon (HEPTILE) and probe based enrichment on Illumina and Nanopore platforms. Sci Rep 15 , 5795 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-87721-1
