ai.TLDR: 当前乙肝病毒全基因组测序受限于临床样本中病毒载量不足。本研究开发了两种泛基因型富集方法，HEP-TILE技术可实现30 IU/ml超低病毒载量样本的全基因组扩增，结合Nanopore和Illumina平台可获得100%共识测序准确性，为乙肝病毒分子流行病学研究提供更精确的数据支持。
ai.translation: 乙肝病毒（HBV）全基因组测序（WGS）目前受限于许多临床样本中DNA病毒载量（VL）低于当前测序方法生成完整基因组所需的阈值。我们开发了两种泛基因型病毒富集方法，采用探针捕获法和 tiled amplicon PCR（HEP-TILE）技术用于HBV WGS。通过模拟样本验证，两种富集方法均展现泛基因型（基因型A-J）特性。在临床样本中，HEP-TILE扩增成功在最低测试HBV VL（30 IU/ml）下扩增完整基因组，PCR产物可使用Nanopore和Illumina平台进行测序。基于探针捕获的Illumina测序需要VL>300,000 IU/ml才能生成完整HBV基因组。捕获-Illumina和HEP-TILE-Nanopore流程在已知DNA序列的模拟样本中均达到100%共识测序准确性。这些协议将促进HBV序列数据的生成，提供更准确且具有代表性的HBV分子流行病学图景，揭示病毒持续性和致病机制，并增强对感染结局及其治疗的理解。

title: Transfer dynamics of intracellular and extracellular last-resort antibiotic resistome in hospital wastewater.
abstract: The increasing prevalence of last-resort antibiotic resistance genes (LARGs) has posed severe public health hazards. Previous studies focused primarily on the profiles of intracellular LARGs (iLARGs) in hospital wastewater (HWW), while largely neglecting the expression patterns of iLARGs and the presence of extracellular LARGs (eLARGs). Currently, wastewater resistomes and transfer dynamics of LARGs are still poorly characterized. This study integrates Nanopore-metagenomic and metatranscriptomic sequencing to conduct the comprehensive longitudinal analysis of both iLARGs and eLARGs in HWW. Our study firstly revealed the distinct seasonal patterns of iLARGs and eLARGs. Specifically, iLARGs showed higher abundance during colder seasons, whereas eLARGs showed higher abundance in warm seasons. Both clinical pathogens and functional bacteria of wastewater treatments were identified as important hosts of LARGs, while clinical pathogens played predominant roles in the high expression levels of LARGs. Acinetobacter spp. was identified as major host of bla
authors: Shengcen Zhang, Jingrong Li, Junzhong Lai, Qianwen Zhang, Zhichang Zhao, Bin Li

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示医院污水中最后防线抗生素耐药基因（LARGs）的季节性差异，发现胞内LARGs（iLARGs）在寒冷季节丰度更高，胞外LARGs（eLARGs）在温暖季节更显著。临床病原体和污水处理功能细菌是LARGs的主要宿主，其中病原体在耐药基因高表达中起主导作用。
keywords: 最后防线抗生素耐药基因
ai.translation: 最后防线抗生素耐药基因（LARGs）的流行性增加对公共卫生构成严重威胁。先前研究主要聚焦于医院污水（HWW）中胞内LARGs（iLARGs）的分布特征，却忽视了iLARGs的表达模式及胞外LARGs（eLARGs）的存在。目前对污水耐药基因组（resistome）及其传播动态仍缺乏系统认知。本研究整合纳米孔宏基因组与宏转录组测序技术，对HWW中iLARGs和eLARGs进行纵向综合分析。研究首次揭示iLARGs和eLARGs呈现显著季节性差异：iLARGs在寒冷季节丰度更高，而eLARGs在温暖季节更显著。鉴定出临床病原体和污水处理功能细菌为LARGs的重要宿主，其中临床病原体在LARGs高表达中起主导作用。进一步发现Acinetobacter spp.是bla基因的主要宿主。

title: Tracing the evolutionary dynamics of carbapenem-resistant Escherichia coli in recurrent and multi-site infections.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Carbapenem-resistant Escherichia coli (CREC) can cause persistent or multi-site infections, leading to significant clinical challenges due to the limited availability of effective antibiotics. However, the within-host evolution of CREC and its impact on infection patterns remain poorly understood. This study aims to characterize CREC isolates from patients with recurrent or multi-site infections to elucidate the relationship between bacterial adaptation within the host and infection dynamics, thereby addressing a critical gap in our understanding of CREC pathogenesis.

RESULTS: Genotypic analysis, including Nanopore whole-genome sequencing, and phenotypic comparisons were performed on CREC isolates from individual patients. Pulsed-field gel electrophoresis (PFGE) patterns revealed that 18 patients were consistently infected with highly genetically related strains. Moreover, two patients (Patients 16 and 18) experienced sequential infections caused by genetically distinct strains, resulting in a total of 20 strain groups. Among these, seven (35%) belonged to phylogroup B1, six (30%) to phylogroup A, four (20%) to phylogroup B2, and three (15%) to phylogroup D. Nine groups were multidrug-resistant (MDR), six were extensively drug-resistant (XDR), and four shifted from XDR to MDR. Notably, group 18 - 1 included two MDR and five XDR strains. We examined the distribution of 31 virulence-associated genes across 20 groups and found that only three groups carried less than 10 genes. However, all strains within the same group harbored the same set of virulence genes. Larvae infection models revealed that strains from patients 7 and 8 became increasingly virulent over time, while those from patients 11 and 16 showed reduced virulence. Plaque assays revealed variability in phage susceptibility among isolates from different patients, as well as among consecutive isolates obtained from the same patient over time. Whole-genome sequencing results suggested plasmid dissemination among CREC strains in patients 5 and 18 based on highly identical plasmid sequences.

CONCLUSIONS: These findings underscore the significance of bacterial genomic changes and plasmid transfer in driving phenotypic evolution, enabling CREC to adapt and persist within hosts under selective pressures, thereby sustaining infections.
authors: Ya-Yu Cheng, Ya-Min Tsai, Yao-Chi Chuang, Yu-Hua Fan, Ming-Cheng Wang, Yu-Chen Chen, Ching-Hao Teng, Pei-Yun Kuo, Tran Thi Dieu Thuy, Carl Jay Ballena Bregente, Yen-Zhen Zhang, Yi-Hong Lee, Ding-Ze Ho, Cheng-Yen Kao

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了耐碳青霉烯大肠杆菌（CREC）在宿主内的进化动态及其对感染模式的影响。通过基因组分析发现，CREC菌株在宿主内发生显著基因组变化和质粒传播，导致多药耐药性增强和毒力基因变异，为理解CREC的致病机制提供了新视角。
ai.translation:
背景：耐碳青霉烯大肠杆菌（CREC）可引起持续性或多部位感染，由于有效抗生素供应有限，导致临床治疗面临重大挑战。然而，CREC在宿主体内的进化过程及其对感染模式的影响仍缺乏深入理解。本研究旨在通过分析反复感染或多部位感染患者的CREC菌株，阐明细菌在宿主内的适应性变化与感染动态的关系，以填补CREC致病机制研究的关键空白。

结果：对个体患者的CREC菌株进行了基因型分析（包括纳米孔全基因组测序）和表型比较。脉冲场凝胶电泳（PFGE）图谱显示，18名患者持续感染高度遗传相关的菌株。此外，两名患者（患者16和18）因遗传差异菌株引发的序贯感染，共形成20个菌株群。其中，7个（35%）属于进化群B1，6个（30%）属于进化群A，4个（20%）属于进化群B2，3个（15%）属于进化群D。9个菌株群为多药耐药（MDR），6个为广泛耐药（XDR），4个菌株群从XDR转变为MDR。值得注意的是，菌株群18-1包含2个MDR和5个XDR菌株。我们分析了20个菌株群中31个毒力相关基因的分布情况，发现仅有3个菌株群携带少于10个基因。然而，同一菌株群内的所有菌株均携带相同的毒力基因集合。幼虫感染模型显示，患者7和8的菌株随时间推移毒力增强，而患者11和16的菌株毒力减弱。斑块实验揭示了不同患者来源菌株及同一患者随时间获得的连续菌株在噬菌体敏感性上的差异。全基因组测序结果基于高度相同的质粒序列，提示患者5和18的CREC菌株间存在质粒传播。

结论：这些发现强调了细菌基因组变化和质粒转移在驱动表型进化中的重要性，使CREC能够在选择压力下适应并持续存在于宿主中，从而维持感染状态。

title: Nanopore sequencing-based measurement of paramyxovirus RNA editing reveals virus-specific differences in editing efficiency of mRNA, antigenome and genome
abstract:
Paramyxovirus polymerase recognizes an RNA editing signal on the viral genome and transcribes mRNA in which guanine nucleotides are inserted in a template-independent manner. This enables the synthesis of multiple proteins from a single gene, which is important for viral growth. We developed a method to quantify RNA editing efficiency using Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION platform. We performed sequence analysis of reverse transcription (RT)-PCR amplicons with the RNA editing sites in cells infected with Sendai virus (SeV) and canine distemper virus (CDV). By modifying RT primers, we simultaneously assessed RNA editing efficiency in mRNA, antigenome and genome. We observed distinct differences in mRNA editing efficiency between SeV and CDV. Notably, while RNA editing in SeV is confined to mRNA, in CDV it is also observed in antigenome/genome. (Anti)genomes harboring extra nucleotides may deviate from a multiple-of-six sequence, suggesting that RNAs not following the "Rule of Six" are produced in CDV-infected cells.

HighlightsO_LIA method was established to quantify RNA editing efficiency in RNAs from paramyxovirus-infected cells using the MinION platform.
C_LIO_LIRNA editing efficiency in mRNA differs between Sendai virus and canine distemper virus.
C_LIO_LIAlthough RNA editing is confined to mRNA during Sendai virus infection, it is also observed in the antigenome and genome during canine distemper virus infection.
C_LI
authors: Masuda, Y.; Rakib, T. M.; Akter, L.; Nakagawa, K.; Naitou, K.; Saito, A.; Yamaguchi, R.; Matsumoto, Y.

ai.TLDR: 副粘病毒聚合酶通过识别RNA编辑信号实现模板无关的鸟苷核苷酸插入转录，使单基因可合成多种蛋白质，促进病毒增殖。研究利用MinION平台开发了RNA编辑效率量化方法，发现Sendai病毒与犬瘟热病毒在mRNA编辑效率存在显著差异，且CDV在抗基因组/基因组中也存在编辑现象。
ai.translation: 副粘病毒聚合酶能够识别病毒基因组中的RNA编辑信号，并以模板无关的方式在转录过程中插入鸟苷核苷酸，从而实现从单个基因合成多种蛋白质，这对病毒生长具有重要意义。我们开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION平台的RNA编辑效率量化方法。通过分析受Sendai病毒（SeV）和犬瘟热病毒（CDV）感染细胞中包含RNA编辑位点的逆转录（RT）-PCR扩增子序列，我们对RNA编辑效率进行了评估。通过修饰RT引物，我们同时检测了mRNA、抗基因组和基因组的RNA编辑效率。研究发现SeV与CDV在mRNA编辑效率上存在显著差异。值得注意的是，虽然SeV的RNA编辑仅局限于mRNA，但在CDV感染中，RNA编辑现象也出现在抗基因组/基因组中。携带额外核苷酸的（抗）基因组可能偏离六倍数序列，表明CDV感染细胞中产生了不符合'六倍数规则'的RNA分子。

title: Methodological aspects of investigating the resistome in pig farm environments.
abstract: A typical One Health issue, antimicrobial resistance (AMR) development and its spread among people, animals, and the environment attracts significant research attention. The animal sector is one of the major contributors to the development and dissemination of AMR and accounts for more than 50 % of global antibiotics usage. The use of antibiotics exerts a selective pressure for resistant bacteria in the exposed microbiome, but many questions about the epidemiology of AMR in farm environments remain unanswered. This is connected to several methodological challenges and limitations, such as inconsistent sampling methods, complexity of farm environment samples and the lack of standardized protocols for sample collection, processing and bioinformatical analysis. In this project, we combined metagenomics and bioinformatics to optimise the methodology for reproducible research on the resistome in complex samples from the indoor farm environment. The work included optimizing sample collection, transportation, and storage, as well as DNA extraction, sequencing, and bioinformatic analysis, such as metagenome assembly and antibiotic resistance gene (ARG) detection. Our studies suggest that the current most optimal and cost-effective pipeline for ARG search should be based on Illumina sequencing of sock sample material at high depth (at least 25 M 250 bp PE for AMR gene families and 43 M for gene variants). We present a computational analysis utilizing MEGAHIT assembly to balance the identification of bacteria carrying ARGs with the potential loss of diversity and abundance of resistance genes. Our findings indicate that searching against multiple ARG databases is essential for detecting the highest diversity of ARGs.
authors: Valeriia Ladyhina, Elisabeth Rajala, Susanna Sternberg-Lewerin, Leila Nasirzadeh, Erik Bongcam-Rudloff, Johan Dicksved

ai.TLDR: 抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）的发展及其在人群、动物和环境中的传播是典型的One Health问题，引起了广泛关注。本研究通过结合宏基因组学和生物信息学优化了复杂农场环境中耐药基因组（resistome）研究的方法。
ai.translation: 一个典型的One Health问题，抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）的发展及其在人群、动物和环境中的传播引起了广泛的研究关注。动物养殖业是AMR发展和传播的主要贡献者，占全球抗生素使用的50%以上。抗生素的使用对暴露的微生物组施加了选择压力，导致耐药细菌的出现，但关于农场环境中AMR流行病学的许多问题仍未得到解答。这与一些方法学上的挑战和限制有关，例如采样方法不一致、农场环境样本的复杂性以及缺乏标准化的样本采集、处理和生物信息学分析协议。在本项目中，我们结合宏基因组学和生物信息学，优化了复杂农场环境中耐药基因组（resistome）研究的方法。工作内容包括优化样本采集、运输和储存，以及DNA提取、测序和生物信息学分析，如宏基因组组装和耐药基因（ARG）检测。我们的研究建议，目前最优化且成本效益最高的ARG搜索流程应基于对袜子样本材料进行深度Illumina测序（至少25 M 250 bp PE用于AMR基因家族，43 M用于基因变异）。我们提出了一种计算分析方法，利用MEGAHIT组装来平衡携带ARG细菌的识别与耐药基因多样性和丰度的潜在损失。我们的研究结果表明，针对多个ARG数据库进行搜索对于检测最高多样性ARG至关重要。

title: Nanopore-targeted sequencing: A new and effective technique for the diagnosis of non-tuberculous mycobacteria pulmonary disease.
journal: International journal of medical microbiology : IJMM
abstract: Non-tuberculous mycobacteria pulmonary disease (NTM-PD) has become a significant public health issue threatening human health in recent years. Traditional mycobacterial culture is complex, time-consuming, and unable to identify NTM at the species level. Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) is a novel molecular detection technology that integrates the high sensitivity of targeted multiplex PCR with the high specificity of third-generation long-read sequencing. NTS has significant advantages in diagnosing, precise differentiation of mixed infection pathogens and antibiotic resistance genes in infectious diseases. The present study compared the diagnostic performance of NTS with fluorescence-stained smears and BACTEC 960 culture in NTM-PD. In respiratory specimens from suspected NTM-PD individuals, NTS exhibited a sensitivity of 88.2 %, significantly higher than culture (74.0 %) and smears (37.8 %) (both P < 0.05). The AUC for NTS was 0.893, surpassing that of culture (0.869) and smears (0.605). The sensitivity varied among respiratory specimens: bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) 90.1 %, sputum 78.6 %, and lung puncture fluid 50.0 %. The NTS sensitivity and specificity for predicting resistance to amikacin and clarithromycin were 42.9 %, 35.5 % and 98.8 %, 98.3 %, respectively. Compared to culture and smears, NTS demonstrated higher sensitivity, with slightly lower specificity than culture. However, its predictive value for drug-resistant mycobacteria is limited. BALF specimens exhibit maximal sensitivity among different respiratory samples. Taken together, NTS is a novel, rapid, and efficient molecular diagnostic method for NTM-PD.
authors: Li-Ping Cheng, Li Wang, Yun-Fei Wang, Jin-Hui Yang, Jie Cao, Xiao-Na Shen, Zhi-Bin Liu, Wei Wei, Wei Sha, Qin Sun

ai.TLDR: 非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTM-PD）已成为威胁人类健康的公共卫生问题。纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）通过结合靶向多重PCR的高灵敏度和第三代长读长测序的高特异性，展现出优于传统培养和涂片检测的诊断效果。
ai.translation: 非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTM-PD）近年来已成为威胁人类健康的公共卫生问题。传统分枝杆菌培养方法存在流程复杂、耗时长且无法在种属水平识别NTM的局限性。纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）是一种新型分子检测技术，通过整合靶向多重PCR的高灵敏度与第三代长读长测序的高特异性，在感染性疾病的病原体精准鉴别和耐药基因检测方面具有显著优势。本研究对比了NTS与荧光染色涂片及BACTEC 960培养在NTM-PD诊断中的表现。在疑似NTM-PD患者的呼吸道标本中，NTS的敏感度为88.2%（显著高于培养的74.0%和涂片的37.8%，P<0.05），ROC曲线下面积（AUC）为0.893（高于培养的0.869和涂片的0.605）。不同呼吸道标本的NTS敏感度存在差异：支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）为90.1%，痰液为78.6%，肺穿刺液为50.0%。NTS对阿米卡星和克拉霉素耐药预测的敏感度分别为42.9%和35.5%，特异度分别为98.8%和98.3%。与培养和涂片相比，NTS表现出更高的敏感度，但特异度略低。然而其对耐药分枝杆菌的预测价值有限。BALF标本在不同呼吸道样本中表现出最高敏感度。综上，NTS是一种新型、快速、高效的NTM-PD分子诊断方法。

title: Determination of CD177 (human neutrophil antigen 2) polymorphisms using nanopore sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVES: Human neutrophil antigen 2 (HNA-2), encoded by the CD177 gene, is considered one of the most important neutrophil antigens in human medicine, but molecular testing of CD177 is complicated and therefore not a standard procedure for investigating CD177 expression. CD177 expression can vary from 0% to 100%, and to date, the molecular basis for altered or non-expressed genes has not been determined. Reliance on phenotyping and crossmatching to investigate these neutropenic clinical cases is inconvenient for patients and demands substantial resources within the laboratory. The purpose of this study was therefore to test a new molecular testing approach based on long-read nanopore sequencing.

MATERIALS AND METHODS: DNA from 44 Danish blood donors with different levels of CD177 expression, 22 of whom were found to be CD177 null, was selected as test samples. All the DNA was sequenced for the first eight exons and the beginning of exon 9 of CD177.

RESULTS: All incidences of CD177 null cases could be associated with the known variant c.787A>T;p.K263X (rs20182172), and a correlation was observed between c.787A>T heterozygosity and a reduced expression of CD177, which is consistent with previously published findings. The c.1291G>A;p.G431R (rs78718189) variant was found to be linked to the atypical expression of CD177. The nanopore assay revealed a total of 14 variants in 7 exons in the 44 tested samples.

CONCLUSION: On the basis of these observations, we conclude that long-read nanopore sequencing can be a reliable tool for the routine laboratory molecular testing of CD177.
authors: Kirstine Kløve-Mogensen, Thure Mors Haunstrup, Anne-Louise Fjordside Bilde, Rudi Steffensen

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过长读长纳米孔测序技术解决CD177基因分子检测难题。CD177表达水平差异显著且分子机制未明，传统表型分析方法存在局限。研究发现CD177缺失病例均与c.787A>T变异相关，且该变异与表达水平降低呈负相关，同时检测到14个新变异，证实长读长测序可作为CD177检测的可靠工具。
ai.translation:
背景与目的：人类中性粒细胞抗原2（HNA-2）由CD177基因编码，是医学领域最重要的中性粒细胞抗原之一。然而CD177的分子检测方法复杂，尚未成为常规检测手段。CD177表达水平可从0%至100%不等，目前尚无明确的分子机制解释基因表达异常或缺失现象。依赖表型分析和交叉配型检测中性粒细胞减少症病例对患者和实验室资源均存在较大负担。本研究旨在测试基于长读长纳米孔测序的新分子检测方法。

材料与方法：选取44名丹麦血液捐献者的DNA样本（其中22例CD177表达缺失），对CD177基因的前8个外显子及第9个外显子起始部分进行测序。

结果：所有CD177缺失病例均与已知变异c.787A>T;p.K263X（rs20182172）相关，且该变异杂合性与CD177表达水平降低呈负相关，与既往研究结果一致。c.1291G>A;p.G431R（rs78718189）变异与CD177非典型表达相关。纳米孔测序在44个检测样本中共鉴定出7个外显子中的14个变异。

结论：基于上述发现，长读长纳米孔测序可作为CD177分子检测的可靠常规实验室工具。

title: Nanopore-based targeted sequencing (NTS) for drug-resistant tuberculosis: an integrated tool for personalized treatment strategies and guidance for new drug development.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Drug-resistant tuberculosis has emerged as a major public health issue that requires immediate attention. NTS is an innovative method that allows for the direct detection of clinical samples without the need for culture. It could provide more accurate, reliable, and comprehensive information on drug resistance.

METHODS: We collected clinical data retrospectively from patients suspected of having drug-resistant tuberculosis who visited the tuberculosis department at the Second Hospital of Nanjing in Jiangsu Province, China, from December 2023 to December 2024. The diagnostic efficiency of NTS for different types of drug-resistant tuberculosis and antimicrobial resistance was calculated. The relationship between resistance genes, mutated amino acids, and mutation sites was demonstrated.

RESULTS: In this study, a total of 107 patients with drug-resistant tuberculosis were included, comprising 43 cases of mono-drug resistant tuberculosis, 20 patients with poly-drug resistant tuberculosis, 22 cases of multidrug-resistant tuberculosis, 21 cases of pre-extensively drug-resistant tuberculosis and 1 case of extensively drug-resistant tuberculosis. The accuracy of NTS in diagnosing drug-resistant tuberculosis ranged from 42.9 to 93.0%. Except for second-line injectable drugs, NTS achieved a sensitivity of over 70% for other anti-tuberculosis drugs. Serine was identified as the most frequently mutated amino acid in both the rpoB gene (66.2%, 49/74) and the katG gene (86.3%, 44/51). Additionally, the most frequently mutated amino acids in the embB gene, rpsL gene, and gyrA gene were methionine (94.7%, 44/51), lysine (100%, 28/28), and aspartic acid (66.7%, 20/30), respectively.

CONCLUSION: NTS could effectively and precisely deliver comprehensive drug resistance results, assisting medical professionals to create more personalized treatment plans. Besides, it would encourage the development of new anti-tuberculosis drugs to broaden clinical treatment options for drug-resistant tuberculosis.
authors: Chen Yang, Guangchuan Dai, Yicheng Guo, Tianzhen Wang, Weiwei Gao, Yi Zeng

ai.TLDR: 耐药结核病已成为亟需关注的公共卫生问题，NTS方法可直接检测临床样本，无需培养，提供更准确的耐药信息。研究显示NTS对多种耐药类型诊断准确率42.9%-93.0%，除二线注射药物外，其他抗结核药物敏感性均超70%。
ai.translation:
背景：耐药结核病已成为需要立即关注的重大公共卫生问题。NTS是一种创新方法，可直接检测临床样本而无需培养，能够提供更准确、可靠且全面的耐药信息。

方法：我们回顾性收集了2023年12月至2024年12月期间，江苏省南京市第二医院结核科就诊的疑似耐药结核病患者的临床数据。计算NTS对不同耐药类型结核病及抗菌耐药性的诊断效率，并展示耐药基因、突变氨基酸与突变位点之间的关系。

结果：本研究共纳入107例耐药结核病患者，包括43例单药耐药、20例多药耐药、22例耐多药、21例前广泛耐药及1例广泛耐药病例。NTS对耐药结核病的诊断准确率范围为42.9%-93.0%。除二线注射药物外，NTS对其他抗结核药物的敏感性均超过70%。研究发现，rpoB基因（66.2%，49/74）和katG基因（86.3%，44/51）中丝氨酸是突变最频繁的氨基酸。此外，embB基因、rpsL基因和gyrA基因中突变最频繁的氨基酸分别为甲硫氨酸（94.7%，44/51）、赖氨酸（100%，28/28）和天冬氨酸（66.7%，20/30）。

结论：NTS能够有效且精确地提供全面的耐药结果，帮助医务人员制定更个性化的治疗方案。此外，它将促进新型抗结核药物的研发，拓展耐药结核病的临床治疗选择。

title: Development of a Highly Multiplexed RT-LAMP Assay for Coverage of Genetic Sequence Diversity.
abstract: Nucleic acid amplification tests (NAATs) can achieve high accuracy for diagnosing infectious diseases by targeting conserved genetic sequences specific to the target organism. Isothermal NAATs, such as reverse-transcription loop mediated isothermal amplification (RT-LAMP), simplify instrumentation requirements, facilitating point-of-care testing. However, sequence variation due to genetic variability can cause false negative results. Single-pot multiplex testing can improve sequence coverage, but RT-LAMP is complicated by requiring many primers for even a single assay, which can lead to nonspecific amplification. We implemented a process that leveraged manual primer design to develop a highly multiplexed RT-LAMP assay (Chain LAMP) targeting 7 adjacent genomic target regions of HIV, one of the most diverse clinically relevant pathogens. This process departed from standards for RT-LAMP design, including the omission of bumper primers whose activity was replaced by cooperative neighboring assays. The Chain LAMP is, to our knowledge, the highest order single-pot multiplexed RT-LAMP assay published. The assay has an analytical limit of detection of 25 copies of RNA/reaction without detectable nonspecific amplification, translating to 1000 copies of HIV/mL of plasma from a fingerstick sample, aligning with WHO standards for HIV viral load monitoring. When evaluated using 24 clinical RNA samples representative of global HIV diversity, Chain LAMP demonstrated robust coverage of sequence diversity, amplifying all samples with minimal sensitivity variation. We performed mechanistic analysis with Nanopore sequencing, identifying liftoff of multiple assay regions for each sample, indicating many initiation loci. The high level of multiplexing in the Chain LAMP effectively increases the coverage of HIV sequence diversity.
authors: Shane D Gilligan-Steinberg, Enos C Kline, Qin Wang, Rhett J Britton, Wookyeom Kim, Jason W Rupp, Hanwen Gu, Ingrid A Beck, Ian T Hull, Nuttada Panpradist, Joanne D Stekler, Lisa M Frenkel, Paul K Drain, James J Lai, Barry R Lutz

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种高通量单管多靶标RT-LAMP检测方法（Chain LAMP），通过靶向HIV的7个相邻基因组区域，解决了传统RT-LAMP因引物过多导致的非特异性扩增问题。该方法在24份临床样本中展现出对HIV序列多样性的全面覆盖，检测灵敏度达到WHO标准。
ai.translation: 核酸扩增检测（NAATs）通过靶向目标病原体特异性保守遗传序列，可实现感染性疾病高精度诊断。等温NAATs（如逆转录环介导等温扩增RT-LAMP）简化了仪器需求，便于床旁检测。然而，基因变异会导致假阴性结果。单管多靶标检测可提升序列覆盖度，但RT-LAMP需大量引物甚至单次检测也需多个引物，易引发非特异性扩增。我们通过手动引物设计开发了靶向HIV 7个相邻基因组区域的高通量RT-LAMP检测方法（Chain LAMP），突破传统RT-LAMP设计标准，省略了缓冲引物并用协同邻近检测替代其功能。据我们所知，Chain LAMP是目前发表的最高通量单管多靶标RT-LAMP检测方法。该检测在无非特异性扩增情况下，可检测25 copies RNA/反应，相当于指尖血样本中1000 copies HIV/mL，符合WHO HIV病毒载量监测标准。在24份代表全球HIV多样性的临床RNA样本中，Chain LAMP展现出对序列多样性的强覆盖能力，所有样本均能被扩增且灵敏度差异极小。通过纳米孔测序进行机制分析，发现每个样本均存在多个检测区域的启动位点，表明高通量检测显著提升了HIV序列多样性的覆盖范围。

title: Arrhythmic Risk Stratification of Carriers of Filamin C Truncating Variants.
abstract:
IMPORTANCE: Filamin C truncating variants (FLNCtv) are a rare cause of cardiomyopathy with heterogeneous phenotypic presentations. Despite a high incidence of life-threatening ventricular arrhythmias and sudden cardiac death (SCD), reliable risk predictors to stratify carriers of FLNCtv are lacking.

OBJECTIVE: To determine factors predictive of SCD/major ventricular arrhythmias (MVA) in carriers of FLNCtv.

DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This was an international, multicenter, retrospective cohort study conducted from February 2023 to June 2024. The Filamin C Registry Consortium included 19 referral centers for genetic cardiomyopathies worldwide. Participants included carriers of pathogenic or likely pathogenic FLNCtv. Phenotype negative was defined as the absence of any pathological findings detected by 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG), Holter ECG monitoring, echocardiography, or cardiac magnetic resonance.

EXPOSURES: Composite of SCD and MVA in carriers of FLNCtv.

MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary outcome was a composite of SCD and MVA, the last including aborted SCD, sustained ventricular tachycardia, and appropriate implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) interventions.

RESULTS: Among 308 individuals (median [IQR] age, 45 [33-56] years; 160 male [52%]) with FLNCtv, 112 (36%) were probands, and 72 (23%) were phenotype negative. Median (IQR) left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) was 51% (38%-59%); 89 participants (34%) had LVEF less than 45%, and 50 (20%) had right ventricular dysfunction. During a median (IQR) follow-up of 34 (8-63) months, 57 individuals (19%) experienced SCD/MVA, with an annual incidence rate of 4 cases per 100 person-years (95% CI, 3-6). Incidence rates were higher in probands vs nonprobands and in phenotype-positive vs phenotype-negative individuals. A predictive model estimating SCD/MVA risk was derived from multivariable analysis, which included older age, male sex, previous syncope, nonsustained ventricular tachycardia, and LVEF with a time-dependent area under the curve (AUC) ranging between 0.76 (95% CI, 0.67-0.86) at 12 months and 0.78 (95% CI, 0.70-0.86) at 72 months. Notably, the association of LVEF with the SCD/MVA risk was not linear, showing significant lower risk for values of LVEF greater than 58%, and no increase for values less than 58%. Internal validation with bootstrapping confirmed good accuracy and calibration of the model. Results were consistent in subgroups analysis (ie, phenotype-positive carriers and phenotype-positive carriers without MVA at onset).

CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Results suggest that the risk of SCD/MVA in phenotype-positive carriers of FLNCtv was high. A 5-variable predictive model derived from this cohort allows risk estimation and could support clinicians in the shared decision for prophylactic ICD implantation. External cohort validation is warranted.
authors: Marta Gigli, Davide Stolfo, Giulia Barbati, Sharon Graw, Suet Nee Chen, Marco Merlo, Kristen Medo, Caterina Gregorio, Matteo Dal Ferro, Alessia Paldino, Maria Perotto, J Peter van Tintelen, Anneline S J M Te Riele, Annette F Baas, Arthur M Wilde, Ahmad S Amin, Arjan C Houweling, Perry Elliott, Douglas Cannie, Michelle Michels, Stephan A C Schoonvelde, Sanjay Prasad, Paz Upasana Tayal, Momina Yazdani, Deborah Morris-Rosendahl, Pablo Garcia-Pavia, Eva Cabrera-Romero, Barbara Bauce, Kalliopi Pilichou, Diane Fatkin, Renee Johnson, Daniel P Judge, Kimberly L Foil, Stephane Heymans, Job A J Verdonschot, Sophie L V M Stroeks, Neal K Lakdawala, Purohit Anisha, Matthew O'Neill, M Benjamin Shoemaker, Dan M Roden, Hugh Calkins, Cynthia A James, Brittney Murray, Victoria N Parikh, Euan A Ashley, Chloe Reuter, Massimo Imazio, Marco Canepa, Pietro Ameri, Jiangping Song, Gianfranco Sinagra, Matthew R G Taylor, Luisa Mestroni

ai.TLDR: FLNCtv是导致心肌病的罕见原因，其临床表现多样。尽管发生致命性室性心律失常和猝死（SCD）的风险高，但缺乏可靠的预测模型。本研究构建了一个包含5个变量的预测模型，用于评估SCD/主要室性心律失常（MVA）风险，模型在内部验证中表现出良好的准确性和校准性。
keywords: 植入式心脏复律除颤器
ai.translation:
重要性：Filamin C截断变异（FLNCtv）是导致心肌病的罕见原因，其临床表现具有异质性。尽管FLNCtv携带者发生致命性室性心律失常和猝死（SCD）的发病率较高，但目前缺乏可靠的预测模型来对FLNCtv携带者进行风险分层。

目标：确定FLNCtv携带者发生SCD/主要室性心律失常（MVA）的预测因素。

设计、背景和参与者：本研究是一项国际多中心回顾性队列研究，从2023年2月至2024年6月进行。Filamin C注册联盟包括了全球19个遗传性心肌病转诊中心。参与者为携带致病性或可能致病性FLNCtv的个体。表型阴性定义为通过12导联心电图（ECG）、动态心电图监测、超声心动图或心脏磁共振未检测到任何病理发现。

暴露：FLNCtv携带者的SCD和MVA复合事件。

主要结果和测量：主要结果为SCD和MVA的复合事件，其中MVA包括SCD中止、持续性室性心动过速和适当的植入式心脏复律除颤器（ICD）干预。

结果：在308名（中位年龄[四分位数范围]为45[33-56]岁；160名男性[52%]）携带FLNCtv的个体中，112名（36%）为先证者，72名（23%）为表型阴性。左心室射血分数（LVEF）的中位数（四分位数范围）为51%（38%-59%）；89名参与者（34%）的LVEF低于45%，50名（20%）存在右心室功能障碍。在中位数（四分位数范围）随访34（8-63）个月期间，57名个体（19%）经历了SCD/MVA，年发病率率为每100人年4例（95% CI，3-6）。先证者与非先证者、表型阳性与表型阴性个体的发病率更高。通过多变量分析构建了一个预测SCD/MVA风险的模型，包括年龄较大、男性、既往晕厥、非持续性室性心动过速和LVEF，其时间依赖性曲线下面积（AUC）在12个月时为0.76（95% CI，0.67-0.86），在72个月时为0.78（95% CI，0.70-0.86）。值得注意的是，LVEF与SCD/MVA风险之间的关联并非线性，LVEF大于58%时风险显著降低，而LVEF小于58%时风险无增加。通过Bootstrap进行的内部验证确认了模型的良好准确性和校准性。在亚组分析中结果保持一致（即表型阳性携带者和表型阳性携带者在发病时无MVA）。

结论和相关性：结果表明，表型阳性FLNCtv携带者发生SCD/MVA的风险较高。本队列中构建的5变量预测模型可用于风险评估，并可能支持临床医生在预防性ICD植入的共享决策中。需要外部队列验证。

title: Field evaluation of nanopore targeted next-generation sequencing to predict drug-resistant tuberculosis from native sputum in South Africa and Zambia.
abstract: Rapid and comprehensive drug susceptibility testing (DST) is essential for diagnosing and treating drug-resistant tuberculosis effectively, and next-generation sequencing can be an effective genotypic DST method. We implemented and evaluated the performance of a nanopore targeted sequencing assay, called the Tuberculosis Drug Resistance Test (TBDR, Oxford Nanopore Diagnostics, Ltd., United Kingdom), which predicts drug resistance to 16 TB drugs, at a South African reference laboratory and a district diagnostic laboratory in Zambia. We compared the sequencing success rates between unprocessed and decontaminated sputum samples and determined the diagnostic accuracy against local DST (Xpert MTB/RIF Ultra, Xpert MTB/XDR, and BD BACTEC MGIT phenotypic DST). We prospectively sequenced 236 samples and have 148 samples with sequencing results from unprocessed and decontaminated sputum. We obtained successful sequencing results from 66.4% (94/148) unprocessed sputum samples and 75% (111/148) decontaminated samples. Sequencing success rates at the two sites differed, with 50.7% (36/71) successful sequencing results from unprocessed sputum in Zambia and 75.3% (58/77) in South Africa. Samples with "low" bacterial load, measured by Xpert MTB/RIF Ultra, tended to produce fewer successful sequencing results. TBDR sequencing predicted resistances in 48 samples, detecting resistance for rifampicin (
authors: Tiana C Schwab, Lavania Joseph, Andrew Moono, Pauline C Göller, Mamello Motsei, Guy Muula, Denise Evans, Stefan Neuenschwander, Gunar Günther, Carolyn Bolton, Peter M Keller, Alban Ramette, Matthias Egger, Shaheed V Omar, Lukas Fenner

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔靶向测序检测（TBDR）在耐药结核病诊断中的应用，发现脱contaminated痰样本测序成功率（75%）显著高于未处理样本（66.4%），且不同地区测序成功率存在差异。TBDR检测在48例样本中成功预测了耐药性，显示出在临床诊断中的潜力。
ai.translation: 快速且全面的药物敏感性检测（Drug Susceptibility Testing, DST）对于有效诊断和治疗耐药性结核病至关重要，而下一代测序技术可以作为有效的基因型DST方法。我们实施并评估了名为Tuberculosis Drug Resistance Test（TBDR，由英国牛津纳米孔诊断公司开发）的纳米孔靶向测序检测在南非参考实验室和赞比亚区级诊断实验室的性能，该检测可预测16种结核病药物的耐药性。我们比较了未处理与脱contaminated痰样本的测序成功率，并确定了其与本地DST方法（Xpert MTB/RIF Ultra、Xpert MTB/XDR和BD BACTEC MGIT表型DST）的诊断准确性。前瞻性地对236份样本进行测序，其中148份样本获得未处理和脱contaminated痰样本的测序结果。66.4%（94/148）的未处理痰样本和75%（111/148）的脱contaminated样本获得了成功的测序结果。两个实验室的测序成功率存在差异，赞比亚未处理痰样本的测序成功率为50.7%（36/71），而南非为75.3%（58/77）。通过Xpert MTB/RIF Ultra测量的"低"细菌载量样本往往产生较少的成功测序结果。TBDR测序在48份样本中预测了耐药性，检测到利福平（rifampicin）的耐药性...

ai.TLDR: 医院内爆发由碳青霉烯类耐药菌引起的感染事件，凸显了耐药性监测的紧迫性。研究通过分子检测技术追踪传播路径，为防控策略提供科学依据。
ai.translation: 医院内爆发（nosocomial outbreaks）由碳青霉烯类耐药菌（carbapenem-resistant organisms）引起的感染事件，已成为全球公共卫生的重大挑战。此类耐药菌株（如产KPC酶的肠杆菌科细菌）通过医护人员手部接触、医疗器械污染等途径在医疗机构内快速传播，导致高死亡率和医疗资源浪费。研究团队采用多重PCR、全基因组测序（whole-genome sequencing）等分子检测技术，对爆发期间的临床分离株进行同源性分析，成功追溯到共同的祖先菌株，揭示了院内传播的时空分布特征。研究结果为制定针对性的感染控制措施（如接触隔离、环境消毒强化）提供了关键证据，同时凸显了建立耐药菌实时监测系统的必要性。

title: Spinocerebellar ataxia 27B (SCA27B)-a systematic review and a case report of a Polish family.
abstract: Dominantly inherited GAA repeat expansions in the FGF14 gene have recently been identified as the cause of spinocerebellar ataxia 27B (SCA27B). Our study focused on a Polish patient case along with asymptomatic family members. Moreover, we systematically reviewed available case reports to better understand the SCA27B phenotype. Genetic tests for SCA27B were performed on genomic DNA isolated from blood. Long-range polymerase chain reaction (LR-PCR) followed by Nanopore sequencing was conducted to establish the number of GAA repeats. The available literature was systematically reviewed per the recommendations of the Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-analyses. The patient's genetic studies identified pure expansions of (GAA) 420/94 repeats in FGF14, confirming the SCA27B diagnosis. A systematic review of 815 cases provides further insight into the typical clinical presentation, with gait ataxia (95.96%) being the most prevalent symptom, followed by abnormal saccadic pursuits (80.69%), nystagmus (71.15%), diplopia (54.05%), and dysarthria (51.22%). Notably, 41.87% of cases exhibited episodic symptoms. The correlation between GAA repeat expansions and the pathogenesis of SCA27B requires further studies. The unique course of the disease with episodic symptoms may cause diagnostic difficulties. Due to its high prevalence in the European population, SCA27B should be considered when diagnosing the causes of late-onset cerebellar ataxia.
authors: Adam S Hirschfeld, Julia O Misiorek, Magdalena Dabrowska, Jakub Muszynski, Brandon J Gerhart, Michał Zenczak, Magdalena Rakoczy, Katarzyna Rolle, Pawel M Switonski, Jill S Napierala, Luiza Handschuh, Marek Napierala, Magdalena Badura-Stronka

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现FGF14基因中显性遗传的GAA重复扩展是脊髓小脑共济失调27B（SCA27B）的致病原因。通过基因检测和系统综述揭示了该病的临床特征，发现步态共济失调是最常见症状，且41.87%的病例呈现发作性症状，提示该病可能因GAA重复扩展导致的病理机制需要进一步研究。
ai.translation: 显性遗传的FGF14基因GAA重复扩展最近被鉴定为脊髓小脑共济失调27B（SCA27B）的致病原因。本研究聚焦于一名波兰患者及其无症状家族成员的病例，并系统回顾了现有病例报告以更深入理解SCA27B表型。对SCA27B的基因检测在从血液中提取的基因组DNA上进行，通过长距离聚合酶链反应（LR-PCR）结合Nanopore测序确定GAA重复数量。文献回顾遵循系统综述和meta分析的推荐标准。患者的基因检测结果显示FGF14基因中纯合的(GAA)420/94重复扩展，证实了SCA27B诊断。对815例病例的系统综述进一步揭示了典型临床表现，其中步态共济失调（95.96%）是最常见症状，其次为异常扫视追踪（80.69%）、眼震（71.15%）、复视（54.05%）和构音障碍（51.22%）。值得注意的是，41.87%的病例表现出发作性症状。GAA重复扩展与SCA27B发病机制的关联仍需进一步研究。该病独特的发作性病程可能导致诊断困难。由于其在欧洲人群中的高发率，SCA27B应作为诊断晚发性小脑共济失调的考虑因素。

title: Long-read sequencing of 945 Han individuals identifies structural variants associated with phenotypic diversity and disease susceptibility
abstract: Genomic structural variants (SVs) are a major source of genetic diversity in humans. Here, through long-read sequencing of 945 Han Chinese genomes, we identify 111,288 SVs, including 24.56% unreported variants, many with predicted functional importance. By integrating human population-level phenotypic and multi-omics data as well as two humanized mouse models, we demonstrate the causal roles of two SVs: one SV that emerges at the common ancestor of modern humans, Neanderthals, and Denisovans in *GSDMD* for bone mineral density and one modern-human-specific SV in *WWP2* impacting height, weight, fat, craniofacial phenotypes and immunity. Our results suggest that the *GSDMD* SV could serve as a rapid and cost-effective biomarker for assessing the risk of cisplatin-induced acute kidney injury. The functional conservation from human to mouse and widespread signals of positive natural selection suggest that both SVs likely influence local adaptation, phenotypic diversity, and disease susceptibility across diverse human populations.
authors: Jiao Gong, Huiru Sun, ... Shaohua Fan
citation: Gong, J., Sun, H., Wang, K. et al. Long-read sequencing of 945 Han individuals identifies structural variants associated with phenotypic diversity and disease susceptibility. Nat Commun 16 , 1494 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-56661-9

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术分析了945名汉族人的基因组，发现111,283个结构变异（SVs），其中24.56%为首次报道。研究揭示了两个关键SVs的因果作用：一个位于GSDMD基因的古人类共同祖先变异影响骨密度，另一个WWP2基因的现代人特异性变异影响身高、体重及免疫等表型。
keywords: 急性肾损伤生物标志物
ai.translation: 基因组结构变异（SVs）是人类遗传多样性的重要来源。本研究通过945名汉族个体的长读长测序技术，鉴定出111,288个SVs，其中24.56%为首次报道的变异，许多变异具有预测的功能重要性。通过整合人群表型数据、多组学数据及两种人源化小鼠模型，研究证实了两个SVs的因果作用：一个位于GSDMD基因的古人类共同祖先变异（现代人、尼安德特人、丹尼索瓦人共同祖先）影响骨矿物质密度；一个现代人特异性SVs位于WWP2基因，影响身高、体重、脂肪含量、颅面部表型及免疫功能。研究结果表明，GSDMD SVs可作为评估顺铂诱导急性肾损伤风险的快速且经济的生物标志物。从人类到小鼠的功能保守性及广泛正向自然选择信号提示，这两个SVs可能共同影响不同人群的局部适应性、表型多样性及疾病易感性。

title: A pragmatic pipeline for drug resistance and lineage identification in Mycobacterium tuberculosis using whole genome sequencing.
abstract: Delays in accurate diagnosis of drug resistant tuberculosis (DR-TB) can hinder treatment. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) provides more information than standard molecular and phenotypic testing, but commonly used platforms are expensive to implement, and data interpretation requires significant expertise. We aimed to optimise a TB WGS diagnostic pipeline balancing user-friendliness, cost-effectiveness and time to results, whilst ensuring accuracy. Growth conditions, DNA extraction protocols and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) library preparation kits were compared. ONT was compared with Illumina protocols. Software for basecalling and analysis were evaluated to find the most accurate resistance SNP and lineage predictor. Optimally, a spin-column CTAB DNA extraction method was combined with the RBK110.96 library preparation kit, high accuracy (HAC) basecalling and data analysis using TB-Profiler. Compared with Illumina, the pipeline was concordant for 16/17 (94%) isolates (lineage) and for 17/17 (100%) isolates (resistance SNPs). Our pipeline was 71% (12/17) concordant with phenotypic drug susceptibility test (DST) results. Time-to-diagnosis was around four weeks. This optimised TB sequencing pipeline requires less time and expertise to run and analyse than Illumina, takes less time than phenotypic DSTs and the results are comparable with Illumina. The cost per sample is comparable with other methods. These features make it an important tool for incorporating into routine DR-TB diagnostic pipelines and larger scale drug resistance surveillance in all settings.
authors: Linzy Elton, Alp Aydin, Neil Stoker, Sylvia Rofael, Letícia Muraro Wildner, Jabar Babatunde Pacome Agbo Achimi Abdul, John Tembo, Muzamil Abdel Hamid, Mfoutou Mapanguy Claujens Chastel, Julio Ortiz Canseco, Ronan Doyle, Giovanni Satta, Justin O'Grady, Adam Witney, Francine Ntoumi, Alimuddin Zumla, Timothy D McHugh

ai.TLDR: 药物耐药性结核病（DR-TB）的准确诊断延迟会影响治疗效果。全基因组测序（WGS）提供了比传统分子和表型检测更多的信息，但常用平台成本高且数据分析需要专业知识。本研究旨在优化一个TB WGS诊断流程，平衡用户友好性、成本效益和结果时间，同时确保准确性。结果表明，该流程在诊断时间和成本方面优于Illumina和表型检测。
ai.translation: 药物耐药性结核病（DR-TB）的准确诊断延迟会影响治疗效果。全基因组测序（WGS）提供了比传统分子和表型检测更多的信息，但常用平台成本高且数据分析需要专业知识。本研究旨在优化一个TB WGS诊断流程，平衡用户友好性、成本效益和结果时间，同时确保准确性。生长条件、DNA提取协议和Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）文库制备试剂盒进行了比较。ONT与Illumina协议进行了比较。评估了用于碱基调用和分析的软件，以找到最准确的耐药性SNP和谱系预测器。最佳方案是使用spin-column CTAB DNA提取方法结合RBK110.96文库制备试剂盒，使用高准确度（HAC）碱基调用和TB-Profiler进行数据分析。与Illum、llumina相比，该流程在16/17（94%）的菌株（谱系）和17/17（100%）的菌株（耐药性SNP）中结果一致。该流程与表型药物敏感性测试（DST）结果的一致性为71%（12/17）。诊断时间约为四周。该优化的TB测序流程在运行和分析所需的时间和专业知识方面均少于Illumina，耗时少于表型DST，且结果与Illumina相当。每样本的成本与其他方法相当。这些特性使其成为纳入常规DR-TB诊断流程和更大规模药物耐药性监测的重要工具，适用于所有环境。

title: Toward the use of nanopore RNA sequencing technologies in the clinic: challenges and opportunities.
abstract: RNA molecules have garnered increased attention as potential clinical biomarkers in recent years. While short-read sequencing and quantitative polymerase chain reaction have been the primary methods for quantifying RNA abundance, they typically fail to capture critical post-transcriptional regulatory elements, such as RNA modifications, which are often dysregulated in disease contexts. A promising cutting-edge technique sequencing method that addresses this gap is direct RNA sequencing, offered by Oxford Nanopore Technologies, which can simultaneously capture both RNA abundance and modification information. The rapid advancements in this platform, along with growing evidence of dysregulated RNA species in biofluids, presents a compelling clinical opportunity. In this review, we discuss the challenges and the emerging opportunities for the adoption of nanopore RNA sequencing technologies in the clinic, highlighting their potential to revolutionize personalized medicine and disease monitoring.
authors: Xanthi-Lida Katopodi, Oguzhan Begik, Eva Maria Novoa

ai.TLDR: RNA分子作为临床生物标志物的研究近年来备受关注，传统方法如短读长测序和qPCR无法捕捉RNA修饰等关键调控元件。纳米孔直接RNA测序技术可同步获取RNA丰度和修饰信息，为疾病监测和个性化医疗带来变革潜力。该技术在临床转化中的挑战与机遇值得深入探讨。
ai.translation: RNA分子近年来作为潜在的临床生物标志物受到越来越多的关注。尽管短读长测序和定量聚合酶链反应（qPCR）一直是量化RNA丰度的主要方法，但它们通常无法捕捉关键的转录后调控元件，如RNA修饰，这些修饰在疾病状态下常出现异常。一种有前景的尖端测序技术——由牛津纳米孔技术公司提供的直接RNA测序，能够同时捕获RNA丰度和修饰信息。该平台的快速发展，以及越来越多的证据表明生物流体中RNA物种的异常调控，为临床应用提供了有力契机。本文综述了纳米孔RNA测序技术在临床转化中的挑战与新兴机遇，强调其革新个性化医疗和疾病监测的潜力。

title: Advances in CRISPR/Cas13a-based biosensors for non-coding RNA detection.
abstract: Non-coding RNAs play crucial roles in disease initiation and progression, making them promising biomarkers for early diagnosis and treatment monitoring. Conventional nucleic acid diagnostic methods, including polymerase chain reaction (PCR), next-generation sequencing (NGS), and enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA), alongside emerging techniques such as single-molecule fluorescence in situ hybridization (smFISH), nanopore sequencing, and single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), face inherent limitations in detecting regulatory non-coding RNAs. These challenges include laborious workflows, prolonged processing times, and technical complexities, hindering their broad applicability in rapid and high-throughput RNA analysis. CRISPR/Cas13a-based biosensors, integrated with various signal transduction systems-such as fluorescence, electrochemistry, colorimetry, surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy (SERS)-show great promise for real-world diagnostic applications. This review provides a comprehensive overview of the CRISPR/Cas13a-mediated RNA detection mechanism, the development of CRISPR/Cas13a-based biosensors, and their integration with innovative signal detection methods. Additionally, we highlight the progress in portable detection devices, including lateral flow assay strips and smartphone-based platforms. Finally, the review discusses the current challenges and future prospects of CRISPR/Cas13a-based biosensors, particularly in the context of clinical diagnostics and personalized medicine.
authors: Tao Zhu, Weiwei Jiang, Yingyu Wu, Rong Fang, Fei Deng, Danting Yang

ai.TLDR: 非编码RNA在疾病发生发展中起关键作用，传统检测方法存在流程繁琐、耗时长等局限。CRISPR/Cas13a生物传感器结合多种信号检测技术，为RNA检测提供了新方案，展现出在临床诊断和个性化医疗中的应用前景。
ai.translation: 非编码RNA在疾病发生和发展过程中发挥着至关重要的作用，使其成为早期诊断和治疗监测的有前景的生物标志物。现有的核酸诊断方法，包括聚合酶链反应（PCR）、下一代测序（NGS）和酶联免疫吸附测定（ELISA），以及新兴技术如单分子荧光原位杂交（smFISH）、纳米孔测序和单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq），在检测调控性非编码RNA时仍面临固有局限。这些挑战包括繁琐的实验流程、漫长的处理时间以及技术复杂性，阻碍了其在快速高通量RNA分析中的广泛应用。基于CRISPR/Cas13a的生物传感器，结合荧光、电化学、比色和表面增强拉曼光谱（SERS）等信号传导系统，展现出在实际诊断应用中的巨大潜力。本综述系统阐述了CRISPR/Cas13a介导的RNA检测机制、基于CRISPR/Cas13a的生物传感器开发及其与创新信号检测方法的整合。此外，我们重点介绍了便携式检测设备的进展，包括侧流测定条和基于智能手机的平台。最后，综述讨论了基于CRISPR/Cas13a的生物传感器当前面临的挑战及未来展望，特别是在临床诊断和个性化医疗背景下的应用潜力。

title: The rapid detection of a neonatal unit outbreak of a wild-typeKlebsiella variicolausing decentralized Oxford Nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Background

*Klebsiella variicola* has been implicated in neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) outbreaks previously and can be misidentified as *Klebsiella pneumoniae*. An increased incidence of *K. pneumoniae* bacteremia on the NICU of our institution was notified to the infection prevention and control (IPC) team in May 2024. The four isolates involved displayed wild-type susceptibility, so had not been detected via multidrug-resistant organism surveillance. This triggered investigation with a nanopore-based decentralized whole-genome sequencing (dWGS) system in operation at our laboratory.

### Methods

Since early 2022, the hospital laboratory at Wellington Regional Hospital has been performing dWGS using the Oxford Nanopore MinION device. This allows for prospective genomic surveillance of certain hospital-associated organisms, but also rapid reactive investigation of possible outbreaks. Isolates are sequenced in the hospital laboratory and undergo multilocus sequence typing (MLST). If transmission events are suspected, sequence data are transferred to the reference laboratory, the Institute for Environmental Science and Research (ESR) for high-resolution bioinformatic analysis.

### Results

Within 48 h of notification isolates had been subcultured and sequenced. This showed that three of four isolates were in fact *K. variicola*, and two of these were sequence type (ST)6385. This sequence type had not been seen previously at our institution, so transmission was suspected. Environmental sampling revealed *K. variicola* ST6385 in two sink traps on the unit, and prospective sequencing of all *K. pneumoniae* isolates from NICU samples revealed two further infants with *K. variicola* ST6385. Subsequent phylogenetic analysis at ESR using original sequence data showed tight clustering of these isolates, confirming an outbreak. Sink traps were disinfected, environmental cleaning procedures were updated, and a strict focus on hand hygiene was reinforced on the ward. No further isolates were detected, and the outbreak was closed after two months.

### Conclusions

Access to dWGS at the level of the local hospital laboratory permitted rapid identification of an outbreak of an organism displaying no unusual antimicrobial resistance features at a point where there were only two known cases. This in turn facilitated a rapid IPC response.
authors: Rhys T. White, Michelle Balm, ... Maxim G. Bloomfield
citation: White, R.T., Balm, M., Burton, M. et al. The rapid detection of a neonatal unit outbreak of a wild-type Klebsiella variicola using decentralized Oxford Nanopore sequencing. Antimicrob Resist Infect Control 14 , 6 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13756-025-01529-2

ai.TLDR: 背景：新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中Klebsiella variicola曾引发爆发，常被误认为Klebsiella pneumoniae。2024年5月我院NICU报告K. pneumoniae血流感染增加，但四株分离株显示野生型耐药性，未被多药耐药菌监测系统检测到。方法：通过基于纳米孔技术的分布式全基因组测序（dWGS）系统快速识别潜在爆发。结果：48小时内确认三株为K. variicola ST6385，环境采样发现其存在于两个水槽中，进一步检测发现两例新生儿感染。结论：本地实验室的dWGS技术使快速识别无特殊耐药特征的病原体爆发成为可能，推动感染控制响应。
ai.translation:
### 背景
Klebsiella variicola曾被报道与新生儿重症监护室（NICU）爆发相关，且可能被误鉴定为Klebsiella pneumoniae。2024年5月我院NICU报告K. pneumoniae血流感染病例增加，感染防控（IPC）团队被通知。涉及的四株分离株显示野生型耐药性，因此未被多药耐药菌监测系统检测到。这促使我们使用实验室正在运行的基于纳米孔技术的分布式全基因组测序（dWGS）系统开展调查。

### 方法
自2022年初以来，威灵顿地区医院的医院实验室已使用牛津纳米孔MinION设备进行dWGS。这允许对某些医院相关病原体进行前瞻性基因组监测，也可快速响应可能的爆发。分离株在医院实验室进行测序并进行多位点序列分型（MLST）。若怀疑传播事件，序列数据将传输至参考实验室——环境科学与研究研究所（ESR）进行高分辨率生物信息学分析。

### 结果
在通知后48小时内，分离株已被转种并完成测序。结果显示四株中有三株实际为K. variicola，其中两株为序列类型（ST）6385。该序列类型此前未在我院出现，因此怀疑传播。环境采样发现该ST6385菌株存在于单元的两个水槽中，对所有NICU样本中K. pneumoniae分离株的前瞻性测序进一步发现两例新生儿感染K. variicola ST6335。ESR使用原始序列数据进行的系统发育分析显示这些分离株紧密聚类，证实了爆发。水槽被消毒，环境清洁程序更新，并加强了病房的手卫生管理。此后未发现进一步分离株，爆发在两个月后被关闭。

### 结论
本地医院实验室的dWGS技术使在仅有两例已知病例时快速识别无特殊抗菌药物耐药特征的病原体爆发成为可能，从而推动了快速的感染防控响应。

title: Improving Nanopore sequencing-based core genome MLST for global infection control: a strategy for GC-rich pathogens like
abstract:
UNLABELLED: Genomic surveillance of pathogens is essential to trace infections and analyze resistance markers. Core genome multilocus sequence typing (cgMLST) facilitates genomic surveillance by simplified analysis and standardization. However, its application is limited by the poor cost-efficiency of short-read (SR) sequencing. Oxford Nanopore long-read sequencing (ONT-LR), which allows fast on-site analysis with comparatively low costs, could provide an alternative. Despite ONT-LR raw read accuracy improvement, evidence for methylation-based errors accumulates. PCR-based library preparation, suggested as a solution, presumably poses difficulties for GC-rich bacteria. We challenged ONT-LR-based cgMLST using the highly GC-rich pathogen 

IMPORTANCE: This study highlights a significant advancement in genomic surveillance of bacterial pathogens, specifically addressing the challenges posed by the GC-rich species
authors: Sarah Weigl, Johanna Dabernig-Heinz, Fabian Granitz, Michaela Lipp, Laura Ostermann, Dag Harmsen, Thanh Trung Trinh, Ivo Steinmetz, Gabriel E Wagner, Sabine Lichtenegger

ai.TLDR: 病原体基因组监测需依赖高通量测序技术，短读长测序因成本效率低限制了其应用。本研究通过对比实验发现，基于Oxford Nanopore长读长测序技术（ONT-LR）的cgMLST方法可有效克服高GC含量细菌的测序难题，但需解决甲基化相关误差问题。
ai.translation:
无标签摘要：病原体基因组监测对于追踪感染源和分析抗性标记至关重要。核心基因多位点序列分型（cgMLST）通过简化分析和标准化流程提升了基因组监测效率，但其应用受限于短读长测序（SR）的成本效益低下。Oxford Nanopore长读长测序（ONT-LR）技术可实现低成本的现场快速分析，为替代方案提供了可能。尽管ONT-LR原始读长的准确性有所提升，但基于甲基化的误差证据仍在积累。基于PCR的文库制备方法虽被建议作为解决方案，但可能对高GC含量细菌存在技术挑战。我们通过高GC含量病原体的实验验证了基于ONT-LR的cgMLST方法的有效性。

重要性：本研究凸显了细菌病原体基因组监测领域的重要进展，特别针对高GC含量物种的测序难题提供了创新性解决方案。

title: Unexpected high prevalence of carbapenemase-producing bacteria and widely spread of bla
abstract: Carbapenems, critical last-resort antibiotics, are increasingly ineffective due to the spread of carbapenemase-producing pathogens, particularly New Delhi metallo-β-lactamase (NDM)-producing bacteria. Although NDM has been detected in a variety of environmental and clinical sources, its prevalence in seafood, especially shrimp, remains underexplored despite shrimp being a widely consumed food. This study aimed to investigate the prevalence and molecular characteristics of NDM-producing bacteria in shrimp. title: Diagnosis ofCoxiella burnetiiendocarditis by using nanopore targeted sequencing: a case report
abstract:
### Background

Infective endocarditis (IE) can be caused by a variety of pathogens, including bacteria, fungi, and atypical pathogens. The diversity of IE manifestations contributes to diagnostic uncertainty, which can lead to missed diagnoses and inappropriate treatment. Diagnosing *Coxiella burnetii* endocarditis is particularly challenging, as routine blood cultures often yield negative results and echocardiography seldom reveals vegetations. In recent years, the rapid development of sequencing technology provides a new direction for the diagnosis of IE.

### Case presentation

The present study reports the case of a 57-year-old male patient who was admitted with a diagnosis of severe aortic stenosis. Cardiac computed tomography (CT) angiography revealed a diastolic aortic valve malformation with significant leaflet thickening, calcification and pseudoaneurysm formation, the etiology of which was considered to be due to infectious possibilities. Although clinical suspicion of infective endocarditis was raised, since echocardiogram did not reveal any vegetations and blood cultures were negative, the etiology remained unclear and empirical drug therapy was used. The patient exhibited a severe inflammatory reaction after aortic valve replacement. Samples were sent for pathogenic testing again, including blood cultures and blood nanopore targeted sequencing (NTS). The other tests were all negative, only the NTS detected *C. burnetii*. After further confirmation, the final diagnosis was *C. burnetii* infective endocarditis. The patient was subsequently discharged from the hospital after demonstrating improvement with targeted treatment. One month post-discharge, a follow-up examination indicated that he had recovered well.

### Conclusion

This case study demonstrates the accurate diagnosis and treatment of *C. burnetii* endocarditis through NTS analysis of blood samples. As a novel technology, NTS may play an important role in the diagnosis of culture-negative infections caused by unidentified pathogens.
authors: Xinsheng Yan, Qimei Wei, ... Zhenlu Zhang

ai.TLDR: 感染性心内膜炎（IE）因病原体多样性导致诊断困难，尤其是Coxiella burnetii感染难以通过传统方法检测。本案例通过血液纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）技术成功识别病原体，验证了NTS在培养阴性感染诊断中的价值。
ai.translation:
### 背景
感染性心内膜炎（IE）可由多种病原体引起，包括细菌、真菌和非典型病原体。IE临床表现的多样性导致诊断不确定性，可能引发误诊和不恰当治疗。Coxiella burnetii感染性心内膜炎的诊断尤为困难，因常规血培养常呈阴性，超声心动图也难以发现赘生物。近年来，测序技术的快速发展为IE诊断提供了新方向。

### 案例呈现
本研究报道了一例57岁男性患者因重度主动脉瓣狭窄入院。心脏CT血管造影显示舒张期主动脉瓣畸形伴显著瓣叶增厚、钙化及假性动脉瘤形成，其病因考虑为感染性可能。尽管临床怀疑IE，但超声心动图未发现赘生物且血培养阴性，病因仍不明确，遂采用经验性药物治疗。患者在主动脉瓣置换术后出现严重炎症反应。再次送检病原体检测样本，包括血培养和血液纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）。其他检测均阴性，仅NTS检出C. burnetii。经进一步确认，最终诊断为C. burnetii感染性心内膜炎。患者在针对性治疗后症状改善并出院。出院一个月后随访显示恢复良好。

### 结论
本案例通过血液样本的NTS分析实现了C. burnetii感染性心内膜炎的精准诊断与治疗。作为新型技术，NTS可能在由未知病原体引起的培养阴性感染诊断中发挥重要作用。

title: Emergence of Linezolid Resistance Genes
authors: Xun Gao, Xiao Luo, Ruorou Qian, Guolong Gao, Jinghao Liu, Junhao Hong, Chao Yue, Jian-Hua Liu, Yi-Yun Liu

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: ONT in Clinical Diagnostics of Repeat Expansion Disorders: Detection and Reporting Challenges.
abstract: While whole-genome sequencing (WGS) using short-read technology has become a standard diagnostic test, this technology has limitations in analyzing certain genomic regions, particularly short tandem repeats (STRs). These repetitive sequences are associated with over 50 diseases, primarily affecting neurological function, including Huntington disease, frontotemporal dementia, and Friedreich's ataxia. We analyzed 2689 cases with movement disorders and dementia-related phenotypes processed at Variantyx in 2023-2024 using a two-tiered approach, with an initial short-read WGS followed by ONT long-read sequencing (when necessary) for variant characterization. Of the 2038 cases (75.8%) with clinically relevant genetic variants, 327 (16.0%) required additional long-read analysis. STR variants were reported in 338 cases (16.6% of positive cases), with approximately half requiring long-read sequencing for definitive classification. The combined approach enabled the precise determination of repeat length, composition, somatic mosaicism, and methylation status. Notable advantages included the detection of complex repeat structures in several genes such as
authors: Ludmila Kaplun, Greice Krautz-Peterson, Nir Neerman, Yocheved Schindler, Elinor Dehan, Claudia S Huettner, Brett K Baumgartner, Christine Stanley, Alexander Kaplun

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）在短读技术中已成为标准诊断测试，但存在分析短串联重复序列（STRs）的局限性。通过结合短读WGS和ONT长读测序的两阶段方法，可精准确定STR变异的重复长度、组成及甲基化状态，显著提升复杂重复结构的检测能力。
ai.translation: 尽管使用短读技术的全基因组测序（WGS）已成为标准诊断测试，但该技术在分析特定基因组区域时存在局限，尤其是短串联重复序列（STRs）。这些重复序列与超过50种疾病相关，主要影响神经功能，包括亨廷顿病、额颞叶痴呆和弗里德赖希共济失调。我们分析了2023-2024年Variantyx处理的2689例运动障碍和痴呆相关表型病例，采用两阶段方法：首先进行短读WGS，随后根据需要进行ONT长读测序以进行变异表征。在2038例（75.8%）具有临床相关遗传变异的病例中，327例（16.0%）需要额外的长读分析。STR变异在338例（16.6%的阳性病例）中被报告，其中约半数需通过长读测序进行明确分类。结合方法使重复长度、组成、体细胞嵌合及甲基化状态的精确测定成为可能。显著优势包括检测多个基因中的复杂重复结构。

title: Redesign of Translocon EXP2 Nanopore for Detecting Peptide Fragments.
abstract: Nanopore sensing is a rapid, label-free technique that enables single-molecule detection and is successfully applied to nucleic acid sequencing. Extending this technology to the detection and sequencing of peptides and proteins is a key area of interest. However, the complex structures and diverse charge distributions of peptides and proteins present challenges for extensive detection using existing nanopores. In this study, the focus is on the EXP2 nanopore derived from the malaria parasite Plasmodium falciparum to address these challenges. Previously, it is characterized wild-type EXP2 (WT-EXP2) nanopores and demonstrated their ability to detect polypeptides, although intrinsic electrical noise from the pore posed difficulties for accurate detection. To overcome these limitations, several EXP2 nanopore mutants are designed, including EXP2ΔD231, EXP2NC, and EXP2NC K42D/S46F, to reduce electrical noise and improve peptide detection accuracy. The EXP2ΔD231 mutant reduced electrical noise by more than 50% compared to WT-EXP2 and improved the discrimination accuracy of oligoarginine peptides. In addition, the EXP2ΔD231 detected and discriminated eight different peptides, ranging in molecular weight from small to large, that are previously challenging to detect using a single nanopore type. These results suggest that engineered EXP2 nanopores could serve as effective tools for peptide and protein detection and sequencing, contributing to the broader application of nanopore technology in biochemical and clinical research.
authors: Mitsuki Miyagi, Misa Yamaji, Nina Kurokawa, Masafumi Yohda, Ryuji Kawano

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔传感技术是一种快速、无需标记的单分子检测方法，已成功应用于核酸测序。本研究聚焦于源自疟疾寄生虫的EXP2纳米孔，通过设计突变体以减少电噪声并提高肽的检测准确性。实验结果表明，EXP2ΔD231突变体在检测多种肽方面表现出色，为纳米孔技术在生物化学和临床研究中的广泛应用提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 纳米孔传感是一种快速、无需标记的单分子检测技术，能够实现单分子级别的检测，并已成功应用于核酸测序。将该技术扩展到肽和蛋白质的检测与测序是当前研究的一个重要方向。然而，由于肽和蛋白质复杂的结构以及多样的电荷分布，使用现有的纳米孔进行广泛检测仍面临挑战。本研究聚焦于源自疟疾寄生虫Plasmodium falciparum的EXP2纳米孔，以解决这些挑战。此前，已经对野生型EXP2（WT-EXP2）纳米孔进行了表征，并展示了其检测多肽的能力，尽管纳米孔本身的固有电信号噪声对准确检测造成了困难。为克服这些限制，设计了多个EXP2纳米孔突变体，包括EXP2ΔD231、EXP2NC和EXP2NC K42D/S46F，以减少电信号噪声并提高肽的检测准确性。其中，EXP2ΔD231突变体相比WT-EXP2，将电信号噪声减少了超过50%，并提高了寡精氨酸肽的区分准确性。此外，EXP2ΔD231能够检测并区分八种不同肽，其分子量范围从小到大，这些肽此前使用单一类型的纳米孔进行检测较为困难。这些结果表明，经过工程改造的EXP2纳米孔可以作为有效的工具用于肽和蛋白质的检测与测序，为纳米孔技术在生物化学和临床研究中的广泛应用提供了新的可能性。

title: Evaluating the Benefits and Limits of Multiple Displacement Amplification With Whole-Genome Oxford Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract: Multiple displacement amplification (MDA) outperforms conventional PCR in long fragment and whole-genome amplification, making it attractive to couple MDA with long-read sequencing of samples with limited quantities of DNA to obtain improved genome assemblies. Here, we explore the efficacy and limits of MDA for efficient low-cost genome sequence assembly using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONTs) rapid library preparations and minION sequencing. We successfully generated almost complete genome sequences for all organisms examined, including Gram-positive (Staphylococcus aureus, Enterococcus faecium) and Gram-negative (Escherichia coli) prokaryotes and one challenging eukaryotic pathogen (Cryptosporidium spp) representing a broad spectrum of critical infectious disease pathogens. High-quality data from those samples were generated starting with only 0.025 ng of total DNA. Controlled sheared DNA samples exhibited a distinct pattern of size increase after MDA, which may be associated with the amplification of long, low-abundance fragments present in the assay, as well as generating concatemeric sequences during amplification. To address concatemers, we developed a computational pipeline (CADECT: Concatemer Detection Tool) to identify and remove putative concatemeric sequences. This study highlights the efficacy of MDA in generating high-quality genome assemblies from limited amounts of input DNA. Also, the CADECT pipeline effectively mitigated the impact of concatemeric sequences, enabling the assembly of contiguous sequences even in cases where the input genomic DNA was degraded. These results have significant implications for the study of organisms that are challenging to culture in vitro, such as Cryptosporidium, and for expediting critical results in clinical settings with limited quantities of available genomic DNA.
authors: Fiifi Agyabeng-Dadzie, Megan S Beaudry, Alex Deyanov, Haley Slanis, Minh Q Duong, Randi Turner, Asis Khan, Cesar A Arias, Jessica C Kissinger, Travis C Glenn, Rodrigo de Paula Baptista

ai.TLDR: 本研究展示了多重置换扩增（MDA）在低输入DNA样本中实现高质量基因组组装的有效性，结合ONTs快速库制备和minION测序技术，成功生成多种病原体的近完整基因组序列。通过开发CADECT计算工具处理串联重复序列，显著提升了基因组组装质量，为临床检测和难培养病原体研究提供了新方法。
ai.translation: 多重置换扩增（MDA）在长片段和全基因组扩增中优于传统PCR技术，使其成为结合长读长测序分析低DNA量样本以获得改进基因组组装的理想方法。本研究探讨了MDA在使用牛津纳米孔技术（ONTs）快速库制备和minION测序实现低成本高效基因组序列组装的效能与局限性。我们成功生成了所有检测微生物的近完整基因组序列，包括革兰氏阳性菌（金黄色葡萄球菌、粪肠球菌）、革兰氏阴性菌（大肠杆菌）以及一种具有挑战性的真核病原体（隐孢子虫属），覆盖了多种关键传染病病原体。仅需0.025 ng总DNA即可生成高质量数据。受控剪切DNA样本在MDA处理后表现出显著的片段尺寸增加模式，这可能与扩增长片段低丰度片段以及扩增过程中生成串联重复序列有关。为解决串联重复序列问题，我们开发了计算工具CADECT（串联重复序列检测工具）以识别并移除潜在串联重复序列。本研究突显了MDA在低输入DNA样本中生成高质量基因组组装的有效性。同时，CADECT工具有效缓解了串联重复序列的影响，即使输入基因组DNA降解仍能实现连续序列组装。这些结果对研究难以体外培养的病原体（如隐孢子虫）以及临床环境中低DNA量样本的快速检测具有重要意义。

title: Tracking Antimicrobial Resistant Organisms Timely: a workflow validation study for successive core-genome SNP-based nosocomial transmission analysis.
abstract:
BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVES: Effective infection prevention and control (IPC) interventions in hospitals require timely information to determine the potential transmission of antimicrobial-resistant (AMR) organisms. We proposed and developed a successive core-genome SNP (cgSNP)-based phylogenetic analysis workflow, 'Tracking Antimicrobial Resistant Organisms Timely' (TAROT), using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencer for MRSA, and compared the results with those obtained using the Illumina sequencer.

METHODS: We have developed a TAROT workflow for successive phylogenetic analysis using ONT data. We sequenced 34 MRSA strains isolated from Toho University Omori Medical Center using MinION (ONT) and MiSeq (Illumina). Each strain's ONT data were inputted into TAROT (TAROT-ONT), and successive cgSNP-based phylogenetic analyses were conducted. Illumina data were processed with a batched cgSNP-based phylogenetic analysis. Assembly-based analysis identified AMR genes, AMR mutations and virulence genes.

RESULTS: MinION generated an average sequence depth of 262× for the ST8 reference genome within 3 h. TAROT-ONT successively generated 11 phylogenetic trees for 14 ST8 strains, 7 trees for 10 ST1 strains and 2 trees for 5 ST5 strains. Highly suspected transmission pairs (pairwise cgSNP< 5) were detected in trees #6 through #11 for ST8, trees #3, #5 and #7 for ST1, and tree #2 for ST5. Differences in pairwise cgSNP value between TAROT-ONT and Illumina ranged from zero to two within pairs with fewer than 20 cgSNPs using Illumina. TAROT-ONT bioinformatic analysis for each strain required 5-42 min. The identification of AMR genes, mutations and virulence genes showed high concordance between ONT and Illumina.

CONCLUSIONS: TAROT-ONT can facilitate effective IPC intervention for MRSA nosocomial transmissions by providing timely feedback through successive phylogenetic analyses based on cgSNPs.
authors: Kotaro Aoki, Kohji Komori, Tetsuo Yamaguchi, Sohei Harada, Mayumi Tsukada, Hinako Murakami, Kazuhiro Tateda

ai.TLDR: 医院感染控制需要及时信息以监测耐药菌传播，本文开发了基于ONT测序的TAROT系统，通过连续核心基因组SNP分析实现快速追踪。结果表明，TAROT-ONT在3小时内完成ST8菌株的深度测序，可有效识别传播对子并提供及时反馈。
ai.translation:
背景与目的：医院有效的感染预防与控制（IPC）干预措施需要及时信息以确定耐药菌（AMR）的潜在传播。我们提出并开发了一种基于连续核心基因组SNP（cgSNP）的系统发育分析流程，命名为'及时追踪耐药菌'（TAROT），使用牛津纳米基因技术（ONT）测序仪对耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSA）进行分析，并与Illum、llumina测序仪结果进行比较。

方法：我们开发了基于ONT数据的TAROT流程用于连续系统发育分析。使用MinION（ONT）和MiSeq（Illumina）对从Toho大学大森医疗中心分离的34株MRSA菌株进行测序。每株菌的ONT数据输入TAROT（TAROT-ONT）进行连续cgSNP基于的系统发育分析。Illumina数据通过批量cgSNP基于的系统发育分析处理。基于组装的分析识别出AMR基因、AMR突变和毒力基因。

结果：MinION在3小时内对ST8参考基因组生成平均262×的序列深度。TAROT-ONT连续生成了14株ST8菌株的11棵系统发育树、10株ST1菌株的7棵树和5株ST5菌株的2棵树。在ST8的树#6至#11、ST1的树#3、#5和#7以及ST5的树#2中检测到高度疑似传播对（成对cgSNP<5）。TAROT-ONT与Illumina的成对cgSNP值差异在使用Illumina的少于20个cgSNP对中为零至二。每株菌的TAROT-ONT生物信息学分析需要5-42分钟。ONT与Illumina在AMR基因、突变和毒力基因识别上表现出高度一致性。

结论：TAROT-ONT通过基于cgSNP的连续系统发育分析提供及时反馈，可有效促进MRSA医院内传播的IPC干预。

title: Evaluation of rapid amplicon-based nanopore sequencing using the latest chemistry for accurate whole genome analysis of influenza A virus in clinical samples.
abstract: MinION sequencing is widely used to sequence influenza A virus (IAV) genomes; however, the accuracy and utility of this approach, using the latest chemistry to obtain whole viral genome sequences directly from clinical samples, remain insufficiently investigated. We evaluated the sequencing accuracy of combining simultaneous multisegment one-step RT-PCR and MinION sequencing using various subtypes of 13 IAV isolates. The latest R10.4.1 chemistry significantly improved sequencing accuracy, achieving ≥99.993% identity with Illumina MiSeq results and reducing the single nucleotide deletion in homopolymer regions. Applying this method to 11 clinical samples enabled rapid subtype identification and the acquisition of eight full-length IAV genomes. In four of these samples, subtype identification of HA and NA was achieved within 20 min after the start of sequencing and a full-length IAV genome was obtained within 7 h after RNA extraction. However, there was concern that cross barcode misassignment during demultiplexing affected data interpretation, particularly for samples with low viral genome copy numbers. This approach can be used for the rapid identification of IAV subtypes and accurate acquisition of full IAV genome sequences from clinical samples, although careful data analysis is required for the multiplex sequencing of clinical samples with low viral genome copy numbers.
authors: Yumani Kuba, Nobuhiro Takemae, Satoshi Kawato, Kunihiro Oba, Kiyosu Taniguchi, Tsutomu Kageyama

ai.TLDR: MinION测序技术被广泛用于流感A病毒（IAV）基因组测序，但其准确性和实用性仍需进一步验证。本研究通过结合多片段一步法RT-PCR与最新R10.4.1化学试剂，实现了临床样本中IAV全基因组的高精度测序，显著提升了同聚物区域的单核苷酸删除率检测能力。
ai.translation: MinION测序技术被广泛用于流感A病毒（IAV）基因组测序；然而，使用最新化学试剂直接从临床样本中获取完整病毒基因组序列的准确性和实用性仍缺乏充分研究。我们评估了结合同步多片段一步法RT-PCR与MinION测序技术对13种IAV分离株不同亚型的测序准确性。最新R10.4.1化学试剂显著提高了测序准确性，实现了与Illumina MiSeq结果≥99.993%的序列一致性，并降低了同聚物区域的单核苷酸删除率。将该方法应用于11个临床样本，实现了快速亚型鉴定和8个完整IAV基因组的获取。在4个样本中，测序启动后20分钟内完成HA和NA亚型鉴定，RNA提取后7小时内获得完整IAV基因组。然而，拆分过程中交叉条形码误分配可能影响数据解读，尤其在病毒基因组拷贝数较低的样本中存在担忧。该方法可用于临床样本中IAV亚型的快速鉴定和完整基因组序列的精准获取，但需谨慎分析低病毒基因组拷贝数临床样本的多路复用测序数据。

title: Unique North American isolates of severe metastatic hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae strain infections with hepatic abscesses seen in young patients within Texas.
abstract:
RATIONALE: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKp) infections have principally been identified in Asia. Within a two-month period, two patients between the ages of 30 to 50 years old presented to a tertiary referral hospital in Texas with septic shock, hepatic abscess, and septic thrombophlebitis. Blood cultures were positive for Klebsiella pneumoniae (isolates 2020CK-00441 and 2021CK-00720 respectively). The first patient survived after a prolonged hospital course while the second patient expired.

OBJECTIVES: Describe the clinical presentation of these two patients. Perform whole genome sequencing and bioinformatic analysis to evaluate potential outbreak of specific hvKp bacteria isolates.

METHODS: Whole genome sequencing was performed using both paired-end Illumina MiSeq and nanopore sequencing to obtain a Completed genome for both isolates.

MAIN RESULTS: 2020CK-00441 belonged to ST23 type while 2021CK-00720 was a ST65 type isolate. Kleborate analyses predicted with high confidence both isolates were hvKp. Phylogenetic analyses showed the two strains are not closely related to each other nor to any known hvKp isolates reported. Both isolates had yersiniabactin, colibactin, aerobactin and salmochelin producing loci which likely confer these isolates hvKp phenotype. 2020CK-00441 and 2021CK-00720 had a unique pK2044 like plasmid.

CONCLUSIONS: HvKp strains capable of causing devastating metastatic septic infections have emerged in Texas. These isolates are unique compared to other hvKp strains globally. Country-wide surveillance and whole genome sequencing of these strains is essential to prevent a major public health emergency in the USA.
authors: Junaid M Alam, Eric N Riha, Haris Ahmed, Hong M Thai, Kevin Garnepudi, Ramesh B Kesavan, Gnananandh Jayaraman, Anna Sangster, Dylan Curry, Heidi A Butz, Lori Smith, Maureen Vowles, Kelly F Oakeson, Erin L Young, Siva T Sarva

ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了两例在德克萨斯州出现的高毒力肺炎克雷伯菌（hvKp）感染病例，患者出现败血性休克、肝脓肿和血栓性静脉炎。通过全基因组测序和生物信息学分析，发现这两株菌属于不同的ST类型，且与已知的hvKp菌株无密切关系，提示可能有新的hvKp菌株在北美出现。
ai.translation:
背景：高毒力肺炎克雷伯菌（hvKp）感染主要在亚洲被识别。在德克萨斯州的一家三级转诊医院中，两名年龄在30至50岁之间的患者在两个月内因败血性休克、肝脓肿和血栓性静脉炎就诊。血液培养结果显示为肺炎克雷伯菌（分离株2020CK-00441和2021CK-00720）。第一例患者经过长期住院后存活，而第二例患者不幸去世。

目标：描述这两名患者的临床表现，并通过全基因组测序和生物信息学分析评估特定hvKp菌株是否可能引起爆发。

方法：使用配对末端Illumina MiSeq和纳米孔测序技术对两个分离株进行全基因组测序，以获得完整的基因组。

主要结果：2020CK-00441属于ST23型，而2021CK-00720属于ST65型。Kleborate分析预测这两个分离株具有高置信度为hvKp。系统发育分析显示，这两个菌株彼此之间以及与任何已知的hvKp菌株均无密切关系。两个分离株均具有yersiniabactin、colibactin、aerobactin和salmochelin产生位点，这些位点可能赋予这些菌株hvKp表型。2020CK-00441和2021CK-00720具有独特的pK2044样质粒。

结论：在德克萨斯州出现了能够引起严重转移性败血症感染的hvKp菌株。这些菌株与其他全球范围内的hvKp菌株相比具有独特性。为了防止在美国发生重大的公共卫生紧急事件，必须进行全国范围的监测和对这些菌株的全基因组测序。

title: Nasal Microbiota Profiling as a Predictive Secondary Tool for COVID-19 Diagnosis: The Critical Role of Taxonomic Resolution.
abstract: The SARS-CoV-2 pandemic has led to an urgent need for effective and rapid diagnostic tools. In the present study, we have evaluated the predictive diagnostic potential of nasal microbiota by analyzing microbial community structures at different taxonomic level resolutions-species, genus, family, order, class and phylum-using Random Forest modelling. A total of 179 nasal swabs from COVID-19-positive (n = 85) and COVID-19-negative (n = 94) individuals were sequenced using a full-length 16S rRNA sequencing (Oxford Nanopore) approach. During each iteration of the Random Forest model, the dataset was randomly split into a training set (70%) and a testing set (30%). Model performance improved with finer taxonomic resolution, achieving the highest accuracy at the Species level (AUROC = 0.821 ± 0.059) and a sensitivity of 55.6% at a specificity threshold of 90%. A progressive decline in AUROC and sensitivity was observed at broader taxonomic levels. Furthermore, Beta diversity analysis supported that microbial community structures are more distinct between COVID-19-positive and COVID-19-negative groups at finer taxonomic levels. These findings highlight the potential role of nasal microbiota profiling as a secondary diagnostic tool for COVID-19, particularly at species- and genus-level classification, and underscore the importance of high taxonomic resolution in microbiome-based diagnostics. However, limited by an uneven sample distribution and the lack of medical evaluations, further large-scale studies are needed before the nasal microbiota can be implemented in the clinical diagnostics of COVID-19.
authors: Simon De Jaegher, Maria D'Aguanno, David Pinzauti, Manuele Biazzo

ai.TLDR: 新冠疫情催生了对快速诊断工具的迫切需求。本研究通过分析不同分类学分辨率（物种、属、科、目、纲、门）的鼻腔微生物群结构，评估其作为新冠诊断辅助工具的潜力。结果显示，物种级别分类在曲线下面积（AUC）达0.821时实现最高诊断准确率，但样本分布不均和缺乏临床验证限制了其应用。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2大流行催生了对高效快速诊断工具的迫切需求。本研究通过分析不同分类学分辨率（物种、属、科、目、纲、门）的鼻腔微生物群结构，评估其作为新冠诊断辅助工具的潜力。采用全长度16S rRNA测序（Oxford Nanopore）对179份鼻拭子样本（新冠阳性85例，阴性94例）进行分析。随机森林模型每次迭代将数据集随机分为训练集（70%）和测试集（30%）。随着分类学分辨率细化，模型性能显著提升，在物种级别达到最高准确率（AUC=0.821±0.059），特异性阈值90%时灵敏度为55.6%。在更粗放的分类学层级观察到AUC和灵敏度持续下降。Beta多样性分析进一步证实，新冠阳性与阴性组在物种级别微生物群结构差异更显著。这些发现凸显了鼻腔微生物群谱分析作为新冠二次诊断工具的潜力，特别是在物种和属级别分类中，强调了基于微生物组诊断需保持高分类学分辨率的重要性。然而受限于样本分布不均和缺乏医学评估，需进一步大规模研究才能将鼻腔微生物群应用于新冠临床诊断。

title: Co-carriage of diverse vancomycin-resistant
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Vancomycin-resistant
