authors: Nicole L Kavanagh, Peter M Kinnevey, Grainne I Brennan, Brian O'Connell, Richard V Goering, David C Coleman

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示爱尔兰医院患者中万古霉素耐药粪肠球菌（VREfm）宿主内多样性普遍存在，显著增加了感染监测难度。线性质粒在爱尔兰VREfm的传播中起关键作用。
keywords: 万古霉素耐药粪肠球菌
ai.translation: 背景：万古霉素耐药粪肠球菌（VREfm）在爱尔兰医院环境中普遍存在。方法：通过直肠拭子采集样本检测VREfm。结果：所有分离株均为clade A1，其中147/150株为ST80基因型（VREfm），25/30株为VSEfm。70%患者（7/10）携带两种或以上耐药基因簇。结论：爱尔兰医院患者中VREfm宿主内多样性高度普遍，显著复杂化感染监测。线性质粒在爱尔兰VREfm的传播中发挥重要作用。

title: Decoding bacterial methylomes in four public health-relevant microbial species: Nanopore sequencing enables reproducible analysis of DNA modifications
abstract:
Investigating bacterial methylation profiles provides essential complementary information to the native DNA sequence, significantly extending our understanding of how DNA modifications influence virulence, antibiotic resistance, and the ability of bacteria to evade the immune system. Recent advancements in real-time Nanopore sequencing and basecalling algorithms have enabled the direct detection of modified bases from raw signal data, eliminating the need for bisulfite treatment of DNA. However, decoding methylation signals remains challenging due to rapid technological and methodological progress.

In this study, we focus on public health-relevant bacterial strains to analyze their methylation profiles and identify methylation motifs. Our dataset includes samples from Staphylococcus aureus, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterococcus faecium, and Klebsiella pneumoniae, sequenced on the Nanopore GridION platform using the latest flow cell chemistry (R10.4.1) and modification basecalling models (Dorado basecalling SUP model v5).

We investigated distinct methylation patterns within and between species, focusing on heavily modified genes or genomic regions. Our results reveal distinct species-specific methylation profiles, with each strain exhibiting unique modification patterns. We developed a modular pipeline using Nextflow and the Nanopore Modkit tool to streamline the detection of methylated motifs. We compared the results with outputs from MicrobeMod, a recent toolkit for exploring prokaryotic methylation and base modifications in nanopore sequencing. Our pipeline is publicly available for further use (github.com/rki-mf1/ont-methylation).

We identified known methylation motifs already described in the literature and novel de novo motifs, providing deeper insights into the diversity of bacterial DNA modifications. Furthermore, we identified genomic regions that are extensively methylated, which could have implications for bacterial behavior and pathogenicity. We also assess improvements in basecalling accuracy, specifically how methylated bases can influence neighboring basecalls. Recent advances in basecalling models, particularly v5 models as part of Dorado, have reduced these issues, improving the reliability of methylation detection in bacterial genomes.

In conclusion, our study highlights the potential of current nanopore sequencing tools for detecting DNA modifications in prokaryotes. By making our pipeline and results publicly available, we facilitate further research into bacterial DNA modifications and their role in microbial pathogenesis.
authors: Galeone, V.; Dabernig-Heinz, J.; Lohde, M.; Brandt, C.; Kohler, C.; Wagner, G. E.; Hölzer, M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术解析细菌甲基化谱型，揭示了物种特异性修饰模式。通过开发模块化分析流程，结合最新碱基调用模型，显著提升了甲基化检测的准确性，为理解细菌致病机制提供了新视角。
ai.translation:
研究细菌甲基化谱型可为DNA修饰对毒力、抗生素耐药性和免疫逃逸机制提供关键补充信息。随着实时纳米孔测序和碱基调用算法的进展，直接从原始信号数据中检测修饰碱基成为可能，无需硫酸盐处理DNA。然而，甲基化信号解码仍面临技术方法快速迭代的挑战。

本研究聚焦公共卫生相关的细菌菌株，分析其甲基化谱型并识别修饰位点。数据集包含金黄色葡萄球菌、李斯特菌、粪肠球菌和肺炎克雷伯菌样本，采用Nanopore GridION平台及最新流细胞化学（R10.4.1）和修饰碱基调用模型（Dorado basecalling SUP model v5）进行测序。

我们分析了物种内及物种间的差异甲基化模式，重点关注高度修饰基因或基因组区域。结果揭示了物种特异性甲基化谱型，每个菌株均表现出独特的修饰模式。开发了基于Nextflow和Nanopore Modkit工具的模块化流程，优化甲基化位点检测。与MicrobeMod等工具的比较显示，该流程可公开获取（github.com/rki-mf1/ont-methylation）。

鉴定出文献已描述的甲基化位点及新发现的de novo位点，深化了对细菌DNA修饰多样性的理解。同时发现广泛甲基化的基因组区域，可能影响细菌行为和致病性。评估了碱基调用准确性改进，特别是甲基化碱基对邻近位点的影响。Dorado v5模型显著降低了这些问题，提升了细菌基因组甲基化检测的可靠性。

综上，本研究凸显了纳米孔测序工具在原核生物DNA修饰检测中的潜力。通过公开流程和结果，为深入研究细菌DNA修饰及其在微生物致病中的作用提供了基础。

title: Targeted long-read sequencing analysis and antifungal susceptibility profiles of Sporothrix schenckii isolates from Thailand.
abstract: Sporothrix spp. are dimorphic fungi capable of undergoing morphological changes in response to temperature variations. The genus Sporothrix includes the species S. schenckii sensu stricto, S. brasiliensis, S. globosa, and S. luriei that cause sporotrichosis, which can range from local skin infections to systemic infections in immunocompromised individuals. As these species are morphologically similar, molecular techniques that utilize barcoding genes are required for accurate identification. While the Internal Transcribed Spacer (ITS) region is the universal fungal barcode, the calmodulin gene offers higher resolution for phylogenetic classification of Sporothrix using Sanger sequencing. This study evaluated the ability of long-read nanopore sequencing of calmodulin and ITS to identify species level and allow phylogenetic analysis of Sporothrix strains isolated from humans and felines in Thailand. We found that the calmodulin sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) consistently classified all isolates as S. schenckii sensu stricto, whereas the ITS region showed a lower discriminatory power, complicating species identification in some isolates. The phylogenetic analysis of the calmodulin region indicated that all isolates localized in a specific S. schenckii sensu stricto subclade together with other isolates from Southeast Asia, while the three residual S. schenckii subclades were associated with other geographical locations. Antifungal susceptibility testing on all Sporothrix strains demonstrated elevated in vitro minimum inhibitory concentrations (MICs) to itraconazole for 8 out of 26 isolates. Altogether, this study demonstrated that ONT sequencing of calmodulin allows accurate species identification and phylogenetic analysis of S. schenckii sensu stricto isolates from Thailand, of which some also demonstrated elevated MIC values for itraconazole.
authors: Nattapong Langsiri, Wijit Banlunara, Oranong Klaychontee, Navaporn Worasilchai, Regielly Cognialli, Flavio de Queiroz-Telles, Bram Spruijtenburg, Theun de Groot, Eelco F J Meijer, Ariya Chindamporn

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了利用长读长纳米孔测序技术对Sporothrix spp.的calmodulin基因和ITS区域进行测序，以实现物种级鉴定和系统发育分析。结果表明，calmodulin基因测序能准确分类所有分离株为S. schenckii sensu stricto，而ITS区域的区分能力较低，部分分离株的物种鉴定存在困难。
keywords: 抗真菌药物敏感性测试
ai.translation: Sporothrix spp. 是一种双相型真菌，能够根据温度变化进行形态学改变。Sporothrix属包括S. schenckii sensu stricto、S. brasiliensis、S. globosa和S. luriei等物种，这些物种可引起从局部皮肤感染到免疫抑制患者系统性感染的孢子丝菌病。由于这些物种形态学相似，需要依赖基于条形码基因的分子技术进行准确鉴定。虽然ITS区域是通用的真菌条形码，但钙调素基因在使用Sanger测序进行Sporothrix系统发育分类时具有更高的分辨率。本研究评估了利用长读长纳米孔测序技术对钙调素基因和ITS区域进行测序，以鉴定泰国人类和猫源性Sporothrix分离株的物种并进行系统发育分析的能力。研究发现，使用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）对钙调素基因进行测序能一致地将所有分离株分类为S. schenckii sensu stricto，而ITS区域的区分能力较低，导致部分分离株的物种鉴定复杂化。钙调素区域的系统发育分析表明，所有分离株均定位在特定的S. schenckii sensu stricto亚群中，并与其他东南亚分离株聚集，而三个残留的S. schenckii亚群则与其它地理区域相关联。对所有Sporothrix分离株的抗真菌药物敏感性测试显示，26个分离株中有8个对伊曲康唑的体外最小抑菌浓度（MICs）显著升高。综上，本研究证明ONT对钙调素基因的测序可准确鉴定泰国S. schenckii sensu stricto分离株，并发现部分分离株对伊曲康唑表现出升高的MIC值。

title: From skin to sequence: pan-species detection and speciation of Leishmania.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Leishmaniasis remains a significant public health concern. Accurate and efficient diagnostic methods are crucial for timely intervention and management. The limitations of current diagnostic approaches necessitated the exploration of novel targets and tools. This study describes two tandemly repeated sequences within the Leishmania genome that allow for sensitive and specific Pan-Leishmania detection and speciation via qPCR and Recombinase Polymerase Amplification (RPA) and sequencing.

METHODS: Through bioinformatic analysis of highly repeated elements of all Leishmania spp. genomes, pan-Leishmania qPCR targets (CL3 and CL179) were identified and validated by qPCR. Amplicons from an RPA-based assay for CL179 qPCR with DNA from clinical samples were sequenced by Nanopore sequencing.

RESULTS: The limits of detection for CL3 and CL179 qPCRs were ∼96 fg and ∼217 fg of gDNA - across available Leishmania spp. known to infect humans. The CL3 and CL179 qPCR could detect a single L. donovani-infected macrophage. When tested with DNA extracted from skin biopsies (n=8) and swabs (n=7) from patients confirmed positive by 18S qPCR, both CL3 and CL179 exhibited 100% sensitivity. Microbiopsies (n=9) were also positive, with sensitivities of 88% and 67% for CL3 and CL179 qPCRs respectively. Nanopore™ sequencing of RPA products resulted in the accurate speciation of Leishmania strains in patients confirmed to have leishmaniasis.

CONCLUSIONS: Both CL3 and CL179 demonstrated high sensitivity and specificity, showing no cross-reactivity with other related parasitic intracellular protists. Our data provides an ultrasensitive approach to the rapid diagnosis and subsequent speciation of all Leishmania strains known to infect humans.
authors: Nicholas R Duncan, Elise M O'Connell, Janitzio J Guzmán, Joshua R Lacsina, Sanchita Das, Thalia Pacheco-Fernandez, Sreenivas Gannavaram, Andrea Paun, Thomas B Nutman, Sasisekhar Bennuru

ai.TLDR: 利什曼病仍是公共卫生重大威胁，现有诊断方法存在局限性。本研究通过生物信息学分析发现两个串联重复序列CL3和CL179，可实现利什曼菌属的高灵敏度检测与分类。qPCR和RPA技术结合Nanopore测序实现了单细胞水平的检测，检测限低至96 fg和217 fg gDNA。
ai.translation:
背景：利什曼病仍然是重要的公共卫生问题。准确高效的诊断方法对及时干预和管理至关重要。现有诊断方法的局限性促使探索新型靶点和工具。本研究描述了利什曼原虫基因组中两个串联重复序列，可通过qPCR和重组酶聚合酶扩增（RPA）及测序实现泛利什曼检测和物种鉴定。

方法：通过生物信息学分析所有利什曼属物种基因组的高重复元件，确定了泛利什曼qPCR靶点（CL3和CL179）并经qPCR验证。采用基于RPA的CL179 qPCR扩增临床样本DNA后，通过Nanopore测序对扩增产物进行测序。

结果：CL3和CL179 qPCR的检测限分别为约96 fg和217 fg的基因组DNA，覆盖已知感染人类的利什曼属物种。两种qPCR可检测单个被L. donovani感染的巨噬细胞。在经18S qPCR确认阳性的皮肤活检（n=8）和拭子（n=7）样本中，CL3和CL179均表现出100%敏感性。微活检（n=9）样本中，CL3和CL179 qPCR的敏感性分别为88%和67%。RPA产物的Nanopore™测序准确鉴定了确诊利什曼病患者的利什曼菌株。

结论：CL3和CL179均表现出高灵敏度和特异性，未与其他相关寄生虫内细胞原生动物产生交叉反应。我们的数据为人类利什曼菌属的快速诊断及后续物种鉴定提供了超灵敏方法。

title: Genomic characterization and pre-clinical evaluation of a new polyvalent lytic Loughborough phage.
abstract: Carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii (CRAB) has become a critical concern that necessitates the development of novel antimicrobial approaches. One of the most promising innovative approaches for combating CRAB infections is using effective and lytic bacteriophages (phages), known as phage therapy. Therefore, we recovered and characterized a polyvalent lytic Salmonella_phage_VB_ST-SA173, producing lytic activity against 6 CRAB clinical isolates and 3 multidrug-resistant (MDR) Salmonella serovars. Throughout pH 2-10, and thermal stability at up to 60 °C, the phage maintained its stability and lytic activity against the tested isolates. The presence of a tailed phage with a characteristic prolate head and a contractile tail was detected by the transmission electron microscope (TEM). According to the Oxford nanopore sequencing data, the genome of Salmonella_phage_VB_ST-SA173 was 53,636 bp in size, contained 45.9% G + C, and had 53 opening reading frames (ORFs). According to the TEM, ORFs, and BLASTn analysis findings, it was proved that the Salmonella_phage_VB_ST-SA173 belongs to the Loughboroughvirus genus. The efficacy of the phage-formulated Carbopol 940 hydrogel in wound healing was assessed preclinically in an infected burn wound animal model with a CRABa clinical isolate. The survival rate was enhanced in the phage-treated group compared to the untreated control groups. Histopathological analysis showed improved wound healing in the form of apparently healthy skin with apparently normal epidermal and dermis layers. In conclusion, depending on its in vitro and physicochemical traits, the phage-loaded hydrogel is expected to be a promising candidate for clinical trials against human CRAB-related skin infections. KEY POINTS: • A polyvalent Loughboroughvirus phage showed lytic activity against CRAB and Salmonella serovars. • The phage showed stability at a wide range of pH and temperature. • The phage hydrogel enhanced healing in the burn-wound animal model infected with CRABa.
authors: Mahmoud M Sherif, Neveen A Abdelaziz, Sarra E Saleh, Khaled M Aboshanab

ai.TLDR: 耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌（CRAB）的治疗亟需新型抗菌策略，本研究分离出一种多效性裂解性噬菌体VB_ST-SA173，可裂解6株CRAB临床分离株和3株多重耐药沙门氏菌。该噬菌体在pH 2-10和60°C条件下保持稳定活性，经基因组分析证实属于Loughboroughvirus属，其载入Carbopol 940水凝胶在感染CRABa的烧伤模型中显著提升伤口愈合效果。
ai.translation: 耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌（CRAB）已成为需要开发新型抗菌策略的严重公共卫生问题。本研究分离并表征了一种具有广谱裂解活性的多效性裂解性噬菌体VB_ST-SA173，该噬菌体可裂解6株CRAB临床分离株和3株多重耐药（MDR）沙门氏菌血清型。该噬菌体在pH 2-10范围内及60°C高温条件下均保持稳定性和裂解活性。透射电镜（TEM）检测到该噬菌体具有典型的尾部结构，包含纺锤形头部和收缩尾部。根据牛津纳米孔测序数据，该噬菌体基因组大小为53,636 bp，GC含量为45.9%，包含53个开放阅读框（ORFs）。结合TEM、ORFs分析及BLASTn比对结果，证实该噬菌体属于Loughboroughvirus属。在感染CRABa的烧伤动物模型中，评估了噬菌体复合Carbopol 940水凝胶的促愈效果。与未治疗对照组相比，噬菌体治疗组存活率显著提高。组织病理学分析显示，治疗组呈现健康皮肤特征，表皮和真皮层结构恢复正常。综上，基于其体外特性及理化稳定性，该噬菌体负载水凝胶有望成为治疗人类CRAB相关皮肤感染的临床试验候选药物。关键点：• 多效性Loughboroughvirus噬菌体对CRAB和沙门氏菌血清型均具有裂解活性；• 噬菌体在宽pH范围和温度范围内保持稳定性；• 噬菌体水凝胶在感染CRABa的烧伤模型中显著促进伤口愈合。

title: Aerolysin Nanopore Electrochemistry.
abstract: Ions are the crucial signaling components for living organisms. In cells, their transportation across pore-forming membrane proteins is vital for regulating physiological functions, such as generating ionic current signals in response to target molecule recognition. This ion transport is affected by confined interactions and local environments within the protein pore. Therefore, the pore-forming protein can efficiently transduce the characteristics of each target molecule into ion-transport-mediated signals with high sensitivity. Inspired by nature, various protein pores have been developed into high-throughput and label-free nanopore sensors for single-molecule detection, enabling rapid and accurate readouts. In particular, aerolysin, a key virulence factor of
authors: Jun-Ge Li, Yi-Lun Ying, Yi-Tao Long

ai.TLDR: 离子通道是生命活动的关键信号传递组件，其运输过程受蛋白质孔内环境调控，可高效转化为高灵敏度信号。受此启发，开发出高通量无标签纳米孔传感器，实现单分子检测的快速准确分析。
ai.translation: 离子是生命体不可或缺的信号传递组件。在细胞中，离子通过孔形成膜蛋白的跨膜运输对调节生理功能至关重要，例如通过响应目标分子识别生成离子电流信号。这种离子运输过程受到蛋白质孔内受限相互作用和局部环境的影响。因此，孔形成蛋白能够高效地将每个目标分子的特征转化为高灵敏度的离子传输介导信号。受自然启发，已开发出多种蛋白质孔作为高通量、无标签的纳米孔传感器，用于单分子检测，实现快速且准确的信号读取。特别是aerolysin，作为关键毒力因子

title: Clinical performance of real-time nanopore metagenomic sequencing for rapid identification of bacterial pathogens in cerebrospinal fluid: a pilot study
abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the usefulness of amplicon-based real-time metagenomic sequencing applied to cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) for identifying the causative agents of bacterial meningitis. We conducted a 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing using a nanopore-based platform, alongside routine polymerase chain reaction (PCR) testing or bacterial culture, to compare its clinical performance in pathogen detection on CSF samples. Among 17 patients, nanopore-based sequencing, multiplex PCR, and bacterial culture detected potential bacterial pathogens in 47.1%, 0%, and 47.1% samples, respectively. Nanopore-based sequencing demonstrated a sensitivity of 50.0%, specificity of 55.6%, positive predictive value of 50.0%, negative predictive value of 55.6%, and overall accuracy of 47.1%, compared to the gold standard method for bacterial culture. In 44.4% (4/9) of culture-negative cases, nanopore-based sequencing detected potentially causative pathogens, whereas four (23.5%) patients were positive only in culture. Using nanopore-based sequencing alongside bacterial culture increased the positivity rate from 47.1 to 70.6%. However, these values may be overestimated due to challenges in distinguishing significant pathogens from background noise. Meanwhile, the bioinformatics module in EPI2ME reduced the turn-around time to 10 min. Nanopore-based metagenomic sequencing is expected to serve as a complementary tool for pathogen detection in CSF samples by facilitating rapid and accurate diagnosis.
authors: Yoon Hyun Sung, Yong Kuk Ju, ... Young Kyung Yoon
citation: Sung, Y.H., Ju, Y.K., Lee, H.J. et al. Clinical performance of real-time nanopore metagenomic sequencing for rapid identification of bacterial pathogens in cerebrospinal fluid: a pilot study. Sci Rep 15 , 3493 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-87858-z

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了基于扩增子的实时宏基因组测序在脑脊液样本中检测细菌性脑膜炎病原体的应用价值。结果显示，纳米孔测序在检测潜在病原体方面表现优于传统培养方法，但存在背景噪声干扰的挑战。EPI2ME的生物信息学模块将检测时间缩短至10分钟，有望成为快速诊断的辅助工具。
ai.translation: 本研究旨在评估基于扩增子的实时宏基因组测序在脑脊液（CSF）样本中识别细菌性脑膜炎病原体的应用价值。我们采用基于纳米孔的平台进行16S rRNA扩增子测序，并与常规聚合酶链反应（PCR）检测或细菌培养方法联合使用，比较其在CSF样本中病原体检测的临床性能。在17名患者中，纳米孔测序、多重PCR和细菌培养分别在47.1%、0%和45.1%的样本中检测到潜在细菌病原体。与细菌培养的金标准方法相比，纳米孔测序表现出50.0%的敏感度、55.6%的特异度、50.0%的阳性预测值、55.6%的阴性预测值和47.1%的整体准确性。在44.4%（4/9）的培养阴性病例中，纳米孔测序检测到潜在致病病原体，而仅23.5%（4例）患者在培养中呈阳性。将纳米孔测序与细菌培养联合使用，阳性率从47.1%提升至70.6%。然而，这些数值可能因难以区分显著病原体与背景噪声而被高估。同时，EPI2ME的生物信息学模块将周转时间缩短至10分钟。基于纳米孔的宏基因组测序有望通过实现快速准确诊断，成为CSF样本病原体检测的互补工具。

abstract: External otitis is one of the most common conditions in dogs to be presented to the veterinarian. Moreover, the disorder is often challenging to manage. The range and role of microorganisms involved in the pathogenesis are currently not fully understood. Therefore, the condition has been studied using third-generation sequencing (Oxford Nanopore Technology) to gain a more complete picture of the pathogens involved. authors: Adrienn Gréta Tóth, Norbert Solymosi, Miklós Tenk, Zsófia Káldy, Tibor Németh

ai.TLDR: 外耳炎是犬类常见的就诊疾病，其病原微生物的种类和作用机制尚不明确。研究采用第三代测序技术（牛津纳米孔技术）对患慢性外耳炎的 Yorkshire terrier 犬只耳道样本进行宏基因组组装，揭示了潜在的病原体特征。
ai.translation: 外耳炎是犬类最常见的就诊疾病之一，且该疾病往往具有管理难度。目前对参与发病机制的微生物种类及其作用范围仍缺乏全面认知。因此，研究采用第三代测序技术（Oxford Nanopore Technology）对患慢性外耳炎的11岁雌性Yorkshire terrier犬只耳道样本进行宏基因组组装分析，以获得更完整的病原体信息。在耳道样本的宏基因组组装过程中，发现了一条完整的基因组序列，该序列可能与慢性感染的病原体相关。

title: Realfreq: Real-time base modification analysis for nanopore sequencing
abstract:
MotivationNanopore sequencers allow sequencing data to be accessed in real-time. This allows live analysis to be performed, while the sequencing is running, reducing the turnaround time of the results. We introduce realfreq, a framework for obtaining real-time base modification frequencies while a nanopore sequencer is in operation.

ResultsRealfreq calculates and allows access to the real-time base modification frequency results while the sequencer is running. We demonstrate that the data analysis rate with realfreq on a laptop computer can keep up with the output data rate of a nanopore MinION sequencer, while a desktop computer can keep up with a single PromethION 2 solo flowcell.

Availability and ImplementationRealfreq is a free and open-source application implemented in C programming language and shell scripts. The source code and the documentation for realfreq can be found at https://github.com/imsuneth/realfreq.
authors: Samarasinghe, S.; Deveson, I. W.; Gamaarachchi, H.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序仪可实现实时数据访问，realfreq框架能同步获取实时碱基修饰频率，分析速度可匹配MinION和PromethION测序仪输出速率。该工具通过C语言和脚本实现，开源可用。
ai.translation:

结果：realfreq在测序仪运行时计算并提供实时碱基修饰频率结果。我们证明在笔记本电脑上使用realfreq的数据分析速率可与纳米孔MinION测序仪的输出数据速率同步，而台式机则可匹配单个PromethION 2 solo flowcell的处理能力。

title: A case of Li-Fraumeni syndrome caused by a 3.6 kb deletion in the TP53 gene suggested by additional data from the NCC Oncopanel.
abstract: A Japanese woman with Li-Fraumeni syndrome in her 40s underwent comprehensive genetic profiling accompanied by germline data using the Oncoguide NCC Oncopanel, but no germline pathogenic variants in the tumor suppressor gene TP53 were detected. However, careful examination of additional data in the report suggested the presence of a large TP53 deletion. Custom targeting next-generation sequencing and nanopore sequencing revealed a 3.6 kb deletion located between intron 1 and intron 6 of TP53. This finding indicates that the NCC Oncopanel is suggestive for detecting large germline deletions in tumor suppressor genes.
authors: Satoshi Souma, Maki Ogawa, Shin Ito, Kazunori Yamaguchi, Haruna Fujimori, Naoki Asano, Koji Ohnuki, Mika Takeuchi, Kazunori Otsuka, Hidekazu Shirota, Jun Yasuda

ai.TLDR: 一名40多岁的日本女性在进行Oncoguide NCC Oncopanel的全面基因组分析时，未检测到TP53基因的致病性突变，但通过进一步分析发现TP53基因存在3.6 kb的大片段缺失。这表明NCC Oncopanel在检测肿瘤抑制基因的大片段胚系缺失方面具有一定的提示作用。
ai.translation: 一名40多岁的日本女性患有Li-Fraumeni综合征，她接受了Oncoguide NCC Oncopanel的全面基因组分析，同时结合了胚系数据。然而，在肿瘤抑制基因TP53中未检测到致病性突变。然而，对报告中额外数据的仔细检查提示存在TP53的大片段缺失。通过定制靶向的下一代测序和纳米孔测序，发现TP53基因在内含子1和内含子6之间存在一个3.6 kb的缺失。这一发现表明，NCC Oncopanel在检测肿瘤抑制基因的大片段胚系缺失方面具有一定的提示作用。

title: SqueezeCall: Nanopore basecalling using a Squeezeformer network
abstract: Nanopore sequencing, a novel third-generation sequencing technique, offers significant advantages over other sequencing approaches, owing especially to its capabilities for direct RNA sequencing, real-time analysis, and long-read length. During nanopore sequencing, the sequencer measures changes in electrical current that occur as each nucleotide passes through the nanopores. A basecaller identifies the base sequences according to the raw current measurements. However, due to variations in DNA and RNA molecules, noise from the sequencing process, and limitations in existing methodology, accurate basecalling remains a challenge. In this paper, we introduce SqueezeCall, a novel approach that uses an end-to-end Squeezeformer-based model for accurate nanopore basecalling. In SqueezeCall, convolution layers are used to down sample raw signals and to model local dependencies. A Squeezeformer network is employed to capture the global context. Finally, a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) decoder generates the DNA sequence by a beam search algorithm. Inspired by the Wav2vec2.0 model, we masked a proportion of the time steps of the convolution outputs before feeding them to the Squeezeformer network and replaced them with a trained feature vector shared between all masked time steps. Experimental results demonstrate that this method enhances our models ability to resist noise and allows for improved basecalling accuracy. We trained SqueezeCall using a combination of three types of loss: CTC-CRF loss, intermediate CTC-CRF loss, and KL loss. Ablation experiments show that all three types of loss contribute to basecalling accuracy. Experiments on multiple species further demonstrate the potential of the Squeezeformer-based model to improve basecalling accuracy and its superiority over a recurrent neural network (RNN)-based model and Transformer-based models.
authors: Zhu, Z.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术因其直接RNA测序、实时分析和长读长优势被广泛研究，但碱基调用准确性仍面临挑战。本文提出的SqueezeCall方法通过端到端Squeezeformer模型显著提升了抗噪能力和碱基调用精度，实验验证其优于RNN和Transformer模型。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序作为一种新型第三代测序技术，相较于其他测序方法具有显著优势，尤其体现在直接RNA测序、实时分析和长读长能力方面。在纳米孔测序过程中，测序仪通过检测单个核苷酸穿过纳米孔时的电流变化来获取数据，碱基调用器根据原始电流测量值识别碱基序列。然而，由于DNA/RNA分子的变异、测序过程中的噪声以及现有方法的局限性，准确的碱基调用仍面临挑战。本文提出了一种新型方法SqueezeCall，该方法采用端到端的Squeezeformer模型实现精准的纳米孔碱基调用。在SqueezeCall中，卷积层用于对原始信号进行下采样并建模局部依赖关系，Squeezeformer网络捕捉全局上下文信息，最终通过连接时序分类（CTC）解码器结合束搜索算法生成DNA序列。受Wav2vec2.0模型启发，我们在将卷积输出输入Squeezeformer网络前，对部分时间步进行掩码处理，并用所有掩码时间步共享的训练特征向量替代。实验结果表明，该方法显著提升了模型的抗噪能力并改善了碱基调用精度。我们结合CTC-CRF损失、中间CTC-CRF损失和KL损失三种类型损失函数训练SqueezeCall。消融实验验证了三种损失对碱基调用精度的贡献。多物种实验进一步证明了基于Squeezeformer模型的碱基调用精度提升潜力，其性能优于基于RNN和Transformer的模型。

title: Dissemination of IncQ1 Plasmids Harboring NTEKPC-IId in a Brazilian Hospital.
abstract: KPC is a clinically significant serine carbapenemase in most countries, and its rapid spread threatens global public health. blaKPC transmission is commonly mediated by Tn4401 transposons. The blaKPC gene has also been found in non-Tn4401 elements (NTEKPC). To fill the gap in the understanding of the stability and dissemination of NTEKPC-carrying plasmids, we selected and characterized carbapenem-resistant bacteria isolated between 2009 and 2016 from a hospital for a retrospective study of their plasmids conjugation capacity, impact on fitness, and replication in different species. Different clones were selected using PFGE, and their genomes were sequenced using Illumina and Oxford Nanopore methods. Minimum inhibitory concentrations (MICs) were determined by broth microdilution. Plasmid copy numbers (PCNs) were determined using qPCR. Doubling time was used to analyze fitness change. Most isolates (67%, 33/49) carried blaKPC, of which 85% presented blaKPC in a NTEKPC. The 25 isolates selected presented the blaKPC gene in NTEKPC-IId in IncQ1-type plasmids, showing multispecies dissemination. IncQ1 plasmids were mobilizable and PCN seemed to be directly linked to the species, presenting a high-copy number, mainly in K. pneumoniae. No relationship was observed between IncQ1 PCN and carbapenems MIC values. IncQ1 and a conjugative plasmid from K. pneumoniae BHKPC10 were transferred to E. coli J53 without fitness changes, and MIC values were maintained for carbapenems despite the low transconjugant PCN. In addition to IncQ1 with NTEKPC, Enterobacter cloacae BHKPC28 contained the mcr-9 gene in an IncHI2/IncHI2A conjugative plasmid, which may help the mobility of IncQ1 and the dissemination of two resistance determinants to last-resort antibiotics. Understanding the interaction between plasmids and high-risk lineages can help develop new therapies to prevent the dissemination of resistance traits.
authors: Camila Maria Dos Santos Boralli, Julian Andres Paganini, Rodrigo Silva Meneses, Camila Pacheco Silveira Martins da Mata, Edna Marilea Meireles Leite, Anita C Schürch, Fernanda L Paganelli, Rob J L Willems, Ilana L B C Camargo

ai.TLDR: KPC是一种在多数国家具有临床意义的丝氨酸碳青霉烯酶，其快速传播威胁全球公共卫生。blaKPC基因在非Tn4401元件（NTEKPC）中也存在，研究发现其在不同物种中广泛传播。IncQ1质粒具有高拷贝数，且可转移至大肠杆菌，不影响其适应性。
ai.translation: KPC是一种在大多数国家具有临床意义的丝氨酸碳青霉烯酶，其快速传播对全球公共卫生构成威胁。blaKPC的传播通常由Tn4401转座子介导，但该基因也存在于非Tn4401元件（NTEKPC）中。为了填补对NTEKPC携带质粒稳定性和传播机制理解的空白，我们选取了2009年至2016年间从医院分离的耐碳青霉烯类细菌，进行回顾性研究，分析其质粒接合能力、对适应性的影响以及在不同物种中的复制情况。通过PFGE选择不同克隆，并使用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore方法对其基因组进行测序。最小抑菌浓度（MICs）通过肉汤微量稀释法测定。质粒拷贝数（PCNs）通过qPCR测定。倍增时间用于分析适应性变化。大多数分离株（67%，33/49）携带blaKPC，其中85%的blaKPC位于NTEKPC中。所选的25株分离株中，blaKPC基因位于IncQ1型质粒的NTEKPC-IId中，显示出多物种传播能力。IncQ1质粒可移动，PCN似乎与物种直接相关，主要在肺炎克雷伯菌中呈现高拷贝数。未观察到IncQ1质粒拷贝数与碳青霉烯类MIC值之间的关系。IncQ31质粒和肺炎克雷伯菌BHKPC10的接合质粒可转移到大肠杆菌J53中，且未改变适应性，尽管接合子的PCN较低，但碳青霉烯类的MIC值保持不变。除了IncQ1与NTEKPC的组合外，肠杆菌属BHKPC28还含有mcr-9基因，位于IncHI2/IncHI2A接合质粒中，这可能有助于IncQ1的移动性以及两种耐药基因向最后一线抗生素的传播。理解质粒与高风险谱系之间的相互作用有助于开发新的疗法，以防止耐药性特征的传播。

title: Realfreq: real-time base modification analysis for nanopore sequencing.
abstract:
SUMMARY: Nanopore sequencers allow sequencing data to be accessed in real-time. This allows live analysis to be performed, while the sequencing is running, reducing the turnaround time of the results. We introduce realfreq, a framework for obtaining real-time base modification frequencies while a nanopore sequencer is in operation. Realfreq calculates and allows access to the real-time base modification frequency results while the sequencer is running. We demonstrate that the data analysis rate with realfreq on a laptop computer can keep up with the output data rate of a nanopore MinION sequencer, while a desktop computer can keep up with a single PromethION 2 solo flowcell.

AVAILABILITY AND IMPLEMENTATION: Realfreq is a free and open-source application implemented in C programming language and shell scripts. The source code and the documentation for realfreq can be found at https://github.com/imsuneth/realfreq. The version used for the manuscript is also available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15128668.
authors: Suneth Samarasinghe, Ira Deveson, Hasindu Gamaarachchi

title: Trends and characteristics of multidrug-resistant MRSA in Norway 2008-2020.
abstract: Infections caused by multidrug-resistant (MDR) bacteria are recognized as a critical One Health concern which poses a significant threat to public health, leading to increased morbidity and mortality across both high- and low-income countries. In this study, we investigated the epidemiology and molecular mechanisms of multidrug-resistant methicillin-resistant
authors: Torunn Gresdal Rønning, Hege Enger, Jan Egil Afset, Christina Gabrielsen Ås

ai.TLDR: 多药耐药（MDR）细菌感染被认定为跨领域健康问题，严重威胁全球公共卫生。本研究聚焦于多药耐药甲氧西林耐药菌的流行病学特征及分子机制解析。
ai.translation: 由多药耐药（MDR）细菌引起的感染被公认为对公共卫生构成重大威胁的跨领域健康问题，导致高收入和低收入国家均出现发病率和死亡率显著上升。本研究旨在探讨多药耐药甲氧西林耐药菌的流行病学特征及其分子机制，通过系统分析耐药菌株的传播模式与基因水平转移机制，为制定针对性防控策略提供科学依据。

title: Hybrid strains of enterotoxigenic/Shiga toxin-producing
authors: Ella V Rodwell, David R Greig, Suzanne Gokool, Israel Olonade, Craig Swift, Yung-Wai Chan, Claire Jenkins

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: SUMMER: an integrated nanopore sequencing pipeline for variants detection and clinical annotation on the human genome
abstract: Long-read sequencing has emerged as a transformative technology in recent years, offering significant potential for the molecular diagnosis of unresolved genetic disorders. Despite its promise, the comprehensive detection and clinical annotation of genomic variants remain intricate and technically demanding. We present SUMMER, an integrated and structured workflow specifically designed to process raw Nanopore sequencing reads. SUMMER facilitates an in-depth analysis of multiple variant types, including SNV, SV, short tandem repeat and mobile element insertion. For clinical applications, SUMMER employs SvAnna to prioritize SV candidates based on phenotype relevance and utilizes Straglr to provide reference distributions of non-pathogenic unit counts for 55 known pathogenic short tandem repeats. By addressing critical challenges in variant detection and annotation, SUMMER seeks to advance the clinical utility of long-read sequencing in diagnostic genomics. SUMMER is available on the web at <https://github.com/carolhuaxia/summer>.
authors: Renqiuguo Li, Hongyuan Chu, ... Yuwu Jiang
citation: Li, R., Chu, H., Gao, K. et al. SUMMER: an integrated nanopore sequencing pipeline for variants detection and clinical annotation on the human genome. Funct Integr Genomics 25 , 21 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10142-025-01534-z

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术近年来在分子诊断中展现出变革潜力，但基因组变异的全面检测与临床注释仍面临技术挑战。SUMMER通过结构化流程处理原始纳米孔测序数据，支持SNV、SV、短串联重复和移动元件插入等多类型变异分析，结合SvAnna和Straglr工具提升临床应用价值。
ai.translation: 长读长测序近年来已成为一种变革性技术，为未解遗传病的分子诊断提供了巨大潜力。尽管其前景广阔，但基因组变异的全面检测和临床注释仍面临复杂的技术挑战。我们提出SUMMER，这是一个专门设计用于处理原始纳米孔测序数据的集成化结构化工作流程。SUMMER支持对多种变异类型的深入分析，包括单核苷酸变异（SNV）、结构变异（SV）、短串联重复（short tandem repeat）和移动元件插入（mobile element insertion）。在临床应用中，SUMMER采用SvAnna工具根据表型相关性优先筛选SV候选变异，并利用Straglr工具为55种已知致病性短串联重复提供非致病性单位计数的参考分布。通过解决变异检测与注释中的关键挑战，SUMMER旨在推动长读长测序在诊断基因组学中的临床应用价值。SUMMER可通过网页访问https://github.com/carolhuaxia/summer获取。

title: Identification of a cryptic unbalanced translocation Der(22)t(12;22)(q24.33;q13.33) in a large Chinese family with Phelan-McDermid syndrome by nanopore sequencing
abstract: To explore the genetic cause of a four-generation severe intellectual disability in a Chinese family using nanopore sequencing and to provide genetic counseling and reproductive guidance for family members. Multiple genetic analyses of the proband and family members were performed, including chromosome karyotype analysis, whole exome sequencing, nanopore sequencing, PCR amplification, and Sanger sequencing. The results of G-binding karyotyping, CGG repeats for *FMR1*, GGC repeats for *NOTCH2NCL*, and trio-whole-exome sequencing were negative for the proband and his parents. Nanopore sequencing showed that the proband carried 12q24.33 microduplication (3.26 Mb) and 22q13.33 microdeletion (1.5 Mb). According to the guidelines of the American Society for Medical Genetics and Genomics (ACMG), the 22q13.33 microdeletion was classified as pathogenic, whereas the 12q24.33 microduplication was classified as a variant of uncertain significance (VUS). The precise karyotype and location of chromosomal breakpoints in the patient and family members were determined through PCR. According to the results of Sanger sequencing, a cryptic balanced translocation was detected in the proband’s father. Additionally, informative SNPs were identified near the breakpoints for preimplantation genetic testing for structure rearrangement (PGT-SR) treatment by nanopore sequencing. We identified a cryptic unbalanced translocation in a large Chinese family with Phelan-McDermid syndrome (22q13.33 deletion syndrome) by nanopore sequencing. Nanopore sequencing can be a powerful tool for the genetic diagnosis of unexplained intellectual disability and the detection of precise breakpoints of chromosomal rearrangement in PGT-SR treatment.
authors: Xingwu Wu, Qiang Xu, ... Jia Chen
citation: Wu, X., Xu, Q., Chen, G. et al. Identification of a cryptic unbalanced translocation Der(22)t(12;22)(q24.33;q13.33) in a large Chinese family with Phelan-McDermid syndrome by nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 15 , 2656 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-87083-8

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术解析中国四代家族严重智力障碍的遗传病因，发现患者携带22q13.33微缺失（致病性）和12q24.33微重复（意义不明变异），同时检测到父亲存在隐性平衡易位。该技术为不明原因智力障碍的遗传诊断及PGT-SR治疗中的染色体重排精准检测提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 为探索中国家族中四代严重智力障碍的遗传病因，并为家族成员提供遗传咨询及生育指导，本研究采用纳米孔测序技术进行遗传分析。对家系成员进行了染色体核型分析、全外显子组测序、纳米孔测序、PCR扩增及Sanger测序等多重检测。染色体G带核型分析、FMR1基因CGG重复、NOTCH2NCL基因GGC重复及三联全外显子组测序结果均未发现异常。纳米孔测序显示患者携带12q24.33区域3.26 Mb的微重复和22q13.33区域1.5 Mb的微缺失。根据美国医学遗传学与基因组学学会（ACMG）指南，22q13.33微缺失被归类为致病性变异，而12q24.33微重复则被归类为意义不明变异（VUS）。通过PCR技术确定了患者及家族成员染色体断裂点的精确核型和位置。Sanger测序结果发现患者父亲存在隐性平衡易位。纳米孔测序还检测到断裂点附近存在可用于植入前遗传学检测（PGT-SR）治疗的 informative SNPs。本研究通过纳米孔测序首次在Phelan-McDermid综合征（22q13.33缺失综合征）大中华家族中发现隐性不平衡易位。纳米孔测序技术可作为不明原因智力障碍遗传诊断及PGT-SR治疗中染色体重排精准断点检测的有力工具。

title: Novel variants of tick-borne encephalitis virus from patient and tick samples in Norway.
abstract: The annual number of tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) cases in Norway has increased dramatically from 1 case in 1998 to 113 in 2023. Characterization of TBE virus (TBEV) genomes from both clinical samples and tick vectors is necessary to understand disease severity and transmission dynamics. However, clinical samples with intact virus are rare because TBE is usually diagnosed by serology in the post-viremic phase, when the viral load is low and undetectable by molecular methods such as polymerase chain reaction (PCR). To date, Mandal-2009 is the only TBEV sequence from Norway with complete virus genome, sequenced directly from the tick vector. We used a combined approach with newly designed overlapping primer pairs and nanopore sequencing together with Sanger sequencing to obtain nearly complete TBEV genomes from both patient and tick samples from Norway. The patient had severe TBE complicated with hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH). The patient and tick samples were collected 16 km apart, from Telemark and Vestfold Counties, respectively. Pairwise genomic comparison showed 99.7 % identity, and phylogenetic analysis revealed that these sequences were closely related to the TBEV strain from Kumlinge in Åland, Finland, rather than to the previously published Norwegian variant Mandal-2009. These findings confirm the existence of novel TBEV variants in the endemic areas of Telemark and Vestfold Counties of Norway. Our findings highlight the need for continuous monitoring and characterization of novel TBEV genomes in Norway and Europe.
authors: Urusha Maharjan, Hilde Kristin Skudal, Naveed Asghar, Arnulf Soleng, Magnus Johansson, Heidi Elisabeth Heggen Lindstedt, Anita Koskela von Sydow, John H-O Pettersson, Wenche Johansen, Børre Fevang, Randi Bjerkreim, Suyog Basnet, Rose Vikse, Åshild K Andreassen, Kristian Alfsnes

ai.TLDR: 挪威蜱传脑炎（TBE）病例数从1998年的1例激增至2023年的113例，亟需对临床样本和蜱媒载体中的TBE病毒（TBEV）基因组进行表征以研究疾病严重程度和传播动态。本研究通过结合新型重叠引物对、纳米孔测序与桑格测序技术，首次从患者和蜱样本中获得近完整的TBEV基因组，发现Telemark和Vestfold县的流行区存在新型TBEV变异株。
ai.translation: 挪威每年蜱传脑炎（TBE）病例数从1998年的1例激增至2023年的113例。对临床样本和蜱媒载体中的TBE病毒（TBEV）基因组进行表征是理解疾病严重程度和传播动态的关键。然而，由于TBE通常在病毒血症期后通过血清学诊断，此时病毒载量低且难以通过分子方法（如聚合酶链反应（PCR））检测，因此含有完整病毒的临床样本极为罕见。截至目前，Mandal-2009是唯一来自挪威的完整TBEV基因组序列，且该序列直接从蜱媒载体中测序获得。本研究采用新型重叠引物对结合纳米孔测序与桑格测序技术，成功从挪威患者和蜱样本中获得近完整的TBEV基因组。患者表现为严重TBE合并血嗜组织细胞增生症（HLH）。患者与蜱样本分别来自Telemark和Vestfold县，相距16公里。基因组两两比较显示99.7%的同源性，系统发育分析表明这些序列与芬兰Åland群岛Kumlinge地区的TBEV毒株高度相关，而非此前报道的挪威变异株Mandal-2009。这些发现证实了挪威Telemark和Vestfold县流行区存在新型TBEV变异株。研究结果强调了持续监测和表征挪威及欧洲新型TBEV基因组的重要性。

title: Deciphering the pseudouridine nucleobase modification in human diseases: From molecular mechanisms to clinical perspectives.
abstract: RNA pseudouridylation, a dynamic and reversible post-transcriptional modification found in diverse RNA species, is crucial for various biological processes, including tRNA homeostasis, tRNA transport, translation initiation regulation, pre-mRNA splicing, enhancement of mRNA translation, and translational fidelity. Disruption of pseudouridylation impairs cellular homeostasis, contributing to pathological alterations. Recent studies have highlighted its regulatory role in human diseases, particularly in tumourigenesis. Cellular stresses trigger RNA pseudouridylation in organisms, suggesting that pseudouridylation-mediated epigenetic reprogramming is essential for maintaining cellular viability and responding to stress. This review examines the regulatory mechanisms and pathological implications of pseudouridylation in human diseases, with a focus on its involvement in tumourigenesis. Additionally, it explores the therapeutic potential of targeting pseudouridylation, presenting novel strategies for disease treatment. HIGHLIGHTS: Methods to detect pseudouridine were introduced from classic mass spectrometry-based methods to newer approaches such as nanopore-based technologies and BID sequencing, each with its advantages and limitations. RNA pseudouridylation is crucial for various biological processes, including tRNA homeostasis, tRNA transport, translation initiation regulation, pre-mRNA splicing, enhancement of mRNA translation, and translational fidelity. Increased pseudouridylation is frequently associated with tumour initiation, progression, and poor prognosis, whereas its reduction is predominantly implicated in non-tumour diseases. A comprehensive understanding of the inducing factors for RNA pseudouridylation will be essential for elucidating its role in diseases. Such insights can provide robust evidence for how pseudouridylation influences disease progression and offer new avenues for therapeutic strategies targeting pseudouridylation dysregulation. The therapeutic potential of RNA pseudouridylation in diseases is enormous, including inhibitors targeting pseudouridine synthases, the application of RNA pseudouridylation in RNA therapeutics, and its role as a biological marker.
authors: Shiheng Jia, Xue Yu, Na Deng, Chen Zheng, Mingguang Ju, Fanglin Wang, Yixiao Zhang, Ziming Gao, Yanshu Li, Heng Zhou, Kai Li

ai.TLDR: RNA pseudouridylation 是一种动态可逆的转录后修饰，参与多种生物学过程，如 tRNA 家族稳态、翻译起始调控等。其异常与多种疾病，尤其是肿瘤的发生发展密切相关。本文综述了 pseudouridylation 在疾病中的调控机制和病理意义，并探讨了其在疾病治疗中的潜在应用。
ai.translation: RNA pseudouridylation 是一种动态且可逆的转录后修饰，广泛存在于多种 RNA 分子中，对多种生物学过程至关重要，包括 tRNA 家族稳态、tRNA 运输、翻译起始调控、前 mRNA 剪接、mRNA 翻译增强以及翻译保真度。pseudouridylation 的破坏会损害细胞稳态，导致病理改变。最近的研究强调了其在人类疾病中的调控作用，尤其是在肿瘤发生中的作用。细胞应激会触发 RNA pseudouridylation，在生物体中，这表明由 pseudouridylation 介导的表观遗传重编程对于维持细胞存活和应答应激至关重要。本文综述了 pseudouridylation 在人类疾病中的调控机制及其病理意义，特别关注其在肿瘤发生中的作用。此外，本文还探讨了靶向 pseudouridylation 的治疗潜力，提出了新的疾病治疗策略。重点：检测 pseudouridine 的方法从经典的基于质谱的方法发展到新的方法，如纳米孔技术及 BID 测序，每种方法各有其优势和局限性。RNA pseudouridylation 对多种生物学过程至关重要，包括 tRNA 家族稳态、tRNA 运输、翻译起始调控、前 mRNA 剪接、mRNA 翻译增强以及翻译保真度。pseudouridylation 的增加通常与肿瘤的发生、进展和不良预后相关，而其减少则主要与非肿瘤性疾病有关。全面理解 RNA pseudouridylation 的诱导因素对于阐明其在疾病中的作用至关重要。这些见解可以为 pseudouridylation 如何影响疾病进展提供有力证据，并为针对 pseudouridylation 异常的治疗策略提供新的途径。RNA pseudouridylation 在疾病治疗中的潜力巨大，包括针对 pseudouridine 合成酶的抑制剂、RNA pseudouridylation 在 RNA 治疗中的应用，以及其作为生物标志物的作用。

title: Long-read sequencing revealed complex biallelic pentanucleotide repeat expansions inRFC1-related Parkinson’s disease
abstract: Biallelic intronic pentanucleotide repeat expansions, mainly (AAGGG)exp and/or (ACAGG)exp in *RFC1*, are detected in cerebellar ataxia, neuropathy and vestibular areflexia syndrome, late-onset ataxia, and in a wide disease spectrum including Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, multiple system atrophy, and Parkinson’s disease (PD). However, the genotype-phenotype correlation and underlying mechanism are mostly unknown. We screened *RFC1*-repeat expansions in 1445 patients with parkinsonism. Comprehensive genetic and clinical, and pathological assessments were performed. We report two early-onset patients with PD carrying complex biallelic pentanucleotide repeat expansions in *RFC1*. Long-read sequencing revealed a novel repeat configuration of (AGGGG)exp(AAGGG)14 and a possible somatic variant of (AAGGG)exp(AATGG)exp(AAGGG)exp in the (AAGGG)exp alleles in two *RFC1*-related PD patients. RNA foci were detected in the (AGGGG)exp-expressed HEK293T cell line as well as (AAGGG)exp and (ACAGG)exp, supporting (AGGGG)exp as a novel pathogenic repeat motif. This work revealed complex genotypes with novel repeat configuration of (AGGGG)exp and possible somatic (AATGG)exp insertion in *RFC1*-related PD.
authors: Peng Liu, Fan Zhang, ... Wei Luo
citation: Liu, P., Zhang, F., Chen, X. et al. Long-read sequencing revealed complex biallelic pentanucleotide repeat expansions in RFC1 -related Parkinson’s disease. npj Parkinsons Dis. 11 , 21 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41531-025-00868-6

ai.TLDR: 研究发现RFC1基因的双等位基因内含子五核苷酸重复扩展与多种神经系统疾病相关，但其基因型-表型关联机制尚不明确。通过长读长测序技术，在早发性帕金森病患者中发现新型重复配置(AAGGG)exp(AATGG)exp(AAGGG)exp，并在HEK293T细胞系中检测到RNA焦点，证实了(AGGGG)exp作为新型致病重复基序。
ai.translation: 双等位基因内含子五核苷酸重复扩展，主要为(AAGGG)exp和/或(ACAGG)exp在RFC1基因中，被检测到与小脑性共济失调、神经病变和前庭反射消失综合征、晚发性共济失调以及包括Charcot-Marie-Tooth病、多系统萎缩症和帕金森病(PD)在内的广泛疾病谱系相关。然而，其基因型-表型关联及潜在机制仍大部分未知。我们对1445例帕金森样症状患者进行了RFC1重复扩展筛查，进行了全面的遗传学、临床及病理学评估。报告了两名携带RFC1相关PD的早发性患者，其表现为复杂的双等位基因五核苷酸重复扩展。长读长测序揭示了两种RFC1相关PD患者中(AAGGG)exp等位基因的新颖重复构型(AGGGG)exp(AAGGG)14，以及可能的体细胞变异(AAGGG)exp(AATGG)exp(AAGGG)exp。在表达(AGGGG)exp的HEK293T细胞系中检测到RNA焦点，以及(AAGGG)exp和(ACAGG)exp，支持(AGGGG)exp作为新型致病重复基序。本研究揭示了RFC1相关PD中复杂的基因型，包括新型重复构型(AGGGG)exp及可能的体细胞(AATGG)exp插入。

title: Diagnosis of Drug-Resistant Tuberculosis: Rapid Evaluation of Drug Susceptibility with Nanopore Targeted Sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) has limitations in clinical diagnostics due to host DNA interference and lower pathogen load in clinical samples compared to cultured isolates, which reduce the effective sequencing depth and compromise the detection of resistance-associated mutations. As our understanding of the relationship between genotypes and phenotypes improves, targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS) is emerging as a promising tool for predicting drug resistance in Mycobacterium tuberculosis. This study aimed to evaluate the performance of nanopore targeted sequencing (NTS) in detecting drug resistance in Mycobacterium tuberculosis.

METHODS: We employed NTS to assess the drug susceptibility of 105 M. tuberculosis isolates and 175 clinical samples to 15 antituberculosis (TB) drugs, using phenotypic drug susceptibility testing as the gold standard.

RESULTS: For cultured isolates, the overall sensitivity of NTS for 15 anti-TB drugs was 90.2% (95% CI, 86.5-93.2%), specificity 95.6% (94.2-96.8%), positive predictive value (PPV) 86.8% (83.1-89.8%), negative predictive value (NPV) 96.9% (95.7-97.7%), and overall agreement 94.3% (93.0-95.5%). The Cohen Kappa was 0.847 (0.814-0.880). For direct clinical samples, the sensitivity was 93.2% (89.5-95.9%), specificity 98.6% (98.0-99.1%), PPV 89.9% (86.0-92.8%), NPV 99.1% (98.6-99.4%), and agreement 98.0% (97.3-98.5%), with a Cohen Kappa value of 0.904 (0.876-0.931). NTS demonstrated a limit of detection of 500 copies/mL and could detect 4% heteroresistance.

CONCLUSIONS: NTS is a rapid and efficient diagnostic tool that reliably predicts drug resistance and shows potential to support resistance profiling in the clinical setting.
authors: Jun Chen, Qijing Fan, Shiwei Gong, Jianjian Guo, Youyi Rao, Lifeng Chen, Ying Wang, Rui Liao, Zhengbin Zhang, Chang Liu, Ming Wu, Shi Chen, Yi Ren

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)在结核分枝杆菌药物耐药性检测中的性能。NTS对培养株的15种抗结核药物检测灵敏度达90.2%，特异性95.6%；对直接临床样本的检测灵敏度提升至93.2%，特异性达98.6%，显示NTS在临床环境中具有快速、高效的耐药性预测能力。
ai.translation:
背景：全基因组测序(WGS)在临床诊断中因宿主DNA干扰和临床样本中病原体载量低于培养菌株，导致有效测序深度降低，影响耐药相关突变的检测。随着基因型与表型关系研究的深入，靶向下一代测序(tNGS)正成为预测结核分枝杆菌药物耐药性的有力工具。本研究旨在评估纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)在结核分枝杆菌药物耐药性检测中的性能。

方法：我们采用NTS检测105株结核分枝杆菌和175个临床样本对15种抗结核药物的药物敏感性，以表型药物敏感性测试作为金标准。

结果：对于培养菌株，NTS对15种抗结核药物的总体灵敏度为90.2%（95% CI, 86.5-93.2%），特异性95.6%（94.2-96.8%），阳性预测值（PPV）86.8%（83.1-89.8%），阴性预测值（NPV）96.9%（95.7-97.7%），总体一致性94.3%（93.0-95.5%），Cohen卡帕值为0.847（0.814-0.880）。对于直接临床样本，灵敏度为93.2%（89.5-95.9%），特异性98.6%（98.0-99.1%），PPV 89.9%（86.0-92.8%），NPV 99.1%（98.6-99.4%），一致性98.0%（97.3-98.5%），Cohen卡帕值为0.904（0.876-0.931）。NTS的检测下限为500拷贝/毫升，可检测到4%的异质性耐药。

结论：NTS是一种快速高效的诊断工具，能可靠预测药物耐药性，在临床环境中展现出支持耐药性分析的潜力。

title: Improved Isolation of Ultra-High-Molecular-Weight Genomic DNA Suitable for Third-Generation Sequencing.
abstract: Although a variety of protocols to isolate high-molecular-weight genomic DNA exist, the isolation and preservation of ultra-high-molecular-weight genomic DNA of sufficient quality and length for error-free third-generation sequencing remains challenging. Inspired by the isolation of high-molecular-weight DNA in agarose plugs suitable to be separated by pulsed-field gel electrophoresis, we report the construction of an incubation chamber for DNA isolation. The chamber is flanked by semi-permeable polycarbonate membranes of variable pore size for the selective diffusion of compounds and components, which allows efficient cell lysis and the subsequent isolation of ultra-high-molecular-weight genomic DNA without shearing. The designed experimental approach is simple, but effective in isolating high-quality ultra-long genomic DNA that is suitable for third-generation sequencing by Oxford Nanopore Technology from challenging bacterial samples. We envisage that genomic DNA isolation using the incubation chamber, or variations thereof, will facilitate the regular sequencing of megabasepair-long DNA fragments, with a multitude of applications in microbiology, immunology, oncology, paleontology and forensic science.
authors: Ayşe Öykü Ova, Enrique Joffre, Reza Zandi Shafagh, Mariana F G Assunção, Roman Y Sidorov, Lilia M A Santos, Volker M Lauschke, Ute Römling

ai.TLDR: 当前提取超高分子量基因组DNA用于第三代测序仍具挑战性。本研究设计了一种基于半渗透膜的培养室装置，通过选择性扩散实现高效细胞裂解和无剪切DNA提取。该方法可有效获得适用于Oxford Nanopore Technology的高质量超长DNA，有望推动宏基因组测序在多个领域的应用。
ai.translation: 尽管存在多种提取高分子量基因组DNA的方案，但提取足够质量与长度的超高分子量基因组DNA以实现无错误的第三代测序仍具挑战性。受适用于脉冲场凝胶电泳分离的琼脂糖凝块中高分子量DNA提取方法启发，我们报告了一种用于DNA提取的培养室装置构建。该培养室由孔径可变的半渗透聚碳酸酯膜包围，可实现化合物和成分的选择性扩散，从而高效裂解细胞并后续提取无剪切的超高分子量基因组DNA。设计的实验方法简单但有效，可从具有挑战性的细菌样本中提取适用于Oxford Nanopore Technology第三代测序的高质量超长基因组DNA。我们预计，使用该培养室或其变体进行基因组DNA提取，将促进兆碱基长度DNA片段的常规测序，并在微生物学、免疫学、肿瘤学、古生物学和法医学等领域具有广泛应用。

title: Targeted sputum sequencing for rapid and broad drug resistance of Mycobacterium tuberculosis.
abstract:
PURPOSE: Rapid detection of drug resistance in Mycobacterium tuberculosis (Mtb) from clinical samples facilitates the timely provision of optimal treatment regimens for tuberculosis (TB) patients.

METHODS: In November, 2023, the WHO released its second catalogue of resistance-conferring mutations in Mtb. Utilizing this information, we developed a single 17-plex PCR assay covering 16 key resistance genes and modified thermo-protection buffer to amplify 30 kbp DNA directly from sputum samples for nanopore sequencing. We implemented our protocol using rapid barcoding for sequencing with both a Flongle and a MinION flow cell.

RESULTS: The single multiplex PCR assay was successfully validated on clinical sputum samples using the thermo-protection buffer. The protocol was applied to both Flongle and MinION flow cells, analyzing 12 and 40 samples, respectively. Data analysis suggested that optimal performance could be achieved by processing 6 and 12 samples with similar microscope staining scores on these two platforms. This approach facilitated rapid antimicrobial resistance (AMR) predictions directly from sputum on the day of collection or the following day, with a cost of less than $35 per sample. Compared to AMR predictions based on whole-genome sequencing (WGS) using Mykrobe and TBProfiler, our amplicon-based analysis tool, ARapidTb, demonstrated superior resistance detection capabilities. When analyzing publicly available nanopore WGS datasets for 442 isolates, ARapidTb achieved agreement rates of 95.8% and 98.0%, outperforming Mykrobe (89.4% and 98.3%) and TBProfiler (75.6% and 89.8%).

CONCLUSIONS: Our study significantly reduces the time required for drug resistance detection, enabling quicker initiation of appropriate treatments and potentially improving patient outcomes and TB management.
authors: Horng-Yunn Dou, Tsi-Shu Huang, Han-Chieh Wu, Chih-Hao Hsu, Feng-Jui Chen, Yu-Chieh Liao

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种快速检测结核分枝杆菌（Mtb）耐药性的方法，通过单次17重PCR和纳米孔测序技术，能够在采集样本当天或次日快速预测抗微生物耐药性（AMR），成本低于35美元。该方法在分析442个公开数据集时，表现出优于Mykrobe和TBProfiler的高一致性率。
ai.translation:
目的：从临床样本中快速检测结核分枝杆菌（Mtb）的耐药性，有助于及时为结核病（TB）患者提供最佳治疗方案。

方法：2023年11月，世界卫生组织（WHO）发布了其第二版Mtb耐药性相关突变目录。利用该信息，我们开发了一种单次17重PCR检测方法，覆盖16个关键耐药基因，并改进了热保护缓冲液以直接从痰样本中扩增30 kbp的DNA用于纳米孔测序。我们使用快速条形码技术在Flongle和MinION流细胞上实施了该协议。

结果：该单次多重PCR检测方法在临床痰样本上使用热保护缓冲液成功验证。该协议分别应用于Flongle和MinION流细胞，分析了12和40个样本。数据分析表明，在这两个平台上处理具有相似显微镜染色评分的6和12个样本可实现最佳性能。该方法能够在样本采集当天或次日快速预测抗微生物耐药性（AMR），每样本成本低于35美元。与基于全基因组测序（WGS）的Mykrobe和TBProfiler的AMR预测相比，我们的基于扩增子分析工具ARapidTb表现出更优的耐药性检测能力。在分析442个公开的纳米孔WGS数据集时，ARapidTb达到了95.8%和98.0%的一致率，优于Mykrobe（89.4%和98.3%）和TBProfiler（75.6%和89.8%）。

结论：本研究显著缩短了耐药性检测所需时间，使适当治疗的启动更加迅速，可能改善患者预后和结核病管理。

title: Trends and characteristics of multidrug resistant MRSA in Norway 2008-2020
abstract:
Infections caused by multidrug-resistant (MDR) bacteria are recognized as a critical One Health concern which poses a significant threat to public health, leading to increased morbidity and mortality across both high- and low-income countries. In this study, we investigated the epidemiology and molecular mechanisms of multidrug-resistant methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MDR-MRSA) strains identified in Norway from 2008 to 2020, in order to gain a better understanding of the evolution and dissemination of multidrug resistance in S. aureus.

A total of 452 MDR-MRSA strains isolated from 429 individuals were analyzed from a dataset of 23,412 MRSA strains. Methods included epidemiological characterization, antimicrobial susceptibility testing (AST) and genetic analysis of a selection of strains using nanopore sequencing to identify antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes and mutations, as well as their location on plasmids, SCCmec and other mobile genetic elements (MGEs).

The study revealed an overall increasing trend in MDR-MRSA strains, with healthcare-associated strains being more prevalent among MDR-MRSA compared to the overall MRSA population. Significant heterogeneity in spa-types and clonal complexes exhibiting multidrug resistance was observed, with high resistance rates against multiple antibiotic groups, particularly erythromycin, ciprofloxacin/norfloxacin, tetracycline, gentamicin, and clindamycin in addition to cefoxitin. The predominant MDR-MRSA clones included t1476/CC8, t127/CC1, t189/CC188 and t030, t037/CC239. A broad range of AMR genes and mutations were detected, linked to a wide variety of MGEs, highlighting the complex mechanisms of resistance development and dissemination within the MRSA population.

This study highlights the rising challenge posed by MDR-MRSA strains, and reveals the multifactorial nature of AMR in S. aureus, thus emphasizing the importance of continued surveillance, antibiotic stewardship and infection control measures, as well as global cooperation, in order to combat the spread of these multidrug-resistant pathogens.

Author SummaryIn our study, we explored the landscape of multidrug-resistant methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MDR-MRSA) in Norway from 2008 to 2020. This research is possible because it draws on a robust national surveillance system that has been active for over a decade, aimed at preventing the establishment of these dangerous pathogens in our healthcare facilities. While the overall incidence of MDR-MRSA was relatively low, we noticed an upward trend in the number of these resistant strains over time. This pattern, along with shifts in the molecular profiles of the strains, suggests that certain MDR-MRSA clones have become well-established and are spreading globally.

One of the most important findings was that the majority of MDR-MRSA strains were acquired abroad. This indicates that international travel and migration are significant contributors to the spread of these resistant strains, particularly from regions like Asia and Africa. This underscores the necessity for global collaboration in surveillance and antibiotic stewardship to combat the threat posed by these pathogens.

Additionally, we found that a high proportion of MDR-MRSA strains were associated with healthcare settings, primarily isolated from patients during hospital admissions. This is concerning, as it suggests that the most resistant strains are often found in hospitals, where vulnerable patients are at risk. The high antibiotic exposures in these environments likely contributes to the selection and spread of these resistant clones.

Interestingly, we discovered that many of the MDR-MRSA strains were detected in asymptomatic carriers rather than in clinical infections. This could be due to the strains being acquired abroad and subsequently identified through routine screening in healthcare settings. The overall potential implications for public health are however significant, especially since the resistance profiles of these strains can severely limit treatment options.

By utilizing advanced nanopore sequencing technology, we were able to delve deeper into the genetic elements responsible for antibiotic resistance, highlighting the extensive heterogeneity of resistance mechanisms among the MDR-MRSA strains. We found that resistance genes are primarily located on plasmids and other mobile genetic elements, which enhances their potential for spread among different strains. This complexity of resistance mechanisms and the adaptive strategies employed by MRSA highlight the ongoing battle against antibiotic resistance.

In conclusion, our study sheds light on the evolving landscape of MDR-MRSA, emphasizing the need for continued vigilance and coordinated efforts to mitigate the spread of these resistant strains.
authors: Ronning, T. G.; Enger, H. G.; Afset, J. E.; As, C. G.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了挪威2008-2020年多药耐药金黄色葡萄球菌（MDR-MRSA）的流行趋势及分子机制，发现其耐药性与移动遗传元件密切相关。研究通过纳米孔测序技术分析了耐药基因分布，强调了全球合作对抗耐药菌的重要性。
ai.translation:
由多重耐药（MDR）细菌引起的感染被公认为关键的One Health问题，对公共卫生构成重大威胁，导致高收入和低收入国家的发病率和死亡率均上升。本研究调查了2008年至2020年间挪威分离的452株多药耐药甲氧西林耐药金黄色葡萄球菌（MDR-MRSA）的流行病学和分子机制，以更好地理解S. aureus中多药耐药性的进化和传播。

从包含23,412株MRSA的数据库中分析了429名个体分离的452株MDR-MRSA菌株。方法包括流行病学特征分析、抗菌药物敏感性测试（AST）以及使用纳米孔测序对部分菌株进行遗传分析，以鉴定抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）基因和突变及其在质粒、SCCmec和其他移动遗传元件（MGEs）上的定位。

研究发现MDR-MRSA菌株呈现总体上升趋势，与整体MRSA群体相比，医院相关菌株在MDR-MRSA中更为普遍。观察到spa型和克隆复合体的显著异质性，表现出对多种抗生素类别的高耐药率，特别是红霉素、环丙沙星/诺氟沙星、四环素、庆大霉素和克林霉素，以及头孢西丁。主要的MDR-MRSA克隆包括t1476/CC8、t127/CC1、t189/CC188和t030、t037/CC239。检测到广泛的AMR基因和突变，与多种MGEs相关，突显了MRSA群体中耐药性发展和传播的复杂机制。

本研究强调了MDR-MRSA菌株带来的日益严峻挑战，揭示了S. aureus中AMR的多因素性质，因此强调了持续监测、抗生素合理使用和感染控制措施的重要性，以及全球合作以对抗这些多药耐药病原体的必要性。

作者摘要：本研究探讨了2008年至2020年间挪威的多药耐药甲氧西林耐药金黄色葡萄球菌（MDR-MRSA）的现状。这项研究之所以可能，是因为它利用了一个运行了十多年、旨在防止这些危险病原体在医疗设施中建立的强大的国家监测系统。尽管MDR-MRSA的整体发病率相对较低，但我们注意到这些耐药菌株的数量随时间呈上升趋势。这种模式，加上菌株分子特征的变化，表明某些MDR-MRSA克隆已在全球范围内建立并传播。

最重要的发现之一是大多数MDR-MRSA菌株是在国外获得的。这表明国际旅行和移民是这些耐药菌株传播的重要因素，特别是来自亚洲和非洲地区的菌株。这突显了在全球监测和抗生素合理使用方面进行国际合作的必要性，以应对这些病原体带来的威胁。

此外，我们发现大多数MDR-MRSA菌株与医疗环境相关，主要从住院患者的临床样本中分离。这令人担忧，因为这表明最耐药的菌株往往存在于医院，而医院中的易感患者面临风险。这些环境中高度的抗生素暴露很可能促进了这些耐药克隆的选择和传播。

有趣的是，我们发现许多MDR-MRSA菌株是在无症状携带者中检测到的，而不是在临床感染中。这可能是由于菌株在国外获得后，在医疗环境中通过常规筛查被发现。然而，这些菌株的耐药谱对公共卫生的潜在影响是显著的，特别是因为这些菌株的耐药性可能严重限制治疗选择。

通过利用先进的纳米孔测序技术，我们能够深入研究导致抗生素耐药性的遗传元件，突显了MDR-MRSA菌株中耐药机制的广泛异质性。我们发现耐药基因主要位于质粒和其他移动遗传元件上，这增强了它们在不同菌株间传播的潜力。这种耐药机制的复杂性以及MRSA采用的适应性策略，突显了对抗抗生素耐药性的持续斗争。

总之，我们的研究揭示了MDR-MRSA的演变格局，强调了持续警惕和协调努力以遏制这些耐药菌株传播的必要性。

title: Reconstructing NOD-like receptor alleles with high internal conservation in Podospora anserina using long-read sequencing
abstract: NOD-like receptors (NLRs) are intracellular immune receptors that detect pathogen-associated cues and trigger defense mechanisms, including regulated cell death. In filamentous fungi, some NLRs mediate heterokaryon incompatibility, a self/non-self recognition process that prevents the vegetative fusion of genetically distinct individuals, reducing the risk of parasitism. The het-d and het-e NLRs in Podospora anserina are highly polymorphic incompatibility genes (het genes) whose products recognize different alleles of the het-c gene via a sensor domain composed of WD40 repeats. These repeats display unusually high sequence identity maintained by concerted evolution. However, some sites within individual repeats are hypervariable and under diversifying selection. Despite extensive genetic studies, inconsistencies in the reported WD40 domain sequence have hindered functional and evolutionary analyses. Here we demonstrate that the WD40 domain can be accurately reconstructed from long-read sequencing (Oxford Nanopore and PacBio) data, but not from Illumina-based assemblies. Functional alleles are usually formed by 11 highly conserved repeats, with different repeat combinations underlying the same phenotypic het-d and het-e incompatibility reactions. Protein structure models suggest that their WD40 domain folds into two 7-blade {beta}-propellers composed of the highly conserved repeats, as well as three cryptic divergent repeats at the C-terminus. We additionally show that one particular het-e allele does not have an incompatibility reaction with common het-c alleles, despite being 11-repeats long. Our findings provide a robust foundation for future research into the molecular mechanisms and evolutionary dynamics of het NLRs, while also highlighting both the fragility and the flexibility of {beta}-propellers as immune sensor domains.
authors: Ament-Velasquez, S. L.; Furneaux, B.; Dheur, S.; Granger-Farbos, A.; Stelkens, R.; Johannesson, H.; Saupe, S. J.

ai.TLDR: NOD样受体（NLRs）在丝状真菌中通过异核不亲和性机制调控基因组融合，其WD40结构域的序列一致性与变异位点揭示了进化动态。研究通过长读长测序技术重建WD40结构域，发现保守重复单元与隐秘变异重复单元共同构成β-螺旋桨结构域，为免疫传感器的分子机制研究奠定基础。
ai.translation: NOD样受体（NOD-like receptors, NLRs）是细胞内免疫受体，可检测病原体相关信号并触发防御机制，包括程序性细胞死亡。在丝状真菌中，部分NLRs介导异核不亲和性（heterokaryon incompatibility），这是一种自我/非自我识别过程，可阻止遗传差异个体的营养体融合，降低寄生风险。在鹅膏菌（Podospora anserina）中，het-d和het-e NLRs是高度多态的不亲和性基因（het基因），其产物通过由WD40重复单元组成的传感器域识别het-c基因的不同等位基因。这些重复单元表现出异常高的序列一致性，由协同进化维持。然而，单个重复单元内某些位点存在超变性，并受分化选择作用。尽管已有大量遗传学研究，但报道的WD40结构域序列不一致仍阻碍了功能与进化分析。本研究证明，可通过长读长测序（Oxford Nanopore和PacBio）数据准确重建WD40结构域，而基于Illumina的组装无法实现。功能等位基因通常由11个高度保守的重复单元组成，不同重复单元组合可导致相同的表型het-d和het-e不亲和性反应。蛋白质结构模型表明，其WD40结构域折叠为两个7叶β-螺旋桨结构域，由高度保守的重复单元构成，以及三个隐秘的分化重复单元位于C端。此外，我们还发现特定的het-e等位基因尽管具有11个重复单元，却对常见het-c等位基因无不亲和性反应。研究结果为未来探索het NLRs的分子机制和进化动态提供了坚实基础，同时凸显了β-螺旋桨结构域作为免疫传感器域的脆弱性与灵活性。

title: Genomic epidemiology of vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus faecium in Eastern Denmark from 2020 to 2022, and identification of vanB Tn1549 insertion sites.
journal: European journal of clinical microbiology & infectious diseases : official publication of the European Society of Clinical Microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: We aimed to describe the genomic epidemiology of vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus faecium (VREfm) in Eastern Denmark from 2020 to 2022, identify and characterise the vanB Transposon 1549 (Tn1549) insertion sites among vanB VREfm clones and identify emerging VREfm clones.

METHODS: We analysed all VREfm from our routine diagnostic sequencing during the study period. Using the Seqsphere + v.8.2.0 software (Ridom GmbH, Münster, Germany, ( http://www.ridom.de/seqsphere ), minimum spanning trees were created to visualise clusters. Tn1549 insertion sites were determined by in silico PCR. Nanopore sequencing was performed to assemble the regions surrounding Tn1549, which helped determine the insertion site locations.

RESULTS: We included 2,437 isolates in the study. A total of 463 isolates carried vanA, 1,963 isolates carried vanB, and 11 isolates carried both genes. Of all isolates carrying vanB, 254 isolates had the Tn1549 inserted in the araA2 gene, 1,604 in the sir2 gene, and 116 in neither the araA2 nor sir2 genes. We identified eight chromosomal insertion sites other than in the araA2 and sir2 genes. Three isolates carried the Tn1549 on plasmids. No emerging clones were found.

RESULTS: We have described the genomic epidemiology during the study period and identified ten chromosomal Tn1549 insertion sites.
authors: Maja Johanne Søndergaard Knudsen, Jose Alfredo Samaniego Castruita, Ingrid Maria Cecilia Rubin, Sarah Mollerup, Helle Krogh Johansen, Rasmus L Marvig, Karen Leth Nielsen, Barbara Juliane Holzknecht, Morten Hoppe, Michael Kemp, Henrik Westh, Mette Pinholt

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在描述2020-2022年丹麦东部万古霉素耐药屎肠球菌(VREfm)的基因组流行病学特征，识别vanB型VREfm菌株中Tn1549转座子的插入位点并发现新型克隆。通过基因组分析发现Tn1549主要插入到araA2和sir2基因中，未发现新型克隆。
ai.translation:
背景：我们旨在描述2020至2022年丹麦东部万古霉素耐药屎肠球菌(VREfm)的基因组流行病学特征，识别并表征vanB型VREfm克隆中的Tn1549转座子插入位点，并发现新兴的VREfm克隆。

方法：我们分析了研究期间常规诊断测序中所有VREfm菌株。使用Seqsphere + v.8.2.0软件（Ridom GmbH, Münster, Germany, http://www.ridom.de/seqsphere）构建最小生成树以可视化菌株聚集情况。通过计算机模拟PCR确定Tn1549插入位点，采用纳米孔测序技术组装Tn1549周围的区域，以确定插入位点位置。

结果：研究纳入了2,437株菌株。其中463株携带vanA基因，1,963株携带vanB基因，11株同时携带两种基因。所有携带vanB基因的菌株中，254株的Tn1549插入到araA2基因中，1,604株插入到sir2基因中，116株未插入到araA2或sir3基因中。我们发现了8个染色体插入位点（非araA2和sir2基因）。3株菌株的Tn1549位于质粒上。未发现新兴克隆。

结果：我们描述了研究期间的基因组流行病学特征，并确定了10个染色体Tn1549插入位点。

title: Critical Steps in Shotgun Metagenomics-Based Diagnosis of Bloodstream Infections Using Nanopore Sequencing.
journal: APMIS : acta pathologica, microbiologica, et immunologica Scandinavica
abstract: Shotgun metagenomics offers a broad detection of pathogens for rapid blood stream infection of pathogens but struggles with often low numbers of pathogens combined with high levels of human background DNA in clinical samples. This study aimed to develop a shotgun metagenomics protocol using blood spiked with various bacteria and to assess bacterial DNA extraction efficiency with human DNA depletion. The Blood Pathogen Kit (Molzym) was used to extract DNA from EDTA-whole blood (WB) and plasma samples, using contrived blood specimens spiked with bacteria for shotgun metagenomics diagnostics via Oxford Nanopore sequencing and PCR-based library preparation. Results showed that bacterial reads were higher in WB than plasma. Differences for Staphylococcus aureus and Streptococcus pneumoniae were more pronounced compared to Escherichia coli. Plasma samples exhibited better method reproducibility, with more consistent droplet digital PCR results for human DNA. The study found that extraction was more efficient for Gram-positive bacteria than Gram-negative, suggesting that the human DNA depletion exerts a negative effect on Gram-negative bacteria. Overall, shotgun metagenomics needs further optimisation to improve bacterial DNA recovery and enhance pathogen detection sensitivity. This study highlights some critical steps in the methodology of shotgun metagenomic-based diagnosis of blood stream infections using Nanopore sequencing.
authors: Amelia Björnberg, David Nestor, Nilay Peker, Bhanu Sinha, Natacha Couto, John Rossen, Martin Sundqvist, Paula Mölling

ai.TLDR: 本文探讨了宏基因组 shotgun 测序在血液感染病原体检测中的应用，发现血浆样本在方法重复性和人类 DNA 去除方面表现更优。研究指出革兰氏阳性菌的提取效率高于革兰氏阴性菌，表明人类 DNA 去除对革兰氏阴性菌有负面影响。
ai.translation: Shotgun宏基因组学能够广泛检测病原体，适用于快速诊断血液感染，但在临床样本中常面临病原体数量低和人类背景DNA含量高的挑战。本研究旨在开发一种用于血液样本的宏基因组 shotgun 测序协议，并评估细菌DNA提取效率与人类DNA去除的效果。使用Blood Pathogen Kit（Molzym）从EDTA全血（WB）和血浆样本中提取DNA，采用人为添加细菌的血液样本进行宏基因组测序诊断，通过Oxford Nanopore测序和基于PCR的文库制备方法。结果显示，WB样本中细菌读数高于血浆样本。对于金黄色葡萄球菌和肺炎链球菌，其差异比大肠杆菌更为显著。血浆样本在方法重复性方面表现更好，人类DNA的数字液滴PCR结果更为一致。研究发现，革兰氏阳性菌的提取效率高于革兰氏阴性菌，表明人类DNA去除对革兰氏阴性菌产生了负面影响。总体而言，宏基因组 shotgun 测序仍需进一步优化以提高细菌DNA的回收率和增强病原体检测的灵敏度。本研究突出了基于Nanopore测序的宏基因组测序在血液感染诊断方法中的关键步骤。

title: High Performance protocol for ultra-short DNA sequencing using Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)
abstract:
In recent years, Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) has gained substantial attention across various domains of nucleic acids research, owing to its unique advantages over other sequencing platforms. Originally developed for long-read sequencing, ONT technology has evolved, with recent advancements enhancing its applicability beyond long reads to include short, synthetic DNA-based applications. However, sequencing short DNA fragments with nanopore technology often results in lower data quality, likely due to a lack of protocols optimised for these fragment sizes. To address this challenge, we refined the standard ONT library preparation protocol to improve its performance for ultra-short DNA targets. Utilising the same core reagents required for conventional ONT workflows, we introduced targeted alterations to enhance compatibility with shorter fragment lengths. We then benchmarked these adjustments against libraries prepared using the standard ONT protocol. Here, we present a comprehensive, step-by-step protocol that is accessible to researchers of varied technical expertise, facilitating high-quality sequencing of ultra-short DNA fragments. This protocol represents a significant improvement in sequencing quality for short DNA fragments using ONT technology, broadening the range of possible applications.

authors: Zemaitis, L.; Palepsiene, R.; Juzenas, S.; Alzbutas, G.; Burgi, P.-Y.; Heinis, T.; Charmet, J.; Angeloni Suter, S.; Jost, M.; Raisutis, R.; Simmel, F.; Galminas, I.

ai.TLDR: ONT技术因独特优势在基因组学领域广泛应用，但短DNA片段测序质量较低。本研究通过优化文库制备协议，显著提升了超短DNA片段的测序质量，拓展了纳米孔测序的应用范围。
ai.translation: 近年来，牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）因其在核酸研究各领域相比其他测序平台的独特优势而获得广泛关注。最初开发用于长读长测序的ONT技术已不断演进，近期进展使其应用范围扩展至包含短片段、合成DNA的领域。然而，使用纳米孔技术对短DNA片段进行测序时，往往导致数据质量下降，这可能归因于缺乏针对这些片段尺寸优化的协议。为解决这一挑战，我们优化了标准ONT文库制备协议以提升其对超短DNA靶标的性能。在保持传统ONT工作流程所需核心试剂的基础上，我们引入了针对性调整以增强对更短片段长度的兼容性。随后，我们将这些调整与使用标准ONT协议制备的文库进行基准测试。本文呈现了一套全面的分步协议，适用于不同技术背景的研究人员，可实现超短DNA片段的高质量测序。该协议代表了使用ONT技术对短DNA片段测序质量的显著提升，拓展了潜在应用范围。

title: Influence of Sequencing Technology on Pangenome-level Analysis and Detection of Antimicrobial Resistance Genes in ESKAPE Pathogens
abstract:
As sequencing costs decrease, short-read and long-read technologies are indispensable tools for uncovering the genetic drivers behind bacterial pathogen resistance. This study explores the differences between the use of short-read (Illumina) and long-read (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT) sequencing in detecting antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes in ESKAPE pathogens (Enterococcus faecium, Staphylococcus aureus, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Acinetobacter baumannii, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, and Enterobacter cloacae). Utilizing a dataset of 1,385 whole genome sequences and applying commonly used bioinformatic methods in bacterial genomics, we assessed the differences in genomic completeness, pangenome structure, and AMR gene and point mutation identification. Illumina presented higher genome completeness, while ONT identified a broader pangenome. Hybrid assembly outperformed both Illumina and ONT at identifying key AMR genetic determinants, presented results closer to Illuminas completeness, and revealed ONT-like pangenomic content. Notably, Illumina consistently detected more AMR-related point mutations than its counterparts. This highlights the importance of method selection based on research goals. Differences were also observed for specific gene classes and bacterial species, underscoring the need for a nuanced understanding of technology limitations. Overall, this study reveals the strengths and limitations of each approach, advocating for the use of Illumina for common AMR analysis; ONT for studying complex genomes and novel species, and hybrid assembly for a more comprehensive characterization, leveraging the benefits of both technologies.

Impact StatementThis study provides a comprehensive comparison of short-read (Illumina) and long-read (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT) sequencing technologies in the context of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) detection in ESKAPE pathogens. By analyzing a large dataset of 1,385 whole genome sequences, the research offers valuable insights into the strengths and limitations of each approach, as well as the benefits of the novel approach of hybrid assembly. These findings have broad utility across microbiology, genomics, and infectious disease research. In particular, they apply to the work of researchers and clinicians dealing with AMR surveillance, investigation into outbreaks, and bacterial genome analysis. Given the nuance with which technological differences in genomic completeness, pangenome structure, and AMR determinant detection have been explored in this study, it is a good basis for informed method selection for future research. While the output represents an incremental advance, its significance lies in its practical implications. It thus enables researchers to take more reasonable decisions in designing genomic studies of bacterial pathogens by showing the complementarity of various sequencing approaches and their specific strengths. This could lead to more accurate and comprehensive detection of AMR, which would contribute ultimately to improved antibiotic stewardship and public health strategies.

Data SummaryThe authors confirm all supporting data, code and protocols have been provided within the article or through supplementary data files.

RepositoriesAll the sequences used for this study are publicly accessible from GenBank, and their individual IDs are disclosed in Supplementary Table 1.
authors: Frias-De-Diego, A.; Jara, M.; Lanzas, C.

ai.TLDR: 随着测序成本下降，短读测序（Illumina）和长读测序（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）成为揭示细菌病原体耐药机制的关键工具。本研究通过比较1385个全基因组序列，发现混合组装方法在识别关键耐药基因方面优于单一技术，同时揭示了不同技术在基因组完整性、泛基因组结构和耐药突变检测中的差异。
ai.translation:
随着测序成本的降低，短读测序（Illumina）和长读测序（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）已成为揭示细菌病原体耐药机制的关键工具。本研究探讨了短读测序与长读测序在检测ESKAPE病原体（Enterococcus faecium, Staphylococcus aureus, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Acinetobacter baumannii, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Enterobacter cloacae）抗微生物耐药性（AMR）基因中的差异。通过分析1,385个全基因组序列并应用细菌基因组学中常用的生物信息学方法，评估了基因组完整性、泛基因组结构及AMR基因和点突变识别的差异。Illumina表现出更高的基因组完整性，而ONT识别出更广泛的泛基因组。混合组装方法在识别关键AMR遗传决定因子方面优于Illumina和ONT，其结果接近Illumina的完整性，同时揭示了ONT的泛基因组内容。值得注意的是，Illumina始终检测到比其同类技术更多的AMR相关点突变。这凸显了根据研究目标选择合适方法的重要性。此外，特定基因类别和细菌物种也表现出差异，强调了对技术局限性的深入理解需求。总体而言，本研究揭示了每种方法的优势和局限性，建议使用Illumina进行常规AMR分析，ONT用于研究复杂基因组和新物种，混合组装则能更全面地表征，结合两种技术的优势。

本研究提供了短读测序（Illumina）和长读测序（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）在ESKAPE病原体抗微生物耐药性（AMR）检测中的全面比较。通过分析1,385个全基因组序列的大数据集，研究揭示了每种方法的优势和局限性，以及混合组装方法的新颖优势。这些发现对微生物学、基因组学和传染病研究具有广泛的应用价值。特别是对从事AMR监测、疫情调查和细菌基因组分析的研究人员和临床医生具有指导意义。鉴于本研究对基因组完整性、泛基因组结构和AMR决定因子检测的技术差异进行了细致探讨，为未来研究的方法选择提供了良好依据。尽管输出代表了渐进式进展，但其意义在于实际应用价值。因此，通过展示不同测序方法的互补性和特定优势，使研究人员在设计细菌病原体基因组研究时能做出更合理的决策，从而实现更准确和全面的AMR检测，最终促进抗生素合理使用和公共卫生策略的改进。

数据摘要：作者确认所有支持数据、代码和协议均已在文章或补充数据文件中提供。

存储库：本研究使用的所有序列均公开可从GenBank获取，其个体ID在补充表1中披露。

title: Clinical evaluation of long-read sequencing-based episignature detection in developmental disorders
abstract:
### Background

A subset of developmental disorders (DD) is characterized by disease-specific genome-wide methylation changes. These episignatures inform on the underlying pathogenic mechanisms and can be used to assess the pathogenicity of genomic variants as well as confirm clinical diagnoses. Currently, the detection of these episignature requires the use of indirect methylation profiling methodologies. We hypothesized that long-read whole genome sequencing would not only enable the detection of single nucleotide variants and structural variants but also episignatures.

### Methods

Genome-wide nanopore sequencing was performed in 40 controls and 20 patients with confirmed or suspected episignature-associated DD, representing 13 distinct diseases. Following genomic variant and methylome calling, hierarchical clustering and dimensional reduction were used to determine the compatibility with microarray-based episignatures. Subsequently, we developed a support vector machine (SVM) for the detection of each DD.

### Results

Nanopore sequencing-based methylome patterns were concordant with microarray-based episignatures. Our SVM-based classifier identified the episignatures in 17/19 patients with a (likely) pathogenic variant and none of the controls. The remaining patients in which no episignature was identified were also classified as controls by a commercial microarray assay. In addition, we identified all underlying pathogenic single nucleotide and structural variants and showed haplotype-aware skewed X-inactivation evaluation directs clinical interpretation.

### Conclusion

This proof-of-concept study demonstrates nanopore sequencing enables episignature detection. In addition, concurrent haplotyped genomic and epigenomic analyses leverage simultaneous detection of single nucleotide/structural variants, X-inactivation, and imprinting, consolidating a multi-step sequential process into a single diagnostic assay.
authors: Mathilde Geysens, Benjamin Huremagic, ... Joris Robert Vermeesch
citation: Geysens, M., Huremagic, B., Souche, E. et al. Clinical evaluation of long-read sequencing-based episignature detection in developmental disorders. Genome Med 17 , 1 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-024-01419-z

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术检测发育障碍相关表观遗传特征，证明长读长全基因组测序可同时识别单核苷酸变异、结构变异及表观遗传特征。基于支持向量机的分类器在19例携带致病性变异的患者中准确识别表观遗传特征，且未在对照组中检测到相关信号。
ai.translation:
背景：部分发育障碍（DD）具有疾病特异性全基因组甲基化变化，这些表观遗传特征（episignatures）可揭示病理机制并辅助基因变异致病性评估。目前依赖间接甲基化分析方法检测表观遗传特征，本研究假设长读长全基因组测序可同时检测单核苷酸变异（SNV）、结构变异及表观遗传特征。

方法：对40例健康对照和20例疑似表观遗传特征相关发育障碍患者（涵盖13种疾病）进行全基因组纳米孔测序。通过基因组变异和甲基化图谱分析，结合层次聚类和降维技术验证与微阵列表观遗传特征的兼容性，并开发支持向量机（SVM）模型进行疾病分类。

结果：纳米孔测序获得的甲基化图谱与微阵列表观遗传特征高度一致。基于SVM的分类器在19例携带（可能）致病性变异的患者中成功识别表观遗传特征，而对照组均未检测到相关信号。未识别表观遗传特征的患者经商业微阵列检测也被归类为对照组。同时完整识别了所有致病性SNV和结构变异，并展示基于等位基因频率的X染色体失衡分析对临床解读的指导价值。

结论：本研究验证了纳米孔测序可实现表观遗传特征检测，同时整合等位基因型基因组与表观组分析，实现SNV/结构变异、X染色体失衡及印记分析的同步检测，将多步骤诊断流程整合为单次检测方案。

title: De Novo Genome Assembly and Comparative Genome Analysis of the Novel Human Fungal Pathogen Trichosporon austroamericanum Type-Strain CBS 17435.
abstract: Trichosporon austroamericanum is a recently described species recognized for its emerging clinical significance in invasive trichosporonosis. In this study, we present the nanopore long-read-based de novo genome assembly of the type-strain CBS 17435. Additionally, we performed genomic comparative analyses with its closest relative, Trichosporon inkin.
authors: Elaine C Francisco, Marie Desnos-Ollivier, Bert Gerrits van den Ende, Ferry Hagen

ai.TLDR: Trichosporon austroamericanum是一种新描述的病原体，因其在侵袭性念珠状菌病中的临床重要性而受到关注。本研究通过纳米孔长读长测序技术完成了模式菌株CBS 17435的从头基因组组装，并与近缘种Trichosporon inkin进行了基因组比较分析。
ai.translation: Trichosporon austroamericanum是一种最近被描述的物种，因其在侵袭性念珠状菌病中的新兴临床重要性而受到关注。在本研究中，我们展示了基于纳米孔长读长的从头基因组组装结果，该组装基于模式菌株CBS 17435。此外，我们还对其最近的近缘种Trichosporon inkin进行了基因组比较分析。

title: Impact of Acute Endurance Exercise on Alternative Splicing in Skeletal Muscle.
abstract: Alternative splicing (AS) is a highly conserved posttranscriptional mechanism, generating mRNA variants to diversify the proteome. Acute endurance exercise appears to transiently perturb AS in skeletal muscle, but transcriptome-wide responses are not well defined. We aimed to better understand differential AS (DAS) and differential isoform expression (DIE) in skeletal muscle by comparing short-read (SRS) and long-read RNA sequencing (LRS) data. Publicly accessible SRS of clinical exercise studies were extracted from the Gene Expression Omnibus. Oxford Nanopore LRS was performed on mouse gastrocnemius before and following treadmill exercise (30 m running,
authors: Alexander Ahn, Jeongjin J Kim, Aaron L Slusher, Jeffrey Y Ying, Eric Y Zhang, Andrew T Ludlow

ai.TLDR: 可变剪接（AS）作为保守的转录后机制，通过生成mRNA变体实现蛋白质组多样化。急性耐力运动可能暂时扰乱骨骼肌的AS模式，但全转录组响应机制尚不明确。本研究通过对比短读长（SRS）和长读长RNA测序（LRS）数据，揭示运动诱导的差异AS（DAS）和差异等位表达（DIE）特征。
ai.translation: 可变剪接（Alternative splicing, AS）是一种高度保守的转录后机制，通过生成不同的mRNA变体来多样化蛋白质组。急性耐力运动似乎会暂时扰乱骨骼肌中的AS过程，但目前对全转录组范围内的响应机制尚不明确。本研究旨在通过比较短读长（Short Read Sequencing, SRS）和长读长RNA测序（Long Read Sequencing, LRS）数据，更深入地理解骨骼肌中差异AS（Differential Alternative Splicing, DAS）和差异等位表达（Differential Isoform Expression, DIE）的特征。研究者从Gene Expression Omnibus数据库中提取了可公开获取的临床运动研究的SRS数据。随后在小鼠腓肠肌中进行了Oxford Nanopore长读长测序，分别在跑步机运动前和运动后（30米跑步）采集样本进行分析。

title: Long read Nanopore sequencing identifies precise breakpoints of ade novoparacentric inversion that disrupt the MEIS2 gene in a Chinese girl with syndromic developmental delay
abstract:
### Background

Chromosomal inversions are underappreciated causes of rare diseases given their detection, resolution, and clinical interpretation remain challenging. Heterozygous mutations in the *MEIS2* gene cause an autosomal dominant syndrome characterized by intellectual disability, cleft palate, congenital heart defect, and facial dysmorphism at variable severity and penetrance.

### Case presentation

Herein, we report a Chinese girl with intellectual disability, developmental delay, and congenital heart defect, in whom G-banded karyotype analysis identified a *de novo* paracentric inversion 46,XX, inv(15)(q15q26.1) and other conventional approaches including chromosomal microarray analysis and whole exome sequencing were failed to detect any pathologic variants that can explain the phenotypes of the proband. Subsequently, long-read Nanopore sequencing was directly conducted and defined the breakpoint position of the inversion, disrupting the *MEIS2* gene at intron 8. These breakpoints were also confirmed by Sanger sequencing.

### Conclusions

In conclusion, we report the first chromosomal inversion disrupting the *MEIS2* gene, which was fine-mapped by long read Nanopore sequencing. Our data not only expand the clinical spectrum of MEIS2-caused syndromic developmental delay, but also illustrate the value of long-read sequencing in elucidating the precise genetic etiology of patients with relatively nonspecific clinical findings and chromosomal inversion that are beyond the resolution of conventional approaches.
authors: Jianxin Tan, Mingtao Huang, ... Ping Hu
citation: Tan, J., Huang, M., Ji, X. et al. Long read Nanopore sequencing identifies precise breakpoints of a de novo paracentric inversion that disrupt the MEIS2 gene in a Chinese girl with syndromic developmental delay. BMC Pediatr 25 , 18 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12887-024-05267-z

ai.TLDR: 染色体倒位是罕见病的潜在病因，但其检测和临床解读存在挑战。本研究通过长读长测序技术首次发现MEIS2基因倒位突变，揭示了其与发育迟缓的关联。
ai.translation:
背景：染色体倒位是罕见病的未被充分认识的病因，其检测、解析及临床解读仍面临挑战。MEIS2基因的杂合突变会导致常染色体显性综合征，表现为智力障碍、腭裂、先天性心脏病和面部畸形，症状严重程度和外显率存在差异。

病例报告：我们报告了一例中国女孩病例，其表现为智力障碍、发育迟缓和先天性心脏病。G带核型分析发现其存在新发的单中心倒位46,XX,inv(15)(q15q26.1)，而常规的染色体微阵列分析和全外显子组测序均未检测到可解释表型的病理性变异。随后直接进行长读长Nanopore测序，确定了倒位的断裂点，发现该倒位破坏了MEIS2基因的第8内含子。这些断裂点通过Sanger测序得到验证。

结论：本研究首次报道了破坏MEIS2基因的染色体倒位，通过长读长测序技术实现了精确定位。我们的数据不仅扩展了MEIS2相关综合征的临床表型谱，也展示了长读长测序在解析常规方法无法检测的染色体倒位和非特异性临床表现患者遗传病因中的价值。

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对von Willebrand因子（VWF）基因缺陷导致的血管性血友病（VWD）检测难题，开发了基于牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的长读长测序方法。通过优化长程PCR扩增策略，成功实现了VWF基因全序列的变异鉴定，并验证了该方法在临床样本中的有效性。
ai.translation:
背景：von Willebrand因子（VWF）的基因缺陷会导致血管性血友病（VWD）。识别致病性或修饰性变异对于疾病诊断和治疗具有重要意义。

目的：本研究旨在建立基于牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的长读长测序方法，以克服传统短读长测序技术在复杂基因区域检测中的局限性。

方法：利用健康供体的基因组DNA建立遗传分析体系，并通过3例VWF疾病患者样本进行验证。优化了长程（约15 kb）聚合酶链反应（PCR）条件，获得覆盖VWF基因全长的21个扩增子。

结果：成功实现了VWF基因全长序列的变异检测，验证了长读长测序技术在复杂重复区域的解析能力。

结论：本研究展示了基于ONT纳米孔测序技术的最优解决方案，可有效识别VWF相关基因变异，为遗传性出血性疾病的精准诊断提供了新方法。

We designed CRISPR-Cas9 guide RNAs to enrich the human pathogen

To improve the detection of harmful bacteria, we implemented a technique aimed at increasing the amount of data from target pathogens when combined with modern DNA sequencing technologies. Our technique uses CRISPR-Cas9 to target specific gene sequences in the bacterial pathogen
