title: Two coding-complete genomes of porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus 2 (PRRSV-2) from field clinical samples in the Philippines.
abstract: We report two coding-complete genome sequences of porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus 2 from field clinical samples obtained in 2021 (BA2021012A) and 2023 (ME20230008B-2) from the Philippines. BA2021012A (15,388 bp) is classified as a lineage L8C strain while ME20230008B-2 (15,513 bp) is a vaccine-like strain in lineage L7.
authors: Andrew Montecillo, Jimwel Bryan Christopher Ferrer, Zyne Baybay, Ruffa Maze Balmes, Roselle Falconite-Cudal, Mary Grace Alba, Karl Alexander Fabros, Timothy James Dela Paz, Lucille C Villegas, Wreahlen Cariaso, Homer Pantua

ai.TLDR: 本研究报道了两株菲律宾分离的猪繁殖与呼吸综合征病毒2型（PRRSV-2）完整编码基因组序列，分别来自2021年和2023年的临床样本。BA2021012A属于L8C谱系，ME20230008B-2为L7谱系的疫苗类似株，揭示了病毒基因组的时空演化特征。
ai.translation: 我们报道了从菲律宾2021年（BA2021012A）和2023年（ME20230008B-2）现场临床样本中分离的两株猪繁殖与呼吸综合征病毒2型（Porcine Reproductive and Respiratory Syndrome Virus 2, PRRSV-2）的完整编码基因组序列。BA2021012A（15,388 bp）被分类为L8C谱系株，而ME20230008B-2（15,513 bp）属于L7谱系的疫苗类似株。

title: Methylmap: visualization of modified nucleotides for large cohort sizes.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Over the years, there has been growing interest in epigenetics, where nucleotide modifications are increasingly recognized for their roles in health and disease. Understanding methylation patterns at the nucleotide level has become pivotal for advancing this field. However, visualizing these modifications, particularly in cohorts of more than a few individuals, remains a challenge.

RESULTS: Here, we present methylmap, a tool developed to visualize modified nucleotide frequencies for regions of interest, specifically optimized for cohort sizes with more than a few individuals. Furthermore, methylmap features the visualization of the haplotype-specific methylation status of 226 individuals of the 1000 Genomes Project ONT Sequencing Consortium, sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION. This resource provides the research community with a comprehensive and complete overview of genome-wide methylation patterns.

CONCLUSIONS: Methylmap offers an easy-to-use platform to facilitate epigenetic research. It is available both as a web application at https://methylmap.bioinf.be and as a command-line tool through Bioconda and PyPI. As such, we provide a valuable resource for advancing the understanding of epigenetic modifications in health and disease.
authors: Elise Coopman, Svenn D'Hert, Rosa Rademakers, Wouter De Coster

ai.TLDR: 随着表观遗传学研究的深入，甲基化模式的可视化成为关键。methylmap工具解决了大群体数据的甲基化分析难题，提供全面的全基因组甲基化视图。该平台通过Web应用和命令行工具双模式发布，助力表观遗传学研究。
ai.translation:
背景：近年来，表观遗传学领域对核苷酸修饰的研究兴趣日益增长，这些修饰在健康与疾病中的作用逐渐被认可。理解核苷酸水平的甲基化模式已成为推动该领域发展的关键。然而，在超过少数个体的群体中可视化这些修饰仍是一个挑战。

结果：本文介绍了methylmap工具，该工具专门用于可视化感兴趣区域的修饰核苷酸频率，特别优化用于处理超过少数个体的群体数据。此外，methylmap还展示了1000 Genomes Project ONT Sequencing Consortium中226名个体的等位基因特异性甲基化状态，这些个体通过牛津纳米孔技术PromethION进行测序。该资源为研究社区提供了全面且完整的全基因组甲基化模式概览。

结论：methylmap提供了一个易于使用的平台，促进表观遗传学研究。该工具可通过https://methylmap.bioinf.be的Web应用和Bioconda/PyPI的命令行工具获取。因此，我们为推进健康与疾病中表观遗传修饰的理解提供了有价值的资源。

title: Pathogen Diagnostic Value of Nanopore Sequencing in Postoperative Central Nervous System Infections.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: To evaluate the diagnostic performance of nanopore sequencing in postoperative central nervous system infections (PCNSIs).

METHODS: A total of 34 patients with suspected PCNSIs after craniocerebral surgery were included from the Aviation General Hospital between June 2022 and October 2023. Cerebrospinal fluid samples were collected immediately. Clinical information was gathered for all patients, and tests including blood routine examination, biochemical analysis, microbial culture, metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS), and nanopore sequencing were performed. Relevant data were compiled.

RESULTS: Among 34 patients suspected of PCNSIs, nanopore sequencing identified specific pathogenic sequences in 27 (79.41% positivity), surpassing both mNGS (73.53%) and microbial culture (55.88%). Compared to microbial culture and mNGS, nanopore sequencing demonstrated superior sensitivity (79.41%) and diagnostic performance, thereby minimizing the missed diagnosis rate of microbial culture (36.67% vs. 11.76%). Nanopore sequencing combined with microbial culture shows significant consistency with the final clinical diagnosis (K = 0.717, P < 0.05). In contrast, the consistency of using microbial culture alone with the final clinical diagnosis is lower (K = 0.289, P < 0.05), suggesting that microbial culture may have limitations in certain situations.

CONCLUSIONS: Compared to microbial culture and mNGS, nanopore sequencing has a higher pathogen detection rate and a lower missed diagnosis rate. In clinical practice, using nanopore sequencing as a supplement to microbial culture can aid in the diagnosis of PCNSIs.
authors: Dongcheng Xie, Yiran Liu, Wenkai Cong, Guanghong Qi, Cangshan Mu

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估纳米孔测序在术后中枢神经系统感染（PCNSI）诊断中的性能。通过对比微生物培养和mNGS，纳米孔测序展现出更高的病原体检出率（79.41%）和诊断准确性，显著降低漏诊率。结果表明纳米孔测序与临床诊断一致性更高（K=0.717），优于单独使用微生物培养（K=0.289）。
keywords: 术后中枢神经系统感染
ai.translation:
研究目的：评估纳米孔测序在术后中枢神经系统感染（postoperative central nervous system infections, PCNSIs）诊断中的性能。

研究方法：选取2022年6月至2023年10月期间航空医学中心收治的34例疑似PCNSI患者。术中立即采集脑脊液样本，收集所有患者临床信息，并进行血常规检查、生化分析、微生物培养、宏基因组下一代测序（metagenomic next-generation sequencing, mNGS）和纳米孔测序检测，整理相关数据。

研究结果：在34例疑似PCNSI患者中，纳米孔测序在27例（79.41%阳性率）中检测到特异性病原序列，高于mNGS（73.53%）和微生物培养（55.88%）。与微生物培养和mNGS相比，纳米孔测序表现出更高的敏感性（79.41%）和诊断性能，显著降低微生物培养的漏诊率（36.67% vs. 11.76%）。纳米孔测序联合微生物培养与最终临床诊断一致性显著（K=0.717, P<0.05）。相比之下，单独使用微生物培养与最终诊断一致性较低（K=0.289, P<0.05），提示微生物培养在某些情况下存在局限性。

研究结论：与微生物培养和mNGS相比，纳米孔测序具有更高的病原体检测率和更低的漏诊率。在临床实践中，将纳米孔测序作为微生物培养的补充手段可提高PCNSI的诊断效率。

authors: Johanna Jahnen, Dennis Hanke, Kristina Kadlec, Stefan Schwarz, Henrike Krüger-Haker

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: An improved rapid and sensitive long amplicon method for nanopore-based RSV whole genome sequencing
abstract:
BackgroundWhole-genome sequencing (WGS) provides critical insights into the Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) transmission and any emerging mutations that could impair the efficacy of monoclonal antibodies or vaccines that have been recently licenced for clinical use worldwide. However, the ability to sequence RSV genomes at large scale is limited by expensive and time-consuming sequencing methods. Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) offers significant improvements in next generation sequencing (NGS) both in turnaround time and cost, compared to other platforms for viral WGS.

MethodsWe have developed and modified an RSV long amplicon-based WGS protocol for the ONT platform using a one-step multiplex RT-PCR assay and the rapid library barcoding kit. 135 RSV positive Australian clinical specimens (91 RSV-A and 44 RSV-B) sampled in 2023 with Cycle threshold (Ct) values between 14 to 35 were tested in this study. This ONT workflow was compared with other recent RSV WGS amplification assays based on short amplicons.

ResultsA PCR amplicon clean-up step prior to library preparation significantly improved WGS result for samples with poor amplicon generation, but it is not necessary or beneficial for ones that generated high concentrations of amplicons. Overall, a success rate of 85.9% was achieved for WGS. This method performed as well as the more complex short amplicon methods in terms of genome coverage and sequencing depth.

ConclusionsThe workflow described here was highly successful in generating RSV WGS on ONT platform and had improved turnaround times and excellent results with RSV clinical samples with Ct values up to 30.
authors: Dong, X.; Edwards, S.; Deng, Y.-M.; Dapat, C.; Hirankitti, A.; Wordsworth, R.; Whitney, P.; Baird, R.; Freeman, K.; Daley, A. J.; Barr, I. G.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于长扩增子的RSV全基因组测序（WGS）方法，利用ONT平台实现高效测序。该方法在Ct值达30的临床样本中表现出85.9%的成功率，且测序深度和覆盖度与传统短扩增子方法相当。
ai.translation:
背景：全基因组测序（WGS）为分析呼吸道合胞病毒（RSV）传播及可能影响单克隆抗体或疫苗效力的新兴突变提供了关键洞察。然而，大规模RSV基因组测序受限于昂贵且耗时的测序方法。Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）相比其他病毒WGS平台，在测序速度和成本方面显著提升了下一代测序（NGS）性能。

方法：我们开发并优化了一种基于长扩增子的RSV WGS协议，采用一步式多重RT-PCR检测和快速库条码试剂盒，用于ONT平台。本研究测试了2023年采集的135份澳大利亚RSV阳性临床样本（91份RSV-A和44份RSV-B），Ct值在14至35之间。该ONT工作流程与基于短扩增子的其他近期RSV WGS扩增检测方法进行了比较。

结果：在库制备前进行PCR扩增子清理步骤显著提升了低扩增子生成样本的WGS结果，但对高扩增子浓度样本并非必要或有益。总体成功率达85.9%。该方法在基因组覆盖度和测序深度方面与更复杂的短扩增子方法表现相当。

结论：本研究描述的工作流程在ONT平台上成功实现了RSV WGS，具有更短的周转时间，并在Ct值达30的RSV临床样本中取得了优异结果。

title: Episodic headaches and cognitive decline: uncovering neuronal intranuclear inclusion disease in a young patient.
abstract: A male in his 20s presented with episodic headache and subsequently developed episodic unilateral weakness, dysphasia and encephalopathy. These paroxysmal episodes persisted over time with the development of background cognitive impairment and neuropsychiatric symptoms. MRI surveillance demonstrated progressive T2 hyperintensity with focal cortical oedema correlating to symptoms observed during clinical episodes.Genetic testing for hemiplegic migraine, mitochondrial encephalomyopathy with lactic acidosis and stroke-like episodes along with exome sequencing and high-density microarray did not reveal a cause for the clinical phenotype. The diagnosis of neuronal intranuclear inclusion disease (NIID) was confirmed by the detection of large guanine-guanine-cytosine repeat expansion in the Notch 2 N-terminal-like C gene using long-read nanopore sequencing.NIID is a genetic neurodegenerative disease, more common in Asian populations. It can present with a varied neurological phenotype, including an episodic event type that can mimic hemiplegic migraine and encephalopathy. This case report highlights the importance of considering NIID in cases of paroxysmal headache and encephalopathy.
authors: Matthew Shrimpton, Yvette Paula Gasser, Adrienne Sexton, Abhishek Malhotra

ai.TLDR: 一名20多岁男性因发作性头痛发展为单侧无力、失语和脑病，MRI显示T2高信号和皮质水肿。基因检测未发现病因，长读长测序确认为神经元胞质内包涵体病(NIID)。该病例强调NIID在发作性头痛和脑病中的诊断价值。
keywords: 神经元胞质内包涵体病(NIID)
线粒体脑肌病伴乳酸血症和卒中样发作
ai.translation: 一名20多岁的男性患者出现发作性头痛，随后发展为发作性单侧无力、失语和脑病。这些发作性症状随时间推移持续存在，并伴随背景认知功能障碍和神经精神症状。MRI动态监测显示T2加权像高信号和局灶性皮质水肿，与临床发作期观察到的症状相关。针对偏瘫性偏头痛、线粒体脑肌病伴乳酸血症和卒中样发作的基因检测，以及外显子组测序和高密度微阵列分析均未发现临床表型的病因。通过长读长纳米孔测序检测到Notch 2 N-terminal-like C基因的大型鸟嘌呤-鸟嘌呤-胞嘧啶重复扩增，最终确诊为神经元胞质内包涵体病(NIID)。NIID是一种遗传性神经退行性疾病，在亚洲人群更为常见，可表现为多种神经系统表型，包括可模拟偏瘫性偏头痛和脑病的发作性事件类型。该病例报告强调在发作性头痛和脑病病例中应考虑NIID的诊断。

title: ModiDeC: a multi-RNA modification classifier for direct nanopore sequencing
abstract: RNA modifications play a crucial role in various cellular functions. Here, we present ModiDeC, a deep-learning-based classifier able to identify and distinguish multiple RNA modifications (N6-methyladenosine, inosine, pseudouridine, 2'-O-methylguanosine, and N1-methyladenosine) using direct RNA sequencing. Alongside ModiDeC, we provide an extensive database of in vitro-transcribed and synthetic sequences generated with both the new RNA004 chemistry and the old RNA002 kit. We show that RNA modifications can be accurately recognized and distinguished across different sequence motifs using synthetic data as well as in HEK293T cells and human blood samples. ModiDeC comes with a graphical user interface that allows easy customization and adaptation to specific research questions, such as learning and classifying additional RNA modifications and further sequence motifs. The reproducibility across samples, together with the low rate of false positives, underscores the potential of ModiDeC as a powerful tool for advancing the analysis of epitranscriptomes and RNA modification.
authors: Alagna, N.; Muendnich, S.; Miedema, J.; Pastore, S.; Lehmann, L.; Wierczeiko, A.; Friedrich, J.; Walz, L.; Joerg, M.; Butto, T.; Friedland, K.; Helm, M.; Gerber, S.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了ModiDeC深度学习分类器，可准确识别多种RNA修饰类型。通过合成数据和HEK293T细胞、人血样本来验证方法有效性，展示了其在表观转录组分析中的潜力。
ai.translation: RNA修饰在多种细胞功能中起关键作用。本文提出ModiDeC，一种基于深度学习的分类器，能够通过直接RNA测序识别和区分多种RNA修饰（N6-甲基腺苷、肌苷、假尿苷、2'-O-甲基鸟苷和N1-甲基腺苷）。我们同时提供了由新型RNA004化学方法和旧版RNA002试剂盒生成的体外转录及合成序列的全面数据库。研究显示，通过合成数据以及HEK293T细胞和人类血液样本，RNA修饰可被准确识别和区分不同序列基序。ModiDeC配备图形用户界面，便于用户根据具体研究问题进行定制化调整，如学习和分类额外的RNA修饰及扩展序列基模。其跨样本的可重复性及低假阳性率，凸显了其作为推进表观转录组和RNA修饰分析的强大工具的潜力。

title: Applying nanopore sequencing in the etiological diagnosis of bloodstream infection.
abstract: Bloodstream infection (BSI) is a systemic infectious disease that can lead to shock, disseminated intravascular coagulation, multiorgan failure, and even death. Blood culture is considered the gold standard for the etiological diagnosis of BSI; however, blood culture is time-consuming and has a low positivity rate, which has limited its utility for early and rapid clinical diagnosis. Nanopore sequencing technology (NST), a third-generation sequencing method, offers rapid detection, real-time single-molecule sequencing, and ultra-long reads. These features enable the prompt detection of pathogens and the analysis of drug-resistant genes and genomic characteristics, thereby optimizing the clinical diagnosis and treatment of BSI. In this article, we summarize the application of NST in the etiological diagnosis of BSI.
authors: Yiqun Liao, Junjie Gong, Xiaoling Wang, Puwen Chen, Qinxing Chi, Xiaohong Chen

ai.TLDR: 血流感染（BSI）是一种可能导致休克、多器官衰竭甚至死亡的全身性感染疾病。传统血培养方法存在耗时长、阳性率低的局限性，而纳米孔测序技术（NST）通过快速检测和超长读长等优势，显著提升了BSI的病原体识别和耐药基因分析效率。
ai.translation: 血流感染（Bloodstream infection, BSI）是一种系统性感染性疾病，可能引发休克、弥散性血管内凝血、多器官功能衰竭，甚至导致死亡。血培养目前被认为是BSI病原学诊断的金标准；然而，该方法存在耗时较长且阳性率较低的局限性，这在早期快速临床诊断中受到一定制约。纳米孔测序技术（Nanopore sequencing technology, NST）作为第三代测序技术，具有快速检测、实时单分子测序和超长读长等特性。这些优势使得病原体的及时识别、耐药基因及基因组特征的分析成为可能，从而优化BSI的临床诊断与治疗方案。本文总结了NST在BSI病原学诊断中的应用价值。

title: Phased genome assemblies and pangenome graphs of human populations of Japan and Saudi Arabia.
abstract: The selection of a reference sequence in genome analysis is critical, as it serves as the foundation for all downstream analyses. Recently, the pangenome graph has been proposed as a data model that incorporates haplotypes from multiple individuals. Here we present JaSaPaGe, a pangenome graph reference for Saudi Arabian and Japanese populations, both of which have been significantly underrepresented in previous genomic studies. We constructed JaSaPaGe from high-quality phased diploid assemblies which were made utilizing PacBio high-fidelity long reads, Nanopore long reads, and Hi-C short reads of 9 Saudi and 10 Japanese individuals. Quality evaluation of the pangenome graph by variant calling showed that our pangenome outperformed earlier linear reference genomes (GRCh38 and T2T-CHM13) and showed comparable performance to the pangenome graph provided by the Human Pangenome Reference Consortium (HPRC), with more variants found in Japanese and Saudi samples using their population-specific pangenomes. This pangenome reference will serve as a valuable resource for both the research and clinical communities in Japan and Saudi Arabia.
authors: Maxat Kulmanov, Saeideh Ashouri, Yang Liu, Marwa Abdelhakim, Ebtehal Alsolme, Masao Nagasaki, Yasuyuki Ohkawa, Yutaka Suzuki, Rund Tawfiq, Katsushi Tokunaga, Toshiaki Katayama, Malak S Abedalthagafi, Robert Hoehndorf, Yosuke Kawai

ai.TLDR: 本研究构建了沙特阿拉伯和日本人群的泛基因组图谱JaSaPaGe，解决了传统线性参考基因组在群体特异性变异检测中的局限性。通过整合高保真长读长测序和Hi-C数据，该图谱在变异检测能力上超越了GRCh38和T2T-CHM13参考基因组。
ai.translation: 在基因组分析中，参考序列的选择至关重要，因为它构成了所有下游分析的基础。近期提出的泛基因组图谱作为一种数据模型，能够整合多个个体的等位基因信息。本文介绍了JaSaPaGe，这是专为沙特阿拉伯和日本人群设计的泛基因组图谱，这两个群体在以往的基因组研究中代表性不足。我们利用PacBio高保真长读长测序、Nanopore长读长测序以及9名沙特和10名日本个体的Hi-C短读长测序数据，构建了高质量的相位二倍体组装体。通过变异检测对泛基因组图谱进行质量评估的结果显示，我们的泛基因组在变异检测能力上超越了早期的线性参考基因组（GRCh38和T2T-CHM13），其性能与人类泛基因组参考联盟（HPRC）提供的泛基因组图谱相当，且在使用群体特异性泛基因组时，日本和沙特样本中检测到的变异数量更多。该泛基因组参考图谱将为日本和沙特阿拉伯的研究及临床社区提供宝贵的资源。

title: Unveiling mismatch of RTS S AS01 and R21 Matrix M malaria vaccines haplotype among Ethiopian Plasmodium falciparum clinical isolates.
abstract: Malaria vaccines, RTS, S/AS01 and R21/Matrix which are based on the Plasmodium falciparum circumsporozoite protein (Pfcsp) have been approved by WHO for broad use in children in Africa. However, the extensive genetic diversity of Pfcsp limited its effectiveness, as vaccine efficacy reduced against non-vaccine strains. Using Oxford Nanopore Technology, we conducted amplicon sequencing of the full-length Pfcsp gene from 96 clinical isolates collected from three health centers in Ethiopia and compared the results against a reference genome. The result showed absence of population differentiation among the Ethiopian isolates. The N-terminal region was relatively conserved, with a KLKQP motif was present across all isolates. However, mutation at position A98G and an insertion of amino acids (DGNNNNGDNGREGKDEDKR) were identified in this region. The number of NANP and NVDP repeats of the central region per haplotype ranged from 39 to 42. Additionally, the Th2R and Th3R epitopes in the C-terminal region exhibited extensive polymorphism with at least one amino acid substitution compared to the reference strains. Notably, none of the Ethiopian Pfcsp haplotypes matched the vaccine haplotype. Furthermore, haplotype network and phylogenetic tree analyses shown considerable similarity among local and global isolates. The findings of this study revealed a high Pfcsp genetic diversity highlighting the need for further studies to inform allele selection for universal or region-specific vaccine development as this may influence vaccine efficacy.
authors: Aynalem Mandefro, Alebachew Messele Kebede, Mitchel Katsvanga, Fatoumatta Cham, Eniyou Oriero, Alfred Amambua-Ngwa, Lemu Golassa

ai.TLDR: 疟疾疫苗RTS,S/AS01和R21/Matrix基于恶性疟原虫环孢子虫蛋白(Pfcsp)，但其遗传多样性限制了疫苗效果。本研究通过扩增测序分析埃塞俄比亚96株临床分离株的Pfcsp基因，发现该区域存在显著多态性且无疫苗单倍型匹配，提示需进一步研究以优化疫苗设计。
ai.translation: 基于恶性疟原虫环孢子虫蛋白(Pfcsp)的疟疾疫苗RTS,S/AS01和R21/Matrix已获WHO批准用于非洲儿童广泛接种。然而Pfcsp的广泛遗传多样性限制了疫苗效果，因疫苗效力对非疫苗株显著下降。本研究采用牛津纳米孔技术，对来自埃塞俄比亚三家医疗机构的96株临床分离株进行全长Pfcsp基因扩增测序，并与参考基因组进行比对。结果显示埃塞俄比亚分离株间未见种群分化，N端区域相对保守，KLKQP基序在所有分离株中均存在。但该区域发现A98G突变及氨基酸插入序列(DGNNNNGDNGREGKDEDKR)。中央区域NANP和NVDP重复次数在不同单倍型中范围为39-42次。此外，C端区域的Th2R和Th3R表位表现出广泛多态性，与参考株相比至少存在一个氨基酸替换。值得注意的是，埃塞俄比亚所有Pfcsp单倍型均未匹配疫苗单倍型。单倍型网络及系统发育树分析显示本地与全球分离株具有显著相似性。本研究结果揭示了Pfcsp的高遗传多样性，提示需进一步研究以指导通用或区域特异性疫苗的等位基因选择，这可能影响疫苗效力。

title: Blueprint of a pandemic: Insights from SARS-CoV-2 genomics surveillance in Meghalaya, India.
abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic uncovered several lacunae in healthcare systems exposing global unpreparedness and triggering unprecedented challenges worldwide- necessitating a shift towards mitigation and robust surveillance strategies. Here, we report the use of Whole Genome Sequencing (WGS) to detect SARS-CoV-2 variants in clinical samples of Meghalaya, India, using Oxford Nanopore Technology. SARS-CoV-2 positive samples collected from various districts of Meghalaya from August 2021 to May 2023 were subjected to WGS. Out of a total of 965 samples, Alpha (0.1 %), Delta (47.2 %) and Omicron (52.7 %) variants were detected. The Delta variant affected 53 % of individuals under the age of 18 years, while the Omicron sub variant BA.2 affected all age groups in a similar manner. The study underscores the efficacy of using a user-friendly sequencing device coupled with simplified bioinformatics, enabling remote regions to effectively combat Covid-19. This approach, characterized by rapidity, simplicity and accuracy, holds promise in confronting future health crises.
authors: Phibangipan Warjri, Olisha Sumer, Leader Langbang, Aesukwanmi Kynta, Daminot Pyngrope

ai.TLDR: 新冠疫情暴露了全球医疗体系的不足，促使向缓解和强化监测策略转变。本研究利用全基因组测序技术检测印度梅加拉亚邦临床样本中的SARS-CoV-2变种，发现主要为Delta和Omicron变种，且Omicron BA.2影响所有年龄组。
ai.translation: 新冠疫情暴露了全球医疗体系的不足，显示出全球应对疫情的准备不足，并引发了前所未有的全球性挑战，这促使向缓解和强化监测策略转变。在此，我们报告了在印度梅加拉亚邦使用全基因组测序（Whole Genome Sequencing, WGS）技术检测临床样本中SARS-CoV-2变种的应用，采用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technology）。从2021年8月至2023年5月，梅加拉亚邦各地区的SARS-CoV-2阳性样本被进行全基因组测序。在总共965个样本中，检测到Alpha变种（0.1 %）、Delta变种（47.2 %）和Omicron变种（52.7 %）。Delta变种影响了53 %的18岁以下个体，而Omicron的亚变种BA.2则以相似的方式影响了所有年龄组。该研究强调了使用用户友好型测序设备结合简化生物信息学分析的有效性，使偏远地区能够有效应对新冠疫情。这种以快速、简便和准确为特点的方法，在应对未来的健康危机方面展现出潜力。

title: Technical and Biological Biases in Bulk Transcriptomic Data Mining for Cancer Research.
abstract: Cancer research has been significantly advanced by the integration of transcriptomic data through high-throughput sequencing technologies like RNA sequencing (RNA-seq). This paper reviews the transformative impact of transcriptomics on understanding cancer biology, focusing on the use of extensive datasets such as The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) and Genotype-Tissue Expression (GTEx). While transcriptomic data provides crucial insights into gene expression patterns and disease mechanisms, the analysis is fraught with technical and biological biases. Technical biases include issues related to microarray, RNA-seq, and nanopore sequencing methods, while biological biases arise from factors like tumor heterogeneity and sample purity. Additionally, misinterpretations often occur when correlational data is erroneously assumed to imply causality or when bulk data is misattributed to specific cell types. This review emphasizes the need for researchers to understand and mitigate these biases to ensure accurate data interpretation and reliable clinical outcomes. By addressing these challenges, the paper aims to enhance the robustness of cancer research and improve the application of transcriptomic data in developing effective therapies and diagnostic tools.
authors: Hengrui Liu, Yiying Li, Miray Karsidag, Tiffany Tu, Panpan Wang

ai.TLDR: 转录组学通过高通量测序技术如RNA测序（RNA-seq）显著推动了癌症研究的发展。本文综述了转录组学在理解癌症生物学中的变革性影响，重点探讨了TCGA和GTEx等大规模数据集的应用。然而，转录组数据分析面临技术与生物偏倚的挑战，需研究人员理解并减轻这些偏倚以确保准确的数据解释和可靠的临床结果。
ai.translation: 癌症研究通过整合转录组数据，借助高通量测序技术如RNA测序（RNA-seq）得到了显著的推进。本文综述了转录组学在理解癌症生物学中的变革性影响，重点聚焦于使用大规模数据集如癌症基因组图谱（The Cancer Genome Atlas, TCGA）和基因型-组织表达（Genotype-Tissue Expression, GTEx）等。尽管转录组数据为基因表达模式和疾病机制提供了关键的见解，但数据分析过程中存在诸多技术与生物偏倚。技术偏倚包括与微阵列、RNA测序和纳米孔测序方法相关的问题，而生物偏倚则源于诸如肿瘤异质性和样本纯度等因素。此外，当相关性数据被错误地假设为因果关系，或当批量数据被错误地归因于特定细胞类型时，常常会出现误解。本文强调研究人员需要理解并减轻这些偏倚，以确保准确的数据解释和可靠的临床结果。通过应对这些挑战，本文旨在增强癌症研究的稳健性，并改善转录组数据在开发有效疗法和诊断工具中的应用。

title: Metagenomic detection and genome assembly of novel PRRSV-2 strain using Oxford Nanopore Flongle flow cell.
abstract:
Porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus (PRRSV) is the causative agent of a syndrome characterized by reproductive failure and respiratory complications (PRRS). Early detection and classification of PRRSV strains are vital for appropriate management strategies to minimize loss following outbreaks. The most widely used classification method for PRRSV is based on open reading frame 5 (ORF5) sequences. However, the effectiveness of the ORF5-based classification system in accurately representing genetic variation is under scrutiny because ORF5 constitutes less than 5% of the 15kb-long genome. In this study, a single Oxford Nanopore Flongle flow cell was used to identify and assemble the genome of a strain sampled in May of 2022 from a Midwest research farm. Based on comparisons with available PRRSV genomes, the assembled genome was determined to be a novel PRRSV-2 strain belonging to the 1-4-4 L1C.5 ORF5-based lineage. Phylogenetic analyses of ORF5 and whole-genome sequences demonstrated differences in clustering between PRRSV strains, supporting the inability of ORF5 to capture genome-wide variation. For example, high levels of variation were observed within ORF1a, which encodes the hypervariable nsp2 protein. Comparison of the newly assembled genome with the genome of a highly characterized strain (VR2332 PRRSV-2) identified a 100 amino acid deletion within nsp2 characteristic of NADC34-like PRRSV. Oxford Nanopore Technologies' Flongle flow cell has been proven in this study to provide a rapid, cost-effective and accessible approach for whole-genome sequencing of PRRSV strains present within clinical samples necessary for strain-specific genome-wide characterization.

Porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus (PRRSV) is responsible for a disease characterized by reproductive and respiratory complications in pigs. PRRSV exhibits substantial genetic diversity throughout the genome, so it is important to utilize whole-genome sequencing to accurately depict the full variation present. In this study, a strain of PRRSV affecting a Midwest research farm was sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore platform and a cost-effective Flongle flow cell. The strain identified was determined to belong to the 1-4-4 L1C.5 lineage of PRRSV-2 based on current open reading frame 5 (ORF5) classification, having 98% nucleotide identity at genome level when compared with other available PRRSV strains. Phylogenetic analyses demonstrated that strains classified under an ORF5-based lineage system could cluster outside of their lineage when whole-genome sequences were compared, confirming the importance of whole-genome sequencing for PRRSV classification.
authors: Arabella L Hodges, Lianna R Walker, Talia Everding, Benny E Mote, Hiep L X Vu, Daniel C Ciobanu

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用Oxford Nanopore Flongle流细胞对2022年采集的PRRSV毒株进行全基因组测序，发现ORF5分类系统无法准确反映全基因组变异。研究强调了全基因组测序在PRRSV分类中的重要性。
ai.translation: 猪繁殖与呼吸综合征病毒（PRRSV）是导致猪繁殖失败和呼吸系统并发症的病原体（PRRS）。早期检测和分类PRRSV毒株对于制定适当的管理策略以减少疫情损失至关重要。目前最广泛使用的PRRSV分类方法基于开放阅读框5（ORF5）序列。然而，ORF5基于的分类系统在准确反映遗传变异方面的有效性受到质疑，因为ORF5仅占15kb长基因组的不到5%。在本研究中，使用单个Oxford Nanopore Flongle流细胞对2022年5月从中西部研究农场采集的毒株进行鉴定和基因组组装。通过与现有PRRSV基因组的比较，组装的基因组被确定为一种新型的PRRSV-2毒株，属于1-4-4 L1C.5基于ORF5的谱系。ORF5和全基因组序列的系统发育分析显示，不同PRRSV毒株在聚类上存在差异，支持ORF5无法捕捉全基因组变异。例如，在ORF1a中观察到高水平的变异，该区域编码超变体nsp2蛋白。将新组装的基因组与高度表征的毒株（VR2332 PRRSV-2）基因组进行比较，发现nsp2中存在一个100个氨基酸的缺失，这是NADC34样PRRSV的特征。本研究证明，Oxford Nanopore Technologies的Flong,le流细胞为临床样本中PRRSV毒株的全基因组测序提供了一种快速、经济且可访问的方法，这对于毒株特异性全基因组表征是必要的。PRRSV导致猪繁殖和呼吸系统并发症。PRRSV在整个基因组中表现出显著的遗传多样性，因此使用全基因组测序以准确描绘全部变异非常重要。在本研究中，使用Oxford Nanopore平台和经济型Flongle流细胞对影响中西部研究农场的PRRSV毒株进行了测序。根据当前的ORF5分类，鉴定的毒株被确定为属于PRRSV-2的1-4-4 L1C.5谱系，与其他可用的PRRSV毒株在基因组水平上具有98%的核苷酸同源性。系统发育分析表明，根据ORF5分类系统分类的毒株在比较全基因组序列时可能聚类在谱系之外，证实了全基因组测序在PRRSV分类中的重要性。

title: Metabarcoding analysis of oral microbiome during pregnancy.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract: Pregnancy is a dynamic physiological process involving significant hormonal, immune, and metabolic changes to support fetal growth and development. This study investigates the changes in salivary microbiome and biochemical markers from the second to the third trimester of pregnancy. Saliva samples were collected from 45 pregnant women enrolled in the Qatar Birth Cohort study at two time points (second and third trimesters). DNA was extracted and subjected to 16S rRNA gene sequencing using Oxford Nanopore Technology. Microbial diversity and taxonomic analyses were performed, along with correlation analyses between microbial abundance and clinical parameters. Biochemically, significant increases in BMI, pulse rate, HbA1c, LDL, total cholesterol, and triglycerides were observed in the third trimester compared to the second. Microbial diversity analysis revealed significant changes in microbial richness and composition. Taxonomy analysis showed a significant 3-fold increase in Bacteroidota. Also, a significant decline in Selenomonas and a significant increase in Veillonella, specifically Veillonella dispar and Veillonella atypica, as well as an increase in Granulicatella were observed in the third trimester, along with a significant decrease in Streptococcus sanguinis. Correlation analysis during the second trimester revealed positive associations between BMI, cholesterol, LDL, and Selenomonas, and negative correlations with Streptococcus and Gemella. In the third trimester, BMI was negatively correlated with Campylobacter, glucose levels were negatively correlated with Neisseria, and triglyceride levels were negatively correlated with Prevotella. These findings highlight significant biochemical and microbial shifts during pregnancy, underscoring the importance of monitoring oral health and metabolic changes in pregnant women.
authors: Fatiha M Benslimane, Layla I Mohammed, Haya Abu-Hijleh, Sara Suleiman, Sonia Boughattas, Zain Zaki Zakaria, Eleni Fthenou, Maha Al-Asmakh

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了妊娠第二到第三孕期唾液微生物组和生化标志物的变化。结果显示，第三孕期BMI、脉搏率、HbA1c、LDL、总胆固醇和甘油三酯显著升高，同时微生物多样性发生显著变化，Bacteroidota显著增加，而Selenomonas减少，Veillonella和Granulicatella增加，Streptococcus sanguinis减少。
ai.translation: 妊娠是一个动态的生理过程，涉及显著的激素、免疫和代谢变化，以支持胎儿的生长和发育。本研究调查了妊娠第二到第三孕期唾液微生物组和生化标志物的变化。从卡塔尔出生队列研究中招募的45名孕妇在第二和第三孕期分别采集唾液样本。提取DNA后，使用牛津纳米孔技术进行16S rRNA基因测序。进行了微生物多样性及分类学分析，并分析了微生物丰度与临床参数之间的相关性。生化分析显示，第三孕期的BMI、脉搏率、HbA1c、LDL、总胆固醇和甘油三酯均显著高于第二孕期。微生物多样性分析显示微生物丰富度和组成发生了显著变化。分类学分析显示Bacteroidota显著增加了3倍。此外，第三孕期观察到Selenomonas显著减少，Veillonella（特别是Veillonella dispar和Veillonella atypica）以及Granulicatella显著增加，同时Streptococcus sanguinis显著减少。第二孕期的相关性分析显示BMI、胆固醇、LDL与Selenomonas呈正相关，而与Streptococcus和Gemella呈负相关。第三孕期BMI与Campylobacter呈负相关，血糖水平与Neisseria呈负相关，甘油三酯水平与Prevotella呈负相关。这些发现突显了妊娠期间显著的生化和微生物变化，强调了对孕妇口腔健康和代谢变化进行监测的重要性。

title: DNA Sequencing and the Third-Generation Sequencing Revolution
abstract: Since the discovery of the structure of DNA in the 1950s and the invention of DNA sequencing in the 1970s, a huge number of scientific advances driven by breakthroughs made using sequencing technologies have been made. More recently, the advent and advances in second and third generation sequencing technologies have enabled new insights into genomic architecture and variation, and the emerging phenotype. In this chapter, I introduce a brief history of DNA sequencing, the emergence of third generation sequencing, Pac-Bio sequencing, Oxford Nanopore Technology, genome assembly challenges and approaches, and examples of notable genome assembly successes including from several bacterial species. I conclude with a synopsis of the current and upcoming topics driving the sequencing and genome assembly revolution.
authors: Jamie Harrison
citation:
Harrison, J. (2025).  DNA Sequencing and the Third-Generation Sequencing Revolution.

                     In: Farrer, R.A. (eds) Genome Assembly. Methods in Molecular Biology, vol 2955. Humana, New York, NY. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-0716-4702-8_1

ai.TLDR: 自1950年代DNA结构发现以来，测序技术突破推动了大量科学进展。第三代测序技术（如Pac-Bio和Oxford Nanopore）使基因组结构解析和表型研究取得新突破。当前基因组组装技术正面临新挑战，相关进展将重塑测序领域。
ai.translation: 自1950年代DNA结构被发现，1970年代DNA测序技术发明以来，由测序技术突破驱动的大量科学进展不断涌现。近期第二代和第三代测序技术的出现与进步，使我们对基因组结构、变异及新兴表型有了新的认识。本章简要介绍DNA测序技术发展史，重点阐述第三代测序技术（包括Pac-Bio测序和牛津纳米孔技术）的出现，分析基因组组装面临的挑战与解决方案，并通过多种细菌物种的基因组组装成功案例进行说明。最后总结当前推动测序与基因组组装革命的核心议题及未来发展方向。

title: Deployment of Amplicon-Based Sequencing Platforms Using Oxford Nanopore Technologies for the Detection and Surveillance of Trypanosomatids
abstract: This chapter delves into the transformative potential of Amplicon-based sequencing (ABS) by Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) for detecting and surveilling Trypanosomatids, a family of challenging protozoan parasites in medical and veterinary domains. Our focus centers on *T. cruzi* and *Leishmania*. Leveraging ONT’s real-time sequencing and full-length reads, ABS-ONT underscores the importance of precise genomic target selection, evidence-based primer design, and robust PCR standardization for reliable results. We emphasize the significance of high-fidelity, long-read polymerases in ABS, crucial for capturing subtle genetic variations essential for precise genotyping. In remote areas, the field implementation of ABS-ONT could proves invaluable, facilitating on-site diagnostics and surveillance with high resolution and sensitivity. The method’s accuracy offers real-time insights into the prevalence and diversity of Trypanosomatids. We discuss challenges in large-scale ABS implementation, including logistical and ethical considerations, emphasizing the need for collaborative efforts, standardized protocols, and stringent ethical practices. Envisioning ABS as the gold standard for diagnostics and genotyping, we contribute to a comprehensive understanding of Trypanosomatids, guiding data-driven public health decisions. Here, we provide a holistic perspective on advancements in detection and surveillance, showcasing the potential of ONT-ABS platform to revolutionize understanding and pave the way for personalized medicine in a one-health approach in parasitology.
authors: Lissa Cruz-Saavedra, Juan David Ramírez
citation:
Cruz-Saavedra, L., Ramírez, J.D. (2025).  Deployment of Amplicon-Based Sequencing Platforms Using Oxford Nanopore Technologies for the Detection and Surveillance of Trypanosomatids.

                     In: Ramírez González, J.D. (eds) Recent Advances in Parasitomics. Springer, Cham. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-70591-5_1

ai.TLDR: 本章探讨了基于扩增子测序（ABS）技术在锥虫病原体检测与监测中的变革潜力，重点分析了高保真长读长聚合酶在精准分型中的关键作用。该方法通过实时测序和全长度读长，为偏远地区提供现场诊断与高灵敏度监测方案，但需解决大规模实施中的物流与伦理挑战。
ai.translation: 本章深入探讨了牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）基于扩增子的测序（ABS）技术在检测和监测锥虫病原体方面的变革潜力。本研究聚焦于克氏锥虫（T. cruzi）和利什曼原虫（Leishmania）等在医学和兽医领域具有挑战性的原生动物寄生虫。通过利用ONT的实时测序和全长度读长技术，ABS-ONT强调了精确基因组靶标选择、基于证据的引物设计以及稳健PCR标准化对获得可靠结果的重要性。我们特别强调高保真长读长聚合酶在ABS中的关键作用，这对于捕获对精准分型至关重要的细微遗传变异至关重要。在偏远地区，ABS-ONT的现场实施将证明其价值，能够实现高分辨率和高灵敏度的现场诊断与监测。该方法的准确性可提供关于锥虫病原体流行率和多样性的实时洞察。我们讨论了大规模ABS实施中的挑战，包括物流和伦理考量，强调需要协作努力、标准化协议和严格的伦理实践。展望ABS作为诊断和分型的金标准，我们为全面理解锥虫病原体做出贡献，指导数据驱动的公共卫生决策。本文提供了对检测和监测技术进展的全面视角，展示了ONT-ABS平台在寄生虫学领域推动个性化医疗的潜力。

title: The Road Toward Nanopore Sequencing of Glycosaminoglycans
abstract: Nanopores have emerged as a powerful, label-free technique for single molecule analysis, offering high sensitivity and rapid analysis capabilities. Originally developed for DNA sequencing, nanopores have shown promise not only for the characterization of other biomolecules, such as RNA, proteins, and glycans but also of small inorganic compounds, such as nanoparticles. Glycosaminoglycans (GAGs) are a linear, highly charged subclass of glycans, which play essential roles in cell signaling, tissue development, and inflammation processes. The immense structural complexity of GAGs involving unique sulfation patterns renders their analysis challenging. This chapter provides a comprehensive overview on the application of biological and solid-state nanopores for the analysis of GAGs.
authors: Wesley Pietsch, Tom Schumann, ... Michael Götze
citation:
Pietsch, W., Schumann, T., Safferthal, M., Geue, N., Pagel, K., Götze, M. (2025).  The Road Toward Nanopore Sequencing of Glycosaminoglycans.

                     In: Pfrengle, F., Pagel, K., Tauber, R. (eds) Complex Carbohydrates in Health and Disease. Handbook of Experimental Pharmacology, vol 288. Springer, Cham. https://doi.org/10.1007/164_2025_750

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术作为一种无标记单分子分析方法，凭借高灵敏度和快速分析能力，在DNA测序领域取得突破，并拓展至RNA、蛋白质等生物分子及无机纳米颗粒的检测。糖胺聚糖（GAGs）因独特的硫酸化模式导致结构复杂性，其分析面临挑战，本章系统综述了生物纳米孔与固态纳米孔在GAG分析中的应用进展。
ai.translation: 纳米孔技术已发展为一种强大的无标记单分子分析方法，具有高灵敏度和快速分析能力。该技术最初用于DNA测序，现已展现出在其他生物分子（如RNA、蛋白质和糖类）以及无机小分子（如纳米颗粒）表征中的应用潜力。糖胺聚糖（GAGs）作为线性高度带电的糖类亚类，在细胞信号传导、组织发育和炎症过程中发挥关键作用。其结构复杂性源于独特的硫酸化模式，使得分析面临显著挑战。本章系统综述了生物纳米孔与固态纳米孔在糖胺聚糖分析中的应用进展。

title: The Cancer Genome in the Long Reads Era
abstract: Cancer genomics, driven by advancements in sequencing technologies, is rapidly transforming our understanding of tumor biology. The advent of high-throughput short-read sequencing technologies has enabled a paradigm shift in cancer genomics, providing unprecedented resolution of mutations that drive tumorigenesis. Initially, short-read sequencing dominated the field, revealing the repertoire of mutational signatures and the complexities of tumor heterogeneity. However, the inherent limitations of short-read sequencing, particularly in resolving complex structural variations and repetitive regions, underscored the need for alternative approaches. This chapter delves into the transformative potential of long-read sequencing in overcoming these limitations, ushering in a new era for cancer genomics. By spanning larger genomic regions, long-reads offer a more comprehensive view of structural variations, phasing information, and complex rearrangements, crucial for deciphering the evolutionary trajectories of cancer. Furthermore, the chapter examines the dynamics of somatic evolution, comparing Darwinian and non-Darwinian frameworks, and discusses how these models inform our understanding of cancer progression which have implications for cancer therapies. Finally, a bioinformatics workflow, leveraging long-read sequencing data, is outlined to enable the identification of cancer-associated mutations. Integrating cutting-edge sequencing technologies with advanced computational approaches is essential for accelerating oncological research and improving cancer therapies. Long-read sequencing is poised to unveil the complex genomic architecture of cancers, potentially leading to more precise and effective treatments.
authors: Luca Ermini
citation:
Ermini, L. (2025).  The Cancer Genome in the Long Reads Era.

                     In: Farrer, R.A. (eds) Genome Assembly. Methods in Molecular Biology, vol 2955. Humana, New York, NY. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-0716-4702-8_15

ai.TLDR: 癌症基因组学因测序技术进步而发生范式转变，长读长测序技术通过解析复杂结构变异和进化轨迹，为癌症治疗提供新方向。该技术通过覆盖更大基因组区域，显著提升了对肿瘤异质性和体细胞进化的理解。
ai.translation: 癌症基因组学在测序技术进步的推动下，正迅速改变我们对肿瘤生物学的理解。高通量短读长测序技术的出现实现了癌症基因组学的范式转变，为驱动肿瘤发生的关键突变提供了前所未有的解析分辨率。早期短读长测序技术主导了该领域，揭示了突变特征谱系和肿瘤异质性的复杂性。然而，短读长测序在解析复杂结构变异和重复区域时存在固有局限性，凸显了需要替代方法的必要性。本章深入探讨长读长测序技术在克服这些局限性方面的变革潜力，标志着癌症基因组学的新时代。通过覆盖更大的基因组区域，长读长测序能够更全面地解析结构变异、相位信息和复杂重排，这对解析癌症的进化轨迹至关重要。此外，本章还分析了体细胞进化的动态特性，比较了达尔文框架与非达尔文框架，并讨论这些模型如何影响我们对癌症进展的理解，进而影响癌症治疗策略。最后，本章概述了一个利用长读长测序数据的生物信息学工作流程，以识别癌症相关突变。将尖端测序技术与先进计算方法相结合，是加速肿瘤学研究和改进癌症治疗的关键。长读长测序有望揭示癌症的复杂基因组架构，可能带来更精准有效的治疗方案。

title: Current Advances in Genetic Detection and Nanopore Sequencing of Peste des Petits Ruminants Virus
abstract: Peste des petits ruminants (PPR), also known as sheep and goat plague, is the deadliest disease affecting the small ruminant industry and a threat to biodiversity conservation caused by peste des petits ruminants virus (PPRV). Effective elimination of the virus will be mainly supported by the availability of effective vaccines and a wide spectrum of accurate and rapid diagnostic tools. In the light of Global PPR Control and Eradication Programme of 2030, rapid and functional molecular diagnostic tools were actively developed between 1989 and 2019, to allow detailed monitoring of any ongoing PPRV epidemics. The development and use of ultra-rapid reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) and its variants and nucleotide sequencing methods is further improving the arsenal of molecular genomic diagnosis of PPR. For instance, in-depth genomic data were mainly generated using Sanger dideoxynucleotide cycle sequencing method and now are being produced using Illumina and recently Oxford nanopore next-generation sequencing technologies due to their higher throughput capabilities, fast turnaround time and lower sequencing costs per sample. This has increased sequence dataset to over 1,800 PPRV nucleotide sequences in the public databases, permitting for more robust and more complex phylogenetic analyses although sequences from non-domestic animals and atypical hosts remain rare. This chapter is elucidating new trends in the field of molecular diagnosis of PPR, with special regard to modern trends in molecular detection and next-generation sequencing.
authors: Edson Kinimi, Richard Kock, ... Gerald Misinzo
citation:
Kinimi, E., Kock, R., Hakizimana, J.N., Mahapatra, M., Parida, S., Misinzo, G. (2025).  Current Advances in Genetic Detection and Nanopore Sequencing of Peste des Petits Ruminants Virus.

                     In: Munir, M., Abubakar, M. (eds) Peste des Petits Ruminants Virus. Birkhäuser Advances in Infectious Diseases. Springer, Cham. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-82214-8_10

ai.TLDR: 小反刍兽疫（PPR）是威胁畜牧业和生物多样性的重要传染病，其病毒（PPRV）的快速诊断工具和疫苗研发是控制疫情的关键。通过下一代测序技术，PPRV的基因组数据已超过1800条，推动了更复杂的系统发育分析。
ai.translation: 小反刍兽疫（PPR），也称为羊瘟和山羊瘟疫，是影响小反刍动物产业最致命的疾病，同时也是由小反刍兽疫病毒（PPRV）引发的威胁生物多样性保护的疾病。有效消除该病毒主要依赖于有效疫苗的可获得性以及广泛谱系的快速准确诊断工具。根据2030年全球PPR控制与根除计划，1989年至2019年间积极开发了快速且功能性的分子诊断工具，以实现对任何持续PPRV疫情的详细监测。超快速逆转录聚合酶链反应（RT-PCR）及其变体和核苷酸测序方法的开发与应用，进一步增强了PPR的分子基因组诊断手段。例如，最初主要使用Sanger双脱氧核苷酸循环测序法生成深度基因组数据，现在则采用Illumina和近期的Oxford纳米孔下一代测序技术，因其具有更高的通量能力、更快的周转时间和每样本更低的测序成本。这使得公共数据库中的PPRV核苷酸序列数据集已超过1800条，允许进行更稳健且复杂的系统发育分析，尽管非家养动物和非典型宿主的序列仍较为罕见。本章阐述了PPR分子诊断领域的新兴趋势，特别关注分子检测技术和下一代测序的现代发展。

title: Shedding light on DNA methylation and its clinical implications: the impact of long-read-based nanopore technology
abstract: DNA methylation is an essential epigenetic mechanism for regulation of gene expression, through which many physiological (X-chromosome inactivation, genetic imprinting, chromatin structure and miRNA regulation, genome defense, silencing of transposable elements) and pathological processes (cancer and repetitive sequences-associated diseases) are regulated. Nanopore sequencing has emerged as a novel technique that can analyze long strands of DNA (long-read sequencing) without chemically treating the DNA. Interestingly, nanopore sequencing can also extract epigenetic status of the nucleotides (including both 5-Methylcytosine and 5-hydroxyMethylcytosine), and a large variety of bioinformatic tools have been developed for improving its detection properties. Out of all genomic regions, long read sequencing provides advantages in studying repetitive elements, which are difficult to characterize through other sequencing methods. Transposable elements are repetitive regions of the genome that are silenced and usually display high levels of DNA methylation. Their demethylation and activation have been observed in many cancers. Due to their repetitive nature, it is challenging to accurately estimate DNA methylation levels within transposable elements using short sequencing technologies. The advantage to sequence native DNA (without PCR amplification biases or harsh bisulfite treatment) and long and ultra long reads coupled with epigenetic states of the DNA allows to accurately estimate DNA methylation levels in transposable elements. This is a big step forward for epigenomic studies, and unsolved questions regarding gene expression and transposable elements silencing through DNA methylation can now be answered.
authors: Alexandra Chera, Mircea Stancu-Cretu, ... Octavian Bucur
citation: Chera, A., Stancu-Cretu, M., Zabet, N.R. et al. Shedding light on DNA methylation and its clinical implications: the impact of long-read-based nanopore technology. Epigenetics & Chromatin 17 , 39 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13072-024-00558-2

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化作为调控基因表达的关键表观遗传机制，参与多种生理和病理过程。纳米孔测序技术通过长读长和表观遗传状态分析，解决了转座子元素甲基化水平精准评估的难题，为表观基因组学研究带来突破。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化是一种调控基因表达的关键表观遗传机制，通过该机制调控多种生理过程（如X染色体失活、基因印记、染色质结构与miRNA调控、基因组防御、转座子沉默）和病理过程（如癌症及重复序列相关疾病）。纳米孔测序作为一种新型技术，能够无需化学处理直接分析长链DNA（长读长测序）。有趣的是，该技术还可提取核苷酸的表观遗传状态（包括5-甲基胞嘧啶和5-羟甲基胞嘧啶），并已开发出大量生物信息学工具以提升其检测性能。在所有基因组区域中，长读长测序在研究重复元件方面具有优势，而这些元件难以通过其他测序方法表征。转座子元素作为基因组中被沉默的重复区域，通常表现出高水平的DNA甲基化。其去甲基化和激活现象在多种癌症中已被观察到。由于重复性特征，短读长测序技术难以准确评估转座子元素内的DNA甲基化水平。通过原生DNA测序（无需PCR扩增偏差或剧烈亚硫酸氢盐处理）结合长读长和超长读长测序及DNA表观遗传状态，可精准评估转座子元素的甲基化水平。这标志着表观基因组学研究的重大进展，此前关于DNA甲基化调控基因表达及转座子沉默的未解问题得以解答。

title: Nanopore sequencing as a cutting-edge technology for medulloblastoma classification.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Medulloblastoma (MB) is one of the most prevalent embryonal malignant brain tumors. Current classification organizes these tumors into 4 molecular subgroups (WNT, SHH, Group 3, and Group 4 MB). Recently, a comprehensive classification has been established, identifying numerous subtypes, some of which exhibit a poor prognosis. It is critical to establish effective subtyping methods for accurate diagnosis and patient's management that strikes a delicate balance between improving outcomes and minimizing the risk of comorbidities.

METHODS: We evaluated the ability of Nanopore sequencing to provide clinically relevant methylation and copy number profiles of MB. Nanopore sequencing was applied to an EPIC cohort of 44 frozen MB, benchmarked against the gold standard EPIC array, and further evaluated on an integrated diagnosis cohort of 116 MB.

RESULTS: Most MB of both cohorts (42/44; 95.5% and 106/116; 91.4%, respectively) were accurately subgrouped by Nanopore sequencing. Employing Flongle flow cells for 18 MB allowed a more rapid and cost-effective analysis, with 94.4% (17/18) being correctly classified. Nanopore sequencing enabled us to accurately subtype 28/30 (93.3%) MB.

CONCLUSION: This study, conducted on the largest cohort of MB analyzed with Nanopore sequencing to date, establishes the proof of concept that this modern and innovative technology is well-suited for MB classification. Nanopore sequencing demonstrates a robust capacity for precise subtyping of MB, a critical advancement that holds significant potential for enhancing patient stratification in future clinical trials. Its ability to deliver quick and cost-effective results firmly establishes it as a game-changer in the field of MB classification.
authors: Mathilde Filser, Jacob Torrejon, Kevin Merchadou, Christelle Dufour, Elodie Girard, Christine Bourneix, Elisa Lemaître, Tarek Gharsalli, Riwan Brillet, Jennifer Wong, David Gentien, Audrey Rapinat, Nicolas Servant, Alexandre Vasiljevic, Anne Isabelle Bertozzi, Sandra Raimbault, Arnault Tauziede Espariat, Benoit Lhermitte, Cécile Faure-Conter, Céline Icher, Claire Berger, Claude Alain Maurage, Damien Bodet, David Meyronet, Emmanuelle Uro-Coste, Emilie De Carli, Fabien Forest, Gilles Palenzuela, Guillaume Chotard, Guillaume Gauchotte, Helene Sudour, Ludovic Mansuy, Marianna Deparis, Matthias Tallegas, Maxime Faisant, Natacha Entz-Werle, Pascale Varlet, Pierre Leblond, Sophie Michalak-Provost, Stéphanie Proust Houdemont, Valérie Rigau, François Doz, Olivier Delattre, Franck Bourdeaut, Olivier Ayrault, Julien Masliah-Planchon

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了Nanopore测序在髓母细胞瘤（MB）分子分型中的应用，结果显示其在准确分型方面具有高可靠性。该技术能够快速、经济地提供临床相关的甲基化和拷贝数变异信息，为MB的精准诊断和患者管理提供了新的工具。
ai.translation:
背景：髓母细胞瘤（MB）是常见的胚胎性恶性脑肿瘤之一。目前的分类将这些肿瘤分为4个分子亚组（WNT、SHH、Group 3和Group 4 MB）。最近，一种全面的分类方法已被建立，识别出多个亚型，其中一些亚型表现出较差的预后。因此，建立有效的亚型分型方法对于准确诊断和患者管理至关重要，以在提高治疗效果和降低合并症风险之间取得平衡。

方法：我们评估了Nanopore测序在提供MB临床相关甲基化和拷贝数变异图谱方面的能力。Nanopore测序应用于44例冷冻MB的EPIC队列，并与金标准EPIC阵列进行基准比较，进一步在116例MB的整合诊断队列中进行评估。

结果：两个队列中的大多数MB（42/44；95.5%和106/116；91.4%）均被Nanopore测序准确分型。使用Flongle流细胞对18例MB进行分析，实现了更快速且经济的分析，其中94.4%（17/18）被正确分类。Nanopore测序使我们能够准确分型28/30（93.3%）的MB。

结论：本研究是迄今为止使用Nanopore测序分析的最大MB队列，证明了这种现代且创新的技术非常适合MB的分类。Nanopore测序展示了其在MB精确分型方面的强大能力，这是未来临床试验中患者分层的重要进展。其能够快速、经济地提供结果，使其成为MB分类领域的变革性工具。

title: Potential of nanopore sequencing for tuberculosis diagnosis and drug resistance detection
abstract:
### Objectives

This study evaluates the effectiveness of nanopore sequencing for accurate detection of *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* pathogens and drug resistance mutations in clinical specimens.

### Methods

A retrospective analysis of 2,421 specimens from suspected tuberculosis patients admitted to Xi’an Chest Hospital from 2022 to 2023 was conducted, with 131 specimens undergoing via real-time, fluorescence-based quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (qPCR), simultaneous amplification and testing RNA (RNA), Mycobacterium culture, Mycobacterium smear, and nanopore sequencing. Employing clinical tuberculosis diagnoses as the gold standard, sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value, negative predictive value, concordance rate, and Kappa coefficient were measured for the five detection techniques. We compared nanopore sequencing with the Melting Curve method to detect drug-resistant gene mutations.

### Results

Nanopore sequencing has a significantly higher sensitivity (0.786) for tuberculosis diagnosis compared to qPCR (0.411), RNA (0.411), Mycobacterium culture (0.402), and Mycobacterium smear (0.241), against the gold-standard clinical diagnosis. It also exhibited a greater concordance rate (0.809) and Kappa coefficient (0.488), and outperformed the other methods in terms of the area under the ROC curve. Nanopore sequencing surpassed the Melting Curve method in identifying drug-resistant mutations.

### Conclusion

Nanopore sequencing significantly enhances the detection of tuberculosis pathogens and drug-resistant genes.
authors: Fei Ren, JinBao Ma, ... JianYing Li
citation: Ren, F., Ma, J., Dang, L. et al. Potential of nanopore sequencing for tuberculosis diagnosis and drug resistance detection. BMC Infect Dis 24 , 1469 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12879-024-10378-0
description: This study evaluates the effectiveness of nanopore sequencing for accurate detection ofMycobacterium tuberculosispathogens and drug...

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序在临床样本中准确检测结核分枝杆菌病原体及耐药突变的效果。通过对比qPCR、RNA检测、培养和涂片等传统方法，纳米孔测序在敏感性（0.786）和一致性（0.809）方面显著优于其他技术，且在耐药突变检测中表现更优。
ai.translation:
### 目的
本研究评估纳米孔测序在临床样本中准确检测结核分枝杆菌病原体及药物耐受性突变的效果。

### 方法
回顾性分析了2022年至2023年间西安胸科医院收治的2,421例疑似结核病患者样本，其中131例样本通过实时荧光定量聚合酶链反应（qPCR）、RNA检测、结核分枝杆菌培养、涂片检查及纳米孔测序进行同步检测。以临床结核病诊断作为金标准，计算五种检测技术的敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值、阴性预测值、一致性率及Kappa系数，并比较纳米孔测序与熔解曲线法在药物耐药基因突变检测中的表现。

### 结果
与qPCR（0.411）、RNA检测（0.411）、结核分枝杆菌培养（0.402）及涂片检查（0.241）相比，纳米孔测序在结核病诊断中的敏感性显著更高（0.786），且一致性率（0.809）和Kappa系数（0.488）更优，ROC曲线下面积也优于其他方法。纳米孔测序在识别药物耐药突变方面超越了熔解曲线法。

### 结论
纳米孔测序显著提升了结核分枝杆菌病原体及耐药基因的检测能力。

title: A practical DNA data storage using expanded alphabet introducing 5-methylcytosine
abstract:
DNA molecular is a promising next-generation data storage medium. Recently, it has been theoretically proposed that non-natural or modified bases can serve as extra molecular letters to increase the information density. However, the feasibility of the strategy is challenging due to the difficulty in synthesizing and the complex structure of non-natural DNA sequences. Here, we described a practical DNA data storage transcoding scheme named R+ based on expanded molecular alphabet by introducing 5-methlcytosine(5mC). We also demonstrated the experimental validation by encoding one representative file into several 1.3~1.6 kbps in vitro DNA fragments for nanopore sequencing. The results show an average data recovery rate of 98.97% and 86.91% with and without reference respectively. This work validates the practicability of 5mC in DNA storage systems, with a potentially wide range of applications.

Availability & ImplementationR+ is implemented in Python and the code is available under the MIT license at https://github.com/Incpink-Liu/DNA-storage-R_plus
authors: Liu, D.; Xu, D.; Shi, L.; Zhang, J.; Bi, K.; Luo, B.; Liu, C.; Li, Y.; Fan, G.; Wang, W.; Ping, Z.

ai.TLDR: DNA分子作为下一代数据存储介质展现出潜力，通过引入5mC扩展分子字母表提出R+方案，实验验证显示数据恢复率达98.97%。该研究证实了5mC在DNA存储系统中的可行性，为高密度数据存储提供新思路。
ai.translation: DNA分子是一种具有前景的下一代数据存储介质。近期有理论提出，非天然或修饰碱基可作为额外的分子字母，提高信息密度。然而，由于非天然DNA序列的合成难度和复杂结构，该策略的可行性面临挑战。本研究提出基于扩展分子字母表的实用DNA数据存储编码方案R+，通过引入5-甲基胞嘧啶(5mC)实现。我们通过将代表性文件编码为多个1.3~1.6 kbps的体外DNA片段进行纳米孔测序实验验证。结果表明，有无参考序列时数据恢复率分别达到98.97%和86.91%。该工作验证了5mC在DNA存储系统中的实用性，具有广泛的应用前景。Availability & Implementation：R+方案使用Python实现，代码在MIT许可证下开源，地址为https://github.com/Incpink-Liu/DNA-storage-R_plus

title: Development and Comprehensive Evaluation of Culture-Independent, Long Amplicon-Based Targeted Next-Generation Sequencing Methods for Predicting Antimicrobial Resistance in Tuberculosis.
abstract: The great variety of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) profiles among tuberculosis (TB) patients necessitates a comprehensive detection method. This study developed culture-independent, long amplicon-based targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS) methods for predicting AMR across 16 drugs within the Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex (MTBC). Multiplex PCR amplification was employed to enrich 20 gene regions, with sequencing performed on either the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) or Illumina platforms. Customized bioinformatics pipelines provide a streamlined process from raw data to clinician-friendly reports. The ONT tNGS method has been optimized, and its performance has been thoroughly evaluated, utilizing Q20+ chemistry in combination with the R10.4.1 flow cell. It requires only 15 high-quality reads per target gene to accurately identify all variants, with the turnaround time taking 4 h and 50 min. Studies confirmed that this method effectively identifies Mycobacterium species and was highly resistant to interference from other clinical pathogens. To ensure optimal coverage, it is recommended to input at least 500 copies of the genome and sequence 500MB of high-quality FASTQ data. Diagnostic performance evaluations demonstrate that this method achieves 98.35% concordance with phenotypic drug susceptibility testing (pDST) and is consistent with the results obtained from Xpert MTB/RIF assays. The design of long amplicons not only ensures comprehensive coverage of target regions but also simplifies primer design, facilitating compatibility with various sequencing platforms. Compared with previous studies, the optimized ONT tNGS method in this study significantly improves turnaround time, detection accuracy, and the comprehensive coverage of mutations associated with AMR.
authors: Lulu Zhang, Xia Yu, Chi Zhang, Xin Zhang, Hairong Huang, Junping Peng

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于长扩增子的靶向下一代测序(tNGS)方法，用于预测结核分枝杆菌复合体(MTBC)对16种药物的抗微生物耐药性(AMR)。该方法在Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)平台上优化，具有高准确性和快速检测能力。
ai.translation: 结核病患者中抗微生物耐药性(AMR)的多样性需要一种全面的检测方法。本研究开发了一种无培养、基于长扩增子的靶向下一代测序(tNGS)方法，用于预测结核分枝杆菌复合体(MTBC)对16种药物的抗微生物耐药性。通过多重PCR扩增富集了20个基因区域，并在Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)或Illumina平台上进行测序。定制的生物信息学流程提供了一个从原始数据到临床医生友好报告的简化流程。ONT tNGS方法已经优化，并通过Q20+化学和R10.4.1流动池进行了全面评估。该方法仅需每个目标基因15条高质量读取即可准确识别所有变异，检测周转时间为4小时50分钟。研究证实该方法能够有效识别分枝杆菌属，并且对其他临床病原体的干扰具有高度抗性。为确保最佳覆盖，建议输入至少500个基因组拷贝，并测序500MB的高质量FASTQ数据。诊断性能评估表明，该方法与表型药物敏感性测试(pDST)的符合率为98.35%，并且与Xpert MTB/RIF检测结果一致。长扩增子的设计不仅确保了目标区域的全面覆盖，还简化了引物设计，便于与各种测序平台兼容。与以往研究相比，本研究优化的ONT tNGS方法显著提高了检测速度、检测准确性和与AMR相关的突变覆盖范围。

title: Investigating the performance of Oxford Nanopore long-read sequencing with respect to Illumina microarrays and short-read sequencing
abstract: Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-read sequencing (LRS) has emerged as a promising tool for genomic analysis, but comprehensive comparisons with established platforms across diverse datasets remain limited. We present a multi-platform benchmark using 14 human genomes sequenced with ONT LRS, Illumina short-read sequencing (SRS), and Illumina microarrays. Our study evaluates LRS performance for various genetic variants across genomic contexts, while also examining the impact of experimental factors such as multiplexing, depth, and read length. In high-complexity regions, LRS demonstrated competitive yet slightly lower accuracy than SRS for SNV detection (F-measure: 0.954 vs. 0.968), with performance gaps narrowing in low-complexity regions. For indel detection, LRS showed robust performance for small indels (1-5bp) in high-complexity regions (F-measure: 0.869), but accuracy decreased significantly in low-complexity regions and for larger indels. LRS identified 2.86 times more structural variants than SRS, with superior detection of large-scale variations. Sequencing depth strongly influenced variant calling performance across all variant types, while multiplexing effects were minimal after controlling for depth. Our findings provide valuable insights for optimising ONT LRS applications in genomic research and clinical diagnostics.
authors: Santos, R.; Lee, H.; Williams, A.; Baffour-Kyei, A.; Breen, G.; Iacoangeli, A.

ai.TLDR: ONT长读长测序（LRS）在基因组分析中展现出潜力，但缺乏与主流平台的全面对比。本研究通过14个全基因组数据对比，发现LRS在复杂区域SNV检测中准确度略低于SRS（F值0.954 vs 0.968），但结构变异检出量是SRS的2.86倍。
ai.translation: 牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序（LRS）已成为基因组分析的有力工具，但其与主流平台在多样化数据集中的系统性对比仍显不足。本研究采用14个全基因组数据，通过多平台基准测试对比ONT LRS、Illumina短读长测序（SRS）和微阵列平台的性能。研究重点评估LRS在不同基因组背景下的遗传变异检测能力，同时分析实验因素如多重测序、测序深度和读长对结果的影响。在高复杂度区域，LRS的SNV检测准确度（F值0.954）略低于SRS（0.968），但低复杂度区域性能差距缩小。对于插入缺失（indel）检测，LRS在高复杂度区域的小indel（1-5bp）表现稳健（F值0.869），但低复杂度区域和大indel的准确度显著下降。LRS在结构变异检测中表现突出，检出数量是SRS的2.86倍，尤其在大规模变异检测中具有优势。测序深度对所有变异类型检测性能均产生显著影响，而多重测序效应在控制深度后影响可忽略。研究结果为优化ONT LRS在基因组研究和临床诊断中的应用提供了重要参考。

title: Long-read Transcriptomics of Caviid Gammaherpesvirus 1: Compiling a Comprehensive RNA Atlas
abstract:
Caviid gammaherpesvirus 1 (CaGHV-1), formerly known as the guinea pig herpes-like virus, is an oncogenic gammaherpesvirus with a sequenced genome but an as-yet uncharacterized transcriptome. Using nanopore long-read RNA sequencing, we annotated the CaGHV-1 genome and constructed a detailed transcriptomic atlas. Our findings reveal diverse viral mRNAs and non-coding RNAs, along with mapped promoter elements for each viral gene. We demonstrated that the CaGHV-1 RTA lytic cycle transcription factor activates its own promoter, similar to KSHV, and that the CaGHV-1 ORF50 promoter responds to RTA proteins from other gammaherpesviruses, highlighting the evolutionary conservation of RTA-mediated transcriptional mechanisms. Additionally, our analysis uncovered extensive transcriptional overlap within the viral genome, suggesting a role in regulating global gene expression. Given its tumorigenic properties, broad host range, and non-human pathogenicity, this work establishes CaGHV-1 as a promising small animal model for investigating human gammaherpesvirus pathogenesis.

IMPORTANCEThe molecular underpinnings of gammaherpesvirus pathogenesis remain poorly understood, partly due to limited animal models. This study provides the first comprehensive transcriptomic atlas of CaGHV-1, highlighting both coding and non-coding RNAs and revealing regulatory elements that drive viral gene expression. Functional studies of the CaGHV-1 RTA transcription factor demonstrated its ability to self-activate and cross-activate promoters from homologous gammaherpesviruses, reflecting conserved mechanisms of transcriptional control. These findings solidify CaGHV-1 as a unique and versatile small animal model, offering new opportunities to investigate gammaherpesvirus replication, transcriptional regulation, and tumorigenesis in a controlled experimental system.
authors: Boldogkoi, Z.; Torma, G.; Dörmo, A.; Fülöp, A.; Tombacz, D.; Mizik, M.; Pretory, A. M.; Lee, S.-C.; Toth, Z.

ai.TLDR: CaGHV-1作为一种致癌性伽马疱疹病毒，其转录组尚未被表征，研究通过纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术构建了详细的转录组图谱，揭示了病毒mRNA和非编码RNA的多样性。研究发现RTA转录因子通过自激活和跨激活机制调控基因表达，为人类伽马疱疹病毒致病机制研究提供了新的小动物模型。
ai.translation:
Caviid gammaherpesvirus 1 (CaGHV-1)，曾被称为豚鼠疱疹样病毒，是一种具有测序基因组但转录组尚未明确的致癌性伽马疱疹病毒。通过纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术，我们注释了CaGHV-1基因组并构建了详细的转录组图谱。研究发现揭示了多种病毒mRNA和非编码RNA，以及每个病毒基因的启动子元件映射。我们证明CaGHV-1 RTA裂解周期转录因子可激活其自身启动子，类似KSHV，且CaGHV-1 ORF50启动子对其他伽马疱疹病毒的RTA蛋白有响应，突显了RTA介导转录调控的进化保守性。此外，分析发现病毒基因组内存在广泛的转录重叠，提示其在全局基因表达调控中的作用。鉴于其致癌特性、广宿主范围及非人致病性，本研究确立了CaGHV-1作为研究人类伽马疱疹病毒致病机制的有前景的小动物模型。

该研究的重要性在于，伽马疱疹病毒致病机制的分子基础仍不清楚，部分原因是缺乏动物模型。本研究首次提供了CaGHV-1的全面转录组图谱，突出了编码和非编码RNA，并揭示了驱动病毒基因表达的调控元件。对CaGHV-1 RTA转录因子的功能研究证明其可自我激活并跨激活同源伽马疱疹病毒的启动子，反映了转录调控的保守机制。这些发现巩固了CaGHV-1作为独特且多功能的小动物模型地位，为在受控实验系统中研究伽马疱疹病毒复制、转录调控及肿瘤发生提供了新机会。

title: Uncovering the complexity of structural variants in four individuals with autism spectrum disorder.
abstract: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is an increasingly recognized childhood developmental disorder. Despite extensive study, causal variants and molecular diagnosis remain elusive. There is both heterogeneity of the phenotype, as well as the genetic landscape associated with phenotype, which includes both inherited and de novo mutations. Currently, diagnosis is complex and behaviourally based, oftentimes occurring years after the ideal 1-2 years of age. Structural variants (SVs) are large and sometimes complex genomic variants that are likely underrepresented contributors to ASD due to the limitations of short-read DNA sequencing, such as alignment in repetitive regions and regions with GC bias. Here, we performed long-read sequencing (LRS) on four individuals with autism spectrum disorder to delineate SV complexity and determine precise breakpoints for SVs, which was not possible with short-read whole-genome sequencing (SRS). We use LRS to interrogate the methylation pattern associated with the SVs and phase the SV haplotypes to further clarify their contribution to disorder. LRS allows insight into the genome and methylome that allow us to uncover variant complexity and contribution that was previously unseen with SRS. Ultimately, this furthers precision diagnosis and contributes to individualized treatment for affected individuals and their families within the clinic.
authors: Sarah Dada, Katherine Dixon, Vahid Akbari, Cameron J Grisdale, Kristina Calli, Sally Martell, Caralyn Reisle, Amanda Lillico-Ouachour, M E Suzanne Lewis, Steven J M Jones

ai.TLDR: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）是一种日益被认识的儿童发育障碍，其病因和分子诊断仍不明确。本研究通过长读长测序（LRS）分析了四名ASD患者的结构变异（SVs），揭示了其复杂性及精确的断点，为精准诊断和个体化治疗提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）是一种日益被认识的儿童发育障碍。尽管已有大量研究，但其致病变异和分子诊断仍不明确。ASD的表型异质性以及与表型相关的遗传景观包括遗传和新发突变。目前，诊断复杂且基于行为，通常在理想的一到两岁之后才发生。结构变异（SVs）是大型且有时复杂的基因组变异，由于短读长DNA测序的局限性（如重复区域和GC偏倚区域的比对），它们可能是ASD的潜在贡献者。在这里，我们对四名ASD患者进行了长读长测序（LRS），以阐明SV的复杂性并确定SV的精确断点，这在短读长全基因组测序（SRS）中是无法实现的。我们利用LRS来研究与SV相关的甲基化模式，并对SV的等位基因进行分型，以进一步明确其对疾病的影响。LRS使我们能够深入了解基因组和甲基组，从而揭示之前无法通过SRS观察到的变异复杂性及其贡献。最终，这有助于提高诊断的精准度，并为受影响个体及其家庭提供个体化的治疗方案。

title: A rapid approach for linear epitope vaccine profiling reveals unexpected epitope tag immunogenicity
abstract: Antibody epitope profiling is essential for assessing the robustness of vaccine-induced immune responses, particularly while in development. Despite advancements in computational tools, high throughput experimental epitope validation remains an important step. Here, we describe a readily accessible method for rapid linear epitope profiling using phage-displayed oligo pools in combination with Nanopore deep sequencing. We applied this approach to TeeVax3, a Group A Streptococcus vaccine candidate, to investigate the antibody response generated in a pre-clinical rabbit model and assess antigen immunogenicity. Surprisingly, we found a strong bias in antibody binding response towards the N-terminal epitope tag used for purification. These tags are widely reported to have low immunogenicity and are frequently left uncleaved in pre-clinical studies. We further confirmed that the observed immune response against the epitope tag dominated even the conformational binding response and, using synthetic peptides, narrowed the epitope down to a set of 10 residues inclusive of the Histidine residues. Our findings highlight the importance of epitope-tag removal in pre-clinical studies and demonstrate the utility of rapid nanopore sequencing for early-stage vaccine evaluation.
authors: Browne-Cole, K.; Hanning, K.; Beijerling, K.; Rousseau, M.; Loh, J.; Kelton, W.

ai.TLDR: 抗体表位分析对评估疫苗诱导免疫反应的稳定性至关重要。本研究开发了一种基于噬菌体展示寡核苷酸池与纳米孔测序的高通量表位验证方法，应用于TeeVax3疫苗候选物的临床前兔模型研究，发现纯化标签的免疫反应显著高于目标抗原。该成果强调了表位标签去除在疫苗研发中的必要性，并验证了纳米孔测序在早期疫苗评估中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 抗体表位谱型分析对于评估疫苗诱导免疫反应的稳定性至关重要，特别是在疫苗研发阶段。尽管计算工具取得了进展，高通量实验表位验证仍然是关键步骤。本文描述了一种基于噬菌体展示寡核苷酸池与纳米孔深度测序的快速线性表位分析方法。我们将其应用于TeeVax3（A组链球菌疫苗候选物），以研究临床前兔模型中产生的抗体反应并评估抗原的免疫原性。令人惊讶的是，我们发现抗体结合反应对用于纯化的N端表位标签表现出显著偏倚。这些标签普遍被认为免疫原性较低，并且在临床前研究中常未被切割。我们进一步证实，针对表位标签的免疫反应甚至超过了构象结合反应，通过合成肽分析，将表位范围缩小到包含组氨酸残基的10个氨基酸残基。我们的发现强调了临床前研究中去除表位标签的重要性，并展示了纳米孔测序在疫苗早期评估中的应用价值。

title: Long-read genomics reveal extensive nuclear-specific evolution and allele-specific expression in a dikaryotic fungus
abstract: Phased telomere to telomere (T2T) genome assemblies are revolutionising our understanding of long hidden genome biology "dark matter" such as centromeres, rDNA repeats, inter-haplotype variation, and allele specific expression (ASE). Yet insights into dikaryotic fungi that separate their haploid genomes into distinct nuclei is limited. Here we explore the impact of dikaryotism on the genome biology of a long-term asexual clone of the wheat pathogenic fungus Puccinia striiformis f. sp. tritici. We use Oxford Nanopore (ONT) duplex sequencing combined with Hi-C to generate a T2T nuclear-phased assembly with >99.999% consensus accuracy. We show that this fungus has large regional centromeres enriched in LTR retrotransposons, with a single centromeric dip in methylation that suggests one kinetochore attachment site per chromosomes. The centromeres of chromosomes pairs are most often highly diverse in sequence and kinetochore attachment sites are not always positionally conserved. Each nucleus carries a unique array of rDNAs with >200 copies that harbour nucleus-specific sequence variations. The inter-haplotype diversity between the two nuclear genomes is caused by large-scale structural variations linked to transposable elements. Nanopore long-read cDNA analysis across distinct infection conditions revealed pervasive allele specific expression for nearly 20% of all heterozygous gene pairs. Genes involved in plant infection were significantly enriched in ASE genes which appears to be mediated by elevated CpG gene body methylation of the lower expressed pair. This suggests that epigenetically regulated ASE is likely a previously overlooked mechanism facilitating plant infection. Overall, our study reveals how dikaryotism uniquely shapes key eukaryotic genome features.
authors: Tam, R.; Moeller, M.; Luo, R.; Luo, Z.; Jones, A.; Periyannan, S.; Rathjen, J. P.; Schwessinger, B.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过端到端（T2T）基因组组装技术揭示了小麦病原菌Puccinia striiformis f. sp. tritici的二倍体结构对基因组生物学的独特影响。研究发现该菌具有独特的着丝粒结构和等位基因特异性表达机制，为理解真菌基因组暗物质提供了新视角。
ai.translation: 端到端（T2T）基因组组装技术正在革新我们对长隐基因组生物学'暗物质'（如着丝粒、rDNA重复序列、等位基因特异性表达）的理解。然而关于二倍体真菌将单倍体基因组分隔在不同细胞核的生物学特性研究仍有限。本研究探讨了二倍体结构对小麦病原菌Puccinia striiformis f. sp. tritici长期无性克隆基因组生物学的影响。通过结合牛津纳米孔（ONT）双链测序与Hi-C技术，我们构建了>99.999%共识准确度的T2T核相基因组组装。研究发现该真菌具有富含LTR逆转录转座子的大型区域着丝粒，单个着丝粒区存在甲基化凹陷，暗示每个染色体仅有一个动粒附着位点。染色体对的着丝粒序列高度多样化，动粒附着位点位置不完全保守。每个细胞核携带>200拷贝的rDNA阵列，包含核特异性序列变异。两个核基因组间的等位型多样性由与转座元件相关的大规模结构变异引起。通过纳米孔长读长cDNA分析不同感染条件下的基因表达，发现近20%的杂合基因对呈现广泛等位基因特异性表达。参与植物感染的基因在ASE基因中显著富集，这种现象似乎由低表达等位基因的CpG基因体甲基化升高介导。这表明表观遗传调控的ASE可能是此前被忽视的促进植物感染的机制。总体而言，本研究揭示了二倍体结构如何独特塑造真核生物基因组关键特征。

title: Harnessing methods, data analysis, and near-real-time wastewater monitoring for enhanced public health response using high throughput sequencing.
abstract: Wastewater-based analysis has emerged as a pivotal method for monitoring SARS-CoV-2 (SC2). Leveraging high-throughput sequencing on wastewater samples facilitates a comprehensive, population-level assessment of circulating and emerging SC2 variants within a community. This study meticulously evaluates the detection performance, variant calling accuracy, and the time taken from sample collection to public data release for wastewater SC2 monitoring. We employed two different SC2 target enrichment panels on Illumina MiSeq and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) GridION sequencing platforms for a robust analysis. Daily collection of routine raw grab and composite samples took place at a wastewater treatment plant (WWTP) site in Maryland, USA (MD) from mid-January 2022 to the end of June 2022. Total Nucleic Acid (TNA) was extracted from samples and target enrichment was executed using QIAseq DIRECT and NEBNext VarSkip Short amplicon kits, with subsequent sequencing on MiSeq or ONT GridION platforms, respectively. Obtained sequences was analyzed using our custom CFSAN Wastewater Analysis Pipeline (C-WAP). Raw sequence data and detailed metadata were submitted to NCBI (BioProject PRJNA757291) as it became available. Our wastewater data successfully detected the onset of new variants BA.2, BA.2.12, BA.4.6, and BA.5 to the observed population. Notably, Omicron sub-variants were identified approximately a week ahead of publicly available clinical data at the MD ZIP-code level. Variation in quality metrics paralleled the rise and fall of BA waves, underscoring the impact of viral load on sequencing quality. Regular updates of estimated variant proportions were made available on the FDA-CFSAN "Wastewater Surveillance for SARS-CoV-2 Variants" website. In contrast to the median 28-day turnaround for our samples, the lead time from sample collection to public release of raw sequence data via NCBI was remarkably swift, accomplished within a mere 57 hours in this specific exercise. Our processing, sequencing, and analysis methods empowered the swift and accurate detection of SC2 trends and circulating variants within a community, offering insights for public health decision-making.
authors: Ramachandran, P.; Kayikcioglu, T.; Walsky, T.; Judy, K.; Amirzadegan, J.; Bias, C. H.; Tesfaldet, B.; Balkey, M.; EppSchmidt, D.; Rand, H.; Pettengill, J.; Tallent, S.; Brown, E.; Pfefer, T.; Timme, R.; Windsor, A.; Grim, C.; Hoffmann, M.

title: Targeted syndromic next-generation sequencing panel for simultaneous detection of pathogens associated with bovine reproductive failure.
abstract: Bovine reproductive failure, which includes infertility, abortion, and stillbirth in cattle, leads to significant economic losses for beef and milk producers. Diagnosing the infectious causes of bovine reproductive failure is challenging as there are multiple pathogens associated with it. The traditional stepwise approach to diagnostic testing is time-consuming and can cause significant delays. In this study, we have developed a syndromic next-generation sequencing panel (BovReproSeq) for the simultaneous detection of 17 pathogens (bacteria, virus, and protozoa) associated with bovine reproductive failure. This targeted approach involves amplifying multiple pathogen-specific targets using ultra-multiplex PCR, followed by sequencing with the Oxford Nanopore platform and subsequent analysis of the data using a custom bioinformatic pipeline to determine the presence or absence of pathogens. We tested 116 clinical samples and found that BovReproSeq results matched with current diagnostic methods for 93% of the samples, and most of the disagreements occurring in samples with very low pathogen loads (Ct >35). At the optimal read-count threshold of 10 reads (minimum number of reads to classify the sample as positive), the clinical sensitivity of the assay was approximately 82%, while clinical specificity was 100%. The overall accuracy of the assay was 98.8%. Matthews correlation coefficient (correlation coefficient of binary classification) was approximately 0.90 and F1 score (harmonic mean of precision and recall) was 0.90, indicating excellent overall performance. Our study presents a significant advancement in detecting the infectious agents associated with bovine reproductive failure and the BovReproSeq panel's ability to detect 17 pathogens makes it a promising tool for veterinary diagnostics.IMPORTANCEBovine reproductive failure causes substantial economic losses to beef and milk producers, and infectious disease contributes significantly to this syndrome. Etiologic diagnosis is complicated since multiple pathogens can be involved and infections with some pathogens are asymptomatic or cause similar clinical signs. A stepwise approach to diagnostic testing is time-consuming and increases the risk of missing the correct diagnosis. BovReproSeq is a next-generation sequencing-based diagnostic panel that allows detection of 17 reproductive failure pathogens simultaneously.
authors: Dhinesh Periyasamy, Yanyun Huang, Janet E Hill

ai.TLDR: 牛繁殖失败（包括不孕、流产和死产）导致牛肉和牛奶生产者重大经济损失。传统诊断方法耗时且效率低，本文开发的BovReproSeq测序面板可同时检测17种病原体，临床敏感度82%、特异度100%，整体准确率98.8%，显著提升诊断效率。
ai.translation: 牛繁殖失败（包括不孕、流产和死产）导致牛肉和牛奶生产者重大经济损失。诊断牛繁殖失败的感染性病因具有挑战性，因为涉及多种病原体。传统分步诊断方法耗时且易延误。本研究开发了用于同时检测17种与牛繁殖失败相关的病原体（细菌、病毒和原生动物）的综合征下一代测序面板（BovReproSeq）。该靶向方法通过超多重PCR扩增多种病原体特异性靶标，随后使用牛津纳米孔平台进行测序，并通过定制生物信息学流程分析数据以确定病原体存在与否。测试116份临床样本发现，BovReproSeq结果与现有诊断方法在93%样本中一致，分歧主要出现在病原体载量极低的样本（Ct>35）。在最优读数阈值10 reads（判定样本为阳性所需的最小读数）下，检测方法临床敏感度约82%，特异度100%。整体准确率98.8%。Matthews相关系数（二分类相关系数）约0.90，F1分数（精确率和召回率的调和平均值）为0.90，表明整体性能优异。本研究展示了检测牛繁殖失败相关感染因子的重要进展，BovReproSeq面板可同时检测17种病原体，成为兽医诊断的有前景工具。重要性：牛繁殖失败导致牛肉和牛奶生产者重大经济损失，感染性疾病显著贡献于此综合征。病因诊断复杂，因可能涉及多种病原体，且某些感染无症状或导致相似临床表现。分步诊断方法耗时且增加漏诊风险。BovReproSeq是基于下一代测序的诊断面板，可同时检测17种繁殖失败病原体。

title: Cas9-based enrichment for targeted long-read metabarcoding
abstract: Metabarcoding is a valuable tool for characterising the communities that underpin the functioning of ecosystems. However, current methods often rely on PCR amplification for enrichment of marker genes. PCR can introduce significant biases that affect quantification and is typically restricted to one target loci at a time, limiting the diversity that can be captured in a single reaction. Here, we address these issues by using Cas9 to enrich marker genes for long-read nanopore sequencing directly from a DNA sample, removing the need for PCR. We show that this approach can effectively isolate a 4.5 kb region covering partial 18S and 28S rRNA genes and the ITS region in a mixed nematode community, and further adapt our approach for characterising a diverse microbial community. We demonstrate the ability for Cas9-based enrichment to support multiplexed targeting of several different DNA regions simultaneously, enabling optimal marker gene selection for different clades of interest within a sample. We also find a strong correlation between input DNA concentrations and output read proportions for mixed-species samples, demonstrating the ability for quantification of relative species abundance. This study lays a foundation for targeted long-read sequencing to more fully capture the diversity of organisms present in complex environments.
authors: Nikolaeva-Reynolds, L.; Cammies, C.; Crichton, R.; Gorochowski, T. E.

ai.TLDR: 元条形码测序是研究生态系统功能群落的重要工具，但现有方法依赖PCR扩增导致偏差且限制多样性捕获。本研究通过Cas9直接从DNA样本中富集标记基因进行长读长纳米孔测序，有效分离混合线虫群落的4.5 kb区域并支持多区域同时靶向，实现了物种丰度的量化分析。
ai.translation: 元条形码测序是表征支撑生态系统功能的群落结构的重要工具。然而现有方法通常依赖PCR扩增来富集标记基因，PCR可能引入显著偏差影响定量分析，并且通常仅针对单一靶向位点，限制了单次反应中可捕获的多样性。本研究通过使用Cas9直接从DNA样本中富集标记基因进行长读长纳米孔测序，消除了对PCR的依赖。我们展示了该方法可有效分离混合线虫群落中覆盖部分18S和28S rRNA基因及ITS区域的4.5 kb区域，并进一步将该方法适应于表征多样化的微生物群落。我们证明了基于Cas9的富集方法可支持同时靶向多个不同DNA区域，实现对样本中不同感兴趣类群的最优标记基因选择。此外，我们发现混合物种样本中输入DNA浓度与输出读数比例存在强相关性，证明了相对物种丰度的量化能力。本研究为靶向长读长测序在复杂环境中更全面捕获生物多样性奠定了基础。

title: Comprehensive genome analysis of hepatitis B virus using nanopore sequencing technology in patients with previously resolved infection and spontaneous reactivation without drug exposure
abstract: A 75-year-old Japanese woman experienced persistent fatigue and progressive jaundice for 6 weeks, and was subsequently diagnosed with acute liver failure. She had not received any immunosuppressive therapies and/or antineoplastic chemotherapy. Blood tests revealed elevated levels of HBsAg, HBV-DNA, and anti-HBc IgG, while anti-HBc IgM was negative. She had undergone hepatitis virus testing 48 weeks earlier, during which HBsAg was negative, indicating that HBV reactivation occurred in a patient with a previously resolved infection, without any drug therapies as triggers, ultimately leading to acute liver failure. Despite receiving multidisciplinary intensive treatment, her condition worsened, resulting in death. Full-length genomic analysis of the HBV strain, performed using nanopore sequencing technology, identified an I126S substitution in HBsAg, known as a vaccine escape mutation, along with a quasispecies consisting primarily of two HBV clone variants: one full-length and the other with a deletion in the nt2,448–nt488 region (sp1 spliced variant). These genetic factors may have contributed to the spontaneous HBV reactivation.
authors: Shunsuke Yamada, Yoshihito Uchida, ... Satoshi Mochida
citation: Yamada, S., Uchida, Y., Kouyama, Ji. et al. Comprehensive genome analysis of hepatitis B virus using nanopore sequencing technology in patients with previously resolved infection and spontaneous reactivation without drug exposure. Clin J Gastroenterol 18 , 145–153 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s12328-024-02078-8

ai.TLDR: 一名75岁日本女性因未接受药物治疗的既往乙肝感染自发再激活导致急性肝衰竭，最终死亡。通过纳米孔测序技术分析HBV全基因组，发现疫苗逃逸突变及两种主要克隆变异体，提示遗传因素可能促进自发性HBV再激活。
ai.translation: 一名75岁的日本女性持续疲劳和进行性黄疸持续6周后被诊断为急性肝衰竭。患者未接受任何免疫抑制治疗或抗肿瘤化疗。血液检测显示HBsAg、HBV-DNA和anti-HBc IgG水平升高，而anti-HBc IgM阴性。患者48周前曾进行乙肝病毒检测，当时HBsAg阴性，表明在既往乙肝感染已清除的情况下发生了HBV再激活，且无药物治疗作为诱因，最终导致急性肝衰竭。尽管接受多学科强化治疗，但病情恶化导致死亡。通过纳米孔测序技术对HBV全长基因组进行分析，发现HBsAg中存在I126S取代突变（疫苗逃逸突变），并检测到主要由两种HBV克隆变异体组成的准种：一种为全长变异体，另一种为nt2448-nt488区域缺失的sp1剪接变体。这些遗传因素可能促成了自发性HBV再激活。

title: Rare disease genomics and precision medicine
abstract: Rare diseases, though individually uncommon, collectively affect millions worldwide. Genomic technologies and big data analytics have revolutionized diagnosing and understanding these conditions. This review explores the role of genomics in rare disease research, the impact of large consortium initiatives, advancements in extensive data analysis, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML), and the therapeutic implications in precision medicine. We also discuss the challenges of data sharing and privacy concerns, emphasizing the need for collaborative efforts and secure data practices to advance rare disease research.
authors: Juhyeon Hong, Dajun Lee, ... Jungmin Choi
citation: Hong, J., Lee, D., Hwang, A. et al. Rare disease genomics and precision medicine. Genom. Inform. 22 , 28 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s44342-024-00032-1
description: Rare diseases, though individually uncommon, collectively affect millions worldwide. Genomic technologies and big data analytics have revolutionized...

ai.TLDR: 罕见病虽个体发病率低，但总体影响全球数百万人。基因组技术与大数据分析革新了罕见病的诊断与研究。本文探讨基因组学在罕见病研究中的作用、大型合作计划的影响、AI与机器学习在数据分析中的应用，以及精准医学的治疗潜力，同时指出数据共享与隐私保护的挑战。
ai.translation: 罕见病虽然每种疾病单独发生率较低，但总体上却影响着全球数百万人。基因组技术和大数据分析已彻底改变了这些疾病的诊断和理解方式。本文综述了基因组学在罕见病研究中的作用，探讨了大型合作计划对研究的推动作用，分析了大规模数据处理技术的进展，以及人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）在数据整合中的应用。同时，文章还讨论了数据共享的挑战和隐私保护问题，强调通过协作研究和安全数据实践来推动罕见病研究的必要性。

title: Study on the early diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing in alveolar lavage fluid smear-negative pulmonary tuberculosis
abstract: The objective of this study was to investigate the early diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing in alveolar lavage smear-negative pulmonary tuberculosis (PTB). A prospective study was conducted on patients hospitalized at Zhuzhou Central Hospital from October 2021 to June 2022 and suspected to have PTB. Alveolar lavage fluid specimens were collected from these patients and simultaneously subjected to centrifugal bacterial collection smear method in a sandwich cup, bifidobacteria solid culture (referred to as culture), *Mycobacterium tuberculosis*-DNA (TB-DNA), and nanopore sequencing for detection of *Mycobacterium tuberculosis*. These patients were ultimately diagnosed with smear-negative PTB. The final clinical diagnosis was used as a reference to compare the diagnostic efficacy of Nanopore sequencing, culture, and TB-DNA for PTB. The results showed that the positive rates detected by nanopore sequencing, culture, and TB-DNA in the 103 suspected tuberculosis patients were 73.8%, 13.6%, and 33.0%, respectively. The sensitivity of nanopore sequencing was significantly higher than culture (*P* < 0.001) and TB-DNA (*P* < 0.001) for the identification of smear-negative PTB. Similarly, the positive rate of TB-DNA was also significantly higher than that of culture (*P* = 0.001). In conclusion, nanopore sequencing exhibited the highest sensitivity for the rapid diagnosis of *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* in alveolar lavage fluid specimens, using clinical diagnosis as a reference standard, and it could improve the PTB clinical diagnosis.
authors: Yangjing Ou, Dan Li, ... Yingzheng Tan
citation: Ou, Y., Li, D., Long, X. et al. Study on the early diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing in alveolar lavage fluid smear-negative pulmonary tuberculosis. Braz J Microbiol 56 , 365–372 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s42770-024-01575-9
