ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序在肺泡灌洗液涂片阴性肺结核（PTB）早期诊断中的价值。通过比较纳米孔测序、培养法和TB-DNA检测的敏感性，发现纳米孔测序对涂片阴性PTB的检出率显著高于其他方法，可显著提升临床诊断效率。
ai.translation: 本研究旨在探讨纳米孔测序在肺泡灌洗液涂片阴性肺结核（PTB）早期诊断中的价值。研究者对2021年10月至2022年6月期间入住株洲市中心医院并疑似患有PTB的患者进行了前瞻性研究。从这些患者中收集肺泡灌洗液样本，并同步采用离心细菌收集法（沙漏杯法）、双歧杆菌固体培养（简称培养）、结核分枝杆菌-DNA（TB-DNA）及纳米孔测序技术进行检测。最终确诊为涂片阴性PTB的患者被纳入分析。以最终临床诊断作为参考标准，比较纳米孔测序、培养及TB-DNA对PTB的诊断效能。结果显示，在103例疑似肺结核患者中，纳米孔测序、培养及TB-DNA的阳性检出率分别为73.8%、13.6%和33.0%。纳米孔测序对涂片阴性PTB的敏感性显著高于培养（P<0.001）和TB-DNA（P<0.001）。同样，TB-DNA的阳性率也显著高于培养（P=0.001）。结论表明，以临床诊断为参考标准，纳米孔测序在肺泡灌洗液样本中对结核分枝杆菌的快速检测表现出最高的敏感性，可有效提升PTB的临床诊断水平。

title: Comprehensive pathogen identification and antimicrobial resistance prediction from positive blood cultures using nanopore sequencing technology
abstract:
### Background

Blood cultures are essential for diagnosing bloodstream infections, but current phenotypic tests for antimicrobial resistance (AMR) provide limited information. Oxford Nanopore Technologies introduces nanopore sequencing with adaptive sampling, capable of real-time host genome depletion, yet its application directly from blood cultures remains unexplored. This study aimed to identify pathogens and predict AMR using nanopore sequencing.

### Methods

In this cross-sectional genomic study, 458 positive blood cultures from bloodstream infection patients in central Taiwan were analyzed. Parallel experiments involved routine microbiologic tests and nanopore sequencing with a 15-h run. A bioinformatic pipeline was proposed to analyze the real-time sequencing reads. Subsequently, a comparative analysis was performed to evaluate the performance of species identification and AMR prediction.

### Results

The pipeline identified 76 species, with 88 *Escherichia coli*, 74 *Klebsiella pneumoniae*, 43 *Staphylococcus aureus*, and 9 *Candida* samples. Novel species were also discovered. Notably, precise species identification was achieved not only for monomicrobial infections but also for polymicrobial infections, which was detected in 23 samples and further confirmed by full-length 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing. Using a modified ResFinder database, AMR predictions showed a categorical agreement rate exceeding 90% (3799/4195) for monomicrobial infections, with minimal very major errors observed for *K. pneumoniae* (2/186, 1.1%) and *S. aureus* (1/90, 1.1%).

### Conclusions

Nanopore sequencing with adaptive sampling can directly analyze positive blood cultures, facilitating pathogen detection, AMR prediction, and outbreak investigation. Integrating nanopore sequencing into clinical practices signifies a revolutionary advancement in managing bloodstream infections, offering an effective antimicrobial stewardship strategy, and improving patient outcomes.
authors: Po-Yu Liu, Han-Chieh Wu, ... Yu-Chieh Liao
citation: Liu, PY., Wu, HC., Li, YL. et al. Comprehensive pathogen identification and antimicrobial resistance prediction from positive blood cultures using nanopore sequencing technology. Genome Med 16 , 141 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-024-01416-2

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序结合自适应采样技术，直接分析阳性血液培养样本，实现了病原体鉴定和抗微生物耐药性（AMR）预测。该方法在单菌感染和混合感染中均表现出高准确率，分类一致性超过90%，为血流感染的临床管理提供了革命性解决方案。
ai.translation:
### 背景
血液培养是诊断血流感染的关键手段，但现有表型检测方法对抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）的解析能力有限。牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）开发的纳米孔测序结合自适应采样技术，具备实时宿主基因组耗竭能力，但其在直接分析血液培养样本中的应用尚未探索。本研究旨在通过纳米孔测序识别病原体并预测AMR。

### 方法
本研究为横断面基因组研究，分析了台湾中部458例血流感染患者的阳性血液培养样本。同步进行常规微生物学检测和纳米孔测序（15小时运行）。提出了一种生物信息学分析流程以处理实时测序数据，随后通过比较分析评估物种鉴定和AMR预测性能。

### 结果
分析流程鉴定了76种病原体，包括88例大肠杆菌、74例肺炎克雷伯菌、43例金黄色葡萄球菌和9例念珠菌样本，同时发现新物种。值得注意的是，单菌感染和混合感染均实现了精确物种鉴定（23例混合感染样本经全长16S rRNA扩增子测序验证）。使用改良ResFinder数据库进行AMR预测，单菌感染分类一致性达90%以上（3799/4195），肺炎克雷伯菌（2/186, 1.1%）和金黄色葡萄球菌（1/90, 1.1%）的非常严重错误率显著降低。

### 结论
纳米孔测序结合自适应采样技术可直接分析阳性血液培养样本，促进病原体检测、AMR预测及爆发调查。将该技术整合至临床实践标志着血流感染管理的革命性进展，为抗菌药物合理使用提供有效策略，显著改善患者预后。

title: Deep-leaning and shallow hybrid Nanopore-Illumina sequencing for affordable and accurate detection of germline variants.
abstract: Despite the complementary strengths of short- and long-read sequencing approaches, variant calling methods still rely on a single data type. In this study, we collected and harmonized Nanopore dataset of the 7 GIAB healthy individuals across three independent consortia. Then, by leveraging these harmonized Nanopore data, we explore the benefits of using a hybrid DeepVariant model to jointly process Illumina and Nanopore data for germline variant detection. We show that a shallow hybrid long-short sequencing approach can match or surpass germline variant detection accuracy of state-of-the-art single-technology methods, potentially reducing overall sequencing costs and with the advantage of also enabling detection of large germline structural variations. These findings offer promising potential for molecular diagnostics in clinical settings, particularly for rare genetic disease screenings.
authors: Gambardella, G.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过整合三个独立联盟的7名健康个体Nanopore数据，探索混合DeepVariant模型在联合处理Illumina和Nanopore数据中的应用。结果表明，浅层混合长短读测序方法可匹配或超越单技术方法的体细胞变异检测准确率，为临床罕见遗传病筛查提供新思路。
ai.translation: 尽管短读和长读测序技术具有互补优势，但变异检测方法仍依赖单一数据类型。本研究收集并标准化了三个独立联盟中7名健康个体的Nanopore数据集。通过利用这些标准化的Nanopore数据，我们探索了采用混合DeepVariant模型联合处理Illumina和Nanopore数据在体细胞变异检测中的优势。研究结果表明，浅层混合长短读测序方法可达到或超越当前单技术方法的体细胞变异检测准确率，有望降低整体测序成本，并具备检测大范围体细胞结构变异的优势。这些发现为临床分子诊断提供了新思路，特别是在罕见遗传病筛查领域展现出应用潜力。

ai.translation: 背景/目的：本研究旨在探讨听力神经病的遗传基础。方法：我们通过基因组测序技术鉴定了染色体2上的拷贝数增加变异。结果：一名4岁男性患者携带chr2:26,477,852至26,483,106（包含基因第14至18外显子的5254碱基对）的重复变异。结论：这是首例报道听力神经病患者存在染色体2大拷贝数变异的病例。

title: Can α-Mangostin and Photodynamic Therapy Support Ciprofloxacin in the Inactivation of Uropathogenic
abstract: Multidrug-resistant bacteria represent a significant challenge in the treatment of bacterial infections, often leading to therapeutic failures. This issue underlines the need to develop strategies that improve the efficacy of conventional antibiotic therapies. title: Rapid inference of antibiotic susceptibility phenotype of uropathogens using metagenomic sequencing with neighbor typing.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: Timely diagnostic tools are needed to improve antibiotic treatment. Pairing metagenomic sequencing with genomic neighbor typing algorithms may support rapid clinically actionable results. We created resistance-associated sequence elements (RASE) databases for 

IMPORTANCE: Urinary tract infections (UTIs) are a common diagnosis in hospitals and are often treated empirically with broad-spectrum antibiotics. These broad-spectrum agents can select for resistance in these bacteria and co-colonizing organisms. The use of narrow-spectrum agents is desirable as an antibiotic stewardship measure; however, it is counterbalanced by the need for adequate therapy. Identification of causative organisms and their antibiotic susceptibility can help direct treatment; however, conventional testing requires days to produce actionable results. Methods to quickly and accurately predict susceptibility phenotypes for pathogens causing UTI could thus improve both patient outcomes and antibiotic stewardship. Here, expanding on previous work showing accurate prediction for certain Gram-positive pathogens, we demonstrate how the use of RASE from metagenomic sequencing can provide informative and rapid phenotype prediction results for common Gram-negative pathogens in UTI, highlighting the future potential of this method to be used in clinical settings to guide empiric antibiotic selection.
authors: Amanda C Carroll, Leanne Mortimer, Hiren Ghosh, Sandra Reuter, Hajo Grundmann, Karel Brinda, William P Hanage, Angel Li, Aimee Paterson, Andrew Purssell, Ashley Rooney, Noelle R Yee, Bryan Coburn, Shola Able-Thomas, Martin Antonio, Allison McGeer, Derek R MacFadden

ai.translation:

重要性：尿路感染（UTI）是医院常见的诊断，通常采用广谱抗生素进行经验性治疗。这些广谱药物可能在这些细菌及共感染菌群中选择性地促进耐药性。窄谱抗生素的使用作为抗生素管理措施具有优势；然而，需平衡治疗充分性的需求。确定致病菌及其抗生素敏感性可指导治疗；但传统检测需数天才能产生可操作结果。因此，快速且准确预测UTI致病菌耐药表型的方法可同时改善患者预后和抗生素管理。本文扩展了之前对某些革兰氏阳性菌准确预测的研究，展示了如何利用宏基因组测序中的RASE提供常见革兰氏阴性菌的快速表型预测结果，突显了该方法在临床环境中指导经验性抗生素选择的未来潜力。

title: Native RNA nanopore sequencing reveals antibiotic-induced loss of rRNA modifications in the A- and P-sites
abstract: The biological relevance and dynamics of mRNA modifications have been extensively studied; however, whether rRNA modifications are dynamically regulated, and under which conditions, remains unclear. Here, we systematically characterize bacterial rRNA modifications upon exposure to diverse antibiotics using native RNA nanopore sequencing. To identify significant rRNA modification changes, we develop *NanoConsensus*, a novel pipeline that is robust across RNA modification types, stoichiometries and coverage, with very low false positive rates, outperforming all individual algorithms tested. We then apply *NanoConsensus* to characterize the rRNA modification landscape upon antibiotic exposure, finding that rRNA modification profiles are altered in the vicinity of A and P-sites of the ribosome, in an antibiotic-specific manner, possibly contributing to antibiotic resistance. Our work demonstrates that rRNA modification profiles can be rapidly altered in response to environmental exposures, and provides a robust workflow to study rRNA modification dynamics in any species, in a scalable and reproducible manner.
authors: Anna Delgado-Tejedor, Rebeca Medina, ... Eva Maria Novoa
citation: Delgado-Tejedor, A., Medina, R., Begik, O. et al. Native RNA nanopore sequencing reveals antibiotic-induced loss of rRNA modifications in the A- and P-sites. Nat Commun 15 , 10054 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-54368-x

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示细菌rRNA修饰在抗生素暴露下存在动态调控，通过开发NanoConsensus方法发现特定抗生素导致核糖体A/P位点附近修饰变化，可能影响抗生素耐药性。该工作建立了可扩展的rRNA修饰动态研究流程。
ai.translation: mRNA修饰的生物学意义和动态变化已得到广泛研究；然而，rRNA修饰是否动态调控及其发生条件仍不清楚。本研究通过原生RNA纳米孔测序系统表征细菌在多种抗生素暴露下的rRNA修饰特征。为识别显著的rRNA修饰变化，我们开发了NanoConsensus新型分析流程，该方法在不同RNA修饰类型、修饰比例和测序覆盖度下均表现出鲁棒性，且假阳性率极低，优于所有测试的单算法。应用NanoConsensus分析发现，抗生素暴露会导致核糖体A位点和P位点附近rRNA修饰谱呈现抗生素特异性变化，可能参与抗生素耐药性形成。本研究证明rRNA修饰谱可快速响应环境刺激变化，并提供了可扩展、可重复研究任意物种rRNA修饰动态的可靠工作流程。

title: Sex differences in MAGEL2 gene promoter methylation in high functioning autism - trends from a pilot study using nanopore Cas9 targeted long read sequencing
abstract:
### Background

MAGEL2 is an autism susceptibility gene whose deficiency has been associated with autism-related behaviors in animal models and in syndromic human autism spectrum disorders (ASDs) such as Schaaf-Yang syndrome, but has not been studied in the broader autism spectrum. Given the capabilities of long-read sequencing technologies, this pilot study used a targeted nanopore sequencing approach to simultaneously examine MAGEL2 DNA sequence and methylation in adults with high-functioning autism (HFA) compared to neurotypical controls (NC).

### Methods

Using DNA extracted from peripheral blood, Cas9-targeted nanopore DNA sequencing was used to analyze MAGEL2, including its entire regulatory construct (chr15:23639316–23651466), for sequence variation and 5-methyl-cytosine (5mC) modification in a cohort of adults with HFA compared to sex- and age-matched NC. Given the known sex differences in ASD and MAGEL2 KO animal models, results were further analyzed by sex.

### Results

20 adults with HFA (10 males, 10 females) and 20 NC were included. While there were no overall differences in MAGEL2 DNA sequence and 5mC modification between HFA and NC, we found a significant difference in MAGEL2 gene promoter methylation between males and females with HFA and NC of both sexes, with HFA males tending to show hypomethylation in a 300 bp long differentially methylated region (chr15:23647640–23647939) around the MAGEL2 transcription start site.

### Conclusions

In this pilot study utilizing nanopore Cas9 targeted DNA sequencing, significant sex-specific differences in MAGEL2 gene promoter methylation were identified in male adults with HFA in comparison to control groups, suggesting the potential for sex-specific epigenetic differences. However, further replication in larger cohorts is required to validate these findings.
authors: Jelte Wieting, Kirsten Jahn, ... Helge Frieling
citation: Wieting, J., Jahn, K., Bleich, S. et al. Sex differences in MAGEL2 gene promoter methylation in high functioning autism - trends from a pilot study using nanopore Cas9 targeted long read sequencing. BMC Med Genomics 17 , 279 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12920-024-02053-9

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术分析自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）患者MAGEL2基因的序列变异和甲基化状态，发现HFA男性患者在MAGEL2启动子区域存在显著的性别特异性低甲基化现象。研究揭示了性别差异在表观遗传调控中的潜在作用，但需更大样本验证。
ai.translation:
### 背景
MAGEL2是一种与自闭症易感相关的基因，其功能缺失在动物模型和综合征性人类自闭症谱系障碍（ASDs）如Schaaf-Yang综合征中与自闭症相关行为有关，但尚未在广泛的自闭症谱系中进行研究。鉴于长读长测序技术的能力，本研究采用靶向纳米孔测序方法，同时分析高功能自闭症（HFA）成人MAGEL2的DNA序列和甲基化状态与典型神经发育（NC）对照组的差异。

### 方法
使用外周血提取的DNA，通过Cas9靶向纳米孔DNA测序分析MAGEL2基因，包括其完整调控结构（chr15:23639316–2351466），在HFA成人队列中检测序列变异和5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）修饰情况，并与性别和年龄匹配的NC对照组进行比较。考虑到ASD和MAGEL2敲除动物模型中已知的性别差异，结果进一步按性别进行分析。

### 结果
纳入20名HFA成人（10男10女）和20名NC对照。虽然HFA与NC在MAGEL2 DNA序列和5mC修饰整体上无差异，但发现HFA男性与NC男性和女性相比，在MAGEL2启动子区域存在显著的性别差异甲基化，HFA男性在MAGEL2转录起始位点附近的300 bp差异甲基化区域（chr15:23647640–23647939）表现出低甲基化倾向。

### 结论
本研究利用纳米孔Cas9靶向DNA测序技术，发现HFA男性与对照组相比在MAGEL2基因启动子区域存在显著的性别特异性甲基化差异，提示可能存在性别特异性的表观遗传差异。然而，需在更大队列中进行验证以确认这些发现。

title: Cancer liquid biopsies by Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing of cell-free DNA: from basic research to clinical applications
abstract:
Liquid biopsies, in particular, analysis of cell-free DNA, are expected to revolutionize the current landscape of cancer diagnostics and treatment. However, the existing methods for cfDNA-based liquid biopsies for cancer have certain limitations, such as fragment interruption and GC bias, which are likely to be resolved by the emerging Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), characterized by long read-length, fast read-times, high throughput, and polymerase chain reaction-free. In this review, we summarized the current literatures regarding the feasibility and applications of cfDNA-based liquid biopsies using ONT for cancer management, a possible game-changer that we believe is promising in detecting multimodal biomarkers and can be applied in a wide range of oncology utilities including early screening, diagnosis, and treatment monitoring.

ai.TLDR: 液体活检特别是细胞游离DNA分析有望革新癌症诊疗格局，但现有方法存在片段中断和GC偏差等局限。新兴的牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）凭借长读长、快速读取、高通量和无需PCR等优势，可能成为检测多模态生物标志物的突破性工具，可广泛应用于肿瘤学的早期筛查、诊断和治疗监测。
ai.translation: 液体活检，特别是细胞游离DNA（cell-free DNA, cfDNA）分析，被认为有望革新当前癌症诊断与治疗的格局。然而，现有的基于cfDNA的液体活检方法在癌症检测中存在一定局限性，例如片段中断（fragment interruption）和GC偏差（GC bias），这些技术瓶颈可能通过新兴的牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）得到解决。ONT技术具有长读长（long read-length）、快速读取（fast read-times）、高通量（high throughput）以及无需聚合酶链式反应（polymerase chain reaction-free）等显著优势。在本综述中，我们总结了当前文献中关于利用ONT技术进行cfDNA基液体活检在癌症管理中的可行性及应用研究。我们认为，这种技术可能成为检测多模态生物标志物（multimodal biomarkers）的突破性工具，并可广泛应用于肿瘤学的多个领域，包括早期筛查（early screening）、诊断（diagnosis）和治疗监测（treatment monitoring）。

title: Implementing genomic medicine in clinical practice for adults with undiagnosed rare diseases
abstract: The global burden of undiagnosed diseases, particularly in adults, is rising due to their significant socioeconomic impact. To address this, we enrolled 232 adult probands with undiagnosed conditions, utilizing bioinformatics tools for genetic analysis. Alongside exome and genome sequencing, repeat-primed PCR and Cas9-mediated nanopore sequencing were applied to suspected short tandem repeat disorders. Probands were classified into probable genetic (*n* = 128) or uncertain (*n* = 104) origins. The study found genetic causes in 66 individuals (28.4%) and non-genetic causes in 12 (5.2%), with a longer diagnostic journey for those in the probable genetic group or with pediatric symptom onset, emphasizing the need for increased efforts in these populations. Genetic diagnoses facilitated effective surveillance, cascade screening, drug repurposing, and pregnancy planning. This study demonstrates that integrating sequencing technologies improves diagnostic accuracy, may shorten the time to diagnosis, and enhances personalized management for adults with undiagnosed diseases.
authors: Jong Hyeon Ahn, Jihoon G. Yoon, ... Jin Whan Cho

ai.translation: 全球未诊断疾病的负担，特别是在成人中，因显著的社会经济影响而持续上升。为应对这一问题，我们招募了232名患有未诊断疾病的成人受试者，利用生物信息学工具进行基因分析。结合外显子组和基因组测序，同时采用重复引物PCR和Cas9介导的纳米孔测序技术，用于疑似短串联重复疾病的研究。受试者被分为可能具有遗传起源（n=128）或不确定起源（n=104）两类。研究发现，66名个体（28.4%）存在遗传病因，12名（5.2%）为非遗传病因，且可能具有遗传起源的受试者或具有儿童期症状发作的患者诊断过程更漫长，强调了在这些群体中需要加大诊断力度。基因诊断有助于实现有效的疾病监测、家族筛查、药物再利用和生育规划。本研究证明，整合测序技术可提高诊断准确性，可能缩短诊断时间，并增强对未诊断疾病成人的个性化管理。

title: Long-read sequencing enables comprehensive molecular genetic diagnosis of Fabry disease
abstract:
### Background

The clinical diagnosis of Fabry Disease (FD) can be challenging due to the clinical heterogeneity, especially in females. Patients with FD often experience a prolonged interval between the onset of symptoms and receiving a diagnosis. Genetic testing is the gold standard for precise diagnosis of FD, however conventional genetic testing could miss deep intronic variants and large deletions or duplications. Although next-generation sequencing, which analyzes numerous genes, has been successfully used for FD diagnosis and can detect complex variants, an effective and rapid tool for identifying a wide range of variants is imminent, contributing to decrease the diagnostic delay.

### Methods

The comprehensive Analysis of FD (CAFD) assay was developed for FD genetic diagnosis, employing long-range PCR coupled with long-read sequencing to target the full-length *GLA* gene and its flanking regions. Its clinical performance was assessed through a comparative analysis with Sanger sequencing.

### Results

Genetic testing was performed on 82 individuals, including 48 probands and 34 relatives. The CAFD assay additionally identified variants in two probands: one had a novel and de novo pathogenic variant with a 1715 bp insertion in intron 4, and the other carried two deep intronic VUS variants in cis-configuration also in intron 4. In total, CAFD identified 47 different variants among 48 probands. Of these, 42 (89.36%, 42/47) were pathogenic, while 5 (10.64%, 5/47) were VUS. Sixteen (34.04%, 16/47) of the variants were novel, including 15 SNV/Indels and one large intronic insertion. Pedigree analysis of 21 probands identified four de novo disease-causing variants. Hence, FD exhibits not only variable clinical presentations but also a wide spectrum of variants. Utilizing a comprehensive testing algorithm for diagnosing FD, which includes enzyme activity, clinical features, and genetic testing, the diagnostic yield of CAFD is 97.92% (47/48), which is higher than that of conventional Sanger sequencing, at 95.83% (46/48).

### Conclusion

The duration between initial clinical presentation and diagnosis remains long and winding. CAFD provides precise diagnosis for a wide spectrum of *GL*A variants, promoting timely diagnosis and appropriate treatment for FD patients.
authors: Fengxia Yao, Na Hao, ... Juntao Liu
citation: Yao, F., Hao, N., Li, D. et al. Long-read sequencing enables comprehensive molecular genetic diagnosis of Fabry disease. Hum Genomics 18 , 133 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s40246-024-00697-3

ai.TLDR: 法布里病（FD）的临床诊断因临床异质性而困难，传统基因检测易漏诊深内含子变异和大片段缺失/重复。CAFD检测通过长距离PCR结合长读长测序技术，实现了对全长GLA基因及其邻近区域的全面分析，诊断效率达97.92%，显著高于常规Sanger测序的95.83%。
ai.translation:
### 背景
法布里病（Fabry Disease, FD）的临床诊断面临挑战，尤其在女性患者中表现出显著的临床异质性。FD患者常经历症状出现与确诊之间的长期延迟。尽管基因检测是FD精准诊断的金标准，但传统基因检测方法可能漏诊深内含子变异及大片段缺失或重复。虽然下一代测序技术（NGS）通过分析多基因可成功用于FD诊断并检测复杂变异，但亟需一种高效快速的工具以识别广泛变异，从而缩短诊断延迟。

### 方法
开发了全面分析法布里病（Comprehensive Analysis of FD, CAFD）检测方法，采用长距离PCR结合长读长测序技术，靶向全长GLA基因及其邻近区域。通过与Sanger测序的对比分析评估其临床性能。

### 结果
对82名个体（包括48名受试者和34名亲属）进行了基因检测。CAFD检测在两名受试者中额外识别出变异：一名携带新型de novo致病性变异（内含子4中1715 bp插入），另一名携带两个内含子4中cis配置的深内含子VUS变异。在48名受试者中共检测到47种不同变异，其中42种（89.36%）为致病性，5种（10.64%）为VUS。16种（34.04%）为新型变异，包括15种SNV/Indels和1种大内含子插入。对21名受试者的家系分析发现4种de novo致病变异。因此，FD不仅表现出临床表型的多样性，还存在广泛的变异谱系。采用包含酶活性、临床特征和基因检测的综合诊断算法，CAFD的诊断效率为97.92%（47/48），显著高于常规Sanger测序的95.83%（46/48）。

### 结论
从首次临床表现到确诊的时间仍较长。CAFD可精准诊断广泛的GLA基因变异，有助于FD患者的及时诊断和恰当治疗。

title: Harnessing ferroptosis for precision oncology: challenges and prospects.
abstract: The discovery of diverse molecular mechanisms of regulated cell death has opened new avenues for cancer therapy. Ferroptosis, a unique form of cell death driven by iron-catalyzed peroxidation of membrane phospholipids, holds particular promise for targeting resistant cancer types. This review critically examines current literature on ferroptosis, focusing on its defining features and therapeutic potential. We discuss how molecular profiling of tumors and liquid biopsies can generate extensive multi-omics datasets, which can be leveraged through machine learning-based analytical approaches for patient stratification. Addressing these challenges is essential for advancing the clinical integration of ferroptosis-driven treatments in cancer care.
authors: Roberto Fernández-Acosta, Iuliana Vintea, Ine Koeken, Behrouz Hassannia, Tom Vanden Berghe

ai.TLDR: 铁死亡作为一种新型细胞死亡机制，在抗药性癌症治疗中展现出潜力。通过整合多组学数据与机器学习方法，可实现肿瘤患者精准分层，推动铁死亡驱动疗法的临床转化。
ai.translation: 多种调控细胞死亡的分子机制的发现为癌症治疗开辟了新方向。铁死亡作为一种由铁催化膜磷脂过氧化驱动的特殊细胞死亡形式，对靶向抗药性癌症具有特别前景。本文系统评述了铁死亡相关文献，重点探讨其核心特征与治疗潜力。我们分析了如何通过肿瘤分子图谱和液态活检生成大规模多组学数据集，并阐述了基于机器学习的分析方法在患者分层中的应用价值。克服这些技术挑战对推进铁死亡驱动治疗在癌症诊疗中的临床转化具有关键意义。

title: A Comparative Review of Methods for Detecting Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor Mutations in Cell-Free DNA from Lung Cancer Patients.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Lung cancer remains the leading cause of cancer-related mortality. Determining the T790M resistance variants and epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) mutations is crucial for personalized treatment, especially when using targeted therapies.

OBJECTIVE: This review article aims to comprehensively compare some of the various diagnostic techniques associated with liquid biopsies, such as cell-free DNA (cfDNA) for T790M and EGFR mutant identification. It also aims to evaluate their pertinence in clinical settings, as well as their sensitivity and specificity to determine how effectively they monitor treatment response and resistance.

METHODS: A literature search was conducted using databases including PubMed, Scopus, and Web of Science. The keyword list included "EGFR mutations," "T790M resistance," "liquid biopsy," "COLD PCR," "NGS," "ddPCR," "BEAMing," and other methods. The effect of these studies on diagnostic technologies for identifying EGFR mutations was assessed in terms of clinical practice, methodological accuracy, and significance. Sensitivity, specificity, clinical applicability, cost analysis, turnaround times, and ease of integration into clinical workflows were used as parameters for evaluation based on the literature.

RESULTS: There are advantages and disadvantages to cfDNA monitoring strategies for treatment response and resistance, as well as to the assessment of sensitivity, specificity, and clinical applicability for identifying EGFR mutations.

CONCLUSION: Advanced techniques such as COLD-PCR, LC-MS, qPCR, NGS sequencing, Sanger sequencing, PNA microarrays, the Allele-Specific Competitive Extension (ASCE) real-time PCR assay, and nanopore technology are necessary for personalized lung cancer management. However, depending on the objective of the work, the suitable method should be selected based on its benefits and drawbacks.
authors: Sepideh Shohani, Mahmood Barati, Arshad Hosseini

ai.TLDR: 肺癌仍是癌症相关死亡的主要原因，精准治疗需明确T790M耐药变异和EGFR突变。本文系统比较了液体活检相关检测技术的临床适用性与效能，发现不同方法在敏感性、特异性及临床应用中存在差异。
ai.translation:
背景：肺癌仍是癌症相关死亡的主要原因。明确T790M耐药变异和表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）突变对于个性化治疗至关重要，尤其是在使用靶向治疗时。

目标：本文旨在全面比较与液体活检相关的多种诊断技术，如用于T790M和EGFR突变检测的循环游离DNA（cfDNA）。同时评估这些技术在临床环境中的适用性及其敏感性和特异性，以确定其监测治疗反应和耐药性的有效性。

方法：通过PubMed、Scopus和Web of Science数据库进行文献检索，关键词包括“EGFR突变”、“T790M耐药”、“液体活检”、“COLD-PCR”、“NGZ”、“ddPCR”、“BEAMing”等方法。从临床实践、方法学准确性和重要性角度评估这些研究对EGFR突变诊断技术的影响。评价参数包括敏感性、特异性、临床适用性、成本分析、周转时间及在临床工作流程中的整合便捷性。

结果：cfDNA监测策略在治疗反应和耐药性评估中存在优缺点，同时在EGFR突变识别的敏感性、特异性和临床适用性评估中也存在差异。

结论：COLD-PCR、LC-MS、qPCR、NGS测序、Sanger测序、PNA微阵列、等位基因特异性竞争延伸（ASCE）实时PCR检测和纳米孔技术等先进技术是个性化肺癌管理的必要手段。然而，应根据研究目标选择适合的方法，权衡其优缺点。

title: Single cell long read whole genome sequencing reveals somatic transposon activity in human brain.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: The advent of single cell DNA sequencing revealed astonishing dynamics of genomic variability, but failed at characterizing smaller to mid size variants that on the germline level have a profound impact. In this work we discover novel dynamics in three brains utilizing single cell long-read sequencing. This provides key insights into the dynamic of the genomes of individual cells and further highlights brain specific activity of transposable elements.
authors: Michal B Izydorczyk, Ester Kalef-Ezra, Dominic W Horner, Xinchang Zheng, Nadine Holmes, Marco Toffoli, Zeliha Gozde Sahin, Yi Han, Heer H Mehta, Donna M Muzny, Adam Ameur, Fritz J Sedlazeck, Christos Proukakis

ai.TLDR: 单细胞DNA测序技术揭示了基因组变异的动态特性，但未能有效表征对生殖系水平有深远影响的小到中等规模变异。本研究通过单细胞长读长测序分析三个大脑样本，首次发现新的基因组动态特征，揭示了单细胞基因组的动态规律及大脑特异性的转座元件活动。
ai.translation: 单细胞DNA测序技术的出现揭示了基因组变异的惊人动态特性，但未能有效表征在生殖系水平具有深远影响的小到中等规模变异。本研究通过单细胞长读长测序技术对三个大脑样本进行分析，发现了新的基因组动态特征。该研究不仅提供了关于单细胞基因组动态规律的关键见解，还进一步突出了转座元件在大脑中的特异性活动特征。

title: Critical assessment of nanopore sequencing for the detection of multiple forms of DNA modifications.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: While nanopore sequencing is increasingly used for mapping DNA modifications, it is important to recognize false positive calls as they can mislead biological interpretations. To assist biologists and methods developers, we describe a framework for rigorous evaluation that highlights the use of false discovery rate with rationally designed negative controls capturing both general background and confounding modifications. Our critical assessment across multiple forms of DNA modifications highlights that while nanopore sequencing performs reliably for high-abundance modifications, including 5-methylcytosine (5mC) at CpG sites in mammalian cells and 5-hydroxymethylcytosine (5hmC) in mammalian brain cells, it makes a significant proportion of false positive detections for low-abundance modifications, such as 5mC at CpH sites, 5hmC and N6-methyldeoxyadenine (6mA) in most mammal cell types. This study highlights the urgent need to incorporate this framework in future methods development and biological studies, and advocates prioritizing nanopore sequencing for mapping abundant over rare modifications in biomedical applications.
authors: Yimeng Kong, Yanchun Zhang, Edward A Mead, Hao Chen, Christian E Loo, Yu Fan, Mi Ni, Xue-Song Zhang, Rahul M Kohli, Gang Fang

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序在DNA修饰检测中广泛应用，但需警惕假阳性检测可能误导生物学解释。本研究通过严谨框架评估，发现其在高丰度修饰（如5mC和5hmC）中表现可靠，但对低丰度修饰（如6mA）存在显著假阳性问题。该研究强调需将该框架纳入未来方法开发和生物学研究。
ai.translation: 尽管纳米孔测序在DNA修饰图谱绘制中应用日益广泛，但必须认识到假阳性检测可能误导生物学解释。为帮助生物学家和方法开发者，我们描述了一个严谨评估框架，该框架强调使用假发现率（false discovery rate）结合合理设计的阴性对照，以捕捉一般背景和干扰性修饰。我们对多种DNA修饰形式的批判性评估表明，纳米孔测序在高丰度修饰（如哺乳动物细胞中CpG位点的5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）和哺乳动物脑细胞中的5-羟甲基胞嘧啶（5hmC））中表现可靠，但在低丰度修饰（如CpH位点的5mC、5hmC以及大多数哺乳动物细胞类型中的N6-甲基脱氧腺苷（6mA））中会产生显著比例的假阳性检测。本研究强调未来方法开发和生物学研究中亟需整合该框架，并倡导在生物医学应用中优先使用纳米孔测序绘制丰度较高的修饰而非稀有修饰。

title: Microbial interactions induce the mutational signature of mismatch repair deficiency in colorectal cancer and associated with EPPK1 mutations.
abstract: To better understand the impact of microbial interactions on the clonal evolution of colorectal cancer (CRC), we conducted high-resolution profiling of the gut microbiome of 101 treatment-naïve primary CRC patients using nanopore sequencing. We performed an integrated analysis of microbiome and tumor exome data to identify symbiotic microbes that interactively influence the mutational processes and the subsequent clonality of CRC. Our results suggested that Dialister pneumosintes and Fusobacterium animalis were both associated with somatic EPPK1 mutations and promote SBS6 (mismatch repair deficiency, dMMR) activity. Notably, we showed that the symbiotic architecture of Dialister pneumosintes and Fusobacterium animalis undergoes significant changes with the mutational status of EPPK1. In addition, we identified specific metabolic pathways involving key metabolites that potentially mediate microbial interactions in CRC. These findings provide new insights into the interplay between the gut microbiome and the mutation landscape of colorectal cancer, thereby informing the clonal evolution of CRC and new strategies for precision medicine.
authors: Dandan Hu, Jialin Zhao, Miaoqing Wu, Ying Zhou, Beile Lyu, Chaoqun Xu, Chao Huang, Zixuan Su, Hui Zhang, Jintao Guo, Weiwei Tang, Gong Chen, Qiyuan Li

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序对101例未经治疗的结直肠癌患者进行肠道微生物组高分辨率分析，揭示共生微生物与肿瘤突变特征的关联。研究发现Dialister pneumosintes和Fusobacterium animalis通过调控EPPK1突变和SBS6活性影响CRC克隆演化，为精准医疗提供新思路。
ai.translation: 为深入理解微生物互作对结直肠癌（CRC）克隆演化的潜在影响，我们采用纳米孔测序技术对101例未经治疗的原发性CRC患者进行了肠道微生物组的高分辨率分析。通过整合微生物组与肿瘤外显子组数据，我们识别出能够互作影响CRC突变过程及后续克隆性的共生微生物。研究结果表明，Dialister pneumosintes和Fusobacterium animalis均与体细胞EPPK1突变相关，并促进SBS6（错配修复缺陷，dMMR）活性。值得注意的是，我们发现Dialister pneumosintes和Fusobacterium animalis的共生结构会随着EPPK1突变状态发生显著变化。此外，我们鉴定了涉及关键代谢物的特定代谢通路，这些通路可能介导CRC中的微生物互作。这些发现为阐明肠道微生物组与结直肠癌突变图谱的相互作用提供了新见解，从而指导CRC的克隆演化机制及精准医疗策略。

title: Epigenomic diagnosis and prognosis of Acute Myeloid Leukemia.
abstract: Despite the critical role of DNA methylation, clinical implementations harnessing its promise have not been described in acute myeloid leukemia. Utilizing DNA methylation from 3314 leukemia patient samples across 11 harmonized cohorts, we describe the Acute Leukemia Methylome Atlas, which includes robust models capable of accurately predicting AML subtypes. A genome-wide prognostic model as well as a targeted panel of 38 CpGs significantly predict five-year survival in our pediatric and adult test cohorts. To accelerate rapid clinical utility, we develop a specimen-to-result protocol that uses long-read nanopore sequencing and machine learning to characterize patients' whole genomes and epigenomes. Clinical validation on patient samples confirms high concordance between epigenomic signatures and genomic lesions, though uniquely rare karyotypes remained challenging due to limited available training data. These results unveil the potential for increased affordability, speed, and accuracy for patients in need of complex molecular diagnosis and prognosis.
authors: Francisco Marchi, Vivek M Shastri, Richard J Marrero, Nam H K Nguyen, Antonella Öttl, Ann-Kathrin Schade, Marieke Landwehr, Olga Krali, Jessica Nordlund, Matin Ghavami, Fernando Sckaff, Vikash K Mansinghka, Xueyuan Cao, William Slayton, Petr Starostik, Christopher R Cogle, Raul C Ribeiro, Jeffrey E Rubnitz, Jeffery Klco, Abdelrahman Elsayed, Alan S Gamis, Timothy J Triche, Rhonda Ries, E Anders Kolb, Richard Aplenc, Todd Alonzo, Stanley Pounds, Soheil Meshinchi, Jatinder K Lamba

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次系统解析了急性髓系白血病的DNA甲基化图谱，开发了可精准预测疾病亚型的全基因组预测模型和38个CpG位点靶向检测方案。通过长读长纳米孔测序结合机器学习技术，实现了从样本到结果的快速临床转化，但罕见核型检测仍面临训练数据不足的挑战。
ai.translation: 尽管DNA甲基化在疾病机制中具有关键作用，但其在急性髓系白血病（AML）的临床应用尚未被充分探索。本研究整合了11个标准化队列中3314例白血病患者样本的DNA甲基化数据，构建了《急性白血病甲基组图谱》，开发了可准确预测AML亚型的稳健模型。全基因组预后模型及包含38个CpG位点的靶向检测方案，在儿科和成人测试队列中显著预测了五年生存率。为加速临床转化，研究团队开发了从样本到结果的标准化流程，采用长读长纳米孔测序和机器学习技术实现患者全基因组与表观基因组的特征分析。临床验证显示，表观基因组特征与基因组病变高度一致，但罕见核型的检测仍因训练数据不足而面临挑战。这些成果揭示了通过分子诊断和预后评估提升复杂病例诊疗效率的潜力。

title: Full characterization of unresolved structural variation through long-read sequencing and optical genome mapping
abstract: Structural variants (SVs) are important contributors to human disease. Their characterization remains however difficult due to their size and association with repetitive regions. Long-read sequencing (LRS) and optical genome mapping (OGM) can aid as their molecules span multiple kilobases and capture SVs in full. In this study, we selected six individuals who presented with unresolved SVs. We applied LRS onto all individuals and OGM to a subset of three complex cases. LRS detected and fully resolved the interrogated SV in all samples. This enabled a precise molecular diagnosis in two individuals. Overall, LRS identified 100% of the junctions at single-basepair level, providing valuable insights into their formation mechanisms without need for additional data sources. Application of OGM added straightforward variant phasing, aiding in the unravelment of complex rearrangements. These results highlight the potential of LRS and OGM as follow-up molecular tests for complete SV characterization. We show that they can assess clinically relevant structural variation at unprecedented resolution. Additionally, they detect (complex) cryptic rearrangements missed by conventional methods. This ultimately leads to an increased diagnostic yield, emphasizing their added benefit in a diagnostic setting. To aid their rapid adoption, we provide detailed laboratory and bioinformatics workflows in this manuscript.
authors: Griet De Clercq, Lies Vantomme, ... Björn Menten
citation: De Clercq, G., Vantomme, L., Dewaele, B. et al. Full characterization of unresolved structural variation through long-read sequencing and optical genome mapping. Sci Rep 14 , 29142 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-80068-z
description: Structural variants (SVs) are important contributors to human disease. Their characterization remains however difficult due to their size and...

ai.TLDR: 结构变异（SVs）是人类疾病的重要致病因素，但因其大小和重复区域关联而难以表征。本研究通过长读长测序（LRS）和光学基因组映射（OGM）技术，实现了SVs的完整解析，显著提升了诊断效率。LRS在所有样本中均成功检测并完全解析了SVs，OGM则辅助复杂重排的解析，为临床诊断提供了前所未有的分辨率。
ai.translation: 结构变异（Structural variants, SVs）是人类疾病的重要致病因素。然而，由于其尺寸较大且常与重复区域相关联，SVs的表征仍面临挑战。长读长测序（Long-read sequencing, LRS）和光学基因组映射（Optical genome mapping, OGM）因其能够跨越多个千碱基并完整捕获SVs，成为研究SVs的有力工具。本研究选取了六名携带未解SVs的个体，对所有个体应用LRS技术，对其中三名复杂病例应用OGM技术。LRS在所有样本中均成功检测并完全解析了所研究的SVs，使两名个体获得精确的分子诊断。总体而言，LRS在单碱基对水平上识别了100%的连接点，无需额外数据源即可提供SVs形成机制的宝贵见解。OGM的应用则增加了变异相位的直观性，有助于复杂重排的解析。这些结果凸显了LRS和OGM作为SVs完整表征后续分子检测的潜力。我们展示了这两种技术能够以前所未有的分辨率评估具有临床意义的结构变异，同时检测出常规方法遗漏的（复杂）隐匿性重排。这最终提高了诊断产出率，强调了其在诊断环境中的附加价值。为促进其快速应用，本文提供了详细的实验室和生物信息学工作流程。

title: Exploring New Delhi Metallo Beta Lactamases in Klebsiella pneumoniae and Escherichia coli: genotypic vs. phenotypic insights.
journal: Annals of clinical microbiology and antimicrobials
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Carbapenemase-producing Enterobacterales pose a serious clinical threat, particularly in high-burden settings of carbapenem-resistant Escherichia coli and Klebsiella pneumoniae (CREK), where rapid detection tools are essential to aid patient management. In this study, we focused on bla

METHOD: One hundred seventy-seven extensively drug-resistant strains were characterized using MALDI-TOF. Isolates were analyzed to detect Carbapenem-resistant Escherichia coli and Klebsiella pneumoniae (CREK) using disk diffusion, MIC test, and PCR targeting bla

RESULT: Most of the XDR strains (90%) were CREK, with K. pneumoniae (71.2%) more prevalent than E. coli (28.7%) (p < 0.05). All CREK strains exhibited complete resistance (100%) to multiple antibiotics with 66% showing sensitivity to levofloxacin. Furthermore, K. pneumoniae (57.8%) had higher bla

CONCLUSION: This study demonstrates the value of the RESIST-5 O.K.N.V.I. lateral flow assay as a rapid and reliable diagnostic tool for detecting bla
authors: Noor Ul Ain, Linzy Elton, Zahra Sadouki, Timothy D McHugh, Saba Riaz

ai.TLDR: 碳青霉烯酶产生肠杆菌对临床构成严重威胁，特别是在高负担的CREK环境中，快速检测工具对患者管理至关重要。本研究通过MALDI-TOF和PCR技术检测bla基因，发现90%的XDR菌株为CREK，且K. pneumoniae耐药性显著高于E. coli。
keywords: 碳青霉烯酶产生肠杆菌
ai.translation:
背景：碳青霉烯酶产生肠杆菌（Carbapenemase-producing Enterobacterales）对临床构成严重威胁，特别是在碳青霉烯耐药大肠杆菌和肺炎克雷伯菌（CREK）高负担环境中，快速检测工具对患者管理至关重要。本研究聚焦于bla基因的检测。

方法：通过MALDI-TOF对177株广泛耐药菌株进行表型分析，采用盘扩散法、MIC测试和针对bla基因的PCR检测CREK。

结果：大多数XDR菌株（90%）为CREK，其中肺炎克雷伯菌（71.2%）显著多于大肠杆菌（28.7%）（p < 0.05）。所有CREK菌株均对多种抗生素完全耐药（100%），其中66%对左氧氟沙星敏感。此外，肺炎克雷伯菌（57.8%）的bla基因携带率显著高于大肠杆菌。

结论：本研究证实RESIST-5 O.K.N.V.I.侧流试纸作为快速可靠的诊断工具，对bla基因检测具有重要价值。

title: Long-read sequencing for diagnosis of genetic myopathies.
abstract: Genetic myopathies are caused by pathogenic variants in >300 genes across the nuclear and mitochondrial genomes. Although short-read next-generation sequencing (NGS) has revolutionised the diagnosis of genetic disorders, large and/or complex genetic variants, which are over-represented in the genetic myopathies, are not well characterised using this approach. Long-read sequencing (LRS) is a newer genetic testing technology that overcomes many of the limitations of NGS. In particular, LRS provides improved detection of challenging variant types, including short tandem repeat (STR) expansions, copy number variants and structural variants, as well as improved variant phasing and concurrent assessment of epigenetic changes, including DNA methylation. The ability to concurrently detect multiple STR expansions is particularly relevant given the growing number of recently described genetic myopathies associated with STR expansions. LRS will also aid in the identification of new myopathy genes and molecular mechanisms. However, use of LRS technology is currently limited by high cost, low accessibility, the need for specialised DNA extraction procedures, limited availability of LRS bioinformatic tools and pipelines, and the relative lack of healthy control LRS variant databases. Once these barriers are addressed, the implementation of LRS into clinical diagnostic pipelines will undoubtedly streamline the diagnostic algorithm and increase the diagnostic rate for genetic myopathies. In this review, we discuss the utility and critical impact of LRS in this field.
authors: Dennis Yeow, Laura Ivete Rudaks, Ryan Davis, Karl Ng, Roula Ghaoui, Pak Leng Cheong, Gianina Ravenscroft, Marina Kennerson, Ira Deveson, Kishore Raj Kumar

ai.TLDR: 遗传性肌病由核基因组和线粒体基因组中超过300个基因的致病性变异引起。尽管短读长测序（NGS）已革新遗传病诊断，但其对复杂变异的检测能力有限。长读长测序（LRS）通过改进STR扩增、拷贝数变异和结构变异的检测，以及表观遗传变化分析，显著提升诊断效率，但受限于成本和工具开发。
ai.translation: 遗传性肌病是由核基因组和线粒体基因组中超过300个基因的致病性变异引起的疾病。尽管短读长测序（NGS）已显著革新遗传病的诊断流程，但其在检测大型或复杂遗传变异方面仍存在局限性，而这类变异在遗传性肌病中普遍存在。长读长测序（LRS）作为一种新兴的基因检测技术，能够克服NGS的诸多限制。特别是LRS在检测具有挑战性的变异类型方面表现出显著优势，包括短串联重复（STR）扩增、拷贝数变异和结构变异，同时还能改进变异相位分析，并同步评估表观遗传变化（如DNA甲基化）。由于近年来发现的遗传性肌病中STR扩增相关病例显著增加，LRS在同时检测多种STR扩增方面的能力尤为重要。此外，LRS还将助力发现新的肌病相关基因和分子机制。然而，LRS技术的临床应用目前仍受限于高昂成本、技术可及性不足、需要专门的DNA提取流程、LRS生物信息学工具和分析流程的有限可用性，以及健康对照样本的LRS变异数据库相对匮乏。一旦这些障碍被克服，将LRS纳入临床诊断流程无疑会优化诊断算法并提高遗传性肌病的诊断率。本文综述了LRS在该领域的重要应用价值和关键影响。

title: ON-OFF nanopores for optical control of transmembrane ionic communication
abstract: [Abstract]Nanoscale photoswitchable proteins could facilitate precise spatiotemporal control of transmembrane communication and support studies in synthetic biology, neuroscience, and bioelectronics. Through covalent modification of the -hemolysin protein pore with arylazopyrazole photoswitches, we have produced "photopores" that transition between iontronic resistor and diode modes in response to irradiation at orthogonal wavelengths. In the diode mode, a low-leak OFF-state nanopore exhibits a reversible increase in unitary conductance of more than 20-fold upon irradiation at 365 nm. A rectification ratio of >5 was achieved with photopores in the diode state by either direct or alternating voltage input. Unlike conventional electronic phototransistors with intensity-dependent photoelectric responses, the photopores regulated current output solely based on the wavelength(s) of monochromatic or dual-wavelength irradiation. Dual-wavelength irradiation at various relative intensities allowed graded adjustment of photopore conductance. By using these properties, photonic signals were converted into ionic signals, highlighting the potential applications of photopores as components of smart devices in synthetic biology.
authors: Wang, X.; Kerckhoffs, A.; Riexinger, J.; Cornall, M.; Langton, M. J.; Bayley, H.; Qing, Y.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过共价修饰α-溶血素蛋白孔与光致变色开关，开发出可响应不同波长光照射切换离子电导模式的光孔。这种新型光控纳米孔在365nm光照下可实现超过20倍的单通道电导率提升，且整流比超过5，为合成生物学智能器件提供了光-电信号转换的新思路。
ai.translation: 纳米尺度的光控蛋白可实现跨膜通讯的时空精确控制，为合成生物学、神经科学和生物电子学研究提供新工具。通过将arylazopyrazole光致变色开关共价修饰到α-溶血素蛋白孔上，我们成功构建出可响应正交波长照射切换离子电导模式的'光孔'。在二极管模式下，低泄漏关闭态纳米孔在365nm光照下可实现单通道电导率超过20倍的可逆增强。通过直接或交流电压输入，在二极管状态下光孔可实现>5的整流比。与传统电子光晶体管依赖光强的光电响应不同，光孔的电流输出仅由单色或双波长照射的波长（s）决定。通过调节不同相对强度的双波长照射，可实现光孔电导率的分级调控。利用这些特性，光信号可被转换为离子信号，凸显了光孔作为合成生物学智能器件组件的应用潜力。

title: Characterization of Vibrio cholerae from the Jukskei River in Johannesburg, South Africa.
abstract: The current study aimed to isolate and characterize Vibrio cholerae isolated from the Jukskei River, one of the largest Rivers in Johannesburg, South Africa. Water samples collected from the Jukskei River were subjected to culture-based methods for the detection and isolation of V. cholerae. Twenty-four V. cholerae were isolated, confirmed using real-time PCR, and sequenced using the MInION portable nanopore-sequencing device. Reference-based genome assemblies were constructed from the raw reads using the EPI2ME software followed by bioinformatics analysis using the Centre for Genomic Epidemiology website. All the V. cholerae isolates isolated from the Jukskei River were classified as non-O1/non-O139 and none of the isolates harbored the cholera toxin gene, ctxA. All 24 V. cholerae isolates belonged to sequence type 741, virulent genes including toxR, vspD, als, hlyA, makA, and rtxA as well as the Vibrio pathogenicity island 2 were detected amongst the isolates. Antimicrobial resistance genes (parC, varG, and gyrA) were detected in 83% of isolates. Although V. cholerae non-O1/non-O139 are not associated with epidemic cholera they can still cause mild to life-threatening illnesses. Therefore, increased surveillance should be considered to better understand the public health risks to the local community.
authors: Luyanda Mkhize, Musa Marimani, Sanelisiwe Thinasonke Duze

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在从南非约翰内斯堡最大的河流之一Jukskei河中分离并表征霍乱弧菌。通过培养法结合实时PCR和MInION便携式纳米孔测序设备，共分离出24株非O1/non-O139霍乱弧菌，均未携带ctxA毒力基因，但携带多种毒力基因和抗药性基因。研究强调需加强非O1/non-O139菌株的监测以评估公共卫生风险。
ai.translation: 本研究旨在从南非约翰内斯堡最大的河流之一Jukskei河中分离并表征霍乱弧菌。从Jukskei河采集的水样通过基于培养的方法进行霍乱弧菌的检测与分离，共分离出24株霍乱弧菌，经实时PCR验证并使用MInION便携式纳米孔测序设备进行测序。通过EPI2ME软件构建参考基因组组装体，并利用Centre for Genomic Epidemiology网站进行生物信息学分析。所有从Jukskei河分离的霍乱弧菌均被分类为非O1/non-O139型，且未检测到霍乱毒素基因ctxA。所有24株霍乱弧菌均属于序列类型741，检测到毒力基因包括toxR、vspD、als、hlyA、makA和rtxA，以及Vibrio致病岛2。83%的分离株中检测到抗菌药物耐药基因（parC、varG和gyrA）。尽管非O1/non-O139型霍乱弧菌与大流行性霍乱无关，但仍可能引起从轻度到危及生命的疾病。因此，应考虑加强监测以更好地了解对当地社区的公共卫生风险。

title: Enhancing pathogens detection in suspected geriatric bloodstream infections using Nanopore-targeted sequencing.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: Bloodstream infections (BSIs) are a critical concern for elderly patients, where prompt and accurate diagnosis is vital for effective treatment. Traditional blood culture methods suffer from delayed results and susceptibility to false-negatives. Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) offers rapid pathogen detection and reporting, presenting a promising alternative. However, the application of NTS for diagnosing suspected BSIs in geriatric patients remains insufficiently studied. We conducted a retrospective cohort study from January 2022 to January 2024, including 198 geriatric patients suspected of BSIs. We utilized NTS to detect pathogen characteristics and compared the effectiveness and consistency of NTS with simultaneous blood culture testing for pathogen detection. NTS demonstrated a pathogen detection rate of 61.1%. The most common bacterial pathogens were 

IMPORTANCE: Bloodstream infections (BSIs) in elderly patients pose substantial diagnostic and therapeutic challenges due to the limitations of traditional blood culture methods, which are hampered by slow turnaround times and false-negatives. Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) emerges as a significant advancement, offering rapid and accurate pathogen detection directly from blood samples. This study demonstrates that NTS provides a higher detection rate and faster results than conventional blood cultures, crucial for the timely management of BSIs in geriatric patients, who often present with multiple or mixed infections and have poorer clinical outcomes. The findings underscore the potential of NTS to enhance diagnostic accuracy and speed, informing more effective treatment strategies and improving overall patient outcomes. Further research is essential to establish NTS as a routine diagnostic tool in the clinical management of BSIs in the elderly.
authors: Menghui Zhao, Yan Ouyang, Junchi Mei, Hang Liu

ai.TLDR: 老年患者血液感染（BSI）的诊断面临传统血培养方法延迟和假阴性率高的挑战。纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）作为快速检测手段，显示出61.1%的病原体检出率，显著优于传统方法。研究证实NTS在老年多病原混合感染的诊断中具有更高的效率和时效性。
ai.translation: 无标签：血液感染（BSIs）是老年患者的重要临床问题，及时准确的诊断对治疗至关重要。传统血培养方法存在结果延迟和假阴性率高的局限性。纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）可实现病原体的快速检测与报告，展现出替代方案的潜力。然而，NTS在老年疑似BSI诊断中的应用仍缺乏充分研究。我们于2022年1月至2024年1月期间开展回顾性队列研究，纳入198例疑似BSI的老年患者，利用NTS检测病原体特征，并与同步血培养检测进行效果和一致性比较。NTS显示61.1%的病原体检出率，最常见的细菌病原体为...（原文省略）。重要性：老年患者BSI的诊断和治疗因传统血培养方法的局限性（如周转时间长和假阴性率高）面临重大挑战。纳米孔靶向测序（NTS）作为技术突破，可直接从血液样本中实现快速准确的病原体检测。本研究证实NTS在检测率和结果时效性上均优于传统血培养，这对老年患者（常合并多病原混合感染且临床预后较差）的及时管理至关重要。研究结果凸显NTS提升诊断准确性和时效性的潜力，为制定更有效的治疗策略、改善患者预后提供依据。进一步研究需确立NTS在老年BSI临床管理中的常规诊断地位。

title: Comprehensive analysis across SMN2 excludes DNA methylation as an epigenetic biomarker for spinal muscular atrophy
abstract: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) is a severe neurodegenerative disease caused by defects in the survival motor neuron 1 (SMN1) gene. The wide variability in SMA severity is partially explained by an inverse correlation with copy number variation of the second human SMN gene (SMN2). Nevertheless, significant variability in severity and treatment response remains unexplained, prompting a search for accessible biomarkers that could explain and predict this variability. DNA methylation of SMN2 has been proposed as one such biomarker, but comprehensive evidence and analyses are lacking. Here, we combined long-read nanopore sequencing with targeted bisulfite sequencing to enable high-resolution analysis of SMN2-specific methylation patterns. We observed tissue-specific variation in DNA methylation across the entire 30 kb SMN2 gene in 29 patients analyzed by long-read nanopore sequencing, identifying variable methylation patterns in the promoter, introns, and 3 UTR. Subsequent targeted analysis of these regions by bisulfite sequencing of blood-derived DNA in 365 SMA patients showed no association between SMN2 methylation and disease severity or treatment response, excluding blood methylation patterns as predictive biomarkers. However, we discovered significant age-associated variation in SMN2 methylation, particularly in intron 1 and the 3 UTR, highlighting DNA methylation as a possible modifier of SMN expression during development and aging. Our approach provides a broadly applicable strategy for detailed but cost-effective and high-throughput characterization of DNA methylation in other genes and diseases, including complex genetic regions.
authors: Zwartkruis, M. M.; Kortooms, J. V.; Gommers, D.; Elferink, M. G.; Signoria, I.; van der Sel, J.; Hop, P. J.; Zwamborn, R. A.; Geene, R.; Green, J. W.; van Deutekom, H. W.; van Rheenen, W.; Veldink, J.; Asselman, F.-L.; Wadman, R. I.; van der Pol, W. L.; van Haaften, G. W.; Groen, E. J.

ai.TLDR: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）的严重程度差异与SMN2基因拷贝数变异相关，但甲基化模式的预测价值仍存争议。本研究通过长读长纳米孔测序结合重亚硫酸盐测序技术，发现SMN2甲基化存在组织特异性变化，但血液样本中甲基化模式与疾病严重程度无显著关联。研究揭示了SMN2甲基化随年龄变化的规律，提示其可能影响神经元表达调控。
ai.translation: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）是一种由生存运动神经元1（SMN1）基因缺陷引起的严重神经退行性疾病。SMA严重程度的广泛变异部分归因于SMN2基因拷贝数变异与疾病严重程度的反向相关性。然而，疾病严重程度和治疗反应的显著变异仍需进一步解释，因此亟需寻找可解释和预测这种变异的可及性生物标志物。尽管SMN2 DNA甲基化被提出作为潜在生物标志物，但缺乏系统性证据和分析。本研究结合长读长纳米孔测序与靶向重亚硫酸盐测序技术，实现了SMN2特异性甲基化模式的高分辨率分析。在通过长读长纳米孔测序分析的29例患者中，观察到整个30 kb SMN2基因在组织间存在甲基化差异，包括启动子、内含子和3'UTR区域的可变甲基化模式。随后对365例SMA患者的血液衍生DNA进行重亚硫酸盐测序靶向分析，结果显示SMN2甲基化与疾病严重程度或治疗反应无显著关联，排除了血液甲基化模式作为预测生物标志物的可能性。然而，研究发现SMN2甲基化存在显著的年龄相关性变化，尤其在内含子1和3'UTR区域，提示DNA甲基化可能作为发育和衰老过程中SMN表达的调节因子。本研究方法为其他基因和疾病的DNA甲基化特征化提供了广泛适用的策略，包括复杂遗传区域的高通量、低成本分析。

title: The Impact of Acute Endurance Exercise on Alternative Splicing in Skeletal Muscle
abstract:
II:PurposeAlternative splicing (AS) is a highly conserved post-transcriptional mechanism, generating mRNA variants to diversify the proteome. Acute endurance exercise appears to transiently perturb AS in skeletal muscle, but transcriptome-wide responses are not well-defined. We aimed to better understand differential AS (DAS) and differential isoform expression (DIE) in skeletal muscle by comparing short-read (SRS) and long-read RNA sequencing (LRS) data.

MethodsPublicly accessible SRS of clinical exercise studies were extracted from the Gene Expression Omnibus. Oxford Nanopore LRS was performed on mouse gastrocnemius before and following treadmill exercise (30m running, n=5 mice/group, 20 total, 10 weeks old). Differential gene expression (DGE) and DIE were analyzed and validated using RT-PCR and immunoblots.

ResultsBoth SRS and LRS illustrated significant DGE in skeletal muscle post-exercise, including 89 RNA-binding proteins (RBPs). rMATS analysis of SRS revealed that exon-skipping and intron-retaining events were the most common. Swan analysis of LRS revealed several common genes across post-exercise cohorts with significant DAS but no DGE: 13 exercise-associated genes, including mSirt2 (24.5% shift at 24hr post-exercise [24pe], p=0.005); 61 RBPs, including mHnrnpa3 (28.5% at 24pe, p=0.02), mHnrnpa1 (30.6% at 24pe, p=0.004), and mTia1 (53.6% at 24pe, p=0.004).

ConclusionsWe illustrated that acute endurance exercise can elicit changes in AS-related responses and RBP expression in skeletal muscle, especially at 24pe. SRS is a powerful tool for analyzing DGE but lacks isoform detection, posing a major gap in knowledge of "hidden" genes with no transcriptional but significant DIE and protein expression changes. Additionally, LRS can uncover previously unknown transcript diversity and mechanisms influencing endurance exercise adaptations and responses.
authors: Ahn, A.; Kim, J. J.; Slusher, A. L.; Ying, J. Y.; Zhang, E. Y.; Ludlow, A. T.

ai.TLDR: 急性耐力运动可引起骨骼肌可变剪接相关反应和RNA结合蛋白表达变化，尤其在运动后24小时显著。短读RNA测序（SRS）能有效分析差异基因表达（DGE）但缺乏异构体检测能力，而长读RNA测序（LRS）可揭示隐藏基因的转录异构体表达（DIE）和蛋白表达变化。
ai.translation:
II: 目的 可变剪接（Alternative splicing, AS）是一种高度保守的转录后机制，通过生成mRNA变体来多样化蛋白质组。急性耐力运动似乎会暂时扰乱骨骼肌的可变剪接，但全转录组响应尚未明确。本研究旨在通过比较短读（SRS）和长读RNA测序（LRS）数据，更深入理解骨骼肌中的差异可变剪接（DAS）和差异异构体表达（DIE）。

方法 从Gene Expression Omnibus提取临床运动研究的公开SRS数据。使用Oxford Nanopore技术对小鼠腓肠肌进行长读RNA测序（LRS），在 treadmill运动前及运动后（30米跑步，每组5只小鼠，共20只，10周龄）进行分析。通过RT-PCR和免疫印迹验证差异基因表达（DGE）和DIE。

结果 SRS和LRS均显示运动后骨骼肌存在显著DGE，包括89个RNA结合蛋白（RBPs）。SRS的rMATS分析显示外显子跳过和内含子保留是最常见的事件。LRS的Swan分析发现运动后队列中多个基因具有显著DAS但无DGE：13个运动相关基因（如mSirt2在运动后24小时（24pe）变化24.5% [p=0.005]）；61个RBPs（如mHnrnpa3在24pe变化28.5% [p=0.02]，mHnrnpa1变化30.6% [p=0.004]，mTia1变化53.6% [p=0.004]）。

结论 急性耐力运动可引起骨骼肌中与可变剪接相关的反应和RBPs表达变化，尤其在运动后24小时显著。SRS是分析DGE的强大工具，但缺乏异构体检测能力，导致对无转录变化但存在显著DIE和蛋白表达变化的'隐藏'基因认知存在重大知识缺口。此外，LRS可揭示先前未知的转录多样性及影响耐力运动适应和反应的机制。

title: Nanopores for DNA and biomolecule analysis: Diagnostic, genomic insights, applications in energy conversion and catalysis.
abstract: Recently, nanopores have emerged as highly significant structures with broad applications in diverse scientific and technological fields. They can naturally occur in biological membranes or be artificially fabricated using advanced techniques. Recent advances in nanopore technology have revolutionized genomics by offering previously unheard-of capacities for deoxyribo nucleic acid (DNA) sequencing and analysis. These tiny pores allow individual molecules to be found more easily, allowing for real-time DNA analysis and providing currently unheard-of insights into genetics and diagnostics. By tracking alterations in electrical or ionic currents as biomolecules traverse the pore, nanopores make possible the real-time recognition of other biomolecules, like proteins, nucleic acids, and small molecules, eliminating the need for labeling. This label-free detection potential holds a huge promise in medical diagnostics, genotyping, environmental monitoring, etc. Nanopores have significantly improved DNA sequencing technology such as increment in read length, enabling researchers to sequence entire genomic regions, accuracy can be improved and recent updates have led to a reported increase in total DNA reads, demonstrating the technology's capacity for high-throughput applications via trapping individual DNA strands and monitoring the variations of ionic current as each nucleotide passes across the pore. Finally, nanopore sequencing is well-known as a novel and highly flexible technique for DNA analyses, which has a huge deal of promise in clinical diagnosis and genomics research. Hence, this review article comprehensively explains nanopores for DNA analysis and other biomolecules, their synthesis, and diverse applications.
authors: Pradakshina Sharma, Tasmiya Sana, Shaheen Khatoon, Ubiad Mushtaq Naikoo, Mosina, Nitesh Malhotra, Md Saquib Hasnain, Amit Kumar Nayak, Jagriti Narang

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术作为基因组学革命性工具，通过实时无标记检测实现了DNA测序的突破性进展。该技术凭借对离子电流变化的精准捕捉，显著提升了测序效率和应用潜力，为临床诊断和基因组研究提供了全新解决方案。
ai.translation: 近年来，纳米孔已发展成为具有广泛应用的高价值结构，在生物膜中天然存在或通过先进工艺人工制造。纳米孔技术的最新进展彻底革新了基因组学领域，为脱氧核糖核酸（DNA）测序和分析提供了前所未有的能力。这些微小孔道使单分子检测更加便捷，实现了DNA的实时分析，并提供了关于遗传学和诊断学的全新见解。通过追踪生物分子穿过孔道时的电信号或离子电流变化，纳米孔技术能够实现对蛋白质、核酸和小分子等其他生物分子的实时识别，无需依赖标记。这种无标记检测潜力在医学诊断、基因分型、环境监测等领域展现出巨大前景。纳米孔技术显著提升了DNA测序技术，如延长读取长度，使研究人员能够对整个基因组区域进行测序，提高准确性。近期技术更新已实现总DNA读取量的显著提升，证明了该技术通过捕获单条DNA链并监测每个核苷酸穿过孔道时的离子电流变化，具备高通量应用能力。最终，纳米孔测序作为DNA分析的新颖灵活技术，已在临床诊断和基因组学研究中展现出巨大潜力。因此，本文全面阐述了纳米孔在DNA分析及其他生物分子中的应用，其合成方法及多样化应用场景。

title: Joint processing of long- and short-read sequencing data with deep learning improves variant calling.
abstract: Despite the complementary strengths of short- and long-read sequencing approaches, variant-calling methods still rely on a single data type. In this study, we collected and harmonized Nanopore datasets of the seven healthy individuals in the GIAB project across three independent consortia. By leveraging these harmonized Nanopore data, we explore the benefits of using a hybrid DeepVariant model to jointly process Illumina and Nanopore data for germline variant detection. We show that a shallow hybrid long-short sequencing approach can match or surpass the germline variant detection accuracy of state-of-the-art single-technology methods, potentially reducing overall sequencing costs and enabling the detection of large germline structural variations. These findings hold great promise for molecular diagnostics in clinical settings, particularly for rare genetic disease screenings.
authors: Gennaro Gambardella

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过整合Nanopore测序数据与Illumina数据，利用混合DeepVariant模型提升了胚系变异检测的准确性。该浅层混合长短读测序方法在降低整体测序成本的同时，可有效检测大片段胚系结构变异，为临床罕见遗传病筛查提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 尽管短读和长读测序技术具有互补优势，但变异检测方法仍依赖单一数据类型。本研究收集并整合了GIAB项目中七名健康个体在三个独立联盟中的Nanopore测序数据。通过利用这些整合后的Nanopore数据，我们探索了采用混合DeepVariant模型联合处理Illumina和Nanopore数据在胚系变异检测中的优势。研究结果表明，浅层混合长短读测序方法可匹配或超越当前单技术方法的胚系变异检测准确性，有望降低整体测序成本并实现大片段胚系结构变异的检测。这些发现对临床分子诊断具有重要应用前景，特别是在罕见遗传病筛查领域。

title: Validation of Human Papillomavirus Genotyping by Oxford Nanopore Sequencing in Formalin-Fixed, Paraffin-Embedded Tissues and ThinPrep Anal and Gynecologic Samples.
journal: The Journal of molecular diagnostics : JMD
abstract: Human papillomavirus (HPV) is linked to various cancers, including cervical, anal, and head and neck cancers. Conventional methods for HPV genotyping and commercial platforms are limited to detecting high-risk HPV genotypes primarily in gynecologic samples. Because of changing trends in the epidemiology and pathogenesis, there is a growing need for HPV genotyping techniques applicable to emerging clinical contexts involving diverse sample types, such as head and neck or anal samples, particularly for formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded (FFPE) tissues. This study aimed to validate amplicon-based sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) for the detection and genotyping of HPV in 181 samples, including FFPE head and neck samples, and ThinPrep liquid-based cytology samples from anal and gynecologic tissues. Sanger sequencing was used as a reference for genotyping accuracy. The ONT sequencing method demonstrated a limit of detection of 1 copy/μL for HPV16 and HPV18. Perfect agreement (κ coefficient = 1.0) was observed for HPV detection across all sample types. Genotyping accuracy exceeded 95%, and ONT identified additional genotypes in certain anal and gynecologic samples that were undetected by Sanger sequencing. The assay showed high reproducibility, with consistent results across intrarun and interrun analyses. This study is the first to validate ONT sequencing for HPV genotyping in FFPE head and neck samples. ONT provides a rapid, cost-effective method for comprehensive HPV genotyping in diverse sample types.
authors: Carolina Hernandez, Luz H Patiño, Milena Camargo, Ching Yi Wang, Feng Chen, Bernadette Liggayu, Liyong Cao, Carlos Cordon-Cardo, Emilia M Sordillo, Alberto Paniz-Mondolfi, Juan D Ramírez

ai.TLDR: 本研究验证了基于扩增子测序的Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)技术在FFPE头颈样本和液基薄prep样本中的HPV检测与分型能力。ONT测序在181个样本中展现出100%的检测一致性及超过95%的分型准确率，可识别Sanger测序未检出的HPV亚型。
ai.translation: 人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）与多种癌症相关，包括宫颈癌、肛门癌和头颈癌。传统HPV分型方法及商业平台主要局限于妇科样本中高危型HPV的检测。由于流行病学和发病机制的变化趋势，亟需适用于新兴临床场景的HPV分型技术，包括头颈癌或肛门癌样本，特别是福尔马林固定石蜡包埋（FFPE）组织。本研究旨在验证基于扩增子测序的Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)技术在181个样本中的HPV检测与分型能力，样本包括FFPE头颈样本和薄prep液基细胞学样本（来自肛门及妇科组织）。Sanger测序作为分型准确性的参考标准。ONT测序方法对HPV16和HPV18的检测限为1 copy/μL。所有样本类型中HPV检测均表现出完美一致性（κ系数=1.0）。分型准确率超过95%，ONT在部分肛门及妇科样本中识别出Sanger测序未检出的HPV亚型。该检测方法表现出高可重复性，同一批次及不同批次分析结果一致。本研究首次验证ONT测序在FFPE头颈样本中的HPV分型应用。ONT技术为多样样本类型提供快速、经济的全面HPV分型方案。

title: Learning From Full Characterization of HIV Proviruses in People Receiving Long-Acting Cabotegravir/Rilpivirine With a History of Replication on the Antiretroviral Classes.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: To better understand factors associated with virologic response, we retrospectively characterized the HIV proviruses of 7 people with HIV who received long-acting cabotegravir/rilpivirine (CAB/RPV-LA) and were selected according to the following criteria: virologic control achieved despite a history of viral replication on 1 or both corresponding antiretroviral classes (n = 6) and virologic failure (VF) after CAB/RPV-LA initiation (n = 1).

METHODS: Last available blood samples before the initiation of CAB/RPV-LA were analyzed retrospectively. Near full-length HIV DNA genome haplotypes were inferred from Nanopore sequencing by the in vivo Genome Diversity Analyzer to search for archived drug resistance mutations (DRMs) and evaluate the frequency and intactness of proviruses harboring DRMs.

RESULTS: Archived DRMs including G-to-A mutations were found in samples from 3 patients who maintained virologic control. Genomes harboring DRMs were majorly in minority variants (<20%) and were defective in all cases except for 1 participant. In this participant, intact genomes with the H221Y mutation on reverse transcriptase were detected representing 11 copies per 10

CONCLUSIONS: Our findings highlight the difficulty in interpreting the clinical significance of DRMs when detected in proviral DNA and the need to filter out hypermutated sequences. Detected DRMs could be harbored by defective archived genomes unlikely to contribute to treatment failure.
authors: Gilbert Mchantaf, Antoine Chaillon, Caroline Charre, Adeline Melard, Elise Gardiennet, Jérôme Guinard, Thierry Prazuck, Clémence Guillaume, Alice-Andrée Mariaggi, Julie Bois, Laurent Hocqueloux, Véronique Avettand-Fenoel

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过分析长效抗HIV药物CAB/RPV-LA治疗患者的病毒基因组，发现存档的耐药突变多为缺陷性变异，可能无法解释治疗失败。研究强调了在解读耐药突变临床意义时需过滤高突变序列的重要性。
ai.translation: 背景：为更深入理解影响病毒学反应的因素，我们回顾性分析了7名接受长效cabotegravir/rilpivirine（CAB/RPV-LA）治疗的HIV患者。这些患者根据以下标准筛选：尽管在1或2种对应抗逆转录病毒药物类别中曾出现病毒复制史仍实现病毒学控制（n=6），或在CAB/RPV-LA治疗后出现病毒学失败（VF）（n=1）。方法：回顾性分析CAB/RPV-LA治疗开始前的最后可用血液样本。通过Nanopore测序结合in vivo Genome Diversity Analyzer推断近全长度HIV DNA基因组等位基因，以检测存档的耐药突变（DRMs）并评估携带DRMs的前病毒的频率和完整性。结果：在维持病毒学控制的3名患者样本中检测到存档的DRMs包括G-to-A突变。携带DRMs的基因组主要为少数变异（<20%），且所有病例均存在缺陷，仅1名参与者检测到携带逆转录酶H221Y突变的完整基因组，代表每10^6个细胞中有11个拷贝。结论：我们的发现强调了在前病毒DNA中检测到DRMs时解读其临床意义的困难，以及过滤高突变序列的必要性。检测到的DRMs可能由无法导致治疗失败的缺陷性存档基因组携带。

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过结合Nanopore与Illumina测序技术的混合组装方法，解析了线粒体基因组的详细结构。结果显示该基因组呈现单个环状结构，包含31个蛋白质编码基因，并揭示了线粒体与叶绿体基因组间的同源片段及系统发育关系。
