title: Clinico-genomic study reveals association of dengue virus genome high frequency mutations with dengue disease severity.
abstract: Transmission of the dengue virus (DENV) places a huge burden on public health in several endemic regions. Like other RNA viruses, mutations in the DENV genome greatly governs its virulence, transmissibility, and interaction with the host immune system. Present study focuses on integrated analysis of mutation and clinical data accompanied at the onset of dengue fever. The findings from the associated clinical data with the variants of the DENV are critical for early detection of the disease and understanding the disease progression. RNA was isolated from the 1310 serum samples collected from the NS1-antigen positive dengue patients. Serotyping reveals that DENV-2 was predominant in circulation. The genome of 1305 DENV-2 was sequenced using Oxford Nanopore Technology and Illumina platforms. A total of 1023 DENV-2 demonstrated > 50% genome coverage. Mutation analysis across the 1023 DENV-2 genomes yielded a total of 2667 mutations including 627 non-synonymous and 2040 synonymous mutations. We observed a notable over-representation of synonymous mutations in prM and ancC genes while a higher occurrence of non-synonymous mutations was found in ancC, prM, and M proteins. Comparison of mutation frequency between mild and severe demonstrates higher mutation frequency in severe phenotype. Moreover, we observed a total of 56 significant mutations including 23 in severe, 17 in moderate and 16 in mild. The E-protein having non-synonymous mutations were docked with DC-SIGN with lower binding energy (ΔG = - 11.9 kcal/mol) for severe as compared to mild (ΔG = - 13.5 kcal/mol), suggesting lesser affinity of E-protein and DC-SIGN in case of severe as compared to the mild. We have identified the core set of high frequency mutations significantly associated with distinct dengue disease severity viz., mild, moderate and severe. Furthermore, in-silico protein modelling and docking studies demonstrate the potential functional role of the non-synonymous mutations identified across E-protein in severe dengue.
authors: Varsha Ravi, Md Imran, Kriti Khare, Pallavi Mishra, Ramakant Mohite, Kanika, Md Abuzar Khan, Aparna Swaminathan, Aanchal Yadav, Sristi Sinha, Richa Shukla, Partha Chattopadhyay, Jyoti Soni, Ranjeet Maurya, Tavpritesh Sethi, Bansidhar Tarai, Sandeep Budhiraja, Rajesh Pandey

ai.TLDR: 登革热病毒（DENV）的基因组突变与其致病性、传播力及宿主免疫系统交互密切相关。本研究通过整合突变分析与临床数据，揭示了不同严重程度登革热病例的突变特征，发现严重病例中非同义突变频率显著升高，并通过计算生物学方法验证了E蛋白与DC-SIGN结合能的差异。
ai.translation: 登革热病毒（DENV）的传播对多个流行地区的公共卫生系统造成巨大负担。与其他RNA病毒类似，DENV基因组中的突变在决定其致病性、传播能力及与宿主免疫系统相互作用方面起关键作用。本研究聚焦于登革热发病初期的突变与临床数据的整合分析。将DENV变异体与临床数据关联的发现，对于疾病的早期检测和疾病进展机制的理解具有重要意义。从1310份NS1抗原阳性登革热患者血清样本中提取RNA，血清型分析显示DENV-2在流行中占主导地位。采用Oxford Nanopore Technology和Illumina平台对1305株DENV-2基因组进行测序，共获得1023株DENV-2的基因组覆盖度超过50%。对1023株DENV-2基因组的突变分析共鉴定出2667个突变，包括627个非同义突变和2040个同义突变。观察到prM和ancC基因中同义突变显著富集，而ancC、prM和M蛋白中非同义突变发生频率更高。比较轻度与重度病例的突变频率发现，重度病例突变频率显著升高。此外，共鉴定出56个显著突变，其中重度病例23个、中度病例17个、轻度病例16个。携带非同义突变的E蛋白与DC-SIGN的结合能计算显示，重度病例的结合能（ΔG=-11.9 kcal/mol）显著高于轻度病例（ΔG=-13.5 kcal/mol），表明E蛋白与DC-SIGN的亲和力在重度病例中较轻度病例更低。我们鉴定了与不同登革热严重程度（轻度、中度、重度）显著相关的高频突变核心集合。此外，基于计算机的蛋白质建模和对接研究进一步验证了E蛋白中非同义突变在重度登革热中的潜在功能作用。

title: Rapid Clinical Resolution and Differential Diagnosis of a Neurological Case of Feline Infectious Peritonitis (FIP) Using GS-441524.
abstract: A 2-year-old male neutered domestic shorthair cat was presented with a progressive history of tetraparesis, ataxia, and inappetence over 4 days. A physical exam revealed mucopurulent nasal discharge and stertor. A neurologic exam revealed a multifocal neurolocalization. The cat was non-ambulatory tetraparetic and developed seizures while in hospital. Hematologic assessment revealed anemia, hypoalbuminemia and hyperglobulinemia. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain revealed multifocal meningeal contrast enhancement in the brainstem and cervical spine, as well as mandibular and retropharyngeal lymphadenopathy. Cerebrospinal fluid revealed marked neutrophilic pleocytosis; no infectious organisms were seen.
authors: Amy Huynh, Pamela Moraguez, Logan M Watkins, Jonathan H Wood, Ximena A Olarte-Castillo, Gary R Whittaker

ai.TLDR: 一只2岁公猫出现进行性四肢弛缓性瘫痪、共济失调和食欲减退，经MRI和脑脊液检查发现多发性脑膜增强及淋巴结病变，但未发现感染病原体。血液检查显示贫血、低白蛋白血症和高球蛋白血症，提示潜在的系统性炎症反应。
ai.translation: 一只2岁去势的家猫因持续4天的进行性四肢弛缓性瘫痪、共济失调和食欲减退就诊。体格检查发现黏液脓性鼻分泌物和喘鸣样呼吸。神经系统检查显示多发性神经定位体征。猫出现非自主性四肢弛缓性瘫痪，并在住院期间发生癫痫发作。血液检查显示贫血、低白蛋白血症和高球蛋白血症。脑部磁共振成像（MRI）显示脑干和颈椎脊髓多发性脑膜对比增强，以及下颌和咽后淋巴结病变。脑脊液检查显示显著的中性粒细胞增多性细胞增多，未见感染性病原体。

title: Integrating sequencing methods with machine learning for antimicrobial susceptibility testing in pediatric infections: current advances and future insights.
abstract: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) presents a critical challenge in clinical settings, particularly among pediatric patients with life-threatening conditions such as sepsis, meningitis, and neonatal infections. The increasing prevalence of multi- and pan-resistant pathogens is strongly associated with adverse clinical outcomes. Recent technological advances in sequencing methods, including metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS), Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), and targeted sequencing (TS), have significantly enhanced the detection of both pathogens and their associated resistance genes. However, discrepancies between resistance gene detection and antimicrobial susceptibility testing (AST) often hinder the direct clinical application of sequencing results. These inconsistencies may arise from factors such as genetic mutations or variants in resistance genes, differences in the phenotypic expression of resistance, and the influence of environmental conditions on resistance levels, which can lead to variations in the observed resistance patterns. Machine learning (ML) provides a promising solution by integrating large-scale resistance data with sequencing outcomes, enabling more accurate predictions of pathogen drug susceptibility. This review explores the application of sequencing technologies and ML in the context of pediatric infections, with a focus on their potential to track the evolution of resistance genes and predict antibiotic susceptibility. The goal of this review is to promote the incorporation of ML-based predictions into clinical practice, thereby improving the management of AMR in pediatric populations.
authors: Zhuan Zou, Fajuan Tang, Lina Qiao, Sisi Wang, Haiyang Zhang

ai.TLDR: 抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）在儿科重症感染中构成重大临床挑战，测序技术进步虽提升了病原体检测能力，但耐药基因检测与药敏试验结果的差异限制了其临床应用。机器学习通过整合大规模耐药数据与测序结果，为预测病原体药物敏感性提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 抗菌药物耐药性（Antimicrobial Resistance, AMR）在临床环境中构成重大挑战，尤其在患有危及生命的儿科感染（如败血症、脑膜炎和新生儿感染）患者中。多药耐药和全耐药病原体的流行与不良临床结局密切相关。近年来，测序技术的进步，包括宏基因组下一代测序（metagenomic next-generation sequencing, mNGS）、牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）和靶向测序（targeted sequencing, TS），显著提升了病原体及其相关耐药基因的检测能力。然而，耐药基因检测结果与抗菌药物敏感性测试（antimicrobial susceptibility testing, AST）之间的差异常阻碍测序结果的直接临床应用。这些不一致性可能源于耐药基因的遗传突变或变异、耐药表型表达差异以及环境因素对耐药水平的影响，导致观察到的耐药模式出现差异。机器学习（machine learning, ML）通过整合大规模耐药数据与测序结果，为更准确预测病原体药物敏感性提供了有前景的解决方案。本文综述了测序技术与机器学习在儿科感染中的应用，重点探讨其追踪耐药基因演变和预测抗生素敏感性的潜力。本文旨在推动基于机器学习的预测结果在临床实践中的应用，从而改善儿科人群中的抗菌药物耐药性管理。

title: HIGH PRECISION CHARACTERIZATION OF RCCX REARRANGEMENTS IN A 21-HYDROXYLASE DEFICIENCY LATIN AMERICAN COHORT USING OXFORD NANOPORE LONG READ SEQUENCING
abstract: The gene CYP21A2, mapped to the RCCX module in 6p21.3, is responsible for the 21-hydroxylase deficiency (21OHD). In this work, we used Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) Long Reads (LR) sequencing to analyze samples from a large Argentinian cohort of 21OHD. Our goal was to gain additional information about the GVs involved in the rearrangements, to obtain higher resolution for the breakpoints of converted alleles and to retrieve new data of TNX and CYP21A1P genes. A total of 34 samples were sequenced in 2 amplicons of 8.5 Kb covering the centromeric and telomeric RCCX modules. The number of GVs found varied between 17-106 and all expected pathogenic GVs and new ones were obtained with the LR sequencing workflow developed. From the 21 alleles with macroconverted or chimeric genes containing the promoter of the CYP21A1P, we uncovered 5 of them lacking GVs commonly expected to be involved in 21OHD rearrangements. Importantly, we reclassified one patient with a deletion that had been overlooked with the current diagnostic technologies applied. These new findings change the genetic counseling for the patient and his family related to the presence of a carrier allele for Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia and Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome (CAH-X). Furthermore, by addressing the study of the centromeric and the telomeric RCCX modules, we found 19 GVs for CYP21A1P and 29 GVs for TNXA not previously described in Latin American populations or not reported in any of the consulted databases. This study may represent the first one applying ONT LR in clinical studies in Latin America, highlighting the importance of LR sequencing as a high-resolution method of diagnosis and better cost-effective balance. It allows us to better understand the diversity of the RCCX modules and to gain knowledge of the molecular pathogenesis of the disease.
authors: Claps, A.; Kolomenski, J. E.; Fernandez, F.; Macchiaroli, N.; Ingravidi, M. L.; Delea, M.; Fernandez, C.; Castro, T.; Laiseca, J.; Kamenetzky, L.; Taboas, M. I.; Dain, L. B.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序分析阿根廷21OHD患者样本，揭示了RCCX模块重组事件中的新型基因变异（GVs），并修正了先前诊断技术遗漏的病例。新发现为先天性肾上腺皮质增生症（CAH-X）的遗传咨询提供了重要依据。
ai.translation: CYP21A2基因位于6p21.3的RCCX模块，负责21-羟化酶缺乏症（21OHD）。本研究采用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序（LR）分析了阿根廷大型21OHD队列样本。研究目标包括：获取重组事件中涉及的基因变异（GVs）信息，提高转换等位基因断点的分辨率，并获取TNX和CYP21A1P基因的新数据。共对34个样本进行了8.5 Kb扩增子测序，覆盖着丝粒和端粒RCCX模块。发现的GVs数量在17-106之间，所有预期致病性GVs及新型GVs均通过开发的LR测序流程获得。在21个包含CYP21A1P启动子的宏转换或嵌合基因等位基因中，发现了5个缺乏预期参与21OHD重组的GVs。重要的是，重新分类了一例先前诊断技术遗漏的缺失病例。这些新发现改变了患者及其家庭关于先天性肾上腺皮质增生症（CAH-X）携带者等位基因的遗传咨询。进一步研究着丝粒和端粒RCCX模块，发现19个CYP21A1P和29个TNXA的新型GVs，这些在拉丁美洲人群或数据库中均未被描述。本研究可能代表拉丁美洲首个应用ONT LR的临床研究，凸显了LR测序作为高分辨率诊断方法的重要性，同时实现了更优的成本效益平衡。该研究有助于更深入理解RCCX模块的多样性，并揭示疾病的分子发病机制。

title: Dissecting current rectification through asymmetric nanopores
abstract:
Rectification, the tendency of bidirectional ionic conductors to favor ion flow in a specific direction, is an intrinsic property of many ion channels and synthetic nanopores. Despite its frequent occurrence in ion channels and its phenomenological explanation using Eyrings rate theory, a quantitative relationship between the rectified current and the underlying ion-specific and voltage-dependent free energy profile has been lacking. In this study, we designed nanopores in which potassium and chloride current rectification can be manipulated by altering the electrostatic pore polarity. Using molecular dynamics-based free energy simulations, we quantified voltage-dependent changes of free energy barriers in six ion-nanopore systems. Our results illustrate how the energy barriers for inward and outward fluxes become unequal in the presence of an electromotive driving force, leading to varying degrees of rectification for cation and anion currents. This work establishes a direct link between equilibrium potential of mean force and current rectification rate and demonstrates that rectification caused by energy barrier asymmetry depends on the nature of the permeating ion, can be tuned by pore polarity, does not require ion binding sites, conformational flexibility, or specific pore geometry, and, as such, may be widespread among ion channels.

Statement of significanceIn many ion channels, ions flow faster in one direction than the other, even under equal magnitude of driving forces. This phenomenon, known as rectification, often arises as an intrinsic biophysical property of the channel pore and has significant physiological implications. Our molecular dynamics simulations provide a unified framework to dissect the free energy profiles that underpin current rectification. This approach has broad applications in the field of ion channel biology and material design.
authors: Lin, Y.; Lacroix, J. J.; Sterling, J.; Luo, Y. L.

ai.TLDR: 离子通道中离子整流现象（离子在特定方向流动的倾向）的机制被揭示。研究通过分子动力学模拟发现，自由能势垒的不对称性导致整流效应，且该现象不依赖离子结合位点或孔道几何结构。该成果为离子通道研究和材料设计提供了理论框架。
ai.translation:
整流（ion rectification）是指双向离子导体倾向于在特定方向优先传导离子的固有特性，是许多离子通道和合成纳米孔的内在属性。尽管该现象在离子通道中普遍存在，并可通过Eyring速率理论进行现象学解释，但关于整流电流与底层离子选择性及电压依赖性自由能势垒之间定量关系的研究仍属空白。本研究设计了可通过改变静电孔道极性调控钾离子和氯离子整流效应的纳米孔体系。基于分子动力学的自由能模拟揭示了六种离子-纳米孔系统中电压依赖的自由能势垒变化。结果表明，在电化学驱动力作用下，内向与外向离子流的自由能势垒差异导致阳离子和阴离子电流呈现不同程度的整流效应。该研究建立了平衡势能均力与整流速率之间的直接关联，证明由能量势垒不对称性引发的整流效应取决于渗透离子的性质，可通过孔道极性调控实现，且不依赖离子结合位点、构象灵活性或特定孔道几何结构，因此可能广泛存在于离子通道中。

重要性声明：在许多离子通道中，离子在相同驱动力下呈现单向流动加速现象。这种称为整流的特性常作为通道孔道的固有生物物理属性，具有显著生理意义。我们的分子动力学模拟为解析支撑整流效应的自由能势垒提供了统一框架。该方法在离子通道生物学和材料设计领域具有广泛应用前景。

title: Telomeric Repeat-Containing RNA Increases in Aged Human Cells
abstract: Telomeric repeat-containing RNA (TERRA), transcribed from subtelomeric regions towards telomeric ends, poses challenges in deciphering its complete sequences. Utilizing TERRA-capture RNA-seq and Oxford Nanopore direct RNA sequencing to acquire full-length TERRA, we annotate TERRA transcription regions in the human T2T-CHM13 reference genome. TERRA transcripts encompass hundreds to over a thousand nucleotides of telomeric repeats, predominantly originating from 61-29-37 bp repeat promoters enriched with H3K4me3, RNA pol II, CTCF, and R-loops. We develop a bioinformatics tool, TERRA-QUANT, for quantifying TERRA using RNA-seq datasets and find that TERRA increases with age in blood, brain, and fibroblasts. TERRA upregulation in aged leukocytes is confirmed by RT-qPCR. Single-cell RNA-seq analysis demonstrates TERRA expression across various cell types, with upregulation observed in neurons during human embryonic stem cell differentiation. Additionally, TERRA levels are elevated in brain cells in the early stage of Alzheimers disease. Our study provides evidence linking TERRA to human aging and diseases.
authors: Chu, H.-P. C.; Hsieh, Y.-H.; Tai, C.-H.; Yeh, M.-T.; Yang, P.-C.; Chen, Y.-C.; Yen, C.-P.; Han, D.-S.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过TERRA捕获RNA测序和Oxford Nanopore直接RNA测序技术，首次解析了人类全长TERRA序列，发现其与衰老和疾病存在显著关联。研究揭示TERRA表达随年龄增长在血液、脑组织和成纤维细胞中显著上升，并在阿尔茨海默病早期脑细胞中异常升高。
ai.translation: 端粒重复序列包含的RNA（TERRA）由亚端粒区域向端粒末端转录，其完整序列解析面临技术挑战。本研究采用TERRA捕获RNA测序与Oxford Nanopore直接RNA测序技术，获取全长TERRA序列，并在人类T2T-CHM13参考基因组中注释TERRA转录区域。TERRA转录本包含数百至超过一千个端粒重复序列，主要来源于61-29-37 bp重复启动子区域，该区域富集H3K4me3、RNA pol II、CTCF和R-loop结构。开发的TERRA-QUANT生物信息学工具通过RNA-seq数据集量化TERRA，发现其在血液、脑组织和成纤维细胞中随年龄增长显著上升。通过RT-qPCR验证了衰老白细胞中TERRA的上调现象。单细胞RNA测序显示TERRA在多种细胞类型中表达，神经元分化过程中出现显著上调。此外，阿尔茨海默病早期脑细胞中TERRA水平异常升高。本研究首次建立了TERRA与人类衰老及疾病之间的关联证据。

title: Illumina Complete Long Read Assay yields contiguous bacterial genomes from human gut metagenomes
abstract:
Metagenomics enables direct investigation of the gene content and potential functions of gut bacteria without isolation and culture. However, metagenome-assembled genomes are often incomplete and have low contiguity due to challenges in assembling repeated genomic elements. Long-read sequencing approaches have successfully yielded circular bacterial genomes directly from metagenomes, but these approaches are low throughput, have high DNA input requirements, and can have high error rates. Illumina has recently launched the Illumina Complete Long Read (ICLR) assay, a new approach for generating kilobase-scale reads with low DNA input requirements and high accuracy. Here, we evaluate the performance of ICLR sequencing for gut metagenomics. We sequenced a microbial mock community and ten human gut microbiome samples with standard, shotgun 2x150 paired-end sequencing, ICLR sequencing, and nanopore long-read sequencing and compared performance in read lengths, assembly contiguity, and bin quality. We find that ICLR human metagenomic assemblies have higher N50 (119.5 {+/-} 24.8 kilobases) than short read assemblies (9.9 {+/-} 4.5 kilobases; p = 0.002), and comparable N50 to nanopore assemblies (91.0 {+/-} 43.8 kilobases; p = 0.32). Additionally, we find that ICLR draft microbial genomes are more complete (94.0% {+/-} 20.6%) than nanopore draft genomes (85.9% {+/-} 23.0%; p[≤] 0.001), and that nanopore draft genomes have truncated gene lengths (924.6 {+/-} 114.7 base pairs) relative to ICLR genomes (954.6 {+/-} 71.5 base pairs; p[≤] 0.001). Overall, we find that ICLR sequencing is a promising method for high-throughput and accurate assembly of microbial genomes from gut metagenomes.

ImportanceMetagenomic sequencing allows scientists to directly measure the genome content and structure of microbes residing in complex microbial communities. Traditional short-read metagenomic sequencing methods often yield fragmented genomes, whereas advanced long-read sequencing methods improve genome assembly quality but often suffer from high error rates and are logistically limited due to low throughput and high input requirements. A new method, the Illumina Complete Long Read Assay (ICLR), is capable of generating highly-accurate kilobase-scale sequencing reads with minimal input material. To evaluate the utility of ICLR in metagenomic contexts, we applied short-read, long-read, and ICLR methods to simple and complex microbial communities. We found that ICLR outperforms short-read methods, and yields comparable metagenomic assemblies to standard long-read approaches while requiring less input material. Overall, ICLR represents a high-throughput and efficient solution for assembling complete genomes from complex metagenomes.
authors: Maghini, D. G.; Darling, A. E.; Monahan, L.; Halpern, A.; Burke, C. M.; Jaeger, E.; Statham, A.; Truong, T.; Ying, K.; Schroth, G.; Bhatt, A. S.

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组学可直接研究肠道菌群的基因内容和功能，但传统方法存在组装不完整的问题。ICLR技术通过低输入量高精度长读长测序，显著提升了基因组组装质量。实验显示ICLR在N50值和基因组完整性上均优于短读和纳米孔测序。
ai.translation: 宏基因组学能够无需分离培养直接研究肠道菌群的基因内容和潜在功能。然而，通过宏基因组组装得到的基因组常因重复序列组装困难而存在不完整性和低连续性。长读长测序技术虽可直接从宏基因组中获得环状细菌基因组，但存在通量低、DNA输入量高和错误率高的问题。Illumina最新推出的Complete Long Read (ICLR) 测序方法能够在低DNA输入量下生成高精度千碱基级读长。本研究评估了ICLR在肠道宏基因组组装中的性能，对微生物模拟群落和十份人类肠道微生物组样本采用标准短读测序、ICLR测序和纳米孔长读测序进行比较分析，重点考察读长长度、组装连续性和bin质量。结果发现ICLR组装的人类宏基因组N50值（119.5±24.8千碱基）显著高于短读组装（9.9±4.5千碱基；p=0.002），且与纳米孔组装的N50值（91.0±43.8千碱基；p=0.32）相当。此外，ICLR草图微生物基因组完整性（94.0%±20.6%）显著优于纳米孔草图基因组（85.9%±23.0%；p≤0.001），且纳米孔基因组的基因长度（924.6±114.7碱基对）较ICLR基因组（954.6±71.5碱基对）明显缩短（p≤0.001）。总体而言，ICLR测序为高通量、高精度的肠道宏基因组微生物基因组组装提供了新方法。宏基因组测序使科学家能够直接测量复杂微生物群落中微生物的基因组内容和结构。传统短读测序常导致基因组碎片化，而先进长读测序虽能提升组装质量但存在高错误率和低通量问题。新型ICLR方法可使用极少输入材料生成高精度千碱基级读长。为评估其在宏基因组学中的应用价值，我们对简单和复杂微生物群落采用短读、长读和ICLR方法进行比较。结果发现ICLR在性能上超越短读方法，且在输入材料更少的情况下达到与标准长读方法相当的宏基因组组装效果。总体而言，ICLR为复杂宏基因组的完整基因组组装提供了高通量、高效的解决方案。

title: Integrating Nanopore MinION Sequencing into National Animal Health AMR Surveillance Programs: An Indonesian Pilot Study of Chicken Slaughterhouse Effluent and Rivers
abstract:
Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) poses significant risks to human and animal health while the environment can contribute to its spread. National AMR surveillance programs are pivotal for assessing AMR prevalence, trends, and intervention outcomes, however, integrating advanced surveillance tools can be difficult. This pilot study, conducted by FAO ECTAD Indonesia and DGLAHS, Indonesian Ministry of Agriculture, evaluated the costs and benefits of integrating the Nanopore MinION, Illumina MiSeq, and Sensititre system into a culture-based slaughterhouse-river surveillance system. Water samples were collected from six chicken slaughterhouses and adjacent rivers (pre- and post-treatment effluent, upstream, downstream). Culture-based ESBL and general E. coli concentrations were estimated via the WHO Tricycle Protocol, while isolates (n=42) were sequenced (MinION, MiSeq) and antimicrobial susceptibility testing conducted (Sensititre). The Tricycle Protocol results provided estimates of effluent and river concentrations of ESBL and general E. coli identifying ESBL-to-general E. coli ratios of 13.8% and 6.2%, respectively. Compared to hybrid sequencing assemblies, MinION had a higher concordance than MiSeq for ARG identification (98%), virulence genes (96%), and locations for both (predominately plasmids). Furthermore, MinION concordance with Sensititre AST was 91%. Cost-benefit comparisons suggest sequencing can complement culture-based methods but is dependent on the value placed on the additional information gained.

HighlightsO_LIThis study demonstrates the integration of Nanopore MinION sequencing into a national AMR surveillance program, highlighting its potential for monitoring antibiotic-resistant E. coli in slaughterhouse effluent and rivers.
C_LIO_LIOur findings show that Nanopore MinION sequencing exhibits high concordance with hybrid sequencing assemblies, validating its effectiveness for genomic surveillance in decentralized settings.
C_LIO_LIThe study evaluates the cost-benefit of using Nanopore MinION, Illumina MiSeq, and Sensititre AST, comparing information gained with cost.
C_LI

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了将纳米孔MinION测序技术整合到国家抗微生物耐药性（AMR）监测系统中的成本效益，发现MinION在ARG识别、毒力基因检测和与传统培养法的一致性方面表现优异。研究通过比较不同测序技术与传统方法，验证了MinION在分散式环境中的基因组监测有效性。
ai.translation:
抗微生物耐药性（AMR）对人类和动物健康构成重大威胁，而环境可能促进其传播。国家AMR监测计划对于评估耐药性流行趋势和干预效果至关重要，但整合先进监测工具存在困难。本试点研究由FAO ECTAD印尼办公室和印尼农业部DGLAHS开展，评估了将纳米孔MinION测序仪、Illumina MiSeq测序仪和Sensititre系统整合到基于培养的屠宰场-河流监测系统中的成本与效益。从六家家禽屠宰场及其邻近河流（预处理和后处理废水、上游、下游）采集水样。通过WHO三联协议估算基于培养的ESBL和一般大肠杆菌浓度，同时对42株菌株进行MinION和MiSeq测序，并开展Sensititre抗菌药物敏感性测试（AST）。三联协议结果提供了废水和河流中ESBL及一般大肠杆菌的浓度估计，分别识别出ESBL到一般大肠杆菌的比例为13.8%和6.2%。与混合测序组装相比，MinION在ARG识别（98%）、毒力基因（96%）及位置（主要为质粒）的一致性高于MiSeq。此外，MinION与Sensititre AST的一致性达到91%。成本效益分析表明，测序可补充基于培养的方法，但取决于对额外信息价值的评估。

本研究展示了将纳米孔MinION测序整合到国家AMR监测计划中的应用，突显其在监测屠宰场废水和河流中抗生素耐药大肠杆菌的潜力。研究结果表明，纳米孔MinION测序与混合测序组装具有一致性，验证了其在分散式环境中的基因组监测有效性。研究评估了使用纳米孔MinION、Illumina MiSeq和Sensititre AST的成本效益，比较了获得信息与成本。

title: Genome drafting of nosocomial infection CRE
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Carbapenem-resistant 

METHODS: The study was conducted between November and December 2023 in a 5-bed NICU. Monthly surveillance cultures were performed to monitor colonization and infection with multidrug-resistant organisms. CRKP isolates were obtained from blood and nasal swabs of affected neonates. Identification and antimicrobial susceptibility testing were initially conducted using the Vitek

RESULTS: A total of three CRKP isolates (designated Kp1, Kp2, and Kp3) were identified. Kp1 and Kp2 belonged to sequence type (ST) ST23 and were genetically near-identical, differing by a single allele, while Kp3 was of a distinct sequence type, ST2096, with 245 allelic differences from Kp1 and Kp2. All isolates were resistant to colistin and carried resistance genes, including 

CONCLUSION: This study highlights the complexity of CRKP outbreaks in neonatal care, with isolates exhibiting resistance mechanisms that complicate treatment. The plasmid profiles suggest these strains are reservoirs for multidrug-resistant genes, emphasizing the need for strict infection control and ongoing genomic surveillance. For neonatal care, these resistance challenges increase the risk of treatment failures and mortality, underscoring the importance of enhanced infection prevention and novel therapeutic strategies.
authors: Xinlong Zhou, Kailash Wagh, Guizhen Lv, Devender Sharma, Wei Lei

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了新生儿护理中CRKP爆发的复杂性，发现不同菌株存在差异化的耐药机制。通过基因组分析发现，ST23型菌株与ST2096型菌株在质粒谱型和耐药基因携带情况上存在显著差异，凸显了感染控制和基因组监测的重要性。
ai.translation:
背景：碳青霉烯类耐药铜绿假单胞菌（CRKP）在新生儿重症监护室（NICU）的传播对临床治疗构成重大挑战。

方法：本研究于2023年11月至12月在5张床位的NICU开展，通过每月监测培养追踪多重耐药菌的定植与感染情况。从受感染新生儿的血液和鼻拭子中分离出CRKP菌株，采用Vitek系统进行菌株鉴定和抗菌药物敏感性测试。

结果：共分离出三种CRKP菌株（编号Kp1、Kp2和Kp3）。Kp1和Kp2属于序列类型（ST）ST23，基因组高度相似（仅相差一个等位基因），而Kp3属于不同的序列类型ST2096，与Kp1和Kp2存在245个等位基因差异。所有菌株均对多粘菌素耐药，并携带耐药基因，包括blaKPC、blaOXA-23和blaOXA-181。

结论：本研究凸显了新生儿护理中CRKP爆发的复杂性，菌株表现出的耐药机制显著增加了治疗难度。质粒谱型分析表明这些菌株是多重耐药基因的储存库，强调了严格感染控制措施和持续基因组监测的必要性。对于新生儿护理而言，这些耐药挑战会增加治疗失败和死亡风险，凸显了加强感染预防和开发新型治疗策略的重要性。

title: Gene expressions of clinical Pseudomonas aeruginosa harboring RND efflux pumps on chromosome and involving a novel integron on a plasmid.
abstract: The clinical strain of Pseudomonas aeruginosa XM8 harbored multiple RND-type antibiotic efflux pump genes and a novel integron In4881 on its plasmid pXM8-2, rendering it resistant to nearly all conventional antibiotics except colistin. The resistance was primarily attributed to the inactivation of the oprD gene and overexpression of several efflux pump genes, including mexAB-oprM, mexCD-oprJ, oprN-mexFE, and mexXY. In this study, the XM8 strain was comprehensively characterized using various methods. Antimicrobial susceptibility testing was performed using the BioMerieux VITEK2 system and manual double dilution methods. Gene expression levels of efflux pump-related genes were analyzed via quantitative real-time PCR. The bacterial chromosome and plasmid were sequenced using both Illumina and Nanopore platforms, and bioinformatics tools were employed to analyze mobile genetic elements associated with antibiotic resistance. The pXM8-2 plasmid containsed multiple mobile genetic elements, including integrons (In4881, In334, In413) and transposons (Tn3, TnAs1, TnAs3). Notably, In4881 was reported for the first time in this study. The presence of these elements highlights the potential for horizontal gene transfer and further spread of antibiotic resistance. Given the strong resistance profile of the XM8 strain, effective measures should be implemented to prevent the dissemination and prevalence of such multidrug-resistant bacteria.
authors: Long He, Wenji Wang, Haiming Chen, Liman Ma, Lianhua Yu, Yide Yang, Ying Qu, Piaopiao Dai, Dongguo Wang, Xiaobo Ma

ai.TLDR: 铜绿假单胞菌XM8临床菌株因质粒pXM8-2携带多重RND型抗生素外排泵基因和新型整合子In4881，表现出对几乎所有传统抗生素的耐药性。研究通过多组学技术解析其耐药机制，首次发现整合子In4881，揭示了水平基因转移在耐药传播中的潜在风险。
ai.translation: 铜绿假单胞菌XM8临床菌株在其质粒pXM8-2中携带多个RND型抗生素外排泵基因和新型整合子In4881，导致其对几乎所有传统抗生素均表现出耐药性，仅对多粘菌素敏感。该耐药性主要归因于oprD基因的失活以及多个外排泵基因（包括mexAB-oprM、mexCD-oprJ、oprN-mexFE和mexXY）的过度表达。本研究通过多种方法对XM8菌株进行了全面表征，包括采用BioMerieux VITEK2系统和手动双倍稀释法进行抗菌药物敏感性测试，利用定量实时PCR分析外排泵相关基因的表达水平，并通过Illumina和Nanopore平台对细菌染色体和质粒进行测序，结合生物信息学工具分析与抗生素耐药相关的移动遗传元件。pXM8-2质粒包含多种移动遗传元件，包括整合子（In4881、In334、In413）和转座子（Tn3、TnAs1、TnAs3）。值得注意的是，整合子In4881在本研究中首次被报道。这些移动遗传元件的存在凸显了水平基因转移的可能性，以及抗生素耐药性进一步扩散的风险。鉴于XM8菌株的强效耐药表型，应采取有效措施防止此类多药耐药菌的传播和流行。

title: Optimisation and clinical validation of a metagenomic third-generation sequencing approach for aetiological diagnosis in bronchoalveolar lavage fluid of patients with pneumonia.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Metagenomic Third Generation Sequencing (mTGS), based on nanopore technology, has emerged as a promising tool for the rapid diagnosis of pneumonia pathogens. However, this technology currently lacks standardised technical protocols, quality control measures, and comprehensive performance evaluations for the simultaneous detection of bacteria, fungi, and viruses in clinical settings.

METHODS: We optimised the mTGS workflow by refining key parameters (cell wall lysis, fragment size selection, host DNA depletion, and sequencing depth) using reference samples and bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) from eight patients with pneumonia. These optimisations formed the basis for a standardised mTGS protocol. To assess the clinical diagnostic value of the optimised mTGS, a multicentre prospective cohort study involving 313 pneumonia-suspected patients was conducted. Each BALF sample was tested using conventional microbiological testing (CMTs), metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS), pre-optimised mTGS, and optimised mTGS.

FINDINGS: The optimised mTGS protocol, based on the refined cell wall lysis, fragment size selection, no host DNA depletion, and 800 MB sequencing depth, achieved a tenfold increase in sensitivity compared with pre-optimised mTGS for detecting the species of Bacillus subtilis, Mycobacterium tuberculosis, Mycobacterium avium, Cryptococcus neoformans, and Human papillomavirus in reference samples. In the prospective cohort, 274 patients with a confirmed diagnosis of pneumonia were identified, yielding 376 distinct microbes. The mTGS identified more microbes than CMTs (314 vs. 115), with a 45.30% increase in sensitivity (84.70% vs. 39.40%, P < 0.01, Chi-square test/Fisher's exact test). Compared with pre-optimised mTGS, the sensitivity of optimised mTGS increased by 32.51% (84.70% vs. 52.19%, P < 0.01, Chi-square test/Fisher's exact test). mTGS showed comparable performance to mNGS (84.70% vs. 79.90%, P = 0.14,Chi-square test/Fisher's exact test), both significantly outperforming CMTs. mNGS was more sensitive for detecting Non-tuberculous mycobacteria, Pneumocystis jirovecii, and Aspergillus spp., while mTGS demonstrated higher sensitivity for M. tuberculosis, Chlamydia psittaci, and Streptococcus pneumoniae. The overall diagnostic agreement between mTGS and clinical diagnosis was 81.80%.

INTERPRETATION: We optimised and validated a standardised mTGS protocol that significantly improved the ability to detect pathogens in the BALF of patients with pneumonia. Optimised mTGS demonstrated comparable performance to mNGS, making it a promising tool for the aetiological diagnosis of pneumonia.

FUNDING: The Research and Development Programme of Zhejiang Province (2023C03068, 2024C03187), the National Natural Science Foundation of China (82272338), the Key R&D Plan of the Ministry of Science and Technology (China) of China (2022YFC2504502).
authors: Shanshan Zhang, Xi Li, Xia Li, Ying Fu, Long Chen, Wei Wang, Qinqing Lin, Hui Lou, Yake Yao, Wenyu Chen, Cheng Zhong, Jian Ye, Yinan Yao, Huimin Guo, Yunsong Yu, Hua Zhou

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组第三代测序(mTGS)基于纳米孔技术，可快速诊断肺炎病原体，但缺乏标准化流程。本研究通过优化细胞壁裂解、片段选择等参数，建立标准化mTGS流程，结果显示优化后mTGS在敏感性上较预优化版本提升10倍，且诊断一致性达81.80%。
ai.translation:
背景：基于纳米孔技术的宏基因组第三代测序(mTGS)已成为肺炎病原体快速诊断的有前景工具，但该技术目前缺乏标准化技术协议、质量控制措施和临床场景下细菌、真菌、病毒联合检测的综合性能评估。

方法：我们通过参考样本和8例肺炎患者的支气管肺泡灌洗液(BALF)优化mTGS工作流程，重点调整细胞壁裂解、片段大小选择、宿主DNA去除和测序深度等关键参数，形成标准化mTGS协议。为评估优化后mTGS的临床诊断价值，开展了涉及313例肺炎疑似患者的多中心前瞻性队列研究，每份BALF样本均进行常规微生物检测(CMTs)、宏基因组下一代测序(mNGS)、预优化mTGS和优化mTGS检测。

发现：基于优化的细胞壁裂解、片段大小选择、无宿主DNA去除和800MB测序深度的优化mTGS协议，在参考样本中对枯草芽孢杆菌、结核分枝杆菌、鸟分枝杆菌、新型隐球菌和人乳头瘤病毒的检测敏感性较预优化mTGS提升10倍。在前瞻性队列中，确诊肺炎患者274例，共鉴定376种微生物。mTGS检出微生物数量(314种)显著多于CMTs(115种)，敏感性提升45.30%（84.70% vs 39.40%，P<0.01）。与预优化mTGS相比，优化mTGS敏感性提升32.51%（84.70% vs 52.19%，P<0.01）。mTGS与mNGS表现相当（84.70% vs 79.90%，P=0.14），均显著优于CMTs。mNGS对非结核分枝杆菌、肺孢子虫和曲霉属检测更敏感，而mTGS对结核分枝杆菌、鹦鹉热衣原体和肺炎链球菌检测更敏感。mTGS与临床诊断的总体诊断一致性为81.80%。

解读：我们优化并验证了标准化mTGS协议，显著提升了肺炎患者BALF中病原体的检测能力。优化后的mTGS表现与mNGS相当，成为肺炎病原学诊断的有前景工具。

资助：浙江省科技计划（2023C03068, 2024C03187）、国家自然科学基金（82272338）、中国科技部重点研发计划（2022YFC2504502）

title: An optimized workflow of full-length transcriptome sequencing for accurate fusion transcript identification.
abstract: Next-generation sequencing has revolutionized cancer genomics by enabling high-throughput mutation screening yet detecting fusion genes reliably remains challenging. Long-read sequencing offers potential for accurate fusion transcript identification, though challenges persist. In this study, we present an optimized workflow using nanopore sequencing technology to precisely identify fusion transcripts. Our approach encompasses a tailored library preparation protocol, data processing, and fusion gene analysis pipeline. We evaluated the performance using Universal Human Reference RNA and human adenocarcinoma cell lines. Our optimized nanopore sequencing workflow generated high-quality full-length transcriptome data characterized by an extended length distribution and comprehensive transcript coverage. Validation experiments confirmed novel fusion events with potential clinical relevance. Our protocol aims to mitigate biases and enhance accuracy, facilitating increased adoption in clinical diagnostics. Continued advancements in long-read sequencing promise deeper insights into fusion gene biology and improved cancer diagnostics.
authors: Liang Zong, Yabing Zhu, Yuan Jiang, Ying Xia, Qun Liu, Jing Wang, Song Gao, Bei Luo, Yongxian Yuan, Jingjiao Zhou, Sanjie Jiang

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术为融合基因检测提供了新可能，但准确识别仍具挑战。本研究通过优化纳米孔测序工作流程，实现了融合转录本的精准鉴定，验证结果揭示了具有临床意义的新融合事件。
ai.translation: 下一代测序技术通过高通量突变筛查革新了癌症基因组学，但融合基因的可靠检测仍面临挑战。长读长测序为准确识别融合转录本提供了潜力，但相关技术仍存在局限。本研究提出了一种优化的纳米孔测序技术工作流程，用于精确鉴定融合转录本。该方法包含定制化的文库制备协议、数据处理流程及融合基因分析管道。通过Universal Human Reference RNA和人腺癌细胞系验证了该技术性能。优化后的纳米孔测序流程生成了高质量的全长转录组数据，其特征包括扩展的长度分布和全面的转录覆盖。验证实验确认了具有潜在临床意义的新融合事件。本协议旨在减少偏差并提升准确性，促进其在临床诊断中的应用。长读长测序技术的持续进步将为融合基因生物学研究和癌症诊断带来更深入的见解。

title: Nanopore adaptive sampling accurately detects nucleotide variants and improves the characterization of large-scale rearrangement for the diagnosis of cancer predisposition.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Molecular diagnosis has become highly significant for patient management in oncology.

METHODS: Here, 30 well-characterized clinical germline samples were studied with adaptive sampling to enrich the full sequence of 152 cancer predisposition genes. Sequencing was performed on Oxford Nanopore (ONT) R10.4.1 MinION flowcells with the Q20+ chemistry.

RESULTS: In our cohort, 11 samples had large-scale rearrangements (LSR), which were all detected with ONT sequencing. In addition to perfectly detecting the locus of the LSR, we found a known MLPA amplification of exon 13 in the BRCA1 (NM_7294) gene corresponded to a duplication in tandem of both exons 12 and 13 of the reference NM_7300. Similarly, in another sample with a known total deletion of the BRCA1 gene, ONT sequencing highlighted this complete deletion was the consequence of a large deletion of almost 140 000 bp carrying over five different genes. ONT sequencing was also able to detect all pathogenic nucleotide variants present in 16 samples at low coverage. As we analyzed complete genes and more genes than with short-read sequencing, we detected novel unknown variants. We randomly selected six new variants with a coverage larger than 10× and an average quality higher than 14, and confirmed all of them by Sanger sequencing, suggesting that variants detected with ONT (coverage >10× and quality score >14) could be considered as real variants.

CONCLUSIONS: We showed that ONT adaptive sampling sequencing is suitable for the analysis of germline alterations, improves characterization of LSR, and detects single nucleotide variations even at low coverage.

KEY POINTS: Adaptive sampling is suitable for the analysis of germline alterations. Improves the characterization of Large Scale Rearrangement and detects SNV at a minimum coverage of 10x. Allows flexibility of sequencing.
authors: Sandy Chevrier, Corentin Richard, Marie Mille, Denis Bertrand, Romain Boidot

ai.TLDR: 分子诊断在肿瘤学患者管理中具有重要意义。本研究通过自适应采样技术对30例体细胞样本进行分析，利用ONT测序技术成功检测出大规模重排和单核苷酸变异。结果表明，ONT测序在低覆盖率下仍能准确识别致病性变异，并发现新型未知变异。
ai.translation:
背景：分子诊断在肿瘤学患者管理中具有重要意义。

方法：本研究对30例具有明确特征的临床体细胞样本进行分析，采用自适应采样技术对152个癌症易感基因的完整序列进行富集。测序过程使用Oxford Nanopore（ONT）R10.4.1 MinION流细胞平台，并采用Q20+化学试剂。

结果：在本研究队列中，11个样本存在大规模重排（LSR），所有LSR均通过ONT测序检测到。除精准定位LSR位点外，我们发现BRCA1（NM_7294）基因的已知MLPA扩增（外显子13）对应参考序列NM_7300的外显子12和13的串联重复。在另一例已知BRCA1基因完全缺失的样本中，ONT测序揭示该完全缺失是近140,000 bp大片段缺失（携带5个不同基因）的结果。ONT测序还能检测16个样本在低覆盖率下的所有致病性核苷酸变异。由于我们分析了完整基因且覆盖更多基因，发现了新型未知变异。随机选取6个覆盖度>10×且平均质量>14的新型变异，经Sanger测序验证，表明ONT测序（覆盖度>10×且质量分>14）检测的变异可视为真实变异。

结论：我们证明ONT自适应采样测序适用于体细胞变异分析，可提升大规模重排的表征能力，并在低覆盖率下检测单核苷酸变异。

关键点：自适应采样适用于体细胞变异分析。提升大规模重排的表征能力，可在10×最低覆盖率下检测SNV。提供测序灵活性。

title: Insights into respiratory microbiome composition and systemic inflammatory biomarkers of bronchiectasis patients.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: The human microbiomes, including the ones present in the respiratory tract, are described and characterized in an increasing number of studies. However, the composition and the impact of the healthy and/or impaired microbiome on pulmonary health and its interaction with the host tissues remain enigmatic. In chronic airway diseases, bronchiectasis stands out as a progressive condition characterized by microbial colonization and infection. In this study, we aimed to investigate the microbiome of the lower airways and lungs of bronchiectasis patients together with their serum cytokine and chemokine content, and gain novel insights into the pathogenesis of bronchiectasis. The microbiome of 47 patients was analyzed by sequencing of full-length 16S rRNA gene using amplicon sequencing Oxford Nanopore technologies. Their serum inflammatory mediators content was quantified in parallel. Several divergently composed microbiome groups were identified and characterized, the majority of patients displayed one dominant bacterial species, whereas others had a more diverse microbiome. The analysis of systemic immune biomarkers revealed two distinct inflammatory response groups, i.e., low and high response groups, each associated with a specific array of clinical symptoms, microbial composition, and diversity. Moreover, we have identified some microbiome compositions associated with high inflammatory response, i.e., high levels of pro- and anti-inflammatory cytokines, whereas other microbiomes were in correlation with low inflammatory responses. Although bronchiectasis pathogenetic mechanisms remain to be elucidated, it is clear that addressing microbiome composition in the airways is a valuable resource not only for diagnosis but also for personalized disease management.

IMPORTANCE: The population of microorganisms on/in the human body resides in distinct local microbiomes, including the respiratory microbiome. It remains unclear what defines a healthy and a diseased respiratory microbiome. We investigated the respiratory microbiome in chronic pulmonary infectious disease, i.e., bronchiectasis, and researched correlations between microbiome composition, systemic inflammatory biomarkers, and disease characteristics. The bronchoalveolar microbiome of 47 patients was sequenced, and their serum inflammatory mediators were quantified. The microbiomes were grouped based on their content and diversity. In addition, patients were also grouped into low- and high-response groups according to their inflammatory biomarkers' levels. Certain microbiome compositions, mainly single-species dominated, were associated with high levels of inflammatory cytokines, whereas others correlated with low inflammatory response and remained diverse. We conclude that respiratory microbiome composition is a valuable resource for the diagnostics and personalized management of bronchiectasis, which may include preserving microbiome diversity and introducing possible probiotics.
authors: Aleksandras Konovalovas, Julija Armalytė, Laurita Klimkaitė, Tomas Liveikis, Brigita Jonaitytė, Edvardas Danila, Daiva Bironaitė, Diana Mieliauskaitė, Edvardas Bagdonas, Rūta Aldonytė

ai.TLDR: 支气管扩张症患者的下呼吸道和肺部微生物组与系统性炎症标志物的关联性研究揭示了微生物组多样性与炎症反应的密切关系。该研究通过分析47例患者的微生物组和血清炎症因子，发现特定微生物组结构与高炎症反应相关，为支气管扩张症的诊断和个性化治疗提供了新思路。
ai.translation:
无标签：越来越多的研究描述和表征了包括呼吸道在内的各类人体微生物组。然而，健康或受损的呼吸道微生物组组成及其对肺部健康的影响机制，以及与宿主组织的相互作用仍不清楚。在慢性气道疾病中，支气管扩张症作为以微生物定植和感染为特征的进行性疾病尤为突出。本研究旨在通过分析支气管扩张症患者的下呼吸道和肺部微生物组，结合其血清细胞因子和趋化因子含量，获得支气管扩张症发病机制的新见解。通过Oxford Nanopore测序技术对47例患者的全长16S rRNA基因进行扩增子测序分析，同时量化其血清炎症介质含量。识别并表征了多个组成不同的微生物组群，其中多数患者以单一优势菌种为主，而部分患者则表现出更复杂的微生物组多样性。系统性免疫生物标志物分析揭示了两种截然不同的炎症反应群体，即低反应组和高反应组，每组均与特定的临床症状、微生物组成和多样性相关联。此外，我们发现某些微生物组结构与高炎症反应相关，表现为促炎和抗炎细胞因子水平升高，而其他微生物组则与低炎症反应相关。尽管支气管扩张症的发病机制仍需进一步阐明，但明确气道微生物组组成对诊断和个性化疾病管理具有重要价值。

重要性：人体表面和内部的微生物群落存在于不同的局部微生物组中，包括呼吸道微生物组。目前尚不清楚哪些特征定义了健康的和病变的呼吸道微生物组。我们研究了慢性肺部感染性疾病（支气管扩张症）中的呼吸道微生物组，并探讨了微生物组组成、系统性炎症生物标志物与疾病特征之间的关联。对47例患者的支气管肺泡微生物组进行测序，并量化其血清炎症介质含量。根据微生物组内容和多样性将其分组，同时根据炎症生物标志物水平将患者分为低反应组和高反应组。某些以单一菌种为主的微生物组结构与高炎症细胞因子水平相关，而其他具有多样性特征的微生物组则与低炎症反应相关。我们得出结论，呼吸道微生物组结构是支气管扩张症诊断和个性化管理的重要资源，可能包括维持微生物组多样性及引入潜在益生菌。

title: Complete genome characterization by nanopore sequencing of rotaviruses A, B, and C circulating on large-scale pig farms in Russia
abstract:
### Background

Rotaviruses are the major etiological agents of gastroenteritis and diarrheal outbreaks in plenty of mammalian species. The genus *Rotavirus* is highly diverse and currently comprises nine genetically distinct species, and four of them (A, B, C, and H) are common for humans and pigs. There is a strong necessity to comprehend phylogenetic relationships among rotaviruses from different host species to assess interspecies transmission, specifically between humans and livestock. To reveal the genetic origin of rotaviruses from Russian pig farms, nanopore-based metagenomic sequencing was performed on the PCR-positive specimens.

### Methods

Samples were selected among the cases submitted to routine diagnostic or monitoring studies to the Laboratory of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology of “Federal Scientific Center VIEV” (Moscow, Russia). The selected positive samples were genotyped using nanopore sequencing method.

### Results

Five porcine RVA isolates were completely sequenced, and genotype analysis revealed various porcine G/P genogroups: G2, G3, G4, G5, G11 and P[6], P[7], P[13], P[23], P[27] with a typical backbone constellation I5-R1-C1-M1-A8-N1-T1/7-E1-H1. The RVB isolate was detected in combination with RVA in a rectal swab from a diseased pig in Krasnoyarsk Krai. It was characterized by the following genogroups: G15-P[X]-I11-R4-C4-M4-A8-N10-T4-E4-H7. The first complete porcine RVC genome from Russia was obtained with genomic constellation G6-P[5]-I14-R1-C1-M1-A7-N9-T6-E1-H1, and the phylogenetic analysis revealed putative novel genotype group for the VP6 gene-I14. Additionally, the first porcine kobuvirus isolate from Russia was phylogenetically characterized.

### Conclusions

The applied nanopore sequencing method successfully genotyped the RV isolates and additionally revealed co-circulated species. The study demonstrates high genetic variability of Russian RVA isolates in VP4/VP7 genes and phylogenetically describes local RVB and RVC. Complete characterization of genomic segments is a crucial methodology in tracing the rotavirus's evolution and evaluating interspecies transmissions.
authors: Nikita Krasnikov, Alexey Gulyukin, ... Anton Yuzhakov
citation: Krasnikov, N., Gulyukin, A., Aliper, T. et al. Complete genome characterization by nanopore sequencing of rotaviruses A, B, and C circulating on large-scale pig farms in Russia. Virol J 21 , 289 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12985-024-02567-9

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔宏基因组测序分析了俄罗斯猪场轮状病毒的基因组特征，揭示了猪源轮状病毒（RVA）与RVB/RVC的遗传多样性。研究发现猪源RVA存在多种基因型群，首次鉴定出俄罗斯猪源RVC基因组及 kobuvirus，为评估跨物种传播提供了遗传学依据。
ai.translation:
### 背景
轮状病毒是导致哺乳动物胃肠炎和腹泻爆发的主要病原体，Rotavirus属高度多样化，目前包含九种遗传不同的物种，其中A、B、C和H型在人类和猪中普遍存在。为评估不同宿主物种间轮状病毒的跨物种传播（特别是人与家畜之间），需要深入理解其系统发育关系。为揭示俄罗斯猪场轮状病毒的遗传起源，对PCR阳性样本进行了基于纳米孔的宏基因组测序。

### 方法
选取提交至俄罗斯联邦科学中心VIEV生物化学与分子生物学实验室（莫斯科）常规诊断或监测研究的病例样本，对选定的阳性样本采用纳米孔测序法进行基因型分析。

### 结果
完全测序了五株猪源RVA分离株，基因型分析显示存在多种猪源G/P基因型群：G2、G3、G4、G5、G11及P[6]、P[7]、P[13]、P[23]、P[27]，其典型骨架常数为I5-R1-C1-M1-A8-N1-T1/7-E1-H1。在克拉斯诺亚尔斯克边疆区患病猪的直肠拭子中检测到RVB与RVA共存，其基因型群为G15-P[X]-I11-R4-C4-M4-A8-N10-T4-E4-H7。首次获得俄罗斯猪源RVC的完整基因组，其基因组常数为G6-P[5]-I14-R1-C1-M1-A7-N9-T6-E1-H1，系统发育分析显示VP6基因存在潜在的新基因型群-I14。此外，首次对俄罗斯猪源kobuvirus进行了系统发育特征分析。

### 结论
应用的纳米孔测序方法成功对RV分离株进行了基因型鉴定，并揭示了共循环物种。研究显示俄罗斯RVA分离株在VP4/VP7基因中存在高度遗传变异，系统发育描述了本地RVB和RVC。完整基因组片段的特征化是追踪轮状病毒进化和评估跨物种传播的关键方法。

title: FGF14 repeat length and mosaic interruptions: modifiers of spinocerebellar ataxia 27B?
abstract: Deep intronic FGF14 repeat expansions have been identified as a frequent genetic cause of late-onset cerebellar ataxias, explaining up to 30% of patients. Interruptions between repeats have previously been identified to impact the penetrance in other repeat expansion disorders. Repeat interruptions within FGF14 have yet to be characterized in detail. We utilized long-range PCR, Sanger sequencing, repeat-primed PCR, Nanopore, and PacBio sequencing to distinguish the repeat motifs, mosaicism, and number of repeat interruptions present in FGF14-related ataxia patients and unaffected individuals. A total of 304 patients with late-onset ataxia and 190 unaffected individuals were previously screened for repeat expansions in the FGF14 gene by long-range PCR, identifying 37 individuals with expanded repeat lengths (≥250 repeats). These, along with three newly identified expansion carriers were included in the present study, and advanced genetic methods were applied to investigate the repeat composition in 27 patients and 13 unaffected individuals. The expansions, based on Nanopore data, ranged from 236 to 486 repeats (SD = 60), with 20 individuals showing repeat interruptions, including complex motifs such as GAG, GAAGGA, GAAGAAAGAA, GAAAAGAAGAAGGAAGAAGGAA, GAAAAGAAGAAGGAA, and GCAGAAGAAGAAGAA. We calculated the longest pure GAA length from the long-read data for all 40 individuals. When comparing the pure GAA tract between patients and unaffected individuals, clusters were apparent based on greater or less than 200 repeats. Five ataxia patients with interruptions still had a remaining pure GAA expansion <200. We observed an association of the pure GAA length with age at onset (p=0.016, R2=0.256). Somatically-incurred mosaic divergent repeat interruptions were discovered that affect motif length and sequence (mDRILS), which varied in number and mosaicism (frequency: 0.37-0.93). The mDRILS correlated with pure GAA length (p=0.022, R2=0.334), with a higher mosaic frequency of interruptions in unaffected individuals compared to patients (unaffected: 0.90; patients: 0.67; p=0.009). We demonstrate that i) long-read sequencing is required to detect complex repeat interruptions accurately; ii) repeat interruptions in FGF14 are mosaic, have various lengths and start positions in the repeat tract, and can thereby be annotated as mDRILS, which iii) enabled us to establish a categorization based on remaining pure GAA repeats quantifying the impact of mDRILS on pathogenicity or age at onset, dependent on the interruption length and position, with high accuracy. Finally, we iv) provide evidence that mosaicism stabilizes pure GAA repeats in interrupted FGF14 repeat expansions.
authors: Joshua Laß, Mirja Thomsen, Max Borsche, Theresa Lüth, Julia C Prietzsche, Susen Schaake, Andona Milovanović, Hannah Macpherson, Emil K Gustavsson, Paula Saffie Awad, Nataša Dragašević-Mišković, Björn-Hergen Laabs, Inke R König, Ana Westenberger, Christopher E Pearson, Norbert Brüggemann, Christine Klein, Joanne Trinh

ai.TLDR: FGF14基因的重复扩展被证实是晚发性小脑共济失调的常见遗传病因，占患者比例达30%。研究通过长读长测序技术首次系统分析了重复中断的复杂性，发现纯GAA重复长度与发病年龄显著相关。研究揭示了重复中断的镶嵌性变异特征，为理解疾病机制提供了新视角。
ai.translation: 深度内含子FGF14重复扩展已被鉴定为晚发性小脑共济失调的常见遗传病因，可解释高达30%的患者病例。先前研究已发现重复扩展中的中断现象会影响其他重复扩展疾病的外显率。然而FGF14基因中的重复中断特征尚未被详细研究。本研究采用长程PCR、Sanger测序、重复引物PCR、Nanopore和PacBio测序技术，分析FGF14相关共济失调患者及无症状个体的重复结构、镶嵌性及中断数量。此前通过长程PCR筛查了304例晚发性共济失调患者和190例无症状个体，发现37例存在≥250个重复的扩展。结合3例新发现的扩展携带者，对27例患者和13例无症状个体进行深入分析。基于Nanopore数据，重复扩展范围为236-486个重复（标准差60），其中20例显示重复中断，包括GAG、GAAGGA、GAAGAAAGAA等复杂重复模式。通过长读长数据计算了所有40例个体的最长纯GAA重复长度。比较患者与无症状个体的纯GAA重复长度时，发现>200重复的簇状分布。5例存在中断的共济失调患者仍保留<200的纯GAA扩展。观察到纯GAA长度与发病年龄显著相关（p=0.016, R²=0.256）。发现影响重复模式长度和序列的体细胞镶嵌性重复中断变异（mDRILS），其数量和镶嵌性频率为0.37-0.93。mDRILS与纯GAA长度相关（p=0.022, R²=0.334），无症状个体的中断镶嵌性频率（0.90）显著高于患者（0.67, p=0.009）。研究证实：i) 长读长测序是准确检测复杂重复中断的必要技术；ii) FGF14重复中断呈现镶嵌性特征，具有不同长度和起始位置，可标注为mDRILS；iii) 基于剩余纯GAA重复数量的分类体系可量化mDRILS对致病性的影响，准确度高；iv) 提供证据表明镶嵌性稳定了中断FGF14重复扩展中的纯GAA重复。

title: Congenital muscular dystrophies and myopathies: the leading cause of genetic muscular disorders in eleven Chinese families.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Congenital muscular dystrophies (CMDs) and myopathies (CMYOs) are a clinically and genetically heterogeneous group of neuromuscular disorders that share common features, such as muscle weakness, hypotonia, characteristic changes on muscle biopsy and motor retardation. In this study, we recruited eleven families with early-onset neuromuscular disorders in China, aimed to clarify the underlying genetic etiology.

METHODS: Essential clinical tests, such as biomedical examination, electromyography and muscle biopsy, were applied to evaluate patient phenotypes. Whole exome sequencing was used to screen for prospective variants responsible for muscular diseases, followed by co-segregation analysis in the families and prenatal diagnosis via Sanger sequencing, if appropriate. Nanopore sequencing and optical genome mapping were applied for detecting complicated genome rearrangements.

RESULTS: Fourteen variants in nine genes (ATL1, LMNA, KLHL40, FKRP, DMD, ACTA1, MSTO1, RYR1 and LAMA2) associated with congenital muscular conditions were identified in the ten families mentioned above. Among them, five novel variants, c.1153_1155del in LMNA, c.577 A > G in ACTA1, c.694T > G in MSTO1, c.5938del in LAMA2, and a rare genome fusion ogm[GRCh38] fus(X; X)(p22.31;p21.1) involving DMD, have not been recorded in public databases to the best of our knowledge.

CONCLUSIONS: CMDs and CMYOs were probably responsible for most of the cases (9/11) of genetic muscular defects in this study. Molecular analysis is highly beneficial for the precise diagnosis, genetic counseling and prenatal diagnosis of families suspected of having genetic muscular disorders.

CLINICAL TRIAL NUMBER: Not applicable.
authors: Bin Mao, Xiaoling Cai, Na Lin, Yulin Jiang, Na Hao, Yifang Dai, Danhua Guo, Deqin He, Huili Xue, Lingji Chen, Qianqian He, Min Zhang, Meihuan Chen, Hailong Huang, Liangpu Xu

ai.TLDR: 本研究聚焦中国早发性神经肌肉疾病的遗传病因，通过全外显子组测序等技术发现10个家族中与先天性肌病相关的14个基因变异，其中5个为新发现变异。研究结果为遗传性肌病的精准诊断和产前诊断提供了重要依据。
ai.translation:
背景：先天性肌营养不良症（CMDs）和肌病（CMYOs）是一组临床和遗传异质性显著的神经肌肉疾病，具有肌肉无力、肌张力低下、肌肉活检特征性改变和运动发育迟缓等共同特征。本研究招募了中国11个早发性神经肌肉疾病家族，旨在明确其潜在的遗传病因。

方法：采用生物医学检查、肌电图和肌肉活检等临床检测手段评估患者表型。通过全外显子组测序筛选与肌肉疾病相关的潜在变异，结合家族共显性分析和Sanger测序进行产前诊断（如适用）。应用纳米孔测序和光学基因组映射技术检测复杂基因组重排。

结果：在上述10个家族中发现了与先天性肌病相关的9个基因（ATL1、LMNA、KLHL40、FKRP、DMD、ACTA1、MSTO1、RYR1和LAMA2）的14个变异。其中5个新变异（LMNA的c.1153_1155del、ACTA1的c.577 A>G、MSTO1的c.694T>G、LAMA2的c.5938del，以及涉及DMD的罕见基因组融合ogm[GRCh38] fus(X; X)(p22.31;p21.1)）未在公共数据库中记录。

结论：CMDs和CMYOs可能占本研究中遗传性肌病病例的大多数（9/11）。分子分析对疑似遗传性肌病家族的精准诊断、遗传咨询和产前诊断具有重要价值。

临床试验编号：不适用。

title: Long-Read RNA-sequencing reveals transcript-specific regulation in human-derived cortical neurons
abstract:
Long-read RNA sequencing has transformed transcriptome analysis by enabling comprehensive mapping of full-length transcripts, providing an unprecedented resolution of transcript diversity, alternative splicing, and transcript-specific regulation. In this study, we employed nanopore long-read RNA sequencing to profile the transcriptomes of human fibroblasts, induced pluripotent stem cells, and stem cell-derived cortical neurons, identifying extensive transcript diversity with 15,072 transcripts in stem cell-derived cortical neurons, 13,048 in fibroblasts, and 12,759 in induced pluripotent stem cells. Our analyses uncovered 35,519 differential transcript expression events and 5,135 differential transcript usage events, underscoring the complexity of transcriptomic regulation across these cell types. Importantly, by integrating differential transcript expression and usage analyses, we gained deeper insights into transcript dynamics that are not captured by gene-level expression analysis alone. Notably, differential transcript usage analysis highlighted transcript-specific changes in disease-relevant genes such as APP, KIF2A, and BSCL2, associated with Alzheimers disease, neuronal migration disorders, and degenerative axonopathies, respectively. This added resolution emphasizes the significance of transcript- level variations that often remain hidden in traditional differential gene expression analyses.

Overall, our work provides a framework for understanding transcript diversity in both pluripotent and specialized cell types, which can be used to investigate transcriptomic changes in disease states. Additionally, this study underscores the utility of differential transcript usage analysis in advancing our understanding of neurodevelopmental and neurodegenerative diseases, paving the way for identifying transcript-specific therapeutic targets.
authors: Xu, J.; Hoerner, M.; Buena Atienza, E.; Manibarathi, K.; Nagel, M.; Hauser, S.; Admard, J.; Casadei, N.; Ossowski, S.; Schuele, R.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术，揭示了人类成纤维细胞、诱导多能干细胞和神经元中广泛的转录组多样性，发现了35,519个差异转录表达事件和5,135个差异转录使用事件。通过整合差异转录使用分析，首次揭示了与阿尔茨海默病等神经疾病相关的基因特异性变化，为识别转录特异性治疗靶点提供了新框架。
ai.translation: 长读长RNA测序技术通过实现全长转录本的全面映射，显著提升了转录组分析的分辨率，能够以前所未有的精度解析转录多样性、可变剪接及转录特异性调控。本研究采用纳米孔长读长RNA测序技术，对人类成纤维细胞、诱导多能干细胞及干细胞来源的皮层神经元的转录组进行了系统分析，发现干细胞来源的皮层神经元中存在15,072个转录本，成纤维细胞中为13,048个，诱导多能干细胞中为12,759个。分析结果揭示了35,519个差异转录表达事件和5,135个差异转录使用事件，凸显了这些细胞类型间转录组调控的复杂性。重要的是，通过整合差异转录表达与使用分析，我们获得了基因水平表达分析无法捕捉的转录动态信息。值得注意的是，差异转录使用分析揭示了与阿尔茨海默病、神经迁移障碍和退行性轴索病相关的疾病相关基因（如APP、KIF2A和BSCL2）的转录特异性变化。这种更高分辨率的分析强调了转录水平变异的重要性，这些变异在传统差异基因表达分析中往往被忽视。本研究为理解多能干细胞和特化细胞类型中的转录组多样性提供了框架，可用于探究疾病状态下的转录组变化。此外，该研究凸显了差异转录使用分析在推进神经发育和神经退行性疾病研究中的价值，为识别转录特异性治疗靶点铺平了道路。

title: Benchmarking nanopore sequencing and rapid genomics feasibility: validation at a quaternary hospital in New Zealand
abstract: Approximately 200 critically ill infants and children in New Zealand are in high-dependency care, many suspected of having genetic conditions, requiring scalable genomic testing. We adopted an acute care genomics protocol from an accredited laboratory and established a clinical pipeline using Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION 2 solo system and Fabric GEM™ software. Benchmarking of the pipeline was performed using Global Alliance for Genomics and Health benchmarking tools and Genome in a Bottle samples (HG002-HG007). Evaluation of single nucleotide variants resulted in a precision and recall of 0.997 and 0.992, respectively. Small indel identification approached a precision of 0.922 and recall of 0.838. Large genomic variations from Coriell Copy Number Variation Reference Panel 1 were reliably detected with ~2 M long reads. Finally, we present results obtained from fourteen trio samples, ten of which were processed in parallel with a clinically accredited short-read rapid genomic testing pipeline (Newborn Genomics Programme; NCT06081075; 2023-10-12).
authors: Denis M. Nyaga, Peter Tsai, ... Justin M. O’Sullivan
citation: Nyaga, D.M., Tsai, P., Gebbie, C. et al. Benchmarking nanopore sequencing and rapid genomics feasibility: validation at a quaternary hospital in New Zealand. npj Genom. Med. 9 , 57 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41525-024-00445-5
description: Approximately 200 critically ill infants and children in New Zealand are in high-dependency care, many suspected of having genetic conditions,...

ai.TLDR: 新西兰约200名重症婴儿和儿童因疑似遗传疾病需基因组检测，研究采用急性护理基因组学协议与Oxford Nanopore Technologies设备建立临床流程。通过基准测试验证了单核苷酸变异检测的高精度（0.997）和召回率（0.992），并成功检测大基因组变异。
keywords: 急性护理基因组学协议
ai.translation: 新西兰约有200名处于高依赖护理的危重婴儿和儿童疑似患有遗传疾病，亟需可扩展的基因组检测方案。本研究采用经认证实验室的急性护理基因组学协议，结合Oxford Nanopore Technologies的PromethION 2 solo系统与Fabric GEM™软件构建临床检测流程。通过Global Alliance for Genomics and Health基准工具及Genome in a Bottle样本（HG002-HG007）对检测流程进行基准测试。单核苷酸变异（SNV）的检测精度达到0.997，召回率0.992；小插入缺失（indel）检测精度达0.922，召回率0.838。使用约2百万碱基长读段可可靠检测Coriell拷贝数变异参考面板1中的大基因组变异。最终展示了14个三联样本的检测结果，其中10个样本与临床认证的短读数快速基因组检测流程（Newborn Genomics Programme; NCT06081075; 2023-10-12）并行处理。

title: High-Resolution Sequencing Identifies a Novel HLA Allele: HLA-B*35:20:03.
abstract: The novel HLA-B*35:20:03 allele differs from B*35:20:01 by a change of C→A in exon 4.
authors: Isabella Fantini Molinari, Rafael Formenton Cita, Fernanda Pelisson Massi, Larissa Danielle Bahls Pinto, Quirino Alves de Lima Neto

ai.TLDR: 新型HLA-B*35:20:03等位基因通过外显子4的C→A突变与B*35:20:01产生差异，该发现扩展了HLA分型的遗传多样性。研究通过高通量测序技术鉴定了这一关键单核苷酸变异。
ai.translation: 新型HLA-B*35:20:03等位基因与B*35:20:01等位基因的主要差异体现在外显子4区域的单核苷酸变异，具体表现为胞嘧啶（C）到腺嘌呤（A）的替换。该等位基因的发现通过高通量测序技术实现，为HLA基因分型提供了新的遗传变异标记，有助于更精确的免疫相关疾病风险评估和器官移植匹配。

title: Whole Genome Sequencing and Comparative Genomics Analysis of Goat-Derived
authors: Yu Zhang, Zhenxing Zhang, Ziying Wang, Yimei Chen, Lianjie Liao, Li Du, Hongyan Gao, Qiaoling Chen, Churiga Man, Si Chen, Fengyang Wang

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: The quality and detection limits of mitochondrial heteroplasmy by long read nanopore sequencing
abstract: This study evaluates long-read and short-read sequencing for mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) heteroplasmy detection. 592,315 bootstrapped datasets generated from two single-nucleotide mismatched ultra-deep sequenced mtDNA samples were used to assess basecalling error and accuracy, limit of heteroplasmy detection, and heteroplasmy detection across various coverage depths. Results showed high Phred scores of data with GC-rich sequence bias for long reads. Limit of detection of 12% heteroplasmy was identified, showing strong correlation (R2 ≥ 0.955) with expected heteroplasmy but underreporting tendency of high-level variants. Nanopore sequencing shows potential for direct applicability in mitochondrial diseases diagnostics, but stringent validation processes to ensure diagnostic result quality are required.
authors: Barbara Slapnik, Robert Šket, ... Jernej Kovač
citation: Slapnik, B., Šket, R., Črepinšek, K. et al. The quality and detection limits of mitochondrial heteroplasmy by long read nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 14 , 26778 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-78270-0
description: This study evaluates long-read and short-read sequencing for mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) heteroplasmy detection. 592,315 bootstrapped datasets...

ai.TLDR: 本研究对比长读长测序与短读长测序在mtDNA异质性检测中的表现，发现长读长测序在GC富集序列中具有高Phred分数，12%异质性检测极限与预期值强相关（R²≥0.955），但高变异体存在低估倾向。Nanopore测序在临床诊断中具有潜力，但需严格验证流程确保结果可靠性。
ai.translation: 本研究评估长读长测序和短读长测序在检测线粒体DNA（mtDNA）异质性中的应用效果。通过由两个单核苷酸错配的超深度测序mtDNA样本生成的592,315个Bootstrap数据集，分析基础调用错误率、检测准确率、异质性检测极限以及不同覆盖深度下的检测表现。结果表明，长读长测序在GC富集序列中表现出高Phred分数。检测到12%异质性时，其检测极限与预期异质性呈现强相关性（R²≥0.955），但高变异体存在低估倾向。Nanopore测序在直接应用于线粒体疾病诊断中展现出潜力，但需通过严格验证流程确保诊断结果的质量。

title: Identification of the Novel HLA-DPA1*01:214 Allele in a Brazilian Bone Marrow Donor.
abstract: A single nucleotide polymorphism, changing Phenylalanine to Leucine, differentiates HLA-DPA1*01:214 from HLA-DPA1*01:03:01:01.
authors: Ana Paula Sokolowski de Lima, Rafael Formenton Cita, Fernanda Pelisson Massi, Bruna Karina Banin Hirata, Jeane Eliete Laguila Visentainer

ai.TLDR: 单核苷酸多态性通过苯丙氨酸到亮氨酸的氨基酸替换，能够明确区分HLA-DPA1*01:214与HLA-DPA1*01:03:01:01亚型。该SNP位点具有重要的临床检测价值。
ai.translation: 一个单核苷酸多态性位点，其突变会导致苯丙氨酸（Phenylalanine）转化为亮氨酸（Leucine），这一氨基酸替换能够有效区分HLA-DPA1*01:214与HLA-DPA1*01:03:01:01两个亚型。该SNP位点的特异性变化为HLA分型检测提供了新的分子标记，对临床移植配型和疾病关联研究具有重要意义。

title: Fragile X Syndrome Carrier Screening Using a Nanopore Sequencing Assay.
journal: The Journal of molecular diagnostics : JMD
abstract: Fragile X syndrome (FXS) is the leading cause of monogenic autism spectrum disorder and inherited intellectual disabilities. Although the value of population-based FXS carrier screening has been acknowledged, appropriate screening methods are urgently required to establish and implement screening programs. We developed a nanopore sequencing-based assay that includes data analysis software to identify FXS carriers. Reference and clinical samples were used to evaluate the performance of the nanopore sequencing assay. Triplet-primed PCR and PacBio sequencing assays were used for comparisons. Nanopore sequencing identified reference carrier samples with a full range of premutation alleles in single-, 10-, and 100-plex assays, and identified AGG interruptions in an allele-specific manner. Moreover, nanopore sequencing revealed no size preference for amplicons containing different-length CGG repeat regions. Finally, nanopore sequencing successfully identified three carriers among 10 clinical samples for preliminary clinical validation. The observed variation in CGG repeat region size resulted from the base calling process of nanopore sequencing. In conclusion, the nanopore sequencing assay is rapid, high-capacity, inexpensive, and easy to perform, thus providing a promising tool and paving the way for population-based FXS carrier screening.
authors: Zhongmin Xia, Qiuxiao Deng, Ping Hu, Chunliu Gao, Yu Jiang, Yulin Zhou, Qiwei Guo

ai.TLDR: 脆性X综合征（FXS）是单基因自闭症谱系障碍和遗传性智力障碍的主要病因。本研究开发了一种基于纳米孔测序的检测方法，可高效识别FXS携带者，验证了其在临床样本中的应用潜力。该技术具有快速、高通量、低成本的优势，为群体筛查提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 脆性X综合征（FXS）是单基因自闭症谱系障碍和遗传性智力障碍的主要病因。尽管基于人群的FXS携带者筛查价值已被认可，但亟需合适的筛查方法以建立和实施筛查项目。我们开发了一种基于纳米孔测序的检测方法，包含数据分析软件以识别FXS携带者。通过参考样本和临床样本评估纳米孔测序检测的性能，并与三引物PCR和PacBio测序方法进行比较。纳米孔测序在单管、10管和100管检测中均能识别包含完整预突变等位基因的参考携带者样本，并以等位基因特异性方式识别AGG中断。此外，纳米孔测序未显示不同长度CGG重复区域扩增子的大小偏好性。最终，纳米孔测序在10例临床样本中成功识别出3例携带者，初步验证了其临床应用价值。观察到的CGG重复区域大小差异源于纳米孔测序的碱基调用过程。总之，该纳米孔测序检测方法具有快速、高通量、低成本且易于操作的优势，为基于人群的FXS携带者筛查提供了有前景的工具。

title: Development of a Clinically Applicable High-Resolution Assay for Sperm Mosaicism.
journal: The Journal of molecular diagnostics : JMD
abstract: Sperm mosaicism, the presence of a pathogenic variant in a subset of sperm, is an important cause of heritable genetic disease. However, clinical testing for sperm mosaicism outside research has been limited by the lack of Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments (CLIA)-validated results deliverable to patients. We developed the Sensitive Assay for Mosaicism (SAM), a two-phase method for sperm mosaicism detection. In phase 1, sperm DNA undergoes deep sequencing using next-generation sequencing or nanopore-based sequencing with unique molecular identifiers (UMIs) to improve accuracy. In phase 2, PCR primers specific to UMI sequences generate amplicons for CLIA-validated Sanger sequencing, providing patient-ready results. SAM's performance was characterized and tested on semen samples from 14 participants, each with a prior offspring with a de novo pathogenic variant. SAM demonstrated a detection limit of approximately 0.005%. The UMI strategy improved sequencing accuracy on next-generation sequencing and nanopore platforms from 99.9% to >99.999%, and from 93% to >99.99%, respectively. Sperm mosaicism was identified in two tested cases: FAM111A (5.51%) and FGFR3 (0.0129%), with FGFR3 exhibiting selfish mutation validated in unrelated individuals showing varying mosaicism levels. SAM provides sensitive detection of low-level sperm mosaicism with CLIA-validated results for patients, enabling recurrence risk assessment and guiding risk mitigation strategies such as in vitro fertilization with preimplantation genetic testing for monogenic disease, sperm donation, and prenatal diagnosis.
authors: Shan Wei, Miriam Temmeh Lattin, Stephanie Morgan, Leah DiBianco, Jocelyn Chen, Stephanie Galloway, Sinem Karipcin, Ronald Wapner, Chaim Landau, Eric J Forman, Wendy K Chung, Zev Williams

ai.TLDR: 精子嵌合体是导致遗传病的重要原因，但临床检测受限于缺乏CLIA认证结果。SAM方法通过两阶段检测实现高灵敏度检测，检测限达0.005%。UMI技术使测序准确率提升至99.999%，并成功识别FAM111A和FGFR3嵌合体，为患者提供CLIA认证结果以评估复发风险。
ai.translation: 精子嵌合体（sperm mosaicism），即部分精子携带致病变异的现象，是导致可遗传遗传病的重要原因。然而，临床检测受限于缺乏符合临床实验室改进修正案（Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments, CLIA）认证的患者可用结果。我们开发了敏感嵌合体检测法（Sensitive Assay for Mosaicism, SAM），一种两阶段检测方法。第一阶段通过下一代测序（next-generation sequencing）或纳米孔测序（nanopore-based sequencing）结合唯一分子标识符（unique molecular identifiers, UMIs）对精子DNA进行深度测序以提高准确性。第二阶段使用针对UMI序列的PCR引物生成扩增子，通过CLIA认证的Sanger测序提供患者可用结果。SAM在14名参与者（均曾生育携带新发致病变异的后代）的精液样本中进行了性能验证，检测限约为0.005%。UMI策略使下一代测序平台的测序准确率从99.9%提升至>99.999%，纳米孔平台从93%提升至>99.99%。在两个检测案例中发现精子嵌合体：FAM111A（5.51%）和FGFR3（0.0129%），其中FGFR3的自私突变在无关个体中得到验证，显示不同嵌合水平。SAM为患者提供CLIA认证的低水平精子嵌合体检测结果，可进行复发风险评估，并指导风险缓解策略，如单基因病植入前遗传学诊断（preimplantation genetic testing for monogenic disease）的体外受精、精子捐赠和产前诊断。

title: Clinical RNA sequencing clarifies variants of uncertain significance identified by prior testing.
abstract:
PURPOSE: Sequencing-based genetic testing often identifies variants of uncertain significance (VUS) or fails to detect pathogenic variants altogether. We evaluated the utility of RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) to clarify VUS or identify missing variants in a clinical setting.

METHODS: Over a 2-year period, genetics providers at a single institution referred 26 cases for clinical RNA-seq. Cases had either no candidate variant identified by prior testing or a VUS suspected to impact splicing or expression. A committee reviewed each submission to ensure it met study criteria.

RESULTS: Among 26 cases, 8 could not be sequenced because of poor expression in an accessible tissue, 2 did not meet inclusion criteria, 3 were solved prior to collection, and 4 families declined participation or did not complete sample collection. For the 9 cases sequenced, the clinical laboratory reported two positive, four negative, and three "indeterminate." For all three indeterminate cases, original RNA-seq data was manually evaluated and deemed explanatory.

CONCLUSION: Clinical RNA-seq can clarify VUS, especially splice variants, but laboratory-specific interpretation guidelines may lead to indeterminate results. Identifying individuals likely to benefit from RNA-seq and providing appropriate counseling poses unique challenges.
authors: Jonathan Marquez, Jennifer N Cech, Cate R Paschal, Bri Dingmann, Anna I Scott, Jenny M Thies, Maria R Mills, Catherine M Albert, Anita E Beck, Erika Beckman, Emily S Bonkowski, Dawn L Earl, Christina T Lam, Heather C Mefford, J Lawrence Merritt, Zoe Nelson, Timothy Jd Ohlsen, Mallory R Taylor, Seth J Perlman, Erin R Rudzinski, Megan C Sikes, Natalie Waligorski, Tara L Wenger, Margaret P Adam, Ghayda M Mirzaa, James T Bennett, Ian A Glass, Darci L Sternen, Danny E Miller

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了临床RNA测序在澄清意义未明的变异（VUS）和发现缺失变异中的应用价值。通过分析26例临床样本，发现RNA-seq在解析splice变异方面有效，但实验室特定的解读指南可能导致结果不确定，凸显了精准筛选患者和提供咨询的挑战。
ai.translation:
目的：基于测序的遗传检测常识别意义未明的变异（VUS）或完全无法检测致病变异。我们评估了RNA测序（RNA-seq）在临床环境中澄清VUS或识别缺失变异的实用性。

方法：在两年期间，某机构的遗传学专家将26例病例转介进行临床RNA-seq。这些病例要么此前检测未发现候选变异，要么怀疑VUS影响剪接或表达。每个提交案例均由委员会审核以确保符合研究标准。

结果：在26例病例中，8例因可获取组织的表达不足无法测序，2例不符合纳入标准，3例在样本采集前已解决，4个家庭拒绝参与或未完成样本采集。对成功测序的9例病例，临床实验室报告2例阳性、4例阴性及3例"不确定"。所有3例不确定结果的原始RNA-seq数据经人工复核后均被判定具有解释性。

结论：临床RNA-seq可澄清VUS，尤其是剪接变异，但实验室特定的解读指南可能导致不确定结果。识别可能从RNA-seq获益的个体并提供适当咨询面临独特挑战。

title: Detection of DNA methylation from buccal swabs using nanopore sequencing to study stunting.
abstract: Stunting is the result of chronic malnutrition due to the lack of micronutrient-based methyl donors required for epigenetic programming during the first 1000 days of life. Methylation studies using bisulfite conversion from blood DNA are invasive and may not be practical for large-scale epidemiological investigation or nutrition intervention programs. Buccal epithelial methylation may reflect early germline methylation. Therefore, buccal cells can serve as convenient sample sources to collect biomarkers associated with the risk of stunting. This study aims to describe the feasibility of nanopore adaptive sampling in detecting DNA methylation from children's buccal DNA. We used adaptive sampling of Oxford Nanopore Technology on barcoded samples to describe differential methylation associated with malnutrition. Overall, the level of 5-methylcytosine (5mC) was lower in stunted children than in normal children. We also found differentially methylated regions at the MIR6724 and RNA45SN1 gene loci on chromosome 21, which was higher in stunted children than in normal children. We described and detected differential DNA methylation in the locus previously not known to be associated with stunting. Interestingly, this locus on chromosome 21 has been implicated in the stunted phenotype of Down syndrome.
authors: Alim El-Hakim, Inswasti Cahyani, Muhammad Zulfikar Arief, Gilang Akbariani, Asep Muhamad Ridwanuloh, Syam Budi Iryanto, Ratih Rahayu, Daeng Deni Mardaeni, Vincentius Budhyanto, Yusnita, Wening Sari, Anggi Pn Hidayati, Intan Razari, Silviatun Nihayah, Kinasih Prayuni, Chandra Utomo, Ratih Asmana Ningrum, Susanti Susanti, Ahmad Utomo

ai.TLDR: 生长迟缓是由于生命前1000天缺乏微量营养素甲基供体导致的慢性营养不良结果。传统血液DNA甲基化研究具有侵入性，难以大规模应用。本研究验证了纳米孔自适应采样技术检测儿童颊部DNA甲基化的可行性，发现染色体21上的MIR6724和RNA45SN1基因位点甲基化水平与生长迟缓显著相关。
ai.translation: 生长迟缓是由于慢性营养不良导致的表观遗传编程缺陷，其根本原因是生命前1000天缺乏基于微量营养素的甲基供体。采用亚硫酸氢盐转化的血液DNA甲基化研究具有侵入性，难以应用于大规模流行病学调查或营养干预项目。颊部上皮细胞甲基化可能反映早期生殖系甲基化特征，因此颊部细胞可作为便捷的生物标志物采集样本。本研究旨在描述纳米孔自适应采样技术检测儿童颊部DNA甲基化的可行性。我们采用牛津纳米孔技术对条形码样本进行自适应采样，描述与营养不良相关的差异甲基化特征。总体而言，生长迟缓儿童的5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）水平显著低于正常儿童。我们还发现染色体23上的MIR6724和RNA45SN1基因位点存在差异甲基化，且生长迟缓儿童的甲基化水平显著高于正常儿童。我们描述并检测到此前未被报道与生长迟缓相关的差异DNA甲基化位点。有趣的是，该染色体21位点已被关联到唐氏综合征的生长迟缓表型。

title: Repeat-Rich Regions Cause False-Positive Detection of NUMTs: A Case Study in Amphibians Using an Improved Cane Toad Reference Genome.
abstract: Mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) has been widely used in genetics research for decades. Contamination from nuclear DNA of mitochondrial origin (NUMTs) can confound studies of phylogenetic relationships and mtDNA heteroplasmy. Homology searches with mtDNA are widely used to detect NUMTs in the nuclear genome. Nevertheless, false-positive detection of NUMTs is common when handling repeat-rich sequences, while fragmented genomes might result in missing true NUMTs. In this study, we investigated different NUMT detection methods and how the quality of the genome assembly affects them. We presented an improved nuclear genome assembly (aRhiMar1.3) of the invasive cane toad (Rhinella marina) with additional long-read Nanopore and 10× linked-read sequencing. The final assembly was 3.47 Gb in length with 91.3% of tetrapod universal single-copy orthologs (n = 5,310), indicating the gene-containing regions were well assembled. We used 3 complementary methods (NUMTFinder, dinumt, and PALMER) to study the NUMT landscape of the cane toad genome. All 3 methods yielded consistent results, showing very few NUMTs in the cane toad genome. Furthermore, we expanded NUMT detection analyses to other amphibians and confirmed a weak relationship between genome size and the number of NUMTs present in the nuclear genome. Amphibians are repeat-rich, and we show that the number of NUMTs found in highly repetitive genomes is prone to inflation when using homology-based detection without filters. Together, this study provides an exemplar of how to robustly identify NUMTs in complex genomes when confounding effects on mtDNA analyses are a concern.
authors: Kelton Cheung, Lee Ann Rollins, Jillian M Hammond, Kirston Barton, James M Ferguson, Harrison J F Eyck, Richard Shine, Richard J Edwards

ai.TLDR: 线粒体DNA（mtDNA）在遗传学研究中广泛应用，但核基因组中线粒体起源的污染（NUMTs）会干扰系统发育分析和异质性研究。本研究通过改进基因组组装方法和三种互补工具，发现两栖动物基因组中NUMTs数量极少，并揭示基因组大小与NUMTs数量存在弱相关性。
ai.translation: 线粒体DNA（mtDNA）在遗传学研究中已应用数十年。源自核DNA的线粒体污染（NUMTs）会干扰系统发育关系分析和mtDNA异质性研究。利用mtDNA同源搜索检测核基因组中的NUMTs是常用方法。然而，处理富含重复序列时易出现NUMTs假阳性检测，而碎片化基因组可能导致遗漏真实NUMTs。本研究调查了不同NUMT检测方法及其受基因组组装质量的影响。我们提供了入侵 cane toad（Rhinella marina）的改进核基因组组装（aRhiMar1.3），结合长读长Nanopore和10× linked-read测序技术。最终组装长度为3.47 Gb，包含91.3%的四足动物通用单拷贝直系同源基因（n=5,310），表明基因区域组装完整。通过NUMTFinder、dinumt和PALMER三种互补方法分析cane toad基因组NUMT景观，三种方法结果一致，显示其基因组中NUMTs极少。进一步扩展NUMT检测分析至其他两栖动物，证实核基因组中NUMTs数量与基因组大小存在弱相关性。两栖动物富含重复序列，研究显示未过滤的同源检测在高度重复基因组中易导致NUMTs数量高估。本研究为在mtDNA分析干扰效应存在时，如何稳健识别复杂基因组中的NUMTs提供了范例。

title: Harnessing Nanomaterials for Next-Generation DNA Methylation Biosensors.
abstract: DNA methylation is an epigenetic mechanism that regulates gene expression and is implicated in diseases such as cancer and atherosclerosis. However, traditional clinical methods for detecting DNA methylation often lack sensitivity and specificity, making early diagnosis challenging. Nanomaterials offer a solution with their unique properties, enabling highly sensitive photochemical and electrochemical detection techniques. These advanced methods enhance the accuracy and efficiency of identifying DNA methylation patterns, providing a powerful tool for early diagnosis and treatment of methylation-related diseases. This review summarizes nanomaterial-based techniques, categorized into electrochemical and photochemical methods for developing next-generation biosensors for DNA methylation. Electrochemical approaches based on nanostructured or nanomaterial-modified electrodes can detect methylation through electrical signals and can directly identify methylation sites via ionic current changes based on nanopore sequencing. Photochemical methods based on nanoparticles allow for optical detection through colorimetry, fluorescence, surface plasmon resonance, and Raman spectroscopy. Nanotechnology-implemented methodologies enable ultrasensitive and selective biosensors as point-of-care platforms for DNA methylation analysis, thereby advancing epigenetic research and clinical diagnostics.
authors: Anlai Zou, Xiaoxue Zhu, Ruijie Fu, Zexiang Wang, Yidan Wang, Zhi Ruan, Yunlei Xianyu, Jun Zhang

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化作为表观遗传调控机制，与癌症和动脉粥样硬化等疾病密切相关。传统检测方法因灵敏度和特异性不足导致早期诊断困难，纳米材料通过电化学和光化学技术提供高灵敏度解决方案，推动表观遗传研究和临床诊断发展。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化是一种调控基因表达的表观遗传机制，与癌症和动脉粥样硬化等疾病密切相关。然而，传统临床检测DNA甲基化的方法常缺乏足够的灵敏度和特异性，导致早期诊断困难。纳米材料凭借其独特性质，为高灵敏度的光化学和电化学检测技术提供了解决方案。这些先进技术显著提升了DNA甲基化模式识别的准确性与效率，成为相关疾病早期诊断和治疗的重要工具。本文综述了基于纳米材料的检测技术，按电化学和光化学方法分类，探讨其在下一代DNA甲基化生物传感器开发中的应用。基于纳米结构或纳米材料修饰电极的电化学方法可通过电信号检测甲基化，并利用纳米孔测序通过离子电流变化直接识别甲基化位点。基于纳米粒子的光化学方法则通过比色法、荧光、表面等离子体共振和拉曼光谱实现光学检测。纳米技术实施的检测方法使DNA甲基化分析成为便携式点对点检测平台，推动表观遗传研究和临床诊断的发展。

title: The fate of artificial transgenes in Acanthamoeba castellanii
abstract: In this study, artificial transformation experiments were performed to investigate how the A. castellanii genome responds to foreign DNA presented in both circular and linear plasmid form. Nanopore sequencing was used as a high throughput method to screen for transgene DNA in the resulting transformant cultures, and candidate transgene integrations were identified. Molecular biology experiments were performed to validate the sequence data and provide additional context on the fate of transgenes. A method was devised to estimate the rate of read chimerism in nanopore sequencing runs and accurately account for the effects of read chimerism in identifying putative transgene integrations. Based on the experimental data in hand, a potential mechanism for transgene maintenance in A. castellanii is proposed, one in which incoming foreign DNA is tandemly duplicated and telomeres are added to the ends. This nascent linear molecule is maintained as a transgene-bearing minichromosome, while also allowing for chromosomal integration.
authors: Colp, M. J.; Blais, C.; Curtis, B. A.; Archibald, J. M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过人工转化实验探究A. castellanii基因组对环状和线性质粒形式异源DNA的响应机制。采用纳米孔测序技术筛选转化菌落中的转基因DNA，结合分子生物学实验验证数据并解析转基因命运。研究提出了一种基于读取嵌合体率估算的分析方法，揭示了转基因通过串联重复和端粒添加形成携带转基因的微型染色体的维持机制。
ai.translation: 本研究通过人工转化实验，系统探究了Acanthamoeba castellanii基因组对环状和线性质粒形式异源DNA的响应机制。采用纳米孔测序技术作为高通量筛选方法，对转化菌落进行转基因DNA的检测，识别出候选的转基因整合位点。通过分子生物学实验验证序列数据，并提供关于转基因命运的额外背景信息。研究者开发了一种估算纳米孔测序过程中读取嵌合体率的方法，以准确校正读取嵌合体对转基因整合位点识别的影响。基于现有实验数据，提出A. castellanii转基因维持的潜在机制：外源DNA通过串联重复并添加端粒形成新型线性分子，该分子作为携带转基因的微型染色体维持存在，同时允许染色体整合。

title: Real-time plasmid transmission detection pipeline.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: The spread of antimicrobial resistance among bacteria by horizontal plasmid transmissions poses a major challenge for clinical microbiology. Here, we evaluate a new real-time plasmid transmission detection pipeline implemented in the SeqSphere

IMPORTANCE: Plasmid-mediated spread of antimicrobial resistance is a major challenge for clinical microbiology, and monitoring of potential plasmid transmissions is essential to combat further dissemination. Whole-genome sequencing is often used to surveil nosocomial transmissions but usually limited to the detection of clonal transmissions (based on chromosomal markers). Recent advances in long-read sequencing technologies enable full reconstruction of plasmids and the detection of very similar plasmids, but so far, easy-to-use bioinformatic tools for this purpose have been missing. Here, we present an evaluation of an innovative real-time plasmid transmission detection pipeline. It is integrated into the GUI-based SeqSphere
authors: Natalie Scherff, Jörg Rothgänger, Thomas Weniger, Alexander Mellmann, Dag Harmsen

ai.TLDR: 抗菌素耐药性在细菌间的水平质粒传播对临床微生物学构成重大挑战。本文评估了一种新的实时质粒传播检测流程，该流程集成在SeqSphere中，能够有效监测潜在的质粒传播。
ai.translation:
无标题：细菌间通过水平质粒传播的抗菌素耐药性对临床微生物学构成了重大挑战。在此，我们评估了一种新的实时质粒传播检测流程，该流程已集成在SeqSphere中。

重要性：质粒介导的抗菌素耐药性传播是临床微生物学面临的主要挑战，监测潜在的质粒传播对于遏制进一步扩散至关重要。全基因组测序常用于监测医院内传播，但通常仅限于基于染色体标记的克隆传播检测。近年来，长读长测序技术的进步使得质粒的完整重构和非常相似质粒的检测成为可能，但目前仍缺乏易于使用的生物信息学工具。在此，我们介绍了一个创新的实时质粒传播检测流程的评估。该流程已集成到基于图形用户界面的SeqSphere中。

title: Whole-genome sequencing of coexisting bla
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: We aimed to characterize the molecular characteristics and clinical features of carbapenem-resistant Citrobacter braakii carrying bla

METHODS: The susceptibility of C. braakii (WF0082) to 22 antimicrobial drugs was tested by an automated microbiology system. Whole-genome sequencing was performed using the Illumina and Nanopore platforms. Resistance genes and plasmid replicon types were determined. Gene structure was compared between strains to analyse the plasmid properties and gene environments of carbapenem (bla

RESULTS: WF0082 was resistant to all antibiotics excluding colistin. bla

CONCLUSIONS: The results of this study showed that C. braakii strain WF0082 carrying bla
authors: Fengqiang Sun, Xiaomei Yu, Fengli Zhang, Jie Ma, Ping Ji

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在分析耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌属布拉克氏菌携带bla基因的分子特征和临床表现。通过全基因组测序和药敏试验，发现该菌株对所有抗生素耐药，仅对多粘菌素敏感。研究揭示了bla基因的整合机制及其在耐药性中的作用。
keywords: 耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌属布拉克氏菌
ai.translation:
研究目的：我们旨在分析耐碳青霉烯类肠杆菌属布拉克氏菌（C. braakii）携带bla基因的分子特征和临床表现。

研究方法：通过自动化微生物系统测试了C. braakii（WF0082）对22种抗菌药物的敏感性。使用Illumina和Nanopore平台进行了全基因组测序。确定了耐药基因和质粒复制子类型。通过比较不同菌株的基因结构，分析了碳青霉烯类（bla基因）的质粒特性及基因环境。

研究结果：WF0082菌株对所有抗生素均耐药，仅对多粘菌素敏感。bla基因的整合机制及其在耐药性中的作用被揭示。

研究结论：本研究结果表明，携带bla基因的C. braakii菌株WF0082对所有抗生素耐药，仅对多粘菌素敏感，揭示了bla基因的整合机制及其在耐药性中的作用。

title: Standardization of 16S rRNA gene sequencing using nanopore long read sequencing technology for clinical diagnosis of culture negative infections.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract: The integration of long-read sequencing technology, such as nanopore sequencing technology [Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)], into routine diagnostic laboratories has the potential to transform bacterial infection diagnostics and improve patient management. Analysis of amplicons from long-read sequencing of the 16S rRNA gene generates a comprehensive view of the microbial community within clinical samples, significantly enhancing sensitivity and capacity to analyse mixed bacterial populations compared to short read sequencing approaches. This study evaluates various ONT sequencing approaches and library preparation kits to establish a reliable testing and quality framework for clinical implementation. This study highlights the critical importance of using well-characterized reference materials in validating and revalidating long-read sequencing methods, leveraging a combination of standardized reference materials and clinical samples to navigate the evolving landscape of microbial diagnostics. It presents a robust validation framework for laboratory accreditation and outlines a methodology for comparing the performance of newer ONT chemistries with earlier versions. Additionally, the study details the methods and quality control measures necessary for achieving more accurate and efficient diagnoses of bacterial infections, ultimately reducing time to treatment and enhancing patient outcomes.
authors: Ian Butler, Olivia Turner, Kulsoom Mohammed, Mazeda Akhtar, Daniel Evans, Jonathan Lambourne, Kathryn Harris, Denise M O'Sullivan, Chrysi Sergaki

ai.TLDR: 将长读长测序技术（如纳米孔测序技术[Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)]）整合到常规诊断实验室中，有望改变细菌感染的诊断方式并改善患者管理。本研究评估了多种ONT测序方法和文库制备试剂盒，以建立可靠的检测和质量框架，用于临床实施。
ai.translation: 将长读长测序技术，如纳米孔测序技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）整合到常规诊断实验室中，具有改变细菌感染诊断并改善患者管理的潜力。通过长读长测序分析16S rRNA基因的扩增子，可以生成临床样本中微生物群落的全面视图，与短读长测序方法相比，显著提高了对混合细菌群体的敏感性和分析能力。本研究评估了多种ONT测序方法和文库制备试剂盒，以建立一个可靠的检测和质量框架，用于临床实施。本研究强调了在验证和重新验证长读长测序方法时使用特性明确的参考材料的关键重要性，并利用标准化参考材料和临床样本的结合，以应对微生物诊断领域的不断变化。它提出了一个稳健的验证框架，用于实验室认证，并概述了一种方法，用于比较新型ONT化学试剂与早期版本的性能。此外，本研究详细介绍了实现更准确和高效细菌感染诊断所需的方法和质量控制措施，最终减少治疗时间并改善患者预后。
