ai.TLDR: 该研究提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，用于从非侵入性样本中检测癌症相关基因突变。该方法在多个数据集上表现出优异的性能，为临床应用提供了新的可能性。
ai.translation: 近年来，非侵入性癌症检测技术因其对患者友好的特性而受到广泛关注。然而，如何从复杂的生物样本中准确识别癌症相关基因突变仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，该方法能够从非侵入性样本中高效地检测癌症相关基因突变。我们的模型通过端到端的学习方式，能够自动提取关键特征并进行分类。实验结果表明，该方法在多个公开数据集上均表现出优异的性能，其准确率和灵敏度均优于现有方法。此外，我们还对模型的可解释性进行了分析，以帮助临床医生更好地理解模型的决策过程。本研究为癌症的早期检测和个性化治疗提供了新的技术手段，具有重要的临床应用价值。

title: Enhanced Prediction of Seafloor Ecological State Using 16S Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: Anthropogenic stress on benthic habitats, particularly from aquaculture, calls for accurate and efficient monitoring of the macrofauna ecological state. Recent advancements in Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) together with environmental DNA offers cost-effective and rapid, on-site monitoring of such ecosystems. Previous studies have demonstrated that Nanopore sequencing provides sufficient precision for predicting ecological state, despite reported challenges with sequencing accuracy. In this study, we aim to predict the seafloor ecological state with both Illumina and Nanopore 16S rRNA gene sequencing data and using a combination of machine learning and feature selection. We analyzed 88 seafloor samples from aquaculture sites located on a north-south gradient along the Norwegian coast. Both sequencing methods were evaluated in combination with various bioinformatic approaches in the context of predicting the normalized EQR index (nEQR, standard ecological index based on macroinvertebrate counting) as a metric of seafloor ecosystem status. Our results show that the predictive performance of Illumina and Nanopore sequencing platforms are comparable, establishing Nanopore as a feasible alternative to illumina sequencing. By employing a stabilized LASSO regression, the feature set (potential taxa) was efficiently optimized from thousands to 40-60 OTUs. The feature selection reduced prediction errors to less than half of what was obtained through full feature modeling. This feature set demonstrated strong predictive accuracy across both sequencing technologies, with a high correlation between observed and predicted nEQR values. The Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.98 for Illumina and 0.95 (mean prediction error: {+/-}0.04) for Nanopore data (mean prediction error: {+/-}0.06). This study demonstrates that continual improvements in Nanopore sequencing accuracy, in combination with optimized feature selection on a broader set of samples, provides a precise and cost-effective monitoring method for marine benthic environments.
authors: Philip, M.; Nilsen, T.; Majaneva, S.; Pettersen, R.; Stokkan, M.; Ray, J. L.; Keeley, N.; rudi, k.; Snipen, L.-G.

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过结合Illumina和Nanopore测序技术，结合机器学习和特征选择方法，预测海底生态状态。结果表明，Nanopore测序在准确性和成本效益方面可作为Illumina的可行替代方案。
ai.translation: 人类活动对海底栖息地（尤其是水产养殖区）造成的压力，需要准确高效的宏观生物生态状态监测。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）与环境DNA的结合，为这类生态系统的现场监测提供了成本效益高且快速的解决方案。尽管存在测序准确性方面的挑战，但先前研究表明，纳米孔测序在预测生态状态方面具有足够的精度。本研究旨在利用Illumina和Nanopore 16S rRNA基因测序数据，结合机器学习和特征选择方法，预测海底生态状态。我们分析了挪威海岸南北梯度分布的水产养殖区88个海底样本。两种测序方法均结合多种生物信息学方法，用于预测标准化生态指数（nEQR，基于大型无脊椎动物计数的生态指数）作为海底生态系统状态的指标。结果表明，Illumina和Nanopore测序平台的预测性能相当，确立了纳米孔测序作为Illumina测序的可行替代方案。通过采用稳定化的LASSO回归，从数千个特征中优化出40-60个OTUs（潜在分类群）。特征选择将预测误差降低至完整特征建模的不到一半。该特征集在两种测序技术中均表现出强预测准确性，观测值与预测值的nEQR呈高度相关性。Illumina的皮尔逊相关系数为0.98，Nanopore数据的皮尔逊相关系数为0.95（平均预测误差：±0.04），而完整特征建模的平均预测误差为±0.06。本研究证明，纳米孔测序准确性的持续改进，结合更广泛样本集的优化特征选择，可为海洋底栖环境提供精确且成本效益高的监测方法。

title: Comparison of direct cDNA and PCR-cDNA Nanopore sequencing of RNA from
abstract: Whole-transcriptome (long-read) RNA sequencing (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT) holds promise for reference-agnostic analysis of differential gene expression in pathogenic bacteria, including for antimicrobial resistance genes (ARGs). However, direct cDNA ONT sequencing requires large concentrations of polyadenylated mRNA, and amplification protocols may introduce technical bias. Here we evaluated the impact of direct cDNA- and cDNA PCR-based ONT sequencing on transcriptomic analysis of clinical
authors: Gillian Rodger, Samuel Lipworth, Lucinda Barrett, Sarah Oakley, Derrick W Crook, David W Eyre, Nicole Stoesser

ai.TLDR: 全转录组（长读长）RNA测序（ONT）在病原菌差异基因表达分析中具有潜力，包括抗微生物耐药基因（ARGs）。然而，直接cDNA测序需要高浓度的多聚腺苷酸化mRNA，且扩增协议可能引入技术偏差。本文评估了直接cDNA和cDNA PCR基的ONT测序对临床样本转录组分析的影响。

title: Investigation of ceftriaxone-resistant Neisseria gonorrhoeae detected in Scotland, 2018-2024
abstract:
ObjectivesDescribe the clinical, phenotypic, and genomic characteristics of ceftriaxone-resistance Neisseria gonorrhoeae from Scotland

MethodsCases were identified in routine care from 2018-2024. Minimum inhibitory concentrations were determined for seven antimicrobial agents. Whole genome sequencing was performed with Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technology instruments. A phylogeny containing global ceftriaxone-resistant genomes was generated with Parsnp. A collection of ST8780 genomes was also analysed to give further context using reference based mapping with Snippy.

ResultsThere were five cases of ceftriaxone-resistant N. gonorrhoeae detected. One case (MLST ST1903) clustered within the FC428 lineage in a returning traveller from an Asia-Pacific country. Two cases belonged to the recently described extensively drug resistant MLST ST16406, a returning traveller from an Asia-Pacific country and a sexual contact within Scotland. The final two cases were a resident of an Asia-Pacific country and a sexual contact within Scotland, both belonged to MLST ST8780. These were distinct from other publicly available ST8780 genomes suggesting a novel introduction of the mosaic penA 60.001 allele. All cases were initially treated with ceftriaxone-based regimes, four returned for test of cure and showed clearance of infection.

ConclusionsAs ceftriaxone resistance is increasingly identified, multiple public health interventions are required to reduce the impact of resistance on gonorrhoea treatment globally.
authors: McHugh, M. P.; Aburajab, K.; Maxwell, A.; Anderson, J.; Cairns, F.; Cotton, S.; Gough, A.; Malloy, B.; Mathers, K.; Renwick, L.; Shepherd, J.; Templeton, K. E.

ai.TLDR: 苏格兰地区发现五例头孢曲松耐药淋球菌感染病例，其中两例属于新型ST8780克隆，提示耐药基因可能通过旅行者引入。所有病例均接受头孢曲松治疗，四例治疗后感染清除，凸显耐药监测的重要性。
ai.translation:
研究目的：描述苏格兰地区头孢曲松耐药淋球菌的临床特征、表型及基因组特性。

方法：2018-2024年间通过常规医疗记录识别病例，对七种抗菌药物进行最低抑菌浓度检测。采用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technology平台进行全基因组测序，使用Parsnp软件构建包含全球头孢曲松耐药菌株的系统发育树。同时通过Snippy软件对ST8780基因组集合进行参考基因组比对分析。

结果：共发现五例头孢曲松耐药淋球菌感染病例。其中一例（MLST ST1903）属于FC428谱系，感染患者为来自亚太地区的旅行者。两例属于近期报道的广泛耐药MLST ST16406克隆，分别感染来自亚太地区的旅行者及苏格兰本地性接触者。最后两例为亚太地区居民及苏格兰本地性接触者，均属于MLST ST8750克隆。这些菌株与公开数据库中的ST8780基因组存在显著差异，提示可能为新型mosaic penA 60.001等位基因的引入。所有病例均采用头孢曲松为基础的治疗方案，四例完成治疗效果评估后感染清除。

结论：随着头孢曲松耐药病例的增加，需要采取多种公共卫生干预措施以降低耐药性对淋病治疗的全球影响。

title: Targeted nanopore sequencing using the Flongle device to identify mitochondrial DNA variants
abstract: Variants in mitochondrial genomes (mtDNA) can cause various neurological and mitochondrial diseases such as mitochondrial myopathy, encephalopathy, lactic acidosis, stroke-like episodes (MELAS). Given the 16 kb length of mtDNA, continuous sequencing is feasible using long-read sequencing (LRS). Herein, we aimed to show a simple and accessible method for comprehensive mtDNA sequencing with potential diagnostic applications for mitochondrial diseases using the compact and affordable LRS flow cell “Flongle.” Whole mtDNA amplification (WMA) was performed using genomic DNA samples derived from four patients with mitochondrial diseases, followed by LRS using Flongle. We compared these results to those obtained using Cas9 enrichment. Additionally, the accuracy of heteroplasmy rates was assessed by incorporating mtDNA variants at equimolar levels. Finally, mtDNA from 19 patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD) was sequenced using Flongle to identify disease risk-associated variants. mtDNA variants were detected in all four patients with mitochondrial diseases, with results comparable to those obtained from Cas9 enrichment. Heteroplasmy levels were accurately detected (r2 > 0.99) via WMA using Flongle. A reported variant was identified in three patients with PD. In conclusion, Flongle can simplify the traditionally cumbersome and expensive mtDNA sequencing process, offering a streamlined and accessible approach to diagnosing mitochondrial diseases.
authors: Shintaro Akamatsu, Satomi Mitsuhashi, ... Yoshihisa Yamano
citation: Akamatsu, S., Mitsuhashi, S., Soga, K. et al. Targeted nanopore sequencing using the Flongle device to identify mitochondrial DNA variants. Sci Rep 14 , 25161 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-75749-8

ai.TLDR: 线粒体基因组变异可导致多种神经和线粒体疾病，本文提出利用低成本Flongle测序技术实现快速诊断。通过全基因组扩增和长读长测序，成功检测到4例线粒体疾病患者的致病变异，异质性水平检测准确度达r2>0.99。
ai.translation: 线粒体基因组（mtDNA）变异可导致多种神经和线粒体疾病，如线粒体肌病、脑病、乳酸酸中毒和类似中风发作（MELAS）。鉴于mtDNA长度为16 kb，可通过长读长测序（LRS）实现连续测序。本研究旨在展示一种简单且可及的mtDNA测序方法，利用紧凑且经济的LRS流细胞“Flongle”进行线粒体疾病的诊断应用。通过使用来自4例线粒体疾病患者的基因组DNA样本进行全mtDNA扩增（WMA），随后采用Flongle进行LRS。将结果与Cas9富集法进行比较，同时通过等摩尔掺入mtDNA变异评估异质性水平的准确性。最终使用Flongle对19例帕金森病（PD）患者进行mtDNA测序以识别疾病相关变异。所有4例线粒体疾病患者均检测到mtDNA变异，结果与Cas9富集法相当。通过Flongle进行的WMA准确检测了异质性水平（r2 > 0.99）。在3例PD患者中鉴定出已报道的变异。结论表明，Flongle可简化传统繁琐且昂贵的mtDNA测序流程，提供一种流线型且可及的线粒体疾病诊断方法。

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在描述头孢曲松耐药的临床、表型和基因组特征。通过分析2018年至2024年的临床数据，结合全基因组测序和系统发育分析，揭示了头孢曲松耐药的流行病学和遗传背景。研究结果表明，头孢曲松耐药的传播对全球淋病治疗构成重大挑战。
ai.translation:

title: Novel bacteriophages targeting wheat phyllosphere bacteria carry DNA modifications and single-strand breaks
abstract: The phyllosphere microbiome can positively or negatively impact plant health and growth, but we currently lack the tools to control microbiome composition. Contributing to a growing collection of bacteriophages (phages) targeting bacteria living in the wheat phyllosphere, we here isolate and sequence eight novel phages targeting common phyllosphere Erwinia and Pseudomonas strains, including two jumbo phages. We characterize genomic, phylogenetic, and morphological traits from these phages and argue for establishing four novel viral genera. We also search the genomes for anti-defense systems and investigate DNA modifications using Nanopore sequencing. In Pseudomonas phage Rembedalsseter we find evidence of 13 motif-associated single-stranded DNA breaks. A bioinformatics search revealed that 60 related Pseudomonas phages are enriched in the same motif, suggesting these single-stranded nicks may be widely distributed in this family of phages. Finally, we also search the Sequence Read Archive for similar phages in public metagenomes. We find close hits to the Erwinia jumbo-phage Kaldavass in a wide variety of plant, food, and wastewater metagenomes including a near-perfect hit from a Spanish spinach sample, illustrating how interconnected geographically distant phages can be.
authors: Dougherty, P. E.; Pedersen, M. S.; Forero-Junco, L. M.; Carstens, A. B.; Raaijmakers, J. M.; Riber, L.; Hansen, L. H.

ai.TLDR: 植物表观微生物组对植物健康具有正负双重影响，但目前缺乏调控其组成的工具。本研究分离并测序了8种新型噬菌体，揭示了其基因组特征及潜在抗防御机制，发现单链DNA断裂可能广泛存在于该噬菌体家族。
ai.translation: 植物表观微生物组（phyllosphere microbiome）可能对植物健康和生长产生积极或消极影响，但目前尚缺乏调控微生物组组成的工具。本研究通过分离并测序8种新型噬菌体，拓展了针对小麦表观中常见Erwinia和Pseudomonas菌株的噬菌体数据库，其中包括两种巨型噬菌体（jumbo phages）。我们系统分析了这些噬菌体的基因组、系统发育及形态特征，并提出建立四个新的病毒属。通过纳米孔测序技术，我们发现Pseudomonas噬菌体Rembedalsseter存在13个与motif相关的单链DNA断裂。生物信息学分析显示，60种相关Pseudomonas噬菌体均富集相同motif，表明单链切口可能在该噬菌体家族中普遍存在。最后，我们通过Sequence Read Archive数据库检索公共宏基因组，发现Erwinia巨型噬菌体Kaldavass在多种植物、食品及废水样本中存在高度相似序列，例如西班牙菠菜样本中近乎完美的匹配，揭示了地理上远距离噬菌体的潜在关联性。

title: COmapper: High-resolution mapping of meiotic crossovers by long-read sequencing in Arabidopsis
abstract:
O_LIMeiotic crossovers rearrange existing genetic variation between homologous chromosomes, profoundly affecting genomic diversity. Crossovers are typically constrained to 1-3 events per chromosome pair, and their distribution is shaped by chromatin accessibility and DNA polymorphisms. Genome-wide crossover maps can be generated in plants by high-throughput short-read sequencing or linked-read sequencing.
C_LIO_LIHere, we use long-read nanopore sequencing technology to develop a crossover mapping pipeline, COmapper, for high-resolution mapping of genome-wide crossovers from pooled DNA of F1 hybrid pollen and F2 recombinant seedlings derived from a cross between Arabidopsis thaliana accessions Col and Ler. We validate the high accuracy of COmapper by applying nanopore long-read sequencing to pooled DNA of Arabidopsis F2 individuals with crossovers mapped by short-read sequencing.
C_LIO_LIUsing the COmapper, we constructed high-resolution genomic maps of crossovers using F1 hybrid pollen and F2 seedlings in wild type and crossover-elevated recq4a recq4b mutant, showing results comparable to short-read sequencing. Crossovers were enriched at gene-proximal promoters in wild type and increased but reshaped by high polymorphism density in recq4a recq4b.
C_LIO_LIWe propose that COmapper will be widely applicable for exploring the effects of genetic, epigenetic and environmental changes on the crossover patterns across diverse plant species.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长纳米孔测序技术开发了COmapper工具，实现了对拟南芥基因组交换事件的高精度定位。实验结果表明，该方法在野生型和突变体中均能获得与短读长测序相当的分辨率，揭示了基因邻近启动子区域的交换富集特征。
ai.translation:
减数分裂交换通过重组同源染色体间的现有遗传变异，深刻影响基因组多样性。交换事件通常被限制在每对染色体1-3次，其分布受染色质可及性和DNA多态性调控。植物可通过高通量短读长测序或链接读长测序生成全基因组交换图谱。

本研究采用长读长纳米孔测序技术，开发了用于高分辨率全基因组交换定位的COmapper流程，该流程基于拟南芥Col和Ler accession杂交产生的F1杂交花粉和F2重组幼苗的混合DNA。通过将纳米孔长读长测序应用于已通过短读长测序定位交换事件的拟南芥F2个体混合DNA，验证了COmapper的高准确性。

利用COmapper，我们构建了野生型和交换增强型recq4a recq4b突变体中F1杂交花粉及F2幼苗的高分辨率基因组交换图谱，结果与短读长测序相当。在野生型中，交换事件在基因邻近启动子区域富集，而在高多态性密度下，交换事件数量增加但分布模式被重塑。

我们提出COmapper将广泛适用于探索遗传、表观遗传和环境变化对多种植物物种交换模式的影响。

title: 3-hour genome sequencing and targeted analysis to rapidly assess genetic risk.
abstract:
PURPOSE: Rapid genetic testing in the critical care setting may guide diagnostic evaluation, direct therapies, and help families and care providers make informed decisions about goals of care. We tested whether a simplified DNA extraction and library preparation process would enable us to perform ultra-rapid assessment of genetic risk for a Mendelian condition, based on information from an affected sibling, using long-read genome sequencing and targeted analysis.

METHODS: Following extraction of DNA from cord blood and rapid library preparation, genome sequencing was performed on an Oxford Nanopore PromethION. FASTQ files were generated from original sequencing data in near real-time and aligned to a reference genome. Variant calling and analysis were performed at timed intervals.

RESULTS: We optimized the DNA extraction and library preparation methods to create sufficient library for sequencing from 500 μL of blood. Real-time, targeted analysis was performed to determine that the newborn was neither affected nor a heterozygote for variants underlying a Mendelian condition. Phasing of the target region and prior knowledge of the affected haplotypes supported our interpretation despite a low level of coverage at 3 hours of life.

CONCLUSION: This proof-of-concept experiment demonstrates how prior knowledge of haplotype structure or familial variants can be used to rapidly evaluate an individual at risk for a genetic disease. While ultra-rapid sequencing remains both complex and cost prohibitive, our method is more easily automated than prior approaches and uses smaller volumes of blood, thus may be more easily adopted for future studies of ultra-rapid genome sequencing in the clinical setting.
authors: Miranda Pg Zalusky, Jonas A Gustafson, Stephanie C Bohaczuk, Ben Mallory, Paxton Reed, Tara Wenger, Erika Beckman, Irene J Chang, Cate R Paschal, Jillian G Buchan, Christina M Lockwood, Mihai Puia-Dumitrescu, Daniel R Garalde, Joseph Guillory, Androo J Markham, Michael J Bamshad, Evan E Eichler, Andrew B Stergachis, Danny E Miller

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过简化DNA提取和文库制备流程，在危重护理环境中实现超快速遗传风险评估。利用长读长基因组测序和靶向分析，结合受影响兄弟姐妹的遗传信息，成功识别新生儿未携带孟德尔遗传病相关变异。该方法在3小时生命阶段即能通过等位基因相位分析和已知致病等位基因信息得出结论。
ai.translation:
目的：在危重护理环境中进行快速基因检测可能指导诊断评估、指导治疗方案，并帮助家属和护理人员做出关于治疗目标的知情决策。我们测试了简化DNA提取和文库制备流程是否能够基于受影响兄弟姐妹的遗传信息，通过长读长基因组测序和靶向分析实现超快速评估孟德尔遗传病的遗传风险。

方法：在从脐带血中提取DNA并完成快速文库制备后，使用Oxford Nanopore PromethION进行基因组测序。原始测序数据在近实时状态下生成FASTQ文件，并与参考基因组进行比对。变异调用和分析在预设时间间隔内进行。

结果：我们优化了DNA提取和文库制备方法，使500μL血液样本能够生成足够的文库用于测序。实时靶向分析显示该新生儿既未携带也非杂合子携带孟德尔遗传病相关变异。尽管生命3小时时目标区域覆盖度较低，但通过目标区域相位分析和已知受影响等位基因信息的支持，我们的解读仍具可靠性。

结论：这项概念验证实验展示了如何利用已知的等位基因结构或家族变异信息，快速评估遗传病风险个体。虽然超快速测序仍存在复杂性和成本限制，但我们的方法相比以往更易自动化，且使用更少血液样本量，因此可能更适用于未来临床环境中的超快速基因组测序研究。

title: DEMINERS enables clinical metagenomics and comparative transcriptomic analysis by increasing throughput and accuracy of nanopore direct RNA sequencing
abstract: Nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS) advances RNA biology but is limited by relatively low basecalling accuracy, low throughput, yet high RNA input and costs. Here we introduce a novel DRS toolkit, DEMINERS, which integrates an RNA multiplexing experimental workflow, a machine-learning barcode classifier based on Random Forest and a novel basecaller built on an optimized convolutional neural network providing an additional species-specific training module. With the increased accuracy in barcode classification and basecalling, DEMINERS can demultiplex up to 24 samples and the required RNA input and running time are both substantially reduced. We demonstrated the applications of DEMINERS in clinical metagenomics, cancer transcriptomics and parallel comparison of transcriptomic features in different biological conditions, revealing altered airway microbial diversity in COVID-19 and a potential role of m6A in increasing transcriptomic diversity in glioma and the mature blood-stage of malaria parasites. Overall, DEMINERS is a simple, robust, high-throughput DRS method for accurately estimating transcript levels, poly(A) lengths, and mutation and RNA modification heterogeneity at single-read level, with minimal sequencing biases.
authors: Song, J.; Lin, L.; Tang, C.; Chen, C.; Yang, Q.; Zhang, D.; Zhao, Y.; Wei, H.-c.; Linghu, K.; Xu, Z.; Chen, T.; He, Z.; Liu, D.; Zhong, Y.; Zhu, W.; Zeng, W.; Chen, L.; Song, G.; Chen, M.; Jiang, J.; Zhou, J.; Wang, J.; Chen, B.; Ying, B.; Wang, Y.; Geng, J.; Lin, J.-w.; Chen, L.

ai.TLDR: DEMINERS通过提升条形码分类和碱基调用准确性，实现了24样本的解复用，显著降低RNA输入量和运行时间。该工具在临床宏基因组学、癌症转录组学等领域验证了其应用价值，揭示了新冠患者气道微生物多样性变化及m6A在胶质瘤和疟疾血阶段寄生虫转录组异质性中的潜在作用。
ai.translation: 纳米孔直接RNA测序（DRS）虽推动了RNA生物学研究，但受限于相对较低的碱基调用准确性、低通量以及高RNA输入量和成本。本文介绍了一种新型DRS工具包DEMINERS，整合了RNA多重测序实验流程、基于随机森林的机器学习条形码分类器以及构建在优化卷积神经网络上的新型碱基调用器，后者包含物种特异性训练模块。通过提升条形码分类和碱基调用准确性，DEMINERS可解复用最多24个样本，所需RNA输入量和运行时间均显著降低。我们验证了DEMINERS在临床宏基因组学、癌症转录组学及不同生物学条件下转录组特征并行比较中的应用，揭示了新冠患者气道微生物多样性变化，以及m6A在胶质瘤和疟疾血阶段寄生虫增加转录组异质性中的潜在作用。总体而言，DEMINERS是一种简单、稳健、高通量的DRS方法，可准确估计转录水平、poly(A)长度、突变和RNA修饰异质性，且具有最小的测序偏差。

title: Single circulating tumor cell sequencing based on improved high-porosity membranes and nanoporous microchambers.
abstract: Circulating tumor cells (CTCs) are crucial for understanding tumor heterogeneity and progression. Despite extensive research over the years, most studies have focused on CTCs counting, with fewer efforts directed toward single-cell sequencing (SCS) of CTCs. In this study, we developed two novel nanodevices---a high-porosity ultrathin filter membrane and a nanowell chip--- to isolate single CTCs. Automated scanning and single-cell picking systems were employed to locate and isolate individual CTCs, enabling the establishment of an efficient and automated workflow for single CTC sequencing using filter-based systems. We conducted an in-depth comparison to evaluate the effects of different filter membranes and cell adhesion types on genomic integrity, cell viability, sequencing coverage, and depth. The results showed that the high-porosity filter membrane outperformed other photolithographic filters for SCS of CTCs. Validation using NCI-H358 cell lines and patient-derived CTCs demonstrated that this workflow could accurately and comprehensively detect gene mutations, amplifications, and copy number variations (CNVs). CNV profiles of CTCs from patients with the same tumor type were highly consistent, while intra-patient CTCs revealed significant heterogeneity. Furthermore, we identified and overcame challenges related to cell adhesion to the filter membrane and the impact of cell viability on sequencing outcomes during CTC enrichment. This workflow offers new insights into the development of CTC-based approaches for exploring tumor progression, heterogeneity, and mechanisms of drug resistance.
authors: Yujuan Zhang, Chao Han, Kexin Li, Tiejun Liu, Hongqing Cai, Danfei Xu, Wei Cui

ai.TLDR: 循环肿瘤细胞（CTCs）在理解肿瘤异质性和进展中起着关键作用。本研究开发了两种新型纳米设备，用于高效分离单个CTCs，并建立了自动化单细胞测序流程。结果表明，高孔率滤膜在单细胞测序中表现更优，能够准确检测基因突变、扩增和拷贝数变异。
ai.translation: 循环肿瘤细胞（CTCs）在理解肿瘤异质性和进展中起着关键作用。尽管多年来已有大量研究，但大多数研究仍集中在CTCs计数，而较少关注CTCs的单细胞测序（SCS）。在本研究中，我们开发了两种新型纳米设备——高孔率超薄滤膜和纳米井芯片——用于分离单个CTCs。通过自动化扫描和单细胞拾取系统，我们定位并分离了单个CTCs，从而建立了基于滤膜系统的高效和自动化单细胞测序流程。我们进行了深入比较，以评估不同滤膜和细胞粘附类型对基因组完整性、细胞活性、测序覆盖度和深度的影响。结果表明，高孔率滤膜在CTCs的单细胞测序中优于其他光刻滤膜。使用NCI-H358细胞系和患者来源的CTCs进行验证，结果表明该流程能够准确且全面地检测基因突变、扩增和拷贝数变异（CNVs）。相同肿瘤类型的CTCs拷贝数变异（CNVs）谱具有高度一致性，而同一患者的CTCs则显示出显著的异质性。此外，我们识别并克服了细胞粘附到滤膜以及细胞活性对测序结果的影响等挑战。该流程为探索肿瘤进展、异质性和药物耐药机制的基于CTCs的方法提供了新的见解。

title: crossNN is an explainable framework for cross-platform DNA methylation-based classification of tumors.
abstract: DNA methylation-based classification of (brain) tumors has emerged as a powerful and indispensable diagnostic technique. Initial implementations used methylation microarrays for data generation, while most current classifiers rely on a fixed methylation feature space. This makes them incompatible with other platforms, especially different flavors of DNA sequencing. Here, we describe crossNN, a neural network-based machine learning framework that can accurately classify tumors using sparse methylomes obtained on different platforms and with different epigenome coverage and sequencing depth. It outperforms other deep and conventional machine learning models regarding accuracy and computational requirements while still being explainable. We use crossNN to train a pan-cancer classifier that can discriminate more than 170 tumor types across all organ sites. Validation in more than 5,000 tumors profiled on different platforms, including nanopore and targeted bisulfite sequencing, demonstrates its robustness and scalability with 99.1% and 97.8% precision for the brain tumor and pan-cancer models, respectively.
authors: Dongsheng Yuan, Robin Jugas, Petra Pokorna, Jaroslav Sterba, Ondrej Slaby, Simone Schmid, Christin Siewert, Brendan Osberg, David Capper, Skarphedinn Halldorsson, Einar O Vik-Mo, Pia S Zeiner, Katharina J Weber, Patrick N Harter, Christian Thomas, Anne Albers, Markus Rechsteiner, Regina Reimann, Anton Appelt, Ulrich Schüller, Nabil Jabareen, Sebastian Mackowiak, Naveed Ishaque, Roland Eils, Sören Lukassen, Philipp Euskirchen

ai.TLDR: 基于DNA甲基化的肿瘤分类已成为一种强大的诊断技术。本文提出crossNN框架，能够跨平台准确分类肿瘤，且在精度和计算需求上优于其他模型。该框架在超过5000个肿瘤样本中验证，显示出高精度和可扩展性。
ai.translation: 基于DNA甲基化的肿瘤分类已成为一种强大且不可或缺的诊断技术。最初的实现使用甲基化微阵列进行数据生成，而大多数当前的分类器依赖于固定的甲基化特征空间。这使得它们与其他平台不兼容，尤其是不同的DNA测序方法。本文中，我们描述了crossNN，这是一种基于神经网络的机器学习框架，能够使用在不同平台获得的稀疏甲基组数据准确分类肿瘤，并且这些数据具有不同的表观基因组覆盖度和测序深度。在准确性和计算需求方面，crossNN优于其他深度和传统机器学习模型，同时仍然保持可解释性。我们使用crossNN训练了一个全癌种分类器，该分类器能够区分所有器官部位中超过170种肿瘤类型。在超过5000个肿瘤样本中进行验证，这些样本使用不同的平台进行分析，包括纳米孔测序和靶向亚硫酸氢盐测序，结果表明其稳健性和可扩展性，分别在脑肿瘤模型和全癌种模型中达到99.1%和97.8%的精确度。

title: Comparison of Illumina and Oxford Nanopore sequencing data quality for Clostridioides difficile genome analysis and their application for epidemiological surveillance.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The burden of Clostridioides difficile as a nosocomial- and community-acquired pathogen has been increasing over the recent decades, including reports of severe outbreaks. Molecular and virulence genotyping are central for the epidemiological surveillance of this pathogen, but need to balance accuracy and rapid turnaround time of the results. While Illumina short-read sequencing has been adopted as the gold standard to investigate C. difficile virulence and transmission routes, little is known about the potential of Nanopore long-read sequencing in this field. The goal of our study was to compare sequencing and assembly quality of 37 C. difficile isolates using Illumina (SPAdes assembled) and Nanopore (Flye and Unicycler assembled) data alone, along with hybrid assemblies obtained with short-read polishing of long reads.

RESULTS: Illumina sequencing produced reads with an average quality of 99.68% (Q25), while Nanopore sequencing produced reads reaching an average quality of 96.84% (Q15), showing a tenfold difference in quality. Sequence type (ST) designation from Nanopore assemblies failed to detect ST5, ST7, ST8, ST13 and ST49, while ST designation based on unpolished Nanopore reads using Krocus was successful for all STs. Nanopore sequences exhibited an average of 640 base errors per genome (~ 0.015% substitution rate), which was reflected by the incorrect assignment of over 180 alleles in core genome multilocus sequence typing (cgMLST) analysis. As a result, Nanopore-derived phylogenies were not as accurate as the Illumina reference, and therefore inadequate for precise investigation of transmission events. Both sequencing platforms provided comparable, satisfactory results for the detection of virulence genes tcdA, tcdB, cdtAB and in-frame deletions in tcdC.

CONCLUSION: Compared to Illumina, Nanopore has higher error rate, which limits its application for high-resolution epidemiological surveillance. However, the short analysis time, lower cost and more simple procedure combined with correctly identified STs and virulence genes, makes it an alternative when fast and less detailed analyses are preferred.
authors: Semeh Bejaoui, Sofie Holtsmark Nielsen, Astrid Rasmussen, John Eugenio Coia, Dorte Terp Andersen, Tobias Bruun Pedersen, Martin Vad Møller, Marc Trunjer Kusk Nielsen, Dorte Frees, Søren Persson

ai.TLDR: 艰难梭菌作为医院和社区获得性病原体的负担近年来不断增加，包括严重爆发的报告。分子和毒力基因分型在流行病学监测中至关重要，但需在准确性和结果周转时间之间取得平衡。尽管Illumina短读测序已成为研究艰难梭菌毒力和传播途径的金标准，但Nanopore长读测序在该领域的潜力尚不清楚。本研究比较了使用Illumina和Nanopore数据（包括混合组装）对37株艰难梭菌分离株的测序和组装质量。
ai.translation:
背景：近年来，艰难梭菌作为医院和社区获得性病原体的负担不断增加，包括严重爆发的报告。分子和毒力基因分型在该病原体的流行病学监测中至关重要，但需要在准确性和结果周转时间之间取得平衡。尽管Illumina短读测序已被采用为研究艰难梭菌毒力和传播途径的金标准，但关于Nanopore长读测序在该领域的潜力仍知之甚少。本研究的目标是使用Illum、Nanopore数据（包括短读校正后的混合组装）比较37株艰难梭菌分离株的测序和组装质量。

结果：Illumina测序产生的读段平均质量为99.68%（Q25），而Nanopore测序产生的读段平均质量为96.84%（Q15），显示出质量相差十倍。基于Nanopore组装的序列类型（ST）鉴定未能检测到ST5、ST7、ST8、ST13和ST49，而基于未校正Nanopore读段的Krocus分析成功识别了所有ST。Nanopore测序在每个基因组中平均表现出640个碱基错误（约0.015%的替换率），这在核心基因组多位点序列分型（cgMLST）分析中表现为超过180个等位基因的错误分配。因此，基于Nanopore的系统发育树不如Illumina参考标准准确，因此不适合用于精确研究传播事件。两种测序平台在检测毒力基因tcdA、tcdB、cdtAB以及tcdC中的框内缺失方面均提供了可比且令人满意的检测结果。

结论：与Illumina相比，Nanopore具有更高的错误率，这限制了其在高分辨率流行病学监测中的应用。然而，其分析时间短、成本低、操作简单，结合正确识别的ST和毒力基因，使其在需要快速且不那么详细分析的情况下成为一种替代方案。

title: Analytical Performance of a Novel Nanopore Sequencing for SARS-CoV-2 Genomic Surveillance.
abstract: The genomic analysis of SARS-CoV-2 has served as a crucial tool for generating invaluable data that fulfils both epidemiological and clinical necessities. Long-read sequencing technology (e.g., ONT) has been widely used, providing a real-time and faster response when necessitated. A novel nanopore-based long-read sequencing platform named QNome nanopore has been successfully used for bacterial genome sequencing and assembly; however, its performance in the SARS-CoV-2 genomic surveillance is still lacking. Synthetic SARS-CoV-2 controls and 120 nasopharyngeal swab (NPS) samples that tested positive by real-time polymerase chain reaction were sequenced on both QNome and MGI platforms in parallel. The analytical performance of QNome was compared to the short-read sequencing on MGI. For the synthetic SARS-CoV-2 controls, despite the increased error rates observed in QNome nanopore sequencing reads, accurate consensus-level sequence determination was achieved with an average mapping quality score of approximately 60 (i.e., a mapping accuracy of 99.9999%). For the NPS samples, the average genomic coverage was 89.35% on the QNome nanopore platform compared with 90.39% for MGI. In addition, fewer consensus genomes from QNome were determined to be good by Nextclade compare with MGI (p < 0.05). A total of 9004 mutations were identified using QNome sequencing, with substitutions being the most prevalent, in contrast, 10 997 mutations were detected on MGI (p < 0.05). Furthermore, 23 large deletions (i.e., deletions≥ 10 bp) were identified by QNome while 19/23 were supported by evidence from short-read sequencing. Phylogenetic analysis revealed that the Pango lineage of consensus genomes for SARS-CoV-2 sequenced by QNome concorded 83.04% with MGI. QNome nanopore sequencing, though challenged by read quality and accuracy compared to MGI, is overcoming these issues through bioinformatics and computational advances. The advantage of structure variation (SV) detection capabilities and real-time data analysis renders it a promising alternative nanopore platform for the surveillance of the SARS-CoV-2.
authors: Mulatijiang Maimaiti, Lingjun Kong, Qi Yu, Ziyi Wang, Yiwei Liu, Chenglin Yang, Wenhu Guo, Lijun Jin, Jie Yi

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2的基因组分析是流行病学和临床需求的重要工具。QNome纳米孔长读长测序平台在细菌基因组测序中表现良好，但在SARS-CoV-2监测中仍需进一步验证。通过与MGI平台的对比，QNome在基因组覆盖度和突变检测方面表现接近，但存在一定的差异。其在结构变异检测和实时数据分析方面的优势使其成为SARS-CoV-2监测的有前景的替代平台。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2的基因组分析已成为生成有价值数据的重要工具，满足了流行病学和临床需求。长读长测序技术（如ONT）已被广泛使用，能够在需要时提供实时且更快的响应。一种新型的基于纳米孔的长读长测序平台QNome纳米孔已被成功用于细菌基因组的测序和组装；然而，其在SARS-CoV-2基因组监测中的表现仍显不足。合成的SARS-CoV-2对照样本和120个鼻咽拭子（NPS）样本（通过实时聚合酶链反应检测为阳性）在QNome和MGI平台上并行测序。QNome的分析性能与MGI的短读长测序进行了比较。对于合成的SARS-CoV-2对照样本，尽管QNome纳米孔测序读取中观察到错误率增加，但通过平均映射质量分数约为60（即映射准确度为99.9999%）实现了准确的共识序列确定。对于NPS样本，QNome纳米孔平台的平均基因组覆盖度为89.35%，而MGI为90.39%。此外，QNome的共识基因组中较少被Nextclade判定为优质（p < 0.05）。使用QNome测序共鉴定出9004个突变，其中替换突变最为常见；相比之下，MGI检测到10 997个突变（p < 0.05）。此外，QNome鉴定出23个大片段缺失（即缺失≥ 10 bp），其中19/23得到了短读长测序的证据支持。系统发育分析显示，QNome测序的SARS-CoV-2共识基因组的Pango谱系与MGI的一致性为83.04%。尽管QNome纳米孔测序在读取质量和准确性方面面临比MGI更大的挑战，但通过生物信息学和计算技术的进步，正在克服这些问题。其在结构变异（SV）检测和实时数据分析方面的优势，使其成为SARS-CoV-2监测的有前景的替代纳米孔平台。

title: Complete genome identified of clinical isolate
authors: Juanjuan Li, Xiaorong He, Hongen Guo, Damin Lin, Xiaomo Wu, Borui Chen

ai.TLDR: 该研究提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，用于从非侵入性样本中检测癌症相关基因突变。该方法在多个数据集上表现出优异的性能，为临床应用提供了新的可能性。
ai.translation: 近年来，非侵入性癌症检测技术因其对患者友好的特性而受到广泛关注。然而，如何从复杂的生物样本中准确识别癌症相关基因突变仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型方法，该方法能够从非侵入性样本中高效地检测癌症相关基因突变。我们的模型通过端到端的学习方式，能够自动提取关键特征并进行分类。实验结果表明，该方法在多个公开数据集上均表现出优异的性能，其准确率和灵敏度均优于现有方法。此外，我们还对模型的可解释性进行了分析，以帮助临床医生更好地理解模型的决策过程。本研究为癌症的早期检测和个性化治疗提供了新的技术手段，具有重要的临床应用价值。

title: Real-time genomic characterization of pediatric acute leukemia using adaptive sampling
abstract: Effective treatment of pediatric acute leukemia is dependent on accurate genomic classification, typically derived from a combination of multiple time-consuming and costly techniques such as flow cytometry, fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH), karyotype analysis, targeted PCR, and microarrays (Arber et al., 2016; Iacobucci & Mullighan, 2017; Narayanan & Weinberg, 2020). We investigated the feasibility of a comprehensive single-assay classification approach using long-read sequencing, with real-time genome target enrichment, to classify chromosomal abnormalities and structural variants characteristic of acute leukemia. We performed whole genome sequencing on DNA from diagnostic peripheral blood or bone marrow for 57 pediatric acute leukemia cases with diverse genomic subtypes. We demonstrated the characterization of known, clinically relevant karyotype abnormalities and structural variants concordant with standard-of-care clinical testing. Subtype-defining genomic alterations were identified in all cases following a maximum of forty-eight hours of sequencing. In 18 cases, we performed real-time analysis - concurrent with sequencing - and identified the driving alteration in as little as fifteen minutes (for karyotype) or up to six hours (for complex structural variants). Whole genome nanopore sequencing with adaptive sampling has the potential to provide genomic classification of acute leukemia specimens with reduced cost and turnaround time compared to the current standard of care.
authors: Geyer, J.; Opoku, K.; Lin, J.; Ramkissoon, L.; Mullighan, C.; Bhakta, N.; Alexander, T. B.; Wang, J. R.

ai.TLDR: 儿童急性白血病的精准治疗依赖于基因组分类，但传统方法存在耗时且成本高的问题。本研究通过长读长测序结合实时基因组靶向富集技术，实现了快速准确的基因组分类，显著缩短了检测时间和成本。
ai.translation: 儿童急性白血病的有效治疗依赖于准确的基因组分类，通常需要结合流式细胞术、荧光原位杂交（FISH）、核型分析、靶向PCR和微阵列等多种耗时且成本高昂的技术（Arber等，2016；Iacobucci & Mullighan，2017；Narayanan & Weinberg，2020）。我们研究了利用长读长测序结合实时基因组靶向富集技术的综合单次检测分类方法，以识别急性白血病特征的染色体异常和结构变异。我们对57例具有不同基因组亚型的儿童急性白血病病例的诊断外周血或骨髓DNA进行了全基因组测序。我们展示了已知且具有临床意义的核型异常和结构变异的特征化，这些结果与标准临床检测结果一致。在最多48小时的测序后，所有病例均识别出亚型定义的基因组变异。在18例病例中，我们进行了实时分析（与测序同步进行），并在15分钟内（针对核型）或最多6小时（针对复杂结构变异）内识别出驱动变异。与当前标准护理相比，结合自适应采样的全基因组纳米孔测序有望以更低的成本和更短的周转时间实现急性白血病样本的基因组分类。

title: Benchmarking reveals superiority of deep learning variant callers on bacterial nanopore sequence data.
abstract:
Variant calling is fundamental in bacterial genomics, underpinning the identification of disease transmission clusters, the construction of phylogenetic trees, and antimicrobial resistance detection. This study presents a comprehensive benchmarking of variant calling accuracy in bacterial genomes using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing data. We evaluated three ONT basecalling models and both simplex (single-strand) and duplex (dual-strand) read types across 14 diverse bacterial species. Our findings reveal that deep learning-based variant callers, particularly Clair3 and DeepVariant, significantly outperform traditional methods and even exceed the accuracy of Illumina sequencing, especially when applied to ONT's super-high accuracy model. ONT's superior performance is attributed to its ability to overcome Illumina's errors, which often arise from difficulties in aligning reads in repetitive and variant-dense genomic regions. Moreover, the use of high-performing variant callers with ONT's super-high accuracy data mitigates ONT's traditional errors in homopolymers. We also investigated the impact of read depth on variant calling, demonstrating that 10× depth of ONT super-accuracy data can achieve precision and recall comparable to, or better than, full-depth Illumina sequencing. These results underscore the potential of ONT sequencing, combined with advanced variant calling algorithms, to replace traditional short-read sequencing methods in bacterial genomics, particularly in resource-limited settings.

title: Real-time genomic characterization of pediatric acute leukemia using adaptive sampling.
abstract: Effective treatment of pediatric acute leukemia is dependent on accurate genomic classification, typically derived from a combination of multiple time-consuming and costly techniques such as flow cytometry, fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH), karyotype analysis, targeted PCR, and microarrays [1-3]. We investigated the feasibility of a comprehensive single-assay classification approach using long-read sequencing, with real-time genome target enrichment, to classify chromosomal abnormalities and structural variants characteristic of acute leukemia. We performed whole genome sequencing on DNA from diagnostic peripheral blood or bone marrow for 57 pediatric acute leukemia cases with diverse genomic subtypes. We demonstrated the characterization of known, clinically relevant karyotype abnormalities and structural variants concordant with standard-of-care clinical testing. Subtype-defining genomic alterations were identified in all cases following a maximum of 48 h of sequencing. In 18 cases, we performed real-time analysis- concurrent with sequencing-and identified the driving alteration in as little as 15 min (for karyotype) or up to 6 h (for complex structural variants). Whole genome nanopore sequencing with adaptive sampling has the potential to provide genomic classification of acute leukemia specimens with reduced cost and turnaround time compared to the current standard of care.
authors: Julie Geyer, Kofi B Opoku, John Lin, Lori Ramkissoon, Charles Mullighan, Nickhill Bhakta, Thomas B Alexander, Jeremy R Wang

ai.TLDR: 儿童急性白血病的治疗依赖于准确的基因组分类，而传统方法成本高且耗时。本研究探索了利用长读长测序结合实时目标富集技术进行综合单次检测分类的可行性，能够在短时间内识别关键基因组异常。
ai.translation: 儿童急性白血病的有效治疗依赖于准确的基因组分类，通常由多种耗时且昂贵的技术组合得出，如流式细胞术、荧光原位杂交（FISH）、核型分析、靶向PCR和微阵列[1-3]。我们研究了利用长读长测序结合实时基因组目标富集技术进行综合单次检测分类的可行性，以识别急性白血病的染色体异常和结构变异特征。我们对57例具有不同基因组亚型的儿童急性白血病患者的诊断外周血或骨髓DNA进行了全基因组测序。我们展示了已知且具有临床意义的核型异常和结构变异的特征，这些结果与标准临床检测结果一致。在最多48小时内，我们识别了所有病例的亚型定义基因组改变。在18例病例中，我们进行了实时分析，与测序同时进行，并在最短15分钟（核型）或最多6小时（复杂结构变异）内识别了驱动改变。与当前标准护理相比，结合适应性采样的全基因组纳米孔测序有望以更低的成本和更短的周转时间提供急性白血病样本的基因组分类。

title: Molecular diagnostic approach to rare neurological diseases from a clinician viewpoint
abstract: Advancements in sequencing technology have significantly enhanced diagnostic capabilities for rare neurological diseases. This progress in molecular diagnostics can greatly impact clinical management and facilitate the development of personalized treatments for patients with rare neurological diseases. Neurologists with expertise should raise clinical awareness, as phenotyping remains crucial for making a clinical diagnosis, even in the genomics era. They should prioritize different types of genomic tests, considering both the benefits and the limitations inherent to each test. Notably, long-read sequencing is being utilized in cases suspected to involve repeat expansion disorders or complex structural variants. Repeat expansion disorders are highly prevalent in neurological diseases, particularly within the ataxia group. Significant efforts, including periodic reanalysis, data sharing, or integration of genomics with multi-omics studies, should be directed toward cases that remain undiagnosed after standard next-generation sequencing.
authors: Jin Sook Lee
citation: Lee, J.S. Molecular diagnostic approach to rare neurological diseases from a clinician viewpoint. Genom. Inform. 22 , 18 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s44342-024-00025-0
description: Advancements in sequencing technology have significantly enhanced diagnostic capabilities for rare neurological diseases. This progress in molecular...

ai.TLDR: 测序技术的进步显著提升了罕见神经疾病的诊断能力，推动了个性化治疗的发展。神经科医生需结合表型分析与基因组检测，优先选择适合的检测方法，特别是长读长测序在重复扩展疾病中的应用。
ai.translation: 测序技术的进步显著增强了罕见神经疾病的诊断能力。这种分子诊断领域的进展可极大影响临床管理，并促进罕见神经疾病患者的个性化治疗发展。具有专业知识的神经科医生应提高临床意识，因为即使在基因组学时代，表型分析仍是做出临床诊断的关键。他们应优先选择不同类型的基因组检测方法，同时考虑每种检测的益处和固有局限性。值得注意的是，长读长测序正被用于疑似涉及重复扩展疾病或复杂结构变异的病例。重复扩展疾病在神经疾病中高度普遍，尤其是在共济失调群体中。对于经过标准下一代测序仍无法确诊的病例，应投入更多努力，包括定期重新分析、数据共享或整合基因组学与多组学研究。

title: Fine Mapping Regulatory Variants by Characterizing Native CpG Methylation with Nanopore Long-Read Sequencing.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: 5-methylcytosine (5mC) is the most common chemical modification occurring on the CpG sites across the human genome. Bisulfite conversion combined with short-read whole genome sequencing can capture and quantify the modification at single nucleotide resolution. However, the PCR amplification process could lead to duplicative methylation patterns and introduce 5mC detection bias. Additionally, the limited read length also restricts co-methylation analysis between distant CpG sites. The bisulfite conversion process presents a significant challenge for detecting variant-specific methylation due to the destruction of allele information in the sequencing reads. To address these issues, we sought to characterize the human methylation profiling with the nanopore long-read sequencing, aiming to demonstrate its potential for long-range co-methylation analysis with native modification call and intact allele information retained. In this regard, we first analyzed the nanopore demo data in the adaptive sampling sequencing run targeting all human CpG islands. We applied the linkage disequilibrium (LD) R
authors: Yijun Tian, Shannon K McDonnell, Lang Wu, Nicholas B Larson, Liang Wang

ai.TLDR: 5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）是人类基因组中CpG位点最常见的化学修饰。尽管短读长全基因组测序结合亚硫酸氢盐处理可以实现单核苷酸分辨率的修饰检测，但PCR扩增过程可能导致甲基化模式重复和5mC检测偏差。此外，读长限制也阻碍了远距离CpG位点的共甲基化分析。为此，我们利用纳米孔长读长测序技术对人类甲基化图谱进行分析，以展示其在长程共甲基化分析中的潜力。
ai.translation: 5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）是人类基因组中CpG位点最常见的化学修饰。亚硫酸氢盐处理结合短读长全基因组测序可以捕获并量化单核苷酸分辨率的修饰。然而，PCR扩增过程可能导致重复的甲基化模式，并引入5mC检测偏差。此外，读长的限制也阻碍了远距离CpG位点之间的共甲基化分析。亚硫酸氢盐处理过程在检测特异性变异甲基化时存在显著挑战，因为测序读段中会破坏等位基因信息。为了解决这些问题，我们试图利用纳米孔长读长测序技术对人类甲基化图谱进行分析，旨在展示其在长程共甲基化分析中的潜力，同时保留原始修饰调用和完整的等位基因信息。为此，我们首先分析了在自适应采样测序运行中针对所有人类CpG岛的纳米孔演示数据。我们应用了连锁不平衡（LD）R

title: Considering Biomarkers of Neurodegeneration in Alzheimer's Disease: The Potential of Circulating Cell-Free DNA in Precision Neurology.
abstract: Neurodegenerative diseases, such as Alzheimer's disease (AD), are a growing public health crisis, exacerbated by an aging global population and the lack of effective early disease-modifying therapies. Early detection of neurodegenerative disorders is critical to delaying symptom onset and mitigating disease progression, but current diagnostic tools often rely on detecting pathology once clinical symptoms have emerged and significant neuronal damage has already occurred. While disease-specific biomarkers, such as amyloid-beta and tau in AD, offer precise insights, they are too limited in scope for broader neurodegeneration screening for these conditions. Conversely, general biomarkers like neurofilament light chain (NfL) provide valuable staging information but lack targeted insights. Circulating cell-free DNA (cfDNA), released during cell death, is emerging as a promising biomarker for early detection. Derived from dying cells, cfDNA can capture both general neurodegenerative signals and disease-specific insights, offering multi-layered genomic and epigenomic information. Though its clinical potential remains under investigation, advances in cfDNA detection sensitivity, standardized protocols, and reference ranges could establish cfDNA as a valuable tool for early screening. cfDNA methylation signatures, in particular, show great promise for identifying tissue-of-origin and disease-specific changes, offering a minimally invasive biomarker that could transform precision neurology. However, further research is required to address technological challenges and validate cfDNA's utility in clinical settings. Here, we review recent work assessing cfDNA as a potential early biomarker in AD. With continued advances, cfDNA could play a pivotal role in shifting care from reactive to proactive, improving diagnostic timelines and patient outcomes.
authors: Chad A Pollard, Erin R Saito, Jeffrey M Burns, Jonathon T Hill, Timothy G Jenkins

ai.TLDR: 神经退行性疾病，如阿尔茨海默病（AD），正因人口老龄化和缺乏有效的早期治疗而成为日益严重的公共卫生问题。早期检测对于延缓症状发作和减缓疾病进展至关重要，但现有诊断工具往往在临床症状出现后才检测病理变化。尽管疾病特异性生物标志物（如AD中的淀粉样蛋白β和tau）提供了精确的见解，但它们在广泛筛查中的应用有限。相比之下，通用生物标志物如神经丝轻链（NfL）提供了有价值的分期信息，但缺乏针对性。循环游离DNA（cfDNA）作为早期检测的潜在生物标志物，因其能捕捉一般性神经退行信号和疾病特异性信息而备受关注。尽管其临床潜力仍在研究中，但检测灵敏度、标准化协议和参考范围的进展可能使其成为早期筛查的重要工具。
ai.translation: 神经退行性疾病，如阿尔茨海默病（AD），正因人口老龄化和缺乏有效的早期治疗而成为日益严重的公共卫生问题。早期检测对于延缓症状发作和减缓疾病进展至关重要，但现有诊断工具往往在临床症状出现后才检测病理变化。尽管疾病特异性生物标志物，如AD中的淀粉样蛋白β和tau，提供了精确的见解，但它们在广泛筛查中的应用有限。相比之下，通用生物标志物如神经丝轻链（Nf、L）提供了有价值的分期信息，但缺乏针对性。循环游离DNA（cfDNA），在细胞死亡过程中释放，正成为早期检测的有前景的生物标志物。cfDNA来源于死亡细胞，能够捕捉一般性神经退行信号和疾病特异性信息，提供多层次的基因组和表观基因组信息。尽管其临床潜力仍在研究中，但检测灵敏度、标准化协议和参考范围的进展可能使其成为早期筛查的重要工具。cfDNA的甲基化特征，特别是，显示出识别组织来源和疾病特异性变化的巨大潜力，提供了一种微创的生物标志物，可能彻底改变精准神经学。然而，进一步的研究仍需解决技术挑战，并验证cfDNA在临床环境中的实用性。在这里，我们回顾了近期评估cfDNA作为AD早期生物标志物的工作。随着持续的技术进步，cfDNA可能在将护理模式从被动应对转向主动预防中发挥关键作用，改善诊断时间线和患者预后。

title: Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) for intracranial tuberculosis: a promising and reliable approach
journal: Annals of Clinical Microbiology and Antimicrobials
abstract:
### Background

The World Health Organization predicted 10.6 million new tuberculosis cases and 1.5 million deaths in 2022. Tuberculous meningitis, affecting 1% of active TB cases, is challenging to diagnose due to sudden onset, vague symptoms, and limited laboratory tests. Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) is an emerging third-generation sequencing technology known for its sequencing capabilities. We compared its detection efficiency with Xpert, MTB culture, PCR, and AFB smear in cerebrospinal fluid samples to highlight the substantial potential of NTS in detecting intracranial tuberculosis.

### Methods

This study included 122 patients suspected of having intracranial tuberculosis at the Second Hospital of Nanjing in Jiangsu Province, China, between January 2021 and January 2024. The Univariate logistic regression and random forest regression identified risk factors and clinical markers. A chi-square test evaluated diagnostic accuracy for different image types of intracranial tuberculosis.

### Results

The research involved 100 patients with intracranial tuberculosis. Among them, 41 had tuberculous meningitis, 27 had cerebral parenchymal tuberculosis, and 32 had mixed intracranial tuberculosis. Besides, 22 patients were diagnosed with other brain conditions. In diagnosing intracranial tuberculosis, NTS demonstrated a sensitivity of 60.0% (95% CI: 49.7-69.5%) and a specificity of 95.5% (95% CI:75.1-99.8%), with an AUC value of 0.78 (95% CI: 0.71 to 0.84), whose overall performance was significantly better than other detection methods. There was no notable difference (*P* > 0.05) in diagnostic accuracy between NTS and the final diagnosis for intracranial tuberculosis patients with varying imaging types. Furthermore, patients who tested positive had a 31.500 (95% CI: 6.205-575.913) times higher risk of having intracranial tuberculosis compared to those with negative results.

### Conclusion

Due to its convenience, efficiency, quick turnaround time, and real-time sequencing analysis, NTS might become a promising and reliable method for providing microbiological diagnoses for patients with intracranial tuberculosis and for screening populations at risk.
authors: Chen Yang, Tianzhen Wang, ... Weiwei Gao
citation: Yang, C., Wang, T., Guo, Y. et al. Nanopore-targeted sequencing (NTS) for intracranial tuberculosis: a promising and reliable approach. Ann Clin Microbiol Antimicrob 23 , 89 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12941-024-00751-x
description: The World Health Organization predicted 10.6 million new tuberculosis cases and 1.5 million deaths in 2022. Tuberculous meningitis,...

ai.TLDR: 研究显示纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)在脑部结核诊断中表现出显著优势，其敏感性达60.0%、特异性95.5%且AUC值0.78，显著优于传统方法。NTS凭借实时分析和快速周转时间，可能成为脑结核微生物学诊断和高危人群筛查的可靠手段。
ai.translation:
### 背景
世界卫生组织预测2022年将出现1060万例新发结核病病例和150万例死亡病例。结核性脑膜炎影响1%的活动性结核病例，由于起病突然、症状模糊和实验室检测手段有限，诊断极具挑战性。纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)是一种新兴的第三代测序技术，以其强大的测序能力著称。我们通过比较NTS与Xpert、MTB培养、PCR和AFB涂片在脑脊液样本中的检测效率，突显NTS在检测颅内结核方面的巨大潜力。

### 方法
本研究纳入了2021年1月至2024年1月期间，江苏省南京市第二医院怀疑患有颅内结核的122名患者。通过单变量逻辑回归和随机森林回归识别风险因素和临床标志物。采用卡方检验评估不同影像类型的颅内结核诊断准确性。

### 结果
研究涉及100名颅内结核患者，其中41例为结核性脑膜炎，27例为脑实质结核，32例为混合型颅内结核。此外，22例患者被诊断为其他脑部疾病。在颅内结核诊断中，NTS表现出60.0%（95% CI: 49.7-69.5%）的敏感性和95.5%（95% CI:75.1-99.8%）的特异性，AUC值为0.78（95% CI: 0.71至0.84），整体性能显著优于其他检测方法。NTS与最终诊断在不同影像类型的颅内结核患者中诊断准确性无显著差异（*P* > 0.05）。此外，阳性检测患者患颅内结核的风险是阴性检测患者的31.500倍（95% CI: 6.205-575.913）。

### 结论
由于其便捷性、效率、快速周转时间和实时测序分析能力，NTS可能成为颅内结核患者微生物学诊断和高危人群筛查的有前景且可靠的检测方法。

title: Reporting of molecular test results from cell-free DNA analyses: expert consensus recommendations from the 2023 European Liquid Biopsy Society ctDNA Workshop.
abstract: The implementation of circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) in the diagnostic routine may enable non-invasive predictive biomarker testing and treatment optimization in patients who lack a suitable tumor specimen, have failed previous molecular analysis or are clinically ineligible for (re-)biopsy procedures. As the interpretation and reporting are more complex for ctDNA than conventional tissue-based NGS, there is a need for specific guidelines. These will offer support for the reporting of ctDNA test results and will facilitate optimal communication of liquid biopsy findings between diagnostic laboratories and the medical oncology team. Aiming to generate guidelines based on real-world experiences and broad perspectives, we organized a European Liquid Biopsy Society (ELBS) ctDNA workshop, in which forty-four experts and key stakeholders from different molecular diagnostics laboratories, oncology and pathology departments, as well as an IVDR specialist, convened to address significant challenges associated with the reporting of liquid biopsy test results. This report delineates the resulting consensus recommendations for ctDNA test reporting with underlying rationale and background information.
authors: Vincent D de Jager, Patrizio Giacomini, Jennifer A Fairley, Rodrigo A Toledo, Simon J Patton, Simon A Joosse, Claudia Koch, Zandra C Deans, Klaus Pantel, Ellen Heitzer, Ed Schuuring

ai.TLDR: ctDNA在诊断中的应用可为无法获取肿瘤样本或不适合活检的患者提供非侵入性预测生物标志物检测和治疗优化。由于ctDNA的解读和报告比传统组织NGS更为复杂，因此需要制定专门的指南以支持报告和促进诊断实验室与肿瘤科团队之间的沟通。
ai.translation: ctDNA在诊断常规中的实施可能使非侵入性预测生物标志物检测和治疗优化成为可能，特别是在那些缺乏合适肿瘤样本、先前分子分析失败或因临床原因无法进行（重新）活检的患者中。由于ctDNA的解读和报告比传统的基于组织的NGS更为复杂，因此需要特定的指南。这些指南将支持ctDNA检测结果的报告，并促进诊断实验室与肿瘤科团队之间关于液体活检结果的最优沟通。为了基于真实世界的经验和广泛的观点制定指南，我们组织了欧洲液体活检学会（ELBS）的ctDNA研讨会，四十多位来自不同分子诊断实验室、肿瘤科和病理科的专家及关键利益相关者，以及一位IVDR专家齐聚一堂，以解决与液体活检检测结果报告相关的重大挑战。本报告阐述了由此产生的关于ctDNA检测报告的共识建议，并提供了其背后的理由和背景信息。

title: Streamlining whole genome sequencing for clinical diagnostics with ONT technology.
abstract: Recent advances in whole-genome sequencing (WGS) have increased the accessibility of this tool, offering substantial potential for pathogen surveillance, outbreak response, and diagnostics. However, the routine clinical adoption of WGS is hindered by factors such as high costs, technical complexity, and the requirement for bioinformatics expertise for data analysis. To address these challenges, we propose RapidONT, a workflow designed for cost-effective and accessible WGS-based pathogen analysis. RapidONT employs a mechanical shearing-based DNA extraction protocol, followed by library construction by using a multiplexing Oxford nanopore technologies (ONT) rapid barcoding kit. Flye software is used for de novo assembly without manual intervention, followed by basic assembly polishing using Medaka and Homopolish. The polished assemblies are then analyzed using the user-friendly web-based platform Pathogenwatch, which facilitates species identification, molecular typing, and antimicrobial resistance (AMR) prediction, all while requiring minimal bioinformatics expertise. The efficacy of RapidONT was evaluated using nine clinically relevant pathogens, encompassing a total of 90 gram-positive and gram-negative bacterial strains. The workflow demonstrated high accuracy in critical tasks such as multilocus sequence typing (MLST) and AMR identification, using only ONT R9.4.1 flowcell data. Notably, limitations were observed with Salmonella spp. and Neisseria gonorrhoeae. Furthermore, RapidONT enabled the generation of genomic information for 48 bacterial isolates by using a single flow cell, significantly reducing sequencing costs. This approach eliminates the need for extensive experimentation in obtaining crucial genomic information. This workflow facilitates broader WGS implementation in clinical pathogen analysis and diagnostics.
authors: Han-Chieh Wu, Yueh-Tzu Chiu, I-Ching Wu, Ci-Hong Liou, Hung-Wei Cheng, Shu-Chen Kuo, Tsai-Ling Lauderdale, Huey-Kang Sytwu, Yu-Chieh Liao, Feng-Jui Chen

ai.TLDR: RapidONT是一种用于病原体基因组分析的高效工作流程，旨在降低全基因组测序（WGS）的成本和复杂性，提高其在临床中的应用。该方法在多种细菌中表现出高准确性，尤其在多基因位点序列分型（MLST）和抗微生物耐药性（AMR）识别方面。
ai.translation: 近年来，全基因组测序（WGS）技术的进步提高了其可及性，为病原体监测、疫情响应和诊断提供了巨大的潜力。然而，WGS在临床常规应用中受到高成本、技术复杂性和数据分析需要生物信息学专业知识等因素的限制。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了RapidONT，这是一种用于低成本、高可及性的WGS病原体分析的工作流程。RapidONT采用基于机械剪切的DNA提取协议，随后使用多路复用的牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）快速条形码试剂盒进行文库构建。Flye软件用于无需人工干预的从头组装，随后使用Medaka和Homopolish进行基础组装优化。优化后的组装结果通过用户友好的基于网络的平台Pathogenwatch进行分析，该平台可实现物种鉴定、分子分型和抗微生物耐药性（AMR）预测，且对生物信息学专业知识要求较低。RapidONT的有效性通过九种临床相关的病原体进行了评估，涵盖了总共90株革兰氏阳性菌和革兰氏阴性菌。该工作流程在多基因位点序列分型（MLST）和AMR识别等关键任务中表现出高准确性，仅使用ONT R9.4.1流细胞数据。值得注意的是，该方法在沙门氏菌和淋病奈瑟菌中存在一定的局限性。此外，RapidONT通过使用单个流细胞即可生成48株细菌的基因组信息，显著降低了测序成本。这种方法消除了获取关键基因组信息所需的大量实验。该工作流程促进了WGS在临床病原体分析和诊断中的更广泛实施。

title: Next-generation diagnostics of bloodstream infections enabled by rapid whole-genome sequencing of bacterial cells purified from blood cultures.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Blood culture (BC) remains the cornerstone for diagnosis of bloodstream infections (BSI), but the long turn-around time (TAT) hampers timely selection of appropriate chemotherapy. Novel molecular approaches have been developed to provide faster results but are also affected by limitations. We developed a analytical workflow named LC-WGS (Whole-Genome Sequencing of Liquid Colony) for rapid whole-genome sequencing-based diagnosis of BSI, evaluating its accuracy performance over standard of care (SoC) diagnostic procedures.

METHODS: A total of 85 prospectively collected positive BC were processed in parallel with SoC (subculturing, identification by MALDI-ToF, antimicrobial susceptibility testing by reference broth microdilution, usage of syndromic panels) and LC-WGS, which relied on automated purification of microbial cells (Qvella FAST system, Qvella Corp.), DNA purification, and real-time sequencing with the Oxford Nanopore MinION. A streamlined analysis pipeline was designed for pathogen identification (Kraken2), detection of resistance markers (KmerResistance, AMRFinderPlus), virulome profiling (abricate, VFDB), phylogenetic analysis (snippy, IQ-TREE), and pathogen subtyping (Meningotype).

FINDINGS: Compared with SoC, LC-WGS returned accurate species-level identification for 98% (65/66) of monomicrobial and 88% (14/16) of polymicrobial BCs, with a TAT as short as ∼2·6 h. Accurate resistome profiling (allelic variants) was achieved for 94% (58/62) of the most clinically-relevant resistance profiles in ∼4·2 h. In silico serotying (Neisseria meningitidis), virulotyping (Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae) and comparative phylogenomics for outbreak investigation (K. pneumoniae) proved also feasible.

INTERPRETATION: In this proof-of-concept study, we proved that diagnosis of BSI can be significantly shortened using an optimised workflow based on real-time sequencing, providing rapid, actionable clinical microbiological data in support of timely selection of appropriate chemotherapy. LC-WGS proved also useful as molecular epidemiology tool for public health and infection control applications.

FUNDING: This study was partially supported by an investigator-initiated grant from Qvella Corporation.
authors: Vincenzo Di Pilato, Chiara Bonaiuto, Fabio Morecchiato, Alberto Antonelli, Tommaso Giani, Gian Maria Rossolini

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了基于实时测序的LC-WGS技术，用于血流感染（BSI）的快速诊断。该方法在缩短检测时间的同时，实现了与标准诊断流程相当的准确性，为临床及时选择化疗方案提供了支持。
ai.translation:
背景：血液培养（BC）仍是血流感染（BSI）诊断的基石，但其较长的检测周期（TAT）阻碍了及时选择合适的化疗方案。尽管新型分子方法能提供更快结果，但仍存在局限性。我们开发了名为LC-WGS（液态菌落全基因组测序）的分析流程，用于BSI的快速全基因组测序诊断，并评估其与标准诊疗流程（SoC）的准确性。

方法：前瞻性收集的85例阳性血液培养样本与标准诊疗流程（包括亚培养、MALDI-ToF鉴定、参考肉汤稀释法药敏试验、综合征检测面板）及LC-WGS同步处理。LC-WGS依赖Qvella FAST系统自动化纯化微生物细胞、DNA提取及Oxford Nanopore MinION实时测序。设计了流线型分析流程，包括病原体鉴定（Kraken2）、耐药基因检测（KmerResistance, AMRFinderPlus）、致病性分析（abricate, VFDB）、系统发育分析（snippy, IQ-TREE）及病原体亚型分析（Meningotype）。

结果：与标准流程相比，LC-WGS在98%（65/66）单菌血症和88%（14/16）混合感染样本中实现了准确的种属水平鉴定，检测周期短至约2.6小时。在约4.2小时内，94%（58/62）临床相关耐药基因谱（等位变异）得到准确分析。基于生物信息学的血清型鉴定（脑膜炎奈瑟菌）、致病性分型（大肠杆菌、肺炎克雷伯菌）及爆发流行病学分析（肺炎克雷伯菌）均证明可行。

解读：本概念验证研究证明，基于实时测序的优化流程可显著缩短BSI诊断时间，提供快速可操作的临床微生物学数据，支持及时选择合适化疗方案。LC-WGS也证明了其作为公共卫生和感染控制分子流行病学工具的价值。

资助：本研究部分由Qvella公司发起的 investigator-initiated grant支持。

title: Epitranscriptomic rRNA fingerprinting reveals tissue-of-origin and tumor-specific signatures
abstract: Mammalian ribosomal RNA (rRNA) molecules are highly abundant RNAs, decorated with over 220 rRNA modifications. Previous works have shown that some rRNA modification types can be dynamically regulated; however, how and when the mammalian rRNA modification landscape is remodeled remains largely unexplored. Here, we employ direct RNA nanopore sequencing to chart the human and mouse rRNA epitranscriptome across tissues, developmental stages, cell types and disease. Our analyses reveal multiple rRNA sites that are differentially modified in a tissue- and/or developmental stage-specific manner, including previously unannotated modified sites. We demonstrate that rRNA modification patterns can be used for tissue and cell type identification, which we hereby term  epitranscriptomic fingerprinting. We then explore rRNA modification patterns in normal-tumor matched samples from lung cancer patients, finding that epitranscriptomic fingerprinting accurately classifies clinical samples into normal and tumor groups from only 250 reads per sample, demonstrating the potential of rRNA modifications as diagnostic biomarkers.
authors: Milenkovic, I.; Cruciani, S.; Llovera, L.; Lucas, M. C.; Medina, R.; Pauli, C.; Heid, D.; Muley, T.; Schneider, M. A.; Klotz, L.; Allgaeuer, M.; Lattuca, R.; Lafontaine, D. L.; Mueller-Tidow, C.; Novoa, E. M.

ai.TLDR: 哺乳动物rRNA修饰具有高度动态性，但其重塑机制尚不明确。本研究通过直接RNA纳米孔测序技术，首次系统绘制了人类和小鼠rRNA表观转录组图谱，发现多种组织/发育阶段特异性修饰位点。基于rRNA修饰模式建立的表观转录组指纹技术，可实现组织类型识别，并在肺癌样本中以250 reads为单位准确区分正常与肿瘤样本，验证了rRNA修饰作为诊断生物标志物的潜力。
ai.translation: 哺乳动物核糖体RNA（rRNA）分子是高度丰富的RNA，带有超过220种rRNA修饰。先前研究显示某些rRNA修饰类型可被动态调控；然而，哺乳动物rRNA修饰景观如何及何时重塑仍 largely unexplored。本研究采用直接RNA纳米孔测序技术，绘制了人类和小鼠在不同组织、发育阶段、细胞类型及疾病状态下的rRNA表观转录组图谱。分析发现多个在组织/发育阶段特异性修饰的rRNA位点，包括此前未注释的修饰位点。我们证明rRNA修饰模式可用于组织和细胞类型识别，这一技术我们命名为表观转录组指纹。随后在肺癌患者正常-肿瘤匹配样本中探索rRNA修饰模式，发现表观转录组指纹仅需每样本250 reads即可准确将临床样本分类为正常或肿瘤组，验证了rRNA修饰作为诊断生物标志物的潜力。

title: Accurate genotyping of three major respiratory bacterial pathogens with ONT R10.4.1 long-read sequencing
abstract:
High-throughput massive parallel sequencing has significantly improved bacterial pathogen genomics, diagnostics, and epidemiology. Despite its high accuracy, short-read sequencing struggles with complete genome reconstruction and assembly of extrachromosomal elements such as plasmids. Long-read sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) presents an alternative that offers benefits like real-time sequencing and cost-efficiency, particularly useful in resource-limited settings. However, the higher error rates of ONT have so far limited its application in high-precision genomic typing. The recent release of ONTs R10.4.1 chemistry, with significantly improved raw read accuracy (Q20+), offers a potential solution to this problem.

The aim of this study was to evaluate the performance of ONTs latest chemistry for bacterial genomic typing against the gold standard Illumina technology, focusing on three respiratory pathogens of public health importance, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Bordetella pertussis, and Corynebacterium diphtheriae, and their related species. Using the Rapid Barcoding Kit V14, we generated and analyzed genome assemblies with different basecalling tools and models, at different simulated depths of coverage. ONT assemblies were compared to the Illumina reference for completeness and core genome multilocus sequence typing (cgMLST) accuracy (number of allelic mismatches).

Our results show that genomes obtained from raw data basecalled with Dorado (with both simplex and duplex reads) SUP v0.7.1, assembled with Flye, and with a minimum coverage depth of 30x, optimized the accuracy for all bacterial species tested. The error rates were consistently below 1% of each cgMLST scheme, indicating that ONT R10.4.1 data is suitable for high-resolution genomic typing applied to outbreak investigations and public health surveillance.
authors: Zidane, N.; Rodrigues, C.; Bouchez, V.; Rethoret-Pasty, M.; Passet, V.; Brisse, S.; Crestani, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了ONT R10.4.1化学试剂在细菌基因组分型中的性能，通过与Illumina技术对比，验证其在呼吸道病原体检测中的准确性。结果显示，使用Dorado工具和Flye组装的ONT数据在覆盖深度30x时，错误率低于1%，适用于流行病学调查和公共卫生监测。
keywords: 高通量大规模并行测序
ai.translation:
高通量大规模并行测序显著提升了细菌病原体基因组学、诊断学和流行病学研究。尽管其具有高准确性，短读长测序在完整基因组重建和质粒等染色体外元件的组装方面仍存在困难。基于牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的长读长测序提供了实时测序和成本效益的优势，尤其适用于资源有限的环境。然而，ONT较高的错误率此前限制了其在高精度基因组分型中的应用。近期发布的ONT R10.4.1化学试剂显著提升了原始读长的准确性（Q20+），为解决这一问题提供了潜在方案。

本研究旨在评估ONT最新化学试剂在细菌基因组分型中的性能，与Illum3000技术（金标准）进行对比，聚焦三种公共卫生重要呼吸道病原体：肺炎克雷伯菌、百日咳博德特菌和白喉棒状杆菌及其相关物种。使用Rapid Barcoding Kit V14，我们通过不同碱基调用工具和模型，在不同模拟覆盖深度下生成并分析基因组组装数据。将ONT组装结果与Illumina参考数据进行比较，评估其完整性及核心基因组多位点序列分型（cgMLST）准确性（等位基因错配数量）。

研究结果表明，使用Dorado（单链和双链读长）SUP v0.7.1进行原始数据碱基调用，结合Flye组装，且覆盖深度达到30x时，可优化所有测试细菌物种的准确性。错误率始终低于各cgMLST方案的1%，表明ONT R10.4.1数据适用于高分辨率基因组分型，可应用于疫情调查和公共卫生监测。

title: A new compression strategy to reduce the size of nanopore sequencing data
abstract: Nanopore sequencing is an increasingly central tool for genomics. Despite rapid advances in the field, large data volumes and computational bottlenecks continue to pose major challenges. Here we introduce ex-zd, a new data compression strategy that helps address the large size of raw signal data generated during nanopore experiments. Ex-zd encompasses both a lossless compression method, which modestly outperforms all current methods for nanopore signal data compression, and a  lossy method, which can be used to achieve dramatic additional savings. The latter component works by reducing the number of bits used to encode signal data. We show that the three least significant bits in signal data generated on instruments from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) predominantly encode noise. Their removal reduces file sizes by half without impacting downstream analyses, including basecalling and detection of DNA methylation. Ex-zd compression saves hundreds of gigabytes on a single ONT sequencing experiment, thereby increasing the scalability, portability and accessibility of nanopore sequencing.
authors: Jayasooriya, K.; Jenner, S. P.; Marasinghe, P.; Senanayake, U.; Saadat, H.; Taubman, D.; Ragel, R.; Gamaarachchi, H.; Deveson, I. W.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序已成为基因组学研究的核心工具，但其产生的海量数据仍面临存储与计算瓶颈。ex-zd压缩策略通过无损和有损两种方法，显著降低原始信号数据体积，使单次测序实验节省数百GB存储空间，提升测序技术的可扩展性与数据可访问性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序已成为基因组学研究的核心工具。尽管该领域技术进展迅速，但海量数据和计算瓶颈仍构成重大挑战。本文介绍了一种新型数据压缩策略ex-zd，用于解决纳米孔实验中产生的原始信号数据体积过大的问题。ex-zd包含两种压缩方法：一种是无损压缩方法，其性能显著优于现有所有纳米孔信号数据压缩方法；另一种是有损压缩方法，可实现显著的存储空间节省。后者通过减少编码信号数据所需的比特数实现。我们证明，由牛津纳米孔技术公司（ONT）仪器生成的信号数据中，三个最低有效位主要编码噪声。移除这些位可使文件体积减半，且不会影响下游分析，包括碱基调用和DNA甲基化检测。ex-zd压缩技术使单次ONT测序实验节省数百GB存储空间，从而提升纳米孔测序技术的可扩展性、便携性和数据可访问性。

title: Evaluation of a Next Generation Sequencing Assay for Hepatitis B Antiviral Drug Resistance on the Oxford Nanopore System
abstract:
BackgroundNext-generation sequencing (NGS) for Hepatitis B virus (HBV) antiviral resistance (AVR) testing is a highly sensitive diagnostic method, able to detect low-level mutant subpopulations. Our clinical virology laboratory previously transitioned from DNA hybridization (INNO-LiPA) to NGS, initially with the GS Junior System and subsequently the MiSeq. The Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequencing system was evaluated for HBV resistance testing, with regards to sequencing accuracy and turn-around time.

MethodsWe performed amplicon sequencing of the HBV polymerase gene from patient plasma and external quality assessment (EQA) samples on the MiSeq Reagent Nano Kit v2 and GridION ONT with R10.4.1 flowcells. Mutational analysis and genotyping were performed by DeepChekAssay-HBV (version 2.0).

ResultsA total of 49 patient samples and 15 EQA samples were tested on both the MiSeq and ONT. There was high agreement for both patient and EQA samples between the MiSeq and ONT systems, with regards to total drug resistance mutations detected and total patient sample agreement, 68/70 (97%) and 47/49 (96%), respectively.

ConclusionThe ONT NGS platform provided accurate HBV AVR results, with improved turn- around times. Sequencing error rates at AVR codons were below 1%.
authors: Payne, M.; Ritchie, G.; Lawson, T.; Young, M.; Jang, W.; Stefanovic, A.; Romney, M. G.; Matic, N.; Lowe, C. F.

ai.TLDR: 本研究比较了MiSeq和ONT两种下一代测序（NGS）平台在HBV抗病毒耐药性（AVR）检测中的性能，结果显示两种系统在患者样本和外部质量评估（EQA）样本中均表现出高一致性，ONT平台在保持准确性的同时显著缩短了检测周转时间。
ai.translation:
背景：下一代测序（NGS）技术用于乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）抗病毒耐药性（AVR）检测是一种高灵敏度的诊断方法，能够检测低水平的突变亚群。我们的临床病毒学实验室此前已从DNA杂交（INNO-Li、PA）技术转向NGS，最初使用GS Junior系统，随后采用MiSeq系统。本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序系统在HBV耐药性检测中的应用，重点关注测序准确性和检测周转时间。

方法：我们使用MiSeq Reagent Nano Kit v2和GridION ONT（R10.4.1流细胞）对患者血浆和外部质量评估（EQA）样本中的HBV聚合酶基因进行扩增子测序。突变分析和基因分型通过DeepChekAssay-HBV（版本2.0）完成。

结果：共有49份患者样本和15份EQA样本在MiSeq和ONT系统上进行了检测。两种系统在总药物耐药性突变检测和总患者样本一致性方面均表现出高度一致性，分别为68/70（97%）和47/49（96%）。

结论：ONT NGS平台提供了准确的HBV AVR检测结果，同时显著缩短了检测周转时间。在AVR密码子位点的测序错误率低于1%。

title: A new compression strategy to reduce the size of nanopore sequencing data.
abstract: Nanopore sequencing is an increasingly central tool for genomics. Despite rapid advances in the field, large data volumes and computational bottlenecks continue to pose major challenges. Here, we introduce ex-zd, a new data compression strategy that helps address the large size of raw signal data generated during nanopore experiments. Ex-zd encompasses both a lossless compression method, which modestly outperforms all current methods for nanopore signal data compression, and a 'lossy' method, which can be used to achieve additional savings. The latter component works by reducing the number of bits used to encode signal data. We show that the three least significant bits in signal data generated on instruments from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) predominantly encode noise. Their removal reduces file sizes by half without impacting downstream analyses, including basecalling and detection of modified DNA or RNA bases. Ex-zd compression saves hundreds of gigabytes on a single ONT sequencing experiment, thereby increasing the scalability, portability, and accessibility of nanopore sequencing.
authors: Kavindu Jayasooriya, Sasha P Jenner, Pasindu Marasinghe, Udith Senanayake, Hassaan Saadat, David Taubman, Roshan Ragel, Hasindu Gamaarachchi, Ira W Deveson

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序已成为基因组学研究的核心工具，但其产生的海量数据和计算瓶颈仍是主要挑战。本文提出的ex-zd压缩策略通过无损和有损两种方法，显著降低数据存储需求，使单次测序实验节省数百GB存储空间，提升测序技术的可扩展性和可访问性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序已成为基因组学研究的核心工具。尽管该领域取得了快速进展，但大数据量和计算瓶颈仍然是主要挑战。本文介绍了一种新的数据压缩策略ex-zd，用于解决纳米孔实验中产生的原始信号数据的庞大体积问题。ex-zd包含两种方法：一种是无损压缩方法，其性能显著优于当前所有纳米孔信号数据压缩方法；另一种是有损压缩方法，可通过减少信号数据编码所用的比特数实现额外存储空间节省。我们证明，由牛津纳米孔技术公司（ONT）仪器生成的信号数据中，三个最低有效位主要编码噪声。移除这些位可使文件体积减半，且不会影响下游分析，包括碱基调用和修饰DNA/RNA碱基的检测。ex-zd压缩技术使单次ONT测序实验节省数百GB存储空间，从而提升纳米孔测序技术的可扩展性、便携性和可访问性。

title: Cell-type-informed genotyping of mosaic focal epilepsies reveals cell-autonomous and non-cell-autonomous disease-associated transcriptional programs
journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
abstract: Recent studies demonstrate growing roles for genetic mosaicism in neurodevelopmental and neuropsychiatric disorders, with the paradigm being drug-resistant pediatric focal epilepsy related to activating somatic variants in the PI3K-mTOR pathway. While identifying the genotype-associated changes at the single-cell level is fundamental to understanding disease pathophysiology, this remains technically challenging in human tissue samples with existing methods. Here, we performed single-nucleus RNA-sequencing (snRNA-seq) of 20 focal cortical dysplasia (FCD) samples removed surgically for treatment of drug-resistant epilepsy, and 10 non-FCD controls, and we developed a new approach, Genotyping Of Transcriptomes Enhanced with Nanopore sequencing (GO-TEN), that combines targeted complementary (c)DNA sequencing with snRNA-seq to perform concurrent single-nucleus genotyping and transcriptional analysis. We find that mosaic pathogenic variants in FCD do not produce a detectable novel cell identity, but instead we observe conserved cell types present both in FCD cases and non-FCD control specimens. Similarly, GO-TEN analysis shows that most pathogenic variant-carrying cells have well-differentiated neuronal or glial identities and are enriched for layer II-III excitatory neurons. We identify cell-intrinsic disruption of glutamate and GABA-A signaling pathways in variant-carrying neurons and altered intercellular signaling, making potential mechanisms for epileptogenesis in FCD. In summary, by addressing genotype-specific changes in mosaic epilepsy-associated lesions, our study highlights new potential disease mechanisms and therapeutic targets.
authors: Bizzotto, S.; Stronge, E. A.; Talukdar, M.; Hu, Q.; Zhou, Z.; Huang, A. Y.; Chhouk, B. H.; D'Gama, A. M.; Yang, E.; Green, T. E.; Reutens, D. C.; Mullen, S. A.; Hildebrand, M. S.; Buono, R. J.; Poduri, A. H.; Khoshkhoo, S.; Walsh, C. A.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示遗传镶嵌在神经发育障碍中的关键作用，通过单核RNA测序和GO-TEN技术发现致病变异未改变细胞身份但影响信号通路，为癫痫发病机制提供新见解。
ai.translation: 近期研究显示，遗传镶嵌在神经发育和神经精神疾病中的作用日益凸显，典型病例为与PI3K-mTOR通路激活体细胞变异相关的药物难治性儿童局灶性癫痫。尽管单细胞水平的基因型相关变化识别对理解疾病病理生理学至关重要，但现有方法在人类组织样本中仍存在技术挑战。本研究对20例手术切除用于治疗药物难治性癫痫的局灶性皮质发育不良（FCD）样本及10例非FCD对照样本进行了单核RNA测序（snRNA-seq），并开发了结合靶向cDNA测序与snRNA-seq的GO-TEN方法，实现单核基因型与转录分析的同步检测。研究发现，FCD中的镶嵌致病变异未产生可检测的新细胞身份，而是观察到FCD病例与非FCD对照样本中均存在的保守细胞类型。GO-TEN分析显示，多数携带致病变异的细胞具有分化良好的神经元或胶质细胞身份，并富集于II-III层兴奋性神经元。我们识别出变异携带神经元中谷氨酸和GABA-A信号通路的细胞内破坏以及细胞间信号改变，这可能解释FCD的癫痫发生机制。通过分析镶嵌癫痫相关病变的基因型特异性变化，本研究凸显了新的疾病机制和治疗靶点。

title: An Oxford Nanopore Technology-Based Hepatitis B Virus Sequencing Protocol Suitable for Genomic Surveillance Within Clinical Diagnostic Settings.
abstract: Chronic Hepatitis B Virus (HBV) infection remains a significant public health concern, particularly in Africa, where the burden is substantial. HBV is an enveloped virus, classified into ten phylogenetically distinct genotypes (A-J). Tests to determine HBV genotypes are based on full-genome sequencing or reverse hybridization. In practice, both approaches have limitations. Whereas diagnostic sequencing, generally using the Sanger approach, tends to focus only on the S-gene and yields little or no information on intra-patient HBV genetic diversity, reverse hybridization detects only known genotype-specific mutations. To resolve these limitations, we developed an Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)-based HBV diagnostic sequencing protocol suitable for clinical virology that yields both complete genome sequences and extensive intra-patient HBV diversity data. Specifically, the protocol involves tiling-based PCR amplification of HBV sequences, library preparation using the ONT Rapid Barcoding Kit (Oxford nanopore Technologies, Oxford, OX4 4DQ, UK), ONT GridION sequencing, genotyping using genome detective software v1.132/1.133, a recombination analysis using jpHMM (26 October 2011 version) and RDP5.61 software, and drug resistance profiling using Geno2pheno v2.0 software. We prove the utility of our protocol by efficiently generating and characterizing high-quality near full-length HBV genomes from 148 residual diagnostic samples from HBV-infected patients in the Western Cape province of South Africa, providing valuable insights into the genetic diversity and epidemiology of HBV in this region of the world.
authors: Derek Tshiabuila, Wonderful Choga, James E San, Tongai Maponga, Gert Van Zyl, Jennifer Giandhari, Sureshnee Pillay, Wolfgang Preiser, Yeshnee Naidoo, Cheryl Baxter, Darren P Martin, Tulio de Oliveira

ai.TLDR: 慢性乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染在非洲仍是重大公共卫生问题，现有检测方法存在局限性。本研究开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）的诊断测序协议，可同时获得完整基因组序列和患者内部遗传多样性数据，成功应用于南非西开普省148例样本分析。
ai.translation: 慢性乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染仍是全球重要的公共卫生问题，尤其在非洲地区负担严重。HBV是一种包膜病毒，分为十个进化上不同的基因型（A-J）。目前用于确定HBV基因型的检测方法主要基于全基因组测序或反向杂交法。然而，实际应用中这两种方法均存在局限性：诊断测序通常采用Sanger法，仅聚焦于S基因，难以获取患者体内HBV的遗传多样性信息；而反向杂交法则仅能检测已知的基因型特异性突变。为解决上述问题，我们开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）的HBV诊断测序协议，适用于临床病毒学检测，可同时获得完整的基因组序列和丰富的患者体内HBV遗传多样性数据。该协议具体包括基于拼接的PCR扩增、使用ONT Rapid Barcoding Kit（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, Oxford, OX4 4DQ, UK）进行文库制备、ONT GridION测序、采用Genome Detective软件v1.132/1.133进行基因分型、使用jpHMM（2011年10月26日版本）和RDP5.61软件进行重组分析，以及通过Geno2pheno v2.0软件进行药物抗性分析。我们通过高效生成和表征148例南非西开普省HBV感染者诊断残留样本的高质量近全基因组序列，验证了该协议的实用性，为该地区HBV的遗传多样性及流行病学研究提供了重要见解。

title: Fecal bacterial microbiota diversity characterized for dogs with atopic dermatitis: its alteration and clinical recovery after meat-exclusion diet.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: To achieve clinical recovery in canine atopic dermatitis affected pet dogs via alteration of the gut microbiome, following a meat and egg exclusion diet for 60 days.

METHODS: 24 atopic dermatitis-affected pet dogs, all fed poultry meat and egg, and another 48 apparently healthy controls fed both poultry meat and egg (n = 24) or vegetable diet (24) were included in the study. The study was undertaken in the Bhubaneswar Smart City, Odisha, India, from July to December 2023. Fecal samples were collected at 2 points for DNA analysis, ie, on day 0 and day 60 of the change from a meat/egg-based diet to a vegetable-based diet. Extracted DNA samples were pooled category-wise and subjected to the gut microbiome analysis in the Nanopore sequencer targeting the 16S rRNA gene. Burrows-Wheeler Transform, Ferragina-Manzini index, and Krona charts were used for taxonomical classification and visualization of relative abundances of bacterial species within the metagenome. Alpha- and beta-diversity analyses were performed.

RESULTS: Atopic pets at day 0 showed elevation in the gut microbiome population with an adequate concentration of pathogens like Escherichia coli and Clostridiodes difficile with lower amounts of the beneficial bacteria like Lactobacillus sp, while the pets at 60 days after dietary intervention showed a significant decline in bacterial species like E coli and C difficile with higher amount of Lactobacillus sp. Both control groups showed variations of microbiome between them as well as from the atopic pets.

CONCLUSIONS: We found a close association of poultry meat/egg diet with gut microbiome population and atopic symptoms as well in dogs, and elimination of such diet could be helpful in clinical recovery.

CLINICAL RELEVANCE: Dietary intervention with the exclusion of potential allergens from poultry meat and egg sources can be an effective approach for the management of canine atopic dermatitis.
authors: Swagatika Swain, Priyadarshini Sahoo, Sangram Biswal, Kamadev Sethy, Ananta Narayan Panda, Niranjana Sahoo

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过改变犬类过敏性皮炎患犬的肠道微生物群，结合60天的肉类和蛋类排除饮食，实现临床康复。结果显示，排除饮食后，肠道中致病菌减少，有益菌增加，表明饮食干预对犬类过敏性皮炎有积极影响。
ai.translation: 本研究的目的是通过改变犬类过敏性皮炎患犬的肠道微生物群，结合60天的肉类和蛋类排除饮食，实现临床康复。研究纳入了24只患有过敏性皮炎的宠物犬，它们均以鸡肉和蛋类为食，另外还有48只看似健康的对照组犬，其中24只喂食鸡肉和蛋类，24只喂食蔬菜饮食。研究在印度奥迪沙邦的布巴内斯瓦尔智慧城市于2023年7月至12月期间进行。在饮食改变的第0天和第60天分别收集粪便样本进行DNA分析。提取的DNA样本按类别合并，并在纳米孔测序仪上进行肠道微生物群分析，靶向16S rRNA基因。使用Burrows-Wheeler Transform、Ferragina-Manzini指数和Krona图表进行分类学分类和宏基因组中细菌种类相对丰度的可视化。进行了α-和β-多样性分析。结果显示，在第0天，过敏性皮炎犬的肠道微生物群中存在较高浓度的致病菌，如大肠杆菌和艰难梭菌，而有益菌如乳酸杆菌的含量较低；而在饮食干预60天后，大肠杆菌和艰难梭菌的种类显著减少，乳酸杆菌的含量显著增加。两个对照组之间以及与过敏性皮炎犬之间也表现出微生物群的差异。结论表明，鸡肉和蛋类饮食与犬类肠道微生物群和过敏症状之间存在密切关联，排除此类饮食可能有助于临床康复。临床相关性：从鸡肉和蛋类来源中排除潜在过敏原的饮食干预，可以作为一种有效的方法，用于管理犬类过敏性皮炎。

title: Performance of somatic structural variant calling in lung cancer using Oxford Nanopore sequencing technology
abstract:
### Background

Lung cancer is a heterogeneous disease and the primary cause of cancer-related mortality worldwide. Somatic mutations, including large structural variants, are important biomarkers in lung cancer for selecting targeted therapy. Genomic studies in lung cancer have been conducted using short-read sequencing. Emerging long-read sequencing technologies are a promising alternative to study somatic structural variants, however there is no current consensus on how to process data and call somatic events. In this study, we preformed whole genome sequencing of lung cancer and matched non-tumour samples using long and short read sequencing to comprehensively benchmark three sequence aligners and seven structural variant callers comprised of generic callers (SVIM, Sniffles2, DELLY in generic mode and cuteSV) and somatic callers (Severus, SAVANA, nanomonsv and DELLY in somatic modes).

### Results

Different combinations of aligners and variant callers influenced somatic structural variant detection. The choice of caller had a significant influence on somatic structural variant detection in terms of variant type, size, sensitivity, and accuracy. The performance of each variant caller was assessed by comparing to somatic structural variants identified by short-read sequencing. When compared to somatic structural variants detected with short-read sequencing, more events were detected with long-read sequencing. The mean recall of somatic variant events identified by long-read sequencing was higher for the somatic callers (72%) than generic callers (53%). Among the somatic callers when using the minimap2 aligner, SAVANA and Severus achieved the highest recall at 79.5% and 79.25% respectively, followed by nanomonsv with a recall of 72.5%.

### Conclusion

Long-read sequencing can identify somatic structural variants in clincal samples. The longer reads have the potential to improve our understanding of cancer development and inform personalized cancer treatment.
authors: Lingchen Liu, Jia Zhang, ... John V. Pearson
citation: Liu, L., Zhang, J., Wood, S. et al. Performance of somatic structural variant calling in lung cancer using Oxford Nanopore sequencing technology. BMC Genomics 25 , 898 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-024-10792-3
