ai.TLDR: 本研究对比了长读长测序与短读长测序在肺癌体细胞结构变异检测中的差异。通过评估不同比对工具和变异检测器的性能，发现长读长测序能显著提升变异检出率，其中SAVANA和Severus在长读长测序中表现最优。
ai.translation:
背景：肺癌是一种异质性肿瘤，是全球癌症相关死亡的主要原因。体细胞突变（包括大结构变异）是肺癌靶向治疗选择的重要生物标志物。肺癌的基因组研究主要采用短读长测序技术，但新兴的长读长测序技术为研究体细胞结构变异提供了新途径。目前尚无统一标准用于长读长测序数据的处理和体细胞事件的检测。本研究通过长读长测序和短读长测序对肺癌及匹配非肿瘤样本进行全基因组测序，全面基准测试了三种序列比对工具和七种结构变异检测器（包括通用型检测器SVIM、Sniffles2、DELLY通用模式和cuteSV，以及特异性检测器Severus、SAVANA、nanomonsv和DELLY特异性模式）。

结果：不同比对工具与变异检测器的组合显著影响体细胞结构变异的检测效果。检测器的选择在变异类型、大小、灵敏度和准确性方面对体细胞结构变异检测具有显著影响。通过与短读长测序检测到的体细胞结构变异进行对比，评估了各变异检测器的性能。与短读长测序检测到的体细胞结构变异相比，长读长测序检测到的变异事件更多。长读长测序检测到的体细胞变异事件平均召回率在特异性检测器中达到72%，高于通用型检测器的53%。在使用minimap2比对工具时，特异性检测器中SAVANA和Severus分别达到79.5%和79.25%的召回率，随后是nanomonsv的72.5%召回率。

结论：长读长测序能够有效识别临床样本中的体细胞结构变异。更长的读长有望提升我们对癌症发展机制的理解，并为个性化癌症治疗提供依据。

title: GoldPolish-Target: Targeted long-read genome assembly polishing
abstract:
BackgroundAdvanced long-read sequencing technologies, such as those from Oxford Nanopore Technologies and Pacific Biosciences, are finding a wide use in de novo genome sequencing projects. However, long reads typically have higher error rates relative to short reads. If left unaddressed, subsequent genome assemblies may exhibit high base error rates that compromise the reliability of downstream analysis. Several specialized error correction tools for genome assemblies have since emerged, employing a range of algorithms and strategies to improve base quality. However, despite these efforts, many genome assembly workflows still produce regions with elevated error rates, such as gaps filled with unpolished or ambiguous bases. To address this, we introduce GoldPolish-Target, a modular targeted sequence polishing pipeline. Coupled with GoldPolish, a linear-time genome assembly algorithm, GoldPolish-Target isolates and polishes user-specified assembly loci, offering a resource-efficient means for polishing targeted regions of draft genomes.

ResultsExperiments using Drosophila melanogaster and Homo sapiens datasets demonstrate that GoldPolish-Target can reduce insertion/deletion (indel) and mismatch errors by up to 49.2% and 53.4% respectively, achieving base accuracy values upwards of 99.9% (Phred score Q>30). This polishing accuracy is comparable to the current state-of-the-art, Medaka, while exhibiting up to 36-fold shorter run times and consuming 94% less memory, on average.

ConclusionGoldPolish-Target, in contrast to most other polishing tools, offers the ability to target specific regions of a genome assembly for polishing, providing a computationally light-weight and highly scalable solution for base error correction.

Availabilityhttps://github.com/bcgsc/goldpolish
authors: Zhang, E.; Coombe, L.; Wong, J.; Warren, R. L.; Birol, I.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术在基因组从头组装中应用广泛，但存在较高错误率问题。GoldPolish-Target通过模块化靶向校正流程，结合线性时间算法，显著降低插入/缺失和错配错误，达到99.9%以上碱基准确性。该工具在保持与Medaka相当校正精度的同时，运行速度提升36倍，内存消耗降低94%。
ai.translation:
背景：先进的长读长测序技术（如牛津纳米孔技术和太平洋生物科学公司技术）在从头基因组测序项目中得到广泛应用。然而，长读长通常比短读长具有更高的错误率。若未妥善处理，后续基因组组装可能产生高碱基错误率，影响下游分析的可靠性。尽管已出现多种专门的错误校正工具，但许多基因组组装流程仍会产生错误率较高的区域，如填充的未优化或模糊碱基。为解决此问题，我们引入GoldPolish-Target，一个模块化的靶向序列校正流程。结合GoldPolish（线性时间基因组组装算法），GoldPolish-Target可隔离并校正用户指定的组装区域，提供一种资源高效的草图基因组靶向区域校正方法。

结果：使用果蝇（Drosophila melanogaster）和人类（Homo sapiens）数据集的实验表明，GoldPolish-Target可分别将插入/缺失（indel）和错配错误降低高达49.2%和53.4%，达到超过99.9%的碱基准确性（Phred score Q>30）。该校正精度与当前最先进的Medaka相当，同时平均运行时间缩短36倍，内存消耗降低94%。

结论：与大多数其他校正工具不同，GoldPolish-Target能够针对基因组组装的特定区域进行校正，提供一种计算轻量且高度可扩展的碱基错误校正解决方案。

可用性：https://github.com/bcgsc/goldpolish

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在通过LR-PCR和Sanger测序检测成人发病性共济失调患者中FGF14基因第一内含子的GAA重复扩展，以确定其与疾病的关联。研究发现GAA重复扩展可能与该病的发病机制有关，为临床诊断提供了新的思路。
ai.translation:
背景与目的：FGF14基因第一内含子中的致病性GAA重复扩展与成人发病性共济失调有关。本研究旨在通过检测这些重复扩展，以确定其在疾病中的作用。

方法：从248例未明确遗传病因的成人发病性共济失调患者中提取基因组DNA样本，首先通过跨越内含子的LR-PCR进行检测。

结果：发现（可能）致病性的GAA重复扩展与该病的发生有关。

讨论：我们得出结论，GAA重复扩展可能在成人发病性共济失调的发病机制中起重要作用，为该病的基因诊断提供了新的依据。

abstract: Outbreaks of furunculosis cause significant losses in salmonid aquaculture worldwide. With a recent rise in antimicrobial resistance, regulatory measures to minimize the use of antibiotics in animal husbandry, including aquaculture, have increased scrutiny and availability of veterinary medical products to control this disease in production facilities. In such a regulatory environment, the utility of autogenous vaccines to assist with disease prevention and control as a veterinary-guided prophylactic measure is of high interest to the producers and veterinary services alike. However, evolving concepts of epidemiological units and epidemiological links need to be considered during approval and acceptance procedures for the application of autogenous vaccines in multiple aquaculture facilities. ai.translation: 毛囊炎爆发在全球鲑鱼养殖业中造成重大损失。随着抗生素耐药性的增加，监管措施加强了对养殖业中抗生素使用的限制，推动了兽医产品的应用。在这样的监管环境下，自主疫苗作为兽医指导下的预防措施，在疾病预防和控制中的作用引起了养殖者和兽医服务的极大兴趣。然而，在多个养殖设施中应用自主疫苗的审批和接受过程中，需要考虑流行病学单位和流行病学联系等概念的演变。本文展示了对54株分离物进行固态纳米孔测序（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）的结果。

title: A Tear-Based Approach for Rapid Identification of Bacterial Pathogens in Corneal Ulcers Using Nanopore Sequencing
abstract:
PurposeCorneal ulcers pose a significant threat to vision, with the need for prompt and precise pathogen identification being critical to effective treatment. This study assesses the efficacy of using next-generation portable sequencing (Nanopore Technology) to detect and identify bacterial pathogens directly from tear samples, providing a non-invasive alternative to traditional corneal scraping and culture, which are limited by high false-negative rates.

DesignProspective observational study.

ParticipantsTen participants diagnosed with corneal ulcers.

MethodsTear samples were collected from the ocular surface using Schirmer strips. Corneal scrapings and cultures were performed as medically indicated. The 16S rRNA gene was amplified directly from the tear samples using polymerase chain reaction (PCR), and Nanopore sequencing was used for bacterial species identification and taxonomic classification. Comparative analysis was conducted to evaluate the concordance between Nanopore sequencing results and traditional culture methods.

Main Outcome MeasuresComparison of bacterial species detected via Nanopore sequencing with those identified through traditional culture methods.

ResultsBacterial DNA was identified in 8 of the 10 samples analyzed using the tear-based sequencing method. Notably, Nanopore sequencing accurately identified the causative bacteria in all 4 samples that exhibited bacterial growth on culture. Additionally, it detected bacterial pathogens in 2 of the 4 ulcers that did not show bacterial growth on culture. In 2 cases where cultures could not be obtained due to the small size of the ulcer, tear sequencing successfully identified bacterial species, highlighting potentially overlooked pathogens in corneal ulcers.

ConclusionsPCR amplification of 16S RNA directly from tears followed by Nanopore sequencing is an effective, non-invasive method to identify bacterial pathogens in corneal ulcers, offering non-inferior results to traditional culture methods. This technique not only allows for the detection of traditionally hard-to-culture organisms, providing immediate diagnostic value to guide treatment, but also enhances our understanding of the microbiological landscape of corneal ulcers, thereby informing more effective treatment strategies.
authors: Dibbs, M.; Matesva, M.; Theotoka, D.; Jayaraj, C.; Metiku, B.; Demkowicz, P.; Heng, J. S.; Wang, Y.; Bakhoum, C. Y.; Chow, J.; Bakhoum, M. F.

ai.TLDR: 角膜溃疡威胁视力，传统培养方法因假阴率高而受限。本研究评估纳米孔测序技术直接检测泪液样本中细菌病原体的效果，提供非侵入性替代方案。结果显示该技术可准确识别致病菌，尤其在传统培养未检出的病例中表现突出。
ai.translation:
目的：角膜溃疡对视力构成重大威胁，迫切需要快速精准的病原体鉴定以指导治疗。本研究评估使用下一代便携式测序（Nanopore Technology）直接从泪液样本中检测和鉴定细菌病原体的效果，提供传统角膜刮片和培养方法（受限于高假阴性率）的非侵入性替代方案。

设计：前瞻性观察性研究。

参与者：10名被诊断为角膜溃疡的患者。

方法：使用Schirmer条从角膜表面收集泪液样本。根据医疗指征进行角膜刮片和培养。通过聚合酶链反应（PCR）直接从泪液样本扩增16S rRNA基因，并利用纳米孔测序进行细菌种属鉴定和分类学分类。通过比较分析评估纳米孔测序结果与传统培养方法的一致性。

主要结果指标：比较纳米孔测序检测到的细菌种属与传统培养方法鉴定结果。

结果：基于泪液的测序方法在10个分析样本中检测到8个样本的细菌DNA。值得注意的是，纳米孔测序在4个培养显示细菌生长的样本中准确识别了致病菌。此外，它在4个培养未检出细菌生长的溃疡中检测到2个细菌病原体。在2个因溃疡大小过小无法获取培养的病例中，泪液测序成功识别了细菌种属，凸显了角膜溃疡中可能被忽视的病原体。

结论：直接从泪液中扩增16S RNA并结合纳米孔测序是一种有效的非侵入性方法，可识别角膜溃疡中的细菌病原体，其结果与传统培养方法相当。该技术不仅能够检测传统难以培养的微生物，为治疗提供即时诊断价值，还能加深对角膜溃疡微生物群落的认识，从而制定更有效的治疗策略。

title: Mechanism of Initial Favorable Response to Decitabine in TP53-Mutated MDS/AML and Potential Mechanisms of Subsequent Relapse.
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research
abstract:
PURPOSE: Myelodysplastic syndrome and acute myeloid leukemia with complex and monosomy karyotypes show a high prevalence of TP53 mutations (TP53m), poor response to induction chemotherapy, and adverse outcomes. These diseases may respond to decitabine, but the mechanisms are presently unclear.

EXPERIMENTAL DESIGN: Patients with myelodysplastic syndrome and acute myeloid leukemia were treated with decitabine for 10 days in a phase II clinical study. In this study, we collected serial samples from patients before and at the completion of decitabine treatment, morphologic remission, and relapse. The samples were interrogated with targeted myeloid panel sequencing, nanopore DNA cytosine methylation sequencing, and single-cell transcriptomics to investigate potential interactions between leukemic and immune populations.

RESULTS: The integrative analysis allowed for the characterization of shifting dynamics within leukemic and immune cell populations in individual patients. Single-cell transcriptomic analyses confirmed immune activation in TP53m responders after decitabine treatment. At relapse, leukemic populations showed upregulation of MYC signaling and heat shock response, whereas T cells showed an exhaustion signature.

CONCLUSIONS: Our work highlighted the complex interplay between leukemic and immune populations in TP53m patients upon decitabine treatment that might account for clinical responses and subsequent relapses.
authors: Nelson K L Ng, Stephen S Y Lam, Lichuan Zheng, Xingliang Liu, Mingxuan Liang, Lam Ng, Koon C Chan, Chun X Zhang, Rachel L S Tse, Arthur K L Cheung, Ho-Wan Ip, Chun H Au, Edmond S K Ma, Chi T Ng, Ying Ni, Run S Li, Guang S Ling, Suet Y Leung, Asif Javed, Anskar Y H Leung

ai.TLDR: TP53突变在复杂和单体核型的骨髓增生异常综合征和急性髓系白血病中常见，且对诱导化疗反应差。本研究通过去甲基化药物地西他滨治疗，发现白血病和免疫细胞之间存在复杂的相互作用，可能影响治疗反应和复发。
ai.translation:
目的：具有复杂和单体核型的骨髓增生异常综合征（MDS）和急性髓系白血病（AML）患者中TP53突变（TP53m）的患病率较高，对诱导化疗的反应较差，预后不良。这些疾病可能对地西他滨（decitabine）有反应，但其机制尚不清楚。

实验设计：在一项II期临床研究中，对患有MDS和AML的患者进行了为期10天的地西他滨治疗。在本研究中，我们从患者治疗前、治疗结束、形态学缓解和复发时收集了连续样本。通过靶向髓系面板测序、纳米孔DNA胞嘧啶甲基化测序和单细胞转录组学分析，研究了白血病细胞和免疫细胞之间的潜在相互作用。

结果：整合分析揭示了个体患者中白血病和免疫细胞群体的动态变化。单细胞转录组学分析证实，在地西他滨治疗后，TP53m应答者中出现了免疫激活。在复发时，白血病群体表现出MYC信号和热休克反应的上调，而T细胞则表现出耗竭特征。

结论：我们的研究揭示了地西他滨治疗TP53m患者时，白血病和免疫细胞之间复杂的相互作用，这可能解释了临床反应和随后的复发。

title: Rapid detection of causative bacteria including multiple infections of bovine respiratory disease using 16S rRNA amplicon-based nanopore sequencing
abstract: Bovine respiratory disease (BRD) is a multifaceted condition that poses a primary challenge in calf rearing. Viruses and bacteria are etiological agents of BRD. Viral BRD is typically managed symptomatically, whereas bacterial BRD is predominantly managed through the empirical administration of antimicrobials. However, this empirical administration has raised concerns regarding the emergence of antimicrobial-resistant bacteria. Thus, rapid identification of pathogenic bacteria and judicious selection of antimicrobials are required. This study evaluated the usefulness of 16S rRNA analysis through nanopore sequencing for the rapid identification of BRD-causing bacteria. A comparative evaluation of nanopore sequencing and traditional culture method was performed on 100 calf samples detected with BRD. Nanopore sequencing facilitated the identification of bacteria at the species level in bovine nasal swabs, ear swabs, and lung tissue samples within approximately 6 h. Of the 92 samples in which BRD-causing bacteria were identified via nanopore sequencing, 82 (89%) were concordant with the results of culture isolation. In addition, the occurrence of multiple infections exceeded that of singular infections. These results suggest that 16S rRNA sequencing via nanopore technology is effective in reducing analysis time and accurately identifying BRD-causing bacteria. This method is particularly advantageous for the initial detectable screening of BRD.
authors: Shingo Okamura, Akira Fukuda, Masaru Usui
citation: Okamura, S., Fukuda, A. & Usui, M. Rapid detection of causative bacteria including multiple infections of bovine respiratory disease using 16S rRNA amplicon-based nanopore sequencing. Vet Res Commun 48 , 3873–3881 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s11259-024-10556-0

ai.TLDR: 牛呼吸道疾病（BRD）的致病菌快速鉴定面临传统培养方法耗时长和抗微生物耐药性风险的挑战。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术实现16S rRNA分析，可在6小时内完成病原菌种属鉴定，89%的检测结果与培养法一致，显示该技术在缩短分析时间及准确识别病原菌方面的有效性。
ai.translation: 牛呼吸道疾病（BRD）是一种复杂的疾病，是犊牛饲养中的主要挑战。病毒和细菌是BRD的病原体。病毒性BRD通常通过症状治疗管理，而细菌性BRD则主要通过经验性使用抗菌药物进行治疗。然而，这种经验性用药引发了对抗微生物耐药菌株出现的担忧。因此，需要快速鉴定致病细菌并合理选择抗菌药物。本研究评估了通过纳米孔测序进行16S rRNA分析在快速鉴定BRD致病菌中的实用性。对100份检测出BRD的犊牛样本进行了纳米孔测序与传统培养法的对比分析。纳米孔测序可在约6小时内完成牛鼻拭子、耳拭子和肺组织样本中细菌的种属鉴定。在92份通过纳米孔测序鉴定出BRD致病菌的样本中，82份（89%）与培养分离结果一致。此外，多重感染的发生率高于单一感染。这些结果表明，通过纳米孔技术进行的16S rRNA测序在缩短分析时间及准确鉴定BRD致病菌方面有效。该方法特别适用于BRD的初步筛查。

title: Nanopore-based targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS): A versatile technology specialized in detecting low bacterial load clinical specimens.
abstract:
INTRODUCTION: The 2024 global tuberculosis report indicated that the epidemiological situation of tuberculosis remains concerning. Current tuberculosis detection methods have limitations, highlighting the urgent need to develop more convenient, effective, and widely utilized detection technologies in clinical settings to facilitate early diagnosis and treatment guidance for tuberculosis. Nanopore-based targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS) offers advantages such as convenience, efficiency, and long-read sequencing, making it a commonly used method for mycobacteria identification.

METHODS: This study compared the detection efficiency of tNGS with Xpert MTB/RIF, MTB culture, and AFB smear in sputum samples, BALF samples, and pathological tissue samples to evaluate the clinical applicability of tNGS in diagnosing tuberculosis and low bacterial load tuberculosis, including extrapulmonary and smear-negative cases.

RESULTS: Among the four detection methods, tNGS demonstrated the highest efficiency, sensitivity, specificity, and AUC values, which are 93.4%, 94.7%, and 0.94, respectively. This method was particularly advantageous for detecting tuberculosis in patients with low bacterial loads, as evidenced by a significantly different positive detection rate in histopathological specimens compared to other methods (P < 0.001). Furthermore, tNGS achieved overall positive detection rates of 93.8% for smear-negative tuberculosis patients and 89.1% for culture-negative tuberculosis patients, both of which were significantly higher than those of other detection methods (P < 0.05). Additionally, tNGS could directly identify bacterial strains and detect mutations associated with drug resistance. In this study, the agreement rate between tNGS strain identification of NTM and the final diagnosis was 94.1%. Among the 21 identified mutation sites associated with rifampicin resistance, one (Pro454His) was located outside RRDR.

CONCLUSION: It is anticipated that tNGS will play a crucial clinical role in the early prevention and control of tuberculosis in the future.
authors: Chen Yang, Weiwei Gao, Yicheng Guo, Yi Zeng

ai.TLDR: 2024年全球结核病报告指出，结核病的流行情况仍然令人担忧。当前的结核病检测方法存在局限性，亟需开发更便捷、高效且广泛应用的检测技术以促进早期诊断和治疗指导。基于纳米孔的靶向下一代测序（tNGS）因其便捷性、高效性和长读长优势，成为分枝杆菌鉴定的常用方法。
ai.translation:
引言：2024年全球结核病报告指出，结核病的流行情况仍然令人担忧。当前的结核病检测方法存在局限性，凸显了在临床环境中开发更便捷、有效且广泛应用的检测技术的迫切需求，以促进结核病的早期诊断和治疗指导。基于纳米孔的靶向下一代测序（tNGS）具有便捷性、高效性和长读长等优势，使其成为分枝杆菌鉴定的常用方法。

方法：本研究比较了tNGS与Xpert MTB/RIF、MTB培养和抗酸杆菌涂片在痰液样本、支气管肺泡灌洗液样本和病理组织样本中的检测效率，以评估tNGS在诊断结核病和低细菌载量结核病（包括非肺部和涂片阴性病例）中的临床适用性。

结果：在四种检测方法中，tNGS表现出最高的效率、敏感性和特异性，分别为93.4%、94.7%和0.94。该方法在低细菌载量结核病患者的检测中具有显著优势，如在组织病理学样本中，其阳性检出率与其他方法相比存在显著差异（P < 0.001）。此外，tNGS在涂片阴性结核病患者中的总体阳性检出率为93.8%，在培养阴性结核病患者中的总体阳性检出率为89.1%，均显著高于其他检测方法（P < 0.05）。此外，tNGS能够直接鉴定细菌菌株并检测与耐药相关的突变。在本研究中，tNGS对NTM菌株的鉴定与最终诊断的一致率为94.1%。在21个与利福平耐药相关的突变位点中，有一个（Pro454His）位于RRDR区域之外。

结论：预计tNGS将在未来结核病的早期预防和控制中发挥重要的临床作用。

title: Combining panel-based and whole-transcriptome-based gene fusion detection by long-read sequencing.
abstract: We present a comprehensive gene fusion (GF) detection and analysis workflow that combines targeted panel-based and whole-transcriptome long-read sequencing. We first adapted libraries from the short-read CHOP Cancer Fusion Panel, which targets 119 oncogenes commonly implicated in cancer fusions, for use on Oxford Nanopore Technologies' long-read sequencing platform. Long-read sequencing successfully detected known GFs in panel-positive samples, confirming compatibility, and enabled reduced turnaround times. To expand GF discovery in clinically challenging cases, we analyzed 24 glioma samples with negative short-read fusion panel results using whole-transcriptome long-read sequencing. This identified 20 candidate GFs in panel-negative samples that were absent from current fusion databases, all of which were experimentally validated. In summary, we introduce a computational workflow that combines panel-based and whole-transcriptome long-read sequencing with tailored analysis pipelines to enable fast and comprehensive GF detection in cancer.
authors: Karleena Rybacki, Feng Xu, Hannah M Deutsch, Mian Umair Ahsan, Joe Chan, Zizhuo Liang, Yuanquan Song, Marilyn Li, Kai Wang

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出了一种结合靶向panel和全转录组长读长测序的基因融合检测与分析流程，能够快速且全面地检测癌症中的基因融合。该方法在临床挑战性病例中成功识别了20个新候选基因融合，所有结果均通过实验验证。
ai.translation: 我们提出了一种全面的基因融合（GF）检测和分析流程，该流程结合了靶向panel和全转录组长读长测序。我们首先将短读长测序的CHOP癌症融合panel库（该panel针对119个在癌症融合中常见的癌基因）适配到Oxford Nanopore Technologies的长读长测序平台上。长读长测序成功检测了panel阳性样本中的已知GFs，验证了其兼容性，并实现了缩短检测周期。为了在临床挑战性病例中扩展GF的发现，我们使用全转录组长读长测序分析了24个短读长测序融合panel结果为阴性的胶质瘤样本。该分析在panel阴性样本中识别出20个候选GFs，这些GFs在当前的融合数据库中均未收录，所有结果均通过实验验证。总之，我们介绍了一种计算流程，结合靶向panel和全转录组长读长测序，并采用定制的分析流程，以实现癌症中快速且全面的GF检测。

title: Packaging of alphavirus-based self-amplifying mRNA yields replication-competent virus through a mechanism of aberrant homologous RNA recombination.
abstract: Messenger (m)RNA has taken center stage in vaccine development, gene therapy, and cancer immunotherapy. A next-generation of mRNA is the self-amplifying (sa)mRNA, which induces broad and long-lasting immunity at a lower dose which provides better clinical outcomes in conjunction with fewer adverse effects. SamRNA, also known as "replicon" RNA, encodes the replication machinery of an alphavirus together with an antigen. Efficient delivery of replicon RNA to target tissues can be accomplished by packaging the replicon RNA in virus-like replicon particles (VRPs) via co-transfection of producer cells with defective helper RNA(s) encoding the alphavirus structural proteins. During the manufacture of VRPs, however, there is a potential risk of RNA recombination, which may lead to the formation of replication-competent virus (RCV). To investigate the factors influencing the unwanted RCV formation, we evaluated how sequence homology orchestrates alphavirus RNA recombination. Several combinations of complementing alphavirus replicon and helper RNAs varying in length of sequences overlap were co-transfected in mammalian cells. The culture fluid was serially passaged to detect RCV. Nanopore sequencing of cells after the first passage in combination with amplicon-based Sanger sequencing of RCV in the culture fluid after four passages led to the detection of RNA recombination. RCV was generated between replicon and helper RNAs with sequence homology in either the non-structural or structural genes, whereas RNAs without overlapping gene regions did not generate RCV. Remarkably, no sequence overlap was detected at the recombination junction sites in the RCV genome, suggesting a mechanism of "aberrant homologous RNA recombination." Accordingly, we conclude that the alphavirus RNA recombination process leading to the formation of RCV is homology-assisted and can be prevented by avoiding sequence homology between replicon and helper RNAs.IMPORTANCEThere is a growing interest in the use of self-amplifying (sa)mRNA vectors for next-generation vaccine development, gene therapy, and cancer immunotherapy. The delivery of samRNA in the form of virus-like replicon particles (VRPs) enables efficient delivery of samRNA to target tissue. The production of these VRPs, however, suffers from contamination with replication-competent virus (RCV) that is thought to arise from recombination events between samRNA and helper RNAs for VRP packaging. The presence of RCV in samRNA in the clinical product is undesirable as alphaviruses may cause serious disease in humans. However, the underlying recombination mechanism leading to RCV is currently unknown. In our work, we demonstrate a detailed evaluation of the recombination sites, which indicates that RCV is formed through an unusual mechanism of "aberrant homologous RNA recombination." The results are useful for researchers in the field of RNA vaccine manufacture and delivery.
authors: Tessy A H Hick, Corinne Geertsema, Reindert Nijland, Gorben P Pijlman

ai.TLDR: 自扩增mRNA（sa mRNA）在疫苗开发、基因治疗和癌症免疫治疗中具有重要应用，但其生产过程中存在RNA重组风险，可能导致复制型病毒（RCV）的形成。研究发现，序列同源性在RNA重组中起关键作用，而避免序列同源性可有效预防RCV的产生。
ai.translation: 信使RNA（mRNA）在疫苗开发、基因治疗和癌症免疫治疗中占据了核心地位。新一代的mRNA是自扩增（sa）mRNA，它在较低剂量下可诱导广泛且持久的免疫反应，从而提供更好的临床结果，并伴随较少的不良反应。自扩增mRNA，也称为“复制子”RNA，编码了甲型病毒的复制机制以及抗原。通过将复制子RNA包装在病毒样复制子颗粒（VRPs）中，可以高效地将复制子RNA递送到靶组织。这种包装方法是通过将生产细胞与缺陷型辅助RNA（编码甲型病毒结构蛋白）共同转染实现的。然而，在VRPs的制造过程中，存在RNA重组的潜在风险，这可能导致复制型病毒（RCV）的形成。为了研究影响不期望的RCV形成的因素，我们评估了序列同源性如何调控甲型病毒RNA重组。我们共转染了多种互补的甲型病毒复制子和辅助RNA，这些RNA在序列重叠长度上有所不同。培养液经过多次传代以检测RCV。通过第一代传代后的纳米孔测序，结合第四代传代后培养液中RCV的扩增子测序，发现了RNA重组。RCV是在复制子和辅助RNA之间具有序列同源性的非结构基因或结构基因区域生成的，而没有重叠基因区域的RNA则不会生成RCV。值得注意的是，在RCV基因组的重组接合位点未检测到序列重叠，这表明了一种“异常同源RNA重组”的机制。因此，我们得出结论，导致RCV形成的甲型病毒RNA重组过程是同源性辅助的，通过避免复制子和辅助RNA之间的序列同源性可以防止RCV的产生。重要性：自扩增mRNA（sa mRNA）载体在新一代疫苗开发、基因治疗和癌症免疫治疗中引起了越来越多的关注。将sa mRNA以病毒样复制子颗粒（VRPs）的形式递送，可以高效地将sa mRNA递送到靶组织。然而，这些VRPs的生产过程中存在被复制型病毒（RCV）污染的风险，这种RCV被认为是由sa mRNA与辅助RNA之间的重组事件引起的。在临床产品中，RCV的存在是不希望的，因为甲型病毒可能在人类中引起严重疾病。然而，导致RCV形成的重组机制目前尚不清楚。在我们的研究中，我们详细评估了重组位点，表明RCV是通过一种不寻常的“异常同源RNA重组”机制形成的。这些结果对RNA疫苗的制造和递送领域的研究人员具有重要价值。

title: Multiplex polymerase chain reaction (PCR) with Nanopore sequencing for sequence-based detection of four tilapia pathogens.
abstract:

METHODS: In this study, we present an approach utilizing a multiplex PCR (mPCR) assay, coupled with rapid Nanopore sequencing, enabling the one-tube simultaneous detection and one-reaction Nanopore sequencing-based validation of four pathogens.

RESULTS: Our one-tube multiplex assay exhibits a detection limit of 1,000 copies per reaction for TiLV, ISKNV, and
authors: Jérôme Delamare-Deboutteville, Watcharachai Meemetta, Khaettareeya Pimsannil, Han Ming Gan, Laura Khor, Mohan Chadag, Ha Thanh Dong, Saengchan Senapin

ai.TLDR: 该研究旨在解决罗非鱼养殖中由四种主要病原体引起的威胁。通过结合多重PCR和Nanopore测序技术，实现四种病原体的同时检测与验证。实验结果显示，该方法在检测灵敏度方面表现良好。
ai.translation:
背景：罗非鱼养殖面临由四种主要病原体带来的重大威胁：罗非鱼湖病毒（TiLV）、传染性脾肾坏死病毒（ISKNV）等。

方法：在本研究中，我们提出了一种利用多重PCR（mPCR）检测方法结合快速Nanopore测序技术的方案，能够实现四种病原体的一管同时检测和一反应基于Nanopore测序的验证。

结果：我们的单管多重检测方法对TiLV、ISKNV的检测下限为每反应1,000拷贝。

title: Characterizing a lethal CAG-ACE2 transgenic mouse model for SARS-CoV-2 infection using Cas9-enhanced nanopore sequencing
abstract: The SARS-CoV-2 pandemic has underscored the necessity for functional transgenic animal models for testing. Mouse lines with overexpression of the human receptor ACE2 serve as the common animal model to study COVID-19 infection. Overexpression of *ACE2* under a strong ubiquitous promoter facilitates convenient and sensitive testing of COVID-19 pathology. We performed pronuclear microinjections using a 5 kb CAG-ACE2 linear transgene construct and identified three founder lines with 140, 72, and 73 copies, respectively. Two of these lines were further analyzed for *ACE2* expression profiles and sensitivity to SARS-CoV-2 infection. Both lines expressed *ACE2* in all organs analyzed. Embryonic fibroblast cell lines derived from transgenic embryos demonstrated severe cytopathic effects following infection, even at low doses of SARS-CoV-2 (0,1–1.0 TCID50). Infected mice from the two lines began to show COVID-19 clinical signs three days post-infection and succumbed between days 4 and 7. Histological examination of lung tissues from terminally ill mice revealed severe pathological alterations. To further characterize the integration site in one of the lines, we applied nanopore sequencing combined with Cas9 enrichment to examine the internal transgene concatemer structure. Oxford Nanopore sequencing (ONT) is becoming the gold standard for transgene insert characterization, but it is relatively inefficient without targeted region enrichment. We digested genomic DNA with Cas9 and gRNA against the *ACE2* transgene to create ends suitable for ONT adapter ligation. ONT data analysis revealed that most of the transgene copies were arranged in a head-to-tail configuration, with palindromic junctions being rare. We also detected occasional plasmid backbone fragments within the concatemer, likely co-purified during transgene gel extraction, which is a common occurrence in pronuclear microinjections.
authors: Alexander Smirnov, Artem Nurislamov, ... Nariman Battulin
citation: Smirnov, A., Nurislamov, A., Koncevaya, G. et al. Characterizing a lethal CAG-ACE2 transgenic mouse model for SARS-CoV-2 infection using Cas9-enhanced nanopore sequencing. Transgenic Res 33 , 453–466 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s11248-024-00413-w
description: The SARS-CoV-2 pandemic has underscored the necessity for functional transgenic animal models for testing. Mouse lines with overexpression of the...

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2大流行凸显了功能性转基因动物模型的必要性，本研究通过显微注射构建了CAG-ACE2转基因小鼠模型，成功获得三系转基因小鼠并验证其对病毒的敏感性。感染实验显示，转基因小鼠在感染后3天出现临床症状，4-7天死亡，肺部组织病理学检查显示严重病变。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2大流行凸显了功能性转基因动物模型的必要性。以过表达人类ACE2受体的转基因小鼠作为研究COVID-19感染的常用动物模型。在强效通用启动子驱动下过表达ACE2基因可实现便捷且敏感的病毒病理检测。我们采用5 kb CAG-ACE2线性转基因构建体进行原核显微注射，成功获得3个转基因小鼠系，分别携带140、72和73个转基因拷贝。其中2个系进一步分析了ACE2表达谱和对SARS-CoV-2感染的敏感性。两个系均在所有检测器官中表达ACE2。转基因胚胎衍生的胚胎成纤维细胞在感染后表现出严重的细胞病变效应，即使在低剂量SARS-CoV-2（0.1–1.0 TCID50）感染下也可见。两个系感染小鼠在感染后3天开始出现COVID-19临床症状，4-7天死亡。终末期小鼠肺组织病理学检查显示严重病理改变。为进一步分析其中一个系的转基因插入位点，我们采用纳米孔测序结合Cas9富集技术分析转基因串联体结构。虽然牛津纳米孔测序（ONT）已成为转基因插入位点分析的金标准，但缺乏靶向区域富集时效率较低。我们通过Cas9和针对ACE2转基因的gRNA消化基因组DNA，生成适合ONT接头连接的末端。ONT数据分析显示，大多数转基因拷贝呈头对尾排列，反向连接位点罕见。我们还检测到串联体中偶尔存在的质粒骨架片段，可能在转基因凝胶提取过程中共纯化，这在显微注射中较为常见。

title: Revolutionising High Resolution HLA Genotyping for Transplant Assessment: Validation, Implementation and Challenges of Oxford Nanopore Technologies' Q20
abstract: The advent of third-generation sequencing (TGS) represents a significant shift in the field of genetic sequencing, enabling single-molecule sequencing to overcome limitations of short-read NGS platforms. Several studies have assessed the utilisation of TGS in HLA genotyping, though many of these studies have described the high error rate as an obstacle to achieving a robust and highly accurate HLA typing assay. In 2021, Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) released the high-accuracy sequencing Kit 14 and the MinION flow cell model R10.4.1, which were reported to achieve sequencing accuracies up to 99%. The aim of this study was to validate this novel high-accuracy sequencing kit for HLA genotyping coupled with a full-gene HLA PCR assay. Comparison with historical data obtained using legacy flow cell models such as R9.4, R10.3 and R10.4 was also done to assess progressive improvement in sequencing performance with each sequential release. The workflow was validated based on data throughput, sequence quality and accuracy, and HLA genotyping resolution. An initial validation was performed using an internal reference panel of 42 samples representing common HLA allele groups, followed by an analysis of data obtained from 111 sequencing batch runs since the implementation, to assess assay performance and define quality control metrics to assess inter-run variability and monitor quality. Furthermore, challenges arising from MinION flow cell stability and use, and assessment of barcode contamination are discussed. The findings of this study highlight advantages of ONT sequencing kit 14/R10.4.1 for HLA genotyping and the implementation considerations for the routine diagnostic HLA laboratory.
authors: Naser El-Lagta, Linh Truong, Felipe Ayora, Fredrick Mobegi, Samuel Bruce, Patricia Martinez, Lloyd D'Orsogna, Dianne De Santis

ai.TLDR: 第三代测序技术（TGS）为遗传测序带来了重大变革，克服了短读长NGS平台的局限性。本研究验证了ONT高精度测序套件14/R10.4.1在HLA基因分型中的应用，并评估了其性能改进。研究结果表明，该套件在HLA分型中具有高准确性和可靠性，适用于常规诊断实验室。
ai.translation: 第三代测序技术（TGS）的出现标志着遗传测序领域的一次重大变革，使得单分子测序能够克服短读长NGS平台的局限性。尽管已有若干研究评估了TGS在HLA基因分型中的应用，但许多研究都指出其高错误率是实现稳健且高准确性的HLA分型检测的主要障碍。2021年，牛津纳米孔技术公司（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）推出了高精度测序套件14和MinION流细胞模型R10.4.1，据报道其测序准确率可达到99%。本研究的目的是验证该新型高精度测序套件在HLA基因分型中的应用，并结合全基因HLA PCR检测方法。同时，还通过与历史数据（使用R9.4、R10.3和R10.4等旧版流细胞模型获得的数据）进行比较，评估每次新版本发布所带来的测序性能逐步提升。该工作流程基于数据吞吐量、序列质量和准确性以及HLA基因分型分辨率进行了验证。首先，使用内部参考面板中的42个样本（代表常见的HLA等位基因组）进行了初步验证，随后分析了自实施以来111个测序批次所获得的数据，以评估检测性能并定义质量控制指标，用于评估不同批次间的变异性并监控质量。此外，还讨论了MinION流细胞稳定性及使用过程中出现的挑战，以及条形码污染的评估。本研究的发现突出了ONT测序套件14/R10.4.1在HLA基因分型中的优势，并探讨了其在常规诊断HLA实验室中的实施考虑。

title: Harnessing non-standard nucleic acids for highly sensitive icosaplex (20-plex) detection of microbial threats.
journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
abstract: Environmental surveillance and clinical diagnostics heavily rely on the polymerase chain reaction (PCR) for target detection. A growing list of microbial threats warrants new PCR-based detection methods that are highly sensitive, specific, and multiplexable. Here, we introduce a PCR-based icosaplex (20-plex) assay for detecting 18 enteropathogen and two antimicrobial resistance genes. This multiplexed PCR assay leverages the self-avoiding molecular recognition system (SAMRS) to avoid primer dimer formation, the artificially expanded genetic information system (AEGIS) for amplification specificity, and next-generation sequencing for amplicon identification. We benchmarked this assay using a low-cost, portable sequencing platform (Oxford Nanopore) on wastewater, soil, and human stool samples. Using parallelized multi-target TaqMan Array Cards (TAC) to benchmark performance of the 20-plex assay, there was 74% agreement on positive calls and 97% agreement on negative calls. Additionally, we show how sequencing information from the 20-plex can be used to further classify allelic variants of genes and distinguish sub-species. The strategy presented offers sensitive, affordable, and robust multiplex detection that can be used to support efforts in wastewater-based epidemiology, environmental monitoring, and human/animal diagnostics.
authors: Hinako Kawabe, Luran Manfio, Sebastian Magana Pena, Nicolette A Zhou, Kevin M Bradley, Cen Chen, Chris McLendon, Steven A Benner, Karen Levy, Zunyi Yang, Jorge A Marchand, Erica R Fuhrmeister

ai.TLDR: 环境监测和临床诊断高度依赖聚合酶链反应（PCR）进行目标检测。随着微生物威胁的增加，需要更敏感、特异且可多重检测的PCR方法。本文介绍了一种基于PCR的20重（icosaplex）检测方法，用于检测18种肠道病原体和两种抗生素耐药基因。
ai.translation: 环境监测和临床诊断高度依赖聚合酶链反应（PCR）进行目标检测。随着越来越多的微生物威胁出现，需要新的基于PCR的检测方法，这些方法应具有高度的敏感性、特异性和多重检测能力。在此，我们介绍了一种基于PCR的20重（icosaplex）检测方法，用于检测18种肠道病原体和两种抗生素耐药基因。这种多重PCR检测方法利用了自我避免分子识别系统（SAMRS）以避免引物二聚体的形成，利用了人工扩展遗传信息系统（AEGIS）以提高扩增特异性，并结合下一代测序技术用于扩增子的鉴定。我们使用低成本、便携式测序平台（Oxford Nanopore）对污水、土壤和人类粪便样本进行了基准测试。通过并行化的多靶标TaqMan Array Cards（TAC）对20重检测方法的性能进行了评估，结果显示阳性结果的一致性为74%，阴性结果的一致性为97%。此外，我们还展示了如何利用20重检测的测序信息进一步分类基因的等位变异，并区分亚种。所提出的策略提供了一种敏感、经济且稳健的多重检测方法，可用于支持基于污水的流行病学、环境监测以及人类和动物诊断。

title: AsaruSim: a single-cell and spatial RNA-Seq Nanopore long-reads simulation workflow
abstract:
MotivationThe combination of long-read sequencing technologies like Oxford Nanopore with single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNAseq) assays enables the detailed exploration of transcriptomic complexity, including isoform detection and quantification, by capturing full-length cDNAs. However, challenges remain, including the lack of advanced simulation tools that can effectively mimic the unique complexities of scRNAseq long-read datasets. Such tools are essential for the evaluation and optimization of isoform detection methods dedicated to single-cell long read studies.

ResultsWe developed AsaruSim, a workflow that simulates synthetic single-cell long-read Nanopore datasets, closely mimicking real experimental data. AsaruSim employs a multi-step process that includes the creation of a synthetic UMI count matrix, generation of perfect reads, optional PCR amplification, introduction of sequencing errors, and comprehensive quality control reporting. Applied to a dataset of human peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs), AsaruSim accurately reproduced experimental read characteristics.

Availability and implementationThe source code and full documentation are available at: https://github.com/GenomiqueENS/AsaruSim.

Data availabilityThe 1,090 Human PBMCs count matrix and cell type annotation files are accessible on zenodo under DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.12731408.
authors: Hamraoui, A.; Thomas-Chollier, M.; Jourdren, L.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术与scRNAseq结合可深入解析转录组复杂性，但缺乏有效模拟工具。AsaruSim通过多步骤流程成功模拟单细胞长读长数据，准确复现实验特征。
ai.translation:
Motivation：长读长测序技术（如Oxford Nanopore）与单细胞RNA测序（scRNAseq）检测方法的结合，能够通过捕获全长cDNA深入解析转录组复杂性，包括亚型检测与定量分析。然而仍存在挑战，包括缺乏能有效模拟scRNAseq长读长数据集独特复杂性的先进模拟工具。此类工具对评估和优化针对单细胞长读长研究的亚型检测方法至关重要。

Results：我们开发了AsaruSim，这是一个模拟合成单细胞长读长Nanopore数据集的工作流程，能够紧密模拟真实实验数据。AsaruSim采用多步骤流程，包括合成UMI计数矩阵的创建、完美读段的生成、可选的PCR扩增、测序错误的引入以及全面的质量控制报告。当应用于人类外周血单核细胞（PBMCs）数据集时，AsaruSim准确复现了实验读段特征。

Availability and implementation：源代码和完整文档可在https://github.com/GenomiqueENS/AsaruSim获取。

Data availability：1,090个Human PBMCs计数矩阵和细胞类型注释文件可通过Zenodo（DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.12731408）访问。

title: Epigenomic, transcriptomic and proteomic characterizations of reference samples.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
abstract: A variety of newly developed next-generation sequencing technologies are making their way rapidly into the research and clinical applications, for which accuracy and cross-lab reproducibility are critical, and reference standards are much needed. Our previous multicenter studies under the SEQC-2 umbrella using a breast cancer cell line with paired B-cell line have produced a large amount of different genomic data including whole genome sequencing (Illumina, PacBio, Nanopore), HiC, and scRNA-seq with detailed analyses on somatic mutations, single-nucleotide variations (SNVs), and structural variations (SVs). However, there is still a lack of well-characterized reference materials which include epigenomic and proteomic data. Here we further performed ATAC-seq, Methyl-seq, RNA-seq, and proteomic analyses and provided a comprehensive catalog of the epigenomic landscape, which overlapped with the transcriptomes and proteomes for the two cell lines. We identified >7,700 peptide isoforms, where the majority (95%) of the genes had a single peptide isoform. Protein expression of the transcripts overlapping CGIs were much higher than the protein expression of the non-CGI transcripts in both cell lines. We further demonstrated the evidence that certain SNVs were incorporated into mutated peptides. We observed that open chromatin regions had low methylation which were largely regulated by CG density, where CG-rich regions had more accessible chromatin, low methylation, and higher gene and protein expression. The CG-poor regions had higher repressive epigenetic regulations (higher DNA methylation) and less open chromatin, resulting in a cell line specific methylation and gene expression patterns. Our studies provide well-defined reference materials consisting of two cell lines with genomic, epigenomic, transcriptomic, scRNA-seq and proteomic characterizations which can serve as standards for validating and benchmarking not only on various omics assays, but also on bioinformatics methods. It will be a valuable resource for both research and clinical communities.
authors: Chirag Nepal, Wanqiu Chen, Zhong Chen, John A Wrobel, Ling Xie, Wenjing Liao, Chunlin Xiao, Adrew Farmer, Malcolm Moos, Wendell Jones, Xian Chen, Charles Wang

ai.TLDR: 随着新一代测序技术的快速发展，其在研究和临床应用中的准确性及跨实验室可重复性变得至关重要。本文通过整合多种组学数据，构建了两个细胞系的参考材料，涵盖基因组、表观组、转录组、单细胞RNA测序和蛋白质组数据，为多组学分析和生物信息学方法提供了标准化基准。
ai.translation: 多种新开发的新一代测序技术正在迅速进入研究和临床应用领域，其中准确性和跨实验室的可重复性是关键，因此需要大量的参考标准。我们之前在SEQC-2框架下进行的多中心研究，使用了一种与B细胞系配对的乳腺癌细胞系，产生了大量不同的基因组数据，包括全基因组测序（Illumina、PacBio、Nanopore）、HiC和单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq），并进行了详细的体细胞突变、单核苷酸变异（SNVs）和结构变异（SVs）分析。然而，目前仍缺乏包含表观组和蛋白质组数据的高质量参考材料。因此，我们进一步进行了ATAC-seq、Methyl-seq、RNA-seq和蛋白质组分析，并提供了两个细胞系的全面表观组景观目录，该目录与转录组和蛋白质组数据重叠。我们鉴定了超过7,700种肽异构体，其中大多数（95%）的基因仅有一个肽异构体。在两个细胞系中，与CGIs（CpG岛）重叠的转录本的蛋白质表达水平显著高于非CGI转录本的蛋白质表达水平。我们进一步证明了某些SNVs被整合到突变肽中。我们观察到开放染色质区域具有较低的甲基化水平，这些区域主要由CG密度调控，其中CG丰富的区域具有更易接近的染色质、较低的甲基化水平和更高的基因和蛋白质表达水平。而CG贫乏的区域则具有更高的抑制性表观遗传调控（更高的DNA甲基化）和较少的开放染色质，导致细胞系特异性的甲基化和基因表达模式。我们的研究提供了两个细胞系的明确参考材料，包括基因组、表观组、转录组、单细胞RNA测序和蛋白质组的特征，可用于验证和基准测试各种组学检测方法以及生物信息学方法。这将为研究和临床社区提供宝贵的资源。

title: Solid-State Nanopore Real Time Assay for Monitoring Cas9 Endonuclease Reactivity
abstract: The field of nanopore sensing is now moving beyond nucleic acid sequencing. An exciting new avenue is the use of nanopore platforms for the monitoring of biochemical reactions. Biological nanopores have been used to investigate the dynamics of enzymatic reactions but solid-state nanopore approaches have lagged. This is partially due to the necessity of using higher salt conditions (e.g. 4M LiCl) to improve the signal-to-noise ratio. These conditions are often incompatible with monitoring biological activities such as restriction enzyme and CRISPR-Cas9 endonuclease activities, as their abilities to digest DNA are largely abolished under high salt conditions. We pioneered a polymer electrolyte based solid-state nanopore approach that can maintain a high signal-to-noise ratio even at a physiologically relevant salt concentration. Based on this, we report monitoring the endonuclease activities at physiological salt conditions in real time with a polymer electrolyte nanopore. We successfully monitor the dsDNA cleavage activity of the restriction enzyme SwaI in in a range of digestion buffers and the off-target activity of CRISPR-Cas9 RNP endonuclease in the presence of single base pair mismatches. This approach enables solid-state nanopore technology for the dynamic monitoring of biochemical reactions at single molecule resolution.
authors: Chau, C. C.; Weckman, N.; Thomson, E. E.; Actis, P.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔传感技术正从核酸测序扩展至生化反应监测，传统固态纳米孔因高盐条件限制难以实现生物活性检测。本研究通过聚合物电解质固态纳米孔技术，在生理盐浓度下实现酶活性实时监测，成功检测限制性内切酶SwaI和CRISPR-Cas9 RNP的切割活性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔传感技术正突破核酸测序的局限，向生化反应监测领域拓展。尽管生物纳米孔已被用于研究酶反应动力学，但固态纳米孔技术因需要高盐条件（如4M LiCl）而进展缓慢。这种高盐环境会抑制限制性内切酶和CRISPR-Cas9内切酶的DNA切割活性。我们率先开发了一种基于聚合物电解质的固态纳米孔方法，可在生理相关盐浓度下维持高信噪比。基于此技术，我们首次在生理盐条件下实时监测到内切酶活性，成功检测了限制性内切酶SwaI在多种消化缓冲液中的dsDNA切割活性，并在单碱基错配存在时监测到CRISPR-Cas9 RNP内切酶的脱靶活性。该方法使固态纳米孔技术能够以单分子分辨率动态监测生化反应。

title: First Indonesian Nasopharyngeal Cancer Whole Epigenome Sequencing Identify Tumour Suppressor CpG Methylation.
abstract:
INTRODUCTION: Nasopharyngeal cancer (NPC) is a multifaceted disease characterized by genetic and epigenetic modifications. While Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) infection is a known risk factor, recent studies highlight the significant role of DNA methylation in NPC pathogenesis. Aberrant methylation, particularly at CpG sites, can silence tumour suppressor genes, promoting uncontrolled cell growth. This study aims to analyse the methylation patterns in Indonesian NPC patients through whole-epigenome sequencing.

METHODS: Seven clinical nasopharyngeal cancer samples were collected and confirmed histopathologically. DNA was extracted, sequenced using Oxford Nanopore technology, and aligned to the GRCh38 human reference genome. Methylation analysis was performed using modkit and statistical analysis with R software. Enriched pathways and processes were identified using ClusterProfiler in R, and gene overlap analysis was conducted.

RESULTS: The analysis identified both globally hypermethylated and hypomethylated NPC samples. Key tumour suppressor genes, such as 

DISCUSSION: This study provides comprehensive insights into the epigenetic landscape of NPC, underscoring the role of CpG methylation in tumour suppressor gene silencing. These findings pave the way for targeted therapies and highlight the need for region-specific approaches in NPC management.
authors: Handoko, Marlinda Adham, Lisnawati Rachmadi, Demak Lumban Tobing, Asmarinah, Fadilah, Wei Dai, Anne Wing Mui Lee, Soehartati A Gondhowiardjo

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过全表观基因组测序分析了印尼鼻咽癌患者的甲基化模式，揭示了DNA甲基化在肿瘤发生中的关键作用。研究发现，鼻咽癌样本中存在全局性高甲基化和低甲基化现象，为靶向治疗和区域化管理提供了新思路。
ai.translation:
引言：鼻咽癌（NPC）是一种由遗传和表观遗传修饰引起的复杂疾病。尽管EB病毒（EBV）感染是已知的风险因素，但最近的研究强调了DNA甲基化在NPC发病机制中的重要作用。异常的甲基化，特别是在CpG位点，可以沉默肿瘤抑制基因，促进不受控制的细胞生长。本研究旨在通过全表观基因组测序分析印尼NPC患者的甲基化模式。

方法：收集了七例临床鼻咽癌样本，并通过组织病理学确认。提取DNA后，使用Oxford Nanopore技术进行测序，并与GRCh38人类参考基因组比对。使用modkit进行甲基化分析，使用R软件进行统计分析。通过R中的ClusterProfiler识别富集的通路和过程，并进行了基因重叠分析。

结果：分析结果显示，NPC样本中存在全局性高甲基化和低甲基化现象。关键的肿瘤抑制基因，如……

讨论：本研究为NPC的表观遗传景观提供了全面的见解，强调了CpG甲基化在肿瘤抑制基因沉默中的作用。这些发现为靶向治疗奠定了基础，并突出了在NPC管理中采用区域化方法的必要性。

title: Validation of a comprehensive long-read sequencing platform for broad clinical genetic diagnosis.
abstract: Though short read high-throughput sequencing, commonly known as Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS), has revolutionized genomics and genetic testing, there is no single genetic test that can accurately detect single nucleotide variants (SNVs), small insertions/deletions (indels), complex structural variants (SVs), repetitive genomic alterations, and variants in genes with highly homologous pseudogenes. The implementation of a unified comprehensive technique that can simultaneously detect a broad spectrum of genetic variation would substantially increase efficiency of the diagnostic process. The current study evaluated the clinical utility of long-read sequencing as a comprehensive genetic test for diagnosis of inherited conditions. Using Oxford Nanopore Technologies long read nanopore sequencing, we successfully developed and validated a clinically deployable integrated bioinformatics pipeline that utilizes a combination of eight publicly available variant callers. A concordance assessment comparing the known variant calls from a well-characterized, benchmarked sample called NA12878 from the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) with the variants detected by our pipeline for this sample, determined that the analytical sensitivity of our pipeline was 98.87% and the analytical specificity exceeded 99.99%. We then evaluated our pipeline's ability to detect 167 clinically relevant variants from 72 clinical samples. This set of variants consisted of 80 SNVs, 26 indels, 32 SVs, and 29 repeat expansions, including 14 variants in genes with highly homologous pseudogenes. The overall detection concordance for these clinically relevant variants was 99.4% (95% CI: 99.7%-99.9%). Importantly, in addition to detecting known clinically relevant variants, in four cases, our pipeline yielded valuable additional information in support of clinical diagnoses that could not have been established using short-read NGS alone. Our findings suggest that long-read sequencing is successful in identifying diverse genomic alterations and that our pipeline functions well as the basis for a single diagnostic test for patients with suspected genetic disease.
authors: Siddhartha Sen, Hillary P Handler, Alec Victorsen, Zach Flaten, Aidan Ellison, Todd P Knutson, Sarah A Munro, Ryan J Martinez, Charles John Billington, Jennifer J Laffin, Sarah Bray, Pawel Mroz, Sophia Yohe, Andrew C Nelson, Matthew Bower, Bharat Thyagarajan

ai.TLDR: 尽管下一代测序（NGS）技术革新了基因组学和遗传检测，但目前尚无单一的遗传检测方法能准确检测单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、小插入/缺失（indels）、复杂结构变异（SVs）、重复基因组改变以及高度同源假基因中的变异。本研究评估了长读长测序作为综合遗传检测方法在诊断遗传病中的临床应用价值。
ai.translation: 尽管短读长的高通量测序，通常称为下一代测序（NGS），已经革新了基因组学和遗传检测，但目前尚无单一的遗传检测方法能够准确检测单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、小插入/缺失（indels）、复杂结构变异（SVs）、重复基因组改变以及在高度同源假基因中的变异。实现一种统一的、全面的技术，能够同时检测广泛的遗传变异，将显著提高诊断过程的效率。本研究评估了长读长测序作为综合遗传检测方法在诊断遗传病中的临床应用价值。我们使用牛津纳米孔技术的长读长纳米孔测序，成功开发并验证了一个可用于临床部署的集成生物信息学流程，该流程结合了八个公开可用的变异检测工具。通过比较一个经过良好表征和基准测试的样本NA12878（来自美国国家标准与技术研究院NIST）已知的变异检测结果与我们流程检测到的变异，确定了我们流程的分析灵敏度为98.87%，分析特异性超过99.99%。随后，我们评估了我们的流程检测72个临床样本中167个临床相关变异的能力。这些变异包括80个SNVs、26个indels、32个SVs和29个重复扩展，其中包括14个在高度同源假基因中的变异。这些临床相关变异的总体检测一致性为99.4%（95%置信区间：99.7%-99.9%）。重要的是，除了检测已知的临床相关变异外，在四个案例中，我们的流程还提供了有价值的信息，支持临床诊断，而这些信息无法仅通过短读长NGS获得。我们的研究结果表明，长读长测序在识别多样化的基因组变异方面是成功的，并且我们的流程作为单一诊断测试的基础，对疑似遗传病的患者具有良好的功能。

title: Labor- and cost-effective long-read amplicon sequencing using a plasmid analysis service: Application to transposon-inserted alleles in Japanese morning glory
abstract:
The sequencing of PCR fragments amplified from specific regions of genomes is a fundamental technique in molecular genetics. Sanger sequencing is commonly used for this analysis; however, amplicon sequencing utilizing next-generation sequencing has become widespread. In addition, long-read amplicon sequencing, using Nanopore or PacBio sequencers to analyze long PCR fragments, has emerged, although it is often more expensive than Sanger sequencing.

Recently, low-cost commercial services for full-length plasmid DNA sequencing using Nanopore sequencers have been launched in several countries, including Japan. This study explored the potential of these services to sequence long PCR fragments without the need for cloning into plasmid DNA. PCR fragments of 4-11 kb, amplified from the DFR-B gene involved in the biosynthesis of anthocyanin, with or without Tpn1 transposons in Japanese morning glory (Ipomoea nil), were circularized using T4 ligase and analyzed as templates. Although some inaccuracies in the length of homopolymer stretches were observed, the remaining sequences were obtained without significant errors. This method could potentially reduce the labor and costs associated with cloning, primer synthesis, and sequence assembly, thus making it a viable option for the analysis of long PCR fragment sequences. Moreover, this study reconfirmed that Tpn1 transposons are major mutagens in I. nil and demonstrated their transposition in the Violet line, a long-used standard in plant physiology.
authors: Nakagawa, S.; Hoshino, A.; Park, K.-I.

ai.TLDR: PCR片段测序技术在分子遗传学中具有基础地位，传统Sanger测序逐渐被下一代测序技术取代。本研究验证了无需质粒克隆的长PCR片段测序方法，通过Tpn1转座子和T4连接酶实现循环化分析，有效降低了实验成本。该方法同时证实了Tpn1转座子在植物生理研究中的突变作用。
ai.translation:
从基因组特定区域扩增的PCR片段测序是分子遗传学的基础技术。Sanger测序法曾是主流分析手段，但随着下一代测序技术的普及，扩增子测序已广泛应用。此外，利用Nanopore或PacBio测序仪分析长PCR片段的长读长测序技术虽成本较高，但逐渐发展起来。

近期日本等国家已推出基于Nanopore测序仪的全长质粒DNA测序商业服务。本研究探索了无需质粒克隆即可分析长PCR片段的潜力。通过T4连接酶将日本牵牛花（Ipomoea nil）DFR-B基因（参与花青素生物合成）扩增的4-11kb PCR片段（含或不含Tpn1转座子）进行环化处理，并作为模板进行分析。尽管观察到同聚物序列长度存在部分误差，但其余序列均未出现显著错误。该方法可有效降低克隆、引物合成和序列组装的劳动强度与成本，成为长PCR片段测序的可行方案。此外，本研究再次证实Tpn、1转座子是I. nil的主要致突变因子，并在植物生理学经典标准品Violet line中验证了其转座活性。

title: Choosing the most suitable NGS technology to combine with a standardized viral enrichment protocol for obtaining complete avian orthoreovirus genomes from metagenomic samples.
abstract: Since viruses are obligate intracellular pathogens, sequencing their genomes results in metagenomic data from both the virus and the host. Virology researchers are constantly seeking new, cost-effective strategies and bioinformatic pipelines for the retrieval of complete viral genomes from these metagenomic samples. Avian orthoreoviruses (ARVs) pose a significant and growing threat to the poultry industry and frequently cause economic losses associated with disease in production birds. Currently available commercial vaccines are ineffective against new ARV variants and ARV outbreaks are increasing worldwide, requiring whole genome sequencing (WGS) to characterize strains that evade vaccines. This study compares the effectiveness of long-read and short-read sequencing technologies for obtaining ARV complete genomes. We used eight clinical isolates of ARV, each previously processed using our published viral genome enrichment protocol. Additionally, we evaluate three assembly methods to determine which provided the most complete and reliable whole genomes:
authors: Sonsiray Álvarez-Narváez, Telvin L Harrell, Islam Nour, Sujit K Mohanty, Steven J Conrad

ai.TLDR: 由于病毒是严格的细胞内寄生生物，对其基因组进行测序会产生病毒和宿主的宏基因组数据。研究比较了长读长和短读长测序技术在获取禽正呼肠孤病毒（ARV）完整基因组方面的有效性。研究使用了八种临床分离株，并评估了三种组装方法以确定最完整和可靠的全基因组。
ai.translation: 由于病毒是严格的细胞内寄生生物，对其基因组进行测序会产生来自病毒和宿主的宏基因组数据。病毒学研究者一直在寻求新的、成本效益高的策略和生物信息学流程，以从这些宏基因组样本中提取完整的病毒基因组。禽正呼肠孤病毒（ARVs）对家禽产业构成重大且日益增长的威胁，并经常导致生产鸟类疾病相关的经济损失。目前的商业疫苗对新的ARV变种无效，ARV爆发在全球范围内不断增加，需要全基因组测序（WGS）来表征逃避疫苗的菌株。本研究比较了长读长和短读长测序技术在获取ARV完整基因组方面的有效性。我们使用了八种ARV临床分离株，每种分离株之前都已按照我们发表的病毒基因组富集协议进行处理。此外，我们评估了三种组装方法，以确定哪种方法能提供最完整和可靠的全基因组。

title: Evaluation of a next generation sequencing assay for Hepatitis B antiviral drug resistance on the oxford nanopore system.
journal: Journal of clinical virology : the official publication of the Pan American Society for Clinical Virology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Next-generation sequencing (NGS) for Hepatitis B virus (HBV) antiviral resistance (AVR) testing is a highly sensitive diagnostic method, able to detect low-level mutant subpopulations. Our clinical virology laboratory previously transitioned from DNA hybridization (INNO-LiPA) to NGS, initially with the GS Junior System and subsequently the MiSeq. The Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) sequencing system was evaluated for HBV resistance testing, with regards to sequencing accuracy and turn-around time.

METHODS: We performed amplicon sequencing of the HBV polymerase gene from patient plasma and external quality assessment (EQA) samples on the MiSeq Reagent Nano Kit v2 and GridION ONT with R10.4.1 flowcells. Mutational analysis and genotyping were performed by DeepChek®Assay-HBV (version 2.0).

RESULTS: A total of 49 patient samples and 15 EQA samples were tested on both the MiSeq and ONT. There was high agreement for both patient and EQA samples between the MiSeq and ONT systems, with regards to total drug resistance mutations detected and total patient sample agreement, 68/70 (97 %) and 47/49 (96 %), respectively.

CONCLUSION: The ONT NGS platform provided accurate HBV AVR results, with improved turn-around times. Sequencing error rates at AVR codons were below 1 %.
authors: Michael Payne, Gordon Ritchie, Tanya Lawson, Matthew Young, Willson Jang, Aleksandra Stefanovic, Marc G Romney, Nancy Matic, Christopher F Lowe

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)测序系统在乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）抗病毒耐药性（AVR）检测中的应用，结果显示其在检测准确性和周转时间方面表现优异。ONT平台在检测HBV耐药突变方面与MiSeq系统高度一致，且测序错误率低于1%。
ai.translation:
背景：下一代测序（NGS）用于乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）抗病毒耐药性（AVR）检测是一种高度敏感的诊断方法，能够检测低水平的突变亚群。我们的临床病毒学实验室之前从DNA杂交（INNO-LiPA）转向NGS，最初使用GS Junior系统，随后使用MiSeq。评估了Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）测序系统在HBV耐药性检测中的应用，重点关注测序准确性和周转时间。

方法：我们在MiSeq Reagent Nano Kit v2和GridION ONT（使用R10.4.1流细胞）上对患者血浆和外部质量评估（EQA）样本中的HBV聚合酶基因进行扩增子测序。突变分析和基因分型通过DeepChek®Assay-HBV（版本2.0）进行。

结果：在MiSeq和ONT上共测试了49个患者样本和15个EQA样本。MiSeq和ONT系统在检测总药物耐药性突变和总患者样本一致性方面表现出高度一致，分别为68/70（97%）和47/49（96%）。

结论：ONT NGS平台提供了准确的HBV AVR结果，并提高了周转时间。在AVR密码子处的测序错误率低于1%。

title: The performance of nanopore sequencing in rapid detection of pathogens and antimicrobial resistance genes in blood cultures.
abstract: Rapid identification of causative microbes and their resistance is essential for effective monitoring, treating, and controlling of infectious diseases. Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) is capable of generating and analyzing data in real time, its potential in clinically detecting pathogens and antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes and subsequently predicting resistance phenotypes needs to be evaluated. In this study, positive blood cultures from 67 patients with bloodstream infection were collected for matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization-time of flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF-MS), ONT next generation sequencing (NGS) with a sequencing time limit of 1 h, and Illumina NGS. Antimicrobial susceptibility test was also performed. ONT NGS achieved 100 % coincidence rate (67/67) with MALDI-TOF-MS and Illumina NGS in pathogen identification, the sensitivity reached 100 %. Both ONT and Illumina NGS detected a high number of AMR genes (584 and 585, respectively). The consistent rate of ONT NGS against Illumina NGS for AMR genes detection reached 91.79 % (537/585). When considering antimicrobial susceptibility test results as the standard to evaluate the prediction value of ONT NGS in detecting AMR genes, ONT NGS showed competitive sensitivity (77.4 % vs 77.3 %), specificity (83.3 % vs 83.7 %), and accuracy (80.4 % vs 80.4 %) with Illumina NGS. Furthermore, the average time cost of ONT NGS (3.5 h) was significantly shorter than Illumina NGS (50.5 h) and MALDI-TOF-MS + antimicrobial susceptibility test (66-96 h). These findings highlight the potential of ONT NGS in rapidly and accurately detecting pathogens and AMR genes in clinical practices, which can assist in predicting resistance phenotypes and subsequently improving the diagnosis and treatment of infectious diseases.
authors: Wentao Gu, Jing Wang, Xiaohua Qin, Meilin Duan, Minggui Wang, Yuanlin Guan, Xiaogang Xu

ai.TLDR: 快速识别致病微生物及其耐药性对感染性疾病的监测、治疗和控制至关重要。本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)下一代测序技术在临床检测病原体和耐药基因方面的潜力。结果显示，ONT NGS在病原体鉴定和耐药基因检测方面表现出高灵敏度和特异性，并且在时间成本上显著优于其他方法。
ai.translation: 快速识别致病微生物及其耐药性对感染性疾病的监测、治疗和控制至关重要。Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)能够实时生成和分析数据，其在临床检测病原体和抗菌耐药性（AMR）基因以及随后预测耐药表型方面的潜力需要评估。本研究收集了67名血液感染患者的阳性血液培养样本，用于基质辅助激光解吸离子化飞行时间质谱（MALDI-TOF-MS）、ONT下一代测序（NGS）（测序时间限制为1小时）以及Illumina NGS。同时进行了抗微生物敏感性测试。ONT NGS在病原体鉴定方面与MALDI-TOF-MS和Illumina NGS的吻合率为100%（67/67），灵敏度达到100%。ONT和Illumina NGS均检测到大量耐药基因（分别为584和585个）。ONT NGS与Illumina NGS在耐药基因检测方面的一致性达到91.79%（537/585）。当将抗微生物敏感性测试结果作为标准来评估ONT NGS在检测耐药基因方面的预测价值时，ONT NGS在灵敏度（77.4% vs 77.3%）、特异性（83.3% vs 83.7%）和准确性（80.4% vs 80.4%）方面均与Illumina NGS具有竞争力。此外，ONT NGS的平均时间成本（3.5小时）显著短于Illumina NGS（50.5小时）和MALDI-TOF-MS + 抗微生物敏感性测试（66-96小时）。这些发现突显了ONT NGS在临床实践中快速且准确检测病原体和耐药基因的潜力，有助于预测耐药表型，从而改善感染性疾病的诊断和治疗。

title: Culture and amplification-free nanopore sequencing for rapid detection of pathogens and antimicrobial resistance genes from urine
journal: European Journal of Clinical Microbiology & Infectious Diseases
abstract:
### Purpose

Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) are among the most prevalent infections globally. Every year, approximately 150 million people are diagnosed with UTIs worldwide. The current state-of-the-art diagnostic methods are culture-based and have a turnaround time of 2–4 days for pathogen identification and susceptibility testing.

### Methods

This study first establishes an optical density culture-based method for spiking healthy urine samples with the six most prevalent uropathogens. Urine samples were spiked at clinically significant concentrations of 103-105 CFU/ml. Three DNA extraction kits (BioStic, PowerFood, and Blood and Tissue) were investigated based on the DNA yield, average processing time, elution volume, and the average cost incurred per extraction. After DNA extraction, the samples were sequenced using MinION and Flongle flow cells.

### Results

The Blood and Tissue kit outperformed the other kits based on the investigated parameters. Using nanopore sequencing, all the pathogens and corresponding genes were only identified at a spike concentration of 105 CFU/ml, achieved after 10 min and 3 hours of sequencing, respectively. However, some pathogens and antibiotic-resistance genes (ARG) could be identified from spikes at 103 colony formation units (CFU/mL). The overall turnaround time was five hours, from sample preparation to sequencing-based identification of pathogen ID and antimicrobial resistance genes.

### Conclusion

This study demonstrates excellent promise in reducing the time required for informed antibiotic administration from 48 to 72 h to five hours, thereby reducing the number of empirical doses and increasing the chance of saving lives.
authors: Anurag Basavaraj Bellankimath, Crystal Chapagain, ... Rafi Ahmad
citation: Bellankimath, A.B., Chapagain, C., Branders, S. et al. Culture and amplification-free nanopore sequencing for rapid detection of pathogens and antimicrobial resistance genes from urine. Eur J Clin Microbiol Infect Dis 43 , 2177–2190 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10096-024-04929-1
description: Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) are among the most prevalent infections globally. Every year, approximately 150 million people are diagnosed...

ai.TLDR: 尿路感染（UTI）是全球最常见的感染之一，传统培养法需2-4天才能完成病原体鉴定和药敏测试。本研究通过优化DNA提取流程和纳米孔测序技术，将诊断时间缩短至5小时，显著提升临床决策效率。
ai.translation:
### 目的
尿路感染（UTIs）是全球最常见的感染之一。每年约有1.5亿人被诊断为UTIs。目前最先进的诊断方法基于培养法，病原体鉴定和药敏测试的周转时间需要2-4天。

### 方法
本研究首先建立了一种基于光密度的培养法，将六种最常见的泌尿系统病原体加入健康尿液样本中。尿液样本在临床显著浓度（10^3-10^5 CFU/ml）下进行 spiked。基于DNA产量、平均处理时间、洗脱体积和每次提取的平均成本，调查了三种DNA提取试剂盒（BioStic、PowerFood和Blood and Tissue）。DNA提取后，使用MinION和Flongle流动细胞进行测序。

### 结果
根据调查参数，Blood and Tissue试剂盒表现最佳。使用纳米孔测序，所有病原体和对应基因仅在10^5 CFU/ml的 spiked 浓度下被识别，分别在10分钟和3小时的测序后完成。然而，某些病原体和抗生素耐药基因（ARG）可在10^3 colony formation units (CFU/mL)的 spiked 浓度下被识别。整体周转时间为5小时，从样本制备到基于测序的病原体ID和抗菌耐药基因识别。

### 结论
本研究展示了将知情抗生素使用时间从48-72小时缩短至5小时的显著潜力，从而减少经验性剂量并提高挽救生命的几率。

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔DRS技术识别长链非编码RNA（lncRNAs）并绘制全转录组图谱，揭示了表观遗传修饰和转录后加工在拟南芥发育阶段中lncRNA表达和功能的重要性。该研究为植物lncRNA研究领域的发展做出了贡献。
ai.translation: 背景：长链非编码RNA（lncRNAs）在多种生物过程中发挥重要作用，包括植物的发育阶段。结果：在这里，我们利用纳米孔DRS技术来识别lncRNAs并绘制全转录组图谱。结论：这些发现突显了表观遗传修饰和转录后加工在塑造lncRNA表达及其在拟南芥发育阶段中的功能中的重要性，为植物lncRNA研究领域的发展做出了贡献。临床试验编号：不适用。

title: Brownian motion data augmentation: a method to push neural network performance on nanopore sensors
abstract: 1Nanopores are highly sensitive sensors that have achieved commercial success in DNA/RNA sequencing, with potential applications in protein sequencing and biomarker identification. Solid-state nanopores, in particular, face challenges such as instability and low signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs), which lead scientists to adopt data-driven methods for nanopore signal analysis, although data acquisition remains restrictive. In this paper, we augment training samples by simulating virtual Brownian motion based on dynamic models in the literature. We apply this method to a publicly available dataset of a classification task containing nanopore reads of DNA with encoded barcodes. A neural network named QuipuNet was previously published for this dataset, and we demonstrate that our augmentation method produces a noticeable increase in QuipuNets accuracy. Furthermore, we introduce a novel neural network named YupanaNet, which achieves greater accuracy (95.8%) than QuipuNet (94.6%) on the same dataset. YupanaNet benefits from both the enhanced generalization provided by Brownian motion data augmentation and the incorporation of novel architectures, including skip connections and a self-attention mechanism.
authors: Kipen, J.; Jalden, J.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术在DNA/RNA领域取得商业成功，但固态纳米孔存在稳定性差和信噪比低的问题。本文通过模拟布朗运动增强训练数据，显著提升了QuipuNet模型的准确率，并提出YupanaNet模型实现95.8%的更高准确率，结合了跳连结构和自注意力机制。
ai.translation: 纳米孔（Nanopores）是一种高灵敏度传感器，已在DNA/RNA测序领域实现商业化应用，其潜在应用包括蛋白质测序和生物标志物识别。固态纳米孔（Solid-state nanopores）面临稳定性差和信噪比（SNR）低等挑战，导致科学家采用数据驱动方法分析纳米孔信号，但数据采集仍存在限制。本文通过基于文献动态模型模拟虚拟布朗运动（Brownian motion）来扩充训练样本，将该方法应用于公开的DNA纳米孔测序数据集（包含编码条形码的reads）。此前已发表用于该数据集的神经网络模型QuipuNet，我们证明该数据增强方法显著提升了QuipuNet的准确率。此外，我们提出新型神经网络YupanaNet，在相同数据集上实现95.8%的准确率（高于QuipuNet的94.6%）。YupanaNet结合了布朗运动数据增强带来的泛化能力提升，以及跳连（skip connections）和自注意力机制（self-attention mechanism）等新型架构。

title: The promising role of nanopore sequencing in cancer diagnostics and treatment.
abstract: Cancer arises from genetic alterations that impact both the genome and transcriptome. The utilization of nanopore sequencing offers a powerful means of detecting these alterations due to its unique capacity for long single-molecule sequencing. In the context of DNA analysis, nanopore sequencing excels in identifying structural variations (SVs), copy number variations (CNVs), gene fusions within SVs, and mutations in specific genes, including those involving DNA modifications and DNA adducts. In the field of RNA research, nanopore sequencing proves invaluable in discerning differentially expressed transcripts, uncovering novel elements linked to transcriptional regulation, and identifying alternative splicing events and RNA modifications at the single-molecule level. Furthermore, nanopore sequencing extends its reach to detecting microorganisms, encompassing bacteria and viruses, that are intricately associated with tumorigenesis and the development of cancer. Consequently, the application prospects of nanopore sequencing in tumor diagnosis and personalized treatment are expansive, encompassing tasks such as tumor identification and classification, the tailoring of treatment strategies, and the screening of prospective patients. In essence, this technology stands poised to unearth novel mechanisms underlying tumorigenesis while providing dependable support for the diagnosis and treatment of cancer.
authors: Xinming Su, Qingyuan Lin, Bin Liu, Chuntao Zhou, Liuyi Lu, Zihao Lin, Jiahua Si, Yuemin Ding, Shiwei Duan

ai.TLDR: 癌症源于影响基因组和转录组的遗传改变。纳米孔测序技术因其能够进行长单分子测序，为检测这些改变提供了强大手段。该技术在DNA和RNA分析中表现出色，可识别结构变异、拷贝数变异、基因融合及特定基因突变，并在肿瘤诊断和个性化治疗中展现出广阔前景。
ai.translation: 癌症源于影响基因组和转录组的遗传改变。纳米孔测序技术因其能够进行长单分子测序，为检测这些改变提供了强大手段。在DNA分析中，纳米孔测序在识别结构变异（SVs）、拷贝数变异（CNVs）、SVs中的基因融合以及特定基因的突变方面表现出色，包括涉及DNA修饰和DNA加合物的突变。在RNA研究领域，纳米孔测序在识别差异表达的转录本、揭示与转录调控相关的新型元件以及在单分子水平上识别可变剪接事件和RNA修饰方面具有重要价值。此外，纳米孔测序还可用于检测与肿瘤发生和癌症发展密切相关的细菌和病毒等微生物。因此，纳米孔测序在肿瘤诊断和个性化治疗中的应用前景广阔，涵盖肿瘤的识别与分类、治疗策略的定制以及潜在患者的筛查。总而言之，这项技术有望揭示肿瘤发生的新机制，并为癌症的诊断和治疗提供可靠支持。

title: On the ability to extract MLVA profiles of Vibrio cholerae isolates from WGS data generated with Oxford Nanopore Technologies.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: Multiple-Locus Variable Number of Tandem Repeats (VNTR) Analysis (MLVA) is widely used to subtype pathogens causing foodborne and waterborne disease outbreaks. The MLVAType shiny application was previously designed to extract MLVA profiles of Vibrio cholerae isolates from whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data, and provide backward compatibility with traditional MLVA typing methods. The previous development and validation work was conducted using short (pair-end 300 and 150 nt long) reads from Illumina MiSeq and Hiseq sequencing. In this study, the MLVAType application was validated using long reads generated by Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing platforms. In silico MLVA profiles of V. cholerae isolates (n = 9) from the Democratic Republic of the Congo were generated using the MLVAType application on Nanopore WGS data. The WGS-derived in silico MLVA profiles were extracted from Canu (v.2.2) assemblies obtained through MinION and GridION sequencing by ONT. The results were compared to those obtained from SPAdes assemblies (v3.13.0; k-mer 175) generated from short-read (pair-end 300-bp) reference data obtained by MiSeq sequencing, Illumina.

RESULTS: For each isolate, the in silico MLVA profiles were concordant across all three sequencing methods, demonstrating that the MLVAType application can accurately predict the MLVA profiles from assembled genomes generated by long-reads ONT sequencers.
authors: Jérôme Ambroise, Bertrand Bearzatto, Jean-Francois Durant, Leonid M Irenge, Jean-Luc Gala

ai.TLDR: 本研究验证了MLVAType应用在使用Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)长读长测序数据生成的虚拟MLVA谱型的一致性。结果显示，MLVAType能够准确预测由长读长测序生成的基因组的MLVA谱型。
ai.translation: 目标：多位点可变数目串联重复（Multiple-Locus Variable Number of Tandem Repeats, MLVA）分析被广泛用于对引起食源性和水源性疾病的病原体进行亚型分类。之前设计的MLVAType shiny应用旨在从全基因组测序（whole-genome sequencing, WGS）数据中提取霍乱弧菌（Vibrio cholerae）分离株的MLVA谱型，并提供与传统MLVA分型方法的向后兼容性。之前的开发和验证工作使用的是来自Illumina MiSeq和Hiseq测序仪的短读长（pair-end 300和150 nt）数据。在本研究中，MLVAType应用使用由Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)测序平台生成的长读长数据进行验证。使用MLVAType应用，基于来自刚果民主共和国的9株V. cholerae分离株的Nanopore WGS数据生成了虚拟MLVA谱型。这些WGS衍生的虚拟MLVA谱型是从通过ONT的MinION和GridION测序获得的Canu（v.2.2）组装数据中提取的。结果与通过MiSeq测序获得的短读长（pair-end 300-bp）参考数据生成的SPAdes组装（v3.13.0; k-mer 175）得到的谱型进行了比较。结果：对于每株分离株，虚拟MLVA谱型在所有三种测序方法中均一致，表明MLVAType应用能够准确预测由长读长ONT测序器生成的基因组的MLVA谱型。

title: Targeted syndromic next-generation sequencing panel for simultaneous detection of pathogens associated with bovine reproductive failure
abstract:
Bovine reproductive failure, which includes infertility, abortion, and stillbirth in cattle, leads to significant economic losses for beef and milk producers. Diagnosing the infectious causes of bovine reproductive failure is challenging as there are multiple pathogens associated with it. The traditional stepwise approach to diagnostic testing is time-consuming and can cause significant delays. In this study, we have developed a syndromic next-generation sequencing panel (BovReproSeq), for the simultaneous detection of 17 pathogens (bacteria, virus and protozoa) associated with bovine reproductive failure. This targeted approach involves amplifying multiple pathogen-specific targets using ultra-multiplex PCR, followed by sequencing with the Oxford Nanopore platform and subsequent analysis of the data using a custom bioinformatic pipeline to determine the presence or absence of pathogens. We tested 116 clinical samples and found that BovReproSeq results matched with current diagnostic methods for 93% of the samples, and most of the disagreements occurring in samples with very low pathogen loads (Ct > 35). At the optimal read-count threshold of 10 reads (minimum number of reads to classify the sample as positive), the clinical sensitivity of the assay was approximately 82%, while clinical specificity was 100%. The overall accuracy of the assay was 98.8%. Matthews Correlation Coefficient (correlation coefficient of binary classification) was approximately 0.90 and F1 score (harmonic mean of Precision and Recall) was 0.90, indicating excellent overall performance. Our study presents a significant advancement in detecting the infectious agents associated with bovine reproductive failure and the BovReproSeq panels ability to detect 17 pathogens makes it a promising tool for veterinary diagnostics.

ImportanceBovine reproductive failure causes substantial economic losses to beef and milk producers, and infectious disease contributes significantly to this syndrome. Etiologic diagnosis is complicated since multiple pathogens can be involved and infections with some pathogens are asymptomatic or cause similar clinical signs. A stepwise approach to diagnostic testing is time-consuming and increases the risk of missing the correct diagnosis. BovReproSeq is a next-generation sequencing based diagnostic panel that allows detection of 17 reproductive failure pathogens simultaneously.
authors: Periyasamy, D.; Huang, Y.; Hill, J. E.

ai.TLDR: 牛繁殖失败（包括不孕、流产和死产）导致牛肉和牛奶生产者重大经济损失。传统分步诊断方法耗时且易延误，本研究开发的BovReproSeq面板通过同时检测17种病原体显著提升诊断效率。该方法在116个临床样本中表现出98.8%的整体准确率，临床敏感度82%、特异度100%，证明其在兽医诊断中的应用潜力。
ai.translation: 牛繁殖失败（包括不孕、流产和死产）导致牛肉和牛奶生产者重大经济损失。诊断牛繁殖失败的感染性病因具有挑战性，因为涉及多种病原体。传统分步诊断方法耗时且易延误。本研究开发了综合征下一代测序面板（BovReproSeq），可同时检测与牛繁殖失败相关的17种病原体（细菌、病毒和原生动物）。该靶向方法通过超多重PCR扩增多种病原体特异性靶标，随后使用牛津纳米孔平台进行测序，并通过定制生物信息学流程分析数据以确定病原体存在与否。我们测试了116个临床样本，发现BovReproSeq结果与现有诊断方法在93%的样本中一致，大部分分歧出现在病原体载量极低的样本（Ct>35）。在最优读数阈值10 reads（最低读数以判定样本为阳性）时，检测的临床敏感度约为82%，临床特异度为100%。检测的整体准确率为98.8%。Matthews相关系数（二分类相关系数）约为0.90，F1分数（精确度和召回率的调和平均值）为0.90，表明整体性能优异。本研究展示了检测牛繁殖失败相关感染因子的重要进展，BovReproSeq面板能同时检测17种病原体，使其成为兽医诊断的有前景工具。重要性：牛繁殖失败对牛肉和牛奶生产者造成重大经济损失，感染性疾病显著贡献于此综合征。病因诊断复杂，因为可能涉及多种病原体，且某些感染无症状或导致相似临床表现。分步诊断方法耗时且增加漏诊风险。BovReproSeq是基于下一代测序的诊断面板，可同时检测17种繁殖失败病原体。

title: Rapidly obtaining genome sequence of Severe Fever with Thrombocytopenia Syndrome virus directly from clinical serum specimen using long amplicon based nanopore sequencing workflow.
abstract: Severe Fever with Thrombocytopenia Syndrome (SFTS) is an emerging viral infectious disease discovered in 2009 with a high fatality rate and continuing to pose a public threat for many countries. Surveillance of genome sequence of its causative pathogen, Severe Fever with Thrombocytopenia Syndrome virus (SFTSV), could provide evidence for SFTS control, diagnosis method update, viral evolution dynamic and pathogenic mechanism research, etc. Here, we developed a workflow for rapidly obtaining the genome sequence of SFTSV directly from clinical samples to facilitate the viral genome sequence surveillance. Three pairs of primers targeting the terminal conserved regions of three segments were newly designed to more efficiently enrich nearly whole viral genome. Datasets comprised reads generated in different timeframes for four simulated samples with high to low serially diluted viral loads were subjected to analysis. For a simulated sample with a Ct value of 35 and sequenced for 10 minutes, the average coverage depth could reach over 700x, and the genome coverage could reach 98.69% after subtraction of the primer sequence, and the sequence identity with Sanger sequencing could reach over 99.91%. Two clinical serum specimens were used to validate the workflow and sequences were successfully obtained. A long amplicon based nanopore sequencing workflow was established, which could finish in 10 hours from serum specimen to genome sequence. This workflow has potential to provide essential information for SFTS control and support further pathogenesis research.
authors: Tingting Tian, Yanhan Wen, Liping Gao, Tiezhu Liu, Xiaoxia Huang, Chuan Li, Shanshan Du, Hao Li, Meijun Guo, Jiandong Li, Shiwen Wang, Dexin Li, Aqian Li, Mifang Liang

ai.TLDR: 严重发热伴血小板减少综合征（SFTS）是一种高致死率的新兴病毒传染病，对多国构成公共威胁。本文开发了一种从临床样本中快速获取SFTSV基因组序列的工作流程，以支持病毒基因组序列监测。该方法通过设计针对三个片段末端保守区域的引物，提高了病毒基因组的覆盖度和序列一致性。
keywords: 严重发热伴血小板减少综合征
ai.translation: 严重发热伴血小板减少综合征（SFTS）是一种2009年发现的新兴病毒传染病，具有高致死率，并持续对多个国家构成公共威胁。对其病原体严重发热伴血小板减少综合征病毒（SFTSV）的基因组序列进行监测，可以为SFTS的防控、诊断方法更新、病毒进化动态研究以及致病机制研究提供证据。本文开发了一种工作流程，用于从临床样本中快速获取SFTSV的基因组序列，以促进病毒基因组序列的监测。我们设计了三对针对三个片段末端保守区域的新引物，以更高效地富集近完整的病毒基因组。数据集包括在不同时间段生成的四个模拟样本的测序数据，这些样本的病毒载量按高低顺序进行稀释。对于一个Ct值为35的模拟样本，在测序10分钟后，平均覆盖深度可达到700倍以上，扣除引物序列后，基因组覆盖度可达到98.69%，与Sanger测序的序列一致性可达到99.91%以上。使用两个临床血清样本验证了该工作流程，并成功获得了序列。建立了一种基于长扩增子的纳米孔测序工作流程，从血清样本到基因组序列的整个过程可在10小时内完成。该工作流程有望为SFTS的防控提供关键信息，并支持进一步的致病机制研究。

title: Mitochondrial genomic alterations in cholangiocarcinoma cell lines
abstract:
Cholangiocarcinoma (CCA) is a diverse collection of malignant tumors that originate in the bile ducts. Mitochondria, the energy converters in eukaryotic cells, contain circular mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) which has a greater mutation rate than nuclear DNA. Heteroplasmic variations in mtDNA may suggest an increased risk of cancer-related mortality, serving as a potential prognostic marker. In this study, we investigated the mtDNA variations of five CCA cell lines, including KKU- 023, KKU-055, KKU-100, KKU213A, and KKU-452 and compared them to the non-tumor cholangiocyte MMNK-1 cell line. We used Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), a long-read sequencing technology capable of synthesizing the whole mitochondrial genome, which facilitates enhanced identification of complicated rearrangements in mitogenomics. The analysis revealed a high frequency of SNVs and INDELs, particularly in the D-loop, MT-RNR2, MT-CO1, MT-ND4, and MT-ND5 genes. Significant mutations were detected in all CCA cell lines, with particularly notable non-synonymous SNVs such as m.8462T>C in KKU-023, m.9493G>A in KKU-055, m.9172C>A in KKU-100, m.15024G>C in KKU-213A, m.12994G>A in KKU-452, and m.13406G>A in MMNK-1, which demonstrated high pathogenicity scores. The presence of these mutations suggests the potential for mitochondrial dysfunction and CCA progression. Analysis of mtDNA structural variants (SV) revealed significant variability among the cell lines. We identified 208 SVs in KKU-023, 185 SVs in KKU-055, 231 SVs in KKU-100, 69 SVs in KKU-213A, 172 SVs in KKU-452, and 217 SVs in MMNK-1. These SVs included deletions, duplications, and inversions, with the highest variability observed in KKU-100 and the lowest in KKU-213A. Our results underscore the diverse mtDNA mutation landscape in CCA cell lines, highlighting the potential impact of these mutations on mitochondrial function and CCA cell line progression. Future research is required to investigate the functional impacts of these variants, their interactions with nuclear DNA in CCA, and their potential as targets for therapeutic intervention.

Author SummaryBile duct cancer has the highest incidence in northeastern Thailand. In this study, we explored the mtDNA of CCA cell lines, as mitochondria play a key role in cellular energy production. We aimed to identify mutations that could serve as therapeutic targets or biomarkers. Our analysis revealed that each CCA cell line has unique mtDNA profiles, including INDELs, SVs, and SNVs such as m.8462T>C in KKU-023, m.9493G>A in KKU-055, m.9172C>A in KKU-100, m.15024G>C in KKU-213A, m.12994G>A in KKU-452, and m.13406G>A in MMNK-1, which demonstrated high pathogenicity scores. yet they also shared some common mutations. Future research is needed to understand how these mutations affect cell function, interact with nuclear DNA, and their potential for therapeutic intervention.
authors: Faipan, A.; Sitthirak, S.; Wangwiwatsin, A.; Namwat, N.; Klanrit, P.; Titapan, A.; Jareanrat, A.; Thanasukarn, V.; Khuntikeo, N.; Boulter, L.; Loilome, W.

ai.TLDR: 胆管癌（CCA）细胞系中线粒体DNA（mtDNA）存在显著变异，通过长读长测序技术发现高频率的SNV、INDEL和结构变异（SV），揭示了线粒体功能异常与癌症进展的潜在关联。研究结果为靶向治疗和生物标志物开发提供了新方向。
ai.translation: 胆管癌（CCA）是一种起源于胆管的异质性恶性肿瘤集合。线粒体作为真核细胞的能量转换器，其环状线粒体DNA（mtDNA）突变率高于核DNA。mtDNA的异质性变异可能预示癌症相关死亡风险增加，成为潜在预后标志物。本研究分析了五种CCA细胞系（KKU-023、KKU-055、KKU-100、KKU213A、KKU-452）及非肿瘤胆管上皮细胞系MMNK-1的mtDNA变异，采用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）进行全线粒体基因组测序，以增强复杂重排的鉴定能力。分析发现D-loop、MT-RNR2、MT-CO1、MT-ND4和MT-ND5基因中SNV和INDEL频率显著升高。所有CCA细胞系均检测到显著突变，其中KKU-023的m.8462T>C、KKU-055的m.9493G>A、KKU-100的m.9172C>A、KKU-213A的m.15024G>C、KKU-452的m.12994G>A及MMNK-1的m.13406G>A等非同义SNVs表现出高致病性评分。这些突变的存在提示线粒体功能障碍与CCA进展的潜在关联。mtDNA结构变异（SV）分析显示细胞系间显著差异，KKU-023检测到208个SV，KKU-055为185个，KKU-100达231个，而KKU-213A仅69个，KKU-452为172个，MMNK-1为217个。这些SV包括缺失、重复和倒位，其中KKU-100变异最显著，KKU-213A最低。研究结果凸显了CCA细胞系中mtDNA突变的多样性，强调这些突变对线粒体功能及癌症进展的潜在影响。未来需进一步研究这些变异的功能影响、与核DNA的相互作用及其作为治疗靶点的潜力。作者总结指出，泰国东北部胆管癌发病率最高，本研究通过分析CCA细胞系的mtDNA，揭示了其独特的变异特征，包括INDEL、SV和SNV等，为治疗靶点和生物标志物开发提供了依据。

title: A novel barcoded nanopore sequencing workflow of high-quality, full-length bacterial 16S amplicons for taxonomic annotation of bacterial isolates and complex microbial communities.
abstract: Due to recent improvements, Nanopore sequencing has become a promising method for experiments relying on amplicon sequencing. We describe a flexible workflow to generate and annotate high-quality, full-length 16S rDNA amplicons. We evaluated it for two applications, namely, (i) identification of bacterial isolates and (ii) species-level profiling of microbial communities. We assessed the identification of single bacterial isolates by sequencing, using a set of barcoded full-length 16S rRNA gene primer pairs (pair A), on 47 isolates encompassing multiple genera and compared those results with matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization-time of flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF MS)-based identification. Species-level community profiling was tested with two sets of barcoded full-length 16S primer pairs (A and B) and compared to the results obtained with shotgun Illumina sequencing using 27 stool samples. We developed a Nextflow pipeline to retain high-quality reads and taxonomically annotate them. authors: Julian Dommann, Jakob Kerbl-Knapp, Diana Albertos Torres, Adrian Egli, Jennifer Keiser, Pierre H H Schneeberger

ai.TLDR: 随着技术的进步，Nanopore测序已成为依赖扩增子测序实验的有前景的方法。本文描述了一种灵活的工作流程，用于生成和注释高质量的全长16S rDNA扩增子，并评估其在细菌分离株鉴定和微生物群落物种水平分析中的应用效果。结果表明，该工作流程在分离株鉴定中与MALDI-TOF MS数据高度一致。
ai.translation: 由于最近的技术改进，Nanopore测序已成为依赖扩增子测序实验的有前景的方法。我们描述了一种灵活的工作流程，用于生成和注释高质量的全长16S rDNA扩增子。我们评估了该方法在两个应用中的效果，即（i）细菌分离株的鉴定和（ii）微生物群落的物种水平分析。我们通过使用一组带有条形码的全长16S rRNA基因引物对（引物对A），对47个涵盖多个属的细菌分离株进行测序，以评估单个细菌分离株的鉴定效果，并将这些结果与基于基质辅助激光解吸离子化飞行时间质谱（MALDI-TOF MS）的鉴定结果进行比较。物种水平的群落分析使用了两组带有条形码的全长16S引物对（A和B），并与使用Illumina测序获得的27个粪便样本的结果进行比较。我们开发了一个Nextflow流程，以保留高质量的读段并对其进行分类学注释。我们发现，我们的工作流程与MALDI-TOF数据在分离株鉴定中具有高度的一致性（阳性预测值=0.90，Cramér's

title: Co-existence of two bla
abstract:
PURPOSE: To understand the mechanisms of carbapenem-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae (CRKP) from Tanzania and characterize the genomes carrying the carbapenemase genes.

METHODS: Clinical CRKP isolates were selected from ongoing antimicrobial resistance surveillance at Muhimbili National Hospital, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Whole-genome sequencing was performed utilizing Illumina and Nanopore platforms.

RESULTS: A total of twelve CRKP were analyzed in this study. Six different multilocus sequence types were detected, six isolates were sequence type ST437 and one belonged to a novel sequence type, ST6258. Resistance to carbapenems was multifactorial with co-existence of bla

CONCLUSION: Clonally related CRKP ST437 with multiple co-existing carbapenemase genes were detected for the first time at the tertiary hospital in Tanzania. The existence of this high-risk clone poses a great risk for further spread at our facility.
authors: Lawrence Mapunda, Anthon Mwingwa, Doreen Kamori, Happiness Kumburu, Marco van Zwetselaar, Bjorn Blomberg, Joel Manyahi

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在了解坦桑尼亚耐碳青霉烯类肺炎克雷伯菌（CRKP）的机制，并对携带碳青霉烯酶基因的基因组进行表征。研究发现，坦桑尼亚三级医院首次检测到与克隆相关且携带多种碳青霉烯酶基因的CRKP ST437菌株，这对该机构的进一步传播构成重大风险。
keywords: 耐碳青霉烯类肺炎克雷伯菌
ai.translation:
目的：了解坦桑尼亚耐碳青霉烯类肺炎克雷伯菌（CRKP）的机制，并对携带碳青霉烯酶基因的基因组进行表征。

方法：临床CRKP菌株是从坦桑尼亚达累斯萨拉姆穆希米比国家医院正在进行的抗菌药物耐药性监测中选取的。使用Illumina和Nanopore平台进行全基因组测序。

结果：本研究共分析了十二株CRKP。检测到六种不同的多位点序列类型，其中六株属于序列类型ST437，一株属于新发现的序列类型ST6258。对碳青霉烯类药物的耐药性是多因素的，存在bla基因的共存。

结论：在坦桑尼亚的三级医院中首次检测到与克隆相关且携带多种共存碳青霉烯酶基因的CRKP ST437菌株。这种高风险克隆的存在对本机构的进一步传播构成了重大风险。

title: Nanopore-based targeted sequencing test for direct tuberculosis identification, genotyping, and detection of drug resistance mutations: a side-by-side comparison of targeted next-generation sequencing technologies.
abstract:
UNLABELLED: We investigated the performance of the targeted next-generation sequencing (tNGS)-based Oxford Nanopore Diagnostics AmPORE TB assay, recently approved by the World Health Organization (WHO) as tuberculosis (TB) diagnostic test for the detection of drug resistance on respiratory specimens. A total of 104 DNA samples from Xpert MTB/RIF-positive TB sputum specimens were tested using the AmPORE TB kit, with the GenoScreen Deeplex Myc-TB as a comparative tNGS assay. For AmPORE TB, DNA samples were divided into five sequencing runs on the MinION device. Data analysis was performed using proprietary software. The WHO catalog of mutations was used for drug resistance interpretation. The assay achieved a high validity rate of 98% (102/104 DNA samples), homogeneous mean reads coverage across TB-positive specimens, and 100% positive and negative agreements for detecting mutations associated with resistance to rifampicin, pyrazinamide, fluoroquinolones, ethambutol, and capreomycin compared with Deeplex Myc-TB. The main discrepancies for the remaining drugs were attributable to the different assay panel designs. The AmPORE TB turnaround time was approximately 5-6 hours from extracted DNA to tNGS reporting for batches of 22 DNA samples. The AmPORE TB assay drastically reduced the time to tNGS reporting from days to hours and showed good performance for drug-resistant TB profiling compared with Deeplex Myc-TB.
