authors: Mario Urtis, Claudia Cavaliere, Viviana Vilardo, Chiara Paganini, Alexandra Smirnova, Carmelina Giorgianni, Alessandro Di Toro, Luisa Chiapparini, Carlo Pellegrini, Maurizia Grasso, Eloisa Arbustini

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在展示病例级别的美国医学遗传学学院（ACMG）标准，如家族分离和病理数据，在确定极罕见变异致病性中的作用。通过心内膜活检和下一代测序，研究确认了变异的致病性，并表明ACMG病例级别数据可以明确解决不确定的解读。
ai.translation:
目标：本研究旨在展示病例级别的美国医学遗传学学院（ACMG）标准，如家族分离和病理数据，在提供关于极罕见变异致病性的明确证据中的作用。

结果：受试者及其受影响的兄弟的心内膜活检显示基质积累（半乳糖苷三酰基鞘氨醇）。抗α-半乳糖苷酶A免疫染色显示，半合子男性完全缺乏该酶，而杂合子女性则呈现镶嵌模式。下一代测序短读多基因面板检测到在该基因中存在c.547+3A>G变异。

结论：ACMG病例级别的数据可以明确解决对变异的不确定解读。

title: Aerolysin nanopore structure revealed at high resolution in lipid environment
journal: Journal of the American Chemical Society
abstract: Aerolysin is a {beta}-pore-forming toxin produced by most Aeromonas bacteria which has attracted large attention in the field of nanopore sensing due to its narrow and charged pore lumen. Structurally similar proteins, belonging to the aerolysin-like family, are present throughout all kingdoms of life, but very few of them have been structurally characterized in a lipid environment. Here we present the first high-resolution atomic cryo-EM structures of aerolysin pre-pore and pore in a membrane-like environment. These structures allow the identification of key interactions, which are relevant for the pore formation and for positioning the pore barrel into the membrane with the anchoring {beta}-turn motif now finally observed. Moreover, we elucidate at high resolution the architecture of key mutations and precisely identify four constriction rings in the pore lumen that are highly relevant for nanopore sensing experiments.
authors: Anton, J.; Iacovache, I.; Bada Juarez, J. F.; Abriata, L.; Perrin, L.; Cao, C.; Marcaida, M. J.; Zuber, B.; Dal Peraro, M.

ai.TLDR: 气孔素作为一种β-孔形成毒素，在纳米孔传感领域因其狭窄带电孔腔而备受关注。本研究首次解析了气孔素前孔与孔结构的高分辨率冷冻电镜结构，揭示了关键相互作用及突变位点，为纳米孔传感实验提供了重要结构基础。
ai.translation: 气孔素是一种由大多数气单胞菌产生的β-孔形成毒素，因其狭窄且带电的孔腔而在纳米孔传感领域受到广泛关注。结构上相似的蛋白属于气孔素样家族，广泛存在于所有生命领域，但仅有少数在脂质环境中被结构表征。本研究首次解析了气孔素前孔与孔结构在类膜环境中的高分辨率原子冷冻电镜结构。这些结构揭示了关键相互作用，这些相互作用对于孔形成以及将孔筒定位至膜中至关重要，其中锚定β-转角结构首次被观察到。此外，我们以高分辨率阐明了关键突变的构型，并精确鉴定了孔腔内四个高度相关的狭窄环结构，这些结构对纳米孔传感实验具有重要意义。

title: Comparative genomics of clinical hybrid Escherichia coli strains in Norway.
journal: International journal of medical microbiology : IJMM
abstract: The global rise of hybrid Escherichia coli (E. coli) is a major public health concern, as enhanced virulence from multiple pathotypes complicates the traditional E. coli classification system and challenges clinical diagnostics. Hybrid strains are particularly concerning as they can infect both intestinal and extraintestinal sites, complicating treatment and increasing the risk of severe disease. This study analyzed virulence-associated genes (VAGs) in 13 E. coli isolates from fecal samples of patients with symptoms of gastrointestinal (GI) infection in Norwegian hospitals and clinics. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) was conducted using Oxford Nanopore's MinION and Illumina's MiSeq platforms. Eleven strains harbored molecular diagnostic markers of atypical enteropathogenic E. coli (aEPEC), enteroinvasive E. coli (EIEC), Shiga toxin-producing E. coli (STEC), enterotoxigenic E. coli (ETEC), or typical enteropathogenic E. coli (tEPEC). Two of those isolates were identified as triple intestinal hybrids with molecular diagnostic markers for aEPEC, EIEC, and STEC. Notably, two isolates lacked any IPEC-specific molecular diagnostic markers, yet were suspected of causing the patient's GI infection. Furthermore, genes associated with extraintestinal pathogenic E. coli (ExPEC)-including adhesins, toxins, protectins, siderophores, iron acquisition systems, and invasins-were identified in all the isolates. Thus, most of the isolates were classified as hybrid aEPEC/ExPEC, STEC/ExPEC, tEPEC/ExPEC, or aEPEC/EIEC/STEC/ExPEC. These findings emphasize the genomic plasticity of E. coli and highlight the need to revise the classification system for enteric pathogens.
authors: Misti D Finton, Roger Meisal, Davide Porcellato, Lin T Brandal, Bjørn-Arne Lindstedt

ai.TLDR: 混合型大肠杆菌的全球上升是公共卫生的重要问题，因其多种病原型导致的增强毒力使传统分类系统复杂化并挑战临床诊断。研究分析了13株来自挪威医院和诊所患者的粪便样本中的致病相关基因，发现大部分菌株被归类为混合型致病菌。
ai.translation: 全球混合型大肠杆菌（E. coli）的上升是公共卫生的重要问题，因为多种病原型导致的增强毒力使传统的E. coli分类系统复杂化，并挑战了临床诊断。混合型菌株尤其令人担忧，因为它们可以感染肠道和肠外部位，使治疗复杂化，并增加严重疾病的风险。本研究分析了13株来自挪威医院和诊所患者的粪便样本中与致病性相关的基因（VAGs），这些患者表现出胃肠道（GI）感染的症状。使用牛津纳米孔MinION和Illumina MiSeq平台进行了全基因组测序（WGS）。其中11株菌株携带非典型肠致病性大肠杆菌（aEPEC）、肠侵袭性大肠杆菌（EIEC）、产志贺毒素大肠杆菌（STEC）、肠毒素性大肠杆菌（ETEC）或典型肠致病性大肠杆菌（tEPEC）的分子诊断标记。其中2株菌株被鉴定为携带aEPEC、EIEC和STEC分子诊断标记的三重肠道混合菌株。值得注意的是，2株菌株缺乏任何IPEC特异性分子诊断标记，但被怀疑导致了患者的胃肠道感染。此外，所有菌株中均发现了与肠外致病性大肠杆菌（ExPEC）相关的基因，包括粘附素、毒素、保护素、铁载体、铁获取系统和侵袭素。因此，大多数菌株被归类为混合型aEPEC/ExPEC、STEC/Ex，tEPEC/ExPEC或aEPEC/EIEC/STEC/ExPEC。这些发现强调了大肠杆菌的基因组可塑性，并突出了修订肠源性病原体分类系统的必要性。

title: Combining Short- and Long-Read Sequencing Technologies to Identify SARS-CoV-2 Variants in Wastewater.
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, the monitoring of SARS-CoV-2 RNA in wastewater was used to track the evolution and emergence of variant lineages and gauge infection levels in the community, informing appropriate public health responses without relying solely on clinical testing. As more sublineages were discovered, it increased the difficulty in identifying distinct variants in a mixed population sample, particularly those without a known lineage. Here, we compare the sequencing technology from Illumina and from Oxford Nanopore Technologies, in order to determine their efficacy at detecting variants of differing abundance, using 248 wastewater samples from various Quebec and Ontario cities. Our study used two analytical approaches to identify the main variants in the samples: the presence of signature and marker mutations and the co-occurrence of signature mutations within the same amplicon. We observed that each sequencing method detected certain variants at different frequencies as each method preferentially detects mutations of distinct variants. Illumina sequencing detected more mutations with a predominant lineage that is in low abundance across the population or unknown for that time period, while Nanopore sequencing had a higher detection rate of mutations that are predominantly found in the high abundance B.1.1.7 (Alpha) lineage as well as a higher sequencing rate of co-occurring mutations in the same amplicon. We present a workflow that integrates short-read and long-read sequencing to improve the detection of SARS-CoV-2 variant lineages in mixed population samples, such as wastewater.
authors: Gabrielle Jayme, Ju-Ling Liu, Jose Hector Galvez, Sarah Julia Reiling, Sukriye Celikkol, Arnaud N'Guessan, Sally Lee, Shu-Huang Chen, Alexandra Tsitouras, Fernando Sanchez-Quete, Thomas Maere, Eyerusalem Goitom, Mounia Hachad, Elisabeth Mercier, Stephanie Katharine Loeb, Peter A Vanrolleghem, Sarah Dorner, Robert Delatolla, B Jesse Shapiro, Dominic Frigon, Jiannis Ragoussis, Terrance P Snutch

ai.TLDR: 在新冠疫情期间，通过废水中的SARS-CoV-2 RNA监测，可以追踪变异谱系的演变和社区感染水平，从而指导公共卫生措施。然而，随着更多亚谱系的发现，识别混合样本中不同变异变得困难，特别是未知谱系的样本。
ai.translation: 在新冠疫情期间，通过监测废水中的SARS-CoV-2 RNA，可以追踪变异谱系的演变和新兴情况，并评估社区感染水平，从而在不完全依赖临床检测的情况下，为公共卫生措施提供信息。随着越来越多的亚谱系被发现，识别混合样本中不同变异的难度增加，尤其是那些没有已知谱系的样本。在此，我们比较了Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technologies的测序技术，以评估它们在检测不同丰度变异方面的有效性，使用了来自魁北克和安大略省多个城市的248份废水样本。我们的研究采用了两种分析方法来识别样本中的主要变异：特征突变和标记突变的存在，以及同一扩增子内特征突变的共现。我们观察到，每种测序方法在检测不同变异时的频率不同，因为每种方法倾向于检测特定变异的突变。Illumina测序能够检测到在人群中低丰度或当时未知的主要谱系的突变，而Nanopore测序则在检测主要存在于高丰度B.1.1.7（Alpha）谱系中的突变方面具有更高的检测率，同时在相同扩增子内共现突变的测序率也更高。我们提出了一种整合短读长和长读长测序的工作流程，以提高在混合人群样本（如废水样本）中检测SARS-CoV-2变异谱系的能力。

title: Determining genotype and antimicrobial resistance of Salmonella Typhi in environmental samples by amplicon sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Estimates of the burden of typhoid fever due to Salmonella enterica serovar Typhi (S. Typhi) rely on data from clinical surveillance, which is rarely done in low income settings and is also limited by the poor sensitivity of the assays used and the reliance on health seeking by patients. Environmental surveillance for S. Typhi shed by symptomatic and asymptomatic individuals in wastewater offers a sensitive surveillance tool that could help to inform burden estimates. Sequencing S. Typhi direct from wastewater concentrates has the potential to identify circulating genotypes and associated antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes, supporting public health interventions such as vaccination and antimicrobial usage.

METHODOLOGY AND PRINCIPAL FINDINGS: We designed a multiplex targeted amplicon sequencing protocol for genotyping and determining AMR in S. Typhi from wastewater samples, targeting SNPs that identify genotypes of interest and both chromosomal and plasmid-borne AMR. PCR products were sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) MinION, and genotypes and AMR identified using the GenoTyphi program. We tested this approach on samples from south India from both hospital outflow and wastewater collected from the community. All samples tested were suspected to be positive for S. Typhi following quantitative PCR for ttr, tviB, and staG gene targets. Out of 110 samples tested we were able to determine a genotype and/or AMR for 8. All samples that gave a genotype call suggested a genotype consistent with those found in clinical cases in India during the same time period and produced consensus sequences that clustered with S. Typhi when included in a phylogenetic tree.

CONCLUSIONS: In this study, we provide proof of concept data for amplicon sequencing of S. Typhi in wastewater which with further optimisation could be used to complement clinical surveillance data or provide data on S. Typhi presence in the absence of clinical surveillance. This information can inform public health interventions, and the concept could be applied to other pathogens of interest for genotyping from environmental surveillance samples.
authors: Catherine Troman, Samuel T Horsfield, Dilip Abraham, Venkata Raghava Mohan, Sidhartha Giri, Satheesh Nair, Alexander G Shaw, Zoe Dyson, Kathryn E Holt, Nicholas C Grassly

title: Combining short and long read sequencing technologies to identify SARS-CoV-2 variants in wastewater
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, the monitoring of SARS-COV-2 RNA in wastewater was used to track the evolution and emergence of variant lineages and gauge infection levels in the community, informing appropriate public health responses without relying solely on clinical testing. As more sublineages were discovered, it increased the difficulty in identifying distinct variants in a mixed population sample, particularly those without a known lineage. Here, we compare two next-generation sequencing technologies, Illumina and Nanopore, in order to determine their efficacy at detecting variants of differing abundance, using 248 wastewater samples from various Quebec and Ontario cities. Our study used two analytical approaches to identify main variants in the samples: the presence of signature and marker mutations, and the co-occurrence of signature mutations within the same amplicon. We observed that each sequencing method detected certain variants at different frequencies as each method preferentially detects mutations of distinct variants. Illumina sequencing detected more mutations with a predominant lineage that is in low abundance across the population or unknown for that time period, while Nanopore sequencing had a higher detection rate of mutations that are predominantly found in the high abundance B.1.1.7 (Alpha) lineage as well as a higher sequencing rate of co-occurring mutations in the same amplicon. We present a workflow that integrates short read and long read sequencing to improve the detection of SARS-CoV-2 variant lineages in mixed population samples, such as wastewater.
authors: Jayme, G.; Liu, J.-L.; Galvez, J. H.; Reiling, S. J.; Aydin, S. C.; N'Guessan, A.; Lee, S.; Chen, S.-H.; Tsitouras, A.; Sanchez-Quete, F.; Maere, T.; Goitom, E.; Hachad, M.; Mercier, E.; Loeb, S. K.; Vanrolleghem, P.; Dorner, S.; Delatolla, R.; Shapiro, B. J.; Frigon, D.; Ragoussis, J.; Snutch, T. P.

ai.TLDR: 在新冠疫情期间，通过污水中SARS-CoV-2 RNA监测可追踪变异株演变并评估社区感染水平，为公共卫生决策提供依据。研究比较了Illumina与Nanopore两种测序技术在混合样本中检测不同丰度变异株的效果，发现整合短读与长读测序可提升复杂样本中变异株的识别能力。
ai.translation: 在新冠疫情期间，通过监测污水中的SARS-CoV-2 RNA被用于追踪变异株的演变和新兴谱系，并评估社区感染水平，从而在不完全依赖临床检测的情况下指导公共卫生响应。随着更多亚谱系被发现，识别混合群体样本中不同变异株的难度增加，尤其是那些未知谱系的样本。本研究比较了两种下一代测序技术（Illumina和Nanopore）在检测不同丰度变异株方面的有效性，使用了来自魁北克和安大略省248个城市的污水样本。研究采用两种分析方法识别样本中的主要变异株：特征突变和标记突变的存在，以及同一扩增子中特征突变的共现。观察到每种测序方法检测特定变异株的频率不同，因为每种方法优先检测不同变异株的突变。Illumina测序能检测到更多在人群中低丰度或当时未知的主要谱系的突变，而Nanopore测序对高丰度B.1.1.7（Alpha）谱系中主导的突变检测率更高，并且在相同扩增子中检测到共现突变的测序效率更高。我们提出了一种整合短读和长读测序的工作流程，以提高混合群体样本（如污水）中SARS-CoV-2变异株谱系的检测能力。

title: LongReadSum: A fast and flexible quality control and signal summarization tool for long-read sequencing data
abstract: While several well-established quality control (QC) tools are available for short reads sequencing data, there is a general paucity of computational tools that provide long read metrics in a fast and comprehensive manner across all major sequencing platforms (such as PacBio, Oxford Nanopore, Illumina Complete Long Read) and data formats (such as ONT POD5, FAST5, basecall summary files and PacBio unaligned BAM). Additionally, none of the current tools provide support for summarizing Oxford Nanopore basecall signal or comprehensive base modification (methylation) information from genomic data. Furthermore, nowadays a single PromethION flowcell on the Oxford Nanopore platform can generate terabytes of signal data, which cannot be handled by existing tools designed for small-scale flowcells. To address these challenges, here we present LongReadSum, a multi-threaded C++ tool which provides fast and comprehensive QC reports on all major aspects of sequencing data (such as read, base, base quality, alignment, and base modification metrics) and produce basecalling signal intensity information from the Oxford Nanopore platform. We demonstrate use cases to analyze cDNA sequencing, direct mRNA sequencing, reduced representation methylation sequencing (RRMS) through adaptive sequencing, as well as whole genome sequencing (WGS) data using diverse long-read platforms.
authors: Perdomo, J. E.; Ahsan, M. U.; Liu, Q.; Fang, L.; Wang, K.

ai.TLDR: 当前缺乏支持主流长读长测序平台（如PacBio、Oxford Nanopore）和多种数据格式的快速全面质量控制工具。LongReadSum作为多线程C++工具，可生成涵盖读长、碱基质量、比对等多维度的QC报告，并支持分析cDNA测序、直接mRNA测序等场景。
ai.translation: 尽管已有多种成熟的短读长测序数据质量控制（QC）工具，但目前缺乏能够快速全面分析主流测序平台（如PacBio、Oxford Nanopore、Illumina Complete Long Read）和多种数据格式（如ONT POD5、FAST5、basecall汇总文件及PacBio未比对BAM文件）的计算工具。现有工具均无法支持对Oxford Nanopore碱基调用信号的汇总分析或从基因组数据中提取全面的碱基修饰（甲基化）信息。当前Oxford Nanopore平台单个PromethION流细胞可生成TB级信号数据，而现有工具仅适用于小规模流细胞。为解决这些问题，本文提出LongReadSum，一款基于多线程C++开发的工具，可提供涵盖测序数据所有关键维度（如读长、碱基、碱基质量、比对及碱基修饰指标）的快速全面QC报告，并可提取Oxford Nanopore平台的碱基调用信号强度信息。通过分析cDNA测序、直接mRNA测序、自适应测序的减少表观遗传学表型测序（RRMS）以及全基因组测序（WGS）等多样化长读长平台数据，展示了该工具的应用场景。

title: De novo non-canonical nanopore basecalling enables private communication using heavily-modified DNA data at single-molecule level.
abstract: Hidden messages in DNA molecules by employing chemical modifications has been suggested for private data storage and transmission at high information density. However, rapidly decoding these "molecular keys" with corresponding basecallers remains challenging. We present DeepSME, a nanopore sequencing and deep-learning based framework towards single-molecule encryption, demonstrated by using 5-hydroxymethylcytosine (5hmC) substitution for individual nucleotide recognition rather than sequential interactions. This non-natural, motif-insensitive methylation disrupts ion current, resulting in a readout failure of 67.2%-100%, concealing the privacy within the DNAs. We further develop an alignment-free DeepSME basecaller as a key to reconstitute the digital information. Our three-stage training pipeline, expands k-mer size from 4
authors: Qingyuan Fan, Xuyang Zhao, Junyao Li, Ronghui Liu, Ming Liu, Qishun Feng, Yanping Long, Yang Fu, Jixian Zhai, Qing Pan, Yi Li

ai.TLDR: DeepSME 是一种基于纳米孔测序和深度学习的框架，用于单分子加密，通过化学修饰隐藏数据。该方法利用 5hmC 替代实现单核苷酸识别，有效隐藏隐私信息。
ai.translation: 通过在 DNA 分子中使用化学修饰来隐藏信息，已被提出用于高信息密度的私有数据存储和传输。然而，使用相应的碱基调用器快速解码这些'分子密钥'仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了 DeepSME，这是一种基于纳米孔测序和深度学习的框架，用于单分子加密。该方法通过使用 5-羟甲基胞嘧啶（5hmC）替代来实现单核苷酸识别，而不是依赖于序列相互作用。这种非自然的、对模序不敏感的甲基化会破坏离子电流，导致 67.2%-100% 的读取失败，从而在 DNA 中隐藏隐私信息。我们进一步开发了一种无需比对的 DeepSME 碱基调用器，作为重新构建数字信息的密钥。我们的三阶段训练流程，将 k-mer 大小从 4 扩展到更大。

title: Differences in diversity and composition of mucosa-associated colonic microbiota in colorectal cancer and non-colorectal cancer in Indonesia.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Colorectal cancer is the third most common malignancy and the fourth leading cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Several studies have shown an association between gut microbiota and colorectal cancer. Gut microbiota is unique and can be influenced by geographic factors and habits. This study aimed to determine the diversity and composition of colonic mucosal microbiota in patients with and without colorectal cancer.

AIM: To determine the diversity and composition of colonic mucosal microbiota in patients with and without colorectal cancer in Indonesia.

METHODS: This case-control study included 59 subjects (35 colorectal cancer patients and 24 non-colorectal cancer patients indicated for colonoscopy at Dr. Cipto Mangunkusumo Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Center and Fatmawati Hospital. Microbiota examination was performed using 16S rRNA sequencing. Bioinformatics analysis was performed using the wf-metagenomics pipeline from EPI2Me-Labs (Oxford Nanopore Technologies platform).

RESULTS: Patients with colorectal cancer had a higher median index value on the Shannon index (3.28 

CONCLUSION: Patients with colorectal cancer exhibit distinct differences in the composition and diversity of their colonic mucosal microbiota compared to those with non-colorectal cancer. This study was reviewed and approved by the Ethics Committee of Faculty of Medicine, Universitas Indonesia (No. KET-1517/UN2.F1/ETIK/PPM.00.02/2023).
authors: Nikko Darnindro, Murdani Abdullah, Ninik Sukartini, Cleopas M Rumende, Amanda Pitarini, Saskia A Nursyirwan, Achmad Fauzi, Dadang Makmun, Erni J Nelwan, Hamzah Shatri, Ikhwan Rinaldi, Caroline Tanadi

ai.TLDR: 结直肠癌是全球第三大常见恶性肿瘤和第四大癌症相关死亡原因。本研究旨在探讨印尼结直肠癌患者与非结直肠癌患者结肠黏膜微生物群的多样性和组成差异。研究发现，结直肠癌患者的香农指数中位数显著高于非患者，表明其微生物多样性较低。
ai.translation:
背景：结直肠癌是全球第三大常见恶性肿瘤和第四大癌症相关死亡原因。已有研究表明肠道微生物群与结直肠癌之间存在关联。肠道微生物群具有独特性，且可能受到地理因素和生活习惯的影响。本研究旨在确定结直肠癌患者与非结直肠癌患者结肠黏膜微生物群的多样性和组成。

目标：确定印尼结直肠癌患者与非结直肠癌患者结肠黏膜微生物群的多样性和组成。

方法：本研究为病例对照研究，共纳入59名受试者（35名结直肠癌患者和24名非结直肠癌患者），这些患者均在Dr. Cipto Mangunkusumo胃肠内镜中心和Fatmawati医院接受结肠镜检查。微生物群检测采用16S rRNA测序方法。生物信息学分析使用EPI2Me-Labs（Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台）的wf-metagenomics流程进行。

结果：结直肠癌患者的香农指数中位数显著高于非患者（3.28 vs. 3.85），表明其微生物多样性较低。

结论：与非结直肠癌患者相比，结直肠癌患者的结肠黏膜微生物群在组成和多样性方面表现出显著差异。本研究已通过印度尼西亚大学医学系伦理委员会审查并获得批准（编号：KET-1517/UN2.F1/ETIK/PPM.00.02/2023）。

title: Dynamic landscape of m6A modifications and related post-transcriptional events in muscle-invasive bladder cancer.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Muscle-invasive bladder carcinoma (MIBC) is a serious and more advanced stage of bladder carcinoma. N6-Methyladenosine (m6A) is a dynamic and reversible modifications that primarily affects RNA stability and alternative splicing. The dysregulation of m6A in MIBC can be potential target for clinical interventions, but there have been limited studies on m6A modifications in MIBC and their associations with post-transcriptional regulatory processes.

METHODS: Paired tumor and adjacent-normal tissues were obtained from three patients with MIBC following radical cystectomy. The additional paired tissues for validation were obtained from patients underwent transurethral resection. Utilizing Nanopore direct-RNA sequencing, we characterized the m6A RNA methylation landscape in MIBC, with a focus on identifying post-transcriptional events potentially affected by changes in m6A sites. This included an examination of differential transcript usage, polyadenylation signal sites, and variations in poly(A) tail length, providing insights into the broader impact of m6A alterations on RNA processing in MIBC.

RESULTS: The prognostic-related m6A genes and m6A-risk model constructed by machine learning enables the stratification of high and low-risk patients with precision. A novel m6A modification site in the 3' untranslated region (3'UTR) of IGLL5 gene were identified, characterized by a lower m6A methylation ratio, elongated poly(A) tails, and a notable bias in transcript usage. Furthermore, we discovered two particular transcripts, VWA1-203 and CEBPB-201. VWA1-203 displayed diminished m6A methylation levels, a truncated 3'UTR, and an elongated poly(A) tail, whereas CEBPB-201 showed opposite trends, highlighting the complex interplay between m6A modifications and RNA processing. Source code was provided on GitHub ( https://github.com/lelelililele/Nanopore-m6A-analysis ).

CONCLUSIONS: The state-of-the-art Nanopore direct-RNA sequencing and machine learning techniques enables comprehensive identification of m6A modification and provided insights into the potential post-transcriptional regulation mechanisms on the development and progression in MIBC.
authors: Lili Zhang, Ziwei Chen, Gaoyuan Sun, Chang Li, Pengjie Wu, Wenrui Xu, Hui Zhu, Zaifeng Zhang, Yongbin Tang, Yayu Li, Yifei Li, Siyuan Xu, Hexin Li, Meng Chen, Fei Xiao, Yaqun Zhang, Wei Zhang

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用Nanopore直接RNA测序技术，系统分析了肌肉浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）中的m6A修饰景观，揭示了m6A修饰在RNA加工过程中的作用。通过机器学习构建的m6A风险模型可有效区分高危和低危患者。
ai.translation:
背景：肌肉浸润性膀胱癌（Muscle-invasive Bladder Carcinoma, MIBC）是膀胱癌的一种更为严重且晚期的类型。N6-甲基腺苷（N6-Methyladenosine, m6A）是一种动态且可逆的RNA修饰，主要影响RNA的稳定性与可变剪接。MIBC中m6A的失调可能成为临床干预的潜在靶点，但目前关于MIBC中m6A修饰及其与转录后调控过程关联的研究仍较为有限。

方法：从接受根治性膀胱切除术的三名MIBC患者中获取了配对的肿瘤组织和邻近正常组织。用于验证的额外配对组织则来自接受经尿道切除术的患者。利用Nanopore直接RNA测序技术，我们系统地分析了MIBC中的m6A RNA甲基化景观，重点在于识别可能受m6A位点变化影响的转录后事件。这包括对差异转录本使用、多聚腺苷酸化信号位点以及多聚(A)尾长度变化的分析，从而揭示m6A修饰变化对MIBC中RNA加工的广泛影响。

结果：通过机器学习构建的与预后相关的m6A基因和m6A风险模型，能够精准地将高危和低危患者进行分层。我们识别出IGLL5基因3'非翻译区（3'UTR）中一个新的m6A修饰位点，其特征为较低的m6A甲基化比例、延长的多聚(A)尾以及显著的转录本使用偏倚。此外，我们还发现了两个特定的转录本：VWA1-203和CEBPB-201。VWA1-203表现出较低的m6A甲基化水平、截短的3'UTR和延长的多聚(A)尾，而CEBPB-201则表现出相反的趋势，突显了m6A修饰与RNA加工之间复杂的相互作用。相关源代码已发布在GitHub上（https://github.com/lelelililele/Nanopore-m6A-analysis）。

结论：先进的Nanopore直接RNA测序技术和机器学习方法能够全面识别m6A修饰，并提供了关于m6A修饰在MIBC发生和进展中潜在转录后调控机制的见解。

title: A case of an Angelman-syndrome caused by an intragenic duplication ofUBE3Auncovered by adaptive nanopore sequencing
abstract: Adaptive nanopore sequencing as a diagnostic method for imprinting disorders and episignature analysis revealed an intragenic duplication of Exon 6 and 7 in *UBE3A* (NM_000462.5) in a patient with relatively mild Angelman-like syndrome. In an all-in-one nanopore sequencing analysis DNA hypomethylation of the *SNURF*:TSS-DMR, known contributing deletions on the maternal allele and point mutations in *UBE3A* could be ruled out as disease drivers. In contrast, breakpoints and orientation of the tandem duplication could clearly be defined. Segregation analysis in the family showed that the duplication derived de novo in the maternal grandfather. Our study shows the benefits of an all-in-one nanopore sequencing approach for the diagnostics of Angelman syndrome and other imprinting disorders.
authors: Laura Holthöfer, Stefan Diederich, ... Matthias Linke
citation: Holthöfer, L., Diederich, S., Haug, V. et al. A case of an Angelman-syndrome caused by an intragenic duplication of UBE3A uncovered by adaptive nanopore sequencing. Clin Epigenet 16 , 101 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13148-024-01711-0
description: Adaptive nanopore sequencing as a diagnostic method for imprinting disorders and episignature analysis revealed an intragenic duplication of Exon 6...

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用自适应纳米孔测序技术诊断印迹障碍疾病，发现Angelman综合征患者存在UBE3A基因内含子6和7的重复。全合一纳米孔测序分析排除了传统致病因素，明确重复来源于祖母的祖父新发突变，验证了该技术在遗传病诊断中的优势。
ai.translation: 自适应纳米孔测序作为诊断印迹障碍疾病和表型特征分析的方法，在一名表现出相对轻微Angelman综合征表型的患者中，揭示了UBE3A基因（NM_000462.5）内含子6和7的基因内重复。通过全合一纳米孔测序分析，发现SNURF:TSS-DMR区域的DNA低甲基化，已知的母源等位基因缺失和UBE3A点突变可被排除为致病因素。相反，串联重复的断点和方向可被明确界定。家族遗传分析显示该重复源自父系祖父的新发突变。本研究证明了全合一纳米孔测序方法在Angelman综合征及其他印迹障碍疾病诊断中的优势。
