title: Development of a classification system for lung ultrasonographic findings in calves based on the association with cure and production outcomes.
abstract: The primary objective of this study was to determine associations between ultrasound-based classification systems (using maximum consolidations depth, number of quadrants with consolidation, and consolidation location), clinical indicators, and performance outcomes (ultrasonographic cure, ADG, and cold carcass weight [CCW]) in veal calves following oral metaphylaxis. A retrospective cohort study was conducted on 1,090 white veal calves originating from 3 Belgian veal herds. Clinical scoring and quick thoracic ultrasound (qTUS) follow-up were done by 4 experienced operators at arrival (wk 0), at the start of the first metaphylactic treatment with doxycycline (treatment initiation, wk 1), at the end of this metaphylactic treatment (short-term evaluation, wk 3) and on a long-term evaluation point (wk 10-12). Cure was defined as complete reaeration of previously consolidated lung tissue. Pathogens were identified using culture and nanopore sequencing. One week after arrival, healthy lungs (no consolidation), mild pneumonia (consolidation <1 cm), moderate pneumonia (consolidation ≥1 but <3 cm), and severe pneumonia (consolidation ≥3 cm) were identified in 46.9%, 12.4%, 21.4%, and 19.4% of calves, respectively. Short-term cure was 59.3% for calves with mild pneumonia, 50.2% for calves with moderate pneumonia, and 32.7% for calves with severe pneumonia, resulting in a total short-term cure of 45.9%. Coronavirus, respiratory syncytial virus, influenza D virus, and Mycoplasmopsis bovis were circulating during treatment. At the long-term evaluation point (wk 10-12), final cure was 59.3%, 55.8%, and 40.3% for calves with mild, moderate, and severe pneumonia at treatment initiation, respectively. Multivariable regression models indicated that different interactions between qTUS categories and number of affected quadrants were associated with short- and long-term odds of cure. Generated models resulted in 3 classification methods, either based on maximum consolidation depth, number of affected quadrants, or an integrated system of both. Calves with clinical pneumonia (Wisconsin score ≥5 and lung consolidation ≥1 cm) had decreased short-term odds to be cured after metaphylaxis compared with calves with subclinical pneumonia (Wisconsin score <5 and lung consolidation ≥1 cm; odds ratio = 0.43; 95% CI: 0.27-0.67). For calves with severe pneumonia in wk 10-12, when compared with calves in a lower qTUS category, ADG and CCW were reduced by 104 g/d (SD = 13; 95% CI: 78-130) and 7.1 kg (SD = 1.9; 95% CI: 3.4-10.9), respectively. Categorization based on maximum consolidation depth, the number of affected quadrants, or an integrated system of both has the potential to be included in an ultrasound scoring system. However, based on the practicality for recording, reporting, and follow-up, the authors recommend categorizing calves into mild, moderate, and severe pneumonia based on maximum consolidation depth measurement, referred to as qTUS score, as a practical classification system for ultrasonographic lung assessment in calves.
authors: Stan Jourquin, Thomas Lowie, Florian Debruyne, Laurens Chantillon, Mathilde L Pas, Justine Clinquart, Randy Boone, Jade Bokma, Bart Pardon

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在探讨基于超声分类系统（最大实变深度、实变象限数量和实变位置）、临床指标与性能结果（超声治愈率、日增重和冷胴体重）在口服预防性治疗后的犊牛中的关联。研究发现，不同超声分类与受影响象限数量的交互作用与短期和长期治愈率有关。基于最大实变深度、受影响象限数量或两者的综合系统可作为超声评分系统的潜在方法。
ai.translation: 本研究的主要目的是确定基于超声的分类系统（使用最大实变深度、实变象限数量和实变位置）、临床指标与性能结果（超声治愈率、日增重 [ADG] 和冷胴体重 [CCW]）在口服预防性治疗后的犊牛中的关联。本研究是一项回顾性队列研究，共纳入来自比利时 3 个犊牛场的 1,090 头白色犊牛。临床评分和快速胸部超声（qTUS）随访由 4 名经验丰富的操作者在到达时（第 0 周）、开始首次使用多西环素的预防性治疗时（治疗开始，第 1 周）、该预防性治疗结束时（短期评估，第 3 周）以及长期评估点（第 10-12 周）进行。治愈被定义为之前实变肺组织的完全再通气。病原体通过培养和纳米孔测序进行鉴定。在到达后一周，46.9% 的犊牛表现出健康的肺部（无实变），12.4% 的犊牛表现出轻度肺炎（实变 <1 cm），21.4% 的犊牛表现出中度肺炎（实变 ≥1 但 <3 cm），19.4% 的犊牛表现出重度肺炎（实变 ≥3 cm）。轻度肺炎犊牛的短期治愈率为 59.3%，中度肺炎为 50.2%，重度肺炎为 32.7%，总体短期治愈率为 45.9%。在治疗期间，冠状病毒、呼吸道合胞病毒、流感 D 病毒和牛支原体在传播。在长期评估点（第 10-12 周），初始治疗时轻度、中度和重度肺炎犊牛的最终治愈率分别为 59.3%、55.8% 和 40.3%。多变量回归模型表明，qTUS 分类与受影响象限数量之间的不同交互作用与短期和长期治愈率有关。生成的模型产生了三种分类方法，分别基于最大实变深度、受影响象限数量或两者的综合系统。临床肺炎（Wisconsin 评分 ≥5 且肺实变 ≥1 cm）犊牛在预防性治疗后的短期治愈率低于亚临床肺炎（Wisconsin 评分 <5 且肺实变 ≥1 cm）犊牛（比值比 = 0.43；95% 置信区间：0.27-0.67）。对于第 10-12 周的重度肺炎犊牛，与较低 qTUS 分类的犊牛相比，ADG 和 CCW 分别减少了 104 g/d（标准差 = 13；95% 置信区间：78-130）和 7.1 kg（标准差 = 1.9；95% 置信区间：3.4-10.9）。基于最大实变深度、受影响象限数量或两者的综合系统分类可能被纳入超声评分系统。然而，基于记录、报告和随访的实用性，作者建议根据最大实变深度测量将犊牛分为轻度、中度和重度肺炎，称为 qTUS 评分，作为犊牛超声肺部评估的实用分类系统。

title: Somatic instability of the FGF14-SCA27B GAA•TTC repeat reveals a marked expansion bias in the cerebellum.
abstract: Spinocerebellar ataxia 27B (SCA27B) is a common autosomal dominant ataxia caused by an intronic GAA•TTC repeat expansion in FGF14. Neuropathological studies have shown that neuronal loss is largely restricted to the cerebellum. Although the repeat locus is highly unstable during intergenerational transmission, it remains unknown whether it exhibits cerebral mosaicism and progressive instability throughout life. We conducted an analysis of the FGF14 GAA•TTC repeat somatic instability across 156 serial blood samples from 69 individuals, fibroblasts, induced pluripotent stem cells and post-mortem brain tissues from six controls and six patients with SCA27B, alongside methylation profiling using targeted long-read sequencing. Peripheral tissues exhibited minimal somatic instability, which did not significantly change over periods of more than 20 years. In post-mortem brains, the GAA•TTC repeat was remarkably stable across all regions, except in the cerebellar hemispheres and vermis. The levels of somatic expansion in the cerebellar hemispheres and vermis were, on average, 3.15 and 2.72 times greater relative to other examined brain regions, respectively. Additionally, levels of somatic expansion in the brain increased with repeat length and tissue expression of FGF14. We found no significant difference in methylation of wild-type and expanded FGF14 alleles in post-mortem cerebellar hemispheres between patients and controls. In conclusion, our study revealed that the FGF14 GAA•TTC repeat exhibits a cerebellar-specific expansion bias, which may explain the pure cerebellar involvement in SCA27B.
authors: David Pellerin, Jean-Loup Méreaux, Susana Boluda, Matt C Danzi, Marie-Josée Dicaire, Claire-Sophie Davoine, David Genis, Guinevere Spurdens, Catherine Ashton, Jillian M Hammond, Brandon J Gerhart, Viorica Chelban, Phuong U Le, Maryam Safisamghabadi, Christopher Yanick, Hamin Lee, Sathiji K Nageshwaran, Gabriel Matos-Rodrigues, Zane Jaunmuktane, Kevin Petrecca, Schahram Akbarian, André Nussenzweig, Karen Usdin, Mathilde Renaud, Céline Bonnet, Gianina Ravenscroft, Mario A Saporta, Jill S Napierala, Henry Houlden, Ira W Deveson, Marek Napierala, Alexis Brice, Laura Molina Porcel, Danielle Seilhean, Stephan Zuchner, Alexandra Durr, Bernard Brais

ai.TLDR: SCA27B是一种由FGF14基因内含子中GAA•TTC重复序列扩增引起的常染色体显性共济失调。研究发现，这种重复序列在小脑中表现出显著的体细胞扩增，而其他脑区则相对稳定。这可能解释了SCA27B的纯小脑受累特征。
ai.translation: 脊髓小脑共济失调27B（SCA27B）是一种常见的常染色体显性共济失调，由FGF14基因内含子中的GAA•TTC重复序列扩增引起。神经病理学研究表明，神经元损失主要局限于小脑。尽管该重复序列在代际传递过程中高度不稳定，但尚不清楚其是否在生命过程中表现出脑部镶嵌现象和渐进性不稳定性。我们分析了69名个体的156份连续血液样本、成纤维细胞、诱导多能干细胞以及6名对照组和6名SCA27B患者的死后脑组织中FGF14 GAA•TTC重复序列的体细胞不稳定性，并结合靶向长读长测序进行甲基化分析。外周组织表现出极低的体细胞不稳定性，且在超过20年的时期内没有显著变化。在死后脑组织中，GAA•TTC重复序列在所有区域均表现出显著的稳定性，除了小脑半球和蚓部。小脑半球和蚓部的体细胞扩增水平分别比其他检查的脑区高3.15倍和2.72倍。此外，脑组织中体细胞扩增水平随着重复序列长度和FGF14的组织表达水平而增加。我们发现，在死后小脑半球中，患者和对照组之间的野生型和扩增型FGF14等位基因的甲基化水平没有显著差异。总之，我们的研究揭示了FGF14 GAA•TTC重复序列在小脑中表现出的特异性扩增偏向性，这可能解释了SCA27B的纯小脑受累特征。

title: Unraveling Clinical Glycoproteome by Integrating Affinity Enrichment with Nanopore Sequencing.
journal: Chembiochem : a European journal of chemical biology
abstract: This prospect explores the integration of enrichment strategies with nanopore detection to advance clinical glycoproteomics. Glycoproteins, crucial for understanding biological processes, pose challenges due to their low abundance and structural diversity. Enrichment techniques using lectin affinity, boronate affinity, and hydrazide chemistry and especially molecular imprinted polymers may selectively and specifically isolate glycoproteins from complex samples, while nanopore technology enables label-free, real-time, and single-molecule analysis. This approach holds promise for disease-related glycosylation studies, biomarker discovery, personalized medicine, and streamlined clinical analysis. Standardization, optimization, and data analysis remain challenges, requiring interdisciplinary collaborations and technological advancements. Overall, this integration may offer transformative potential for clinical glycoproteomics and innovative diagnostic and therapeutic strategies.
authors: Irshad Ali, Muhammad Mujahid Ali, Quanjun Liu, Lianghai Hu

ai.TLDR: 本文探讨了将富集策略与纳米孔检测技术结合，以推动临床糖蛋白组学的发展。该方法有望在疾病相关糖基化研究、生物标志物发现和个性化医疗中发挥重要作用。
ai.translation: 本展望探讨了将富集策略与纳米孔检测技术相结合，以推动临床糖蛋白组学的发展。糖蛋白对于理解生物过程至关重要，但由于其低丰度和结构多样性，研究面临挑战。利用凝集素亲和力、硼酸盐亲和力、肼化学以及特别是分子印迹聚合物的富集技术，可以有选择性且特异性地从复杂样本中分离糖蛋白，而纳米孔技术则能够实现无标签、实时和单分子分析。这种方法在疾病相关糖基化研究、生物标志物发现、个性化医疗和临床分析流程优化方面具有广阔前景。标准化、优化和数据分析仍然是挑战，需要跨学科合作和技术创新。总体而言，这种整合可能为临床糖蛋白组学提供变革性的潜力，并推动创新的诊断和治疗策略。

title: Molecular characterisation of human rabies in Tanzania and Kenya: a case series report and phylogenetic investigation.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Rabies remains a major public health problem in low- and middle-income countries. However, human rabies deaths are rarely laboratory-confirmed or sequenced, especially in Africa. Five human rabies deaths from Tanzania and Kenya were investigated and the causative rabies viruses sequenced, with the aim of identifying implications for rabies control at individual, healthcare and societal levels.

CASE PRESENTATION: The epidemiological context and care of these cases was contrasting. Four had a clear history of being bitten by dogs, while one had an unclear biting history. Two individuals sought medical attention within a day of being bitten, whereas three sought care only after developing rabies symptoms. Despite seeking medical care, none of the cases received complete post-exposure prophylaxis: one patient received only tetanus vaccination, one did not complete the post-exposure vaccination regimen, one followed an off-label vaccination schedule, and two did not receive any post-exposure vaccinations before the onset of symptoms. These cases highlight serious gaps in health-seeking behaviour, and in health systems providing appropriate care following risky exposures, including in the accessibility and effectiveness of post-exposure prophylaxis as it is administered in the region.

CONCLUSIONS: The viral genomic and epidemiological data confirms dog-mediated rabies as the cause of each of these deaths. The phylogenetic investigation highlights the transboundary circulation of rabies within domestic dog populations, revealing distinct rabies virus clades with evidence of regional spread. These findings underscore the importance of coordinated cross-border control efforts between the two countries. Urgent action is needed to improve awareness around the need for emergency post-exposure vaccines that should be accessible in local communities and administered appropriately, as well as investment in coordinated dog vaccination to control dog-mediated rabies, the underlying cause of these deaths.
authors: Gurdeep Jaswant, Kathryn Campbell, Anna Czupryna, Athman Mwatondo, Brian Ogoti, Carmen W E Embregts, Corine H GeurtsvanKessel, Charles Kayuki, Davis Kuchaka, Gati Wambura, James Oigo, Joel Changalucha, Julius O Oyugi, Kennedy Lushasi, Lwitiko Sikana, Marco van Zwetselaar, Marieke C J Dekker, Mathew Muturi, Marybeth Maritim, Mumbua Mutunga, Rowan Durrant, Tom Abala, Veronicah Chuchu, Kirstyn Brunker, S M Thumbi, Katie Hampson

ai.TLDR: 狂犬病仍然是低收入和中等收入国家的主要公共卫生问题，但人类狂犬病死亡病例很少被实验室确认或进行基因测序，尤其是在非洲。本研究分析了坦桑尼亚和肯尼亚五例狂犬病死亡病例，揭示了暴露后预防措施的不足以及跨境犬类狂犬病传播的现状。研究强调了加强跨境合作和社区疫苗接种的重要性。
ai.translation:
背景：狂犬病仍然是低收入和中等收入国家的主要公共卫生问题。然而，人类狂犬病死亡病例很少被实验室确认或进行基因测序，尤其是在非洲。本研究调查了坦桑尼亚和肯尼亚五例人类狂犬病死亡病例，并对导致死亡的狂犬病毒进行了基因组测序，旨在识别对个体、医疗体系和社会层面狂犬病控制的启示。

病例呈现：这些病例的流行病学背景和医疗护理情况存在显著差异。四例患者有明确的被犬咬伤史，而一例的咬伤史不明确。两名患者在被咬后一天内寻求医疗帮助，而另外三名患者仅在出现狂犬病症状后才寻求医疗帮助。尽管寻求了医疗帮助，但这些病例中没有人接受了完整的暴露后预防措施：一名患者仅接受了破伤风疫苗，一名患者未完成暴露后疫苗接种方案，一名患者遵循了非标签的疫苗接种方案，两名患者在症状出现前未接受任何暴露后疫苗接种。这些病例突显了健康寻求行为中的严重不足，以及在风险暴露后提供适当护理的医疗体系中的缺陷，包括该地区暴露后预防措施的可及性和有效性。

结论：病毒基因组和流行病学数据确认了犬类传播是这些死亡的根源。系统发育分析突显了狂犬病毒在犬类种群中的跨境传播，揭示了具有区域传播证据的狂犬病毒谱系。这些发现强调了两国之间协调跨境控制措施的重要性。迫切需要采取行动，提高对紧急暴露后疫苗需求的认识，确保这些疫苗在本地社区中可及并正确使用，同时加大对协调犬类疫苗接种的投资，以控制犬类传播的狂犬病，这是这些死亡的根本原因。

title: A Cry For Kelp: Evidence for Polyphenolic Inhibition of Oxford Nanopore Sequencing of Brown Algae
abstract: Genomic resources for macroalgae are increasingly important for conservation and commercial management, however the generation of such resources continues to be hampered by difficulties in the isolation of suitable DNA. Even when DNA has been isolated that otherwise appears high quality, such samples may not perform well during the sequencing process. We here compare Oxford Nanopore long-read sequencing results for three species of macroalgae to those of non-macroalgal species and find that macroalgal samples tend to lead to rapid decline in the number of available sequencing pores resulting in reduced sequencing yield. LC-MS analysis of macroalgal DNA that would be considered suitable for sequencing reveals that DNA derived from dried macroalgae is enriched for polyphenol-DNA adducts - which may lead to sequencing inhibition. Our findings have wide-ranging implications for the generation of genomic resources from macroalgae, for example long read sequencing of dried herbarium specimens, and suggest a need to use fresh tissue wherever possible for genome sequencing.
authors: Pearman, W. S.; Arranz, V.; Carvajal, J. I.; Whibley, A.; Liau, Y.; Johnson, K.; Gray, R.; Treece, J. M.; Gemmell, N. J.; Liggins, L.; Fraser, C. I.; Jensen, E. L.; Green, N. J.

ai.TLDR: 宏藻基因组资源对保护和商业管理至关重要，但DNA提取困难限制了资源生成。研究发现干燥海藻DNA含有抑制测序的多酚-DNA加合物，建议优先使用新鲜组织进行基因组测序。
ai.translation: 宏藻基因组资源在保护和商业管理中日益重要，但此类资源的生成仍受制于适宜DNA的分离困难。即使分离出看似高质量的DNA样本，在测序过程中也可能表现不佳。本研究比较了三种宏藻物种与非宏藻物种的Oxford Nanopore长读长测序结果，发现宏藻样本会导致可用测序孔数量快速下降，从而降低测序产量。对被认为适合测序的宏藻DNA进行LC-MS分析显示，干燥宏藻来源的DNA富含多酚-DNA加合物，这可能导致测序抑制。我们的发现对宏藻基因组资源的生成具有广泛影响，例如干燥标本的长读长测序，建议尽可能使用新鲜组织进行基因组测序。

title: Vivaldi: An amplicon-based whole genome sequencing method for the four seasonal human coronaviruses 229E, NL63, OC43 & HKU1, alongside SARS-CoV-2
abstract:
Prior to the emergence of SARS-CoV-2 in 2019, Alphacoronaviruses 229E and NL63 and Betacoronaviruses OC43 and HKU1 were already established endemic  common cold viral infections. Despite their collective contribution towards global respiratory morbidity and mortality and potential to inform the future trajectory of SARS-CoV-2 endemicity, they are infrequently sequenced. We therefore developed a 1200bp amplicon-based whole genome sequencing scheme targeting all four seasonal coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2.

The  Vivaldi method was applied retrospectively and prospectively using Oxford Nanopore Technology to approximately 400 seasonal coronavirus infections diagnosed in Nottingham, UK, from February 2016 to July 2023. We demonstrate that the amplicon multiplex strategy can be applied agnostically to determine complete genomes of five different species from two coronaviral genera. 304 unique seasonal coronavirus genomes of greater than 95% coverage were achieved: 64 for 229E, 85 for NL63, 128 for OC43 and 27 for HKU1. They collectively indicated a dynamic seasonal coronavirus genomic landscape, with co-circulation of multiple variants emerging and declining over the UK winter respiratory infection season, with further geographical distinction when compared to a global dataset. Prolonged infection with concomitant intra-host evolution was also observed for both Alpha-(NL63) and Betacoronaviruses (OC43).

This data represents the largest single cohort of seasonal coronavirus genomes to date and also a novel amplicon scheme for their future global surveillance suitable for widespread and easy adoption in the post-SARS-CoV-2 era of viral genomics.
authors: McClure, C. P.; Tsoleridis, T.; Holmes, N.; Chappell, J. G.; Byaruhanga, T.; Duncan, J.; Tofan, M.; Khater, A.; Berry, L.; Clark, G.; Irving, W. L.; Tarr, A. W.; Ball, J. K.; Astbury, S.; Loose, M.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了季节性冠状病毒（229E、NL63、OC43、HKU1）的基因组多样性及进化动态，通过开发基于1200bp扩增子的全基因组测序方案，首次实现五种冠状病毒物种的完整基因组解析。该方法为后SARS-CoV-2时代的全球病毒监测提供了可扩展的技术框架。
ai.translation:
在2019年SARS-CoV-2出现之前，α冠状病毒229E和NL63以及β冠状病毒OC43和HKU1已形成稳定的流行性普通感冒病毒感染。尽管这些病毒对全球呼吸道疾病负担和死亡率有重要贡献，并可能影响SARS-CoV-2的流行趋势，但其基因组测序仍较为罕见。因此，我们开发了一种基于1200bp扩增子的全基因组测序方案，针对四种季节性冠状病毒及SARS-CoV-2。

Vivaldi方法通过牛津纳米孔技术，回顾性及前瞻性地应用于英国诺丁汉地区2016年2月至2023年7月诊断的约400例季节性冠状病毒感染病例。研究证明，扩增子多重策略可无偏倚地解析两个冠状病毒属中五种不同物种的完整基因组。共获得304个覆盖度超过95%的季节性冠状病毒基因组：229E 64个、NL63 85个、OC43 128个、HKU1 27个。这些数据揭示了动态的季节性冠状病毒基因组景观，显示英国冬季呼吸道感染季中多种变异株的共循环现象，并与全球数据集相比呈现地理差异。同时观察到α冠状病毒（NL63）和β冠状病毒（OC43）在宿主体内存在长期感染及持续进化现象。

该数据代表迄今为止最大的季节性冠状病毒基因组队列，并提供了适用于后SARS-CoV-2时代全球病毒监测的新型扩增子方案，具有广泛采用的可行性。

title: Targeted sequencing of Enterobacterales bacteria using CRISPR-Cas9 enrichment and Oxford Nanopore Technologies
abstract: Sequencing DNA directly from patient samples enables faster pathogen characterisation compared to traditional culture-based approaches, but often yields insufficient sequence data for effective downstream analysis. CRISPR-Cas9 enrichment is designed to improve yield of low abundance sequences but has not been thoroughly explored with Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) for use in clinical bacterial epidemiology. We designed CRISPR-Cas9 guide RNAs to enrich for the human pathogen Klebsiella pneumoniae, by targeting multi-locus sequence type (MLST) and transfer RNA (tRNA) genes, as well as common antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes and the resistance-associated integron gene intI1. We validated enrichment performance in bacterial isolates before comparing enriched and unenriched sequencing of three human faecal samples spiked with K. pneumoniae at varying abundance. Enriched sequencing generated 56x and 11.3x the number of AMR and MLST reads respectively compared to unenriched sequencing and required approximately one third of the computational storage space. Targeting the intI1 gene often led to detection of 10-20 proximal resistance genes due to the long reads produced by ONT sequencing. We demonstrated that CRISPR-Cas9 enrichment combined with ONT sequencing enabled improved genomic characterisation outcomes over unenriched sequencing of patient samples. This method could be used to inform infection control strategies by identifying patients colonised with high-risk strains.
authors: Cottingham, H.; Judd, L. M.; Wisniewski, J. A.; Wick, R. R.; Stanton, T. D.; Vezina, B.; Macesic, N.; Peleg, A. Y.; Okeke, I. N.; Holt, K. E.; Hawkey, J.

ai.TLDR: 直接从患者样本中测序DNA相比传统培养方法能更快地表征病原体，但常因序列数据不足影响下游分析。本研究通过CRISPR-Cas9富集技术结合ONT测序，显著提升了耐药基因和MLST的检测效率，同时降低计算存储需求。该方法可为感染控制策略提供高风险菌株的识别依据。
ai.translation: 直接从患者样本中进行DNA测序相较于传统培养方法能够更快地表征病原体，但通常产生的序列数据不足以支持有效的下游分析。CRISPR-Cas9富集技术旨在提升低丰度序列的产出，但其与牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）在临床细菌流行病学中的应用尚未被充分探索。我们设计了针对肺炎克雷伯菌（Klebsiella pneumoniae）的CRISPR-Cas9引导RNA，通过靶向多基因位点序列分型（MLST）和转运RNA（tRNA）基因，以及常见的抗菌耐药（AMR）基因和与耐药相关的整合子基因intI1进行富集。在比较富集与非富集测序对三份人工添加不同丰度肺炎克雷伯菌的人类粪便样本的分析前，我们首先验证了富集效果。富集测序产生的耐药基因读数是未富集测序的56倍，MLST读数是11.3倍，且所需计算存储空间约为未富集测序的三分之一。由于ONT测序产生的长读长，靶向intI1基因常导致检测到10-20个邻近的耐药基因。我们证明了CRISPR-Cas9富集结合ONT测序相较于未富集测序能够实现更优的基因组表征结果。该方法可用于通过识别携带高风险菌株的患者来制定感染控制策略。

title: MethPhaser: methylation-based long-read haplotype phasing of human genomes
abstract: The assignment of variants across haplotypes, phasing, is crucial for predicting the consequences, interaction, and inheritance of mutations and is a key step in improving our understanding of phenotype and disease. However, phasing is limited by read length and stretches of homozygosity along the genome. To overcome this limitation, we designed MethPhaser, a method that utilizes methylation signals from Oxford Nanopore Technologies to extend Single Nucleotide Variation (SNV)-based phasing. We demonstrate that haplotype-specific methylations extensively exist in Human genomes and the advent of long-read technologies enabled direct report of methylation signals. For ONT R9 and R10 cell line data, we increase the phase length N50 by 78%-151% at a phasing accuracy of 83.4-98.7% To assess the impact of tissue purity and random methylation signals due to inactivation, we also applied MethPhaser on blood samples from 4 patients, still showing improvements over SNV-only phasing. MethPhaser further improves phasing across *HLA* and multiple other medically relevant genes, improving our understanding of how mutations interact across multiple phenotypes. The concept of MethPhaser can also be extended to non-human diploid genomes. MethPhaser is available at <https://github.com/treangenlab/methphaser>.
authors: Yilei Fu, Sergey Aganezov, ... Fritz J. Sedlazeck
citation: Fu, Y., Aganezov, S., Mahmoud, M. et al. MethPhaser: methylation-based long-read haplotype phasing of human genomes. Nat Commun 15 , 5327 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49588-0
description: The assignment of variants across haplotypes, phasing, is crucial for predicting the consequences, interaction, and inheritance of mutations and is a...

ai.TLDR: MethPhaser通过整合甲基化信号解决了SNV分型中长读长技术的局限性，显著提升了相位分析的长度和准确性。该方法在HLA等医学相关基因的分型中表现出色，可扩展至非人类二倍体基因组。
ai.translation: 单倍型分型（phasing）在预测突变后果、相互作用及遗传特性中至关重要，是理解表型与疾病的关键步骤。然而，分型受读长长度和基因组同源区域的限制。为克服这一局限，我们设计了MethPhaser方法，利用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的甲基化信号扩展基于单核苷酸变异（SNV）的分型。我们证明人类基因组中存在大量单倍型特异性甲基化，长读长技术的出现使甲基化信号可直接报告。在ONT R9和R10细胞系数据中，分型长度N50在83.4-98.7%分型准确率下提升了78%-151%。为评估组织纯度和失活导致的随机甲基化信号的影响，我们对4名患者的血液样本应用MethPhaser，结果仍显示相比仅SNV分型有显著改进。MethPhaser进一步提升了HLA及多个医学相关基因的分型效果，加深了对突变跨多表型相互作用的理解。该方法概念可扩展至非人类二倍体基因组。MethPhaser可在https://github.com/treangenlab/methphaser获取。

title: Comparative analysis of culture- and ddPCR-based wastewater surveillance for carbapenem-resistant bacteria
abstract: With the widespread use of last-resort antibiotics, carbapenems, clinical reports of infections associated with carbapenem-resistant Enterobacterales (CRE) have increased. Clinical surveillance for CRE involves susceptibility testing and/or whole genome sequencing of resistant isolates, which is laborious, resource intensive, and requires expertise. Wastewater surveillance can potentially complement clinical surveillance of CRE, and population-level antibiotic resistance (AR) surveillance more broadly. In this study, we quantitatively and qualitatively compared two widely used methods for AR wastewater surveillance: (1) a culture-based approach for quantifying carbapenem-resistant bacteria and (2) a digital droplet PCR (ddPCR) assay targeting five major carbapenemase genes. We developed a multiplexed ddPCR assay to detect five carbapenemase genes and applied it to wastewater samples from three sites over 12 weeks. In parallel, we quantified carbapenem resistant bacteria and carbapenemase-producing bacteria using culture-based methods. We assessed associations between the concentrations of carbapenemase genes and resistant bacteria. Although both approaches showed similar trends in the overall abundance of dominant carbapenem-resistant bacteria and genes, there were weak correlations between the quantitative levels of resistance. Nanopore sequencing of the resistome of the carbapenem-resistant bacteria revealed that discrepancies arose from differences in the sensitivity and specificity of the methods. This study enhances our understanding of the application of wastewater surveillance in tracking carbapenem resistance and highlights how method choice impacts the results from AR wastewater surveillance.
authors: Zhou, S.; Lou, E. G.; Schedler, J.; Ensor, K. B.; Hopkins, L.; Stadler, L.

ai.TLDR: 随着碳青霉烯类抗生素的广泛使用，碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌（CRE）感染报告显著增加。现有临床监测方法存在耗时且资源密集的问题，本研究通过比较培养法与数字滴定PCR（ddPCR）两种废水监测方法，揭示了定量水平上的弱相关性，发现差异源于方法敏感性与特异性的不同。
keywords: 碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌（CRE）
ai.translation: 随着碳青霉烯类抗生素的广泛使用，临床报告中与碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌（CRE）相关的感染病例显著增加。临床监测CRE通常涉及耐药菌株的药敏试验和/或全基因组测序，但该过程耗时且资源密集，需要专业知识。废水监测可作为CRE临床监测的补充手段，并扩展至更广泛的人群抗生素耐药性（AR）监测。本研究定量和定性比较了两种常用的AR废水监测方法：（1）用于量化碳青霉烯类耐药细菌的培养法；（2）针对五种主要碳青霉烯酶基因的数字滴定PCR（ddPCR）检测。我们开发了一种多重ddPCR检测方法，用于检测五种碳青霉烯酶基因，并将其应用于三个采样点持续12周的废水样本。同时，我们采用培养法量化碳青霉烯耐药细菌和碳青霉烯酶产生菌。评估了碳青霉烯酶基因与耐药细菌浓度之间的关联性。尽管两种方法在优势菌株和基因的整体丰度趋势上相似，但耐药水平的定量结果呈现弱相关性。对耐药细菌的耐药基因组进行纳米孔测序发现，差异源于两种方法在敏感性和特异性上的不同。本研究加深了我们对废水监测在追踪碳青霉烯耐药性应用的理解，并强调了方法选择对AR废水监测结果的影响。

title: Benchmarking whole exome sequencing in the German network for personalized medicine.
abstract:
INTRODUCTION: Whole Exome Sequencing (WES) has emerged as an efficient tool in clinical cancer diagnostics to broaden the scope from panel-based diagnostics to screening of all genes and enabling robust determination of complex biomarkers in a single analysis.

METHODS: To assess concordance, six formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded (FFPE) tissue specimens and four commercial reference standards were analyzed by WES as matched tumor-normal DNA at 21 NGS centers in Germany, each employing local wet-lab and bioinformatics. Somatic and germline variants, copy-number alterations (CNAs), and complex biomarkers were investigated. Somatic variant calling was performed in 494 diagnostically relevant cancer genes. The raw data were collected and re-analyzed with a central bioinformatic pipeline to separate wet- and dry-lab variability.

RESULTS: The mean positive percentage agreement (PPA) of somatic variant calling was 76 % while the positive predictive value (PPV) was 89 % in relation to a consensus list of variants found by at least five centers. Variant filtering was identified as the main cause for divergent variant calls. Adjusting filter criteria and re-analysis increased the PPA to 88 % for all and 97 % for the clinically relevant variants. CNA calls were concordant for 82 % of genomic regions. Homologous recombination deficiency (HRD), tumor mutational burden (TMB), and microsatellite instability (MSI) status were concordant for 94 %, 93 %, and 93 % of calls, respectively. Variability of CNAs and complex biomarkers did not decrease considerably after harmonization of the bioinformatic processing and was hence attributed mainly to wet-lab differences.

CONCLUSION: Continuous optimization of bioinformatic workflows and participating in round robin tests are recommended.
authors: Michael Menzel, Mihaela Martis-Thiele, Hannah Goldschmid, Alexander Ott, Eva Romanovsky, Janna Siemanowski-Hrach, Lancelot Seillier, Nadina Ortiz Brüchle, Angela Maurer, Kjong-Van Lehmann, Matthias Begemann, Miriam Elbracht, Robert Meyer, Sebastian Dintner, Rainer Claus, Jan P Meier-Kolthoff, Eric Blanc, Markus Möbs, Maria Joosten, Manuela Benary, Patrick Basitta, Florian Hölscher, Verena Tischler, Thomas Groß, Oliver Kutz, Rebecca Prause, Doreen William, Kai Horny, Wolfgang Goering, Sugirthan Sivalingam, Arndt Borkhardt, Cornelia Blank, Stefanie V Junk, Layal Yasin, Evgeny A Moskalev, Maria Giulia Carta, Fulvia Ferrazzi, Lars Tögel, Steffen Wolter, Eugen Adam, Uta Matysiak, Tessa Rosenthal, Jürgen Dönitz, Ulrich Lehmann, Gunnar Schmidt, Stephan Bartels, Winfried Hofmann, Steffen Hirsch, Nicola Dikow, Kirsten Göbel, Rouzbeh Banan, Stefan Hamelmann, Annette Fink, Markus Ball, Olaf Neumann, Jan Rehker, Michael Kloth, Justin Murtagh, Nils Hartmann, Phillip Jurmeister, Andreas Mock, Jörg Kumbrink, Andreas Jung, Eva-Maria Mayr, Anne Jacob, Marcel Trautmann, Santina Kirmse, Kim Falkenberg, Christian Ruckert, Daniela Hirsch, Alexander Immel, Wolfgang Dietmaier, Tobias Haack, Ralf Marienfeld, Axel Fürstberger, Jakob Niewöhner, Uwe Gerstenmaier, Timo Eberhardt, Philipp A Greif, Silke Appenzeller, Katja Maurus, Julia Doll, Yvonne Jelting, Danny Jonigk, Bruno Märkl, Dieter Beule, David Horst, Anna-Lena Wulf, Daniela Aust, Martin Werner, Kirsten Reuter-Jessen, Philipp Ströbel, Bernd Auber, Felix Sahm, Sabine Merkelbach-Bruse, Udo Siebolts, Wilfried Roth, Silke Lassmann, Frederick Klauschen, Nadine T Gaisa, Wilko Weichert, Matthias Evert, Sorin Armeanu-Ebinger, Stephan Ossowski, Christopher Schroeder, Christian P Schaaf, Nisar Malek, Peter Schirmacher, Daniel Kazdal, Nicole Pfarr, Jan Budczies, Albrecht Stenzinger

ai.TLDR: 全外显子组测序（WES）在临床癌症诊断中被广泛用于扩展检测范围，从基于面板的诊断到全基因筛查，并能可靠地确定复杂生物标志物。研究评估了不同中心间WES结果的一致性，发现通过优化过滤标准和重新分析，可显著提高变异检测的一致性。
ai.translation:
引言：全外显子组测序（WES）已成为临床癌症诊断中的高效工具，使检测范围从基于面板的诊断扩展到全基因筛查，并能够在单次分析中可靠地确定复杂的生物标志物。

方法：为了评估一致性，六份福尔马林固定石蜡包埋（FFPE）组织样本和四个商业参考标准通过WES在德国的21个NGS中心进行分析，每个中心均采用本地湿实验和生物信息学流程。研究了体细胞和胚系变异、拷贝数变异（CNAs）以及复杂生物标志物。在494个诊断相关的癌症基因中进行了体细胞变异的检测。原始数据被收集并使用中央生物信息学流程重新分析，以区分湿实验和干实验的差异。

结果：体细胞变异检测的平均阳性百分比一致（PPA）为76%，而阳性预测值（PPV）在至少五个中心发现的变异共识列表中为89%。变异过滤被确定为导致变异检测差异的主要原因。调整过滤标准并重新分析后，所有变异的PPA提高至88%，临床相关变异的PPA提高至97%。拷贝数变异（CNAs）在82%的基因组区域中一致。同源重组缺陷（HRD）、肿瘤突变负荷（TMB）和微卫星不稳定性（MSI）状态分别在94%、93%和93%的检测中一致。在生物信息学处理标准化后，CNAs和复杂生物标志物的变异性并未显著减少，因此主要归因于湿实验差异。

结论：建议持续优化生物信息学流程并参与轮询测试。

title: Nanopore Decoding with Speed and Versatility for Data Storage
abstract:
MotivationAs nanopore technology reaches ever higher throughput and accuracy, it becomes an increasingly viable candidate for reading out DNA data storage. Nanopore sequencing offers considerable flexibility by allowing long reads, real-time signal analysis, and the ability to read both DNA and RNA. We need flexible and efficient designs that match nanopores capabilities, but relatively few designs have been explored and many have significant inefficiency in read density, error rate, or compute time. To address these problems, we designed a new single-read per-strand decoder that achieves low byte error rates, offers high throughput, scales to long reads, and works well for both DNA and RNA molecules. We achieve these results through a novel soft decoding algorithm that can be effectively parallelized on a GPU. Our faster decoder allows us to study a wider range of system designs.

ResultsWe demonstrate our approach on HEDGES, a state-of-the-art DNA-constrained convolutional code. We implement one hard decoder that runs serially and two soft decoders that run on GPUs. Our evaluation for each decoder is applied to the same population of nanopore reads collected from a synthesized library of strands. These same strands are synthesized with a T7 promoter to enable RNA transcription and decoding. Our results show that the hard decoder has a byte error rate over 25%, while the prior state of the art soft decoder can achieve error rates of 2.25%. However, that design also suffers a low throughput of 183 seconds/read. Our new Alignment Matrix Trellis soft decoder improves throughput by 257x with the trade off of a higher byte error rate of 3.52% compared to the state-of-the-art. Furthermore, we use the faster speed of our algorithm to explore more design options. We show that read densities of 0.33 bits/base can be achieved, which is 4x larger than prior MSA-based decoders. We also compare RNA to DNA, and find that RNA has 85% as many error free reads as compared to DNA.

Availability and implementationSource code for our soft decoder and data used to generate figures is available publicly in the Github repository https://github.com/dna-storage/hedges-soft-decoder (10.5281/zenodo.11454877). All raw FAST5/FASTQ data is available at 10.5281/zenodo.11985454 and 10.5281/zenodo.12014515.

Contackvolkel@ncsu.edu or jtuck@ncsu.edu
authors: Volkel, K.; Hook, P. W.; Keung, A. J.; Timp, W.; Tuck, J. M.

ai.TLDR: 随着纳米孔技术在吞吐量和准确性上的提升，其在DNA数据存储中的应用前景愈发广阔。本文提出了一种新型单链读取软解码器，通过GPU并行化算法显著提升了读取效率和准确性，解决了传统解码器在吞吐量、错误率和计算时间上的不足。
ai.translation:
动机：随着纳米孔技术在吞吐量和准确性上的持续提升，其作为DNA数据存储读取方案的可行性日益增强。纳米孔测序通过支持长读长、实时信号分析以及同时读取DNA和RNA的能力，展现出显著的灵活性。然而现有设计在读取密度、错误率或计算时间方面存在显著效率不足。为解决这些问题，我们设计了一种新型单链读取解码器，实现了低字节错误率、高吞吐量、支持长读长，并适用于DNA和RNA分子。该成果通过一种可有效在GPU上并行化的新型软解码算法实现，使我们能够探索更广泛的系统设计。

结果：我们在HEDGES（最先进的DNA约束卷积码）上验证了该方法。我们实现了串行运行的硬解码器和两个基于GPU的软解码器。所有解码器均在相同的人工合成链库采集的纳米孔读取数据集上进行评估，这些链通过T7启动子合成以支持RNA转录和解码。结果表明，硬解码器的字节错误率超过25%，而传统软解码器的错误率为2.25%，但吞吐量仅为183秒/读取。我们的新型对齐矩阵维特比软解码器在错误率提升至3.52%的情况下，吞吐量提升257倍。此外，我们利用算法的高速度探索更多设计选项，证明0.33 bits/base的读取密度（是传统MSA解码器的4倍）。同时比较RNA与DNA发现，RNA的无错误读取量是DNA的85%。

可用性与实现：我们的软解码器源代码及生成图表使用的数据已公开在GitHub仓库（https://github.com/dna-storage/hedges-soft-decoder，10.5281/zenodo.11454877）。所有原始FAST5/FASTQ数据可通过10.5281/zenodo.11985454和10.5281/zenodo.12014515获取。

联系方式：volkel@ncsu.edu 或 jtuck@ncsu.edu

title: Enhancing public health outcomes with AI-powered clinical surveillance: Precise detection of COVID-19 variants using qPCR and nanopore sequencing.
journal: Journal of infection and public health
abstract:
BACKGROUND: We aimed to evaluate the efficacy of integrating the Varia5 multiplex assay (qPCR) and whole genome sequencing (WGS) for monitoring SARS-CoV-2, focusing on their overall performance in identifying various virus variants.

METHODS: This study included 140 naso-pharyngeal swab samples from individuals with suspected COVID-19. We utilized our self-developed Varia5 multiplex assay, which targets five viral genes linked to COVID-19 mutations, in conjunction with comprehensive genomic analysis performed through whole genome sequencing (WGS) using the Oxford Nanopore system. Machine learning was integrated to optimize the qPCR conditions and enhance the detection efficiency.

RESULTS: The Varia5 assay identified the prevalent BA.2.75 variant in 92 samples compared to that in 81 samples detected via WGS. The BA.5.2 variant, indicative of higher viral loads, was identified in 15 samples via Varia5 and in 14 samples via WGS.Furthermore, rare variants, such as BA.2.10, were identified. The mean Ct value was 18.36, with significant viral load differences noted between specific variants.

CONCLUSION: Our findings demonstrate that while WGS offers enhanced sensitivity and specificity for variant detection, qPCR remains crucial for large-scale testing because of its cost and time efficiency. The integrated approach, which combines both techniques, represents a more comprehensive monitoring algorithm that can improve public health strategies against pandemics such as COVID-19.
authors: Hsing-Yi Chung, Ming-Jr Jian, Chih-Kai Chang, Cherng-Lih Perng, Kuo-Sheng Hung, Chun-Hsiang Chiu, Hung-Sheng Shang

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了将Varia5多重检测（qPCR）与全基因组测序（WGS）结合用于监测SARS-CoV-2病毒变异的有效性，发现WGS在变异检测中具有更高的灵敏度和特异性，而qPCR在大规模检测中更具成本和时间优势。结合两种方法可提供更全面的监测策略，有助于提升公共卫生应对能力。
ai.translation:
背景：我们旨在评估将Varia5多重检测（qPCR）与全基因组测序（WGS）结合用于监测SARS-CoV-2病毒变异的有效性，重点关注其在识别多种病毒变异方面的整体性能。

方法：本研究包括140份鼻咽拭子样本，来自疑似COVID-19患者。我们使用了自主研发的Varia5多重检测方法，该方法针对与COVID-19突变相关的五个病毒基因，并结合通过牛津纳米孔系统进行的全面基因组分析。同时，我们整合了机器学习技术以优化qPCR条件并提高检测效率。

结果：Varia5检测在92份样本中识别出流行的BA.2.75变异，而WGS检测出81份样本。BA.5.2变异（表明病毒载量较高）在15份样本中被Varia5检测到，而在14份样本中被WGS检测到。此外，一些罕见变异如BA.2.10也被识别出来。平均Ct值为18.36，不同变异之间存在显著的病毒载量差异。

结论：我们的研究结果表明，尽管WGS在变异检测中具有更高的灵敏度和特异性，但由于其成本和时间效率，qPCR在大规模检测中仍然至关重要。结合两种技术的方法代表了一种更全面的监测算法，有助于提升对如COVID-19等大流行病的公共卫生应对策略。

title: Haplotype Inference Using Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing: Application toGSTA1Promoter
abstract: Recovering true haplotypes can have important clinical consequences. The laboratory process is difficult and is, therefore, most often done through inference. In this paper, we show that when using the Oxford nanopore sequencing technology, we could recover the true haplotypes of the *GSTA1* promoter region. Eight LCL cell lines with potentially ambiguous haplotypes were used to characterize the efficacy of Oxford nanopore sequencing to phase the correct GSTA1 promoter haplotypes. The results were compared to Sanger sequencing and inferred haplotypes in the 1000 genomes project. The average read length was 813 bp out of a total PCR length of 1336 bp. The best coverage of sequencing was in the middle of the PCR product and decreased to 50% at the PCR ends. SNPs separated by less than 200 bp showed > 90% of correct haplotypes, while at the distance of 1089 bp, this proportion still exceeded 58%. The number of cycles influences the generation of hybrid haplotypes but not extension or annealing time. The results demonstrate that this long sequencing reads methodology, can accurately determine the haplotypes without the need for inference. The technology proved to be robust but the success of phasing nonetheless depends on the distances and frequencies of SNPs.
authors: Vid Mlakar, Isabelle Dupanloup, ... Marc Ansari
citation: Mlakar, V., Dupanloup, I., Gloor, Y. et al. Haplotype Inference Using Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing: Application to GSTA1 Promoter. Mol Biotechnol 67 , 2512–2519 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s12033-024-01213-7
description: Recovering true haplotypes can have important clinical consequences. The laboratory process is difficult and is, therefore, most often done through...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过Oxford纳米孔测序技术成功恢复了GSTA1启动子区域的真实等位基因，验证了其在无需推断情况下准确分型的能力。实验显示，SNP间距与覆盖度显著影响分型效果，但技术本身具有稳健性。
ai.translation: 恢复真实等位基因对临床具有重要意义。由于实验室过程复杂，通常通过推断完成。本文展示使用Oxford纳米孔测序技术可成功恢复GSTA1启动子区域的真实等位基因。通过8株具有潜在模糊等位基因的LCL细胞系，验证了该技术分型正确GSTA1启动子等位基因的有效性。结果与Sanger测序及1000基因组项目推断等位基因进行对比。平均读长为813 bp（总PCR长度1336 bp）。测序覆盖度在PCR产物中间最高，两端降至50%。间距小于200 bp的SNP显示>90%正确等位基因，而间距1089 bp时该比例仍超58%。循环次数影响杂合等位基因生成，但不影响延伸或退火时间。结果证明该长读长测序方法可无需推断准确确定等位基因。技术证明具有稳健性，但分型成功仍依赖SNP间距和频率。

title: Nanopore sequencing for smear-negative pulmonary tuberculosis—a multicentre prospective study in China
journal: Annals of Clinical Microbiology and Antimicrobials
abstract:
### Purpose

In this prospective study, the diagnosis accuracy of nanopore sequencing-based *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* (MTB) detection was determined through examining bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) samples from pulmonary tuberculosis (PTB) -suspected patients. Compared the diagnostic performance of nanopore sequencing, mycobacterial growth indicator tube (MGIT) culture and Xpert MTB/rifampin resistance (MTB/RIF) assays.

### Methods

Specimens collected from suspected PTB cases across China from September 2021 to April 2022 were tested then assay diagnostic accuracy rates were compared.

### Results

Among the 111 suspected PTB cases that were ultimately diagnosed as PTB, the diagnostic rate of nanopore sequencing was statistically significant different from other assays (*P* < 0.05). Fleiss’ kappa values of 0.219 and 0.303 indicated fair consistency levels between MTB detection results obtained using nanopore sequencing versus other assays, respectively. Respective PTB diagnostic sensitivity rates of MGIT culture, Xpert MTB/RIF and nanopore sequencing of 36.11%, 40.28% and 83.33% indicated superior sensitivity of nanopore sequencing. Analysis of area under the curve (AUC), Youden’s index and accuracy values and the negative predictive value (NPV) indicated superior MTB detection performance for nanopore sequencing (with Xpert MTB/RIF ranking second), while the PTB diagnostic accuracy rate of nanopore sequencing exceeded corresponding rates of the other methods.

### Conclusions

In comparison with MGIT culture and Xpert MTB/RIF assays, BALF’s nanopore sequencing provided superior MTB detection sensitivity and thus is suitable for testing of sputum-scarce suspected PTB cases. However, negative results obtained using these assays should be confirmed based on additional evidence before ruling out a PTB diagnosis.
authors: Xiaojing Yan, Guoli Yang, ... Wenjuan Nie
citation: Yan, X., Yang, G., Wang, Y. et al. Nanopore sequencing for smear-negative pulmonary tuberculosis—a multicentre prospective study in China. Ann Clin Microbiol Antimicrob 23 , 51 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12941-024-00714-2
description: In this prospective study, the diagnosis accuracy of nanopore sequencing-basedMycobacterium tuberculosis(MTB) detection was determined...

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序在肺结核疑似患者支气管肺泡灌洗液样本中的诊断准确性，结果显示其敏感性显著优于结核菌生长指示管培养和Xpert MTB/RIF检测。纳米孔测序在曲线下面积、Youden指数和负预测值等指标上均表现更优，尤其适用于痰量不足的疑似肺结核病例检测。
keywords: 结核菌生长指示管培养
ai.translation:
### 目的
本前瞻性研究通过分析肺结核（PTB）疑似患者的支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）样本，评估基于纳米孔测序的结核分枝杆菌（MTB）检测的诊断准确性，并比较纳米孔测序、结核菌生长指示管培养（MGIT）和Xpert MTB/利福平耐药（MTB/RIF）检测的诊断性能。

### 方法
2021年9月至2022年4月期间，从中国疑似PTB病例中收集的样本进行了检测，随后比较各检测方法的诊断准确率。

### 结果
在最终确诊为PTB的111例疑似病例中，纳米孔测序的诊断率与其他检测方法存在统计学显著差异（P<0.05）。纳米孔测序与其它检测方法获得的MTB检测结果的Fleiss κ值分别为0.219和0.303，表明其一致性处于中等水平。MGIT培养、Xpert MTB/RIF和纳米孔测序的PTB诊断敏感性分别为36.11%、40.28%和83.33%，显示纳米孔测序具有更高的敏感性。通过分析曲线下面积（AUC）、Youden指数和准确率值以及负预测值（NPV）可知，纳米孔测序在MTB检测性能上表现更优（Xpert MTB/RIF排名第二），其PTB诊断准确率超过其他方法的对应值。

### 结论
与MGIT培养和Xpert MTB/RIF检测相比，BALF的纳米孔测序提供了更高的MTB检测敏感性，因此适用于痰量不足的疑似PTB病例检测。然而，在排除PTB诊断前，应基于额外证据确认这些检测方法的阴性结果。

title: Diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing technology in nontuberculous mycobacterial pulmonary disease.
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: To explore the diagnostic value of nanopore sequencing technology for detecting nontuberculous mycobacterial pulmonary disease (NTM-PD) in bronchial alveolar lavage fluid (BALF).

METHODS: A retrospective analysis was conducted on 83 patients with suspected NTM-PD admitted to Anhui Chest Hospital from January 2021 to November 2023. All patients underwent bronchoscopic examination, and BALF samples were collected for smear acid-fast staining, mycobacterial culture, and nanopore sequencing. The diagnostic efficiencies of these three methods were compared.

RESULTS: Among these patients, 27 were diagnosed with NTM-PD, 43 with pulmonary tuberculosis (PTB), and 13 with other lung diseases (OLD). The sensitivity, specificity, positive and negative predictive value of nanopore sequencing for diagnosing NTM-PD were 88.9%, 87.5%, 77.4%, and 94.2%, respectively. Nanopore sequencing demonstrated significantly higher sensitivity than smear and culture methods. The area under the receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve (AUC) for nanopore sequencing was 0.882, significantly higher than that of smear (0.547) and culture (0.658), with 

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing technology has high diagnostic efficiency for NTM-PD and can directly identify bacterial species, but specificity issues should be considered in clinical application.
authors: Wen-Hong Lin, Fei Tang, Sheng-Sheng Liu

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估纳米孔测序技术在支气管肺泡灌洗液中检测非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTM-PD）的诊断价值。结果显示，纳米孔测序在NTM-PD诊断中表现出较高的敏感性和特异性，优于传统方法。
ai.translation: 本研究的目的是探讨纳米孔测序技术在检测非结核分枝杆菌肺病（NTM-PD）中的诊断价值，特别是在支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）中的应用。研究方法为回顾性分析，纳入了2021年1月至2023年11月期间在安徽省胸科医院就诊的83名疑似NTM-PD患者。所有患者均接受了支气管镜检查，并收集了BALF样本进行抗酸染色、分枝杆菌培养和纳米孔测序。比较了这三种方法的诊断效率。研究结果显示，这83名患者中有27人被诊断为NTM-PD，43人被诊断为肺结核（PTB），13人被诊断为其他肺部疾病（OLD）。纳米孔测序在诊断NTM-PD中的敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值和阴性预测值分别为88.9%、87.5%、77.4%和94.2%。纳米孔测序的敏感性显著高于涂片和培养方法。纳米孔测序的受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线下面积（AUC）为0.882，显著高于涂片（0.547）和培养（0.658）的AUC值。结论是，纳米孔测序技术在NTM-PD的诊断中具有高效率，能够直接鉴定细菌种类，但在临床应用中应考虑其特异性问题。

title: Genomic Insights and Biocontrol Potential of Ten Bacterial Strains from the Tomato Core Microbiome
abstract: Despite their adverse environmental effects, modern agriculture relies heavily on agrochemicals to manage diseases and pests and enhance plant growth and productivity. Some of these functions could instead be fulfilled by endophytes from the plant microbiota, which have diverse activities beneficial for plant growth and health. We therefore used a microbiome-guided top-down approach to select ten bacterial strains from different taxa in the core microbiome of tomato plants in the production chain for evaluation as potential bioinoculants. These taxa included some that are commonly used as biofertilizers and biocontrol agents (Pseudomonas and Bacillus) as well as the less studied genera Leclercia, Chryseobacterium, Glutamicibacter, and Paenarthorbacter. When inoculated in the tomato rhizosphere, these strains promoted plant growth and reduced the severity of Fusarium Crown and Root Rot and Bacterial Spot infections. High-quality genomes for each strain were obtained using Oxford Nanopore long-read and Illumina short-read sequencing, enabling the dissection of their genetic makeup to identify phyto-beneficial traits. This yielded a comprehensive inventory of genes from each strain related to processes including colonization, biofertilization, phytohormones, and plant signaling. Traits directly relevant to fertilization including phosphate solubilization and acquisition of nitrogen and iron were also identified. Moreover, the strains carried several functional genes putatively involved in abiotic stress alleviation and biotic stress management, traits that indirectly foster plant health and growth. The gathered genomic information will be instrumental in planning the use of these bacteria individually or in consortia to enhance plant growth by coupling strains with different traits, effects, and mechanisms of action.
authors: Nicotra, D.; Ghadamgahi, F.; Ghosh, S.; Anzalone, A.; Dimaria, G.; Mosca, A.; Massimino, M. E.; Vetukuri, R. R.; Catara, V.

ai.TLDR: 现代农业依赖农药管理病虫害和提升作物产量，但内生菌可替代部分功能。通过微生物组引导的自上而下方法筛选出10种番茄核心菌群细菌株，发现其能促进生长并抑制两种病害。基因组分析揭示了与植物共生、养分获取及胁迫缓解相关的功能基因。
keywords: 微生物组引导的自上而下方法
ai.translation: 尽管对环境有负面影响，现代农业仍严重依赖农用化学品来管理病虫害并提升植物生长与产量。部分功能可通过植物微生物组中的内生菌实现，这些菌株具有促进植物生长和健康的多样化活性。因此，我们采用微生物组引导的自上而下方法，从番茄生产链核心微生物组中不同分类群中筛选出10种细菌株作为潜在生物菌肥进行评估。这些分类群包括常用于生物肥料和生物防治的假单胞菌属和芽孢杆菌属，以及较少研究的利斯特氏菌属、黄杆菌属、谷氨酸芽孢杆菌属和泛arthorbacter属。当这些菌株接种于番茄根际时，可促进植物生长并减轻镰刀菌冠腐病和细菌性斑点病的严重程度。通过Oxford Nanopore长读长测序和Illumina短读长测序获得每株菌的高质量基因组，解析其遗传组成以识别植物有益特性。这为每株菌与定殖、生物固氮、植物激素及植物信号传导相关的基因提供了全面清单。还鉴定了与肥料相关的关键特性，包括磷酸溶解、氮和铁的获取能力。此外，这些菌株携带多个可能参与非生物胁迫缓解和生物胁迫管理的功能基因，这些特性间接促进植物健康与生长。收集的基因组信息将有助于规划这些细菌单独或联合使用以增强植物生长，通过结合具有不同特性、效应和作用机制的菌株。

title: Rapid genotyping ofToxoplasma gondiiisolates via Nanopore-based multi-locus sequencing
abstract: *Toxoplasma gondii* is an obligate intracellular parasite associated with severe disease, especially in the immunosuppressed. It is also a cause of congenital malformation and abortion in both animals and humans and is considered one of the most important foodborne pathogens worldwide with different strains showing variable distribution and differing pathogenicity. Thus, strain-level differentiation of *T. gondii* isolates is an essential asset in the understanding of parasite’s diversity, geographical distribution, epidemiology and health risk. Here, we designed and implemented an Oxford Nanopore MinION protocol to analyse genomic sequence variation including single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) and insertion/deletion polymorphisms (InDel’s) of four different genomic loci, part of protein coding genes *SAG2, SAG3, ROP17* and *ROP21*. This method provided results with the sequencing depth necessary for accurate differentiation of *T. gondii* strains and represents a rapid approach compared to conventional techniques which we further validated against environmental samples isolated from wild wood mice. In summary, multi-locus sequence typing (MLST) of both highly conserved and more polymorphic areas of the genome, provided robust data for strain classification in a platform ready for further adaption for other strains and pathogens.
authors: Zisis Koutsogiannis, Paul W. Denny
citation: Koutsogiannis, Z., Denny, P.W. Rapid genotyping of Toxoplasma gondii isolates via Nanopore-based multi-locus sequencing. AMB Expr 14 , 68 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13568-024-01728-x

ai.TLDR: 弓形虫（Toxoplasma gondii）作为重要食源性病原体，其菌株水平区分对理解寄生虫多样性、地理分布和健康风险至关重要。本研究通过MinION测序技术实现多基因位点分型，提供快速准确的菌株分型方法，并验证了其在环境样本中的适用性。
ai.translation: 弓形虫（Toxoplasma gondii）是一种与严重疾病相关的专性细胞内寄生虫，尤其在免疫抑制人群中具有高致病性。该病原体也是动物和人类先天性畸形及流产的主要病因，被公认为全球最重要的食源性病原体之一，不同菌株在分布和致病性上存在显著差异。因此，弓形虫菌株水平的区分是理解寄生虫多样性、地理分布、流行病学和健康风险的关键资产。本研究设计并实施了基于Oxford Nanopore MinION平台的测序协议，分析四个基因组位点（SAG2、SAG3、ROP17和ROP21）的基因组序列变异，包括单核苷酸多态性（SNPs）和插入/缺失多态性（InDels）。该方法通过足够的测序深度实现了弓形虫菌株的准确区分，相较于传统技术具有更高的效率，并通过野外木鼠环境样本验证了其有效性。总结来看，对基因组中高度保守区域和多态性区域进行多基因位点序列分型（MLST），为菌株分类提供了可靠数据，并为其他病原体的适应性研究奠定了平台基础。

title: Dispensable genome and segmental duplications drive the genome plasticity in Fusarium solani
abstract: Fusarium solani is a species complex encompassing a large phylogenetic clade with diverse members occupying varied habitats. We recently reported a unique opportunistic F. solani associated with unusual dark galls in sugarbeet. We assembled the chromosome-level genome of the F. solani sugarbeet isolate strain SB1 using Oxford Nanopore and Hi-C sequencing. SB1 has a large genome (59.38 Mb) organized into 15 chromosomes. The genome expansion is due to the high repeats and massive segmental duplications within its three potentially accessory chromosomes. These chromosomes are absent in the closest reference genome with chromosome-level assembly, F. vanettenii 77-13-4. The extensive segmental duplications between the two SB1 chromosomes suggest that this isolate may have doubled its accessory genes. Further comparison of the F. solani strain SB1 genome demonstrates inversions and syntenic regions to an accessory chromosome of F. vanettenii 77-13-4. The pan-genome of 12 publicly available F. solani isolates nearly reached gene saturation, with few new genes discovered after the addition of the last genome. Based on orthogroups and average nucleotide identity, F. solani is not grouped by lifestyle or origin. The pan-genome analysis further revealed the enrichment of several enzymes-coding genes within the dispensable (accessory + unique genes) genome, such as hydrolases, transferases, oxidoreductases, lyases, ligases, isomerase, and dehydrogenase. The evidence presented here suggests that genome plasticity, genetic diversity, and adaptive traits in Fusarium solani are driven by the dispensable genome with significant contributions from segmental duplications.
authors: Navasca, A. M.; Singh, J.; Rivera-Varas, V.; Gill, U.; Secor, G.; Baldwin, T. T.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了尖孢镰刀菌（Fusarium solani）基因组的可塑性特征，通过染色体水平基因组组装发现其与糖用甜菜的特殊关联。该菌株SB1的基因组扩张主要由重复序列和段间重复导致，表明其具有显著的基因组多样性与适应性进化特征。
ai.translation: 尖孢镰刀菌（Fusarium solani）是一个包含大量系统发育类群的物种复合体，其成员占据多样化的生态环境。我们近期报道了一种与糖用甜菜异常暗色肿瘤相关的新机会性F. solani菌株。通过Oxford Nanopore和Hi-C测序技术，我们组装了该菌株SB1的染色体水平基因组。SB1具有59.38 Mb的大基因组，由15条染色体组成。基因组扩张主要归因于其三条潜在辅助染色体内的高重复序列和大规模段间重复。这些染色体在最近的参考基因组（F. vanettenii 77-13-4）中缺失。SB1两条染色体间的广泛段间重复表明该菌株可能实现了辅助基因组的加倍。进一步比较F. solani菌株SB1的基因组发现其存在与F. vanettenii 77-13-4辅助染色体的倒位和共线性区域。12个公开可用的F. solani菌株泛基因组接近基因饱和，新增基因数量极少。基于正交群和平均核苷酸身份分析，F. solani的菌株分类与其生活方式或起源无关。泛基因组分析进一步揭示了可变基因组（辅助+独特基因）中多种酶编码基因的富集，如水解酶、转移酶、氧化还原酶、裂解酶、连接酶、异构酶和脱氢酶。本研究证据表明，F. solani的基因组可塑性、遗传多样性和适应性特征主要由可变基因组驱动，其中段间重复贡献显著。

title: Tracking the genetic diversity of SARS-CoV-2 variants in Nicaragua throughout the COVID-19 Pandemic
abstract: The global circulation of SARS-CoV-2 has been extensively documented, yet the dynamics within Central America, particularly Nicaragua, remain underexplored. This study characterizes the genomic diversity of SARS-CoV-2 in Nicaragua from March 2020 through December 2022, utilizing 1064 genomes obtained via next-generation sequencing. These sequences were selected nationwide and analyzed for variant classification, lineage predominance, and phylogenetic diversity. We employed both Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies for all sequencing procedures. Results indicated a temporal and spatial shift in dominant lineages, initially from B.1 and A.2 in early 2020 to various Omicron subvariants towards the studys end. Significant lineage shifts correlated with changes in COVID-19 positivity rates, underscoring the epidemiological impact of variant dissemination. The comparative analysis with regional data underscored the low diversity of circulating lineages in Nicaragua and their delayed introduction compared to other countries in the Central American region. The study also linked specific viral mutations with hospitalization rates, emphasizing the clinical relevance of genomic surveillance. This research advances the understanding of SARS-CoV-2 evolution in Nicaragua and provide valuable information regarding its genetic diversity for public health officials in Central America. We highlight the critical role of ongoing genomic surveillance in identifying emergent lineages and informing public health strategies.
authors: Vasquez Aleman, G.; Cerpas, C.; G. Juarez, J.; Moreira, H.; Arguello, S.; Coloma, J.; Harris, E.; Gordon, A.; N. Bennett, S.; Balmaseda, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过分析尼加拉瓜2020年3月至2022年12月的1064个SARS-CoV-2基因组序列，揭示了病毒谱系的时间空间演变规律。研究发现主要谱系从早期的B.1/A.2逐渐转变为多种奥密克戎亚变种，突显了基因组监测在公共卫生决策中的关键作用。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2在全球范围的传播已得到充分记录，但中美洲地区，特别是尼加拉瓜的病毒动态仍缺乏深入研究。本研究通过分析2020年3月至2022年12月期间获得的1064个尼加拉瓜SARS-CoV-2基因组序列，系统刻画了该国病毒的基因组多样性。所有测序工作采用Illumina和牛津纳米孔技术完成，通过全国范围的序列筛选，分析了变异分类、谱系优势度和系统发育多样性特征。研究发现主要流行谱系呈现显著的时间与空间变化，早期以B.1和A.2谱系为主，后期逐渐转变为多种奥密克戎亚变种。谱系变化与新冠阳性率波动存在显著相关性，凸显了变异株传播的流行病学影响。与区域数据的比较分析表明，尼加拉瓜流行谱系的多样性较低且引入时间较周边国家滞后。研究还发现特定病毒突变与住院率存在关联，强调了基因组监测的临床价值。该研究深化了对尼加拉瓜SARS-CoV-2进化规律的认识，为中美洲公共卫生官员提供了重要的遗传多样性信息。我们强调持续的基因组监测在识别新兴谱系和制定公共卫生策略中的关键作用。

title: GCRTcall: a Transformer based basecaller for nanopore RNA sequencing enhanced by gated convolution and relative position embedding via joint loss training
abstract: Nanopore sequencing, renowned for its ability to sequence DNA and RNA directly with read lengths extending to several hundred kilobases or even megabases, holds significant promise in fields like transcriptomics and other omics studies. Despite its potential, the technologys limited accuracy in base identification has restricted its widespread application. Although many algorithms have been developed to improve DNA decoding, advancements in RNA sequencing remain limited. Addressing this challenge, we introduce GCRTcall, a novel approach integrating Transformer architecture with gated convolutional networks and relative positional encoding for RNA sequencing signal decoding. Our evaluation demonstrates that GCRTcall achieves state-of-the-art performance in RNA basecalling.
authors: Li, Q.; Sun, C.; Wang, D.; Lou, J.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序因可直接对DNA/RNA进行长读长测序（可达数百千碱基甚至兆碱基）在转录组学等领域展现潜力，但其碱基识别准确率不足限制了应用。本文提出的GCRTcall方法通过整合Transformer架构与门控卷积网络，实现了RNA测序信号解码的突破性进展。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序因其能够直接对DNA和RNA进行测序，且读长可延伸至数百千碱基甚至兆碱基，在转录组学及其他组学研究领域展现出重要应用前景。尽管该技术具有显著潜力，但其在碱基识别方面的有限准确性仍制约了其广泛应用。虽然已有多种算法被开发用于提升DNA解码性能，但RNA测序技术的进步仍相对有限。为解决这一挑战，我们提出GCRTcall，这是一种新型RNA测序信号解码方法，通过整合Transformer架构、门控卷积网络以及相对位置编码技术。我们的评估结果表明，GCRTcall在RNA碱基识别任务中达到了最先进的性能水平。

title: Amplified DNA Heterogeneity Assessment with Oxford Nanopore Sequencing Applied to Cell Free Expression Templates
abstract: In this work, Oxford Nanopore sequencing is tested as an accessible method for quantifying heterogeneity of amplified DNA. This method enables rapid quantification of deletions, insertions, and substitutions, the probability of each mutation error, and their locations in the replicated sequences. Amplification techniques tested were conventional polymerase chain reaction (PCR) with varying levels of polymerase fidelity (OneTaq, Phusion, and Q5) as well as rolling circle amplification (RCA) with Phi29 polymerase. Plasmid amplification using bacteria was also assessed. By analyzing the distribution of errors in a large set of sequences for each sample, we examined the heterogeneity and mode of errors in each sample. This analysis revealed that Q5 and Phusion polymerases exhibited the lowest error rates observed in the amplified DNA. As a secondary validation, we analyzed the emission spectra of sfGFP fluorescent proteins synthesized with amplified DNA using cell free expression. Error-prone polymerase chain reactions confirmed the dependency of reporter protein emission spectra peak broadness to DNA error rates. The presented nanopore sequencing methods serve as a roadmap to quantify the accuracy of other gene amplification techniques, as they are discovered, enabling more homogenous cell-free expression of desired proteins.
authors: Hejazi, S. S.; Hejazi, S. S.; Kashani, M.; Reuel, N. F.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过牛津纳米孔测序技术评估了DNA扩增异质性的量化方法，发现Q5和Phusion聚合酶具有最低的错误率。通过细胞外表达验证了DNA错误率与荧光蛋白发射光谱的关系，为基因扩增技术的准确性评估提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 本研究测试了牛津纳米孔测序作为量化扩增DNA异质性的可及性方法。该方法能够快速量化缺失、插入和替换等突变错误的概率及其在复制序列中的位置。测试的扩增技术包括不同保真度水平的常规聚合酶链反应（PCR）（OneTaq、Phusion和Q5）以及使用Phi29聚合酶的滚环扩增（RCA），同时评估了通过细菌进行质粒扩增的效果。通过分析每个样本中大量序列的错误分布，我们考察了样本的异质性及错误模式。分析结果表明，Q5和Phusion聚合酶在扩增DNA中表现出最低的错误率。作为二次验证，我们通过细胞外表达分析了使用扩增DNA合成的sfGFP荧光蛋白的发射光谱。错误易发的PCR反应证实了报告蛋白发射光谱峰宽与DNA错误率之间的依赖关系。所展示的纳米孔测序方法为量化其他基因扩增技术的准确性提供了路线图，这些技术在被发现时能够实现更均质的细胞外目标蛋白表达。

title: BaseNet: A Transformer-Based Toolkit for Nanopore Sequencing Signal Decoding
abstract: Nanopore sequencing provides a rapid, convenient and high-throughput solution for nucleic acid sequencing. Accurate basecalling in nanopore sequencing is crucial for downstream analysis. Traditional approaches such as Hidden Markov Models (HMM), Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN), and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have improved basecalling accuracy but there is a continuous need for higher accuracy and reliability. In this study, we introduce BaseNet, an open-source toolkit that utilizes transformer models for advanced signal decoding in nanopore sequencing. BaseNet incorporates both autoregressive and non-autoregressive transformer-based decoding mechanisms, offering state-of-the-art algorithms freely accessible for future improvement. Our research indicates that cross-attention weights effectively map the relationship between current signals and base sequences, joint loss training through adding a pair of forward and reverse decoder facilitate model converge, and large-scale pre-trained models achieve superior decoding accuracy. This study helps to advance the field of nanopore sequencing signal decoding, contributes to technological advancements, and provides novel concepts and tools for researchers and practitioners.
authors: Li, Q.; Sun, C.; Wang, D.; Lou, J.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术通过Transformer模型实现了高精度的碱基调用，BaseNet工具包提供了先进的信号解码方案。研究显示交叉注意力权重能有效映射电流信号与碱基序列关系，预训练模型显著提升了解码准确性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序技术为核酸测序提供了快速、便捷且高通量的解决方案。在纳米孔测序中，准确的碱基调用对后续分析至关重要。传统方法如隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）、循环神经网络（RNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）虽已提升碱基调用准确性，但仍需更精确可靠的解决方案。本研究引入了BaseNet，这是一个开源工具包，利用Transformer模型实现纳米孔测序的先进信号解码。BaseNet结合了自回归和非自回归的Transformer解码机制，提供了可自由访问的最先进算法以供未来改进。研究显示，交叉注意力权重有效映射了电流信号与碱基序列之间的关系，通过添加正向和反向解码器的联合损失训练促进了模型收敛，大规模预训练模型实现了卓越的解码准确性。本研究推动了纳米孔测序信号解码领域的发展，促进了技术进步，并为研究人员和从业者提供了新概念和工具。

title: Disruption of recombination machinery alters the mutational landscape in plant organellar genomes
abstract: Land plant organellar genomes have extremely low rates of point mutation yet also experience high rates of recombination and genome instability. Characterizing the molecular machinery responsible for these patterns is critical for understanding the evolution of these genomes. While much progress has been made towards understanding recombination activity in land plant organellar genomes, the relationship between recombination pathways and point mutation rates remains uncertain. The organellar targeted mutS homolog MSH1 has previously been shown to suppress point mutations as well as non-allelic recombination between short repeats in Arabidopsis thaliana. We therefore implemented high-fidelity Duplex Sequencing to test if other genes that function in recombination and maintenance of genome stability also affect point mutation rates. We found small to moderate increases in the frequency of single nucleotide variants (SNVs) and indels in mitochondrial and/or plastid genomes of A. thaliana mutant lines lacking radA, recA1, or recA3. In contrast, osb2 and why2 mutants did not exhibit an increase in point mutations compared to wild type (WT) controls. In addition, we analyzed the distribution of SNVs in previously generated Duplex Sequencing data from A. thaliana organellar genomes and found unexpected strand asymmetries and large effects of flanking nucleotides on mutation rates in WT plants and msh1 mutants. Finally, using long- read Oxford Nanopore sequencing, we characterized structural variants in organellar genomes of the mutant lines and show that different short repeat sequences become recombinationally active in different mutant backgrounds. Together, these complementary sequencing approaches shed light on how recombination may impact the extraordinarily low point mutation rates in plant organellar genomes.
authors: Waneka, G.; Broz, A. K.; Wold-McGimsey, F.; Zou, Y. B.; Wu, Z.; Sloan, D. B.

ai.TLDR: 植物线粒体和叶绿体基因组表现出极低的点突变率但高重组率。研究通过高保真双链测序发现，RAD A/REC A基因影响突变率，而OSB2/WHY2基因则无显著影响。研究揭示了重组路径与突变率之间的复杂关系，并发现突变存在链不对称性和邻近核苷酸效应。
ai.translation: 陆生植物的细胞器基因组表现出极低的点突变率，但同时存在高重组率和基因组不稳定性。解析导致这些特征的分子机制对理解其进化至关重要。尽管已取得重组活性研究的进展，但重组路径与点突变率的关系仍不明确。此前研究显示，线粒体靶向的mutS同源基因MSH1可抑制拟南芥的点突变和短重复序列间的非等位重组。因此，本研究采用高保真双链测序技术，检测参与重组和基因组稳定性的其他基因是否影响点突变率。结果发现，在缺乏radA、recA1或recA3的拟南芥突变体中，线粒体和/或叶绿体基因组的单核苷酸变异(SNVs)和插入缺失(indels)频率出现小到中等程度的增加。相比之下，osb2和why2突变体与野生型(WT)对照相比未表现出点突变率增加。此外，分析先前生成的双链测序数据发现，WT植株和msh1突变体中SNVs分布存在意外的链不对称性，且邻近核苷酸对突变率有显著影响。最后，通过长读长Oxford Nanopore测序，研究了突变体的基因组结构变异，发现不同短重复序列在不同突变背景中表现出不同的重组活性。这些互补的测序方法揭示了重组如何影响植物细胞器基因组异常低的点突变率。

title: A High-quality Oxford Nanopore Assembly of the Hourglass Dolphin (Sagmatias cruciger) Genome
abstract: The hourglass dolphin (Lagenorhynchus cruciger) is a small cetacean species of the Southern Ocean, with significance to iwi M[a]ori (M[a]ori tribes) of Aotearoa New Zealand as taonga (treasured/valued). Due to the remoteness and difficulty of surveying Antarctic waters, it remains one of the least-studied dolphin species. A recent stranding of an hourglass dolphin represented a rare opportunity to generate a genome assembly as a resource for future study into the conservation and evolutionary biology of this species. In this study, we present a high-quality genome assembly of an hourglass dolphin individual using a single sequencing platform, Oxford Nanopore Technologies, coupled with computationally efficient assembly methods. Our assembly strategy yielded a genome of high contiguity (N50 of 8.07 Mbp) and quality (98.3% BUSCO completeness). Compared to other Delphinoidea reference genomes, this assembly has fewer missing BUSCOs than any except Orcinus orca, more single-copy complete BUSCOs than any except Phocoena sinus, and 20% fewer duplicated BUSCOs than the average Delphinoidea reference genome. This suggests that it is one of the most complete and accurate marine mammal genomes to date. This study showcases the feasibility of a cost-effective mammalian genome assembly method, allowing for genomic data generation outside the traditional confines of academia and/or resource-rich genome assembly hubs, and facilitating the ability to uphold Indigenous data sovereignty. In the future the genome assembly presented here will allow valuable insights into the past population size changes, adaptation, vulnerability to future climate change of the hourglass dolphin and related species.
authors: McGrath, N.; le Roux, J.; Whibley, A.; Alexander, A.; Stewart, R. O.; Johnstone, M.; Stockin, K. A.; Silander, O. K.

ai.TLDR: 沙漏海豚作为南大洋濒危物种，其基因组研究面临采样困难。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台实现高质量基因组组装，N50达8.07 Mbp，BUSCO完整性达98.3%，成为目前最完整的海洋哺乳动物基因组之一。该成果为原住民数据主权提供技术支持，未来可揭示该物种种群动态与气候变化适应性。
ai.translation: 沙漏海豚（Lagenorhynchus cruciger）是南大洋小型鲸目物种，对新西兰毛利部落具有文化价值。由于南极水域调查困难，该物种仍是研究最少的海豚之一。近期一次搁浅事件为基因组研究提供契机。本研究采用Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台结合高效算法，完成高质量基因组组装。组装结果达到N50 8.07 Mbp和98.3% BUSCO完整性，相比其他海豚参考基因组，其缺失BUSCO数量少于除虎鲸外的所有物种，单拷贝完整BUSCO数量超过除江豚外的所有物种，重复BUSCO数量比平均值低20%。这表明该基因组是目前最完整准确的海洋哺乳动物基因组之一。研究展示了低成本基因组组装方法的可行性，突破传统学术机构和资源中心的限制，支持原住民数据主权。未来该基因组将助力研究沙漏海豚及近缘物种的种群历史变化、适应机制及气候变化脆弱性。

title: HiFi long-read amplicon sequencing for full-spectrum variants of human mtDNA
abstract:
### Background

Mitochondrial diseases (MDs) can be caused by single nucleotide variants (SNVs) and structural variants (SVs) in the mitochondrial genome (mtDNA). Presently, identifying deletions in small to medium-sized fragments and accurately detecting low-percentage variants remains challenging due to the limitations of next-generation sequencing (NGS).

### Methods

In this study, we integrated targeted long-range polymerase chain reaction (LR-PCR) and PacBio HiFi sequencing to analyze 34 participants, including 28 patients and 6 controls. Of these, 17 samples were subjected to both targeted LR-PCR and NGS to compare the mtDNA variant detection efficacy.

### Results

Among the 28 patients tested by long-read sequencing (LRS), 2 patients were found positive for the m.3243 A > G hotspot variant, and 20 patients exhibited single or multiple deletion variants with a proportion exceeding 4%. Comparison between the results of LRS and NGS revealed that both methods exhibited similar efficacy in detecting SNVs exceeding 5%. However, LRS outperformed NGS in detecting SNVs with a ratio below 5%. As for SVs, LRS identified single or multiple deletions in 13 out of 17 cases, whereas NGS only detected single deletions in 8 cases. Furthermore, deletions identified by LRS were validated by Sanger sequencing and quantified in single muscle fibers using real-time PCR. Notably, LRS also effectively and accurately identified secondary mtDNA deletions in idiopathic inflammatory myopathies (IIMs).

### Conclusions

LRS outperforms NGS in detecting various types of SNVs and SVs in mtDNA, including those with low frequencies. Our research is a significant advancement in medical comprehension and will provide profound insights into genetics.
authors: Yan Lin, Jiayin Wang, ... Kunqian Ji
citation: Lin, Y., Wang, J., Xu, R. et al. HiFi long-read amplicon sequencing for full-spectrum variants of human mtDNA. BMC Genomics 25 , 538 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-024-10433-9
description: Mitochondrial diseases (MDs) can be caused by single nucleotide variants (SNVs) and structural variants (SVs) in the mitochondrial genome...

ai.TLDR: 线粒体疾病（MDs）由线粒体基因组（mtDNA）中的单核苷酸变异（SNVs）和结构变异（SVs）引起，当前NGS在检测小到中等片段缺失及低比例变异方面存在挑战。本研究通过结合靶向长距离PCR（LR-PCR）和PacBio HiFi测序，发现长读长测序（LRS）在检测低频SNVs（<5%）和SVs方面显著优于NGS。
ai.translation:
背景：线粒体疾病（MDs）可由线粒体基因组（mtDNA）中的单核苷酸变异（SNVs）和结构变异（SVs）引起。目前，由于下一代测序（NGS）技术的局限性，识别小到中等片段的缺失以及准确检测低比例变异仍面临挑战。

方法：本研究整合靶向长距离聚合酶链反应（LR-PCR）与PacBio HiFi测序技术，分析了34名参与者（包括28名患者和6名对照者）。其中17个样本同时接受靶向LR-PCR和NGS检测，以比较mtDNA变异检测效果。

结果：在通过长读长测序（LRS）检测的28名患者中，2名患者检出m.3243 A > G热点变异，20名患者存在单个或多个缺失变异，变异比例超过4%。LRS与NGS结果对比显示，两种方法在检测比例>5%的SNVs时效果相似，但LRS在检测比例<5%的SNVs时表现更优。对于SVs，LRS在17例中检出13例单个或多个缺失，而NGS仅检出8例单个缺失。此外，LRS检出的缺失通过Sanger测序验证，并通过单纤维实时PCR量化。值得注意的是，LRS还有效识别了特发性炎性肌病（IIMs）中的二次mtDNA缺失。

结论：LRS在检测mtDNA中各种SNVs和SVs（包括低频变异）方面优于NGS。本研究为医学理解提供了重要进展，并将深化对遗传学的认知。

title: Characterizing a Lethal CAG-ACE2 Transgenic Mouse Model for SARS-CoV-2 infection with Using Cas9-Enhanced Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: The SARS-CoV-2 pandemic has underscored the necessity for functional transgenic animal models for testing. Mouse lines with overexpression of the human receptor ACE2 serve as the primary animal model to study COVID-19 infection. Overexpression of ACE2 under a strong ubiquitous promoter facilitates convenient and sensitive testing of COVID-19 pathology. We performed pronuclear microinjections using a 5 kb CAG-ACE2 linear transgene construct and identified three founder lines with 140, 72, and 73 copies, respectively. Two of these lines were further analyzed for ACE2 expression profiles and sensitivity to SARS-CoV-2 infection. Both lines expressed ACE2 in all organs analyzed. Embryonic fibroblast cell lines derived from transgenic embryos demonstrated severe cytopathic effects following infection, even at low doses of SARS-CoV-2 (0,1-1.0 TCID50). Infected mice from the two lines began to show COVID-19 symptoms three days post-infection and succumbed between days 4 and 7. Histological examination of lung tissues from terminally ill mice revealed severe pathological alterations. To further characterize the integration site in one of the lines, we applied Nanopore sequencing combined with Cas9 enrichment to examine the internal transgene concatemer structure. Oxford Nanopore sequencing (ONT) is becoming the gold standard for transgene insert characterization, but it is relatively inefficient without targeted region enrichment. We digested genomic DNA with Cas9 and gRNA against the ACE2 transgene to create ends suitable for ONT adapter ligation. ONT data analysis revealed that most of the transgene copies were arranged in a head-to-tail configuration, with palindromic junctions being rare. We also detected occasional plasmid backbone fragments within the concatemer, likely co-purified during transgene gel extraction, which is a common occurrence in pronuclear microinjections.
authors: Smirnov, A.; Nurislamov, A.; Koncevaya, G.; Serova, I.; Kabirova, E.; Chuyko, E.; Maltceva, E.; Savoskin, M.; Zadorozhny, D.; Svyatchenko, V. A.; Protopopova, E. V.; Taranov, O. S.; Legostaev, S. S.; Loktev, V. B.; Serov, O.; Battulin, N.

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2大流行凸显了功能性转基因动物模型在病毒研究中的必要性。本研究通过构建CAG-ACE2转基因小鼠模型，成功实现了对新冠病毒感染的敏感检测，发现转基因小鼠在低剂量感染下表现出显著病理变化和临床症状。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2大流行凸显了功能性转基因动物模型在病毒研究中的必要性。以ACE2受体过表达的小鼠品系作为主要动物模型，用于研究新冠病毒感染。在强效通用启动子驱动下ACE2过表达可实现便捷且敏感的病理检测。我们采用5 kb CAG-ACE2线性转基因构建体进行原核显微注射，筛选出3个转基因系，分别携带140、72和73个转基因拷贝。其中2个系进一步分析ACE2表达谱及对新冠病毒感染的敏感性。两个系均在所有检测器官中表达ACE2。转基因胚胎衍生的胚胎成纤维细胞在低剂量新冠病毒感染（0.1-1.0 TCID50）后表现出严重细胞病变效应。两个系感染小鼠在感染后第3天开始出现新冠症状，第4-7天死亡。终末期小鼠肺组织病理学检查显示严重病理改变。为解析其中一个系的转基因整合位点，我们结合纳米孔测序与Cas9富集技术分析转基因串联体结构。尽管纳米孔测序已成为转基因插入位点分析的金标准，但缺乏靶向区域富集时效率较低。我们通过Cas9和针对ACE2转基因的gRNA消化基因组DNA，构建适合纳米孔适配器连接的末端。测序分析显示大多数转基因拷贝呈头对尾排列，反向连接位点罕见。同时检测到串联体中偶见质粒骨架片段，可能在转基因凝胶提取过程中共纯化，这是原核显微注射的常见现象。

title: Salivary microbiota dysbiosis and elevated polyamine levels contribute to the severity of periodontal disease.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The oral cavity is a complex environment which harbours the second largest and most diverse microflora after the gastrointestinal tract. The bacteriome in the oral cavity plays a pivotal role in promoting the health and well-being of human beings. Gingivitis, an inflammation of the gingival tissue, arises due to plaque accumulation on the teeth, often leads to periodontitis. Progression of periodontitis resulting in clinical attachment loss, bone loss and eventually the tooth loss is poorly understood. The present study explores the transitions in microbioata, oxidative stress and polyamine levels during the disease evolution which can contribute to developing effective therapeutic approaches.

METHODS: Saliva samples were collected from seventy-two individuals after procuring informed consent who were either healthy, gingivitis or stage-specific periodontitis patients. Periodontitis stage was confirmed by clinical and radiographic analysis. Microbiota analysis was carried out by 16S rRNA sequencing on the Nanopore PromethIONsystem platform of Oxford Nanopore technologies. Polyamine levels were quantified with fluorescence spectrophotometer. Ornithine decarboxylase quantification was evaluated by ELISA method. Antioxidant levels of the salivary samples were measured by DPPH, SOD, and catalase assays. Autophagy was measured by acid phosphatase assay.

RESULT: The salivary microbiota exhibited significant changes in their abundance and diversity between healthy individuals and those with conditions such as gingivitis, and chronic periodontitis. A significant increase in polyamines and ornithine decarboxylase was found in gingivitis and various stages of periodontitis. Elevated oxidative stress observed in gingivitis and periodontitis could have resulted in cell death.

CONCLUSION: The current study shows the role of salivary microbiota and polyamines in gingivitis and different periodontitis stages. The progressive elevation of Streptococcus levels from gingivitis to periodontitis, coupled with polyamine concentrations, may serve as a promising identification marker for assessing the severity of periodontal disease. Insight into the oral bacterial flora and associated physiological changes provide a foundation for targeted therapeutic interventions in gingivitis and periodontitis diseases emphasising the importance of personalised oral health management strategies.
authors: Md Haroon Rashid, Sandhya Pavan Kumar, Resma Rajan, Anitha Mamillapalli

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了口腔微生物群、氧化应激和多胺水平在牙周炎发展过程中的变化，揭示了其与疾病进展的关联。通过分析72例健康人及牙龈炎/牙周炎患者的唾液样本，发现微生物群多样性显著变化，多胺和鸟氨酸脱羧酶水平升高，氧化应激可能引发细胞死亡。
ai.translation:
背景：口腔是一个复杂的环境，其微生物群仅次于胃肠道，是第二大的且最多样化的微生物群。口腔微生物群在促进人类健康和福祉中起关键作用。牙龈炎是牙龈组织的炎症，由牙齿上的牙菌斑堆积引起，常导致牙周炎。牙周炎进展导致临床附着丧失、骨质流失和最终牙齿脱落的机制尚不明确。本研究探索了疾病演变过程中微生物群、氧化应激和多胺水平的变化，为开发有效治疗方案提供依据。

方法：从72名健康人、牙龈炎患者及不同阶段牙周炎患者中获取知情同意后采集唾液样本。通过临床和影像学分析确认牙周炎阶段。使用牛津纳米基因技术的Nanopore PromethION系统平台进行16S rRNA测序分析微生物群。多胺水平通过荧光分光光度计定量分析。鸟氨酸脱羧酶水平通过ELISA方法评估。唾液样本的抗氧化水平通过DPPH、SOD和过氧化氢酶实验测定。自噬水平通过酸性磷酸酶实验检测。

结果：健康人群与牙龈炎、慢性牙周炎患者的唾液微生物群在丰度和多样性上均出现显著变化。牙龈炎及不同阶段的牙周炎患者中多胺和鸟氨酸脱羧酶水平显著升高。牙龈炎和牙周炎中观察到的氧化应激可能引发细胞死亡。

结论：本研究揭示了唾液微生物群和多胺在牙龈炎及不同阶段牙周炎中的作用。从牙龈炎到牙周炎的链球菌水平逐步升高，结合多胺浓度，可能作为评估牙周病严重程度的潜在标志物。对口腔细菌群落及其相关生理变化的深入了解，为牙龈炎和牙周炎的靶向治疗干预提供了基础，强调了个性化口腔健康管理策略的重要性。
