ai.TLDR: GlcNAc2-表异构酶（GNE）肌病是一种由GNE基因致病性变异引起的罕见常染色体隐性遗传病。本研究通过多中心回顾性分析揭示了97种不同的临床表型，并强调全基因组测序（WGS）和纳米孔长读长测序（Nanopore LRS）在精准诊断中的关键作用。
keywords: 纳米孔长读长测序（Nanopore LRS）
ai.translation:
背景：GlcNAc2-表异构酶（GNE）肌病是一种罕见的常染色体隐性遗传病，由GNE基因的致病性变异引起。

目标：本多中心研究旨在明确GNE肌病的临床表型特征。

方法：我们回顾性分析了多中心的临床数据和基因检测结果。

结果：本研究发现了97种不同的致病性变异，并揭示了GNE肌病的复杂临床表型谱。

结论：全基因组测序（WGS）和纳米孔长读长测序（Nan0re LRS）等综合技术对于GNE肌病的精准诊断具有重要价值。

title: Tracking the genetic diversity of SARS-CoV-2 variants in Nicaragua throughout the COVID-19 pandemic.
abstract: The global circulation of SARS-CoV-2 has been extensively documented; however, the dynamics within Central America, particularly Nicaragua, remain underexplored. This study characterizes the genomic diversity of SARS-CoV-2 in Nicaragua from March 2020 through December 2022, utilizing 1064 genomes obtained via next-generation sequencing. These sequences were selected nationwide and analyzed for variant classification, lineage predominance, and phylogenetic diversity. We employed both Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies for all sequencing procedures. Results indicated a temporal and spatial shift in dominant lineages, initially from B.1 and A.2 in early 2020 to various Omicron subvariants toward the study's end. Significant lineage shifts correlated with changes in COVID-19 positivity rates, underscoring the epidemiological impact of variant dissemination. Comparative analysis with regional data underscored the low diversity of circulating lineages in Nicaragua and their delayed introduction compared to other countries in the Central American region. The study also linked specific viral mutations with hospitalization rates, emphasizing the clinical relevance of genomic surveillance. This research advances the understanding of SARS-CoV-2 evolution in Nicaragua and provides valuable information regarding its genetic diversity for public health officials in Central America. We highlight the critical role of ongoing genomic surveillance in identifying emergent lineages and informing public health strategies.
authors: Gerald Vásquez Alemán, Cristhiam Cerpas, Jose G Juarez, Hanny Moreira, Sonia Arguello, Josefina Coloma, Eva Harris, Aubree Gordon, Shannon N Bennett, Ángel Balmaseda

ai.TLDR: 本研究系统分析了尼加拉瓜2020年3月至2022年12月期间SARS-CoV-2的基因组多样性，揭示了病毒谱系随时间与空间的动态变化。研究通过下一代测序技术获取1064个基因组数据，发现主要谱系从早期的B.1和A.2转变为多种奥密克戎亚变种，突显了基因组监测在公共卫生策略制定中的关键作用。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2在全球范围的传播已得到广泛记录；然而，中美洲地区，特别是尼加拉瓜的病毒动态仍缺乏深入研究。本研究通过1064个经下一代测序获得的基因组数据，系统分析了尼加拉瓜2020年3月至2022年12月期间SARS-CoV-2的基因组多样性。这些序列在全国范围内选取，用于变异分类、谱系优势度分析及系统发育多样性研究。研究同时采用Illumina和牛津纳米孔测序技术进行所有测序流程。结果表明，优势谱系呈现时间与空间上的变化，早期2020年主要为B.1和A.2，而研究结束时则转变为多种奥密克戎亚变种。显著的谱系变化与新冠阳性率波动存在相关性，凸显了变异株传播的流行病学影响。与区域数据的比较分析显示，尼加拉瓜流行谱系的多样性较低，且其引入时间较中美洲其他国家滞后。研究还发现特定病毒突变与住院率的关联性，强调了基因组监测的临床意义。本研究深化了对尼加拉瓜SARS-CoV-2进化规律的理解，并为中美洲公共卫生官员提供了重要的遗传多样性信息。我们强调持续基因组监测在识别新兴谱系和制定公共卫生策略中的关键作用。

title: Long-read RNA sequencing enables full-length chimeric transcript annotation of transposable elements in lung adenocarcinoma.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Transposable elements (TEs), which constitute nearly half of the human genome, have long been regarded as genomic "dark matter". However, their reactivation in tumor cells, resulting in the production of TE-chimeric transcripts (TCTs), has emerged as a potential driver of cancer progression. The complexity and full extent of these transcripts remain elusive, largely due to the limitations of short-read next-generation sequencing technologies. These methods have struggled to comprehensively capture the diversity and structure of TCTs, particularly those involving short interspersed nuclear elements (SINEs) or closely co-transcribed TEs.

METHODS: Leveraging full-length cDNA sequencing technology based on nanopore sequencing platform, we developed a customized pipeline for identifying and quantifying TCTs in 19 lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) cell lines. The short-read RNA-seq dataset from a LUAD corhort (~ 200 tumor samples) was employed to validate the identified TCTs and explore their association with tumor progression. To assess the functional roles of a specific TCTs, cell migration and cell proliferation assays were performed.

RESULTS: We uncovered 208 unique TCT candidates in the LUAD cell lines. Our approach allowed for the identification of cryptic promoters and terminators within non-transposing TEs. Notably, we identified a chimeric transcript involving MIR_HKDC1, which appears to play a significant role in the progression of LUAD. Furthermore, the expression of these TCTs were associated with poor clinical outcomes in a cohort of LUAD patients, suggesting their potential as novel biomarkers for both LUAD progression and prognosis.

CONCLUSIONS: Our study underscores the application of long-read sequencing to unravel the complex landscape of TCTs in LUAD. We provide a comprehensive characterization of TCTs in LUAD, exploring their potential regulatory roles in cancer progression. These findings contribute to a deeper understanding of the genomic intricacies underlying cancer, and offer new directions for the development of targeted therapies and personalized treatment strategies for LUAD. This research highlights the potential of TCTs as both biomarkers and therapeutic targets in the oncogenesis, offering new insights into the interplay between transposable elements and gene regulation in cancer.
authors: Yang Li, Yahui Liu, Yingxin Xie, Yaxuan Wang, Jing Wang, Huan Wang, Lin Xia, Dan Xie

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了肺癌腺癌（LUAD）中可移动元件（TEs）重新激活产生的TE-嵌合转录本（TCTs）在肿瘤进展中的作用。通过长读长测序技术，发现208个独特TCT候选物，其中涉及MIR_HKDC1的嵌合转录本与LUAD不良预后显著相关，为肿瘤标志物和靶向治疗提供了新方向。
ai.translation:
背景：可移动元件（TEs）构成了人类基因组的近一半，长期以来被视为基因组‘暗物质’。然而，肿瘤细胞中TEs的重新激活导致产生TE-嵌合转录本（TCTs），已成为癌症进展的潜在驱动因素。这些转录本的复杂性和完整范围仍不清楚，主要受限于短读长测序技术的局限性。现有方法难以全面捕捉TCTs的多样性及结构，特别是涉及短散在核元件（SINEs）或紧密共转录TEs的转录本。

方法：基于纳米孔测序平台的全长cDNA测序技术，我们开发了定制化流程用于鉴定和量化19株肺癌腺癌（LUAD）细胞系中的TCTs。采用LUAD队列（约200例肿瘤样本）的短读RNA-seq数据集验证鉴定的TCTs并探索其与肿瘤进展的关联。通过细胞迁移和增殖实验评估特定TCTs的功能作用。

结果：在LUAD细胞系中发现了208个独特的TCT候选物。我们的方法能够识别非转座TEs中的隐秘启动子和终止子。值得注意的是，我们鉴定出涉及MIR_HKDC1的嵌合转录本，该转录本似乎在LUAD进展中起重要作用。此外，这些TCTs的表达与LUAD患者队列的不良临床结局显著相关，提示其作为LUAD进展和预后新型生物标志物的潜力。

结论：本研究强调长读长测序在解析LUAD中TCTs复杂景观中的应用价值。我们提供了LUAD中TCTs的全面表征，探索其在癌症进展中的潜在调控作用。这些发现深化了对癌症基因组复杂性的理解，为LUAD靶向治疗和个性化治疗策略的发展提供了新方向。本研究凸显了TCTs在肿瘤发生中的生物标志物和治疗靶点潜力，为可移动元件与基因调控在癌症中的相互作用提供了新见解。

title: Long-read sequencing for 29 immune cell subsets reveals disease-linked isoforms
abstract: Alternative splicing events are a major causal mechanism for complex traits, but they have been understudied due to the limitation of short-read sequencing. Here, we generate a full-length isoform annotation of human immune cells from an individual by long-read sequencing for 29 cell subsets. This contains a number of unannotated transcripts and isoforms such as a read-through transcript of *TOMM40-APOE* in the Alzheimer’s disease locus. We profile characteristics of isoforms and show that repetitive elements significantly explain the diversity of unannotated isoforms, providing insight into the human genome evolution. In addition, some of the isoforms are expressed in a cell-type specific manner, whose alternative 3’-UTRs usage contributes to their specificity. Further, we identify disease-associated isoforms by isoform switch analysis and by integration of several quantitative trait loci analyses with genome-wide association study data. Our findings will promote the elucidation of the mechanism of complex diseases via alternative splicing.
authors: Jun Inamo, Akari Suzuki, ... Yuta Kochi
citation: Inamo, J., Suzuki, A., Ueda, M.T. et al. Long-read sequencing for 29 immune cell subsets reveals disease-linked isoforms. Nat Commun 15 , 4285 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-48615-4
description: Alternative splicing events are a major causal mechanism for complex traits, but they have been understudied due to the limitation of short-read...

ai.TLDR: 替代剪接事件是复杂性状的重要致病机制，但传统短读测序技术限制了其研究。本研究通过长读测序技术对个体29种免疫细胞亚群进行全长异构体注释，发现大量未注释转录本并揭示重复元件对异构体多样性的影响。研究进一步识别出与疾病相关的异构体，为复杂疾病机制研究提供新视角。
ai.translation: 替代剪接事件是复杂性状的重要致病机制，但受限于短读测序技术的局限性，相关研究仍显不足。本研究通过长读测序技术，对个体29种免疫细胞亚群进行全长异构体注释，发现包括阿尔茨海默病位点TOMM40-APOE基因的读穿转录本在内的大量未注释转录本和异构体。通过分析异构体特征发现，重复元件显著解释了未注释异构体的多样性，为人类基因组进化研究提供新见解。研究进一步发现部分异构体呈现细胞类型特异性表达，其替代3'-UTR的使用模式与其特异性密切相关。通过异构体切换分析结合多个数量性状位点分析与全基因组关联研究数据，成功识别出疾病相关异构体。这些发现将推动通过替代剪接机制解析复杂疾病的发生机制。

title: Cas9-targeted-based long-read sequencing for genetic screening of
abstract:
INTRODUCTION: Long-read sequencing (LRS) enables accurate structural variant detection and variant phasing. When a molecular diagnosis is suspected, target enrichment can reduce the cost and duration of sequencing.

METHODS: LRS was conducted in five inherited retinal dystrophy (IRD) patients harboring a monoallelic variant in 

RESULTS: The nanopore sequencing process yielded a median of 271 reads within the targeted region, with a mean depth of 109 and a median read size of 8 kb. All variants identified by CES have been detected using this approach, and no additional 

DISCUSSION: In this study, we explore the advantages of using a targeted approach together with long-read sequencing to identify variants associated with IRD. The results underscore the utility of targeted long reads for characterizing patients affected by rare diseases when first-tier diagnostic tests are non-conclusive.
authors: Cristina Rodilla, Gonzalo Núñez-Moreno, Yolanda Benitez, Raquel Romero, Lidia Fernández-Caballero, Pablo Mínguez, Marta Corton, Carmen Ayuso

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术（LRS）结合靶向富集策略，成功检测了遗传性视网膜变性（IRD）患者的致病变异。该方法在降低测序成本和缩短检测周期方面展现出显著优势，尤其适用于常规诊断手段无法明确的罕见病病例。
ai.translation:
引言：长读长测序（LRS）能够实现结构变异的精准检测和变异相位分析。当怀疑存在分子诊断时，靶向富集技术可有效降低测序的成本和耗时。

方法：在五例携带单等位基因变异的遗传性视网膜变性（IRD）患者中开展了长读长测序研究。

结果：纳米孔测序在靶向区域获得了中位数为271个读数，平均深度达109倍，中位读长为8 kb。所有通过CES检测到的变异均通过该方法成功识别，未发现额外的变异。

讨论：本研究探讨了将靶向策略与长读长测序结合在IRD相关变异检测中的优势。研究结果强调了靶向长读长测序在罕见病患者诊断中的价值，特别是在常规诊断测试无法明确诊断时，该技术能有效表征疾病特征。

title: Population-based nanopore sequencing of the HIV-1 pangenome to identify drug resistance mutations
abstract: HIV-1 drug resistance genotypic tests have primarily been performed by Sanger sequencing of gene segments encoding different drug target proteins. Since the number of targets has increased with the addition of a new class of antiretroviral drugs, a simple high-throughput system for assessing nucleotide sequences throughout the HIV-1 genome is required. Here, we developed a new solution using nanopore sequencing of viral pangenomes amplified by PCR. Benchmark tests using HIV-1 molecular clones demonstrated an accuracy of up to 99.9%. In addition, validation tests of our protocol in 106 clinical samples demonstrated high concordance of drug resistance and tropism genotypes (92.5% and 98.1%, respectively) between the nanopore sequencing-based results and archived clinical determinations made based on Sanger sequencing data. These results suggest that our new approach will be a powerful solution for the comprehensive survey of HIV-1 drug resistance mutations in clinical settings.
authors: Hirotaka Ode, Masakazu Matsuda, ... Yasumasa Iwatani
citation: Ode, H., Matsuda, M., Shigemi, U. et al. Population-based nanopore sequencing of the HIV-1 pangenome to identify drug resistance mutations. Sci Rep 14 , 12099 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-63054-3
description: HIV-1 drug resistance genotypic tests have primarily been performed by Sanger sequencing of gene segments encoding different drug target proteins....

ai.TLDR: 当前HIV-1药物耐药性检测主要依赖Sanger测序，但随着抗逆转录病毒药物种类增加，亟需更高效的高通量检测方法。本研究开发的纳米孔测序技术通过PCR扩增病毒全基因组，经基准测试显示准确率达99.9%，临床样本验证显示其与传统Sanger测序结果在药物耐药性和病毒嗜性基因型检测中高度一致。
ai.translation: HIV-1药物耐药性基因型检测主要通过Sanger测序对编码不同药物靶点蛋白的基因片段进行测序。由于新型抗逆转录病毒药物的增加导致靶点数量上升，亟需一种简单高效的高通量系统来全面评估HIV-1基因组的核苷酸序列。本研究开发了一种新型解决方案，通过PCR扩增病毒全基因组后进行纳米孔测序。使用HIV-1分子克隆进行的基准测试显示该方法准确率达99.9%。此外，在106份临床样本中验证该协议的测试结果显示，基于纳米孔测序的结果与基于Sanger测序数据的存档临床检测在药物耐药性基因型（92.5%）和病毒嗜性基因型（98.1%）检测中高度一致。这些结果表明，该新方法将成为临床环境中全面调查HIV-1药物耐药性突变的强大解决方案。

title: Giraffe: A tool for comprehensive processing and visualization of multiple long-read sequencing data.
abstract: Third-generation sequencing techniques have become increasingly popular due to their capacity to produce long, high-quality reads. Effective comparative analysis across various samples and sequencing platforms is essential for understanding biological mechanisms and establishing benchmark baselines. However, existing tools for long-read sequencing predominantly focus on quality control (QC) and processing for individual samples, complicating the comparison of multiple datasets. The lack of comprehensive tools for data comparison and visualization presents challenges for researchers with limited bioinformatics experience. To address this gap, we present Giraffe (https://github.com/lrslab/Giraffe_View), a Python3-based command-line tool designed for comparative analysis and visualization across diverse samples and platforms. Giraffe facilitates the assessment of read quality, sequencing bias, and genomic regional methylation proportions for both DNA and direct RNA sequencing reads. Its effectiveness has been demonstrated in various scenarios, including comparisons of sequencing methods (whole genome amplification vs. shotgun), sequencing platforms (Oxford Nanopore Technology, ONT vs. Pacific Biosciences, PacBio), tissues (kidney marrow with and without blood), and biological replicates (kidney marrows).
authors: Xudong Liu, Yanwen Shao, Zhihao Guo, Ying Ni, Xuan Sun, Anskar Yu Hung Leung, Runsheng Li

ai.TLDR: 第三代测序技术因能产生长读长高质量数据而日益流行，但现有工具主要针对单样本质量控制，难以实现多组学数据比较。Giraffe工具通过跨样本和平台的比较分析与可视化，解决了数据比较难题，并在多种场景中验证了其有效性。
ai.translation: 第三代测序技术由于其能够产生长读长且高质量的数据而变得越来越受欢迎。有效的跨样本和测序平台比较分析对于理解生物机制和建立基准基线至关重要。然而，现有的长读长测序工具主要专注于单个样本的质量控制（QC）和数据处理，这使得多组学数据的比较变得复杂。缺乏全面的数据比较和可视化工具对生物信息学经验有限的研究者构成了挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了Giraffe（https://github.com/lrslab/Giraffe_View），一个基于Python3的命令行工具，专门用于跨多样本和平台的比较分析与可视化。Giraffe能够评估DNA和直接RNA测序数据的读取质量、测序偏差以及基因组区域的甲基化比例。其有效性已在多种场景中得到验证，包括测序方法比较（全基因组扩增 vs. 随机测序）、测序平台比较（牛津纳米孔技术，ONT vs. 帕罗生物科学，PacBio）、组织类型比较（含/不含血液的骨髓）以及生物重复样本（骨髓）的分析。

title: Advances in long-read single-cell transcriptomics
abstract: Long-read single-cell transcriptomics (scRNA-Seq) is revolutionizing the way we profile heterogeneity in disease. Traditional short-read scRNA-Seq methods are limited in their ability to provide complete transcript coverage, resolve isoforms, and identify novel transcripts. The scRNA-Seq protocols developed for long-read sequencing platforms overcome these limitations by enabling the characterization of full-length transcripts. Long-read scRNA-Seq techniques initially suffered from comparatively poor accuracy compared to short read scRNA-Seq. However, with improvements in accuracy, accessibility, and cost efficiency, long-reads are gaining popularity in the field of scRNA-Seq. This review details the advances in long-read scRNA-Seq, with an emphasis on library preparation protocols and downstream bioinformatics analysis tools.
authors: Pallawi Kumari, Manmeet Kaur, ... Amarinder Singh Thind
citation: Kumari, P., Kaur, M., Dindhoria, K. et al. Advances in long-read single-cell transcriptomics. Hum. Genet. 143 , 1005–1020 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00439-024-02678-x
description: Long-read single-cell transcriptomics (scRNA-Seq) is revolutionizing the way we profile heterogeneity in disease. Traditional short-read scRNA-Seq...

ai.TLDR: 长读长单细胞转录组学（scRNA-Seq）正在改变疾病异质性分析方式，传统短读长方法在转录本覆盖和异构体解析方面存在局限。长读长技术通过全转录本测序克服了这些限制，随着准确性和成本优势的提升，该技术在scRNA-Seq领域逐渐普及。
ai.translation: 长读长单细胞转录组学（scRNA-Seq）正在革新我们分析疾病异质性的方法。传统短读长scRNA-Seq方法在提供完整转录本覆盖、解析异构体和识别新转录本方面存在局限性。为长读长测序平台开发的scRNA-Seq协议通过实现全长转录本的特征分析，克服了这些限制。早期长读长scRNA-Seq技术在准确度方面相比短读长方法存在明显不足，但随着准确度、可及性和成本效率的提升，长读长技术正逐渐在scRNA-Seq领域获得广泛应用。本文综述了长读长scRNA-Seq技术的最新进展，重点探讨文库制备协议和下游生物信息学分析工具的优化。

title: Assessing different next-generation sequencing technologies for wastewater-based epidemiology
abstract: Wastewater-based epidemiology has proven to be an important public health asset during the COVID-19 pandemic. It can provide less biassed and more cost-effective population-level monitoring of the disease burden as compared to clinical testing. An essential component of SARS-CoV-2 wastewater monitoring is next-generation sequencing, providing genomic data to identify and quantify circulating viral strains rapidly. However, the specific choice of sequencing method influences the quality and timeliness of generated data and hence its usefulness for wastewater-based pathogen surveillance. Here, we systematically benchmarked Illumina Novaseq 6000, Element Aviti, ONT R9.4.1 MinION flow cell, and ONT R9.4.1 Flongle flow cell sequencing data to facilitate the selection of sequencing technology. Using a time series of wastewater samples from influent of six wastewater treatment plants throughout Switzerland, along with spike-in experiments, we show that higher sequencing error rates of ONT Nanopore sequencing reduce the accuracy of estimates of the relative abundance of viral variants, but the overall trend is in good concordance among all technologies. We find that the sequencing runtime for ONT Nanopore flow cells can be reduced to as little as five hours without significant impact on the quality of variant estimates. Our findings suggest that SARS-CoV-2 variant tracking is readily achievable with all tested technologies, albeit with different tradeoffs in terms of cost, timeliness and accuracy.
authors: Beerenwinkel, N.; John, A.; Dreifuss, D.; Kang, S.; Bratus-Neuenschwander, A.; Zajac, N.; Topolsky, I.; Dondi, A.; Aquino, C.; Julian, T. R.

ai.TLDR: 污水流行病学在新冠疫情期间成为重要的公共卫生工具，可提供比临床检测更少偏倚且更经济的群体疾病监测。不同测序技术在病毒变异株追踪中表现各异，ONT纳米孔测序在缩短运行时间的同时保持了变异株估计的准确性。
ai.translation: 基于污水的流行病学在新冠疫情期间已被证明是重要的公共卫生资产。与临床检测相比，它能够提供更少偏倚且更经济的群体层面疾病负担监测。SARS-CoV-2污水监测的关键组成部分是下一代测序技术，该技术可提供基因组数据以快速识别和量化流行病毒株。然而，测序方法的具体选择会影响生成数据的质量和时效性，从而影响其在污水基病原体监测中的实用性。本研究系统评估了Illumina Novaseq 6000、Element Aviti、ONT R9.4.1 MinION流细胞和ONT R9.4.1 Flongle流细胞测序数据，以帮助选择测序技术。通过瑞士六个污水处理厂进水样本的时间序列数据及加入标准品实验，我们发现ONT纳米孔测序的较高测序误差率会降低病毒变异株相对丰度估计的准确性，但所有技术的整体趋势均保持良好一致性。研究发现ONT纳米孔流细胞的测序运行时间可缩短至最低5小时，而对变异株估计质量影响不大。我们的研究结果表明，所有测试技术均可实现SARS-CoV-2变异株追踪，但存在成本、时效性和准确性方面的不同权衡。

title: Wastewater surveillance in post-omicron silent phase uncovers silent waves and cryptic transmission of SARS-CoV-2 variants; a yearlong study in Western India.
journal: The Science of the total environment
abstract: Due to reduced clinical testing and evolving monitoring challenges, tracking the emergence and evolution of SARS-CoV-2 variants has become increasingly complex. To address this gap, we investigated the utility of wastewater-based epidemiology (WBE) as a complementary tool for SARS-CoV-2 variant surveillance in sewage treatment plants (STPs) across Pune, India. We analyzed 1128 wastewater samples collected between May 2022 and May 2023, using Illumina and nanopore sequencing techniques for robust detection and variant characterization. The study revealed critical findings, including "silent waves" with elevated viral load despite minimal clinical cases, suggesting potential cryptic transmission. These silent waves aligned with the dominance of Omicron BA.2 in June-July 2022 and emergence of the recombinant XBB clade in December 2022. Importantly, sequencing detected XBB lineages 130-253 days before their initial clinical identification, demonstrating its significant advantage in early variant detection. Furthermore, wastewater analysis revealed a higher degree of lineage diversity compared to clinical data, indicating its ability to capture a broader spectrum of circulating variants. The BA.2.86.X was identified 103 days prior to its clinical detection in Pune, highlighting WBE's remarkable lead time. Surprisingly, BF.7.X and BQ.X fragments were also detected in wastewater but not yet reported clinically. These findings demonstrate the remarkable value of WBE as an early warning tool for SARS-CoV-2 variants ahead of time. By revealing silent waves, enabling early variant detection, and capturing a broader viral spectrum, WBE effort could empower public health officials to make informed decisions and implement effective strategies to mitigate future waves, especially in contexts with declining clinical testing.
authors: Vinay Rajput, Rinka Pramanik, Kiran Nannaware, Vinita Malik, Sejal Matra, Shubham Kumar, Sai Joshi, Pradnya Kadam, Unnati Bhalerao, Manisha Tupekar, Dipti Deshpande, Priyanki Shah, Poornima Sangewar, Niharika Gogate, Radhika Boargaonkar, Dhawal Patil, Saurabh Kale, Asim Bhalerao, Nidhi Jain, L S Shashidhara, Sanjay Kamble, Syed Dastager, Krishanpal Karmodiya, Mahesh Dharne

ai.TLDR: 由于临床检测减少和监测挑战，追踪SARS-CoV-2变异株变得复杂。本研究通过污水流行病学（WBE）在印度浦那污水处理厂分析1128份污水样本，发现变异株的‘无声波’现象，揭示了WBE在早期变异监测中的显著优势。
ai.translation: 由于临床检测减少和监测挑战的演变，追踪SARS-CoV-2变异株的出现和演化变得日益复杂。为解决这一问题，我们研究了污水流行病学（WBE）在印度浦那污水处理厂（STPs）中作为SARS-CoV-2变异株监测的补充工具的实用性。我们分析了2022年5月至2023年5月期间收集的1128份污水样本，采用Illumina和纳米孔测序技术进行稳健的检测和变异株表征。研究揭示了关键发现，包括‘无声波’现象，即病毒载量升高但临床病例极少，提示可能存在隐匿性传播。这些无声波与2022年6-7月Omicron BA.2的主导地位以及2022年12月重组XBB谱系的出现相吻合。重要的是，测序在临床首次识别前130-253天就检测到XBB谱系，证明其在早期变异检测中的显著优势。此外，污水分析显示比临床数据更高的谱系多样性，表明其能捕捉更广泛的流行变异株。BA.2.86.X在浦那临床检测前103天即被识别，凸显了WBE的显著预警能力。令人惊讶的是，BF.7.X和BQ.X片段也出现在污水中但尚未临床报告。这些发现证明了WBE作为SARS-CoV-2变异株早期预警工具的卓越价值。通过揭示无声波、实现早期变异检测以及捕捉更广泛的病毒谱系，WBE工作可帮助公共卫生官员制定应对未来波浪的策略，特别是在临床检测减少的背景下。

title: Blood- and brain-based genome-wide association studies of smoking
abstract: DNA methylation offers an objective method to assess the impact of smoking. In this work, we conduct a Bayesian EWAS of smoking pack years (n=17,865, [~]850k sites, Illumina EPIC array) and extend it by analysing whole genome data of smokers and non-smokers from Generation Scotland (n=46, [~]4-21 million sites via TWIST and Oxford Nanopore sequencing). We develop mCigarette, an epigenetic biomarker of smoking, and test it in three British cohorts. Results of brain- and blood-based EWAS (nbrain=14, nblood=882, >450k sites, Illumina arrays) reveal several loci with near-perfect discrimination of smoking status, but which do not overlap across tissues. Furthermore, we perform a GWAS of epigenetic smoking, identifying several smoking-related loci. Overall, we improve smoking-related biomarker accuracy and enhance the understanding of the effects of smoking by integrating DNA methylation data from multiple tissues and cohorts.
authors: Chybowska, A. D.; Bernabeu, E.; Yousefi, P.; Suderman, M.; Hillary, R. F.; MacGillivray, L.; Murphy, L.; Harris, S. E.; Corley, J.; Campbell, A.; Spires-Jones, T. L.; McCartney, D. L.; Cox, S. R.; Price, J. F.; Evans, K. L.; Marioni, R. E.

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化为评估吸烟影响提供了客观方法。本研究通过贝叶斯表观组全基因组关联分析（EWAS）和整合多组织数据，开发了表观遗传生物标志物mCigarette，显著提升了吸烟相关生物标志物的准确性，并深化了对吸烟效应的理解。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化为评估吸烟影响提供了客观方法。本研究采用贝叶斯表观组全基因组关联分析（EWAS）对吸烟包年数（n=17,865，约850万个位点，Illumina EPIC芯片）进行分析，并扩展至整合Generation Scotland队列中吸烟者与非吸烟者的全基因组数据（n=46，通过TWIST和Oxford Nanopore测序覆盖约4-2100万个位点）。我们开发了mCigarette，一种表观遗传生物标志物，并在三个英国队列中进行验证。基于脑组织和血液的EWAS结果（脑组织n=14，血液n=882，>450万个位点，Illumina芯片）揭示了多个在组织间无重叠但可近乎完美区分吸烟状态的位点。此外，我们进行了表观遗传吸烟相关的全基因组关联研究（GWAS），识别出多个与吸烟相关的位点。总体而言，通过整合多组织和队列的DNA甲基化数据，我们提高了吸烟相关生物标志物的准确性，并深化了对吸烟效应的理解。

title: Small but mitey: long-read assembly of a streamlined mite genome from contaminated host plant sequencing data
abstract:
Technological advances have propelled DNA sequencing of non-model organisms, making sequencing more accessible and cost effective, which has also increased the availability of raw data in public repositories. However, contamination is a significant concern, and the use and reuse of sequencing data requires quality control and curation. A reference genome for the Australian native rainforest tree Rhodamnia argentea Benth. (malletwood) was assembled from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-reads, 10x Genomics Chromium linked-reads, and Hi-C data (N50 = 32.3 Mbp and BUSCO completeness 98.0%) with 99.0% of the 347 Mbp assembly anchored to 11 chromosomes (2n = 22). The R. argentea genome will inform conservation efforts for Myrtaceae species threatened by the global spread of the fungal disease myrtle rust. We observed contamination in the sequencing data and further investigation revealed an arthropod source. Here, we demonstrate the feasibility of assembling a high-quality gapless telomere-to-telomere mite genome using contaminated host plant sequencing data. The mite exhibits genome streamlining and has a 35 Mbp genome (68.6% BUSCO completeness) on two chromosomes, capped with a novel TTTGG telomere sequence. Phylogenomic analysis suggests that it is a previously unsequenced eriophyoid mite. Despite its unknown identity, this complete nuclear genome provides a valuable resource to investigate invertebrate genome reduction. This study emphasises the importance of checking sequencing data for contamination, especially when working with non-model organisms. It also enhances our understanding of two species, including a tree that faces substantial conservation challenges, contributing to broader biodiversity initiatives.

SignificanceThe genomes of Rhodamnia argentea and an associated eriophyoid mite, which contaminated the tree raw sequencing data, were assembled for the first time. We generated valuable chromosome-level genomic resources for the conservation of myrtle rust impacted tree species, pest genomics, and understanding genome streamlining. The research underscores the growing prevalence of sequencing experiments in non-model organisms while emphasising the importance of quality control and curation of sequencing data.
authors: Chen, S. H.; Jones, A.; Lu-Irving, P.; Yap, J.-Y. S.; van der Merwe, M.; Bragg, J. G.; Edwards, R. J.

ai.TLDR: 非模式生物的DNA测序技术进步使得测序更易获取且成本更低，但数据污染问题显著。本研究通过多种测序技术组装了Rhodamnia argentea基因组，并发现污染源为螨虫，揭示了其基因组简化特征。该成果为保护受桉树锈病威胁的物种提供资源，强调了测序数据质量控制的重要性。
ai.translation:
技术进步推动了非模式生物的DNA测序，使测序更易获取且成本更低，这同时也增加了公共数据库中的原始数据量。然而，污染是显著的担忧，测序数据的使用和再利用需要质量控制和数据整理。澳大利亚本地雨林树Rhodamnia argentea（malletwood）的参考基因组通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）长读长测序、10x Genomics Chromium连接读长测序和Hi-C数据（N50=32.3 Mbp，BUSCO完整性98.0%）组装完成，其中99.0%的347 Mbp组装锚定到11条染色体（2n=22）。R. argentea基因组将为受全球桉树锈病威胁的Myrtaceae物种的保护提供信息。我们观察到测序数据存在污染，进一步调查发现污染源为节肢动物。本研究展示了利用污染宿主植物测序数据组装高质量无间隙端粒到端粒螨虫基因组的可行性。该螨虫表现出基因组简化特征，其基因组为35 Mbp（BUSCO完整性68.6%），分布在两条染色体上，两端具有新型TTTGG端粒序列。系统发育基因组分析表明其为此前未测序的Eriophyoid螨虫。尽管其身份未知，该完整核基因组为研究无脊椎动物基因组缩减提供了宝贵资源。本研究强调了检查测序数据污染的重要性，特别是在处理非模式生物时。同时加深了对两种物种的理解，包括面临重大保护挑战的树木，为更广泛的生物多样性倡议做出贡献。

重要意义：Rhodamnia argentea及其污染树原始测序数据的关联Eriophyoid螨虫的基因组首次被组装。我们为受桉树锈病影响的树木物种保护、害虫基因组学和理解基因组简化生成了有价值的染色体级基因组资源。该研究突显了非模式生物测序实验的日益普遍，同时强调了测序数据质量控制和整理的重要性。

title: Direct detection of 8-oxo-dG using nanopore sequencing
abstract: Genomic DNA is constantly subjected to oxidative damage, which is thought to be one of the major drivers of cancer and age-dependent decline. The most prominent consequence is the modification of guanine into 8-hydroxyguanine (8-oxo-dG), which has important mutagenic potential and plays a role in methylation-mediated gene regulation. Methods to simultaneously detect and quantify 8-oxo-dG within its genomic context have been lacking; mainly because these methods rely on indirect detection or are based on hydrolysis of the DNA. Nanopore sequencing has been deployed for the direct detection of base-modifications like cytosine methylation during sequencing. However, currently there is no model to detect 8-oxo-dG by nanopore sequencing due to the lack of training data. Here, we developed a strategy based on synthetic oligos to create long DNA molecules with context variability for effective deep learning and nanopore sequencing. Moreover, we showcase a training approach suitable to deal with the extreme scarceness of 8-oxo-dG compared to canonical G to enable specific 8-oxo-dG detection. Applied to an inducible tissue culture system for oxidative DNA damage, our approach reveals variable 8-oxo-dG distribution across the genome, a dissimilar context pattern to C>A mutations, and concurrent 5-mC depletion within a 2-kilobase window surrounding 8-oxo-dG sites. These findings not only underscore the potential of nanopore sequencing in epigenetic research, but also shed light on 8-oxo-dGs role in genomic regulation. By simultaneously measuring 5-mC and 8-oxo-dG at single molecule resolution, our study provides insights into the functional interplay between these DNA modifications. Moreover, our approach using synthetic oligos to generate a ground truth from machine learning modification calling could be applied to any other DNA modification. Overall, our work contributes to advancing the field of epigenetics and highlights nanopore sequencing as a powerful tool for studying DNA modifications.
authors: Pages-Gallego, M.; van Soest, D. M. K.; Besselink, N. J. M.; Straver, R.; Keijer, J. P.; Vermeulen, C.; Marcozzi, A.; van Roosmalen, M. J.; van Boxtel, R.; Burgering, B. M. T.; Dansen, T. B.; de Ridder, J.

ai.TLDR: 基因组DNA持续受到氧化损伤，其中8-oxo-dG的积累是癌症和年龄相关衰退的重要驱动因素。本研究通过合成寡核苷酸构建变异DNA分子，结合纳米孔测序开发了新型检测方法，首次实现了8-oxo-dG的精准定位与定量分析，揭示了其与5-甲基胞嘧啶的动态互作关系。
ai.translation: 基因组DNA持续受到氧化损伤，这种损伤被认为是癌症和年龄相关衰退的主要驱动因素之一。最显著的后果是鸟嘌呤转化为8-羟基鸟嘌呤（8-oxo-dG），这种修饰具有重要的致突变潜力，并参与甲基化介导的基因调控。目前尚缺乏能够同时检测和量化8-oxo-dG及其基因组背景的方法，主要因为现有技术依赖间接检测或基于DNA水解的分析。纳米孔测序已被用于直接检测如胞嘧啶甲基化等碱基修饰，但目前尚无针对8-oxo-dG的检测模型，这归因于缺乏训练数据。本研究开发了一种基于合成寡核苷酸的策略，通过构建具有上下文变异性的长DNA分子实现深度学习和纳米孔测序的有效结合。此外，我们展示了一种适用于处理8-oxo-dG相对于常规G极端稀缺情况的训练方法，以实现特异性检测。将该方法应用于诱导型组织培养系统进行氧化DNA损伤研究，发现8-oxo-dG在基因组中呈现差异分布模式，其上下文特征与C>A突变不同，并在8-oxo-dG位点周围2千碱基窗口内伴随5-甲基胞嘧啶的耗竭。这些发现不仅凸显了纳米孔测序在表观遗传学研究中的潜力，也揭示了8-oxo-dG在基因组调控中的作用。通过单分子分辨率同时测量5-甲基胞嘧啶和8-oxo-dG，本研究揭示了这两种DNA修饰的功能性互作关系。此外，本研究采用合成寡核苷酸生成机器学习修饰调用的基准数据的方法，该方法可拓展至其他DNA修饰的检测。总体而言，本工作推动了表观遗传学领域的发展，并突显了纳米孔测序作为研究DNA修饰的强大工具。

title: Low-Pass Whole Genome Sequencing of Cell-Free DNA from Cerebrospinal Fluid: A Focus on Pediatric Central Nervous System Tumors.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Cell-free DNA (cfDNA) technology has allowed for cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), a previously underutilized biofluid, to be analyzed in new ways. The interrogation of CSF-derived cfDNA is giving rise to novel molecular insights, particularly in pediatric central nervous system (CNS) tumors, where invasive tumor tissue acquisition may be challenging. Contemporary disease monitoring is currently restricted to radiographic surveillance by magnetic resonance imaging and CSF cytology to directly detect abnormal cells and cell clusters. Alternatively, cfDNA is often present in the CSF from pediatric patients with both malignant and nonmalignant CNS tumors and can be accessed by minimally invasive lumbar puncture and other CSF-liberating procedures, offering a promising alternative for longitudinal molecular disease analysis and surveillance.

CONTENT: This review explores the use of low-pass whole genome sequencing (LP-WGS) to analyze cfDNA from the CSF of pediatric patients with CNS tumors. This platform is uniquely poised for the detection of tumors harboring copy number variants, which are prevalent in this population. The utility and sensitivity of LP-WGS as a clinical tool is explored and discussed in the context of alternative CSF liquid biopsy interrogation modalities, including nanopore sequencing and methylation array.

SUMMARY: Analysis of CSF-derived cfDNA by LP-WGS has broad diagnostic, prognostic, and clinical implications for pediatric patients with CNS tumors. Careful interpretation of LP-WGS results may aid in therapeutic targeting of pediatric CNS tumors and may provide insight into tumor heterogeneity and evolution over time, without the need for invasive and potentially risky tissue sampling.
authors: Katrina O'Halloran, Eirini Christodoulou, Vera A Paulson, Bonnie L Cole, Ashley S Margol, Jaclyn A Biegel, Sarah E S Leary, Christina M Lockwood, Erin E Crotty

ai.TLDR: cfDNA技术为儿科中枢神经系统肿瘤的无创检测提供了新途径，低通全基因组测序（LP-WGS）可有效分析脑脊液中的cfDNA，具有诊断和预后评估价值。该方法无需侵入性取样，可揭示肿瘤异质性及进化过程。
ai.translation:
背景：无细胞DNA（cfDNA）技术使原本未被充分利用的脑脊液（CSF）成为新的分析对象。通过分析来源于CSF的cfDNA，研究人员获得了关于儿科中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤的新分子见解，特别是在难以获取肿瘤组织的病例中。目前的疾病监测主要依赖磁共振成像的影像学检查和脑脊液细胞学分析，而cfDNA常存在于患有恶性或良性CNS肿瘤的儿科患者CSF中，可通过微创腰椎穿刺等方法获取，为长期分子疾病分析提供了有前景的替代方案。

内容：本综述探讨了低通全基因组测序（LP-WGS）在分析儿科CNS肿瘤患者CSF中cfDNA的应用。该平台特别适合检测携带拷贝数变异的肿瘤，这类变异在该人群中普遍存在。文章在比较CSF液态活检的其他方法（包括纳米孔测序和甲基化芯片）的背景下，探讨了LP-WGS作为临床工具的实用性和灵敏度。

总结：通过LP-WGS分析CSF来源的cfDNA，对儿科CNS肿瘤患者具有广泛的诊断、预后和临床意义。仔细解读LP-WGS结果可辅助制定靶向治疗策略，并揭示肿瘤异质性及随时间的进化过程，无需进行侵入性且可能有风险的组织取样。

title: Hybrid lipid-block copolymer membranes enable stable reconstitution of a wide range of nanopores and robust sampling of serum
abstract: Biological nanopores are powerful tools for detecting biomolecules at the single-molecule level, making them appealing as sensors for biological samples. However, the lipid membranes in which nanopores reside can be unstable in the presence of biological fluids. Here, membranes formed with the amphiphilic polymers PMOXA-PDMS-PMOXA and PBD-PEO are tested as potential alternatives for nanopore sensing. We demonstrate that polymer membranes can possess increased stability towards applied potentials and high concentrations of human serum, but that the stable insertion of a wide range of biological nanopores is most often compromised. Alternatively, hybrid polymer-lipid membranes comprising a 1:1 w/w mixture of PBD11PEO8 and DPhPC showed high electrical and biochemical stability while creating a suitable environment for all tested nanopores. Analytes such as proteins, DNA and sugars were efficiently sampled, indicating that in hybrid membranes nanopores showed native-like properties. Molecular dynamics simulations revealed that lipids form [~]12 nm domains interspersed by a polymer matrix. Nanopores partitioned into these lipid nanodomains and sequestered lipids possibly offering the same binding strength as in a native bilayer. This work shows that single-molecule analysis with nanopores in [PBD11PEO8 + DPhPC] membranes is feasible and present stable recordings in the presence of human serum. These results pave the way towards novel nanopore-based biosensors.
authors: Vreeker, E.; Grunewald, F.; van der Heide, N.; Marrink, S.-J.; Tych, K.; Maglia, G.

ai.TLDR: 生物纳米孔作为单分子检测工具具有潜力，但传统脂质膜在生物液体中易失稳。研究发现混合聚合物-脂质膜可提供稳定的检测环境，支持多种纳米孔的高效分析，为新型纳米孔生物传感器奠定基础。
ai.translation: 生物纳米孔是检测生物分子的有力工具，可实现单分子水平的分析，因此在生物样本传感领域具有吸引力。然而，纳米孔所处的脂质膜在生物液体环境中易出现稳定性问题。本研究测试了两种两亲性聚合物PMOXA-PDMS-PMOXA和PBD-PEO形成的膜作为纳米孔传感的替代方案。实验表明，聚合物膜在施加电势和高浓度人血清条件下表现出增强的稳定性，但多数生物纳米孔的稳定插入仍受限。相比之下，由PBD11PEO8与DPhPC以1:1质量比混合形成的杂化聚合物-脂质膜展现出优异的电化学和生化稳定性，为所有测试纳米孔提供了适宜环境。蛋白质、DNA和糖等分析物可被高效检测，表明在杂化膜中纳米孔表现出类似天然特性。分子动力学模拟显示脂质在聚合物基质中形成约12 nm的纳米域，纳米孔优先分布于这些脂质纳米域并可能通过隔离脂质实现与天然双层膜相当的结合强度。本研究证实，在[PBD11PEO8 + DPhPC]膜中进行纳米孔单分子分析具有可行性，并在人血清存在下可获得稳定记录。这些结果为新型纳米孔生物传感器的发展提供了新方向。

title: Clinical applications of metagenomics next-generation sequencing in infectious diseases
abstract: Infectious diseases are a great threat to human health. Rapid and accurate detection of pathogens is important in the diagnosis and treatment of infectious diseases. Metagenomics next-generation sequencing (mNGS) is an unbiased and comprehensive approach for detecting all RNA and DNA in a sample. With the development of sequencing and bioinformatics technologies, mNGS is moving from research to clinical application, which opens a new avenue for pathogen detection. Numerous studies have revealed good potential for the clinical application of mNGS in infectious diseases, especially in difficult-to-detect, rare, and novel pathogens. However, there are several hurdles in the clinical application of mNGS, such as: (1) lack of universal workflow validation and quality assurance; (2) insensitivity to high-host background and low-biomass samples; and (3) lack of standardized instructions for mass data analysis and report interpretation. Therefore, a complete understanding of this new technology will help promote the clinical application of mNGS to infectious diseases. This review briefly introduces the history of next-generation sequencing, mainstream sequencing platforms, and mNGS workflow, and discusses the clinical applications of mNGS to infectious diseases and its advantages and disadvantages.
authors: Ying Liu, Yongjun Ma
citation: Liu, Y., Ma, Y. Clinical applications of metagenomics next-generation sequencing in infectious diseases. J. Zhejiang Univ. Sci. B 25 , 471–484 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1631/jzus.B2300029
description: Infectious diseases are a great threat to human health. Rapid and accurate detection of pathogens is important in the diagnosis and treatment of...

ai.TLDR: 传染病对人类健康构成重大威胁，宏基因组下一代测序（mNGS）作为无偏倚且全面的检测方法，在病原体识别中展现出潜力。然而其临床应用面临标准化流程缺失、高宿主背景干扰及数据分析规范不足等挑战，亟需系统性技术优化。
ai.translation: 传染病是威胁人类健康的重要公共卫生问题，快速准确的病原体检测对传染病的诊断与治疗至关重要。宏基因组下一代测序（mNGS）作为一种无偏倚且全面的检测方法，可同时识别样本中的所有RNA和DNA。随着测序技术和生物信息学的发展，mNGS正从研究阶段向临床应用转化，为病原体检测开辟了新途径。大量研究表明，mNGS在难检测、罕见及新型病原体的临床诊断中具有显著潜力。但其临床应用仍面临三大障碍：（1）缺乏通用的流程验证和质量保证体系；（2）对高宿主背景和低生物量样本的敏感性不足；（3）缺乏大规模数据的分析规范及报告解读标准。因此，全面理解该技术特性将有助于推动mNGS在传染病领域的临床应用。本文简要介绍下一代测序技术的发展历程、主流测序平台及mNGS工作流程，并探讨其在传染病检测中的临床应用价值及技术优劣势。

title: Full-length nanopore sequencing of circular RNA landscape in peripheral blood cells following sequential BNT162b2 mRNA vaccination.
abstract: Circular RNAs (circRNA) lack 5' or 3' ends; their unique covalently closed structures prevent RNA degradation by exonucleases. These characteristics provide circRNAs with high pharmaceutical stability and biostability relative to current standard-of-care linear mRNAs. CircRNA levels are reportedly associated with certain human diseases, making them novel disease biomarkers and a noncanonical class of therapeutic targets. In this study, the endogenous circRNAs underlying the response to BNT162b2 mRNA vaccination were evaluated. To this end, peripheral blood samples were subjected to full-length sequencing of circRNAs via nanopore sequencing and transcriptome sequencing. Fifteen samples, comprising pre-, first, and second vaccination cohorts, were obtained from five healthcare workers with no history of SARS-CoV-2 infection or previous vaccination. A total of 4706 circRNAs were detected; following full-length sequencing, 4217 novel circRNAs were identified as being specifically expressed during vaccination. These circRNAs were enriched in the binding motifs of stress granule assemblies and SARS-CoV-2 RNA binding proteins, namely poly(A) binding protein cytoplasmic 1 (PABPC1), pumilio RNA binding family member 1 (PUM1), and Y box binding protein 1 (YBX1). Moreover, 489 circRNAs were identified as previously reported miRNA sponges. The differentially expressed circRNAs putatively originated from plasma B cells compared to circRNAs reported in human blood single-cell RNA sequencing datasets. The pre- and post-vaccination differences observed in the circRNA expression landscape in response to the SARS-CoV-2 BNT162b2 mRNA vaccine.
authors: Yu-Chen Liu, Masakazu Ishikawa, Shuhei Sakakibara, Mohamad Al Kadi, Daisuke Motooka, Yoko Naito, Shingo Ito, Yuko Imamura, Hisatake Matsumoto, Fuminori Sugihara, Haruhiko Hirata, Hiroshi Ogura, Daisuke Okuzaki

ai.TLDR: 环状RNA（circRNA）因缺乏5'和3'端而具有高药物稳定性和生物稳定性，可作为疾病生物标志物和新型治疗靶点。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术分析BNT162b2 mRNA疫苗接种后circRNA的动态变化，发现4217个新型疫苗特异性circRNA与应激颗粒组装和SARS-CoV-2 RNA结合蛋白相关。
ai.translation: 环状RNA（circRNA）缺乏5'或3'端，其独特的共价闭合结构可防止外切酶降解。这些特性使circRNA相较于当前标准治疗的线性mRNA具有更高的药物稳定性和生物稳定性。已有研究报道circRNA水平与某些人类疾病相关，使其成为新型疾病生物标志物和非典型治疗靶点。本研究评估了BNT162b2 mRNA疫苗接种反应中内源性circRNA的表达特征。通过纳米孔测序技术对全血样本进行circRNA全长测序和转录组测序，获取了5名无SARS-CoV-2感染史或疫苗接种史医护人员的15份样本（包含接种前、首次和第二次疫苗接种队列）。共检测到4706个circRNA，其中4217个新型circRNA被鉴定为疫苗接种特异性表达。这些circRNA在应激颗粒组装和SARS-CoV-2 RNA结合蛋白（如poly(A)结合蛋白胞质1[PABPC1]、pumilio RNA结合家族成员1[PUM1]和Y盒结合蛋白1[YBX1]）的结合基序中显著富集。此外，489个circRNA被鉴定为已报道的miRNA海绵。差异表达的circRNA可能来源于血浆B细胞，与人类血液单细胞RNA测序数据集报道的circRNA存在显著差异。研究观察到SARS-CoV-2 BNT162b2 mRNA疫苗接种后circRNA表达景观的接种前后差异。

title: Diagnostic value of third-generation nanopore sequencing in extrapulmonary tuberculosis.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: This study aimed to explore the accuracy of third-generation nanopore sequencing to diagnose extrapulmonary tuberculosis (EPTB).

METHODS: Samples were collected from the lesions of 67 patients with suspected EPTB admitted between April 2022 and August 2023. Nanopore sequencing, acid-fast bacilli (AFB) staining, DNA testing, and X-pert and mycobacterial cultures were performed. The sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), negative predictive value (NPV) and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) were calculated for different diagnostic methods, and their diagnostic accuracies were compared.

RESULTS: Nanopore sequencing demonstrated the highest correct diagnosis rate among 50 positive EPTB cases, independently diagnosing 19 positive cases missed by conventional methods. Its sensitivity (62.00%), specificity (94.10%), PPV (96.90%), NPV (45.70%) and AUC (0.781, 95% CI: 0.67-0.89) were superior to those of conventional methods, such as AFB staining, DNA testing, X-pert, and solid culture, indicating its significantly efficient advantage in EPTB detection.

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing technology significantly outperforms conventional methods such as AFB staining, DNA testing, X-pert, and mycobacterial culture to diagnose EPTB, promising to improve the diagnosis of EPTB.
authors: Chang Song, Chunyan Zhao, Yanrong Lin, Yingxing Nong, Aichun Huang, Shaoyong Xi, Xiaoying Wei, Chunmei Zeng, Shixiong Yang, Qingdong Zhu

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了第三代纳米孔测序在肺外结核诊断中的准确性。结果显示纳米孔测序在敏感性（62.00%）、特异性（94.10%）和AUC（0.781）等指标上显著优于传统方法，可独立诊断19例传统方法漏诊的阳性病例。
ai.translation:
背景：本研究旨在探讨第三代纳米孔测序在诊断肺外结核（EPTB）中的准确性。

方法：收集了2022年4月至2023年8月期间收治的67例疑似EPTB患者的病灶样本，进行了纳米孔测序、抗酸杆菌染色（AFB）、DNA检测、X-pert和分枝杆菌培养等检测。计算了不同诊断方法的敏感性、特异性、阳性预测值（PPV）、阴性预测值（NPV）和受试者工作特征曲线下面积（AUC），并比较其诊断准确性。

结果：在50例阳性EPTB病例中，纳米孔测序表现出最高的正确诊断率，独立诊断出19例传统方法漏诊的阳性病例。其敏感性（62.00%）、特异性（94.10%）、PPV（96.90%）、NPV（45.70%）和AUC（0.781，95% CI: 0.67-0.89）均优于传统方法（如AFB染色、DNA检测、X-pert和固体培养），表明其在EPTB检测中具有显著优势。

结论：纳米孔测序技术在诊断EPTB方面显著优于传统方法（如AFB染色、DNA检测、X-pert和分枝杆菌培养），有望提高EPTB的诊断水平。

title: Giraffe: a tool for comprehensive processing andvisualization of multiple long-read sequencing data
abstract: Third-generation sequencing techniques have become increasingly popular due to their ability to generate long, high-quality reads. Utilizing datasets from various samples and multiple sequencing platforms for comparative and comprehensive analysis is essential for exploring biological mechanisms and establishing benchmark baselines. However, current tools for long reads primarily focus on quality control (QC) and read processing for individual samples, complicating the profiling and comparison of multiple datasets. The lack of tools for data comparison and visualization presents challenges for researchers with limited bioinformatics experience. Furthermore, developing a comprehensive long-read QC method that facilitates comparative analysis and visualization across multiple samples and platforms is necessary to establish benchmark baselines for selecting appropriate sequencing platforms. We introduce Giraffe, a Python3-based command line tool designed for comparative analysis and visualization across multiple samples and platforms. Giraffe enables the assessment of read quality, sequencing bias, and genomic regional methylation proportions for both DNA and direct RNA sequencing reads. Its usability has been demonstrated in various scenarios, including comparisons of different biological processing methods (whole genome amplification vs. shotgun), sequencing platforms (Oxford Nanopore Technology vs. Pacific Biosciences), tissues (kidney marrow with and without blood), and biological replicates (kidney marrows). Additionally, our findings indicate that Oxford Nanopore duplex reads outperform PacBio HiFi reads in homopolymer identification and GC evenness while maintaining comparable overall read quality.
authors: Liu, X.; Shao, Y.; Guo, Z.; Ni, Y.; Sun, X.; Leung, Y. H. A.; Li, R.

ai.TLDR: 第三代测序技术因能生成长且高质量的读长而日益流行。现有工具主要针对单样本的质控和读长处理，难以实现多数据集的比较分析。Giraffe作为Python3命令行工具，可跨样本和平台进行比较分析与可视化，显著提升了长读长测序数据的评估效率。
ai.translation: 第三代测序技术由于其能够生成长且高质量的读长而日益受到关注。利用来自不同样本和多种测序平台的数据集进行比较和全面分析对于探索生物机制和建立基准基线至关重要。然而，当前针对长读长的工具主要聚焦于单个样本的质量控制（QC）和读长处理，这使得多数据集的分析和比较变得复杂。缺乏数据比较和可视化工具对生物信息学经验有限的研究者构成了挑战。此外，开发一种全面的长读长QC方法，以支持跨多个样本和平台的比较分析与可视化，对于建立选择合适测序平台的基准基线是必要的。我们介绍了Giraffe，这是一个基于Python3的命令行工具，专为跨多个样本和平台的比较分析与可视化而设计。Giraffe能够评估DNA和直接RNA测序读长的质量、测序偏差以及基因组区域的甲基化比例。其可用性已在多种场景中得到验证，包括不同生物处理方法（全基因组扩增 vs. 随机测序）、测序平台（牛津纳米孔技术 vs. 帕罗生物科学）、组织（含/不含血液的肾髓）和生物重复（肾髓）的比较。此外，我们的研究结果表明，牛津纳米孔双链读长在均聚物识别和GC平衡性方面优于帕罗生物科学HiFi读长，同时保持了相当的整体读长质量。

title: The emergence of transposon-driven multidrug resistance in invasive nontypeable Haemophilus influenzae over the last decade.
abstract: Nontypeable Haemophilus influenzae (NTHi), once considered a harmless commensal, has emerged as a significant concern due to the increased prevalence of multidrug-resistant (MDR) strains and their association with invasive infections. This study aimed to explore the epidemiology and molecular resistance mechanisms of 51 NTHi isolates collected from patients with invasive infections in northern Taiwan between 2011 and 2020. This investigation revealed substantial genetic diversity, encompassing 29 distinct sequence types and 18 clonal complexes. Notably, 68.6% of the isolates exhibited ampicillin resistance, with 28 categorised as MDR and four isolates were even resistant to up to six antibiotic classes. Among the MDR isolates, 18 pulsotypes were identified, indicating diverse genetic lineages. Elucidation of their resistance mechanisms revealed 18 β-lactamase-producing amoxicillin-clavulanate-resistant (BLPACR) isolates, 12 β-lactamase-producing ampicillin-resistant (BLPAR) isolates, and 5 β-lactamase-nonproducing ampicillin-resistant (BLNAR) isolates. PBP3 analysis revealed 22 unique substitutions in BLPACR and BLNAR, potentially contributing to cephem resistance. Notably, novel transposons, Tn7736-Tn7739, which contain critical resistance genes, were discovered. Three strains harboured Tn7739, containing seven resistance genes [aph(3')-Ia, bla
authors: Tsai-Wen Wan, Yu-Tsung Huang, Jian-Hong Lai, Qiao-Ting Chao, Hui-Hui Yeo, Tai-Fen Lee, Yung-Chi Chang, Hao-Chieh Chiu

ai.TLDR: 非典型流感嗜血杆菌（NTHi）因多药耐药（MDR）菌株增加及与侵袭性感染关联成为重要病原体。研究分析2011-2020年台湾北部51株临床分离株，发现其遗传多样性显著，68.6%对氨苄西林耐药，部分菌株对六类抗生素耐药，揭示了β-内酰胺酶产生与非产生型耐药机制及新型转座子携带的耐药基因。
ai.translation: 非典型流感嗜血杆菌（Nontypeable Haemophilus influenzae, NTHi）曾被认为是一种无害的共生菌，但因多药耐药（multidrug-resistant, MDR）菌株的流行及其与侵袭性感染的关联，现已成为临床关注的重要病原体。本研究旨在探讨2011年至2020年间台湾北部侵袭性感染患者中分离的51株NTHi的流行病学特征及分子耐药机制。研究发现这些菌株表现出显著的遗传多样性，包含29种不同的序列类型（sequence types）和18个克隆复合体（clonal complexes）。值得注意的是，68.6%的菌株对氨苄西林（ampicillin）耐药，其中28株被归类为多药耐药（MDR），甚至有4株对多达六类抗生素表现出耐药性。在MDR菌株中鉴定出18种脉冲型（pulsotypes），表明存在多样的遗传谱系。通过解析其耐药机制，发现18株为β-内酰胺酶产生型氨苄西林-克拉维酸耐药菌（β-lactamase-producing amoxicillin-clavulanate-resistant, BLPACR），12株为β-内酰胺酶产生型氨苄西林耐药菌（β-lactamase-producing ampicillin-resistant, BLPAR），以及5株为β-内酰命酶非产生型氨苄西林耐药菌（β-lactamase-nonproducing ampicillin-resistant, BLNAR）。通过PBP3分析，发现BLPACR和BLNAR菌株中存在22种独特的氨基酸替换，可能与头孢菌素类抗生素耐药性相关。值得注意的是，发现了新型转座子Tn7736-Tn7739，其包含关键的耐药基因。其中3株菌株携带Tn7739，该转座子包含7个耐药基因[aph(3')-Ia, bla]

title: Evaluation of the taxonomic classification tools and visualizers for metagenomic analysis using the Oxford nanopore sequence database.
abstract: Microbial metagenomic identification is generally attributed to the specificity and type of the bioinformatic tools, including classifiers and visualizers. In this study, the performance of two major classifiers, Centrifuge and Kraken2, and two visualizers (Recentrifuge and Krona) has been thoroughly investigated for their efficiency in the identification of the microorganisms using the Whole-Genome Sequence (WGS) database and four targeted databases including NCBI, Silva, Greengenes, and Ribosomal Database Project (RDP). Two standard DNA metagenomic library replicates, Zymo and Zymo-1, were used as quality control. Results showed that Centrifuge gave a higher percentage of Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Escherichia coli, and Salmonella enterica identification than Kraken2. Compared to Recentrifuge, Kraken2 was more accurate in identifying Staphylococcus aureus, Listeria monocytogenes, Bacillus subtilis, and Cryptococcus neoformans. The results of the rest of the detected microorganisms were generally consistent with the two classifiers. Regarding visualizers, both Recentrifuge and Krona provided similar results regarding the abundance of each microbial species regardless of the classifier used. The differences in results between the two mentioned classifiers may be attributed to the specific algorithms each method uses and the sequencing depth. Centrifuge uses a read mapping approach, while Kraken2 uses a k-mer-based system to classify the sequencing reads into taxonomic groups. In conclusion, both Centrifuge and Kraken2 are effective tools for microbial classification. However, the choice of classifier can influence the accuracy of microbial classification and, therefore, should be made carefully, depending on the desired application, even when the same reference database is used.
authors: Abraam S Bebawy, Bishoy T Saad, Mina T Saad, Gamal S Mosaad, Fatma Alzahraa M Gomaa, Mohammad Y Alshahrani, Khaled M Aboshanab

ai.TLDR: 微生物宏基因组识别效果主要取决于生物信息学工具的特性和类型。本研究系统比较了Centrifuge和Kraken2两种分类器在全基因组序列（WGS）数据库及NCBI、Silva、Greengenes和RDP等靶向数据库中的表现，发现Centrif、Kraken2在不同微生物识别中存在差异。可视化工具Recentrifuge和Krona在分类器选择上均能提供相似的物种丰度分析结果。
ai.translation: 微生物宏基因组识别通常归因于生物信息学工具的特异性及其类型，包括分类器和可视化工具。本研究系统评估了两种主要分类器Centrifuge和Kraken2，以及两种可视化工具Recentrifuge和Krona在使用全基因组序列（WGS）数据库及NCBI、Silva、Greengenes和Ribosomal Database Project（RDP）等四个靶向数据库时的微生物识别效率。采用两个标准DNA宏基因组库重复样本Zymo和Zymo-1作为质量控制。结果表明，Centrifuge在铜绿假单胞菌（Pseudomonas aeruginosa）、大肠杆菌（Escherichia coli）和沙门氏菌（Salmonella enterica）的识别比例上高于Kraken2。与Recentrifuge相比，Kraken2在金黄色葡萄球菌（Staphylococcus aureus）、李斯特菌（Listeria monocytogenes）、枯草芽孢杆菌（Bacillus subtilis）和新型隐球菌（Cryptococcus neoformans）的识别准确性更高。其余检测微生物的结果在两种分类器间基本一致。关于可视化工具，无论使用哪种分类器，Recentrifuge和Krona均提供了相似的微生物物种丰度分析结果。两种分类器结果差异可能源于各自算法特性和测序深度。Centrifuge采用读段映射方法，而Kraken2基于k-mer系统将测序读段分类到分类学组。结论表明，Centrifuge和Kraken2均为有效的微生物分类工具。然而，分类器的选择会影响微生物分类的准确性，因此需根据具体应用需求谨慎选择，即使使用相同参考数据库。

title: Comprehensive genetic analysis of facioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy by Nanopore long-read whole-genome sequencing
abstract:
### Background

Facioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy (FSHD) is a high-prevalence autosomal dominant neuromuscular disease characterized by significant clinical and genetic heterogeneity. Genetic diagnosis of FSHD remains a challenge because it cannot be detected by standard sequencing methods and requires a complex diagnosis workflow.

### Methods

We developed a comprehensive genetic FSHD detection method based on Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) whole-genome sequencing. Using a case–control design, we applied this procedure to 29 samples and compared the results with those from optical genome mapping (OGM), bisulfite sequencing (BSS), and whole-exome sequencing (WES).

### Results

Using our ONT-based method, we identified 59 haplotypes (35 4qA and 24 4qB) among the 29 samples (including a mosaic sample), as well as the number of D4Z4 repeat units (RUs). The pathogenetic D4Z4 RU contraction identified by our ONT-based method showed 100% concordance with OGM results. The methylation levels of the most distal D4Z4 RU and the double homeobox 4 gene (*DUX4*) detected by ONT sequencing are highly consistent with the BSS results and showed excellent diagnostic efficiency. Additionally, our ONT-based method provided an independent methylation profile analysis of two permissive 4qA alleles, reflecting a more accurate scenario than traditional BSS. The ONT-based method detected 17 variations in three FSHD2-related genes from nine samples, showing 100% concordance with WES.

### Conclusions

Our ONT-based FSHD detection method is a comprehensive method for identifying pathogenetic D4Z4 RU contractions, methylation level alterations, allele-specific methylation of two 4qA haplotypes, and variations in FSHD2-related genes, which will all greatly improve genetic testing for FSHD.
authors: Mingtao Huang, Qinxin Zhang, ... Ping Hu
citation: Huang, M., Zhang, Q., Jiao, J. et al. Comprehensive genetic analysis of facioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy by Nanopore long-read whole-genome sequencing. J Transl Med 22 , 451 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12967-024-05259-8
