ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)全基因组测序的FSHD综合检测方法，通过与光学基因组映射(OGM)、亚硫酸氢盐测序(BSS)和全外显子组测序(WES)对比验证，实现了D4Z4重复单位收缩的100%一致性检测，并揭示了甲基化水平与基因变异的精准关联，显著提升了FSHD的遗传诊断效率。
ai.translation:
背景：面肩肱型肌营养不良症(FSHD)是一种高发的常染色体显性神经肌肉疾病，具有显著的临床和遗传异质性。由于无法通过标准测序方法检测且需要复杂的诊断流程，FSHD的遗传诊断仍面临挑战。

方法：我们基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)全基因组测序技术开发了全面的FSHD检测方法。采用病例对照设计，将该方法应用于29个样本，并与光学基因组映射(OGM)、亚硫酸氢盐测序(BSS)和全外显子组测序(WES)结果进行对比分析。

结果：通过ONT方法，我们在29个样本（包括镶嵌样本）中鉴定了59个等位基因（35个4qA和24个4qB），并确定了D4Z4重复单位(RUs)的数量。由ONT方法识别的致病性D4Z4 RU收缩与OGM结果呈现100%一致性。ONT测序检测到的最远端D4Z4 RU和双同源框4基因(*DUX4*)的甲基化水平与BSS结果高度一致，展现出优秀的诊断效率。此外，ONT方法独立分析了两个允许性4qA等位基因的甲基化谱型，比传统BSS更准确。ONT方法从9个样本中检测到3个FSHD2相关基因的17种变异，与WES结果完全一致。

结论：基于ONT的FSHD检测方法能够全面识别致病性D4Z4 RU收缩、甲基化水平改变、两个4qA等位基因的等位基因特异性甲基化以及FSHD2相关基因变异，将显著提升FSHD的遗传检测水平。

title: Long-read sequencing for detection and subtyping of Prader-Willi and Angelman syndromes.
abstract: Prader-Willi syndrome (PWS) and Angelman syndrome (AS) are imprinting disorders caused by genetic or epigenetic aberrations of 15q11.2-q13. Their clinical testing is often multitiered; diagnostic testing begins with methylation-specific multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification or methylation-sensitive PCR and then proceeds to molecular subtyping to determine the mechanism and recurrence risk. Currently, correct classification of a proband's PWS/AS subtype often requires parental samples, a costly process for families and health systems. The use of nanopore sequencing for molecular diagnosis of PWS and AS has been explored by Yamada
authors: Vahid Akbari, Sarah Dada, Yaoqing Shen, Katherine Dixon, Duha Hejla, Andrew Galbraith, Sanaa Choufani, Rosanna Weksberg, Cornelius F Boerkoel, Laura Stewart, William T Gibson, Steven J M Jones

ai.TLDR: Prader-Willi综合征(PWS)和Angelman综合征(AS)是15q11.2-q13区域遗传/表观遗传异常引起的印迹性疾病，其临床检测通常采用分层策略。当前分类需要父母样本导致成本高昂，Yamada团队探索了纳米孔测序在PWS/AS分子诊断中的应用。
ai.translation: Prader-Willi综合征(PWS)和Angelman综合征(AS)是由15q11.2-q13区域遗传或表观遗传异常引起的印迹性疾病。其临床检测通常采用多层级检测策略，诊断检测首先通过甲基化特异性多重连接依赖探针扩增(methylation-specific multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification)或甲基化敏感性PCR进行初步筛查，随后进行分子亚型分析以确定致病机制和复发风险。目前对受检者PWS/AS亚型的正确分类通常需要父母样本，这对家庭和医疗系统而言成本较高。Yamada团队探索了纳米孔测序(nanopore sequencing)在PWS和AS分子诊断中的应用。

title: Agreement between Phenotypically Detected Linezolid Resistance and Mutations in rrl and rplC Genes of Mycobacterium tuberculosis Isolates Using Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Phenotypic drug susceptibility testing (DST) is considered the gold standard for detecting linezolid (LZD) resistance in Mycobacterium tuberculosis (MTB), but it is time-consuming. Nanopore sequencing offers a potentially faster alternative approach. This study evaluated the agreement between phenotypically detected LZD resistance and mutations in the rrl and rplC genes of MTB isolates using nanopore sequencing.

METHODS: Consecutive drug-resistant MTB isolates from pulmonary samples collected in 2021 underwent liquid culture (LC) DST for LZD. All resistant isolates and an equal number of susceptible isolates were subjected to targeted sequencing of the rrl and rplC genes using nanopore technology.

RESULTS: Sequencing identified a C154R mutation in the rplC gene in only one LZD-resistant isolate. No mutations were detected in the rrl gene. The agreement between sequencing and LC-DST for detecting LZD resistance was poor (Cohen's kappa: 0.03571, 95% confidence interval [CI]: -0.034-0.105). Additionally, no significant association was found between LZD resistance and clinical or microbiological outcomes at 6-month follow-up.

CONCLUSION: This study revealed a considerable discrepancy between phenotypic and genotypic detection of LZD resistance in MTB. Further research is needed to better understand the genetic mechanisms underlying LZD resistance and to develop reliable molecular diagnostics for rapid resistance detection.
authors: Senjuti Sengupta, Parul Jain, Rashmi Ratnam, Bhoopendra Kumar Pandey, Urmila Singh, Vijay Kumar, Ashutosh Paliwal, Amita Jain

ai.TLDR: 本研究比较了表型药物敏感性检测（DST）与纳米孔测序在检测结核分枝杆菌（MTB）利奈唑胺（LZD）耐药性中的差异。结果显示，两种方法在耐药性检测中一致性较差，且未发现LZD耐药性与临床结局的显著关联。
ai.translation:
背景：表型药物敏感性检测（DST）被认为是检测结核分枝杆菌（MTB）利奈唑胺（LZD）耐药性的金标准，但该方法耗时较长。纳米孔测序提供了一种潜在的更快替代方案。本研究通过纳米孔测序评估了表型检测到的LZD耐药性与MTB分离株rrl和rplC基因突变的一致性。

方法：2021年收集的肺部样本中连续的耐药MTB分离株进行了液体培养（LC）DST检测LZD耐药性。所有耐药分离株及等量的敏感分离株均采用纳米孔技术对rrl和rplC基因进行靶向测序。

结果：测序仅在1株LZD耐药分离株中检测到rplC基因的C154R突变，未在rrl基因中发现突变。测序与LC-DST在检测LZD耐药性的一致性较差（Cohen's kappa：0.03571，95%置信区间[CI]：-0.034-0.105）。此外，未发现LZD耐药性与6个月随访期间临床或微生物学结局的显著关联。

结论：本研究揭示了表型与基因型检测MTB LZD耐药性之间存在显著差异。需要进一步研究以更好地理解LZD耐药性的遗传机制，并开发可靠的分子诊断方法以实现快速耐药性检测。

title: Genetic characterization of extensively drug-resistant bla
abstract:
OBJECTIVE: The convergence of globalization with increased sexual risk behaviours has significantly facilitated the dissemination of multidrug-resistant and extensively drug-resistant clusters of Shigella spp. among men who have sex with men, particularly Shigella sonnei and Shigella flexneri. A cluster of S. sonnei carrying bla

METHODS: Genetic characterization was assessed by whole-genome sequencing using the MinION Mk1C device (Oxford Nanopore Technologies, Oxford, UK).

RESULTS: All the isolates presented IncB/O/K/Z or IncFII plasmids, which carried genes conferring resistance to second- and third-generation cephalosporins, cotrimoxazole, azithromycin and quinolones. SNP analysis revealed that neither the strains within this study nor the UK cluster were related to each other.

CONCLUSIONS: Different community clusters of extensively drug-resistant S. sonnei strains harbouring bla
authors: Domingo Fernández Vecilla, Mikel Joseba Urrutikoetxea Gutiérrez, María Carmen Nieto Toboso, Kristina Zugazaga Inchaurza, Estíbaliz Ugalde Zárraga, Beatriz Ruiz Estévez, José Luis Díaz de Tuesta Del Arco

ai.TLDR: 全球化与性风险行为增加导致志贺氏菌多重耐药株在男男性行为者中传播，特别是S. sonnei和S. flexneri。通过全基因组测序发现耐药基因与不同社区集群无关联。
ai.translation: 研究目标：全球化与性风险行为增加显著促进了志贺氏菌多重耐药和广泛耐药簇在男男性行为者中的传播，尤其是Shigella sonnei和Shigella flexneri。方法：通过MinION Mk1C设备（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, Oxford, UK）进行全基因组测序以进行遗传特征分析。结果：所有分离株均携带IncB/O/K/Z或IncFII质粒，这些质粒携带赋予对第二、第三代头孢菌素、复方新诺明、阿奇霉素和喹诺酮类药物耐药性的基因。SNP分析显示，本研究中的菌株与英国集群之间无关联。结论：广泛耐药S. sonnei菌株携带bla基因的不同社区集群存在差异。

title: A method for filtering abnormal modified base calling in Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing
journal: Journal of Bioinformatics and Systems Biology
abstract:
Backgroundgene synthesis sequencing using the long-read Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) provides a cost-effective option for gene synthesis quality control. Despite the advantage of using long reads, however, accurate base calling is influenced by modified bases.

ResultsWe introduce a method for filtering abnormal modified base calling in Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing. This method is based on the mapping results and perform an exact binomial test on the proportion of single base forward and reverse chain depth to determine the presence of abnormal modified base calling. Based on Sanger sequencing results, this method detected 96.79% of effective abnormal modified base calling, and the accuracy of gene synthesis sequencing increased from 99.40% before calibration to 99.98% after calibration, significantly reducing the proportion of requiring secondary gene synthesis sequencing.

ConclusionThis method can accurately filter abnormally modified base calling sites, reduce the proportion of using Sanger for secondary sequencing, thereby saving costs, and improving efficiency.
authors: ma, x.; jia, r.; wang, y.; ye, h.

ai.TLDR: 基于ONT长读长测序技术的基因合成质量控制面临修改碱基导致的碱基调用准确性问题。本研究提出通过精确二项式检验结合比对结果过滤异常修改碱基调用，使基因合成测序准确率从99.40%提升至99.98%，显著降低二次Sanger测序需求。
ai.translation:
背景：使用长读长测序技术Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)进行基因合成测序为质量控制提供了成本效益高的解决方案。然而，尽管长读长测序具有优势，但修改碱基的存在仍会影响碱基调用的准确性。

结果：我们提出了一种基于比对结果的异常修改碱基调用过滤方法，通过精确二项式检验单碱基正反链深度比例来判断异常调用的存在。基于Sanger测序结果，该方法检测到96.79%的有效异常修改碱基调用，基因合成测序准确率从校准前的99.40%提升至校准后的99.98%，显著降低了需要二次基因合成测序的比例。

结论：该方法能够准确过滤异常修改碱基调用位点，减少Sanger测序的二次使用比例，从而节省成本并提高效率。

title: Deciphering the mitochondrial genome of Oikopleura dioica (Chordata: Tunicata: Appendicularia)
abstract:
Sequencing the mitochondrial genome of the tunicate Oikopleura dioica is a challenging task due to the presence of long poly-A/T homopolymer stretches, which impair sequencing and assembly. Here, we report on the sequencing and annotation of the majority of the mitochondrial genome of O. dioica by means of combining several DNA and amplicon reads obtained by Illumina and MinIon Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) with public RNA sequences. We document extensive RNA editing, since all homopolymer stretches present in the mitochondrial DNA correspond to 6U-regions in the mitochondrial RNA. Out of the 13 canonical protein-coding genes, we were able to detect eight, plus an unassigned ORF that lacked sequence similarity to canonical mitochondrial protein-coding genes. We show that the nad3 gene has been transferred to the nucleus and acquired a mitochondria-targeting signal. In addition to two very short rRNAs, we could only identify a single tRNA (tRNA-Met), suggesting multiple losses of tRNA genes, supported by a corresponding loss of mitochondrial aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases in the nuclear genome. Based on the eight canonical protein-coding genes identified, we reconstructed maximum likelihood and Bayesian phylogenetic trees and inferred an extreme evolutionary rate of this mitochondrial genome. The phylogenetic position of appendicularians among tunicates, however, could not be accurately determined.

SignificanceSequencing and annotating the mitochondrial genome of fast-evolving organisms is difficult because they often present unusual characteristics. The tunicate Oikopleura dioica is a model species for understanding tunicate and chordate genome evolution. However, no complete annotated mitochondrial genome for this species has been published to date. Here, we determined the major part of the mitochondrial genome of O. dioica. Our results indicate the presence of highly modified rRNA genes and the absence of all tRNAs except tRNA-Met. Moreover, we show that the mitochondrial genome undergoes editing at the RNA level. Our study demonstrates that utilizing a combination of public RNA data and DNA from long-and short-read sequencing platforms significantly improves our ability to study mitochondrial genomes with atypical characteristics.
authors: Klirs, Y.; Novosolov, M.; Gissi, C.; Garic, R.; Pupko, T.; Huchon, D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过结合Illumina和MinIon测序技术及公共RNA数据，成功解析了Oikopleura dioica线粒体基因组的大部分序列。发现线粒体基因组存在广泛的RNA编辑现象，且nad3基因转移到细胞核并获得线粒体靶向信号。研究揭示了线粒体基因组的极端进化速率，但附肢动物在尾索动物中的系统发育位置仍需进一步确认。
ai.translation:
由于存在长的A/T同聚体序列，Oikopleura dioica的线粒体基因组测序面临挑战，这些序列会干扰测序和组装。本研究通过整合Illum、MinIon Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）测序获得的DNA和扩增子数据，以及公共RNA序列，完成了O. dioica线粒体基因组的大部分测序与注释。我们记录到广泛的RNA编辑现象，因为线粒体DNA中的所有同聚体序列均对应线粒体RNA中的6U区域。在13个经典蛋白编码基因中，我们检测到8个基因，以及一个未分类的ORF，其序列与经典线粒体蛋白编码基因无相似性。研究显示nad3基因已转移到细胞核并获得线粒体靶向信号。除了两个极短的rRNA外，仅鉴定到单个tRNA（tRNA-Met），表明多个tRNA基因丢失，这与细胞核基因组中线粒体氨基酰-tRNA合成酶的缺失相一致。基于鉴定的8个经典蛋白编码基因，我们重建了最大似然法和贝叶斯系统发育树，推断该线粒体基因组具有极端进化速率。然而，附肢动物在尾索动物中的系统发育位置仍无法准确确定。

研究意义：快速进化的物种线粒体基因组测序和注释具有挑战性，因其常表现出异常特征。Oikopleura dioica是理解尾索动物和脊索动物基因组进化的模式生物，但至今尚未有该物种的完整注释线粒体基因组发表。本研究确定了O. dioica线粒体基因组的主要部分，结果表明存在高度修饰的rRNA基因，且除tRNA-Met外所有tRNA均缺失。此外，我们证明线粒体基因组在RNA水平经历编辑。本研究证明，结合公共RNA数据与长/短读长测序平台DNA数据，能显著提升对具有非典型特征线粒体基因组的研究能力。

title: Full-Length Immune Repertoire Reconstruction and Profiling at the Transcriptome Level Using Long-Read Sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Due to the diversity of the immune repertoire (IR), reconstructing full-length IR using traditional short-read sequencing has proven challenging.

METHODS: A full-length IR sequencing (FLIRseq) work flow was developed with linear rolling circle amplification and nanopore sequencing. Its accuracy and quantification ability were verified by plasmid mixtures and commercial B-cell receptor/T-cell receptor sequencing (BCR/TCR-seq) based on short reads. IRs in tissues and the peripheral blood from 8 patients with acute lymphoblastic leukemia, 3 patients with allergic diseases, 4 patients with psoriasis, and 5 patients with prostate cancer were analyzed using FLIRseq.

RESULTS: FLIRseq reads had lower mismatch rates and gap rates, and higher identify rates than nanopore reads (all P < 2.2 × -16). The relative quantification of components by FLIRseq was consistent with the actual quantification (P > 0.05). FLIRseq had superiority over BCR/TCR-seq, providing the long complementarity-determining region 3, B-cell isotype, and the rarely used V gene sequence. FLIRseq observed an increase in clonotype diversity (P < 0.05) and a decrease in the percentage of abnormal BCRs/TCRs in patients with leukemia in remission. For patients with allergic diseases or psoriasis, FLIRseq provided direct insights into V(D)J recombination and specific immunoglobulin classes. Compared with that in prostate cancer tissues, the full-length V segment of the biased T-cell receptor β chain from lymphocytes in psoriatic tissues showed a more consistent AlphaFold2-predicted protein structure (P < 0.05).

CONCLUSIONS: FLIRseq enables unbiased and comprehensive analyses of direct V(D)J recombination and immunoglobulin classes, thereby contributing to characterizing pathogenic mechanisms, monitoring minimal residual disease, and customizing adoptive cell therapy.
authors: Xuanmei Luo, Lili Zhang, Yifei Li, Chang Li, Gaoyuan Sun, Chunli Zhang, Yu Fu, Haozhen Lv, Ming Liu, Hongyuan Cui, Dali Cai, Lihui Zou, Jie Ma, Fei Xiao

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了全长免疫受体测序（FLIRseq）技术，通过线性滚环扩增和纳米孔测序实现免疫受体库（IR）的全长重建。该技术在8例急性淋巴细胞白血病患者等样本中验证，展现出比传统方法更高的准确性与定量能力，可为病理机制研究和治疗监测提供新工具。
ai.translation:
背景：由于免疫受体库（IR）的高度多样性，使用传统短读长测序技术重建全长IR一直颇具挑战性。

方法：开发了全长免疫受体测序（FLIRseq）工作流程，结合线性滚环扩增和纳米孔测序技术。通过质粒混合物和基于短读长的商业B细胞受体/T细胞受体测序（BCR/TCR-seq）验证了其准确性和定量能力。采用FLIRseq分析了8例急性淋巴细胞白血病患者、3例过敏性疾病患者、4例银屑病患者和5例前列腺癌患者的组织及外周血中的IR。

结果：FLIRseq测序结果的错配率和缺口率显著低于纳米孔测序（所有P<2.2×10^-16），且识别率更高。FLIRseq对组分的相对定量结果与实际定量一致（P>0.05）。相比BCR/TCR-seq，FLIRseq能提供更长的互补决定区3（CDR3）、B细胞亚型和罕见的V基因序列。在缓解期白血病患者中，FLIRseq观察到克隆型多样性增加（P<0.05）和异常BCR/TCR占比下降。对于过敏性疾病或银屑病患者，FLIRseq可直接揭示V(D)J重排和特定免疫球蛋白类别。与前列腺癌组织相比，银屑病组织淋巴细胞中偏向性T细胞受体β链全长V段的AlphaFold2预测蛋白结构更一致（P<0.05）。

结论：FLIRseq能够实现无偏倚、全面的V(D)J重排和免疫球蛋白类别的分析，有助于病理机制研究、最小残留病监测和个性化细胞治疗的定制。

title: The assembly and annotation of two teinturier grapevine varieties, Dakapo and Rubired
abstract:
BackgroundTeinturier grapevine varieties were first described in the 16th century and have persisted due to their deep pigmentation. Unlike most other grapevine varieties, teinturier varieties produce berries with pigmented flesh due to anthocyanin production within the flesh. As a result, teinturier varieties are of interest not only for their ability to enhance the pigmentation of wine blends but also for their health benefits. Here, we assembled and annotated the Dakapo and Rubired genomes, two teinturier varieties.

FindingsFor Dakapo, we used a combination of Nanopore sequencing, Illumina sequencing, and scaffolding to the existing grapevine genome assembly to generate a final assembly of 508.5 Mbp with an N50 scaffold length of 25.6 Mbp and a BUSCO score of 98.0%. A combination approach of de novo annotation and lifting over annotations from the existing grapevine reference genome resulted in the annotation of 36,940 genes in the Dakapo assembly. For Rubired, PacBio HiFi reads were assembled, scaffolded, and phased to generate a diploid assembly with two haplotypes 474.7-476.0 Mbp long. The diploid genome has an N50 scaffold length of 24.9 Mbp and a BUSCO score of 98.7%, and both haplotype-specific genomes are of similar quality. De novo annotation of the diploid Rubired genome yielded annotations for 56,681 genes.

ConclusionsThe Dakapo and Rubired genome assemblies and annotations will provide genetic resources for future investigations into berry flesh pigmentation and other traits of interest in grapevine.
authors: Ritter, E. J.; Cochetel, N.; Minio, A.; Cousins, P.; Cantu, D. J.; Niederhuth, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次完成两种Teinturier葡萄品种Dakapo和Rubired的基因组组装与注释。通过结合纳米孔测序、Illumina测序及现有基因组支架构建技术，Dakapo基因组达到508.5 Mbp，注释36,940个基因；Rubired通过PacBio HiFi测序构建二倍体基因组，注释56,681个基因，为研究果实色素形成机制提供重要资源。
ai.translation:
背景：Teinturier葡萄品种自16世纪被描述以来，因其深色色素特性而持续存在。与大多数葡萄品种不同，Teinturier品种的果实肉质因花青素合成而呈现色素，不仅可增强葡萄酒混酿的色泽，还具有健康益处。本研究完成了Dakapo和Rubired两种Teinturier品种的基因组组装与注释。

发现：对于Dakapo品种，采用纳米孔测序、Illumina测序及基于现有葡萄基因组组装的支架构建技术，最终获得508.5 Mbp的基因组组装，N50支架长度为25.6 Mbp，BUSCO评分为98.0%。结合从头注释与现有葡萄参考基因组注释的lift-over方法，Dakapo基因组注释出36,940个基因。Rubired品种通过PacBio HiFi读段进行组装、支架构建和相位分离，生成长度为474.7-476.0 Mbp的二倍体基因组，N50支架长度为24.9 Mbp，BUSCO评分为98.7%。两个单倍型特异性基因组质量相近，二倍体Rubired基因组从头注释获得56,681个基因注释。

结论：Dakapo和Rubired的基因组组装与注释将为未来研究葡萄果实肉质色素形成机制及其他重要性状提供遗传资源。

title: Analysis of Coinfection Pathogens From Foot-and-Mouth Disease Virus Persistently Infected Cattle Using Oxford Nanopore Sequencing.
abstract: The persistent infection caused by foot-and-mouth disease virus (FMDV) still lacks a reliable explanation, as its etiology and maintenance are intricate and potentially involve concurrent infections with multiple pathogens. In this study, we utilized the nanopore platform for direct sequencing of clinical samples obtained from cattle persistently infected with FMDV serotype O and investigated the distribution characteristics of coinfecting pathogens in their pharyngeal region. Briefly, we exploited Oxford Nanopore sequencing technology to generate high-quality and sufficient sequence data for the comprehensive characterization of microbial genomes. Furthermore, we performed sequence comparison, alignment, and phylogenetic tree construction. Our findings revealed a total of 23 viruses in FMDV carrier bovine, with FMDV, bovine orthopneumovirus, and
authors: Shuang Wang, Sumin Wei, Yaozhong Ding, Yun Zhang, Zhihui Zhang, Shiqi Sun, Huichen Guo, Shuanghui Yin

ai.TLDR: 口蹄疫病毒（FMDV）持续感染的病因机制尚不明确，可能涉及多种病原体的共感染。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术对FMDV持续感染牛的咽喉部样本进行分析，揭示了23种共感染病毒的存在，包括FMDV、牛正肺病毒等，为理解复杂感染机制提供了新线索。
ai.translation: 由口蹄疫病毒（FMDV）引起的持续性感染仍缺乏可靠解释，因其病因和维持机制复杂，可能涉及多种病原体的并发感染。本研究采用纳米孔平台对来自持续感染FMDV O型的牛的临床样本进行直接测序，分析其咽喉区域共感染病原体的分布特征。简要而言，我们利用牛津纳米孔测序技术生成高质量且充足的序列数据，以全面表征微生物基因组。此外，我们进行了序列比对、排列和系统发育树构建。研究结果揭示了FMDV携带牛中共感染的23种病毒，包括FMDV、牛正肺病毒以及...

title: Evaluation of DNA extraction kits for long-read shotgun metagenomics using Oxford Nanopore sequencing for rapid taxonomic and antimicrobial resistance detection.
abstract: During a bacterial infection or colonization, the detection of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is critical, but slow due to culture-based approaches for clinical and screening samples. Culture-based phenotypic AMR detection and confirmation require up to 72 hours (h) or even weeks for slow-growing bacteria. Direct shotgun metagenomics by long-read sequencing using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) may reduce the time for bacterial species and AMR gene identification. However, screening swabs for metagenomics is complex due to the range of Gram-negative and -positive bacteria, diverse AMR genes, and host DNA present in the samples. Therefore, DNA extraction is a critical initial step. We aimed to compare the performance of different DNA extraction protocols for ONT applications to reliably identify species and AMR genes using a shotgun long-read metagenomic approach. We included three different sample types: ZymoBIOMICS Microbial Community Standard, an in-house mock community of ESKAPE pathogens including Enterococcus faecium, Staphylococcus aureus, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Acinetobacter baumannii, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, and Escherichia coli (ESKAPE Mock), and anonymized clinical swab samples. We processed all sample types with four different DNA extraction kits utilizing different lysis (enzymatic vs. mechanical) and purification (spin-column vs. magnetic beads) methods. We used kits from Qiagen (QIAamp DNA Mini and QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA) and Promega (Maxwell RSC Cultured Cells and Maxwell RSC Buccal Swab DNA). After extraction, samples were subject to the Rapid Barcoding Kit (RBK004) for library preparation followed by sequencing on the GridION with R9.4.1 flow cells. The fast5 files were base called to fastq files using Guppy in High Accuracy (HAC) mode with the inbuilt MinKNOW software. Raw read quality was assessed using NanoPlot and human reads were removed using Minimap2 alignment against the Hg38 genome. Taxonomy identification was performed on the raw reads using Kraken2 and on assembled contigs using Minimap2. The AMR genes were identified using Minimap2 with alignment against the CARD database on both the raw reads and assembled contigs. We identified all bacterial species present in the Zymo Mock Community (8/8) and ESKAPE Mock (6/6) with Qiagen PowerFecal Pro DNA kit (chemical and mechanical lysis) at read and assembly levels. Enzymatic lysis retrieved fewer aligned bases for the Gram-positive species (Staphylococcus aureus and Enterococcus faecium) from the ESKAPE Mock on the assembly level compared to the mechanical lysis. We detected the AMR genes from Gram-negative and -positive species in the ESKAPE Mock with the QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA kit on reads level with a maximum median time of 1.9 h of sequencing. Long-read metagenomics with ONT may reduce the turnaround time in screening for AMR genes. Currently, the QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA kit (chemical and mechanical lysis) for DNA extraction along with the Rapid Barcoding Kit for the ONT sequencing captured the best taxonomy and AMR identification for our specific use case.
authors: Srinithi Purushothaman, Marco Meola, Tim Roloff, Ashley M Rooney, Adrian Egli

ai.TLDR: 在细菌感染或定植中，抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）检测至关重要，但传统培养方法耗时过长（可达数天至数周）。本研究通过比较不同DNA提取方法，发现QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA试剂盒（化学与机械裂解）结合ONT长读长测序，可显著缩短AMR基因检测时间至1.9小时，同时实现物种和耐药基因的精准识别。
ai.translation: 在细菌感染或定植过程中，抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）的检测至关重要，但传统基于培养的方法因临床和筛查样本处理耗时过长而存在局限。基于培养的表型AMR检测与确认需要长达72小时甚至数周的时间，尤其对生长缓慢的细菌更为明显。通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）的长读长宏基因组测序可直接进行细菌种属和AMR基因的快速鉴定，但样本中包含的革兰氏阴性/阳性菌种类、多样化的AMR基因及宿主DNA使得宏基因组筛选复杂化。因此，DNA提取作为关键的初始步骤，其性能直接影响后续分析结果。本研究旨在比较不同DNA提取方法在ONT应用中的表现，以通过长读长宏基因组测序可靠地识别物种和AMR基因。研究纳入三种样本类型：ZymoBIOMICS微生物群落标准品、包含肠球菌、金黄色葡萄球菌、肺炎克雷伯菌、鲍曼不动杆菌、铜绿假单胞菌和大肠杆菌的自制ESKAPE病原体模拟样本（ESKAPE Mock），以及匿名化临床拭子样本。所有样本均采用四种不同的DNA提取试剂盒处理，涉及不同裂解方式（酶解 vs. 机械裂解）和纯化方法（离心柱 vs. 磁珠）。使用的试剂盒包括Qiagen的QIAamp DNA Mini和QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA，以及Promega的Maxwell RSC Cultured Cells和Maxwell RSC Buccal Swab DNA。提取后，样本通过Rapid Barcoding Kit（RBK004）进行文库制备，随后在GridION平台使用R9.4.1流细胞进行测序。使用Guppy在高精度（HAC）模式下将fast5文件转换为fastq文件，并通过MinKNOW软件进行碱基调用。通过NanoPlot评估原始读段质量，利用Minimap2比对至Hg38基因组去除人类读段。通过Kraken2对原始读段进行分类学鉴定，对组装的contigs使用Minimap2进行比对。通过Minimap2结合CARD数据库比对，识别原始读段和组装contigs中的AMR基因。使用Qiagen PowerFecal Pro DNA试剂盒（化学与机械裂解）在Zymo Mock Community（8/8）和ESKAPE Mock（6/6）中成功识别所有细菌种属，且在读段和组装水平均表现优异。酶解裂解在ESKAPE Mock的组装水平上对革兰氏阳性菌（金黄色葡萄球菌和肠球菌）的比对碱基数少于机械裂解。通过QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA试剂盒在ESKAPE Mock的读段水平上检测到革兰氏阴性/阳性菌的AMR基因，最大中位数测序时间为1.9小时。ONT长读长宏基因组测序可显著缩短AMR基因筛查的周转时间。目前，QIAamp PowerFecal Pro DNA试剂盒（化学与机械裂解）结合Rapid Barcoding Kit在ONT测序中，针对本研究特定应用场景实现了最佳的分类学和AMR基因识别效果。

title: Long-read sequencing improves the genetic diagnosis of retinitis pigmentosa by identifying an Alu retrotransposon insertion in theEYSgene
abstract:
### Background

Biallelic variants in *EYS* are the major cause of autosomal recessive retinitis pigmentosa (arRP) in certain populations, a clinically and genetically heterogeneous disease that may lead to legal blindness. *EYS* is one of the largest genes (~ 2 Mb) expressed in the retina, in which structural variants (SVs) represent a common cause of disease. However, their identification using short-read sequencing (SRS) is not always feasible. Here, we conducted targeted long-read sequencing (T-LRS) using adaptive sampling of *EYS* on the MinION sequencing platform (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) to definitively diagnose an arRP family, whose affected individuals (*n* = 3) carried the heterozygous pathogenic deletion of exons 32–33 in the *EYS* gene. As this was a recurrent variant identified in three additional families in our cohort, we also aimed to characterize the known deletion at the nucleotide level to assess a possible founder effect.

### Results

T-LRS in family A unveiled a heterozygous AluYa5 insertion in the coding exon 43 of *EYS* (chr6(GRCh37):g.64430524_64430525ins352), which segregated with the disease in compound heterozygosity with the previously identified deletion. Visual inspection of previous SRS alignments using IGV revealed several reads containing soft-clipped bases, accompanied by a slight drop in coverage at the Alu insertion site. This prompted us to develop a simplified program using *grep* command to investigate the recurrence of this variant in our cohort from SRS data. Moreover, LRS also allowed the characterization of the CNV as a ~ 56.4kb deletion spanning exons 32–33 of *EYS* (chr6(GRCh37):g.64764235_64820592del). The results of further characterization by Sanger sequencing and linkage analysis in the four families were consistent with a founder variant.

### Conclusions

To our knowledge, this is the first report of a mobile element insertion into the coding sequence of *EYS,* as a likely cause of arRP in a family. Our study highlights the value of LRS technology in characterizing and identifying hidden pathogenic SVs, such as retrotransposon insertions, whose contribution to the etiopathogenesis of rare diseases may be underestimated.
authors: Elena Fernández-Suárez, María González-del Pozo, ... Guillermo Antiñolo
citation: Fernández-Suárez, E., González-del Pozo, M., Méndez-Vidal, C. et al. Long-read sequencing improves the genetic diagnosis of retinitis pigmentosa by identifying an Alu retrotransposon insertion in the EYS gene. Mobile DNA 15 , 9 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13100-024-00320-1
description: Biallelic variants inEYSare the major cause of autosomal recessive retinitis pigmentosa (arRP) in certain populations, a clinically and...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术（T-LRS）首次发现EYS基因的移动元件插入变异可能引发常染色体隐性视网膜炎（arRP）。研究利用MinION平台对EYS基因进行靶向测序，发现AluYa5插入变异与已知的外显子32-33缺失形成复合杂合状态，结合Sanger测序和连锁分析验证了该变异的致病性。
keywords: 常染色体隐性视网膜炎（arRP）
ai.translation:
背景：EYS基因的双等位变异是某些人群常染色体隐性视网膜炎（arRP）的主要病因，该疾病具有临床和遗传异质性，可能导致失明。EYS是视网膜中表达的第二大基因（约2 Mb），结构变异（SVs）是其致病的常见原因。然而，短读长测序（SRS）难以准确识别这些变异。本研究采用MinION平台的靶向长读长测序（T-LRS）技术，明确诊断一例arRP家族（3名患者携带EYS基因外显子32-33的杂合致病性缺失）。由于该变异在队列中其他3个家族中也出现，我们进一步分析其核苷酸水平特征以评估可能的创始人效应。

结果：家族A的T-LRS揭示EYS基因编码外显子43存在杂合的AluYa5插入变异（chr6(GRCh37):g.64430524_64430525ins352），该变异与已知缺失形成复合杂合状态。通过IGV查看SRS比对结果发现，插入位点存在软剪切碱基和覆盖度轻微下降。我们开发简化程序利用grep命令分析SRS数据中该变异的复发性。此外，LRS还明确了~56.4kb的缺失CNV，覆盖EYS外显子32-33（chr6(GRCh37):g.64764235_64820592del）。四家系的Sanger测序和连锁分析结果与创始人变异一致。

结论：据我们所知，这是首例报道EYS编码序列中移动元件插入可能引发arRP的病例。本研究凸显了LRS技术在识别隐性结构变异（如逆转录转座子插入）中的价值，这类变异可能被低估其在罕见病致病机制中的作用。

title: CRISPR-mediated megabase-scale transgene de-duplication to generate a functional single-copy full-length humanized DMD mouse model.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The development of sequence-specific precision treatments like CRISPR gene editing therapies for Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) requires sequence humanized animal models to enable the direct clinical translation of tested strategies. The current available integrated transgenic mouse model containing the full-length human DMD gene, Tg(DMD)72Thoen/J (hDMDTg), has been found to have two copies of the transgene per locus in a tail-to-tail orientation, which does not accurately simulate the true (single) copy number of the DMD gene. This duplication also complicates analysis when testing CRISPR therapy editing outcomes, as large genetic alterations and rearrangements can occur between the cut sites on the two transgenes.

RESULTS: To address this, we performed long read nanopore sequencing on hDMDTg mice to better understand the structure of the duplicated transgenes. Following that, we performed a megabase-scale deletion of one of the transgenes by CRISPR zygotic microinjection to generate a single-copy, full-length, humanized DMD transgenic mouse model (hDMDTgSc). Functional, molecular, and histological characterisation shows that the single remaining human transgene retains its function and rescues the dystrophic phenotype caused by endogenous murine Dmd knockout.

CONCLUSIONS: Our unique hDMDTgSc mouse model simulates the true copy number of the DMD gene, and can potentially be used for the further generation of DMD disease models that would be better suited for the pre-clinical assessment and development of sequence specific CRISPR therapies.
authors: Yu C J Chey, Mark A Corbett, Jayshen Arudkumar, Sandra G Piltz, Paul Q Thomas, Fatwa Adikusuma

ai.TLDR: 本研究为杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）的CRISPR基因编辑疗法开发了更精准的动物模型。现有hDMDTg小鼠模型存在双拷贝转基因结构，无法准确模拟人类DMD基因的单拷贝状态。通过长读长纳米孔测序和CRISPR合子显微注射技术，成功构建了单拷贝人源化DMD转基因小鼠模型（hDMDTgSc），该模型保留了转基因功能并能有效缓解内源性小鼠Dmd基因敲除导致的肌营养不良表型。
keywords: 单拷贝转基因小鼠模型
ai.translation:
背景：开发针对杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）的序列特异性精准治疗（如CRISPR基因编辑疗法）需要序列人类化的动物模型，以实现测试策略的直接临床转化。目前可用的整合转基因小鼠模型Tg(DMD)72Thoen/J（hDMDTg）包含全长人类DMD基因，但发现其每个位点存在两个反向尾对尾排列的转基因拷贝，无法准确模拟人类DMD基因的真实单拷贝状态。这种重复结构在测试CRISPR治疗编辑结果时会带来分析复杂性，因为两个转基因切割位点之间可能发生大规模遗传改变和重排。

结果：为解决这一问题，我们对hDMDTg小鼠进行了长读长纳米孔测序以更深入理解重复转基因的结构。随后通过CRISPR合子显微注射技术对其中一个转基因进行兆碱基尺度的删除，成功构建了单拷贝、全长的人源化DMD转基因小鼠模型（hDMDTgSc）。功能、分子及组织学特征分析表明，剩余的单个人类转基因保留了其功能，并能有效缓解内源性小鼠Dmd基因敲除导致的肌营养不良表型。

结论：我们开发的hDMDTgSc小鼠模型能够准确模拟DMD基因的真实拷贝数，可进一步用于生成更适用于预临床评估和序列特异性CRISPR疗法开发的DMD疾病模型。

title: Enhanced Detection and Genotyping of Disease-Associated Tandem Repeats Using HMMSTR and Targeted Long-Read Sequencing
abstract:
Tandem repeat sequences comprise approximately 8% of the human genome and are linked to more than 50 neurodegenerative disorders. Accurate characterization of disease-associated repeat loci remains resource intensive and often lacks high resolution genotype calls. We introduce a multiplexed, targeted nanopore sequencing panel and HMMSTR, a sequence-based tandem repeat copy number caller. HMMSTR outperforms current signal- and sequence-based callers relative to two assemblies and we show it performs with high accuracy in heterozygous regions and at low read coverage. The flexible panel allows us to capture disease associated regions at an average coverage of >150x. Using these tools, we successfully characterize known or suspected repeat expansions in patient derived samples. In these samples we also identify unexpected expanded alleles at tandem repeat loci not previously associated with the underlying diagnosis. This genotyping approach for tandem repeat expansions is scalable, simple, flexible, and accurate, offering significant potential for diagnostic applications and investigation of expansion co-occurrence in neurodegenerative disorders.

ai.TLDR: 串联重复序列占人类基因组约8%，与50多种神经退行性疾病相关。现有方法在重复位点的基因型鉴定中存在资源消耗大、分辨率不足的问题。本研究开发了基于纳米孔测序的多重靶向面板和HMMSTR算法，实现了高精度的重复序列拷贝数分析，可扩展应用于临床样本的重复扩展鉴定。
ai.translation: 串联重复序列约占人类基因组的8%，且与超过50种神经退行性疾病存在关联。目前对疾病相关重复位点的准确表征仍需大量资源，且常缺乏高分辨率的基因型鉴定。我们开发了一种多重靶向纳米孔测序面板，并引入了基于序列的HMMSTR算法用于串联重复拷贝数分析。相较于两种组装方法，HMMSTR在异质性和低测序覆盖度区域均表现出高准确性。该灵活的测序面板使我们能够以平均>150倍覆盖度捕获疾病相关区域。利用这些工具，我们成功鉴定了患者样本中已知或疑似重复扩展区域。在这些样本中，我们还发现了与基础诊断无关联的串联重复位点的意外扩展等位基因。这种串联重复扩展的基因分型方法具有可扩展性、简便性、灵活性和准确性，为诊断应用和神经退行性疾病扩展共现研究提供了重要潜力。

title: Innovative approach of nanopore-based metagenomic sequencing for rapid identification of bacterial pathogens in joint fluid: A pilot study.
abstract: Analysis of 11 clinical samples of joint fluid in this pilot study demonstrated proof-of-concept for nanopore-based metagenomic sequencing to serve as a complementary real-time diagnostic technique for septic arthritis, with a sensitivity of 75.0 % and specificity of 57.1 %, compared to the gold standard method of bacterial culture.
authors: Yoon Hyun Sung, Woong Kyo Jeong, Hak Jun Lee, Jin Woong Suh, Jeong Yeon Kim, Young Kyung Yoon

ai.TLDR: 本试点研究通过分析11例关节液样本，验证了基于纳米孔宏基因组测序的实时诊断技术在化脓性关节炎检测中的潜力。该方法对细菌培养金标准检测的敏感性为75.0%，特异性为57.1%。
ai.translation: 本试点研究对11例临床关节液样本进行分析，证明了基于纳米孔技术的宏基因组测序可作为细菌培养金标准检测的补充性实时诊断方法。结果显示，该技术对化脓性关节炎的检测敏感性为75.0%，特异性为57.1%。研究结果表明，纳米孔宏基因组测序在感染性关节炎的快速诊断中具有应用前景，但其临床适用性仍需更大样本量验证。

title: Most human DNA replication initiation is dispersed throughout the genome with only a minority within previously identified initiation zones
abstract:
BackgroundThe identification of sites of DNA replication initiation in mammalian cells has been challenging. Here, we present unbiased detection of replication initiation events in human cells using BrdU incorporation and single-molecule nanopore sequencing.

ResultsIncreases in BrdU incorporation allow us to measure DNA replication dynamics, including identification of replication initiation, fork direction and termination on individual nanopore sequencing reads. Importantly, initiation and termination events are identified on single-molecules with high resolution, throughout S-phase, genome-wide and at high coverage at specific loci using targeted enrichment. We find a significant enrichment of initiation sites within the broad initiation zones identified by population level studies. However, these focused initiation sites only account for [~]20% of all identified replication initiation events. Most initiation events are dispersed throughout the genome and are missed by cell population approaches. This indicates that most initiation occurs at sites that, individually, are rarely used. These dispersed initiation sites contrast with the focused sites identified by population studies, in that they do not show a strong relationship to transcription or a particular epigenetic signature.

ConclusionsWe show here that single-molecule sequencing enables unbiased detection and characterisation of DNA replication initiation events, including the numerous dispersed initiation events that replicate most of the human genome.
authors: Carrington, J. T.; Wilson, R. H.; Thiyagarajan, S.; Barker, T.; Catchpole, L.; Durrant, A.; Knitlhoffer, V.; Watkins, C.; Gharbi, K.; Nieduszynski, C. A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过单分子纳米孔测序技术，首次实现了对人类细胞DNA复制起始位点的无偏检测。发现大部分复制起始事件分布在基因组广泛区域，与转录和表观遗传标记无显著关联。
ai.translation:
背景：在哺乳动物细胞中识别DNA复制起始位点一直具有挑战性。本文通过BrdU掺入和单分子纳米孔测序技术，首次实现了对人类细胞复制起始事件的无偏检测。

结果：BrdU掺入量的增加使我们能够测量DNA复制动态，包括单个纳米孔测序读取中复制起始、叉方向和终止事件的识别。重要的是，通过靶向富集技术，我们以高分辨率在S期全基因组范围内识别单分子的起始和终止事件，并在特定位点实现高覆盖度。研究发现，群体水平研究确定的广泛起始区域中存在显著的起始位点富集。然而，这些聚焦起始位点仅占所有识别到的复制起始事件的约20%。大多数起始事件分散在基因组各处，被群体水平方法遗漏。这表明大多数复制起始发生在个体使用频率较低的位点。这些分散的起始位点与群体研究识别的聚焦位点形成对比，因为它们与转录或特定表观遗传标记无显著关联。

结论：本文证明单分子测序技术能够无偏检测和表征DNA复制起始事件，包括复制人类基因组大部分区域的众多分散起始事件。

title: Exploring the Transcriptomic Profile of Human Monkeypox Virus via CAGE and Native RNA Sequencing Approaches
abstract:
In this study, we employed short- and long-read sequencing technologies to delineate the transcriptional architecture of the human monkeypox virus and to identify key regulatory elements that govern its gene expression. Specifically, we conducted a transcriptomic analysis to annotate the transcription start sites (TSSs) and transcription end sites (TESs) of the virus by utilizing cap analysis of gene expression sequencing on the Illumina platform and direct RNA sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore technology device. Our investigations uncovered significant complexity in the use of alternative TSSs and TESs in viral genes. In this research, we also detected the promoter elements and poly(A) signals associated with the viral genes. Additionally, we identified novel genes in both the left and right variable regions of the viral genome.

ImportanceGenerally, gaining insight into how the transcription of a virus is regulated offers insights into the key mechanisms that control its life cycle. The recent outbreak of the human monkeypox virus has underscored the necessity of understanding the basic biology of its causative agent. Our results are pivotal for constructing a comprehensive transcriptomic atlas of the human monkeypox virus, providing valuable resources for future studies.
authors: Boldogkoi, Z.; Nagy, G. A.; Tombacz, D.; Prazsak, I.; Csabai, Z.; Dörmo, A.; Gulyas, G.; Kemenesi, G.; Toth, G. E.; Holoubek, J.; Ruzek, D.; Kakuk, B.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过短读和长读测序技术解析猴痘病毒的转录结构，发现病毒基因存在复杂的可变转录起始位点（TSSs）和终止位点（TESs）使用模式。研究首次鉴定出病毒基因组左右可变区的新型基因及调控元件，为构建猴痘病毒转录组图谱提供关键资源。
ai.translation: 本研究中，我们采用短读和长读测序技术解析人类猴痘病毒的转录结构，并鉴定调控其基因表达的关键调控元件。具体而言，我们通过Illumina平台的基因表达帽分析测序和Oxford Nanopore技术设备的直接RNA测序，开展了转录组分析以注释病毒的转录起始位点（TSSs）和转录终止位点（TESs）。研究发现病毒基因在使用替代TSSs和TESs方面表现出显著复杂性。此外，我们检测到与病毒基因相关联的启动子元件和多聚A信号，并在病毒基因组左右可变区鉴定出新型基因。总体而言，深入了解病毒转录调控机制可揭示其生命周期的关键控制机制。近期人类猴痘病毒爆发凸显了研究其病原体基础生物学的必要性。我们的研究结果对构建全面的猴痘病毒转录组图谱具有关键作用，为未来研究提供了重要资源。

title: Unveiling microbial diversity: harnessing long-read sequencing technology
abstract: Long-read sequencing has recently transformed metagenomics, enhancing strain-level pathogen characterization, enabling accurate and complete metagenome-assembled genomes, and improving microbiome taxonomic classification and profiling. These advancements are not only due to improvements in sequencing accuracy, but also happening across rapidly changing analysis methods. In this Review, we explore long-read sequencing’s profound impact on metagenomics, focusing on computational pipelines for genome assembly, taxonomic characterization and variant detection, to summarize recent advancements in the field and provide an overview of available analytical methods to fully leverage long reads. We provide insights into the advantages and disadvantages of long reads over short reads and their evolution from the early days of long-read sequencing to their recent impact on metagenomics and clinical diagnostics. We further point out remaining challenges for the field such as the integration of methylation signals in sub-strain analysis and the lack of benchmarks.
authors: Daniel P. Agustinho, Yilei Fu, ... Fritz J. Sedlazeck
citation: Agustinho, D.P., Fu, Y., Menon, V.K. et al. Unveiling microbial diversity: harnessing long-read sequencing technology. Nat Methods 21 , 954–966 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-024-02262-1
description: Long-read sequencing has recently transformed metagenomics, enhancing strain-level pathogen characterization, enabling accurate and complete...

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术通过提升测序精度和分析方法革新，显著推动了宏基因组学发展，实现了病原体表型分析、基因组组装和微生物分类的突破。本文系统梳理了长读长测序在宏基因组学中的技术进展，重点分析其计算流程、分类学特征和变异检测方法，并探讨其在临床诊断中的应用潜力。
ai.translation: 长读长测序技术最近彻底改变了宏基因组学领域，显著提升了病原体株级表型分析能力，实现了准确且完整的宏基因组组装基因组，同时改进了微生物分类学分类和功能分型。这些进展不仅源于测序精度的提升，更得益于分析方法的快速迭代。本文综述系统探讨了长读长测序对宏基因组学的深远影响，重点聚焦基因组组装的计算流程、分类学特征分析和变异检测方法，旨在总结该领域的最新进展，并提供可用的分析方法概览以充分发挥长读长数据价值。我们深入分析了长读长测序相较于短读长测序的优势与局限性，回顾了其从早期技术发展到当前在宏基因组学和临床诊断中的应用历程。同时指出该领域仍面临的挑战，如亚株分析中表观遗传信号的整合难题以及缺乏标准化基准测试等问题。

title: A retrospective genomic characterisation of the 2022 mpox outbreak in Belgium, and in vitro assessment of three antiviral compounds.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Since the beginning of May 2022, cases of mpox have been reported in several European and American countries where the disease is nonendemic. We performed a retrospective genomic characterisation of the 2022 mpox outbreak in Belgium, and assessed the in vitro sensitivity of three antiviral compounds to a monkeypox virus (MPXV) strain from the 2022 outbreak.

METHODS: We sequenced the complete genomes of MPXV isolated from skin-, throat-, anorectal- and genital swab samples using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) GridION. We subsequently analysed high-quality complete MPXV genomes and conducted a genomic analysis of MPXV complete genomes from this study with all other complete MPXV genomes available on GISAID up to October 28th, 2022. The in vitro activity of tecovirimat, brincidofovir, and cidofovir was also tested in human and monkey cell lines.

FINDINGS: We produced 248 complete MPXV genomes. Phylogenetic analysis of the complete MPXV genomes revealed that they all belong to MPXV Clade IIb B.1. Surprisingly, through phylogeographic analysis we identified a minimum number of 79 introduction events into Belgium, along with sustained local transmission. We also demonstrated the superior in vitro efficacy and selectivity of tecovirimat to the 2022 MPXV clinical strain.

INTERPRETATION: The number of sequences provides sufficient information about the MPXV lineages that were circulating in Belgium. The 2022 mpox outbreak, in Belgium, was mainly characterised by many introduction events that were promptly contained and resulted in limited human-to-human transmission of MPXV. The in vitro efficacy of antivirals against a 2022 MPXV Belgian strain highlights the potent activity and specificity of tecovirimat and its ability to prevent the formation of the extracellular enveloped viruses.

FUNDING: None.
authors: Tony Wawina-Bokalanga, Bert Vanmechelen, Anne-Sophie Logist, Mandy Bloemen, Lies Laenen, Sébastien Bontems, Marie-Pierre Hayette, Cécile Meex, Christelle Meuris, Catherine Orban, Emmanuel André, Robert Snoeck, Guy Baele, Samuel L Hong, Graciela Andrei, Piet Maes

ai.TLDR: 2022年比利时猴痘疫情的基因组分析显示，所有病毒株均属于IIb B.1分支，且存在79次输入事件和局部传播。体外实验表明tecovirimat对2022年临床株具有显著的抗病毒活性和选择性。
ai.translation:
背景：自2022年5月初以来，欧洲和美洲非流行区陆续报告猴痘病例。我们对2022年比利时猴痘疫情进行了回顾性基因组特征分析，并评估了三种抗病毒化合物对2022年疫情中猴痘病毒（MPXV）株的体外敏感性。

方法：使用牛津纳米基因组技术（ONT GridION）对皮肤、咽喉、肛门和生殖器拭子样本中分离的MPXV进行全基因组测序。随后分析高质量的MPXV全基因组，并与GISAID数据库截至2022年10月28日的所有MPXV全基因组进行比较分析。同时在人类和猴细胞系中测试了tecovirimat、brincidofovir和cidofovir的体外活性。

发现：我们获得了248个完整的MPXV基因组。系统发育分析显示所有病毒株均属于MPXV IIb B.1分支。通过流行遗传学分析发现至少有79次病毒输入事件，并存在持续的本地传播。同时证明tecovirimat对2022年临床株具有显著的体外疗效和选择性。

解读：获得的序列数量已能充分反映比利时流行病毒株的谱系特征。2022年比利时猴痘疫情主要表现为多次输入事件被迅速控制，导致有限的人传人传播。抗病毒药物对2022年比利时株的体外效果凸显了tecovirimat的强效活性和特异性，其能有效阻止细胞外包膜病毒的形成。

资助：无。

title: Assessing different next-generation sequencing technologies for wastewater-based epidemiology.
abstract: Wastewater-based epidemiology has proven to be an important public health asset during the COVID-19 pandemic. It can provide less biassed and more cost-effective population-level monitoring of the disease burden as compared to clinical testing. An essential component of SARS-CoV-2 wastewater monitoring is next-generation sequencing, providing genomic data to identify and quantify circulating viral strains rapidly. However, the specific choice of sequencing method influences the quality and timeliness of generated data and hence its usefulness for wastewater-based pathogen surveillance. Here, we systematically benchmarked Illumina Novaseq 6000, Element Aviti, ONT R9.4.1 MinION flow cell, and ONT R9.4.1 Flongle flow cell sequencing data to facilitate the selection of sequencing technology. Using a time series of wastewater samples from influent of six wastewater treatment plants throughout Switzerland, along with spike-in experiments, we show that higher sequencing error rates of ONT Nanopore sequencing reduce the accuracy of estimates of the relative abundance of viral variants, but the overall trend is in good concordance among all technologies. We find that the sequencing runtime for ONT Nanopore flow cells can be reduced to as little as five hours without significant impact on the quality of variant estimates. Our findings suggest that SARS-CoV-2 variant tracking is readily achievable with all tested technologies, albeit with different tradeoffs in terms of cost, timeliness and accuracy.
authors: Anika John, David Dreifuss, Seju Kang, Anna Bratus-Neuenschwander, Natalia Zajac, Ivan Topolsky, Arthur Dondi, Catharine Aquino, Timothy R Julian, Niko Beerenwinkel

ai.TLDR: 污水流行病学在新冠疫情期间成为重要的公共卫生工具，可提供比临床检测更少偏倚且更经济的群体疾病监测。不同测序技术在病毒变异株追踪中表现各异，ONT纳米孔测序在缩短运行时间的同时保持了变异株估计的准确性。
ai.translation: 基于污水的流行病学在新冠疫情期间已被证明是重要的公共卫生资产。与临床检测相比，它能够提供更少偏倚且更经济的群体层面疾病负担监测。SARS-CoV-2污水监测的关键组成部分是下一代测序技术，该技术可提供基因组数据以快速识别和量化流行病毒株。然而，测序方法的具体选择会影响生成数据的质量和时效性，从而影响其在污水基病原体监测中的实用性。本研究系统评估了Illumina Novaseq 6000、Element Aviti、ONT R9.4.1 MinION流细胞和ONT R9.4.1 Flongle流细胞测序数据，以帮助选择测序技术。通过瑞士六个污水处理厂进水样本的时间序列数据及加入标准品实验，我们发现ONT纳米孔测序的较高测序误差率会降低病毒变异株相对丰度估计的准确性，但所有技术的整体趋势均保持良好一致性。研究发现ONT纳米孔流细胞的测序运行时间可缩短至最低5小时，而对变异株估计质量影响不大。我们的研究结果表明，所有测试技术均可实现SARS-CoV-2变异株追踪，但存在成本、时效性和准确性方面的不同权衡。

title: Location of phosphorylation sites within long polypeptide chains by binder-assisted nanopore detection
journal: Journal of the American Chemical Society
abstract: The detection and mapping of protein phosphorylation sites are essential for understanding the mechanisms of various cellular processes and for identifying targets for drug development. The study of biopolymers at the single-molecule level has been revolutionized by nanopore technology. In this study, we detect protein phosphorylation within long polypeptides (>600 amino acids), after the attachment of binders that interact with phosphate monoesters; electro-osmosis is used to drive the tagged chains through engineered protein nanopores. By monitoring the ionic current carried by a nanopore, phosphorylation sites are located within individual polypeptide chains, providing a valuable step toward nanopore proteomics.
authors: Lan, W.-H.; He, H.; Bayley, H.; Qing, Y.

ai.TLDR: 蛋白质磷酸化位点的检测与定位对于理解多种细胞过程的机制以及识别药物开发靶点至关重要。本研究通过纳米孔技术结合电渗流驱动标记链，实现了长多肽中磷酸化位点的单分子级检测，为纳米孔蛋白质组学提供了关键步骤。
ai.translation: 蛋白质磷酸化位点的检测与定位对于理解多种细胞过程的机制以及识别药物开发靶点至关重要。单分子水平的生物聚合物研究因纳米孔技术的出现而发生革命性变化。本研究通过在长多肽（>600个氨基酸）上连接能与磷酸单酯相互作用的结合物，利用电渗流驱动标记链通过工程化蛋白纳米孔。通过监测纳米孔携带的离子电流，可在单个多肽链中定位磷酸化位点，为纳米孔蛋白质组学提供了有价值的步骤。

title: CAIM: Coverage-based Analysis for Identification of Microbiome
abstract:
Accurate taxonomic profiling of microbial taxa in a metagenomic sample is vital to gain insights into microbial ecology. Recent advancements in sequencing technologies have contributed tremendously toward understanding these microbes at species resolution through a whole shotgun metagenomic (WMS) approach. In this study, we developed a new bioinformatics tool, CAIM, for accurate taxonomic classification and quantification within both long- and short-read metagenomic samples using an alignment-based method. CAIM depends on two different containment techniques to identify species in metagenomic samples using their genome coverage information to filter out false positives rather than the traditional approach of relative abundance. In addition, we propose a nucleotide-count based abundance estimation, which yield lesser root mean square error than the traditional read-count approach. We evaluated the performance of CAIM on 28 metagenomic mock communities and 2 synthetic datasets by comparing it with other top-performing tools. CAIM maintained a consitently good performance across datasets in identifying microbial taxa and in estimating relative abundances than other tools. CAIM was then applied to a real dataset sequenced on both Nanopore (with and without amplification) and Illumina sequencing platforms and found high similality of taxonomic profiles between the sequencing platforms. Lastly, CAIM was applied to fecal shotgun metagenomic datasets of 232 colorectal cancer patients and 229 controls obtained from 4 different countries and primary 44 liver cancer patients and 76 controls. The predictive performance of models using the genome-coverage cutoff was better than those using the relative-abundance cutoffs in discriminating colorectal cancer and primary liver cancer patients from healthy controls with a highly confident species markers.

Key Points- Metagenomic coverage is an important index to obtain highly accurate species identification by reducing false positives from whole shotgun metagenomic data.
- Comparative analyses of CAIM and other bioinformatics tools for species identification on many mock community whole shotgun metagenomic datasets generated by short-read and long-read sequencing and synthetic datasets were performed, showing that CAIM has a very good performance compared with the other tools.
- Using the metagenomic coverage approach through CAIM improves the predictive power of species biomarkers identified from in stool samples of colorectal cancer and primary liver datasets.
authors: Acheampong, D. A.; Jenjaroenpun, P.; Wongsurawat, T.; Krulilung, A.; Pomyen, Y.; Kunadirek, P.; Chuaypen, N.; Kusonmano, K.; Nookaew, I.

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组样本的准确分类分析对理解微生物生态学至关重要。CAIM工具通过宏基因组覆盖度而非传统相对丰度方法，有效减少了假阳性，提升了物种分类和定量的准确性。在28个模拟社区和2个合成数据集的测试中，CAIM在物种识别和相对丰度估计方面表现优异，并成功应用于结直肠癌和肝癌患者的粪便样本分析。
ai.translation: 准确鉴定宏基因组样本中的微生物分类群对揭示微生物生态学至关重要。近年来，测序技术的进步极大地推动了通过全基因组宏基因组（WMS）方法对微生物进行种级分辨率的理解。本研究开发了一种新的生物信息学工具CAIM，采用基于比对的方法，用于长读长和短读长宏基因组样本的准确分类和定量。CAIM依赖两种不同的包含技术，通过基因组覆盖度信息过滤假阳性，而非传统相对丰度方法。此外，我们提出了一种基于核苷酸计数的丰度估计方法，其均方根误差低于传统读数计数方法。通过与其它顶级工具比较，CAIM在28个宏基因组模拟社区和2个合成数据集中表现出色。CAIM在识别微生物分类群和估计相对丰度方面优于其他工具。CAIM随后应用于Nanopore（含/不含扩增）和Illumina测序平台的真实数据集，发现不同测序平台的分类群谱高度相似。最后，CAIM应用于来自4个国家的232例结直肠癌患者和229例对照的粪便全基因组宏基因组数据，以及44例原发性肝癌患者和76例对照的肝癌数据。使用基因组覆盖度截断的模型在区分癌症患者与健康对照时，其预测性能优于基于相对丰度截断的模型，并具有高度可信的物种标志物。

title: Performance of metagenomic Next-Generation Sequencing and metagenomic Nanopore Sequencing for the diagnosis of tuberculosis in HIV-positive patients.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Patients who were infected by the 

METHODS: The 122 HIV-infected patients were enrolled for the retrospective analysis. All of the patients underwent traditional microbiological tests, mNGS, and (or) mNPS tests. The clinical comprehensive diagnosis was used as the reference standard to compare the diagnostic performance of culture, mNGS, and mNPS on tuberculosis. We also investigate the diagnostic value of mNGS and mNPS on mixed-infection. Furthermore, the treatment adjustment directed by mNGS and mNPS was analyzed.

RESULTS: Compared with the composite reference standard, the culture showed 42.6% clinical sensitivity and 100% specificity, and the OMT(other microbiological testing) had 38.9% sensitivity and 100% specificity. The mNGS had 58.6% clinical sensitivity and 96.8% specificity, and the mNPS had 68.0% clinical sensitivity and 100% specificity. The proportion of mixed-infection cases (88.9%) in the TB group was higher than those in the non-TB group (54.8%) and the mNGS and mNPS are more competitive on mixed-infection diagnosis compared with the traditional methods. Furthermore, there are 63 patients (69.2%) and 36 patients (63.2%) achieved effective treatment after receiving the detection of mNPS and mNGS, respectively.

CONCLUSION: Our study indicated that mNPS and mNGS have high sensitivity and specificity for TB diagnosis compared with the traditional methods, and mNPS seems to have better diagnostic performance than mNGS. Moreover, mNGS and mNPS showed apparent advantages in detecting mixed infection. The mNPS and mNGS-directed medication adjustment have effective treatment outcomes for HIV-infected patients who have lower immunity.
authors: Jing Yuan, Lanchun Wang, Wei Zhang, Changgang Deng, Qisui Li, Yamin Meng, Yaokai Chen

ai.TLDR: 本研究比较了传统方法与mNGS/mNPS在HIV感染患者结核病诊断中的效果。结果显示mNPS在敏感性（68.0%）和特异性（100%）上优于mNGS（58.6%敏感性，96.8%特异性），且对混合感染检测更具优势。
ai.translation: 背景：HIV感染患者中结核病的诊断面临挑战。方法：纳入122例HIV感染患者进行回顾性分析，所有患者均接受传统微生物学检测、mNGS和/或mNPS检测。以临床综合诊断作为参考标准，比较培养法、mNGS和mNPS对结核病的诊断性能。同时评估mNGS和mNPS在混合感染诊断中的价值，并分析其指导下的治疗调整效果。结果：与复合参考标准相比，培养法临床敏感性为42.6%、特异性100%，其他微生物学检测敏感性38.9%、特异性100%。mNGS敏感性58.6%、特异性96.8%，mNPS敏感性68.0%、特异性100%。结核病组混合感染比例（88.9%）显著高于非结核病组（54.8%），mNGS和mNPS在混合感染诊断中较传统方法更具竞争力。接受mNPS检测的63例患者（69.2%）和接受mNGS检测的36例患者（63.2%）均实现有效治疗。结论：mNPS和mNGS在结核病诊断中较传统方法具有更高敏感性和特异性，且mNPS诊断性能更优。两种技术在混合感染检测中均表现出显著优势，其指导的治疗调整对免疫功能低下的HIV感染患者具有良好的治疗效果。

title: Cross-Correlation between Biosecurity Measures and the Detection of Viral and Bacterial Agents on German Farms with Respiratory Disease.
abstract: Effective porcine health management relies majorly on diagnostic tests, vaccination, treatment strategies, and a proper biosecurity management plan. However, understanding the link between circulating microbes and biosecurity measures on a pig farm is not evident. Substantial progress has been made in recent years with the availability of new diagnostic tools (e.g., sequencing-based diagnostics) and extensive biosecurity management questionnaires. However, the interpretation and correlation of these results are hampered by the abundance of gained (meta)data. Therefore, we aimed to cross-correlate viral and bacterial pathogens with respiratory tropism detected by third-generation nanopore metagenomic sequencing with biosecurity measures assessed by Biocheck.UGent™. The study was conducted on 25 sow farms with attached nurseries in Germany with known respiratory distress. The biosecurity level of the study farms complied with the European averages. Interestingly, the farms with the highest biosecurity score showed the lowest overall prevalence of porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus (PRRSV) and
authors: Julia Stadler, Kathrin Lillie-Jaschniski, Sophia Zwickl, Susanne Zoels, Sebastiaan Theuns, Mathias Ritzmann, Nick Vereecke

ai.TLDR: 猪群健康管理依赖诊断测试和生物安全措施，但微生物与生物安全措施的关联尚不明确。本研究通过第三代纳米孔宏基因组测序和Biocheck.UGent™评估工具，发现高生物安全评分农场的PRRSV感染率显著降低。
keywords: 第三代纳米孔宏基因组测序
ai.translation: 有效的猪群健康管理主要依赖诊断测试、疫苗接种、治疗策略和完善的生物安全计划。然而，目前尚不清楚猪场循环微生物与生物安全措施之间的具体关联。近年来，随着新型诊断工具（如基于测序的诊断技术）和全面的生物安全管理问卷的出现，相关研究取得显著进展。但大量获得的元数据（meta)data使得结果的解读和关联分析面临挑战。因此，本研究旨在通过第三代纳米孔宏基因组测序技术检测呼吸道嗜性病毒和细菌病原体，并结合Biocheck.UGent™评估生物安全措施，进行交叉关联分析。研究在德国25个附带育仔舍的母猪农场开展，这些农场存在已知的呼吸道疾病。研究农场的生物安全水平符合欧洲平均水平。有趣的是，生物安全评分最高的农场表现出最低的猪繁殖与呼吸综合征病毒（PRRSV）总体流行率。

ai.TLDR: 研究通过多种分子检测技术鉴定耐药菌株，确认NDM-5编码质粒可通过接合实验在受体细胞中转移。实验结合MALDI-TOF MS、基因组测序和生物信息学分析，揭示了碳青霉烯类抗生素耐药性的遗传机制。
ai.translation: 引言：本研究聚焦于耐药菌株的分子检测与遗传机制分析。方法：通过MALDI-TOF MS鉴定菌株，采用VITEK 2/Phoenix系统进行抗生素敏感性测试。通过接合实验评估耐药质粒的转移能力，对两株菌株的基因组DNA进行Illumina测序，其中一株同时使用Oxford Nanopore技术测序。生物信息学分析用于检测抗菌耐药基因，并注释NDM基因的遗传背景。结果与结论：两株菌株均通过表型测试显示对碳青霉烯类抗生素耐药。接合实验证实两株菌的NDM-5编码质粒可转移至受体细胞。完整NDM-5编码质粒的测序结果表明...

title: Snapshot study of canine distemper virus in Bangladesh with on-site PCR detection and nanopore sequencing
abstract: Canine distemper virus (CDV) is a highly contagious virus that affects domestic and wild animals, causing severe illness with high mortality rates. Rapid monitoring and sequencing can provide valuable information about circulating CDV strains, which may foster effective vaccination strategies and the successful integration of these into conservation programs. During two site visits in Bangladesh in 2023, we tested a mobile, deployable genomic surveillance setup to explore the genetic diversity and phylogenetic patterns of locally circulating CDV strains. We collected and analysed 355 oral swab samples from stray dogs in Rajshahi and Chattogram cities, Bangladesh. CDV-specific real-time RT-PCR was performed to screen the samples. Out of the 355 samples, 7.4% (10/135) from Rajshahi city and 0.9% (2/220) from Chattogram city tested positive for CDV. We applied a real-time RT-PCR assay and a pan-genotype CDV-specific amplicon-based Nanopore sequencing technology to obtain the near-completes. Five near-complete genome sequences were generated, with phylogenetic relation to the India-1/Asia-5 lineage previously identified in India. This is the first study to provide genomic data on CDV in Bangladesh and the first demonstration of a mobile laboratory setup as a powerful tool in rapid genomic surveillance and risk assessment for CDV in low resource regions.
authors: Zsófia Lanszki, Md. Shafeul Islam, ... Sazeda Akter
citation: Lanszki, Z., Islam, M.S., Shikder, M.F. et al. Snapshot study of canine distemper virus in Bangladesh with on-site PCR detection and nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 14 , 9250 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-59343-6

ai.TLDR: 犬瘟热病毒（CDV）在孟加拉国流浪犬中存在显著差异，移动实验室系统首次实现该地区CDV基因组数据采集。通过实时RT-PCR和纳米孔测序技术，获得近全基因组序列并揭示与印度-1/亚洲-5谱系的进化关系。
ai.translation: 犬瘟热病毒（Canine distemper virus, CDV）是一种高度传染性病毒，可感染家养和野生动物，导致严重疾病并具有高死亡率。快速监测和测序可为流行CDV毒株提供重要信息，有助于制定有效疫苗策略并整合至保护计划。2023年在孟加拉国两次实地考察中，我们测试了可部署的基因组监测系统，以探索本地流行CDV毒株的遗传多样性及系统发育模式。在拉杰沙希和乔尔布尔城收集并分析了355份流浪犬口拭子样本。通过CDV特异性实时RT-PCR筛选样本，结果显示拉杰沙希城135份样本中7.4%（10份）和乔尔布尔城220份样本中0.9%（2份）呈阳性。采用实时RT-PCR检测和泛基因型CDV特异性扩增子纳米孔测序技术，获得近全基因组序列。共生成5条近全基因组序列，其系统发育关系与印度-1/亚洲-5谱系（此前在印度鉴定）相关。这是首项提供孟加拉国CDV基因组数据的研究，也是首次展示移动实验室系统作为低资源地区快速基因组监测和风险评估的强大工具。

title: Aneuploidy detection in pooled polar bodies using rapid nanopore sequencing
journal: Journal of Assisted Reproduction and Genetics
abstract:
### Purpose

Various screening techniques have been developed for preimplantation genetic testing for aneuploidy (PGT-A) to reduce implantation failure and miscarriages in women undergoing in vitro fertilisation (IVF) treatment. Among these methods, the Oxford nanopore technology (ONT) has already been tested in several tissues. However, no studies have applied ONT to polar bodies, a cellular material that is less restrictively regulated for PGT-A in some countries.

### Methods

We performed rapid short nanopore sequencing on pooled first and second polar bodies of 102 oocytes from women undergoing IVF treatment to screen for aneuploidy. An automated analysis pipeline was developed with the expectation of three chromatids per chromosome. The results were compared to those obtained by array-based comparative genomic hybridisation (aCGH).

### Results

ONT and aCGH were consistent for 96% (98/102) of sample ploidy classification. Of those samples, 36 were classified as euploid, while 62 were classified as aneuploid. The four discordant samples were assessed as euploid using aCGH but classified as aneuploid using ONT. The concordance of the ploidy classification (euploid, gain, or loss) per chromosome was 92.5% (2169 of 2346 of analysed chromosomes) using aCGH and ONT and increased to 97.7% (2113/2162) without the eight samples assessed as highly complex aneuploid using ONT.

### Conclusion

The automated detection of the ploidy classification per chromosome and shorter duplications or deletions depending on the sequencing depth demonstrates an advantage of the ONT method over standard, commercial aCGH methods, which do not consider the presence of three chromatids in pooled polar bodies.
authors: Silvia Madritsch, Vivienne Arnold, ... Franco Laccone
citation: Madritsch, S., Arnold, V., Haider, M. et al. Aneuploidy detection in pooled polar bodies using rapid nanopore sequencing. J Assist Reprod Genet 41 , 1261–1271 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10815-024-03108-7

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在评估牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）在胚胎植入前遗传学检测（PGT-A）中对极体样本的染色体倍性分类准确性。通过与基于芯片的比较基因组杂交（aCGH）方法对比，发现ONT在96%的样本中与aCGH结果一致，且在检测复杂染色体异常方面具有优势。
keywords: 胚胎植入前遗传学检测
ai.translation:
### 目的

为减少体外受精（IVF）治疗中植入失败和流产风险，已开发多种用于非整倍体筛查的胚胎植入前遗传学检测（PGT-A）技术。其中，牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）已应用于多种组织检测，但尚未有研究将其用于PGT-A中监管较宽松的极体样本。

### 方法

我们对102枚IVF治疗卵子的合并第一和第二极体进行了快速短纳米孔测序，以筛查非整倍体。开发了自动化分析流程，预期每条染色体包含三个染色单体。结果与基于芯片的比较基因组杂交（aCGH）方法进行对比。

### 结果

ONT与aCG比对在96%（98/102）样本的倍性分类中一致。其中36例被归类为正常二倍体，62例被归类为非整倍体。4例不一致样本在aCGH中被判定为正常二倍体，但ONT显示为非整倍体。ONT与aCGH在每条染色体倍性分类（正常二倍体、增益或丢失）的一致性为92.5%（2169/2346分析染色体），排除8例ONT判定为高度复杂非整倍体样本后提升至97.7%（2113/2162）。

### 结论

ONT方法通过自动化检测每条染色体的倍性分类及短片段重复/缺失，相较于不考虑合并极体中三染色单体存在的标准商业aCGH方法具有优势。

title: Long-read sequencing and structural variant characterization in 1,019 samples from the 1000 Genomes Project
abstract: Structural variants (SVs) contribute significantly to human genetic diversity and disease1-4. Previously, SVs have remained incompletely resolved by population genomics, with short-read sequencing facing limitations in capturing the whole spectrum of SVs at nucleotide resolution5-7. Here we leveraged nanopore sequencing8 to construct an intermediate coverage resource of 1,019 long-read genomes sampled within 26 human populations from the 1000 Genomes Project. By integrating linear and graph-based approaches for SV analysis via pangenome graph-augmentation, we uncover 167,291 sequence-resolved SVs in these samples, considerably advancing SV characterization compared to population-wide short-read sequencing studies3,4. Our analysis details diverse SV classes--deletions, duplications, insertions, and inversions--at population-scale. LINE-1 and SVA retrotransposition activities frequently mediate transductions9,10 of unique sequences, with both mobile element classes transducing sequences at either the 3'- or 5'-end, depending on the source element locus. Furthermore, analyses of SV breakpoint junctions suggest a continuum of homology-mediated rearrangement processes are integral to SV formation, and highlight evidence for SV recurrence involving repeat sequences. Our open-access dataset underscores the transformative impact of long-read sequencing in advancing the characterisation of polymorphic genomic architectures, and provides a resource for guiding variant prioritisation in future long-read sequencing-based disease studies.
authors: Schloissnig, S.; Pani, S.; Rodriguez-Martin, B.; Ebler, J.; Hain, C.; Tsapalou, V.; Soylev, A.; Huether, P.; Ashraf, H.; Prodanov, T.; Asparuhova, M.; Hunt, S.; Rausch, T.; Marschall, T.; Korbel, J. O.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术分析了1000基因组计划中26个人群的1019个长读长基因组，揭示了167,291个结构变异，显著提升了对结构变异的解析能力。研究发现LINE-1和SVA转座子活动频繁介导序列转移，并揭示了同源重组在结构变异形成中的关键作用。
ai.translation: 结构变异（SVs）显著贡献于人类遗传多样性及疾病发生1-4。此前，群体基因组学对SVs的解析仍不完全，短读长测序在核苷酸分辨率下难以全面捕获SVs的全谱5-7。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术构建了1019个长读长基因组的中间覆盖度资源，这些基因组采样自1000基因组计划中的26个人群。通过整合线性与图谱分析方法，利用泛基因组图谱增强技术，我们揭示了167,291个序列解析的SVs，相较于全人群短读长测序研究3,4，显著推进了SVs的解析。分析详细描述了在群体尺度下的SV类别——缺失、重复、插入和倒位。LINE-1和SVA转座子活动频繁介导独特序列的转移，两类移动元件根据源元件位点分别在3'端或5'端进行序列转移。此外，SV断点连接分析表明，同源介导的重排过程连续性是SV形成的关键，且重复序列参与的SV复发性证据被突出显示。本研究的开放数据集强调了长读长测序在解析多态性基因组架构中的变革性影响，并为未来基于长读长测序的疾病研究提供变异优先级指导资源。

title: Identification of skewed X chromosome inactivation using exome and transcriptome sequencing in patients with suspected rare genetic disease
abstract:
### Background

X-chromosome inactivation (XCI) is an epigenetic process that occurs during early development in mammalian females by randomly silencing one of two copies of the X chromosome in each cell. The preferential inactivation of either the maternal or paternal copy of the X chromosome in a majority of cells results in a skewed or non-random pattern of X inactivation and is observed in over 25% of adult females. Identifying skewed X inactivation is of clinical significance in patients with suspected rare genetic diseases due to the possibility of biased expression of disease-causing genes present on the active X chromosome. The current clinical test for the detection of skewed XCI relies on the methylation status of the methylation-sensitive restriction enzyme (Hpall) binding site present in proximity of short tandem polymorphic repeats on the androgen receptor (AR) gene. This approach using one locus results in uninformative or inconclusive data for 10–20% of tests. Further, recent studies have shown inconsistency between methylation of the AR locus and the state of inactivation of the X chromosome. Herein, we develop a method for estimating X inactivation status, using exome and transcriptome sequencing data derived from blood in 227 female samples. We built a reference model for evaluation of XCI in 135 females from the GTEx consortium. We tested and validated the model on 11 female individuals with different types of undiagnosed rare genetic disorders who were clinically tested for X-skew using the AR gene assay and compared results to our outlier-based analysis technique.

### Results

In comparison to the *AR* clinical test for identification of X inactivation, our method was concordant with the *AR* method in 9 samples, discordant in 1, and provided a measure of X inactivation in 1 sample with uninformative clinical results. We applied this method on an additional 81 females presenting to the clinic with phenotypes consistent with different hereditary disorders without a known genetic diagnosis.

### Conclusions

This study presents the use of transcriptome and exome sequencing data to provide an accurate and complete estimation of X-inactivation and skew status in a cohort of female patients with different types of suspected rare genetic disease.
authors: Numrah Fadra, Laura E Schultz-Rogers, ... Eric W Klee
citation: Fadra, N., Schultz-Rogers, L.E., Chanana, P. et al. Identification of skewed X chromosome inactivation using exome and transcriptome sequencing in patients with suspected rare genetic disease. BMC Genomics 25 , 371 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-024-10240-2
