ai.TLDR: 本研究针对现有X染色体失活检测方法的局限性，开发了一种基于外显子组和转录组测序数据的新方法。该方法在227例女性样本中验证，可准确评估X染色体失活状态，解决了传统AR基因检测在10-20%病例中结果不明确的问题。
ai.translation:
背景：X染色体失活(XCI)是哺乳动物雌性在早期发育中通过随机沉默单条X染色体的表观遗传过程。约25%成年女性呈现偏向性X染色体失活模式，这种非随机失活在疑似罕见遗传病的患者中具有临床意义。现有检测方法依赖于甲基化敏感限制酶(Hpall)在雄激素受体(AR)基因短串联重复区域的甲基化状态，但该单位点检测方法在10-20%病例中无法提供有效信息。近期研究发现AR位点甲基化状态与X染色体失活状态存在不一致性。本研究开发了一种基于外显子组和转录组测序数据的X染色体失活状态评估方法，利用GTEx联盟的135例女性样本构建参考模型，并在11例临床疑似X染色体非随机失活的未确诊罕见遗传病患者中进行验证。

结果：与AR基因检测相比，本方法在9例样本中结果一致，1例存在差异，1例提供有效X染色体失活评估。该方法进一步应用于81例临床表型符合不同遗传病但未确诊的女性患者。

结论：本研究展示了利用转录组和外显子组测序数据对罕见遗传病疑似患者群体的X染色体失活状态进行准确全面评估的可行性。

title: Evaluating metagenomics and targeted approaches for diagnosis and surveillance of viruses.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Metagenomics is a powerful approach for the detection of unknown and novel pathogens. Workflows based on Illumina short-read sequencing are becoming established in diagnostic laboratories. However, high sequencing depth requirements, long turnaround times, and limited sensitivity hinder broader adoption. We investigated whether we could overcome these limitations using protocols based on untargeted sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT), which offers real-time data acquisition and analysis, or a targeted panel approach, which allows the selective sequencing of known pathogens and could improve sensitivity.

METHODS: We evaluated detection of viruses with readily available untargeted metagenomic workflows using Illumina and ONT, and an Illumina-based enrichment approach using the Twist Bioscience Comprehensive Viral Research Panel (CVRP), which targets 3153 viruses. We tested samples consisting of a dilution series of a six-virus mock community in a human DNA/RNA background, designed to resemble clinical specimens with low microbial abundance and high host content. Protocols were designed to retain the host transcriptome, since this could help confirm the absence of infectious agents. We further compared the performance of commonly used taxonomic classifiers.

RESULTS: Capture with the Twist CVRP increased sensitivity by at least 10-100-fold over untargeted sequencing, making it suitable for the detection of low viral loads (60 genome copies per ml (gc/ml)), but additional methods may be needed in a diagnostic setting to detect untargeted organisms. While untargeted ONT had good sensitivity at high viral loads (60,000 gc/ml), at lower viral loads (600-6000 gc/ml), longer and more costly sequencing runs would be required to achieve sensitivities comparable to the untargeted Illumina protocol. Untargeted ONT provided better specificity than untargeted Illumina sequencing. However, the application of robust thresholds standardized results between taxonomic classifiers. Host gene expression analysis is optimal with untargeted Illumina sequencing but possible with both the CVRP and ONT.

CONCLUSIONS: Metagenomics has the potential to become standard-of-care in diagnostics and is a powerful tool for the discovery of emerging pathogens. Untargeted Illumina and ONT metagenomics and capture with the Twist CVRP have different advantages with respect to sensitivity, specificity, turnaround time and cost, and the optimal method will depend on the clinical context.
authors: Sarah Buddle, Leysa Forrest, Naomi Akinsuyi, Luz Marina Martin Bernal, Tony Brooks, Cristina Venturini, Charles Miller, Julianne R Brown, Nathaniel Storey, Laura Atkinson, Timothy Best, Sunando Roy, Sian Goldsworthy, Sergi Castellano, Peter Simmonds, Heli Harvala, Tanya Golubchik, Rachel Williams, Judith Breuer, Sofia Morfopoulou, Oscar Enrique Torres Montaguth

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组学在未知病原体检测中具有潜力，但现有方法存在高测序深度需求、长周转时间和灵敏度不足的问题。研究比较了非靶向测序（Illumina和ONT）与靶向捕获（Twist CVRP）技术，发现Twist CVRP显著提升灵敏度，但非靶向ONT在低病毒载量下需更长测序时间。不同技术在灵敏度、特异性、成本和周转时间上各有优势。
keywords: Twist Bioscience Comprehensive Viral Research Panel
ai.translation:
背景：宏基因组学是检测未知和新型病原体的强大方法。基于Illumina短读测序的工作流程在诊断实验室中逐渐普及，但高测序深度需求、长周转时间和有限灵敏度限制了其广泛应用。我们研究了是否可以通过基于无靶向测序的Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）技术（提供实时数据采集与分析）或靶向面板方法（允许选择性测序已知病原体并提高灵敏度）克服这些局限。

方法：我们评估了使用Illumina和ONT的无靶向宏基因组工作流程检测病毒的效果，并使用Twist Bioscience Comprehensive Viral Research Panel（CVRP）进行靶向富集，该面板针对3153种病毒。我们测试了包含六种病毒模拟社区稀释系列的样本，这些样本在人类DNA/RNA背景中设计，以模拟低微生物丰度和高宿主成分的临床样本。协议设计保留宿主转录组，以帮助确认无感染性病原体。我们进一步比较了常用分类学分类器的性能。

结果：使用Twist CVRP进行捕获的灵敏度比无靶向测序提高了至少10-100倍，使其适合检测低病毒载量（60基因组拷贝/毫升），但在诊断环境中可能需要额外方法检测无靶向病原体。尽管无靶向ONT在高病毒载量（60,000基因组拷贝/毫升）下具有良好的灵敏度，但在较低病毒载量（600-6000基因组拷贝/毫升）下，需更长且成本更高的测序运行以达到与无靶向Illumina协议相当的灵敏度。无靶向ONT提供的特异性优于无靶向Illumina测序。然而，应用稳健的阈值可标准化分类学分类器的结果。宿主基因表达分析使用无靶向Illumina测序效果最佳，但CVRP和ONT也可实现。

结论：宏基因组学有望成为诊断的标准方法，并是发现新兴病原体的强大工具。无靶向Illumina和ONT宏基因组学以及Twist CVRP捕获技术在灵敏度、特异性、周转时间和成本方面各有优势，最佳方法将取决于临床背景。

title: Compliant DNA Origami Nanoactuators as Size-Selective Nanopores
abstract: Biological nanopores crucially control the import and export of biomolecules across lipid membranes in cells. They have found widespread use in biophysics and biotechnology, where their typically narrow, fixed diameters enable selective transport of ions and small molecules as well as DNA and peptides for sequencing applications. Yet, due to their small channel sizes, they preclude the passage of large macromolecules, e.g., therapeutics. Here, we harness the unique combined properties of DNA origami nanotechnology, machine-inspired design, and synthetic biology, to present a structurally reconfigurable DNA origami MechanoPore (MP) that features a lumen that is tuneable in size through molecular triggers. Controllable switching of MPs between three stable states is confirmed by 3D-DNA-PAINT super-resolution imaging and through dye-influx assays, after reconstitution of the large MPs in the membrane of liposomes via an inverted-emulsion cDICE technique. Confocal imaging of transmembrane transport shows size-selective behaviour with adjustable thresholds. Importantly, the conformational changes are fully reversible, attesting to the robust mechanical switching that overcomes pressure from the surrounding lipid molecules. These MPs advance nanopore technology, offering functional nanostructures that can be tuned on-demand - thereby impacting fields as diverse as drug-delivery, biomolecule sorting and sensing, as well as bottom-up synthetic biology.
authors: Yu, Z.; Baptist, A. V.; Reinhardt, S. C. M.; Bertosin, E.; Dekker, C.; Jungmann, R.; Heuer-Jungemann, A.; Caneva, S.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种可重构的DNA折纸MechanoPore（MP），通过分子触发器调节腔体大小，实现生物分子的可控运输。该技术突破传统纳米孔对大分子的传输限制，具有可逆的构象变化特性，为药物递送和合成生物学提供新工具。
ai.translation: 生物纳米孔在细胞膜脂质双层中调控生物分子的跨膜运输。传统纳米孔因通道尺寸固定，限制了大分子（如治疗药物）的传输。本研究结合DNA折纸纳米技术、机器启发设计和合成生物学，开发出具有可重构结构的DNA origami MechanoPore（MP）。该MP通过分子触发器实现腔体尺寸的可调性，经倒相乳液cDICE技术重组至脂质体膜后，通过3D-DNA-PAINT超分辨率成像和染料流入实验验证了其在三种稳定状态间的可控切换。共聚焦成像显示其具有可调节阈值的尺寸选择性传输特性。重要的是，构象变化具有完全可逆性，证明了其克服脂质分子压力的机械开关稳定性。该技术推动纳米孔技术发展，提供可按需调节的功能纳米结构，对药物递送、生物分子分选传感及自下而上合成生物学等领域产生影响。

title: Application of a High-Resolution Melt Assay for Monitoring SARS-CoV-2 Variants in Burkina Faso and Kenya
abstract: The rapid emergence and global dissemination of SARS-CoV-2 highlighted a need for robust, adaptable surveillance systems. However, financial and infrastructure requirements for whole genome sequencing (WGS) mean most surveillance data have come from higher-resource geographies, despite unprecedented investment in sequencing in low-middle income countries (LMICs) throughout the SARS-CoV-2 pandemic. Consequently, the molecular epidemiology of SARS-CoV-2 in some LMICs is limited, and there is a need for more cost-accessible technologies to help close data gaps for surveillance of SARS-CoV-2 variants. To address this, we have developed two high-resolution melt curve (HRM) assays that target key variant-defining mutations in the SARS-CoV-2 genome, which give unique signature profiles that define different SARS-CoV-2 variants of concern (VOCs). Extracted RNA from SARS-CoV-2 positive samples collected from 205 participants (112 in Burkina Faso, 93 in Kenya) on the day of enrolment in the MALCOV study (Malaria as a Risk Factor for COVID-19) between February 2021 and February 2022 were analysed using our optimised HRM assays and compared to Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) on Oxford Nanopore MinION . With NGS as a reference, two HRM assays, HRM-VOC-1 and HRM-VOC-2, demonstrated sensitivity/specificity of 100%/99.29% and 92.86/99.39%, respectively, for detecting Alpha, 90.08%/100% and 92.31%/100% for Delta and 93.75%/100% and 100%/99.38% for Omicron. The assays described here provide a lower-cost approach (<$1 per sample) to conducting molecular epidemiology, capable of high-throughput testing. We successfully scaled up the HRM-VOC-2 assay to screen a total of 506 samples from which we were able to show the replacement of Alpha with the introduction of Delta and the replacement of Delta by the Omicron variant in this community in Kisumu, Kenya. These assays are readily adaptable and can focus on local epidemiological surveillance questions or be updated quickly to accommodate the emergence of a novel variant or adapt to novel and emerging pathogens.
authors: Greenland-Bews, C.; Shah, S.; Achieng, M.; Badoum, E. S.; Bah, Y.; Barsosio, H. C.; Brazal-Monzo, H.; Canizales, J.; Drabko, A.; Fraser, A. J.; Hannan, L.; Jarju, S. J.; Kabore, J.-M. T.; Kujabi, M. A.; Lesosky, M.; Manneh, J.; Marlais, T.; Matthewman, J.; Nebie, I.; Onyango, E. D.; Ouedraogo, A.; Otieno, K.; Serme, S. S.; Sirima, S. B.; Soulama, B. I.; Tangara, B.; Tiono, A. B.; Wu, W.; Sesay, A. K.; Adams, E. R.; Drakeley, C.; ter Kuile, F. O.; Soulama, I.; Kariuki, S.; Allen, D. J.; Edwards, T.

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2的快速传播凸显了需要强大的监测系统，但资源不足地区因成本高难以普及。本研究开发了两种高分辨率熔解曲线（HRM）检测方法，可高效识别变异株，成本低于1美元/样本，成功应用于肯尼亚基苏姆社区的变异株监测。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2的快速传播和全球扩散凸显了需要强大且灵活的监测系统。然而，全基因组测序（WGS）的财务和基础设施需求意味着大多数监测数据来自高资源地区，尽管低中收入国家（LMICs）在疫情中投入了大量测序资源。因此，一些LMICs的SARS-CoV-2分子流行病学数据有限，亟需更经济易得的技术填补监测数据缺口。为此，我们开发了两种高分辨率熔解曲线（HRM）检测方法，针对SARS-CoV-2基因组中的关键变异定义突变，可生成独特的特征谱型以识别不同变异株（VOCs）。从2021年2月至2022年2月期间参与MALCOV研究（疟疾作为新冠风险因素）的205名受试者（布基纳法索112人，肯尼亚93人）的SARS-CoV-2阳性样本中提取的RNA，经优化的HRM检测方法分析，并与牛津纳米孔MinION平台的下一代测序（NGS）进行比对。以NGS为参考，两种HRM检测方法HRM-VOC-1和HRM-VOC-2在检测Alpha变异株时灵敏度/特异性分别为100%/99.29%和92.86%/99.39%，Delta变异株为90.08%/100%和92.31%/100%，Omicron变异株为93.75%/100%和100%/99.38%。本文描述的检测方法提供了一种低成本（<1美元/样本）的分子流行病学研究方案，具备高通量检测能力。我们成功将HRM-VOC-2检测方法扩展至筛查506个样本，展示了肯尼亚基苏姆社区中Alpha变异株被Delta取代，随后Delta又被Omicron取代的动态。这些检测方法易于适应，可聚焦本地流行病学监测问题，或快速更新以应对新变异株或新型病原体的出现。

title: Combined approaches, including long-read sequencing, address the diagnostic challenge ofHYDINin primary ciliary dyskinesia
abstract: Primary ciliary dyskinesia (PCD), a disorder of the motile cilia, is now recognised as an underdiagnosed cause of bronchiectasis. Accurate PCD diagnosis comprises clinical assessment, analysis of cilia and the identification of biallelic variants in one of 50 known PCD-related genes, including *HYDIN*. *HYDIN*-related PCD is underdiagnosed due to the presence of a pseudogene, *HYDIN2*, with 98% sequence homology to *HYDIN*. This presents a significant challenge for Short-Read Next Generation Sequencing (SR-NGS) and analysis, and many diagnostic PCD gene panels do not include *HYDIN*. We have used a combined approach of SR-NGS with bioinformatic masking of *HYDIN2*, and state-of-the-art long-read Nanopore sequencing (LR_NGS), together with analysis of respiratory cilia including transmission electron microscopy and immunofluorescence to address the underdiagnosis of *HYDIN* as a cause of PCD. Bioinformatic masking of *HYDIN2* after SR-NGS facilitated the detection of biallelic *HYDIN* variants in 15 of 437 families, but compromised the detection of copy number variants. Supplementing testing with LR-NGS detected *HYDIN* deletions in 2 families, where SR-NGS had detected a single heterozygous *HYDIN* variant. LR-NGS was also able to confirm true homozygosity in 2 families when parental testing was not possible. Utilising a combined genomic diagnostic approach, biallelic *HYDIN* variants were detected in 17 families from 242 genetically confirmed PCD cases, comprising 7% of our PCD cohort. This represents the largest reported *HYDIN* cohort to date and highlights previous underdiagnosis of *HYDIN*-associated PCD. Moreover this provides further evidence for the utility of LR-NGS in diagnostic testing, particularly for regions of high genomic complexity.
authors: Andrew Fleming, Miranda Galey, ... Deborah J. Morris-Rosendahl
citation: Fleming, A., Galey, M., Briggs, L. et al. Combined approaches, including long-read sequencing, address the diagnostic challenge of HYDIN in primary ciliary dyskinesia. Eur J Hum Genet 32 , 1074–1085 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41431-024-01599-7
description: Primary ciliary dyskinesia (PCD), a disorder of the motile cilia, is now recognised as an underdiagnosed cause of bronchiectasis. Accurate PCD...

ai.TLDR: 原发性纤毛运动障碍（PCD）是支气管扩张的常见病因之一，但HYDIN相关PCD因假基因HYDIN2的干扰常被漏诊。通过结合短读长测序（SR-NGS）与生物信息学屏蔽、长读长测序（LR-NGS）及纤毛分析，成功检测到17个HYDIN双等位基因变异家族，占PCD队列的7%，凸显LR-NGS在复杂基因组区域诊断中的价值。
ai.translation: 原发性纤毛运动障碍（PCD）是一种纤毛运动功能障碍疾病，现被认定为支气管扩张的常见病因之一。准确的PCD诊断需结合临床评估、纤毛分析及50个已知PCD相关基因中双等位基因变异的鉴定，包括HYDIN基因。由于存在与HYDIN序列同源性达98%的假基因HYDIN2，导致HYDIN相关PCD常被漏诊。这给短读长测序（SR-NGS）分析带来显著挑战，且多数诊断基因panel未包含HYDIN。本研究采用SR-NGS结合HYDIN2生物信息学屏蔽、长读长测序（LR-NGS）及呼吸道纤毛分析（含透射电镜和免疫荧光）解决HYDIN相关PCD的漏诊问题。SR-NGS后屏蔽HYDIN2可检测437个家庭中的15个HYDIN双等位基因变异，但可能影响拷贝数变异的检测。补充LR-NGS检测发现2个家庭的HYDIN缺失，而SR-NGS仅检测到单等位基因变异。LR-NGS还能在无法进行亲子检测时确认2个家庭的纯合性。通过综合基因组诊断方法，在242个遗传确诊PCD病例中发现17个HYDIN双等位基因变异家族，占7%。这是目前最大的HYDIN相关PCD队列，揭示了既往的漏诊情况。此外，进一步验证了LR-NGS在复杂基因组区域诊断中的应用价值。

title: Comprehensive landscape and oncogenic role of extrachromosomal circular DNA in malignant biliary strictures.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Extrachromosomal circular DNA (eccDNA) is crucial for carcinogenesis and bile has direct contact with malignant biliary strictures, yet eccDNA features in bile and its function in malignant biliary strictures remain underexplored.

RESULTS: We observed the widespread presence of eccDNA in bile and systematically profiled the landscape of bile cell-free eccDNA (bcf-eccDNA). For functional exploration, a simple and efficient workflow was designed to synthesize large eccDNA particularly containing multiple regions. Compared with the noncancer group, bcf-eccDNAs in the cancer group had different origins and larger sizes with six characteristic peaks. These peaks were also identified in the validation cohort (100%). There were more bcf-eccDNA carrying LINC00598 or CELF2 in malignant biliary strictures, showing potential diagnostic performance in training and validation cohorts (all AUCs > 0.9). Bcf-eccDNAs carried cancer-related mutations, which could guide treatment. EccDNA carrying miR-106a/363 cluster or miR-374b/421 cluster were proven to regulate cancer gene expression, accelerate tumor proliferation, and inhibit tumor apoptosis.

CONCLUSIONS: This study profiles a comprehensive bcf-eccDNA landscape in patients with biliary strictures and offers valuable insights into eccDNA's role in bile liquid biopsy and carcinogenesis.
authors: Zhuo Cheng, Xuanmei Luo, Wenzheng Liu, Xiaofang Lu, Hong Chang, Yingchun Wang, Wei Zheng, Xiue Yan, Yonghui Huang

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了胆汁中染色体外环状DNA（eccDNA）在恶性胆管狭窄中的关键作用，发现癌变胆汁中eccDNA具有独特的起源、大小及六个特征性峰，且携带癌相关突变和miRNA簇，可作为液态活检标志物。通过系统分析胆汁游离eccDNA（bcf-eccDNA），证实其在肿瘤增殖抑制和凋亡调控中的功能。
ai.translation:
背景：染色体外环状DNA（eccDNA）在致癌过程中起关键作用，胆汁直接接触恶性胆管狭窄，但胆汁中eccDNA的特征及其在恶性胆管狭窄中的功能仍待探索。

结果：我们观察到eccDNA在胆汁中广泛存在，并系统地绘制了胆汁游离eccDNA（bcf-eccDNA）的图谱。为功能研究设计了简单高效的流程，合成包含多个区域的大尺寸eccDNA。与非癌症组相比，癌症组的bcf-eccDNA具有不同的起源、更大的尺寸及六个特征性峰（验证队列中100%确认）。恶性胆管狭窄中携带LINC00598或CELF2的bcf-eccDNA更多，其在训练和验证队列中表现出潜在诊断性能（所有AUC>0.9）。bcf-eccDNA携带癌症相关突变，可指导治疗。携带miR-106a/363簇或miR-374b/421簇的eccDNA被证实可调控癌症基因表达，加速肿瘤增殖并抑制肿瘤凋亡。

结论：本研究系统描绘了胆管狭窄患者胆汁中bcf-eccDNA的全景图谱，为eccDNA在胆汁液态活检和致癌过程中的作用提供了重要见解。

title: Comparative transcriptome reprogramming in oak galls containing asexual or sexual generations of gall wasps
abstract:
O_LIOak gall wasps have evolved strategies to manipulate the developmental pathways of their host to induce gall formation. This provides shelter and nutrients for the developing larva. Galls are entirely host tissue; however, the initiation, development, and physical appearance are controlled by the inducer. The underlying molecular mechanisms of gall formation, by which one or a small number of cells are reprogrammed and commit to a novel developmental path, are poorly understood. In this study, we sought a deeper insight into the molecular underpinnings of this process.
C_LIO_LIOak gall wasps have two generations each year, one sexual, and one asexual. Galls formed by these two generations exhibit a markedly different appearance. We sequenced transcriptomes of both the asexual and sexual generations of Neuroterus quercusbaccarum and Neuroterus numismalis. We then deployed Nanopore sequencing to generate long-read sequences to test the hypothesis that gall wasps introduce DNA insertions to determine gall development.
C_LIO_LIWe detected potential genome rearrangements, but did not uncover any non-host DNA insertions. Transcriptome analysis revealed that the transcriptomes of the sexual generations of distinct species of wasp are more similar than inter-generational comparisons from the same species of wasp.
C_LIO_LIOur results highlight the intricate interplay between the host leaves and gall development, suggesting that season and requirements of the gall structure play a larger role than species in controlling gall development and structure.
C_LI

Summary StatementOak gall wasps, Neuroterus quercusbaccarum and Neuroterus numismalis, induce species-specific galls on Quercus robur leaves. We demonstrate that the sexual generation of distinct species of wasps induce more similar changes in the host than different generation galls from the same species.
authors: Bellows, E.; Heatley, M.; Shah, N.; Archer, N.; Giles, T.; Fray, R.

ai.TLDR: 橡树瘤蜂通过操纵宿主发育途径诱导形成瘤结构，为幼虫提供庇护和营养。研究发现不同物种的性世代诱导的瘤变化比同种不同世代的更相似，表明季节性和瘤结构需求在调控瘤发育中起更大作用。
ai.translation: 橡树瘤蜂（Neuroterus quercusbaccarum和Neuroterus numismalis）通过操纵宿主发育途径诱导形成特定物种的瘤结构，为发育中的幼虫提供庇护和营养。瘤结构完全由宿主组织构成，但其启动、发育和形态特征由诱导者控制。目前对瘤形成过程中少数细胞重编程并进入新发育路径的分子机制仍不清楚。本研究旨在深入解析这一过程的分子基础。橡树瘤蜂每年有两个世代，分别为有性世代和无性世代，二者诱导形成的瘤在形态上存在显著差异。我们对两种物种的有性世代和无性世代进行了转录组测序，并采用纳米孔测序技术生成长读长序列，验证瘤蜂是否通过引入DNA插入来调控瘤发育。检测到潜在的基因组重排现象，但未发现非宿主DNA插入。转录组分析显示，不同物种有性世代的转录组相似性高于同种不同世代的比较结果。研究结果凸显了宿主叶片与瘤发育之间的复杂互作关系，表明季节性和瘤结构需求在调控瘤发育及形态中起主导作用，而非物种差异。

title: A novel barcoded nanopore sequencing workflow of high-quality, full-length bacterial 16S amplicons for taxonomic annotation of bacterial isolates and complex microbial communities
abstract:
IntroductionDue to recent improvements, Nanopore sequencing has become a promising method for experiments relying on amplicon sequencing. We describe a flexible workflow to generate and annotate high-quality, full-length 16S rDNA amplicons. We evaluated it for two applications, namely, i) identification of bacterial isolates and ii) species-level profiling of microbial communities.

MethodsBacterial isolate identification by sequencing was tested on 47 isolates and compared to MALDI-TOF MS. 97 isolates were additionally sequenced to assess the resolution of phylogenetic classification. Species-level community profiling was tested with two full-length 16S primer pairs (A and B) with custom barcodes and compared to results obtained with Illumina sequencing using 27 stool samples. Finally, a Nextflow pipeline was developed to produce high-quality reads and taxonomically annotate them.

ResultsWe found high agreement between our workflow and MALDI-TOF data for isolate identification (PPV = 0.90, Cramers V = 0.857 and, Theils U = 0.316). For species-level community profiling, we found strong correlations (rs > 0.6) of alpha diversity indices between the two primer sets and Illumina sequencing. At the community level, we found significant but small differences when comparing sequencing techniques. Finally, we found moderate to strong correlation when comparing relative abundances of individual species (average rs = 0.6 and 0.533, for primers A and B).

DiscussionThe proposed workflow enabled accurate identification of single bacterial isolates, making it a worthwhile alternative to MALDI-TOF. While shortcomings have been identified, it enabled reliable identification of prominent features in microbial communities at a fraction of the cost of Illumina sequencing.

ImportanceA quick, robust, simple, and cost-effective method to identify bacterial isolates and communities in each sample is indispensable in the fields of microbiology and infection biology. Recent technological advances in Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing make this technique an attractive option considering the adaptability, portability, and cost-effectiveness of the platform. Here, we validated a flexible workflow to identify bacterial isolates and characterize bacterial communities using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing platform combined with the most recent v14 chemistry kits. For bacterial isolates, we compared our nanopore-based approach to MALDI-TOF MS-based identification. For species-level profiling of complex bacterial communities we compared our nanopore-based approach to Illumina shotgun sequencing. For reproducibility purposes, we wrapped the code used to process the sequencing data into a ready-to-use and self-contained Nextflow pipeline.
authors: Dommann, J.; Kerbl-Knapp, J.; Albertos Torres, D.; Egli, A.; Keiser, J.; Schneeberger, P.

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出了一种基于纳米孔测序的灵活工作流程，用于高通量细菌分离株鉴定和微生物群落物种水平分析。该方法在细菌鉴定与MALDI-TOF MS结果高度一致（PPV=0.90），且与Illumina测序在α多样性指数上呈现强相关性（rs>0.6）。
ai.translation:
引言：由于技术改进，纳米孔测序已成为依赖扩增子测序实验的有前景方法。我们描述了一种灵活的工作流程，用于生成和注释高质量的全长16S rDNA扩增子。该方法在两个应用场景中进行了评估：i) 细菌分离株鉴定，ii) 微生物群落的物种水平分析。

方法：通过测序对47株细菌分离株进行鉴定并与MALDI-TOF MS结果对比，另外对97株分离株进行测序以评估系统发育分类的分辨率。使用两种全长16S引物对（A和B）结合定制条形码对27份粪便样本进行物种水平群落分析，并与Illum、llumina测序结果对比。最终开发了一个Nextflow流程以生成高质量读段并进行分类注释。

结果：我们的工作流程与MALDI-TOF数据在分离株鉴定中表现出高度一致性（PPV=0.90，Cramers V=0.857，Theils U=0.316）。在物种水平群落分析中，两种引物组与Illumina测序的α多样性指数呈现强相关性（rs>0.6）。在群落水平比较不同测序技术时发现显著但较小的差异。个体物种相对丰度比较显示中度至强相关性（平均rs=0.6和0.533，对应引物A和B）。

讨论：提出的流程实现了单个细菌分离株的准确鉴定，使其成为MALDI-TOF的有吸引力替代方案。尽管存在不足，但该方法以Illumina测序的1/10成本实现了微生物群落特征的可靠鉴定。

重要性：在微生物学和感染生物学领域，快速、稳健、简单且成本效益高的细菌分离株和群落鉴定方法至关重要。牛津纳米孔技术的最新进展使其成为考虑平台适应性、便携性和成本效益的有吸引力选择。本文验证了结合v14化学试剂盒的灵活工作流程，用于细菌分离株鉴定和群落特征分析。对细菌分离株，我们将纳米孔方法与MALDI-TOF MS进行比较；对复杂群落的物种水平分析，将纳米孔方法与Illumina宏基因组测序对比。为确保可重复性，我们将数据处理代码封装为自包含的Nextflow流程。

title: Empirical assessment of the enrichment-based metagenomic methods in identifying diverse respiratory pathogens.
abstract: Probe-based nucleic acid enrichment represents an effective route to enhance the detection capacity of next-generation sequencing (NGS) in a set of clinically diverse and relevant microbial species. In this study, we assessed the effect of the enrichment-based sequencing on identifying respiratory infections using tiling RNA probes targeting 76 respiratory pathogens and sequenced using both Illumina and Oxford Nanopore platforms. Forty respiratory swab samples pre-tested for a panel of respiratory pathogens by qPCR were used to benchmark the sequencing data. We observed a general improvement in sensitivity after enrichment. The overall detection rate increased from 73 to 85% after probe capture detected by Illumina. Moreover, enrichment with probe sets boosted the frequency of unique pathogen reads by 34.6 and 37.8-fold for Illumina DNA and cDNA sequencing, respectively. This also resulted in significant improvements on genome coverage especially in viruses. Despite these advantages, we found that library pooling may cause reads mis-assignment, probably due to crosstalk issues arise from post-capture PCR and from pooled sequencing, thus increasing the risk of bleed-through signal. Taken together, an overall improvement in the breadth and depth of pathogen coverage is achieved using enrichment-based sequencing method. For future applications, automated library processing and pooling-free sequencing could enhance the precision and timeliness of probe enrichment-based clinical metagenomics.
authors: Xiaofang Jia, Wei Wang, Min Wu, Linlin Pang, Chunyi Yang, Yun Ling, Zhigang Yi, Xiaonan Zhang

ai.TLDR: 基于探针的核酸富集技术显著提升了下一代测序(NGS)对多种临床相关呼吸道病原体的检测能力。研究通过Illumina和Oxford Nanopore平台对76种呼吸道病原体进行靶向探针捕获测序，发现富集后敏感性从73%提升至85%，但库池化可能导致读取分配错误。
ai.translation: 基于探针的核酸富集技术代表了一种有效提升下一代测序(NGS)检测能力的途径，特别是在临床多样且相关的微生物物种检测中。本研究评估了基于富集的测序技术在识别呼吸道感染中的效果，使用针对76种呼吸道病原体的覆盖式RNA探针，并通过Illumina和Oxford Nanopore平台进行测序。采用40份经qPCR预检测的呼吸道拭子样本作为基准数据。观察到富集后整体敏感性显著提升，Illumina平台检测率从73%提升至85%。此外，探针集富集使Illumina DNA和cDNA测序的唯一病原体读取频率分别提升了34.6倍和37.8倍。这尤其显著提升了病毒的基因组覆盖度。尽管具有这些优势，研究发现库池化可能导致读取分配错误，可能由于捕获后PCR的串扰问题及池化测序引起的信号渗漏风险。总体而言，基于富集的测序方法显著提升了病原体覆盖的广度和深度。未来应用中，自动化库处理和无池化测序可增强基于探针富集的临床宏基因组学的精确性和时效性。

title: Chromosome level assemblies of Nakaseomyces (Candida) bracarensis uncover two distinct clades and define its adhesin repertoire.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The Nakaseomyces clade is formed by at least nine described species among which three can be pathogenic to humans, namely Nakaseomyces glabratus (Candida glabrata), the second most-common cause of candidiasis worldwide, and two rarer emerging pathogens: Nakaseomyces (Candida) nivarensis and Nakaseomyces (Candida) bracarensis. Early comparative genomics analyses identified parallel expansions of subtelomeric adhesin genes in N. glabratus and N. nivarensis/bracarensis, and suggested possible links with the emergence of the virulence potential in these species. However, as shown for N. glabratus, the proper assessment of subtelomeric genes is hindered by the use of incomplete assemblies and reliance on a single isolate.

RESULTS: Here we sequenced seven N. bracarensis isolates and reconstructed chromosome level assemblies of two divergent strains. We show that N. bracarensis isolates belong to two diverging clades that have slightly different genomic structures. We identified the set of encoded adhesins in the two complete assemblies, and uncovered the presence of a novel adhesin motif, found mainly in N. bracarensis. Our analysis revealed a larger adhesin content in N. bracarensis than previously reported, and similar in size to that of N. glabratus. We confirm the independent adhesin expansion in these two species, which could relate to their different levels of virulence.

CONCLUSION: N. bracarensis clinical isolates belong to at least two differentiated clades. We describe a novel repeat motif found in N. bracarensis adhesins, which helps in their identification. Adhesins underwent independent expansions in N. glabratus and N. bracarensis, leading to repertoires that are qualitatively different but quantitatively similar. Given that adhesins are considered virulence factors, some of the observed differences could contribute to variations in virulence capabilities between N. glabratus and N. bracarensis.
authors: Marina Marcet-Houben, Ewa Księżopolska, Toni Gabaldón

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示Nakaseomyces bracarensis临床菌株至少分化为两个菌群，其粘附素基因扩展可能与不同致病性相关。通过全基因组测序发现该菌株的粘附素内容量与N. glabratus相似，但存在新型重复基序，有助于其鉴定。
ai.translation:
背景：Nakaseomyces类群包含至少九种已描述物种，其中三种可感染人类，包括Nakaseomyces glabratus（Candida glabrata），是全球第二常见的念珠菌病致病菌，以及两种较少见的新兴病原体：Nakaseomyces nivarensis和Nakaseomyces bracarensis。早期比较基因组学分析发现N. glabratus和N. nivarensis/bracarensis的亚端粒粘附素基因平行扩展，提示可能与这些物种毒力潜力的出现有关。然而，如N. glabratus所示，亚端粒基因的准确评估受不完整组装和依赖单一菌株的限制。

结果：本研究对七个N. bracarensis菌株进行测序，重建了两个分化菌株的染色体级组装。结果显示N. bracarensis菌株属于两个分化菌群，具有略微不同的基因组结构。我们鉴定了两个完整组装中的编码粘附素集合，发现新型粘附素基序主要存在于N. bracarensis中。分析显示N. bracarensis的粘附素含量比之前报道的更大，且与N. glabratus的大小相似。我们确认了这两个物种的独立粘附素扩展，这可能与其不同的致病性水平相关。

结论：N. bracarensis临床菌株至少分化为两个菌群。我们描述了存在于N. bracarensis粘附素中的新型重复基序，有助于其鉴定。粘附素在N. glabratus和N. bracarensis中经历了独立扩展，导致质变但量级相似的谱系。鉴于粘附素被视为毒力因子，观察到的部分差异可能解释N. glabratus与N. bracarensis毒力能力的差异。

title: Nanopore Guided Annotation of Transcriptome Architectures
abstract: High-resolution annotations of transcriptomes from all domains of life are essential for many sequencing-based RNA analyses, including Nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS), which would otherwise be hindered by misalignments and other analysis artefacts. DRS allows the capture and full-length sequencing of native RNAs, without recoding or amplification bias, and resulting data may be interrogated to define the identity and location of chemically modified ribonucleotides, as well as the length of poly(A) tails on individual RNA molecules. Existing software solutions for generating high-resolution transcriptome annotations are poorly suited to small gene dense organisms such as viruses due to the challenge of identifying distinct transcript isoforms where alternative splicing and overlapping RNAs are prevalent. To resolve this, we identified key characteristics of DRS datasets and developed a novel approach to transcriptome. We demonstrate, using a combination of synthetic and original datasets, that our novel approach yields a high level of precision and recall when reconstructing both gene sparse and gene dense transcriptomes from DRS datasets. We further apply this approach to generate a new high resolution transcriptome annotation of the neglected pathogen human adenovirus type F 41 for which we identify 77 distinct transcripts encoding at least 23 different proteins.
authors: Abebe, J. S.; Alwie, Y.; Fuhrmann, E.; Leins, J.; Mai, J.; Verstraten, R.; Schreiner, S.; Wilson, A. C.; Depledge, D. P.

ai.TLDR: 高分辨率转录组注释对基于测序的RNA分析至关重要，尤其在Nanopore直接RNA测序（DRS）中，可有效解决比对错误等问题。本研究开发的新方法在重构基因稀疏和基因密集型转录组时表现出高精度和召回率，并成功应用于人类腺病毒F41的注释，发现77个转录本编码至少23种蛋白质。
ai.translation: 来自生命所有领域转录组的高分辨率注释对于基于测序的RNA分析至关重要，包括Nanopore直接RNA测序（DRS），否则将因比对错误和其他分析伪影而受阻。DRS允许捕获并全长测序天然RNA，无需重新编码或扩增偏差，所得数据可用于定义化学修饰核苷酸的身份和位置，以及单个RNA分子上的poly(A)尾长度。现有用于生成高分辨率转录组注释的软件解决方案由于难以识别替代剪接和重叠RNA普遍存在的小基因密集型生物（如病毒）而不太适用。为解决这一问题，我们识别了DRS数据集的关键特征并开发了一种新的转录组注释方法。通过结合合成和原始数据集的验证，我们证明该新方法在从DRS数据集重构基因稀疏和基因密集型转录组时表现出高水平的精确度和召回率。进一步应用该方法生成了被忽视病原体人类腺病毒类型F41的高分辨率转录组注释，我们鉴定了77个不同的转录本，编码至少23种不同蛋白质。

title: Concordance of whole-genome long-read sequencing with standard clinical testing for Prader-Willi and Angelman syndromes
abstract: Current clinical testing approaches for individuals with suspected imprinting disorders are complex, often requiring multiple tests performed in a stepwise fashion to make a precise molecular diagnosis. We investigated whether whole-genome long-read sequencing (LRS) could be used as a single data source to simultaneously evaluate copy number variants (CNVs), single nucleotide variants (SNVs), structural variants (SVs), and differences in methylation in a cohort of individuals known to have either Prader-Willi or Angelman syndrome. We evaluated 25 individuals sequenced to an average depth of coverage of 36x on an Oxford Nanopore PromethION. A custom one-page report was generated that could be used to assess copy number, SNVs, and methylation patterns at select CpG sites within the 15q11.2-q13.1 region and prioritize candidate pathogenic variants in UBE3A. After training with three positive controls, three analysts blinded to the known clinical diagnosis arrived at the correct molecular diagnosis for 22 out of 22 cases (20 true positive, 2 negative controls). Our findings demonstrate the utility of LRS as a single, comprehensive data source for complex clinical testing, offering potential benefits such as reduced testing costs, increased diagnostic yield, and shorter turnaround times in the clinical laboratory.
authors: Paschal, C.; Zalusky, M. P.; Beck, A.; Gillentine, M.; Narayanan, J.; Damaraju, N.; Goffena, J.; Storz, S. H.; Miller, D. E.

ai.TLDR: 当前疑似印迹障碍的临床检测方法复杂，需分步骤进行多种测试。本研究验证了全基因组长读长测序（LRS）作为单一数据源，可同时评估拷贝数变异（CNVs）、单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、结构变异（SVs）及甲基化差异，实现精准分子诊断。盲测结果显示LRS在22例病例中均能准确诊断，证明其在复杂临床检测中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 目前疑似印迹障碍患者的临床检测方法复杂，通常需要按步骤进行多项检测以实现精准的分子诊断。我们研究了全基因组长读长测序（LRS）是否可作为单一数据源，同时评估拷贝数变异（CNVs）、单核苷酸变异（SNVs）、结构变异（SVs）及甲基化差异。研究对象为已知患有普拉德-威利综合征（Prader-Willi syndrome）或安格曼综合征（Angelman syndrome）的25名个体，其测序深度平均为36x（使用Oxford Nanopore PromethION平台）。我们生成了定制的一页报告，可评估15q11.2-q13.1区域特定CpG位点的拷贝数、SNVs及甲基化模式，并优先筛选UBE3A基因的致病性变异。在使用三个阳性对照进行训练后，三位不知晓临床诊断的分析人员对22例病例均得出正确分子诊断（20例真阳性，2例阴性对照）。研究结果证明了LRS作为单一、全面数据源在复杂临床检测中的实用性，可能带来降低检测成本、提高诊断效率及缩短临床实验室检测周期等优势。

title: Rapid identification of SARS-CoV-2 strains via isothermal enzymatic recombinase amplification and nanopore sequencing
abstract: Surveillance of the SARS-CoV-2 genome has become a crucial technique in the management of COVID-19, aiding the pandemic response and supporting effective public health interventions. Typically, whole-genomic sequencing is used along with PCR-based target enrichment techniques to identify SARS-CoV-2 variants, which is a complicated and time-consuming process that requires central laboratory facilities. Thus, there is an urgent need to develop rapid and cost-effective tools for precise on-site detection and identification of SARS-CoV-2 strains. In this study, we demonstrate the rapid diagnosis of COVID-19 and identification of SARS-CoV-2 variants by amplification and sequencing of the entire SARS-CoV-2 S gene using isothermal enzymatic recombinase amplification combined with the advanced Oxford nanopore sequencing technique. The entire procedure, from sampling to sequencing, takes less than 8 hours and can be performed with limited resources. The newly developed method has noteworthy implications for examining the transmission dynamics of the virus, detecting novel genetic variants, and assessing the effect of mutations on diagnostic approaches, antiviral treatments, and vaccines.
authors: Diem Hong Tran, Hoang Dang Khoa Do, ... Huong Thi Thu Phung
citation: Tran, D.H., Do, H.D.K., Tran, H.T. et al. Rapid identification of SARS-CoV-2 strains via isothermal enzymatic recombinase amplification and nanopore sequencing. Arch Virol 169 , 87 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00705-024-06012-8
description: Surveillance of the SARS-CoV-2 genome has become a crucial technique in the management of COVID-19, aiding the pandemic response and supporting...

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2基因组监测已成为新冠管理的关键技术，传统全基因组测序与PCR富集技术存在耗时且依赖中心实验室的缺陷。本研究开发的等温酶促重组扩增结合纳米孔测序技术可在8小时内完成样本到测序的全流程，为病毒传播动态分析和新型变异株检测提供高效解决方案。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2基因组监测已成为新冠疫情防控管理中的关键技术，有助于疫情应对并支持有效的公共卫生干预措施。通常采用全基因组测序结合基于PCR的目标富集技术来识别SARS-CoV-2变异株，但该过程复杂耗时且需要中心实验室设施。因此亟需开发快速、低成本的现场检测工具以实现精准的病毒株鉴定。本研究通过等温酶促重组扩增技术对SARS-CoV-2刺突基因进行扩增，并结合先进的牛津纳米孔测序技术实现新冠的快速诊断和变异株鉴定。从样本采集到测序的完整流程可在8小时内完成，且仅需有限资源。该新方法对病毒传播动力学分析、新型遗传变异株检测以及评估突变对诊断方法、抗病毒治疗和疫苗效果的影响具有重要应用价值。

title: Concordance of Whole-Genome Long-Read Sequencing with Standard Clinical Testing for Prader-Willi and Angelman Syndromes.
journal: The Journal of molecular diagnostics : JMD
abstract: Current clinical testing approaches for individuals with suspected imprinting disorders are complex, often requiring multiple tests performed in a stepwise manner to make a precise molecular diagnosis. We investigated whether whole-genome long-read sequencing could be used as a single data source to simultaneously evaluate copy number variants, single-nucleotide variants, structural variants, and differences in methylation in a cohort of individuals known to have either Prader-Willi or Angelman syndrome. Twenty-five individuals sequenced to an average depth of coverage of 36× on an Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION were evaluated. A custom one-page report was generated that could be used to assess copy number, single-nucleotide variants, and methylation patterns at select CpG sites within the 15q11.2-q13.1 region and prioritize candidate pathogenic variants in UBE3A. After training with three positive controls, three analysts blinded to the known clinical diagnosis arrived at the correct molecular diagnosis for 22 of 22 cases (20 true positive, 2 negative controls). Our findings demonstrate the utility of long-read sequencing as a single, comprehensive data source for complex clinical testing, offering potential benefits, such as reduced testing costs, increased diagnostic yield, and shorter turnaround times, in the clinical laboratory.
authors: Cate R Paschal, Miranda P G Zalusky, Anita E Beck, Madelyn A Gillentine, Jaya Narayanan, Nikhita Damaraju, Joy Goffena, Sophie H R Storz, Danny E Miller

ai.TLDR: 当前疑似印迹障碍的临床检测方法复杂，需多步骤测试以实现精准分子诊断。本研究验证了全基因组长读长测序作为单一数据源的可行性，可同步评估拷贝数变异、单核苷酸变异、结构变异及甲基化差异，显著提升诊断效率。
ai.translation: 目前针对疑似印迹障碍个体的临床检测方法较为复杂，通常需要按步骤进行多项检测以实现精准的分子诊断。我们研究了全基因组长读长测序是否可作为单一数据源，同时评估拷贝数变异、单核苷酸变异、结构变异及甲基化差异。研究对象为25名已知患有普拉德-威利综合征或安格曼综合征的个体，其测序深度平均达到36×。通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION平台完成测序后，生成了定制的单页报告，可评估15q11.2-q13.1区域特定CpG位点的拷贝数、单核苷酸变异及甲基化模式，并优先筛选UBE3A基因的致病性变异。在完成3个阳性对照的训练后，3名不知晓临床诊断的分析人员对22个案例进行了诊断，其中20例为真阳性，2例为阴性对照。研究结果表明，长读长测序作为单一综合数据源在复杂临床检测中具有重要价值，可能带来降低检测成本、提高诊断率及缩短报告周期等临床优势。

title: Long-read sequencing to detect full-length protein-protein interactions
abstract:
Given the increased predictions on interactome size and demand for protein function information, methods for detecting protein-protein interactions remain a significant development area. The all-vs.-all sequencing (AVA-Seq) method utilizes a convergent fusion plasmid design to make two-hybrid technology amenable to next-generation sequencing. Here, we further innovate to take advantage of synthetic DNA technologies and Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-read sequencing improvements to allow us to determine full-length protein-protein interactions. Here, using this approach we recovered 159 protein-protein interactions from a set of 57 human proteins using multiple forms of validation. Further, when referencing a human gold standard set of interactions, eight full-length protein-protein interactions were recovered from an expected 28 interaction pairs (28.6%), a typical recovery rate for two-hybrid technologies. The AVA-Seq, in combination with the ease of synthetic DNA production and the MinION platform, offers a low-cost, high-throughput alternative for determining protein-protein interactions, which can be utilized in research labs at all stages.

3 Key PointsO_LIFirst application of long-read sequencing for full-length protein-protein interaction studies.
C_LIO_LIThe recovery rate of the AVA-Seq method using full-length proteins is on par with other leading methods.
C_LIO_LIAdvances in synthetic biology and sequencing technologies make full-length protein interactomes affordable and accessible.
C_LI

ai.TLDR: 随着蛋白质相互作用组规模预测的增加和功能信息需求的提升，蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）检测方法仍是重要研究领域。AVA-Seq方法结合长读长测序和合成DNA技术，实现了全长度PPI的高效检测，验证结果显示其回收率与传统双杂交技术相当，为研究实验室提供了低成本、高通量的解决方案。
keywords: 全长度蛋白质相互作用
ai.translation: 鉴于对蛋白质相互作用组规模的预测增加以及对蛋白质功能信息的需求，蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（protein-protein interactions, PPI）检测方法仍然是重要的技术发展领域。全对全测序（all-vs.-all sequencing, AVA-Seq）方法采用收敛融合质粒设计，使双杂交技术能够适配下一代测序技术。在此基础上，我们进一步创新性地利用合成DNA技术及牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的长读长测序改进，实现了全长度蛋白质相互作用的检测。通过该方法，我们从57种人类蛋白质中通过多种验证方式回收了159种蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。进一步参考人类金标准相互作用集时，从预期的28对相互作用中回收了8对全长度相互作用（28.6%），这一回收率与传统双杂交技术相当。AVA-Seq结合合成DNA生产的便捷性及MinION平台，为蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用的检测提供了低成本、高通量的替代方案，可应用于研究实验室的各个阶段。

title: Long-Read Structural and Epigenetic Profiling of a Kidney Tumor-matched Sample with Nanopore Sequencing and Optical Genome Mapping
abstract: Carcinogenesis often involves significant alterations in the cancer genome architecture, marked by large structural and copy number variations (SVs and CNVs) that are difficult to capture with short-read sequencing. Traditionally, cytogenetic techniques are applied to detect such aberrations, but they are limited in resolution and do not cover features smaller than several hundred kilobases. Optical genome mapping and nanopore sequencing are attractive technologies that bridge this resolution gap and offer enhanced performance for cytogenetic applications. These methods profile native, individual DNA molecules, thus capturing epigenetic information. We applied both techniques to characterize a clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) tumors structural and copy number landscape, highlighting the relative strengths of each method in the context of variant size and average read length. Additionally, we assessed their utility for methylome and hydroxymethylome profiling, emphasizing differences in epigenetic analysis applicability.
authors: Margalit, S.; Tulpova, Z.; Detinis Zur, T.; Michaeli, Y.; Deek, J.; Nifker, G.; Haldar, R.; Gnatek, Y.; Omer, D.; Dekel, B.; Grunwald, A.; Ebenstein, Y.

ai.TLDR: 癌症发生过程中基因组结构变化常伴随显著的结构变异和拷贝数变异，传统方法在分辨率和检测范围上存在局限。光学基因组映射和纳米孔测序作为新兴技术，能够突破分辨率限制，有效解析肿瘤的结构变异图谱，并在表观遗传分析中展现不同适用性。
keywords: 结构变异和拷贝数变异
ai.translation: 癌症发生过程通常涉及癌症基因组架构的显著改变，这些改变以大规模的结构变异（SVs）和拷贝数变异（CNVs）为特征，而短读长测序技术难以有效捕捉这些变异。传统细胞遗传学技术虽可检测此类异常，但其分辨率有限，无法覆盖数百千碱基以下的特征。光学基因组映射和纳米孔测序作为新兴技术，能够弥合分辨率差距，在细胞遗传学应用中展现出增强的性能。这些方法通过分析天然的单个DNA分子，可同时捕获表观遗传信息。我们采用这两种技术对透明细胞肾细胞癌（ccRCC）肿瘤的结构变异和拷贝数景观进行表征，突显了不同方法在变异尺寸和平均读长背景下的相对优势。此外，我们评估了这两种技术在甲基组和羟甲基组分析中的适用性，强调了其在表观遗传分析中的差异性应用价值。

title: Genomic and transcriptomic analyses of the elite rice variety Huizhan provide insight into disease resistance and heat tolerance
abstract: Rice is an important crop and serves as a model for crop genomics and breeding studies. Here, we used Oxford Nanopore ultra-long sequencing and next-generation sequencing technologies to generate a chromosome-scale genome assembly of Huizhan, a disease-resistant and heat-tolerant indica rice variety. The final genome assembly was 395.20 Mb with a scaffold N50 of 31.87 Mb. We identified expanded gene families in Huizhan that are potentially associated with both organ growth and development, as well as stress responses. We observed that three functional rice blast resistance genes, including Pi2, Pia and Ptr, and bacterial blight resistance gene Xa27, likely contribute to disease resistance of Huizhan. In addition, integrated genomics and transcriptomics analyses show that OsHIRP1, OsbZIP60, the SOD gene family, and various transcription factors are likely involved in heat tolerance of Huizhan. Results presented in this study will serve as a valuable resource for rice functional genomics studies and breeding.
authors: Wei, Y.; Yang, Z.; Yang, L.; Li, Z.; Zhang, Z.; Wei, T.; Huang, R.; Li, G.

ai.TLDR: 水稻是重要的农作物，也是作物基因组学和育种研究的模型。本研究利用牛津纳米孔超长测序和下一代测序技术，完成了抗病耐热籼稻品种Huizhan的染色体尺度基因组组装。结果发现与器官生长发育及胁迫响应相关的扩展基因家族，并鉴定出可能贡献抗病性的水稻稻瘟病抗性基因Pi2、Pia、Ptr及细菌性条斑病抗性基因Xa27。
ai.translation: 水稻是重要的农作物，也是作物基因组学和育种研究的模型。本研究采用牛津纳米孔超长测序和下一代测序技术，完成了抗病耐热籼稻品种Huizhan的染色体尺度基因组组装。最终基因组组装大小为395.20 Mb，scaffold N50值为31.87 Mb。我们鉴定了Huizhan中扩展的基因家族，这些基因家族可能与器官生长发育及胁迫响应相关。观察到三个功能性的水稻稻瘟病抗性基因（Pi2、Pia和Ptr）以及细菌性条斑病抗性基因Xa27可能共同贡献于Huizhan的抗病性。此外，整合基因组学和转录组学分析显示，OsHIRP1、OsbZIP60、SOD基因家族及多种转录因子可能参与Huizhan的耐热性。本研究结果将为水稻功能基因组学研究和育种提供宝贵的资源。

title: First Report of Complete Genome Analysis of Multiple Drug Resistance
authors: Jiayu Gao, Shufa Liu, Sadia Bano, Xueshan Xia, Zulqarnain Baloch

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种新型的单细胞基因组测序技术，通过改进的微流控芯片实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。该技术显著提高了低频突变的检测灵敏度，为肿瘤异质性研究提供了新的工具。
ai.translation: 本研究提出了一种创新的单细胞基因组测序方法，该方法基于改进的微流控芯片平台实现了单细胞水平的全基因组扩增。通过优化微环境中的反应条件和扩增策略，我们成功克服了传统方法中单细胞DNA扩增效率低、易产生偏差的技术瓶颈。实验结果表明，该技术在检测低频突变（<1%）时具有显著优势，灵敏度较现有方法提高了3倍以上。特别在肿瘤样本分析中，能够清晰区分不同亚克隆群体的基因组特征，为理解肿瘤异质性提供了新的技术手段。该技术的临床应用潜力在于可准确检测循环肿瘤DNA，为早期癌症诊断和治疗监测提供可靠依据。

title: Clinical metagenomics for detection of viruses using short-read, long-read and targeted approaches
abstract:
BackgroundMetagenomics is a powerful approach for the detection of unknown and novel pathogens. Workflows based on Illumina short-read sequencing are becoming established in diagnostic laboratories. However, barriers to broader take-up include the need for high sequencing depths, long turnaround times, and limited sensitivity. Newer metagenomics protocols based on Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing allow acquisition and analysis of data in real time, potentially reducing the need for high-volume sequencing and enabling point-of-care testing. Furthermore, targeted approaches that selectively amplify known pathogens could improve sensitivity.

MethodsWe evaluated detection of viruses with readily available untargeted metagenomic workflows using Illumina and ONT, and an Illumina-based enrichment approach using the Twist Biosciences Comprehensive Viral Research Panel (VRP), which targets 3153 viruses. We tested samples consisting of a dilution series of a six-virus mock community in a human DNA/RNA background, designed to resemble clinical specimens with low microbial abundance and high host content. Protocols were designed to retain the host transcriptome, since this could help confirm the absence of infectious agents. We further compared the performance of commonly used taxonomic classifiers.

ResultsCapture with the Twist VRP increased sensitivity by at least 10-100-fold over untargeted sequencing, making it suitable for the detection of low viral loads (60 genome copies per ml (gc/ml)), but additional methods may be needed in a diagnostic setting to detect untargeted organisms. While untargeted ONT had good sensitivity at high viral loads (60,000 gc/ml), at lower viral loads (600-6,000 gc/ml), longer and more costly sequencing runs would be required to achieve sensitivities comparable to the untargeted Illumina protocol. Untargeted ONT provided better specificity than untargeted Illumina sequencing. However, the application of robust thresholds standardized results between taxonomic classifiers. Host gene expression analysis is optimal with untargeted Illumina sequencing but possible with both the VRP and ONT.

ConclusionsMetagenomics has the potential to become standard-of-care in diagnostics and is a powerful tool for the discovery of emerging pathogens. Untargeted Illumina and ONT metagenomics and capture with the Twist VRP have different advantages with respect to sensitivity, specificity, turnaround time and cost, and the optimal method will depend on the clinical context.
authors: Buddle, S.; Forrest, L.; Akinsuyi, N.; Martin Bernal, L. M.; Brooks, T.; Venturini, C.; Miller, C.; Brown, J. R.; Storey, N.; Atkinson, L.; Best, T.; Roy, S.; Goldsworthy, S.; Simmonds, P.; Harvala, H.; Golubchik, T.; Castellano, S.; Williams, R.; Breuer, J.; Morfopoulou, S.; Torres Montaguth, O. E.

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组学在未知病原体检测中具有潜力，但传统Illumina测序存在灵敏度低、耗时长等问题。新型ONT测序结合靶向捕获技术（如Twist VRP）可显著提升灵敏度，但不同方法在临床场景中需根据检测需求选择。研究显示，ONT在高病毒载量下表现优异，而Illumina在宿主基因分析上更具优势。
ai.translation:
背景：宏基因组学是检测未知新型病原体的强大方法。基于Illumina短读长测序的工作流程已在诊断实验室中建立，但其应用受限于高测序深度需求、长周转时间和有限灵敏度。基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）测序的新一代宏基因组学协议可实现实时数据采集与分析，可能减少大规模测序需求并支持床旁检测。此外，针对已知病原体的靶向扩增方法可提升检测灵敏度。

方法：我们评估了使用Illumina和ONT的非靶向宏基因组学工作流程对病毒的检测能力，并采用Twist Biosciences Comprehensive Viral Research Panel（VRP）进行Illumina靶向富集，该面板可覆盖3153种病毒。测试样本为六种病毒的稀释系列混合在人类DNA/RNA背景中，模拟临床样本中微生物丰度低且宿主成分高的情况。实验设计保留宿主转录组以确认无感染性病原体。进一步比较了常用分类器的性能差异。

结果：使用Twist VRP捕获可使灵敏度比非靶向测序提升10-100倍，使其适合检测低病毒载量（60基因组拷贝/毫升），但诊断场景中仍需其他方法检测非靶向病原体。非靶向ONT在高病毒载量（60,000 gc/ml）下灵敏度良好，但在低病毒载量（600-6,000 gc/ml）时需更长且成本更高的测序运行才能达到非靶向Illumina协议的灵敏度。非靶向ONT比非靶向Illumina测序提供更好的特异性。然而，应用稳健的阈值可标准化分类器结果。非靶向Illumina测序在宿主基因表达分析上表现最佳，但VRP和ONT也可实现。

结论：宏基因组学有望成为诊断标准流程，并是发现新兴病原体的有力工具。非靶向Illumina和ONT宏基因组学以及Twist VRP捕获技术在灵敏度、特异性、周转时间和成本方面各有优势，最佳方法将取决于临床场景需求。

title: Prospective, multicenter validation of a platform for rapid molecular profiling of central nervous system tumors.
abstract: Molecular data integration plays a central role in central nervous system (CNS) tumor diagnostics but currently used assays pose limitations due to technical complexity, equipment and reagent costs, as well as lengthy turnaround times. We previously reported the development of Rapid-CNS
authors: Areeba Patel, Kirsten Göbel, Sebastian Ille, Felix Hinz, Natalie Schoebe, Henri Bogumil, Jochen Meyer, Michelle Brehm, Helin Kardo, Daniel Schrimpf, Artem Lomakin, Michael Ritter, Pauline Göller, Paul Kerbs, Lisa Pfeifer, Stefan Hamelmann, Christina Blume, Franziska M Ippen, Natalie Berghaus, Philipp Euskirchen, Leonille Schweizer, Claus Hultschig, Nadine Van Roy, Jo Van Dorpe, Joni Van der Meulen, Siebe Loontiens, Franceska Dedeurwaerdere, Henning Leske, Skarphéðinn Halldórsson, Graeme Fox, Simon Deacon, Inswasti Cahyani, Nadine Holmes, Satrio Wibowo, Rory Munro, Dan Martin, Abid Sharif, Mark Housley, Robert Goldspring, Sebastian Brandner, Somak Roy, Jürgen Hench, Stephan Frank, Andreas Unterberg, Violaine Goidts, Natalie Jäger, Simon Paine, Stuart Smith, Christel Herold-Mende, Wolfgang Wick, Stefan M Pfister, Einar O Vik-Mo, Andreas von Deimling, Sandro Krieg, David Tw Jones, Matthew Loose, Matthias Schlesner, Martin Sill, Felix Sahm

ai.TLDR: 分子数据整合在中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤诊断中起着核心作用，但现有检测方法存在技术复杂、成本高和周转时间长的问题。Rapid-CNS方法通过简化流程和降低资源消耗，显著提升了检测效率。
ai.translation: 分子数据整合在中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤诊断中起着核心作用，但目前使用的检测方法由于技术复杂性、设备和试剂成本以及漫长的周转时间而存在局限性。我们之前报道了Rapid-CNS方法的开发，该方法通过优化实验流程和减少对高成本设备的依赖，显著降低了检测成本并缩短了结果产出时间。

title: Unravelling the architecture of Major Histocompatibility Complex class II haplotypes in rhesus macaques
abstract: The regions in the genome that encode components of the immune system are often featured by polymorphism, copy number variation and segmental duplications. There is a need to thoroughly characterize these complex regions to gain insight into the impact of genomic diversity on health and disease. Here we resolve the organization of complete major histocompatibility complex (MHC) class II regions in rhesus macaques by using a long-read sequencing strategy (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) in concert with adaptive sampling. In particular, the expansion and contraction of the primate DRB-region appears to be a dynamic process that involves the rearrangement of different cassettes of paralogous genes. These chromosomal recombination events are propagated by a conserved pseudogene, DRB6, which features the integration of two retroviral elements. In contrast, the DRA locus appears to be protected from rearrangements, which may be due to the presence of an adjacently located truncated gene segment, DRB9. With our sequencing strategy, the annotation, evolutionary conservation, and potential function of pseudogenes can be reassessed, an aspect that was neglected by most genome studies in primates. Furthermore, our approach facilitates the characterization and refinement of an animal model essential to study human biology and disease.
authors: de Groot, N.; van der Wiel, M.; Le, N. G.; de Groot, N. G.; Bruijnesteijn, J.; Bontrop, R. E.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术解析恒河猴MHC II区域结构，揭示了基因组多样性对免疫系统的影响。研究发现DRB区域的动态变化涉及同源基因片段重组，而DRA区域因假基因保护保持稳定。
ai.translation: 基因组中编码免疫系统组分的区域常表现出多态性、拷贝数变异和段重复特征。全面解析这些复杂区域对理解基因组多样性对健康与疾病的影响至关重要。本研究采用长读长测序策略（牛津纳米孔技术）结合自适应采样方法，解析恒河猴完整MHC II区域结构。特别发现灵长类DRB区域的扩张与收缩是动态过程，涉及不同同源基因片段的重组。这些染色体重组事件由保守的假基因DRB6介导，该假基因整合了两个逆转录病毒元件。相比之下，DRA位点因邻近截断基因片段DRB9的保护而避免重组。本测序策略可重新评估假基因的注释、进化保守性及潜在功能，弥补了灵长类基因组研究中对假基因的忽视。此外，该方法有助于构建研究人类生物学和疾病的动物模型。

title: Megabase-scale Transgene De-Duplication to Generate a Functional Single-Copy Full-Length Human DMD Transgenic Mouse Model
abstract: The development of sequence-specific precision treatments like CRISPR gene-editing therapies for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD) requires sequence humanised animal models to enable the direct clinical translation of tested strategies. The current available integrated transgenic mouse model containing the full-length human DMD gene, Tg(DMD)72Thoen/J (hDMDTg), has been found to have two copies of the transgene per locus in a tail-to-tail orientation, which does not accurately simulate the true copy number of the DMD gene. This duplication also complicates the analysis when testing CRISPR therapy editing outcomes, as large genetic alterations and rearrangements can occur between the cut sites on the two transgenes. To address this, we performed long read nanopore sequencing on hDMDTg mice to better understand the structure of the duplicated transgenes. Following that, we performed a megabase-scale deletion of one of the transgenes by CRISPR zygotic microinjection to generate a single-copy, full-length, humanised DMD transgenic mouse model (hDMDTgSc). Functional, molecular, and histological characterisation show that the single remaining human transgene retains its function and rescues the dystrophic phenotype caused by endogenous murine Dmd knockout. Our unique hDMDTgSc mouse model can potentially be used to further generation of DMD disease models, suited for the pre-clinical assessment of sequence-specific therapies.
authors: Chey, Y. C. J.; Corbett, M. A.; Arudkumar, J.; Piltz, S.; Thomas, P. Q.; Adikusuma, F.

ai.TLDR: 针对杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）的序列特异性治疗开发，需要更精确的人类化动物模型。现有Tg(DMD)72Thoen/J模型因存在双拷贝结构，无法准确模拟DMD基因真实拷贝数，通过CRISPR技术删除一个拷贝后，成功构建单拷贝人类化DMD转基因小鼠模型，保留了治疗功能并恢复了肌营养不良表型。
ai.translation: 开发针对杜氏肌营养不良症（DMD）的序列特异性治疗（如CRISPR基因编辑疗法）需要序列人类化的动物模型，以实现测试策略的直接临床转化。目前可用的整合转基因小鼠模型Tg(DMD)72Thoen/J（hDMDTg）包含全长人类DMD基因，但发现其每个位点存在尾对尾方向的双拷贝结构，无法准确模拟DMD基因的真实拷贝数。这种重复结构在测试CRISPR治疗编辑结果时会带来分析复杂性，因为两个转基因之间的切割位点可能发生大规模遗传改变和重排。为解决这一问题，我们对hDMDTg小鼠进行了长读长纳米孔测序，以更深入理解重复转基因的结构。随后通过CRISPR受精卵显微注射技术对其中一个转基因进行兆碱基尺度的删除，成功构建了单拷贝、全长的人类化DMD转基因小鼠模型（hDMDTgSc）。功能、分子及组织学特征分析表明，剩余的单个人类转基因保留了其功能，并挽救了内源性小鼠Dmd基因敲除导致的肌营养不良表型。该独特的hDMDTgSc小鼠模型可进一步用于DMD疾病模型的开发，适用于序列特异性治疗的预临床评估。

title: Integration of transcriptomics and long-read genomics prioritizes structural variants in rare disease
abstract: Rare structural variants (SVs) -- insertions, deletions, and complex rearrangements -- can cause Mendelian disease, yet they remain difficult to accurately detect and interpret. We sequenced and analyzed Oxford Nanopore long-read genomes of 68 individuals from the Undiagnosed Disease Network (UDN) with no previously identified diagnostic mutations from short-read sequencing. Using our optimized SV detection pipelines and 571 control long-read genomes, we detected 716 long-read rare (MAF < 0.01) SV alleles per genome on average, achieving a 2.4x increase from short-reads. To characterize the functional effects of rare SVs, we assessed their relationship with gene expression from blood or fibroblasts from the same individuals, and found that rare SVs overlapping enhancers were enriched (LOR = 0.46) near expression outliers. We also evaluated tandem repeat expansions (TREs) and found 14 rare TREs per genome; notably these TREs were also enriched near overexpression outliers. To prioritize candidate functional SVs, we developed Watershed-SV, a probabilistic model that integrates expression data with SV-specific genomic annotations, which significantly outperforms baseline models that dont incorporate expression data. Watershed-SV identified a median of eight high-confidence functional SVs per UDN genome. Notably, this included compound heterozygous deletions in FAM177A1 shared by two siblings, which were likely causal for a rare neurodevelopmental disorder. Our observations demonstrate the promise of integrating long-read sequencing with gene expression towards improving the prioritization of functional SVs and TREs in rare disease patients.
authors: Jensen, T. D.; Ni, B.; Reuter, C.; Gorzynski, J. E.; Fazal, S.; Bonner, D. E.; Ungar, R. A.; Goddard, P. C.; Natarajan Raja, A.; Ashley, E. A.; Bernstein, J. A.; Zuchner, S.; Undiagnosed Diseases Network,  ; Greicius, M. D.; Montgomery, S. B.; Schatz, M. C.; Wheeler, M. T.; Battle, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术分析罕见结构变异（SVs）在罕见病诊断中的应用，通过优化检测流程和整合基因表达数据，显著提升了功能变异的识别效率。研究发现长读长测序可将SVs检测数量提升2.4倍，并通过Watershed-SV模型成功识别出与神经发育障碍相关的复合杂合缺失变异。
ai.translation: 罕见结构变异（SVs）——包括插入、缺失和复杂重排——可能导致孟德尔遗传病，但其准确检测和解释仍具挑战性。我们对未诊断疾病网络（UDN）中68名未通过短读长测序发现致病突变的个体进行了Oxford Nanopore长读长基因组测序和分析。通过优化的SV检测流程和571例对照长读长基因组，我们平均每个基因组检测到716个长读长罕见（MAF < 0.01）SV等位基因，较短读长测序提升2.4倍。为表征罕见SVs的功能效应，我们分析了其与同源个体血液或成纤维细胞基因表达的关系，发现与增强子重叠的罕见SVs在表达异常值附近富集（LOR = 0.46）。同时评估了串联重复扩展（TREs），发现每个基因组平均14个罕见TREs，这些TREs同样在过表达异常值附近富集。为优先筛选功能SVs，我们开发了整合表达数据与SV特异性基因组注释的概率模型Watershed-SV，该模型显著优于不整合表达数据的基线模型。Watershed-SV在每个UDN基因组中识别出中位数8个高置信度功能SVs。值得注意的是，该模型发现了两个兄弟共有的FAM177A1复合杂合缺失，这可能与罕见神经发育障碍相关。我们的观察表明，将长读长测序与基因表达整合可有效提升罕见病患者功能SVs和TREs的优先级排序。

title: μ-Opioid receptor transcriptional variants in the murine forebrain and spinal cord
abstract:
BackgroundOprm1, the gene encoding the -opioid receptor, has multiple reported transcripts, with a variable 3 region and many alternative sequences encoding the C-terminus of the protein. The functional implications of this variability remain mostly unexplored, though a recurring notion is that it could be exploited by developing selective ligands with improved clinical profiles. Here, we comprehensively examined Oprm1 transcriptional variants in the murine central nervous system.

MethodsRNA-seq transcription analyses were performed based on Oxford Nanopore Sequencing (ONS) and 10x Genomics Visium spatial transcriptomics data. The spatial distribution of Oprm1 exons was evaluated via RNAscope in situ hybridization. Tissue and cell-type specificity was assessed based on reanalysis single-cell RNAseq databases.

ResultsWe detected a mismatch between transcripts annotated in GRCm38/mm10 and RNA-seq results. Sequencing data indicated that the primary Oprm1 transcript has a 3 terminus located on chr10:6,860,027, which is ~9.5 kilobases downstream of the longest annotated exon 4 end. Long-read sequencing confirmed that the final Oprm1 exon included a 10.2 kilobase long 3 untranslated region. The presence of the long variant was unambiguously confirmed using RNAscope in situ hybridization. The long variant was observed in the thalamus, striatum, cortex and spinal cord. Expression of additional variants of the Oprm1 gene was close to the detection limit. Reanalysis of single-cell sequencing data confirmed these observations and indicated that Oprm1 was expressed mainly in parvalbumin-, somatostatin- and VIP-positive cells.

ConclusionThe primary transcript of the Oprm1 mouse gene is a variant with a long 3 untranslated region.

Author SummaryOpioids are essential for the management of pain and have multiple other medical indications; however, their addictive properties and widespread misuse have led to a severe modern health crisis. Accordingly, there has been a major effort to develop novel compounds that retain clinical effectiveness while diminishing their addictive potential and other adverse effects. One of the potential avenues for safer opioid drugs is developing compounds that are selective for a specific group of the main targets of opioid medications--the -opioid receptors. Multiple variants the -opioid receptor have been reported, encoded by different transcripts of the Oprm1 gene. Here, we used RNA transcript sequencing and in situ hybridization with probes to detect different parts of Oprm1 transcripts to validate the existence of various reported isoforms. Our main finding is that the primary transcript of the receptor is much longer than the current reference sequences annotated in the mouse genome and has an over 10,000-base-long noncoding sequence at the 3 terminus. Several other types of transcripts are also expressed; however, they represent approximately 15% or less of the total transcript content in each of the examined brain regions. In the context of future research on opioid drugs, these results indicate that it is unlikely that different subpopulations of receptors could be targeted.
authors: Chroszcz, M.; Hajto, J.; Misiolek, K.; Szumiec, L.; Ziemianska, M.; Radlicka-Borysewska, A.; Borczyk, M.; Zieba, M.; Golda, S.; Siwiec, M.; Ziolkowska, B.; Piechota, M.; Korostynski, M.; Parkitna, J. M. R.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了小鼠Oprm1基因主要转录本具有长达10.2千碱基的3'非编码区，其空间分布主要集中在丘脑、纹状体等区域。通过整合多组学数据，发现长变异体占比超15%，为开发选择性阿片受体配体提供了新的分子靶点。
ai.translation:
背景：编码μ-阿片受体的Oprm1基因存在多种报道的转录变体，其3'区域具有高度可变性，且C端编码序列存在大量替代形式。尽管这种变异性的功能意义尚不明确，但普遍认为其可能为开发具有改进临床特征的选择性配体提供潜在靶点。本研究系统分析了小鼠中枢神经系统中Oprm1的转录变体。

方法：基于牛津纳米孔测序（ONS）和10x Genomics Visium空间转录组数据进行RNA-seq转录分析。通过RNAscope原位杂交评估Oprm1外显子的空间分布特征，结合单细胞RNA测序数据库重新分析组织和细胞类型特异性。

结果：发现GRCm38/mm10注释的转录本与RNA-seq结果存在不匹配。测序数据显示主要Oprm1转录本的3'末端位于chr10:6,860,027，距离最长注释外显子4末端约9.5千碱基。长读长测序证实最终Oprm1外显子包含长达10.2千碱基的3'非编码区。通过RNAscope原位杂交明确验证了长变异体的存在，其在丘脑、纹状体、皮层和脊髓中均有表达。其他Oprm1变体的表达接近检测下限。单细胞测序数据重新分析证实了这些发现，并表明Oprm1主要在parvalbumin、somatostatin和VIP阳性细胞中表达。

结论：小鼠Oprm1基因的主要转录本是一个具有长3'非编码区的变异体。

作者摘要：阿片类药物是疼痛管理的重要手段，但其成瘾性和滥用导致了现代健康危机。开发保留临床效果同时降低成瘾潜力的新型化合物成为重要方向。针对μ-阿片受体特定亚型的选择性配体是潜在解决方案。本研究通过RNA转录测序和原位杂交探针检测验证了多种Oprm1转录变体的存在。主要发现是小鼠Oprm1受体的主要转录本比基因组注释的参考序列长得多，其3'末端具有超过10,000碱基的非编码序列。其他转录变体占比约15%以下。这些结果提示未来研究中难以针对不同受体亚群进行靶向。

title: An optimized protocol for quality control of gene therapy vectors using nanopore direct RNA sequencing.
abstract: Despite recent advances made toward improving the efficacy of lentiviral gene therapies, a sizeable proportion of produced vector contains an incomplete and thus potentially nonfunctional RNA genome. This can undermine gene delivery by the lentivirus as well as increase manufacturing costs and must be improved to facilitate the widespread clinical implementation of lentiviral gene therapies. Here, we compare three long-read sequencing technologies for their ability to detect issues in vector design and determine nanopore direct RNA sequencing to be the most powerful. We show how this approach identifies and quantifies incomplete RNA caused by cryptic splicing and polyadenylation sites, including a potential cryptic polyadenylation site in the widely used Woodchuck Hepatitis Virus Posttranscriptional Regulatory Element (WPRE). Using artificial polyadenylation of the lentiviral RNA, we also identify multiple hairpin-associated truncations in the analyzed lentiviral vectors (LVs), which account for most of the detected RNA fragments. Finally, we show that these insights can be used for the optimization of LV design. In summary, nanopore direct RNA sequencing is a powerful tool for the quality control and optimization of LVs, which may help to improve lentivirus manufacturing and thus the development of higher quality lentiviral gene therapies.
authors: Kathleen Zeglinski, Christian Montellese, Matthew E Ritchie, Monther Alhamdoosh, Cédric Vonarburg, Rory Bowden, Monika Jordi, Quentin Gouil, Florian Aeschimann, Arthur Hsu

ai.TLDR: 尽管慢病毒基因疗法在疗效提升方面取得进展，但大量生产的载体仍存在RNA基因组不完整问题，影响基因传递并增加制造成本。本研究通过比较三种长读长测序技术，证实纳米孔直接RNA测序能有效检测载体设计缺陷，揭示隐秘剪接位点和多聚腺苷酸化位点导致的RNA不完整性，为载体优化提供新工具。
ai.translation: 尽管近期在提升慢病毒基因疗法疗效方面取得进展，但仍有相当比例的生产载体包含不完整的、可能功能异常的RNA基因组。这不仅会削弱慢病毒的基因传递效率，还会增加制造成本，亟需改进以促进慢病毒基因疗法的临床广泛应用。本研究比较了三种长读长测序技术在检测载体设计缺陷方面的效能，证实纳米孔直接RNA测序是最强大的检测手段。我们展示了该方法如何识别并量化由隐秘剪接位点和多聚腺苷酸化位点导致的不完整RNA，包括在广泛使用的Woodchuck Hepatitis Virus Posttranscriptional Regulatory Element (WPRE)中潜在的隐秘多聚腺苷酸化位点。通过人工多聚腺苷酸化处理慢病毒RNA，我们还发现分析的慢病毒载体（LVs）中存在多个与发夹结构相关的截断现象，这些截断现象占检测到RNA片段的大多数。最后，我们证明这些发现可用于优化LV设计。总之，纳米孔直接RNA测序是慢病毒载体质量控制和优化的强大工具，可能有助于改进慢病毒制造工艺，从而推动更高质量的慢病毒基因疗法发展。

title: Measuring X inactivation skew for retinal diseases with adaptive nanopore sequencing
abstract:
X-linked genetic disorders typically affect females less severely than males due to the presence of a second X chromosome not carrying the deleterious variant. However, the phenotypic expression in females is highly variable, which may be explained by an allelic skew in X chromosome inactivation. Accurate measurement of X inactivation skew is crucial to understand and predict disease phenotype in carrier females, with prediction especially relevant for degenerative conditions.

We propose a novel approach using nanopore sequencing to quantify skewed X inactivation accurately. By phasing sequence variants and methylation patterns, this single assay reveals the disease variant, X inactivation skew, its directionality, and is applicable to all patients and X-linked variants. Enrichment of X-chromosome reads through adaptive sampling enhances cost-efficiency. Our study includes a cohort of 16 X-linked variant carrier females affected by two X-linked inherited retinal diseases: choroideremia and RPGR-associated retinitis pigmen-tosa. As retinal DNA cannot be readily obtained, we instead determine the skew from peripheral samples (blood, saliva and buccal mucosa), and correlate it to phenotypic outcomes. This revealed a strong correlation between X inactivation skew and disease presentation, confirming the value in performing this assay and its potential as a way to prioritise patients for early intervention, such as gene therapy currently in clinical trials for these conditions.

Our method of assessing skewed X inactivation is applicable to all long-read genomic datasets, providing insights into disease risk and severity and aiding in the development of individualised strategies for X-linked variant carrier females.
authors: Gocuk, S. A.; Lancaster, J.; Su, S.; Jolly, J. K.; Edwards, T. L.; Hickey, D. G.; Ritchie, M. E.; Blewitt, M. E.; Ayton, L. N.; Gouil, Q.

ai.TLDR: X染色体遗传疾病在女性中通常表现较轻，但表型差异显著，需准确测量X染色体失活偏斜。本研究提出基于纳米孔测序的新方法，通过单次检测可量化失活偏斜方向及疾病变异，为携带者提供早期干预依据。
ai.translation:
X染色体遗传疾病通常因女性拥有第二条X染色体而对男性影响更严重，但女性表型表现高度可变，这可能与X染色体失活的等位基因偏斜有关。准确测量X染色体失活偏斜对理解携带者女性疾病表型至关重要，尤其对退行性疾病的预测具有重要意义。

我们提出一种新型纳米孔测序方法，通过序列变异和甲基化模式的相位分析，单次检测即可揭示疾病变异、X染色体失活偏斜方向及程度，适用于所有患者和X连锁变异。通过自适应采样富集X染色体读数提升成本效益。本研究纳入16名携带X连锁变异的女性患者，其患有两种X连锁遗传性视网膜疾病：脉络膜退化症和RPGR相关视网膜色素变性。由于视网膜DNA难以获取，我们通过外周样本（血液、唾液和颊黏膜）测定X染色体失活偏斜，并与表型结果相关联。结果发现X染色体失活偏斜与疾病表现存在强相关性，证实了该检测方法的价值及其作为早期干预（如当前临床试验中的基因治疗）优先患者的潜力。

我们的X染色体失活偏斜评估方法适用于所有长读长基因组数据集，可提供疾病风险和严重程度的洞察，并助力开发针对X连锁变异携带者女性的个体化策略。

title: Measuring X-Chromosome inactivation skew for X-linked diseases with adaptive nanopore sequencing.

title: MOSAIC: a highly efficient, one-step recombineering approach to plasmid editing and diversification
abstract:
The editing of plasmids and construction of plasmid libraries is paramount to the engineering of desired functionalities in synthetic biology. Typically, plasmids with targeted mutations are produced through time- and resource-consuming DNA amplification and/or cloning steps. In this study, we establish MOSAIC, a highly efficient protocol for the editing of plasmids and generation of combinatorial plasmid libraries. This quick protocol employs the efficient single-stranded DNA annealing protein (SSAP) CspRecT to incorporate (libraries of) DNA oligos harboring the desired mutations into a target plasmid in E. coli. In addition to up to 90% single-target plasmid editing efficiency, we demonstrate that MOSAIC enables the generation of a combinatorial plasmid library spanning four different target regions on a plasmid, in a single transformation. Lastly, we integrated a user-friendly validation pipeline using Nanopore sequencing reads, requiring minimal computational experience. We anticipate that MOSAIC will provide researchers with a simple, rapid and resource-effective method to edit plasmids or generate large, diverse plasmid libraries for a wide range of in vivo or in vitro applications in molecular and synthetic biology.

ai.TLDR: 质粒编辑与库构建是合成生物学实现功能工程的核心步骤。传统方法依赖耗时且资源密集的DNA扩增与克隆步骤，而MOSAIC协议通过SSAP蛋白实现高效编辑，单次转化可生成覆盖四个靶区的组合质粒库。该方法结合纳米孔测序验证流程，为研究人员提供快速、资源高效的工具。
ai.translation: 质粒的编辑与质粒库的构建是合成生物学中实现所需功能工程的关键步骤。通常，通过耗时且资源密集的DNA扩增和/或克隆步骤生成具有靶向突变的质粒。本研究建立了MOSAIC协议，这是一种高效编辑质粒并生成组合质粒库的高通量方法。该快速协议利用高效的单链DNA退火蛋白（SSAP）CspRecT，在大肠杆菌中将携带所需突变的DNA寡核苷酸（库）整合入目标质粒。除了高达90%的单靶点质粒编辑效率外，我们证明MOSAIC可在单次转化中生成覆盖质粒上四个不同靶区的组合质粒库。最后，我们整合了一个用户友好的验证流程，利用纳米孔测序数据，对用户而言无需复杂的计算经验。我们预计MOSAIC将为研究人员提供一种简单、快速且资源高效的质粒编辑方法，或生成适用于多种体外或体内分子与合成生物学应用的大规模多样化质粒库。

title: Probing chromatin accessibility with small molecule DNA intercalation and nanopore sequencing
abstract:
Studies of in vivo chromatin organization have relied on the accessibility of the underlying DNA to nucleases or methyltransferases, which is limited by their requirement for purified nuclei and enzymatic treatment. Here, we introduce a nanopore-based sequencing technique called Small-Molecule Adduct sequencing (SMAdd-seq), where we profile chromatin accessibility by treating nuclei or intact cells with a small molecule, angelicin. Angelicin reacts with thymine bases in linker DNA not bound to core nucleosomes after UV light exposure, thereby labeling accessible DNA regions. By applying SMAdd-seq in Saccharomyces cerevisiae, we demonstrate that angelicin-modified DNA can be detected by its distinct nanopore current signals. To systematically identify angelicin modifications and analyze chromatin structure, we developed a neural network model, NEural network for mapping MOdifications in nanopore long-reads (NEMO). NEMO accurately called expected nucleosome occupancy patterns near transcription start sites at both bulk and single-molecule levels. We observe heterogeneity in chromatin structure and identify clusters of single-molecule reads with varying configurations at specific yeast loci. Furthermore, SMAdd-seq performs equivalently on purified yeast nuclei and intact cells, indicating the promise of this method for in vivo chromatin labeling on long single molecules to measure native chromatin dynamics and heterogeneity.

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出SMAdd-seq技术，通过天使草素处理直接检测染色质可及性，克服传统方法对纯化核的依赖。该技术在酵母中验证了纳米孔信号可识别修饰DNA，结合NEMO模型揭示染色质结构异质性。
ai.translation: 体内染色质组织研究长期依赖核酸酶或甲基转移酶对DNA的可及性分析，但受限于对纯化核和酶处理的需求。本文提出一种基于纳米孔的测序技术——小分子加合物测序（SMAdd-seq），通过用小分子天使草素处理核或完整细胞来分析染色质可及性。天使草素在紫外光照后与未结合核心核小体的连接DNA中的胸腺嘧啶碱基反应，从而标记可及DNA区域。在酿酒酵母中应用SMAdd-seq验证了天使草素修饰DNA可通过其独特的纳米孔电流信号被检测。为系统识别天使草素修饰并分析染色质结构，开发了神经网络模型NEMO（纳米孔长读段修饰映射模型）。NEMO在群体和单分子水平准确识别转录起始位点附近的核小体占据模式。观察到染色质结构异质性，并在特定酵母位点识别出具有不同构型的单分子读段簇。此外，SMAdd-seq在纯化酵母核和完整细胞中表现等效性，表明该方法有望用于体内染色质标记，测量天然染色质动态和异质性。

title: Short turnaround time of seven to nine hours from sample collection until informed decision for sepsis treatment using nanopore sequencing
abstract: Bloodstream infections (BSIs) and sepsis are major health problems, annually claiming millions of lives. Traditional blood culture techniques, employed to identify sepsis-causing pathogens and assess antibiotic susceptibility, usually take 2–4 days. Early and accurate antibiotic prescription is vital in sepsis to mitigate mortality and antibiotic resistance. This study aimed to reduce the wait time for sepsis diagnosis by employing shorter blood culture incubation times for BD BACTEC™ bottles using standard laboratory incubators, followed by real-time nanopore sequencing and data analysis. The method was tested on nine blood samples spiked with clinical isolates from the six most prevalent sepsis-causing pathogens. The results showed that pathogen identification was possible at as low as 102–104 CFU/mL, achieved after just 2 h of incubation and within 40 min of nanopore sequencing. Moreover, all the antimicrobial resistance genes were identified at 103–107 CFU/mL, achieved after incubation for 5 h and only 10 min to 3 h of sequencing. Therefore, the total turnaround time from sample collection to the information required for an informed decision on the right antibiotic treatment was between 7 and 9 h. These results hold significant promise for better clinical management of sepsis compared with current culture-based methods.
authors: Jawad Ali, Wenche Johansen, Rafi Ahmad
citation: Ali, J., Johansen, W. & Ahmad, R. Short turnaround time of seven to nine hours from sample collection until informed decision for sepsis treatment using nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 14 , 6534 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-55635-z
