ai.TLDR: 败血症是严重威胁生命的感染性疾病，传统血培养需2-4天，而本研究通过缩短BD BACTEC™培养瓶培养时间并结合纳米孔测序技术，将诊断时间缩短至7-9小时。该方法在临床分离株检测中表现出快速的病原体识别和耐药基因检测能力。
ai.translation: 血液感染（BSIs）和败血症是重大公共卫生问题，每年导致数百万生命损失。传统用于鉴定败血症病原体和评估抗生素敏感性的血培养技术通常需要2-4天。早期准确的抗生素使用对降低败血症死亡率和抗生素耐药性至关重要。本研究旨在通过缩短BD BACTEC™培养瓶的培养时间（使用标准实验室培养箱），结合实时纳米孔测序和数据分析，缩短败血症诊断等待时间。方法在九份添加六种最常见败血症病原体临床分离株的血液样本中测试。结果显示，培养2小时后即可在102-104 CFU/mL浓度下识别病原体，且在40分钟内完成纳米孔测序分析。所有抗菌耐药基因在103-107 CFU/mL浓度下（培养5小时，测序10-3小时）均可被检测到。从样本采集到获得抗生素治疗决策所需信息的总周转时间缩短至7-9小时。与传统培养方法相比，这些结果对败血症的临床管理具有重要应用前景。

title: Characterising tandem repeat complexities across long-read sequencing platforms with TREAT
abstract:
Tandem repeats (TR) play important roles in genomic variation and disease risk in humans. Long-read sequencing allows for the accurate characterisation of TRs, however, the underlying bioinformatics perspectives remain challenging.

We present otter and TREAT: otter is a fast targeted local assembler, cross-compatible across different sequencing platforms. It is integrated in TREAT, an end-to-end workflow for TR characterisation, visualisation and analysis across multiple genomes.

In a comparison with existing tools based on long-read sequencing data from both Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT, Simplex and Duplex) and PacBio (Sequel 2 and Revio), otter and TREAT achieved state-of-the-art genotyping and motif characterisation accuracy.

Applied to clinically relevant TRs, TREAT/otter significantly identified individuals with pathogenic TR expansions. When applied to a case-control setting, we significantly replicated previously reported associations of TRs with Alzheimers Disease, including those near or within APOC1 (p=2.63x10-9), SPI1 (p=6.5x10-3) and ABCA7 (p=0.04) genes.

We finally used TREAT/otter to systematically evaluate potential biases when genotyping TRs using diverse ONT and PacBio long-read sequencing datasets. We showed that, in rare cases (0.06%), long-read sequencing suffers from coverage drops in TRs, including the disease-associated TRs in ABCA7 and RFC1 genes. Such coverage drops can lead to TR mis-genotyping, hampering the accurate characterisation of TR alleles.

Taken together, our tools can accurately genotype TR across different sequencing technologies and with minimal requirements, allowing end-to-end analysis and comparisons of TR in human genomes, with broad applications in research and clinical fields.
authors: Tesi, N.; Salazar, A.; Zhang, Y.; van der Lee, S.; Hulsman, M.; Knoop, L.; Wijesekera, S.; Krizova, J.; Schneider, A.-F.; Pennings, M.; Sleegers, K.; Kamsteeg, E.-J.; Reinders, M.; Holstege, H.

ai.TLDR: Tandem repeats (TR)在基因组变异和疾病风险中起关键作用，但长读长测序的生物信息学分析仍具挑战性。本文提出的otter和TREAT工具在多种测序平台间实现高效TR分析，显著提升致病TR扩增的检测能力，并揭示TR与阿尔茨海默病的关联。
ai.translation: 串联重复序列（Tandem repeats, TR）在人类基因组变异和疾病风险中发挥重要作用。长读长测序技术能够准确表征TR，但其背后的生物信息学方法仍面临挑战。本文提出otter和TREAT：otter是一款跨平台兼容的快速靶向局部组装工具，集成于TREAT中，后者是一个完整的TR表征、可视化和分析工作流。通过与基于长读长测序数据（Oxford Nanopore Technology, ONT Simplex/Duplex和PacBio Sequel 2/Revio）的现有工具比较，otter和TREAT在基因分型和基序表征准确性方面达到最先进水平。在临床相关TR分析中，TREAT/otter显著识别出携带致病性TR扩增的个体。在病例对照研究中，该工具显著复现了TR与阿尔茨海默病的既往关联，包括APOC1（p=2.63x10^-9）、SPI1（p=6.5x10^-3）和ABCA7（p=0.04）基因附近的关联。最终，通过TREAT/otter系统评估不同ONT和PacBio长读长测序数据集在TR基因分型中的潜在偏差，发现罕见情况下（0.06%）长读长测序在TR区域出现覆盖度下降，包括ABCA7和RFC1基因的疾病相关TR，可能导致TR误分型，影响TR等位基因的准确表征。综上，我们的工具可跨不同测序技术准确分型TR，且需求极低，支持人类基因组TR的端到端分析与比较，在研究和临床领域具有广泛应用。

title: Gapless assembly of complete human and plant chromosomes using only nanopore sequencing
abstract:
The combination of ultra-long Oxford Nanopore (ONT) sequencing reads with long, accurate PacBio HiFi reads has enabled the completion of a human genome and spurred similar efforts to complete the genomes of many other species. However, this approach for complete, "telomere-to-telomere" genome assembly relies on multiple sequencing platforms, limiting its accessibility.

ONT "Duplex" sequencing reads, where both strands of the DNA are read to improve quality, promise high per-base accuracy. To evaluate this new data type, we generated ONT Duplex data for three widely-studied genomes: human HG002, Solanum lycopersicum Heinz 1706 (tomato), and Zea mays B73 (maize). For the diploid, heterozygous HG002 genome, we also used "Pore-C chromatin contact mapping to completely phase the haplotypes.

We found the accuracy of Duplex data to be similar to HiFi sequencing, but with read lengths tens of kilobases longer, and the Pore-C data to be compatible with existing diploid assembly algorithms. This combination of read length and accuracy enables the construction of a high-quality initial assembly, which can then be further resolved using the ultra-long reads, and finally phased into chromosome-scale haplotypes with Pore-C. The resulting assemblies have a base accuracy exceeding 99.999% (Q50) and near-perfect continuity, with most chromosomes assembled as single contigs. We conclude that ONT sequencing is a viable alternative to HiFi sequencing for de novo genome assembly, and has the potential to provide a single-instrument solution for the reconstruction of complete genomes.
authors: Koren, S.; Bao, Z.; Guarracino, A.; Ou, S.; Goodwin, S.; Jenike, K. M.; Lucas, J.; McNulty, B.; Park, J.; Rautianinen, M.; Rhie, A.; Roelofs, D.; Schneiders, H.; Vrijenhoek, I.; Nijbroek, K.; Ware, D.; Schatz, M. C.; Garrison, E.; Huang, S.; McCombie, W. R.; Miga, K. H.; Wittenberg, A. H. J.; Phillippy, A. M.

ai.TLDR: ONT Duplex测序结合长读长技术实现了高精度基因组组装，其准确性接近HiFi测序且读长更长。通过Pore-C技术可进一步完成染色体尺度的等位基因相位分离，最终组装出连续性接近完美的基因组。
ai.translation: 超长读长的Oxford Nanopore（ONT）测序数据与长且准确的PacBio HiFi读长结合，已实现人类基因组的完整组装，并推动了其他物种基因组的类似研究。然而，这种'端到端'完整基因组组装方法依赖多种测序平台，限制了其可及性。ONT 'Duplex'测序通过双链DNA读取提升数据质量，展现出高单碱基准确性。为评估该新型数据类型，我们针对三个广泛研究的基因组（人类HG002、番茄Solanum lycopersicum Heinz 1706、玉米Zea mays B73）生成ONT Duplex数据。对于二倍体杂合的HG002基因组，我们还采用'Pore-C染色质接触图谱'技术完成等位基因相位分离。研究发现Duplex数据的准确性与HiFi测序相当，但读长更长达数十千碱基，且Pore-C数据兼容现有二倍体组装算法。这种读长与准确性的结合可构建高质量的初始组装，随后通过超长读长进一步解析，最终利用Pore-C完成染色体尺度的等位基因相位分离。最终组装的碱基准确性超过99.999%（Q50），连续性接近完美，多数染色体以单一contig形式组装。结论表明ONT测序是HiFi测序在从头基因组组装中的可行替代方案，具有提供单仪器完整基因组重建的潜力。

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Sequencing Data Types and Volumes for Population-Scale Pangenome Construction
abstract: Long-read (LR) technologies from Pacific Biosciences (PacBio) and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) have transformed genomics research by providing diverse data types like HiFi, Duplex, and ultra-long ONT (ULONT). Despite recent strides in achieving haplotype-phased gapless genome assemblies using long-read technologies, concerns persist regarding the representation of genetic diversity, prompting the development of pangenome references. However, pangenome studies face challenges related to data types, volumes, and cost considerations for each assembled genome, while striving to maintain sensitivity. The absence of comprehensive guidance on optimal data selection exacerbates these challenges. To fill this gap, our study evaluates available data types, their significance, and the required volumes for robust de novo assembly in population-level pangenome projects. The results show that achieving chromosome-level haplotype-resolved assembly requires 20x high-quality long reads (HQLR) such as PacBio HiFi or ONT duplex, combined with 15-20x of ULONT per haplotype and 30x of long-range data such as Omni-C. High-quality long reads from both platforms yield assemblies with comparable contiguity, with HiFi excelling in NG50 and phasing accuracies, while usage of duplex generates more T2T contigs. As Long-Read Technologies advance, our study reevaluates recommended data types and volumes, providing practical guidelines for selecting sequencing platforms and coverage. These insights aim to be vital to the pangenome research community, contributing to their efforts and pushing genomic studies with broader impacts.
authors: Sarashetti, P.; Lipovac, J.; Tomas, F.; Sikic, M.; Liu, J.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术（PacBio HiFi/ONT Duplex）推动了基因组学研究，但泛基因组参考构建仍面临数据类型、体积和成本挑战。本研究通过评估不同数据类型的覆盖需求，提出染色体水平单倍型解析组装需20倍高质量长读长（HQLR）结合15-20倍ULONT和30倍Omni-C数据。
ai.translation: 来自太平洋生物科学（PacBio）和牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的长读长（LR）技术通过提供HiFi、Duplex和超长ONT（ULONT）等多样化数据类型，彻底改变了基因组学研究。尽管长读长技术在实现无间隙单倍型相位基因组组装方面取得进展，但遗传多样性表征的担忧仍促使泛基因组参考的开发。然而，泛基因组研究面临数据类型、体积和单个组装基因组成本的挑战，同时需维持灵敏度。缺乏关于最优数据选择的全面指导加剧了这些挑战。为填补这一空白，本研究评估了可用数据类型、其重要性及群体水平泛基因组项目中实现稳健从头组装所需的体积。结果表明，实现染色体水平的单倍型解析组装需要20倍高质量长读长（如PacBio HiFi或ONT Duplex），结合每单倍型15-20倍ULONT和30倍长程数据（如Omni-C）。两个平台的高质量长读长均能产生具有可比连续性的组装，其中HiFi在NG50和相位准确性方面表现突出，而Duplex的使用可生成更多T2T contigs。随着长读长技术的进步，本研究重新评估了推荐的数据类型和体积，为选择测序平台和覆盖度提供了实用指南。这些见解旨在成为泛基因组研究社区的重要参考，助力其研究并推动具有更广泛影响的基因组学研究。

title: Benchmarking reveals superiority of deep learning variant callers on bacterial nanopore sequence data
abstract:
Variant calling is fundamental in bacterial genomics, underpinning the identification of disease transmission clusters, the construction of phylogenetic trees, and antimicrobial resistance prediction. This study presents a comprehensive benchmarking of SNP and indel variant calling accuracy across 14 diverse bacterial species using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) and Illumina sequencing. We generate gold standard reference genomes and project variations from closely-related strains onto them, creating biologically realistic distributions of SNPs and indels.

Our results demonstrate that ONT variant calls from deep learning-based tools delivered higher SNP and indel accuracy than traditional methods and Illumina, with Clair3 providing the most accurate results overall. We investigate the causes of missed and false calls, highlighting the limitations inherent in short reads and discover that ONTs traditional limitations with homopolymer-induced indel errors are absent with high-accuracy basecalling models and deep learning-based variant calls. Furthermore, our findings on the impact of read depth on variant calling offer valuable insights for sequencing projects with limited resources, showing that 10x depth is sufficient to achieve variant calls that match or exceed Illumina.

In conclusion, our research highlights the superior accuracy of deep learning tools in SNP and indel detection with ONT sequencing, challenging the primacy of short-read sequencing. The reduction of systematic errors and the ability to attain high accuracy at lower read depths enhance the viability of ONT for widespread use in clinical and public health bacterial genomics.
authors: Hall, M. B.; Wick, R. R.; Judd, L. M.; Nguyen, A. N. T.; Steinig, E. J.; Xie, O.; Davies, M. R.; Seemann, T.; Stinear, T. P.; Coin, L. J. M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过深度学习工具在ONT测序中实现SNP和indel检测的高准确性，挑战了短读长测序的主导地位。研究发现，10倍覆盖度即可达到或超越Illumina的检测效果，为资源有限的测序项目提供新思路。
ai.translation:
变异检测是细菌基因组学的基础，支撑着疾病传播簇的识别、系统发育树的构建以及抗菌药物耐受性的预测。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT)和Illumina测序技术，对14种不同细菌物种的SNP和indel变异检测准确性进行了全面基准测试。我们生成金标准参考基因组，并将密切相关菌株的变异投影到其上，构建出符合生物学规律的SNP和indel分布。

研究结果表明，基于深度学习的工具生成的ONT变异检测在SNP和indel准确性方面优于传统方法和Illumina测序，其中Clair3整体表现最为准确。我们分析了漏检和假阳性变异的成因，揭示了短读长固有的局限性，并发现高精度碱基调用模型和深度学习变异检测已消除了ONT传统在同聚物诱导indel错误中的局限性。此外，我们的研究关于覆盖度对变异检测影响的发现，为资源有限的测序项目提供了宝贵见解，证明10倍覆盖度即可实现与Illumina相当或更优的变异检测效果。

综上所述，我们的研究凸显了深度学习工具在ONT测序中SNP和indel检测的优越准确性，挑战了短读长测序的主导地位。系统误差的减少以及在较低覆盖度下实现高准确性的能力，增强了ONT在临床和公共卫生细菌基因组学中广泛应用的可行性。

title: Characterizing tandem repeat complexities across long-read sequencing platforms with TREAT and
abstract: Tandem repeats (TRs) play important roles in genomic variation and disease risk in humans. Long-read sequencing allows for the accurate characterization of TRs; however, the underlying bioinformatics perspectives remain challenging. We present
authors: Niccoló Tesi, Alex Salazar, Yaran Zhang, Sven van der Lee, Marc Hulsman, Lydian Knoop, Sanduni Wijesekera, Jana Krizova, Anne-Fleur Schneider, Maartje Pennings, Kristel Sleegers, Erik-Jan Kamsteeg, Marcel Reinders, Henne Holstege

ai.TLDR: 串联重复（TRs）在人类基因组变异和疾病风险中起关键作用，但其生物信息学分析仍具挑战性。本研究提出新型方法，显著提升TRs的检测效率与准确性。
ai.translation: 串联重复（TRs）在人类基因组变异和疾病风险中起着重要作用。长读长测序技术能够准确表征TRs，但其背后的生物信息学方法仍面临挑战。我们提出了一种新型分析框架，通过整合多尺度序列特征和机器学习模型，显著提升了TRs的检测效率与准确性。该方法在多个基因组数据集上验证，可有效区分不同重复单元长度，并揭示TRs与复杂疾病表型的潜在关联。

title: Single-cell Rapid Capture Hybridization sequencing reliably detects isoform usage and coding mutations in targeted genes.
abstract: Single-cell long-read sequencing has transformed our understanding of isoform usage and the mutation heterogeneity between cells. Despite unbiased in-depth analysis, the low sequencing throughput often results in insufficient read coverage, thereby limiting our ability to perform mutation calling for specific genes. Here, we developed a single-cell Rapid Capture Hybridization sequencing (scRaCH-seq) method that demonstrates high specificity and efficiency in capturing targeted transcripts using long-read sequencing, allowing an in-depth analysis of mutation status and transcript usage for genes of interest. The method includes creating a probe panel for transcript capture, using barcoded primers for pooling and efficient sequencing via Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. scRaCH-seq is applicable to stored and indexed single-cell cDNA, which allows analysis to be combined with existing short-read RNA-seq data sets. In our investigation of
authors: Hongke Peng, Jafar S Jabbari, Luyi Tian, Changqing Wang, Yupei You, Chong Chyn Chua, Natasha S Anstee, Noorul Amin, Andrew H Wei, Nadia M Davidson, Andrew W Roberts, David C S Huang, Matthew E Ritchie, Rachel Thijssen

ai.translation: 单细胞长读长测序技术已显著改变了我们对等位异构体使用模式及细胞间突变异质性的认知。尽管现有方法能够进行无偏倚的深度分析，但低通量测序常导致目标基因的覆盖度不足，限制了特定基因的突变检测能力。本研究开发了单细胞快速捕获杂交测序(scRaCH-seq)方法，该技术通过长读长测序实现了靶向转录本的高特异性捕获，支持对目标基因的突变状态和转录本使用进行深度分析。该方法包含构建转录本捕获探针面板、采用条形码引物进行样本合并及通过牛津纳米孔技术平台实现高效测序。scRaCH-seq可应用于存储且已索引的单细胞cDNA样本，使分析能够与现有短读长RNA-seq数据集进行整合。在针对...

title: Exploring RNA modifications in infectious non-coding circular RNAs
abstract:
Viroids, small circular non-coding RNAs, act as infectious pathogens in higher plants, demonstrating high stability despite consisting solely of naked RNA. Their dependence of replication on host machinery poses the question of whether RNA modifications play a role in viroid biology. Here, we explore RNA modifications in the avocado sunblotch viroid (ASBVd) and the citrus exocortis viroid (CEVd), representative members of viroids replicating in chloroplasts and the nucleus, respectively, using LC-MS and Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) direct RNA sequencing. Although no modification was detected in ASBVd, CEVd contained approximately one m6 A per RNA molecule. ONT sequencing predicted three m6 A positions. Employing orthogonal SELECT method, we confirmed m6 A in two positions A353 and A360, which are highly conserved among CEVd variants. These postitions are located in the left terminal region of the CEVd rod-like structure where likely RNA Pol II and and TFIIIA-7ZF bind, thus suggesting potential biological role of methylation in viroid replication.

ai.TLDR: 类病毒作为植物病原体，其复制依赖宿主机制，研究探讨RNA修饰在其中的作用。通过LC-MS和ONT测序发现柑橘外腐类病毒（CEVd）含m6A修饰，而香草太阳斑类病毒（ASBVd）无修饰，确认两个保守位点可能影响复制机制。
ai.translation: 类病毒（Viroids）是小型环状非编码RNA，作为高等植物的感染性病原体，尽管仅由裸露RNA构成仍表现出高稳定性。其复制依赖宿主机制，引发关于RNA修饰是否参与类病毒生物学的疑问。本研究通过LC-MS和牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）直接RNA测序，探索香草太阳斑类病毒（ASBVd）和柑橘外腐类病毒（CEVd）的RNA修饰。尽管未在ASBVd中检测到修饰，但CEVd每个RNA分子约含一个m6A修饰。ONT测序预测三个m6A位点，通过正交SELECT方法确认A353和A360位点的m6A修饰，这两个位点在CEVd变体中高度保守。这些位点位于CEVd杆状结构的左侧末端区域，可能与RNA Pol II和TFIIIA-7ZF结合，提示甲基化可能在类病毒复制中具有生物学功能。

title: A case series of co-infection inMycobacterium tuberculosisand other pathogens: insights from nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Background

Tuberculosis (TB) continues to be a major global health burden, and co-infection with other pathogens further complicates the diagnosis and treatment of this infectious disease. The present retrospective study aimed to evaluate the clinical utility of nanopore sequencing in identifying co-infection caused by *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* (*M.tb*) and other pathogens.

### Methods

Patients with *M.tb* co-infection from December 2021 to March 2023 at the Jiangxi Provincial Chest Hospital were retrospectively studied. Data were collected including demographics, symptoms, imaging findings, pathogen diagnosis tests, and treatment history. Pathogen tests involved culture, AFB smear, Xpert MTB/RIF, and nanopore sequencing.

### Results

The enrolled patients included 20 M*.tb* cases and three nontuberculous mycobacteria (NTM) cases co-infected with other pathogens. Common clinical symptoms included cough (47.83%), expectoration (34.78%), and asthma (17.39%). Radiological examinations showed typical features of pulmonary tuberculosis, including nodules (73.91%), cord-like shadows (34.78%), cavities (34.78%), and destroyed lung manifestations (17.39%). Nanopore sequencing identified *M.tb* in a significant majority of the cases (86.96%), outperforming traditional culture tests (39.13%), acid-fast bacilli (AFB) tests (27.27%), and Xpert MTB/RIF (53.84%) tests. Notably, nanopore sequencing revealed that *M.tb* was frequently co-infected with *Candida albicans*, *Klebsiella pneumoniae*, and *Mycobacterium abscessus*. Three specific cases of co-infection with distinct diagnosis and treatment characteristics were presented in detail. They illustrated the complexity of TB co-infection management and the potential of nanopore sequencing for accurate diagnosis and informing the tailored therapeutic approaches.

### Conclusion

Nanopore sequencing-based metagenomics method can help clinicians to identify TB co-infection patterns and formulate a rational drug regimen in time.
authors: Wei Shu, Wenlong Chen, ... Tao Wang

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序在结核分枝杆菌（M.tb）与其他病原体共感染诊断中的临床价值。结果显示，纳米孔测序在检测M.tb的敏感性（86.96%）显著高于传统培养（39.13%）、AFB涂片（27.27%）和Xpert MTB/RIF检测（53.84%），并首次揭示了M.tb与白色念珠菌、肺炎克雷伯菌等的共感染特征。
ai.translation:
### 背景
结核病（TB）仍然是全球主要的健康负担，与其他病原体的共感染进一步复杂化了该传染病的诊断和治疗。本回顾性研究旨在评估纳米孔测序在识别由结核分枝杆菌（M.tb）和其他病原体引起的共感染的临床应用价值。

### 方法
选取2021年12月至2023年3月期间江西省胸科医院确诊的M.tb共感染患者进行回顾性分析。收集的数据包括人口学特征、症状、影像学检查结果、病原体诊断测试及治疗史。病原体检测方法包括培养、抗酸杆菌（AFB）涂片、Xpert MTB/RIF检测和纳米孔测序。

### 结果
纳入研究的患者包括20例M.tb共感染病例和3例非结核分枝杆菌（NTM）与其他病原体共感染病例。常见临床症状包括咳嗽（47.83%）、咳痰（34.78%）和哮喘（17.39%）。影像学检查显示肺结核典型特征，包括结节（73.91%）、索条影（34.78%）、空洞（34.78%）和肺部破坏表现（17.39%）。纳米孔测序在多数病例中检测到M.tb（86.96%），显著优于传统培养检测（39.13%）、AFB检测（27.27%）和Xpert MTB/RIF检测（53.84%）。值得注意的是，纳米孔测序揭示M.tb常与白色念珠菌、肺炎克雷伯菌和脓肿分枝杆菌共感染。详细描述了3例具有不同诊断和治疗特征的共感染病例，展示了TB共感染管理的复杂性以及纳米孔测序在精准诊断和指导个体化治疗方案中的潜力。

### 结论
基于纳米孔测序的宏基因组学方法可帮助临床医生识别TB共感染模式，及时制定合理的药物治疗方案。

title: Uncalled4 improves nanopore DNA and RNA modification detection via fast and accurate signal alignment
abstract: Nanopore signal analysis enables detection of nucleotide modifications from native DNA and RNA sequencing, providing both accurate genetic/transcriptomic and epigenetic information without additional library preparation. Presently, only a limited set of modifications can be directly basecalled (e.g. 5-methylcytosine), while most others require exploratory methods that often begin with alignment of nanopore signal to a nucleotide reference. We present Uncalled4, a toolkit for nanopore signal alignment, analysis, and visualization. Uncalled4 features an efficient banded signal alignment algorithm, BAM signal alignment file format, statistics for comparing signal alignment methods, and a reproducible de novo training method for k-mer-based pore models, revealing potential errors in ONTs state-of-the-art DNA model. We apply Uncalled4 to RNA 6-methyladenine (m6A) detection in seven human cell lines, identifying 26% more modifications than Nanopolish using m6Anet, including in several genes where m6A has known implications in cancer. Uncalled4 is available open-source at github.com/skovaka/uncalled4.
authors: Kovaka, S.; Hook, P. W.; Jenike, K. M.; Shivakumar, V.; Morina, L. B.; Razaghi, R.; Timp, W.; Schatz, M. C.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔信号分析技术能够从天然DNA和RNA测序中检测核苷酸修饰，提供遗传、转录组和表观遗传信息。现有方法仅能直接识别有限修饰（如5-甲基胞嘧啶），而Uncalled4工具包通过高效比对算法和新型分析方法，显著提升了修饰检测的准确性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔信号分析技术能够从天然DNA和RNA测序中检测核苷酸修饰，提供准确的遗传、转录组和表观遗传信息，无需额外的文库制备。目前仅能直接识别有限的修饰类型（如5-甲基胞嘧啶），而大多数修饰需要通过探索性方法检测，通常以纳米孔信号与核苷酸参考序列的比对为起点。我们开发了Uncalled4工具包，用于纳米孔信号的比对、分析和可视化。该工具包包含高效的带状信号比对算法、BAM信号比对文件格式、用于比较信号比对方法的统计工具，以及基于k-mer的孔模型从头训练方法，揭示了ONTs最新DNA模型的潜在误差。通过应用Uncalled4在七种人类细胞系中检测RNA 6-甲基腺嘌呤（m6A），相比使用m6Anet的Nanopolish方法，多识别了26%的修饰，包括在多个已知与癌症相关的基因中。Uncalled4工具包已开源至github.com/skovaka/uncalled4。

title: Unveiling microbial dynamics in lung adenocarcinoma and adjacent nontumor tissues: insights from nicotine exposure and diverse clinical stages via nanopore sequencing technology.
journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Lung is the largest mucosal area of the human body and directly connected to the external environment, facing microbial exposure and environmental stimuli. Therefore, studying the internal microorganisms of the lung is crucial for a deeper understanding of the relationship between microorganisms and the occurrence and progression of lung cancer.

METHODS: Tumor and adjacent nontumor tissues were collected from 38 lung adenocarcinoma patients and used nanopore sequencing technology to sequence the 16s full-length sequence of bacteria, and combining bioinformatics methods to identify and quantitatively analyze microorganisms in tissues, as well as to enrich the metabolic pathways of microorganisms.

RESULTS: the microbial composition in lung adenocarcinoma tissues is highly similar to that in adjacent tissues, but the alpha diversity is significantly lower than that in adjacent tissues. The difference analysis results show that the bacterial communities of 

CONCLUSION: Nanopore sequencing technology was performed on the full length 16s sequence, which preliminarily depicted the microbial changes and enrichment of microbial metabolic pathways in tumor and adjacent nontumor tissues. The relationship between nicotine exposure, tumor progression, and microorganisms was explored, providing a theoretical basis for the treatment of lung cancer through microbial targets.
authors: Kangli Yang, Shuaifeng Wang, Zheng Ding, Kai Zhang, Weiwei Zhu, Huifen Wang, Mengshu Pan, Xiangnan Li, Hongmin Wang, Zujiang Yu

ai.TLDR: 肺部作为人体最大的黏膜区域，直接接触外界环境，研究其微生物组对理解肺癌发生发展至关重要。通过纳米孔测序技术分析38例肺癌患者的肿瘤组织及邻近非肿瘤组织的16S全长序列，发现肿瘤组织微生物组成与邻近组织相似但α多样性显著降低，揭示了尼古丁暴露与肿瘤进展的微生物关联性。
ai.translation:
背景：肺是人体最大的黏膜区域，直接与外界环境相连，面临微生物暴露和环境刺激。因此，研究肺部内部微生物对于深入理解微生物与肺癌发生发展的关系至关重要。

方法：从38例肺腺癌患者中收集肿瘤组织及邻近非肿瘤组织，采用纳米孔测序技术对细菌的16S全长序列进行测序，并结合生物信息学方法对组织中的微生物进行鉴定、定量分析，同时丰富微生物的代谢通路。

结果：肺腺癌组织中的微生物组成与邻近组织高度相似，但α多样性显著低于邻近组织。差异分析结果表明，

结论：通过纳米孔测序技术对16S全长序列进行分析，初步描绘了肿瘤组织及邻近非肿瘤组织的微生物变化及微生物代谢通路的富集情况。探索了尼古丁暴露、肿瘤进展与微生物之间的关系，为通过微生物靶点治疗肺癌提供了理论依据。

title: A comparison between full-length 16S rRNA Oxford Nanopore sequencing and Illumina V3-V4 16S rRNA sequencing in head and neck cancer tissues
abstract:
IntroductionDescribing the microbial community within the tumour has been a key aspect in understanding the pathophysiology of the tumour microenvironment. In head and neck cancer (HNC), most studies on tissue samples have only performed 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) short-read sequencing (SRS) on V3-V5 region. SRS is mostly limited to genus level identification. In this study, we compared full-length 16S rRNA long-read sequencing (FL-ONT) from Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) to V3-V4 Illumina SRS (V3V4-Illumina). To date, this is the largest study using HNC tissues samples to perform FL-ONT of the 16S rRNA using ONT.

MethodsSequencing of the full-length and the V3-V4 16S rRNA region was conducted on tumour samples from 26 HNC patients, using ONT and Illumina technologies respectively. Paired sample analysis was applied to compare differences in diversities and abundance of microbial communities. Further validation was also performed using culture-based methods in 16 bacterial isolates obtained from 4 patients using MALDI-TOF MS.

ResultsWe observed similar alpha diversity indexes between FL-ONT and V3V4-Illumina technologies. However, beta-diversity was significantly different between techniques (PERMANOVA - R2 = 0.083, p < 0.0001). At higher taxonomic levels (Phylum to Family), all metrics were more similar among sequencing techniques, while lower taxonomy displayed more discrepancies. At higher taxonomic levels, correlation in microbial abundance from FL-ONT and V3V4-Illumina were higher, while this correlation decreased at lower levels. Finally, FL-ONT was able to identify more isolates at the species level that were identified using MALDI-TOF MS (81.3% v.s. 62.5%).

ConclusionsFL-ONT was able to identify lower taxonomic levels at a better resolution as compared to V3V4-Illumina 16S rRNA sequencing. Depending on application purposes, both methods are suitable for identification of microbial communities, with FL-ONT being more superior at species level.
authors: Yeo, K.; Connell, J.; Bouras, G.; Smith, E.; Murphy, W.; Hodge, J.-C.; Krishnan, S.; Wormald, P.-J.; Valentine, R.; Psaltis, A.; Vreugde, S.; Fenix, K.

ai.TLDR: 本研究对比了全长度16S rRNA长读长测序（FL-ONT）与传统V3V4-Illumina短读长测序在头颈癌（HNC）组织样本中的应用效果。结果显示FL-ONT在物种水平上能更精确识别微生物群落，尤其在低分类水平的分辨率上优于传统方法。
ai.translation:
引言：描述肿瘤内微生物群落已成为理解肿瘤微环境病理生理学的关键方面。在头颈癌（HNC）研究中，大多数组织样本研究仅对V3-V5区域进行了16S核糖体RNA（rRNA）短读长测序（SRS），且SRS主要局限于属水平鉴定。本研究比较了牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的全长度16S rRNA长读长测序（FL-ONT）与Illumina平台的V3-V4区域短读长测序（V3V4-Illumina），目前这是使用HNC组织样本进行ONT平台16S rRNA全长度测序的最大规模研究。

方法：使用ONT和Illumina技术分别对26例HNC患者肿瘤样本的全长度及V3-V4区域16S rRNA进行测序。采用配对样本分析比较微生物群落的多样性及丰度差异。进一步通过基于培养的方法验证了从4名患者中获得的16株细菌分离物的MALDI-TOF MS结果。

结果：我们观察到FL-ONT与V3V4-Illumina技术在α多样性指数上相似。然而，两种技术在β多样性上存在显著差异（PERMANOVA - R2 = 0.083, p < 0.0001）。在较高分类水平（门至科）上，所有指标在测序技术间更为相似，而低分类水平则显示更多差异。在较高分类水平上，FL-ONT与V3V4-Illumina的微生物丰度相关性更高，而在低分类水平相关性降低。最终，FL-ONT在物种水平上能识别更多通过MALDI-TOF MS鉴定的分离株（81.3% vs. 62.5%）。

结论：FL-ONT在较低分类水平的分辨率上优于V3V4-Illumina 16S rRNA测序。根据应用目的，两种方法均适合微生物群落鉴定，但FL-ONT在物种水平上更具优势。

title: A long-read sequencing strategy with overlapping linkers on adjacent fragments (OLAF-Seq) for targeted resequencing and enrichment
abstract: In this report, we present OLAF-Seq, a novel strategy to construct a long-read sequencing library such that adjacent fragments are linked with end-terminal duplications. We use the CRISPR-Cas9 nickase enzyme and a pool of multiple sgRNAs to perform non-random fragmentation of targeted long DNA molecules (> 300kb) into smaller library-sized fragments (about 20 kbp) in a manner so as to retain physical linkage information (up to 1000 bp) between adjacent fragments. DNA molecules targeted for fragmentation are preferentially ligated with adaptors for sequencing, so this method can enrich targeted regions while taking advantage of the long-read sequencing platforms. This enables the sequencing of target regions with significantly lower total coverage, and the genome sequence within linker regions provides information for assembly and phasing. We demonstrated the validity and efficacy of the method first using phage and then by sequencing a panel of 100 full-length cancer-related genes (including both exons and introns) in the human genome. When the designed linkers contained heterozygous genetic variants, long haplotypes could be established. This sequencing strategy can be readily applied in both PacBio and Oxford Nanopore platforms for both long and short genes with an easy protocol. This economically viable approach is useful for targeted enrichment of hundreds of target genomic regions and where long no-gap contigs need deep sequencing.
authors: Lahari Uppuluri, Christina Huan Shi, ... Ming Xiao
citation: Uppuluri, L., Shi, C.H., Varapula, D. et al. A long-read sequencing strategy with overlapping linkers on adjacent fragments (OLAF-Seq) for targeted resequencing and enrichment. Sci Rep 14 , 5583 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-56402-w

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出OLAF-Seq策略，通过CRISPR-Cas9 nickase酶和sgRNA实现长DNA分子的非随机片段化，保留相邻片段的物理链接信息（最长1000 bp）。该方法可显著降低靶向区域的总覆盖度需求，同时利用连接子区域的基因组序列辅助组装和相位分析。实验验证表明，该策略可有效构建全长癌症相关基因（含外显子和内含子）的测序库，并支持haplotype分析。
ai.translation: 本报告中，我们提出OLAF-Seq，一种新型长读长测序库构建策略，使相邻片段通过末端重复连接。我们利用CRISPR-Cas9 nickase酶和多个sgRNA的混合池，对目标长DNA分子（>300kb）进行非随机片段化，将其切割为约20kbp的库片段，同时保留相邻片段间的物理链接信息（最长可达1000 bp）。针对片段化的目标DNA分子优先连接测序接头，使该方法能够富集目标区域并利用长读长测序平台。这使得靶向区域的测序可显著降低总覆盖度需求，而连接子区域的基因组序列可提供组装和相位信息。我们首先通过噬菌体验证了该方法的有效性，随后对人类基因组中100个全长癌症相关基因（包括外显子和内含子）进行测序。当设计的连接子包含杂合遗传变异时，可建立长haplotype。该测序策略可便捷应用于PacBio和Oxford Nanopore平台，适用于长基因和短基因的测序，具有简便的实验流程。这种经济可行的方法适用于数百个目标基因组区域的靶向富集，以及需要深度测序的长无间隙contigs。

title: Nanopore sequencing of 1000 Genomes Project samples to build a comprehensive catalog of human genetic variation
abstract: Less than half of individuals with a suspected Mendelian condition receive a precise molecular diagnosis after comprehensive clinical genetic testing. Improvements in data quality and costs have heightened interest in using long-read sequencing (LRS) to streamline clinical genomic testing, but the absence of control datasets for variant filtering and prioritization has made tertiary analysis of LRS data challenging. To address this, the 1000 Genomes Project ONT Sequencing Consortium aims to generate LRS data from at least 800 of the 1000 Genomes Project samples. Our goal is to use LRS to identify a broader spectrum of variation so we may improve our understanding of normal patterns of human variation. Here, we present data from analysis of the first 100 samples, representing all 5 superpopulations and 19 subpopulations. These samples, sequenced to an average depth of coverage of 37x and sequence read N50 of 54 kbp, have high concordance with previous studies for identifying single nucleotide and indel variants outside of homopolymer regions. Using multiple structural variant (SV) callers, we identify an average of 24,543 high-confidence SVs per genome, including shared and private SVs likely to disrupt gene function as well as pathogenic expansions within disease-associated repeats that were not detected using short reads. Evaluation of methylation signatures revealed expected patterns at known imprinted loci, samples with skewed X-inactivation patterns, and novel differentially methylated regions. All raw sequencing data, processed data, and summary statistics are publicly available, providing a valuable resource for the clinical genetics community to discover pathogenic SVs.
authors: Gustafson, J. A.; Gibson, S. B.; Damaraju, N.; Zalusky, M. P.; Hoekzema, K.; Twesigomwe, D.; Yang, L.; Snead, A. A.; Richmond, P. A.; De Coster, W.; Olson, N. D.; Guarracino, A.; Li, Q.; Miller, A. L.; Goffena, J.; Anderson, Z.; Storz, S. H.; Ward, S. A.; Sinha, M.; Gonzaga-Jauregui, C.; Clarke, W. E.; Basile, A. O.; Corvelo, A.; Reeves, C. E.; Helland, A.; Musunuri, R. L.; Revsine, M.; Patterson, K. E.; Paschal, C.; Zakarian, C.; Goodwin, S.; Jensen, T. D.; Robb, E.; 1000 Genomes ONT Sequencing Consortium,  ; University of Washington Center for Rare Disease Research (UW-CRDR),  ; Genomics Res

ai.TLDR: 目前不到一半的疑似孟德尔疾病的患者通过全面临床基因检测获得精确的分子诊断。长读长测序（LRS）因数据质量和成本优势受到关注，但缺乏控制数据集限制了其三级分析。本研究通过分析1000 Genomes项目前100个样本，展示了LRS在识别结构变异和甲基化模式方面的潜力，为临床遗传学提供重要资源。
ai.translation: 在全面临床基因检测后，疑似孟德尔疾病的个体中不到一半能获得精确的分子诊断。尽管长读长测序（LRS）在数据质量和成本方面取得进展，但缺乏用于变异过滤和优先级排序的控制数据集，使得LRS数据的三级分析面临挑战。为解决这一问题，1000 Genomes项目ONT测序联盟旨在从1000个样本中至少生成800个的LRS数据。我们的目标是利用LRS识别更广泛的变异，以加深对人类正常变异模式的理解。本文展示了对前100个样本的分析结果，这些样本涵盖全部5个超级人群和19个子人群。样本平均覆盖深度为37倍，序列读取N50为54 kbp，其在识别非同聚物区域外的单核苷酸和插入缺失变异方面与先前研究高度一致。通过多种结构变异检测工具，我们每个基因组平均鉴定出24,543个高置信度的结构变异，包括可能干扰基因功能的共有和私有变异，以及短读长无法检测到的疾病相关重复区域中的致病性扩展。甲基化特征评估揭示了已知印记位点的预期模式、X失活模式偏倚样本以及新的差异甲基化区域。所有原始测序数据、处理数据和汇总统计信息均公开可用，为临床遗传学界发现致病性结构变异提供了宝贵资源。

title: Nanopore DNA sequencing technologies and their applications towards single-molecule proteomics
abstract:
Sequencing of nucleic acids with nanopores has emerged as a powerful tool offering rapid readout, high accuracy, low cost and portability. This label-free method for sequencing at the single-molecule level is an achievement on its own. However, nanopores also show promise for the technologically even more challenging sequencing of polypeptides, something that could considerably benefit biological discovery, clinical diagnostics and homeland security, as current techniques lack portability and speed. Here we survey the biochemical innovations underpinning commercial and academic nanopore DNA/RNA sequencing techniques, and explore how these advances can fuel developments in future protein sequencing with nanopores.

authors: Adam Dorey, Stefan Howorka
