ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术已成为核酸测序的有力工具，具备快速读取、高精度、低成本和便携性优势。该技术在单分子水平实现无标签测序已属突破，但其在多肽测序中的应用潜力更值得期待，有望推动生物发现、临床诊断和国家安全领域的发展。
ai.translation: 利用纳米孔进行核酸测序已发展为一种强大的工具，能够实现快速读取、高精度、低成本和便携性。这种无需标记的单分子水平测序方法本身就是一个重要突破。然而，纳米孔技术同样展现出在更复杂的技术挑战——多肽测序中的应用潜力。这种技术有望显著促进生物发现、临床诊断和国家安全领域的发展，因为当前技术在便携性和速度方面存在不足。本文综述了支撑商业和学术领域纳米孔DNA/RNA测序技术的生化创新，并探讨这些进展如何推动未来纳米孔蛋白质测序技术的发展。

title: Nanopore sequencing with unique molecular identifiers enables accurate mutation analysis and haplotyping in the complex Lipoprotein(a) KIV-2 VNTR
abstract:
BackgroundRepetitive genome regions, such as variable number of tandem repeats (VNTR) or short tandem repeats (STR), are major constituents of the uncharted dark genome and evade conventional sequencing approaches. The protein-coding LPA kringle IV type-2 (KIV-2) VNTR (5.6 kb per unit, 1-40 units per allele) is a medically highly relevant example with a particularly intricate structure, multiple haplotypes, intragenic homologies and an intra-VNTR STR. It is the primary regulator of plasma lipoprotein(a) [Lp(a)] concentrations, an important cardiovascular risk factor. However, despite Lp(a) variance is mostly genetically determined, Lp(a) concentrations vary widely between individuals and ancestries. This VNTR region hides multiple causal variants and functional haplotypes.

MethodsWe evaluated the performance of amplicon-based nanopore sequencing with unique molecular identifiers (UMI-ONT-Seq) for SNP detection, haplotype mapping, VNTR unit consensus sequence generation and copy number estimation via coverage-corrected haplotypes quantification in the KIV-2 VNTR. We used 15 human samples and low-level mixtures (0.5% to 5%) of KIV-2 plasmids as a validation set. We then applied UMI-ONT-Seq to extract KIV-2 VNTR haplotypes in 48 multi-ancestry 1000-Genome samples and analyzed at scale a poorly characterized STR within the KIV-2 VNTR.

ResultsUMI-ONT-Seq detected KIV-2 SNPs down to 1% variant level with high sensitivity, specificity and precision (0.977{+/-}0.018; 1.000{+/-}0.0005; 0.993{+/-}0.02) and accurately retrieved the full-length haplotype of each VNTR unit. Human variant levels were highly correlated with next-generation sequencing (R2=0.983) without bias across the whole variant level range. Six reads per UMI produced sequences of each KIV-2 unit with Q40-quality. The KIV-2 repeat number determined by coverage-corrected unique haplotype counting was in close agreement with droplet digital PCR (ddPCR), with 70% of the samples falling even within the narrow confidence interval of ddPCR. We then analyzed 62,679 intra-KIV-2 STR sequences and identified ancestry-specific STR patterns. Finally, we characterized the KIV-2 haplotype patterns across multiple ancestries.

ConclusionsUMI-ONT-Seq accurately retrieves the SNP haplotype and precisely quantifies the VNTR copy number of each repeat unit of the complex KIV-2 VNTR region across multiple ancestries. This study utilizes the KIV-2 VNTR, presenting a novel and potent tool for comprehensive characterization of medically relevant complex genome regions at scale.
authors: Amstler, S.; Streiter, G.; Pfurtscheller, C.; Forer, L.; Di Maio, S.; Weissensteiner, H.; Paulweber, B.; Schoenherr, S.; Kronenberg, F.; Coassin, S.

ai.TLDR: 重复基因组区域（如VNTR/STR）因结构复杂难以通过传统测序技术解析。本研究通过UMI-ONT-Seq技术实现了KIV-2 VNTR区域SNP检测、等位基因图谱构建及拷贝数精准量化，灵敏度达1%变异水平，且与ddPCR结果高度一致。该方法为大规模分析医学相关复杂基因组区域提供了新工具。
ai.translation:
背景：重复基因组区域，如可变数量串联重复（VNTR）或短串联重复（STR），是未被探索的暗基因组主要组成部分，传统测序方法难以解析。蛋白编码LPA kringle IV type-2（KIV-2）VNTR（每单位5.6 kb，等位基因1-40单位）是具有复杂结构、多等位基因、基因内同源性和内VNTR STR的医学高度相关实例。它是血浆脂蛋白(a)[Lp(a)]浓度的主要调节因子，重要心血管风险因子。然而，尽管Lp(a)变异主要由遗传决定，个体间Lp(a)浓度差异显著。该VNTR区域隐藏多个致病变异和功能等位基因。

方法：我们评估了基于扩增子的纳米孔测序（UMI-ONT-Seq）在KIV-2 VNTR中通过覆盖校正等位基因量化实现SNP检测、等位基因图谱构建、VNTR单位共识序列生成和拷贝数估计的性能。使用15个人类样本和低水平混合（0.5%-5%）KIV-2质粒作为验证集。随后应用UMI-ONT-Seq提取48个多祖先1000-Genome样本中的KIV-2 VNTR等位基因，并大规模分析该VNTR内未充分研究的STR。

结果：UMI-ONT-Seq在1%变异水平下检测KIV-2 SNP具有高灵敏度、特异性和精确度（0.977±0.018；1.000±0.0005；0.993±0.02），准确获取每个VNTR单位全长等位基因。人类变异水平与下一代测序高度相关（R²=0.983），整个变异水平范围内无偏差。每UMI产生6条读取，获得每个KIV-2单位Q40质量序列。通过覆盖校正唯一等位基因计数确定的KIV-2重复数与数字滴定PCR（ddPCR）高度一致，70%样本甚至落在ddPCR狭窄置信区间内。随后分析了62,679个内KIV-2 STR序列，识别出祖先特异性STR模式。最后，表征了多祖先群体中的KIV-2等位基因模式。

结论：UMI-ONT-Seq准确获取复杂KIV-2 VNTR区域多祖先群体的SNP等位基因，并精准量化每个重复单位的VNTR拷贝数。本研究利用KIV-2 VNTR，呈现了一种新型高效工具，可大规模全面解析医学相关复杂基因组区域。

title: High-coverage nanopore sequencing of samples from the 1000 Genomes Project to build a comprehensive catalog of human genetic variation.
abstract: Fewer than half of individuals with a suspected Mendelian or monogenic condition receive a precise molecular diagnosis after comprehensive clinical genetic testing. Improvements in data quality and costs have heightened interest in using long-read sequencing (LRS) to streamline clinical genomic testing, but the absence of control data sets for variant filtering and prioritization has made tertiary analysis of LRS data challenging. To address this, the 1000 Genomes Project (1KGP) Oxford Nanopore Technologies Sequencing Consortium aims to generate LRS data from at least 800 of the 1KGP samples. Our goal is to use LRS to identify a broader spectrum of variation so we may improve our understanding of normal patterns of human variation. Here, we present data from analysis of the first 100 samples, representing all 5 superpopulations and 19 subpopulations. These samples, sequenced to an average depth of coverage of 37× and sequence read N50 of 54 kbp, have high concordance with previous studies for identifying single nucleotide and indel variants outside of homopolymer regions. Using multiple structural variant (SV) callers, we identify an average of 24,543 high-confidence SVs per genome, including shared and private SVs likely to disrupt gene function as well as pathogenic expansions within disease-associated repeats that were not detected using short reads. Evaluation of methylation signatures revealed expected patterns at known imprinted loci, samples with skewed X-inactivation patterns, and novel differentially methylated regions. All raw sequencing data, processed data, and summary statistics are publicly available, providing a valuable resource for the clinical genetics community to discover pathogenic SVs.
authors: Jonas A Gustafson, Sophia B Gibson, Nikhita Damaraju, Miranda P G Zalusky, Kendra Hoekzema, David Twesigomwe, Lei Yang, Anthony A Snead, Phillip A Richmond, Wouter De Coster, Nathan D Olson, Andrea Guarracino, Qiuhui Li, Angela L Miller, Joy Goffena, Zachary B Anderson, Sophie H R Storz, Sydney A Ward, Maisha Sinha, Claudia Gonzaga-Jauregui, Wayne E Clarke, Anna O Basile, André Corvelo, Catherine Reeves, Adrienne Helland, Rajeeva Lochan Musunuri, Mahler Revsine, Karynne E Patterson, Cate R Paschal, Christina Zakarian, Sara Goodwin, Tanner D Jensen, Esther Robb, William Richard McCombie, Fritz J Sedlazeck, Justin M Zook, Stephen B Montgomery, Erik Garrison, Mikhail Kolmogorov, Michael C Schatz, Richard N McLaughlin, Harriet Dashnow, Michael C Zody, Matt Loose, Miten Jain, Evan E Eichler, Danny E Miller

ai.TLDR: 目前不到一半的疑似孟德尔或单基因疾病的患者通过全面临床基因检测未能获得精确的分子诊断。长读长测序（LRS）因数据质量和成本的提升而受到关注，但缺乏控制数据集导致变异过滤和优先级评估困难。1000 Genomes项目通过分析前100个样本，展示了LRS在识别更广泛变异谱方面的潜力。
ai.translation: 在全面临床基因检测后，疑似孟德尔或单基因疾病的个体中不到一半能获得精确的分子诊断。尽管长读长测序（LRS）因数据质量和成本的提升而受到关注，但缺乏用于变异过滤和优先级评估的控制数据集，使得LRS数据的三级分析面临挑战。为解决这一问题，1000 Genomes项目（1KGP）的Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序联盟旨在从至少800个1KGP样本中生成LRS数据。我们的目标是利用LRS识别更广泛的变异谱，以加深对人类正常变异模式的理解。本文展示了前100个样本的分析数据，涵盖所有5个超级人群和19个子人群。这些样本平均覆盖深度为37×，序列读段N50为54 kbp，与以往研究在非同聚物区域的单核苷酸和插入缺失变异识别上高度一致。通过多种结构变异（SV）检测工具，我们每个基因组平均识别出24,543个高置信度SV，包括可能破坏基因功能的共有和私有SV，以及短读长无法检测到的与疾病相关重复区域中的致病性扩展。甲基化信号评估揭示了已知印记位点的预期模式、X失活模式偏倚样本以及新型差异甲基化区域。所有原始测序数据、处理数据和汇总统计信息均公开可用，为临床遗传学界发现致病性SV提供了宝贵资源。

title: Resolving complex duplication variants in autism spectrum disorder using long-read genome sequencing.
abstract: Rare or de novo structural variation, primarily in the form of copy number variants, is detected in 5%-10% of autism spectrum disorder (ASD) families. While complex structural variants involving duplications can generally be detected using microarray or short-read genome sequencing (GS), these methods frequently fail to characterize breakpoints at nucleotide resolution, requiring additional molecular methods for validation and fine-mapping. Here, we use Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION long-read GS to characterize complex genomic rearrangements (CGRs) involving large duplications that segregate with ASD in five families. In total, we investigated 13 CGR carriers and were able to resolve all breakpoint junctions at nucleotide resolution. While all breakpoints were identified, the precise genomic architecture of one rearrangement remained unresolved with three different potential structures. The findings in two families include potential fusion genes formed through duplication rearrangements, involving
authors: Jesper Eisfeldt, Edward J Higginbotham, Felix Lenner, Jennifer Howe, Bridget A Fernandez, Anna Lindstrand, Stephen W Scherer, Lars Feuk

ai.TLDR: 研究利用长读长基因组测序技术解析了与自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）相关的复杂基因组重排。现有短读长测序方法无法精确解析结构变异断点，而长读长技术成功识别了13个携带者的全部断点，但部分重组结构仍存在解析困难。
ai.translation: 罕见或新发的结构变异，主要以拷贝数变异（Copy Number Variants, CNVs）形式存在，在5%-10%的自闭症谱系障碍（Autism Spectrum Disorder, ASD）家庭中被检测到。尽管微阵列或短读长基因组测序（Genome Sequencing, GS）技术能够检测涉及重复的复杂结构变异，但这些方法通常无法在核苷酸水平解析断点，需要额外的分子方法进行验证和精细定位。本研究采用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）PromethION长读长基因组测序技术，对五个ASD相关家庭中与疾病共分离的大型重复变异进行解析。共分析了13个复杂基因组重排（Complex Genomic Rearrangements, CGRs）携带者，成功在核苷酸水平解析了所有断点连接区域。尽管所有断点均被识别，但其中一种重组的精确基因组结构在三种潜在结构模型中仍未明确。在两个家庭的研究中发现了通过重复重组形成的潜在融合基因，涉及...

title: Deciphering mixed infections by plant RNA virus and reconstructing complete genomes simultaneously present within-host
abstract:
The local co-circulation of multiple phylogenetic lineages is particularly likely for rapidly evolving pathogens in the current globalization context. When various phylogenetic lineages co-occur in the same fields, they may simultaneously be present in the same host plant (i.e. mixed infection), with potential important consequences for disease outcome. This is the case in Burkina Faso for the rice yellow mottle virus (RYMV), endemic to Africa, where it constitutes a major constraint to rice production.

We aimed at deciphering the distinct RYMV isolates simultaneously infecting a single rice plant and sequencing their genomes. To this purpose, we tested various sequencing strategies, and we finally combined direct cDNA ONT (Oxford Nanopore Technology) sequencing with the bioinformatics tool RVhaplo. This methodology was validated though the successful reconstruction of two viral genomes distant from as less as a hundred nucleotides (out of 4450nt length genome, i.e. 2-3%), and present within artificial mixes at up to a 99/1 ratio. Then, we used this method to subsequently analyze mixed infections from field samples, revealing up to three RYMV isolates within one single rice plant sample from Burkina Faso. In most cases, the complete genome sequences were obtained, which is particularly important to better estimate the viral diversity and permits to detect recombination events.

The described methodology consequently allows to identify various haplotypes of RYMV simultaneously infecting a single rice plant, obtain their full-length sequences, as well as a rough estimate of relative frequencies within the sample. It is efficient, cost-effective, as well as portable, so that it could further be implemented where RYMV is endemic. Perspectives include to decipher mixed infections involving other RNA viruses threatening crop production worldwide.
authors: BANGRATZ, M.; COMTE, A.; BILLARD, E.; GUIGMA, A. K.; GANDOLFI, G.; KASSANKOGNO, A. I.; SEREME, D.; POULICARD, N.; TOLLENAERE, C.

ai.TLDR: 在全球化背景下，快速演化的病原体在局部地区共循环的多个系统发育谱系可能导致混合感染，影响疾病结果。本研究通过结合ONT测序与RVhaplo工具，成功解析了单个水稻植株中同时感染的多个RYMV分离株，实现了基因组全长测序及频率估算。
ai.translation: 在当前全球化背景下，快速演化的病原体在局部地区共循环的多个系统发育谱系尤为常见。当不同系统发育谱系同时存在于同一环境中时，可能在同一种宿主植物（即混合感染）中同时存在，这可能对疾病结果产生重要影响。这种情况在布基纳法索的稻黄条病毒（RYMV）中尤为典型，该病毒是非洲特有的，对水稻生产构成主要限制。本研究旨在解析同时感染单个水稻植株的RYMV分离株并对其基因组进行测序。为此，我们测试了多种测序策略，最终结合直接cDNA ONT（牛津纳米孔技术）测序与RVhaplo生物信息学工具。该方法通过成功重建两个基因组（距离仅数百个核苷酸，占全长4450nt的2-3%）并存在于人工混合物中（最高99/1比例）得到验证。随后，我们利用该方法分析田间样本的混合感染，发现布基纳法索单个水稻植株样本中最多存在三个RYMV分离株。大多数情况下获得了完整的基因组序列，这对于更准确估计病毒多样性并检测重组事件尤为重要。所描述的方法因此能够识别同时感染单个水稻植株的多种RYMV单倍型，获取其全长序列，并对样本中的相对频率进行粗略估算。该方法高效、成本低且便携，可进一步在RYMV流行地区应用。未来方向包括解析涉及其他威胁全球作物生产的RNA病毒的混合感染。

title: Latest RNA and DNA nanopore sequencing allows for rapid avian influenza profiling
abstract:
Avian influenza virus (AIV) currently causes a panzootic with extensive mortality in wild birds, poultry, and wild mammals, thus posing a major threat to global health and underscoring the need for efficient monitoring of its distribution and evolution. Here, we utilized a well-defined AIV strain to systematically investigate AIV characterization through rapid, portable nanopore sequencing by (i) benchmarking the performance of fully portable RNA extraction and viral detection; (ii) comparing the latest DNA and RNA nanopore sequencing approaches for in-depth AIV profiling; and (iii) evaluating the performance of various computational pipelines for viral consensus sequence creation and phylogenetic analysis. Our results show that the latest RNA-specific nanopores can accurately genomically profile AIV from native RNA while additionally detecting RNA epigenetic modifications. We further identified an optimal laboratory and bioinformatic pipeline for reconstructing viral consensus genomes from nanopore sequencing data at various rarefaction thresholds, which we validated by application to real-world environmental samples for AIV monitoring in livestock.

Author SummaryWe tested portable, rapid, and easy-to-use technology to obtain more information about the potentially zoonotic RNA virus avian influenza virus, or AIV. AIV has spread globally via the migratory paths of wild birds, and endangers domestic birds, mammals, and human populations given past evidence of infections of different animal species. We here used novel genomic technology that is based on nanopores to explore the genomes of the virus; we established optimized ways of creating the viral genome by comparing different laboratory and computational approaches and the performance of nanopores that either sequence the viral RNA directly or the converted DNA. We then applied the optimized protocol to dust samples which were collected from a duck farm in France during an AIV outbreak. We showed that we were able to use the resulting data to reconstruct the relationship between the virus responsible for the outbreak and previously detected AIV. Altogether, we showed how novel easy-to-use genomic technology can support the surveillance of potentially zoonotic pathogens by accurately recreating the viral genomes to better understand evolution and transmission of these pathogens.
authors: Perlas, A.; Reska, T.; CROVILLE, G.; Tarres-Freixas, F.; Guerin, J.-L.; Majo, N.; Urban, L.

ai.TLDR: 禽流感病毒（AIV）目前在全球范围内引发大规模疫情，威胁动物和人类健康。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术，系统评估了病毒基因组分析方法，实现了对AIV的精准检测及表观遗传修饰识别。研究结果为AIV监测提供了高效、便携的检测方案，验证了其在实际环境样本中的应用价值。
ai.translation:
禽流感病毒（AIV）目前在全球范围内引发大规模疫情，导致野生鸟类、家禽及野生动物大量死亡，对全球健康构成重大威胁，凸显了对其分布和进化进行高效监测的迫切需求。本研究采用明确定义的AIV菌株，通过快速便携的纳米孔测序技术，系统性地开展AIV特征分析：(i) 评估完全便携式RNA提取和病毒检测的性能；(ii) 比较最新DNA和RNA纳米孔测序方法对AIV深度分析的能力；(iii) 评估多种计算流程在病毒共识序列构建和系统发育分析中的表现。研究结果表明，最新的RNA特异性纳米孔可准确从天然RNA中进行基因组分析，同时还能检测RNA表观遗传修饰。我们进一步确定了适用于不同稀释阈值下从纳米孔测序数据中重建病毒共识基因组的最优实验室和生物信息学流程，并通过实际环境样本验证了该方法在畜牧业AIV监测中的应用价值。

作者摘要：我们测试了便携、快速且易于使用的技术，以获取关于潜在人畜共通RNA病毒禽流感病毒（AIV）的更多信息。AIV通过野生鸟类的迁徙路径在全球传播，威胁家禽、哺乳动物和人类群体，鉴于过去不同动物物种感染的证据。我们采用基于纳米孔的新型基因组技术探索病毒基因组；通过比较不同实验室和计算方法及纳米孔性能（直接测序病毒RNA或转换后的DNA），建立了优化的病毒基因组构建方法。随后，我们将优化的协议应用于法国鸭场AIV爆发期间收集的粉尘样本。我们展示了如何利用所得数据重建爆发病毒与先前检测AIV之间的关系。总体而言，我们展示了新型易用基因组技术如何通过准确重建病毒基因组支持潜在人畜共通病原体的监测，以更好地理解这些病原体的进化和传播。

title: Nanopore targeted sequencing-based diagnosis of central nervous system infections in HIV-infected patients
journal: Annals of Clinical Microbiology and Antimicrobials
abstract:
### Background

Early and accurate etiological diagnosis is very important for improving the prognosis of central nervous system (CNS) infections in human immunodeficiency virus (HIV)-infected patients. The goal is not easily achieved by conventional microbiological tests. We developed a nanopore targeted sequencing (NTS) platform and evaluated the diagnostic performance for CNS infections in HIV-infected patients, with special focus on cryptococcal meningitis (CM). We compared the CM diagnostic performance of NTS with conventional methods and cryptococcal polymerase chain reaction (PCR).

### Methods

This study included 57 hospitalized HIV-infected patients with suspected CNS infections from September 2018 to March 2022. The diagnosis established during hospitalization includes 27 cases of CM, 13 CNS tuberculosis, 5 toxoplasma encephalitis, 2 cytomegalovirus (CMV) encephalitis and 1 Varicella-zoster virus (VZV) encephalitis. The 2 cases of CMV encephalitis also have co-existing CM. Target-specific PCR amplification was used to enrich pathogen sequences before nanopore sequencing. NTS was performed on stored cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) samples and the results were compared with the diagnosis during hospitalization.

### Results

53 (93.0%) of the patients were male. The median CD4 cell count was 25.0 (IQR: 14.0–63.0) cells/uL. The sensitivities of CSF culture, India ink staining, cryptococcal PCR and NTS for CM were 70.4% (95%CI: 51.5 − 84.1%), 76.0% (95%CI: 56.6 − 88.5%), 77.8% (59.2 − 89.4%) and 85.2% (95%CI: 67.5 − 94.1%), respectively. All those methods had 100% specificity for CM. Our NTS platform could identify Cryptococcus at species level. Moreover, NTS was also able to identify all the 5 cases of toxoplasma encephalitis, 2 cases of CMV encephalitis and 1 VZV encephalitis. However, only 1 of 13 CNS tuberculosis cases was diagnosed by NTS, and so did Xpert MTB/RIF assay.

### Conclusions

NTS has a good diagnostic performance for CM in HIV-infected patients and may have the ability of simultaneously detecting other pathogens, including mixed infections. With continuing improving of the NTS platform, it may be a promising alterative microbiological test for assisting with the diagnosis of CNS infections.
authors: Xihong Yang, Shuilian Zhou, ... Zhiliang Hu
citation: Yang, X., Zhou, S., Chang, Z. et al. Nanopore targeted sequencing-based diagnosis of central nervous system infections in HIV-infected patients. Ann Clin Microbiol Antimicrob 23 , 22 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12941-024-00682-7
description: Early and accurate etiological diagnosis is very important for improving the prognosis of central nervous system (CNS) infections in human...

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)平台，用于HIV感染患者中枢神经系统(CNS)感染的诊断，重点评估其对隐球菌性脑膜炎(CM)的诊断效果。结果显示NTS在CM检测中敏感性达85.2%，且能同时检测多种病原体，可能成为传统微生物检测的有力替代方案。
ai.translation:
背景：早期准确的病因诊断对改善人类免疫缺陷病毒(HIV)感染患者中枢神经系统(CNS)感染预后至关重要。传统微生物学检测难以实现该目标。我们开发了纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)平台，评估其在HIV感染患者CNS感染诊断中的表现，特别关注隐球菌性脑膜炎(CM)。比较了NTS与传统方法及隐球菌聚合酶链反应(PCR)在CM诊断中的效果。

方法：本研究纳入了2018年9月至2022年3月期间住院的57例疑似CNS感染的HIV感染患者。住院期间确诊的病例包括27例隐球菌性脑膜炎、13例CNS结核、5例弓形虫脑炎、2例巨细胞病毒(CMV)脑炎和1例水痘-带状疱疹病毒(VZV)脑炎。2例CMV脑炎患者同时存在隐球菌性脑膜炎。在纳米孔测序前采用靶向PCR扩增富集病原体序列。NTS在储存的脑脊液(CSF)样本上进行，结果与住院期间诊断进行对比。

结果：53例(93.0%)患者为男性，中位CD4细胞计数为25.0(四分位数范围：14.0–63.0)细胞/uL。CSF培养、墨水染色、隐球菌PCR和NTS对CM的敏感性分别为70.4%(95%CI: 51.5 − 84.1%)、76.0%(95%CI: 56.6 − 88.5%)、77.8%(59.2 − 89.4%)和85.2%(95%CI: 67.5 − 94.1%)，所有方法对CM均具有100%特异性。NTS平台可识别至隐球菌种属水平。此外，NTS还能检出全部5例弓形虫脑炎、2例CMV脑炎和1例VZV脑炎。但仅1/13例CNS结核病例通过NTS诊断，Xpert MTB/RIF检测结果相同。

结论：NTS在HIV感染患者隐球菌性脑膜炎诊断中表现良好，可能具备同时检测其他病原体（包括混合感染）的能力。随着NTS平台的持续优化，其可能成为辅助诊断CNS感染的有前景的微生物学检测方法。

title: Decoupled degradation and translation enables noise-modulation by poly(A)-tails
abstract: Poly(A)-tails are crucial for mRNA translation and degradation, but the exact relationship between tail length and mRNA kinetics remains unclear. Here we employ a small library of identical mRNAs that differ only in their poly(A)-tail length to examine their behavior in human embryonic kidney cells. We find that tail length strongly correlates with mRNA degradation rates, but is decoupled from translation. Interestingly, an optimal tail length of [~]100 nucleotides displays the highest translation rate, which is identical to the average endogenous tail length measured by nanopore sequencing. Furthermore, poly(A)-tail length variability--a feature of endogenous mRNAs--impacts translation efficiency but not mRNA degradation rates. Stochastic modelling combined with single-cell tracking reveals that poly(A)-tails provide cells with an independent handle to tune gene expression fluctuations by decoupling mRNA degradation and translation. Together, this work contributes to the basic understanding of gene expression regulation and has potential applications in nucleic acid therapeutics.
authors: Grandi, C.; Emmaneel, M.; Nelissen, F. H. T.; Roosenboom, L. W. M.; Petrova, Y.; Elzokla, O.; Hansen, M. M. K.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了poly(A)尾长对mRNA降解率的显著影响，但发现其与翻译效率存在脱钩现象。通过构建不同尾长的mRNA库，发现约100个核苷酸的尾长可实现最高翻译效率，这一结果与内源性mRNA的纳米孔测序数据一致。
ai.translation: Poly(A)-尾部对mRNA的翻译和降解至关重要，但尾长与mRNA动力学的精确关系仍不清楚。本研究采用仅在poly(A)-尾部长度上存在差异的同源mRNA小库，考察其在人类胚胎肾细胞中的行为。结果发现尾长与mRNA降解速率存在强相关性，但与翻译过程脱钩。有趣的是，约100个核苷酸的最优尾长表现出最高翻译速率，这一数值与通过纳米孔测序测得的内源性尾长平均值一致。进一步发现，poly(A)-尾长的变异（内源性mRNA的特征）影响翻译效率但不影响mRNA降解速率。结合随机建模与单细胞追踪的分析表明，poly(A)-尾部为细胞提供了独立调节基因表达波动的手段，通过解耦mRNA降解与翻译过程实现。本研究深化了对基因表达调控的基本认知，并为核酸治疗提供了潜在应用方向。

title: NanoMGT: Marker gene typing of low complexity mono-species metagenomic samples using noisy long reads.
abstract: Rapid advancements in sequencing technologies have led to significant progress in microbial genomics, yet challenges persist in accurately identifying microbial strain diversity in metagenomic samples, especially when working with noisy long-read data from platforms like Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT). In this article, we introduce NanoMGT, a tool designed to enhance marker gene typing in low-complexity mono-species samples, leveraging the unique properties of long reads. NanoMGT excels in its ability to accurately identify mutations amidst high error rates, ensuring the reliable detection of multiple strain-specific marker genes. Our tool implements a novel scoring system that rewards mutations co-occurring across different reads and penalizes densely grouped, likely erroneous variants, thereby achieving a good balance between sensitivity and precision. A comparative evaluation of NanoMGT, using a simulated multi-strain sample of seven bacterial species, demonstrated superior performance relative to existing tools and the advantages of using a threshold-based filtering approach to calling minority variants in ONT's sequencing data. NanoMGT's potential as a post-binning tool in metagenomic pipelines is particularly notable, enabling researchers to more accurately determine specific alleles and understand strain diversity in microbial communities. Our findings have significant implications for clinical diagnostics, environmental microbiology, and the broader field of genomics. The findings offer a reliable and efficient approach to marker gene typing in complex metagenomic samples.
authors: Malte B Hallgren, Philip T L C Clausen, Frank M Aarestrup

ai.TLDR: 随着测序技术的快速发展，微生物基因组学取得显著进展，但现有工具在处理长读长数据时仍存在识别菌株多样性困难。NanoMGT通过创新的评分系统，在低复杂度单菌种样本中实现高精度标记基因分型，其阈值过滤方法在ONT数据中表现出优于现有工具的性能。
ai.translation: 测序技术的快速发展推动了微生物基因组学的显著进展，但准确识别宏基因组样本中微生物菌株多样性仍面临挑战，尤其是在处理Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）等平台产生的噪声长读长数据时。本文介绍了一种名为NanoMGT的工具，该工具通过利用长读长数据的独特特性，旨在增强低复杂度单菌种样本的标记基因分型能力。NanoMGT在高错误率环境下仍能准确识别突变，确保多菌株特异性标记基因的可靠检测。该工具采用了一种创新的评分系统，对不同读段中共现的突变进行奖励，对密集分布的可能错误变异进行惩罚，从而在灵敏度和精确度之间取得良好平衡。通过对比评估NanoMGT在模拟的七种细菌多菌株样本中的表现，结果表明其性能优于现有工具，验证了基于阈值过滤方法在ONT测序数据中识别少数变异的优势。NanoMGT作为宏基因组分析流程中的后分箱工具展现出显著潜力，使研究人员能够更精确地确定特异性等位基因并理解微生物群落的菌株多样性。研究结果对临床诊断、环境微生物学及基因组学领域具有重要影响，为复杂宏基因组样本的标记基因分型提供了可靠高效的解决方案。

title: Nanopore targeted sequencing identifies pathogens in patients with postoperative endophthalmitis.
abstract:
AIM: To estimate if nanopore targeted sequencing (NTS) could identify pathogens causing postoperative endophthalmitis and further determine the feasibility of clinical application of NTS.

METHODS: A total of 55 patients (55 eyes) with postoperative endophthalmitis were retrospectively included in this study with their medical records. Intraocular fluid samples were examined by NTS and microbial culture. All included patients had undergone examinations including measurement of best corrected visual acuity (BCVA) and intraocular pressure (IOP), slit-lamp biomicroscopy, and indirect ophthalmoscopy; additionally, they underwent B-ultrasound, anterior segment photography, and fundus photography if necessary.

RESULTS: Among 55 patients with postoperative endophthalmitis, the age was 65.25±15.04y and there were 30 female (54.54%) patients. Forty-one (74.54%) vitreous humor samples and fourteen (25.45%) aqueous humor samples were sent for both NTS and microbial culture. NTS had a notable higher detection rate than microbial culture in detecting pathogens (90.91% 

CONCLUSION: NTS can provide rapid identification and highly sensitive detection of pathogens among patients with postoperative endophthalmitis, which can guide anti-infection treatment and improve visual prognosis.
authors: Xin-Lei Hao, Man Yuan, Ming Wang, Ai-Si Fu, Jia-Shuang Gu, Bing-Qian Yang, Wei Jin, An-Huai Yang

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)在术后眼内炎病原体检测中的应用价值，结果显示NTS在病原体检测灵敏度上显著优于传统微生物培养。该技术可为抗感染治疗提供快速诊断依据，有望改善患者视觉预后。
ai.translation: 目的：评估纳米孔靶向测序(NTS)是否能够识别导致术后眼内炎的病原体，并进一步确定NTS在临床应用中的可行性。方法：回顾性纳入55例(55眼)术后眼内炎患者的病历资料，对其房水和玻璃体样本进行NTS检测和微生物培养。所有患者均接受最佳矫正视力(BCVA)、眼内压(IOP)、裂隙灯显微镜检查、间接检眼镜检查；必要时进行B超、前段光学相干断层扫描和视网膜摄影。结果：55例术后眼内炎患者中，平均年龄65.25±15.04岁，女性30例(54.54%)。41例(74.54%)玻璃体液样本和14例(25.45%)房水样本均接受了NTS和微生物培养检测。NTS在病原体检测中的阳性率显著高于微生物培养(90.91% vs... 结论：NTS能够为术后眼内炎患者提供快速的病原体识别和高灵敏度检测，有助于指导抗感染治疗并改善视觉预后。

title: Chromosome-level genome assembly and annotation of the social amoeba Dictyostelium firmibasis
abstract: Dicytostelium firmibasis is a member of Dictyostelia, a group of social amoebae that upon starvation display aggregative multicellularity where the amoebae transition from uni-to multicellular life. The D. firmibasis genome assembly that is currently available is of limited use due to its low contiguity, large number of undetermined bases, and lack of annotations. Here we used Nanopore long read sequencing, complemented with Illumina sequencing, and developmental transcriptomics as well as small RNA-sequencing, to present a new, fully annotated, chromosome-level D. firmibasis genome assembly. The new assembly contains no undetermined bases, and consists mainly of six large contigs representing the chromosomes, as well as a complete mitochondrial genome. This new genome assembly will be a valuable tool, allowing comprehensive comparison to Dictyostelium discoideum, the dictyostelid genetically tractable model. Further, the new genome will be important for studies of evolutionary processes governing the transition from unicellular to multicellular organisms and will aid in the sequencing and annotation of other dictyostelids genomes, many of which are currently of poor quality.
authors: Edelbroek, B.; Kjellin, J.; Jerlstrom-Hultqvist, J.; Koskiniemi, S.; Soderbom, F.

ai.TLDR: D. firmibasis基因组组装质量较低，本文通过结合长读长测序和转录组分析，构建了首个完整注释的染色体级基因组。新组装具有高连续性且无未确定碱基，为比较研究和进化机制探索提供了重要资源。
ai.translation: Dicytostelium firmibasis是Dictyostelia类群的成员，该类群的变形虫在饥饿条件下会表现出聚集性多细胞生命形式。目前可用的D. firmibasis基因组组装因连续性不足、大量未确定碱基及缺乏注释而限制了其应用价值。本研究通过结合Nanopore长读长测序与Illumina测序，结合发育转录组学及小RNA测序技术，构建了首个完整注释的染色体级基因组组装。新组装完全消除了未确定碱基，主要由六个代表染色体的大contigs及完整的线粒体基因组构成。该基因组将作为重要工具，支持与遗传可操作模型Dictyostelium discoideum的全面比较研究。同时，该基因组对解析单细胞向多细胞生命形式转化的进化机制具有重要意义，并将助力其他dictyostelid物种基因组的测序与注释工作，其中许多现有基因组质量亟待提升。

title: Integrating short-read and long-read single-cell RNA sequencing for comprehensive transcriptome profiling in mouse retina
abstract: The vast majority of protein-coding genes in the human genome produce multiple mRNA isoforms through alternative splicing, significantly enhancing the complexity of the transcriptome and proteome. To establish an efficient method for characterizing transcript isoforms within tissue samples, we conducted a systematic comparison between single-cell long-read and conventional short-read RNA sequencing techniques. The transcriptome of approximately 30,000 mouse retina cells was profiled using 1.54 billion Illumina short reads and 1.40 billion Oxford Nanopore long reads. Consequently, we identified 44,325 transcript isoforms, with a notable 38% previously uncharacterized and 17% expressed exclusively in distinct cellular subclasses. We observed that long-read sequencing not only matched the gene expression and cell-type annotation performance of short-read sequencing but also excelled in the precise identification of transcript isoforms. While transcript isoforms are often shared across various cell types, their relative abundance shows considerable cell-type-specific variation. The data generated from our study significantly enhance the existing repertoire of transcript isoforms, thereby establishing a foundational resource for future research into the mechanisms and implications of alternative splicing within retinal biology and its links to related diseases.
authors: Wang, M.; Li, Y.; Wang, J.; Oh, S. H.; Chen, R.

ai.TLDR: 人类基因组中超过90%的蛋白质编码基因通过可变剪接产生多个mRNA异构体，显著提升转录组和蛋白质组复杂性。本研究通过比较单细胞长读长与传统短读长RNA测序技术，发现长读长测序在转录本异构体精确识别方面具有显著优势。
ai.translation: 人类基因组中绝大多数蛋白质编码基因通过可变剪接产生多个mRNA异构体，显著增强了转录组和蛋白质组的复杂性。为建立高效的组织样本转录本异构体表征方法，我们系统比较了单细胞长读长与传统短读长RNA测序技术。通过1.54亿条Illumina短读长和1.40亿条Oxford Nanopore长读长对约3万只小鼠视网膜细胞的转录组进行分析，共鉴定出44,325个转录本异构体，其中38%为首次表征，17%仅在特定细胞亚型中表达。研究发现长读长测序不仅在基因表达和细胞类型注释性能上与短读长测序相当，更在转录本异构体精确识别方面表现突出。尽管转录本异构体常在不同细胞类型间共享，但其相对丰度表现出显著的细胞类型特异性差异。本研究生成的数据显著扩展了现有转录本异构体库，为未来研究视网膜生物学中可变剪接机制及其与相关疾病关联提供了基础资源。

title: Long-read sequencing of an advanced cancer cohort resolves rearrangements, unravels haplotypes, and reveals methylation landscapes.
abstract: The Long-Read Personalized OncoGenomics (POG) dataset comprises a cohort of 189 patient tumors and 41 matched normal samples sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies PromethION platform. This dataset from the POG program and the Marathon of Hope Cancer Centres Network includes DNA and RNA short-read sequence data, analytics, and clinical information. We show the potential of long-read sequencing for resolving complex cancer-related structural variants, viral integrations, and extrachromosomal circular DNA. Long-range phasing facilitates the discovery of allelically differentially methylated regions (aDMRs) and allele-specific expression, including recurrent aDMRs in the cancer genes RET and CDKN2A. Germline promoter methylation in MLH1 can be directly observed in Lynch syndrome. Promoter methylation in BRCA1 and RAD51C is a likely driver behind homologous recombination deficiency where no coding driver mutation was found. This dataset demonstrates applications for long-read sequencing in precision medicine and is available as a resource for developing analytical approaches using this technology.
authors: Kieran O'Neill, Erin Pleasance, Jeremy Fan, Vahid Akbari, Glenn Chang, Katherine Dixon, Veronika Csizmok, Signe MacLennan, Vanessa Porter, Andrew Galbraith, Cameron J Grisdale, Luka Culibrk, John H Dupuis, Richard Corbett, James Hopkins, Reanne Bowlby, Pawan Pandoh, Duane E Smailus, Dean Cheng, Tina Wong, Connor Frey, Yaoqing Shen, Eleanor Lewis, Luis F Paulin, Fritz J Sedlazeck, Jessica M T Nelson, Eric Chuah, Karen L Mungall, Richard A Moore, Robin Coope, Andrew J Mungall, Melissa K McConechy, Laura M Williamson, Kasmintan A Schrader, Stephen Yip, Marco A Marra, Janessa Laskin, Steven J M Jones

ai.TLDR: POG数据集通过长读长测序技术解析了癌症相关复杂变异，包括结构变异、病毒整合和环状DNA。该数据集揭示了等位基因差异甲基化区域与基因表达的关联，为精准医学提供了重要资源。
keywords: 等位基因差异甲基化区域(aDMRs)
ai.translation: 长读长个性化肿瘤基因组学(POG)数据集包含189例患者肿瘤样本和41例匹配正常样本，采用牛津纳米孔技术PromethION平台进行测序。该数据集由POG计划和马拉松希望癌症中心网络提供，包含DNA/RNA短读长序列数据、分析结果及临床信息。研究展示了长读长测序在解析复杂癌症相关结构变异、病毒整合及额外染色体环状DNA方面的潜力。长程相位分析可发现等位基因差异甲基化区域(aDMRs)和等位基因特异性表达，包括RET和CDKN2A癌基因中的复发性aDMRs。MLH1的生殖系启动子甲基化可直接观察到林奇综合征。BRCA1和RAD51C的启动子甲基化可能是同源重组缺陷的驱动因素，即使未发现编码驱动突变。该数据集验证了长读长测序在精准医学中的应用价值，并作为开发该技术分析方法的资源。

title: Nanopore-based consensus sequencing enables accurate multimodal tumor cell-free DNA profiling.
abstract: Shallow genome-wide cell-free DNA sequencing holds great promise for noninvasive cancer monitoring by providing reliable copy number alteration (CNA) and fragmentomic profiles. Single-nucleotide variations (SNVs) are, however, much harder to identify with low sequencing depth due to sequencing errors. Here, we present Nanopore Rolling Circle Amplification (RCA)-enhanced Consensus Sequencing (NanoRCS), which leverages RCA and consensus calling based on genome-wide long-read nanopore sequencing to enable simultaneous multimodal tumor fraction (TF) estimation through SNVs, CNAs, and fragmentomics. The efficacy of NanoRCS is tested on 18 cancer patient samples and seven healthy controls, demonstrating its ability to reliably detect TFs as low as 0.24%. In vitro experiments confirm that SNV measurements are essential for detecting TFs below 3%. NanoRCS provides an opportunity for cost-effective and rapid sample processing, which aligns well with clinical needs, particularly in settings where quick and accurate cancer monitoring is essential for personalized treatment strategies.
authors: Li-Ting Chen, Myrthe Jager, Dàmi Rebergen, Geertruid J Brink, Tom van den Ende, Willem Vanderlinden, Pauline Kolbeck, Marc Pagès-Gallego, Ymke van der Pol, Nicolle Besselink, Norbert Moldovan, Nizar Hami, Wigard P Kloosterman, Hanneke van Laarhoven, Florent Mouliere, Ronald Zweemer, Jan Lipfert, Sarah Derks, Alessio Marcozzi, Jeroen de Ridder

ai.TLDR: 浅层全基因组无细胞DNA测序在非侵入性癌症监测中具有潜力，但低测序深度下单核苷酸变异（SNVs）识别困难。本文提出的NanoRCS技术通过结合纳米孔长读长测序与共识测序，实现了SNVs、拷贝数变异（CNA）和片段组学的多模态肿瘤分数（TF）同步估计，可可靠检测低至0.24%的TF。
keywords: Nanopore Rolling Circle Amplification (RCA)-enhanced Consensus Sequencing (NanoRCS)
ai.translation: 浅层全基因组无细胞DNA测序在非侵入性癌症监测中展现出巨大前景，其通过提供可靠的拷贝数变异（CNA）和片段组学特征实现疾病监测。然而，由于测序错误的影响，单核苷酸变异（SNVs）在低测序深度下难以准确识别。本研究提出了一种基于纳米孔长读长测序的Nanopore Rolling Circle Amplification (RCA)-enhanced Consensus Sequencing (NanoRCS)技术，该方法通过整合RCA扩增和全基因组共识测序，能够同时利用SNVs、CNA和片段组学特征进行多模态肿瘤分数（TF）估计。在18例癌症患者样本和7例健康对照中验证了NanoRCS的效能，结果表明其可可靠检测低至0.24%的TF。体外实验进一步证实，SNV测量对于检测低于3%的TF具有关键作用。NanoRCS技术为低成本、高通量的样本处理提供了新方案，其快速准确的检测能力与临床需求高度契合，尤其适用于需要实时监测以指导个性化治疗策略的医疗场景。

title: Haplotype information of large neuromuscular disease genes provided by linked-read sequencing has a potential to increase diagnostic yield
abstract: Rare or novel missense variants in large genes such as *TTN* and *NEB* are frequent in the general population, which hampers the interpretation of putative disease-causing biallelic variants in patients with sporadic neuromuscular disorders. Often, when the first initial genetic analysis is performed, the reconstructed haplotype, i.e. phasing information of the variants is missing. Segregation analysis increases the diagnostic turnaround time and is not always possible if samples from family members are lacking. To overcome this difficulty, we investigated how well the linked-read technology succeeded to phase variants in these large genes, and whether it improved the identification of structural variants. Linked-read sequencing data of nemaline myopathy, distal myopathy, and proximal myopathy patients were analyzed for phasing, single nucleotide variants, and structural variants. Variant phasing was successful in the large muscle genes studied. The longest continuous phase blocks were gained using high-quality DNA samples with long DNA fragments. Homozygosity increased the number of phase blocks, especially in exome sequencing samples lacking intronic variation. In our cohort, linked-read sequencing added more information about the structural variation but did not lead to a molecular genetic diagnosis. The linked-read technology can support the clinical diagnosis of neuromuscular and other genetic disorders.
authors: Johanna Lehtonen, Anna-Maija Sulonen, ... Janna Saarela
citation: Lehtonen, J., Sulonen, AM., Almusa, H. et al. Haplotype information of large neuromuscular disease genes provided by linked-read sequencing has a potential to increase diagnostic yield. Sci Rep 14 , 4306 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-54866-4
description: Rare or novel missense variants in large genes such asTTNandNEBare frequent in the general population, which hampers the interpretation of...

ai.TLDR: 在神经肌肉疾病患者中，大基因（如TTN和NEB）的罕见或新型错义变异普遍存在，导致双等位基因致病性变异的解读困难。linked-read技术成功实现了大基因变异的分型，增加了结构变异信息，但未达到分子遗传学诊断。该技术可辅助神经肌肉及其它遗传性疾病的临床诊断。
ai.translation: 在普通人群中，大基因（如TTN和NEB）中的罕见或新型错义变异非常常见，这阻碍了散发性神经肌肉疾病的患者中潜在致病性双等位基因变异的解读。通常情况下，首次遗传分析时，变异的分型信息（即重构的等位基因型）缺失。家系分型分析会延长诊断周期，且在缺乏家庭成员样本时无法进行。为克服这一困难，我们研究了linked-read技术在大基因中分型变异的效果，以及其是否能提高结构变异的识别能力。分析了肌营养不良症、远端肌病和近端肌病患者的linked-read测序数据，评估分型信息、单核苷酸变异和结构变异。研究的大肌肉基因中，变异分型成功。使用高质量DNA样本（含长DNA片段）获得最长的连续分型片段。纯合性增加了分型片段数量，尤其在缺乏内含子变异的外显子组测序样本中更为明显。在我们的队列中，linked-read测序增加了结构变异的信息，但未导致分子遗传学诊断。linked-read技术可支持神经肌肉及其它遗传性疾病的临床诊断。

title: The genome of Przewalski's horse (Equus ferus przewalskii)
abstract: The Przewalskis horse (Equus ferus przewalskii) is an endangered equid native to the steppes of central Asia. After becoming extinct in the wild, multiple conservation efforts convened to preserve the species including captive breeding programs, reintroduction and monitoring systems, protected lands, and cloning. Availability of a highly contiguous reference genome is essential to support these continued efforts. We used Oxford Nanopore sequencing to produce a scaffold-level 2.5 Gb nuclear assembly and 16,002 bp mitogenome from a captive Przewalskis mare. All assembly drafts were generated from 111 Gb of sequence from a single PromethION R10.4.1 flow cell. The mitogenome contained 37 genes in the standard mammalian configuration and was 99.63% identical to the domestic horse (Equus caballus). The nuclear assembly, EquPr2, contained 2,146 scaffolds with an N50 of 85.1 Mb, 43X mean depth, and BUSCO quality score of 98.92%. EquPr2 successfully improves upon the existing Przewalskis horse reference genome (Burgud), with 25-fold fewer scaffolds, a 166-fold larger N50, and phased pseudohaplotypes. Modified basecalls revealed 79.5% DNA methylation and 2.1% hydroxymethylation globally. Allele-specific methylation analysis between pseudohaplotypes revealed 226 differentially methylated regions (DMRs) in known imprinted genes and loci not previously reported as imprinted. The heterozygosity rate of 0.165% matches previous estimates for the species and compares favorably to other endangered animals. This improved Przewalskis horse assembly will serve as a valuable resource for conservation efforts and comparative genomics investigations.
authors: Flack, N.; Hughes, L.; Cassens, J.; Enriquez, M.; Gebeyehu, S.; Alshagawi, M.; Hatfield, J.; Kauffman, A.; Brown, B.; Klaeui, C.; Malbrouk, I. F.; Walls, C.; Yeater, T.; Rivas, A.; Faulk, C.

ai.TLDR: 普氏野马作为濒危物种亟需基因组资源支持保护工作。本研究通过牛津纳米孔测序技术构建了高质量参考基因组，显著提升了基因组组装连续性与完整性，发现226个差异甲基化区域并验证了物种杂合率。该成果为物种保护和比较基因组学研究提供了重要资源。
ai.translation: 普氏野马（Equus ferus przewalskii）是一种原产于中亚草原的濒危马科动物。在野外灭绝后，保护工作包括圈养繁殖、重引入、监测系统、保护区建设和克隆技术。构建高连续性参考基因组对这些保护工作至关重要。我们利用牛津纳米孔测序技术，从单个PromethION R10.4.1流细胞产生的111 Gb序列数据中，组装出2.5 Gb的核基因组草图和16,002 bp的线粒体基因组。线粒体基因组包含标准哺乳动物配置的37个基因，与家马（Equus caballus）基因组序列一致性达99.63%。核基因组组装EquPr2包含2,146个scaffold，N50值为85.1 Mb，平均深度43倍，BUSCO质量评分98.92%。EquPr2相比现有普氏野马参考基因组（Burgud）具有25倍更少的scaffold数量、166倍更大的N50值以及相位伪单倍型。修饰碱基调用显示全基因组79.5%的DNA甲基化和2.1%的羟甲基化。伪单倍型间的等位特异性甲基化分析揭示了226个差异甲基化区域（DMRs），涉及已知印迹基因及未报道的印迹位点。0.165%的杂合率与物种先前估计值一致，优于其他濒危动物。该改进的普氏野马基因组组装将为保护工作和比较基因组学研究提供重要资源。

title: Genomic surveillance of multidrug-resistant organisms based on long-read sequencing
abstract:
BackgroundMultidrug-resistant organisms (MDRO) pose a significant threat to public-health world-wide. The ability to identify antimicrobial resistance determinants, to assess changes in molecular types, and to detect transmission are essential for effective surveillance and infection prevention of MDRO. Molecular characterization based on long-read sequencing has emerged as a promising alternative to short-read sequencing. The aim of this study was to rapidly and accurately characterize MDRO for surveillance and transmission studies based on long-read sequencing only.

MethodsGenomic DNA of 356 MDRO was automatically extracted using the Maxwell-RSC48. The MDRO included 106 Klebsiella pneumoniae isolates, 85 Escherichia coli, 15 Enterobacter cloacae complex, 10 Citrobacter freundii, 34 Pseudomonas aeruginosa, 16 Acinetobacter baumannii, and 69 methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), of which 24 were from an outbreak. MDRO were sequenced using both short-read (Illumina NextSeq 550) and long-read (Nanopore Rapid Barcoding Kit-24-V14, R10.4.1) whole-genome sequencing (WGS). Basecalling was performed for two distinct models using Dorado-0.3.2 duplex mode. Long-read data was assembled using Flye, Canu, Miniasm, Unicycler, Necat, Raven and Redbean assemblers. Long-read WGS data with >40x coverage was used for multi-locus sequence typing (MLST), whole-genome MLST (wgMLST), in silico multiple locus variable-number of tandem repeat analysis (iMLVA) for MRSA, and identification of resistance genes (Abricate).

ResultsComparison of wgMLST profiles based on long-read and short-read WGS data revealed >95% of wgMLST profiles within the species-specific cluster cut-off, except for P. aeruginosa. The wgMLST profiles obtained by long-read and short-read WGS differed only one to nine wgMLST alleles for K. pneumoniae, E. coli, E. cloacae complex, C. freundii, A. baumannii complex and MRSA. For P. aeruginosa differences were up to 27 wgMLST alleles between long-read and short-read wgMLST. MLST sequence types and in silico MLVA types were concordant between long-read and short-read WGS data and conventional MLVA typing. Antimicrobial resistance genes were detected in long-read sequencing data with high sensitivity/specificity (92-100%/99-100%). Long-read sequencing enabled analysis of an MRSA outbreak.

ConclusionsWe demonstrate that molecular characterization of automatically extracted DNA followed by long-read sequencing is as accurate and more cost-effective compared to short-read sequencing. Long-read sequencing is suitable for molecular typing and outbreak analysis as part of genomic surveillance of MDRO. However, the analysis of P. aeruginosa requires further improvement which may be obtained by other basecalling algorithms. The low implementation costs, low price per isolate, and rapid library preparation for long-read sequencing of MDRO extends its applicability to resource-constrained settings and low-income countries world-wide.
authors: Landman, F.; Jamin, C.; de Haan, A.; Witteveen, S.; Bos, J.; van der Heide, H. G. J.; Schouls, L. M.; Hendrickx, A. P. A.; Dutch CPE and MRSA surveillance study groups,

ai.TLDR: 多重耐药菌（MDRO）对全球公共卫生构成重大威胁，长读长测序技术在分子表征中展现出高准确性与成本效益。研究通过对比长读长测序与短读长测序，证实其在基因分型、抗药基因检测及爆发分析中的可靠性，但需进一步优化铜绿假单胞菌的分析方法。
ai.translation:
背景：多重耐药菌（MDRO）对全球公共卫生构成重大威胁。能够识别抗菌耐药决定因子、评估分子类型变化并检测传播事件，是有效监测和预防MDRO感染的关键。基于长读长测序的分子表征技术已作为短读长测序的潜在替代方案崭露头角。本研究旨在通过仅使用长读长测序技术，快速准确地对MDRO进行表征，以支持监测和传播研究。

方法：使用Maxwell-RSC48自动提取356株MDRO的基因组DNA，包含106株肺炎克雷伯菌、85株大肠杆菌、15株肠杆菌属复合群、10株弗劳地枸橼酸杆菌、34株铜绿假单胞菌、16株鲍曼不动杆菌及69株耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSA），其中24株来自爆发事件。采用短读长测序（Illumina NextSeq 550）和长读长测序（Nanopore Rapid Barcoding Kit-24-V14, R10.4.1）进行全基因组测序（WGS）。使用Dorado-0.3.2双模式对两种模型进行碱基调用。通过Flye、Canu、Miniasm、Unicycler、Necat、Raven和Redbean组装器对长读长测序数据进行拼接。覆盖度>40倍的长读长测序数据用于多基因座序列分型（MLST）、全基因组MLST（wgMLST）、体外多重基因座可变数目串联重复分析（iMLVA）（针对MRSA）及抗药基因识别（Abrate）。

结果：基于长读长测序与短读长测序的wgMLST谱型比较显示，除铜绿假单胞菌外，>95%的谱型位于种属特异性聚类截断值内。长读长测序与短读长测序获得的wgMLST谱型在肺炎克雷伯菌、大肠杆菌、肠杆菌属复合群、弗劳地枸橼酸杆菌、鲍曼不动杆菌复合群及MRSA中仅相差1-9个wgMLST等位基因，而铜绿假单胞菌差异可达27个等位基因。长读长测序与短读长测序数据及传统MLVA分型在MLST序列型和体外MLVA型上高度一致。长读长测序数据中抗药基因检测灵敏度/特异性达92-100%/99-100%。长读长测序支持MRSA爆发分析。

结论：我们证明自动提取DNA后进行长读长测序的分子表征方法在准确性上与短读长测序相当，且更具成本效益。长读长测序适用于MDRO的分子分型和爆发分析，可纳入基因组监测体系。然而，铜绿假单胞菌分析仍需进一步优化，可能通过其他碱基调用算法实现。长读长测序的低实施成本、低单株价格及快速文库制备能力，使其在资源匮乏地区和低收入国家具有更广泛的应用前景。

title: Long Read Sequencing reveals transgene concatemerization and backbone integration following AAV-driven electroporation of CRISPR RNP complexes in mouse zygotes
abstract:
Over the last decade CRISPR gene editing has been successfully used to streamline the generation of animal models for biomedical purposes. However, one limitation to its use is the potential occurrence of on-target mutations that may be detrimental or otherwise unintended. These bystander mutations are often undetected using conventional genotyping methods.

The use of Adeno-Associated Viruses (AAVs) to bring donor templates in zygotes is currently being deployed by transgenic cores around the world to generate knock-ins with large transgenes. Thanks to a high level of efficiency and the relative ease to establish this technique, it recently became a method of choice for transgenic laboratories. However, a thorough analysis of the editing outcomes following this method is yet to be developed.

To this end, we generated three different types of integration using AAVs in two different murine genes (i.e., Ace2 and Foxg1) and employed Oxford Nanopore Technologies long read sequencing to analyze the outcomes. Using a workflow that includes Cas9 enrichment and adaptive sampling, we showed that unintended on-target mutations (sometimes reported using other workflows) can occur when using AAVs. This work highlights the importance of in-depth validation of the mutant lines generated and informs the uptake of this new method.
authors: Luqman, M. W.; Jenjaroenpun, P.; Spathos, J.; Shingte, N.; Cummins, M.; Nimsamer, P.; Ittner, L. M.; Wongsurawat, T.; Delerue, F.

ai.TLDR: CRISPR基因编辑技术在动物模型构建中广泛应用，但存在脱靶突变风险。本研究通过AAV载体和长读长测序技术，首次揭示了AAV介导编辑可能引发的意外脱靶突变，强调了基因编辑产物的深度验证必要性。
ai.translation:
在过去十年中，CRISPR基因编辑技术已被成功应用于简化生物医学目的的动物模型构建。然而，其应用存在潜在局限性，即可能发生有害或非预期的脱靶突变，而传统基因分型方法常无法检测到这些旁观者突变。

利用腺相关病毒（AAV）将供体模板递送至合子中，已成为全球转基因核心实验室生成大转基因片段敲入的首选方法。得益于其高效率和相对简便的技术建立过程，该方法近期成为转基因实验室的主流技术。然而，针对该方法编辑结果的系统分析仍处于空白。

为此，我们采用AAV在两种不同的小鼠基因（Ace2和Foxg1）中生成三种不同类型的整合，并运用牛津纳米孔技术的长读长测序分析结果。通过结合Cas9富集和自适应采样工作流程，我们发现使用AAV时可能发生非预期的脱靶突变（有时在其他工作流程中被报道）。本研究强调了对生成突变系进行深入验证的重要性，并为该新技术的推广提供了关键信息。

title: Assessing the efficacy of target adaptive sampling long-read sequencing through hereditary cancer patient genomes
abstract: Innovations in sequencing technology have led to the discovery of novel mutations that cause inherited diseases. However, many patients with suspected genetic diseases remain undiagnosed. Long-read sequencing technologies are expected to significantly improve the diagnostic rate by overcoming the limitations of short-read sequencing. In addition, Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) offers adaptive sampling and computationally driven target enrichment technology. This enables more affordable intensive analysis of target gene regions compared to standard non-selective long-read sequencing. In this study, we developed an efficient computational workflow for target adaptive sampling long-read sequencing (TAS-LRS) and evaluated it through application to 33 genomes collected from suspected hereditary cancer patients. Our workflow can identify single nucleotide variants with nearly the same accuracy as the short-read platform and elucidate complex forms of structural variations. We also newly identified several SINE-R/VNTR/Alu (SVA) elements affecting the *APC* gene in two patients with familial adenomatous polyposis, as well as their sites of origin. In addition, we demonstrated that off-target reads from adaptive sampling, which is typically discarded, can be effectively used to accurately genotype common single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) across the entire genome, enabling the calculation of a polygenic risk score. Furthermore, we identified allele-specific *MLH1* promoter hypermethylation in a Lynch syndrome patient. In summary, our workflow with TAS-LRS can simultaneously capture monogenic risk variants including complex structural variations, polygenic background as well as epigenetic alterations, and will be an efficient platform for genetic disease research and diagnosis.
authors: Wataru Nakamura, Makoto Hirata, ... Yuichi Shiraishi
citation: Nakamura, W., Hirata, M., Oda, S. et al. Assessing the efficacy of target adaptive sampling long-read sequencing through hereditary cancer patient genomes. npj Genom. Med. 9 , 11 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41525-024-00394-z
