ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术通过克服短读长测序的局限性，显著提升了遗传病诊断率。本研究开发的TAS-LRS计算流程可同时捕获单基因风险变异、复杂结构变异及表观遗传改变，为遗传病研究提供高效平台。
ai.translation: 测序技术的创新使研究人员能够发现导致遗传病的新突变。然而，许多疑似遗传病患者仍无法确诊。长读长测序技术通过克服短读长测序的局限性，有望显著提高诊断率。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）提供的自适应采样和计算驱动的目标富集技术，相比标准非选择性长读长测序，可实现更经济的目标基因区域深度分析。本研究开发了针对目标自适应采样长读长测序（TAS-LRS）的高效计算流程，并通过33例疑似遗传性癌症患者的基因组应用进行验证。我们的流程可识别与短读长平台几乎相同准确度的单核苷酸变异，并解析复杂的结构变异形式。研究还首次在两名家族性腺瘤性息肉病患者中鉴定出影响APC基因的SINE-R/VNTR/Alu（SVA）元件及其起源位点。此外，我们证明通常被丢弃的自适应采样脱靶读段可有效用于全基因组常见单核苷酸多态性（SNP）的精准分型，从而计算多基因风险评分。进一步发现 Lynch 综合征患者中存在等位基因特异性的 MLH1 启动子超甲基化。综上，本研究的 TAS-LRS 流程可同时捕获单基因风险变异、复杂结构变异、多基因背景及表观遗传改变，为遗传病研究和诊断提供高效平台。

title: Decoding the complexity of on-target integration: characterizing DNA insertions at the CRISPR-Cas9 targeted locus using nanopore sequencing
abstract:
### Background

CRISPR-Cas9 technology has advanced in vivo gene therapy for disorders like hemophilia A, notably through the successful targeted incorporation of the F8 gene into the Alb locus in hepatocytes, effectively curing this disorder in mice. However, thoroughly evaluating the safety and specificity of this therapy is essential. Our study introduces a novel methodology to analyze complex insertion sequences at the on-target edited locus, utilizing barcoded long-range PCR, CRISPR RNP-mediated deletion of unedited alleles, magnetic bead-based long amplicon enrichment, and nanopore sequencing.

### Results

We identified the expected F8 insertions and various fragment combinations resulting from the in vivo linearization of the double-cut plasmid donor. Notably, our research is the first to document insertions exceeding ten kbp. We also found that a small proportion of these insertions were derived from sources other than donor plasmids, including Cas9-sgRNA plasmids, genomic DNA fragments, and LINE-1 elements.

### Conclusions

Our study presents a robust method for analyzing the complexity of on-target editing, particularly for in vivo long insertions, where donor template integration can be challenging. This work offers a new tool for quality control in gene editing outcomes and underscores the importance of detailed characterization of edited genomic sequences. Our findings have significant implications for enhancing the safety and effectiveness of CRISPR-Cas9 gene therapy in treating various disorders, including hemophilia A.
authors: Juan-Juan Zhao, Xin-Yu Sun, ... Xiao-Bing Zhang
citation: Zhao, JJ., Sun, XY., Tian, SN. et al. Decoding the complexity of on-target integration: characterizing DNA insertions at the CRISPR-Cas9 targeted locus using nanopore sequencing. BMC Genomics 25 , 189 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-024-10050-6
description: CRISPR-Cas9 technology has advanced in vivo gene therapy for disorders like hemophilia A, notably through the successful targeted...

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对CRISPR-Cas9技术在体内基因治疗中的应用，开发了新型分析方法以评估靶向编辑位点的复杂插入序列。该方法通过条形码长距离PCR、CRISPR RNP介导的未编辑等位基因删除等技术，成功解析了超过10kbp的插入片段，揭示了供体模板整合的挑战性问题。研究结果为基因编辑质量控制提供了新工具，对提升CRISPR-Cas9治疗血友病A等疾病的临床安全性具有重要意义。
ai.translation:
### 背景
CRISPR-Cas9技术已推动了如血友病A等疾病的体内基因治疗进展，特别是通过成功将F8基因靶向整合至肝细胞的Alb位点，在小鼠中有效治愈了该疾病。然而，全面评估该疗法的安全性和特异性至关重要。本研究引入了一种新型方法，用于分析靶向编辑位点的复杂插入序列，该方法结合了条形码长距离PCR、CRISPR RNP介导的未编辑等位基因删除、基于磁珠的长扩增子富集以及纳米孔测序技术。

### 结果
我们鉴定了预期的F8插入以及由体内线性化双切质粒供体产生的各种片段组合。值得注意的是，本研究首次记录了超过10kbp的插入现象。同时发现，这些插入中有一小部分来源于非供体质粒，包括Cas9-sgRNA质粒、基因组DNA片段和LINE-1元件。

### 结论
本研究呈现了一种分析靶向编辑复杂性的稳健方法，特别是在体内长插入的分析中，供体模板整合具有挑战性。本工作为基因编辑结果的质量控制提供了新工具，并强调了详细表征编辑后基因组序列的重要性。研究结果对提升CRISPR-Cas、Cas9基因治疗在治疗包括血友病A在内的多种疾病的临床安全性和有效性具有重要意义。

title: Nanopore-based consensus sequencing enables accurate multimodal tumor cell-free DNA profiling
abstract: Shallow genome-wide cell-free DNA (cfDNA) sequencing holds great promise for non-invasive cancer monitoring by providing reliable copy number alteration (CNA) and fragmentomic profiles. Single nucleotide variations (SNVs) are, however, much harder to identify with low sequencing depth due to sequencing errors. Here we present Nanopore Rolling Circle Amplification (RCA)-enhanced Consensus Sequencing (NanoRCS), which leverages RCA and consensus calling based on genome-wide long-read nanopore sequencing to enable simultaneous multimodal tumor fraction estimation through SNVs, CNAs, and fragmentomics. Efficacy of NanoRCS is tested on 18 cancer patient samples and 3 healthy controls, demonstrating its ability to reliably detect tumor fractions as low as 0.24%. In vitro experiments confirm that SNV measurements are essential for detecting tumor fractions below 2%. NanoRCS provides the opportunity for cost-effective and rapid processing, which aligns well with clinical needs, particularly in settings where quick and accurate cancer monitoring is essential for personalized treatment strategies.
authors: Chen, L.-T.; Jager, M.; Rebergen, D.; Brink, G. J.; van den Ende, T.; Vanderlinden, W.; Kolbeck, P.; Pages-Gallego, M.; van der Pol, Y.; Besselink, N.; Moldovan, N.; Hami, N.; Kloosterman, W.; van Laarhoven, H.; Mouliere, F.; Zweemer, R.; Lipfert, J.; Derks, S.; Marcozzi, A.; de Ridder, J.

ai.TLDR: 浅层全基因组游离DNA（cfDNA）测序在非侵入性癌症监测中展现出巨大潜力，但单核苷酸变异（SNVs）在低测序深度下难以检测。本研究提出的NanoRCS技术通过结合纳米孔长读长测序与共识测序，实现了SNVs、拷贝数变异（CNA）和片段组学的多模态肿瘤分数联合检测，可可靠识别0.24%的肿瘤比例。
ai.translation: 浅层全基因组游离DNA（cfDNA）测序在非侵入性癌症监测中展现出巨大潜力，通过提供可靠的拷贝数变异（CNA）和片段组学特征实现。然而，由于测序误差的影响，单核苷酸变异（SNVs）在低测序深度下难以准确识别。本研究提出了一种基于纳米孔长读长测序的Nanopore Rolling Circle Amplification（RCA）增强共识测序（NanoRCS）技术，该方法通过整合RCA扩增和基于全基因组的共识调用，实现了SNVs、CNA和片段组学的多模态肿瘤比例联合估算。通过18例癌症患者样本和3例健康对照的验证，NanoRCS展现出可靠检测低至0.24%肿瘤比例的能力。体外实验进一步证实，SNV测量对于检测低于2%的肿瘤比例至关重要。NanoRCS技术提供了成本效益高且处理速度快的解决方案，尤其适用于需要快速准确癌症监测以支持个性化治疗策略的临床场景。

title: Optimized bacterial community characterization through full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing utilizing MinION nanopore technology
abstract:
### Background

Accurate identification of bacterial communities is crucial for research applications, diagnostics, and clinical interventions. Although 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) gene sequencing is a widely employed technique for bacterial taxonomic classification, it often results in misclassified or unclassified bacterial taxa. This study sought to refine the full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing protocol using the MinION sequencer, focusing on the V1–V9 regions. Our methodological enquiry examined several factors, including the number of PCR amplification cycles, choice of primers and Taq polymerase, and specific sequence databases and workflows employed. We used a microbial standard comprising eight bacterial strains (five gram-positive and three gram-negative) in known proportions as a validation control.

### Results

Based on the MinION protocol, we employed the microbial standard as the DNA template for the 16S rRNA gene amplicon sequencing procedure. Our analysis showed that an elevated number of PCR amplification cycles introduced PCR bias, and the selection of Taq polymerase and primer sets significantly affected the subsequent analysis. Bacterial identification at genus level demonstrated Pearson correlation coefficients ranging from 0.73 to 0.79 when assessed using BugSeq, Kraken-Silva and EPI2ME-16S workflows. Notably, the EPI2ME-16S workflow exhibited the highest Pearson correlation with the microbial standard, minimised misclassification, and increased alignment accuracy. At the species taxonomic level, the BugSeq workflow was superior, with a Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.92.

### Conclusions

These findings emphasise the importance of careful selection of PCR settings and a well-structured analytical framework for 16S rRNA full-length gene sequencing. The results showed a robust correlation between the predicted and observed bacterial abundances at both the genus and species taxonomic levels, making these findings applicable across diverse research contexts and with clinical utility for reliable pathogen identification.
authors: Alessandro Bertolo, Ezra Valido, Jivko Stoyanov
citation: Bertolo, A., Valido, E. & Stoyanov, J. Optimized bacterial community characterization through full-length 16S rRNA gene sequencing utilizing MinION nanopore technology. BMC Microbiol 24 , 58 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12866-024-03208-5
description: Accurate identification of bacterial communities is crucial for research applications, diagnostics, and clinical interventions. Although...

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在优化全长度16S rRNA基因测序流程，通过MinION测序仪提升细菌分类准确性。实验发现PCR循环次数、引物选择和Taq聚合酶显著影响结果，EPI2ME-16S工作流在属级分类中表现最佳，BugSeq在种级分类中达到0.92相关系数。
ai.translation:
背景：准确识别细菌群落对研究应用、诊断和临床干预至关重要。尽管16S核糖体RNA（rRNA）基因测序是细菌分类的常用技术，但常导致分类错误或未分类。本研究旨在优化全长度16S rRNA基因测序流程，聚焦V1–V9区域，通过分析PCR循环次数、引物选择、Taq聚合酶及数据库策略，使用包含8种已知比例细菌菌株的标准微生物样本进行验证。

结果：基于MinION协议，采用标准微生物样本作为DNA模板进行16S rRNA基因扩增测序。分析显示，PCR循环次数增加会导致PCR偏差，Taq聚合酶和引物选择显著影响后续分析。属级分类中，BugSeq、Kraken-Silva和EPI2ME-16S工作流的皮尔逊相关系数在0.73-0.79之间。其中EPI2ME-16S工作流与标准微生物样本相关性最高，减少分类错误并提升比对准确性。种级分类中，BugSeq工作流表现最佳，相关系数达0.92。

结论：研究强调PCR参数选择和分析框架构建的重要性。结果在属级和种级分类中均显示预测与实际细菌丰度的强相关性，表明该方法适用于多样化的研究场景，并具有可靠的临床病原体识别价值。

title: CoRAL accurately resolves extrachromosomal DNA genomestructures with long-read sequencing
abstract:
Extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) is a central mechanism for focal oncogene amplification in cancer, occurring in approximately 15% of early stage cancers and 30% of late-stage cancers. EcDNAs drive tumor formation, evolution, and drug resistance by dynamically modulating oncogene copy-number and rewiring gene-regulatory networks. Elucidating the genomic architecture of ecDNA amplifications is critical for understanding tumor pathology and developing more effective therapies.

Paired-end short-read (Illumina) sequencing and mapping have been utilized to represent ecDNA amplifications using a breakpoint graph, where the inferred architecture of ecDNA is encoded as a cycle in the graph. Traversals of breakpoint graph have been used to successfully predict ecDNA presence in cancer samples. However, short-read technologies are intrinsically limited in the identification of breakpoints, phasing together of complex rearrangements and internal duplications, and deconvolution of cell-to-cell heterogeneity of ecDNA structures. Long-read technologies, such as from Oxford Nanopore Technologies, have the potential to improve inference as the longer reads are better at mapping structural variants and are more likely to span rearranged or duplicated regions.

Here, we propose CoRAL (Complete Reconstruction of Amplifications with Long reads), for reconstructing ecDNA architectures using long-read data. CoRAL reconstructs likely cyclic architectures using quadratic programming that simultaneously optimizes parsimony of reconstruction, explained copy number, and consistency of long-read mapping. CoRAL substantially improves reconstructions in extensive simulations and 9 datasets from previously-characterized cell-lines as compared to previous short-read-based tools. As long-read usage becomes wide-spread, we anticipate that CoRAL will be a valuable tool for profiling the landscape and evolution of focal amplifications in tumors.
authors: Zhu, K.; Jones, M. G.; Luebeck, J.; Bu, X.; Yi, H.; Hung, K. L.; Wong, I. T.-L.; Zhang, S.; Mischel, P. S.; Chang, H. Y.; Bafna, V.

ai.TLDR: 胞外染色体DNA（ecDNA）是癌症中局部癌基因扩增的核心机制，存在于约15%早期癌症和30%晚期癌症中。CoRAL算法通过长读长测序技术显著提升了ecDNA结构的重建精度，解决了短读长技术在断点识别和复杂重排分析中的局限性。
ai.translation:
胞外染色体DNA（ecDNA）是癌症中局部癌基因扩增的核心机制，存在于约15%早期癌症和30%晚期癌症中。ecDNA通过动态调控癌基因拷贝数和重构基因调控网络驱动肿瘤形成、进化和药物耐受性。阐明ecDNA扩增的基因组架构对理解肿瘤病理机制和开发更有效的治疗策略至关重要。

配对端短读长（Illumina）测序和比对已被用于通过断点图表示ecDNA扩增，其中推断的ecDNA架构被编码为图中的循环结构。断点图的遍历已被成功用于预测癌症样本中ecDNA的存在。然而，短读长技术在断点识别、复杂重排相位分析和ecDNA结构细胞间异质性解析方面存在固有局限性。长读长技术（如牛津纳米孔技术）具有改进推断的潜力，因其更长的读长能更准确地映射结构变异，并更可能跨越重排或重复区域。

本文提出CoRAL（基于长读长的扩增完整重建）算法，用于通过长读长数据重建ecDNA架构。CoRAL利用二次规划重构可能的循环架构，同时优化重建简约性、拷贝数解释度和长读长比对一致性。与先前基于短读长的工具相比，CoRAL在广泛模拟实验和9个已表征细胞系数据集中显著提升了重建效果。随着长读长技术的普及，我们预计CoRAL将成为分析肿瘤局部扩增景观和进化的重要工具。

title: Flexible and cost-effective genomic surveillance ofP. falciparummalaria with targeted nanopore sequencing
abstract: Genomic surveillance of *Plasmodium falciparum* malaria can provide policy-relevant information about antimalarial drug resistance, diagnostic test failure, and the evolution of vaccine targets. Yet the large and low complexity genome of *P. falciparum* complicates the development of genomic methods, while resource constraints in malaria endemic regions can limit their deployment. Here, we demonstrate an approach for targeted nanopore sequencing of *P. falciparum* from dried blood spots (DBS) that enables cost-effective genomic surveillance of malaria in low-resource settings. We release software that facilitates flexible design of amplicon sequencing panels and use this software to design two target panels for *P. falciparum*. The panels generate 3–4 kbp reads for eight and sixteen targets respectively, covering key drug-resistance associated genes, diagnostic test antigens, polymorphic markers and the vaccine target *csp*. We validate our approach on mock and field samples, demonstrating robust sequencing coverage, accurate variant calls within coding sequences, the ability to explore *P. falciparum* within-sample diversity and to detect deletions underlying rapid diagnostic test failure.
authors: Mariateresa de Cesare, Mulenga Mwenda, ... Jason A. Hendry
citation: de Cesare, M., Mwenda, M., Jeffreys, A.E. et al. Flexible and cost-effective genomic surveillance of P. falciparum malaria with targeted nanopore sequencing. Nat Commun 15 , 1413 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-45688-z
description: Genomic surveillance ofPlasmodium falciparummalaria can provide policy-relevant information about antimalarial drug resistance, diagnostic test...

ai.TLDR: 疟疾基因组监测可提供抗疟药物耐药性、诊断失败和疫苗靶点演化的政策相关信息。针对恶性疟原虫的干血斑样本纳米孔测序方法实现了低成本监测，软件设计的靶向测序面板可覆盖关键耐药基因、诊断抗原和疫苗靶点csp，验证显示该方法具有准确的变异检测和样本内多样性分析能力。
ai.translation: 恶性疟原虫（Plasmodium falciparum）的基因组监测可为抗疟药物耐药性、诊断测试失败和疫苗靶点演化提供政策相关的信息。然而，恶性疟原虫大而低复杂度的基因组使得基因组方法的开发变得复杂，而疟疾流行地区资源限制又限制了其部署。本文展示了一种针对干血斑样本（DBS）中恶性疟原虫的靶向纳米孔测序方法，该方法实现了低资源环境下疟疾的低成本基因组监测。我们发布了支持灵活设计扩增子测序面板的软件，并利用该软件设计了两个针对恶性疟原虫的靶向测序面板。这些面板分别可生成8个和16个靶点的3-4千碱基对（kbp）测序数据，覆盖关键耐药相关基因、诊断测试抗原、多态性标记以及疫苗靶点csp。我们通过模拟样本和现场样本验证了该方法，结果表明其具有稳健的测序覆盖度、编码序列中准确的变异检测能力、探索恶性疟原虫样本内多样性以及检测导致快速诊断测试失败的缺失突变的能力。

title: A preliminary indication that HLA-A*03:01 may be associated with visceral leishmaniasis development in people living with HIV in Ethiopia.
abstract: Human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) co-infection is a major challenge for visceral leishmaniasis (VL) control, particularly in Ethiopia where the incidence of both pathogens is high. VL-HIV often leads to high rates of antileishmanial treatment failure and recurrent VL disease relapses. Considering the high prevalence of HIV and Leishmania in the Ethiopian population, preventing the progression of asymptomatic Leishmania infection to disease would be a valuable asset to VL disease control and to the clinical management of people living with HIV (PLWH). However, such a strategy requires good understanding of risk factors for VL development. In immunocompetent individuals living in Brazil, India, or Iran, the Human Leukocyte Antigen (HLA) gene region has been associated with VL development. We used NanoTYPE, an Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing-based HLA genotyping method, to detect associations between HLA genotype and VL development by comparing 78 PLWH with VL history and 46 PLWH that controlled a Leishmania infection, all living in a VL endemic region of North-West Ethiopia. We identified an association between HLA-A*03:01 and increased risk of VL development (OR = 3.89). These data provide candidate HLA alleles that can be further explored for inclusion in a potential Leishmania screen-and-treat strategy in VL endemic regions.
authors: Nicky de Vrij, Romi Vandoren, Kadrie Ramadan, Anke Van Hul, Ann Ceulemans, Mekibib Kassa, Roma Melkamu, Arega Yeshanew, Tadfe Bogale, Hailemariam Beyene, Kasaye Sisay, Aderajew Kibret, Dagnew Mersha, Wim L Cuypers, Florian Vogt, Saskia van Henten, Koert Ritmeijer, Thao-Thy Pham, Pieter Meysman, Kris Laukens, Bart Cuypers, Ermias Diro, Rezika Mohammed, Johan van Griensven, Wim Adriaensen

ai.TLDR: HIV与利什曼病（VL）共感染在埃塞俄比亚的控制面临重大挑战，尤其在HIV和利什曼原虫感染率均高的地区。研究发现HLA-A*03:01基因型与VL发病风险显著相关，为利什曼病筛查与治疗策略提供了潜在靶点。
ai.translation: 人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）共感染是利什曼病（VL）控制的主要挑战，特别是在埃塞俄比亚，这两种病原体的发病率均较高。VL-HIV常导致抗利什曼病治疗失败率升高和疾病复发率增加。鉴于埃塞俄比亚人群中HIV和利什曼原虫的高流行率，阻止无症状利什曼原虫感染进展为疾病的策略将对VL控制和HIV感染者临床管理具有重要价值。然而，此类策略需要深入理解VL发病的风险因素。在巴西、印度或伊朗的免疫功能正常人群中，人类白细胞抗原（HLA）基因区域与VL发病相关。本研究采用基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序技术的NanoTYPE方法，通过比较78名有VL病史的HIV感染者与46名控制利什曼原虫感染的HIV感染者（均居住在埃塞俄比亚西北部VL流行区），检测HLA基因型与VL发病的关联。研究发现HLA-A*03:01基因型与VL发病风险增加显著相关（OR=3.89）。这些数据为利什曼病筛查与治疗策略提供了潜在的HLA等位基因候选靶点。

title: Emergence of high-level aztreonam-avibactam and cefiderocol resistance following treatment of an NDM-producing
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Cefiderocol (FDC) or ceftazidime-avibactam with aztreonam (CZA-ATM) are frontline agents for New Delhi metallo-β-lactamase (NDM)-producing Enterobacterales; however, clinical data are scarce, and mechanisms of treatment-emergent resistance are ill-defined. Our objectives were to characterize serial isolates and stool microbiota from a liver transplant recipient with NDM-producing 

METHODS: Isolates collected pre- and post-CZA-ATM treatment underwent broth microdilution susceptibility testing and whole-genome sequencing. Longitudinal stool collected during CZA-ATM therapy underwent metagenomic sequencing (Nanopore MinION).

RESULTS: The baseline isolate exhibited elevated MICs for ATM-AVI (16/4 µg/mL) and FDC (8 µg/mL). Posttreatment, a rectal surveillance isolate exhibited high-level resistance to ATM-AVI (> 128/4 µg/mL) and FDC (32 µg/mL). Both isolates belonged to ST361 and harboured WT 

CONCLUSIONS: Baseline mutations in
authors: Ghady Haidar, Ellen G Kline, Georgios D Kitsios, Xiaohong Wang, Eun Jeong Kwak, Anthony Newbrough, Kelly Friday, Kailey Hughes Kramer, Ryan K Shields

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了肝移植患者感染NDM产肠杆菌的治疗挑战，发现治疗后出现高耐药性，且菌株携带特定基因突变。通过全基因组测序和宏基因组分析，揭示了治疗后耐药机制与菌株演化路径。
ai.translation:
背景：Cefiderocol（FDC）或ceftazidime-avibactam联合aztreonam（CZA-ATM）是治疗产新德里金属β-内酰胺酶（NDM）肠杆菌的首选药物；然而临床数据有限，治疗后耐药机制尚不明确。我们的目标是分析肝移植患者感染NDM产肠杆菌的连续菌株及粪便微生物组。

方法：收集治疗前后CZA-ATM的菌株进行肉汤稀释法药敏试验和全基因组测序。治疗期间纵向收集的粪便样本通过纳米孔MinION进行宏基因组测序。

结果：基线菌株对ATM-AVI（16/4 µg/mL）和FDC（8 µg/mL）表现出高MIC值。治疗后直肠监测菌株对ATM-AVI（> 128/4 µg/mL）和FDC（32 µg/mL）呈现高水平耐药。两株菌均属于ST361克隆，携带WT基因。

结论：基线突变可能影响治疗效果，提示需要进一步研究耐药机制以优化治疗策略。

title: Analysis of Preimplantation and Clinical Outcomes of Two Cases by Oxford Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: It is challenging to distinguish embryos with a balanced translocation karyotype from a normal karyotype by existing conventional genetic testing methods. However, in germ-cell gamete generation, chromosome exchange and separation through cell meiosis form a different proportion of unbalanced gametes. Adverse birth events may occur, such as repeated miscarriages and fetal birth defects. In this study, the exact breakpoints of structural variation (SV) from two balanced translocation carrier families by using Nanopore long reads sequencing technology were obtained, and haplotype analysis and Sanger verified the accuracy of the detection results, confirming the application value of the Nanopore sequencing technology in the detection of balanced translocation before embryo implantation. Nanopore long-read sequencing was performed to find the precise breakpoint of chromosome-balanced translocation carriers. The breakpoints were subsequently verified by designing primers across the breakpoints and Sanger sequencing. Haplotype linkage analysis of SNPs which can be linked by a read block of families around the breakpoint regions was followed. After frozen (-thawed) embryo transfer (FET), prenatal cytogenetic analysis of amniotic fluid cells confirmed the predicted karyotypes from the transferred embryos. The presence of breakpoints was detected in three embryos of patient 1. No breakpoints were detected in either embryo of patient 2. One balanced translocated embryo from patient 1 and one normal euploid embryo from patient 2 were transplanted back into the patients, and amniotic fluid cells were analyzed for the karyotype of fetuses. The results were entirely consistent with the fetal karyotype. And through late follow-up, both patients successfully had a live birth fetus. The breakpoint location of the balanced chromosome translocation can be accurately found by Nanopore sequencing. The haplotype of carriers can be successfully constructed by Nanopore and sanger sequencing confirmed that the results were accurate. This is very advantageous for preimplantation genetic testing for chromosomal structural rearrangements (PGT-SR) detection in the families without proband.
authors: Jian Ou, Jiaojiao Wang, ... Jia Fei
citation: Ou, J., Wang, J., Sun, J. et al. Analysis of Preimplantation and Clinical Outcomes of Two Cases by Oxford Nanopore Sequencing. Reprod. Sci. 31 , 2123–2134 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1007/s43032-024-01470-6
description: It is challenging to distinguish embryos with a balanced translocation karyotype from a normal karyotype by existing conventional genetic testing...

ai.TLDR: 现有遗传检测方法难以区分平衡易位胚胎与正常胚胎，可能导致不良妊娠事件。本研究通过纳米孔长读长测序技术精准定位平衡易位断点，结合家系SNP等位基因分析和Sanger测序验证，成功实现胚胎植入前遗传检测。临床验证显示该技术可准确预测胚胎染色体状态，助力无携带者家系的染色体结构重排检测（PGT-SR）。
ai.translation: 现有常规遗传检测方法难以通过核型分析区分携带平衡易位的胚胎与正常胚胎。然而，在生殖细胞形成过程中，染色体通过减数分裂交换和分离形成不同比例的不平衡配子，可能导致反复流产和胎儿出生缺陷等不良妊娠事件。本研究通过纳米孔长读长测序技术获取了两例平衡易位携带者家系的结构变异（SV）精确断点，结合等位基因分析和Sanger测序验证了检测结果的准确性，证实了纳米孔测序技术在胚胎植入前平衡易位检测中的应用价值。通过纳米孔长读长测序定位染色体平衡易位携带者的精确断点，随后设计跨越断点的引物进行Sanger测序验证。对断点区域周围可由读段块连接的SNP进行等位基因连锁分析。在冻融胚胎移植（FET）后，通过羊水细胞产前细胞遗传学分析确认了移植胚胎的预测核型。患者1的三个胚胎中检测到断点，患者2的两个胚胎均未检测到断点。将患者1的1个平衡易位胚胎和患者2的1个正常二倍体胚胎移植回患者体内，对胎儿的核型进行羊水细胞分析。结果与胎儿核型完全一致。通过后期随访，两名患者均成功获得活产胎儿。纳米孔测序可准确找到平衡染色体易位的断点位置。通过纳米孔测序和Sanger测序成功构建携带者的等位基因，证实了检测结果的准确性。这对无携带者家系的植入前遗传检测（PGT-SR）具有重要优势。

title: Rapid brain tumor classification from sparse epigenomic data.
abstract: Although the intraoperative molecular diagnosis of the approximately 100 known brain tumor entities described to date has been a goal of neuropathology for the past decade, achieving this within a clinically relevant timeframe of under 1 h after biopsy collection remains elusive. Advances in third-generation sequencing have brought this goal closer, but established machine learning techniques rely on computationally intensive methods, making them impractical for live diagnostic workflows in clinical applications. Here we present MethyLYZR, a naive Bayesian framework enabling fully tractable, live classification of cancer epigenomes. For evaluation, we used nanopore sequencing to classify over 200 brain tumor samples, including 10 sequenced in a clinical setting next to the operating room, achieving highly accurate results within 15 min of sequencing. MethyLYZR can be run in parallel with an ongoing nanopore experiment with negligible computational overhead. Therefore, the only limiting factors for even faster time to results are DNA extraction time and the nanopore sequencer's maximum parallel throughput. Although more evidence from prospective studies is needed, our study suggests the potential applicability of MethyLYZR for live molecular classification of nervous system malignancies using nanopore sequencing not only for the neurosurgical intraoperative use case but also for other oncologic indications and the classification of tumors from cell-free DNA in liquid biopsies.
authors: Björn Brändl, Mara Steiger, Carolin Kubelt, Christian Rohrandt, Zhihan Zhu, Maximilian Evers, Gaojianyong Wang, Bernhard Schuldt, Ann-Kristin Afflerbach, Derek Wong, Amy Lum, Skarphedinn Halldorsson, Luna Djirackor, Henning Leske, Svetlana Magadeeva, Romualdas Smičius, Claudia Quedenau, Nils O Schmidt, Ulrich Schüller, Einar O Vik-Mo, Martin Proescholdt, Markus J Riemenschneider, Gelareh Zadeh, Ole Ammerpohl, Stephen Yip, Michael Synowitz, Alena van Bömmel, Helene Kretzmer, Franz-Josef Müller

ai.TLDR: 术中分子诊断脑肿瘤实体的挑战在于需在活检后1小时内完成临床相关时间框架内的分析。MethyLYZR通过朴素贝叶斯框架实现纳米孔测序数据的实时分类，可在15分钟内完成200余例脑肿瘤样本的高精度分类，显著缩短诊断时间。
ai.translation: 尽管过去十年神经病理学界一直在追求对约100种已知脑肿瘤实体进行术中分子诊断，但如何在活检后不到1小时内完成临床相关时间框架内的分析仍难以实现。第三代测序技术的进步使这一目标更近一步，但现有机器学习方法依赖计算密集型算法，难以应用于实时诊断流程。本文提出MethyLYZR，一种基于朴素贝叶斯框架的可完全追踪的实时癌症表观基因组分类方法。评估中我们使用纳米孔测序对200余例脑肿瘤样本进行分类，包括10例在手术室旁临床环境中实时测序的样本，可在测序后15分钟内获得高精度结果。MethyLYZR可与正在进行的纳米孔实验并行运行，计算开销可忽略不计。因此，即使更快的结果时间仅受限于DNA提取时间和纳米孔测序仪的最大并行吞吐量。尽管需要更多前瞻性研究证据，但我们的研究提示MethyLYZR可通过纳米孔测序实现神经系统恶性肿瘤的实时分子分类，不仅适用于神经外科术中场景，还可扩展至其他肿瘤指征及细胞外DNA液体活检中的肿瘤分类。

title: High-throughput nanopore DNA sequencing of large insert fosmid clones directly from bacterial colonies
abstract:
Fosmids and cosmids are vectors frequently used in functional metagenomic studies. With a large insert capacity (around 30 kb) they can encode dozens of cloned genes or in some cases, entire biochemical pathways. Fosmids with cloned inserts can be transferred to heterologous hosts and propagated to enable screening for new enzymes and metabolites. After screening, fosmids from clones with an activity of interest must be de novo sequenced, a critical step towards identification of the gene(s) of interest. In this work, we present a new approach for rapid and high-throughput fosmid sequencing directly from Escherichia coli colonies without liquid culturing or fosmid purification. Our sample preparation involves fosmid amplification with phi29 polymerase and then direct nanopore sequencing using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies system. We also present a bioinformatics pipeline termed "phiXXer" that facilitates both de novo read assembly and vector trimming to generate a linear sequence of the fosmid insert. Finally, we demonstrate accurate sequencing of 96 fosmids in a single run and validate the method using two fosmid libraries that contain cloned large insert ([~]30-40 kb) genomic or metagenomic DNA.

ImportanceLarge-insert clone (fosmids or cosmids) sequencing is challenging and arguably the most limiting step of functional metagenomic screening workflows. Our study establishes a new method for high-throughput nanopore sequencing of fosmid clones directly from lysed E. coli cells. It also describes a companion bioinformatic pipeline that enables de novo assembly of fosmid DNA insert sequences. The devised method widens the potential of functional metagenomic screening by providing a simple, high-throughput approach to fosmid clone sequencing that dramatically speeds the pace of discovery.
authors: Chuzel, L.; Sinha, A.; Cunningham, C. V.; Taron, C. H.

ai.TLDR: 功能宏基因组学研究中，fosmids和cosmids作为载体具有大插入容量（约30 kb），可编码多个基因或完整生化途径。传统方法需液态培养和纯化步骤，本研究提出直接从大肠杆菌菌落进行高通量纳米孔测序的新方法，显著提升筛选效率。
ai.translation: fosmids和cosmids是功能宏基因组学研究中常用的载体。它们具有较大的插入容量（约30 kb），可编码数十个克隆基因或在某些情况下整个生化途径。携带克隆插入片段的fosmids可转移至异源宿主进行培养，以筛选新酶和代谢产物。筛选后需对具有目标活性的克隆进行从头测序，这是识别目标基因的关键步骤。本研究提出一种新型方法，可直接从大肠杆菌菌落进行高通量fosmid测序，无需液态培养或fosmid纯化。样本制备通过phi29聚合酶进行fosmid扩增，随后使用牛津纳米孔技术系统进行直接测序。我们还开发了名为'phiXXer'的生物信息学流程，支持从头读段组装和载体修剪，生成fosmid插入片段的线性序列。最终，我们演示了单次运行中96个fosmids的准确测序，并通过包含克隆大插入（~30-40 kb）基因组或宏基因组DNA的两个fosmid文库验证了该方法。大插入克隆（fosmids或cosmids）测序具有挑战性，可能是功能宏基因组学筛选流程中最关键的限制步骤。本研究建立了一种新的高通量纳米孔测序方法，可直接从裂解的大肠杆菌细胞中进行fosmid克隆测序。同时描述了配套的生物信息学流程，支持fosmid DNA插入片段的从头组装。该方法通过提供简单、高通量的fosmid克隆测序方案，显著加速了功能宏基因组学筛选的发现速度。

title: NMDtxDB: Data-driven identification and annotation of human NMD target transcripts
abstract:
The nonsense-mediated RNA decay (NMD) pathway is a crucial mechanism of mRNA quality control. Current annotations of NMD substrate RNAs are rarely data-driven, but use general established rules. We introduce a dataset with 4 cell lines and combinations for SMG5, SMG6 and SMG7 knockdowns or SMG7 knockout. Based on this dataset, we implemented a workflow that combines Nanopore and Illumina sequencing to assemble a transcriptome, which is enriched for NMD target transcripts. Moreover, we use coding sequence information from Ensembl, Gencode consensus RiboSeq ORFs and OpenProt to enhance the CDS annotation of novel transcript isoforms. 302,889 transcripts were obtained from the transcriptome assembly process, out of which, 48,213 contain a premature stop codon and 6,433 are significantly up regulated in three or more comparisons of NMD active vs deficient cell lines.

We present an in-depth view on these results through the NMDtxDB database, which is available at https://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/NMDtxDB, and supports the study of NMD-sensitive transcripts. We open sourced our implementation of the respective web-application and analysis workflow at https://github.com/dieterich-lab/NMDtxDB and https://github.com/dieterich-lab/nmd-wf.
authors: Britto-Borges, T.; Gehring, N. H.; Boehm, V.; Dieterich, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究构建了包含4种细胞系的NMD底物RNA数据集，结合Nanopore与Illumina测序技术解析NMD靶向转录本。通过整合多组学数据，发现302,889个转录本中6,433个在NMD功能细胞系中显著高表达。
ai.translation: 无义介导的RNA降解（NMD）途径是mRNA质量控制的关键机制。当前NMD底物RNA的注释方法多依赖通用规则而非数据驱动。本研究构建了包含4种细胞系及SMG5、SMG6、SMG7敲低或SMG7敲除组合的数据集。基于该数据集，我们开发了结合Nanopore与Illumina测序技术的转录组组装流程，该转录组富集了NMD靶向转录本。通过整合Ensembl编码序列信息、Gencode共识RiboSeq ORF和OpenProt数据，提升了新型转录本的CDS注释准确性。转录组组装共获得302,889个转录本，其中48,213个包含提前终止密码子，6,433个在NMD功能型与缺陷型细胞系的3次以上比较中显著高表达。通过NMDtxDB数据库（https://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/NMDtxDB）呈现研究结果，支持NMD敏感转录本的深入研究。相关Web应用及分析流程已开源（https://github.com/dieterich-lab/NMDtxDB, https://github.com/dieterich-lab/nmd-wf）。

title: Non-Skewed X-inactivation Results in NF-κB Essential Modulator (NEMO) Δ-exon 5-autoinflammatory Syndrome (NEMO-NDAS) in a Female with Incontinentia Pigmenti.
abstract:
PURPOSE: Genetic hypomorphic defects in X chromosomal IKBKG coding for the NF-κB essential modulator (NEMO) lead to ectodermal dysplasia and immunodeficiency in males and the skin disorder incontinentia pigmenti (IP) in females, respectively. NF-κB essential modulator (NEMO) Δ-exon 5-autoinflammatory syndrome (NEMO-NDAS) is a systemic autoinflammatory disease caused by alternative splicing and increased proportion of NEMO-Δex5. We investigated a female carrier presenting with IP and NEMO-NDAS due to non-skewed X-inactivation.

METHODS: IKBKG transcripts were quantified in peripheral blood mononuclear cells isolated from the patient, her mother, and healthy controls using RT-PCR and nanopore sequencing. Corresponding proteins were analyzed by western blotting and flow cytometry. Besides toll-like receptor (TLR) and tumor necrosis factor (TNF) signaling, the interferon signature, cytokine production and X-inactivation status were investigated.

RESULTS: IP and autoinflammation with recurrent fever, oral ulcers, hepatitis, and neutropenia, but no immunodeficiency was observed in a female patient. Besides moderately reduced NEMO signaling function, type I interferonopathy, and elevated IL-18 and CXCL10 were found. She and her mother both carried the heterozygous variant c.613 C > T p.(Gln205*) in exon 5 of IKBKG previously reported in NEMO-deficient patients. However, X-inactivation was skewed in the mother, but not in the patient. Alternative splicing led to increased ratios of NEMO-Dex5 over full-length protein in peripheral blood cell subsets causing autoinflammation. Clinical symptoms partially resolved under treatment with TNF inhibitors.

CONCLUSION: Non-skewed X-inactivation can lead to NEMO-NDAS in females with IP carrying hypomorphic IKBKG variants due to alternative splicing and increased proportions of NEMO-∆ex5.
authors: Jessica Eigemann, Ales Janda, Catharina Schuetz, Min Ae Lee-Kirsch, Ansgar Schulz, Manfred Hoenig, Ingrid Furlan, Eva-Maria Jacobsen, Julia Zinngrebe, Sarah Peters, Cosima Drewes, Reiner Siebert, Eva-Maria Rump, Marita Führer, Myriam Lorenz, Ulrich Pannicke, Uwe Kölsch, Klaus-Michael Debatin, Horst von Bernuth, Klaus Schwarz, Kerstin Felgentreff

ai.TLDR: 本研究探讨了非偏斜X染色体失活在携带IKBKG功能减弱突变的女性患者中导致NEMO-NDAS的机制。通过分析转录组和蛋白表达发现，选择性剪接导致NEMO-Dex5与全长蛋白比例增加，引发自身炎症反应，但未出现免疫缺陷。
ai.translation:
目的：X染色体上的IKBKG基因功能减弱突变会导致男性出现皮肤发育不良和免疫缺陷，女性则表现为色素失禁症（IP）。NF-κB关键调节因子（NEMO）Δ外显子5自身炎症综合征（NEMO-NDAS）是由选择性剪接和NEMO-Δex5比例增加引起的系统性自身炎症疾病。我们研究了一位携带IP和NEMO-NDAS的女性携带者，其X染色体失活未发生偏斜。

方法：通过RT-PCR和纳米孔测序对患者、其母亲及健康对照组的外周血单核细胞中的IKBKG转录本进行定量分析。采用Western blot和流式细胞术检测对应蛋白。除研究TLR和TNF信号通路外，还分析了I型干扰素特征、细胞因子产生及X染色体失活状态。

结果：一名女性患者表现出IP和自身炎症症状，包括反复发热、口腔溃疡、肝炎和中性粒细胞减少，但未见免疫缺陷。除NEMO信号功能中度减弱外，还发现I型干扰素病和IL-18、CXCL10水平升高。患者及其母亲均携带IKBKG外显子5的杂合突变c.613 C>T p.(Gln205*)，但母亲X染色体失活发生偏斜，患者则未发生偏斜。选择性剪接导致外周血细胞亚群中NEMO-Dex5与全长蛋白比例增加，引发自身炎症。使用TNF抑制剂治疗后临床症状部分缓解。

结论：非偏斜X染色体失活可导致携带IKBKG功能减弱突变的女性患者出现NEMO-NDAS，这是由于选择性剪接和NEMO-Δex5比例增加所致。

title: Single-cell Rapid Capture Hybridization sequencing (scRaCH-seq) to reliably detect isoform usage and coding mutations in targeted genes at a single-cell level
abstract: Single-cell long-read sequencing has transformed our understanding of isoform usage and the mutation heterogeneity between cells. Despite unbiased in-depth analysis, the low sequencing throughput often results in insufficient read coverage thereby limiting our ability to perform mutation calling for specific genes. Here, we developed a single-cell Rapid Capture Hybridization sequencing (scRaCH-seq) method that demonstrated high specificity and efficiency in capturing targeted transcripts using long-read sequencing, allowing an in-depth analysis of mutation status and transcript usage for genes of interest. The method includes creating a probe panel for transcript capture, using barcoded primers for pooling and efficient sequencing via Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. scRaCH-seq is applicable to stored and indexed single-cell cDNA which allows analysis to be combined with existing short-read RNA-seq datasets. In our investigation of BTK and SF3B1 genes in samples from patients with chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL), we detected SF3B1 isoforms and mutations with high sensitivity. Integration with short-read scRNA-seq data revealed significant gene expression differences in SF3B1-mutated CLL cells, though it did not impact the sensitivity of the anti-cancer drug venetoclax. scRaCH-seqs capability to study long-read transcripts of multiple genes makes it a powerful tool for single-cell genomics.
authors: Peng, H.; Jabbari, J. S.; Tian, L.; Chua, C. C.; Anstee, N. S.; Amin, N.; Wei, A. H.; Davidson, N. M.; Roberts, A. W.; Huang, D. C. S.; Ritchie, M. E.; Thijssen, R.

ai.TLDR: 单细胞长读长测序技术(scRaCH-seq)通过高通量捕获目标转录本，解决了传统方法在特定基因突变检测中的覆盖不足问题。该方法结合长读长测序与靶向捕获技术，实现了对BTK和SF3B1基因的高灵敏度突变检测，并揭示了SF3B1突变对慢性淋巴细胞白血病细胞基因表达的影响。
ai.translation: 单细胞长读长测序技术已彻底改变了我们对同源异构体使用模式及细胞间突变异质性的理解。尽管能够进行无偏倚的深度分析，但低通量测序常导致读段覆盖不足，限制了特定基因的突变检测能力。本研究开发了一种单细胞快速捕获杂交测序(scRaCH-seq)方法，该技术通过长读长测序实现了对目标转录本的高特异性与高效率捕获，使关键基因的突变状态和转录本使用情况得以深入分析。该方法包含构建转录本捕获探针文库、采用条形码引物进行样本合并及通过牛津纳米孔技术平台实现高效测序。scRaCH-seq适用于存储且已索引的单细胞cDNA，可与现有短读长RNA-seq数据集进行联合分析。在对慢性淋巴细胞白血病(CLL)患者样本中BTK和SF3B1基因的研究中，我们以高灵敏度检测到SF3B1异构体及突变。与短读长单细胞RNA测序数据整合分析显示，SF3B1突变的CLL细胞存在显著基因表达差异，但未影响抗肿瘤药物维奈托克的敏感性。scRaCH-seq对多基因长读长转录本的研究能力，使其成为单细胞基因组学的强大工具。

title: The potential clinical utility of Whole Genome Sequencing for patients with cancer: evaluation of a regional implementation of the 100,000 Genomes Project.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: The 100,000 Genomes Project established infrastructure for Whole Genome Sequencing (WGS) in the United Kingdom.

METHODS: A retrospective study of cancer patients recruited to the 100,000 Genomes Project by the West Midlands Genomics Medicine Centre, evaluating clinical relevance of results.

RESULTS: After excluding samples with no sequencing data (1678/4851; 34.6%), 3166 sample sets (germline and somatic) from 3067 participants were sequenced. Results of 1256 participants (41.0%) were interpreted (excluding participants who died (308/3067; 10.0%) or were clinically excluded (1503/3067; 49.0%)). Of these, 323 (25.7%) had no variants in genes which may alter management (Domain 1 genes). Of the remaining 933 participants, 552 (59.2%) had clinical recommendations made (718 recommendations in total). These included therapeutic recommendations (377/933; 40.4%), such as clinical trial, unlicensed or licensed therapies or high TMB recommendations, and germline variants warranting clinical genetics review (85/933; 9.1%). At the last follow up, 20.2% of all recommendations were followed (145/718). However, only a small proportion of therapeutic recommendations were followed (5.1%, 25/491).

CONCLUSIONS: The 100,000 Genomes Project has established infrastructure and regional experience to support personalised cancer care. The majority of those with successful sequencing had actionable variants. Ensuring GTAB recommendations are followed will maximise benefits for patients.
authors: Elaine Y L Leung, Helen L Robbins, Shafquat Zaman, Neeraj Lal, Dion Morton, Lisa Dew, Anthony P Williams, Yvonne Wallis, Jennie Bell, Manoj Raghavan, Gary Middleton, Andrew D Beggs

ai.TLDR: 100,000 Genomes项目在英国建立了全基因组测序（WGS）的基础设施。研究显示，大多数成功测序的患者具有可操作的基因变异，但仅有少数治疗建议被实际执行。
ai.translation:
背景：100,000 Genomes项目在英国建立了全基因组测序（Whole Genome Sequencing, WGS）的基础设施。

方法：对通过西米德兰基因组医学中心招募的癌症患者进行回顾性研究，评估测序结果的临床相关性。

结果：在排除了无测序数据的样本（1678/4851; 34.6%）后，3067名参与者中有3166个样本集（包括体细胞和胚系）被测序。1256名参与者（41.0%）的结果被解读（排除了死亡的参与者（308/3067; 10.0%）或临床排除的参与者（1503/3067; 49.0%））。其中，323名（25.7%）在可能改变管理的基因（Domain 1 genes）中没有变异。在剩下的933名参与者中，552名（59.2%）获得了临床建议（共718条建议）。这些建议包括治疗建议（377/933; 40.4%），如临床试验、非授权或授权疗法或高TMB建议，以及需要临床遗传学评估的胚系变异（85/933; 9.1%）。在最近一次随访中，所有建议中有20.2%（145/718）被执行。然而，仅有少数治疗建议被执行（5.1%，25/491）。

结论：100,000 Genomes项目已建立了支持个性化癌症治疗的基础设施和区域经验。大多数成功测序的患者具有可操作的变异。确保GTAB建议被执行将最大化患者受益。

title: Utility of long-read sequencing for All of Us
abstract: The All of Us (AoU) initiative aims to sequence the genomes of over one million Americans from diverse ethnic backgrounds to improve personalized medical care. In a recent technical pilot, we compare the performance of traditional short-read sequencing with long-read sequencing in a small cohort of samples from the HapMap project and two AoU control samples representing eight datasets. Our analysis reveals substantial differences in the ability of these technologies to accurately sequence complex medically relevant genes, particularly in terms of gene coverage and pathogenic variant identification. We also consider the advantages and challenges of using low coverage sequencing to increase sample numbers in large cohort analysis. Our results show that HiFi reads produce the most accurate results for both small and large variants. Further, we present a cloud-based pipeline to optimize SNV, indel and SV calling at scale for long-reads analysis. These results lead to widespread improvements across AoU.
authors: M. Mahmoud, Y. Huang, ... F. J. Sedlazeck
citation: Mahmoud, M., Huang, Y., Garimella, K. et al. Utility of long-read sequencing for All of Us. Nat Commun 15 , 837 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-44804-3
description: The All of Us (AoU) initiative aims to sequence the genomes of over one million Americans from diverse ethnic backgrounds to improve personalized...

ai.TLDR: All of Us计划旨在通过测序百万名美国人的基因组提升个性化医疗。研究对比了短读测序与长读测序在复杂医学相关基因的测序准确性差异，发现HiFi读段在变异检测中表现最优。基于云平台的分析流程显著提升了大规模长读测序的SNV/indel/SV检测效率。
ai.translation: All of Us（AoU）计划旨在对超过一百万名具有多样族裔背景的美国人进行基因组测序，以改善个性化医疗。在最近的技术试点中，我们对比了传统短读测序与长读测序在HapMap项目小样本队列及两个AoU对照样本（代表八个数据集）中的性能表现。分析结果显示，这两种技术在复杂医学相关基因的准确测序能力存在显著差异，特别是在基因覆盖度和致病性变异识别方面。我们还探讨了低覆盖度测序在大规模队列分析中增加样本量的优势与挑战。结果表明，HiFi读段在小变异和大变异检测中均产生最准确的结果。此外，我们提出了一种基于云平台的流程，以优化长读测序的SNV、indel和SV大规模检测。这些成果为AoU计划带来了广泛的技术改进。

title: Transverse Aortic COnstriction Multi-omics Analysis (TACOMA) uncovers pathophysiological cardiac molecular mechanisms
abstract:
Time-course multi-omics data of a murine model of progressive heart failure induced by transverse aortic constriction (TAC) provide insights into the molecular mechanisms that are causatively involved in contractile failure and structural cardiac remodelling. We employ Illumina-based transcriptomics, Nanopore sequencing, and mass spectrometry-based proteomics on samples from the left ventricle (LV) and right ventricle (RV, RNA only) of the heart at 1, 7, 21, and 56 days following TAC and Sham surgery. Here, we present TACOMA, as an interactive web-application that integrates and visualizes transcriptomics and proteomics data collected in a TAC time-course experiment. TACOMA enables users to visualize the expression profile of known and novel genes and protein products thereof. Importantly, we capture alternative splicing events by assessing differential transcript and exon usage as well. Co-expression-based clustering algorithms and functional enrichment analysis revealed overrepresented annotations of biological processes and molecular functions at the protein and gene levels. To enhance data integration, TACOMA synchronizes transcriptomics and proteomics profiles, enabling cross-omics comparisons. With TACOMA (https://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/tacoma), we offer a rich web-based resource to uncover molecular events and biological processes implicated in contractile failure and cardiac hypertrophy. For example, we highlight: (i) changes in metabolic genes and proteins in the time course of hypertrophic growth and contractile impairment; (ii) identification of RNA splicing changes in the expression of Tpm2 isoforms between RV and LV; and (iii) novel transcripts and genes likely contributing to the pathogenesis of heart failure. We plan to extend these data with additional environmental and genetic models of heart failure to decipher common and distinct molecular changes in heart diseases of different aetiologies.

Database URLhttps://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/tacoma
authors: Gjerga, E.; Dewenter, M.; Britto-Borges, T.; Grosso, J.; Stein, F.; Eschenbach, J.; Rettel, M.; Backs, J.; Dieterich, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过小鼠心力衰竭模型的多组学数据揭示了收缩功能障碍和心脏重构的分子机制。开发的TACOMA平台整合了转录组与蛋白质组数据，支持跨组学分析，为心力衰竭相关分子事件提供了资源。研究发现代谢基因变化、RNA剪接差异及新型转录本与心衰发病机制相关。
ai.translation: 横断主动脉缩窄（TAC）诱导的小鼠渐进性心力衰竭时间进程多组学数据揭示了导致收缩功能障碍和结构性心脏重构的分子机制。我们采用Illumina转录组学、Nanopore测序和基于质谱的蛋白质组学技术，对TAC和假手术后1、7、21和56天小鼠心脏左心室（LV）和右心室（RV，仅RNA）样本进行分析。本研究开发了TACOMA交互式网络应用，整合并可视化TAC时间进程实验的转录组和蛋白质组数据。TACOMA支持用户可视化已知和新型基因及其蛋白产物的表达谱，同时通过差异转录本和外显子使用分析捕捉替代剪接事件。基于共表达的聚类算法和功能富集分析揭示了蛋白质和基因水平上生物过程和分子功能的显著注释。为增强数据整合，TACOMA同步转录组和蛋白质组谱型，实现跨组学比较。通过TACOMA（https://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/tacoma）提供的丰富网络资源，可揭示收缩功能障碍和心脏肥厚相关的分子事件和生物学过程。例如，我们重点展示了：(i) 肥厚生长和收缩功能障碍时间进程中的代谢基因和蛋白变化；(ii) RV与LV间Tpm2亚型RNA剪接变化的鉴定；(iii) 可能参与心衰发病机制的新型转录本和基因。计划通过额外环境和遗传性心衰模型扩展这些数据，以解析不同病因心病的共同和特异性分子变化。数据库URL: https://shiny.dieterichlab.org/app/tacoma

title: Comparative genomics reveals intra and inter species variation in the pathogenic fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis
abstract:
The Global Panzootic Lineage (GPL) of the amphibian pathogen Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis (Bd) has been described as a main driver of amphibian extinctions on nearly every continent. Near complete genomes of three Bd-GPL strains have enabled studies of the pathogen but the genomic features that set Bd-GPL apart from other B. dendrobatidis lineages is not well understood due to a lack of high-quality genome assemblies and annotations from other lineages. We used Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) DNA sequencing to assemble high-quality genomes of three Bd-BRAZIL isolates and one non-pathogen outgroup species Polyrhizophydium stewartii (Ps) strain JEL0888 and compared these to genomes of previously sequenced Bd-GPL strains. The Bd-BRAZIL assemblies range in size between 22.0 and 26.1 Mb and encode 8495-8620 protein-coding genes for each strain. A pangenome is defined as all the genes in a species including the core genome, genes found in every strain, and the accessory genome, genes found in only some strains (Brockhurst et al. 2019). To date, a comprehensive analysis identifying the core and accessory genes within B. dendrobatidis has not been conducted. Furthermore, while previous studies have examined the gene transcription profiles of Bd-GPL and Bd-BRAZIL strains (McDonald et al. 2020), they do not account for the genomic differences between these strains. Our pangenome analysis provides insight into shared and lineage-specific gene content and how B. dendrobatidis genotype affects recovery of RNAseq transcripts from different strains. We hypothesize that gene content differences exist between the B. dendrobatidis lineages and genomic differences, such as gene family expansions or gene sequence variation, affect alignment and enumeration of transcriptomic data when relying on a single reference genome. The pangenome analysis revealed a core genome consisting of 6278 conserved gene families, and an accessory genome with 202 Bd-BRAZIL and 172 Bd-GPL specific gene families. We discovered gene copy number differences in five pathogenicity gene families: M36 Peptidase, Crinkler Necrosis Genes (CRN), Aspartyl Peptidase, Carbohydrate-Binding Module-18 (CBM18), and S41 Protease, between Bd-BRAZIL and Bd-GPL strains. However, none of the five families were expanded in Bd-GPL compared to Bd-BRAZIL strains. Comparison between the Batrachochytrium genus and two closely related non-pathogenic saprophytic chytrids identified differences in sequence and protein domain counts. We further test these new Bd-BRAZIL genomes to assess their utility as reference genomes for transcriptome alignment and analysis. Our analysis examines the genomic variation between strains in Bd-BRAZIL and Bd-GPL and offers insights into the application of these genomes as reference genomes for future studies.

SignificanceThe geographically defined enzootic populations of amphibian pathogen Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis harbor gene context variation revealed in pan-genome analyses. Long read sequencing is required to fully capture this diversity as some recently duplicated and potential virulence gene families are undercounted in short-read only genome assemblies. This genetic variation can impact estimates of gene expression differences between strains if a single genome reference is used. It is necessary to consider the pan-genome diversity of the multiple lineages of this important amphibian pathogen and perhaps other fungal pathogens when engaging in studies of adaptation, virulence, and comparative biology of a species.
authors: Yacoub, M. N.; Stajich, J. E.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了两栖动物病原体Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis (Bd)的全球流行株(Bd-GPL)与其他菌株的基因组差异，发现其泛基因组包含核心基因和特异性基因家族，基因组差异可能影响转录组分析。通过长读长测序技术组装的Bd-BRAZIL菌株基因组显示，部分毒力基因家族拷贝数存在差异，但Bd-GPL未表现出基因家族扩张。
ai.translation: 全球流行株(GPL)的两栖动物病原体Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis (Bd)被描述为导致几乎每个大陆两栖动物灭绝的主要驱动因素。已有三种Bd-GPL菌株的近完整基因组测序使病原体研究成为可能，但其他B. dendrobatidis菌株的高质量基因组组装和注释不足，导致其基因组特征尚不明确。本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术(ONT)DNA测序，组装了三种Bd-BRAZIL分离株和一种非病原体外群物种Polyrhizophydium stewartii (Ps)菌株JEL0888的高质量基因组，并与先前测序的Bd-GPL菌株基因组进行比较。Bd-BRAZIL菌株基因组大小在22.0-26.1 Mb之间，每个菌株编码8495-8620个蛋白质编码基因。泛基因组定义为物种中所有基因，包括核心基因组（所有菌株共有的基因）、可变基因组（仅部分菌株含有的基因）（Brockhurst等，2019）。目前尚未开展对B. dendrobatidis核心和可变基因的全面分析。尽管先前研究已比较了Bd-GPL和Bd-BRAZIL菌株的基因转录谱（McDonald等，2020），但未考虑这些菌株间的基因组差异。我们的泛基因组分析揭示了共享基因和谱系特异性基因内容，以及B. dendrobatidis基因型如何影响不同菌株的RNA测序转录本回收。我们假设不同B. dendrobatidis谱系间存在基因内容差异，基因家族扩张或序列变异等基因组差异会影响依赖单一参考基因组的转录组数据比对和计数。泛基因组分析显示核心基因组包含6278个保守基因家族，可变基因组包含202个Bd-BRAZIL特异性基因家族和172个Bd-GPL特异性基因家族。我们发现Bd-BRAZIL与Bd-GPL菌株在五个毒力基因家族（M36蛋白酶、Crinkler坏死基因(CRN)、天冬氨酸蛋白酶、碳水化合物结合模块-18 (CBM18)和S41蛋白酶）中存在基因拷贝数差异，但Bd-GPL菌株未表现出比Bd-BRAZIL菌株更多的基因家族扩张。与Batrachochytrium属及两个密切相关非病原性腐生水霉的比较显示序列和蛋白质结构域计数存在差异。我们进一步测试了新组装的Bd-BRAZIL基因组作为转录组比对和分析参考基因组的实用性。分析探讨了Bd-BRAZIL和Bd-GPL菌株间的基因组变异，并为未来研究这些基因组作为参考基因组的应用提供了见解。

title: An explainable framework for cross-platform DNA methylation-based classification of cancer
abstract: DNA methylation-based classification of brain tumors has emerged as a powerful and indispensable diagnostic technique. Initial implementations have used methylation microarrays for data generation, but different sequencing approaches are increasingly used. Most current classifiers, however, rely on a fixed methylation feature space, rendering them incompatible with other platforms, especially different flavors of DNA sequencing. Here, we describe crossNN, a neural network-based machine learning framework which can accurately classify tumor entities using DNA methylation profiles obtained from different platforms and with different epigenome coverage and sequencing depth. It outperforms other deep- and shallow machine learning models with respect to precision as well as simplicity and computational requirements while still being fully explainable. Validation in a large cohort of >1,900 tumors profiled using different microarray and sequencing platforms, including low-pass nanopore and targeted bisulfite sequencing, demonstrates the robustness and scalability of the model.
authors: Yuan, D.; Jugas, R.; Pokorna, P.; Sterba, J.; Slaby, O.; Schmid, S.; Siewert, C.; Osberg, B.; Capper, D.; Zeiner, P.; Weber, K.; Harter, P.; Jabareen, N.; Mackowiak, S.; Ishaque, N.; Eils, R.; Lukassen, S.; Euskirchen, P.

ai.TLDR: 基于DNA甲基化的脑肿瘤分类技术已成为重要诊断手段，但现有方法因依赖固定特征空间导致平台兼容性差。crossNN框架通过神经网络实现跨平台、多测序深度的准确分类，验证显示其模型具有高鲁棒性和可扩展性。
ai.translation: 基于DNA甲基化的脑肿瘤分类技术已发展为强大的诊断手段。早期研究主要采用甲基化微阵列生成数据，但随着测序技术的发展，不同测序方法逐渐被应用。然而，大多数现有分类器依赖固定的甲基化特征空间，导致其与其他平台（特别是不同类型的DNA测序技术）不兼容。本文提出crossNN框架，这是一种基于神经网络的机器学习方法，能够利用来自不同平台的DNA甲基化谱型进行肿瘤实体的准确分类，且具有不同的表观组覆盖度和测序深度。该模型在精确度、模型简化程度及计算需求方面均优于其他深度和浅层机器学习模型，同时保持完全可解释性。通过在超过1,900例肿瘤的大规模队列中验证，包括使用低通量纳米孔测序和靶向亚硫酸氢盐测序等不同微阵列及测序平台，结果证实了该模型的稳健性和可扩展性。

title: Dissecting the membrane association mechanism of aerolysin pore at femtomolar concentrations using water as a probe
abstract: Aerolysin is a bacterial pore-forming toxin able to form transmembrane pores at the host plasma membrane of narrow internal diameter and great stability. These assets make it a highly promising nanopore for the detection of biopolymers such as nucleic acids and peptides. While much is known about aerolysin from a microbiological and structural side, its membrane association and pore-formation mechanism are not yet fully disclosed. Here, we studied the interaction of femtomolar concentrations of aerolysin and its mutants with liposomes in aqueous solution using angle-resolved second harmonic scattering (AR-SHS), in combination with single-channel current measurements. The measurements were so sensitive to detect electrostatic changes on the membrane-bound aerolysin induced by pH variation induced by the changes in the hydration shell of aerolysin. We reported for the first time the membrane binding affinity of aerolysin at different stages of the pore formation mechanism: while wt aerolysin has a binding affinity as high as 20 fM, the quasi-pore state and the prepore state show gradually decreasing membrane affinities, incomplete insertion and pore opening signature. Moreover, we quantitatively characterized the membrane affinity of mutants relevant for applications to nanopore sensing. This approach opens new possibilities to efficiently screen biological pores suitable for conducting molecular sensing and sequencing measurements, as well as to probe pore forming processes.
authors: Roesel, T.; Cao, C.; Bada Juarez, J. F.; Dal Peraro, M.; Roke, S.

ai.TLDR: Aerolysin作为一种细菌孔形成毒素，具有形成稳定跨膜孔道的潜力，适用于生物分子检测。研究通过AR-SHS和单通道电流测量技术，首次揭示了其在不同孔形成阶段的膜结合亲和力变化，为纳米孔传感应用提供了新方法。
ai.translation: Aerolysin是一种细菌孔形成毒素，能够在其宿主细胞膜上形成直径狭窄且高度稳定的跨膜孔道。这些特性使其成为检测核酸和肽等生物大分子的极具前景的纳米孔。尽管在微生物学和结构学方面对Aerolysin已有较多研究，但其膜结合机制和孔形成过程仍不完全明确。本研究通过角度分辨二次谐波散射（AR-SHS）技术结合单通道电流测量，研究了飞摩尔浓度的Aerolysin及其突变体在水溶液中与脂质体的相互作用。实验结果对膜结合Aerolysin因水合层变化引起的pH波动导致的静电变化具有极高的灵敏度。首次报道了Aerolysin在孔形成不同阶段的膜结合亲和力：野生型Aerolysin的结合亲和力高达20 fM，而准孔态和前孔态表现出逐渐降低的膜亲和力、不完全插入和孔开放特征。此外，定量表征了与纳米孔传感应用相关的突变体膜亲和力。该方法为高效筛选适用于分子传感和测序的生物孔道，以及探究孔形成过程提供了新思路。

title: Development and validation of a long-read metabarcoding platform for the detection of filarial worm pathogens of animals and humans
abstract:
### Background

Filarial worms are important vector-borne pathogens of a large range of animal hosts, including humans, and are responsible for numerous debilitating neglected tropical diseases such as, lymphatic filariasis caused by *Wuchereria bancrofti* and *Brugia* spp., as well as loiasis caused by *Loa loa*. Moreover, some emerging or difficult-to-eliminate filarioid pathogens are zoonotic using animals like canines as reservoir hosts, for example *Dirofilaria* sp. ‘hongkongensis’. Diagnosis of filariasis through commonly available methods, like microscopy, can be challenging as microfilaremia may wane below the limit of detection. In contrast, conventional PCR methods are more sensitive and specific but may show limited ability to detect coinfections as well as emerging and/or novel pathogens. Use of deep-sequencing technologies obviate these challenges, providing sensitive detection of entire parasite communities, whilst also being better suited for the characterisation of rare or novel pathogens. Therefore, we developed a novel long-read metabarcoding assay for deep-sequencing the filarial nematode cytochrome c oxidase subunit I gene on Oxford Nanopore Technologies’ (ONT) MinION™ sequencer. We assessed the overall performance of our assay using kappa statistics to compare it to commonly used diagnostic methods for filarial worm detection, such as conventional PCR (cPCR) with Sanger sequencing and the microscopy-based modified Knott’s test (MKT).

### Results

We confirmed our metabarcoding assay can characterise filarial parasites from a diverse range of genera, including, *Breinlia*, *Brugia*, *Cercopithifilaria*, *Dipetalonema*, *Dirofilaria*, *Onchocerca*, *Setaria*, *Stephanofilaria* and *Wuchereria*. We demonstrated proof-of-concept for this assay by using blood samples from Sri Lankan dogs, whereby we identified infections with the filarioids *Acanthocheilonema reconditum*, *Brugia* sp. Sri Lanka genotype and zoonotic *Dirofilaria* sp. ‘hongkongensis’. When compared to traditionally used diagnostics, such as the MKT and cPCR with Sanger sequencing, we identified an additional filarioid species and over 15% more mono- and coinfections.

### Conclusions

Our developed metabarcoding assay may show broad applicability for the metabarcoding and diagnosis of the full spectrum of filarioids from a wide range of animal hosts, including mammals and vectors, whilst the utilisation of ONT’ small and portable MinION™ means that such methods could be deployed for field use.
authors: Lucas G. Huggins, Ushani Atapattu, ... Vito Colella
citation: Huggins, L.G., Atapattu, U., Young, N.D. et al. Development and validation of a long-read metabarcoding platform for the detection of filarial worm pathogens of animals and humans. BMC Microbiol 24 , 28 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12866-023-03159-3
