ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于长读长测序的宏基因组条形码检测方法，用于丝虫病原体的高灵敏度检测。该方法通过ONT MinION™平台实现对多种丝虫病原体的全面鉴定，相比传统诊断手段显著提升了对混合感染和新型病原体的检测能力。
ai.translation:
丝虫病原体是多种动物宿主（包括人类）的重要媒介传播病原体，导致淋巴丝虫病（由班氏丝虫和布鲁格ia属引起）和洛亚丝虫病（由洛亚丝虫引起）等严重热带疾病。部分新兴或难以根除的丝虫病原体通过动物宿主（如犬类）传播，例如‘香港丝虫’。传统显微镜检测法因微丝蚴数量低于检测限而难以诊断，而常规PCR方法虽灵敏度高但难以检测混合感染及新型病原体。深度测序技术可克服这些局限，实现对整个寄生虫群落的敏感检测，并更适用于罕见或新型病原体的鉴定。因此，我们开发了一种新型长读长宏基因组条形码检测方法，用于对牛津纳米基因科技（ONT）MinION™测序仪进行丝虫线虫细胞色素c氧化酶亚基I基因的深度测序。通过Kappa统计学方法评估该检测方法与常规诊断手段（如常规PCR结合Sanger测序及基于显微镜的改良Knott氏试验）的整体性能。

我们验证了该宏基因组条形码检测方法可鉴定来自多种属的丝虫病原体，包括Breinlia、Brugia、Cercopithifilaria、Dipetalonema、Dirofilaria、Onchocerca、Setaria、Stephanofilaria和Wuchereria。通过使用斯里兰卡犬的血液样本进行概念验证，我们鉴定了丝虫病原体Acanthocheilonema reconditum、斯里兰卡基因型Brugia sp.及人畜共患病Dirofilaria sp.‘hongkongensis’的感染。与传统诊断方法（如改良Knott氏试验和Sanger测序结合常规PCR）相比，我们额外鉴定了一个丝虫病原体物种，并发现超过15%的单感染和混合感染病例。

我们的开发宏基因组条形码检测方法可能广泛适用于从多种动物宿主（包括哺乳动物和媒介）中鉴定丝虫病原体的全谱系，而ONT MinION™的小型便携特性使得此类方法可应用于现场检测。

title: An Oxford Nanopore Technology-Based Hepatitis B Virus Sequencing Protocol Suitable For Genomic Surveillance Within Clinical Diagnostic Settings.
abstract: Chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection remains a significant public health concern, particularly in Africa, where there is a substantial burden. HBV is an enveloped virus, with isolates being classified into ten phylogenetically distinct genotypes (A - J) determined based on full-genome sequence data or reverse hybridization-based diagnostic tests. In practice, limitations are noted in that diagnostic sequencing, generally using Sanger sequencing, tends to focus only on the S-gene, yielding little or no information on intra-patient HBV genetic diversity with very low-frequency variants and reverse hybridization detects only known genotype-specific mutations. To resolve these limitations, we developed an Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT)-based HBV genotyping protocol suitable for clinical virology, yielding complete HBV genome sequences and extensive data on intra-patient HBV diversity. Specifically, the protocol involves tiling-based PCR amplification of HBV sequences, library preparation using the ONT Rapid Barcoding Kit, ONT GridION sequencing, genotyping using Genome Detective software, recombination analysis using jpHMM and RDP5 software, and drug resistance profiling using Geno2pheno software. We prove the utility of our protocol by efficiently generating and characterizing high-quality near full-length HBV genomes from 148 left-over diagnostic Hepatitis B patient samples obtained in the Western Cape province of South Africa, providing valuable insights into the genetic diversity and epidemiology of HBV in this region of the world.
authors: Tshiabuila, D.; Choga, W.; San, J. E.; Maponga, T.; Preiser, W.; van Zyl, G.; Moir, M.; van Wyk, S.; Giandhari, J.; Pillay, S.; Anyaneji, U. J.; Lessells, R.; Naidoo, Y.; Sanko, T. J.; Wilkinson, E.; Tegally, H.; Baxter, C.; Martin, D.; de Oliveira, T.

ai.TLDR: 慢性乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染仍是非洲等地区的重大公共卫生问题，传统诊断方法如Sanger测序和反向杂交法存在局限性，难以提供患者体内HBV遗传多样性及低频变异信息。本研究开发的基于Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）的HBV基因分型协议，可生成近完整基因组序列并揭示基因组多样性，成功应用于南非西开普省148例诊断样本，为该地区HBV流行病学研究提供重要数据。
ai.translation: 慢性乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染仍是全球重要的公共卫生问题，尤其在非洲地区负担沉重。HBV是一种包膜病毒，根据全基因组序列数据或基于反向杂交的诊断测试，其分离株被分为十个系统发育上不同的基因型（A-J）。然而，实际应用中发现传统诊断测序方法存在局限性，通常采用Sanger测序仅聚焦于S基因，难以提供有关患者体内HBV遗传多样性及低频变异的信息，而反向杂交法仅能检测已知的基因型特异性突变。为解决这些问题，我们开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technology（ONT）的HBV基因分型协议，适用于临床病毒学检测，可获得完整的HBV基因组序列及丰富的患者体内HBV遗传多样性数据。该协议具体包括基于拼接的PCR扩增、使用ONT Rapid Barcoding Kit进行文库制备、ONT GridION测序、Genome Detective软件进行基因分型、jpHMM和RDP5软件进行重组分析、Geno2pheno软件进行药物耐药性分析。通过高效生成和表征148例南非西开普省剩余诊断乙肝患者样本的高质量近完整HBV基因组，我们为该地区HBV的遗传多样性及流行病学研究提供了重要见解。

title: Advancing molecular, phenotypic and mechanistic insights of FGF14 pathogenic expansions (SCA27B)
abstract:
Repeat expansions in the FGF14 gene have recently been identified as a frequent cause of autosomal dominant late-onset cerebellar ataxia (SCA27B). The threshold for pathogenicity was estimated to range from 250 (incomplete penetrance) to 300 AAG repeats (full penetrance) based on expansion sizes observed in patients and controls. However, the full sequences of pathogenic and non-pathogenic alleles remain largely unknown.

In this study, we used STRling and ExpansionHunter/STRipy to detect short tandem repeat expansions in short-read genome data of 80 patients with unsolved neurological disorders, including 48 patients from 39 unrelated families with cerebellar ataxia. Significant outlier values indicating a possible FGF14 repeat expansion were detected in 49% of families with ataxia. We used long-range PCR and repeat-primed PCR to confirm repeat motifs and number, and to further screen for FGF14 repeat expansions in 106 additional patients. The distribution of FGF14 alleles was also analyzed in 802 control individuals. Long-range PCR amplicons from affected and control subjects with at least one expanded allele were sequenced by nanopore sequencing.

Altogether, we report a total of 38 individuals from 31 families with a pure AAG expansion [≥]250 repeats in FGF14 (range: 254-937) out of 134 families with unsolved ataxia (23%). Four families had biallelic expansions. One individual showed mosaicism of the expansion, with two distinct large alleles detected. The overall distribution of FGF14 alleles significantly differs in patients and control subjects with pure expansions from 180 repeats being enriched in patients while AAGGAG and interrupted alleles were more frequent in controls. Expanded and non-expanded FGF14 alleles were associated with different 5-flanking regions correlating with repeat stability. Episodic symptoms of ataxia and downbeat nystagmus were frequent in patients with SCA27B independently of the repeat number. A family with a novel nonsense variant (NM_175929.3: c.239T>G; p.Leu80*; SCA27A) exhibited similar symptoms but earlier age at onset than patients with pathogenic expansions (SCA27B).

In conclusion, this study reveals the complete sequence of pathogenic and non-pathogenic FGF14 expansions. We suggest that pure AAG expansions are pathogenic from a lower threshold than previously reported, comprised between 180 and 220 pure AAG repeats, while full penetrance would be above 320-335 repeats. Interrupted expansions and expansions composed of other hexanucleotide repeats motifs are non-pathogenic. Diagnostic tests should thus include a complete sequencing of the expansion in addition to repeat number assessment. Finally, we provide mechanistic insights into how pure AAG repeat expansions could lead to adult-onset cerebellar ataxia.
authors: Mohren, L.; Erdlenbruch, F.; Leitao, E.; Kilpert, F.; Hönes, G. S.; Kaya, S.; Schröder, C.; Thieme, A.; Sturm, M.; Park, J.; Schlüter, A.; Ruiz, M.; Morales de la Prida, M.; Casasnovas, C.; Becker, K.; Roggenbuck, U.; Pechlivanis, S.; Kaiser, F. J.; Synofzik, M.; Wirth, T.; Anheim, M.; Haack, T. B.; Lockhart, P. J.; Jöckel, K.-H.; Pujol, A.; Klebe, S.; Timmann, D.; Depienne, C.

ai.TLDR: FGF14基因重复扩展被确认为小脑性共济失调（SCA27B）的常见病因，其致病阈值范围为250-300个AAG重复序列。研究通过STRling和ExpansionHunter/STRipy工具分析了80名患者的基因组数据，发现49%的家族存在潜在重复扩展，最终确认31个家族的纯AAG扩展（254-937重复）与疾病相关。
ai.translation:
FGF14基因的重复扩展最近被鉴定为常染色体显性晚发性小脑性共济失调（SCA27B）的常见病因。根据患者和对照组中观察到的扩展长度，致病性阈值估计范围为250个（不完全外显）至300个AAG重复序列（完全外显）。然而，致病性和非致病性等位基因的完整序列仍知之甚少。

本研究使用STRling和ExpansionHunter/STRipy工具，在80名未解的神经系统疾病患者（包括39个无关家族的48名小脑性共济失调患者）的短读长基因组数据中检测短串联重复扩展。在49%的小脑性共济失调家族中检测到显著的异常值，提示可能的FGF14重复扩展。我们通过长距离PCR和重复引物PCR确认重复基序及数量，并进一步在106名额外患者中筛查FGF14重复扩展。同时分析了802名对照个体的FGF14等位基因分布。对受影响和对照个体中至少携带一个扩展等位基因的长距离PCR扩增子进行了纳米孔测序。

综上，我们报告了31个家族的38名个体，其FGF14基因存在纯AAG扩展（≥250重复，范围254-937），占134个未解共济失调家族的23%。4个家族存在双等位基因扩展，1名个体表现出扩展的嵌合现象，检测到两个不同的大等位基因。纯扩展的FGF14等位基因在患者和对照组中的分布显著不同，180重复序列在患者中富集，而AAGGAG和中断等位基因在对照组中更常见。扩展和未扩展的FGF14等位基因与不同的5-侧翼区相关，这与重复稳定性有关。SCA27B患者无论重复数量如何，均频繁出现共济失调的发作性症状和下跳性眼震。一个携带新型无义变异（NM_175929.3: c.239T>G; p.Leu80*; SCA27A）的家族表现出类似症状，但发病年龄早于致病性扩展（SCA27B）患者。

结论：本研究揭示了致病性和非致病性FGF14扩展的完整序列。我们建议纯AAG扩展的致病阈值低于此前报告的180-220个纯AAG重复，而完全外显则在320-335重复以上。中断扩展和其他六核苷酸重复基序的扩展是非致病性的。因此，诊断测试应包括扩展的完整测序及重复数量评估。最后，我们提供了纯AAG重复扩展如何导致成人发病性小脑性共济失调的机制见解。

title: Trans2express - de novo transcriptome assembly pipeline optimized for gene expression analysis
abstract:
BackgroundAs genomes of many eukaryotic species, especially plants, are large and complex, their de novo sequencing and assembly is still a difficult task despite progress in sequencing technologies. An alternative to genome assembly is the assembly of transcriptome, the set of RNA products of the expressed genes. While a bunch of de novo transcriptome assemblers exists, the challenges of transcriptomes (the existence of isoforms, the uneven expression levels across genes) complicates the generation of high-quality assemblies suitable for downstream analyses.

ResultsWe developed Trans2express - a web-based tool and a pipeline of de novo hybrid transcriptome assembly and postprocessing based on rnaSPAdes with a set of subsequent filtrations. The pipeline was tested on Arabidopsis thaliana cDNA sequencing data obtained using Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. The comparison of structural characteristics of the transcriptome assembly with reference Arabidopsis genome revealed the high quality of assembled transcriptome with 86.1% of Arabidopsis expressed genes assembled as a single contig. We tested the applicability of the transcriptome assembly for gene expression analysis and showed high congruence of gene expression levels and sets of differentially expressed genes between analyses based on genome and based on the transcriptome assembly.

ConclusionsWe present Trans2express - a protocol for de novo hybrid transcriptome assembly aimed at recovering of a single transcript per gene. We expect this protocol to promote the characterization of transcriptomes and gene expression analysis in non-model plants and web-based tool to be of use to a wide range of plant biologists.
authors: Kasianova, A. M.; Penin, A. A.; Schelkunov, M. I.; Kasianov, A. S.; Logacheva, M. D.; Klepikova, A. V.

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对真核生物（尤其是植物）基因组复杂性高的问题，开发了Trans2express工具，通过混合策略实现转录组从头组装。该工具在拟南芥数据中表现出86.1%的基因单一致命组装效率，验证了其在基因表达分析中的可靠性。
ai.translation:
背景：许多真核生物，特别是植物的基因组因其庞大且复杂性，其从头测序和组装仍然是具有挑战性的任务，尽管测序技术已取得进展。转录组组装作为基因组组装的替代方案，其挑战在于存在异构体和基因表达水平不均等问题，这使得生成适合下游分析的高质量组装变得复杂。

结果：我们开发了Trans2express——一个基于rnaSPAdes的网页工具和从头混合转录组组装及后处理流程，包含一系列后续过滤步骤。该流程在使用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台获得的拟南芥cDNA测序数据上进行了测试。通过与参考拟南芥基因组的转录组组装结构特征比较，发现86.1%的拟南芥表达基因被组装为单一contig。我们测试了转录组组装在基因表达分析中的适用性，并展示了基于基因组和基于转录组组装分析在基因表达水平和差异表达基因集合上的高度一致性。

结论：我们提出了Trans2express——一种旨在恢复每个基因单一致命的无参考混合转录组组装协议。我们预期该协议将促进非模式植物转录组特征化和基因表达分析，并认为该基于网络的工具将对广泛植物生物学家具有实用价值。

title: Evaluation of the accuracy of bacterial genome reconstruction with Oxford Nanopore R10.4.1 long-read-only sequencing
abstract:
2.Whole genome reconstruction of bacterial pathogens has become an import tool for tracking antimicrobial resistance spread, however accurate and complete assemblies have only been achievable using hybrid long and short-read sequencing. We have previously found the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) R10.4/kit12 flowcells produced improved assemblies over the R9.4.1/kit10, however they contained too many errors compared to hybrid Illumina-ONT assemblies. ONT have since released the R10.4.1/kit12 flowcells that promises greater accuracy and yield. They have also released newly trained basecallers using native bacterial DNA containing methylation sites intended to fix systematic errors, specifically Adenosine (A) to Guanine (G) and Cytosine (C) to Thymine (T) substitutions. ONT have recommended the use of Bovine Serum Albumin (BSA) during library preparation to improve sequencing yield and accuracy. To evaluate these improvements, we sequenced DNA extracts from four commonly studied bacterial pathogens, namely Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Pseudomonas aeruginosa and Staphylococcus aureus, as well as 12 disparate E. coli clinical samples from different phylogroups and sequence types. These were all sequenced with and without BSA. These sequences were de novo assembled and compared against Illumina-corrected reference genomes. Here we have found the nanopore long read-only R10.4.1 (kit14) assemblies with basecallers trained using native bacterial methylated DNA produce accurate assemblies from 40x depth or higher, sufficient to be cost-effective compared to hybrid long-read (ONT) and short-read (Illumina) sequencing.

3. Impact statementCurrently, the best method of building accurate and complete bacterial genome assemblies is to create a hybrid assembly; combining both long and short DNA sequencing reads. Short reads are more accurate, but can be difficult to assemble into a complete genome. Long reads are generally less accurate, but easier to reconstruct into a complete genome. By combining long and short reads, we get both accuracy and reconstructive power. However, this also involves higher costs and more labour than using a single sequencing platform. In this study, we compare long read only assemblies from Oxford Nanopore Technologys newest iteration of improvements in both chemistry and software to hybrid Illumina-Nanopore assemblies. We sequenced four bacterial pathogens with published reference genomes (Staphylococcus aureus, Klebsiella Pneumoniae, Pseudomonas Aeruginosa, and Escherichia Coli) and twelve bloodstream associated E. coli, and show that assemblies from the newest technology are not only an improvement on the previous iteration, but are able to compete with hybrid Illumina-Nanopore assemblies in their quality, providing a step towards bacterial genome assembly using a single sequencing platform.

4. Data summaryThe authors confirm all supporting data, code and protocols have been provided within the article, through supplementary data files, or in publicly accessible repositories.

Nanopore and Illumina fastq data are available in the ENA under project accession: PRJEB51164.

Assemblies have been made available at: https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/R10_4_1_KIT14_comparison_assemblies/2497 2954

Code and analysis outputs are available at:

https://gitlab.com/ModernisingMedicalMicrobiology/assembly_comparison
authors: Sanderson, N. D.; Hopkins, K.; Colpus, M.; Parker, M.; Lipworth, S.; Crook, D.; Stoesser, N.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过比较纳米孔测序技术（R10.4.1/kit14）与混合测序（Illumina-Nanopore）的性能，发现新型纳米孔技术在无需混合测序的情况下即可生成高质量细菌基因组组装，解决了传统方法中长读测序准确性不足的问题。该技术通过甲基化DNA训练的碱基调用器和BSA辅助文库制备，显著提升了组装精度和效率。
ai.translation:
2. 细菌病原体的全基因组重建已成为追踪抗生素耐药性传播的重要工具，但仅通过混合长读和短读测序才能实现准确且完整的组装。我们先前发现，牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）R10.4/kit12流细胞相比R9.4.1/kit10产生了更优的组装结果，但其错误率仍高于混合Illumina-ONT组装。ONT随后推出的R10.4.1/kit12流细胞承诺更高的准确性和产量，并发布了基于原生细菌DNA甲基化位点训练的新碱基调用器，旨在修正系统性错误（如腺苷到鸟苷、胞苷到胸苷替换）。ONT建议在文库制备中使用牛血清白蛋白（BSA）以提升测序产量和准确性。为评估这些改进，我们对四种常见细菌病原体（大肠杆菌、肺炎克雷伯菌、铜绿假单胞菌和金黄色葡萄球菌）的DNA提取物进行了测序，包括12个不同进化群和序列类型的临床大肠杆菌样本，并在有无BSA条件下进行测序。所有序列均进行从头组装并与Illumina校正的参考基因组进行比对。结果发现，使用原生细菌甲基化DNA训练的碱基调用器的纳米孔长读测序（R10.4.1, kit14）在40倍深度或更高时可生成准确组装，其成本效益可与混合长读（ONT）和短读（Illum、ina）测序相媲美。

3. 当前构建准确完整细菌基因组组装的最佳方法是创建混合组装，结合长读和短读DNA测序数据。短读测序准确性更高但难以组装完整基因组，长读测序准确性较低但更易重建完整基因组。通过结合两者可兼顾准确性与重构能力，但成本和劳动强度更高。本研究比较了牛津纳米孔技术最新化学和软件改进的长读测序组装与混合Illumina-Nanopore组装。我们对四种具有参考基因组的细菌病原体（金黄色葡萄球菌、肺炎克雷伯菌、铜绿假单胞菌和大肠杆菌）及十二个血流相关大肠杆菌样本进行了测序，结果显示新型技术不仅优于前代，其组装质量可与混合Illumina-Nanopore组装竞争，为单平台细菌基因组组装提供了新方向。

4. 数据摘要：作者确认所有支持数据、代码和协议均通过文章补充数据文件或公开存储库提供。纳米孔和Illumina fastq数据可在ENA项目PRJEB51164下获取。组装数据已发布于https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/R10_4_1_KIT14_comparison_assemblies/24972954。代码和分析结果可访问：https://gitlab.com/ModernisingMedicalMicrobiology/assembly_comparison

title: Long-read RNA sequencing identifies region- and sex-specific C57BL/6J mouse brain mRNA isoform expression and usage
abstract: Alternative splicing (AS) contributes to the biological heterogeneity between species, sexes, tissues, and cell types. Many diseases are either caused by alterations in AS or by alterations to AS. Therefore, measuring AS accurately and efficiently is critical for assessing molecular phenotypes, including those associated with disease. Long-read sequencing enables more accurate quantification of differentially spliced isoform expression than short-read sequencing approaches, and third-generation platforms facilitate high-throughput experiments. To assess differences in AS across the cerebellum, cortex, hippocampus, and striatum by sex, we generated and analyzed Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-read RNA sequencing (lrRNA-Seq) C57BL/6J mouse brain cDNA libraries. From >85 million reads that passed quality control metrics, we calculated differential gene expression (DGE), differential transcript expression (DTE), and differential transcript usage (DTU) across brain regions and by sex. We found significant DGE, DTE, and DTU across brain regions and that the cerebellum had the most differences compared to the other three regions. Additionally, we found region-specific differential splicing between sexes, with the most sex differences in DTU in the cortex and no DTU in the hippocampus. We also report on two distinct patterns of sex DTU we observed, sex-divergent and sex-specific, that could potentially help explain sex differences in the prevalence and prognosis of various neurological and psychiatric disorders in future studies. Finally, we built a Shiny web application for researchers to explore the data further. Our study provides a resource for the community; it underscores the importance of AS in biological heterogeneity and the utility of long-read sequencing to better understand AS in the brain.
authors: Jones, E. F.; Howton, T. C.; Flanary, V. L.; Clark, A. D.; Lasseigne, B. N.

ai.TLDR: 可变剪接（AS）在物种、性别、组织和细胞类型间的生物异质性中起关键作用，准确测量AS对疾病分子表型评估至关重要。本研究利用ONT长读长测序技术分析小鼠脑区差异性剪接，发现小脑与其他脑区差异最大，且不同脑区存在性别特异性剪接模式。
ai.translation: 可变剪接（AS）在物种、性别、组织和细胞类型间的生物异质性中起关键作用。许多疾病要么由AS改变引起，要么由AS改变诱发。因此，准确高效地测量AS对评估分子表型（包括与疾病相关的表型）至关重要。长读长测序相比短读长测序能更精确地量化差异性剪接异构体表达，第三代测序平台可实现高通量实验。为评估小脑、皮层、海马体和纹状体在性别间的AS差异，我们构建并分析了Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）长读长RNA测序（lrRNA-Seq）C57BL/6J小鼠脑cDNA文库。从超过8500万条通过质量控制的测序数据中，我们计算了不同脑区及性别间的差异基因表达（DGE）、差异转录本表达（DTE）和差异性转录本使用（DTU）。研究发现不同脑区存在显著的DGE、DTE和DTU差异，其中小脑与其他三个区域差异最大。此外，不同脑区存在性别特异性剪接差异，皮层的DTU性别差异最显著，而海马体未观察到DTU。我们还报告了两种性别特异性DTU模式：性别分化型和性别特异型，这可能为未来研究不同神经精神疾病的性别差异患病率和预后提供新视角。最后，我们构建了Shiny网络应用供研究者进一步探索数据。本研究为社区提供了资源，强调了AS在生物异质性中的重要性，以及长读长测序在理解大脑AS机制中的应用价值。

title: Target enrichment improves culture-independent detection of Neisseria gonorrhoeae direct from sample with Nanopore sequencing.
abstract:
Multi-drug resistant Neisseria gonorrhoeae infection is a significant public health risk. Rapidly detecting N. gonorrhoeae and antimicrobial resistant (AMR) determinants by metagenomic sequencing of urine is possible, although high levels of host DNA and overgrowth of contaminating species hamper sequencing and limit N. gonorrhoeae genome coverage. We performed Nanopore sequencing of nucleic acid amplification test-positive urine samples and culture-positive urethral swabs with and without probe-based target enrichment, using a custom SureSelect panel to investigate selectively enriching for N. gonorrhoeae DNA. Probes were designed to cover the entire N. gonorrhoeae genome, with 10-fold enrichment of probes covering selected AMR determinants. Multiplexing was tested in subset of samples. The proportion of sequence bases classified as N. gonorrhoeae increased in all samples after enrichment, from a median (IQR) of 0.05% (0.01-0.1%) to 76% (42-82%), giving a corresponding median improvement in fold genome coverage of 365-times (112-720). Over 20-fold coverage, required for robust AMR determinant detection, was achieved in 13/15 (87%) samples, compared to 2/15 (13%) without enrichment. The four samples multiplexed together also achieved >20x genome coverage. Coverage of AMR determinants was sufficient to predict resistance where present, and genome coverage also enabled phylogenetic relationships to be reconstructed. Probe-based target enrichment can improve N. gonorrhoeae genome coverage when sequencing DNA extracts directly from urine or urethral swabs, allowing for robust detection of AMR determinants. Additionally, multiplexing prior to enrichment provided enough genome coverage for AMR detection and reduces the costs associated with this method.

Impact statementNeisseria gonorrhoeae infection presents a significant public health risk, with multi-drug resistance present globally. Early detection helps control the spread of antimicrobial resistant strains. Genome sequencing can be used to detect infections in samples collected directly from patients, without the need to grow any microorganisms in a laboratory first, and this has already been demonstrated for gonorrhoea using urine samples. With enough sequence information it is also possible to detect antimicrobial resistance (AMR), allowing both detection of infection and information on treatment choices from the same test. This study assesses a method for enriching N. gonorrhoeae sequence data from urine and urethral swabs, and analyses the impact of enrichment on the detection of genes known to cause antibiotic resistance. We show that enriching for N. gonorrhoeae DNA prior to sequencing can improve the detection of some AMR genes, and by testing several samples at the same time we can reduce the costs associated with this method.

Data summaryThe sequence data generated in this study are deposited in the European Nucleotide Archive (ENA, https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena/browser/) and are publicly available under study code PRJEB64347. The authors confirm all supporting data, code and protocols are provided within the article or through supplementary data files.
authors: Street, T. L.; Sanderson, N. D.; Barker, L.; Kavanagh, J.; Cole, K.; The GonFast Investigators Group,  ; Llewelyn, M.; Eyre, D. W.

ai.TLDR: 耐药性淋球菌感染是重大公共卫生风险，通过尿液宏基因组测序快速检测淋球菌及抗菌耐药（AMR）决定因子存在技术挑战。本研究采用纳米孔测序结合探针富集技术，显著提升淋球菌基因组覆盖度，实现AMR基因的可靠检测。
ai.translation: 多重耐药性淋球菌（Neisseria gonorrhoeae）感染是重大公共卫生风险。通过尿液宏基因组测序快速检测淋球菌及抗菌耐药（AMR）决定因子是可能的，但宿主DNA高含量和污染物种过度生长会阻碍测序并限制淋球菌基因组覆盖度。我们采用纳米孔测序技术，对核酸扩增试验（NAAT）阳性尿液样本和培养阳性尿道拭子样本进行测序，使用定制SureSelect探针组对淋球菌DNA进行选择性富集。探针覆盖整个淋球菌基因组，对选定的AMR决定因子区域实现10倍富集。部分样本进行了多重测序测试。富集后，所有样本中被归类为淋球菌的序列碱基比例显著提升，中位数（IQR）从0.05%（0.01-0.1%）增至76%（42-82%），对应基因组覆盖度提升中位数为365倍（112-720倍）。15个样本中13个（87%）实现超过20倍覆盖度，而未富集样本仅2个（13%）。4个多重测序样本也达到>20倍覆盖度。AMR决定因子覆盖度足以预测耐药性，基因组覆盖度还支持系统发育关系重建。基于探针的靶向富集技术可提升尿液或尿道拭子直接DNA提取的淋球菌基因组覆盖度，实现AMR决定因子的可靠检测。此外，富集前的多重测序可提供足够覆盖度并降低方法成本。

title: A new and widespread group of fish apicomplexan parasites
abstract: Apicomplexans are obligate intracellular parasites which have evolved from a free-living, phototrophic ancestor. Well-known representatives include Plasmodium, the causative agent of malaria, and the gregarines which infect a vast number of marine invertebrates. Apicomplexans have been reported from marine environmental samples in high numbers1, with several clades of Apicomplexan-Related Lineages (ARLs) having been described from environmental sequencing data (SSU rRNA metabarcoding)2. The most notable of these being the corallicolids (previously known as ARL-V) which possess chlorophyll-biosynthesis genes in their relic chloroplast (apicoplast) and are geographically wide-spread and abundant symbionts of anthozoans3. Ophioblennius macclurei, the redlip blenny, along with other tropical reef fishes, is known to be infected by Haemogregarina-like and Haemohormidium-like parasites4; however previous phylogenetic work using the 18S rRNA genes shows these parasites to be distinct from where they are classified morphologically5,6 and instead related to the Coccidia. Hybrid genomic sequencing incorporating Oxford Nanopore Technologies long reads and Illumina short reads of apicomplexan-infected O. macclurei blood was carried out to retrieve more genetic information on these parasites. Using this approach, we were able to recover the entire rRNA operon of this apicomplexan parasite along with the complete mitochondrion and apicoplast genomes. Phylogenetic analyses using this new genomic information consistently place these fish-infecting apicomplexans, hereby informally named ichthyocolids, sister to the corallicolids within Coccidia. The apicoplast genome did not contain chlorophyll biosynthesis genes, providing evidence for another independent loss of this pathway within Apicomplexa. Based on the 16S rRNA gene found in the apicoplast, this group corresponds to the previously described ARL-VI. Screening of fish microbiome studies using the plastid 16S rRNA gene shows these parasites to be geographically and taxonomically widespread in fish species across the globe with potentially major implications for commercial fisheries and oceanic food webs.
authors: Bonacolta, A. M.; Krause, J.; Smit, N. J.; Sikkel, P.; del Campo, J.

ai.TLDR: Apicomplexans作为专性细胞内寄生虫，其进化起源可追溯至自由生活的光合祖先。研究通过混合基因组测序技术揭示了鱼类感染的新型寄生虫ichthyocolids与珊瑚虫寄生虫的亲缘关系，并发现其叶绿素合成途径的独立丢失。该发现对全球渔业和海洋生态具有重要影响。
ai.translation: Apicomplexans是一类必须寄生于宿主细胞内的寄生虫，其进化起源可追溯至自由生活的光合祖先。已知的代表包括引起疟疾的疟原虫（Plasmodium）以及感染大量海洋无脊椎动物的gregarines。在海洋环境样本中已发现大量Apicomplexans，通过环境测序数据（SSU rRNA元条形码测序）已描述出多个Apicomplexan-Related Lineages（ARLs）分支。其中最显著的是珊瑚虫寄生虫（corallicolids，曾称为ARL-V），其残余叶绿体（apicoplast）中包含叶绿素合成基因，广泛分布于刺胞动物门宿主中。红唇鱼（Ophioblennius macclurei）等热带珊瑚礁鱼类已知感染Haemogregarina-like和Haemohormidium-like寄生虫，但基于18S rRNA基因的系统发育分析显示这些寄生虫与形态分类存在差异，反而更接近Coccidia类群。通过结合Oxford Nanopore Technologies长读长和Illumina短读长的混合基因组测序技术，成功获取了感染O. macclurei血液的Apicomplexan寄生虫的完整rRNA操纵子、线粒体和apicoplast基因组。基于新基因组数据的系统发育分析显示，这些鱼类感染的Apicomplexans（暂称ichthyocolids）与珊瑚虫寄生虫在Coccidia类群中呈姐妹群关系。apicoplast基因组未检测到叶绿素合成基因，证实了Apicomplexa类群中该途径的另一独立丢失。基于apicoplast中发现的16S rRNA基因，该类群对应此前描述的ARL-VI。通过筛选鱼类微生物组研究中的plastid 16S rRNA基因，发现这些寄生虫在全球鱼类物种中具有广泛的地理和分类分布，可能对商业渔业和海洋食物网产生重大影响。

title: Landscape of antisense genes in the human genome and identification of new human hepatic antisense RNAs by long-read sequencing.
abstract:
BACKGROUND: Protein-coding genes have been considered the functional part of the genome, although they represent only 2% of the genome. In contrast, more than 90% of the genome produces non-coding RNA (ncRNA), including antisense (AS) genes, a type of long non-coding genes (encoding transcripts > 200 nucleotides) located on the opposite strand of coding genes. Therefore, antisense RNA (asRNA) can be complementary to the counterpart sense RNA, supporting a regulatory role with potential pathogenic consequences, as their deregulation has been associated with cardiovascular disease, cancer, and diabetes.

RESULTS: We performed an in-depth review of AS genes in Ensembl and evaluated the expression of AS genes in human liver by third-generation RNA sequencing methods. Currently, 1656 AS genes overlapping with 1556 sense genes have been identified in the human genome. Coding genes with antisense counterparts were significantly larger and had higher transcriptional activity than genes without antisense counterparts. RNA nanopore sequencing of 15 human livers identified 185 transcripts (55 novel) from 150 known AS genes, and 1316 transcripts from 807 sense genes, with 111 sense-antisense pairs. Sense transcripts showed higher expression than antisense transcripts. Remarkably, RNA nanopore sequencing of human livers identified 146 transcripts (67 novel) corresponding to 118 possible novel AS genes.

CONCLUSION: This study reveals the landscape of AS genes in the human genome and demonstrates the power of long-read RNA sequencing to identify novel transcripts and even novel AS genes, exploring the relationship between sense and AS gene expression as well.
authors: Juan Jose Rojo-Carrillo, Pedro Garrido-Rodríguez, Maria Llamas-López, Rosa Cifuentes-Riquelme, Jose Padilla, Bruno Ramos-Molina, Maria Luisa Lozano, Belen de la Morena-Barrio, Maria Eugenia de la Morena-Barrio, Javier Corral

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长RNA测序技术，揭示了人类基因组中反义基因（AS基因）的景观，并发现了大量新的反义基因和转录本。研究结果表明，反义基因与编码基因在表达水平和转录活性上存在显著差异。
ai.translation:
背景：蛋白质编码基因被认为是基因组的功能部分，尽管它们仅占基因组的2%。相反，超过90%的基因组产生非编码RNA（ncRNA），包括反义（AS）基因，这是一种长非编码基因（编码转录本>200个核苷酸），位于编码基因的反义链上。因此，反义RNA（asRNA）可以与对应的顺义RNA互补，支持其具有潜在致病后果的调控作用，因为其失调已被与心血管疾病、癌症和糖尿病相关联。

结果：我们对Ensembl中的反义基因进行了深入综述，并通过第三代RNA测序方法评估了人类肝脏中反义基因的表达情况。目前，在人类基因组中已鉴定出1656个与1556个顺义基因重叠的反义基因。具有反义对应物的编码基因显著更大，并且具有更高的转录活性。对15个人类肝脏的RNA纳米孔测序发现了来自150个已知反义基因的185个转录本（其中55个为新发现），以及来自807个顺义基因的1316个转录本，其中有111对顺义-反义配对。顺义转录本的表达水平高于反义转录本。值得注意的是，对人类肝脏的RNA纳米孔测序发现了146个转录本（其中67个为新发现），对应于118个可能的新反义基因。

结论：本研究揭示了人类基因组中反义基因的景观，并展示了长读长RNA测序在识别新转录本和甚至新反义基因方面的强大能力，同时探索了顺义基因与反义基因表达之间的关系。

title: Detecting m6A RNA modification from nanopore sequencing using a semi-supervised learning framework
abstract: Direct nanopore-based RNA sequencing can be used to detect post-transcriptional base modifications, such as m6A methylation, based on the electric current signals produced by the distinct chemical structures of modified bases. A key challenge is the scarcity of adequate training data with known methylation modifications. We present Xron, a hybrid encoder-decoder framework that delivers a direct methylation-distinguishing basecaller by training on synthetic RNA data and immunoprecipitation-based experimental data in two steps. First, we generate data with more diverse modification combinations through in silico cross-linking. Second, we use this dataset to train an end-to-end neural network basecaller followed by fine-tuning on immunoprecipitation-based experimental data with label-smoothing. The trained neural network basecaller outperforms existing methylation detection methods on both read-level and site-level prediction scores. Xron is a standalone, end-to-end m6A-distinguishing basecaller capable of detecting methylated bases directly from raw sequencing signals, enabling de novo methylome assembly.
authors: Teng, H.; Stoiber, M.; Bar-Joseph, Z.; Kingsford, C.

ai.TLDR: 基于纳米孔的RNA测序技术可直接检测转录后碱基修饰（如m6A甲基化），但训练数据不足是主要挑战。Xron框架通过合成数据与实验数据结合训练，实现了端到端的甲基化碱基识别，显著优于现有方法。
ai.translation: 直接基于纳米孔的RNA测序技术可通过修饰碱基特有的化学结构产生的电信号检测转录后碱基修饰，例如m6A甲基化。关键挑战在于缺乏具有已知甲基化修饰的充足训练数据。我们提出Xron，一种混合编码器-解码器框架，通过两阶段训练实现直接甲基化碱基识别：首先利用体外交联生成更多修饰组合的合成数据，随后基于免疫沉淀实验数据训练端到端神经网络并进行标签平滑微调。训练后的神经网络碱基识别器在读段级和位点级预测评分上均优于现有甲基化检测方法。Xron作为独立的端到端m6A识别工具，可直接从原始测序信号中检测甲基化碱基，实现从头甲基组组装。

title: Multimodal cell-free DNA whole-genome TAPS is sensitive and reveals specific cancer signals.
abstract: The analysis of circulating tumour DNA (ctDNA) through minimally invasive liquid biopsies is promising for early multi-cancer detection and monitoring minimal residual disease. Most existing methods focus on targeted deep sequencing, but few integrate multiple data modalities. Here, we develop a methodology for ctDNA detection using deep (80x) whole-genome TET-Assisted Pyridine Borane Sequencing (TAPS), a less destructive approach than bisulphite sequencing, which permits the simultaneous analysis of genomic and methylomic data. We conduct a diagnostic accuracy study across multiple cancer types in symptomatic patients, achieving 94.9% sensitivity and 88.8% specificity. Matched tumour biopsies are used for validation, not for guiding the analysis, imitating an early detection scenario. Furthermore, in silico validation demonstrates strong discrimination (86% AUC) at ctDNA fractions as low as 0.7%. Additionally, we successfully track tumour burden and ctDNA shedding from precancerous lesions post-treatment without requiring matched tumour biopsies. This pipeline is ready for further clinical evaluation to extend cancer screening and improve patient triage and monitoring.
authors: Dimitrios V Vavoulis, Anthony Cutts, Nishita Thota, Jordan Brown, Robert Sugar, Antonio Rueda, Arman Ardalan, Kieran Howard, Flavia Matos Santo, Thippesh Sannasiddappa, Bronwen Miller, Stephen Ash, Yibin Liu, Chun-Xiao Song, Brian D Nicholson, Helene Dreau, Carolyn Tregidgo, Anna Schuh

ai.TLDR: 通过微创液体活检分析循环肿瘤DNA（ctDNA）在早期多癌种检测和监测残留疾病方面具有前景。本文提出了一种基于深度全基因组TAPS测序的方法，能够同时分析基因组和甲基组数据，实现了高灵敏度和特异性。此外，该方法在无肿瘤活检的情况下成功追踪了治疗后肿瘤负担和ctDNA的释放。
ai.translation: 通过微创液体活检分析循环肿瘤DNA（ctDNA）在早期多癌种检测和监测残留疾病方面具有前景。目前大多数方法集中于靶向深度测序，但很少整合多种数据模式。本文开发了一种用于ctDNA检测的方法，该方法基于深度（80倍）全基因组TET-Assisted Pyridine Borane Sequencing（TAPS），这是一种比亚硫酸盐测序更少破坏性的方法，允许同时分析基因组和甲基组数据。我们在有症状患者的多种癌症类型中进行了诊断准确性研究，实现了94.9%的灵敏度和88.8%的特异性。匹配的肿瘤活检用于验证，而非指导分析，模拟早期检测场景。此外，体外验证显示，在ctDNA比例低至0.7%时，具有强区分能力（86% AUC）。此外，我们成功追踪了治疗后癌前病变的肿瘤负担和ctDNA释放，而无需匹配的肿瘤活检。该流程已准备好进行进一步的临床评估，以扩展癌症筛查并改善患者分诊和监测。

title: Next-generation sequencing and bioinformatics in rare movement disorders
abstract: The ability to sequence entire exomes and genomes has revolutionized molecular testing in rare movement disorders, and genomic sequencing is becoming an integral part of routine diagnostic workflows for these heterogeneous conditions. However, interpretation of the extensive genomic variant information that is being generated presents substantial challenges. In this Perspective, we outline multidimensional strategies for genetic diagnosis in patients with rare movement disorders. We examine bioinformatics tools and computational metrics that have been developed to facilitate accurate prioritization of disease-causing variants. Additionally, we highlight community-driven data-sharing and case-matchmaking platforms, which are designed to foster the discovery of new genotype–phenotype relationships. Finally, we consider how multiomic data integration might optimize diagnostic success by combining genomic, epigenetic, transcriptomic and/or proteomic profiling to enable a more holistic evaluation of variant effects. Together, the approaches that we discuss offer pathways to the improved understanding of the genetic basis of rare movement disorders.
authors: Michael Zech, Juliane Winkelmann
citation: Zech, M., Winkelmann, J. Next-generation sequencing and bioinformatics in rare movement disorders. Nat Rev Neurol 20 , 114–126 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41582-023-00909-9
description: The ability to sequence entire exomes and genomes has revolutionized molecular testing in rare movement disorders, and genomic sequencing is becoming...

ai.TLDR: 全外显子组和全基因组测序技术革新了罕见运动障碍的分子检测，但海量基因组变异数据的解读面临重大挑战。本文系统探讨了多维遗传诊断策略，包括生物信息学工具、社区驱动的数据共享平台以及多组学数据整合方法，旨在提升罕见运动障碍的遗传机制认知。
ai.translation: 对整个外显子组和基因组进行测序的能力已经彻底改变了罕见运动障碍的分子检测领域，基因组测序正逐渐成为这些异质性疾病的常规诊断流程中的核心环节。然而，当前生成的大量基因组变异信息的解读仍面临显著挑战。在本文的综述中，我们概述了针对罕见运动障碍患者的多维遗传诊断策略。我们分析了为实现疾病致病变异精准优先级排序而开发的生物信息学工具和计算指标。此外，我们强调了社区驱动的数据共享和病例匹配平台，这些平台旨在促进新型基因型-表型关系的发现。最后，我们探讨了多组学数据整合如何通过结合基因组、表观遗传、转录组和/或蛋白质组谱型分析，优化诊断成功率，从而实现对变异效应的更全面评估。综上所述，本文讨论的这些方法为深入理解罕见运动障碍的遗传基础提供了新的路径。

title: Integrative genotyping of cancer and immune phenotypes by long-read sequencing
abstract: Single-cell transcriptomics has become the definitive method for classifying cell types and states, and can be augmented with genotype information to improve cell lineage identification. Due to constraints of short-read sequencing, current methods to detect natural genetic barcodes often require cumbersome primer panels and early commitment to targets. Here we devise a flexible long-read sequencing workflow and analysis pipeline, termed *nanoranger*, that starts from intermediate single-cell cDNA libraries to detect cell lineage-defining features, including single-nucleotide variants, fusion genes, isoforms, sequences of chimeric antigen and TCRs. Through systematic analysis of these classes of natural ‘barcodes’, we define the optimal targets for nanoranger, namely those loci close to the 5’ end of highly expressed genes with transcript lengths shorter than 4 kB. As proof-of-concept, we apply nanoranger to longitudinal tracking of subclones of acute myeloid leukemia (AML) and describe the heterogeneous isoform landscape of thousands of marrow-infiltrating immune cells. We propose that enhanced cellular genotyping using *nanoranger* can improve the tracking of single-cell tumor and immune cell co-evolution.
authors: Livius Penter, Mehdi Borji, ... Catherine J. Wu
citation: Penter, L., Borji, M., Nagler, A. et al. Integrative genotyping of cancer and immune phenotypes by long-read sequencing. Nat Commun 15 , 32 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-44137-7
description: Single-cell transcriptomics has become the definitive method for classifying cell types and states, and can be augmented with genotype information to...

ai.TLDR: 单细胞转录组学已成为细胞类型分类的金标准，但受限于短读测序技术，现有方法需复杂引物面板和早期目标承诺。本文提出的纳米范围（nanoranger）流程通过长读测序技术，从中间单细胞cDNA库中检测细胞谱系特征，显著提升了谱系鉴定和肿瘤-免疫细胞共演化追踪能力。
ai.translation: 单细胞转录组学已成为分类细胞类型和状态的权威方法，通过整合基因型信息可进一步提升细胞谱系鉴定的准确性。然而，受限于短读测序技术，现有方法在检测天然遗传条形码时往往需要复杂的引物面板和早期目标承诺。本文提出了一种灵活的长读测序工作流程和分析流程，命名为nanoranger，该流程从中间单细胞cDNA文库出发，可检测定义细胞谱系的关键特征，包括单核苷酸变异（SNV）、融合基因、异构体、嵌合抗原序列以及T细胞受体（TCR）序列。通过系统分析这些天然‘条形码’类别，我们确定了nanoranger的最佳检测目标：位于高表达基因5'端附近、转录长度小于4 kB的基因位点。作为概念验证，我们应用nanoranger对急性髓系白血病（AML）亚克隆的纵向追踪进行了分析，并描绘了数千个骨髓浸润免疫细胞的异质性异构体景观。研究提出，采用nanoranger进行增强的细胞基因型分析，可显著提升单细胞肿瘤与免疫细胞共演化的追踪能力。

ai.TLDR: 本文综述聚焦第三代生物大分子测序技术的发展，重点阐述其操作原理与现代特点。研究通过分析技术演进路径，揭示了其在提升测序效率和应用范围方面的突破性进展。
ai.translation: 本综述重点阐述第三代生物大分子测序技术的操作原理、技术特征及现代发展特点。文章系统分析了该技术从概念验证到工程化实现的关键突破，特别关注单分子测序技术如何通过消除PCR扩增偏差实现更精确的基因组表征。研究还探讨了纳米孔测序和荧光原位测序等新型技术范式，揭示其在实时监测DNA合成过程、降低测序成本方面的创新优势。通过对比不同技术路线的性能参数，作者为该领域未来的技术优化方向提供了重要参考。

title: NanoHLA: A Method for Human Leukocyte Antigen Class I Genes Typing Without Error Correction Based on Nanopore Sequencing Data
abstract: Human leukocyte antigen (HLA) typing is of great importance in clinical applications such as organ transplantation, blood transfusion, disease diagnosis and treatment, and forensic analysis. In recent years, nanopore sequencing technology has emerged as a rapid and cost-effective option for HLA typing. However, due to the principles and data characteristics of nanopore sequencing, there was a scarcity of robust and generalizable bioinformatics tools for its downstream analysis, posing a significant challenge in deciphering the thousands of HLA alleles present in the human population. To address this challenge, we developed NanoHLA as a tool for high-resolution typing of HLA class I genes without error correction based on nanopore sequencing. The method integrated the concepts of HLA type coverage analysis and the data conversion techniques employed in Nano2NGS, which was characterized by applying nanopore sequencing data to NGS-liked data analysis pipelines. In validation with public nanopore sequencing datasets, NanoHLA showed an overall concordance rate of 84.34% for HLA-A, HLA-B, and HLA-C, and demonstrated superior performance in comparison to existing tools such as HLA-LA. NanoHLA provides tools and solutions for use in HLA typing related fields, and look forward to further expanding the application of nanopore sequencing technology in both research and clinical settings. The code is available at <https://github.com/langjidong/NanoHLA>.
authors: Jidong Lang, Liu Qin
citation:
Lang, J., Qin, L. (2024).  NanoHLA: A Method for Human Leukocyte Antigen Class I Genes Typing Without Error Correction Based on Nanopore Sequencing Data.

                     In: Boegel, S. (eds) HLA Typing. Methods in Molecular Biology, vol 2809. Humana, New York, NY. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-0716-3874-3_8

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术因快速且成本效益高被用于HLA分型，但缺乏有效的下游分析工具。本研究开发的NanoHLA工具通过整合HLA类型覆盖分析和数据转换技术，实现了无需纠错的高分辨率HLA I类基因分型，验证数据显示其在HLA-A、HLA-B、HLA-C的总体一致率达84.34%，优于现有工具。
ai.translation: 人类白细胞抗原（HLA）分型在器官移植、输血、疾病诊断治疗及法医学分析等临床应用中具有重要意义。近年来，纳米孔测序技术作为一种快速且成本效益高的HLA分型方法逐渐兴起。然而，由于纳米孔测序技术的原理和数据特征，其下游分析缺乏稳健且通用的生物信息学工具，这给解析人类群体中数千种HLA等位基因带来了显著挑战。为解决这一问题，我们开发了NanoHLA工具，该工具基于纳米孔测序技术实现无需纠错的HLA I类基因高分辨率分型。该方法整合了HLA类型覆盖分析的概念和Nano2NGS中采用的数据转换技术，其特点在于将纳米孔测序数据应用于类似NGS的数据分析流程。通过公开的纳米孔测序数据集验证，NanoHLA在HLA-A、HLA-B和HLA-C的总体一致率达84.34%，在性能上优于现有工具如HLA-LA。NanoHLA为HLA分型相关领域提供了工具和解决方案，并期待进一步拓展纳米孔测序技术在研究和临床场景中的应用。代码已开源至<https://github.com/langjidong/NanoHLA>。

title: Revolutionizing Genomics: Exploring the Potential of Next-Generation Sequencing
abstract:
Next-generation sequencing (NGS) technologies have revolutionized the field of genomics by enabling high-throughput, cost-effective, and rapid DNA sequencing on an unprecedented scale. This introduction offers a synopsis of NGS and its profound implications across diverse areas of biological research and medical diagnostics. The fundamental principles underlying NGS, including library preparation, sequencing-by-synthesis, and data generation, are outlined. The different NGS platforms, such as Illumina, Ion Torrent, and Oxford Nanopore, as well as their respective strengths and limitations, are discussed. Recent advancements in sequencing technologies, such as single-cell sequencing, long-read sequencing, and spatial transcriptomics, are explored, expanding the capabilities of NGS and facilitating comprehensive genomic investigations. Subsequently, the applications of NGS in genomics, transcriptomics, epigenomics, metagenomics, and personalized medicine are examined. The accelerated discovery of genetic variants, gene expression patterns, DNA methylation profiles, and microbial communities through NGS is emphasized. Moreover, the role of NGS in uncovering disease mechanisms, identifying therapeutic targets, and enabling precision medicine approaches is discussed. Furthermore, the computational challenges associated with NGS data analysis, including read alignment, variant calling, and data interpretation, are addressed. The pivotal role of bioinformatics and data analysis pipelines in transforming raw sequencing data into biologically meaningful insights is highlighted. Additionally, the integration of NGS data with other omics datasets and the emerging field of multi-omics integration, providing a holistic view of biological systems, are briefly touched upon.

Additionally, the impact of NGS on clinical diagnostics, encompassing the detection of genetic disorders, cancer genomics, infectious disease surveillance, and pharmacogenomics, is elucidated. The potential of NGS-based liquid biopsies and non-invasive prenatal testing in revolutionizing clinical practice is underscored. Lastly, the challenges and considerations associated with NGS, such as data storage, privacy concerns, ethical considerations, and the importance of standardization and quality control measures, are addressed. The significance of interdisciplinary collaborations among scientists, clinicians, and bioinformaticians in harnessing the full potential of NGS and driving innovation in genomic research and healthcare is emphasized. In conclusion, this comprehensive introduction to next-generation sequencing provides an overview of the technology, its applications, and its impact across various fields. By empowering researchers and clinicians with unprecedented genomic information, NGS has the potential to revolutionize our understanding of biological systems, unravel disease complexities, and facilitate personalized approaches to healthcare.
authors: Ghloamareza Abdi, Maryam Abbasi Tarighat, ... Mukul Barwant
citation:
Abdi, G., Tarighat, M.A., Jain, M., Tendulkar, R., Tendulkar, M., Barwant, M. (2024).  Revolutionizing Genomics: Exploring the Potential of Next-Generation Sequencing.

                     In: Singh, V., Kumar, A. (eds) Advances in Bioinformatics. Springer, Singapore. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-99-8401-5_1

ai.TLDR: 下一代测序技术（NGS）通过高通量、低成本和快速的DNA测序能力，彻底改变了基因组学领域。该技术在生物研究和医学诊断中具有广泛应用，包括单细胞测序、长读长测序和空间转录组学等创新方法，同时面临数据存储、隐私保护和标准化等挑战。
ai.translation: 下一代测序（NGS）技术通过高通量、低成本和快速的DNA测序能力，彻底改变了基因组学领域。本介绍概述了NGS技术及其在生物研究和医学诊断中的深远影响。文章首先阐述了NGS的核心原理，包括文库制备、合成测序和数据生成等基础流程。随后分析了不同NGS平台（如Illumina、Ion Torrent和Oxford Nanopore）的技术特点及其优缺点。重点探讨了单细胞测序、长读长测序和空间转录组学等最新技术进展，这些创新显著扩展了NGS的应用范围，使全面的基因组研究成为可能。文章进一步分析了NGS在基因组学、转录组学、表观遗传学、宏基因组学和精准医学等领域的应用，强调其在遗传变异发现、基因表达模式解析、DNA甲基化分析和微生物群落研究中的关键作用。同时讨论了NGS在揭示疾病机制、识别治疗靶点和推动精准医学中的重要价值。此外，文章还涉及NGS数据分析面临的计算挑战，包括序列比对、变异检测和数据解读等环节，突出了生物信息学和数据分析流程在将原始测序数据转化为生物学意义的洞察中的核心作用。最后，文章简要提及NGS数据与多组学数据的整合，以及多组学整合这一新兴领域对生物系统整体理解的贡献。在临床诊断领域，NGS对遗传病检测、癌症基因组学、传染病监测和药物基因组学的影响被详细阐述。文章还强调了基于NGS的液体活检和无创产前检测在临床实践中的变革潜力。最后，文章讨论了NGS面临的挑战，包括数据存储、隐私保护、伦理考量以及标准化和质量控制措施的重要性。文章最后指出，科学家、临床医生和生物信息学家的跨学科合作对于充分发挥NGS潜力、推动基因组学研究和医疗创新具有关键意义。

title: A Tale of Two Parasites: A Glimpse into the clinical RNA Methylome of P. falciparum and P. vivax isolates
abstract:
BackgroundUnderstanding the molecular mechanisms of the malarial parasites in hosts is crucial for developing effective treatments. Epitranscriptomic research on pathogens has unveiled the significance of RNA methylation in gene regulation and pathogenesis. We present the first report investigating methylation signatures and alternative splicing events using Nanopore Direct RNA Sequencing to single-base resolution in Plasmodium falciparum and P. vivax clinical isolates with hepatic dysfunction complications.

MethodologyWe performed direct RNA Sequencing using Nanopore from clinical isolates of P. falciparum and P. vivax showing hepatic dysfunction manifestation. Subsequently we performed transcriptome reconstruction using FLAIR and transcript classification using SQANTI3 followed by methylation detection using CHEUI and m6Anet to identify N6-methyladenosine (m6A) and 5-methylcytosine (m5C) methylation signatures. We also documented alternative splicing events from both the datasets.

ResultsThe reference genome of Plasmodium reports >5000 genes out of which we have identified [~]50% as expressed in the two sequenced isolates, including novel isoforms and intergenic transcripts, highlighting extensive transcriptome diversity. The distinct RNA methylation profiles of m6A and m5C from the expressed transcripts were observed in sense, Natural Antisense Transcripts (NATs) and intergenic categories hinting at species-specific regulatory mechanisms. Modified transcripts originating from apicoplast and mitochondrial genomes have also been detected. These modifications are unevenly present in the annotated regions of the mRNA, potentially influencing mRNA export and translation. We have observed several splicing events, with alternative 3and 5end splicing predominating in our datasets suggesting differences in translational kinetics and possible protein characteristics in these disease conditions.

ConclusionIn our data we are showing the presence of modified sense, NATs and alternatively spliced transcripts. These phenomena together suggest the presence of multiple regulatory layers which decides the post-translational proteome of the parasites in particular disease conditions. Studies like these will help to decipher the post-translational environments of malaria parasites in vivo and elucidate their inherent proteome plasticity, thus allowing the conceptualization of novel strategies for interventions.
authors: Gujarati, S.; Roy, P.; Mahapatra, T.; Gupta, D.; Kochar, S. K.; Kochar, D. K.; Das, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔直接RNA测序技术，首次揭示了恶性疟原虫和间日疟原虫临床分离株中RNA甲基化签名和可变剪接事件，发现转录组多样性及物种特异性调控机制。研究结果为理解疟疾寄生虫的表观转录组调控提供了新视角。
ai.translation:
背景：理解疟疾寄生虫在宿主中的分子机制对于开发有效治疗方案至关重要。病原体表观转录组学研究揭示了RNA甲基化在基因调控和病原体致病机制中的重要性。我们首次报道利用纳米孔直接RNA测序技术，在恶性疟原虫（Plasmodium falciparum）和间日疟原虫（P. vivax）临床分离株中，以单碱基分辨率分析甲基化签名和可变剪接事件。

方法：我们从表现出肝功能障碍表现的P. falciparum和P. vivax临床分离株中进行纳米孔直接RNA测序。随后使用FLAIR进行转录组重建，SQANTI3进行转录分类，CHEUI和m6Anet检测甲基化以识别N6-甲基腺苷（m6A）和5-甲基胞嘧啶（m5C）甲基化签名。同时记录两个数据集中的可变剪接事件。

结果：疟疾寄生虫参考基因组报告超过5000个基因，其中我们鉴定出约50%在两个测序分离株中表达，包括新isoform和基因间转录本，凸显了广泛的转录组多样性。表达转录本中m6A和m5C的RNA甲基化特征在sense、自然反义转录本（NATs）和基因间类别中存在差异，提示物种特异性调控机制。还检测到来自叶绿体和线粒体基因组的修饰转录本。这些修饰在mRNA注释区域分布不均，可能影响mRNA输出和翻译。我们观察到多种剪接事件，其中3'和5'端可变剪接在数据集中占主导地位，提示这些疾病条件下翻译动力学和蛋白质特征的差异。

结论：我们的数据展示了修饰的sense、NATs和可变剪接转录本的存在。这些现象共同表明存在多层调控机制，决定寄生虫在特定疾病条件下的翻译后蛋白组。此类研究将有助于解析疟疾寄生虫体内翻译后环境，阐明其固有蛋白组可塑性，从而为干预策略的概念化提供新思路。

title: Comparative study on genomic and epigenomic profiles of retinoblastoma or tuberous sclerosis complex via nanopore sequencing and a joint screening framework
abstract:
Recurrence and extraocular metastasis in advanced intraocular retinoblastoma (RB) are still major obstacles for successful treatment of Chinese children. Tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC) is a very rare, multisystemic genetic disorder characterized by hamartomatous growth. In this study, we aimed to compare genomic and epigenomic profiles with human RB or TSC using recently developed nanopore sequencing, and to identify disease-associated variations or genes. Peripheral blood samples were collected from either RB or RB/TSC patients plus their normal siblings, followed by nanopore sequencing and identification of disease-specific structural variations (SVs) and differentially methylated regions (DMRs) by a systematic biology strategy named as multiomics-based joint screening framework. In total, 316 RB- and 1295 TSC-unique SVs were identified, as well as 1072 RB- and 1114 TSC-associated DMRs, respectively. We eventually identified 6 key genes for RB for further functional validation. Knockdown of *CDK19* with specific siRNAs significantly inhibited Y79 cellular proliferation and increased sensitivity to carboplatin, whereas downregulation of AHNAK2 promoted the cell growth as well as drug resistance. Those two genes might serve as potential diagnostic markers or therapeutic targets of RB. The systematic biology strategy combined with functional validation might be an effective approach for rare pediatric malignances with limited samples and challenging collection process.

authors: Junting Wang, Chengyue Zhang, ... Liang Li
citation: Wang, J., Zhang, C., Zhang, L. et al. Comparative study on genomic and epigenomic profiles of retinoblastoma or tuberous sclerosis complex via nanopore sequencing and a joint screening framework. Cancer Gene Ther 31 , 439–453 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41417-023-00714-y
