ai.TLDR: 视网膜母细胞瘤（RB）和结节性硬化症（TSC）在中国儿童治疗中面临复发和眼外转移的挑战。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术结合多组学分析，发现RB相关的关键基因CDK19和AHNAK2，其功能验证显示可作为诊断标志物或治疗靶点。
ai.translation: 在晚期眼内视网膜母细胞瘤（RB）中，复发和眼外转移仍是阻碍中国儿童成功治疗的主要障碍。结节性硬化症复合征（TSC）是一种罕见的多系统遗传性疾病，以 hamartomatous 生长为特征。本研究旨在利用最新开发的纳米孔测序技术，比较人类 RB 或 TSC 的基因组和表观基因组特征，识别疾病相关变异或基因。从 RB 或 RB/TSC 患者及其正常同胞的外周血样本中提取 DNA，通过纳米孔测序结合系统生物学策略（多组学联合筛选框架）鉴定疾病特异性结构变异（SVs）和差异甲基化区域（DMRs）。共鉴定出 316 个 RB 特异性 SVs 和 1295 个 TSC 特异性 SVs，以及 1072 个 RB 相关 DMRs 和 1114 个 TSC 相关 DMRs。最终确定了 6 个 RB 相关关键基因进行功能验证。使用特异性 siRNA 敲低 CDK19 显著抑制 Y79 细胞增殖并增强卡铂敏感性，而 AHNAK2 表达下调则促进细胞生长及药物耐受性。这两个基因可能作为 RB 的潜在诊断标志物或治疗靶点。结合系统生物学策略与功能验证的方法，可能成为样本量有限且采集过程复杂的罕见儿科恶性肿瘤的有效研究途径。

title: Detection of pathogenic bacteria in ticks from Isiolo and Kwale counties of Kenya using metagenomics.
abstract: Ticks are arachnid ectoparasites which rank second only to mosquitoes in the transmission of human diseases including bacteria responsible for anaplasmosis, ehrlichiosis, spotted fevers, and Lyme disease among other febrile illnesses. Due to paucity of data on bacteria transmitted by ticks in Kenya, this study undertook a bacterial metagenomic-based characterization of ticks collected from Isiolo, a semi-arid pastoralist County in Eastern Kenya, and Kwale, a coastal County with monsoon climate on the southern Kenyan border with Tanzania. A total of 2,918 ticks belonging to 3 genera and 10 species were pooled and screened in this study. Tick identification was confirmed through the sequencing of Cytochrome C Oxidase Subunit 1 (COI) gene. Bacterial 16S rRNA gene PCR amplicons obtained from the above samples were sequenced using the MinION (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) platform. The resulting reads were demultiplexed in Porechop, followed by trimming and filtering in Trimmomatic before clustering using Qiime2-VSearch. A SILVA database pretrained naive Bayes classifier was used to taxonomically classify the Operational Taxonomic Units (OTUs). The bacteria of clinical interest detected in pooled tick assays were as follows: Rickettsia spp. 59.43% of pools, Coxiella burnetii 37.88%, Proteus mirabilis 5.08%, Cutibacterium acnes 6.08% and Corynebacterium ulcerans 2.43%. These bacteria are responsible for spotted fevers, query fever (Q-fever), urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, eye infections and diphtheria-like infections in humans, respectively. P. mirabilis, C. acnes and C. ulcerans were detected only in Isiolo. Additionally, COI sequences allowed for the identification of Rickettsia and Coxiella species to strain level in some of the pools. Diversity analysis revealed that the tick genera had high levels of Alpha diversity but the differences between the microbiomes of the three tick genera studied were not significant. The detection of Cutibacterium acnes, commonly associated with human skin flora suggests that the ticks may have contact with humans potentially exposing them to bacterial infections. The findings in this study highlight the need for further investigation into the viability of these bacteria and the competency of ticks to transmit them. Clinicians in these high-risk areas also need to be appraised for them to include Rickettsial diseases and Q-fever as part of their differential diagnosis.
authors: Kimemia, B. B.; Musila, L.; Langat, S.; Odoyo, E.; Cinkovich, S.; Abuom, D.; Yalwala, S.; Khamadi, S.; Johnson, J.; Garges, E.; Ojwang, E.; Eyase, F.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过宏基因组分析揭示了肯尼亚Isiolo和Kwale地区蜱虫传播的细菌多样性，发现Rickettsia spp.和Coxiella burnetii等病原体可能引发斑疹伤寒、Q热等疾病。研究结果强调了蜱虫传播病原体的潜在风险，需进一步评估其致病性和临床诊断价值。
ai.translation: 蜱虫是仅次于蚊虫的第二大人类疾病传播媒介，可传播引起斑疹伤寒、Q热、立克次体病等细菌。由于肯尼亚蜱传细菌数据匮乏，本研究对肯尼亚东部半干旱地区Isiolo县和南部沿海Kwale县采集的蜱虫进行了细菌宏基因组分析。共收集2,918只属于3属10种的蜱虫样本，通过细胞色素C氧化酶亚基1（COI）基因测序确认分类。利用MinION平台对16S rRNA基因PCR产物进行测序，通过Porechop解复用、Trimmomatic修剪过滤后，使用Qiime2-VSearch聚类分析。SILVA数据库预训练的朴素贝叶斯分类器用于操作分类单元（OTU）的分类。混合样本中检测到的临床相关细菌包括：Rickettsia spp.（59.43%）、Coxiella burnetii（37.88%）、Proteus mirabilis（5.08%）、Cutibacterium acnes（6.08%）和Corynebacterium ulcerans（2.43%）。这些细菌分别可引起斑疹伤寒、Q热、泌尿系统感染、皮肤软组织感染、眼部感染和类白喉感染。Proteus mirabilis、Cutibacterium acnes和Corynebacterium ulcerans仅在Isiolo地区检测到。COI序列还允许在部分样本中将Rickettsia和Coxiella物种鉴定至菌株水平。多样性分析显示蜱虫属具有高Alpha多样性，但三种蜱虫属的微生物组差异不显著。检测到与人类皮肤菌群相关的Cutibacterium acnes，表明蜱虫可能接触人类并暴露于细菌感染风险。研究结果强调需进一步评估这些细菌的致病性及蜱虫的传播能力，高风险地区临床医生需将立克次体病和Q热纳入鉴别诊断。

title: Human telomere length is chromosome specific and conserved across individuals
abstract: Short telomeres cause age-related disease and long telomeres predispose to cancer; however, the mechanisms regulating telomere length are unclear. To probe these mechanisms, we developed a nanopore sequencing method, Telomere Profiling, that is easy to implement, precise, and cost effective with broad applications in research and the clinic. We sequenced telomeres from individuals with short telomere syndromes and found similar telomere lengths to the clinical FlowFISH assay. We mapped telomere reads to specific chromosome end and identified both chromosome end-specific and haplotype-specific telomere length distributions. In the T2T HG002 genome, where the average telomere length is 5kb, we found a remarkable 6kb difference in lengths between some telomeres. Further, we found that specific chromosome ends were consistently shorter or longer than the average length across 147 individuals. The presence of conserved chromosome end-specific telomere lengths suggests there are new paradigms in telomere biology that are yet to be explored. Understanding the mechanisms regulating length will allow deeper insights into telomere biology that can lead to new approaches to disease.
authors: Greider, C. W.; Karimian, K.; Groot, A.; Huso, V.; Kahidi, R.; Tan, K.-T.; Sholes, S.; Keener, R. W.; McDyer, J. F.; Alder, J. K.; Li, H. K.; Rechtsteiner, A.

ai.TLDR: 端粒长度异常与年龄相关疾病及癌症风险密切相关，但其调控机制尚不明确。本研究开发了基于纳米孔测序的Telomere Profiling技术，实现了对端粒长度的精准检测，并发现特定染色体末端存在显著的端粒长度差异，揭示了端粒生物学的新范式。
ai.translation: 短端粒会导致年龄相关疾病，而长端粒则会增加癌症风险；然而，调控端粒长度的机制仍不清楚。为探索这些机制，我们开发了一种纳米孔测序方法——Telomere Profiling，该方法易于实施、精确且成本效益高，可广泛应用于研究和临床领域。我们对短端粒综合征患者的端粒进行了测序，发现其端粒长度与临床FlowFISH检测结果相似。我们通过将端粒读取映射到特定染色体末端，识别出染色体末端特异性及等位基因特异性的端粒长度分布。在T2T HG002基因组中，平均端粒长度为5kb，我们发现某些端粒长度存在显著的6kb差异。进一步研究发现，在147名个体中，特定染色体末端的端粒长度始终短于或长于平均长度。保守的染色体末端特异性端粒长度的存在表明，端粒生物学中存在尚未探索的新范式。理解调控端粒长度的机制将有助于深入揭示端粒生物学，从而为疾病治疗提供新思路。

title: Adapting Nanopore Sequencing Basecalling Models for Modification Detection via Incremental Learning and Anomaly Detection
abstract: We leverage machine learning approaches to adapt nanopore sequencing basecallers for nucleotide modification detection. We first apply the incremental learning technique to improve the basecalling of modification-rich sequences, which are usually of high biological interests. With sequence backbones resolved, we further run anomaly detection on individual nucleotides to determine their modification status. By this means, our pipeline promises the single-molecule, single-nucleotide and sequence context-free detection of modifications. We benchmark the pipeline using control oligos, further apply it in the basecalling of densely-modified yeast tRNAs and E.coli genomic DNAs, the cross-species detection of N6-methyladenosine (m6A) in mammalian mRNAs, and the simultaneous detection of N1-methyladenosine (m1A) and m6A in human mRNAs. Our IL-AD workflow is available at: https://github.com/wangziyuan66/IL-AD.
authors: Wang, Z.; Fang, Y.; Liu, Z.; Hao, N.; Zhang, H.; Sun, X.; Que, J.; DING, H.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过机器学习优化纳米孔测序碱基调用器，实现核苷酸修饰的单分子检测。采用增量学习与异常检测结合的方法，解决了传统方法在修饰序列解析中的局限性，成功应用于酵母tRNA、大肠杆菌DNA及人类mRNA的多修饰类型检测。
ai.translation: 我们利用机器学习方法优化纳米孔测序碱基调用器，以实现核苷酸修饰的检测。首先应用增量学习技术提升富含修饰序列的碱基调用性能，这类序列通常具有重要的生物学意义。在解析出序列骨架后，进一步对单个核苷酸进行异常检测以确定其修饰状态。通过该方法，我们的流程实现了无需序列上下文的单分子、单核苷酸修饰检测。使用控制寡核苷酸对流程进行基准测试，并将其应用于密集修饰酵母tRNA和大肠杆菌基因组DNA的碱基调用，实现了哺乳动物mRNA中N6-甲基腺苷（m6A）的跨物种检测，以及人类mRNA中N1-甲基腺苷（m1A）和m6A的同时检测。我们的IL-AD工作流程可在https://github.com/wangziyuan66/IL-AD获取。

title: Air monitoring by nanopore sequencing
abstract: While the air microbiome and its diversity are essential for human health and ecosystem resilience, comprehensive air microbial diversity monitoring has remained rare, so that little is known about the air microbiomes composition, distribution, or functionality. Here we show that nanopore sequencing-based metagenomics can robustly assess the air microbiome in combination with active air sampling through liquid impingement and tailored computational analysis. We provide fast and portable laboratory and computational approaches for air microbiome profiling, which we leverage to robustly assess the taxonomic composition of the core air microbiome of a controlled greenhouse environment and of a natural outdoor environment. We show that long-read sequencing can resolve species-level annotations and specific ecosystem functions through de novo metagenomic assemblies despite the low amount of fragmented DNA used as an input for nanopore sequencing. We then apply our pipeline to assess the diversity and variability of an urban air microbiome, using Barcelona, Spain, as an example; this randomized experiment gives first insights into the presence of highly stable location-specific air microbiomes within the citys boundaries, and showcases the robust microbial assessments that can be achieved through automatable, fast, and portable nanopore sequencing technology.
authors: Reska, T.; Pozdniakova, S.; Borras, S.; Schloter, M.; Canas, L.; Fenn, A.; Rodo, X.; Winkler, B.; Schnitzler, J.-P.; Urban, L.

ai.TLDR: 空气微生物组及其多样性对人类健康和生态系统韧性至关重要，但全面监测仍属罕见。本研究通过纳米孔测序宏基因组学结合液滴冲击采样和定制计算分析，首次实现空气微生物组的精准评估，揭示了城市环境中稳定存在的位置特异性微生物组特征。
ai.translation: 尽管空气微生物组及其多样性对人类健康和生态系统韧性至关重要，但全面的空气微生物多样性监测仍属罕见，因此对空气微生物组的组成、分布或功能知之甚少。本研究展示了一种基于纳米孔测序的宏基因组学方法，通过液滴冲击主动空气采样和定制计算分析，可稳健地评估空气微生物组。我们提供了快速且便携的实验室和计算方法用于空气微生物组分析，并利用这些方法对受控温室环境和自然户外环境的核心空气微生物组的分类学组成进行了稳健评估。研究显示，即使使用少量碎片化DNA作为纳米孔测序输入，长读长测序仍可通过de novo宏基因组组装解析物种水平注释和特定生态系统功能。随后，我们将该流程应用于评估城市空气微生物组的多样性与变异性，以西班牙巴塞罗那为例进行随机实验，首次揭示了城市边界内高度稳定的地点特异性空气微生物组的存在，并展示了通过自动化、快速且便携的纳米孔测序技术可实现的稳健微生物组评估。

title: RNA sequencing and target long-read sequencing reveal an intronic transposon insertion causing aberrant splicing
abstract: More than half of cases with suspected genetic disorders remain unsolved by genetic analysis using short-read sequencing such as exome sequencing (ES) and genome sequencing (GS). RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) and long-read sequencing (LRS) are useful for interpretation of candidate variants and detection of structural variants containing repeat sequences, respectively. Recently, adaptive sampling on nanopore sequencers enables target LRS more easily. Here, we present a Japanese girl with premature chromatid separation (PCS)/mosaic variegated aneuploidy (MVA) syndrome. ES detected a known pathogenic maternal heterozygous variant (c.1402-5A>G) in intron 10 of *BUB1B* (NM_001211.6), a known responsive gene for PCS/MVA syndrome with autosomal recessive inheritance. Minigene splicing assay revealed that almost all transcripts from the c.1402-5G allele have mis-splicing with 4-bp insertion. GS could not detect another pathogenic variant, while RNA-seq revealed abnormal reads in intron 2. To extensively explore variants in intron 2, we performed adaptive sampling and identified a paternal 3.0 kb insertion. Consensus sequence of 16 reads spanning the insertion showed that the insertion consists of *Alu* and SVA elements. Realignment of RNA-seq reads to the new reference sequence containing the insertion revealed that 16 reads have 5’ splice site within the insertion and 3’ splice site at exon 3, demonstrating causal relationship between the insertion and aberrant splicing. In addition, immunoblotting showed severely diminished BUB1B protein level in patient derived cells. These data suggest that detection of transcriptomic abnormalities by RNA-seq can be a clue for identifying pathogenic variants, and determination of insert sequences is one of merits of LRS.
authors: Ryota Kawakami, Takuya Hiraide, ... Hirotomo Saitsu
citation: Kawakami, R., Hiraide, T., Watanabe, K. et al. RNA sequencing and target long-read sequencing reveal an intronic transposon insertion causing aberrant splicing. J Hum Genet 69 , 91–99 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s10038-023-01211-8
description: More than half of cases with suspected genetic disorders remain unsolved by genetic analysis using short-read sequencing such as exome sequencing...

ai.TLDR: 目前超过半数疑似遗传病病例无法通过短读测序技术解决，长读测序在检测结构变异方面具有优势。本研究通过结合RNA-seq和自适应采样技术，首次发现BUB1B基因插入突变导致异常剪接，为遗传病诊断提供新思路。
ai.translation: 超过半数疑似遗传病病例通过短读测序（如外显子组测序和全基因组测序）仍无法确诊。RNA测序（RNA-seq）和长读测序（LRS）在候选变异解读及重复序列结构变异检测中具有独特优势。近期纳米孔测序的自适应采样技术显著提升了目标LRS的可行性。本研究报道一名日本女孩的早熟染色体分离（PCS）/镶嵌性非整倍体（MVA）综合征病例。外显子组测序（ES）检测到BUB1B基因（NM_001211.6）内含子10的已知致病性母源杂合变异（c.1402-5A>G），该基因与常染色体隐性遗传的PCS/MVA综合征相关。迷你基因剪接实验显示，c.1402-5G等位基因几乎全部转录本存在4-碱基插入的异常剪接。全基因组测序（GS）未能检测到另一致病性变异，但RNA-seq显示内含子2存在异常读段。为深入探索内含子2变异，采用自适应采样技术鉴定出父源3.0kb插入。16条覆盖插入区域的共识序列显示，插入由Alu和SVA元件组成。将RNA-seq读段重新比对至包含插入的新参考序列后，发现16条读段在插入区存在5'剪接位点，且在外显子3存在3'剪接位点，证实插入与异常剪接的因果关系。此外，患者细胞来源的免疫印迹显示BUB1B蛋白水平显著降低。这些数据表明，通过RNA-seq检测转录组异常可为识别致病性变异提供线索，而插入序列的确定是长读测序的重要优势。

title: NAD: Noise-augmented direct sequencing of target nucleic acids by augmenting with noise and selective sampling
abstract: Next-generation sequencing necessitates a minimum quantity and concentration of DNA/RNA samples, typically achieved through amplification using the PCR technique. However, this amplification step introduces several drawbacks to biological insights, including PCR bias and the loss of epigenetic information. The advent of long-read sequencing technologies facilitates direct sequencing, with the primary constraint being the limited amount of DNA/RNA present in biological samples. Here, we present a novel method called Noise-Augmented Direct (NAD) sequencing that enables the direct sequencing of target DNA even when it falls below the minimum quantity and concentration required for long-read sequencing by augmenting with noise DNA and adaptive sampling. Adaptive sampling is an emerging technology of nanopore sequencing, allowing the enhanced sequencing of target DNA by selectively depleting noise DNA. In this study, we use the DNA standard of the Lambda phage genome as the noise DNA to augment samples containing low amounts of bacterial genomes (1 ng to 300 ng). The results with cost-effective flow cells indicate that NAD sequencing successfully detects the target DNA with an input quantity as low as 1 ng, and the bacterial genome of Salmonella enterica can be assembled to 30% completion at an accuracy of 98% with an input quantity of 3 ng. With high throughput flow cells, the bacterial genome of Pseudonomas aeruginas was assembled to near completion (99.9%) at an accuracy of 99.97% with an input quantity of 300 ng. This proof-of-concept study demonstrates the potential of NAD sequencing in enhancing the robustness of long-read sequencing with small input DNA/RNA samples with noise augmentation and adaptive sampling.
authors: Shim, H.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术需要最低DNA/RNA量和浓度，但PCR扩增会引入偏差和表观遗传信息丢失。本文提出的NAD测序通过噪声DNA增强和自适应采样技术，成功实现了低至1 ng输入量的直接测序，展示了在小样本量下的应用潜力。
ai.translation: 下一代测序技术需要最低限度的DNA/RNA样本量和浓度，通常通过PCR技术进行扩增来实现。然而，这种扩增步骤会引入多种生物学信息的偏差，包括PCR偏差和表观遗传信息的丢失。长读长测序技术的出现使得直接测序成为可能，但其主要限制是生物样本中DNA/RNA的含量有限。本文提出了一种名为噪声增强直接（Noise-Augmented Direct, NAD）测序的新方法，通过添加噪声DNA和自适应采样技术，使目标DNA在长读长测序所需的最低量和浓度以下时仍能进行直接测序。自适应采样是纳米孔测序的新兴技术，通过选择性去除噪声DNA来增强目标DNA的测序效果。在本研究中，我们使用Lambda噬菌体基因组作为噪声DNA，用于增强含有低量细菌基因组（1 ng至300 ng）的样本。成本效益型流细胞的实验结果表明，NAD测序能够成功检测低至1 ng输入量的目标DNA，且在3 ng输入量下，沙门氏菌细菌基因组可达到98%准确度的30%组装完成度。使用高通量流细胞时，300 ng输入量下铜绿假单胞菌细菌基因组可达到99.9%准确度的近完全组装（99.9%）。这项概念验证研究展示了NAD测序在通过噪声增强和自适应采样提升小输入DNA/RNA样本长读长测序鲁棒性方面的潜力。

title: Parallel Molecular Data Storage by Printing Epigenetic Bits on DNA
abstract: DNA storage has shown potential to transcend current silicon-based data storage technologies in storage density, lifetime and energy consumption. However, writing large-scale data directly into DNA sequences by de novo synthesis remains uneconomical in time and cost. Inspired by the natural genomic modifications, in this work, we report an alternative, parallel strategy that enables the writing of arbitrary data on DNA using premade nucleic acids. With epigenetic modifications as information bits, our system employed DNA self-assembly guided enzymatic methylation to perform movable-type printing on universal DNA templates. By programming with a finite set of 700 DNA movable types and 5 templates, we achieved the synthesis-free writing of [~]270000 bits on an automated platform with 350 bits written per reaction. The data encoded in complex epigenetic patterns were retrieved high-throughput by nanopore sequencing, and algorithms were developed to finely resolve 240 modification patterns per sequencing reaction. Our framework presents a new modality of DNA-based data storage that is parallel, programmable, stable and scalable. Such a modality opens up avenues towards practical data storage and dual-mode data functions in biomolecular systems.
authors: Zhang, C.; Wu, R.; Sun, F.; Lin, Y.; Zhang, Y.; Liang, Y.; Chen, Y.; Teng, J.; Song, Z.; Liu, N.; Ouyang, Q.; Qian, L.; Yan, H.

ai.TLDR: DNA存储技术在存储密度、寿命和能耗方面展现出超越硅基存储的潜力。本研究通过预制核酸和表观遗传修饰的并行策略，实现了无需合成的高效数据写入。该方法在自动化平台上每反应写入350位，成功存储约270000位数据。
ai.translation: DNA存储已显示出在存储密度、寿命和能耗方面超越当前硅基数据存储技术的潜力。然而，通过从头合成直接将大规模数据写入DNA序列在时间和成本上仍不经济。受自然基因组修饰的启发，本研究报道了一种替代的并行策略，该策略通过预制核酸实现任意数据在DNA上的写入。以表观遗传修饰作为信息位点，我们的系统利用DNA自组装引导的酶促甲基化，在通用DNA模板上实现活字印刷。通过编程有限集合的700种DNA活字和5种模板，在自动化平台上实现了无需合成的[~]270000位数据写入，每反应写入350位。通过纳米孔测序高通量检索复杂表观遗传模式编码的数据，并开发算法实现每测序反应精细解析240种修饰模式。我们的框架提出了一种新的DNA基数据存储模式，具有并行性、可编程性、稳定性和可扩展性。这种模式为生物分子系统中的实用数据存储和双模数据功能开辟了新途径。

title: Beyond the exome: utility of long-read whole genome sequencing in exome-negative autosomal recessive diseases
abstract:
### Background

Long-read whole genome sequencing (lrWGS) has the potential to address the technical limitations of exome sequencing in ways not possible by short-read WGS. However, its utility in autosomal recessive Mendelian diseases is largely unknown.

### Methods

In a cohort of 34 families in which the suspected autosomal recessive diseases remained undiagnosed by exome sequencing, lrWGS was performed on the Pacific Bioscience Sequel IIe platform.

### Results

Likely causal variants were identified in 13 (38%) of the cohort. These include (1) a homozygous splicing SV in *TYMS* as a novel candidate gene for lethal neonatal lactic acidosis, (2) a homozygous non-coding SV that we propose impacts *STK25* expression and causes a novel neurodevelopmental disorder, (3) a compound heterozygous SV in *RP1L1* with complex inheritance pattern in a family with inherited retinal disease, (4) homozygous deep intronic variants in *LEMD2* and *SNAP91* as novel candidate genes for neurodevelopmental disorders in two families, and (5) a promoter SNV in *SLC4A4* causing non-syndromic band keratopathy. Surprisingly, we also encountered causal variants that could have been identified by short-read exome sequencing in 7 families. The latter highlight scenarios that are especially challenging at the interpretation level.

### Conclusions

Our data highlight the continued need to address the interpretation challenges in parallel with efforts to improve the sequencing technology itself. We propose a path forward for the implementation of lrWGS sequencing in the setting of autosomal recessive diseases in a way that maximizes its utility.
authors: Lama AlAbdi, Hanan E. Shamseldin, ... Fowzan S. Alkuraya
citation: AlAbdi, L., Shamseldin, H.E., Khouj, E. et al. Beyond the exome: utility of long-read whole genome sequencing in exome-negative autosomal recessive diseases. Genome Med 15 , 114 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-023-01270-8
description: Long-read whole genome sequencing (lrWGS) has the potential to address the technical limitations of exome sequencing in ways not possible...

ai.TLDR: 长读长全基因组测序(lrWGS)在解决外显子组测序技术局限性方面展现出潜力，但其在常染色体隐性遗传病中的应用仍需验证。研究通过分析34个未确诊家族发现，lrWGS可识别13个家族的致病变异，但部分变异可能通过短读长外显子组测序发现，凸显了结果解读的挑战。
ai.translation:
### 背景
长读长全基因组测序(lrWGS)在解决外显子组测序的技术局限性方面展现出独特优势，这种优势是短读长全基因组测序无法实现的。然而，其在常染色体隐性孟德尔遗传病中的临床应用价值仍缺乏系统性研究。

### 方法
在34个通过外显子组测序仍无法确诊的家族中，采用Pacific Bioscience Sequel IIe平台进行长读长全基因组测序分析。

### 结果
在13个家族(38%)中识别出可能的致病性变异，具体包括：(1)TYMS基因的同源剪接结构变异作为致命新生儿乳酸酸中毒的新候选基因；(2)STK25基因的同源非编码结构变异导致新型神经发育障碍；(3)RP1L1基因的复合杂合结构变异呈现复杂遗传模式；(4)LEMD2和SNAP91基因的同源内含子深度变异作为两个家族的新型神经发育障碍候选基因；(5)SLC4A4基因启动子的单核苷酸变异导致非综合征型带状角膜病变。令人意外的是，7个家族的致病性变异可能通过短读长外显子组测序识别，这些案例凸显了结果解读层面的特殊挑战。

### 结论
研究数据强调需要同步解决基因组解读的复杂性问题与改进测序技术本身。我们提出了一条通过优化lrWGS技术应用流程，最大化其在常染色体隐性遗传病诊断中的临床价值的实施路径。

title: Profiling age and body fluid DNA methylation markers using nanopore adaptive sampling
abstract: DNA methylation plays essential roles in regulating physiological processes, from tissue and organ development to gene expression and aging processes and has emerged as a widely used biomarker for the identification of body fluids and age prediction. Currently, methylation markers are targeted independently at specific CpG sites, as part of a multiplexed assay, rather than through a unified assay. Methylation detection is also dependent on divergent methodologies, ranging from enzyme digestion and affinity enrichment to bisulfite treatment, alongside various technologies for high-throughput profiling, including microarray and sequencing. In this pilot study, we test the simultaneous identification of age-associated and body fluid-specific methylation markers using a single technology, nanopore adaptive sampling. This innovative approach enables the profiling of multiple CpG marker sites across entire gene regions from a single sample without the need for specialized DNA preparation or additional biochemical treatments. Our study demonstrates that adaptive sampling achieves sufficient coverage in regions of interest to accurately determine the methylation status, shows a robust consistency with whole-genome bisulfite sequencing data, and corroborates known CpG markers of age and body fluids. Our work also resulted in the identification of new sites strongly correlated with age, suggesting new possible age methylation markers. This study lays the groundwork for the systematic development of nanopore-based methodologies in both age prediction and body fluid identification, highlighting the feasibility and potential of nanopore adaptive sampling while acknowledging the need for further validation and expansion in future research.
authors: Yuen, Z.; Shanmuganandam, S.; Stanley, M.; Jiang, S.; Hein, N.; Daniel, R.; McNevin, D.; Jack, C.; Eyras, E.

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化在调控生理过程（如组织器官发育、基因表达和衰老）中发挥关键作用，并作为体液识别和年龄预测的常用生物标志物。本研究通过纳米孔自适应采样技术实现年龄相关和体液特异性甲基化标记的同步检测，展示了该方法在覆盖度、数据一致性及新标记物发现方面的有效性。
keywords: 全基因组亚硫酸盐测序
ai.translation: DNA甲基化在调控生理过程中发挥关键作用，从组织器官发育到基因表达及衰老过程，并已发展为体液识别和年龄预测的常用生物标志物。目前，甲基化标记物主要通过独立靶向特定CpG位点或作为多重检测的一部分进行检测，而非统一检测方法。甲基化检测还依赖于多种不同方法，包括酶切、亲和富集和亚硫酸盐处理，以及多种高通量测序技术，如微阵列和测序。在本试点研究中，我们通过单一技术纳米孔自适应采样，测试了年龄相关和体液特异性甲基化标记物的同时检测。该创新方法无需特殊DNA制备或额外生化处理，即可从单一样本中对整个基因区域的多个CpG标记位点进行分析。研究结果表明，自适应采样在感兴趣区域实现了足够的覆盖度，能够准确确定甲基化状态，与全基因组亚硫酸盐测序数据表现出稳健的一致性，并验证了已知的年龄和体液相关CpG标记物。本研究还发现了与年龄显著相关的新型位点，提示了新的潜在年龄甲基化标记物。该研究为纳米孔技术在年龄预测和体液识别中的系统性方法开发奠定了基础，突显了纳米孔自适应采样的可行性与潜力，同时承认未来研究中需要进一步验证和扩展。

title: Disease-decreasing diversity: evidence for lowered parasite prevalence in microscopic nematode communities with higher species numbers
abstract: Biodiversity can affect parasite prevalence, a phenomenon widely studied in macroscopic organisms. However, data from microscopic communities is lacking, despite their essential role in ecosystem functioning and the unique experimental opportunities microscopic organisms offer. Here, we study diversity-disease effects in wild nematode communities by profiting from the molecular tools available in the well-studied model nematode Caenorhabditis elegans. Nanopore sequencing was used to characterize nematode community diversity and composition, whereas parasites were identified using nine distinct experimental assays based on fluorescent staining or fluorescent reporter strains. Our results indicate biotic stress is abundant in wild nematode communities. Moreover, in two assays, diversity-disease relations were observed: microsporidia and immune system activation were more often detected in relatively species-poor communities. Other assays, targeting different parasites, were without diversity-disease relations. Together, this study provides the first demonstration of diversity-disease effects in microbial communities and establishes the use of nematode communities as model systems for disease dilution.
authors: van Himbeeck, R.; Sowa, J. N.; Tamim El Jarkass, H.; Wu, W.; Oude Vrielink, J.; Riksen, J. A. G.; Reinke, A.; van Sluijs, L.

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次揭示微生物群落中生物多样性对疾病传播的影响，通过分析野生线虫群落发现低多样性环境更易出现寄生虫感染。研究利用秀丽线虫模型结合纳米孔测序技术，发现微孢子虫感染和免疫激活在物种贫乏群落中更常见。
ai.translation: 生物多样性可能影响寄生虫流行率，这一现象在宏观生物中已被广泛研究。然而，关于微观生物群落的数据仍严重缺乏，尽管它们在生态系统功能中具有关键作用，并且为实验研究提供了独特机会。本研究通过利用已研究透彻的秀丽线虫模型中可用的分子工具，探讨野生线虫群落中的多样性-疾病效应。采用纳米孔测序技术表征线虫群落的多样性与组成，通过九种基于荧光染色或荧光报告菌株的实验检测方法识别寄生虫。研究结果表明，野生线虫群落中普遍存在生物胁迫。在两项实验中观察到多样性-疾病关系：微孢子虫感染和免疫系统激活在物种组成较简单的群落中更常见。其他针对不同寄生虫的实验未发现此类关系。本研究首次在微生物群落中展示了多样性-疾病效应，并确立了线虫群落作为疾病稀释效应研究模型系统的应用价值。

title: Digital telomere measurement by long-read sequencing distinguishes healthy aging from disease
abstract: Telomere length is an important biomarker of organismal aging and cellular replicative potential, but existing measurement methods are limited in resolution and accuracy. Here, we deploy digital telomere measurement by nanopore sequencing to understand how distributions of human telomere length change with age and disease. We measure telomere attrition and de novo elongation with unprecedented resolution in genetically defined populations of human cells, in blood cells from healthy donors and in blood cells from patients with genetic defects in telomere maintenance. We find that human aging is accompanied by a progressive loss of long telomeres and an accumulation of shorter telomeres. In patients with defects in telomere maintenance, the accumulation of short telomeres is more pronounced and correlates with phenotypic severity. We apply machine learning to train a binary classification model that distinguishes healthy individuals from those with telomere biology disorders. This sequencing and bioinformatic pipeline will advance our understanding of telomere maintenance mechanisms and the use of telomere length as a clinical biomarker of aging and disease.
authors: Sanchez, S. E.; Gu, J.; Golla, A.; Martin, A.; Shomali, W.; Hockemeyer, D.; Savage, S.; Artandi, S.

ai.TLDR: 端粒长度作为生物老化和细胞复制潜力的重要生物标志物，现有测量方法在分辨率和准确性上存在局限。本研究通过纳米孔测序实现数字端粒测量，揭示了人类端粒长度随年龄和疾病的变化规律，并发现端粒维持缺陷患者的短端粒积累与表型严重程度相关。
ai.translation: 端粒长度是生物老化和细胞复制潜力的重要生物标志物，但现有测量方法在分辨率和准确性上存在局限。本研究采用纳米孔测序技术进行数字端粒测量，以探究人类端粒长度分布随年龄和疾病的变化规律。我们通过高分辨率测量，在遗传定义的人类细胞群体、健康供体的血液细胞以及端粒维持缺陷患者的血液细胞中，分别检测到端粒缩短和新生延长现象。研究发现，人类衰老伴随长端粒的渐进性丢失和短端粒的累积。在端粒维持缺陷患者中，短端粒的累积更为显著，并与表型严重程度呈正相关。我们应用机器学习训练二分类模型，可有效区分健康个体与端粒生物学障碍患者。该测序与生物信息学流程将推动对端粒维持机制的理解，并促进端粒长度作为衰老和疾病临床生物标志物的应用。

title: Barcode 100K Specimens: In a Single Nanopore Run
abstract: It is a global priority to better manage the biosphere, but action needs to be informed by monitoring shifts in the abundance and distribution of species across the domains of life. The acquisition of such information is currently constrained by the limited knowledge of biodiversity. Among the 20 million or more species of eukaryotes, just a tenth have scientific names. DNA barcoding can speed the registration of unknown animal species, the most diverse kingdom of eukaryotes, as the BIN system automates their recognition. However, inexpensive analytical protocols are critical as the census of all animal species will require processing a billion or more specimens. Barcoding involves DNA extraction followed by PCR and sequencing with the last step dominating costs until 2017. By recovering barcodes from highly multiplexed samples, the Sequel platforms from Pacific BioSciences slashed costs by 90%, but these instruments are only deployed in core facilities because of their expense. Sequencers from Oxford Nanopore Technologies provide an escape from high capital and service costs, but their low sequence fidelity has, until now, kept analytical cost above Sequel. However, the improved performance of its latest flow cells (R10.4.1) might erase this differential. This study demonstrates that a regular MinION flow cell can characterize an amplicon pool derived from 100,000 specimens while a Flongle flow cell can process one derived from several thousand. At $0.01 per specimen, DNA sequencing is now the least expensive step in the barcode workflow. By coupling simplified protocols for DNA extraction with ultra-low volume PCRs, it will be possible to move from specimen to DNA barcode for $0.10, a price point that will enable the census of all species within two decades.
authors: Hebert, P. D. N.; Floyd, R.; Jafarpour, S.; Prosser, S. W. J.

ai.TLDR: 全球生物圈管理需要监测物种丰度和分布变化，但现有知识限制了生物多样性数据获取。通过优化DNA条形码技术，结合新型测序平台，使DNA测序成本降至每样本0.01美元，未来十年内有望完成所有物种的普查。
ai.translation: 更好地管理生物圈是全球优先事项，但行动需要基于对生命三大域物种丰度和分布变化的监测。目前获取此类信息受到生物多样性知识有限的制约。在超过2000万种真核生物中，仅有十分之一拥有科学名称。DNA条形码技术能够加速未知动物物种（真核生物中最丰富的王国）的注册，因为BIN系统可自动化其识别。然而，低廉的分析协议至关重要，因为所有动物物种的普查将需要处理数十亿个样本。条形码流程包括DNA提取、PCR和测序，其中测序步骤直到2017年始终主导成本。通过从高度复用的样本中恢复条形码，太平洋生物科学公司的Sequel平台将成本降低了90%，但这些设备因高昂费用仅部署在核心设施中。牛津纳米孔技术的测序仪可摆脱高资本和维护成本，但其低序列保真度使分析成本至今高于Sequel。然而，其最新流细胞（R10.4.1）性能的提升可能消除这一差异。本研究证明，常规MinION流细胞可表征来自10万个样本的扩增子池，而Flongle流细胞可处理来自数千个样本的池。以每样本0.01美元的成本，DNA测序现在成为条形码流程中最便宜的步骤。通过结合简化DNA提取协议与超低体积PCR，有望以0.10美元的价格实现样本到DNA条形码的转换，这一价格点将在未来二十年内实现所有物种的普查。

title: High resolution long-read telomere sequencing reveals dynamic mechanisms in aging and cancer
abstract: Telomeres are the protective nucleoprotein structures at the end of linear eukaryotic chromosomes. Telomeres repetitive nature and length have traditionally challenged the precise assessment of the composition and length of individual human telomeres. Here, we present Telo-seq to resolve bulk, chromosome arm-specific and allele-specific human telomere lengths using Oxford Nanopore Technologies native long-read sequencing. Telo-seq resolves telomere shortening in five population doubling increments and reveals intrasample, chromosome arm-specific, allele-specific telomere length heterogeneity. Telo-seq can reliably discriminate between telomerase- and ALT-positive cancer cell lines. Thus, Telo-seq is a novel tool to study telomere biology during development, aging, and cancer at unprecedented resolution.
authors: Schmidt, T. T.; Tyer, C.; Rughani, P.; Haggblom, C.; Jones, J. R.; Dai, X.; Frazer, K. A.; Gage, F. H.; Juul, S.; Hickey, S.; Karlseder, J.

ai.TLDR: 端粒是真核生物染色体末端的保护性核蛋白结构，其重复序列和长度传统上难以精确评估。Telo-seq技术通过Oxford Nanopore长读长测序，首次实现对群体、染色体臂特异性及等位基因特异性端粒长度的高分辨率分析，可有效区分端粒酶阳性与ALT阳性癌细胞系。
ai.translation: 端粒是真核生物染色体末端的保护性核蛋白结构。由于端粒的重复序列特性及其长度的复杂性，传统方法在精确评估单个个体端粒组成和长度方面存在挑战。本研究提出Telo-seq技术，利用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的原生长读长测序，可解析群体水平、染色体臂特异性及等位基因特异性的人类端粒长度。该技术能够以五倍群体倍增单位的分辨率检测端粒缩短现象，并揭示样本内染色体臂特异性、等位基因特异性端粒长度异质性。Telo-seq可可靠区分端粒酶阳性与替代长度突变（ALT）阳性癌细胞系，因此成为研究发育、衰老及癌症中端粒生物学的全新高分辨率工具。

title: Nanopore and Illumina Sequencing Reveal Different Viral Populations from Human Gut Samples
abstract:
The advent of viral metagenomics, or viromics, has improved our knowledge and understanding of global viral diversity. High-throughput sequencing technologies enable explorations of the ecological roles, contributions to host metabolism, and the influence of viruses in various environments including the human gut microbiome. However, the bacterial metagenomic studies frequently have the advantage. The adoption of advanced technologies like long-read sequencing has the potential to be transformative in refining viromics and metagenomics.

Here, we examined the effectiveness of long-read and hybrid sequencing by comparing Illumina short-read and Oxford Nanopore Technology (ONT) long-read sequencing technologies and different assembly strategies on recovering viral genomes from human faecal samples.

Our findings showed that if a single sequencing technology is to be chosen for virome analysis, Illumina was preferable due to its superior ability to recover fully resolved viral genomes and minimise erroneous genomes. While ONT assemblies were effective in recovering viral diversity, the challenges related to input requirements and the necessity for amplification made it less ideal as a standalone solution. However, using a combined, hybrid approach enabled a more authentic representation of viral diversity to be obtained within samples.

Impact StatementViral metagenomics, or viromics, has revolutionised our understanding of global viral diversity however long-read and hybrid approaches are not yet widespread in this field. Here, we compared the performance of Illumina short-read and Nanopore long-read assembly approaches for recovering fully resolved viral genomes from human faecal samples. We highlight Illuminas short-read sequencing for recovering fully resolved viral genomes, while acknowledging Oxford Nanopore Technologys long-read sequencing for capturing broader viral diversity. However, a hybrid approach, utilising both technologies, may mitigate the limitations of one technology alone.

Data SummaryAll reads used in this study are available on European Nucleotide Archive (ENA) within the project PRJEB47625.
authors: Cook, R.; Telatin, A.; Hsieh, S.-Y.; Newberry, F.; Tariq, M. A.; Baker, D. J.; Carding, S. R.; Adriaenssens, E. M.

ai.TLDR: 病毒宏基因组学（viromics）通过高通量测序技术深化了我们对全球病毒多样性的理解，但传统细菌宏基因组研究仍占优势。本研究通过比较Illumina短读长测序与ONT长读长测序技术，发现Illumina在恢复完整病毒基因组方面更优，而混合测序策略能更真实地反映病毒多样性。
ai.translation:
病毒宏基因组学（viromics）的出现提高了我们对全球病毒多样性的认知和理解。高通量测序技术使我们能够探索病毒在生态角色、宿主代谢贡献以及不同环境（包括人类肠道微生物组）中的影响。然而，细菌宏基因组研究仍具有明显优势。采用长读长测序等先进技术有望在优化病毒宏基因组学和宏基因组研究中发挥变革性作用。

本研究通过比较Illumina短读长测序与牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序技术，以及不同组装策略在人类粪便样本中恢复病毒基因组的有效性。

研究结果表明，若需选择单一测序技术进行病毒组分析，Illumina因其在恢复完整解析病毒基因组和最小化错误基因组方面的卓越能力而更优。尽管ONT组装在恢复病毒多样性方面有效，但输入需求和扩增必要性带来的挑战使其作为独立解决方案不够理想。然而，采用混合策略可获得更真实的病毒多样性表征。

影响声明：病毒宏基因组学已革新我们对全球病毒多样性的理解，但长读长和混合方法在该领域尚未普及。本研究比较了Illumina短读长测序与纳米孔长读长测序在恢复完整病毒基因组中的性能。我们强调Illumina短读长测序在恢复完整病毒基因组中的优势，同时认可ONT长读长测序在捕捉更广泛病毒多样性中的作用。然而，结合两种技术的混合方法可能缓解单一技术的局限性。

数据摘要：本研究使用的所有读取数据均保存在欧洲核苷酸档案库（ENA）项目PRJEB47625中。

title: Drug resistance and vaccine target surveillance ofPlasmodium falciparumusing nanopore sequencing in Ghana
abstract: Malaria results in over 600,000 deaths annually, with the highest burden of deaths in young children living in sub-Saharan Africa. Molecular surveillance can provide important information for malaria control policies, including detection of antimalarial drug resistance. However, genome sequencing capacity in malaria-endemic countries is limited. We designed and implemented an end-to-end workflow to detect *Plasmodium falciparum* antimalarial resistance markers and diversity in the vaccine target *circumsporozoite protein* (*csp*) using nanopore sequencing in Ghana. We analysed 196 clinical samples and showed that our method is rapid, robust, accurate and straightforward to implement. Importantly, our method could be applied to dried blood spot samples, which are readily collected in endemic settings. We report that *P. falciparum* parasites in Ghana are mostly susceptible to chloroquine, with persistent sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine resistance and no evidence of artemisinin resistance. Multiple single nucleotide polymorphisms were identified in *csp*, but their significance is uncertain. Our study demonstrates the feasibility of nanopore sequencing for malaria genomic surveillance in endemic countries.
authors: Sophia T. Girgis, Edem Adika, ... William L. Hamilton
citation: Girgis, S.T., Adika, E., Nenyewodey, F.E. et al. Drug resistance and vaccine target surveillance of Plasmodium falciparum using nanopore sequencing in Ghana. Nat Microbiol 8 , 2365–2377 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41564-023-01516-6
description: Malaria results in over 600,000 deaths annually, with the highest burden of deaths in young children living in sub-Saharan Africa. Molecular...

ai.TLDR: 疟疾每年导致超过60万人死亡，尤其在撒哈拉以南非洲的儿童中最为严重。本研究在冈比亚采用纳米孔测序技术，开发了一种端到端的工作流程，用于检测恶性疟原虫的抗药性标记和疫苗靶点环孢子虫蛋白（csp）的多样性。结果表明该方法快速、可靠且易于实施，揭示了当地疟原虫对氯喹的高敏感性及磺胺嘧啶-吡咯嘧啶耐药性的持续存在。
ai.translation: 疟疾每年导致超过60万人死亡，其中撒哈拉以南非洲地区的儿童死亡负担最重。分子监测可为疟疾防控政策提供重要信息，包括抗疟药物耐药性的检测。然而，疟疾流行地区基因组测序能力有限。我们设计并实施了一种端到端的工作流程，利用纳米孔测序技术在加纳检测恶性疟原虫（Plasmodium falciparum）的抗疟药物耐药性标记及疫苗靶点环孢子虫蛋白（circumsporozoite protein, csp）的多样性。我们分析了196份临床样本，结果表明该方法具有快速、稳健、准确且易于实施的特点。重要的是，该方法可应用于干血斑样本，这种样本在流行地区易于采集。我们报告称，加纳的恶性疟原虫主要对氯喹敏感，存在持续的磺胺嘧啶-吡咯嘧啶耐药性，且未发现青蒿素耐药证据。在csp中鉴定出多个单核苷酸多态性，但其意义尚不确定。本研究证明了纳米孔测序在疟疾流行地区基因组监测的可行性。

title: Identification of A Novel CG307 Sub-clade in Third Generation Cephalosporin Resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae Causing Invasive Infections in the United States
abstract:
Despite the notable clinical impact, recent molecular epidemiology regarding third-generation cephalosporin-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae (3GC-RKp) in the United States remains limited. We performed whole genome sequencing of 3GC-RKp bacteremia isolates collected from March 2016 to May 2022 at a tertiary care cancer center in Houston, TX using Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies platforms. A comprehensive comparative genomic analysis was performed to dissect population structure, transmission dynamics, and pan-genomic signatures of our 3GC-RKp population. Of the 194 3GC-RKp bacteremias that occurred during our study timeframe, we were able to analyze 153 (79%) bacteremia isolates, 126 initial and 27 recurrent isolates respectively. While isolates belonging to the widely prevalent clonal group (CG) 258 were rarely observed, the predominant clonal group, CG307, accounted for 37 (29%) index isolates and displayed a significant correlation (Pearson correlation test P-value = 0.03) with the annual frequency of 3GC-RKp bacteremia. Within our CG307 cohort, 89% (33/37) of our isolates belong to the global rather than previously described Texas-specific clade. Strikingly, we identified a new CG307 sub-clade (i.e., cluster 1 isolates) comprised of 18 isolates characterized by the chromosomally-encoded blaSHV-205 and unique accessory genome content. This CG307 sub-clade was detected in various United States regions, with genome sequences from 24 additional strains becoming recently available in the NCBI SRA database. Collectively, this study underscores the emergence and dissemination of a distinct CG307 sub-clade that is a prevalent cause of 3GC-RKp bacteremia among cancer patients seen in Houston, TX and has recently been isolated throughout the United States.

DATA SUMMARYWGS data sequenced during this study period was submitted to NCBI and can be accessed within BioProject PRJNA648389. WGS data from previous study of carbapenem non-susceptible Enterobacterales can be accessed from BioProject PRJNA836696. Assembly information and BioAccession numbers are provided in Table S1.

IMPACT STATEMENTInfections due to 3rd generation cephalosporin resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae (3GC-RKp) are considered among the most urgent public health threats. However, molecular epidemiology studies on 3GC-RKp in the United States are limited. Our analysis indicates a preponderance of genetically diverse 3GC-RKp isolates harboring the key antimicrobial resistance determinant blaCTX-M-15 at our institution. Importantly, however, we detected evidence of long duration transmission of highly genetically related CG307 and CG29 specific clusters at our institution. Interestingly, we rarely detected the pandemic CG258 lineage in our cohort and did not detect more than two genetically related CG258 isolates from this lineage. We found that 90% of our isolates from the most prevalent clonal group, CG307, belonged to a novel, nested-population of a "global" CG307 clade in contrast to the more commonly detected "Texas-specific" clade that has circulated in our region. We searched the NCBI SRA database using genomic markers of the novel CG307 clade and found evidence of this clade causing recent invasive infections in other locations across the United States. Our study highlights the shifting population dynamics of K. pneumoniae causing invasive infections and the necessity to continue AMR surveillance in order to identify emerging high-risk populations.
authors: Selvaraj Anand, S.; Wu, C.-T.; Bremer, J.; Bhatti, M. M.; Treangen, T. J.; Kalia, A.; Shelburne, S. A.; Shropshire, W. C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过全基因组测序分析了美国德克萨斯州休斯顿某三级癌症中心2016-2022年间3GC-RKp败血症菌株的分子流行病学特征。发现CG307克隆群占主导地位，其中89%的菌株属于全球性亚群而非本地特有亚群，并鉴定出携带blaSHV-205的新型CG307亚群，该亚群已在美国多地区传播。
ai.translation:
尽管3GC-RKp在临床中具有显著影响，但美国相关分子流行病学研究仍有限。我们使用Illumina和Oxford Nanopore Technologies平台对2016年3月至2022年5月期间收集的3GC-RKp败血症菌株进行了全基因组测序，共分析了153株（占79%），包括126株初始分离株和27株复发分离株。虽然广泛流行的CG258克隆群在样本中罕见，但主导克隆群CG307占37株（29%），且与3GC-RKp败血症年发生频率呈显著正相关（Pearson相关性检验P值=0.03）。在CG307队列中，89%（33/37）的菌株属于全球性而非之前描述的德克萨斯州特有分支。令人惊讶的是，我们鉴定出一个新的CG307亚群（即簇1菌株），包含18株携带染色体编码的blaSHV-205和独特的辅助基因组内容。该CG307亚群在美国多个地区被检测到，NCBI SRA数据库近期新增了24株该亚群的基因组序列。本研究强调了CG307亚群在美国德克萨斯州癌症患者中作为3GC-RKp败血症主要病因的传播情况，并揭示了其在美国其他地区的扩散趋势。

数据摘要：本研究期间的WGS数据已提交至NCBI，可通过BioProject PRJNA648389访问。之前关于碳青霉烯类耐药肠杆菌科的WGS数据可访问BioProject PRJNA836696。组装信息和BioAccession编号详见表S1。

影响声明：3GC-RKp感染被视为最紧迫的公共卫生威胁之一。然而，美国的3GC-RKp分子流行病学研究仍有限。我们的分析显示，机构内携带关键耐药基因blaCTX-M-15的遗传多样性3GC-RKp菌株占主导。重要的是，我们检测到高度遗传相关的CG307和CG29特异性簇在机构内存在长期传播。有趣的是，我们的队列中罕见检测到流行性CG258谱系，且未发现超过两个遗传相关的CG258菌株。我们发现，最常见克隆群CG307中90%的菌株属于新型嵌套全球性CG307分支，而非更常检测到的本地特有分支。通过NCBI SRA数据库的基因组标记搜索，我们发现该分支近期在美国其他地区引发了侵袭性感染。本研究突显了肺炎克雷伯菌侵袭性感染的群体动态变化，并强调持续监测耐药性（AMR）以识别新兴高危群体的必要性。

title: Nanopore sequencing of influenza A and B in Oxfordshire and the United Kingdom, 2022-23
abstract:
ObjectivesWe evaluated Nanopore sequencing for influenza surveillance.

MethodsInfluenza A and B PCR-positive samples from hospital patients in Oxfordshire, UK, and a UK-wide population survey from winter 2022-23 underwent Nanopore sequencing following targeted rt-PCR amplification.

ResultsFrom 941 infections, successful sequencing was achieved in 292/388(75%) available Oxfordshire samples: 231(79%) A/H3N2, 53(18%) A/H1N1, and 8(3%) B/Victoria and in 53/113(47%) UK-wide samples. Sequencing was more successful at lower Ct values. Most same-sample replicate sequences had identical haemagglutinin segments (124/141;88%); a subset of samples also Illumina sequenced were very similar to Nanopore sequences.

Comparison of Oxfordshire and UK-wide sequences showed frequent inter-regional transmission. Infections were closely-related to 2022-23 vaccine strains. Only one sample had a neuraminidase inhibitor resistance mutation.

849/941(90%) Oxfordshire infections were community-acquired. 63/88(72%) potentially healthcare-associated cases shared a hospital ward with [≥]1 known infectious case. 33 epidemiologically-plausible transmission links had sequencing data for both source and recipient: 8 were within [≤]5 SNPs, of these, 5(63%) involved potential sources that were also hospital-acquired.

ConclusionsNanopore influenza sequencing was reproducible and antiviral resistance rare. Inter-regional transmission was common; most infections were genomically similar. Hospital-acquired infections are likely an important source of nosocomial transmission and should be prioritised for infection prevention and control.

HighlightsO_LINanopore sequencing is a reproducible tool for influenza surveillance
C_LIO_LIInter-regional transmission of influenza was common across the UK
C_LIO_LIInfluenza anti-viral resistance was rare
C_LIO_LIIn 1 year most infections were genetically similar, hindering transmission studies
C_LIO_LIHospital-acquired infections are likely a key source of nosocomial transmission
C_LI
authors: Cane, J.; Sanderson, N.; Barnett, S.; Vaughan, A.; Pott, M.; Kapel, N.; Morgan, M.; Jesuthasan, G.; Samuel, R.; Ehsaan, M.; Boothe, H.; Haduli, E.; Studley, R.; Rourke, E.; Diamond, I.; Fowler, T.; Watson, C.; Stoesser, N.; Walker, A. S.; Street, T.; Eyre, D. W.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估纳米孔测序在流感监测中的应用，结果显示该技术具有可重复性且抗病毒耐药性罕见。研究发现英国不同地区间存在频繁的流感病毒传播，且多数感染在基因组层面相似，提示医院获得性感染可能是院内传播的重要来源。
ai.translation:
研究目标：评估纳米孔测序技术在流感监测中的应用价值。

研究方法：收集英国牛津郡医院患者及全国范围内的流感A/B型PCR阳性样本，通过靶向逆转录PCR扩增后进行纳米孔测序分析。

研究结果：在941例感染样本中，牛津郡388份样本中292份（75%）成功完成测序（A/H3N2 231例，A/H1N1 53例，B/Victoria 8例），全国范围113份样本中53份（47%）成功测序。测序成功率与循环阈值（Ct值）呈负相关。同源样本重复测序中，141份样本中124份（88%）血凝素片段完全一致，部分样本的Illumina测序结果与纳米孔测序高度相似。牛津郡与全国范围测序数据显示频繁的跨区域传播，感染株与2022-23季疫苗株高度相关，仅1例存在神经氨酸酶抑制剂耐药突变。90%牛津郡感染为社区获得性，72%潜在医院相关感染病例与至少1例已知传染源共处医院病房。33例流行病学可解释的传播链中，8例（≤5个SNP差异）涉及潜在医院获得性传染源。

研究结论：纳米孔流感测序具有可重复性且抗病毒耐药性罕见。跨区域传播普遍存在，多数感染在基因组层面相似。医院获得性感染可能是院内传播的重要来源，应作为感染防控的重点。

研究亮点：
1. 纳米孔测序是流感监测的可重复工具
2. 英国流感跨区域传播普遍存在
3. 流感抗病毒耐药性罕见
4. 1年内多数感染基因组相似，阻碍传播研究
5. 医院获得性感染可能是院内传播关键来源

title: Simultaneous Profiling of Chromatin Accessibility and DNA Methylation in Complete Plant Genomes Using Long-Read Sequencing
abstract: Epigenetic regulations, including chromatin accessibility, nucleosome positioning, and DNA methylation intricately shape genome function. However, current chromatin profiling techniques relying on short-read sequencing technologies fail to characterise highly repetitive genomic regions and cannot detect multiple chromatin features simultaneously. Here, we performed Simultaneous Accessibility and DNA Methylation Sequencing (SAM-seq) of purified plant nuclei. Thanks to the use of long-read nanopore sequencing, SAM-seq enables high-resolution profiling of m6A-tagged chromatin accessibility together with endogenous cytosine methylation in plants. Analysis of naked genomic DNA revealed significant sequence preference biases of m6A-MTases, controllable through a normalisation step. By applying SAM-seq to Arabidopsis and maize nuclei we obtained fine-grained accessibility and DNA methylation landscapes genome-wide. We uncovered crosstalk between chromatin accessibility and DNA methylation within nucleosomes of genes, TEs, and centromeric repeats. SAM-seq also detects DNA footprints over cis-regulatory regions. Furthermore, using the single-molecule information provided by SAM-seq we identified extensive cellular heterogeneity at chromatin domains with antagonistic chromatin marks, suggesting that bivalency reflects cell-specific regulations. SAM-seq is a powerful approach to simultaneously study multiple epigenetic features over unique and repetitive sequences, opening new opportunities for the investigation of epigenetic mechanisms.
authors: Leduque, B.; Edera, A.; Vitte, C.; Quadrana, L.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了SAM-seq技术，通过长读长纳米孔测序实现植物染色质可及性和DNA甲基化的同步分析。该方法揭示了染色质可及性与DNA甲基化在基因、转座子和着丝粒重复区域的互作机制，并发现染色质标记的双向性反映了细胞特异性调控。
ai.translation: 表观遗传调控，包括染色质可及性、核小体定位和DNA甲基化，复杂地塑造了基因组功能。然而，目前依赖短读长测序技术的染色质谱分析方法无法表征高度重复的基因组区域，也无法同时检测多种染色质特征。本研究对纯化的植物核进行了同步可及性与DNA甲基化测序（SAM-seq）。得益于长读长纳米孔测序技术的应用，SAM-seq能够实现植物中m6A标记的染色质可及性与内源性胞嘧啶甲基化的高分辨率分析。对裸露基因组DNA的分析揭示了m6A-MTases显著的序列偏好性偏差，该偏差可通过标准化步骤进行调控。通过将SAM-seq应用于拟南芥和玉米核，我们获得了全基因组范围内精细的染色质可及性和DNA甲基化图谱。研究发现基因、转座子和着丝粒重复区域的核小体中染色质可及性与DNA甲基化存在互作现象。SAM-seq还能检测到顺式调控区域的DNA足迹。此外，利用SAM-seq提供的单分子信息，我们识别出具有拮抗染色质标记的染色质区域存在广泛的细胞异质性，表明双向性反映了细胞特异性调控。SAM-seq是一种强大的方法，可同时研究独特和重复序列上的多种表观遗传特征，为表观遗传机制研究开辟了新机遇。

title: Deep learning and direct sequencing of labeled RNA captures transcriptome dynamics
abstract: Quantification of the dynamics of RNA metabolism is essential for understanding gene regulation in health and disease. Existing methods rely on metabolic labeling of nascent RNAs and physical separation or inference of labeling through PCR-generated mutations, followed by short-read sequencing. However, these methods are limited in their ability to identify transient decay intermediates or co-analyze RNA decay with cis-regulatory elements of RNA stability such as poly(A) tail length and modification status, at single molecule resolution. Here we use 5-ethynyl uridine (5EU) to label nascent RNA followed by direct RNA sequencing with nanopores. We developed RNAkinet, a deep convolutional and recurrent neural network that processes the electrical signal produced by nanopore sequencing to identify 5EU-labeled nascent RNA molecules. RNAkinet demonstrates generalizability to distinct cell types and organisms and reproducibly quantifies RNA kinetic parameters allowing the combined interrogation of RNA metabolism and cis-acting RNA regulatory elements.
authors: Martinek, V.; Martin, J.; Belair, C.; Payea, M. J.; Malla, S.; Alexiou, P.; Maragkakis, M.

ai.TLDR: RNA代谢动态定量对理解健康与疾病中的基因调控至关重要。现有方法通过代谢标记和PCR突变推断分析RNA代谢，但无法识别瞬时衰变中间体或联合分析RNA稳定性相关cis调控元件。本研究采用5EU标记新生RNA结合纳米孔测序技术，开发出RNAkinet深度学习模型，可跨细胞类型和物种量化RNA动力学参数并解析cis-作用RNA调控元件。
ai.translation: RNA代谢动态的定量分析对于理解健康与疾病状态下的基因调控机制具有关键意义。现有技术主要依赖新生RNA的代谢标记，通过PCR生成突变进行物理分离或推断标记，随后进行短读长测序。然而这些方法在单分子分辨率下存在局限性，无法有效识别瞬时衰变中间体，也无法将RNA衰变过程与RNA稳定性相关的cis调控元件（如poly(A)尾长度和修饰状态）进行联合分析。本研究采用5-乙炔基尿苷（5EU）对新生RNA进行标记，结合纳米孔测序技术直接分析RNA代谢动态。我们开发了RNAkinet深度卷积与循环神经网络模型，该模型可处理纳米孔测序产生的电信号，精准识别5EU标记的新生RNA分子。RNAkinet展现出对不同细胞类型和物种的泛化能力，能够可重复地量化RNA动力学参数，实现RNA代谢过程与cis-作用RNA调控元件的联合解析。

title: Decoil: Reconstructing extrachromosomal DNA structural heterogeneity from long-read sequencing data
abstract: Circular extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) is a form of oncogene amplification found across cancer types and associated with poor outcome in patients. EcDNA can be structurally complex and contain rearranged DNA sequences derived from multiple chromosome locations. As the structure of ecDNA can impact oncogene regulation and may indicate mechanisms of its formation, disentangling it at high resolution from sequencing data is essential. Even though methods have been developed to identify and reconstruct ecDNA in cancer genome sequencing, it remains challenging to resolve complex ecDNA structures, in particular amplicons with shared genomic footprints. We here introduce Decoil, a computational method which combines a breakpoint-graph approach with LASSO regression to reconstruct complex ecDNA and deconvolve co-occurring ecDNA elements with overlapping genomic footprints from long-read nanopore sequencing. Decoil outperforms de-novo assembly and alignment-based methods in simulated longread sequencing data for both simple and complex ecDNAs. Applying Decoil on whole genome sequencing data uncovered different ecDNA topologies and explored ecDNA structure heterogeneity in neuroblastoma tumors and cell lines, indicating that this method may improve ecDNA structural analyzes in cancer.
authors: Giurgiu, M.; Wittstruck, N.; Rodriguez-Fos, E.; Chamorro Gonzalez, R.; Bruckner, L.; Krienelke-Szymansky, A.; Helmsauer, K.; Hartebrodt, A.; Koche, R. P.; Haase, K.; Reinert, K.; Henssen, A. G.

ai.TLDR: 环状游离染色体DNA（ecDNA）作为癌基因扩增形式广泛存在于各类癌症中，其结构复杂性影响癌基因调控。Decoil方法通过结合断点图谱与LASSO回归技术，成功解析了长读长纳米孔测序数据中的复杂ecDNA结构，显著优于传统组装与比对方法。该方法在神经母细胞瘤样本中揭示了ecDNA拓扑异质性，为癌症ecDNA结构分析提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 环状游离染色体DNA（ecDNA）是一种在多种癌症类型中均存在的癌基因扩增形式，并与患者不良预后相关。ecDNA在结构上可能高度复杂，包含源自多个染色体位点的重排DNA序列。由于ecDNA结构可能影响癌基因调控并反映其形成机制，因此从测序数据中高分辨率解析其结构至关重要。尽管已有方法用于癌症基因组测序中ecDNA的识别与重构，但解析复杂ecDNA结构（特别是具有共享基因组足迹的扩增子）仍具挑战性。本文提出Decoil方法，该计算方法结合断点图谱分析与LASSO回归技术，可从长读长纳米孔测序数据中重构复杂ecDNA并分离共存的具有重叠基因组足迹的ecDNA元件。在模拟的长读长测序数据中，Decoil在简单和复杂ecDNA的解析上均优于从头组装和基于比对的方法。将Decoil应用于全基因组测序数据，揭示了神经母细胞瘤肿瘤和细胞系中ecDNA结构的异质性，表明该方法可能提升癌症ecDNA结构分析的准确性。

title: Characterisation of human astrovirus in a diarrhoea outbreak using nanopore and Sanger sequencing protocols
abstract: Human astroviruses (HAstV) are etiologic agents of acute gastroenteritis that most often afflict young children and elderly adults. Most studies of HAstV have focused on epidemiology. In this study, we collected 10 stool samples from a diarrhea outbreak from a diarrhea sentinel surveillance hospital in Beijing. Samples were evaluated immediately using parallel multiplex RT-qPCR and nanopore sequencing, and were then amplified by designed primers and Sanger sequencing to obtain whole genome sequences. Six isolates were categorized as HAstV-5 and subjected to whole genome analysis to characterize their genetic variation and evolution. Full genome analysis revealed low genetic variation (99.38–100% identity) among isolates. Phylogenetic analysis showed that all isolates were closely related to domestic strains Yu/1-CHN and 2013/Fuzhou/85. The recombination breakpoint of the six isolates was located at 2741 bp in the overlap region of ORF1a and ORF1b, similar to those of Yu/1-CHN and 2013/Fuzhou/85. Overall, our study highlights the combined use of RT-qPCR and sequencing as an important tool in rapid diagnosis and acquisition of whole genome sequences of HAstV.
authors: Jinhui Li, Lang Yang, ... Peng Li
citation: Li, J., Yang, L., Wang, K. et al. Characterisation of human astrovirus in a diarrhoea outbreak using nanopore and Sanger sequencing protocols. Virol J 20 , 263 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12985-023-02224-7
description: Human astroviruses (HAstV) are etiologic agents of acute gastroenteritis that most often afflict young children and elderly adults. Most studies of...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过结合RT-qPCR和测序技术，揭示了HAstV-5病毒株的低遗传变异性和重组特征。研究结果为急性胃肠炎的快速诊断和全基因组分析提供了重要工具。
ai.translation: 人类星状病毒（Human astroviruses, HAstV）是引起急性胃肠炎的主要病原体，多影响婴幼儿和老年人群。现有研究多聚焦于HAstV的流行病学特征。本研究从北京某腹泻哨点监测医院的腹泻暴发病例中收集了10份粪便样本，采用平行多重RT-qPCR和纳米孔测序技术进行即时检测，随后通过设计引物和Sanger测序获得全基因组序列。6株分离株被归类为HAstV-5，经全基因组分析揭示其遗传变异特征。结果显示分离株间遗传相似度高达99.38-100%。系统进化分析表明所有分离株与国内株Yu/1-CHN和2013/Fuzhou/85高度相似。6株病毒的重组断点位于ORF1a和ORF1b重叠区的2741 bp位置，与Yu/1-CHN和2013/Fuzhou/85的重组特征一致。本研究证实RT-qPCR与测序技术联用可有效实现HAstV的快速诊断和全基因组序列获取。

title: Comprehensive profiling of L1 retrotransposons in mouse
abstract: L1 elements are retrotransposons currently active in mammals. Although L1s are typically silenced in most normal tissues, elevated L1 expression is associated with a variety of conditions, including cancer, aging, infertility, and neurological disease. These associations have raised interest in the mapping of human endogenous de novo L1 insertions, and a variety of methods have been developed for this purpose. Adapting these methods to mouse genomes would allow us to monitor endogenous in vivo L1 activity in controlled, experimental conditions using mouse disease models. Here we use a modified version of transposon insertion profiling, called nanoTIPseq, to selectively enrich young mouse L1s. By linking this amplification step with nanopore sequencing, we identified >95% annotated L1s from C57BL/6 genomic DNA using only 200,000 sequencing reads. In the process, we discovered 82 unannotated L1 insertions from a single C57BL/6 genome. Most of these unannotated L1s were near repetitive sequence and were not found with short-read TIPseq. We used nanoTIPseq on individual mouse breast cancer cells and were able to identify the annotated and unannotated L1s, as well as new insertions specific to individual cells, providing proof of principle for using nanoTIPseq to interrogate retrotransposition activity at the single cell level in vivo.
authors: Zhang, X.; Celic, I.; Mitchell, H.; Stuckert, S.; Vedula, L.; Han, J.

ai.TLDR: L1元件作为活跃的逆转录转座子，在哺乳动物中与癌症、衰老等疾病相关。本研究通过改进的nanoTIPseq技术结合纳米孔测序，成功在单细胞水平检测到小鼠基因组中大量L1插入，验证了该技术在体内逆转录转座活动分析中的应用价值。
ai.translation: L1元件是当前在哺乳动物中活跃的逆转录转座子。尽管L1s通常在大多数正常组织中被沉默，但其表达升高与癌症、衰老、不孕和神经疾病等多种状况相关。这些关联促使研究者关注人类内源性新L1插入的图谱绘制，已开发出多种相关方法。将这些方法应用于小鼠基因组，可以让我们在可控的实验条件下，利用小鼠疾病模型监测内源性L1的体内活动。本研究采用改进的转座子插入谱分析技术（称为nanoTIPseq），选择性富集年轻小鼠L1s。通过将该扩增步骤与纳米孔测序结合，仅使用200,000个测序读取，就从C57BL/6基因组DNA中识别出>95%的注释L1s。在此过程中，我们从小鼠C57BL/6基因组中发现了82个未注释的L1插入。这些未注释的L1s大多靠近重复序列，且无法通过短读长TIPseq检测到。我们对单个小鼠乳腺癌细胞进行了nanoTIPseq分析，成功识别了注释和未注释的L1s，以及特定于单个细胞的新插入，证明了使用nanoTIPseq在体内单细胞水平分析逆转录转座活动的可行性。

title: De novo basecalling of m6A modifications at single molecule and single nucleotide resolution
abstract: RNA modifications hold pivotal roles in shaping the fate and function of RNA molecules. Although nanopore sequencing technologies have proven successful at transcriptome-wide detection of RNA modifications, current algorithms are limited to predicting modifications at a per-site level rather than within individual RNA molecules. Herein, we introduce m6ABasecaller, an innovative method enabling direct basecalling of m6A modifications from raw nanopore signals within individual RNA molecules. This approach facilitates de novo prediction of m6A modifications with precision down to the single nucleotide and single molecule levels, without the need of paired knockout or control conditions. Using the m6ABasecaller, we find that the median transcriptome-wide m6A modification stoichiometry is [~]10-15% in human, mouse and zebrafish. Furthermore, we show that m6A modifications affect polyA tail lengths, exhibit a propensity for co-occurrence within the same RNA molecules, and show relatively consistent stoichiometry levels across isoforms. We further validate the m6ABasecaller by treating mESC with increasing concentrations of STM2457, a METTL3 inhibitor as well as in inducible METTL3 knockout systems. Overall, this work demonstrates the feasibility de novo basecalling of m6A modifications, opening novel avenues for the application of nanopore sequencing to samples with limited RNA availability and for which control knockout conditions are unavailable, such as patient-derived samples.
authors: Cruciani, S.; Delgado Tejedor, A.; Pryszcz, L.; Medina, R.; Llovera, L.; Novoa, E. M.

ai.TLDR: RNA修饰在调控RNA命运和功能中起关键作用。现有纳米孔测序技术虽能实现全转录组修饰检测，但算法仅能进行单碱基水平预测。本研究提出的m6ABasecaller方法可直接从原始信号中实现单分子级m6A修饰的从头预测，无需配对敲除或对照条件。实验发现人类、小鼠和斑马鱼的m6A修饰比例中位数为10-15%，且修饰影响polyA尾长、在单分子内易共存，并在不同剪接变体间保持相对一致的修饰比例。
ai.translation: RNA修饰在塑造RNA分子命运和功能中发挥关键作用。尽管纳米孔测序技术已成功实现全转录组RNA修饰的检测，但现有算法仅能进行单碱基水平的修饰预测，而无法在单个RNA分子层面进行分析。本研究提出了一种创新方法m6ABasecaller，该方法能够直接从原始纳米孔信号中实现单分子级别的m6A修饰的从头预测，无需依赖配对敲除或对照条件。通过m6ABasecaller分析发现，人类、小鼠和斑马鱼的全转录组m6A修饰比例中位数约为10-15%。进一步研究显示，m6A修饰会影响polyA尾长，在同一RNA分子中易出现共存现象，并在不同剪接变体间表现出相对一致的修饰比例水平。我们通过使用METTL3抑制剂STM2457处理mESC细胞以及在可诱导METTL3基因敲除系统中验证了m6ABasecaller的可靠性。本研究证明了纳米孔测序技术实现m6A修饰从头预测的可行性，为RNA样本有限且无法获取对照敲除条件的样本（如患者来源样本）提供了新的应用途径。

title: Telomere-to-telomere assembly by preserving contained reads
abstract: Automated telomere-to-telomere (T2T) de novo assembly of diploid and polyploid genomes remains a formidable task. A string graph is a commonly used assembly graph representation in the overlap-based algorithms. The string graph formulation employs graph simplification heuristics, which drastically reduce the count of vertices and edges. One of these heuristics involves removing the reads contained in longer reads. However, this procedure is not guaranteed to be safe. In practice, it occasionally introduces gaps in the assembly by removing all reads that cover one or more genome intervals. The factors contributing to such gaps remain poorly understood. In this work, we mathematically derived the frequency of observing a gap near a germline and a somatic heterozygous variant locus. Our analysis shows that (i) an assembly gap due to contained read deletion is an order of magnitude more frequent in Oxford Nanopore reads than PacBio HiFi reads due to differences in their read-length distributions, and (ii) this frequency decreases with an increase in the sequencing depth. Drawing cues from these observations, we addressed the weakness of the string graph formulation by developing the RAFT assembly algorithm. RAFT addresses the issue of contained reads by fragmenting reads and producing a more uniform readlength distribution. The algorithm retains spanned repeats in the reads during the fragmentation. We empirically demonstrate that RAFT significantly reduces the number of gaps using simulated datasets. Using real Oxford Nanopore and PacBio HiFi datasets of the HG002 human genome, we achieved a twofold increase in the contig NG50 and the number of haplotype-resolved T2T contigs compared to Hifiasm.
authors: Kamath, S. S.; Bindra, M.; Pal, D.; Jain, C.

ai.TLDR: 全染色体（T20T）从头组装在二倍体和多倍体基因组中仍面临重大挑战。弦图简化策略可能导致组装间隙，而RAFT算法通过分割读取和生成均匀读长分布有效缓解了这一问题。实验表明RAFT在模拟和真实数据中均显著减少间隙数量，提升组装质量。
ai.translation: 自动化全染色体（T2T）从头组装在二倍体和多倍体基因组中仍是一项艰巨任务。弦图（string graph）是重叠算法中常用的组装图表示方法，其简化策略通过启发式算法大幅减少顶点和边的数量。其中一种启发式方法是移除包含在更长读取中的短读取，但该过程无法保证安全性。实践中，移除覆盖一个或多个基因组区间的所有读取可能导致组装间隙。导致此类间隙的因素仍不明确。本研究通过数学推导，计算了在生殖系和体细胞杂合变异位点附近观察到间隙的频率。分析表明：(i) 由于读长分布差异，Oxford Nanopore读取中因包含读取删除导致的组装间隙比PacBio HiFi读取高一个数量级；(ii) 该频率随测序深度增加而降低。基于这些观察，我们通过开发RAFT组装算法解决了弦图表示的局限性。RAFT通过分割读取生成更均匀的读长分布，同时保留分割过程中的重复序列。实验表明，RAFT在模拟数据集中显著减少了间隙数量。使用HG002人类基因组的真实Oxford Nanopore和PacBio HiFi数据集，与Hifiasm相比，RAFT使contig NG50提升两倍，并增加了两倍的单倍型解析T2T contigs数量。

title: Nanopore long-read sequencing analysis reveals ZIC1 dysregulation caused by a de novo 3q inversion with a breakpoint located 7 kb downstream ofZIC1
abstract: Zic family member 1 (*ZIC1*), a gene located on chromosome 3q24, encodes a transcription factor with zinc finger domains that is essential for the normal development of the cerebellum. Heterozygous loss-of-function of *ZIC1* causes Dandy-Walker malformation, while heterozygous gain-of-function leads to a multiple congenital anomaly syndrome characterized by craniosynostosis, brain abnormalities, facial features, and learning disability. In this study, we present the results of genetic analysis of a male patient with clinically suspected Gomez-Lopez-Hernandez syndrome. The patient displayed multiple congenital abnormalities, including bicoronal craniosynostosis, characteristic facial features, cerebellar malformation with rhombencephalosynapsis, and temporal alopecia, and a de novo inversion of chromosome 3q. Breakpoint analysis using a Nanopore long-read sequencer revealed a breakpoint in the distal centromere of 3q24 located 7 kb downstream of the 3′ untranslated region of *ZIC1*. On the basis of the clinical similarities, we concluded that the abnormalities in this patient were caused by the transcriptional dysregulation of *ZIC1*. We hypothesize the underlying molecular mechanisms of transcriptional dysregulation of *ZIC1* such as the abnormalities in topologically associated domains encompassing *ZIC1*. This study highlights the usefulness of long-read sequencing in the analysis of de novo balanced chromosomal abnormalities.
authors: Hiroaki Murakami, Yumi Enomoto, ... Kenji Kurosawa
citation: Murakami, H., Enomoto, Y., Kumaki, T. et al. Nanopore long-read sequencing analysis reveals ZIC1 dysregulation caused by a de novo 3q inversion with a breakpoint located 7 kb downstream of ZIC1 . J Hum Genet 69 , 47–52 (2024). https://doi.org/10.1038/s10038-023-01205-6

ai.TLDR: ZIC1基因位于3q24染色体，其功能异常与小脑发育障碍相关。本研究通过长读长测序分析发现，染色体3q倒位导致ZIC1转录失调，引发多种先天异常。研究结果揭示了长读长测序在分析新发平衡染色体异常中的应用价值。
ai.translation: Zic家族成员1（ZIC1）基因位于3号染色体长臂24区，编码含锌指结构的转录因子，对小脑正常发育至关重要。ZIC1杂合性功能丧失会导致Dandy-Walker畸形，而杂合性功能获得则引发以颅缝早闭、脑部异常、面部特征及学习障碍为特征的多发先天异常综合征。本研究对一名临床疑似Gomez-Lopez-Hernandez综合征的男性患者进行遗传分析，该患者表现为双冠状颅缝早闭、特征性面部特征、小脑畸形伴菱脑融合及颞部脱发，并伴有3号染色体长臂新发倒位。通过纳米孔长读长测序仪进行断点分析，发现断点位于3q24远端着丝粒区，距离ZIC1基因3'非翻译区下游7kb处。基于临床表型相似性，我们推断该患者的异常由ZIC1转录失调引起。我们推测ZIC1转录失调的潜在分子机制可能涉及包含ZIC1的拓扑关联域异常。本研究凸显了长读长测序在分析新发平衡染色体异常中的应用价值。

title: Structural and non-coding variants increase the diagnostic yield of clinical whole genome sequencing for rare diseases
abstract:
### Background

Whole genome sequencing is increasingly being used for the diagnosis of patients with rare diseases. However, the diagnostic yields of many studies, particularly those conducted in a healthcare setting, are often disappointingly low, at 25–30%. This is in part because although entire genomes are sequenced, analysis is often confined to in silico gene panels or coding regions of the genome.

### Methods

We undertook WGS on a cohort of 122 unrelated rare disease patients and their relatives (300 genomes) who had been pre-screened by gene panels or arrays. Patients were recruited from a broad spectrum of clinical specialties. We applied a bioinformatics pipeline that would allow comprehensive analysis of all variant types. We combined established bioinformatics tools for phenotypic and genomic analysis with our novel algorithms (SVRare, ALTSPLICE and GREEN-DB) to detect and annotate structural, splice site and non-coding variants.

### Results

Our diagnostic yield was 43/122 cases (35%), although 47/122 cases (39%) were considered solved when considering novel candidate genes with supporting functional data into account. Structural, splice site and deep intronic variants contributed to 20/47 (43%) of our solved cases. Five genes that are novel, or were novel at the time of discovery, were identified, whilst a further three genes are putative novel disease genes with evidence of causality. We identified variants of uncertain significance in a further fourteen candidate genes. The phenotypic spectrum associated with *RMND1* was expanded to include polymicrogyria. Two patients with secondary findings in *FBN1* and *KCNQ1* were confirmed to have previously unidentified Marfan and long QT syndromes, respectively, and were referred for further clinical interventions. Clinical diagnoses were changed in six patients and treatment adjustments made for eight individuals, which for five patients was considered life-saving.

### Conclusions

Genome sequencing is increasingly being considered as a first-line genetic test in routine clinical settings and can make a substantial contribution to rapidly identifying a causal aetiology for many patients, shortening their diagnostic odyssey. We have demonstrated that structural, splice site and intronic variants make a significant contribution to diagnostic yield and that comprehensive analysis of the entire genome is essential to maximise the value of clinical genome sequencing.
authors: Alistair T. Pagnamenta, Carme Camps, ... Jenny C. Taylor
citation: Pagnamenta, A.T., Camps, C., Giacopuzzi, E. et al. Structural and non-coding variants increase the diagnostic yield of clinical whole genome sequencing for rare diseases. Genome Med 15 , 94 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-023-01240-0

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）在罕见病诊断中应用广泛，但传统分析方法仅聚焦编码区域导致诊断率不足25-30%。本研究通过整合新型算法工具（SVRare, ALTSPLICE, GREEN-DB）对300个基因组进行全基因组分析，将诊断率提升至35%，其中43%的病例涉及结构变异、剪接位点变异和内含子变异。研究发现5个新型致病基因并扩展了RMND1基因的表型谱。
ai.translation:
背景
全基因组测序（Whole Genome Sequencing, WGS）正被越来越多用于罕见病患者的诊断。然而，许多研究（特别是临床环境中的研究）的诊断产出率往往令人失望，仅在25-30%左右。这在很大程度上是因为虽然对整个基因组进行了测序，但分析往往局限于体外基因面板或基因组的编码区域。

方法
我们对122名无亲缘关系的罕见病患者及其亲属（共300个基因组）进行了全基因组测序，这些患者已通过基因面板或芯片进行过预筛选。患者来自广泛的临床专科领域。我们应用了一种生物信息学流程，可实现对所有变异类型的全面分析。我们结合了已有的生物信息学工具进行表型和基因组分析，并结合我们开发的新算法（SVRare, ALTSPLICE和GREEN-DB）来检测和注释结构变异、剪接位点变异和非编码变异。

结果
我们的诊断产出率为122例中的43例（35%），但考虑到新候选基因的功能数据支持时，47例（39%）被判定为已解决。结构变异、剪接位点变异和深内含子变异共同贡献了47例中20例（43%）的诊断。我们发现了5个新型基因（或在发现时为新型基因），另外3个基因被推测为新型致病基因并具有致病性证据。我们还在14个候选基因中发现了意义未明的变异。RMND1基因的表型谱被扩展至包含多小叶脑皮质发育不良。两名在FBN1和KCNQ1基因中发现次要发现的患者被确认患有先前未识别的马凡综合征和长QT综合征，并被转介进行进一步临床干预。6名患者的临床诊断被修改，8名个体的治疗方案进行了调整，其中5名患者的调整被认为具有生命挽救意义。

结论
全基因组测序正被越来越多地视为常规临床环境中的首选遗传检测方法，能够快速识别许多患者的致病病因，缩短其诊断历程。我们证明了结构变异、剪接位点变异和内含子变异对诊断产出率的显著贡献，全面分析整个基因组对于最大化临床基因组测序的价值至关重要。

title: NASTRA: Innovative Short Tandem Repeat Analysis through Cluster-Based Structure-Aware Algorithm in Nanopore Sequencing Data
abstract:
Forensic short-tandem repeats (STR) genetic markers are multi-allelic and widely utilized for individual identification, kinship testing, and cell-line authentication. Nanopore sequencing, known for its portability, is emerging as a promising approach for STR typing, facilitating real-time and in-field testing. However, its efficacy is often hampered by sequencing noise. Previous methods rely on alignment-based genotyping, necessitating known alleles, which limits their applicability to unknown alleles. Here, we introduced NASTRA, an innovative allele reference-free tool for precise germline analysis of STR genetic markers. NASTRA incorporates a recursive algorithm to infer repeat structures of allele sequences using only known repeat motifs. Our tests, conducted on 80 individual samples and 8 DNA standards, have demonstrated NASTRAs exceptional 100% accuracy in genotyping nearly all diploid STRs across various multiplex kits and flow cells. It surpasses alignment-based methods in accuracy and speed. In a paternity testing case study, NASTRA accurately identified three relationships among six individuals within an 18-minute sequencing duration. These results underscore NASTRAs ability to perform STR analysis on both NGS and nanopore sequencing platforms, significantly enhancing the utility of nanopore sequencing in relevant applications.

GRAPHICAL ABSTRACT
