ai.TLDR: 法医短串联重复序列（STR）遗传标记检测面临纳米孔测序噪声干扰的挑战。NASTRA作为无参考系等位基因分型工具，通过递归算法实现高精度STR分析，其100%准确率显著优于传统比对方法，在亲子鉴定案例中18分钟内准确识别六人关系。
ai.translation: 法医短串联重复序列（short-tandem repeats, STR）遗传标记具有多等位基因特性，广泛应用于个体识别、亲子鉴定和细胞系验证。尽管纳米孔测序因其便携性成为STR分型的新兴方法，但测序噪声常影响其有效性。传统方法依赖比对基型分型，需已知等位基因信息，限制了其对未知等位基因的应用。本研究提出NASTRA工具，该工具无需参考系即可实现STR遗传标记的精准胚系分析。NASTRA采用递归算法，仅通过已知重复基序推断等位基因序列的重复结构。在80个个体样本和8个DNA标准品的测试中，NASTRA展现出100%的分型准确率，可覆盖多种多重检测套件和流细胞平台。其准确性和速度均超越传统比对方法。在亲子鉴定案例研究中，NASTRA在18分钟测序时间内准确识别六人中的三重关系。这些结果证实了NASTRA在NGS和纳米孔测序平台均能实现STR分析的能力，显著提升了纳米孔测序在相关应用中的实用性。

title: Movi: a fast and cache-efficient full-text pangenome index
abstract: Efficient pangenome indexes are promising tools for many applications, including rapid classification of nanopore sequencing reads. Recently, a compressed-index data structure called the "move structure" was proposed as an alternative to other BWT-based indexes like the FM index and r-index. The move structure uniquely achieves both O(r) space and O(1)-time queries, where r is the number of runs in the pangenome BWT. We implemented Movi, an efficient tool for building and querying move-structure pangenome indexes. While the size of the Movis index is larger than the r-index, it scales at a smaller rate for pangenome references, as its size is exactly proportional to r, the number of runs in the BWT of the reference. Movi can compute sophisticated matching queries needed for classification - such as pseudo-matching lengths and backward search - at least ten times faster than the fastest available methods, and in some cases more than 30-fold faster. Movi achieves this speed by leveraging the move structures strong locality of reference, incurring close to the minimum possible number of cache misses for queries against large pangenomes. We achieve still further speed improvements by using memory prefetching to attain a degree of latency hiding that would be difficult with other index structures like the r-index. Movis fast constant-time query loop makes it well suited to real-time applications like adaptive sampling for nanopore sequencing, where decisions must be made in a small and predictable time interval.
authors: Zakeri, M.; Brown, N. K.; Ahmed, O. Y.; Gagie, T.; Langmead, B.

ai.TLDR: 泛基因组索引在纳米孔测序读取分类等应用中具有重要价值。本文提出的Movi工具通过move structure数据结构实现了O(r)空间和O(1)时间复杂度的查询，其查询速度比现有方法快10-30倍，特别适合实时应用场景。
ai.translation: 高效的泛基因组索引是许多应用中的有前景工具，包括纳米孔测序读取的快速分类。最近，一种名为'move structure'的压缩索引数据结构被提出，作为FM索引和r-index等BWT基索引的替代方案。该move structure独特地实现了O(r)空间复杂度和O(1)时间复杂度的查询，其中r是泛基因组BWT中的运行次数。我们实现了Movi工具，用于构建和查询基于move structure的泛基因组索引。虽然Movis索引的大小大于r-index，但其在泛基因组参考序列中的扩展速率更小，因为其大小与参考序列BWT中的运行次数r呈正比。Movi能够计算分类所需的复杂匹配查询（如伪匹配长度和反向搜索），速度比现有最快方法快至少10倍，在某些情况下甚至超过30倍。Movi通过利用move structure的强局部性参考特性，实现接近最小可能的缓存缺失次数，从而提升查询效率。我们进一步通过内存预取技术实现延迟隐藏，这种效果在r-index等其他索引结构中难以实现。Movis的快速常数时间查询循环使其特别适合实时应用，如纳米孔测序的自适应采样，其中需要在短且可预测的时间间隔内做出决策。

title: SimReadUntil for Benchmarking Selective Sequencing Algorithms on ONT Devices
abstract:
MotivationThe Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) ReadUntil API enables selective sequencing, which aims to reduce time spent on sequencing uninteresting reads in favor of more interesting reads, e.g., to deplete or enrich certain genomic regions. The performance gain depends on the selective sequencing decision-making algorithm (SSDA) which decides whether to reject a read, stop receiving a read or wait for more data. Since real runs are time-consuming and costly (at scale), simulating the ONT device with support for the ReadUntil API is highly beneficial to compare and optimize the parameters of SSDAs. Existing software like MinKNOW and UNCALLED only return raw signal data, are memory-intensive, require huge and often unavailable multi-fast5 files ([≥] 100GB) and are not clearly documented.

ResultsWe present the ONT device simulator SimReadUntil that takes a set of full (real or simulated) reads as input, distributes them to channels and plays them back in real time including mux scans, channel gaps and blockages, and allows to unblock (reject) reads as well as stop receiving data from them (imitating the ReadUntil API). Our modified ReadUntil API provides the basecalled reads rather than the raw signal to reduce computational load and focus on the SSDA rather than basecalling. Tuning the parameters of tools like ReadFish and ReadBouncer becomes easier because no GPU is required anymore for basecalling. We offer various methods to extract simulation parameters from a sequencing summary file and compare them. SimReadUntil  s gRPC interface allows standardized interaction with a wide range of programming languages.

AvailabilityThe code is freely available on GitHub (https://github.com/ratschlab/sim_read_until) along with a fully worked use case that combines the simulator with ReadFish (and optionally NanoSim).

Supplementary informationSupplementary data are available at Bioinformatics online.
authors: Mordig, M.; Ratsch, G.; Kahles, A.

ai.TLDR: ONT的ReadUntil API通过选择性测序减少无趣读段的测序时间，提升有趣区域的测序效率。现有工具如MinKNOW和UNCALLED存在数据量大、文档不清晰等问题。SimReadUntil模拟器通过实时回放读段和参数优化，显著降低计算负载并简化工具调优。
ai.translation:
动机：牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的ReadUntil API实现了选择性测序，旨在减少对无趣读段的测序时间以优先处理更有趣的读段，例如耗尽或富集特定基因组区域。性能提升依赖于选择性测序决策算法（SSDA），该算法决定是否拒绝读段、停止接收读段或等待更多数据。由于真实运行耗时且成本高昂（大规模应用），支持ReadUntil API的ONT设备模拟对比较和优化SSDA参数具有重要价值。现有工具如MinKNOW和UNCALLED仅返回原始信号数据，内存占用高，需要巨大的且通常不可用的多-fast5文件（[≥]100GB），且文档不清晰。

结果：我们提出ONT设备模拟器SimReadUntil，输入一组完整的（真实或模拟）读段，将其分配到通道并实时回放，包括mux扫描、通道间隙和阻塞，允许解除阻塞（拒绝）读段或停止接收数据（模拟ReadUntil API）。我们的改进版ReadUntil API提供碱基调用读段而非原始信号，以降低计算负载并聚焦SSDA而非碱基调用。由于无需GPU进行碱基调用，调优ReadFish和ReadBouncer等工具的参数变得更加容易。我们提供多种方法从测序摘要文件中提取模拟参数并进行比较。SimReadUntil的gRPC接口支持与多种编程语言的标准化交互。

可用性：代码在GitHub（https://github.com/ratschlab/sim_read_until）免费提供，并附带一个结合模拟器与ReadFish（可选NanoSim）的完整使用案例。

补充信息：补充数据可在Bioinformatics在线获取。

title: ntsm: an alignment-free, ultra low coverage, sequencing technology agnostic, intraspecies sample comparison tool for sample swap detection
abstract:
BackgroundDue to human error, sample swapping in large cohort studies with heterogeneous data types (e.g. mix of Oxford Nanopore, Pacific Bioscience, Illumina data, etc.) remains a common issue plaguing large-scale studies. At present, all sample swapping detection methods require costly and unnecessary (e.g. if data is only used for genome assembly) alignment, positional sorting, and indexing of the data in order to compare similarly. As studies include more samples and new sequencing data types, robust quality control tools will become increasingly important.

FindingsThe similarity between samples can be determined using indexed k-mer sequence variants. To increase statistical power, we use coverage information on variant sites, calculating similarity using a likelihood ratio-based test. Per sample error rate, and coverage bias (i.e. missing sites) can also be estimated with this information, which can be used to determine if a spatially indexed PCA-based pre-screening method can be used, which can greatly speed up analysis by preventing exhaustive all-to-all comparisons.

ConclusionsBecause this tool processes raw data, is faster than alignment, and can be used on very low coverage data, it can save an immense degree of computational resources in standard QC pipelines. It is robust enough to be used on different sequencing data types, important in studies that leverage the strengths of different sequencing technologies. In addition to its primary use case of sample-swap detection, this method provides other useful information useful in QC, such as error rate and coverage bias, as well as population-level PCA ancestry analysis visualization.
authors: Chu, J.; Rong, J.; Feng, X.; Li, H.

ai.TLDR: 大规模异质数据研究中样本交换问题仍普遍存在，传统检测方法需昂贵的对齐和索引步骤。本研究提出基于k-mer序列变异的相似性分析方法，通过似然比测试提升统计效力，可快速检测样本交换并评估错误率与覆盖偏差。该工具处理原始数据无需比对，适用于低覆盖数据，显著降低计算资源消耗。
ai.translation:
背景：由于人为错误，大规模异质数据队列研究（如混合Oxford Nanopore、Pacific Bioscience、Illumina数据等）中样本交换问题仍普遍存在。目前所有样本交换检测方法均需昂贵且不必要的对齐、位置排序和数据索引步骤（例如当数据仅用于基因组组装时）。随着研究样本量增加和新型测序数据类型的引入，稳健的质量控制工具将变得越来越重要。

发现：可通过索引的k-mer序列变异确定样本相似性。为提升统计效力，我们利用变异位点的覆盖信息，采用基于似然比的测试计算相似性。通过该信息还可估算单样本错误率及覆盖偏差（即缺失位点），从而判断是否可采用空间索引的PCA预筛选方法，该方法可大幅加速分析过程，避免全对全比较。

结论：由于该工具处理原始数据、比对齐更快且适用于极低覆盖数据，可显著节省标准QC流程中的计算资源。其稳健性使其适用于不同测序数据类型，这对结合不同测序技术优势的研究至关重要。除主要的样本交换检测应用场景外，该方法还提供其他QC有用信息，如错误率、覆盖偏差，以及群体水平的PCA祖先分析可视化。

title: Rapid DNA methylation-based classification of pediatric brain tumours from ultrasonic aspirate specimens
abstract:
BackgroundAlthough cavitating ultrasonic aspirators are commonly used in neurosurgical procedures, the suitability of ultrasonic aspirator-derived tumor material for diagnostic procedures is still controversial. Here, we explore the feasibility of using ultrasonic aspirator-resected tumor tissue to classify otherwise discarded sample material by fast DNA methylation-based analysis using low pass nanopore whole genome sequencing.

Methodsultrasonic aspirator-derived specimens from pediatric patients undergoing brain tumour resection were subjected to low-pass nanopore whole genome sequencing. DNA methylation-based classification using a neural network classifier and copy number variation analysis were performed. Tumor purity was estimated from copy number profiles. Results were compared to microarray (EPIC)-based routine neuropathological histomorphological and molecular evaluation.

Results18 samples with confirmed neuropathological diagnosis were evaluated. All samples were successfully sequenced and passed quality control for further analysis. DNA and sequencing characteristics from ultrasonic aspirator-derived specimens were comparable to routinely processed tumor tissue. Classification of both methods was concordant regarding methylation class in 16/18 (89%) cases. Application of a platform-specific threshold for nanopore-based classification ensured a specificity of 100%, whereas sensitivity was 78%. Copy number variation profiles were generated for all cases and matched EPIC results in 16/18 (89%) samples, even allowing the identification of diagnostically or therapeutically relevant genomic alterations.

ConclusionMethylation-based classification of pediatric CNS tumors based on ultrasonic aspirator-reduced and otherwise discarded tissue is feasible using time- and cost-efficient nanopore sequencing.
authors: Simon, M.; Kuschel, L. P.; von Hoff, K.; Yuan, D.; Hernaiz Driever, P.; Hain, E. G.; Koch, A.; Capper, D.; Schulz, M.; Thomale, U.-W.; Euskirchen, P.

ai.TLDR: 研究探讨了利用超声吸引器切除的肿瘤组织进行DNA甲基化分析的可行性，通过低通量纳米孔全基因组测序实现快速分类。结果显示，该方法在89%的病例中与常规检测结果一致，特异性达100%，可有效识别具有临床意义的基因组改变。
ai.translation:
背景：尽管空化超声吸引器在神经外科手术中广泛应用，但其提取的肿瘤材料是否适合诊断仍存在争议。本研究探索了利用超声吸引器切除的肿瘤组织进行快速DNA甲基化分析的可行性，通过低通量纳米孔全基因组测序对原本会被丢弃的样本进行分类。

方法：从接受脑肿瘤切除术的儿童患者中获取超声吸引器提取的样本，进行低通量纳米孔全基因组测序。采用神经网络分类器进行基于DNA甲基化的分类，并进行拷贝数变异分析。通过拷贝数谱估计肿瘤纯度，结果与基于微阵列（EPIC）的常规神经病理学组织形态学和分子评估结果进行对比。

结果：评估了18例经病理学确诊的样本，所有样本均成功测序并通过质量控制。超声吸引器提取样本的DNA和测序特征与常规处理的肿瘤组织相当。两种方法在16/18（89%）例中甲基化分类结果一致。针对纳米孔测序的平台特异性阈值确保了100%的特异性，灵敏度为78%。所有病例均生成拷贝数变异图谱，16/18（89%）例与EPIC结果匹配，甚至能识别具有诊断或治疗意义的基因组改变。

结论：基于超声吸引器处理的组织进行DNA甲基化分类的儿科中枢神经系统肿瘤检测，可通过高效且经济的纳米孔测序实现。

title: Comparison of methylation estimates obtained via MinION nanopore sequencing and sanger bisulfite sequencing in theTRPA1promoter region
abstract:
### Background

Bisulfite sequencing has long been considered the gold standard for measuring DNA methylation at single CpG resolution. However, in recent years several new approaches like nanopore sequencing have been developed due to hints for a partial error-proneness of bisulfite sequencing. Since these errors were shown to be sequence-specific, we aimed to verify the methylation data of a particular region of the *TRPA1* promoter from our previous studies obtained by bisulfite sequencing.

### Methods

We compared methylation rates determined by direct bisulfite sequencing and nanopore sequencing following Cas9-mediated PCR-free enrichment.

### Results

We could show that CpG methylation levels above 20% corroborate well with our previous data. Within the range between 0 and 20% methylation, however, Sanger sequencing data have to be interpreted cautiously, at least in the investigated region of interest (*TRPA1* promotor region).

### Conclusion

Based on the investigation of the TRPA1- region as an example, the present work can help in choosing the right method out of the two current main approaches for methylation analysis for different individual settings regarding many factors like cohort size, costs and prerequisites that should be fulfilled for each method. All in all, both methods have their raison d’être. Furthermore, the present paper contains and illustrates some important basic information and explanation of how guide RNAs should be located for an optimal outcome in Cas9 mediated PCR free target enrichment.
authors: Sara Gombert, Kirsten Jahn, ... Helge Frieling
citation: Gombert, S., Jahn, K., Pathak, H. et al. Comparison of methylation estimates obtained via MinION nanopore sequencing and sanger bisulfite sequencing in the TRPA1 promoter region. BMC Med Genomics 16 , 257 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12920-023-01694-6
description: Bisulfite sequencing has long been considered the gold standard for measuring DNA methylation at single CpG resolution. However, in recent...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过比较亚硫酸氢盐测序与纳米孔测序在TRPA1启动子区域的甲基化检测效果，发现两者在CpG甲基化水平高于20%时结果一致，但0-20%区间需谨慎解读。研究为选择适合不同场景的甲基化分析方法提供了参考依据。
ai.translation:
背景：亚硫酸氢盐测序长期以来被认为是单个CpG位点甲基化检测的金标准。然而近年来由于发现其存在序列特异性错误，纳米孔测序等新方法被开发。本研究旨在验证之前通过亚硫酸氢盐测序获得的TRPA1启动子区域甲基化数据。

方法：通过Cas9介导的PCR-free富集后，比较直接亚硫酸氢盐测序与纳米孔测序测定的甲基化率。

结果：研究显示CpG甲基化水平超过20%时，两种方法结果高度一致。但在0-20%甲基化区间，Sanger测序数据需谨慎解读，至少在所研究的TRPA1启动子区域如此。

结论：以TRPA1区域为例，本研究为选择适合不同场景（如队列规模、成本和方法前提条件）的甲基化分析方法提供了参考。两种方法各有适用场景。此外，本文还阐述了Cas9介导PCR-free靶向富集时guide RNA定位的关键信息。

title: ClusterV-Web: A User-Friendly Tool for Profiling HIV Quasispecies and Generating Drug Resistance Reports from Nanopore Long-Read Data
abstract:
SummaryThird-generation long-read sequencing is an increasingly utilized technique for profiling HIV quasispecies and detecting drug resistance mutations due to its ability to cover the entire viral genome in individual reads. Recently, the ClusterV tool has demonstrated accurate detection of HIV quasispecies from Nanopore long-read sequencing data. However, the need for scripting skills and a computational environment may act as a barrier for many potential users. To address this issue, we have introduced ClusterV-Web, a user-friendly web-based application that enables easy configuration and execution of ClusterV, both remotely and locally. Our tool provides interactive tables and data visualizations to aid in the interpretation of results. This development is expected to democratize access to long-read sequencing data analysis, enabling a wider range of researchers and clinicians to efficiently profile HIV quasispecies and detect drug resistance mutations.

Availability and implementationClusterV-Web is freely available and open source, with detailed documentation accessible at http://www.bio8.cs.hku.hk/ClusterVW/. The standalone Docker image and source code are also available at https://github.com/HKU-BAL/ClusterV-Web.

Contactrbluo@cs.hku.hk, Department of Computer Science, The University of Hong Kong, Hong Kong, China; jhsu@cs.hku.hk, Department of Computer Science, The University of Hong Kong, Hong Kong, China

Supplementary informationNone
authors: Su, J.; Zheng, Z.; Li, S.; Lam, T.-W.; Luo, R.

ai.TLDR: 第三代长读长测序技术因能完整覆盖病毒基因组而被广泛用于HIV准种分析和耐药突变检测。ClusterV-Web作为用户友好的网页工具，解决了传统方法需要编程技能的门槛问题，通过交互式可视化功能提升数据分析效率。该工具的开源发布将推动长读长测序技术在临床研究中的普及应用。
ai.translation:
第三代长读长测序技术因能完整覆盖病毒基因组而被广泛用于HIV准种分析和耐药突变检测。近期ClusterV工具已证明能准确从Nanopore长读长测序数据中检测HIV准种，但其需要编程技能和计算环境可能成为潜在用户的障碍。为解决此问题，我们开发了ClusterV-Web，这是一个用户友好的网页应用，支持远程和本地环境下的ClusterV配置与执行。工具提供交互式表格和数据可视化功能以辅助结果解读。该发展预计能普及长读长测序数据分析，使更广泛的科研人员和临床医生高效完成HIV准种分析和耐药突变检测。

可用性及实现：ClusterV-Web免费开源，详细文档可通过http://www.bio8.cs.hku.hk/ClusterVW/访问。独立Docker镜像和源代码也托管在https://github.com/HKU-BAL/ClusterV-Web。

联系方式：rbluo@cs.hku.hk（香港大学计算机科学系，中国香港）；jhsu@cs.hku.hk（香港大学计算机科学系，中国香港）

补充信息：无

title: Comprehensive Identification of Pathogenic Microbes and Antimicrobial Resistance Genes in Food Products Using Nanopore Sequencing-Based Metagenomics
abstract: Foodborne pathogens, particularly antimicrobial-resistant (AMR) bacteria, remain a significant threat to global health. Conventional culture-based approaches for detecting infectious agents are limited in scope and time-consuming. Metagenomic sequencing of food products offers a rapid and comprehensive approach to detect pathogenic microbes, including AMR bacteria. In this study, we used nanopore-based metagenomic sequencing to detect pathogenic microbes and antimicrobial resistance genes (ARGs) in 260 food products, including raw meat, sashimi, and ready-to-eat (RTE) vegetables. We identified Clostridium botulinum and Staphylococcus aureus as the predominant foodborne pathogens in the food samples, particularly prevalent in fresh, peeled, and minced foods. Importantly, RTE-vegetables, which harbored Acinetobacter baumannii and Toxoplasma gondii as the dominant foodborne pathogens, displayed the highest abundance of carbapenem resistance genes among the different food types. Exclusive blaCTX-Mgene-carrying plasmids were found in both RTE-vegetables and sashimi. Additionally, we assessed the impact of host DNA and sequencing depth on microbial profiling and ARG detection, highlighting the preference for nanopore sequencing over Illumina for ARG detection. A lower sequencing depth of around 25,000 is adequate for effectively profiling bacteria in food samples, whereas a higher sequencing depth of approximately 700,000 is required to detect ARGs. Our workflow provides insights into the development of food safety monitoring tools and can assess the potential risk to human health from foodborne pathogens and ARGs. This approach has the potential to revolutionize the screening of food products and enable more efficient and accurate detection of foodborne pathogens and ARGs, thereby reducing the risks of foodborne illness and improving public health.
authors: Lee, A. W.-T.; NG, I. C.-F.; WONG, E. Y.-K.; WONG, I. T.-F.; SZE, R. P.-P.; CHAN, K.-Y.; SO, T.-Y.; ZHANG, Z.; FUNG, S. K.-Y.; WONG, S. C.-Y.; TAM, W.-Y.; Lao, H.-Y.; LEE, L.-K.; LEUNG, J. S.-L.; CHAN, C. T.-M.; NG, T. T.-L.; CHOW, F. W.-N.; LEUNG, P. H.-M.; SIU, G. K.-H.

ai.TLDR: 食品中的耐药性（AMR）细菌仍是全球健康的重要威胁。传统培养法检测病原体存在局限性，本研究采用纳米孔宏基因组测序技术，对260份食品样本进行快速全面检测，发现即食蔬菜中耐碳青霉烯类基因丰度最高。该方法可有效提升食品安全监测效率，降低食源性疾病风险。
ai.translation: 食源性致病菌，特别是具有抗微生物耐药性（AMR）的细菌，仍然是全球健康的重要威胁。传统的基于培养的病原体检测方法在检测范围和耗时方面存在局限性。食品宏基因组测序提供了一种快速且全面的方法来检测致病微生物，包括耐药性细菌。在本研究中，我们使用基于纳米孔的宏基因组测序技术，对260份食品样本（包括生肉、刺身和即食（RTE）蔬菜）中的致病微生物和抗微生物耐药基因（ARGs）进行了检测。我们发现肉毒梭菌（Clostridium botulinum）和金黄色葡萄球菌（Staphylococcus aureus）是食品样本中主要的食源性致病菌，尤其在新鲜、去皮和绞碎食品中更为普遍。重要的是，即食蔬菜中携带不动杆菌（Acinetobacter baumannii）和弓形虫（Toxoplasma gondii）作为主要食源性致病菌，其碳青霉烯类耐药基因丰度在不同食品类型中最高。在即食蔬菜和刺身中均发现了携带blaCTX-M基因的质粒。此外，我们评估了宿主DNA和测序深度对微生物组成分析和ARG检测的影响，强调了纳米孔测序相较于Illumina测序在ARG检测中的优势。约25,000的测序深度足以有效分析食品样本中的细菌，而检测ARGs则需要约700,000的更高测序深度。我们的工作流程为食品安全监测工具的开发提供了见解，能够评估食品中致病菌和ARGs对人类健康的潜在风险。这种方法有望革新食品检测流程，实现更高效准确的食源性致病菌和ARGs检测，从而降低食源性疾病风险并改善公共卫生。

title: NanoRanger enables rapid single base-pair resolution of genomic disorders
abstract: Rare diseases affect around 350 million individuals globally, yet at least half of those with suspected Mendelian disorders remain without a precise molecular diagnosis despite advanced genetic testing using short read sequencing (SRS). Long-read sequencing (LRS) holds a promise in addressing this diagnostic gap although its clinical application is hampered by its complicated workflow, demanding sample requirements, and exorbitant cost. Genomic disorders represent an opportunity to demonstrate the unique capability of LRS. This study addresses the challenges of identifying missing disease-causing breakpoints in complex genomic disorders by employing multiple LRS strategies, including a novel strategy named nanopore-based rapid acquisition of neighboring genomic regions (NanoRanger). NanoRanger requires neither detailed prior genetic mapping nor large amounts of ultrahigh-molecular-weight DNA, and it stands out for its ease of use and ultra-rapid acquisition of large genomic regions of interest with deep coverage. We describe a cohort of 13 families, each harboring a different homozygous disease-causing genomic rearrangement that defied breakpoint determination by SRS and Optical Genome Mapping (OGM). In each case, NanoRanger identified the breakpoints with a single base-pair resolution. This has enabled the accurate determination of the carrier status of unaffected family members as well as the founder nature of these genomic lesions and their frequency in the local population. It has also enabled an unprecedented analysis of the DNA motifs to discern the mechanism that predisposed to these recessive rearrangements. Our data suggest that NanoRanger can greatly accelerate the clinical adoption of LRS and expand its access for the benefit of patients with rare diseases.
authors: Zhang, Y.; Bi, C.; Nadeef, S. S.; Maddirevula, S.; Alqahtani, M.; Alkuraya, F.; Li, M.

ai.TLDR: 罕见病影响全球约3.5亿人，但半数疑似孟德尔疾病的患者仍未获得分子诊断。长读长测序（LRS）通过NanoRanger等新型策略突破短读长测序（SRS）的局限，实现了单碱基分辨率的断点定位，显著提升了复杂基因组疾病的诊断效率。
ai.translation: 罕见病影响全球约3.5亿人，但至少半数疑似孟德尔疾病的患者仍无法通过短读长测序（SRS）获得精确的分子诊断。尽管长读长测序（LRS）在解决这一诊断缺口方面展现出潜力，但其临床应用受限于复杂的操作流程、苛刻的样本需求和高昂的成本。基因组疾病为展示LRS独特能力提供了机会。本研究通过多种LRS策略，包括新型纳米孔技术快速获取邻近基因组区域（NanoRanger）方法，解决了复杂基因组疾病中缺失致病断点的鉴定难题。NanoRanger无需详细的前期遗传图谱或大量超长DNA，以其易用性和超快速获取大基因组区域的深度覆盖能力脱颖而出。我们描述了13个家族的队列研究，每个家族均携带不同的同源致病基因组重排，这些重排通过SRS和光学基因组映射（OGM）无法确定断点。在每种情况下，NanoRanger均以单碱基分辨率定位了断点。这使得未受影响家族成员的携带状态、这些基因组病变的创始性质及其在本地人群中的频率得以准确确定。同时实现了前所未有的DNA基序分析，揭示了这些隐性重排的易感机制。我们的数据表明，NanoRanger可显著加速LRS的临床应用并扩大其可及性，为罕见病患者带来临床益处。

title: N6-methyladenosine modification is not a general trait of viral RNA genomes
abstract: Despite the nuclear localization of the m6A machinery, the genomes of multiple exclusively-cytoplasmic RNA viruses, such as chikungunya (CHIKV) and dengue (DENV), are reported to be extensively m6A-modified. However, these findings are mostly based on m6A-seq, an antibody-dependent technique with a high rate of false positives. Here, we addressed the presence of m6A in CHIKV and DENV RNAs. For this, we combined m6A-seq and the antibody-independent SELECT and nanopore direct RNA sequencing techniques with functional, molecular, and mutagenesis studies. Following this comprehensive analysis, we found no evidence of m6A modification in CHIKV or DENV transcripts. Furthermore, depletion of key components of the host m6A machinery did not affect CHIKV or DENV infection. Moreover, CHIKV or DENV infection had no effect on the m6A machinerys localization. Our results challenge the prevailing notion that m6A modification is a general feature of cytoplasmic RNA viruses and underscore the importance of validating RNA modifications with orthogonal approaches.
authors: Baquero-Perez, B.; Yonchev, I. D.; Delgado-Tejedor, A.; Medina, R.; Puig-Torrents, M.; Sudbery, I. M.; Begik, O.; Wilson, S. A.; Novoa, E. M.; Diez, J.

ai.TLDR: 研究挑战了细胞质RNA病毒普遍具有m6A修饰的主流观点，通过整合多组学技术验证了CHIKV和DENV RNA中不存在m6A修饰。结果表明宿主m6A机制的干扰不影响病毒复制，强调了交叉验证RNA修饰的重要性。
ai.translation: 尽管m6A修饰机制主要定位于细胞核，但多项研究报道了包括寨卡病毒（CHIKV）和登革热病毒（DENV）在内的细胞质RNA病毒基因组存在广泛m6A修饰。然而这些结论主要基于依赖抗体的m6A-seq技术，该技术存在较高的假阳性率。本研究通过整合m6A-seq、抗体非依赖的SELECT技术以及纳米孔直接RNA测序，并结合功能实验、分子机制和突变分析，系统验证了CHIKV和DENV RNA中不存在m6A修饰。进一步发现宿主m6A修饰核心组件的缺失不影响病毒感染过程，且病毒感染不会改变宿主m6A修饰机制的定位。研究结果推翻了细胞质RNA病毒普遍具有m6A修饰的主流认知，强调了采用多技术交叉验证RNA修饰的必要性。

title: Arrayed in vivo barcoding for multiplexed sequence verification of plasmid DNA and demultiplexing of pooled libraries
abstract: Sequence verification of plasmid DNA is critical for many cloning and molecular biology workflows. To leverage high-throughput sequencing, several methods have been developed that add a unique DNA barcode to individual samples prior to pooling and sequencing. However, these methods require an individual plasmid extraction and/or in vitro barcoding reaction for each sample processed, limiting throughput and adding cost. Here, we develop an arrayed in vivo plasmid barcoding platform that enables pooled plasmid extraction and library preparation for Oxford Nanopore sequencing. This method has a high accuracy and recovery rate, and greatly increases throughput and reduces cost relative to other plasmid barcoding methods or Sanger sequencing. We use in vivo barcoding to sequence verify >45,000 plasmids and show that the method can be used to transform error-containing dispersed plasmid pools into sequence-perfect arrays or well-balanced pools. In vivo barcoding does not require any specialized equipment beyond a low-overhead Oxford Nanopore sequencer, enabling most labs to flexibly process hundreds to thousands of plasmids in parallel.
authors: Li, W.; Miller, D.; Liu, X.; Tosi, L.; Chkaiban, L.; Mei, H.; Hung, P.-H.; Parekkadan, B.; Sherlock, G.; Levy, S. F.

ai.TLDR: 质粒DNA序列验证是分子生物学工作流程的关键步骤。现有方法需逐个样本进行提取和条形码反应，限制了通量并增加成本。本文开发的体内质粒条形码平台实现了批量提取和文库制备，显著提升通量并降低测序成本。
ai.translation: 质粒DNA的序列验证对于许多克隆和分子生物学工作流程至关重要。为利用高通量测序技术，已开发出多种方法，在样本池化和测序前为每个样本添加独特的DNA条形码。然而，这些方法需要对每个样本进行单独的质粒提取和/或体外条形码反应，限制了处理通量并增加了成本。本文开发了一种阵列式体内质粒条形码平台，可实现质粒池化提取和Oxford Nanopore测序的文库制备。该方法具有高准确性和回收率，相较于其他质粒条形码方法或Sanger测序，显著提高了通量并降低了成本。我们利用体内条形码技术对超过45,000个质粒进行序列验证，证明该方法可将含有错误的分散质粒池转化为序列完美的阵列或均衡的质粒池。体内条形码技术仅需低功耗的Oxford Nanopore测序仪即可完成，使大多数实验室能够灵活并行处理数百至数千个质粒。

title: cgMSI: pathogen detection within species from nanopore metagenomic sequencing data
abstract:
### Background

Metagenomic sequencing is an unbiased approach that can potentially detect all the known and unidentified strains in pathogen detection. Recently, nanopore sequencing has been emerging as a highly potential tool for rapid pathogen detection due to its fast turnaround time. However, identifying pathogen within species is nontrivial for nanopore sequencing data due to the high sequencing error rate.

### Results

We developed the core gene alleles metagenome strain identification (cgMSI) tool, which uses a two-stage maximum a posteriori probability estimation method to detect pathogens at strain level from nanopore metagenomic sequencing data at low computational cost. The cgMSI tool can accurately identify strains and estimate relative abundance at 1× coverage.

### Conclusions

We developed cgMSI for nanopore metagenomic pathogen detection within species. cgMSI is available at <https://github.com/ZHU-XU-xmu/cgMSI>.
authors: Xu Zhu, Lili Zhao, ... Rongshan Yu
citation: Zhu, X., Zhao, L., Huang, L. et al. cgMSI: pathogen detection within species from nanopore metagenomic sequencing data. BMC Bioinformatics 24 , 387 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12859-023-05512-9
description: Metagenomic sequencing is an unbiased approach that can potentially detect all the known and unidentified strains in pathogen detection....

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对纳米孔测序数据中物种内病原体识别难题，开发了基于最大后验概率估计的cgMSI工具，可在低计算成本下实现病原体株级检测。该方法在1×覆盖度下能准确识别菌株并估计相对丰度，为快速病原体检测提供了新方案。
ai.translation:
### 背景
宏基因组测序是一种无偏检测方法，能够潜在识别所有已知和未知的病原体株。近期，纳米孔测序因快速的周转时间而成为病原体检测的有前景工具。然而，由于测序错误率较高，纳米孔测序数据中物种内病原体的识别仍具挑战性。

### 结果
我们开发了核心基因等位基因宏基因组株识别（cgMSI）工具，该工具采用两阶段最大后验概率估计方法，可在低计算成本下从纳米孔宏基因组测序数据中检测病原体株。cgMSI工具能够在1×覆盖度下准确识别菌株并估计相对丰度。

### 结论
我们开发了用于物种内纳米孔宏基因组病原体检测的cgMSI工具。cgMSI工具可在<https://github.com/ZHU-XU-xmu/cgMSI>获取。

title: Revisiting genomes of non-model species with long reads yields new insights into their biology and evolution
abstract: High-quality genomes obtained using long-read data allow not only for a better understanding of heterozygosity levels, repeat content, and more accurate gene annotation, and prediction when compared to those obtained with short-read technologies, but also allow to understand haplotype divergence. Advances in long-read sequencing technologies in the last years have made it possible to produce such high-quality assemblies for non-model organisms. This allows us to revisit genomes, which have been problematic to scaffold to chromosome-scale with previous generations of data, and assembly software. Nematoda, one of the most diverse, and speciose animal phyla within metazoans, remains poorly studied, and many previously assembled genomes are fragmented. Using long reads obtained with Nanopore R10.4.1 and PacBio HiFi, we generated highly contiguous assemblies of a diploid nematode of the Mermithidae family, for which no closely related genomes are available to date, as well as a collapsed assembly and a phased assembly for a triploid nematode from the Panagrolaimidae family. Both genomes had been analysed before, but the fragmented assemblies had scaffold sizes comparable to the length of long reads prior to assembly. Our new assemblies illustrate how long-read technologies allow for a much better representation of species genomes. We are now able to conduct more accurate downstream assays based on more complete gene and transposable element predictions.
authors: Guiglielmoni, N.; Villegas, L.; Kirangwa, J.; Schiffer, P.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术显著提升了非模式生物基因组的组装质量，使异质性分析和等位基因分化研究成为可能。通过Nanopore R10.4.1和PacBio HiFi技术，研究者成功构建了线虫基因组的高连续性组装，解决了传统方法无法实现的染色体尺度 scaffold 问题。
ai.translation: 利用长读长数据获得的高质量基因组不仅能够更准确地解析异质性水平、重复序列内容和基因注释预测，相比短读长技术还能够揭示等位基因分化特征。近年来长读长测序技术的突破使得非模式生物的高质量基因组组装成为可能，这为重新分析此前因数据和技术限制难以实现染色体尺度 scaffold 的基因组提供了新途径。线虫作为后生动物中多样性最高的门类，其基因组研究仍存在诸多空白，现有组装多呈现碎片化特征。本研究通过Nanopore R10.4.1和PacBio HiFi长读长数据，成功构建了无近缘参考基因组的双倍体线虫（Mermithidae科）的高连续性组装，以及三倍体线虫（Panagrolaimidae科）的塌陷组装和相位组装。这两个基因组此前虽有研究，但其碎片化组装的scaffold长度仍与长读长数据长度相当。新组装结果充分证明长读长技术能更精确地呈现物种基因组特征，使基于更完整基因和转座子预测的下游分析成为可能。

title: Lessons from a multilaboratorial task force for diagnosis of a fatal toxoplasmosis outbreak in captive primates in Brazil
abstract:
As exemplified by the Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic, infectious diseases may emerge and spread rapidly, often causing serious economic losses and public health concerns. In fact, disease outbreaks have become increasingly common, especially those of zoonotic origin. The Brazilian Ministry of Health is responsible for national epizootic surveillance. However, the systems focus primarily on diseases affecting humans has led to the neglect of other zoonotic diseases. In this report, we present an integrated investigation of an outbreak that occurred during the first year of the COVID-19 pandemic among captive neotropical primates housed at a primatology center in Brazil. After presenting a range of non-specific clinical signs, including fever, prostration, inappetence, and abdominal pain, ten primates from five different species died within approximately four days. Despite the state of health emergency due to the pandemic, a network of volunteer researchers was established to investigate the outbreak. A wide range of high-resolution techniques was used for different pathogens, including SARS-CoV-2 (RTq-PCR, ELISA and IHC), Toxoplasma gondii (IHC and IFA) and Escherichia coli (IFA), as well as a portable Metagenomic Sequencing utilizing Nanopore Technology. Within a span of four days after necropsies, we successfully identified T. gondii as the causative agent of this outbreak. This case highlights some of the obstacles faced with the current Brazilian surveillance system, which is still limited. A cross-platform interdisciplinary investigation could be a possible model for future epizootic investigations in non-human animals.

Author summaryThe Brazilian epizootic surveillance system, under the regulation of the Ministry of Health, has been established to address a national list of compulsory notifiable diseases. However, focusing mainly on the risks to humans causes other zoonoses to be neglected. Here we present an outbreak that occurred during the first year of the COVID-19 pandemic that affected eleven neotropical primates (NP) belonging to six different species. Within four days of exhibiting a range of non-specific clinical signs, including fever, prostration, inappetence, and abdominal pain, ten NPs died. Despite testing negative for pathogens included in the national surveillance policy, a collaborative group of researchers investigated the outbreak in detail. Using integrated diagnostic techniques, we identified Toxoplasma gondii as the causative agent four days after necropsy. Toxoplasmosis causes devastating acute death outbreaks in neotropical primates and is currently absent in the national guidelines. This unified effort proved the effectiveness of a multidisciplinary collaborative surveillance network in facilitating precise diagnoses.
authors: Schiffler, F. B.; Moreira, S. B.; Pereira, A. H. B.; Arruda, I. F.; Moreira, F. R. R.; D'arc, M.; Claro, I. M.; Pissinatti, T. d. A.; Cavalcante, L. T. d. F.; Miranda, T. d. S.; Cosentino, M. A. C.; de Oliveira, R. C.; de Jesus, J. F.; Assis, M. R. d. S.; de Oliveira, J. G.; da Silva, T. A. C.; Galliez, R. M.; Faffe, D. S.; de Jesus, J. G.; da Silva, M. S. B.; Bezerra, M. F.; Ferreira Junior, O. d. C.; Tanuri, A.; Castineiras, T. M. P. P.; Aguiar, R. S.; Faria, N. R.; Almeida, A. P.; Pissinatti, A.; Sabino, E. C.; Amendoeira, M. R. R.; de Lemos, E. R. S.; Ubiali, D. G.; Santos, A. F.

ai.TLDR: 新冠疫情暴发期间，巴西灵长类动物群体出现不明原因死亡，暴露出人畜共患病监测系统的不足。研究通过整合多组学技术，4天内锁定弓形虫为致病源，凸显跨学科协作在疫情溯源中的关键作用。
ai.translation:
如2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）大流行所示，传染病可能迅速暴发并扩散，常导致严重经济损失和公共卫生危机。事实上，疾病暴发已日益频繁，尤其是源自动物的传染病。巴西卫生部负责全国动物疫情监测，但现有系统过度关注人类疾病，导致其他人畜共患病被忽视。本报告呈现了巴西某灵长类研究中心在疫情初期发生的动物疫情调查。11只来自6个物种的灵长类动物在出现发热、虚弱、食欲丧失和腹痛等非特异性临床症状后，4天内有10只死亡。尽管疫情导致公共卫生紧急状态，志愿者研究网络仍建立起来开展调查。采用高分辨率技术检测多种病原体，包括SARS-CoV-2（RTq-PCR、ELISA和IHC）、弓形虫（IHC和IFA）和大肠杆菌（IFA），并使用便携式纳米孔测序技术进行宏基因组测序。在尸检后4天内成功鉴定弓形虫为疫情病原体。该案例揭示了巴西现有监测系统的局限性，跨平台的多学科调查可能成为未来非人类动物疫情调查的范式。

作者摘要：巴西卫生部监管的动物疫情监测系统已建立应对国家法定报告疾病的机制。但过度关注人类健康风险导致其他人畜共患病被忽视。本文呈现了疫情初期影响11只新世界灵长类动物的疫情，10只动物在出现发热、虚弱、食欲丧失和腹痛等非特异性症状后4天内死亡。尽管检测结果未发现国家监测政策中的病原体，研究团队仍通过整合诊断技术，在尸检后4天确认弓形虫为致病源。弓形虫感染常导致新世界灵长类动物急性死亡暴发，但尚未纳入国家指南。此次跨学科协作证明了多学科监测网络在精准诊断中的有效性。

title: Incorporating Nanopore Sequencing into a Diverse Diagnostic Toolkit for Incontinentia Pigmenti
abstract:
BackgroundIncontinentia pigmenti (IP) is a rare, hereditary multisystemic disorder affecting 1.2 in 100,000 live births, predominantly females. Conventional genetic analyses through short-read sequencing are complicated in case of IP due to the presence of a highly homologous pseudogene. Traditionally, long-range PCR is employed in order to overcome this challenge, however, detection of skewed X-Inactivation can also aid in correctly assign a variant to IKBKG.

MethodsWe employed a comprehensive multi-method approach, incorporating whole-exome sequencing (WES), long-range PCR, RT-PCR, X-inactivation analysis, and nanopore sequencing of genomic DNA, to identify and accurately phase a small heterozygous deletion NM_001099857.5:c.363_367del, p.(Leu122Glyfs*14) to the IKBKG gene in a family affected with IP.

ResultsThe deletion was initially detected through WES and skewed X-inactivation was observed in both the proband and her mother. Long-range PCR specific to IKBKG was utilized to verify that the variant is located in IKBKG and not in its highly homologous pseudogene. On RNA level, the variant was undetectable, suggesting nonsense-mediated decay (NMD) of the transcript containing the variant. We further utilized nanopore sequencing not only to pinpoint and accurately map the variant to the IKBKG gene but also to analyze methylation status of both alleles. This allowed us to confirm the skewed X-inactivation, with the variant-carrying allele found to be predominantly inactivated.

ConclusionNanopore sequencing serves as a valuable tool in genetic diagnosis, enabling the precise localization of the variant in either the gene or the pseudogene. Furthermore, in females with skewed X-inactivation, this method facilitates the determination of whether the variant is predominantly located on the activated or inactivated X-chromosome.
authors: Ahting, S.; Popp, D.; Oppermann, H.; Strehlow, V.; Fasshauer, M.; Popp, B.; Karnstedt, M.; Schumann, I.

ai.TLDR: Incontinentia Pigmenti (IP) 是一种罕见的遗传性多系统疾病，传统短读长测序因假基因同源性高而难以检测。本研究通过整合全外显子组测序、长距离PCR、纳米孔测序等技术，成功定位了IKBKG基因的杂合缺失突变，并确认了X染色体失活偏向性。该方法为遗传诊断提供了精准定位突变位点的新工具。
ai.translation:
背景：Incontinentia Pigmenti (IP) 是一种罕见的遗传性多系统疾病，发病率约为1.2/10万活产儿，主要影响女性。由于IP病例中存在高度同源的假基因，传统短读长测序分析面临复杂性。尽管长距离PCR是传统解决方案，但检测X染色体失活偏向性也可帮助正确将变异归因于IKBKG基因。

方法：我们采用综合多方法策略，结合全外显子组测序（WES）、长距离PCR、逆转录PCR（RT-PCR）、X染色体失活分析以及基因组DNA的纳米孔测序，以识别并精准定位IKBKG基因的杂合缺失突变（NM_001099857.5:c.363_367del, p.(Leu122Glyfs*14)）。

结果：该缺失突变最初通过WES检测到，并在受试者及其母亲中观察到X染色体失活偏向性。针对IKBKG的特异性长距离PCR验证了该变异位于IKBKG基因而非其高度同源的假基因。在RNA水平，该变异无法检测到，提示包含该变异的转录本可能经历无义介导降解（NMD）。进一步利用纳米孔测序不仅精准定位并映射该变异至IKBKG基因，还分析了两个等位基因的甲基化状态。这证实了X染色体失活偏向性，且携带变异的等位基因主要处于失活状态。

结论：纳米孔测序是遗传诊断的宝贵工具，能够精准定位变异在基因或假基因中的位置。此外，该方法可帮助确定在X染色体失活偏向性女性中，变异主要位于激活或失活的X染色体上。

title: From buds to shoots: Insights into grapevine development from the Witch's Broom bud sport
abstract:
Premise of StudyDevelopment is relatively understudied in woody vines, such as grapevine (Vitis vinifera). We used the Witchs Broom bud sport in grapevine to understand the developmental trajectories of the bud sports, as well as the potential genetic basis of the bud sport.

MethodsWe phenotyped shoots, buds, and leaves of two independent cases of the Witchs Broom bud sport, in the Dakapo and Merlot varieties of grapevine, alongside wild-type counterparts of the same variety. We also performed Illumina and Oxford Nanopore sequencing on the two independent cases and two wild-type counterparts of the same variety.

Key ResultsThe Dakapo and Merlot cases of Witchs Broom displayed severe developmental defects, with no fruit/clusters formed and dwarf vegetative features. However, the Dakapo and Merlot cases of Witchs Broom studied were also phenotypically different from one another, with distinct differences in bud and leaf development. We were able to identify unique genetic mutations in our two Witchs Broom cases that are strong candidates for the genetic basis of the bud sports.

ConclusionsThe Witchs Broom bud sport in grapevine serves as a useful natural mutant in which to study grapevine development. The Witchs Broom bud sports in both varieties studied had dwarf phenotypes, but the two instances studied were also vastly different from one another. Future work on Witchs Broom bud sports in grapevine could provide more insight into development and the genetic pathways involved in grapevine.
authors: Ritter, E. J.; Cousins, P.; Quigley, M.; Kile, A.; Raju, S. K. K.; Chitwood, D. H.; Niederhuth, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究聚焦葡萄藤（Vitis vinifera）中较少被研究的Witchs Broom芽变现象，通过表型分析和基因组测序揭示其发育轨迹及遗传基础。研究发现两种芽变株系均表现出矮化表型，但存在显著的表型差异，提示其可能涉及不同的遗传机制。
ai.translation: 本研究的背景是，葡萄藤等木质藤本植物的发育机制研究相对不足。我们以葡萄藤（Vitis vinifera）中的Witchs Broom芽变突变体为研究对象，旨在解析芽变的发育轨迹及其潜在的遗传基础。研究方法包括对Dakapo和Merlot两个葡萄品种的Witchs Broom芽变株系及其野生型对照的枝条、芽和叶片进行表型分析，同时对两个独立的芽变株系及其野生型对照进行Illumina和Oxford Nanopore测序。关键结果表明，Dakapo和Merlot的Witchs Broom芽变均表现出严重的发育缺陷，未形成果实/果穗且具有矮化植株特征。然而，两种芽变株系在芽和叶片发育上存在显著差异，研究者成功鉴定了两种芽变中可能与芽变表型相关的独特遗传突变。结论指出，葡萄藤的Witchs Broom芽变可作为研究其发育机制的天然突变体，两种芽变均表现出矮化表型，但具体表现差异显著。未来对葡萄藤Witchs Broom芽变的深入研究将有助于揭示其发育机制及相关遗传通路。

title: Nanopore sequencing of DNA-barcoded probes for highly multiplexed detection of microRNA, proteins and small biomarkers
abstract: There is an unmet need to develop low-cost, rapid and highly multiplexed diagnostic technology platforms for quantitatively detecting blood biomarkers to advance clinical diagnostics beyond the single biomarker model. Here we perform nanopore sequencing of DNA-barcoded molecular probes engineered to recognize a panel of analytes. This allows for highly multiplexed and simultaneous quantitative detection of at least 40 targets, such as microRNAs, proteins and neurotransmitters, on the basis of the translocation dynamics of each probe as it passes through a nanopore. Our workflow is built around a commercially available MinION sequencing device, offering a one-hour turnaround time from sample preparation to results. We also demonstrate that the strategy can directly detect cardiovascular disease-associated microRNA from human serum without extraction or amplification. Due to the modularity of barcoded probes, the number and type of targets detected can be significantly expanded.
authors: Caroline Koch, Benedict Reilly-O’Donnell, ... Joshua B. Edel
citation: Koch, C., Reilly-O’Donnell, B., Gutierrez, R. et al. Nanopore sequencing of DNA-barcoded probes for highly multiplexed detection of microRNA, proteins and small biomarkers. Nat. Nanotechnol. 18 , 1483–1491 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41565-023-01479-z
description: There is an unmet need to develop low-cost, rapid and highly multiplexed diagnostic technology platforms for quantitatively detecting blood...

ai.TLDR: 当前亟需开发低成本、快速且高通量的诊断平台，以实现血液生物标志物的定量检测，突破单一生物标志物模型的局限。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术，结合DNA条形码分子探针，实现了对40种以上目标分子（如microRNAs、蛋白质和神经递质）的同时定量检测，且无需提取或扩增即可直接检测心血管疾病相关microRNA。
ai.translation: 目前仍存在未满足的需求，亟需开发低成本、快速且高度并行化的诊断技术平台，以实现对血液生物标志物的定量检测，从而推动临床诊断超越单一生物标志物模型。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术对设计用于识别多种分析物的DNA条形码分子探针进行测序，基于探针通过纳米孔时的迁移动力学特性，实现了至少40种目标分子（如microRNAs、蛋白质和神经递质）的高通量并行定量检测。我们的工作流程围绕商业化的MinION测序设备构建，从样本制备到结果输出仅需1小时。同时，我们还证明该策略可直接检测人类血清中与心血管疾病相关的microRNA，无需提取或扩增步骤。由于条形码探针的模块化特性，可显著扩展检测的目标数量和类型。

title: Do we still need Illumina sequencing data?: Evaluating Oxford Nanopore Technologies R10.4.1 flow cells and v14 library prep kits for Gram negative bacteria whole genome assemblies
abstract: The best whole genome assemblies are currently built from a combination of highly accurate short-read sequencing data and long-read sequencing data that can bridge repetitive and problematic regions. Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) produce long-read sequencing platforms and they are continually improving their technology to obtain higher-quality read data that is approaching the quality obtained from short-read platforms such as Illumina. As these innovations continue, we were interested in evaluating how much ONT read coverage produced by the Rapid Barcoding Kit v14 (SQK-RBK114) is necessary to generate high-quality hybrid and long-read-only genome assemblies for a panel of carbapenemase-producing Enterobacterales bacterial isolates. We found that 30X long-read coverage is sufficient if Illumina data is available, and that 100X long-read coverage is recommended for long-read-only assemblies. We found that Illumina polishing is still improving SNVs and INDELs in long-read-only assemblies. We also examined if antimicrobial resistance genes could be accurately identified in long-read-only data, and found that Flye assemblies regardless of ONT coverage detected > 94 % of resistance genes at 100% identity and length. Overall, the Rapid Barcoding Kit v14 and long-read-only assemblies can be an optimal sequencing strategy depending on the specific use case and resources available.
authors: Lerminiaux, N.; Fakharuddin, K.; Mulvey, M. R.; Mataseje, L.

ai.TLDR: 当前最优的全基因组组装依赖短读长测序与长读长测序数据的结合。研究评估了Rapid Barcoding Kit v14生成的长读数据覆盖度对碳青霉烯酶产生菌基因组组装的影响，发现30X长读覆盖度结合Illumina数据即可生成高质量组装，而100X长读覆盖度更适合纯长读组装。Illumina polishing仍能有效优化长读组装的SNVs和INDELs。
ai.translation: 目前最优的全基因组组装通常由高精度短读长测序数据与能够跨越重复区域和复杂区域的长读长测序数据相结合构建。牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）开发了长读长测序平台，并持续改进技术以获得接近Illumina短读平台质量的读取数据。随着技术革新，我们评估了Rapid Barcoding Kit v14（SQK-RBK114）生成的长读数据覆盖度对碳青霉烯酶产生菌肠杆菌目细菌分离株的混合组装和纯长读组装的影响。研究发现，若存在Illumina数据，30倍长读覆盖度已足够生成高质量组装，而纯长读组装建议达到100倍覆盖度。研究还发现Illumina polishing仍能有效优化纯长读组装中的SNVs和INDELs。此外，我们检验了纯长读数据中是否能准确识别抗菌药物耐药基因，结果发现无论ONT覆盖度如何，Flye组装均能以100%身份和长度检测到>94%的耐药基因。总体而言，Rapid Barcoding Kit v14与纯长读组装策略可根据具体应用场景和资源情况成为最优测序方案。

title: Benchmarking long-read sequencing strategies for obtaining ASV-resolved rRNA operons from environmental microeukaryotes
abstract: The use of short-read metabarcoding for classifying microeukaryotes is challenged by the lack of comprehensive 18S rRNA reference databases. While recent advances in high-throughput long-read sequencing provide the potential to greatly increase the phylogenetic coverage of these databases, the performance of different sequencing technologies and subsequent bioinformatics processing remain to be evaluated, primarily because of the absence of well-defined eukaryotic mock communities. To address this challenge, we created a eukaryotic rRNA operons clone-library and turned it into a precisely defined synthetic eukaryotic mock community. This mock community was then used to evaluate the performance of three long-read sequencing techniques (PacBio HiFi, and Nanopore UMI with/without clonal pre-amplification) and three tools for resolving amplicons sequence variants (ASVs) (Uchime3, Unoise3, and DADA2). We investigated the sensitivity of the sequencing techniques based on the number of detected mock taxa, and the accuracy of the different ASV-calling tools with a specific focus on the presence of chimera among the final rRNA operon ASVs. Based on our findings, we provide recommendations and best practice protocols for how to cost-effectively obtain essential error-free rRNA operons in high-throughput. An agricultural soil sample was used to demonstrate that the sequencing and bioinformatic results from the mock community also translates to highly diverse natural samples.
authors: Overgaard, C. K.; Jamy, M.; Radutoiu, S.; Burki, F.; Dueholm, M. K. D.

ai.TLDR: 短读宏条形码在微生物分类中面临18S rRNA参考数据库不全面的挑战，而长读测序技术虽能提升数据库覆盖范围，但其性能评估仍需标准模拟社区。本研究通过构建合成真核生物模拟社区，系统评估了三种长读测序技术及三种ASV识别工具的性能，提出了高通量获取无误差rRNA operons的最佳实践方案。
ai.translation: 使用短读宏条形码对微真核生物进行分类面临18S rRNA参考数据库不全面的挑战。尽管高通量长读长测序技术为显著扩展这些数据库的系统发育覆盖范围提供了潜力，但不同测序技术的性能及后续生物信息学处理效果仍需评估，主要由于缺乏明确定义的真核生物模拟社区。为解决这一挑战，我们构建了真核生物rRNA operons克隆库，并将其转化为精确定义的合成真核生物模拟社区。随后利用该模拟社区评估了三种长读测序技术（PacBio HiFi、Nanopore UMI带/不带克隆预扩增）和三种扩增子序列变异（ASVs）解析工具（Uchime3、Unoise3、DADA2）的性能。通过检测到的模拟分类单元数量评估测序技术的灵敏度，并重点关注最终rRNA operon ASVs中嵌合体的存在情况以验证不同ASV识别工具的准确性。基于研究结果，我们提出了如何以低成本获得无误差rRNA operons的高效方案。通过农业土壤样本验证了模拟社区的测序和生物信息学结果可有效应用于高度多样化的自然样本。

title: Generation and characterisation of an Arabidopsis thaliana f3h/fls1/ans triple mutant that accumulates eriodictyol derivatives
abstract:
BackgroundFlavonoids are plant specialised metabolites, which derive from phenylalanine and acetate metabolism. They possess a variety of beneficial characteristics for plants and humans. Several modification steps in the synthesis of tricyclic flavonoids cause for the amazing diversity of flavonoids in plants. The 2-oxoglutarate-dependent dioxygenases (2-ODDs) flavanone 3-hydroxylase (F3H, synonym FHT), flavonol synthase (FLS) and anthocyanidin synthase (ANS, synonym leucoanthocyanidin dioxigenase (LDOX)), catalyse oxidative modifications to the central C ring. They are highly similar and have been shown to catalyse, at least in part, each others reactions. FLS and ANS have been identified as bifunctional enzymes in many species, including Arabidopsis thaliana, stressing the capability of plants to bypass missing or mutated reaction steps on the way to flavonoid production. However, little is known about such bypass reactions and the flavonoid composition of plants lacking all three central flavonoid 2-ODDs.

ResultsTo address this issue, we generated a f3h/fls1/ans mutant, as well as the corresponding double mutants and investigated the flavonoid composition of this mutant collection. The f3h/fls1/ans mutant was further characterised at the genomic level by analysis of a nanopore DNA sequencing generated genome sequence assembly and at the transcriptomic level by RNA-Seq analysis. The mutant collection established, including the novel double mutants f3h/fls1 and f3h/ans, was used to validate and analyse the multifunctionalities of F3H, FLS1, and ANS in planta. Metabolite analyses revealed the accumulation of eriodictyol and additional glycosylated derivatives in mutants carrying the f3h mutant allele, resulting from the conversion of naringenin to eriodictyol by flavonoid 3-hydroxylase (F3H) activity.

ConclusionsWe describe the in planta multifunctionality of the three central flavonoid 2-ODDs from A. thaliana and identify a bypass in the f3h/fls1/ans triple mutant that leads to the formation of eriodictyol derivatives. As (homo-)eriodictyols are known as bitter taste maskers, the annotated eriodictyol (derivatives) and in particular the observations made on their in planta production, could provide valuable insights for creating of novel food supplements.
authors: Schilbert, H. M.; Busche, M.; Saez Pulgar, V. S.; Angeli, A.; Weisshaar, B.; Martens, S.; Stracke, R.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了拟南芥中三种核心类黄酮2-ODDs（F3H/FLS1/ANS）的多效性，发现f3h/fls1/ans三重突变体可通过绕过反应生成儿茶素衍生物。该发现为开发新型食品补充剂提供了潜在应用价值。
ai.translation:
背景：类黄酮是植物特有的次生代谢产物，源自苯丙氨酸和乙酸代谢。它们对植物和人类具有多种益处。三环类黄酮合成中的多个修饰步骤导致植物中类黄酮的惊人多样性。2-OG依赖性双加氧酶（2-ODDs）包括黄烷酮3-羟化酶（F3H，同义词FHT）、黄酮醇合成酶（FLS）和花青素合成酶（ANS，同义词白花青素双加氧酶LDOX），催化中央C环的氧化修饰。这些酶高度相似，且已被证明至少部分催化彼此的反应。FLS和ANS在许多物种中被鉴定为多功能酶，包括拟南芥，强调植物绕过类黄酮合成中缺失或突变反应步骤的能力。然而，关于此类绕过反应及缺乏所有三种核心类黄酮2-ODDs植物的类黄酮组成仍知之甚少。

结果：为解决这一问题，我们构建了f3h/fls1/ans突变体及其对应的双突变体，并分析了该突变体集合的类黄酮组成。通过纳米孔DNA测序生成的基因组序列组装和RNA-Seq分析，进一步对f3h/fls1/ans突变体进行了基因组和转录组层面的表征。建立的突变体集合，包括新型双突变体f3h/fls1和f3h/ans，用于验证和分析F3H、FLS1和ANS在植株中的多功能性。代谢物分析显示，在携带f3h突变等位基因的突变体中积累儿茶素及其额外的糖基化衍生物，这是由于黄烷酮3-羟化酶（F3H）活性将柚皮素转化为儿茶素所致。

结论：我们描述了拟南芥中三种核心类黄酮2-ODDs的植株多功能性，并鉴定出f3、fls1/ans三重突变体中的绕过反应，导致儿茶素衍生物的形成。由于（同源）儿茶素已知为苦味掩蔽剂，注释的儿茶素（衍生物）及特别对其植株生产观察结果，可能为开发新型食品补充剂提供有价值的见解。

title: Biofoundry-scale DNA assembly validation using cost-effective high-throughput long read sequencing
abstract:
Biofoundries are automated high-throughput facilities specialising in the design, construction and testing of engineered/synthetic DNA constructs (plasmids), often from genetic parts. A critical step of this process is assessing the fidelity of the assembled DNA construct to the desired design. Current methods utilised for this purpose are restriction digest or PCR followed by fragment analysis, and sequencing. The Edinburgh Genome Foundry (EGF) has recently established a single-molecule sequencing quality control step using the Oxford Nanopore sequencing technology, along with a companion Nextflow pipeline and a Python package to perform in-depth analysis and generate a detailed report. Our software enables biofoundry scientists and end-users to rapidly analyse sequencing data, without specialised bioinformatics knowledge. In conclusion, we have created a laboratory and software protocol that validates assembled, cloned or edited plasmids, using Nanopore long reads, which can serve as a useful resource for the genetics, synthetic biology and sequencing communities.

Author informationAll authors contributed to the design of the sequencing quality control step and pipeline, and the preparation of the manuscript. P.V. wrote the manuscript, designed and implemented the bioinformatics pipeline and interpreted results. S.D. wrote the manuscript, implemented the laboratory protocol and interpreted results. G.S. designed the bioinformatics pipeline. R.F. wrote the manuscript and contributed to the design of the laboratory protocol and pipeline.

Address: Edinburgh Genome Foundry (University of Edinburgh), Michael Swann Building, Max Born Crescent, Edinburgh, EH9 3BF, United Kingdom

ai.TLDR: 生物制造设施需要验证工程DNA结构的准确性，传统方法存在效率低的问题。本研究通过整合纳米孔单分子测序技术与配套分析流程，实现了质粒验证的自动化分析。该方法无需专业生物信息学知识即可完成数据解析，为基因组学和合成生物学领域提供了实用工具。
ai.translation:
生物制造设施是专门从事工程化/合成DNA结构（质粒）设计、构建和测试的自动化高通量设施，通常基于遗传元件进行操作。该过程的关键步骤是评估组装DNA结构与设计目标的一致性。目前常用的方法包括限制酶切或PCR后片段分析以及测序。爱丁堡基因组制造设施（EGF）最近建立了基于牛津纳米孔测序技术的单分子测序质量控制步骤，并配套开发了Nextflow流程和Python分析包，用于深度数据分析和生成详细报告。我们的软件使生物制造设施科学家和终端用户能够无需专业生物信息学知识即可快速分析测序数据。结论：我们创建了实验室和软件协议，利用纳米孔长读长技术验证组装、克隆或编辑的质粒，该方法可为基因组学、合成生物学和测序领域提供实用资源。

作者信息：所有作者均参与了测序质量控制步骤和流程的设计以及手稿的撰写。P.V.撰写了手稿，设计并实现了生物信息学流程，解释了结果。S.D.撰写了手稿，实施了实验室协议并解释了结果。G.S.设计了生物信息学流程。R.F.撰写了手稿，并参与了实验室协议和流程的设计。

地址：爱丁堡基因组制造设施（爱丁堡大学），Michael Swann大楼，Max Born Crescent，爱丁堡，EH9 3BF，英国

title: Comparison of computational methods for host removal and classification of mycobacteria from clinical metagenomic data
abstract:
BackgroundCulture-free real-time sequencing of clinical metagenomic samples promises both rapid pathogen detection and antimicrobial resistance profiling. However, this approach introduces the risk of patient DNA leakage. To mitigate this risk, we need near-comprehensive removal of human DNA sequence at the point of sequencing, typically involving use of resource-constrained devices. Existing benchmarks have largely focused on use of standardised databases and largely ignored the computational requirements of depletion pipelines as well as the impact of human genome diversity.

ResultsWe benchmarked host removal pipelines on simulated Illumina and Nanopore metagenomic samples. We found that construction of a custom kraken database containing diverse human genomes results in the best balance of accuracy and computational resource usage. In addition, we benchmarked pipelines using kraken and minimap2 for taxonomic classification of Mycobacterium reads using standard and custom databases. With a database representative of the Mycobacterium genus, both tools obtained near-perfect precision and recall for classification of Mycobacterium tuberculosis. Computational efficiency of these custom databases was again superior to most standard approaches, allowing them to be executed on a laptop device.

ConclusionsNanopore sequencing and a custom kraken human database with a diversity of genomes leads to superior host read removal from simulated metagenomic samples while being executable on a laptop. In addition, constructing a taxon-specific database provides excellent taxonomic read assignment while keeping runtime and memory low. We make all customised databases and pipelines freely available.
authors: Hall, M. B.; Coin, L. J. M.

ai.TLDR: 无培养实时测序技术在临床宏基因组样本中可实现快速病原体检测和抗微生物耐药性分析，但存在患者DNA泄漏风险。通过构建包含多个人类基因组的自定义Kraken数据库，可有效平衡准确性和计算资源使用，使宿主去除流程在笔记本电脑上高效运行。
ai.translation:
背景：无培养实时测序技术在临床宏基因组样本中可实现快速病原体检测和抗微生物耐药性分析。然而，该方法引入了患者DNA泄漏的风险。为降低此风险，需要在测序过程中近乎完全去除人类DNA序列，通常涉及资源受限设备的使用。现有基准测试主要聚焦标准化数据库的使用，而忽视了去除流程的计算需求及人类基因组多样性的影响。

结果：我们对模拟的Illumina和Nanopore宏基因组样本的宿主去除流程进行了基准测试。发现包含多样人类基因组的自定义Kraken数据库在准确性和计算资源使用之间达到最佳平衡。此外，我们使用Kraken和Minimap2工具对结核分枝杆菌读段进行分类学分类的基准测试显示，包含结核分枝杆菌属代表性基因组的数据库使两种工具均获得接近完美的分类精度和召回率。这些自定义数据库的计算效率显著优于多数标准方法，可在笔记本电脑上执行。

结论：Nanopore测序结合包含多样人类基因组的自定义Kraken数据库，可实现模拟宏基因组样本中更优的宿主读段去除效果，且可在笔记本电脑上运行。此外，构建特定分类群的数据库可实现优秀的分类学读段分配，同时保持较低的运行时间和内存占用。我们公开所有自定义数据库和流程。

title: Nanopore sequencing for accurate bacterial outbreak tracing
abstract:
Our study investigated the effectiveness of Oxford Nanopore Technologies for accurate outbreak tracing by resequencing 33 isolates of a three-year-long Klebsiella pneumoniae outbreak with Illumina short read sequencing data as the point of reference.

We detected considerable base errors through cgMLST and phylogenetic analysis of genomes sequenced with Oxford Nanopore Technologies, leading to the false exclusion of some outbreak-related strains from the outbreak cluster. Nearby methylation sites cause these errors and can also be found in other species besides K. pneumoniae. Based on this data, we explored PCR-based sequencing and a masking strategy, which both successfully addressed these inaccuracies and ensured accurate outbreak tracing. We offer our masking strategy as a bioinformatic workflow (MPOA is freely available on GitHub under the GNUv3 license: github.com/replikation/MPOA) to identify and mask problematic genome positions in a reference-free manner.

Our research highlights limitations in using Oxford Nanopore Technologies for sequencing prokaryotic organisms, especially for investing outbreaks. For time-critical projects that cannot wait for further technological developments by Oxford Nanopore Technologies, our study recommends either PCR-based sequencing or using our provided bioinformatic workflow. We would advise that read mapping-based quality control of genomes should be provided when publishing results.
authors: Lohde, M.; Wagner, G. E.; Dabernig-Heinz, J.; Viehweger, A.; Stein, C.; Braun, S. D.; Monecke, S.; Marquet, M.; Ehricht, R.; Pletz, M. W.; Brandt, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了Oxford Nanopore Technologies在Klebsiella pneumoniae爆发追踪中的有效性，发现其测序数据存在显著碱基错误，导致部分爆发相关菌株被错误排除。通过PCR测序和掩码策略成功修正了这些误差，为无参考基因组的分析提供了生物信息学工作流程。
ai.translation: 我们的研究通过重新测序三年期的Klebsiella pneumoniae爆发的33株分离株，评估了Oxford Nanopore Technologies在精准流行病学溯源中的有效性，以Illumina短读长测序数据作为参考基准。通过cgMLST和基因组系统发育分析，我们检测到Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序数据存在大量碱基错误，导致部分与爆发相关的菌株被错误排除在爆发簇之外。邻近甲基化位点是造成这些错误的主要原因，且这类位点在其他物种中也存在。基于这些数据，我们探索了基于PCR的测序和掩码策略，两种方法均成功修正了这些不准确性并确保了精准的爆发溯源。我们提供该掩码策略作为生物信息学工作流程（MPOA可在GitHub上免费获取，GNUv3许可证：github.com/replikation/MPOA），以无参考基因组的方式识别并掩码问题区域。本研究突显了Oxford Nanopore Technologies在原核生物测序中的局限性，特别是在爆发调查中的应用。对于无法等待Oxford Nanopore Technologies技术进一步发展的时效性项目，我们建议采用基于PCR的测序或使用提供的生物信息学工作流程。我们建议在发表结果时应提供基于读段映射的质量控制分析。

title: Nanopore translocation reveals electrophoretic force on A- and B-form nucleic acids
abstract: Electrophoretic transport plays a pivotal role in advancing sensing technologies. So far, systematic studies have focused on translocation of canonical B-form or A-form nucleic acids, while direct RNA analysis is emerging as the new frontier for nanopore sensing and sequencing. Here, we compare the less-explored dynamics of non-canonical RNA:DNA hybrids in electrophoretic transport with the well-researched transport of B-form DNA. Using DNA/RNA nanotechnology and solid-state nanopores, the translocation of RNA:DNA (RD) and DNA:DNA (DD) duplexes was examined. Notably, RD duplexes were found to translocate through nanopores faster than DD duplexes, despite containing the same number of base pairs. Our experiments reveal that RD duplexes present a non-canonical helix with distinct transport properties from B-form DD molecules. We find RD and DD molecules with the same contour length move with comparable velocity through nanopores. We examined the physical characteristics of both duplex forms using atomic force microscopy, atomistic molecular dynamics simulations, agarose gel electrophoresis, and dynamic light scattering measurements. With the help of coarse-grained and molecular dynamics simulations, we find the effective force per unit length applied by the electric field to a fragment of RD or DD duplex in nanopores with various geometries or shapes to be approximately the same within experimental errors. Our results shed light on the significance of helical form in nucleic acid translocation, with implications for RNA sensing, sequencing, and molecular understanding of electrophoretic transport.
authors: Boskovic, F. N.; Maffeo, C.; Patino Guillen, G.; Tivony, R.; Aksimentiev, A.; Keyser, U. F.

ai.TLDR: 电泳传输在传感技术发展中起关键作用，本研究首次系统比较了非典型RNA:DNA杂交体与B型DNA在纳米孔中的传输差异。通过纳米技术和纳米孔实验发现，相同碱基对数的RNA:DNA杂交体传输速度显著快于DNA:DNA双链，揭示了螺旋结构对电泳传输的重要性。
ai.translation: 电泳传输在推进传感技术发展方面发挥着关键作用。迄今为止，系统性研究主要聚焦于B型或A型核苷酸的迁移特性，而直接RNA分析正逐渐成为纳米孔传感和测序的新前沿。本研究首次系统比较了非典型RNA:DNA杂交体在电泳传输中的动态特性与已深入研究的B型DNA传输行为。通过结合DNA/RNA纳米技术与固态纳米孔技术，我们对RNA:DNA(RD)和DNA:DNA(DD)双链的迁移过程进行了实验分析。值得注意的是，尽管RD双链与DD双链具有相同的碱基对数量，但RD双链仍被发现通过纳米孔的迁移速度更快。实验结果揭示RD双链呈现一种非典型的螺旋结构，其传输特性与B型DD分子存在显著差异。我们发现具有相同轮廓长度的RD和DD分子在纳米孔中的迁移速度相近。通过原子力显微镜、原子级分子动力学模拟、琼脂糖凝胶电泳和动态光散射测量等手段，我们对两种双链形式的物理特性进行了系统分析。借助粗粒化和分子动力学模拟，我们发现不同几何形状或结构的纳米孔中，电场对RD或DD双链片段施加的单位长度有效力在实验误差范围内基本相同。研究结果揭示了螺旋结构在核苷酸迁移中的关键作用，对RNA传感、测序以及电泳传输的分子机制理解具有重要意义。

title: Scalable Nanopore sequencing of human genomes provides a comprehensive view of haplotype-resolved variation and methylation
abstract: Long-read sequencing technologies substantially overcome the limitations of short-reads but have not been considered as a feasible replacement for population-scale projects, being a combination of too expensive, not scalable enough or too error-prone. Here we develop an efficient and scalable wet lab and computational protocol, Napu, for Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-read sequencing that seeks to address those limitations. We applied our protocol to cell lines and brain tissue samples as part of a pilot project for the National Institutes of Health Center for Alzheimer’s and Related Dementias. Using a single PromethION flow cell, we can detect single nucleotide polymorphisms with F1-score comparable to Illumina short-read sequencing. Small indel calling remains difficult within homopolymers and tandem repeats, but achieves good concordance to Illumina indel calls elsewhere. Further, we can discover structural variants with F1-score on par with state-of-the-art de novo assembly methods. Our protocol phases small and structural variants at megabase scales and produces highly accurate, haplotype-specific methylation calls.
authors: Mikhail Kolmogorov, Kimberley J. Billingsley, ... Benedict Paten
citation: Kolmogorov, M., Billingsley, K.J., Mastoras, M. et al. Scalable Nanopore sequencing of human genomes provides a comprehensive view of haplotype-resolved variation and methylation. Nat Methods 20 , 1483–1492 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-023-01993-x
description: Long-read sequencing technologies substantially overcome the limitations of short-reads but have not been considered as a feasible replacement for...

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术虽能克服短读长测序的局限性，但因成本高、扩展性不足等问题尚未被广泛应用于大规模项目。本研究开发的Napu协议通过整合湿实验与计算方法，实现了高效、可扩展的长读长测序流程，可检测与Illumina短读长测序相当的SNP和结构变异。
ai.translation: 长读长测序技术显著克服了短读长测序的局限性，但尚未被视为大规模群体项目可行的替代方案，因其存在成本过高、扩展性不足或错误率过高等问题。本研究开发了一种高效且可扩展的湿实验与计算流程协议Napu，专为牛津纳米孔技术长读长测序设计，旨在解决上述局限性。我们应用该协议对细胞系和脑组织样本进行了试点项目，作为美国国立卫生研究院阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症中心的项目一部分。通过单个PromethION流细胞，我们能够检测单核苷酸多态性（SNP），其F1分数与Illum3短读长测序相当。小插入缺失（indel）的检测在同聚物和串联重复区域仍具挑战性，但在其他区域与Illumina插入缺失检测结果具有良好的一致性。此外，我们能够发现结构变异，其F1分数与最先进的从头组装方法相当。本协议可在兆碱基尺度上对小变异和结构变异进行相位分析，并生成高准确性的等位基因特异性甲基化检测结果。

title: A Nanopore sequencing-based pharmacogenomic panel to personalize tuberculosis drug dosing
journal: American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine
abstract:
RationaleStandardized dosing of anti-tubercular (TB) drugs leads to variable plasma drug levels, which are associated with adverse drug reactions, delayed treatment response, and relapse. Mutations in genes affecting drug metabolism explain considerable interindividual pharmacokinetic variability; however, pharmacogenomic (PGx) assays that predict metabolism of anti-TB drugs have been lacking.

ObjectivesTo develop a Nanopore sequencing panel and validate its performance in active TB patients to personalize treatment dosing.

Measurements and Main ResultsWe developed a Nanopore sequencing panel targeting 15 single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNP) in 5 genes affecting the metabolism of isoniazid (INH), rifampin (RIF), linezolid and bedaquiline. For validation, we sequenced DNA samples (n=48) from the 1000 genomes project and compared variant calling accuracy with Illumina genome sequencing. We then sequenced DNA samples from patients with active TB (n=100) from South Africa on a MinION Mk1C and evaluated the relationship between genotypes and pharmacokinetic parameters for INH and RIF.

ResultsThe PGx panel achieved 100% concordance with Illumina sequencing in variant identification for the samples from the 1000 Genomes Project. In the clinical cohort, coverage was >100x for 1498/1500 (99.8%) amplicons across the 100 samples. One third (33%) of participants were identified as slow, 47% were intermediate and 20% were rapid isoniazid acetylators. Isoniazid clearance was significantly impacted by acetylator status (p<0.0001) with median (IQR) clearances of 11.2 L/h (9.3-13.4), 27.2 L/h (22.0-31.7), and 45.1 L/h (34.1-51.1) in slow, intermediate, and rapid acetylators. Rifampin clearance was 17.3% (2.50-29.9) lower in individuals with homozygous AADAC rs1803155 G>A substitutions (p=0.0015).

ConclusionTargeted sequencing can enable detection of polymorphisms influencing TB drug metabolism on a low-cost, portable instrument to personalize dosing for TB treatment or prevention.

SummaryThis manuscript describes the development and validation of Nanopore sequencing panel to detect host pharmacogenomic markers to guide personalized drug dosing for treatment or prevention of tuberculosis.

This article has an online data supplement, which is accessible from this issues table of content online at www.atsjournals.org
authors: Verma, R.; da Silva, K.; Rockwood, N.; Wasmann, R. E.; Yende, N.; Song, T.; Kim, E.; Denti, P.; Wilkinson, R. J.; Andrews, J. R.

ai.TLDR: 标准化抗结核药物剂量导致血药浓度波动，影响治疗效果。本研究开发并验证了纳米孔测序面板，可检测影响药物代谢的基因多态性，实现个性化用药。结果表明该方法在临床队列中具有高灵敏度，能显著区分不同乙酰化者的药物清除率差异。
ai.translation:
抗结核药物（TB）标准化给药会导致血药浓度波动，与不良药物反应、治疗延迟和复发相关。影响药物代谢的基因突变可解释显著的个体间药代动力学差异，但缺乏预测抗结核药物代谢的药代基因组学（PGx）检测方法。

研究目标：开发纳米孔测序面板并验证其在活动性TB患者中的性能，以实现个性化治疗剂量。

检测与主要结果：我们开发了针对异烟肼（INH）、利福平（RIF）、利奈唑胺和贝达喹啉代谢相关基因中15个单核苷酸多态性（SNP）的纳米孔测序面板。通过对比illumina基因组测序，验证了1000基因组计划中48个DNA样本的变异检测准确性。随后对南非100例活动性TB患者的DNA样本进行MinION Mk1C测序，评估基因型与INH/RIF药代动力学参数的关系。

结果：PGx面板在1000基因组计划样本中变异识别与illumina测序完全一致（100%一致性）。临床队列中1500个扩增子中有1498个（99.8%）达到>100x覆盖深度。1/3参与者被鉴定为慢乙酰化者，47%为中间型，20%为快速乙酰化者。异烟肼清除率受乙酰化状态显著影响（p<0.0001），中位数清除率分别为慢乙酰化者11.2 L/h（9.3-13.4）、中间型27.2 L/h（22.0-31.7）和快速型45.1 L/h（34.1-51.1）。携带AADAC rs1803155 G>A纯合子的个体利福平清除率低17.3%（2.50-29.9，p=0.0015）。

结论：靶向测序可在低成本便携设备上检测影响TB药物代谢的多态性，实现TB治疗或预防的个性化剂量。

摘要：本文描述了纳米孔测序面板的开发与验证，用于检测宿主药代基因组学标志物，指导TB治疗或预防的个性化药物剂量。

本文有在线数据补充，可通过本期目录访问www.atsjournals.org

title: Comparing methylation levels assayed in GC-rich regions with current and emerging methods
abstract: DNA methylation is an epigenetic mechanism that regulates gene expression, and for mammals typically occurs on cytosines within CpG dinucleotides. A significant challenge for methylation detection methods is accurately measuring methylation levels within GC-rich regions such as gene promoters, as inaccuracies compromise downstream biological interpretation of the data. To address this challenge, we compared methylation levels assayed using four different methods: Enzymatic Methyl-seq (EM-seq), whole genome bisulphite sequencing (WGBS), Infinium arrays (Illumina MethylationEPIC, "EPIC"), and Oxford Nanopore Technologies nanopore sequencing (ONT) applied to human DNA. Overall, all methods produced comparable and consistent methylation readouts across the human genome. The flexibility offered by current gold standard WGBS in interrogating genome-wide cytosines is surpassed technically by both EM-seq and ONT, as their coverages and methylation readouts are less prone to GC bias. These advantages are tempered by increased laboratory time (EM-seq) and higher complexity (ONT). We further assess the strengths and weaknesses of each method, and provide recommendations in choosing the most appropriate methylation method for specific scientific questions or translational needs.
authors: Guanzon, D.; Ross, J. P.; Ma, C.; Berry, O.; Liew, Y. J.

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化作为表观遗传调控机制，在哺乳动物中主要发生在CpG二核苷酸上的胞嘧啶。当前检测方法在GC富集区域（如基因启动子）的甲基化水平测量存在显著挑战，本文通过比较四种技术（EM-seq、WGBS、Infinium芯片、ONT）发现，EM-seq和ONT在技术层面超越了传统WGBS的灵活性，但需权衡实验耗时和复杂度。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化是一种表观遗传调控机制，通过调控基因表达实现生物学功能，在哺乳动物中通常发生在CpG二核苷酸中的胞嘧啶上。当前甲基化检测方法面临的主要挑战在于准确测量GC富集区域（如基因启动子）的甲基化水平，因为测量误差会破坏后续数据的生物学解释。为解决这一问题，我们比较了四种甲基化水平检测方法：酶促甲基化测序（Enzymatic Methyl-seq, EM-seq）、全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序（whole genome bisulphite sequencing, WGBS）、Infinium芯片（Illumina MethylationEPIC, "EPIC"）以及牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）在人类DNA中的应用。总体而言，所有方法在人类基因组中均产生了可比且一致的甲基化读数。当前金标准的WGBS在全基因组胞嘧啶检测的灵活性被EM-seq和ONT在技术层面超越，因为它们的覆盖度和甲基化读数对GC偏差的敏感性较低。这些优势被EM-seq增加的实验耗时和ONT更高的技术复杂度所抵消。我们进一步评估了每种方法的优缺点，并针对特定科学问题或转化需求推荐最合适的甲基化检测方法。

title: Long-read RNA sequencing redefines the clear cell renal cell carcinoma transcriptome and reveals novel genes and transcripts associated with disease recurrence and immune evasion
abstract:
BackgroundLong-read direct RNA sequencing (DRS) and PCR cDNA sequencing (PCS) of tumour samples could lead to discovery of novel transcript isoforms, novel genes, and transcriptomic co-dependencies missed by conventional short-read sequencing. However, only a handful of reports using DRS or PCS in cancer exist with no direct comparison between the two methods. Clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) is the most common form of kidney cancer. Following primary tumour resection approximately 30% of patients experience disease recurrence. Long-read RNA sequencing has not been applied to kidney cancer.

Methods12 primary ccRCC archival tumours (discovery cohort), 6 from patients who went on to relapse, were analysed by Oxford Nanopore DRS and PCS. Results were validated in an independent cohort of 20 patients and compared to DRS analysis of RCC4 cells.

ResultsDRS and PCS were successfully performed achieving high read length, with PCS achieving higher sequencing depth. Differentially expressed gene sets in patients who went on to relapse were determined with good overlap between DRS and PCS. Deconvolution analysis showed a loss of immune infiltrate in primary tumours of patients who relapse and revealed the CD8+ T cell exhaustion marker TOX as a novel recurrence-associated gene. Notably, novel transcript analysis revealed more than 10,000 uncharacterised candidate novel transcripts detected by both methods and in a ccRCC cell line in vitro. This allowed the definition of the full exonic structure of ccRCC-associated splice variants, including variants of MVK and HPCAL1. Remarkably, this also revealed a novel sPD-L1 transcript encoding for the soluble version of the protein with a longer 3UTR and lower stability in ccRCC cells than the annotated transcript. Levels of sPD-L1 transcripts are unchanged in primary tumours that go on to relapse, whereas membrane PD-L1 shows a trend towards down-regulation. Finally, both methods identified 414 novel genes, also detected in ccRCC cells in vitro, including a novel non-coding gene over-expressed in patients who relapse.

ConclusionsPCS and DRS can be used in tumour samples to uncover substantial yet unmapped features underpinning the plasticity and instability of cancer transcriptomes which are linked to disease progression and immune evasion.
authors: Lee, J.; Snell, E. A.; Brown, J.; Banks, R. E.; Turner, D. J.; Vasudev, N. S.; Lagos, D.

ai.TLDR: 长读长直接RNA测序（DRS）和PCR cDNA测序（PCS）在肾癌样本中可揭示传统短读长测序遗漏的转录变异特征，但缺乏直接对比研究。本研究通过DRS和PCS分析12例肾透明细胞癌（ccRCC）样本，发现TOX和sPD-L1等新型复发相关基因，揭示癌症转录组的可塑性与免疫逃逸机制。
ai.translation:
背景：长读长直接RNA测序（DRS）和PCR cDNA测序（PCS）对肿瘤样本的分析可发现传统短读长测序遗漏的新型转录异构体、新型基因及转录组共依赖关系。然而目前仅存在少量使用DRS或PCS研究癌症的报道，且缺乏两种方法的直接对比。肾透明细胞癌（ccRCC）是肾癌最常见的亚型，约30%接受手术切除的患者会发生疾病复发。长读长RNA测序尚未应用于肾癌研究。

方法：对12例ccRCC存档肿瘤样本（发现队列，其中6例来自复发患者）进行牛津纳米孔技术DRS和PCS分析，结果在独立的20例患者队列中验证，并与RCC4细胞的DRS分析进行比较。

结果：DRS和PCS均成功实现高读长测序，其中PCS具有更高的测序深度。复发患者的差异表达基因集在DRS和PCS中表现出良好重叠。去卷积分析显示复发患者原发肿瘤中存在免疫浸润丧失现象，并揭示CD8+ T细胞耗竭标志物TOX作为新型复发相关基因。值得注意的是，新型转录本分析显示两种方法共同检测到超过10,000个未表征的候选新型转录本，并在ccRCC细胞系中体外检测到类似结果。这使得能够定义ccRCC相关剪接变异的完整外显子结构，包括MVK和HPCAL1的变异体。更显著的是，发现了一种新型sPD-L1转录本，其编码可溶性蛋白且具有更长的3'UTR和更低的稳定性，相较于注释转录本在ccRCC细胞中表现出不同特性。sPD-L1转录本水平在复发性原发肿瘤中保持不变，而膜结合PD-L1则呈现下调趋势。最后，两种方法均鉴定出414个新型基因，包括在ccRCC细胞系中体外检测到的新型非编码基因，该基因在复发患者中高表达。

结论：PCS和DRS可应用于肿瘤样本，揭示癌症转录组的可塑性和不稳定性特征，这些特征与疾病进展和免疫逃逸密切相关。

title: Resolution of ring chromosomes, Robertsonian translocations, and complex structural variants from long-read sequencing and telomere-to-telomere assembly
journal: The American Journal of Human Genetics
abstract:
The capacity to resolve structural variants (SVs) at sequence resolution in highly repetitive genomic regions has long been intractable. Consequently, the properties, origins, and functional effects of multiple classes of complex rearrangement are unknown. To resolve these challenges, we leveraged recent technical milestones: 1) Oxford-Nanopore (ONT) sequencing; 2) the gapless Telomere-to-Telomere (T2T) genome assembly; and 3) a novel tool to discover large-scale rearrangements from long-reads. We applied these technologies across 13 patients with ring chromosomes, Robertsonian translocations, and complex balanced SVs that were unresolved by short-read sequencing. We resolved 10 of 13 events, including ring chromosomes, the complex SVs, and a Robertsonian translocation. Multiple breakpoints were localized to highly repetitive regions inaccessible to short-read alignment, such as acrocentric p-arms, ribosomal DNA arrays, and telomeric repeats, and involved complex structures such as a deletion-inversion and interchromosomal dispersed duplications. We also leveraged ONT native methylation detection to discover phased differential methylation in a gene promoter proximal to a ring fusion site, suggesting a long-range positional effect with heterochromatin spreading. Breakpoint sequences were consistent with common mechanisms of SV formation, including microhomology-mediated mechanisms, non-homologous end-joining, and non-allelic homologous recombination. These methods provide some of the first glimpses into the sequence resolution of ring chromosomes and Robertsonian translocations and illuminate the structural diversity of chromosomal rearrangements with implications for molecular diagnosis and genome biology.

HighlightsO_LICryptic rearrangements revealed in repetitive and previously inaccessible regions
C_LIO_LIAligning long-reads to telomere-to-telomere assembly enabled breakpoint discovery
C_LIO_LIFirst sequence resolution of a Robertsonian translocation breakpoint
C_LIO_LIHaplotype-specific methylation changes associated with ring formation
C_LI
