ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序和端粒到端粒（T2T）基因组组装技术，首次解析了环状染色体和罗伯逊易位的结构变异。研究发现复杂断裂点涉及高度重复区域的特殊结构，揭示了染色体重排的序列细节，为分子诊断和基因组学提供了新视角。
keywords: 端粒到端粒（T2T）基因组组装
ai.translation: 在高度重复的基因组区域中解析结构变异（SVs）的序列分辨率长期以来存在技术障碍。因此，多种复杂重排的特性、起源及功能效应仍不清楚。为解决这些挑战，我们整合了三项技术突破：1）牛津纳米孔（ONT）测序；2）无间隙端粒到端粒（T2T）基因组组装；3）从长读长数据中发现大规模重排的新工具。我们对13名携带环状染色体、罗伯逊易位及复杂平衡SVs的患者样本进行了分析，其中10/13个事件被成功解析，包括环状染色体、复杂SVs及罗伯逊易位。多个断裂点定位在短读长测序无法覆盖的高度重复区域，如acrocentric p臂、核糖体DNA阵列和端粒重复序列，涉及删除-倒位等复杂结构及染色体间分散重复。通过ONT原生甲基化检测，我们发现环融合位点附近基因启动子区域存在相位特异性甲基化差异，提示异染色质扩散的远距离效应。断裂点序列符合SVs形成的常见机制，包括微同源介导机制、非同源末端连接及非等位同源重组。这些方法首次揭示了环状染色体和罗伯逊易位的序列分辨率，阐明了染色体重排的结构多样性，对分子诊断和基因组生物学具有重要意义。

title: Deep learning-assisted single-molecule detection of protein post-translational modifications with a biological nanopore
abstract: Protein post-translational modifications (PTMs) play a crucial role in countless biological processes, profoundly modulating protein properties on both the spatial and temporal scales. Protein PTMs have also emerged as reliable biomarkers for several diseases. However, only a handful of techniques are available to accurately measure their levels, capture their complexity at a single molecule level and characterize their multifaceted roles in health and disease. Nanopore sensing provides high sensitivity for the detection of low-abundance proteins, holding the potential to impact single-molecule proteomics and PTM detection in particular. Here, we demonstrate the ability of a biological nanopore, the pore-forming toxin aerolysin, to detect and distinguish -synuclein-derived peptides bearing single or multiple PTMs, namely phosphorylation, nitration and oxidation occurring at different positions and in various combinations. The characteristic current signatures of the -synuclein peptide and its PTM variants could be confidently identified using a deep learning model for signal processing. We further demonstrate that this framework can quantify -synuclein peptides at picomolar concentration and detect the C-terminal peptides generated by digestion of full-length -synuclein. Collectively, our work highlights the unique advantage of using nanopore as a tool for simultaneous detection of multiple PTMs and paves the way for their use in biomarker discovery and diagnostics.
authors: Cao, C.; Magalhaes, P.; Krapp, L.; Bada Juarez, J.; Mayer, S.; Rukes, V.; Chiki, A.; Lashuel, H.; Dal Peraro, M.

ai.TLDR: 蛋白质翻译后修饰（PTMs）在生物过程中起关键作用，但现有技术难以精准检测其复杂性。本研究利用纳米孔传感技术，成功实现了对α-突触核蛋白衍生肽中多种PTMs的检测与区分。
ai.translation: 蛋白质翻译后修饰（PTMs）在无数生物过程中发挥关键作用，通过空间和时间尺度深刻调控蛋白质特性。PTMs已成为多种疾病的可靠生物标志物。然而，目前仅有少数技术能够精准测量其水平，捕捉单分子层面的复杂性，并阐明其在健康与疾病中的多面性作用。纳米孔传感技术为低丰度蛋白检测提供了高灵敏度，具有在单分子蛋白质组学和PTM检测方面产生影响的潜力。本研究展示了生物纳米孔——溶菌酶形成毒素气单胞菌溶素，能够检测并区分携带单个或多个PTMs（如磷酸化、硝化和氧化）的α-突触核蛋白衍生肽，这些修饰发生在不同位置并以多种组合形式存在。通过深度学习模型对信号进行处理，可可靠识别α-突触核蛋白肽及其PTM变体的特征电流签名。进一步研究表明，该框架可量化皮摩尔浓度的α-突触核蛋白肽，并检测全长α-突触核蛋白消化产生的C端肽。本工作凸显了纳米孔技术在同时检测多种PTMs的独特优势，并为生物标志物发现和诊断应用铺平了道路。

title: Targeted sequencing analysis pipeline for species identification of human pathogenic fungi using long-read nanopore sequencing
abstract: Among molecular-based techniques for fungal identification, Sanger sequencing of the primary universal fungal DNA barcode, the internal transcribed spacer (ITS) region (ITS1, 5.8S, ITS2), is commonly used in clinical routine laboratories due to its simplicity, universality, efficacy, and affordability for fungal species identification. However, Sanger sequencing fails to identify mixed ITS sequences in the case of mixed infections. To overcome this limitation, different high-throughput sequencing technologies have been explored. The nanopore-based technology is now one of the most promising long-read sequencing technologies on the market as it has the potential to sequence the full-length ITS region in a single read. In this study, we established a workflow for species identification using the sequences of the entire ITS region generated by nanopore sequencing of both pure yeast isolates and mocked mixed species reads generated with different scenarios. The species used in this study included *Candida albicans* (n = 2), *Candida tropicalis* (n = 1), *Nakaseomyces glabratus* (formerly *Candida glabrata*) (n = 1), *Trichosporon asahii* (n = 2), *Pichia kudriavzevii* (formerly *Candida krusei*) (n = 1), and *Cryptococcus neoformans* (n = 1). Comparing various methods to generate the consensus sequence for fungal species identification, the results from this study indicate that read clustering using a modified version of the NanoCLUST pipeline is more sensitive than Canu or VSEARCH, as it classified species accurately with a lower abundance cluster of reads (3% abundance compared to 10% with VSEARCH). The modified NanoCLUST also reduced the number of classified clusters compared to VSEARCH, making the subsequent BLAST+ analysis faster. Subsampling of the datasets, which reduces the size of the datasets by approximately tenfold, did not significantly affect the identification results in terms of the identified species name, percent identity, query coverage, percentage of reads in the classified cluster, and the number of clusters. The ability of the method to distinguish mixed species within sub-populations of large datasets has the potential to aid computer analysis by reducing the required processing power. The herein presented new sequence analysis pipeline will facilitate better interpretation of fungal sequence data for species identification.
authors: Nattapong Langsiri, Navaporn Worasilchai, ... Ariya Chindamporn
citation: Langsiri, N., Worasilchai, N., Irinyi, L. et al. Targeted sequencing analysis pipeline for species identification of human pathogenic fungi using long-read nanopore sequencing. IMA Fungus 14 , 18 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s43008-023-00125-6
description: Among molecular-based techniques for fungal identification, Sanger sequencing of the primary universal fungal DNA barcode, the internal transcribed...

ai.TLDR: 在真菌鉴定中，Sanger测序因简便性和通用性被广泛用于临床实验室，但无法识别混合感染中的混合ITS序列。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术结合改进的NanoCLUST流程，显著提升了混合物种的识别敏感性。实验表明，该方法在降低计算资源需求的同时，能更准确地解析大规模数据集中的亚群混合物种。
ai.translation: 在基于分子技术的真菌鉴定方法中，Sanger测序的ITS区域（ITS1、5.8S、ITS2）因操作简便、通用性强、成本低而被广泛应用于临床常规实验室。然而，Sanger测序在混合感染样本中无法识别混合ITS序列。为克服这一局限性，研究者探索了多种高通量测序技术。纳米孔测序技术作为长读长测序技术的代表，因其可单次读取完整ITS区域的潜力而成为市场上的重要选择。本研究建立了一套基于纳米孔测序的物种鉴定工作流程，利用纯酵母菌株和模拟混合物种样本（不同场景生成）的完整ITS区域序列进行分析。研究中使用的真菌物种包括：白念珠菌（n=2）、热带念珠菌（n=1）、光滑念珠菌（n=1）、曲霉菌（n=2）、克鲁斯念珠菌（n=1）和新型隐球菌（n=1）。通过比较不同方法生成共识序列的效果，研究结果表明：改进版的NanoCLUST流程比Canu或VSEARCH方法更敏感，其在低丰度读取簇（3%丰度 vs VSEARCH的10%）中仍能准确分类物种。改进版NanoCLUST还减少了分类簇数量，使后续BLAST+分析更高效。数据集的子采样（减少约十倍数据量）未显著影响物种名称识别、同源性百分比、查询覆盖率、分类簇中读取占比及簇数量。该方法通过降低大规模数据集亚群混合物种的解析复杂度，有望减少计算机分析所需的计算资源。本研究提出的新型序列分析流程将有助于更精准地解读真菌序列数据以实现物种鉴定。

title: Automated detection and classification of polioviruses from nanopore sequencing reads using piranha
abstract: Widespread surveillance, rapid detection and appropriate intervention will be critical for successful eradication of poliovirus. With deployable next-generation sequencing (NGS) approaches, such as Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION, the time from sample to result can be significantly reduced compared to cell culture and Sanger sequencing. We developed piranha (poliovirus investigation resource automating nanopore haplotype analysis) to aid routine poliovirus testing of both stool and environmental samples and alleviate the bioinformatic bottleneck that often exists for labs adopting novel NGS approaches. Piranha can be used for efficient intratypic differentiation of poliovirus serotypes, for classification of Sabin-like polioviruses and for detection of wild-type and vaccine derived polioviruses. It produces interactive, distributable html reports, as well as summary csv files and consensus poliovirus FASTA sequences. The reports describe each nanopore sequencing run with interpretable plots enabling researchers to easily detect the presence of poliovirus in samples and quickly disseminate their results.
authors: O'Toole, A. N.; Colquhoun, R.; Ansley, C.; Troman, C.; Maloney, D.; Vance, Z.; Akello, J.; Bujaki, E.; Majumdar, M.; Khurshid, A.; Arshad, Y.; Alam, M. M.; Martin, J.; Shaw, A. G.; Grassly, N. C.

ai.TLDR: 脊髓灰质炎病毒的根除需要广泛监控、快速检测和及时干预。Piranha工具通过自动化纳米孔测序分析，显著提升了病毒分型和检测效率，解决了实验室采用新型测序技术时的生物信息学瓶颈。该工具可实现病毒株分类、野生型与疫苗衍生病毒检测，并生成交互式报告辅助结果传播。
ai.translation: 广泛监控、快速检测和适当干预对于成功根除脊髓灰质炎病毒至关重要。通过部署可携带的下一代测序（NGS）方法，如牛津纳米孔技术MinION，相比细胞培养和桑格测序，可显著缩短从样本到结果的时间。我们开发了Piranha（脊髓灰质炎病毒调查资源自动化纳米孔等位基因分析工具），以辅助粪便和环境样本的常规脊髓灰质炎病毒检测，并缓解实验室采用新型NGS方法时常见的生物信息学瓶颈。Piranha可用于高效进行脊髓灰质炎病毒型内分化，Sabin样病毒分类，以及野生型和疫苗衍生脊髓灰质炎病毒的检测。该工具生成可交互、可分发的HTML报告，以及汇总CSV文件和共识脊髓灰质炎病毒FASTA序列。报告通过可解释的图表描述每个纳米孔测序运行过程，使研究人员能够轻松检测样本中的脊髓灰质炎病毒，并快速传播检测结果。

title: Ribosomal Incorporation of Short RNAs from Mitochondrial Genome Recombination Sites in Toxoplasma gondii
abstract: The mitochondrial genomes of apicomplexans comprise merely three protein-coding genes, alongside a set of thirty to forty genes encoding small RNAs (sRNAs), many of which exhibit homologies to rRNA from E. coli. The expression status and integration of these short RNAs into ribosomes remains unclear and direct evidence for active ribosomes within apicomplexan mitochondria is still lacking. In this study, we conducted small RNA sequencing on the apicomplexan Toxoplasma gondii to investigate the occurrence and function of mitochondrial sRNAs. To enhance the analysis of sRNA sequencing outcomes, we also re-sequenced the T. gondii mitochondrial genome using an improved organelle enrichment protocol and Nanopore sequencing. It has been established previously that the T. gondii genome comprises 21 sequence blocks that undergo recombination among themselves but that their order is not entirely random. The enhanced coverage of the mitochondrial genome allowed us to characterize block combinations at increased resolution. Employing this refined genome for sRNA mapping, we find that many small RNAs originated from the junction sites between protein-coding blocks and rRNA sequence blocks. Surprisingly, such block border sRNAs were incorporated into polysomes together with canonical rRNA fragments and mRNAs. In conclusion, apicomplexan ribosomes are active within polysomes and are indeed assembled through the integration of sRNAs, including previously undetected sRNAs with merged mRNA-rRNA sequences. Our findings lead to the hypothesis that T. gondiis block-based genome organization enables the dual utilization of mitochondrial sequences as both messenger RNAs and ribosomal RNAs, potentially establishing a link between the regulation of rRNA and mRNA expression.
authors: Tetzlaff, S.; Hillebrand, A.; Lyko, P.; Wicke, S.; Schmitz-Linneweber, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过小RNA测序和线粒体基因组重测序，揭示了弓形虫线粒体小RNA的来源及其在核糖体中的整合。研究发现，线粒体基因组的块状结构使得部分小RNA兼具mRNA和rRNA功能，为线粒体基因调控机制提供了新见解。
ai.translation: 弓形虫的线粒体基因组仅包含三个蛋白质编码基因，以及三十至四十个编码小RNA（sRNA）的基因，其中许多与大肠杆菌的rRNA具有同源性。目前尚不清楚这些短RNA的表达状态及其是否整合到核糖体中，且缺乏直接证据表明弓形虫线粒体中存在活跃的核糖体。本研究通过小RNA测序分析弓形虫（Toxoplasma gondii）的线粒体sRNA分布，并采用改进的细胞器富集协议和Nanopore测序技术重新测序线粒体基因组。此前已知T. gondii基因组由21个序列块组成，这些块之间存在重组但排列顺序并非完全随机。通过提高线粒体基因组的覆盖深度，我们得以在更高分辨率下表征这些序列块的组合。利用该优化后的基因组进行sRNA定位分析发现，许多小RNA来源于蛋白质编码块与rRNA序列块之间的接合位点。令人惊讶的是，这些块边界的小RNA与经典的rRNA片段和mRNA共同整合到多聚核糖体中。综上所述，弓形虫的核糖体确实在多聚核糖体中活跃，并通过整合sRNA组装，包括此前未检测到的具有融合mRNA-rRNA序列的小RNA。研究结果提出假设：T. gondii基于块状结构的基因组组织使得线粒体序列可同时作为mRNA和rRNA使用，可能建立rRNA与mRNA表达调控之间的联系。

title: Full-length direct RNA sequencing reveals widespread RNA decay upon cellular stress
abstract: Cells react to stress by triggering response pathways, leading to extensive alterations in the transcriptome to restore cellular homeostasis. The role of RNA metabolism in shaping the cellular response to stress is vital, yet the global changes in RNA stability under these conditions remain unclear. In this work, we employ direct RNA sequencing with nanopores, enhanced by 5 end adaptor ligation, to comprehensively interrogate the human transcriptome at single-molecule and nucleotide resolution. By developing a statistical framework to identify robust RNA length variations in nanopore data, we find that cellular stress induces prevalent 5 end RNA decay that is coupled to translation and ribosome occupancy. Unlike typical RNA decay models in normal conditions, we show that stress-induced RNA decay is dependent on XRN1 but does not depend on deadenylation or decapping. We observed that RNAs undergoing decay are predominantly enriched in the stress granule transcriptome while inhibition of stress granule formation via genetic ablation of G3BP1 and G3BP2 rescues RNA length. Our findings reveal RNA decay as a key determinant of RNA metabolism upon cellular stress and dependent on stress-granule formation.
authors: Dar, S. A.; Malla, S.; Lee, C. T.-Y.; Martin, J.; Payea, M. J.; Khandeshi, A. J.; Martindale, J. L.; Belair, C.; Maragkakis, M.

ai.TLDR: 细胞在应激反应中通过激活响应通路改变转录组以恢复稳态，RNA代谢在其中起关键作用。研究通过纳米孔测序技术发现应激诱导的RNA降解与XRN1相关，且不依赖去腺苷化或脱帽过程，揭示了应激颗粒形成对RNA代谢的决定性作用。
ai.translation: 细胞通过激活应激响应通路导致转录组广泛改变以恢复细胞稳态。RNA代谢在塑造细胞应激反应中起关键作用，但应激条件下全局RNA稳定性变化机制尚不明确。本研究采用结合5'端接头连接的纳米孔直接RNA测序技术，以单分子和核苷酸分辨率全面解析人类转录组。通过开发统计框架识别纳米孔数据中的稳健RNA长度变异，发现细胞应激诱导普遍的5'端RNA降解，该过程与翻译和核糖体占据相关。与正常条件下的典型RNA降解模型不同，应激诱导的RNA降解依赖XRN1但不依赖去腺苷化或脱帽过程。观察到降解RNA主要富集于应激颗粒转录组，而通过遗传消除G3BP1和G3BP2抑制应激颗粒形成可恢复RNA长度。研究结果揭示RNA降解是细胞应激下RNA代谢的关键决定因素，并依赖应激颗粒的形成。

title: First whole genome sequence and assembly of the Ecuadorian brown-headed spider monkey (Ateles fusciceps fusciceps), a critically endangered species, using Oxford Nanopore Technologies
abstract: The Ecuadorian brown-headed spider monkey (Ateles fusciceps fusciceps) is currently considered one of the most endangered primates in the world and is classified as critically endangered (IUCN). It faces multiple threats, the most significant one being habitat loss due to deforestation in western Ecuador. Genomic tools are key for the management of endangered species, but this requires a reference genome which until now was unavailable for A. f. fusciceps. The present study reports the first whole genome sequence and assembly of A. f. fusciceps generated using Oxford Nanopore long reads. DNA was extracted from a subadult male and libraries were prepared for sequencing following the Ligation Sequencing Kit SQK-LSK112 workflow. Sequencing was performed using a MinION Mk1C sequencer. The sequencing reads were processed to generate a genome assembly. Two different assemblers were used to obtain draft genomes using raw reads, of which the Flye assembly was found to be superior. The final assembly has a total length of 2.63 Gb and contains 3,861 contigs, with an N50 of 7,560,531 bp. The assembly was analyzed for annotation completeness based on primate ortholog prediction using a high-resolution database, and was found to be 84.3% complete, with a low number of duplicated genes indicating a precise assembly. The annotation of the assembly predicted 31,417 protein-coding genes, comparable to other mammal assemblies. A reference genome for this critically endangered species will allow researchers to gain insight into the genetics of its populations and thus aid conservation and management efforts of this vulnerable species.
authors: Pozo, G.; Albuja Quintana, M.; Larreategui, L.; Gutierrez, B.; Fuentes, N.; Alfonso-Cortes, F.; Torres, M. d. L.

ai.TLDR: 厄瓜多尔棕头蜘蛛猴作为极度濒危灵长类动物，亟需基因组研究支持保护。本研究首次利用Oxford Nanopore长读长技术完成其全基因组组装，获得2.63 Gb的高质量参考基因组，为种群遗传研究和保护策略提供关键数据。
ai.translation: 厄瓜多尔棕头蜘蛛猴（Ateles fusciceps fusciceps）目前被认定为全球最濒危的灵长类动物之一，被国际自然保护联盟（IUCN）列为极危物种。该物种面临多重威胁，其中西厄瓜多尔森林砍伐导致的栖息地丧失是最显著的威胁。基因组工具在濒危物种管理中起着关键作用，但此前缺乏A. f. fusciceps的参考基因组。本研究首次利用Oxford Nanopore长读长技术完成该物种的全基因组序列和组装。从亚成年雄性个体提取DNA，并按照Ligation Sequencing Kit SQK-LSK112工作流程制备测序库。使用MinION Mk1C测序仪进行测序，通过处理测序读段生成基因组组装。采用两种不同的组装工具对原始读段进行处理，其中Flye组装结果更优。最终组装总长度为2.63 Gb，包含3,861个contigs，N50值为7,560,531 bp。通过高分辨率数据库进行的灵长类直系同源基因预测分析显示，该组装完整性达84.3%，重复基因数量较少表明组装精度较高。基因组注释预测了31,417个蛋白质编码基因，与其它哺乳动物组装相当。该极危物种的参考基因组将帮助研究人员深入了解其种群遗传学，从而辅助该易危物种的保护与管理措施。

title: Long-read sequencing identifies a common transposition haplotype predisposing forCLCNKBdeletions
abstract:
### Background

Long-read sequencing is increasingly used to uncover structural variants in the human genome, both functionally neutral and deleterious. Structural variants occur more frequently in regions with a high homology or repetitive segments, and one rearrangement may predispose to additional events. Bartter syndrome type 3 (BS 3) is a monogenic tubulopathy caused by deleterious variants in the chloride channel gene *CLCNKB*, a high proportion of these being large gene deletions. Multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification, the current diagnostic gold standard for this type of mutation, will indicate a simple homozygous gene deletion in biallelic deletion carriers. However, since the phenotypic spectrum of BS 3 is broad even among biallelic deletion carriers, we undertook a more detailed analysis of precise breakpoint regions and genomic structure.

### Methods

Structural variants in 32 BS 3 patients from 29 families and one BS4b patient with *CLCNKB* deletions were investigated using long-read and synthetic long-read sequencing, as well as targeted long-read sequencing approaches.

### Results

We report a ~3 kb duplication of 3′-UTR *CLCNKB* material transposed to the corresponding locus of the neighbouring *CLCNKA* gene, also found on ~50 % of alleles in healthy control individuals. This previously unknown common haplotype is significantly enriched in our cohort of patients with *CLCNKB* deletions (45 of 51 alleles with haplotype information, 2.2 kb and 3.0 kb transposition taken together, *p*=9.16×10−9). Breakpoint coordinates for the *CLCNKB* deletion were identifiable in 28 patients, with three being compound heterozygous. In total, eight different alleles were found, one of them a complex rearrangement with three breakpoint regions. Two patients had different *CLCNKA/CLCNKB* hybrid genes encoding a predicted *CLCNKA/CLCNKB* hybrid protein with likely residual function.

### Conclusions

The presence of multiple different deletion alleles in our cohort suggests that large *CLCNKB* gene deletions originated from many independently recurring genomic events clustered in a few hot spots. The uncovered associated sequence transposition haplotype apparently predisposes to these additional events.

The spectrum of *CLCNKB* deletion alleles is broader than expected and likely still incomplete, but represents an obvious candidate for future genotype/phenotype association studies.

We suggest a sensitive and cost-efficient approach, consisting of indirect sequence capture and long-read sequencing, to analyse disease-relevant structural variant hotspots in general.
authors: Nikolai Tschernoster, Florian Erger, ... Janine Altmüller
citation: Tschernoster, N., Erger, F., Kohl, S. et al. Long-read sequencing identifies a common transposition haplotype predisposing for CLCNKB deletions. Genome Med 15 , 62 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-023-01215-1
description: Long-read sequencing is increasingly used to uncover structural variants in the human genome, both functionally neutral and deleterious....

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术分析Bartter综合征类型3（BS3）患者的CLCNKB基因结构变异，发现3′-UTR区域重复和新型等位基因，揭示了基因缺失的复杂机制。研究结果表明，CLCNKB基因缺失与特定序列转位多态性相关，可能促进额外的基因重组事件。
keywords: 多重连接依赖探针扩增
ai.translation:
背景：长读长测序技术被广泛用于揭示人类基因组中功能中性或有害的结构变异，尤其在高度同源或重复序列区域。Bartter综合征类型3（BS3）是一种由CLCNKB氯离子通道基因有害变异引起的单基因肾小管病，其中大部分病例为大基因缺失。目前的诊断金标准多重连接依赖探针扩增（multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification）仅能检测纯合基因缺失，但BS3表型谱在基因缺失携带者中仍存在显著差异，因此需要更精确的断点区域分析。

方法：采用长读长测序、合成长读长测序及靶向长读长测序技术，对32例BS3患者（来自29个家庭）和1例BS4b患者的CLCNKB基因缺失进行结构变异分析。

结果：发现约3 kb的CLCNKB 3′-UTR区域重复转位至邻近CLCNKA基因对应位点，该现象在健康对照组约50%的等位基因中存在。该新型常见单体型在CLCNKB缺失患者中显著富集（45/51个等位基因，p=9.16×10−9）。28例患者可定位CLCNKB缺失断点，其中3例为复合杂合子。共发现8种不同等位基因，其中1种包含三个断点区域的复杂重排。2例患者存在不同CLCNKA/CLCNKB杂交基因，编码预测具有残余功能的杂交蛋白。

结论：研究队列中多种CLCNKB缺失等位基因的存在表明，大基因缺失源于少数热点区域的独立重复事件。发现的序列转位单体型可能促进这些额外事件的发生。CLCNKB缺失等位基因谱比预期更广泛且可能不完整，但为未来基因型/表型关联研究提供了明确候选。建议采用间接序列捕获结合长读长测序的敏感且经济的方法，用于分析疾病相关结构变异热点。

title: SUPREM: an engineered non-site-specific m6A RNA methyltransferase with highly improved efficiency
abstract: m6A RNA methylation plays a key role in RNA processing and translational regulation, influencing both normal physiological and pathological processes. Yet, current techniques for studying RNA methylation struggle to isolate the effects of individual m6A modifications. Engineering of RNA methyltransferases (RNA MTases) could enable development of improved synthetic biology tools to manipulate RNA methylation, but it is challenging due to limited understanding of structure-function relationships in RNA MTases. Herein, using ancestral sequence reconstruction we explore the sequence space of the bacterial DNA methyltransferase EcoGII (M.EcoGII), a promising target for protein engineering due to its lack of sequence specificity and its residual activity on RNA. We thereby created an efficient non-specific RNA MTase termed SUPREM, which exhibits 8-fold higher expression levels, 7 {degrees}C higher thermostability, and 12-fold greater m6A RNA methylation activity compared with M.EcoGII. Immunofluorescent staining and quantitative LC/MS-MS analysis confirmed SUPREMs higher RNA methylation activity compared with M.EcoGII in mammalian cells. Additionally, Nanopore direct RNA sequencing highlighted that SUPREM is capable of methylating a larger number of RNA methylation sites than M.EcoGII. Through phylogenetic and mutational analysis, we identified a critical residue for the enhanced RNA methylation activity of SUPREM. Collectively, our findings indicate that SUPREM holds promise as a versatile tool for in vivo RNA methylation and labeling.
authors: Ochiai, Y.; Clifton, B. E.; Coz, M. L.; Terenzio, M.; Laurino, P.

ai.TLDR: m6A RNA甲基化在RNA加工和翻译调控中起关键作用，但现有技术难以分离单个修饰的影响。本研究通过祖先序列重建开发出非特异性RNA甲基转移酶SUPREM，其在表达量、热稳定性和甲基化活性方面均显著优于M.EcoGII。
ai.translation: m6A RNA甲基化在RNA加工和翻译调控中起关键作用，影响正常生理和病理过程。然而，当前研究RNA甲基化的技术难以分离单个m6A修饰的影响。通过工程化RNA甲基转移酶(RNA MTases)可开发更优的合成生物学工具，但受限于对RNA MTases结构-功能关系的理解不足。本研究采用祖先序列重建技术，探索细菌DNA甲基转移酶EcoGII(M.EcoGII)的序列空间，该酶因缺乏序列特异性且对RNA仍有残留活性，成为蛋白质工程的潜在目标。由此开发出高效的非特异性RNA MTase SUPREM，其表达水平比M.EcoGII高8倍，热稳定性高7°C，m6A RNA甲基化活性高12倍。免疫荧光染色和定量LC/MS-MS分析证实SUPREM在哺乳动物细胞中比M.Eco、GII具有更高的RNA甲基化活性。此外，纳米孔直接RNA测序显示SUPREM能甲基化更多RNA甲基化位点。通过系统发育和突变分析，我们鉴定了SUPREM增强RNA甲基化活性的关键残基。综上，我们的发现表明SUPREM有望成为体内RNA甲基化和标记的多功能工具。

title: R2C2+UMI: Combining concatemeric consensus sequencing with unique molecular identifiers enables ultra-accurate sequencing of amplicons on Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencers
abstract: The sequencing of PCR amplicons is a core application of high-throughput sequencing technology. Using unique molecular identifiers (UMIs), individual amplified molecules can be sequenced to very high accuracy on an Illumina sequencer. However, Illumina sequencers have limited read length and are therefore restricted to sequencing amplicons shorter than 600bp unless using inefficient synthetic long-read approaches. Native long-read sequencers from Pacific Biosciences and Oxford Nanopore Technologies can, using consensus read approaches, match or exceed Illumina quality while achieving much longer read lengths. Using a circularization-based concatemeric consensus sequencing approach (R2C2) paired with UMIs (R2C2+UMI) we show that we can sequence [~]550nt antibody heavy-chain (IGH) and [~]1500nt 16S amplicons at accuracies up to and exceeding Q50 (<1 error in 100,0000 sequenced bases), which exceeds accuracies of UMI-supported Illumina paired sequencing as well as synthetic long-read approaches.
authors: Deng, D. Z. Q.; Verhage, J.; Neudorf, C.; Corbett-Detig, R.; Mekonen, H.; Castaldi, P. J.; Vollmers, C.

ai.TLDR: PCR扩增子测序是高通量测序技术的核心应用，通过唯一分子标识符（UMIs）可在Illumina测序仪上实现超高精度测序。本研究采用基于环化的串联共识测序方法（R2C2）结合UMIs（R2C2+UMI），成功实现约550nt抗体重链（IGH）和约1500nt 16S扩增子的Q50级精度测序，超越传统UMI支持的Illumina配对测序及合成长读长方法。
ai.translation: PCR扩增子测序是高通量测序技术的核心应用。通过使用唯一分子标识符（UMIs），可以在Illumina测序仪上对单个扩增分子进行超高精度测序。然而，Illumina测序仪的读长有限，因此只能对长度小于600bp的扩增子进行测序，除非采用低效的合成长读长方法。来自太平洋生物科学公司（Pacific Biosciences）和牛津纳米孔技术公司（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的原生长读长测序仪，通过共识读取方法可在实现更长读长的同时达到或超越Illumina的测序质量。我们采用基于环化的串联共识测序方法（R2C2）结合UMIs（R2C2+UMI），展示了可实现高达Q50（每10万测序碱基中错误率<1）精度的测序能力，用于约550nt的抗体重链（IGH）和约1500nt的16S扩增子测序，其精度超越了UMI支持的Illumina配对测序以及合成长读长方法。

title: Application of Nanopore Sequencing in the Diagnosis and Treatment of Pulmonary Infections
abstract: This review provides an in-depth discussion of the development, principles and utility of nanopore sequencing technology and its diverse applications in the identification of various pulmonary pathogens. We examined the emergence and advancements of nanopore sequencing as a significant player in this field. We illustrate the challenges faced in diagnosing mixed infections and further scrutinize the use of nanopore sequencing in the identification of single pathogens, including viruses (with a focus on its use in epidemiology, outbreak investigation, and viral resistance), bacteria (emphasizing 16S targeted sequencing, rare bacterial lung infections, and antimicrobial resistance studies), fungi (employing internal transcribed spacer sequencing), tuberculosis, and atypical pathogens. Furthermore, we discuss the role of nanopore sequencing in metagenomics and its potential for unbiased detection of all pathogens in a clinical setting, emphasizing its advantages in sequencing genome repeat areas and structural variant regions. We discuss the limitations in dealing with host DNA removal, the inherent high error rate of nanopore sequencing technology, along with the complexity of operation and processing, while acknowledging the possibilities provided by recent technological improvements. We compared nanopore sequencing with the BioFire system, a rapid molecular diagnostic system based on polymerase chain reaction. Although the BioFire system serves well for the rapid screening of known and common pathogens, it falls short in the identification of unknown or rare pathogens and in providing comprehensive genome analysis. As technological advancements continue, it is anticipated that the role of nanopore sequencing technology in diagnosing and treating lung infections will become increasingly significant.
authors: Jie Chen, Feng Xu
citation: Chen, J., Xu, F. Application of Nanopore Sequencing in the Diagnosis and Treatment of Pulmonary Infections. Mol Diagn Ther 27 , 685–701 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1007/s40291-023-00669-8
description: This review provides an in-depth discussion of the development, principles and utility of nanopore sequencing technology and its diverse applications...

ai.TLDR: 本文系统综述了纳米孔测序技术的发展历程、技术原理及其在肺部病原体检测中的应用价值。该技术在混合感染诊断、单病原体鉴定（病毒、细菌、真菌、结核分枝杆菌及非典型病原体）等领域展现出独特优势，尤其在宏基因组学研究中可实现无偏检测，但需克服宿主DNA去除、高错误率及操作复杂性等局限。
ai.translation: 本综述深入探讨了纳米孔测序技术的发展历程、技术原理及其在多种肺部病原体鉴定中的应用价值。我们分析了该技术作为该领域重要工具的出现与技术进步。文章重点阐述了在混合感染诊断中面临的挑战，并进一步探讨纳米孔测序在单病原体鉴定中的应用，包括病毒（侧重其在流行病学、疫情调查及病毒耐药性研究中的应用）、细菌（强调16S靶向测序、罕见细菌性肺部感染及抗微生物耐药性研究）、真菌（采用内转录间隔区测序）、结核分枝杆菌及非典型病原体的检测。此外，我们讨论了纳米孔测序在宏基因组学中的作用及其在临床环境中对所有病原体进行无偏检测的潜力，特别强调其在基因组重复区域和结构变异区域测序中的优势。同时，我们分析了宿主DNA去除、纳米孔测序技术固有的高错误率及操作处理复杂性等局限性，并认可近期技术改进带来的可能性。我们对比了纳米孔测序与基于聚合酶链反应的快速分子诊断系统BioFire系统的性能。尽管BioFire系统在已知常见病原体的快速筛查中表现良好，但在未知或罕见病原体的鉴定及全面基因组分析方面存在不足。随着技术持续进步，纳米孔测序技术在肺部感染诊断与治疗中的作用预计将愈发重要。

title: Familial co-segregation and the emerging role of long-read sequencing to re-classify variants of uncertain significance in inherited retinal diseases
abstract: Phasing genetic variants is essential in determining those that are potentially disease-causing. In autosomal recessive inherited retinal diseases (IRDs), reclassification of variants of uncertain significance (VUS) can provide a genetic diagnosis in indeterminate compound heterozygote cases. We report four cases in which familial co-segregation demonstrated a VUS resided in *trans* to a known pathogenic variant, which in concert with other supporting criteria, led to the reclassification of the VUS to likely pathogenic, thereby providing a genetic diagnosis in each case. We also demonstrate in a simplex patient without access to family members for co-segregation analysis that targeted long-read sequencing can provide haplotagged variant calling. This can elucidate if variants reside in *trans* and provide phase of genetic variants from the proband alone without parental testing. This emerging method can alleviate the bottleneck of haplotype analysis in cases where genetic testing of family members is unfeasible to provide a complete genetic diagnosis.
authors: Pankhuri Gupta, Kenji Nakamichi, ... Debarshi Mustafi
citation: Gupta, P., Nakamichi, K., Bonnell, A.C. et al. Familial co-segregation and the emerging role of long-read sequencing to re-classify variants of uncertain significance in inherited retinal diseases. npj Genom. Med. 8 , 20 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41525-023-00366-9
description: Phasing genetic variants is essential in determining those that are potentially disease-causing. In autosomal recessive inherited retinal diseases...

ai.TLDR: 基因变异相位分析在确定潜在致病变异中至关重要。通过家系共分离分析，重新分类不确定意义的变异（VUS）可为复合杂合子病例提供遗传诊断。研究展示了靶向长读长测序在无家系成员情况下实现等位基因标记变异调用的技术优势。
keywords: 常染色体隐性遗传性视网膜疾病
ai.translation: 基因变异相位分析在确定潜在致病变异中具有关键作用。在常染色体隐性遗传性视网膜疾病（IRDs）中，不确定意义的变异（VUS）的重新分类可为无法确定的复合杂合子病例提供遗传诊断。我们报告了四例通过家系共分离分析证实VUS与已知致病变异位于不同染色体片段（trans）的病例，结合其他支持标准后，将VUS重新分类为可能致病性变异，从而为每例患者提供遗传诊断。同时在无家系成员可进行共分离分析的单例患者中，我们展示了靶向长读长测序可实现等位基因标记变异调用。该技术可明确变异是否位于不同染色体片段，并通过单个受检者样本确定基因变异相位，无需父母检测。这种新兴方法可缓解因无法进行家系成员基因检测而造成的相位分析瓶颈，从而提供完整的遗传诊断。

title: The application of long-read sequencing in clinical settings
abstract: Long-read DNA sequencing technologies have been rapidly evolving in recent years, and their ability to assess large and complex regions of the genome makes them ideal for clinical applications in molecular diagnosis and therapy selection, thereby providing a valuable tool for precision medicine. In the third-generation sequencing duopoly, Oxford Nanopore Technologies and Pacific Biosciences work towards increasing the accuracy, throughput, and portability of long-read sequencing methods while trying to keep costs low. These trades have made long-read sequencing an attractive tool for use in research and clinical settings. This article provides an overview of current clinical applications and limitations of long-read sequencing and explores its potential for point-of-care testing and health care in remote settings.
authors: Josephine B. Oehler, Helen Wright, ... Ulf Schmitz
citation: Oehler, J.B., Wright, H., Stark, Z. et al. The application of long-read sequencing in clinical settings. Hum Genomics 17 , 73 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s40246-023-00522-3
description: Long-read DNA sequencing technologies have been rapidly evolving in recent years, and their ability to assess large and complex regions of the genome...

ai.TLDR: 长读长DNA测序技术因能解析基因组复杂区域而成为分子诊断和治疗选择的有力工具，推动精准医疗发展。该技术在提升准确性、通量和便携性的同时保持成本可控，使其在研究和临床场景中具有应用潜力。文章综述了其临床应用现状及局限性，并探讨其在远程医疗即时检测中的前景。
ai.translation: 近年来，长读长DNA测序技术发展迅速，其解析基因组大范围复杂区域的能力使其成为分子诊断和治疗选择的临床理想工具，为精准医疗提供了重要手段。在第三代测序技术领域，牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）和太平洋生物科学公司（Pacific Biosciences）致力于提升长读长测序方法的准确性、通量和便携性，同时控制成本。这些技术进步使长读长测序成为研究和临床场景中的有吸引力工具。本文综述了长读长测序在临床应用中的现状与局限性，并探讨其在远程医疗场景下的即时检测潜力及对医疗保健的潜在影响。

title: Using deep long-read RNAseq in Alzheimer's disease brain to assess clinical relevance of RNA isoform diversity
abstract: Due to alternative splicing, human protein-coding genes average over eight RNA isoforms, resulting in nearly four distinct protein coding sequences per gene. Long-read RNAseq (IsoSeq) enables more accurate quantification of isoforms, shedding light on their specific roles. To assess the medical relevance of measuring RNA isoform expression, we sequenced 12 aged human frontal cortices (6 Alzheimers disease cases and 6 controls; 50% female) using one Oxford Nanopore PromethION flow cell per sample. Our study uncovered 53 new high-confidence RNA isoforms in medically relevant genes, including several where the new isoform was one of the most highly expressed for that gene. Specific examples include WDR4 (61%; microcephaly), MYL3 (44%; hypertrophic cardiomyopathy), and MTHFS (25%; major depression, schizophrenia, bipolar disorder). Other notable genes with new high-confidence isoforms include CPLX2 (10%; schizophrenia, epilepsy) and MAOB (9%; targeted for Parkinsons disease treatment). We identified 1,917 medically relevant genes expressing multiple isoforms in human frontal cortex, where 1,018 had multiple isoforms with different protein coding sequences, demonstrating the need to better understand how individual isoforms from a single gene body are involved in human health and disease, if at all. Exactly 98 of the 1,917 genes are implicated in brain-related diseases, including Alzheimers disease genes such as APP (A{beta} precursor protein; five), MAPT (tau protein; four), and BIN1 (eight). As proof of concept, we also found 99 differentially expressed RNA isoforms between Alzheimers cases and controls, despite the genes themselves not exhibiting differential expression. Our findings highlight the significant knowledge gaps in RNA isoform diversity and their medical relevance. Deep long-read RNA sequencing will be necessary going forward to fully comprehend the medical relevance of individual isoforms for a "single" gene.
authors: Aguzzoli Heberle, B.; Brandon, J. A.; Page, M. L.; Nations, K. A.; Dikobe, K. I.; White, B. J.; Gordon, L. A.; Fox, G. A.; Wadsworth, M. E.; Doyle, P. H.; Fox, E. J.; Shantaraman, A.; Ryten, M.; Goodwin, S.; Ghiban, E.; Wappel, R.; Mavruk-Eskpelivan, S.; Miller, J. B.; Seyfried, N.; Nelson, P. T.; Fryer, J. D.; Ebbert, M. T. W.

ai.TLDR: 研究利用长读长RNA测序技术揭示了阿尔茨海默病患者与健康对照组间RNA剪接变体的显著差异，发现53个新高置信度剪接变体与多种神经系统疾病相关。通过分析12例老年额叶皮质样本，证实了特定基因剪接变体与微脑症、心肌病、抑郁症等疾病存在显著关联。
ai.translation: 由于可变剪接现象，人类蛋白质编码基因平均产生超过8种RNA异构体，导致每个基因产生近4种不同的蛋白质编码序列。长读长RNA测序（Iso-Seq）技术能够更精确地量化这些异构体，揭示其特定功能。为评估测量RNA异构体表达的医学相关性，我们使用单个Oxford Nanopore PromethION流细胞对12例老年人类额叶皮质样本（6例阿尔茨海默病病例和6例对照组；50%女性）进行测序。研究发现53个新高置信度的医学相关基因RNA异构体，包括多个新异构体成为该基因最高度表达的变体。具体案例包括WDR4（61%；微脑症）、MYL3（44%；肥厚型心肌病）、MTHFS（25%；重度抑郁、精神分裂症、双相情感障碍）。其他重要基因如CPLX2（10%；精神分裂症、癫痫）和MAOB（9%；帕金森病治疗靶点）也发现了新异构体。我们鉴定出1,917个在人类额叶皮质中表达多个异构体的医学相关基因，其中1,018个基因存在不同蛋白质编码序列的异构体，表明需要更深入理解单个基因体中不同异构体对人类健康与疾病的作用。恰好有98个基因与脑部疾病相关，包括阿尔茨海默病相关基因如APP（Aβ前体蛋白；5个）、MAPT（tau蛋白；4个）和BIN1（8个）。作为概念验证，我们还发现阿尔茨海默病病例与对照组间存在99种差异表达的RNA异构体，尽管这些基因本身未表现出差异表达。研究结果凸显了RNA异构体多样性及其医学相关性的知识鸿沟。未来需要深入的长读长RNA测序来全面理解单个基因中不同异构体的医学意义。

title: Targeted decontamination of sequencing data with CLEAN
abstract:
Many biological and medical questions are answered based on the analysis of sequence data. However, we can find contamination, artificial spike-ins, and overrepresented rRNA sequences in various read collections and assemblies. In particular, spike-ins used as controls, as those known from Illumina or Nanopore data, are often not considered as contaminants and also not appropriately removed during analyses. Additionally, removing human host DNA may be necessary for data protection and ethical considerations to ensure that individuals cannot be identified.

We developed CLEAN, a pipeline to remove unwanted sequences from both long- and short-read sequencing techniques. While focusing on Illumina and Nanopore data with their technology-specific control sequences, the pipeline can also be used for host decontamination of metagenomic reads and assemblies, or the removal of rRNA from RNA-Seq data. The results are the purified sequences and sequences identified as contaminated with statistics summarized in a report.

The output can be used directly in subsequent analyses, resulting in faster computations and improved results. Although decontamination seems mundane, many contaminants are routinely overlooked, cleaned by steps that are not fully reproducible or difficult to trace. CLEAN facilitates reproducible, platform-independent data analysis in genomics and transcriptomics and is freely available at https://github.com/rki-mf1/clean under a BSD3 license.

authors: Lataretu, M.; Krautwurst, S.; Viehweger, A.; Brandt, C.; Hölzer, M.

ai.TLDR: 当前测序数据分析中存在污染、人工加入序列和rRNA过度表示等问题，CLEAN工具通过针对性去除这些干扰序列提升分析效率。该方法可应用于多种测序技术，实现可重复且平台无关的基因组学分析。
ai.translation:
许多生物学和医学问题的解答依赖于序列数据分析。然而在各类读取数据集合和组装中，我们常发现污染、人工加入的序列以及过度表示的rRNA序列。特别是作为对照的人工加入序列（如Illumina或Nanopore数据中已知的类型），通常未被视作污染物，也未在分析中被适当去除。此外，为确保个体无法被识别，去除人类宿主DNA在数据保护和伦理考量中可能是必要的。

我们开发了CLEAN，一个用于去除长读长和短读长测序技术中不需要序列的流程。虽然主要针对Illumina和Nanopore数据及其技术特异性对照序列，但该流程也可用于宏基因组读取和组装的宿主污染去除，或从RNA-Seq数据中去除rRNA。结果包括纯化后的序列和被标记为污染的序列，统计信息汇总在报告中。

输出可直接用于后续分析，从而实现更快的计算和更优的结果。尽管污染去除看似简单，但许多污染物常被常规忽视，且清洗步骤可能不完全可重复或难以追溯。CLEAN促进了基因组学和转录组学中可重复、平台无关的数据分析，并在BSD3许可证下免费提供于https://github.com/rki-mf1/clean。

title: Primed and ready: Nanopore metabarcoding can now recover highly accurate consensus barcodes that are generally indel-free
abstract:
BackgroundDNA metabarcoding applies high-throughput sequencing approaches to generate numerous DNA barcodes from mixed sample pools for mass species identification and community characterisation. To date, however, most metabarcoding studies employ second-generation sequencing platforms like Illumina, which are limited by short read lengths and longer turnaround times. While third-generation platforms such as the MinION (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) can sequence longer reads and even in real-time, application of these platforms for metabarcoding has remained scarce due to the relatively high read error rate as well as the paucity of specialised software for processing such reads.

FindingsWe show that this is no longer the case by performing nanopore-based metabarcoding on 34 zooplankton bulk samples with amplicon_sorter, benchmarking the results against conventional Illumina MiSeq sequencing. The R10.3 sequencing chemistry and super accurate (SUP) basecalling model reduced raw read error rates to [~]4%, and consensus calling with amplicon_sorter (without further error correction) generated metabarcodes that were [≤]1% erroneous. Although Illumina recovered a higher number of molecular operational taxonomic units (MOTUs) than nanopore sequencing (589 vs. 471), we found no significant differences in the zooplankton communities inferred between the sequencing platforms. Indeed, the same ecological conclusions were obtained regardless of the sequencing platform used. Moreover, 406 of 444 (91.4%) shared MOTUs between Illumina and nanopore were found to be indel-free.

ConclusionsCollectively, our results illustrate the viability of nanopore metabarcoding for characterising communities, and paves the way for greater utilisation of nanopore sequencing in various metabarcoding applications.
authors: Chang, J. J. M.; Ip, Y. C. A.; Neo, W. L.; Mowe, M. A. D.; Jaafar, Z.; Huang, D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术对34个浮游动物混合样本进行宏条形码分析，发现其在物种鉴定和群落表征方面具有可行性。尽管Illumina MiSeq测序获得的分子操作分类单元（MOTUs）数量更多，但两种平台推断出的浮游动物群落无显著差异，且91.4%的共享MOTUs无插入缺失变异。
ai.translation:
背景：DNA宏条形码测序通过高通量测序技术从混合样本池中生成大量DNA条形码，用于大规模物种鉴定和群落特征分析。然而，目前大多数宏条形码研究仍采用第二代测序平台（如Illumina），其存在读长较短和周转时间较长的局限性。尽管第三代平台如MinION（牛津纳米孔技术）可实现长读长甚至实时测序，但其在宏条形码应用中仍较为稀缺，主要受限于相对较高的读取错误率以及缺乏专门的读取处理软件。

发现：我们通过使用amplicon_sorter对34个浮游动物混合样本进行纳米孔宏条形码分析，并将结果与传统Illumina MiSeq测序进行基准对比。R10.3测序化学结合超级准确（SUP）碱基调用模型将原始读取错误率降至约4%，而amplicon_sorter（无需进一步错误校正）的共识调用生成的宏条形码错误率低于1%。尽管Illumina测序获得的分子操作分类单元（MOTUs）数量（589个）多于纳米孔测序（471个），但两种平台推断出的浮游动物群落无显著差异。事实上，无论使用哪种测序平台均获得相同的生态学结论。此外，444个共享MOTUs中406个（91.4%）被证实无插入缺失变异。

结论：我们的结果表明纳米孔宏条形码测序在群落特征分析中具有可行性，并为纳米孔测序在各类宏条形码应用中的更广泛应用铺平了道路。

title: Genomic DNA extraction optimization and validation for genome sequencing using the marine gastropod Kellet's whelk
abstract: Next-generation sequencing technologies, such as Nanopore MinION, Illumina Hiseq and Novaseq, and PacBio Sequel II, hold immense potential for advancing genomic research on non-model organisms, including the vast majority of marine species. However, application of these technologies to marine invertebrate species is often impeded by challenges in extracting and purifying their genomic DNA due to high polysaccharide content and other secondary metabolites. In this study, we help resolve this issue by developing and testing DNA extraction protocols for Kellets whelk (Kelletia kelletii), a subtidal gastropod with ecological and commercial importance, by comparing four DNA extraction methods commonly used in marine invertebrate studies. We identified an optimized protocol that balances efficiency, cost, and DNA extraction quality; the Salting out protocol. We validated the protocol using an independent set of tissue samples, then applied it to extract high-molecular-weight (HMW) DNA from over three thousand Kellets whelk tissue samples. The protocol demonstrated scalability and, with added clean-up, suitability for RAD-seq, GT-seq, as well as whole genome sequencing using both long read (ONT MinION) and short read (Illumina Novaseq) sequencing platforms. Our findings offer a robust and versatile DNA extraction and clean-up protocol for supporting genomic research efforts on non-model marine organisms, to help mediate the under-representation of invertebrates in genomic studies.
authors: Daniels, B. N.; Nurge, J.; Sleeper, O.; Lee, A.; Lopez, C.; Christie, M.; Toonen, R. J.; Davidson, J.; White, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究针对海洋无脊椎动物基因组DNA提取难题，通过比较四种常用方法，优化出盐析法协议，成功实现大规模高分子量DNA提取，适用于多种基因组学研究技术。该方法在非模式海洋生物基因组研究中具有重要应用价值。
ai.translation: 下一代测序技术（如Nanopore MinION、Illumina Hiseq和Novaseq，以及PacBio Sequel II）在非模式生物基因组研究中具有巨大潜力，但海洋无脊椎动物因高多糖含量和其他次级代谢产物导致DNA提取和纯化面临挑战。本研究通过比较四种常用DNA提取方法，针对具有生态和商业价值的凯尔特海蜗牛（Kelletia kelletii）开发优化协议。我们发现盐析法在效率、成本和DNA质量间取得平衡，经独立组织样本验证后，成功从三千多份组织样本中提取高分子量（HMW）DNA。该协议具备可扩展性，经纯化步骤后适用于RAD-seq、GT-seq及全基因组测序，兼容长读长（ONT MinION）和短读长（Illum3 Novaseq）测序平台。研究结果为非模式海洋生物基因组研究提供了稳健且通用的DNA提取和纯化方案，有助于缓解无脊椎动物在基因组研究中的代表性不足问题。

title: Targeted Amplification and Genetic Sequencing of the Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome Coronavirus 2 Surface Glycoprotein
abstract: The SARS-CoV-2 spike protein is a highly immunogenic and mutable protein that is the target of vaccine prevention and antibody therapeutics. This makes the encoding S-gene an important sequencing target. The SARS-CoV-2 sequencing community overwhelmingly adopted tiling amplicon-based strategies for sequencing the entire genome. As the virus evolved, primer mismatches inevitably led to amplicon drop-out. Given the exposure of the spike protein to host antibodies, mutation occurred here most rapidly, leading to amplicon failure over the most insightful region of the genome. To mitigate this, we developed SpikeSeq, a targeted method to amplify and sequence the S-gene. We evaluated 20 distinct primer designs through iterative in silico and in vitro testing to select the optimal primer pairs and run conditions. Once selected, periodic in silico analysis monitor primer conservation as SARS-CoV-2 evolves. Despite being designed during the Beta wave, the selected primers remain > 99% conserved through Omicron as of 2023-04-14. To validate the final design, we compared SpikeSeq data and National SARS-CoV-2 Strain Surveillance whole-genome data for 321 matching samples. Consensus sequences for the two methods were highly identical (99.998%) across the S-gene. SpikeSeq can serve as a complement to whole-genome surveillance or be leveraged where only S-gene sequencing is of interest. While SpikeSeq is adaptable to other sequencing platforms, the Nanopore platform validated here is compatible with low to moderate throughputs, and its simplicity better enables users to achieve accurate results, even in low resource settings.
authors: Keller, M. W.; Keong, L. M.; Rambo-Martin, B. L.; Hassell, N.; Lacek, K.; Wilson, M. M.; Kirby, M. K.; Liddell, J.; Owuor, D. C.; Sheth, M.; Madden, J.; Lee, J. S.; Kondor, R. J.; Wentworth, D. E.; Barnes, J. R.

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2刺突蛋白因高度免疫原性和变异性成为疫苗和抗体药物开发的关键靶标，但传统测序策略因引物错配导致基因片段缺失。本研究开发的SpikeSeq方法通过优化引物设计，实现了对S基因的高效测序，其引物在Omicron变异株中仍保持>99%的保守性，验证数据与全基因组测序结果高度一致。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2刺突蛋白是一种高度免疫原性且易发生变异的蛋白，是疫苗预防和抗体治疗药物的靶标，因此其编码基因（S-gene）成为重要的测序目标。SARS-CoV-2测序领域普遍采用基于tiling amplicon的策略对整个基因组进行测序。随着病毒进化，引物错配不可避免地导致基因片段缺失。由于刺突蛋白暴露于宿主抗体，该区域突变速度最快，导致基因组最具有信息量区域的测序失败。为解决这一问题，我们开发了SpikeSeq，一种针对S-gene的靶向扩增测序方法。通过迭代的体外和计算机模拟实验，评估了20种不同的引物设计，筛选出最优引物对和实验条件。选定后，定期通过计算机模拟分析监测引物在SARS-CoV-2进化过程中的保守性。尽管该引物设计于Beta变异株时期，截至2023-04-14，其保守性仍超过99%。为验证最终设计，我们比较了SpikeSeq数据与国家SARS-CoV-2菌株监测全基因组数据的321个匹配样本。两种方法在S-gene区域的共识序列高度一致（99.998%）。SpikeSeq可作为全基因组监测的补充手段，或在仅需S-gene测序时使用。虽然SpikeSeq可适配其他测序平台，但本研究验证的Nanopore平台兼容低至中等通量，其简单性更便于用户在资源有限环境下获得准确结果。

title: Borg extrachromosomal elements of methane-oxidizing archaea have conserved and expressed genetic repertoires
abstract: Borgs are huge extrachromosomal elements (ECE) of anaerobic methane-consuming "Candidatus Methanoperedens" archaea. Here, we used nanopore sequencing to validate published complete genomes curated from short reads and to reconstruct new genomes. 13 complete and four near-complete linear genomes share 40 genes that define a largely syntenous genome backbone. We use these conserved genes to identify new Borgs from peatland soil and to delineate Borg phylogeny, revealing two major clades. Remarkably, Borg genes encoding OmcZ nanowire-like electron-exporting cytochromes and cell surface proteins are more highly expressed than those of host Methanoperedens, indicating that Borgs augment the Methanoperedens activity in situ. We reconstructed the first complete 4.00 Mbp genome for a Methanoperedens that is inferred to be a Borg host and predicted its methylation motifs, which differ from pervasive TC and CC methylation motifs of the Borgs. Thus, methylation may enable Methanoperedens to distinguish their genomes from those of Borgs. Very high Borg to Methanoperedens ratios and structural predictions suggest that Borgs may be capable of encapsulation. The findings clearly define Borgs as a distinct class of ECE with shared genomic signatures, establish their diversification from a common ancestor with genetic inheritance, and raise the possibility of periodic existence outside of host cells.
authors: Schoelmerich, M. C.; Ly, L.; West-Roberts, J.; Shi, L.-D.; Shen, C.; Malvankar, N.; Taib, N.; Gribaldo, S.; Woodcroft, B. J.; Al-Shayeb, B.; Dai, X.; Mozsary, C.; Hickey, S.; He, C.; Beaulaurier, J. A.; Juul, S.; Sachdeva, R.; Banfield, J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序技术验证并重建了厌氧甲烷消耗古菌Candidatus Methanoperedens的Borgs基因组，发现其具有独特的基因组骨架和甲基化特征。研究揭示Borgs通过编码纳米线样电子传递蛋白显著增强宿主代谢活性，并提出其可能具备细胞封装能力。
ai.translation: Borgs是厌氧甲烷消耗的'Candidatus Methanoperedens'古菌的大型额外染色体元素（ECE）。本研究利用纳米孔测序技术验证了从短读序列整理的完整基因组，并重建了新的基因组。13个完整和4个近完整的线性基因组共享40个定义基因组骨架的基因，这些保守基因被用于从泥炭土壤中识别新Borgs并构建系统发育树，揭示两个主要分支。值得注意的是，Borgs编码的OmcZ纳米线样电子传递细胞色素和细胞表面蛋白的表达水平高于宿主Methanoperedens，表明Borgs在体内的宿主活性中起增强作用。我们重建了首个完整的4.00 Mbp Methanoperedens基因组（推测为Borgs宿主），并预测其甲基化基序，这些基序与Borgs普遍存在的TC和CC甲基化基序不同。因此，甲基化可能使Methanoperedens能够区分自身基因组与Borgs基因组。极高的Borgs与Methanoperedens比例及结构预测表明Borgs可能具备封装能力。研究结果明确将Borgs定义为具有共享基因组特征的ECE新类群，确立其从共同祖先遗传分化的过程，并提出其可能在宿主细胞外周期性存在的可能性。

title: Genome sequencing of Syzygium cumini (Jamun) reveals adaptive evolution in secondary metabolism pathways associated with its medicinal properties
abstract: Syzygium cumini, also known as jambolan or jamun, is an evergreen tree widely known for its medicinal properties, fruits, and ornamental value. To understand the genomic and evolutionary basis of its medicinal properties, we sequenced S. cumini genome, which is the largest genome sequenced for the first time from the worlds largest tree genus Syzygium using Oxford Nanopore and 10x Genomics sequencing technologies. The tetraploid and highly heterozygous draft genome of S. cumini had a total size of 709.9 Mbp with 61,195 coding genes. The phylogenetic position of S. cumini was established using a comprehensive genome-wide analysis including species from 18 Eudicot plant orders. The existence of neopolyploidy in S. cumini was evident from the higher number of coding genes and expanded gene families compared to the other two sequenced species from this genus. Comparative evolutionary analyses showed the adaptive evolution of genes involved in the phenylpropanoid-flavonoid (PF) biosynthesis pathway and other secondary metabolites biosynthesis such as terpenoid and alkaloid in S. cumini, along with genes involved in stress tolerance mechanisms, which was also supported by leaf transcriptome data generated in this study. The adaptive evolution of secondary metabolism pathways is associated with the wide range of pharmacological properties, specifically the anti-diabetic property, of this species conferred by the bioactive compounds that act as nutraceutical agents in modern medicine.
authors: Chakraborty, A.; Mahajan, S.; Bisht, M. S.; Sharma, V. K.

ai.TLDR: Syzygium cumini（jambolan/jamun）的基因组测序揭示了其药用特性与次级代谢途径的适应性进化关联。研究通过Oxford Nanopore和10x Genomics技术首次完成该物种基因组测序，发现其四倍体、高度杂合的基因组特征与苯丙烷-黄酮生物合成途径的基因适应性进化密切相关。
ai.translation: Syzygium cumini（也称为jambolan或jamun）是一种广为人知的常绿树，以其药用特性、果实和观赏价值而闻名。为理解其药用特性背后的基因组和进化基础，我们首次使用Oxford Nanopore和10x Genomics测序技术对Syzygium属最大的树种S. cumini基因组进行测序。该四倍体且高度杂合的草图基因组总大小为709.9 Mbp，包含61,195个编码基因。通过涵盖18个双子叶植物目物种的全基因组分析，确定了S. cumini的系统发育位置。与该属其他两个测序物种相比，S. cumini表现出更高的编码基因数量和扩展的基因家族，表明其存在新多倍体特征。比较进化分析显示，S. cumini中参与苯丙烷-黄酮（PF）生物合成途径及其他次级代谢物（如萜类和生物碱）合成的基因经历了适应性进化，同时涉及胁迫耐受机制的基因也表现出类似特征，这一结论由本研究生成的叶转录组数据支持。次级代谢途径的适应性进化与该物种广泛的药理特性相关，特别是由生物活性化合物介导的抗糖尿病特性，这些化合物在现代医学中作为营养补充剂发挥作用。

title: High quality genome assembly and annotation (v1) of the eukaryotic terrestrial microalga Coccomyxa viridis SAG 216-4
abstract: Unicellular green algae of the genus Coccomyxa are recognized for their worldwide distribution and ecological versatility. Most species described to date live in close association with various host species, such as in lichen associations. However, little is known about the molecular mechanisms that drive such symbiotic lifestyles. We generated a high-quality genome assembly for the lichen photobiont Coccomyxa viridis SAG 216-4 (formerly C. mucigena). Using long-read PacBio HiFi and Oxford Nanopore Technologies in combination with chromatin conformation capture (Hi-C) sequencing, we assembled the genome into 21 scaffolds with a total length of 50.9 Mb, an N50 of 2.7 Mb and a BUSCO score of 98.6%. While 19 scaffolds represent full-length nuclear chromosomes, two additional scaffolds represent the mitochondrial and plastid genomes. Transcriptome-guided gene annotation resulted in the identification of 13,557 protein-coding genes, of which 68% have annotated PFAM domains and 962 are predicted to be secreted.
authors: Kraege, A.; Chavarro-Carrero, E.; Guiglielmoni, N.; Schnell, E.; Kirangwa, J.; Heilmann-Heimbach, S.; Becker, K.; Kohrer, K.; WGGC Team,  ; DeRGA Community,  ; Schiffer, P.; Thomma, B. P.; Rovenich, H.

ai.TLDR: Coccomyxa属绿藻因全球分布和生态适应性而被关注，其与地衣宿主的共生关系尚缺乏分子机制研究。本研究通过PacBio HiFi、Oxford Nanopore和Hi-C测序技术，首次完成Coccomyxa viridis高质量基因组组装，揭示了其核、线粒体和叶绿体基因组结构。
ai.translation: Coccomyxa属单细胞绿藻因其全球分布和生态适应性而被广泛研究，多数已描述物种与多种宿主形成紧密共生关系，如地衣共生系统。然而，驱动此类共生生活方式的分子机制仍不清楚。本研究对地衣光合共生体Coccomyxa viridis SAG 216-4（原名C. mucigena）进行了高质量基因组组装。通过结合长读长PacBio HiFi测序、Oxford Nanopore测序技术以及染色质构象捕获（Hi-C）测序，成功将基因组组装为21个scaffold，总长度达50.9 Mb，N50值为2.7 Mb，BUSCO评分为98.6%。其中19个scaffold代表完整的核染色体，另外2个scaffold分别对应线粒体和叶绿体基因组。基于转录组引导的基因注释共鉴定出13,557个蛋白质编码基因，其中68%具有注释的PFAM结构域，962个基因被预测为分泌蛋白。

title: Long-read sequencing reveals the complex structure of extra dic(21;21) chromosome and its biological effects
abstract: Complex congenital chromosome abnormalities are rare but often cause severe symptoms. However, the structures and biological impacts of such abnormalities have seldomly been analyzed at the molecular level. Previously, we reported a Japanese female patient with severe developmental defects. The patient had an extra dicentric chromosome 21 (chr21) consisting of two partial chr21 copies fused together within their long arms along with two centromeres and many copy number changes. In this study, we performed whole-genome, transcriptional, and DNA methylation analyses, coupled with novel bioinformatic approaches, to reveal the complex structure of the extra chromosome and its transcriptional and epigenetic changes. Long-read sequencing accurately identified the structures of junctions related to the copy number changes in extra chr21 and suggested the mechanism of the structural changes. Our transcriptome analysis showed the overexpression of genes in extra chr21. Additionally, an allele-specific DNA methylation analysis of the long-read sequencing data suggested that the centromeric region of extra chr21 was hypermethylated, a property associated with the inactivation of one centromere in the extra chromosome. Our comprehensive analysis provides insights into the molecular mechanism underlying the generation of the extra chromosome and its pathogenic roles.
authors: Kugui Yoshida-Tanaka, Ko Ikemoto, ... Akihiro Fujimoto
citation: Yoshida-Tanaka, K., Ikemoto, K., Kuribayashi, R. et al. Long-read sequencing reveals the complex structure of extra dic(21;21) chromosome and its biological effects. Hum. Genet. 142 , 1375–1384 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00439-023-02583-9
description: Complex congenital chromosome abnormalities are rare but often cause severe symptoms. However, the structures and biological impacts of such...

ai.TLDR: 复杂先天性染色体异常虽罕见但常导致严重症状，本研究通过多组学分析揭示了额外双着丝粒染色体21的结构特征及其致病机制。研究发现该异常染色体存在拷贝数变化、基因过表达及着丝粒区高甲基化等表观遗传改变。
ai.translation: 复杂先天性染色体异常虽罕见但常导致严重症状。然而，此类异常的结构特征及生物学影响在分子层面鲜有分析。此前我们报道了一例日本女性患者，其存在严重发育缺陷，该患者携带由两个部分染色体21片段在长臂融合形成的额外双着丝粒染色体21（chr21），包含两个着丝粒和大量拷贝数变化。本研究通过全基因组、转录组及DNA甲基化分析，结合新型生物信息学方法，揭示了额外染色体的复杂结构及其转录和表观遗传变化。长读长测序技术精准识别了额外chr21拷贝数变化相关连接点的结构，提示了结构变化的机制。转录组分析显示额外chr21基因呈现过表达现象。此外，基于长读长测序数据的等位基因特异性DNA甲基化分析表明，额外chr21的着丝粒区呈现高甲基化特征，这一特性与额外染色体中一个着丝粒的失活相关。本研究的综合分析为理解额外染色体的生成机制及其致病作用提供了新见解。

title: Nanopore Adaptive Sampling Enriches for Antimicrobial Resistance Genes in Microbial Communities
abstract: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is a global public health threat. Environmental microbial communities act as reservoirs for AMR, containing genes associated with resistance, their precursors, and the selective pressures to encourage their persistence. Genomic surveillance could provide insight into how these reservoirs are changing and their impact on public health. The ability to enrich for AMR genomic signatures in complex microbial communities would strengthen surveillance efforts and reduce time-to-answer. Here, we test the ability of nanopore sequencing and adaptive sampling to enrich for AMR genes in a mock community of environmental origin. Our setup implemented the MinION mk1B, an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier GPU, and flongle flow cells. We observed consistent enrichment by composition when using adaptive sampling. On average, adaptive sampling resulted in a target composition that was 4x higher than a treatment without adaptive sampling. Despite a decrease in total sequencing output, the use of adaptive sampling increased target yield in most replicates.
authors: Wrenn, D. C.; Drown, D. M.

ai.TLDR: 抗微生物耐药性（AMR）是全球公共卫生威胁，环境微生物群作为耐药基因储存库。本研究通过纳米孔测序和自适应采样技术，成功在模拟环境中富集AMR基因，结果显示自适应采样显著提升目标基因检测效率。
ai.translation: 抗微生物耐药性（AMR）是全球公共卫生威胁。环境微生物群落作为AMR基因库，包含耐药基因、其前体及选择压力。基因组监测能够揭示这些储存库的变化及其对公共卫生的影响。本研究测试纳米孔测序与自适应采样技术在环境来源模拟群落中富集AMR基因的能力。实验采用MinION mk1B设备、NVIDIA Jetson Xavier GPU及flongle流细胞。结果表明，自适应采样在成分分析中表现出一致的富集效果。平均而言，自适应采样使目标成分浓度比无自适应采样处理高出4倍。尽管总测序输出量下降，但自适应采样在多数重复实验中显著提升了目标基因产量。

title: Decomposing a San Francisco Estuary microbiome using long read metagenomics reveals species and species- and strain-level dominance from picoeukaryotes to viruses
abstract:
Although long read sequencing has enabled obtaining high-quality and complete prokaryotic genomes from metagenomes, many challenges still remain to completely decompose a metagenome into its constituent genomes. These challenges include obtaining enough biomass, high-molecular weight DNA extraction, determining the appropriate depth of sequencing, and bioinformatics challenges to separate closely related genomes. This study focuses on decomposing an estuarine water metagenome from USGS Station 36 in the South San Francisco Bay into its constituent genomes and counting the number of organisms present. To achieve this, we developed a new bead-based DNA extraction method, a novel bin refinement method, and sequenced the sample with 150 Gbases of nanopore sequencing. With our results, we were able to estimate that there are [~]500 bacteria and archaeal species in our sample, obtain 68 high-quality bins (>90% complete, <5% contamination, [≤]5 contigs, no contigs shorter than 100 Kbases, and all ribosomal and necessary tRNA genes). Since we pre-filtered the sample at 11m and then collected directly on to a 0.1m filter, we also obtained many contigs of picoeukaryotes, environmental DNA of larger eukaryotes such as mammals, complete mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes, and detected [~]40,000 viral populations. This deep analysis of the taxonomy of the sample down to the strain and individual contig level allowed us to find that among picoeukaryotes, prokaryotes, and viruses there are likely only a few strains that comprise most of the species abundances. These results also indicate that to truly decompose a metagenome into its constituent genomes, we likely need 1Tbase of sequencing.

If you are reading this preprint, know that this is the paper we wanted to write, but it will likely be shortened for submission to a journal.
authors: Lui, L. M.; Nielsen, T. N.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过开发新型珠式DNA提取方法和bin优化技术，结合纳米孔测序技术，成功解析了美国南湾USGS站36的河口水宏基因组，揭示了微生物群落的组成特征。结果表明，仅需1Tbase测序量即可实现宏基因组的完整分解。
ai.translation: 尽管长读长测序技术已能从宏基因组中获取高质量且完整的原核生物基因组，但完全分解宏基因组仍面临诸多挑战。这些挑战包括获取足够生物量、高分子量DNA提取、确定合适的测序深度以及生物信息学分析中分离紧密相关基因组的困难。本研究聚焦于解析美国南湾USGS站36的河口水宏基因组，统计其中存在的生物种类数量。为实现这一目标，我们开发了新型珠式DNA提取方法、创新的bin优化技术，并采用150 Gbases的纳米孔测序技术对样本进行测序。研究结果表明，样本中约有500种细菌和古菌，获得了68个高质量的基因组（>90%完整度，<5%污染率，≤5个contigs，无短于100 Kbases的contigs，包含所有核糖体和必要tRNA基因）。由于我们在11m处预过滤后直接收集到0.1m滤膜上，还获得了大量微微真核生物contigs、大型真核生物环境DNA（如哺乳动物）、完整的线粒体和叶绿体基因组，并检测到约40,000个病毒种群。对样本分类学的深度分析（至菌株和单个contig水平）表明，微微真核生物、原核生物和病毒中可能仅有少数菌株构成了大部分物种丰度。这些结果也表明，要真正分解宏基因组，可能需要1Tbase的测序量。若您正在阅读本预印本，请知悉这是我们希望撰写的论文，但最终投稿期刊时可能会进行缩短。

title: A CRISPR-based strategy for targeted sequencing in biodiversity science
abstract: Many applications in molecular ecology require the ability to match specific DNA sequences from single- or mixed-species samples to a diagnostic reference library. Widely used methods for DNA barcoding and metabarcoding require PCR and amplicon sequencing to identify taxa based on target sequences, but the target-specific enrichment capabilities of CRISPR-Cas systems may offer advantages in some applications. We identified 54,837 CRISPR-Cas guide RNAs that may be useful for enriching chloroplast DNA across phylogenetically diverse plant species. We then tested a subset of 17 guide RNAs in vitro to enrich and sequence plant DNA strands ranging in size from diagnostic DNA barcodes of 1,428 bp to entire chloroplast genomes of 121,284 bp. We used an Oxford Nanopore sequencer to evaluate sequencing success based on both single- and mixed-species samples, which yielded mean on-target chloroplast sequence lengths of 5,755-11,367 bp, depending on the experiment. Single-species experiments yielded more on-target sequence reads and greater accuracy, but mixed-species experiments yielded superior coverage. Comparing CRISPR-based strategies to a widely used protocol for plant DNA metabarcoding with the chloroplast trnL-P6 marker, we obtained a 66-fold increase in sequence length and markedly better estimates of relative abundance for a commercially prepared mixture of plant species. Future work would benefit from developing both in vitro and in silico methods for analyses of mixed-species samples, especially when the appropriate reference genomes for contig assembly cannot be known a priori. Prior work developed CRISPR-based enrichment protocols for long-read sequencing and our experiments pioneered its use for plant DNA barcoding and chromosome assemblies that may have advantages over workflows that require PCR and short-read sequencing.
authors: Littleford-Colquhoun, B. L.; Kartzinel, T. R.

ai.TLDR: 分子生态学研究需要将单/混合物种样本的特定DNA序列匹配到诊断参考库，传统PCR和测序方法存在局限。本研究筛选出54,837个可能用于富集叶绿体DNA的CRISPR-Cas引导RNA，并验证了其在不同规模DNA片段（1,428 bp至121,284 bp）的富集效果。实验显示CRISPR策略在混合样本中实现更优覆盖度，且序列长度和丰度估计显著优于传统方法。
ai.translation: 分子生态学的许多应用需要将单物种或混合物种样本中的特定DNA序列与诊断参考库进行匹配。广泛使用的DNA条形码和宏条形码方法依赖PCR和扩增子测序来基于目标序列识别分类群，但CRISPR-Cas系统的靶向特异性富集能力可能在某些应用中具有优势。我们筛选出54,837个可能用于跨系统发育多样植物物种富集叶绿体DNA的CRISPR-Cas引导RNA。随后我们测试了17个引导RNA在体外对植物DNA片段（从1,428 bp的诊断DNA条形码到121,284 bp的完整叶绿体基因组）的富集和测序效果。使用牛津纳米孔测序仪评估了单物种和混合物种样本的测序成功率，结果显示目标叶绿体序列长度平均为5,755-11,367 bp（取决于实验）。单物种实验获得更多目标序列读数和更高准确性，但混合物种实验实现更优覆盖度。与传统基于chloroplast trnL-P6标记的植物DNA宏条形码协议相比，CRISPR策略在商业制备的植物物种混合样本中实现了66倍的序列长度提升和显著更精确的相对丰度估计。未来研究应开发体外和计算机模拟方法分析混合物种样本，特别是当无法预先知道用于拼接的参考基因组时。先前研究已开发基于CRISPR的长读长测序富集协议，而我们的实验开创了其在植物DNA条形码和染色体组装中的应用，这可能比需要PCR和短读长测序的工作流更具优势。

title: A survey of algorithms for the detection of genomic structural variants from long-read sequencing data
abstract: As long-read sequencing technologies are becoming increasingly popular, a number of methods have been developed for the discovery and analysis of structural variants (SVs) from long reads. Long reads enable detection of SVs that could not be previously detected from short-read sequencing, but computational methods must adapt to the unique challenges and opportunities presented by long-read sequencing. Here, we summarize over 50 long-read-based methods for SV detection, genotyping and visualization, and discuss how new telomere-to-telomere genome assemblies and pangenome efforts can improve the accuracy and drive the development of SV callers in the future.
authors: Mian Umair Ahsan, Qian Liu, ... Kai Wang
citation: Ahsan, M.U., Liu, Q., Perdomo, J.E. et al. A survey of algorithms for the detection of genomic structural variants from long-read sequencing data. Nat Methods 20 , 1143–1158 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-023-01932-w
description: As long-read sequencing technologies are becoming increasingly popular, a number of methods have been developed for the discovery and analysis of...

ai.TLDR: 随着长读长测序技术的普及，研究人员开发了多种方法用于结构变异（SVs）的发现与分析。长读长测序能够检测短读长测序无法识别的SVs，但计算方法需适应其独特挑战。本文总结了50余种基于长读长测序的SV检测方法，并探讨了端到端基因组组装和泛基因组研究对提升SV检测准确性的潜在价值。
ai.translation: 随着长读长测序技术的广泛应用，研究者已开发出多种用于结构变异（Structural Variants, SVs）发现与分析的方法。长读长测序技术能够检测短读长测序技术无法识别的SVs类型，但计算方法必须适应长读长测序带来的独特挑战与机遇。本文系统总结了超过50种基于长读长测序的SV检测、基因分型及可视化方法，并探讨了新型端到端基因组组装技术与泛基因组研究如何提升SV检测准确性，以及这些进展对未来SV检测工具开发的推动作用。

title: Phylogenetic placement of Ceratophyllum submersum based on a complete plastome sequence derived from nanopore long read sequencing data
abstract:
ObjectiveEutrophication poses a mounting concern in todays world. Ceratophyllum submersum L. is one of many plants capable of living in eutrophic conditions, therefore it could play a critical role in addressing the problem of eutrophication. This study aimed to take a first genomic look at C. submersum.

ResultsSequencing of gDNA from C. submersum yielded enough reads to assemble a plastome. Subsequent annotation and phylogenetic analysis validated existing information regarding angiosperm relationships and the positioning of Ceratophylalles in a wider phylogenetic context.
authors: Meckoni, S. N.; Nass, B.; Pucker, B.

ai.TLDR: 水体富营养化是当前全球面临的严峻生态问题，Ceratophyllum submersum作为耐富营养化植物具有生态修复潜力。本研究首次通过基因组分析揭示其叶绿体基因组特征，验证了被子植物系统发育关系及Ceratophylalles类群的进化定位。
ai.translation:
研究目标：水体富营养化是当今世界日益严重的环境问题。Ceratophyllum submersum L. 是众多能在富营养化条件下生存的植物之一，因此它可能在解决富营养化问题中发挥关键作用。本研究旨在对C. submersum进行首次基因组层面的探索。

研究结果：从C. submersum中提取的基因组DNA（gDNA）测序产生了足够的reads以组装叶绿体基因组。随后的注释和系统发育分析验证了现有被子植物间关系的信息，并确认了Ceratophylalles在更广泛的系统发育背景中的定位。

title: Universal whole-genome Oxford nanopore sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 using tiled amplicons
abstract: We developed a comprehensive multiplexed set of primers adapted for the Oxford Nanopore Rapid Barcoding library kit that allows universal SARS-CoV-2 genome sequencing. This primer set is designed to set up any variants of the primers pool for whole-genome sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 using single- or double-tiled amplicons from 1.2 to 4.8 kb with the Oxford Nanopore. This multiplexed set of primers is also applicable for tasks like targeted SARS-CoV-2 genome sequencing. We proposed here an optimized protocol to synthesize cDNA using Maxima H Minus Reverse Transcriptase with a set of SARS-CoV-2 specific primers, which has high yields of cDNA template for RNA and is capable of long-length cDNA synthesis from a wide range of RNA amounts and quality. The proposed protocol allows whole-genome sequencing of the SARS-CoV-2 virus with tiled amplicons up to 4.8 kb on low-titer virus samples and even where RNA degradation has occurred. This protocol reduces the time and cost from RNA to genome sequence compared to the Midnight multiplex PCR method for SARS-CoV-2 genome sequencing using the Oxford Nanopore.
authors: Ruslan Kalendar, Ulykbek Kairov, ... Dos Sarbassov
citation: Kalendar, R., Kairov, U., Karabayev, D. et al. Universal whole-genome Oxford nanopore sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 using tiled amplicons. Sci Rep 13 , 10334 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-023-37588-x
description: We developed a comprehensive multiplexed set of primers adapted for the Oxford Nanopore Rapid Barcoding library kit that allows universal SARS-CoV-2...

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一套适用于Oxford Nanopore快速条形码库试剂盒的多重引物集合，可实现SARS-CoV-2全基因组通用测序。该方法通过单/双覆盖扩增子（1.2-4.8kb）支持病毒变异体的全基因组测序，并优化了Maxima H Minus逆转录酶的cDNA合成协议，显著提升低浓度样本和降解RNA的测序效率。
ai.translation: 我们开发了一套全面的多重引物集合，适用于Oxford Nanopore Rapid Barcoding库试剂盒，可实现SARS-CoV-2全基因组通用测序。该引物集合设计用于通过单覆盖或双覆盖扩增子（长度范围1.2-4.8kb）进行SARS-CoV-2全基因组测序，支持任何变异体的引物池设置。该多重引物集合也可用于靶向SARS-CoV-2全基因组测序等任务。本文提出了一种优化的cDNA合成协议，使用Maxima H Minus逆转录酶配合SARS-CoV-2特异性引物集合，该方法可从广泛范围的RNA量和质量中高效合成长片段cDNA模板。该协议使低浓度病毒样本及RNA降解情况下仍能实现SARS-CoV-2全基因组测序，通过tiled扩增子达到4.8kb长度。与Midnight多重PCR方法相比，该协议显著降低了从RNA到基因组序列的耗时和成本。

title: Rapid species discovery and identification with real-time barcoding facilitated by ONTbarcoder 2.0 and Oxford Nanopore R10.4
abstract: Most arthropod species are undescribed and hidden in biodiversity samples that are difficult to sort to species using morphological characters. Sorting specimens to putative species with DNA barcodes is an attractive alternative, but needs cost-effective techniques that are suitable for use in many laboratories around the world. Barcoding with Oxford Nanopores portable and inexpensive MinION sequencers could be a good presorting approach because it reduces the space and capital cost of a fully functional barcoding laboratory. Similarly important would be user-friendly and reliable software for analysis of the ONT data. It is here provided in the form of an updated ONTbarcoder that is available for all commonly used operating systems and includes a GUI. The new version of ONTbarcoder has three key improvements related to the higher read quality obtained with ONTs latest basecallers and chemistry (R10.4 flow cells, Q20+ kits). Firstly, ONTbarcoder can now deliver real-time barcoding to complement ONTs real-time sequencing. This means that the first barcodes are obtained within minutes of starting a sequencing run and a significant proportion of barcodes are available before sequencing completes. This real-time feature of ONTbarcoder can be configured to handle both Mk1B and Mk1C sequencers. The input is a demultiplexing sheet and sequencing data (raw or basecalled). Secondly, the improved read quality of ONTs latest flow cells (R10.4) allows for the use of primers with shorter indices than those previously needed (9 bp vs. 12-13 bp). This decreases primer cost and improves PCR success rates. Thirdly, we demonstrate that the availability of R10.4 chemistry in the low-cost Flongle flow cell is an attractive option for users who require only 200-250 barcodes at a time.
authors: Srivathsan, A.; Feng, V.; Ramos, D.; Meier, R.

ai.TLDR: 当前节肢动物物种描述存在困难，DNA条形码技术结合便携式MinION测序仪提供低成本解决方案。ONTbarcoder软件通过实时条形码生成和优化引物设计显著提升分析效率。
ai.translation: 大多数节肢动物物种尚未被描述，传统形态学分类方法难以在生物多样性样本中准确区分物种。使用DNA条形码技术对样本进行物种鉴定是一种有吸引力的替代方案，但需要成本效益高的技术以适应全球实验室应用。Oxford Nanopores便携式且价格低廉的MinION测序仪可作为预分类方法，因其能降低完整条形码实验室的空间和资本成本。同样重要的是需要用户友好且可靠的软件分析ONT测序数据。本文提供了更新的ONTbarcoder软件，适用于所有常见操作系统并包含图形用户界面。新版本ONTbarcoder有三项关键改进：1) 利用ONT最新碱基调用器和化学试剂（R10.4流细胞，Q20+试剂盒）获得的更高读取质量，可实现实时条形码生成，使测序运行开始后数分钟内即可获得首个条形码，且显著比例的条形码在测序完成前即可获取，该实时功能支持Mk1B和Mk1C测序仪；2) R10.4流细胞的改进读取质量允许使用比之前所需的更短索引引物（9 bp vs. 12-13 bp），降低引物成本并提高PCR成功率；3) 证明R10.4化学试剂在低成本Flongle流细胞中的可用性，为每次仅需200-250条形码的用户提供经济选择。

title: Rapid nanopore metagenomic sequencing and predictive susceptibility testing of positive blood cultures from intensive care patients with sepsis
abstract:
BackgroundDirect metagenomic sequencing from positive blood culture (BC) broths, to identify bacteria and predict antimicrobial susceptibility, has been previously demonstrated using Illumina-based methods, but is relatively slow. We aimed to evaluate this approach using nanopore sequencing to provide more rapid results.

MethodsPatients with suspected sepsis in 4 intensive care units were prospectively enrolled. Human-depleted DNA was extracted from positive BC broths and sequenced using nanopore (MinION). Species abundance was estimated using Kraken2, and a cloud-based artificial intelligence (AI) system (AREScloud) provided in silico antimicrobial susceptibility testing (AST) from assembled contigs. These results were compared to conventional identification and phenotypic AST.

ResultsGenus-level agreement between conventional methods and metagenomic whole genome sequencing (MG-WGS) was 96.2% (50/52), but increased to 100% in monomicrobial infections. In total, 262 high quality AREScloud AST predictions across 24 samples were made, exhibiting categorical agreement (CA) of 89.3%, with major error (MA) and very major error (VME) rates of 10.5% and 12.1%, respectively. Over 90% CA was achieved for some taxa (e.g. Staphylococcus aureus), but was suboptimal for Pseudomonas aeruginosa (CA 50%). In 470 AST predictions across 42 samples, with both high quality and exploratory-only predictions, overall CA, ME and VME rates were 87.7%, 8.3% and 28.4%. VME rates were inflated by false susceptibility calls in a small number of species / antibiotic combinations with few representative resistant isolates. Time to reporting from MG-WGS could be achieved within 8-16 hours from blood culture positivity.

ConclusionsDirect metagenomic sequencing from positive BC broths is feasible and can provide accurate predictive AST for some species and antibiotics, but is sub-optimal for a subset of common pathogens, with unacceptably high VME rates. Nanopore-based approaches may be faster but improvements in accuracy are required before it can be considered for clinical use. New developments in nanopore sequencing technology, and training of AI algorithms on larger and more diverse datasets may improve performance.
authors: Harris, P. N. A.; Bauer, M. J.; Lueftinger, L.; Beisken, S.; Forde, B. M.; Balch, R.; Cotta, M. O.; Schlapbach, L.; Raman, S.; Shekar, K.; Kruger, P.; Lipman, J.; Bialasiewicz, S.; Coin, L. J. M.; Roberts, J. A.; Paterson, D. L.; Irwin, A. D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序技术在阳性血液培养物中直接进行宏基因组测序的可行性，旨在提供更快速的抗生素敏感性预测。结果显示该方法在部分菌种和抗生素预测中准确，但对常见病原体存在较高严重错误率。
ai.translation:
背景：直接从阳性血液培养（BC）培养物中进行宏基因组测序以识别细菌并预测抗生素敏感性，此前已通过Illum、llumina方法验证，但存在相对缓慢的问题。本研究旨在评估使用纳米孔测序技术的可行性以提供更快速的结果。

方法：纳入4个重症监护病房中疑似脓毒症的患者进行前瞻性研究。从阳性BC培养物中提取人源基因组DNA并使用纳米孔（MinION）测序。通过Kraken2估算物种丰度，云基人工智能系统（AREScloud）从组装的contigs中提供体外抗生素敏感性测试（AST）结果。将这些结果与传统鉴定和表型AST进行比较。

结果：传统方法与宏基因组全基因组测序（MG-WGS）在属水平的共识为96.2%（50/52），单菌感染时提升至100%。共生成24个样本的262条高质量AREScloud AST预测，分类共识（CA）为89.3%，主要错误（MA）和严重错误（VME）率分别为10.5%和12.1%。某些菌种（如金黄色葡萄球菌）达到超过90%的CA，但铜绿假单胞菌的CA仅为50%。在42个样本的470条AST预测中（含高质量和探索性预测），总体CA、ME和VME率分别为87.7%、8.3%和28.4%。少数菌种/抗生素组合因代表性耐药菌株不足导致VME率虚高。MG-WGS从血液培养阳性到报告的时间可控制在8-16小时内。

结论：直接从阳性BC培养物进行宏基因组测序是可行的，可为部分菌种和抗生素提供准确的预测AST，但对部分常见病原体存在不可接受的高VME率。基于纳米孔的方案可能更快，但在准确率提升前难以用于临床。纳米孔测序技术的新进展及AI算法在更大更多样数据集上的训练可能提升性能。

title: Defining cat mitogenome variation and accounting for numts via multiplex amplification and Nanopore sequencing
abstract: Hair shed by domestic cats is a potentially useful source of forensic evidence. Analysable hair DNA is predominantly mitochondrial, but the recent domestication history of cats means that mtDNA diversity is low. A 402-bp control region segment is usually sequenced, defining only a small number of distinct mitotypes in populations. Previously, we used a long-amplicon approach to sequence whole mitogenomes in a sample of blood DNAs from 119 UK cats, greatly increasing observed diversity and reducing random match probabilities. To exploit this variation for forensic analysis, we here describe a multiplex system that amplifies the cat mitogenome in 60 overlapping amplicons of mean length 360 bp, followed by Nanopore sequencing. Variants detected in multiplex sequence data from hair completely mirror those from long-amplicon data from blood from the same individuals. However, applying the multiplex to matched blood DNA reveals additional sequence variants which derive from the major feline nuclear mitochondrial insertion sequence (numt), which covers 7.9 kb of the 17-kb mitogenome and exists in multiple tandem copies. We use long-amplicon Nanopore sequencing to investigate numt variation in a set of cats, together with an analysis of published genome sequences, and show that numt arrays are variable in both structure and sequence, thus providing a potential source of uncertainty when nuclear DNA predominates in a sample. Forensic application of the test was demonstrated by matching hairs from a cat with skeletal remains from its putative mother, both of which shared a globally common mitotype at the control region. The random match probability (RMP) in this case with the CR 402-bp segment was 0.21 and this decreased to 0.03 when considering the whole mitogenome. The developed multiplex and sequencing approach, when applied to cat hair where nuclear DNA is scarce, can provide a reliable and highly discriminating source of forensic genetic evidence. The confounding effect of numt co-amplification in degraded samples where mixed sequences are observed can be mitigated by variant phasing, and by comparison with numt sequence diversity data, such as those presented here.
authors: Patterson, E.; Matharu Lall, G.; Neumann, R.; Ottolini, B.; Sacchini, F.; Foster, A. P.; Jobling, M. A.; Wetton, J. H.

ai.TLDR: 猫毛作为法医学证据具有潜力，但传统线粒体DNA分析存在多样性不足的问题。本研究通过多路复用系统结合纳米孔测序技术，显著提升线粒体基因组多样性，降低随机匹配概率。研究发现核基因组中的numt序列可能引入不确定性，但通过变异相位分析可有效解决该问题。
ai.translation: 家猫脱落的毛发是潜在的法医学证据来源。可分析的毛发DNA主要为线粒体DNA，但猫的近期驯化历史导致线粒体DNA多样性较低。通常对402-bp控制区片段进行测序，仅能定义少量不同的线粒体类型。此前我们采用长扩增子方法对119只英国猫的血液DNA样本进行全线粒体基因组测序，显著增加观察到的多样性并降低随机匹配概率。为实现法医学分析，本文描述了一种多路复用系统，通过60个平均长度360 bp的重叠扩增子对猫线粒体基因组进行扩增，随后进行纳米孔测序。毛发样本的多路复用测序数据中检测到的变异与同个体血液样本的长扩增子数据完全一致。然而，将多路复用技术应用于匹配的血液DNA时，发现额外的序列变异源自主要猫核基因组线粒体插入序列（numt），该序列覆盖线粒体基因组17 kb中的7.9 kb，并以多拷贝串联形式存在。我们采用长扩增子纳米孔测序技术研究一组猫的numt变异，结合已发表的基因组序列分析，证明numt阵列在结构和序列上均存在变异，因此当核DNA占主导时可能成为不确定性来源。通过匹配一只猫毛发与疑似母亲骨骼遗骸的线粒体类型，验证了该检测方法的法医学应用。在控制区402-bp片段情况下，随机匹配概率（RMP）为0.21，考虑全线粒体基因组后降至0.03。当应用于核DNA稀缺的猫毛样本时，开发的多路复用和测序方法可提供可靠且高度区分性的法医学遗传证据。在降解样本中观察到混合序列时，numt共扩增的干扰效应可通过变异相位分析及与numt序列多样性数据（如本文所示）进行比较来缓解。

title: Using nanopore sequencing to identify fungi from clinical samples with high phylogenetic resolution
abstract: The study of microbiota has been revolutionized by the development of DNA metabarcoding. This sequence-based approach enables the direct detection of microorganisms without the need for culture and isolation, which significantly reduces analysis time and offers more comprehensive taxonomic profiles across broad phylogenetic lineages. While there has been an accumulating number of researches on bacteria, molecular phylogenetic analysis of fungi still remains challenging due to the lack of standardized tools and the incompleteness of reference databases limiting the accurate and precise identification of fungal taxa. Here, we present a DNA metabarcoding workflow for characterizing fungal microbiota with high taxonomic resolution. This method involves amplifying longer stretches of ribosomal RNA operons and sequencing them using nanopore long-read sequencing technology. The resulting reads were error-polished to generate consensus sequences with 99.5–100% accuracy, which were then aligned against reference genome assemblies. The efficacy of this method was explored using a polymicrobial mock community and patient-derived specimens, demonstrating the marked potential of long-read sequencing combined with consensus calling for accurate taxonomic classification. Our approach offers a powerful tool for the rapid identification of pathogenic fungi and has the promise to significantly improve our understanding of the role of fungi in health and disease.
authors: Atsufumi Ohta, Kenichiro Nishi, ... Yoshiyuki Matsuo
citation: Ohta, A., Nishi, K., Hirota, K. et al. Using nanopore sequencing to identify fungi from clinical samples with high phylogenetic resolution. Sci Rep 13 , 9785 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-023-37016-0
description: The study of microbiota has been revolutionized by the development of DNA metabarcoding. This sequence-based approach enables the direct detection of...

ai.TLDR: DNA宏条形码技术革新了微生物组研究，通过无需培养的序列分析显著提升检测效率。针对真菌分子系统发育分析的挑战，本研究提出结合纳米孔长读长测序与共识序列构建的新方法，实现了高精度的真菌分类。
ai.translation: 微生物组研究因DNA宏条形码技术的发展而发生革命性变化。这种基于序列的方法能够直接检测微生物，无需培养和分离，显著缩短分析时间并提供更全面的分类学谱系。尽管细菌相关研究已积累大量成果，但真菌的分子系统发育分析仍面临挑战，这归因于标准化工具的缺乏和参考数据库的不完善，限制了真菌分类的准确性和精确性。本研究提出了一种高分类分辨率的真菌微生物组特征分析工作流程。该方法通过扩增更长的核糖体RNA操纵子区域，并使用纳米孔长读长测序技术进行测序。所得序列经错误校正后生成准确度达99.5-100%的共识序列，随后与参考基因组组装进行比对。通过多菌种模拟社区和患者样本验证了该方法的有效性，证明长读长测序结合共识序列构建在准确分类中的显著潜力。本方法为病原真菌的快速鉴定提供了强大工具，有望显著提升我们对真菌在健康与疾病中作用的理解。

title: Applications of long-read sequencing to Mendelian genetics
abstract: Advances in clinical genetic testing, including the introduction of exome sequencing, have uncovered the molecular etiology for many rare and previously unsolved genetic disorders, yet more than half of individuals with a suspected genetic disorder remain unsolved after complete clinical evaluation. A precise genetic diagnosis may guide clinical treatment plans, allow families to make informed care decisions, and permit individuals to participate in N-of-1 trials; thus, there is high interest in developing new tools and techniques to increase the solve rate. Long-read sequencing (LRS) is a promising technology for both increasing the solve rate and decreasing the amount of time required to make a precise genetic diagnosis. Here, we summarize current LRS technologies, give examples of how they have been used to evaluate complex genetic variation and identify missing variants, and discuss future clinical applications of LRS. As costs continue to decrease, LRS will find additional utility in the clinical space fundamentally changing how pathological variants are discovered and eventually acting as a single-data source that can be interrogated multiple times for clinical service.
authors: Francesco Kumara Mastrorosa, Danny E. Miller, Evan E. Eichler
citation: Mastrorosa, F.K., Miller, D.E. & Eichler, E.E. Applications of long-read sequencing to Mendelian genetics. Genome Med 15 , 42 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-023-01194-3
description: Advances in clinical genetic testing, including the introduction of exome sequencing, have uncovered the molecular etiology for many rare and...

ai.TLDR: 临床基因检测技术的进步，如外显子组测序，已揭示许多罕见遗传病的分子病因，但仍有超过半数疑似遗传病患者无法确诊。长读长测序（LRS）作为提升诊断率和缩短诊断时间的新兴技术，正在改变临床遗传检测的范式。
ai.translation: 临床遗传检测技术的进展，包括外显子组测序的引入，已揭示了许多罕见且此前未解遗传病的分子病因。然而，经过完整临床评估后，仍有超过半数疑似遗传病患者未能获得明确诊断。精准的遗传诊断可指导临床治疗方案，使家庭做出知情护理决策，并允许个体参与N-of-1试验；因此，开发新工具和技术以提高诊断率具有重要价值。长读长测序（Long-read Sequencing, LRS）是提升诊断率并缩短精准遗传诊断所需时间的有前景技术。本文总结当前LRS技术，举例说明其如何用于评估复杂遗传变异并识别缺失变异，并探讨LRS的未来临床应用。随着成本持续下降，LRS将在临床领域发挥更大作用，从根本上改变病理变异的发现方式，最终成为可多次查询的单一数据源以支持临床服务。

title: Mitogenome sequences of domestic cats demonstrate lineage expansions and dynamic mutation processes in a mitochondrial minisatellite
