abstract: As a population genetic tool, mitochondrial DNA is commonly divided into the [~]1-kb control region (CR), in which single nucleotide variant (SNV) diversity is relatively high, and the coding region, in which selective constraint is greater and diversity lower, but which provides an informative phylogeny. In some species, the CR contains variable tandemly repeated sequences that are understudied due to heteroplasmy. Domestic cats (Felis catus) have a recent origin and therefore traditional CR-based analysis of populations yields only a small number of haplotypes. To increase resolution we used Nanopore sequencing to analyse 119 cat mitogenomes via a long-amplicon approach. This greatly improves discrimination (from 15 to 87 distinct haplotypes) and defines a phylogeny showing similar starlike topologies within all cat haplogroups, likely reflecting post-domestication expansion. We sequenced RS2, a CR tandem array of 80-bp repeat units, placing RS2 array structures within the phylogeny and increasing overall haplotype diversity. Repeat number varies between 3 and 12 (median: 4) with over 30 different repeat unit types differing largely by SNVs. Five SNVs show evidence of independent recurrence within the phylogeny, and seven are involved in at least 11 instances of rapid spread along repeat arrays within haplogroups. In defining mitogenome variation our study provides key information for the forensic genetic analysis of cat hair evidence, and for the first time a phylogenetically informed picture of tandem repeat variation that reveals remarkably dynamic mutation processes at work in the mitochondrion.
authors: Patterson, E. C.; Matharu Lall, G.; Neumann, R.; Ottolini, B.; Batini, C.; Sacchini, F.; Foster, A. P.; Wetton, J. H.; Jobling, M. A.

ai.TLDR: 线粒体DNA作为群体遗传工具，其控制区（CR）因单核苷酸变异（SNV）多样性高而被广泛研究，但编码区因选择约束导致多样性较低。本研究通过Nanopore长片段测序技术分析119只家猫的线粒体基因组，显著提升单倍型分辨率（从15增至87种），揭示了家猫群体中星形拓扑结构的系统发育特征，同时发现串联重复序列的动态突变机制。
ai.translation: 作为一种群体遗传工具，线粒体DNA通常被划分为约1 kb的控制区（CR），该区域因单核苷酸变异（SNV）多样性较高而被广泛研究，而编码区则因存在更强的选择约束导致多样性较低，但能提供具有信息量的系统发育关系。在某些物种中，CR包含可变的串联重复序列，由于异质性（heteroplasmy）原因尚未被充分研究。家猫（Felis catus）具有较近的起源，因此基于传统CR分析的群体研究仅能获得少量单倍型。为提高分辨率，本研究采用Nanopore测序技术通过长片段扩增方法分析了119只猫的线粒体基因组。该方法显著提升了单倍型区分能力（从15种增至87种），并定义了显示所有猫单倍群中相似星形拓扑结构的系统发育关系，这种特征可能反映了家猫驯化后的扩张过程。我们进一步测序了RS2，这是一种由80 bp重复单元组成的CR串联阵列，将RS2阵列结构纳入系统发育分析中，从而提升了整体单倍型多样性。重复单元数量在3至12个之间（中位数为4），超过30种不同的重复单元类型主要通过SNV差异区分。有5个SNV在系统发育中显示出独立重复的证据，另有7个SNV参与了至少11次在单倍群内重复阵列中的快速传播事件。本研究通过定义线粒体基因组变异，为猫毛发证据的法医遗传分析提供了关键信息，并首次揭示了串联重复变异的系统发育图景，展示了线粒体中显著动态的突变过程。

title: Performance analysis of conventional and AI-based variant callers using short and long reads
abstract: The accurate detection of variants is essential for genomics-based studies. Currently, there are various tools designed to detect genomic variants, however, it has always been a challenge to decide which tool to use, especially when various major genome projects have chosen to use different tools. Thus far, most of the existing tools were mainly developed to work on short-read data (i.e., Illumina); however, other sequencing technologies (e.g. PacBio, and Oxford Nanopore) have recently shown that they can also be used for variant calling. In addition, with the emergence of artificial intelligence (AI)-based variant calling tools, there is a pressing need to compare these tools in terms of efficiency, accuracy, computational power, and ease of use. In this study, we evaluated the most widely used conventional and AI-based variant calling tools (BCFTools, GATK4, Platypus, DNAscope, and DeepVariant) in terms of accuracy and computational cost using both short-read and long-read data derived from three different sequencing technologies for the same set of samples from the Genome In A Bottle (GIAB) project. The analysis showed that AI-based variant calling tools supersede conventional ones for calling SNVs and INDELs using both long and short reads. In addition, we demonstrate the advantages and drawbacks of each tool while ranking them in each aspect of these comparisons. This study provides best practices for variant calling using AI-based and conventional variant callers with different types of sequencing data.
authors: Abdelwahab, O.; Belzile, F.; Torkamaneh, D.

ai.TLDR: 基因组学研究依赖于准确的变异检测，但传统工具与AI工具在不同测序技术下的表现差异显著。本研究通过对比分析，证实AI工具在短读长和长读长数据中均能超越传统方法，为变异检测提供了最佳实践方案。
ai.translation: 准确检测变异对于基于基因组学的研究至关重要。目前存在多种基因组变异检测工具，但选择合适工具始终是挑战，尤其当不同主要基因组项目采用不同工具时。现有大多数工具主要针对短读长数据（如Illumina）开发，而PacBio和Oxford Nanopore等长读长测序技术近期显示出在变异检测中的潜力。随着基于人工智能（AI）的变异检测工具的出现，亟需从效率、准确性、计算能力和易用性等方面进行工具比较。本研究评估了当前最常用的常规和AI-based变异检测工具（BCFTools、GATK4、Platypus、DNAscope和DeepVariant），使用来自Genome In A Bottle（GIAB）项目同一批样本的三种不同测序技术产生的短读长和长读长数据，分析其准确性和计算成本。结果表明，基于AI的变异检测工具在短读长和长读长数据中均能超越传统方法进行SNVs和INDELs检测。此外，我们展示了每种工具的优势与局限性，并在各项比较指标中进行排名。本研究为不同测序数据类型的AI-based和常规变异检测工具提供了最佳实践方案。

title: Long-read sequencing revealing intragenic deletions in exome-negative spastic paraplegias
abstract: Hereditary spastic paraplegias (HSPs) are a heterogeneous group of neurodegenerative disorders characterized by progressive spasticity and weakness in the lower extremities. To date, a total of 88 types of SPG are known. To diagnose HSP, multiple technologies, including microarray, direct sequencing, multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification, and short-read next-generation sequencing, are often chosen based on the frequency of HSP subtypes. Exome sequencing (ES) is commonly used. We used ES to analyze ten cases of HSP from eight families. We identified pathogenic variants in three cases (from three different families); however, we were unable to determine the cause of the other seven cases using ES. We therefore applied long-read sequencing to the seven undetermined HSP cases (from five families). We detected intragenic deletions within the *SPAST* gene in four families, and a deletion within *PSEN1* in the remaining family. The size of the deletion ranged from 4.7 to 12.5 kb and involved 1–7 exons. All deletions were entirely included in one long read. We retrospectively performed an ES-based copy number variation analysis focusing on pathogenic deletions, but were not able to accurately detect these deletions. This study demonstrated the efficiency of long-read sequencing in detecting intragenic pathogenic deletions in ES-negative HSP patients.
authors: Hiromi Fukuda, Takeshi Mizuguchi, ... Naomichi Matsumoto
citation: Fukuda, H., Mizuguchi, T., Doi, H. et al. Long-read sequencing revealing intragenic deletions in exome-negative spastic paraplegias. J Hum Genet 68 , 689–697 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s10038-023-01170-0
description: Hereditary spastic paraplegias (HSPs) are a heterogeneous group of neurodegenerative disorders characterized by progressive spasticity and weakness...

ai.TLDR: 遗传性痉挛性截瘫（HSP）是一种以下肢进行性肌张力增高和肌无力为特征的异质性神经退行性疾病。本研究通过长读长测序技术成功检测到外显子组测序阴性HSP患者中SPAST基因和PSEN1基因的致病性基因缺失，证实了长读长测序在检测基因内部缺失变异中的高效性。
ai.translation: 遗传性痉挛性截瘫（HSPs）是一组异质性神经退行性疾病，其特征是下肢进行性肌张力增高和肌无力。截至目前已知有88种SPG亚型。HSP的诊断通常采用微阵列、直接测序、多重连接依赖探针扩增和短读长下一代测序等技术，其中外显子组测序（ES）是常用方法。本研究使用ES分析了8个家族中的10例HSP病例，发现3例（来自不同家族）存在致病性变异，但其余7例无法通过ES确定病因。因此对这7例未确定病因的HSP病例（来自5个家族）应用长读长测序，检测到4个家族的SPAST基因基因内缺失和1个家族的PSEN1基因缺失。缺失片段大小为4.7-12.5 kb，涉及1-7个外显子，所有缺失均包含在单个长读长中。回顾性进行基于ES的拷贝数变异分析时未能准确检测这些缺失。本研究证实了长读长测序在检测外显子组测序阴性HSP患者基因内致病性缺失中的有效性。

title: Rapid molecular species identification of mammalian scat samples using nanopore adaptive sampling
abstract: AO_SCPLOWBSTRACTC_SCPLOWAccurate species identification is essential to mammalogy. Despite this necessity, rapid and accurate identification of cryptic, understudied, and elusive mammals remains challenging. Traditional barcoding of mitochondrial genes is standard for molecular identification but requires time-consuming wet-lab methodologies. Recent bioinformatic advancements for nanopore sequencing data offer exciting opportunities for non-invasive and field-based identification of mammals. Nanopore adaptive sampling (NAS), a PCR-free method, selectively sequences regions of DNA according to user-specified reference databases. Here, we utilized NAS to enrich mammalian mitochondrial genome sequencing to identify species. Fecal DNA extractions were sequenced from nine mammals, several collected in collaboration with Minnesota Tribal Nations, to demonstrate utility for NAS-barcoding of non-invasive samples. By mapping to the entire National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI) mammalian mitochondrial reference genome database and bioinformatically analyzing highly similar matches, we successfully produced species identifications for all of our fecal samples. Eight of nine species identifications matched previous PCR or animal/fecal morphological identifications. For the ninth species, our genetic data indicate a misidentification stemming from the original study. Our approach has a range of applications, particularly field-based wildlife research, conservation, disease surveillance, and monitoring of wildlife trade. Of importance to Minnesota tribes is invasive species monitoring, detections, and confirmation as climate impacts causes changes in biodiversity and shifts in species distributions. The rapid assessment techniques described here will be useful as new introductions and range expansions of native and invasive species may first be detected by the presence of signs such as scat rather than direct observations and will be helpful for chronically understaffed tribal natural resources agencies.
authors: Frank, L. E.; Lindsey, L. L.; Kipp, E. J.; Faulk, C.; Stone, S.; Roerick, T. M.; Moore, S. A.; Wolf, T. M.; Larsen, P. A.

ai.TLDR: 准确的物种鉴定对哺乳动物学至关重要。传统线粒体基因条形码方法存在耗时且侵入性问题，本文提出基于纳米孔自适应采样（NAS）的非侵入性鉴定方案，成功实现九种哺乳动物粪便样本的物种识别，验证了该技术在野外研究和生态保护中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 准确的物种鉴定对哺乳动物学至关重要。尽管这一需求明确，但对隐秘、研究不足且难以捕捉的哺乳动物进行快速准确鉴定仍具挑战性。传统线粒体基因条形码方法是分子鉴定的标准手段，但需要耗时的湿实验流程。近期纳米孔测序数据的生物信息学进展为非侵入性野外物种鉴定提供了新机遇。纳米孔自适应采样（NAS）是一种无需PCR的PCR-free方法，可根据用户指定的参考数据库选择性地对DNA特定区域进行测序。本研究利用NAS技术富集哺乳动物线粒体基因组测序以实现物种鉴定。通过与明尼苏达部落合作采集的九种哺乳动物粪便DNA样本，验证了NAS条形码技术对非侵入性样本的实用性。通过比对美国国家生物技术信息中心（NCBI）完整的哺乳动物线粒体参考基因组数据库，并对高度相似匹配结果进行生物信息学分析，成功实现了所有粪便样本的物种鉴定。九种物种中有八种鉴定结果与先前的PCR或动物/粪便形态学鉴定结果一致。第九种物种的遗传数据表明原始研究存在误鉴定。本方法在野外野生动物研究、生态保护、疾病监测及野生动物贸易监控等领域具有广泛应用价值。对明尼苏达部落而言，监测入侵物种、检测其存在及确认其分布变化尤为重要，因气候变化正导致生物多样性变化和物种分布迁移。本文描述的快速评估技术将有助于在直接观测之前通过踪迹（如粪便）发现新入侵物种或本地物种的分布扩展，对人员长期不足的部落自然资源机构具有实用价值。

title: Detecting haplotype-specific transcript variation in long reads with FLAIR2
abstract:
BackgroundRNA-Seq has brought forth significant discoveries regarding aberrations in RNA processing, implicating these RNA variants in a variety of diseases. Aberrant splicing and single nucleotide variants in RNA have been demonstrated to alter transcript stability, localization, and function. In particular, the upregulation of ADAR, an enzyme which mediates adenosine-to-inosine editing, has been previously linked to an increase in the invasiveness of lung ADC cells and associated with splicing regulation. Despite the functional importance of studying splicing and SNVs, short read RNA-Seq has limited the communitys ability to interrogate both forms of RNA variation simultaneously.

ResultsWe employed long-read technology to obtain full-length transcript sequences, elucidating cis-effects of variants on splicing changes at a single molecule level. We have developed a computational workflow that augments FLAIR, a tool that calls isoform models expressed in long-read data, to integrate RNA variant calls with the associated isoforms that bear them. We generated nanopore data with high sequence accuracy of H1975 lung adenocarcinoma cells with and without knockdown of ADAR. We applied our workflow to identify key inosine-isoform associations to help clarify the prominence of ADAR in tumorigenesis.

ConclusionsUltimately, we find that a long-read approach provides valuable insight toward characterizing the relationship between RNA variants and splicing patterns.

HighlightsO_LIFLAIR2 has improved transcript isoform detection and incorporates sequence variants for haplotype-specific transcript detection.
C_LIO_LIIn addition to haplotype-specific variant detection, it identifies transcript-specific RNA editing
C_LIO_LIAble to identify haplotype-specific transcript isoform bias in expression
C_LIO_LILong-read sequencing identifies hyperedited transcripts that are missed from short-read sequencing methods for a more comprehensive identification of ADAR targets
C_LI
authors: Tang, A. D.; Hrabeta-Robinson, E.; Volden, R.; Vollmers, C.; Brooks, A. N.

ai.TLDR: RNA-Seq技术揭示了RNA加工异常与多种疾病的关系，但短读长测序限制了对RNA变异的同步分析。本研究通过长读长测序技术，结合FLAIR工具开发了计算流程，实现了对ADAR编辑事件与异构体关联的全面解析，为肿瘤发生机制提供了新视角。
ai.translation:
背景：RNA-Seq技术已揭示RNA加工异常与多种疾病的关系，异常剪接和单核苷酸变异被证明会改变转录本稳定性、定位和功能。特别是ADAR酶（腺苷脱氨酶）的上调与肺腺癌细胞侵袭性增强及剪接调控相关。尽管研究剪接和SNV具有功能重要性，但短读长RNA-Seq限制了对这两种RNA变异的同步分析。

结果：我们采用长读长技术获取全长转录本序列，揭示了变异对剪接变化的顺式效应。开发了增强FLAIR工具的计算流程，整合RNA变异调用与承载变异的异构体。通过纳米孔测序生成高准确度的H1975肺腺癌细胞数据（含ADAR敲降），应用该流程识别关键inosine-异构体关联，阐明ADAR在肿瘤发生中的作用。

结论：长读长方法为解析RNA变异与剪接模式关系提供了重要见解。

亮点：
O_LIFLAIR2改进了转录本异构体检测，整合序列变异进行基因型特异性转录本检测。
C_LIO_LI除基因型特异性变异检测外，可识别转录本特异性RNA编辑。
C_LIO_LIAble识别基因型特异性转录本异构体表达偏差。
C_LIO_LILong-read测序可识别短读长方法遗漏的高编辑转录本，实现更全面的ADAR靶点识别。
C_LI

title: Integrated multi-omics for rapid rare disease diagnosis on a national scale
abstract: Critically ill infants and children with rare diseases need equitable access to rapid and accurate diagnosis to direct clinical management. Over 2 years, the Acute Care Genomics program provided whole-genome sequencing to 290 families whose critically ill infants and children were admitted to hospitals throughout Australia with suspected genetic conditions. The average time to result was 2.9 d and diagnostic yield was 47%. We performed additional bioinformatic analyses and transcriptome sequencing in all patients who remained undiagnosed. Long-read sequencing and functional assays, ranging from clinically accredited enzyme analysis to bespoke quantitative proteomics, were deployed in selected cases. This resulted in an additional 19 diagnoses and an overall diagnostic yield of 54%. Diagnostic variants ranged from structural chromosomal abnormalities through to an intronic retrotransposon, disrupting splicing. Critical care management changed in 120 diagnosed patients (77%). This included major impacts, such as informing precision treatments, surgical and transplant decisions and palliation, in 94 patients (60%). Our results provide preliminary evidence of the clinical utility of integrating multi-omic approaches into mainstream diagnostic practice to fully realize the potential of rare disease genomic testing in a timely manner.
authors: Sebastian Lunke, Sophie E. Bouffler, ... Zornitza Stark
citation: Lunke, S., Bouffler, S.E., Patel, C.V. et al. Integrated multi-omics for rapid rare disease diagnosis on a national scale. Nat Med 29 , 1681–1691 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41591-023-02401-9
description: Critically ill infants and children with rare diseases need equitable access to rapid and accurate diagnosis to direct clinical management. Over 2...

ai.TLDR: 危重患儿的快速诊断对罕见病治疗至关重要。急性护理基因组学项目通过全基因组测序在290个家庭中实现47%的诊断率，结合转录组测序和功能分析后提升至54%。诊断结果显著改变了120例患者的临床管理，包括精准治疗和手术决策等关键干预。
ai.translation: 危重婴儿和儿童罕见疾病患者需要公平获得快速准确的诊断以指导临床管理。在两年内，急性护理基因组学项目为290个因疑似遗传疾病而住院的危重婴儿和儿童家庭提供了全基因组测序。平均结果获取时间为2.9天，初始诊断率为47%。对未确诊患者进行了额外的生物信息学分析和转录组测序。在选定病例中应用了长读长测序和功能分析，包括临床认证的酶分析到定制定量蛋白质组学。这使额外获得19个诊断，总体诊断率提升至54%。诊断变异范围从结构染色体异常到内含子逆转录转座子，导致剪接紊乱。120例确诊患者（77%）的重症监护管理发生改变，包括94例（60%）患者的关键影响，如精准治疗、手术和移植决策及姑息治疗。研究结果初步证明了将多组学方法整合到主流诊断实践中的临床价值，以及时实现罕见病基因组检测的潜力。

title: Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing ofRPGR ORF15is Enhanced Following DNase I Treatment of MinION Flow Cells
abstract:
### Introduction

*RPGR ORF15* is an exon present almost exclusively in the retinal transcript of *RPGR*. It is purine-rich, repetitive and notoriously hard to sequence, but is a hotspot for mutations causing X-linked retinitis pigmentosa.

### Methods

Long-read nanopore sequencing on MinION and Flongle flow cells was used to sequence *RPGR ORF15* in genomic DNA from patients with inherited retinal dystrophy. A flow cell wash kit was used on a MinION flow cell to increase yield. Findings were confirmed by PacBio SMRT long-read sequencing.

### Results

We showed that long-read nanopore sequencing successfully reads through a 2 kb PCR-amplified fragment containing *ORF15*. We generated reads of sufficient quality and cumulative read-depth to detect pathogenic RP-causing variants. However, we observed that this G-rich, repetitive DNA segment rapidly blocks the available pores, resulting in sequence yields less than 5% of the expected output. This limited the extent to which samples could be pooled, increasing cost. We tested the utility of a MinION wash kit containing DNase I to digest DNA fragments remaining on the flow cell, regenerating the pores. Use of the DNase I treatment allowed repeated re-loading, increasing the sequence reads obtained. Our customised workflow was used to screen pooled amplification products from previously unsolved inherited retinal disease (IRD) in patients, identifying two new cases with pathogenic *ORF15* variants.

### Discussion

We report the novel finding that long-read nanopore sequencing can read through *RPGR-ORF15*, a DNA sequence not captured by short-read next-generation sequencing (NGS), but with a more reduced yield. Use of a flow cell wash kit containing DNase I unblocks the pores, allowing reloading of further library aliquots over a 72-h period, increasing yield. The workflow we describe provides a novel solution to the need for a rapid, robust, scalable, cost-effective *ORF15* screening protocol.
authors: Samar Yahya, Christopher M. Watson, ... Chris F. Inglehearn
citation: Yahya, S., Watson, C.M., Carr, I. et al. Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing of RPGR ORF15 is Enhanced Following DNase I Treatment of MinION Flow Cells. Mol Diagn Ther 27 , 525–535 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1007/s40291-023-00656-z
description: RPGR ORF15is an exon present almost exclusively in the retinal transcript ofRPGR. It is purine-rich, repetitive and notoriously hard...

ai.TLDR: 本研究展示了长读长纳米孔测序技术可穿透RPGR-ORF15区域，但其高GC含量重复序列导致测序效率低下。通过DNase I处理流细胞清洗套件，成功提升测序产量并发现两个新病例。该方法为X连锁视网膜色素变性提供了一种快速、可扩展的检测方案。
ai.translation:
引言
RPGR ORF15是RPGR基因在视网膜转录本中几乎专有的外显子，其富含嘌呤、重复性高且难以测序，但却是导致X连锁视网膜色素变性的突变热点。

方法
使用MinION和Flongle流细胞进行长读长纳米孔测序，对遗传性视网膜变性患者的基因组DNA中的RPGR ORF15区域进行测序。通过MinION流细胞使用流细胞清洗套件提升测序产量，并通过PacBio SMRT长读长测序验证结果。

结果
我们证明长读长纳米孔测序可成功读取包含ORF15的2 kb PCR扩增片段。生成的测序数据具有足够的质量及累计覆盖深度以检测致病性RP相关变异。然而观察到该富含鸟嘌呤的重复DNA片段会快速阻塞可用孔，导致测序产量不足预期的5%。这限制了样本池化程度，增加成本。测试了含DNase I的MinION清洗套件的效用，该套件可消化残留在流细胞上的DNA片段，再生孔。使用DNase I处理允许重复加载，提升测序产量。我们定制的工作流程用于筛查先前未解决的遗传性视网膜疾病（IRD）患者的池化扩增产物，发现两个携带致病性ORF15变异的新病例。

讨论
我们首次发现长读长纳米孔测序可穿透RPGR-ORF15区域，该序列无法被短读长下一代测序（NGS）捕获，但产量较低。使用含DNase I的流细胞清洗套件可解除孔阻塞，允许在72小时内多次加载库分装，提升产量。我们描述的工作流程为需要快速、稳健、可扩展且成本效益高的ORF15筛查方案提供了新方案。

title: SUsPECT: a pipeline for variant effect prediction based on custom long-read transcriptomes for improved clinical variant annotation
abstract: Our incomplete knowledge of the human transcriptome impairs the detection of disease-causing variants, in particular if they affect transcripts only expressed under certain conditions. These transcripts are often lacking from reference transcript sets, such as Ensembl/GENCODE and RefSeq, and could be relevant for establishing genetic diagnoses. We present SUsPECT (Solving Unsolved Patient Exomes/gEnomes using Custom Transcriptomes), a pipeline based on the Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor (VEP) to predict variant impact on custom transcript sets, such as those generated by long-read RNA-sequencing, for downstream prioritization. Our pipeline predicts the functional consequence and likely deleteriousness scores for missense variants in the context of novel open reading frames predicted from any transcriptome. We demonstrate the utility of SUsPECT by uncovering potential mutational mechanisms of pathogenic variants in ClinVar that are not predicted to be pathogenic using the reference transcript annotation. In further support of SUsPECT’s utility, we identified an enrichment of immune-related variants predicted to have a more severe molecular consequence when annotating with a newly generated transcriptome from stimulated immune cells instead of the reference transcriptome. Our pipeline outputs crucial information for further prioritization of potentially disease-causing variants for any disease and will become increasingly useful as more long-read RNA sequencing datasets become available.
authors: Renee Salz, Nuno Saraiva-Agostinho, ... Peter A.C. ’t Hoen
citation: Salz, R., Saraiva-Agostinho, N., Vorsteveld, E. et al. SUsPECT: a pipeline for variant effect prediction based on custom long-read transcriptomes for improved clinical variant annotation. BMC Genomics 24 , 305 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12864-023-09391-5
description: Our incomplete knowledge of the human transcriptome impairs the detection of disease-causing variants, in particular if they affect transcripts only...

ai.TLDR: 由于人类转录组知识的不完整性，导致特定条件表达的致病变异难以检测。SUsPECT通过自定义转录组分析，显著提升了致病变异的识别能力，并揭示了免疫相关变异的分子机制。该方法利用长读长RNA测序数据，为遗传诊断提供了关键信息。
ai.translation: 我们对人类转录组的不完全认知阻碍了致病变异的检测，特别是那些仅在特定条件下表达的转录本。这些转录本常缺失于参考转录组集合（如Ensembl/GENCODE和RefSeq），可能对遗传诊断具有重要意义。我们提出SUsPECT（通过自定义转录组解决未解患者外显子/基因组），这是一个基于Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor (VEP)的流程，用于预测自定义转录组（如长读长RNA测序生成的转录组）中变异的影响，以供后续优先级排序。我们的流程可预测错义变异在新型开放阅读框背景下的功能后果及潜在致病性评分。通过分析ClinVar中未被参考转录组注释预测为致病的变异，我们验证了SUsPECT的实用性，揭示了潜在的致病变异突变机制。进一步支持SUsPECT价值的是，当使用刺激免疫细胞生成的新转录组而非参考转录组注释时，我们发现免疫相关变异在分子后果上更为严重。该流程为任何疾病的潜在致病变异优先级排序提供关键信息，随着长读长RNA测序数据的增加，其应用价值将不断提升。

title: Boosting variant-calling performance with multi-platform sequencing data using Clair3-MP
abstract:
BackgroundWith the continuous advances in third-generation sequencing technology and the increasing affordability of next-generation sequencing technology, sequencing data from different sequencing technology platforms is becoming more common. While numerous benchmarking studies have been conducted to compare variant-calling performance across different platforms and approaches, little attention has been paid to the potential of leveraging the strengths of different platforms to optimize overall performance, especially integrating Oxford Nanopore and Illumina sequencing data.

ResultsWe investigated the impact of multi-platform data on the performance of variant calling through carefully designed experiments with a deep learning-based variant caller named Clair3-MP (Multi-Platform). Through our research, we not only demonstrated the capability of ONT-Illumina data for improved variant calling, but also identified the optimal scenarios for utilizing ONT-Illumina data. In addition, we revealed that the improvement in variant calling using ONT-Illumina data comes from an improvement in difficult genomic regions, such as the large low-complexity regions and segmental and collapse duplication regions. Moreover, Clair3-MP can incorporate reference genome stratification information to achieve a small but measurable improvement in variant calling. Clair3-MP is accessible as an open-source project at: https://github.com/HKU-BAL/Clair3-MP.

ConclusionsThese insights have important implications for researchers and practitioners alike, providing valuable guidance for improving the reliability and efficiency of genomic analysis in diverse applications.
authors: Yu, H.; Zheng, Z.; Su, J.; Lam, T.-W.; Luo, R.

ai.TLDR: 随着第三代测序技术的进步和下一代测序技术成本的降低，多平台测序数据整合成为趋势。本研究通过Clair3-MP深度学习工具验证了ONT-Illumina多平台数据在复杂基因区域的变体调用优势，揭示了其在低复杂度区域和重复区域的性能提升。
ai.translation:
背景：随着第三代测序技术的持续发展和下一代测序技术成本的不断降低，不同测序平台产生的测序数据正变得越来越常见。尽管已有大量基准测试研究比较了不同平台和方法的变体调用性能，但针对如何利用不同平台的优势优化整体性能的研究仍显不足，特别是整合Oxford Nanopore（ONT）和Illumina测序数据的潜力尚未被充分探索。

结果：我们通过精心设计的实验，使用基于深度学习的变体调用工具Clair3-MP（Multi-Platform）研究了多平台数据对变体调用性能的影响。研究不仅验证了ONT-Illumna数据在提升变体调用性能方面的潜力，还确定了最佳应用场景。此外，我们发现ONT-Illumina数据在复杂基因区域（如大低复杂度区域和段重复/折叠重复区域）的性能提升是变体调用改进的主要来源。同时，Clair3-MP能够整合参考基因组分层信息，实现可测量的变体调用性能提升。Clair3-MP作为开源项目可在https://github.com/HKU-BAL/Clair3-MP获取。

结论：这些发现对研究人员和临床实践者具有重要意义，为提升基因组分析在多样化应用中的可靠性和效率提供了有价值的指导。

title: Near chromosome-level genome assembly of the microsporidium Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis
abstract:
Microsporidia are intracellular parasitic fungi whose genomes rank among the smallest of all known eukaryotes. A number of outstanding questions remain concerning the evolution of their large-scale variation in genome architecture, responsible for genome size variation of more than an order of magnitude. This genome report presents a first near-chromosomal assembly of a large-genome microsporidium, Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis. Combined Oxford Nanopore, Pacific Biosciences, and Illumina sequencing led to a genome assembly of 17 contigs, 11 of which represent complete chromosomes. Our assembly is 21.64 Mb in length, has an N50 of 1.44 Mb, and consists of 39.56 % interspersed repeats. We introduce a novel approach in microsporidia, PacBio Iso-Seq, as part of a larger annotation pipeline for obtaining high-quality annotations of 3,573 protein-coding genes. Based on direct evidence from the full-length Iso-Seq transcripts, we present evidence for alternative polyadenylation and variation in splicing efficiency, which are potential regulation mechanisms for gene expression in microsporidia. The generated high-quality genome assembly is a necessary resource for comparative genomics that will help elucidate the evolution of genome architecture in response to intracellular parasitism.

SignificanceMicrosporidia are a model for genome evolution in response to intracellular parasitism, but we lack high-quality resources from species with large genomes. We present a near complete assembly of a large-genome microsporidium, Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis, and obtain high-quality gene annotations through full-length transcripts using Iso-Seq, a novel approach in microsporidia. Our study provides insights into gene regulation and paves the way for comparative genomic analyses aiming to understand the evolution of genome reduction and expansion in these intracellular parasites.
authors: Angst, P.; Pombert, J.-F.; Ebert, D.; Fields, P. D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次对大基因组微孢子虫Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis进行近染色体级基因组组装，通过多组学测序技术获得21.64 Mb的高质量基因组，揭示了微孢子虫基因表达调控机制。该成果为比较基因组学研究提供了关键资源，有助于解析细胞内寄生生活对基因组结构进化的驱动作用。
ai.translation:
微孢子虫是一类细胞内寄生真菌，其基因组在所有真核生物中属于最小规模。关于其基因组结构大规模变异的进化机制仍存在诸多未解问题，特别是基因组大小可相差一个数量级。本研究首次对大基因组微孢子虫Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis进行近染色体级基因组组装。通过结合Oxford Nanopore、Pacific Biosciences和Illumina测序技术，获得由17条contig组成的基因组，其中11条代表完整染色体。组装后的基因组长度为21.64 Mb，N50值为1.44 Mb，包含39.56%的散在重复序列。我们首次在微孢子虫中引入PacBio Iso-Seq技术，作为更大规模注释管道的一部分，获得3,573个蛋白编码基因的高质量注释。基于全长Iso-Seq转录本的直接证据，我们首次发现微孢子虫存在选择性多聚腺苷酸化现象和剪切效率变异，这可能是其基因表达调控机制。生成的高质量基因组组装为比较基因组学研究提供了必要资源，将有助于解析细胞内寄生生活对基因组结构进化的驱动作用。

微孢子虫是研究细胞内寄生生活驱动基因组进化的模式生物，但缺乏大基因组物种的高质量资源。我们首次完成大基因组微孢子虫Hamiltosporidium tvaerminnensis的近完整基因组组装，并通过Iso-Seq技术获得高质量基因注释。本研究通过全长转录本揭示了基因调控机制，为比较基因组学分析奠定了基础，将有助于理解这类细胞内寄生虫基因组缩减与扩张的进化过程。

title: GeneToCN: An Alignment-Free Method for Gene Copy Number Estimation Directly from Next-Generation Sequencing Reads
abstract: Genomes exhibit large regions with segmental copy number variation, many of which include entire genes and are multiallelic. We have developed a computational method GeneToCN that counts the frequencies of gene-specific k-mers in FASTQ files and uses this information to infer copy number of the gene. We validated the copy number predictions for amylase genes (AMY1, AMY2A, AMY2B) using experimental data from digital droplet PCR (ddPCR) on 39 individuals and observed a strong correlation (R=0.99) between GeneToCN predictions and experimentally determined copy numbers. We further tested the method on three different genomic regions (SMN, NPY4R, and LPA Kringle IV-2 domain). Predicted copy number distributions of these genes in a set of 500 individuals from the Estonian Biobank were in good agreement with the previously published studies. In addition, we investigated the possibility to use GeneToCN on sequencing data generated by different technologies by comparing copy number predictions from Illumina, PacBio, and Oxford Nanopore data of the same sample. Despite the differences in variability of k-mer frequencies, all three sequencing technologies give similar predictions with GeneToCN.
authors: Pajuste, F.-D.; Remm, M.

ai.TLDR: 基因组中存在大量段落拷贝数变异区域，其中包含完整基因且具有多等位性。本文提出GeneToCN计算方法，通过分析FASTQ文件中基因特异性k-mer频率推断基因拷贝数。实验验证显示，该方法在AMY1/AMY2A/AMY2B基因的拷贝数预测与ddPCR实验结果高度相关（R=0.99），且适用于不同测序技术的数据。
ai.translation: 基因组中存在大量段落拷贝数变异区域，其中包含完整基因且具有多等位性。我们开发了一种计算方法GeneToCN，该方法通过统计FASTQ文件中基因特异性k-mer的频率，并利用这些信息推断基因拷贝数。通过数字液滴PCR（ddPCR）实验数据验证了AMY1、AMY2A、AMY2B基因的拷贝数预测结果，在39名个体样本中观察到GeneToCN预测值与实验测定拷贝数之间存在强相关性（R=0.99）。进一步在SMN、NPY4R和LPA Kringle IV-2域三个不同基因组区域测试该方法，发现500名爱沙尼亚生物银行个体样本中这些基因的拷贝数分布与既往研究结果高度一致。此外，我们通过比较Illumina、PacBio和Oxford Nanopore同一样本的测序数据，探讨GeneToCN在不同测序技术生成数据中的适用性。尽管k-mer频率的变异性存在差异，三种测序技术均能通过GeneToCN获得相似的拷贝数预测结果。

title: Long-read genome sequencing identifies cryptic structural variants in congenital aniridia cases
abstract:
### Background

Haploinsufficiency of the transcription factor PAX6 is the main cause of congenital aniridia, a genetic disorder characterized by iris and foveal hypoplasia. 11p13 microdeletions altering *PAX6* or its downstream regulatory region (DRR) are present in about 25% of patients; however, only a few complex rearrangements have been described to date. Here, we performed nanopore-based whole-genome sequencing to assess the presence of cryptic structural variants (SVs) on the only two unsolved “*PAX6*-negative” cases from a cohort of 110 patients with congenital aniridia after unsuccessfully short-read sequencing approaches.

### Results

Long-read sequencing (LRS) unveiled balanced chromosomal rearrangements affecting the *PAX6 locus* at 11p13 in these two patients and allowed nucleotide-level breakpoint analysis. First, we identified a cryptic 4.9 Mb de novo inversion disrupting intron 7 of *PAX6,* further verified by targeted polymerase chain reaction amplification and sequencing and FISH-based cytogenetic analysis*.* Furthermore, LRS was decisive in correctly mapping a t(6;11) balanced translocation cytogenetically detected in a second proband with congenital aniridia and considered non-causal 15 years ago. LRS resolved that the breakpoint on chromosome 11 was indeed located at 11p13, disrupting the DNase I hypersensitive site 2 enhancer within the DRR of *PAX6,* 161 Kb from the causal gene. Patient-derived RNA expression analysis demonstrated *PAX6* haploinsufficiency, thus supporting that the 11p13 breakpoint led to a positional effect by cleaving crucial enhancers for *PAX6* transactivation. LRS analysis was also critical for mapping the exact breakpoint on chromosome 6 to the highly repetitive centromeric region at 6p11.1.

### Conclusions

In both cases, the LRS-based identified SVs have been deemed the hidden pathogenic cause of congenital aniridia. Our study underscores the limitations of traditional short-read sequencing in uncovering pathogenic SVs affecting low-complexity regions of the genome and the value of LRS in providing insight into hidden sources of variation in rare genetic diseases.
authors: Alejandra Damián, Gonzalo Núñez-Moreno, ... Marta Corton
citation: Damián, A., Núñez-Moreno, G., Jubin, C. et al. Long-read genome sequencing identifies cryptic structural variants in congenital aniridia cases. Hum Genomics 17 , 45 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s40246-023-00490-8
description: Haploinsufficiency of the transcription factor PAX6 is the main cause of congenital aniridia, a genetic disorder characterized by iris and...

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔全长测序技术，首次揭示了先天性无虹膜患者中隐匿的结构变异。传统短读测序无法检测到的11p13区域的复杂重排，通过长读测序技术成功定位并验证，证实了PAX6基因调控区域的异常是致病关键。
ai.translation:
背景：PAX6转录因子的单倍体不足是先天性无虹膜的主要病因，该遗传病表现为虹膜和黄斑发育不良。约25%的患者存在11p13区域的PAX6基因或其下游调控区（DRR）的微缺失，但至今仅描述了少数复杂重排。本研究通过纳米孔全长基因组测序，分析了110例先天性无虹膜患者中两个未解的'PAX6阴性'病例的隐匿结构变异（SVs），这些病例在短读测序后仍无法明确诊断。

结果：长读测序（LRS）揭示了两个患者中影响PAX6基因位点（11p13）的平衡染色体重排，并实现了核苷酸级断点分析。首先，我们鉴定出一个隐匿的4.9 Mb新生倒位，破坏了PAX6基因的内含子7，通过靶向PCR扩增、测序和FISH细胞遗传学分析得到验证。其次，LRS成功定位了第二例先天性无虹膜患者的t(6;11)平衡易位，该易位15年前被误认为非致病性。LRS证实染色体11的断点位于11p13，破坏了PAX、6基因DRR中的DNase I超敏感位点2增强子，距离致病基因161 Kb。患者来源的RNA表达分析显示PAX6基因单倍体不足，支持11p13断点通过切割关键增强子导致PAX6转激活的位点效应。LRS分析还精准定位了染色体6的断点至高度重复的着丝粒区域6p11.1。

结论：在两个病例中，LRS鉴定的结构变异被认定为先天性无虹膜的隐匿致病原因。本研究凸显了传统短读测序在揭示低复杂度区域致病性结构变异的局限性，同时证明了长读测序在解析罕见遗传病隐匿变异来源中的关键价值。

title: Detection and identification of transposable element transcripts using Long Read RNA-seq in Drosophila germline tissues
abstract: Transposable elements (TEs) are repeated DNA sequences potentially able to move throughout the genome. In addition to their inherent mutagenic effects, TEs can disrupt nearby genes by donating their intrinsic regulatory sequences, for instance, promoting the ectopic expression of a cellular gene. TE transcription is therefore not only necessary for TE transposition per se but can also be associated with TE-gene fusion transcripts, and in some cases, be the product of pervasive transcription. Hence, correctly determining the transcription state of a TE copy is essential to apprehend the impact of the TE in the host genome. Methods to identify and quantify TE transcription have mostly relied on short RNA-seq reads to estimate TE expression at the family level while using specific algorithms to discriminate copy-specific transcription. However, assigning short reads to their correct genomic location, and genomic feature is not trivial. Here we retrieved full-length cDNA (TeloPrime, Lexogen) of Drosophila melanogaster gonads and sequenced them using Oxford Nanopore Technologies. We show that long-read RNA-seq can be used to identify and quantify transcribed TEs at the copy level. In particular, TE insertions overlapping annotated genes are better estimated using long reads than short reads. Nevertheless, long TE transcripts (> 4.5 kb) are not well captured. Most expressed TE insertions correspond to copies that have lost their ability to transpose, and within a family, only a few copies are indeed expressed. Long-read sequencing also allowed the identification of spliced transcripts for around 107 TE copies. Overall, this first comparison of TEs between testes and ovaries uncovers differences in their transcriptional landscape, at the subclass and insertion level.
authors: Rebollo, R.; Cumunel, E.; Mary, A.; Sabot, F.; Burlet, N.; Gillet, B.; Hughes, S.; Siqueira Oliveira, D.; Goubert, C.; Fablet, M.; Vieira, C.; Lacroix, V.

ai.TLDR: 转座元件（TEs）作为可移动的重复DNA序列，其转录状态对宿主基因组有重要影响。现有方法依赖短读长RNA-seq估算家族水平表达，但难以准确定位拷贝特异性转录。本研究通过长读长RNA测序（TeloPrime+Oxford Nanopore）首次揭示睾丸与卵巢中TE转录景观的差异，证实长读长技术能更精确识别重叠基因的TE拷贝。
ai.translation: 转座元件（TEs）是具有潜在移动能力的重复DNA序列，除固有致突变效应外，可通过捐赠内在调控序列干扰邻近基因，例如促进细胞基因的异位表达。因此，TE转录不仅对自身转位至关重要，还可能与TE-基因融合转录本相关，某些情况下甚至成为广泛转录产物。准确判定TE拷贝的转录状态对理解其在宿主基因组中的影响至关重要。目前识别和量化TE转录的方法主要依赖短读长RNA-seq估算家族水平表达，通过特定算法区分拷贝特异性转录。然而，将短读长准确映射到基因组位置和特征仍具挑战性。本研究通过获取果蝇（Drosophila melanogaster）生殖腺的全长cDNA（TeloPrime, Lexogen）并使用Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序，证实长读长RNA测序可实现拷贝水平TE转录的识别与量化。特别地，重叠注释基因的TE插入位点在长读长测序下估计更准确。尽管如此，长TE转录本（>4.5 kb）仍难以被充分捕获。大多数表达的TE插入位点对应已失去转位能力的拷贝，且家族内仅少数拷贝实际表达。长读长测序还识别了约10^7个TE拷贝的剪接转录本。总体而言，首次对比睾丸与卵巢的TE转录景观，揭示了亚类和插入位点层面的差异。

title: Icarust, a real-time simulator for Oxford Nanopore adaptive sampling.
abstract:
1SummaryOxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencers enable real-time generation of sequence data, which allows for concurrent analysis during a run. Adaptive sampling leverages this real-time capability in extremis, rejecting or accepting reads for sequencing based on assessment of the sequence from the start of each read. This functionality is provided by ONTs software, MinKNOW (https://community.nanoporetech.com/downloads). Designing and developing software to take advantage of adaptive sampling can be expensive due to the cost of using real sequencing consumables, using precious samples and preparing sequencing libraries. MinKNOW addresses this issue in part by providing the ability to replay previously sequenced runs for testing, using its playback functionality. However, as we have illustrated here, the sequencing output only partially changes in response to adaptive sampling instructions. Here we present Icarust, a tool enabling more accurate approximations of sequencing runs. Icarust recreates all the required endpoints of MinKNOW to perform adaptive sampling and writes output compatible with current base-callers and analysis pipelines. Icarust is capable of serving nanopore signal to simulate a MinION or PromethION flow cell experiment from any reference genome using either R9 or R10 pore signal. We show that simulating sequencing runs with Icarust provides a realistic testing and development environment for software exploiting the real-time nature of Nanopore sequencing.

Availability and ImplementationAll code is open source and freely available here - https://github.com/LooseLab/Icarust. Icarust is implemented in Rust, with an easy to install and use docker container available.

Supplementary InformationSupplementary information is available here - https://github.com/Adoni5/Icarust_paper.
authors: Munro, R. J.; Payne, A.; Loose, M. W.

ai.TLDR: Icarust工具通过模拟ONT测序仪的实时数据生成过程，解决了自适应采样在真实测序中输出不完全响应指令的问题，为软件开发提供了更真实的测试环境。该工具可基于参考基因组使用R9/R10孔信号模拟MinION/PromethION实验，兼容现有碱基调用器和分析流程。
ai.translation:
1. 摘要
牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序仪能够实时生成序列数据，允许在运行过程中进行并发分析。自适应采样利用了这一实时能力，在读取开始时根据序列评估来接受或拒绝读取。这一功能由ONT的MinKNOW软件（https://community.nanoporetech.com/downloads）提供。由于使用真实测序消耗品的成本高昂，设计和开发利用自适应采样的软件需要昂贵的实验成本，涉及珍贵样本的使用和测序文库的制备。MinKNOW部分解决了这一问题，通过其回放功能允许使用之前测序的运行数据进行测试。然而，如本文所示，自适应采样指令对测序输出的影响是部分的。本文提出Icarust工具，能够更准确地模拟测序运行。Icarust重现了MinKNOW的所有必要端点以执行自适应采样，并生成与现有碱基调用器和分析流程兼容的输出。Icarust能够通过任何参考基因组使用R9或R10孔信号模拟纳米孔信号，以模拟MinION或PromethION流细胞实验。我们证明，使用Icarust模拟测序运行可为利用纳米孔测序实时特性的软件提供真实的测试和开发环境。

2. 可用性与实现
所有代码均为开源并免费获取（https://github.com/LooseLab/Icarust）。Icarust使用Rust语言实现，提供易于安装和使用的Docker容器。

3. 补充信息
补充信息可在此获取（https://github.com/Adoni5/Icarust_paper）。

title: Sequencing, fast and slow: profiling microbiomes in human samples with nanopore sequencing
abstract: Rapid and accurate pathogen identification is crucial in effectively combating infectious diseases. However, the current diagnostic tools for bacterial infections predominantly rely on century-old culture-based methods. Furthermore, recent research highlights the significance of host-microbe interactions within the host microbiota in influencing the outcome of infection episodes. As our understanding of science and medicine continues to advance, there is a pressing need for innovative diagnostic methods that can identify pathogens and also rapidly and accurately profile the microbiome landscape in human samples. In clinical settings, such diagnostic tools will become a powerful predictive instrument in directing the diagnosis and prognosis of infectious diseases by providing comprehensive insights into the patients microbiota. Here, we explore the potential of long-read sequencing in profiling the microbiome landscape from various human samples in terms of speed and accuracy. Using nanopore sequencers, we generate native DNA sequences from saliva and stool samples rapidly, from which each long-read is basecalled in real-time to provide downstream analyses such as taxonomic classification and antimicrobial resistance through the built-in software (< 12 hours). Subsequently, we utilize the nanopore sequence data for in-depth analysis of each microbial species in terms of host-microbe interaction types and deep learning-based classification of unidentified reads. We find that the nanopore sequence data encompass complex information regarding the microbiome composition of the host and its microbial communities, and also shed light on the unexplored human mobilome including bacteriophages. In this study, we use two different systems of long-read sequencing to give insights into human microbiome samples in the  slow and  fast modes, which raises additional inquiries regarding the precision of this novel technology and the feasibility of extracting native DNA sequences from other human microbiomes.
authors: Park, Y.; Lee, J.; Shim, H.

ai.TLDR: 传统培养法在细菌感染诊断中存在局限，长读长测序技术通过纳米孔测序仪实现了微生物组快速分析。该方法在12小时内完成DNA序列生成与分类，揭示了宿主微生物组复杂性及噬菌体等未探索领域。
ai.translation: 快速准确的病原体鉴定对于有效应对传染病至关重要。然而，当前细菌感染诊断工具主要依赖百年的培养法。近期研究强调宿主微生物组中宿主-微生物互作对感染结局的影响。随着科学医学认知的深化，亟需创新诊断方法实现病原体鉴定与微生物组景观的快速精准分析。在临床场景中，此类工具将成为指导传染病诊断预后的强大预测仪器。本研究探索长读长测序在多种人体样本微生物组分析中的潜力。通过纳米孔测序仪，我们从唾液和粪便样本中快速生成原生DNA序列，实时进行碱基调用以实现分类学分类和抗微生物耐药性分析（<12小时）。随后利用纳米孔序列数据进行微生物物种的宿主-微生物互作类型分析及深度学习驱动的未知序列分类。研究发现纳米孔序列数据包含宿主微生物组组成及其微生物群落的复杂信息，同时揭示了未被探索的人类mobilome（包括噬菌体）。本研究采用两种长读长测序系统以慢速和快速模式分析人体微生物组样本，引发对新技术精度及从其他人体微生物组提取原生DNA序列可行性的进一步探讨。

title: An amplicon-based nanopore sequencing workflow for rapid tracking of avian influenza outbreaks, France, 2020-2022
journal: Frontiers in Cellular and Infection Microbiology
abstract:
During the recent avian influenza epizootics that occurred in France in 2020/21 and 2021/22, the virus was so contagiousness that it was impossible to control its spread between farms. The preventive slaughter of millions of birds consequently was the only solution available. In an effort to better understand the spread of avian influenza viruses (AIVs) in a rapid and innovative manner, we established an amplicon-based MinION sequencing workflow for the rapid genetic typing of circulating AIV strains.

An amplicon-based MinION sequencing workflow based on a set of PCR primers targeting primarily the hemagglutinin gene but also the entire influenza virus genome was developed. Thirty field samples from H5 HPAIV outbreaks in France, including environmental samples, were sequenced using the MinION MK1C. A real-time alignment of the sequences with MinKNOW software allowed the sequencing run to be stopped as soon as enough data were generated. The consensus sequences were then generated and a phylogenetic analysis was conducted to establish links between the outbreaks.

The whole sequence of the hemagglutinin gene was obtained for the 30 clinical samples of H5Nx HPAIV belonging to clade 2.3.4.4b. The consensus sequences comparison and the phylogenetic analysis demonstrated links between some outbreaks.

While several studies have shown the advantages of MinION for avian influenza virus sequencing, this workflow has been applied exclusively to clinical field samples, without any amplification step on cell cultures or embryonated eggs. As this type of testing pipeline requires only a short amount of time to link outbreaks or demonstrate a new introduction, it could be applied to the real-time management of viral epizootics.
authors: CROVILLE, G.; WALCH, M.; LEBRE, L.; SILVA, S.; FILAIRE, F.; GUERIN, J.-L.

ai.TLDR: 2020/21及2021/22年法国禽流感疫情中，病毒高传染性导致需大规模扑杀禽类。研究团队开发了基于扩增子的MinION测序流程，实现对流行毒株的快速基因分型。该方法通过实时比对软件控制测序进程，结合系统发育分析成功关联了部分疫情。
ai.translation:
在2020/21及2021/22年法国禽流感疫情中，病毒的高传染性导致无法控制养殖场间的传播，最终不得不对数百万只禽类进行扑杀。为更快速地理解禽流感病毒（AIVs）的传播模式，研究团队建立了一种基于扩增子的MinION测序工作流程，用于快速鉴定流行AIV株的基因型。

该工作流程基于一组主要针对血凝素基因（hemagglutinin gene）但同时也覆盖整个流感病毒基因组的PCR引物。使用MinION MK1C设备对30份法国H5高致病性禽流感（HPAIV）疫情现场样本（包括环境样本）进行了测序。通过MinKNOW软件的实时序列比对功能，可在生成足够数据后立即停止测序运行。随后生成共识序列并进行系统发育分析，以建立疫情间的关联。

对属于2.3.4.4b亚群的30份H5Nx HPAIV临床样本的血凝素基因全长序列进行了获取。共识序列比较和系统发育分析显示部分疫情间存在关联。

尽管已有研究证实MinION在禽流感病毒测序中的优势，但该工作流程仅应用于临床现场样本，未涉及细胞培养或鸡胚扩增步骤。由于此类检测流程能快速关联疫情或证明新引入情况，可应用于病毒疫情的实时管理。

title: Resolving genotype-phenotype discrepancies of the Kidd blood group using nanopore sequencing
abstract: Due to substantial improvement in read accuracy, third-generation long-read sequencing holds great potential in blood group diagnostics, particularly in cases where traditional genotyping or sequencing techniques, primarily targeting exons, fail to explain serological phenotypes. In this study, we employed Oxford Nanopore sequencing to resolve all genotype-phenotype discrepancies in the Kidd blood group system (JK, encoded by SLC14A1) observed over seven years of routine high-throughput donor genotyping using a mass spectrometry based platform at Blood Transfusion Service Zurich. Discrepant results from standard serological typing and donor genotyping were confirmed by commercial PCR-SSP kits. To resolve discrepancies, we amplified the entire coding region of SLC14A1 ([~]24 kb, exons 3 to 10) in two overlapping long-range PCRs in all samples. Amplicons were barcoded and sequenced on a MinION flow cell. Sanger sequencing and bridge-PCRs were used to confirm findings. Among 11,972 donors with both serological and genotype data available for the Kidd system, we identified 10 cases with unexplained conflicting results. Five were linked to known weak and null alleles caused by variants not included in the routine donor genotyping. In two cases, we identified novel null alleles on the JK*01 (Gly40Asp; c.119G>A) and JK*02 (Gly242Glu; c.725G>A) haplotype, respectively. Remarkably, the remaining three cases were associated with a yet unknown deletion of [~]5 kb spanning exons 9-10 of the JK*01 allele, which other molecular methods had failed to detect. Overall, nanopore sequencing demonstrated reliable and accurate performance for detecting both single-nucleotide and structural variants. It possesses the potential to become a robust tool in the molecular diagnostic portfolio, particularly for addressing challenging structural variants such as hybrid genes, deletions and duplications.
authors: Gueuning, M.; Thun, G. A.; Schneider, L.; Trost, N.; Sigurdardottir, S.; Engström, C.; Rizzi, G.; Merki, Y.; Neuenschwander, K.; Frey, B. M.; Mattle-Greminger, M. P.; Meyer, S.

ai.TLDR: 第三代长读长测序技术因读取准确性显著提升，在血型诊断中展现出巨大潜力，尤其适用于传统基因分型技术无法解释的血清学表型。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore测序技术，成功解析了Kidd血型系统中7年高通量供体基因分型中发现的10例基因型-表型不一致案例，包括新发现的等位基因和缺失变异。
ai.translation: 由于读取准确性显著提升，第三代长读长测序技术在血型诊断中展现出巨大潜力，特别是在传统基因分型或测序技术（主要针对外显子）无法解释血清学表型的病例中。本研究采用Oxford Nanopore测序技术，解决了苏黎世血库服务处基于质谱平台的高通量供体基因分型7年间观察到的Kidd血型系统（JK，由SLC14A1基因编码）所有基因型-表型不一致问题。标准血清学分型和供体基因分型的不一致结果通过商业PCR-SSP试剂盒进行了验证。为解决不一致问题，我们在所有样本中通过两次重叠的长距离PCR扩增SLC14A1基因的完整编码区（约24 kb，外显子3至10）。扩增产物进行条形码标记后在MinION流细胞上测序。通过Sanger测序和桥式PCR验证发现结果。在11,972名同时具有血清学和基因型数据的供体中，我们发现了10例无法解释的冲突结果。其中5例与已知的弱等位基因和无活性等位基因相关，这些变异未包含在常规供体基因分型中。在2例中，我们分别在JK*01（Gly40Asp; c.119G>A）和JK*02（Gly242Glu; c.725G>A）单倍型中鉴定出新的无活性等位基因。值得注意的是，剩余3例与JK*01等位基因外显子9-10约5 kb的未知缺失相关，其他分子方法未能检测到该缺失。总体而言，纳米孔测序在检测单核苷酸和结构变异方面表现出可靠且准确的性能。它有望成为分子诊断工具箱中的强大工具，特别是针对具有挑战性的结构变异如嵌合基因、缺失和重复。

title: Conserving a threatened North American walnut: a chromosome-scale reference genome for butternut (Juglans cinerea)
abstract: With the advent of affordable and more accurate third generation sequencing technologies and the associated bioinformatic tools, it is now possible to sequence, assemble, and annotate more species of conservation concern than ever before. Juglans cinerea, commonly known as butternut or white walnut, is a member of the walnut family, native to the Eastern United States and Southeastern Canada. The species is currently listed as Endangered on the IUCN Red List due to decline from an invasive fungus known as Ophiognomonia clavigignenti-juglandacearum (Oc-j) that causes butternut canker. Oc-j creates visible sores on the trunks of the tree which essentially starves and slowly kills the tree. Natural resistance to this pathogen is rare. Conserving butternut is of utmost priority due to its critical ecosystem role and cultural significance. As part of an integrated undergraduate and graduate student training program in biodiversity and conservation genomics, the first reference genome for Juglans cinerea is described here. This chromosome-scale 539 Mb assembly was generated from over 100X coverage of Oxford Nanopore long reads and scaffolded with the Juglans mandshurica genome. Scaffolding with a closely related species oriented and ordered the sequences in a manner more representative of the structure of the genome without altering the sequence. Comparisons with sequenced Juglandaceae revealed high levels of synteny and further supported J. cinereas recent phylogenetic placement. Comparative assessment of gene family evolution revealed a significant number of contracting families, including several associated with biotic stress response.
authors: Guzman-Torres, C. R.; Trybulec, E.; LeVasseur, H.; Akella, H.; Amee, M.; Strickland, E.; Pauloski, N.; Williams, M.; Romero-Severson, J.; Hoban, S.; Woeste, K.; Pike, C.; Fetter, K. C.; Webster, C. N.; Neitzey, M. L.; O'Neill, R.; Wegrzyn, J. L.

ai.TLDR: 随着第三代测序技术的发展，首次完成Juglans cinerea的参考基因组组装，揭示其基因组结构和进化特征。该研究通过长读长测序和近缘物种辅助组装，为保护濒危的butternut树种提供遗传资源。
ai.translation: 随着成本降低且精度更高的第三代测序技术及其配套生物信息学工具的发展，现在可以对更多受保护物种进行测序、组装和注释。Juglans cinerea（俗称美洲山核桃）是山核桃科植物，原产于美国东部和加拿大东南部。该物种因受侵袭性真菌Ophiognomonia clavigignenti-juglandacearum (Oc-j)感染导致butternut canker而被列为IUCN红色名录濒危物种。Oc-j真菌会在树干形成可见的溃疡病灶，最终导致树木因营养匮乏而缓慢死亡。天然抗性极为罕见。由于其关键的生态系统功能和文化价值，保护butternut具有最高优先级。作为生物多样性与保护基因组学的本科生与研究生整合培训项目的一部分，本文描述了首个Juglans cinerea参考基因组。该染色体尺度的539 Mb组装通过超过100倍覆盖的Oxford Nanopore长读长测序生成，并以Juglans mandshurica基因组为骨架进行scaffolding。利用近缘物种进行scaffolding不仅定位了序列顺序，更真实反映了基因组结构而未改变序列信息。与已测序的Juglandaceae科物种比较显示高度的synteny，进一步支持了J. cinerea的近期系统发育位置。基因家族进化比较分析揭示了大量收缩型家族，包括多个与生物胁迫响应相关的家族。

title: Squigulator: simulation of nanopore sequencing signal data with tunable noise parameters
abstract: In silico simulation of next-generation sequencing data is a technique used widely in the genomics field. However, there is currently a lack of optimal tools for creating simulated data from  third-generation nanopore sequencing devices, which measure DNA or RNA molecules in the form of time-series current signal data. Here, we introduce Squigulator, a fast and simple tool for simulation of realistic nanopore signal data. Squigulator takes a reference genome, transcriptome or read sequences and generates corresponding raw nanopore signal data. This is compatible with basecalling software from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) and other third-party tools, thereby providing a useful substrate for testing, debugging, validation and optimisation of nanopore analysis methods. The user may generate noise-free  ideal data, realistic data with noise profiles emulating specific ONT protocols, or they may deterministically modify noise parameters and other variables to shape the data to their needs. To highlight its utility, we use Squigulator to model the degree to which different types of noise impact the accuracy of ONT basecalling and downstream variant detection, revealing new insights into the properties of ONT data. We provide Squigulator as an open-source tool for the nanopore community: https://github.com/hasindu2008/squigulator
authors: Gamaarachchi, H.; Ferguson, J. M.; Samarakoon, H.; Liyanage, K.; Deveson, I. W.

ai.TLDR: 体外模拟技术在基因组学领域广泛应用，但第三代纳米孔测序设备的模拟数据生成工具尚不完善。Squigulator作为新型模拟工具，可生成符合真实数据特征的纳米孔信号数据，支持ONT等软件的兼容性测试，为分析方法优化提供基础。该工具可生成无噪声理想数据或模拟特定协议的噪声数据，揭示ONT测序数据特性新见解。
ai.translation: 下一代测序数据的体外模拟技术在基因组学领域得到广泛应用。然而目前尚缺乏针对第三代纳米孔测序设备的优化模拟工具，这类设备通过时间序列电流信号数据测量DNA或RNA分子。本文介绍了一种快速简便的Squigulator工具，可模拟真实纳米孔信号数据。该工具以参考基因组、转录组或读取序列作为输入，生成对应的原始纳米孔信号数据。其兼容牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）的碱基调用软件及其他第三方工具，为纳米孔分析方法的测试、调试、验证和优化提供重要基础。用户可生成无噪声的理想数据，或生成模拟特定ONT协议噪声特征的现实数据，也可通过确定性修改噪声参数和其他变量来定制数据。为突出其应用价值，我们使用Squigulator模拟不同噪声类型对ONT碱基调用准确性和下游变体检测的影响程度，揭示ONT数据的新特性。我们向纳米孔研究社区提供该开源工具：https://github.com/hasindu2008/squigulator

title: Whole-genome long-read sequencing downsampling and its effect on variant calling precision and recall
abstract: Advances in long-read sequencing (LRS) technology continue to make whole-genome sequencing more complete, affordable, and accurate. LRS provides significant advantages over short-read sequencing approaches, including phased de novo genome assembly, access to previously excluded genomic regions, and discovery of more complex structural variants (SVs) associated with disease. Limitations remain with respect to cost, scalability, and platform-dependent read accuracy and the tradeoffs between sequence coverage and sensitivity of variant discovery are important experimental considerations for the application of LRS. We compare the genetic variant calling precision and recall of Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) and PacBio HiFi platforms over a range of sequence coverages. For read-based applications, LRS sensitivity begins to plateau around 12-fold coverage with a majority of variants called with reasonable accuracy (F1 score above 0.5), and both platforms perform well for SV detection. Genome assembly increases variant calling precision and recall of SVs and indels in HiFi datasets with HiFi outperforming ONT in quality as measured by the F1 score of assembly-based variant callsets. While both technologies continue to evolve, our work offers guidance to design cost-effective experimental strategies that do not compromise on discovering novel biology.
authors: Harvey, W. T.; Ebert, P.; Ebler, J.; Audano, P. A.; Munson, K. M.; Hoekzema, K.; Porubsky, D. E.; Beck, C. R.; Marschall, T. R.; Garimella, K. V.; Eichler, E. E.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术（LRS）持续提升全基因组测序的完整性、成本效益和准确性。研究比较了Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）和PacBio HiFi平台在不同覆盖度下的基因变异检测精度与召回率，发现HiFi平台在质量评估中表现更优。
ai.translation: 长读长测序（LRS）技术的持续进步使全基因组测序更加完整、经济且精确。与短读长测序方法相比，LRS具有显著优势，包括相位化从头基因组组装、访问此前被排除的基因组区域以及发现更多与疾病相关的复杂结构变异（SVs）。然而，在成本、可扩展性和平台依赖的读取准确性方面仍存在局限性，且序列覆盖度与变异发现灵敏度之间的权衡是LRS应用的重要实验考量。我们比较了Oxford Nanopore Technologies（ONT）和PacBio HiFi平台在不同序列覆盖度下的遗传变异检测精度与召回率。对于基于读取的应用，LRS灵敏度在约12倍覆盖度时趋于平稳，大部分变异可被合理准确地检测（F1分数高于0.5），且两个平台在SV检测中均表现良好。HiFi数据集的基因组组装显著提升了SV和插入缺失（indels）的检测精度与召回率，且HiFi在基于组装的变异检测集的F1分数中优于ONT。尽管两种技术仍在持续发展，我们的研究为设计兼顾成本效益且不牺牲新生物学发现的实验策略提供了指导。

title: Novel regulatory variant in ABO intronic RUNX1 binding site inducing A3 phenotype
abstract:
Background and ObjectivesMixed-field agglutination in ABO phenotyping (A3, B3) has been linked to genetically different blood cell populations like in chimerism, or to rare variants in either ABO exon 7 or regulatory regions. Clarification of such cases is challenging and would greatly benefit from sequencing technologies that allow resolving full-gene haplotypes at high resolution.

Materials and MethodsWe used long-read sequencing by Oxford Nanopore Technologies to sequence the entire ABO gene, amplified in two overlapping long-range PCR fragments, in a blood donor presented with A3B phenotype. Confirmation analyses were carried out by Sanger sequencing and included samples from other family members.

ResultsOur data revealed a novel heterozygous g.10924C>A variant on the ABO*A-allele located in the transcription factor binding site for RUNX1 in intron 1 (+5.8 kb site). Inheritance was shown by the results of the donors mother, who shared the novel variant and the anti-A specific mixed-field agglutination.

ConclusionWe discovered a regulatory variant in the 8-bp RUNX1 motif of ABO, which extends current knowledge of three other variants affecting the same motif and also leading to A3 or B3 phenotypes. Overall, long-range PCR combined with nanopore sequencing proved powerful and showed great potential as emerging strategy for resolving cases with cryptic ABO phenotypes.
authors: Thun, G. A.; Gueuning, M.; Sigurdardottir, S.; Meyer, E.; Gourri, E.; Schneider, L.; Merki, Y.; Trost, N.; Neuenschwander, K.; Engstroem, C.; Frey, B. M.; Meyer, S.; Mattle-Greminger, M. P.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术解析了ABO血型表型中混合场凝集现象的遗传基础，发现了一个位于RUNX1结合位点的新调控变异。该方法为解决隐性ABO表型提供了高分辨率的基因组分析策略。
ai.translation:
背景与目的：ABO血型表型中的混合场凝集（A3、B3）现象与遗传差异的血细胞群体（如嵌合体）或ABO基因外显子7或调控区域的罕见变异相关。此类病例的明确诊断面临挑战，亟需高分辨率的测序技术来解析全基因组单倍型。

材料与方法：我们采用牛津纳米孔技术的长读长测序，对一名表现为A3B表型的献血者进行ABO基因全基因组测序。该基因通过两个重叠的长距离PCR片段扩增完成。通过Sanger测序进行验证分析，并包含其他家庭成员的样本。

结果：我们的数据揭示了ABO*A等位基因上一个新的杂合变异（g.10924C>A），位于内含子1的RUNX1转录因子结合位点（+5.8 kb位点）。通过献血者母亲的检测结果证实了该变异的遗传性，其同样携带该变异并表现出抗A特异性混合场凝集。

结论：我们发现了ABO基因中8碱基RUNX1基序的调控变异，扩展了目前关于影响同一基序的三个其他变异的知识，并同样导致A3或B3表型。总体而言，长距离PCR结合纳米孔测序证明了其在解析隐性ABO表型病例中的强大能力，展现出作为新兴策略的广阔前景。

title: Single-molecule methylation profiles of cell-free DNA in cancer with nanopore sequencing
abstract: Epigenetic characterization of cell-free DNA (cfDNA) is an emerging approach for detecting and characterizing diseases such as cancer. We developed a strategy using nanopore-based single-molecule sequencing to measure cfDNA methylomes. This approach generated up to 200 million reads for a single cfDNA sample from cancer patients, an order of magnitude improvement over existing nanopore sequencing methods. We developed a single-molecule classifier to determine whether individual reads originated from a tumor or immune cells. Leveraging methylomes of matched tumors and immune cells, we characterized cfDNA methylomes of cancer patients for longitudinal monitoring during treatment.
authors: Billy T. Lau, Alison Almeda, ... Hanlee P. Ji
citation: Lau, B.T., Almeda, A., Schauer, M. et al. Single-molecule methylation profiles of cell-free DNA in cancer with nanopore sequencing. Genome Med 15 , 33 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-023-01178-3
description: Epigenetic characterization of cell-free DNA (cfDNA) is an emerging approach for detecting and characterizing diseases such as cancer. We developed a...

ai.TLDR: 无细胞DNA（cfDNA）的表观遗传特征分析是癌症等疾病检测的新方法。本研究通过纳米孔单分子测序技术实现了cfDNA甲基化组的高通量测序，单样本数据量较现有方法提升一个数量级，并开发了单分子分类器区分肿瘤与免疫细胞来源的cfDNA，为治疗期间的动态监测提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 无细胞DNA（cell-free DNA, cfDNA）的表观遗传特征分析是检测和表征癌症等疾病的新方法。我们开发了一种基于纳米孔单分子测序的策略，用于测量cfDNA的甲基化组。该方法单个cfDNA样本可生成高达2亿条读段，较现有纳米孔测序方法提升一个数量级。我们开发了单分子分类器以确定单个读段来源于肿瘤细胞还是免疫细胞。通过结合匹配肿瘤和免疫细胞的甲基化组数据，我们对癌症患者的cfDNA甲基化组进行了纵向监测，用于治疗期间的动态分析。

title: A multiplexed RT-PCR Assay for Nanopore Whole Genome Sequencing of Tilapia lake virus (TiLV)
abstract: Tilapia lake virus (TiLV) is a highly contagious viral pathogen that affects tilapia, a globally significant and affordable source of fish protein. To prevent the introduction and spread of TiLV and its impact, there is an urgent need for increased surveillance, improved biosecurity measures, and continuous development of effective diagnostic and rapid sequencing methods. In this study, we have developed a multiplexed RT-PCR assay that can amplify all ten complete genomic segments of TiLV from various sources of isolation. The amplicons generated using this approach were immediately subjected to real-time sequencing on the Nanopore system. By using this approach, we have recovered and assembled 10 TiLV genomes from total RNA extracted from naturally TiLV-infected tilapia fish, concentrated tilapia rearing water, and cell culture. Our phylogenetic analysis, consisting of more than 36 TiLV genomes from both newly sequenced and publicly available TiLV genomes, provides new insights into the high genetic diversity of TiLV. This work is an essential steppingstone towards integrating rapid and real-time Nanopore-based amplicon sequencing into routine genomic surveillance of TiLV, as well as future vaccine development.
authors: Delamare-Deboutteville, J.; Watcharachai, M.; Gan, H. M.; Mohan, C. V.; Dong, H. T.; Senapin, S.

ai.TLDR: TiLV是一种高传染性病毒，严重威胁罗非鱼养殖业。本研究开发了基于Nanopore实时测序的多重RT-PCR方法，成功从感染样本中组装出完整基因组，揭示了TiLV的高遗传多样性，为实时监测和疫苗研发奠定基础。
ai.translation: Tilapia lake virus (TiLV) 是一种高度传染性的病毒病原体，影响罗非鱼——一种全球范围内重要且经济实惠的鱼蛋白来源。为防止TiLV的传入和扩散及其带来的影响，亟需加强监测、改进生物安全措施，并持续开发有效的诊断和快速测序方法。本研究开发了一种多重RT-PCR检测方法，可从多种分离源中扩增TiLV完整的十个基因组片段。通过该方法生成的扩增子立即在Nanopore系统上进行实时测序。利用该方法，我们从自然感染TiLV的罗非鱼、浓缩的养殖水体和细胞培养物中提取的总RNA中恢复并组装了10个TiLV基因组。我们的系统发育分析包含超过36个TiLV基因组（来自新测序和公开可用的基因组），为TiLV的高遗传多样性提供了新见解。本研究是将基于Nanopore的实时扩增子测序整合到TiLV基因组监测常规工作中的重要步骤，也为未来疫苗研发奠定了基础。

title: Fibertools: fast and accurate DNA-m6A calling using single-molecule long-read sequencing
abstract: Long-read DNA sequencing has recently emerged as a powerful tool for studying both genetic and epigenetic architectures at single-molecule and single-nucleotide resolution. Long-read epigenetic studies encompass both the direct identification of native cytosine methylation as well as the identification of exogenously placed DNA N6-methyladenine (DNA-m6A). However, detecting DNA-m6A modifications using single-molecule sequencing, as well as co-processing single-molecule genetic and epigenetic architectures, is limited by computational demands and a lack of supporting tools. Here, we introduce fibertools, a state-of-the-art toolkit that features a semi-supervised convolutional neural network for fast and accurate identification of m6A-marked bases using PacBio single-molecule long-read sequencing, as well as the co-processing of long-read genetic and epigenetic data produced using either PacBio or Oxford Nanopore sequencing platforms. We demonstrate accurate DNA-m6A identification (>90% precision and recall) along >20 kilobase long DNA molecules with a [~]1,000-fold improvement in speed. In addition, we demonstrate that fibertools can readily integrate genetic and epigenetic data at single-molecule resolution, including the seamless conversion between molecular and reference coordinate systems, allowing for accurate genetic and epigenetic analyses of long-read data within structurally and somatically variable genomic regions.
authors: Jha, A.; Bohaczuk, S. C.; Mao, Y.; Ranchalis, J.; Mallory, B. J.; Min, A. T.; Hamm, M. O.; Swanson, E.; Finkbeiner, C.; Li, T.; Whittington, D.; Noble, W. S.; Stergachis, A. B.; Vollger, M. R.

ai.TLDR: 长读长DNA测序技术为单分子和单碱基分辨率研究基因组与表观遗传结构提供了新工具。当前检测DNA-m6A修饰及联合处理遗传与表观遗传数据面临计算需求高和工具不足的挑战。本文提出的fibertools工具通过半监督卷积神经网络实现了PacBio长读长测序数据中m6A标记的快速精准识别，并支持跨平台长读长数据的联合分析。
ai.translation: 长读长DNA测序技术最近已成为研究基因组和表观遗传结构的强大工具，能够实现单分子和单碱基分辨率。长读长表观遗传研究包括原生胞嘧啶甲基化的直接鉴定以及外源性DNA N6-甲基腺嘌呤（DNA-m6A）的识别。然而，使用单分子测序检测DNA-m6A修饰，以及联合处理单分子遗传与表观遗传结构，受限于计算需求和缺乏支持工具。本文介绍了fibertools，一个最先进的工具包，其特点包括用于通过PacBio单分子长读长测序快速准确识别m6A标记碱基的半监督卷积神经网络，以及支持通过PacBio或Oxford Nanopore测序平台生成的长读长遗传与表观遗传数据的联合处理。我们展示了在超过20千碱基的DNA分子上实现>90%精确度和召回率的DNA-m6A识别，速度提升了约1000倍。此外，我们证明fibertools能够轻松整合单分子分辨率的遗传与表观遗传数据，包括分子坐标系与参考坐标系之间的无缝转换，从而在结构和体细胞变异的基因组区域中实现准确的遗传与表观遗传分析。

title: Alternative mRNA splicing controls the functions of the histone H3K27 demethylase UTX/KDM6A
abstract:
BackgroundThe UTX/KDM6A histone H3K27 demethylase plays an important role in development and is frequently mutated in cancers such as urothelial cancer. Despite many studies on UTX proteins, variations in mRNA splicing have been overlooked.

MethodsUsing Nanopore sequencing, we present a comprehensive analysis of UTX/KDM6A splicing events in human cell lines and in tissue samples from bladder cancer and normal epithelium.

ResultsThe central region of UTX mRNAs encoded by exons 12 to 17 undergoes extensive alternative splicing. Up to half of all stable mRNAs (8-48% in bladder tissues and 18-58% in cell lines) are represented by the UTX canonical isoform lacking exon 14 encoding a nuclear localization sequence, hence localize to the nucleus, unlike cytonuclear localization of the canonical isoform. Chromatin association was also higher for exon 14-containing isoform compared to the canonical UTX. Using quantitative mass spectrometry, we found that all UTX isoforms integrated into the MLL3 and MLL4, PR-DUB and MiDAC complexes. Interestingly, one of the novel UTX isoforms, which lacks exons 14 and 16, fails to interact with PR-DUB and MiDAC complex members.

ConclusionUTX mRNAs undergo extensive alternative splicing that controls the subcellular localization of UTX and its interactions with other chromatin regulatory complexes.

Simple SummaryUTX/KDM6A is a histone H3K27 demethylase and plays an important role in mammalian development and human diseases such as urothelial cancer. We identified a region encompassing exons 12-17 of UTX that undergoes extensive splicing events. As a result, a nuclear localization sequence located in exon14 is missing in a considerable part of UTX transcripts in different cell lines and tissues from normal bladder epithelium and bladder cancer. Mass spectrometry analysis showed a role for this region in binding to the epigenetic PR-DUB and MiDAC complexes. UTX was also more extensively bound to chromatin when the alternative splicing region presented. Our study showed that alternative splicing of UTX transcripts plays an important role in its functions.
authors: Fotouhi, O.; Nizamuddin, S.; Schilling, O.; Knuechel-Clarke, R.; Manke, T.; Biniossek, M. L.; Timmers, H. T. M.; Falk, S.

ai.TLDR: UTX/KDM6A作为组蛋白H3K27去甲基酶在发育和癌症中起关键作用，其mRNA在剪接过程中存在显著变异。研究通过纳米孔测序发现UTX的可变剪接事件影响其亚细胞定位和染色质结合能力，部分剪接变体无法与PR-DUB/MiDAC复合物相互作用，揭示了剪接变异对功能调控的重要性。
ai.translation:
背景：UTX/KDM6A组蛋白H3K27去甲基酶在发育过程中发挥关键作用，并在尿路上皮癌等癌症中频繁发生突变。尽管已有大量关于UTX蛋白的研究，但其mRNA剪接变异仍被忽视。

方法：本研究采用纳米孔测序技术，对人类细胞系及膀胱癌组织和正常上皮组织中的UTX/KDM6A剪接事件进行了全面分析。

结果：UTX mRNA中央区域（外显子12-17编码）经历广泛的可变剪接。在膀胱组织中，高达48%的稳定mRNA（8-48%）和细胞系中58%的mRNA（18-58%）以缺乏外显子14（编码核定位序列）的UTX经典剪接变体形式存在，因此定位于细胞核，与经典剪接变体的细胞质-核定位不同。包含外显子14的剪接变体在染色质结合能力上显著高于经典UTX。定量质谱分析显示所有UTX剪接变体均整合至MLL3/MLL4、PR-DUB和MiDAC复合物中。有趣的是，缺乏外显子14和16的新剪接变体无法与PR-DUB和MiDAC复合物成员相互作用。

结论：UTX mRNA经历广泛的可变剪接，调控UTX的亚细胞定位及其与其他染色质调控复合物的相互作用。

简单摘要：UTX/KDM6A是组蛋白H3K27去甲基酶，在哺乳动物发育和人类疾病如尿路上皮癌中起重要作用。我们发现UTX外显子12-17区域经历广泛的剪接事件，导致不同细胞系和正常膀胱上皮组织及膀胱癌组织中大量UTX转录本缺失外显子14中的核定位序列。质谱分析显示该区域在与表观遗传PR-DUB和MiDAC复合物结合中起关键作用。当可变剪接区域存在时，UTX与染色质的结合更为广泛。研究证实UTX转录本的可变剪接在功能调控中起重要作用。

title: High diagnostic potential of short and long read genome sequencing with transcriptome analysis in exome-negative developmental disorders
abstract: Exome sequencing (ES) has become the method of choice for diagnosing rare diseases, while the availability of short-read genome sequencing (SR-GS) in a medical setting is increasing. In addition, new sequencing technologies, such as long-read genome sequencing (LR-GS) and transcriptome sequencing, are being increasingly used. However, the contribution of these techniques compared to widely used ES is not well established, particularly in regards to the analysis of non-coding regions. In a pilot study of five probands affected by an undiagnosed neurodevelopmental disorder, we performed trio-based short-read GS and long-read GS as well as case-only peripheral blood transcriptome sequencing. We identified three new genetic diagnoses, none of which affected the coding regions. More specifically, LR-GS identified a balanced inversion in *NSD1*, highlighting a rare mechanism of Sotos syndrome. SR-GS identified a homozygous deep intronic variant of *KLHL7* resulting in a neoexon inclusion, and a de novo mosaic intronic 22-bp deletion in *KMT2D*, leading to the diagnosis of Perching and Kabuki syndromes, respectively. All three variants had a significant effect on the transcriptome, which showed decreased gene expression, mono-allelic expression and splicing defects, respectively, further validating the effect of these variants. Overall, in undiagnosed patients, the combination of short and long read GS allowed the detection of cryptic variations not or barely detectable by ES, making it a highly sensitive method at the cost of more complex bioinformatics approaches. Transcriptome sequencing is a valuable complement for the functional validation of variations, particularly in the non-coding genome.
authors: François Lecoquierre, Olivier Quenez, ... Gaël Nicolas
citation: Lecoquierre, F., Quenez, O., Fourneaux, S. et al. High diagnostic potential of short and long read genome sequencing with transcriptome analysis in exome-negative developmental disorders. Hum Genet 142 , 773–783 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00439-023-02553-1
description: Exome sequencing (ES) has become the method of choice for diagnosing rare diseases, while the availability of short-read genome sequencing (SR-GS) in...

ai.TLDR: 外显子组测序（ES）已成为罕见病诊断的首选方法，但长读长基因组测序（LR-GS）和转录组测序在非编码区分析中的贡献尚不明确。通过结合短读长和长读长基因组测序以及转录组测序，研究发现了三种新的基因诊断，验证了长读长测序在检测隐匿性变异方面的高灵敏度。
ai.translation: 外显子组测序（Exome sequencing, ES）已成为诊断罕见疾病的首选方法，而短读长基因组测序（Short-read Genome Sequencing, SR-GS）在临床环境中的可用性正在增加。此外，长读长基因组测序（Long-read Genome Sequencing, LR-GS）和转录组测序等新技术的应用也在逐渐增多。然而，这些技术相较于广泛应用的外显子组测序在非编码区分析中的贡献尚未明确。在一项针对五例未确诊神经发育障碍患者的试点研究中，我们采用了基于三联体的短读长基因组测序、长读长基因组测序以及单独病例的外周血转录组测序。研究发现了三种新的遗传诊断，均未涉及编码区。具体而言，长读长基因组测序发现了NSD1基因的平衡倒位，揭示了Sotos综合征的罕见致病机制；短读长基因组测序则发现了KLHL7基因的同源深内含子变异导致新外显子插入，以及KMT2D基因的新生嵌合内含子22-bp缺失，分别导致Perching综合征和Kabuki综合征的诊断。所有三种变异均显著影响转录组，表现为基因表达降低、单等位表达和剪接缺陷，进一步验证了这些变异的效应。总体而言，在未确诊患者中，短读长与长读长基因组测序的结合能够检测到外显子组测序难以发现的隐匿性变异，使其成为高灵敏度方法，但需付出更复杂的生物信息学分析成本。转录组测序作为功能验证变异的有力补充，尤其在非编码基因组分析中具有重要价值。

title: Evaluation of nanopore sequencing on polar bodies for routine PGT-A
abstract:
Structured AbstractO_ST_ABSBACKGROUNDC_ST_ABSPGT-A using polar body (PB) biopsy derives a clinical benefit by reducing the number of embryo transfers and miscarriage rates but is currently not cost-efficient. Nanopore sequencing technology opens possibilities by providing cost-efficient, fast sequencing results with uncomplicated sample preparation workflows.

METHODSIn this comparative experimental study, 102 pooled PB samples from 20 patients were analyzed for aneuploidy using nanopore sequencing technology and compared with aCGH results generated as part of the clinical routine. Samples were sequenced on a Nanopore MinION machine for up to 9 hours for 6 pooled PB samples. Whole-chromosome copy-numbers were called by a custom bioinformatic analysis software. Automatically called results were compared to aCGH results.

RESULTSOverall, 96/99 samples were consistently detected as euploid or aneuploid in both methods (concordance=97.0%, sensitivity = 0.957, specificity = 1.0, PPV = 1.0, NPV = 0.906). On chromosomal level, concordance reached 98.7%. Chromosomal aneuploidies analyzed in this trial covered all 23 chromosomes with 98 trisomies, and 97 monosomies in 70 aCGH samples.

The whole nanopore workflow is feasible in under 5 hours (for one sample) with maximum time of 16 hours (for 12 samples), enabling fresh PB-euploid embryo transfer. Material cost of 150{euro}/sample possibly enable cost-efficient aneuploidy screening.

CONCLUSIONSThis is the first study, systematically comparing nanopore sequencing for aneuploidy of PBs with standard detection methods. High concordance rates confirmed feasibility of nanopore technology for this application. Additionally, the fast and cost-efficient workflow reveals clinical utility of this technology, making PB PGT-A clinically attractive.
authors: Oberle, A.; Hanzer, F.; Kokocinski, F.; Ennemoser, A.; Carli, L.; Vaccari, E.; Hengstschlaeger, M.; Feichtinger, M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次系统比较了纳米孔测序技术与传统aCGH方法在极体活检非整倍体检测中的应用，结果显示两种方法在染色体水平上高度一致（98.7%），且纳米孔测序可在5小时内完成单样本分析，为临床提供快速、经济的非整倍体筛查方案。
keywords: 临床胚胎移植（Clinical embryo transfer）
ai.translation:
结构化摘要

背景：通过极体（PB）活检进行胚胎植入前遗传学检测（PGT-A）可降低胚胎移植次数和流产率，但目前成本效益不高。纳米孔测序技术通过提供成本低、快速且样本制备简单的测序结果，为该领域提供了新可能。

方法：本比较性实验研究中，对20名患者的102个合并PB样本使用纳米孔测序技术进行非整倍体分析，并与临床常规生成的aCGH结果进行对比。6个合并PB样本在Nanopore MinION设备上进行长达9小时的测序。通过定制生物信息分析软件计算全染色体拷贝数，自动分析结果与aCGH结果进行对比。

结果：总体而言，96/99个样本在两种方法中均被一致检测为整倍体或非整倍体（一致性=97.0%，灵敏度=0.957，特异性=1.0，PPV=1.0，NPV=0.906）。在染色体水平上，一致性达到98.7%。本试验分析的染色体非整倍体覆盖了全部23条染色体，其中70个aCGH样本中包含98个三体和97个单体。

纳米孔测序全流程可在单个样本5小时内完成（最多12个样本需16小时），实现新鲜PB整倍体胚胎移植。单样本材料成本约150€/sample，可能实现非整倍体筛查的成本效益。

结论：本研究首次系统比较了纳米孔测序在PB非整倍体检测与标准检测方法的应用。高一致性率证实了纳米孔技术在该应用中的可行性。此外，快速且成本效益高的工作流程揭示了该技术的临床价值，使PB PGT-A在临床中更具吸引力。

title: Barcode-free multiplex plasmid sequencing using Bayesian analysis and nanopore sequencing
abstract: Plasmid construction is central to life science research, and sequence verification is arguably its costliest step. Long-read sequencing has emerged as a competitor to Sanger sequencing, with the principal benefit that whole plasmids can be sequenced in a single run. Nevertheless, the current cost of nanopore sequencing is still prohibitive for routine sequencing during plasmid construction. We develop a computational approach termed Simple Algorithm for Very Efficient Multiplexing of Oxford Nanopore Experiments for You (SAVEMONEY) that guides researchers to mix multiple plasmids and subsequently computationally de-mixes the resultant sequences. SAVEMONEY defines optimal mixtures in a pre-survey step, and following sequencing, executes a post-analysis workflow involving sequence classification, alignment, and consensus determination. By using Bayesian analysis with prior probability of expected plasmid construction error rate, high-confidence sequences can be obtained for each plasmid in the mixture. Plasmids differing by as little as two bases can be mixed for submission as a single sample for nanopore sequencing, and routine multiplexing of even six plasmids per 180 reads can still maintain high accuracy of consensus sequencing. SAVEMONEY should further democratize whole-plasmid sequencing by nanopore and related technologies, driving down the effective cost of whole-plasmid sequencing to lower than that of a single Sanger sequencing run.
authors: Uematsu, M.; Baskin, J. M.

ai.TLDR: 质粒构建中序列验证是成本最高的步骤，纳米孔测序虽能单次测序完整质粒但成本仍高。SAVEMONEY算法通过混合多质粒样本并计算分析，显著降低测序成本，使单次测序可处理6个质粒且保持高准确性。
ai.translation: 质粒构建是生命科学研究的核心环节，而序列验证是其中成本最高的步骤。长读长测序技术作为Sanger测序的替代方案，其优势在于可单次测序完整质粒。然而纳米孔测序的当前成本仍限制其在质粒构建中的常规应用。我们开发了名为SAVEMONEY的计算方法，该方法指导研究人员混合多个质粒样本，并通过计算分析实现序列解混。SAVEMONEY在预调研阶段定义最优混合比例，在测序后执行包含序列分类、比对和共识序列确定的后处理流程。通过结合贝叶斯分析和预期质粒构建错误率的先验概率，可获得每个混合质粒的高置信度序列。即使差异仅为两个碱基的质粒也可混合为单一样本进行纳米孔测序，且每180次读取常规混合6个质粒仍能保持共识测序的高准确性。SAVEMONEY将进一步降低纳米孔测序及相关技术的全质粒测序成本，使其低于单次Sanger测序的成本。

title: Multicellular, IVT-derived, unmodified human transcriptome for nanopore direct RNA analysis
abstract: Nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS) enables measurements of RNA modifications. Modification-free transcripts are a practical and targeted control for DRS, providing a baseline measurement for canonical nucleotides within a matched and biologically derived sequence context. However, these controls can be challenging to generate and carry nanopore-specific nuances that can impact analysis. We produced DRS datasets using modification-free transcripts from in vitro transcription (IVT) of cDNA from six immortalized human cell lines. We characterized variation across cell lines and demonstrated how these may be interpreted. These data will serve as a versatile control and resource to the community for RNA modification analysis of human transcripts.
authors: McCormick, C. A.; Akeson, S.; Tavakoli, S.; Bloch, D.; Klink, I. N.; Jain, M.; Rouhanifard, S. H.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔直接RNA测序（DRS）可检测RNA修饰，但传统无修饰转录本对照存在生成困难和纳米孔特异性偏差。本研究通过六种永生化人类细胞系的cDNA体外转录（IVT）生成标准化对照数据集，揭示了细胞系间修饰变异特征，为RNA修饰分析提供可复用的基准资源。
ai.translation: 纳米孔直接RNA测序（DRS）能够实现对RNA修饰的直接检测。无修饰转录本作为DRS的实用且针对性的对照，可为匹配且来源于生物样本的序列背景中的常规核苷酸提供基线测量值。然而，这些对照的生成存在挑战，并且具有纳米孔特有的细微差别，可能影响分析结果。本研究利用六种永生化人类细胞系的cDNA体外转录（IVT）生成的无修饰转录本，构建了DRS数据集。我们分析了不同细胞系间的变异特征，并阐述了这些变异的解读方法。这些数据将作为通用对照资源，为人类转录本的RNA修饰分析提供社区可用的参考依据。

title: IS1-related large-scale deletion of chromosomal regions harbouring oxygen-insensitive nitroreductase gene nfsB causes nitrofurantoin heteroresistance in Escherichia coli
abstract:
Nitrofurantoin is a broad-spectrum first-line antimicrobial used for managing uncomplicated urinary tract infection. Loss-of-function mutations in chromosomal genes nfsA, nfsB, and ribE of Escherichia coli are known to reduce nitrofurantoin susceptibility. Here, we report monoclonal nitrofurantoin heteroresistance in E. coli and a novel genetic mechanism associated with this phenomenon.

Subpopulations with reduced nitrofurantoin susceptibility in cultures of two E. coli blood strains were identified using population analysis profiling. Four colonies of each strain growing on agar with 0.5xMIC nitrofurantoin were sub-cultured in broth with 0.5xMIC nitrofurantoin (n=2) or without nitrofurantoin (n=2). Moreover, one colony of each strain growing without nitrofurantoin exposure was selected as a reference for genomic comparison. Whole-genome sequencing of all isolates were conducted on Illumina and Nanopore MinION systems.

Both strains had a nitrofurantoin MICs of 64 mg/L. The proportion of cells grown at 0.5xMIC was two and 99 per million, respectively, which is distinct to that of a homogeneously susceptible or resistant isolate. All isolates grown at 0.5xMIC had 11-66 kbp deletions in chromosomal regions harbouring nfsB, and all these deletions were immediately adjacent to IS1-family insertion sequences.

Although this study is limited to E. coli and nitrofurantoin, our findings suggest IS1-associated genetic deletion represents a hitherto unrecognised mechanism of heteroresistance that could compromise infection management and impact conventional antimicrobial susceptibility testing.

Impact statementNitrofurantoin is widely used for treating and preventing urinary tract infection. Prevalence of nitrofurantoin resistance generally is low in E. coli. Here, we report nitrofurantoin heteroresistance in two E. coli blood strains and attribute this phenotype to IS1-associated deletion of chromosomal regions harbouring oxygen-insensitive nitroreductase gene nfsB. Our discoveries demonstrate a novel genetic mechanism of heteroresistance and suggest detecting nitrofurantoin heteroresistance in E. coli urinary isolates for improving prescribing.

Data summaryWhole-genome sequencing reads and genome assemblies generated in this study have been deposited under BioProject PRJEB58678 in the European Nucleotide Archive (ENA). Accession numbers are listed in Supplementary Table 1. Previously generated Illumina whole-genome sequencing reads of parental isolates EC0026B and EC0880B are available under ENA accessions ERR3142418 and ERR3142524, respectively.
authors: Wan, Y.; Sabnis, A.; Mumin, Z.; Potterill, I.; Jauneikaite, E.; Brown, C. S.; Ellington, M. J.; Edwards, A. M.; Sriskandan, S.

ai.TLDR: 本研究发现大肠杆菌中存在单克隆硝基呋喃妥因异质耐药性，其机制与IS1家族插入序列邻近的染色体区域删除有关。该发现揭示了新型遗传耐药机制，可能影响传统药敏试验结果。
ai.translation:
硝基呋喃妥因是一种广谱一线抗菌药物，用于治疗无并发症尿路感染。已知大肠杆菌染色体基因nfsA、nfsB和ribE的失功能突变会降低其敏感性。本研究报道了大肠杆菌中单克隆硝基呋喃妥因异质耐药现象，并发现与该现象相关的新型遗传机制。

通过群体分析谱型法，在两种大肠杆菌血流感染菌株培养物中鉴定出耐药亚群。每株菌在含0.5xMIC硝基呋喃妥因的琼脂上生长的四个菌落，分别在含0.5xMIC硝基呋喃妥因的肉汤（n=2）或不含药物的肉汤（n=2）中亚培养。同时，每株菌未暴露于硝基呋喃妥因的菌落作为基因组比较参考。所有分离株均通过Illumina和Nanopore MinION系统进行全基因组测序。

两株菌的硝基呋喃妥因MIC均为64 mg/L。在0.5xMIC浓度下生长的细胞比例分别为2和99每百万，与均质敏感或耐药菌株显著不同。所有在0.5xMIC下生长的分离株均在包含nfsB的染色体区域存在11-66 kbp的缺失，且所有缺失均紧邻IS1家族插入序列。

尽管本研究仅限于大肠杆菌和硝基呋喃妥因，但我们的发现表明IS1相关的染色体区域删除代表一种尚未被认识的异质耐药机制，可能影响感染管理并干扰传统抗菌药物敏感性测试。

影响声明：硝基呋喃妥因广泛用于治疗和预防尿路感染。大肠杆菌中硝基呋喃妥因耐药普遍存在较低。本研究报道了两种大肠杆菌血流感染菌株的硝基呋喃妥因异质耐药性，并将其归因于IS1相关删除导致的氧不敏感硝基还原酶基因nfsB缺失。我们的发现展示了新型异质耐药遗传机制，并建议在大肠杆菌尿液分离株中检测硝基呋喃妥因异质耐药性以优化处方。

数据摘要：本研究生成的全基因组测序读取数据和基因组组装已存入欧洲核苷酸档案库（ENA）的BioProject PRJEB58678项目。补充表1列出了访问编号。之前生成的父代分离株EC0026B和EC0880B的Illumina全基因组测序读取数据分别存于ENA访问编号ERR3142418和ERR3142524。

title: Leptospira transcriptome sequencing using long-read technology reveals unannotated transcripts and potential polyadenylation of mRNA molecules
abstract:
Leptospirosis caused by the spirochete bacteria Leptospira is an emerging zoonosis that causes life-threatening disease in humans and animals. However, a detailed understanding of Leptospiras RNA profiles is limited. In this study, we sequenced and analyzed the transcriptome of multiple Leptospira serovars using Oxford Nanopore Technologies direct cDNA and direct RNA sequencing methods. We identified several operon transcriptional units, novel RNA coding regions, and evidence of potential posttranscriptional polyadenylation in the Leptospira transcriptome. Some coding regions of multiple RNA molecules that have not been previously annotated could be potential sRNA or ncRNA molecules that support gene expression regulation purposes in Leptospira. Many of the relative positions of these unannotated RNA coding regions were consistent in their neighboring coding regions across the reference genomes of two pathogenic Leptospira analyzed in this study. Besides, the majority of the unannotated coding regions and operon transcriptional units were not detected in the nonpathogenic Leptospira, suggesting potential virulence-related functions for these RNA molecules coding regions. Overall, our study confirms the utility of ONTs sequencing in studying prokaryotic transcriptome profiles and offers a tool to improve our understanding of the structural composition of RNA molecules and prokaryotic polyadenylation. However, the findings from our study also warrant that the presence of homopolymers of adenine bases in the transcripts may interfere with the interpretation of bacterial transcriptome profiles.
