Carefully designed experiments are needed to unravel the role of the features described in this study in Leptospira virulence and pathogenesis.

Author SummaryLeptospirosis caused by the spirochete bacteria, Leptospira, is recognized as one of the most widespread zoonotic diseases. Leptospirosis is a neglected disease and has been estimated to cause over one million annual human clinical cases and over 60,000 deaths. Leptospira are maintained in the renal tubules of asymptomatic animal reservoirs, and in contaminated environments, such as soil and water. Studying gene expression profiles is an important component of bacterial pathogenesis studies, and a number of methods are available to do it. Our study compared various transcriptome sequencing methods using one of the latest next generation sequencing tools (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) and evaluated the compositions of RNA in different Leptospiras transcriptomes. We identified many previously undescribed and potentially significant features within the Leptospira transcriptome that may contribute to the virulence and pathogenesis of Leptospira sp. Our findings lead to new opportunities for researchers to sequence prokaryotic RNA molecules and to unravel many regulatory mechanisms.
authors: Xu, R.; Prakoso, D.; Salvador, L. C. M.; Rajeev, S.

ai.TLDR: 钩端螺旋体感染是威胁人类和动物生命的新兴人畜共患病，但其RNA图谱研究仍存在不足。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies直接cDNA和RNA测序技术，揭示了钩端螺旋体转录组中多个操纵子转录单元、新型RNA编码区域及潜在转录后多聚腺苷酸化现象。研究发现，病原性钩端螺旋体中未注释的RNA编码区域可能与致病性相关，而腺嘌呤同聚体可能干扰转录组分析。
ai.translation: 由螺旋体细菌钩端螺旋体引起的钩端螺旋体病是一种威胁人类和动物生命的新兴人畜共患病。然而，目前对钩端螺旋体RNA图谱的详细理解仍存在局限。本研究采用牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies）的直接cDNA和直接RNA测序方法，对多种钩端螺旋体血清型的转录组进行了测序和分析。我们鉴定了多个操纵子转录单元、新型RNA编码区域，并发现了钩端螺旋体转录组中潜在的转录后多聚腺苷酸化证据。研究发现，多个未被注释的RNA分子编码区域可能具有sRNA或ncRNA功能，这些分子可能在调控钩端螺旋体基因表达中发挥作用。在本研究分析的两种致病性钩端螺旋体参考基因组中，这些未注释RNA编码区域的相对位置在邻近编码区域中表现出高度一致性。此外，大多数未注释编码区域和操纵子转录单元在非致病性钩端螺旋体中未被检测到，提示这些RNA分子编码区域可能与致病性相关。总体而言，本研究验证了ONT测序技术在研究原核生物转录组图谱中的应用价值，并为深入理解RNA分子结构组成和原核生物多聚腺苷酸化提供了工具。然而，研究结果也表明，转录本中腺嘌呤同聚体的存在可能干扰细菌转录组图谱的解读。需要精心设计的实验来阐明本研究描述的特征在钩端螺旋体致病性和发病机制中的作用。

title: Sequencing accuracy and systematic errors in nanopore direct RNA sequencing
abstract: Direct RNA sequencing (dRNA-seq) on the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) platforms can produce reads covering up to full-length gene transcripts while containing decipherable information about RNA base modifications and poly-A tail lengths. Although many published studies have been exploring and expanding the potential of dRNA-seq, the sequencing accuracy and error patterns remain understudied. We present the first comprehensive evaluation of accuracy and systematic errors in dRNA-seq data from diverse species, as well as synthetic RNA. Deletions significantly outnumbered mismatches/insertions, while the median read accuracy exhibited species-level variation. In addition to homopolymer errors, we observed systematic biases across nucleotides and heteropolymeric motifs in all species. In general, cytosine/uracil-rich regions were more likely to be erroneous than guanines/adenines. Moreover, the systematic errors were strongly dependent on local sequence contexts. By examining raw signal data, we identified underlying signal-level features potentially associated with the error patterns. While read quality scores approximated error rates at base and read levels, failure to detect DNA adapters may lead to data loss. By comparing distinct basecallers, we reason that some sequencing errors are attributable to signal insufficiency rather than algorithmic (base-calling) artefacts. Lastly, we discuss the implications of such error patterns for downstream applications of dRNA-seq data.
authors: Wang, L.; van der Toorn, W.; Bohn, P.; Hölzer, M.; Smyth, R.; von Kleist, M.

ai.TLDR: 直接RNA测序(dRNA-seq)在牛津纳米孔技术(ONT)平台可生成覆盖全长基因转录本的读段，并包含可解读的RNA碱基修饰和poly-A尾长度信息。尽管已有大量研究探索dRNA-seq潜力，但其测序准确性和错误模式仍缺乏系统研究。本研究首次对多物种和合成RNA的dRNA-seq数据进行全面评估，发现缺失事件显著多于错配/插入事件，且读段准确度呈现物种特异性差异。
ai.translation: 直接RNA测序(direct RNA sequencing, dRNA-seq)在牛津纳米孔技术(Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT)平台上能够生成覆盖全长基因转录本的读段，同时包含可解读的RNA碱基修饰信息和poly-A尾长度数据。尽管已有大量研究探索和拓展dRNA-seq的潜力，但其测序准确性和错误模式仍缺乏系统性研究。本研究首次对多物种和合成RNA的dRNA-seq数据进行全面评估，发现缺失事件显著多于错配/插入事件，而中位数读段准确度呈现物种水平差异。除同聚体错误外，所有物种均观察到核苷酸和异聚体基序的系统性偏差。总体而言，富含胞嘧啶/尿嘧啶的区域比富含鸟嘌呤/腺嘌呤区域更容易出现错误。此外，系统性错误强烈依赖于局部序列上下文。通过分析原始信号数据，我们识别出可能与错误模式相关的信号级特征。虽然读段质量评分可近似反映碱基和读段水平的错误率，但未能检测到DNA接头可能导致数据丢失。通过比较不同碱基调用器，我们推测部分测序错误源于信号不足而非算法（碱基调用）伪影。最后，我们讨论了此类错误模式对dRNA-seq数据下游应用的潜在影响。

title: Coordination of Alternative Splicing and Alternative Polyadenylation revealed by Targeted Long Read Sequencing
abstract: Nervous system development is associated with extensive regulation of alternative splicing (AS) and alternative polyadenylation (APA). AS and APA have been extensively studied in isolation, but little is known about how these processes are coordinated. Here, the coordination of cassette exon (CE) splicing and APA in Drosophila was investigated using a targeted long-read sequencing approach we call Pull-a-Long-Seq (PL-Seq). This cost-effective method uses cDNA pulldown and Nanopore sequencing combined with an analysis pipeline to resolve the connectivity of alternative exons to alternative 3 ends. Using PL-Seq, we identified genes that exhibit significant differences in CE splicing depending on connectivity to short versus long 3UTRs. Genomic long 3UTR deletion was found to alter upstream CE splicing in short 3UTR isoforms and ELAV loss differentially affected CE splicing depending on connectivity to alternative 3UTRs. This work highlights the importance of considering connectivity to alternative 3UTRs when monitoring AS events.
authors: Zhang, Z.; Bae, B.; Cuddleston, W. H.; Miura, P.

ai.TLDR: 神经系统发育过程中可变剪接（AS）和可变多聚腺苷酸化（APA）存在紧密调控关系。本研究通过PL-Seq技术揭示了cassette外显子剪接与3'UTR连接的动态调控机制，发现3'UTR长度差异显著影响剪接模式，强调了3'UTR连接在AS事件监测中的关键作用。
ai.translation: 神经系统发育与广泛的可变剪接（Alternative Splicing, AS）和可变多聚腺苷.3'UTR连接的动态调控机制。我们开发了一种靶向长读长测序方法，称为Pull-a-Long-Seq (PL-Seq)，该方法结合cDNA拉下法和纳米孔测序技术，通过分析流程解析可变外显子与可变3'末端的连接关系。利用PL-Seq技术，我们鉴定了在短3'UTR与长3'UTR连接状态下表现出显著差异的cassette外显子剪接模式。基因组长3'UTR缺失被发现会改变短3'UTR异构体的上游cassette外显子剪接，而ELAV丢失对cassette外显子剪接的影响则取决于其与可变3'UTR的连接状态。本研究强调了在监测AS事件时需考虑可变3'UTR连接关系的重要性。

title: Nanopore adaptive sampling of a metagenomic sample derived from a human monkeypox case
abstract: In 2022, a series of human monkeypox cases in multiple countries led to the largest and most widespread outbreak outside the known endemic areas. Genomic surveillance is of utmost importance to control such outbreaks. To this end, we performed Nanopore Whole Genome Sequencing of a local monkeypox sample on a PromethION 24. Adaptive sampling was applied for in silico depletion of the human host genome, allowing for the enrichment of low abundance viral DNA without a priori knowledge of sample composition. Nanopore sequencing allowed for high viral genome coverage, tracking of sample composition during sequencing, strain determination, and preliminary assessment of mutational pattern. Nanopore sequencing is a highly versatile method to characterize a virus in real-time without pre-sequencing target enrichment.
authors: Hewel, C.; Schmidt, H.; Runkel, S.; Kohnen, W.; Schweiger-Seemann, S.; Michel, A.; Bikar, S.-E.; Plachter, B.; Hankeln, T.; Linke, M.; Gerber, S.

ai.TLDR: 2022年多国猴痘疫情引发全球最大规模爆发，基因组监测成为控制疫情的关键。研究采用PromethION 24平台进行纳米孔全基因组测序，通过自适应采样技术有效富集低丰度病毒DNA，实现病毒株系鉴定和突变模式分析。
ai.translation: 2022年，多国出现的人猴痘病例引发了最大规模且最广泛的疫情爆发，超出已知疫区范围。基因组监测对于控制此类疫情至关重要。为此，我们使用PromethION 24平台对本地猴痘样本进行了纳米孔全基因组测序。采用自适应采样技术进行计算机模拟去除人类宿主基因组，无需预先了解样本组成即可富集低丰度病毒DNA。纳米孔测序实现了高病毒基因组覆盖度，能够实时追踪样本组成变化，确定病毒株系并初步评估突变模式。纳米孔测序是一种无需预测序靶向富集即可实时表征病毒的高灵活性方法。

title: Native RNA nanopore sequencing reveals antibiotic-induced loss of rRNA modifications in the A- and P-sites
abstract: The biological relevance and dynamics of mRNA modifications have been extensively studied in the past few years, revealing their key roles in major cellular processes, such as cellular differentiation or sex determination. However, whether rRNA modifications are dynamically regulated, and under which conditions, remains largely unclear. Here, we performed a systematic characterization of bacterial rRNA modification dynamics upon exposure to diverse antibiotics using native RNA nanopore sequencing. To identify significant rRNA modification changes, we developed NanoConsensus, a novel pipeline that integrates the estimates from multiple RNA modification detection algorithms, predicting differentially modified rRNA sites with very low false positive rates and high replicability. We showed that NanoConsensus is robust across RNA modification types, stoichiometries and coverage, and outperforms all individual algorithms tested. Using this approach, we identified multiple rRNA modifications that are lost upon the presence of antibiotics, showing that rRNA modification profiles are altered in an antibiotic-specific manner. We found that significantly altered rRNA modified sites upon antibiotic exposure are located in the vicinity of the A and P-sites of the ribosome, possibly contributing to antibiotic resistance. We then systematically examined whether loss of  antibiotic-sensitive rRNA modifications may be sufficient to confer antibiotic resistance, finding that depletion of some rRNA modification enzymes guiding dysregulated rRNA modifications confers increased antibiotic resistance. Altogether, our work reveals that rRNA modification profiles can be rapidly altered in response to environmental exposures, and that nanopore sequencing can accurately identify dysregulated rRNA modifications, contributing to the mechanistic dissection of antibiotic resistance. Moreover, we provide a novel, robust workflow to study rRNA modification dynamics in any species using nanopore sequencing in a scalable and reproducible manner.
authors: Delgado-Tejedor, A.; Medina, R.; Begik, O.; Cozzuto, L.; Ponomarenko, J.; Novoa, E. M.

ai.TLDR: 近年来对mRNA修饰的研究揭示了其在细胞分化等过程中的关键作用，但rRNA修饰的动态调控机制仍不清楚。本研究通过纳米孔测序系统分析抗生素暴露下的rRNA修饰动态，开发出NanoConsensus算法，发现抗生素可特异性改变rRNA修饰谱，且部分修饰酶的缺失可增强抗生素耐药性。
ai.translation: 过去几年对mRNA修饰的生物学意义和动态变化的研究已广泛展开，揭示了其在细胞分化、性别决定等关键细胞过程中的核心作用。然而，rRNA修饰是否具有动态调控特性及其调控条件仍不清楚。本研究通过原生RNA纳米孔测序技术，系统分析了细菌在多种抗生素暴露下的rRNA修饰动态变化。为识别显著的rRNA修饰变化，我们开发了NanoConsensus新流程，该流程整合多个RNA修饰检测算法的估计值，能够以极低的假阳性率和高可重复性预测差异修饰位点。结果显示，NanoConsensus在不同RNA修饰类型、摩尔比和覆盖度条件下均表现出鲁棒性，且优于所有测试的单算法。通过该方法，我们发现多种rRNA修饰在抗生素存在时消失，表明rRNA修饰谱以抗生素特异性方式发生改变。进一步发现，抗生素暴露导致的显著修饰位点变化位于核糖体A位和P位附近，可能参与抗生素耐药性形成。随后系统验证了抗生素敏感性rRNA修饰的丧失是否足以赋予耐药性，发现部分调控异常修饰的rRNA修饰酶的缺失可增强抗生素耐药性。综上，我们的研究揭示了rRNA修饰谱可快速响应环境暴露变化，纳米孔测序能准确识别异常修饰，为抗生素耐药机制解析提供新思路。同时，我们提供了基于纳米孔测序的新型可靠工作流程，可规模化、可重复地研究任意物种的rRNA修饰动态。

title: Aptamer Conformational Dynamics Modulate Neurotransmitter Sensing in Nanopores
abstract: Aptamers that undergo conformational changes upon small-molecule recognition have been shown to gate the ionic flux through nanopores by rearranging charge density within the aptamer-occluded orifice. However, mechanistic insight into such systems where biomolecular interactions are confined in nanoscale spaces, is limited. To understand the fundamental mechanisms that facilitate the detection of small-molecule analytes inside structure-switching aptamer-modified nanopores, we correlated experimental observations to theoretical models. We developed a dopamine aptamer-functionalized nanopore sensor with femtomolar detection limits and compared the sensing behavior with a serotonin sensor fabricated with the same methodology. When sensing these two neurotransmitters with comparable mass and equal charge, the sensors showed an opposite electronic behavior. This distinctive phenomenon was extensively studied using complementary experimental techniques such as quartz crystal microbalance with dissipation monitoring, in combination with theoretical assessment by the finite element method and molecular dynamic simulations. Taken together, our studies demonstrate that the sensing behavior of aptamer-modified nanopores in detecting specific small-molecule analytes correlates to the structure-switching mechanisms of individual aptamers. We believe that such investigations not only improve our understanding of the complex interactions occurring in confined nanoscale environments, but will also drive further innovations in biomimetic nanopore technologies.
authors: Stuber, A.; Douaki, A.; Hengsteler, J.; Buckingham, D.; Momotenko, D.; Garoli, D.; Nakatsuka, N.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过结合实验观测与理论模型，揭示了适配体修饰纳米孔传感器在检测小分子分析物时的结构切换机制。实验发现，多巴胺和血清素这两种分子量相近且电荷相等的神经递质在传感器中表现出相反的电子行为，表明结构切换机制与检测响应密切相关。
ai.translation: 在小分子识别过程中发生构象变化的适配体已被证明可通过重新排列适配体阻塞孔道内的电荷密度来调控纳米孔的离子流。然而，受限于纳米尺度空间中生物分子相互作用的复杂性，目前对这类系统的机制理解仍存在局限。为阐明结构切换适配体修饰纳米孔检测小分子分析物的基本机制，我们通过实验观测与理论模型的关联分析进行了系统研究。开发了具有飞摩尔级检测限的多巴胺适配体功能化纳米孔传感器，并将其传感行为与采用相同方法制备的血清素传感器进行了对比。当检测这两种分子量相近且电荷相等的神经递质时，传感器表现出相反的电子响应行为。这一独特现象通过石英晶体微天平耗散监测等互补实验技术，结合有限元法和分子动力学模拟的理论评估进行了深入研究。研究结果表明，适配体修饰纳米孔对特定小分子分析物的传感行为与其个体结构切换机制密切相关。我们认为此类研究不仅深化了对受限纳米尺度环境中复杂相互作用的理解，也将推动仿生纳米孔技术的进一步创新。

title: A complete digital karyotype of the B-cell leukemia REH cell line resolved by long-read sequencing
abstract:
The B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) cell line REH, with the t(12;21) ETV6-RUNX1 translocation, is known to have a complex karyotype defined by a series of large-scale chromosomal rearrangements. Taken from a 15-year-old at relapse, the cell line offers a practical model for the study of high-risk pediatric B-ALL patients. In recent years, short-read DNA and RNA sequencing have emerged as a complement to analog karyotyping techniques in the resolution of structural variants in an oncological context. However, it is challenging to create a comprehensive digital karyotype of a genome with these techniques alone. Here, we explore the integration of long-read PacBio and Oxford Nanopore whole genome sequencing (WGS), IsoSeq RNA-sequencing, and short-read sequencing to create a detailed digital karyotype of the REH cell line. WGS refined the breakpoints of known aberrations and clarified the molecular traits of disrupted ALL-associated genes BTG1 and TBL1XR1, as well as the glucocorticoid receptor NR3C1. Several previously underreported structural variants were also uncovered, including deletions affecting the ALL-associated genes VPREB1 and NFATC1. Meanwhile, transcriptome sequencing identified seven fusion genes within the genomic breakpoints. Together, our extensive whole-genome investigation makes high-quality open-source data available to the leukemia genomics community.

KEY POINTSO_LIA complete digital karyotype of the REH cell line was produced with short- and long-read DNA and RNA sequencing technologies.
C_LIO_LIThe study enabled precise identification of structural variants, and the fusion genes expressed as the result of these variants.
C_LI
authors: Lysenkova Wiklander, M.; Arvidsson, G.; Bunikis, I.; Lundmark, A.; Raine, A.; Marincevic-Zuniga, Y.; Gezelius, H.; Bremer, A.; Feuk, L.; Ameur, A.; Nordlund, J.

ai.TLDR: REH细胞系作为高危B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（B-ALL）研究模型，其复杂核型通过整合长读长测序、IsoSeq和短读长测序技术实现精准解析。研究揭示了新型结构变异及融合基因，为白血病基因组学提供高质量开放数据。
keywords: B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病
ai.translation: B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（B-ALL）细胞系REH携带t(12;21) ETV6-RUNX1易位，其复杂核型由一系列大规模染色体重排定义。该细胞系源自15岁复发患者，为研究高危儿科B-ALL提供了实用模型。近年来，短读长DNA和RNA测序已成为解析肿瘤学领域结构变异的补充技术，但单独使用这些技术难以构建完整的数字核型。本研究通过整合长读长PacBio和Oxford Nanopore全基因组测序（WGS）、IsoSeq RNA测序及短读长测序技术，构建了REH细胞系的详细数字核型。WGS技术精确定位已知异常的断裂点，并阐明了ALL相关基因BTG1、TBL1XR1及糖皮质激素受体NR3C1的分子特征。同时发现了多个此前未被报道的结构变异，包括影响ALL相关基因VPREB1和NFATC1的缺失突变。转录组测序在基因组断裂点内鉴定出七种融合基因。本研究通过全面的全基因组分析，为白血病基因组学社区提供了高质量的开放源数据。

title: VIsoQLR: an interactive tool for the detection, quantification and fine-tuning of isoforms in selected genes using long-read sequencing
abstract:
DNA variants altering the pre-mRNA splicing process represent an underestimated cause of human genetic diseases. Their association with disease traits should be confirmed using functional assays from patient cell lines or alternative models to detect aberrant mRNAs. Long-read sequencing is a suitable technique to identify and quantify mRNA isoforms. Available isoform detection and/or quantification tools are generally designed for the whole transcriptome analysis. However experiments focusing on genes of interest need more precise data fine-tuning and visualization tools.

Here we describe VIsoQLR, an interactive analyzer, viewer and editor for the semi-automated identification and quantification of known and novel isoforms using long-read sequencing data. VIsoQLR is tailored to thoroughly analyze mRNA expression in splicing assays of selected genes. Our tool takes sequences aligned to a reference, and for each gene, it defines consensus splice sites and quantifies isoforms. VIsoQLR introduces features to edit the splice sites through dynamic and interactive graphics and tables, allowing accurate manual curation. Known isoforms detected by other methods can also be imported as references for comparison. A benchmark against two other popular transcriptome-based tools shows VIsoQLR accurate performance on both detection and quantification of isoforms. Here, we present VIsoQLR principles and features and its applicability in a case study example using nanopore-based long-read sequencing. VIsoQLR is available at <https://github.com/TBLabFJD/VIsoQLR>.
authors: Gonzalo Núñez-Moreno, Alejandra Tamayo, ... Pablo Mínguez
citation: Núñez-Moreno, G., Tamayo, A., Ruiz-Sánchez, C. et al. VIsoQLR: an interactive tool for the detection, quantification and fine-tuning of isoforms in selected genes using long-read sequencing. Hum Genet 142 , 495–506 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1007/s00439-023-02539-z
description: DNA variants altering the pre-mRNA splicing process represent an underestimated cause of human genetic diseases. Their association with disease...

ai.TLDR: DNA变异影响前mRNA剪接过程是人类遗传病的潜在原因，需通过功能实验验证其与疾病表型的关联。VIsoQLR作为长读长测序工具，可半自动识别和量化已知/新异构体，通过动态交互界面实现剪接位点编辑与手动校正，验证其在异构体检测与量化中的准确性。
ai.translation:
改变前mRNA剪接过程的DNA变异是人类遗传病被低估的原因。应通过患者细胞系或替代模型的功能实验验证其与疾病表型的关联，以检测异常mRNA。长读长测序是识别和量化mRNA异构体的合适技术。现有异构体检测/量化工具通常设计用于全转录组分析，但针对感兴趣基因的实验需要更精确的数据微调和可视化工具。

本文介绍VIsoQLR，一款交互式分析器、查看器和编辑器，用于基于长读长测序数据的已知和新型异构体的半自动识别与量化。VIsoQLR专为全面分析选定基因的mRNA表达在剪接实验中设计。该工具接收与参考序列比对的序列数据，对每个基因定义共识剪接位点并量化异构体。VIsoQLR引入动态交互图形和表格功能，允许用户通过手动校正精确编辑剪接位点。其他方法检测到的已知异构体也可导入作为参考进行比较。与两款流行转录组学工具的基准测试显示，VIsoQLR在异构体检测和量化方面均表现出准确性能。本文展示VIsoQLR的原理、功能及其在纳米孔长读长测序案例研究中的适用性。VIsoQLR可在<https://github.com/TBLabFJD/VIsoQLR>获取。

title: GPU-accelerated Dynamic Time Warping for SelectiveNanopore Sequencing
abstract: The design and supply of RT-PCR primers for accurate virus testing is a complex process. The MinION is a revolutionary portable nanopore DNA sequencer that may be used to sequence the whole genome of a target virus in a biological sample. Human samples have more than 99% of non-target host DNA and Read Until is a protocol that enables the MinION to selectively eject reads in real-time. However, the MinION does not have any in-built compute power to select non-target reads. SquiggleFilter is a prior work that identified the accuracy and throughput challenges in performing Read Until using the state-of-the-art solution and proposed a hardware-accelerated subsequence Dynamic Time Warping (sDTW) based programmable filter on an ASIC. However, SquiggleFilter does not work for genomes larger than 100Kb. We optimize SquiggleFilters sDTW algorithm onto the more commonly available GPUs. DTWax better uses tensor core pipes, 2X-SIMD FP16 computations and efficient data handling strategies using offline pre-processing, coalesced global memory loads, warp shuffles and shared memory buffering among other optimizations. DTWax enables Read Until and yields 1.92X sequencing speedup and 3.64X compute speedup: costup over a sequencing workflow that does not use Read Until.
authors: Sadasivan, H.; Stiffler, D.; Tirumala, A.; Israeli, J.; Narayanasamy, S.

ai.TLDR: RT-PCR引物设计与病毒检测存在复杂性，MinION纳米孔测序仪通过Read Until协议可实现靶向病毒全基因组测序。SquiggleFilter因硬件限制无法处理超100Kb基因组，DTWax通过GPU优化实现1.92倍测序加速和3.64倍计算加速。
ai.translation: RT-PCR引物的设计与供应用于准确的病毒检测是一个复杂的过程。MinION是一种革命性的便携式纳米孔DNA测序仪，可用于对生物样本中的目标病毒进行全基因组测序。人类样本中超过99%的DNA是非靶向宿主DNA，Read Until是一种使MinION能够实时选择性排出读段的协议。然而，MinION本身没有内置的计算能力来选择非靶向读段。SquiggleFilter是一项先前的工作，识别了使用最新解决方案进行Read Until时的准确性和吞吐量挑战，并提出了基于硬件加速的子序列动态时间规整（sDTW）的可编程过滤器。然而，SquiggleFilter无法处理超过100Kb的基因组。我们将SquiggleFilter的sDTW算法优化到更常见的GPU上。DTWax更好地利用了张量核心管道、2X-SIMD FP16计算以及通过离线预处理、合并全局内存加载、线程shuffle和共享内存缓冲等优化策略实现的高效数据处理。DTWax实现了Read Until，带来了1.92倍的测序加速和3.64倍的计算加速，相比不使用Read Until的测序流程具有显著优势。

title: Long-read sequence analysis of MMEJ-mediated CRISPR genome editing reveals complex on-target vector insertions that may escape standard PCR-based quality control
abstract: CRISPR genome editing is a powerful tool for elucidating biological functions. To modify the genome as intended, it is essential to understand the various modes of recombination that can occur. In this study, we report unexpected complex vector insertions that were identified during the generation of conditional alleles by CRISPR editing using microhomology-mediated end joining (MMEJ). The targeting vector contained two loxP sequences and flanking 40-bp microhomologies. The genomic regions corresponding to the loxP sequences were cleaved with Cas9 in mouse embryonic stem cells. PCR screening for targeted recombination revealed a high frequency of bands of a larger size than expected. Nanopore sequencing of these bands revealed complex vector insertions mediated not only by MMEJ but also by non-homologous end joining and homologous recombination in at least 17% of the clones. A new band appeared upon improving the PCR conditions, suggesting the presence of unexpectedly modified alleles that escape standard PCR screening. This prompted us to characterize the recombination of each allele of the genome-edited clones using heterozygous single nucleotide polymorphisms, leading to confirmation of the presence of homozygous alleles. Our study indicates that careful quality control of genome-edited clones is needed to exclude complex, unexpected, on-target vector insertion.
authors: Higashitani, Y.; Horie, K.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了CRISPR编辑中意外的复杂载体插入现象，表明在生成条件等位基因时，微同源介导的末端连接（MMEJ）以外的非同源末端连接和同源重组也可能发生。通过改进PCR条件发现新型条带，提示存在逃逸标准筛查的修饰等位基因，强调基因编辑克隆需严格质量控制以排除意外的靶向载体插入。
keywords: 微同源介导的末端连接
ai.translation: CRISPR基因组编辑是阐明生物功能的强大工具。为了按预期修改基因组，必须理解可能发生的各种重组模式。本研究在通过微同源介导的末端连接（MMEJ）进行CRISPR编辑生成条件等位基因时，意外发现了复杂的载体插入现象。靶向载体包含两个loxP序列和两侧的40碱基微同源序列。在小鼠胚胎干细胞中，Cas9切割了对应loxP序列的基因组区域。针对重组的PCR筛查显示，比预期更大的条带频率较高。对这些条带的纳米孔测序揭示，至少17%的克隆中存在由MMEJ、非同源末端连接和同源重组共同介导的复杂载体插入。改进PCR条件后出现新的条带，提示存在逃逸标准PCR筛查的意外修饰等位基因。这促使我们通过杂合单核苷酸多态性对基因组编辑克隆的每个等位基因重组进行表征，确认了纯合等位基因的存在。本研究表明，需对基因编辑克隆进行严格的质量控制，以排除复杂且意外的靶向载体插入。

title: Phased nanopore assembly with Shasta and modular graph phasing with GFAse
abstract: As a step towards simplifying and reducing the cost of haplotype resolved de novo assembly, we describe new methods for accurately phasing nanopore data with the Shasta genome assembler and a modular tool for extending phasing to the chromosome scale called GFAse. We test using new variants of Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) PromethION sequencing, including those using proximity ligation and show that newer, higher accuracy ONT reads substantially improve assembly quality.
authors: Lorig-Roach, R.; Meredith, M.; Monlong, J.; Jain, M.; Olsen, H.; McNulty, B.; Porubsky, D.; Montague, T. G.; Lucas, J.; Condon, C.; Eizenga, J.; Juul, S.; McKenzie, S.; Simmonds, S.; Park, J.; Asri, M.; Koren, S.; Eichler, E.; Axel, R.; Martin, B.; Carnevali, P.; Miga, K.; Paten, B.

ai.TLDR: 为简化并降低单倍型解析的从头组装成本，研究者开发了基于Shasta基因组组装器的新型纳米孔数据相位分离方法，并通过GFAse工具扩展至染色体尺度。实验表明，新型ONT PromethION测序技术（含邻近连接方案）显著提升了组装质量。
ai.translation: 为简化并降低单倍型解析的从头组装成本，我们描述了新的方法，用于通过Shasta基因组组装器准确相位分离纳米孔数据，并开发了一个模块化工具GFAse，用于将相位分离扩展至染色体尺度。我们测试了新型牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）PromethION测序方案，包括采用邻近连接技术的变体，并证明更新的、准确性更高的ONT测序数据显著提升了组装质量。

title: Pressure-driven membrane inflation through nanopores on the cell wall
abstract: Walled cells, such as plants and fungi, compose an important part of the model systems in biology. The cell wall primarily functions to prevent the cell from over-expansion when exposed to water, and is a porous material distributed with nanosized pores on it. In this paper, we study the deformation of a membrane patch by an osmotic pressure through a nanopore on the cell wall. We find that there exists a critical pore size beyond which the membrane cannot stand against the pressure and would inflate out through the pore. The critical pore size scales exponentially with the membrane tension and the spontaneous curvature, and exhibits a power law dependence on the osmotic pressure. Our results also show that the liquid membrane expansion by pressure is mechanically different from the solid balloon expansion, and predict that the bending rigidity of the membrane in walled cells should be larger than that of the mammalian cells so as to prevent inflation through the pores on the cell wall.
authors: Zhong, Q.; Wu, C.-X.; MA, R.

ai.TLDR: 细胞壁（如植物和真菌）在生物模型系统中具有重要地位，其主要功能是防止细胞过度膨胀。本研究通过纳米孔探讨渗透压对膜片变形的影响，发现膜存在临界孔径阈值，超过该阈值会导致膜通过孔洞膨胀。结果表明，膜弯曲刚度需高于哺乳动物细胞以防止细胞壁孔洞引发的膨胀。
ai.translation: 具有细胞壁的细胞（如植物和真菌）构成了生物学模型系统的重要组成部分。细胞壁的主要功能是防止细胞在接触水分时过度膨胀，其结构为具有纳米级孔洞的多孔材料。本文通过纳米孔研究渗透压对膜片变形的影响，发现存在一个临界孔径阈值，当孔径超过该阈值时，膜无法承受压力并会通过孔洞膨胀。临界孔径与膜张力和自发曲率呈指数关系，对渗透压呈幂律依赖。研究结果还表明，液体膜的膨胀机制与固体气球膨胀存在机械差异，并预测有细胞壁的细胞膜弯曲刚度应高于哺乳动物细胞，以防止通过细胞壁孔洞引发的膨胀。

title: Deciphering D4Z4 CpG methylation gradients in fascioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy using nanopore sequencing
abstract: Fascioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy (FSHD) is caused by a unique genetic mechanism that relies on contraction and hypomethylation of the D4Z4 macrosatellite array on the chromosome 4q telomere allowing ectopic expression of the DUX4 gene in skeletal muscle. Genetic analysis is difficult due to the large size and repetitive nature of the array, a nearly identical array on the 10q telomere, and the presence of divergent D4Z4 arrays scattered throughout the genome. Here, we combine nanopore long-read sequencing with Cas9-targeted enrichment of 4q and 10q D4Z4 arrays for comprehensive genetic analysis including determination of the length of the 4q and 10q D4Z4 arrays with base-pair resolution. In the same assay, we differentiate 4q from 10q telomeric sequences, determine A/B haplotype, identify paralogous D4Z4 sequences elsewhere in the genome, and estimate methylation for all CpGs in the array. Asymmetric, length-dependent methylation gradients were observed in the 4q and 10q D4Z4 arrays that reach a hypermethylation point at approximately 10 D4Z4 repeat units, consistent with the known threshold of pathogenic D4Z4 contractions. High resolution analysis of individual D4Z4 repeat methylation revealed areas of low methylation near the CTCF/insulator region and areas of high methylation immediately preceding the DUX4 transcriptional start site. Within the DUX4 exons, we observed a waxing/waning methylation pattern with a 180-nucleotide periodicity, consistent with phased nucleosomes. Targeted nanopore sequencing complements recently developed molecular combing and optical mapping approaches to genetic analysis for FSHD by adding precision of the length measurement, base-pair resolution sequencing, and quantitative methylation analysis.
authors: Butterfield, R. J.; Dunn, D. M.; Duvall, B.; Moldt, S.; Weiss, R. B.

ai.TLDR: 法布里-马莱德综合征（FSHD）由染色体4q端粒处D4Z4宏卫星阵列的收缩和去甲基化导致DUX4基因在骨骼肌中的异常表达。传统遗传分析因D4Z4阵列的重复性和大尺寸面临挑战，本文通过结合纳米孔长读长测序与Cas9靶向富集技术，实现了对4q/10q D4Z4阵列的高分辨率分析，揭示了甲基化梯度与染色质结构的关联。
ai.translation: 法布里-马莱德综合征（FSHD）是由染色体4q端粒处D4Z4宏卫星阵列的收缩和去甲基化引发的遗传性疾病，这种机制导致DUX4基因在骨骼肌中异常表达。由于D4Z4阵列的重复性、大尺寸以及染色体10q端粒处高度相似的阵列，传统遗传分析面临显著挑战。本研究结合纳米孔长读长测序技术与Cas9靶向富集策略，实现了对4q和10q D4Z4阵列的全面遗传分析，包括以碱基对分辨率确定阵列长度。同一检测流程中，可区分4q与10q端粒序列、确定A/B单倍型、识别基因组其他区域的同源D4Z4序列，并对阵列内所有CpG位点进行甲基化定量分析。研究发现4q和10q D4Z4阵列存在不对称的长度依赖性甲基化梯度，在约10个D4Z4重复单位处达到超甲基化阈值，与已知的致病性D4Z4收缩阈值一致。对单个D4Z4重复单元甲基化分析显示，CTCF/绝缘子区域附近存在低甲基化区，而DUX4转录起始位点前部呈现高甲基化区。在DUX4外显子中观察到180核苷酸周期性的甲基化波动模式，与相位化的核小体结构一致。靶向纳米孔测序通过提供长度测量精度、碱基对分辨率测序和定量甲基化分析，补充了近期发展的分子梳和光学映射技术，为FSHD的遗传分析提供了更精确的工具。

title: Diameter Dependence of Transport through Nuclear Pore Complex Mimics Studied Using Optical Nanopores
abstract: The nuclear pore complex (NPC) regulates the selective transport of large biomolecules through the nuclear envelope. As a model system for nuclear transport, we construct NPC mimics by functionalizing the pore walls of freestanding palladium zero-mode waveguides with the FG-nucleoporin Nsp1. This approach enables the measurement of single-molecule translocations through individual pores using optical detection. We probe the selectivity of Nsp1-coated pores by quantitatively comparing the translocation rates of the nuclear transport receptor Kap95 to the inert probe BSA over a wide range of pore sizes from 35 nm to 160 nm. Pores below 55 {+/-} 5 nm show significant selectivity that gradually decreases for larger pores. This finding is corroborated by coarse-grained molecular-dynamics simulations of the Nsp1 mesh within the pore, which suggest that leakage of BSA occurs by diffusion through transient openings within the dynamic mesh. Furthermore, we experimentally observe a modulation of the BSA permeation when varying the concentration of Kap95. The results demonstrate the potential of single-molecule fluorescence measurements on biomimetic NPCs to elucidate the principles of nuclear transport.
authors: Klughammer, N.; Barth, A.; Dekker, M.; Fragasso, A.; Onck, P.; Dekker, C.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过构建仿生核孔复合体（NPC）模拟系统，揭示了核运输选择性机制。利用单分子荧光技术测量不同孔径下运输受体与惰性探针的传输速率差异，发现孔径小于55 nm时存在显著选择性，该结果通过分子动力学模拟得到验证。
ai.translation: 核孔复合体（NPC）调控大分子物质通过核膜的选择性运输。作为核运输研究模型系统，我们通过功能化自由站立钯零模波导的孔壁，构建了FG核孔蛋白Nsp1修饰的NPC模拟体。该方法实现了单分子通过单个孔道的光学检测。通过定量比较核运输受体Kap95与惰性探针BSA在35-160 nm不同孔径下的传输速率，发现孔径小于55±5 nm时存在显著选择性，而大孔径选择性逐渐降低。该结果通过Nsp1网格的粗粒度分子动力学模拟得到验证，表明BSA泄漏是通过动态网格中瞬时开口的扩散实现。进一步实验观察到Kap95浓度变化会调节BSA渗透性。结果证明了基于仿生NPC的单分子荧光检测在揭示核运输原理中的潜力。

title: Defining the heterogeneity of unbalanced structural variation underlying breast cancer susceptibility by nanopore genome sequencing
abstract: Germline structural variants (SVs) are challenging to resolve by conventional genetic testing assays. Long-read sequencing has improved the global characterization of SVs, but its sensitivity at cancer susceptibility loci has not been reported. Nanopore long-read genome sequencing was performed for nineteen individuals with pathogenic copy number alterations in *BRCA1*, *BRCA2*, *CHEK2* and *PALB2* identified by prior clinical testing. Fourteen variants, which spanned single exons to whole genes and included a tandem duplication, were accurately represented. Defining the precise breakpoints of SVs in *BRCA1* and *CHEK2* revealed unforeseen allelic heterogeneity and informed the mechanisms underlying the formation of recurrent deletions. Integrating read-based and statistical phasing further helped define extended haplotypes associated with founder alleles. Long-read sequencing is a sensitive method for characterizing private, recurrent and founder SVs underlying breast cancer susceptibility. Our findings demonstrate the potential for nanopore sequencing as a powerful genetic testing assay in the hereditary cancer setting.
authors: Katherine Dixon, Yaoqing Shen, ... Steven J. M. Jones
citation: Dixon, K., Shen, Y., O’Neill, K. et al. Defining the heterogeneity of unbalanced structural variation underlying breast cancer susceptibility by nanopore genome sequencing. Eur J Hum Genet 31 , 602–606 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41431-023-01284-1
description: Germline structural variants (SVs) are challenging to resolve by conventional genetic testing assays. Long-read sequencing has improved the global...

ai.TLDR: 传统遗传检测方法难以解析胚系结构变异(SVs)，而长读长测序虽能全局表征SVs，但其在癌症易感位点的敏感性尚未验证。通过纳米孔长读长测序分析19例携带BRCA1/BRCA2等基因致病性拷贝数改变的个体，成功识别14种变异并揭示了新的等位基因异质性及重复删除机制。
ai.translation: 胚系结构变异(SVs)难以通过传统遗传检测方法解析。长读长测序虽能改善SVs的全局表征，但其在癌症易感位点的敏感性尚未报道。本研究对19例经临床检测确认携带BRCA1、BRCA2、CHEK2和PALB2基因致病性拷贝数改变的个体进行了纳米孔长读长基因组测序。成功准确识别出涵盖单个外显子至整基因的14种变异，包括串联重复。明确BRCA1和CHEK2基因SVs的精确断点揭示了未预见的等位基因异质性，并阐明了重复删除形成的机制。整合基于读段和统计的相位分析进一步定义了与创始等位基因相关的扩展单体型。长读长测序是一种敏感方法，可表征与乳腺癌易感性相关的私有、复发性和创始SVs。我们的研究结果证明了纳米孔测序作为遗传检测方法在遗传性癌症领域的应用潜力。

title: Dancing the Nanopore limbo - Nanopore metagenomics from small DNA quantities for bacterial genome reconstruction
abstract:
BackgroundWhile genome-resolved metagenomics has revolutionized our understanding of microbial and genetic diversity in environmental samples, assemblies of short-reads often result in incomplete and/or highly fragmented metagenome-assembled genomes (MAGs), hampering in-depth genomics. Although Nanopore sequencing has increasingly been used in microbial metagenomics as long reads greatly improve the assembly quality of MAGs, the recommended DNA quantity usually exceeds the recoverable amount of DNA of environmental samples. Here, we evaluated lower-than-recommended DNA quantities for Nanopore library preparation by determining sequencing quality, community composition, assembly quality and recovery of MAGs.

ResultsWe generated 27 Nanopore metagenomes using the commercially available ZYMO mock community and varied the amount of input DNA from 1000 ng (the recommended minimum) down to 1 ng in eight steps. The quality of the generated reads remained stable across all input levels. The read mapping accuracy, which reflects how well the reads match a known reference genome, was consistently high across all libraries. The relative abundance of the species in the metagenomes was stable down to input levels of 50 ng. High-quality MAGs (> 95% completeness, [≤] 5% contamination) could be recovered from metagenomes down to 35 ng of input material. When combined with publicly available Illumina reads for the mock community, Nanopore reads from input quantities as low as 1 ng improved the quality of hybrid assemblies.

ConclusionOur results show that the recommended DNA amount for Nanopore library preparation can be substantially reduced without any adverse effects to genome recovery and still bolster hybrid assemblies when combined with short-read data. We posit that the results presented herein will enable studies to improve genome recovery from low-biomass environments, enhancing microbiome understanding.
authors: Simon, S. A.; Schmidt, K.; Griesdorn, L.; Soares, A. R.; Bornemann, T. L. V.; Probst, A. J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究评估了纳米孔测序在低DNA量下的宏基因组组装效果，发现减少推荐DNA量不会影响基因组回收质量，且结合短读数据可提升混合组装质量。该成果为低生物量环境的基因组回收研究提供了新思路。
ai.translation:
背景：尽管基于基因组的宏基因组学革命性地改变了我们对环境样本中微生物和遗传多样性的理解，但短读长的组装通常会导致不完整和/或高度碎片化的宏基因组组装基因组（MAGs），阻碍深入基因组学分析。虽然纳米孔测序因长读长显著提升MAGs组装质量而被广泛用于微生物宏基因组学，但推荐的DNA量通常超过环境样本可回收的DNA量。本研究评估了低于推荐量的DNA量对纳米孔文库制备的影响，通过测定测序质量、群落组成、组装质量和MAGs回收情况进行分析。

结果：我们使用商业化的ZYMO模拟群落生成了27个纳米孔宏基因组，将输入DNA量从推荐的最低值1000 ng逐步降至1 ng（共8个梯度）。所有输入水平下生成的读长质量保持稳定。反映读长与已知参考基因组匹配程度的读长映射准确性在所有文库中均保持较高水平。宏基因组中物种相对丰度在输入量降至50 ng时仍保持稳定。从输入量35 ng的样本中可回收到高质量MAGs（>95%完整性，≤5%污染）。当结合公开的Illumina读长数据时，仅需1 ng输入量的纳米孔读长即可提升混合组装质量。

结论：我们的结果表明，纳米孔文库制备的推荐DNA量可显著减少而不影响基因组回收质量，且与短读数据结合时仍能增强混合组装效果。我们认为本研究结果将使低生物量环境的基因组回收研究成为可能，从而提升微生物组的理解深度。

title: Chromosome-level genome assembly of Lilford's wall lizard, Podarcis lilfordi (Gunther, 1874) from the Balearic Islands (Spain)
abstract: The Mediterranean lizard Podarcis lilfordi is an emblematic species of the Balearic Islands. The extensive phenotypic diversity among extant isolated populations makes the species a great insular model system for eco-evolutionary studies, as well as a challenging target for conservation management plans. Here we report the first high quality chromosome-level assembly and annotation of the P. lilfordi genome, along with its mitogenome, based on a mixed sequencing strategy (10X Genomics linked reads, Oxford Nanopore Technologies long reads and Hi-C scaffolding) coupled with extensive transcriptomic data (Illumina and PacBio). The genome assembly (1.5 Gb) is highly contiguous (N50 = 90 Mb) and complete, with 99% of the sequence assigned to candidate chromosomal sequences and >97% gene completeness. We annotated a total of 25,663 protein-coding genes, assigning 72% to known functions. Comparison to the genome of the related species Podarcis muralis revealed substantial similarity in genome size, annotation metrics, repeat content, and strong collinearity, despite their evolutionary distance (~18-20 MYA). This genome expands the repertoire of available reptilian genomes and will facilitate the exploration of the molecular and evolutionary processes underlying the extraordinary phenotypic diversity of this insular species, while providing a critical resource for conservation genomics.
authors: Gomez-Garrido, J.; Cruz, F.; Alioto, T. S.; Feiner, N.; Uller, T.; Gut, M.; Sanchez Escudero, I.; Tavecchia, G.; Rotger, A.; Otalora Acevedo, K. E.; Baldo, L.

ai.TLDR: 本研究首次完成地中海蜥蜴Podarcis lilfordi的染色体级基因组组装与注释，结合多种测序技术揭示其基因组特征。该基因组具有高连续性和完整性，为研究岛屿物种的表型多样性及保护遗传学提供重要资源。
ai.translation: 地中海蜥蜴Podarcis lilfordi是巴利阿里群岛的标志性物种。现存孤立种群间广泛的表型多样性使其成为生态进化研究的理想岛生模型系统，同时也为保护管理计划带来挑战。本研究首次报道了P. lilfordi基因组的高质量染色体级组装与注释，结合混合测序策略（10X Genomics链接读数、牛津纳米孔长读数和Hi-C scaffolding）及大量转录组数据（Illumina和PacBio）。组装后的基因组（1.5 Gb）具有高度连续性（N50=90 Mb）和完整性，99%的序列被分配到候选染色体序列，>97%的基因完整性。共注释了25,663个蛋白质编码基因，其中72%被赋予已知功能。与近缘物种Podarcis muralis基因组比较发现，尽管进化距离约18-20 MYA，其基因组大小、注释指标、重复序列含量及强共线性表现出显著相似性。该基因组扩展了可用的爬行动物基因组资源，将促进探索该岛屿物种非凡表型多样性的分子与进化机制，同时为保护基因组学提供关键资源。

title: LINE1-mediated reverse transcription and genomic integration of SARS-CoV-2 mRNA detected in virus-infected but not in viral mRNA-transfected cells
abstract: SARS-CoV-2 sequences can be reverse-transcribed and integrated into the genomes of virus-infected cells by a LINE1-mediated retrotransposition mechanism. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) methods detected retrotransposed SARS-CoV-2 subgenomic sequences in virus-infected cells overexpressing LINE1, while an enrichment method (TagMap) identified retrotranspositions in cells that did not overexpress LINE1. LINE1 overexpression increased retrotranspositions about 1,000-fold as compared to non-overexpressing cells. Nanopore WGS can directly recover retrotransposed viral and flanking host sequences but its sensitivity depends on the depth of sequencing (a typical 20-fold sequencing depth would only examine 10 diploid cell equivalents). In contrast, TagMap enriches for the host-virus junctions and can interrogate up to 20,000 cells and is able to detect rare viral retrotranspositions in LINE1 non-overexpressing cells. Although Nanopore WGS is 10 - 20-fold more sensitive per tested cell, TagMap can interrogate 1,000 - 2,000-fold more cells and therefore can identify infrequent retrotranspositions. When comparing SARS-CoV-2 infection and viral nucleocapsid mRNA transfection by TagMap, retrotransposed SARS-CoV-2 sequences were only detected in infected but not in transfected cells. Retrotransposition in virus-infected in contrast to transfected cells may be facilitated because virus infection in contrast to viral RNA transfection results in significantly higher viral RNA levels and stimulates LINE1-expression which causes cellular stress.
authors: Zhang, L.; Bisht, P.; Flamier, A.; Barrasa, M. I.; Richards, A.; Hughes, S. H.; Jaenisch, R.

ai.TLDR: SARS-CoV-2可通过LINE1介导的逆转录转座机制整合至病毒感染细胞的基因组中。研究比较了Nanopore全基因组测序与TagMap方法的检测效果，发现TagMap在LINE1非过表达细胞中仍能有效识别罕见逆转录转座事件，其灵敏度优势源于对宿主-病毒连接点的特异性富集。
ai.translation: SARS-CoV-2序列可通过LINE1介导的逆转录转座机制被逆转录并整合至病毒感染细胞的基因组中。全基因组测序（WGS）方法在LINE1过表达的病毒感染细胞中检测到逆转录转座的SARS-CoV-2亚基因组序列，而TagMap富集方法则能在未过表达LINE1的细胞中识别逆转录转座事件。LINE1过表达使逆转录转座效率较非过表达细胞提高约1000倍。Nanopore WGS可直接回收逆转录病毒及邻近宿主序列，但其灵敏度依赖测序深度（典型20倍测序深度仅覆盖10个二倍体细胞等效量）。相比之下，TagMap通过富集宿主-病毒连接点，可检测高达20,000个细胞，并能识别LINE1非过表达细胞中的罕见病毒逆转录转座。尽管Nanopore WGS在单细胞检测灵敏度上是TagMap的10-20倍，但TagMap可检测1,000-2,000倍更多细胞，因此能识别低频逆转录转座事件。当使用TagMap比较SARS-CoV-2感染与病毒核衣壳mRNA转染时，仅在感染细胞中检测到逆转录转座的SARS-CoV-2序列。病毒感染相较于病毒RNA转染可能更易促进逆转录转座，因为病毒感染导致病毒RNA水平显著升高并刺激LINE1表达，从而引发细胞应激。

title: The long and short of it: Benchmarking viromics using Illumina, Nanopore and PacBio sequencing technologies
abstract:
Viral metagenomics has fuelled a rapid change in our understanding of global viral diversity and ecology. Long-read sequencing and hybrid approaches that combine long and short read technologies are now being widely implemented in bacterial genomics and metagenomics. However, the use of long-read sequencing to investigate viral communities is still in its infancy. While Nanopore and PacBio technologies have been applied to viral metagenomics, it is not known to what extent different technologies will impact the reconstruction of the viral community.

Thus, we constructed a mock phage community of previously sequenced phage genomes and sequenced using Illumina, Nanopore, and PacBio sequencing technologies and tested a number of different assembly approaches. When using a single sequencing technology, Illumina assemblies were the best at recovering phage genomes. Nanopore- and PacBio-only assemblies performed poorly in comparison to Illumina in both genome recovery and error rates, which both varied with the assembler used. The best Nanopore assembly had errors that manifested as SNPs and INDELs at frequencies ~4x and 120x higher than found in Illumina only assemblies respectively. While the best PacBio assemblies had SNPs at frequencies ~3.5 x and 12x higher than found in Illumina only assemblies respectively. Despite high read coverage, long-read only assemblies failed to recover a complete genome for any of the 15 phage, down sampling of reads did increase the proportion of a genome that could be assembled into a single contig.

Overall the best approach was assembly by a combination of Illumina and Nanopore reads, which reduced error rates to levels comparable with short read only assemblies. When using a single technology, Illumina only was the best approach. The differences in genome recovery and error rates between technology and assembler had downstream impacts on gene prediction, viral prediction, and subsequent estimates of diversity within a sample. These findings will provide a starting point for others in the choice of reads and assembly algorithms for the analysis of viromes.

Data SummaryAll reads from virome sequencing were submitted to the ENA under study PRJEB56639. The assemblies are provided via FigShare (https://figshare.com/s/2d9b5121eb421d370455).

Author NotesEight Supplementary Tables and nine Supplementary Figures are available with the online version of this article.
authors: Cook, R.; Brown, N.; Rihtman, B.; Michniewski, S.; Redgwell, T.; Stekel, D. J.; Hobman, J.; Chen, Y.; Nelson, A.; Scanlan, D.; Jones, M. A.; Smith, D.; Millard, A. D.

ai.TLDR: 病毒宏基因组学研究揭示了长读长测序技术在病毒群落分析中的潜力，但不同技术对病毒基因组重建的影响尚不明确。本研究通过构建模拟噬菌体群落，比较了Illumina、Nanopore和PacBio三种测序技术的组装效果，发现混合测序策略能显著降低错误率。
ai.translation:
病毒宏基因组学推动了我们对全球病毒多样性与生态系统的认知变革。长读长测序技术及结合长读长与短读长技术的混合方法已广泛应用于细菌基因组学和宏基因组学研究。然而，利用长读长测序技术分析病毒群落仍处于初级阶段。尽管Nanopore和PacBio技术已被应用于病毒宏基因组学，但不同技术对病毒群落重建的影响程度尚不明确。

因此，我们构建了一个由已测序噬菌体基因组组成的模拟噬菌体群落，并采用Illumina、Nanopore和PacBio三种测序技术进行测序，测试了多种不同的组装方法。当使用单一测序技术时，Illumina组装在恢复噬菌体基因组方面表现最佳。与Illumina相比，Nanopore和PacBio单独组装在基因组恢复和错误率方面均表现较差，且错误率受所用组装器影响显著。最佳Nanopore组装的错误率表现为SNP和INDEL频率分别约为Illumina单独组装的4倍和120倍。而最佳PacBio组装的SNP频率分别约为Illum、llumina单独组装的3.5倍和12倍。尽管具有高测序覆盖度，仅长读长组装未能完整恢复15种噬菌体的基因组，但降低测序数据量可提高单个contig组装的基因组比例。

总体而言，Illumina与Nanopore数据混合组装是最佳策略，可将错误率降至与短读长组装相当的水平。当使用单一技术时，Illumina单独组装效果最佳。技术与组装器间的基因组恢复差异和错误率差异，对基因预测、病毒预测及样本多样性估计产生了下游影响。这些发现为后续病毒组分析中读长选择和组装算法的决策提供了基础。

数据摘要：所有病毒组测序数据已提交至ENA数据库（项目编号PRJEB56639），组装结果通过FigShare平台提供（https://figshare.com/s/2d9b5121eb421d370455）。

作者注：本文在线版本包含8个补充表格和9个补充图。

title: The Genome of the Soybean Gall Midge (Resseliella maxima)
abstract: The cecidomyiid fly, soybean gall midge, Resseliella maxima Gagne, is a recently discovered insect that feeds on soybean plants in the Midwest US. Resseliella maxima larvae feed on soybean stems which may induce plant death and can cause considerable yield losses, making it an important agricultural pest. From three pools of 50 adults each, we used long-read nanopore sequencing to assemble a R. maxima reference genome. The final genome assembly is 206 Mb with 64.88X coverage, consisting of 1009 contigs with an N50 size of 714 kb. The assembly is high quality with a BUSCO score of 87.8%. Genome-wide GC level is 31.60% and DNA methylation was measured at 1.07%. The R. maxima genome is comprised of 21.73% repetitive DNA, which is in line with other cecidomyiids. Protein prediction annotated 14,798 coding genes with 89.9% protein BUSCO score. Mitogenome analysis indicated that R. maxima assembly is a single circular contig of 15,301 bp and shares highest identity to the mitogenome of the Asian rice gall midge, Orseolia oryzae (Wood-Mason). The R. maxima genome has one of the highest completeness levels for a cecidomyiid and will provide a resource for research focused on the biology, genetics, and evolution of cecidomyiids, as well as plant-insect interactions in this important agricultural pest.
authors: Melotto, G.; Jones, M.; Bosley, K.; Flack, N.; Frank, L. E.; Jacobson, E.; Kipp, E. J.; Nelson, S.; Ramirez, M.; Walls, C.; Koch, R. L.; Lindsey, A. R. I.; Faulk, C.

ai.TLDR: Resseliella maxima是一种危害大豆的玉米螟，其基因组通过长读长纳米孔测序完成组装，基因组大小206 Mb，完整性达87.8%。该基因组为研究玉米螟生物学、遗传学及植物-昆虫互作提供了重要资源。
ai.translation: Cecidomyiid fly（玉米螟）Resseliella maxima Gagne是一种近期发现的在北美中部地区危害大豆植物的昆虫。Resseliella maxima幼虫取食大豆茎部可能导致植株死亡并造成显著产量损失，使其成为重要农业害虫。我们从三个各含50只成虫的样本池中，利用长读长纳米孔测序技术组装了R. maxima参考基因组。最终基因组组装大小为206 Mb，覆盖度达64.88倍，由1009个contig组成，N50长度为714 kb。该组装质量较高，BUSCO评分为87.8%。基因组-wide GC含量为31.60%，DNA甲基化水平为1.07%。R. maxima基因组包含21.73%重复序列，与其他玉米螟属物种一致。蛋白质预测注释了14,798个编码基因，蛋白质BUSCO评分为89.9%。线粒体基因组分析表明，R. maxima组装为一个15,301 bp的环状contig，与亚洲稻瘿蚊Orseolia oryzae（Wood-Mason）的线粒体基因组同源性最高。R. maxima基因组是玉米螟属中完整性最高的基因组之一，将为研究玉米螟生物学、遗传学及进化，以及该重要农业害虫的植物-昆虫互作提供重要资源。

title: Transcriptome profiling for precision cancer medicine using shallow nanopore cDNA sequencing
abstract: Transcriptome profiling is a mainstay of translational cancer research and is increasingly finding its way into precision oncology. While bulk RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) is widely available, high investment costs and long data return time are limiting factors for clinical applications. We investigated a portable nanopore long-read sequencing device (MinION, Oxford Nanopore Technologies) for transcriptome profiling of tumors. In particular, we investigated the impact of lower coverage than that of larger sequencing devices by comparing shallow nanopore RNA-seq data with short-read RNA-seq data generated using reversible dye terminator technology (Illumina) for ten samples representing four cancer types. Coupled with ShaNTi (Shallow Nanopore sequencing for Transcriptomics), a newly developed data processing pipeline, a turnaround time of five days was achieved. The correlation of normalized gene-level counts between nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq was high for MinION but not for very low-throughput Flongle flow cells (r = 0.89 and r = 0.24, respectively). A cost-saving approach based on multiplexing of four samples per MinION flow cell maintained a high correlation with Illumina data (r = 0.56–0.86). In addition, we compared the utility of nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq data for analysis tools commonly applied in translational oncology: (1) Shallow nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq were equally useful for inferring signaling pathway activities with PROGENy. (2) Highly expressed genes encoding kinases targeted by clinically approved small-molecule inhibitors were reliably identified by shallow nanopore RNA-seq. (3) In tumor microenvironment composition analysis, quanTIseq performed better than CIBERSORT, likely due to higher average expression of the gene set used for deconvolution. (4) Shallow nanopore RNA-seq was successfully applied to detect fusion genes using the JAFFAL pipeline. These findings suggest that shallow nanopore RNA-seq enables rapid and biologically meaningful transcriptome profiling of tumors, and warrants further exploration in precision cancer medicine studies.
authors: Andreas Mock, Melissa Braun, ... Cihan Erkut
citation: Mock, A., Braun, M., Scholl, C. et al. Transcriptome profiling for precision cancer medicine using shallow nanopore cDNA sequencing. Sci Rep 13 , 2378 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-023-29550-8

ai.TLDR: 转录组分析在癌症研究中至关重要，但传统批量RNA测序存在成本高和周期长的问题。本研究通过MinION纳米孔测序设备实现快速分析，5天内完成数据处理，且与Illumina数据相关性达0.89。浅层纳米孔测序在信号通路分析、激酶基因识别和肿瘤微环境解析中表现优异，为精准肿瘤学研究提供了新方法。
ai.translation: 转录组分析是转化癌症研究的核心技术，正逐步应用于精准肿瘤学。尽管批量RNA测序（RNA-seq）技术普及，但高昂的投入成本和漫长的数据显示周期限制了其临床应用。本研究探索了便携式纳米孔长读长测序设备（MinION, Oxford Nanopore Technologies）在肿瘤转录组分析中的应用。特别针对低覆盖度对测序结果的影响，通过比较浅层纳米孔RNA-seq数据与基于可逆染料终止技术（Illumina）生成的短读长RNA-seq数据，分析了十例代表四种癌症类型的样本。结合新开发的ShaNTi数据处理流程，实现了5天的周转时间。纳米孔测序与Illumina RNA-seq的基因水平计数标准化相关性在MinION设备上达到0.89，但非常低通量的Flongle流细胞仅0.24。基于每MinION流细胞复用四个样本的成本节约策略，仍能保持与Illumina数据的高相关性（r=0.56-0.86）。此外，比较了纳米孔与Illumina RNA-seq数据在转化肿瘤学常用分析工具中的应用效果：（1）浅层纳米孔与Illumina RNA-seq在通过PROGENy推断信号通路活性方面具有同等价值；（2）针对临床批准的小分子抑制剂靶向激酶的高表达基因，浅层纳米孔RNA-seq能可靠识别；（3）在肿瘤微环境组成分析中，quanTIseq表现优于CIBERSORT，可能由于用于解卷积的基因集平均表达水平更高；（4）浅层纳米孔RNA-seq成功应用于通过JAFFAL流程检测融合基因。这些发现表明，浅层纳米孔RNA-seq能够实现肿瘤的快速且具有生物学意义的转录组分析，值得在精准肿瘤学研究中进一步探索。

title: Uncovering bacterial hosts of class 1 integrons in an urban coastal aquatic environment with a single-cell fusion-PCR technology
abstract:
Horizontal gene transfer (HGT) is a key driver of bacterial evolution via transmission of genetic materials across taxa. Class 1 integrons are genetic elements that correlate strongly with anthropogenic pollution and contribute to the spread of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes via HGT. Despite their significance to human health, there is a shortage of robust, culture-free surveillance technologies for identifying uncultivated environmental taxa that harbour class 1 integrons. We developed a modified version of epicPCR (emulsion, paired isolation and concatenation polymerase chain reaction) that links class 1 integrons amplified from single bacterial cells to taxonomic markers from the same cells in emulsified aqueous droplets. Using this single-cell genomic approach and Nanopore sequencing, we successfully assigned class 1 integron gene cassette arrays containing mostly AMR genes to their hosts in coastal water samples that were affected by pollution. Our work presents the first application of epicPCR for targeting variable, multi-gene loci of interest. We also identified the Rhizobacter genus as novel hosts of class 1 integrons. These findings establish epicPCR as a powerful tool for linking taxa to class 1 integrons in environmental bacterial communities and offer the potential to direct mitigation efforts towards hotspots of class 1 integron-mediated dissemination of AMR.

SynopsisWe present a novel single-cell genomic surveillance technology for identifying environmental bacterial hosts of a class of mobile genetic elements that are linked to anthropogenic pollution and contribute to the dissemination of antimicrobial resistance.
authors: Qi, Q.; Ghaly, T. M.; Penesyan, A.; Rajabal, V.; Stacey, J. A.; Tetu, S. G.; Gillings, M. R.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种改进的epicPCR技术，通过单细胞基因组学和纳米孔测序，成功将I类整合子与污染水样中的宿主关联。该技术首次应用于靶向多基因位点，发现Rhizobacter属为新型I类整合子宿主，为AMR传播热点的防控提供了新工具。
ai.translation: 水平基因转移（HGT）是细菌进化的重要驱动力，通过跨物种遗传物质传递实现。I类整合子作为遗传元件，与人为污染高度相关，通过HGT促进抗生素耐药基因（AMR）的传播。尽管其对人类健康具有重要影响，但目前缺乏可靠的无培养检测技术，用于识别携带I类整合子的未培养环境微生物。我们改进了epicPCR（乳液、配对隔离和串联聚合酶链反应）技术，通过乳液水滴将单细胞来源的I类整合子与同源的分类学标记连接。结合单细胞基因组学和纳米孔测序，成功将主要包含AMR基因的I类整合子基因盒阵列与其宿主关联到受污染的沿海水样中。本研究首次将epicPCR应用于靶向多基因位点，同时发现Rhizobacter属为新型I类整合子宿主。这些发现确立了epicPCR作为环境细菌群落中关联分类群与I类整合子的有力工具，并为针对I类整合子介导的AMR传播热点的防控措施提供了潜在方向。

title: Enzyme-less nanopore detection of post-translational modifications within long polypeptides
abstract: Means to sequence DNA and RNA quickly and cheaply have revolutionized biology and medicine. The ability to analyse cellular proteins and their millions of variants would be an advance of comparable importance, but requires a fresh technical approach. We use electroosmosis for the non-enzymatic capture, unfolding and translocation of individual polypeptides of more than 1200 residues by a protein nanopore. By monitoring the ionic current carried by the nanopore, we locate post-translational modifications deep within the polypeptide chains, and thereby lay the groundwork for obtaining inventories of the proteoforms in cells and tissues.
authors: Martin-Baniandres, P.; Lan, W.-H.; Board, S.; Romero-ruiz, M.; Garcia-Manyes, S.; Qing, Y.; Bayley, H.

ai.TLDR: 快速低成本的DNA和RNA测序技术已彻底革新生物学与医学领域。尽管蛋白质分析及其变体研究具有同等重要价值，但需要全新的技术手段。本研究通过电渗流技术实现对超过1200个残基的多肽进行非酶促捕获、展开和转运，并利用纳米孔离子电流监测定位翻译后修饰，为建立细胞和组织的蛋白形式库存奠定基础。
ai.translation: 用于快速且低成本对DNA和RNA进行测序的技术已经彻底革新了生物学和医学领域。能够分析细胞内的蛋白质及其数以百万计的变体将具有同等重要的意义，但需要全新的技术方法。我们利用电渗流实现对超过1200个残基的单个多肽进行非酶促的捕获、展开和通过蛋白纳米孔的转运。通过监测纳米孔所携带的离子电流，我们能够定位多肽链深处的翻译后修饰，从而为获取细胞和组织中的蛋白形式库存奠定基础。

title: Accelerated nanopore basecalling with SLOW5 data format
abstract: Nanopore sequencing is emerging as a key pillar in the genomic technology landscape but computational constraints limiting its scalability remain to be overcome. The translation of raw current signal data into DNA or RNA sequence reads, known as  basecalling, is a major friction in any nanopore sequencing workflow. Here, we exploit the advantages of the recently developed signal data format  SLOW5 to streamline and accelerate nanopore basecalling on high-performance computer (HPC) and cloud environments. SLOW5 permits highly efficient sequential data access, eliminating a significant analysis bottleneck. To take advantage of this, we introduce Buttery-eel, an open-source wrapper for Oxford Nanopores Guppy basecaller that enables SLOW5 data access, resulting in performance improvements that are essential for scalable, affordable basecalling.
authors: Samarakoon, H.; Ferguson, J. M.; Gamaarachchi, H.; Deveson, I. W.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序作为基因组学技术的重要支柱，其碱基调用过程存在计算瓶颈。本文通过SLOW5数据格式和Buttery-eel工具优化，显著提升了高通量计算环境下的测序性能，为可扩展的低成本碱基调用提供了关键解决方案。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序正在成为基因组学技术领域的重要支柱，但限制其可扩展性的计算约束仍需克服。将原始电流信号数据转化为DNA或RNA序列读段的过程（称为碱基调用）是任何纳米孔测序工作流程中的主要瓶颈。本文利用近期开发的SLOW5信号数据格式，优化了高性能计算（HPC）和云环境下的纳米孔碱基调用流程。SLOW-5格式支持高效的顺序数据访问，消除了显著的分析瓶颈。为充分利用这一优势，我们开发了Buttery-eel，这是一个开源的Oxford Nanopore Guppy碱基调用器包装工具，实现了SLOW5数据访问，从而获得对可扩展且经济高效的碱基调用至关重要的性能提升。

title: Optimized testing strategy for the diagnosis of GAA-FGF14 ataxia
abstract:
BackgroundDominantly inherited GAA repeat expansions in FGF14 are a common cause of spinocerebellar ataxia (GAA-FGF14 ataxia; SCA27B, late-onset). Molecular confirmation of FGF14 GAA repeat expansions has thus far mostly relied on long-read sequencing, a technology that is not yet widely available in clinical laboratories.

MethodsWe developed and validated a strategy to detect FGF14 GAA repeat expansions using long-range PCR, bidirectional repeat-primed PCRs, and Sanger sequencing. We compared this strategy to targeted nanopore sequencing in a cohort of 22 French Canadian patients and next validated it in a cohort of 53 French index patients with unsolved ataxia.

ResultsDiagnosis was accurately confirmed for all 22 French Canadian patients using this strategy. Method comparison showed that capillary electrophoresis of long-range PCR products significantly underestimated expansion sizes compared to nanopore sequencing (slope, 0.87 [95% CI, 0.81 to 0.93]; intercept, 14.58 [95% CI, -2.48 to 31.12]) and gel electrophoresis (slope, 0.84 [95% CI, 0.78 to 0.97]; intercept, 21.34 [95% CI, -27.66 to 40.22]). The latter techniques yielded similar size estimates. Following calibration with internal controls, expansion size estimates were similar between capillary electrophoresis and nanopore sequencing (slope: 0.98 [95% CI, 0.92 to 1.04]; intercept: 10.62 [95% CI, -7.49 to 27.71]), and gel electrophoresis (slope: 0.94 [95% CI, 0.88 to 1.09]; intercept: 18.81 [95% CI, -41.93 to 39.15]). We identified 9 French patients (9/53; 17%) and 2 of their relatives who carried an FGF14 (GAA)[≥]250 expansion.

ConclusionThis novel strategy reliably detected and sized FGF14 GAA expansions. It compared favorably to long-read sequencing and can readily be implemented in clinical laboratories.
authors: Bonnet, C.; Pellerin, D.; Roth, V.; Clement, G.; Wandzel, M.; Lambert, L.; Frismand, S.; Douarinou, M.; Grosset, A.; Bekkour, I.; Weber, F.; Girardier, F.; Robin, C.; Cacciatore, S.; Bronner, M.; Pourie, C.; Dreumont, N.; Puisieux, S.; Dicaire, M.-J.; Evoy, F.; Rioux, M.-F.; Hocquel, A.; La Piana, R.; Synofzik, M.; Houlden, H.; Danzi, M. C.; Zuchner, S.; Brais, B.; Renaud, M.

ai.TLDR: FGF14基因GAA重复扩展是导致脊髓小脑共济失调（SCA27B）的常见遗传病因。本研究开发了一种结合长距离PCR、双向重复引物PCR和桑格测序的检测策略，经临床验证后可准确识别GAA重复扩展并实现精准分型，其检测效果与长读长测序相当且更适合临床推广。
ai.translation:
背景：FGF14基因GAA重复扩展是导致脊髓小脑共济失调（GAA-FGF14 ataxia; SCA27B，晚发性）的常见遗传病因。目前FGF14 GAA重复扩展的分子确认主要依赖长读长测序技术，但该技术尚未在临床实验室广泛普及。

方法：我们开发并验证了一种检测FGF14 GAA重复扩展的新策略，该策略结合长距离PCR、双向重复引物PCR和桑格测序技术。通过比较该策略与靶向纳米孔测序在22名法国加拿大患者队列中的检测效果，并在53名未确诊共济失调的法国家系队列中进行验证。

结果：该策略成功确诊了所有22名法国加拿大患者。方法比较显示，长距离PCR产物的毛细管电泳显著低估了重复扩展大小（斜率0.87[95% CI, 0.81-0.93]；截距14.58[95% CI, -2.48-31.12]），与纳米孔测序相比（斜率0.84[95% CI, 0.78-0.97]；截距21.34[95% CI, -27.66-40.22]）。经内部对照校准后，毛细管电泳与纳米孔测序的扩展大小估计值相近（斜率0.98[95% CI, 0.92-1.04]；截距10.62[95% CI, -7.49-27.71]），与凝胶电泳结果（斜率0.94[95% CI, 0.88-1.09]；截距18.81[95% CI, -41.93-39.15]）也趋于一致。最终确认9名法国患者（9/53；17%）及其2名亲属携带FGF14（GAA）≥250重复扩展。

结论：该新型检测策略可可靠地检测并量化FGF14 GAA重复扩展，其检测效果与长读长测序相当，且更易于在临床实验室中实施。

title: stRainy: assembly-based metagenomic strain phasing using long reads
abstract: Bacterial species in microbial communities are often represented by mixtures of strains, distinguished by small variations in their genomes. Despite the functional importance of intra-strain heterogeneity, its characterization from metagenomic sequencing data remains challenging. Short-read approaches can be used to detect small-scale variation between strains, but fail to phase these variants into contiguous haplotypes. Long-read metagenome assemblers can generate contiguous bacterial chromosomes, but often suppress strain-level variation in favor of species-level consensus. Here we present Strainy - an algorithm for strain-level metagenome assembly and phasing from Nanopore and HiFi reads. Strainy takes a de novo metagenomic assembly as input, identifies strain variants which are then phased and assembled into contiguous haplotypes. Using simulated and mock Nanopore and HiFi metagenome data, we show that Strainy assembles accurate and complete strain haplotypes, outperforming current Nanopore-based methods and comparable with HiFi-based algorithms in completeness and accuracy. We then use Strainy to assemble strain haplotypes of a complex environmental metagenome, revealing distinct mutational patterns in bacterial species.
authors: Kazantseva, E.; Donmez, A.; Pop, M.; Kolmogorov, M.

ai.TLDR: 微生物群落中细菌种群常由多个菌株混合组成，其基因组差异微小。现有方法在菌株级单倍型组装和相位分离方面存在局限。Strainy算法通过结合Nanopore和HiFi数据，实现了高精度的菌株级单倍型组装，其性能优于现有Nanopore方法并接近HiFi算法。该算法在复杂环境宏基因组中揭示了细菌物种的突变模式差异。
ai.translation: 微生物群落中的细菌物种通常由多个菌株的混合组成，这些菌株通过基因组中微小的变异进行区分。尽管菌株内异质性在功能上具有重要意义，但从宏基因组测序数据中表征这种异质性仍面临挑战。短读长测序方法可以检测菌株间的微小变异，但无法将这些变异相位化为连续的单倍型。长读长宏基因组组装器能够生成连续的细菌染色体，但往往优先保留物种水平的共识序列而非菌株水平的变异。本文提出Strainy算法，该算法可从Nanopore和HiFi测序数据中实现菌株级宏基因组的组装与相位分离。Strain、y以从头宏基因组组装结果为输入，识别菌株变异并将其相位化为连续单倍型。通过模拟和假阳性Nanopore及HiFi宏基因组数据验证，Strainy能够组装出准确且完整的菌株单倍型，其性能优于现有Nanopore方法，在完整性和准确性方面与HiFi方法相当。随后，我们利用Strainy对复杂环境宏基因组进行菌株单倍型组装，揭示了细菌物种间显著的突变模式差异。

title: Scaling Logical Density of DNA storage with Enzymatically-Ligated Composite Motifs
abstract: DNA is a promising candidate for long-term data storage due to its high density and endurance. The key challenge in DNA storage today is the cost of synthesis. In this work, we propose composite motifs, a frame-work that uses a mixture of prefabricated motifs as building blocks to reduce synthesis cost by scaling logical density. To write data, we introduce Bridge Oligonucleotide Assembly, an enzymatic ligation technique for synthesizing oligos based on composite motifs. To sequence data, we introduce Direct Oligonucleotide Sequencing, a nanopore-based technique to sequence oligos without assembly and amplification. To decode data, we introduce Motif-Search, a novel consensus caller that provides accurate reconstruction despite synthesis and sequencing errors. Using the proposed methods, we present an end-to-end experiment where we store the text "HelloWorld" at a logical density of 84 bits/cycle (14-42x improvement over state-of-the-art.)
authors: YAN, Y.; Pinnamaneni, N.; Chalapati, S.; Crosbie, C.; Appuswamy, R.

ai.TLDR: DNA因其高密度和耐久性成为长期数据存储的候选方案，但合成成本是当前主要挑战。本研究提出复合模因框架，通过预制模因构建块和逻辑密度扩展降低合成成本，并结合桥接寡核苷酸组装、直接寡核苷酸测序及模因搜索技术实现端到端实验，将文本'HelloWorld'以84 bits/cycle逻辑密度存储（较现有技术提升14-42倍）。
ai.translation: DNA由于其高密度和耐久性，成为长期数据存储的有前景候选方案。当前DNA存储的关键挑战在于合成成本。在本工作中，我们提出复合模因框架，该框架通过混合预制模因作为构建块，通过扩展逻辑密度来降低合成成本。为了写入数据，我们引入桥接寡核苷酸组装技术，这是一种基于复合模因的酶促连接技术，用于合成寡核苷酸。为了测序数据，我们引入直接寡核苷酸测序技术，这是一种基于纳米孔技术的测序方法，无需组装和扩增即可测序寡核苷酸。为了解码数据，我们引入模因搜索，这是一种新型共识调用器，即使在合成和测序错误的情况下也能提供准确的重建。使用所提出的方法，我们展示了端到端实验，其中我们将文本'HelloWorld'以84 bits/cycle的逻辑密度存储（比现有技术提高14-42倍）。

title: Rapid metagenomic sequencing for diagnosis and antimicrobial sensitivity prediction of canine bacterial infections
abstract:
Antimicrobial resistance is one of the greatest current threats to human and animal health. There is an urgent need to ensure that antimicrobials are used appropriately to limit the emergence and impact of resistance. In the human and veterinary healthcare setting, traditional culture and antimicrobial sensitivity testing is typically conducted, requiring 48-72 h to identify appropriate antibiotics for treatment. In the meantime, broad-spectrum antimicrobials are often used, which may be ineffective or impact non-target commensal bacteria. Here, we present a rapid diagnostics pipeline, involving metagenomic Nanopore sequencing directly from clinical urine and skin samples of dogs. We have optimised this pipeline to be versatile and easily implementable in a clinical setting, with the potential for future adaptation to different sample types and animals. Using our approach, we can identify the bacterial pathogen present in a sample with 100% sensitivity within 5 hours. For urine samples, we can predict antibiotic sensitivity with up to 95% accuracy. However, skin swabs which exhibited lower bacterial abundance and higher host DNA, were less amenable and an additional host depletion step may be required prior to DNA extraction. In summary, our pipeline represents an important step towards the design of individually tailored veterinary treatment plans on the same day as presentation, facilitating effective use of antibiotics and promoting antimicrobial stewardship.

Impact statementAntimicrobial resistance (AMR) is a major threat to veterinary and human healthcare. It is a one-health problem, as humans and dogs are in close contact, require similar antibiotics, and share bacterial pathogens and AMR genes. Limited treatments options due to AMR would have a catastrophic effect. The risk of infection would render much of modern healthcare (including critical care, orthopaedic and complex surgeries, implants and oncology) impossible. In addition, routine infections could become life threatening. It is therefore critical to preserve the efficacy of these drugs for the future. Inappropriate antimicrobial use is the single biggest factor driving AMR. Antimicrobial stewardship involves reducing antimicrobial use, using first-line narrow-spectrum drugs, and avoiding overly long treatment. Delays in culture-based diagnosis lead clinicians to speculatively use broad-spectrum antibiotics and prolong courses of treatment beyond clinical cure. Our rapid diagnostic approach will have a major impact in reducing, refining and replacing antibiotic use. This will advance antimicrobial stewardship in veterinary and human healthcare.

Data summaryAll sequencing data mentioned in this work is available from NCBI, BioProject PRJNA925092, Biosamples SAMN32880396 to SAMN32880438, run accessions SRR23195371 to SRR23195413.

The authors confirm all supporting data, code and protocols have been provided within the article or through supplementary data files.
authors: Ring, N.; Low, A. S.; Wee, B.; Paterson, G. K.; Nuttall, T.; Mellanby, R.; Gally, D.; Fitzgerald, J. R.

ai.TLDR: 抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）是威胁人类和动物健康的关键问题，传统检测方法耗时较长。本研究开发了一种基于宏基因组纳米孔测序的快速诊断流程，可在5小时内实现100%敏感度的病原体识别，并对尿液样本的抗生素敏感性预测准确率达95%。该技术为兽医临床提供实时精准治疗方案，推动抗菌药物合理使用。
ai.translation: 抗菌药物耐药性是当前人类和动物健康面临的最大威胁之一。确保抗菌药物的合理使用以限制耐药性的产生和影响至关重要。在人类和兽医医疗环境中，传统培养和抗菌药物敏感性测试通常需要48-72小时才能确定合适的抗生素治疗方案。在此期间，广谱抗菌药物常被使用，这可能导致治疗无效或影响非目标共生菌群。本研究提出了一种快速诊断流程，通过宏基因组纳米孔测序直接从犬类临床尿液和皮肤样本中进行分析。我们优化了该流程，使其具备临床应用的通用性和可操作性，未来可扩展至不同样本类型和动物。使用我们的方法，可在5小时内以100%敏感度识别样本中的细菌病原体。对于尿液样本，可预测抗生素敏感性达95%准确率。然而，皮肤拭子样本因细菌丰度较低且宿主DNA含量较高，分析效果较差，可能需要在DNA提取前增加宿主DNA去除步骤。总之，我们的流程代表了设计同日个性化兽医治疗方案的重要进展，有助于有效使用抗生素并促进抗菌药物管理。影响声明：抗菌药物耐药性（AMR）是兽医和人类医疗的严重威胁。它是一个跨物种问题，因为人类和犬类密切接触，需要相似的抗生素，且共享细菌病原体和耐药基因。由于AMR导致的治疗选择受限将产生灾难性影响。感染风险会使现代医疗（包括重症监护、骨科和复杂手术、植入物及肿瘤学）变得不可行。此外，常规感染可能变得危及生命。因此，必须为未来保留这些药物的有效性。不合理的抗菌药物使用是推动AMR的最主要因素。抗菌药物管理包括减少使用量、优先使用窄谱一线药物以及避免过度长期治疗。基于培养的诊断延迟会导致临床医生推测性使用广谱抗生素并延长治疗至临床治愈后。我们的快速诊断方法将在减少、优化和替代抗生素使用方面产生重大影响，推动兽医和人类医疗的抗菌药物管理。数据摘要：本研究中提及的所有测序数据均可从NCBI获取，BioProject PRJNA925092，Biosamples SAMN32880396至SAMN32880438，运行访问编号SRR23195371至SRR23195413。作者确认所有支持数据、代码和协议已通过文章或补充数据文件提供。

title: Nanopore-based direct RNA sequencing of the Trypanosoma brucei transcriptome identifies novel lncRNAs
abstract: Trypanosomatids are single-cell eukaryotic parasites. Unlike higher eukaryotes, they control gene expression posttranscriptionally and not at the level of transcription initiation. This involves all known cellular RNA circuits, from mRNA processing to mRNA decay to translation, in addition to a large panel of RNA-interacting proteins that modulate mRNA abundance. However, other forms of gene regulation, for example, by lncRNAs, cannot be excluded. LncRNAs are poorly studied in trypanosomatids, with only a single lncRNA characterized today. Furthermore, it is not clear whether the complete inventory of trypanosomatid lncRNAs is known because of the inherent cDNA recoding and DNA amplification limitations of short-read RNA sequencing. Here we overcome these limitations by using long-read direct RNA sequencing (DRS) on nanopore arrays. We analyze the native RNA pool of the two main lifecycle stages of the African trypanosome T. brucei with a special emphasis on the inventory of lncRNAs. We identify 207 previously unknown lncRNAs, 109 of which are stage-specifically expressed. We also present insights into the complexity of the T. brucei transcriptome, including alternative transcriptional start and stop sites and potential transcript isoforms to provide a bias-free understanding of the intricate RNA landscape in T. brucei.
authors: Kruse, E.; Goringer, H. U.

ai.TLDR: 利什曼原虫通过后转录调控基因表达，而非转录起始阶段。传统短读RNA测序因cDNA重编码和DNA扩增限制，难以全面解析其lncRNA库，本研究采用长读长直接RNA测序（DRS）技术，首次系统揭示了非洲锥虫T. brucei的lncRNA图谱及转录组复杂性。
ai.translation: 利什曼原虫是单细胞真核寄生虫。与高等真核生物不同，它们通过后转录调控基因表达，而非转缉录起始阶段。这一过程涉及所有已知的细胞RNA通路，包括mRNA加工、mRNA降解和翻译，以及大量调控mRNA丰度的RNA互作蛋白。然而，其他形式的基因调控（如长链非编码RNA，lncRNAs）仍无法排除。目前对利什曼原虫的lncRNA研究极为有限，仅鉴定出单一lncRNA。此外，由于短读RNA测序固有的cDNA重编码和DNA扩增局限性，尚不清楚是否已完整解析利什曼原虫的lncRNA库。本研究通过纳米孔阵列的长读长直接RNA测序（DRS）技术克服了这些限制，重点分析了非洲锥虫T. brucei两个主要生命周期阶段的天然RNA池，特别关注lncRNA图谱。我们鉴定了207个此前未知的lncRNA，其中109个具有阶段特异性表达。同时，研究还揭示了T. brucei转录组的复杂性，包括替代转录起始和终止位点、潜在转录异构体，为无偏见地理解T. brucei复杂的RNA景观提供了新视角。

title: Ultra-fast deep-learned pediatric CNS tumor classification during surgery
abstract: The primary treatment of CNS tumors starts with a neurosurgical resection in order to obtain tumor tissue for diagnosis and to reduce tumor load and mass effect. The neurosurgeon has to decide between radical resection versus a more conservative strategy to prevent surgical morbidity. The prognostic impact of a radical resection varies between tumor types. However due to a lack of pre-operative tissue-based diagnostics, limited knowledge of the precise tumor type is available at the time of surgery. Current standard practice includes preoperative imaging and intraoperative histological analysis, but these are not always conclusive. After surgery, histopathological and molecular tests are performed to diagnose the precise tumor type. The results may indicate that an additional surgery is needed or that the initial surgery could have been less radical. Using rapid Nanopore sequencing, a sparse methylation profile can be directly obtained during surgery, making it ideally suited to enable intraoperative diagnostics. We developed a state-of-the-art neural-network approach called Sturgeon, to deliver trained models that are lightweight and universally applicable across patients and sequencing depths. We demonstrate our method to be accurate and fast enough to provide a correct diagnosis with as little as 20 to 40 minutes of sequencing data in 45 out of 49 pediatric samples, and inconclusive results in the other four. In four intraoperative cases we achieved a turnaround time of 60-90 minutes from sample biopsy to result; well in time to impact surgical decision making. We conclude that machine-learned diagnosis based on intraoperative sequencing can assist neurosurgical decision making, allowing neurological comorbidity to be avoided or preventing additional surgeries.
authors: Vermeulen, C.; Pages-Gallego, M.; Kester, L. A.; Kranendonk, M. E. G.; Wesseling, P.; van der Lugt, J.; van Baarsen, K. M.; Hoving, E. W.; Tops, B. B. J.; de Ridder, J.

ai.TLDR: 中枢神经系统肿瘤治疗需通过神经外科手术获取组织样本并减少肿瘤负荷，但术前诊断不足导致决策困难。本研究开发的Sturgeon模型通过术中纳米孔测序快速诊断，可在45/49例儿童样本中20-40分钟内提供准确结果，显著缩短诊断时间以辅助手术决策。
ai.translation: 中枢神经系统（CNS）肿瘤的初始治疗始于神经外科手术，目的是获取肿瘤组织进行诊断并减少肿瘤负荷和占位效应。神经外科医生需在根治性切除与保守策略间做出决策以避免手术并发症。根治性切除的预后影响因肿瘤类型而异，但术前缺乏基于组织的诊断手段导致手术时对肿瘤类型的认知有限。当前标准流程包括术前影像学检查和术中组织病理分析，但这些方法并不总是明确。术后通过组织病理学和分子检测确定精确肿瘤类型，结果可能提示需要额外手术或初始手术不够彻底。利用快速纳米孔测序技术，可在手术中直接获得稀疏甲基化图谱，使其成为术中诊断的理想工具。我们开发了名为Sturgeon的先进神经网络方法，提供轻量级且适用于不同患者和测序深度的训练模型。在49例儿童样本中，该方法在45例中仅需20-40分钟测序数据即可提供准确诊断，在4例中结果不明确。4例术中案例中，从活检到结果的周转时间为60-90分钟，足以影响手术决策。结论表明，基于术中测序的机器学习诊断可辅助神经外科决策，避免神经并发症或减少额外手术。

title: In-situ metagenomics: A platform for rapid sequencing and analysis of metagenomes in less than one day
abstract: We present here a complete system for metagenomic analysis that allows performing the sequencing and analysis of a medium-size metagenome in less than one day. This unprecedented development was possible due to the conjunction of state-of-the art experimental and computational advances: a portable laboratory suitable for DNA extraction and sequencing with nanopore technology; the powerful metagenomic analysis pipeline SqueezeMeta, capable to provide a complete analysis in a few hours and using scarce computational resources; and tools for the automatic inspection of the results via a graphical user interface, that can be coupled to a web server to allow remote visualization of data (SQMtools and SQMxplore). We have tested the feasibility of our approach in the sequencing of the microbiota associated to volcanic rocks in La Palma, Canary Islands. Also, we did a two-day sampling campaign of marine waters in which the results obtained the first day guided the experimental design of the second day. This system offers the possibility of prospecting any habitat in a quick way, obtaining both taxonomic and functional information about the target microbiome.
authors: Tamames, J.; Jiminez, D.; Redondo, A.; Martinez, S.; De los Rios, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种宏基因组分析系统，可在不到一天内完成中等规模宏基因组的测序与分析。该系统结合了便携式实验室、高效计算流程和可视化工具，实现了快速获取目标微生物组的分类与功能信息。
ai.translation: 我们在此展示了一种完整的宏基因组分析系统，该系统能够实现中等规模宏基因组的测序与分析，耗时不足24小时。这一前所未有的进展得益于实验技术与计算方法的突破性结合：适用于DNA提取与纳米孔测序的便携式实验室；具备高效分析能力的宏基因组分析流程SqueezeMeta，可在数小时内完成分析且对计算资源需求较低；以及通过图形用户界面实现结果自动检查的工具（SQMtools和SQMxplore），可与网络服务器联用实现远程数据可视化。我们在拉帕尔马火山岩微生物群落的测序中验证了该方法的可行性，并在海洋水样采样中实现了两天采样周期的优化：第一天结果指导了第二天实验设计。该系统可快速勘探任何生态环境，同时获取目标微生物组的分类学和功能信息。

title: Genome Skimming with Nanopore Sequencing Precisely Determines Global and Transposon DNA Methylation in Vertebrates
abstract: Genome skimming is defined as low-pass sequencing below 0.05X coverage and is typically used for mitochondrial genome recovery and species identification. Long read nanopore sequencers enable simultaneous reading of both DNA sequence and methylation and can multiplex samples for low-cost genome skimming. Here I present nanopore sequencing as a highly precise platform for global DNA methylation and transposon assessment. At coverage of just 0.001X, or 30 Mb of reads, accuracy is sub-1%. Biological and technical replicates validate high precision. Skimming 40 vertebrate species reveals conserved patterns of global methylation consistent with whole genome bisulfite sequencing and an average mapping rate above 97%. Genome size directly correlates to global DNA methylation, explaining 44% of its variance. Accurate SINE and LINE transposon methylation in both mouse and primates can be obtained with just 0.0001X coverage, or 3 Mb of reads. Sample multiplexing, field portability, and the low price of this instrument combine to make genome skimming for DNA methylation an accessible method for epigenetic assessment from ecology to epidemiology, and by low resource groups.
authors: Faulk, C.

ai.TLDR: 基因组测序技术通过低覆盖度测序实现DNA甲基化和转座子的高精度分析。纳米孔测序在0.001X覆盖度下可达到亚1%的准确性，揭示了脊椎动物中保守的甲基化模式，并证明了基因组大小与甲基化水平的显著相关性。
ai.translation: 基因组测序（Genome skimming）被定义为低于0.05X覆盖度的低覆盖度测序，通常用于线粒体基因组恢复和物种鉴定。长读长纳米孔测序仪能够同时读取DNA序列和甲基化状态，并可通过样本复用实现低成本的基因组测序。本文提出纳米孔测序作为高精度平台，用于全球DNA甲基化和转座子评估。在仅0.001X覆盖度（或30 Mb读数）下，准确度可达到亚1%。生物学和实验重复验证了其高精度特性。对40种脊椎动物进行测序揭示了与全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序一致的保守甲基化模式，平均比对率超过97%。基因组大小与全局DNA甲基化水平直接相关，可解释其44%的变异。仅需0.0001X覆盖度（或3 Mb读数）即可在小鼠和灵长类动物中准确获取SINE和LINE转座子的甲基化信息。该技术结合样本复用、野外便携性和低成本仪器，使DNA甲基化基因组测序成为从生态学到流行病学领域及资源有限群体的表观遗传学评估方法。

title: Telomerase-independent survival leads to a mosaic of complex subtelomere rearrangements in Chlamydomonas reinhardtii
abstract: Telomeres and subtelomeres, the genomic regions located at chromosome extremities, are essential for genome stability in eukaryotes. In the absence of the canonical maintenance mechanism provided by telomerase, telomere shortening induces genome instability. The landscape of the ensuing genome rearrangements is not accessible by short-read sequencing. Here, we leverage Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-read sequencing to survey the extensive repertoire of genome rearrangements in telomerase mutants of the model green microalga Chlamydomonas reinhardtii. In telomerase mutant strains grown for [~]700 generations, most chromosome extremities were capped by short telomere sequences that were either recruited de novo from other loci or maintained in a telomerase-independent manner. Other extremities did not end with telomeres but only with repeated subtelomeric sequences. The subtelomeric elements, including rDNA, were massively rearranged and involved in breakage-fusion-bridge cycles, translocations, recombinations and chromosome circularization. These events were established progressively over time and displayed heterogeneity at the subpopulation level. New telomere-capped extremities composed of sequences originating from more internal genomic regions were associated with high DNA methylation, suggesting that de novo heterochromatin formation contributes to restore chromosome end stability in C. reinhardtii. The diversity of alternative strategies to maintain chromosome integrity and the variety of rearrangements found in telomerase mutants are remarkable and illustrate genome plasticity at short timescales.
authors: Chaux, F.; Agier, N.; Garrido, C.; Fischer, G.; Eberhard, S.; Xu, Z.

ai.TLDR: 端粒和亚端粒区域是维持真核生物基因组稳定的关键区域。在缺乏端粒酶的突变体中，端粒缩短导致基因组不稳定，而长读长测序技术揭示了绿藻Chlamydomonas reinhardtii中端粒酶突变体的基因组重排特征。研究发现，端粒末端通过新招募或独立维持机制形成，而亚端粒区域则参与多种染色体结构变异。
ai.translation: 端粒和亚端粒区域，位于染色体末端的基因组区域，是维持真核生物基因组稳定性的关键。在缺乏端粒酶这一经典维持机制的情况下，端粒缩短会引发基因组不稳定。短读长测序技术无法揭示由此产生的基因组重排全景。本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术的长读长测序，系统分析了模式绿藻Chlamydomonas reinhardtii端粒酶突变体的基因组重排谱。在培养约700代的端粒酶突变株中，大多数染色体末端被短端粒序列覆盖，这些序列要么通过新招募机制从其他位点获得，要么以端粒酶非依赖方式维持。其他末端未以端粒序列结束，而是仅由重复的亚端粒序列构成。包含rDNA在内的亚端粒元件发生大规模重排，参与断裂-融合-桥循环、易位、重组和染色体环化等事件。这些变化随时间逐步形成，并在亚群体层面表现出异质性。由更内部基因组区域序列组成的新型端粒末端与高DNA甲基化相关，提示新异染色质形成可能有助于恢复C. reinhardti的染色体末端稳定性。端粒酶突变体中维持染色体完整性的替代策略多样性及发现的重排类型，凸显了基因组在短时间尺度上的可塑性。

title: RawHash: Enabling Fast and Accurate Real-Time Analysis of Raw Nanopore Signals for Large Genomes
abstract:
Nanopore sequencers generate electrical raw signals in real-time while sequencing long genomic strands. These raw signals can be analyzed as they are generated, providing an opportunity for real-time genome analysis. An important feature of nanopore sequencing, Read Until, can eject strands from sequencers without fully sequencing them, which provides opportunities to computationally reduce the sequencing time and cost. However, existing works utilizing Read Until either 1) require powerful computational resources that may not be available for portable sequencers or 2) lack scalability for large genomes, rendering them inaccurate or ineffective.

We propose RawHash, the first mechanism that can accurately and efficiently perform real-time analysis of nanopore raw signals for large genomes using a hash-based similarity search. To enable this, RawHash ensures the signals corresponding to the same DNA content lead to the same hash value, regardless of the slight variations in these signals. RawHash achieves an accurate hash-based similarity search via an effective quantization of the raw signals such that signals corresponding to the same DNA content have the same quantized value and, subsequently, the same hash value.

We evaluate RawHash on three applications: 1) read mapping, 2) relative abundance estimation, and 3) contamination analysis. Our evaluations show that RawHash is the only tool that can provide high accuracy and high throughput for analyzing large genomes in real-time. When compared to the state-of-the-art techniques, UNCALLED and Sigmap, RawHash provides 1) 25.8x and 3.4x better average throughput and 2) significantly better accuracy for large genomes, respectively. Source code is available at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/RawHash.
authors: Firtina, C.; Ghiasi, N. M.; Lindegger, J.; Singh, G.; Cavlak, M. B.; Mao, H.; Mutlu, O.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术通过实时生成电信号原始数据实现长基因组序列分析，但现有方法存在计算资源需求高或扩展性不足的问题。RawHash作为首个基于哈希相似性搜索的机制，能高效准确地实现大基因组实时分析，相比现有技术提升25.8倍吞吐量和显著准确性。
ai.translation:
纳米孔测序仪在进行长基因组序列分析时会实时生成电信号原始数据。这些原始信号在生成过程中即可进行分析，为实时基因组分析提供了机会。纳米孔测序的重要特性Read Until能够在不完全测序的情况下将DNA链从测序仪中移除，这为计算上缩短测序时间和成本提供了可能。然而，现有利用Read Until技术的研究要么需要强大的计算资源（可能无法在便携式测序仪上实现），要么缺乏对大基因组的扩展性，导致准确性或有效性不足。

我们提出RawHash，这是首个能够通过基于哈希的相似性搜索，对大基因组的纳米孔原始信号进行准确高效实时分析的机制。为实现这一目标，RawHash确保相同DNA内容对应的信号无论存在微小差异都会生成相同的哈希值。通过有效的原始信号量化，RawHash使相同DNA内容对应的信号具有相同的量化值，从而获得相同的哈希值。

我们在三个应用场景中评估RawHash：1）读段映射，2）相对丰度估计，3）污染分析。评估结果表明，RawHash是唯一能提供高准确性和高吞吐量进行大基因组实时分析的工具。与现有技术UNCALLED和Sigmap相比，RawHash分别提供了25.8倍和3.4倍的平均吞吐量提升，并在大基因组分析中显著提高了准确性。源代码可在https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/RawHash获取。

title: Metagenomic profiling of long-read sequencing for clinical diagnosis of ocular inflammation
abstract:
ObjectiveTo establish a metagenomic profiling method using long-read sequencing for clinical diagnosis of ocular inflammation and detect the etiologic virus of herpetic uveitis.

DesignA retrospective, cross-sectional study.

ParticipantsThe participants were 44 uveitis patients with a suspected infectious etiology and 22 controls with cataract.

MethodsThe anterior aqueous humor (10-20 {micro}l) was subjected to DNA purification, followed by whole genome amplification. The Nanopore MinION using the Flongle Flow Cell was used to perform rapid long-read sequencing and the phylogenetic composition of the microorganisms in the specimen was evaluated.

Main Outcomes and MeasuresThe detection of the DNA sequence reads of the etiologic virus of herpetic uveitis in the generated FASTQ files from nanopore sequencing and the evaluation of the limits of detection (LOD) of metagenomic analysis compared to multiplex polymerase chain reaction (mPCR) testing for etiologic virus detection of herpetic uveitis.

ResultsThe detection rate of nanopore metagenomic analysis was approximately 59.0% as a result of validation against 22 mPCR-positive cases. The LOD was between 103.6 and 106 copies of virus DNA.
