The undetectable cases tended to have significantly lower copy numbers by mPCR, suggesting the lower metagenomic analysis sensitivity compared to mPCR. The nine pathogenic microorganisms evaluated by mPCR were also not detected by nanopore in all mPCR-negative cases and controls. The minimum time to obtain analysis results using this method was approximately 190 minutes.

Conclusions and RelevanceOur established sequencing protocol from the anterior aqueous humor detected the DNA fragments of etiologic viruses in patients with herpes virus uveitis. Conversely, nanopore metagenomic results contained considerable noise and were found to be less sensitive compared to the conventional mPCR tests for ocular infections.
authors: Koyanagi, Y.; Sajiki, A. F.; Ushida, H.; Kawano, K.; Fujita, K.; Okuda, D.; Kawabe, M.; Yamada, K.; Suzumura, A.; Kachi, S.; Kaneko, H.; Komatsu, H.; Usui, Y.; Goto, H.; Nishiguchi, K. M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究旨在建立基于长读长测序的宏基因组分析方法，用于眼炎的临床诊断及疱疹性葡萄膜炎病原病毒检测。结果显示纳米孔宏基因组分析的检出率约为59%，但灵敏度低于传统多重PCR检测。
ai.translation:
研究目的：建立一种基于长读长测序的宏基因组分析方法，用于眼炎的临床诊断，并检测疱疹性葡萄膜炎的病原病毒。

研究设计：回顾性横断面研究。

参与者：44名疑似感染性病因的葡萄膜炎患者及23名白内障对照组患者。

方法：采集前房房水（10-20微升），进行DNA纯化及全基因组扩增。使用Nanopore MinION（Flongle Flow Cell）进行快速长读长测序，评估样本中微生物的系统发育组成。

主要结果与测量指标：通过纳米孔测序生成的FASTQ文件检测疱疹性葡萄膜炎病原病毒的DNA序列读数，并比较宏基因组分析与多重PCR检测在病原病毒检测中的检测限（LOD）。

结果：纳米孔宏基因组分析的检出率约为59%，与22例多重PCR阳性病例验证相关。检测限在10^3.6至10^6病毒DNA拷贝之间。未检出病例的mPCR拷贝数显著较低，表明宏基因组分析的灵敏度低于mPCR。mPCR检测的九种病原微生物在所有mPCR阴性病例及对照中均未被纳米孔检测到。该方法的分析结果最快约需190分钟。

结论与相关性：本研究建立的前房房水测序协议可检测疱疹病毒性葡萄膜炎患者的病毒DNA片段。然而，纳米孔宏基因组结果存在显著噪声，其灵敏度低于传统多重PCR检测。

title: Method of the year: long-read sequencing
abstract: To large-scale projects and individual labs, long-read sequencing has delivered new vistas and long wish lists for this technology’s future.
authors: Vivien Marx
citation: Marx, V. Method of the year: long-read sequencing. Nat Methods 20 , 6–11 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-022-01730-w

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术为大规模项目和个体实验室打开了技术未来的新视野，提供了长期的研究目标。该技术通过突破性能力推动了基因组学领域的应用进展。
ai.translation: 长读长测序技术为大规模项目和个体实验室带来了技术未来的新视野和长期愿望清单。这项技术通过其突破性的读长能力，显著提升了复杂基因组结构解析的准确性，为临床诊断、基因组变异检测和生物医学研究提供了全新的技术路径。其在单分子测序和染色体构象分析中的应用，正在重塑基因组学研究范式。

title: HQAlign: Aligning nanopore reads for SV detection using current-level modeling
abstract:
MotivationDetection of structural variants (SV) from the alignment of sample DNA reads to the reference genome is an important problem in understanding human diseases. Long reads that can span repeat regions, along with an accurate alignment of these long reads play an important role in identifying novel SVs. Long read sequencers such as nanopore sequencing can address this problem by providing very long reads but with high error rates, making accurate alignment challenging. Many errors induced by nanopore sequencing have a bias because of the physics of the sequencing process and proper utilization of these error characteristics can play an important role in designing a robust aligner for SV detection problems. In this paper, we design and evaluate HQAlign, an aligner for SV detection using nanopore sequenced reads. The key ideas of HQAlign include (i) using basecalled nanopore reads along with the nanopore physics to improve alignments for SVs (ii) incorporating SV specific changes to the alignment pipeline (iii) adapting these into existing state-of-the-art long read aligner pipeline, minimap2 (v2.24), for efficient alignments.

ResultsWe show that HQAlign captures about 4 - 6% complementary SVs across different datasets which are missed by minimap2 alignments while having a standalone performance at par with minimap2 for real nanopore reads data. For the common SV calls between HQAlign and minimap2, HQAlign improves the start and the end breakpoint accuracy for about 10 - 50% of SVs across different datasets. Moreover, HQAlign improves the alignment rate to 89.35% from minimap2 85.64% for nanopore reads alignment to recent telomere-to-telomere CHM13 assembly, and it improves to 86.65% from 83.48% for nanopore reads alignment to GRCh37 human genome.

Availabilityhttps://github.com/joshidhaivat/HQAlign.git
authors: Joshi, D. J.; Diggavi, S. N.; Chaisson, M.; Kannan, S.

ai.TLDR: 结构变异（SV）检测是理解人类疾病的重要问题，纳米孔测序虽能提供超长读长但存在高错误率。HQAlign通过结合纳米孔物理特性与对齐流程优化，显著提升了SV检测的准确率与对齐效率。实验表明，HQAlign在多个数据集上捕获了4-6%的新型SV，并将对齐率提升至89.35%。
ai.translation:
动机：从样本DNA读取与参考基因组的比对中检测结构变异（SV）是理解人类疾病的重要问题。能够跨越重复区域的长读长以及这些长读长的精确比对在识别新型SV中起关键作用。纳米孔测序等长读长测序技术虽能提供超长读长，但存在高错误率，导致精确比对困难。由于测序过程的物理特性，纳米孔测序产生的许多错误具有偏差特征，合理利用这些错误特征在设计SV检测的稳健比对工具中具有重要作用。本文设计并评估了HQAlign，这是一种用于纳米孔测序数据的SV检测比对工具。HQAlign的核心思想包括：(i) 利用已进行碱基调用的纳米孔测序数据与纳米孔物理特性提升SV比对质量；(ii) 将SV特异性变化整合到比对流程中；(iii) 将这些改进适配到现有的长读长比对工具minimap2(v2.24)中以实现高效比对。

结果：我们显示HQAlign在不同数据集中捕获了约4-6%的互补SV，这些SV被minimap2比对遗漏，同时在真实纳米孔测序数据中表现出与minimap2相当的独立性能。对于HQAlign与minimap2共有的常见SV调用，HQAlign在不同数据集中将约10-50%的SV的起始和终止断点准确性提升了10-50%。此外，HQAlign将纳米孔测序数据到最新端到端CHM13组装的对齐率从minimap2的85.64%提升至89.35%，并将其到GRCh37人类基因组的对齐率从83.48%提升至86.65%。

可用性：https://github.com/joshidhaivat/HQAlign.git

title: The Current State of Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: Nanopore sensing is a disruptive, revolutionary way in which to sequence nucleic acids, including both native DNA and RNA molecules. First commercialized with the MinIONTM sequencer from Oxford Nanopore TechnologiesTM in 2015, this review article looks at the current state of nanopore sequencing as of June 2022. Covering the unique characteristics of the technology and how it functions, we then go on to look at the ability of the platform to deliver sequencing at all scales—from personal to high-throughput devices—before looking at how the scientific community is applying the technology around the world to answer their biological questions.
authors: Jonathan Pugh
citation:
Pugh, J. (2023).  The Current State of Nanopore Sequencing.

                     In: Arakawa, K. (eds) Nanopore Sequencing. Methods in Molecular Biology, vol 2632. Humana, New York, NY. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-0716-2996-3_1

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术作为颠覆性革命性方法，实现了从单分子到高通量的全尺度测序。该技术自2015年MinIONTM设备商业化以来，已发展出覆盖个人至高通量设备的完整应用体系，全球科研界正通过该技术深入探索生物医学问题。
ai.translation: 纳米孔传感技术是一种颠覆性、革命性的方法，能够对核酸（包括天然DNA和RNA分子）进行测序。该技术自2015年牛津纳米孔技术公司推出MinIONTM测序仪后实现商业化，本文综述截至2022年6月的最新进展。文章首先阐述该技术的独特特性及其工作原理，随后分析平台在个人级到高通量设备层面的测序能力，最后探讨全球科学界如何应用该技术解决生物医学领域的关键问题。

title: Full-Length 16S rRNA Gene Analysis Using Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing for Rapid Identification of Bacteria from Clinical Specimens
abstract: Amplicon sequencing of the 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) gene is a practical and reliable measure for taxonomic profiling of bacterial communities. This chapter describes the detailed workflow for full-length 16S rRNA gene amplicon analysis using nanopore sequencing and bioinformatics pipelines to analyze nanopore sequencing data for taxonomic assignment. This approach offers a higher taxonomic resolution for bacterial identification from clinical specimens with a markedly reduced timeframe and improved versatility.
authors: Yoshiyuki Matsuo
citation:
Matsuo, Y. (2023).  Full-Length 16S rRNA Gene Analysis Using Long-Read Nanopore Sequencing for Rapid Identification of Bacteria from Clinical Specimens.

                     In: Arakawa, K. (eds) Nanopore Sequencing. Methods in Molecular Biology, vol 2632. Humana, New York, NY. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-0716-2996-3_14

ai.TLDR: 16S rRNA基因扩增子测序是细菌群落分类分析的实用可靠方法。本章通过纳米孔测序与生物信息学流程实现全长16S rRNA基因分析，显著提升临床样本细菌鉴定的分类分辨率。该方法在缩短分析周期的同时增强了技术灵活性。
ai.translation: 16S核糖体RNA（rRNA）基因扩增子测序是一种用于细菌群落分类分析的实用且可靠的技术手段。本章详细描述了基于纳米孔测序技术的全长16S rRNA基因扩增子分析工作流程，包括利用生物信息学分析流程对纳米孔测序数据进行分类学注释的方法。该方法通过显著缩短分析周期并提升技术灵活性，实现了临床样本中细菌鉴定的更高分类分辨率。

title: Phylodynamics and migration data help describe HIV transmission dynamics in internally displaced people who inject drugs in Ukraine
abstract:
Internally-displaced persons are often excluded from HIV molecular epidemiology surveillance due to structural, behavioral, and social barriers in access to treatment. We test a novel field-based molecular epidemiology framework to study HIV transmission dynamics in a hard-to-reach and highly-stigmatized group, internally-displaced people who inject drugs (IDPWID). We inform the framework by Nanopore generated HIV pol sequences and IDPWID migration history. In June-September 2020, we recruited 164 IDPWID in Odesa, Ukraine, and obtained 34 HIV sequences from HIV-infected participants. We aligned them to publicly-available sequences (N=359) from Odesa and IDPWID regions of origin and identified 7 phylogenetic clusters with at least 1 IDPWID. Using times to the most recent common ancestors of the identified clusters and times of IDPWID relocation to Odesa, we infer potential post-displacement transmission window when infections likely to happen to be between 10 and 21 months, not exceeding 4 years. Phylogeographic analysis of the sequence data show that local people in Odesa disproportionally transmit HIV to the IDPWID community. Rapid transmissions post-displacement in the IDPWID community might be associated with slow progression along the HIV continuum of care: only 63% of IDPWID were aware of their status, 40% of those were in antiviral treatment, and 43% of those were virally suppressed. Such HIV molecular epidemiology investigations are feasible in transient and hard-to-reach communities and can help indicate best times for HIV preventive interventions. Our findings highlight the need to rapidly integrate Ukrainian IDPWID into prevention and treatment services following the dramatic escalation of the war in 2022.

SIGNIFICANCE STATEMENTAs human displacement is on the rise globally, it is crucial to develop ways in which infectious disease transmission can be monitored in displaced populations. We tested a new molecular epidemiology framework that relies on molecular epidemiology methods and portable HIV sequencing from samples collected from a hard-to-reach population of internally-displaced people who inject drugs (IDPWID). We show that by phylogenetically identifying potential HIV transmission clusters, estimating times of the clusters origin, and referencing these times against the time of IDPWIDs arrival to a new region, we can estimate an approximate window during an IDPWIDs displacement journey when HIV transmissions are likely to happen. Further analysis indicated that HIV is primarily transmitted from local populations to IDPWID.
authors: Kovalenko, G.; Yakovleva, A.; Smyrnov, P.; Redlinger, M.; Tymets, O.; Korobchuk, A.; Podolina, A.; Kolodiazieva, A.; Cherniavska, S.; Skaathun, B.; Smith, L. R.; Strathdee, S. A.; Wertheim, J. O.; Friedman, S. R.; Bortz, E.; Goodfellow, I.; Meredith, L.; Vasylyeva, T. I.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过纳米孔测序和迁移历史分析，揭示了乌克兰流离失所吸毒者（IDPWID）群体中HIV传播的动态特征。研究发现，流离失所后10-21个月内是HIV传播的高危窗口期，且本地人群向IDPWID群体的传播占主导地位。该方法为难以接触群体的传染病监测提供了可行框架。
ai.translation: 由于结构性、行为性和社会性障碍，内部流离失所者（IDPWID）常被排除在HIV分子流行病学监测之外。本研究测试了一种新型现场分子流行病学框架，用于研究高度污名化且难以接触的IDPWID群体中的HIV传播动态。通过纳米孔测序生成的HIV pol序列和IDPWID迁移历史数据构建分析框架。2020年6月至9月期间，研究者在乌克兰敖德萨招募了164名IDPWID，并获得34例HIV感染者序列。将这些序列与敖德萨及IDPWID原籍地区公开数据库（N=359）进行比对，识别出7个包含至少1名IDPWID的系统发育簇。通过计算簇的最近共同祖先时间及IDPWID迁入敖德萨的时间，推断流离失所后10-21个月内为HIV传播的高危窗口期，且不超过4年。序列数据的地理流行病学分析显示，敖德萨本地人群向IDPWID群体的HIV传播比例显著高于其他群体。流离失所后快速传播可能与HIV连续护理进程缓慢相关：仅63%的IDPWID知晓自身感染状态，其中40%接受抗病毒治疗，43%实现病毒载量抑制。此类分子流行病学研究在临时性和难以接触群体中具有可行性，可为HIV预防干预提供最佳时机参考。研究结果强调需在2022年战争升级后迅速将乌克兰IDPWID纳入预防和治疗服务。

title: Rapid and collective determination of the complete "hot-spring frog" mitochondrial genome containing long repeat regions using Nanopore sequencing
abstract: The mitochondrial genome (mt-genome) is one of the promising molecular markers for phylogenetics and population genetics. Recently, various mt-genomes have been determined rapidly by using massively parallel sequencers. However, the control region (CR, also called D-loop) in mt-genomes remain difficult to precisely determine due to the presence of repeat regions. Here, using Nanopore sequencing, we succeeded in rapid and collective determination of complete mt-genome of the hot-spring frog, Buergeria japonica, and found that its mt-genome size was 22,274 bp including CR (6,929 bp) with two types of tandem repeat motifs forming repeat regions. Comparison of assemble strategies revealed that the long- and short-read data combined together enabled efficient determination of the CR, but the short-read data alone did not. The B. japonica CR was longer than that of a congenic species inhabiting cooler climate areas, Buergeria buergeri, because of the long repeat regions in the former. During the thermal adaptation of B. japonica, the longer repeat regions in its CR may have accumulated within a short period after divergence from B. buergeri.
authors: Asaeda, Y.; Shiraga, K.; Suzuki, M.; Sambongi, Y.; Ogino, H.; Igawa, T.

ai.TLDR: 线粒体基因组（mt-genome）在系统发育研究中具有重要价值，但其控制区（CR）因重复区域的存在难以精确测定。本研究通过纳米孔测序技术成功解析了温泉蛙（Buergeria japonica）的完整mt-genome，发现其CR区域包含两种串联重复基序，且长度显著长于同属物种Buergeria buergeri。
ai.translation: 线粒体基因组（mt-genome）是系统发育和群体遗传学研究中具有前景的分子标记。近年来，通过大规模并行测序技术已能快速测定多种mt-genome。然而，由于存在重复区域，mt-genome中的控制区（CR，也称为D-loop）仍难以精确测定。本研究采用纳米孔测序技术，成功实现了温泉蛙（Buergeria japonica）完整mt-genome的快速集体测定，发现其mt-genome大小为22,274 bp，包含6,929 bp的CR区域，该区域由两种类型的串联重复基序形成重复区域。通过比较不同组装策略发现，长读长与短读长数据结合可高效测定CR，而仅使用短读长数据则无法实现。B. japonica的CR长度长于栖息于较冷气候区的同属物种Buergeria buergeri，这可能是由于前者具有更长的重复区域。在B. japonica的热适应过程中，其CR中更长的重复区域可能在与B. buergeri分化后短时间内迅速积累。

title: Systematic Evaluation of Self-Assembling Membrane Peptides to Form Nanopores in the context of the Functional Nanopore Screen
abstract: The functional analysis of protein nanopores is typically conducted in planar lipid bilayers or liposomes exploiting high-resolution but low-throughput electrical and optical read-outs. Yet, the reconstitution of protein nanopores in vitro still constitutes an empiric and low-throughput process. Addressing these limitations, nanopores can now be analyzed using the functional nanopore (FuN) screen exploiting genetically-encoded fluorescent protein sensors that resolve distinct nanopore-dependent Ca2+ in- and efflux patterns across the inner membrane of Escherichia coli. With a primary proof-of-concept established for the S2168 holin, and thereof based recombinant nanopore assemblies, the question arises to what extent alternative nanopores can be analyzed with the FuN screen and to what extent alternative fluorescent protein sensors can be adapted. Focussing on self-assembling membrane peptides, three sets of 13 different nanopores are assessed for their capacity to form nanopores in the context of the FuN screen. Nanopores tested comprise both natural and computationally-designed nanopores. Further, the FuN screen is extended to K+-specific fluorescent protein sensors to provide a complementary read-out to Ca2+. Finally, a comparison with high-resolution biophysical and electrophysiological studies in planar lipid bilayers provides an experimental benchmark for future studies.
authors: Eisenhauer, K.; Weber, W.; Kemp, P.; Stein, V.

ai.TLDR: 传统蛋白质纳米孔功能分析依赖高分辨率但低通量的电学和光学读数，而新型功能纳米孔（FuN）筛选技术通过基因编码荧光蛋白传感器实现了对大肠杆菌膜内Ca²+动态的高通量检测。该方法已验证可扩展至多种天然和计算设计的纳米孔，并引入K⁺特异性荧光探针，为后续研究提供实验基准。
keywords: 基因编码荧光蛋白传感器
ai.translation: 蛋白质纳米孔的功能分析通常在平面脂质双分子层或脂质体中进行，依赖高分辨率但低通量的电学和光学读数。然而，体外重构蛋白质纳米孔仍是一个经验性且低通量的过程。为解决这些局限性，现在可以使用功能纳米孔（FuN）筛选技术，该技术利用基因编码的荧光蛋白传感器，能够解析大肠杆菌内膜上不同纳米孔依赖的Ca²+流入和流出模式。以S2168 holin的初步验证为基础，进一步构建了重组纳米孔组装体，由此引发两个关键问题：FuN筛选能否分析其他类型的纳米孔？以及是否能适配其他荧光蛋白传感器？研究聚焦于自组装膜肽，评估了三组共13种不同纳米孔在FuN筛选体系中的纳米孔形成能力，包括天然和计算设计的纳米孔。此外，FuN筛选被扩展至K⁺特异性荧光蛋白传感器，以提供与Ca²+互补的检测信号。最后，通过与平面脂质双分子层的高分辨率生物物理和电生理学研究进行对比，为未来研究建立了实验基准。

title: Light-Activated Assembly of Connexon Nanopores in Synthetic Cells
journal: Journal of the American Chemical Society
abstract: During developmental processes and wound healing, activation of living cells occurs with spatiotemporal precision and leads to rapid release of soluble molecular signals, allowing communication and coordination between neighbors. Non-living systems capable of similar responsive release hold great promise for information transfer in materials and site-specific drug delivery. One non-living system that offers a tunable platform for programming release is synthetic cells. Encased in a lipid bilayer structure, synthetic cells can be outfitted with molecular conduits that span the bilayer and lead to material exchange. While previous work expressing membrane pore proteins in synthetic cells demonstrated content exchange, user-defined control over release has remained elusive. In mammalian cells, connexon nanopore structures drive content release and have garnered significant interest since they can direct material exchange through intercellular contacts. Here, we focus on connexon nanopores and present activated release of material from synthetic cells in a light-sensitive fashion. To do this, we re-engineer connexon nanopores to assemble after post-translational processing by a protease. By encapsulating proteases in light-sensitive liposomes, we show that assembly of nanopores can be triggered by illumination, resulting in rapid release of molecules encapsulated within synthetic cells. Controlling connexin nanopore activity provides an opportunity for initiating communication with extracellular signals and for transferring molecular agents to the cytoplasm of living cells in a rapid, light-guided manner.
authors: Sihorwala, A.; Lin, A.; Stachowiak, J. C.; Belardi, B.

ai.TLDR: 合成细胞通过光敏脂质体和蛋白酶调控纳米孔组装，实现材料的光控快速释放。该技术为细胞间信息传递和分子药物递送提供了新的编程平台。
ai.translation: 在发育过程和伤口愈合中，活细胞的激活具有时空精确性，导致可溶性分子信号的快速释放，从而实现细胞间通讯与协调。能够实现类似响应性释放的非生命系统在材料信息传递和靶向药物递送方面具有巨大潜力。合成细胞作为一种可编程的释放平台，其脂双层结构可搭载跨膜分子通道以实现物质交换。尽管先前研究已展示膜孔蛋白在合成细胞中的内容物交换，但用户定义的释放控制仍难以实现。在哺乳动物细胞中，缝隙连接纳米孔结构通过细胞间接触实现物质交换，因此受到广泛关注。本研究聚焦缝隙连接纳米孔，展示了一种光敏化的合成细胞材料释放策略。通过重新设计纳米孔使其在蛋白酶的翻译后加工后组装，将蛋白酶封装在光敏脂质体中，可实现光照触发的纳米孔组装，从而导致合成细胞内封装分子的快速释放。调控缝隙连接纳米孔活性为快速、光控引导的分子剂向活细胞胞质传递提供了新机会。

title: NanopoReaTA: a user-friendly tool for nanopore-seq real-time transcriptional analysis
abstract:
SummaryOxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing platform offers an excellent opportunity to perform real-time analysis during sequencing. This feature allows for early insights into experimental data and accelerates a potential decision-making process for further analysis, which can be particularly relevant in the clinical context. Although some tools for the real-time analysis of DNA-sequencing data already exist, there is currently no application available for differential transcriptome data analysis designed for scientists or physicians with limited bioinformatics knowledge. Here we introduce NanopoReaTA, a user-friendly real-time analysis toolbox for RNA sequencing data from ONT. Sequencing results from a running or finished experiment are processed through an R Shiny-based graphical user interface (GUI) with an integrated Nextflow pipeline for whole transcriptome or gene-specific analyses. NanopoReaTA provides visual snapshots of a sequencing run in progress, thus enabling interactive sequencing and rapid decision-making that could also be applied to clinical cases.

Availabilityhttps://github.com/AnWiercze/NanopoReaTA

Contactbuttamer@uni-mainz.de and sugerber@uni-mainz.de
authors: Wierczeiko, A.; Pastore, S.; Muendnich, S.; Helm, M.; Butto, T.; Gerber, S.

ai.TLDR: ONT测序平台支持实时数据分析，有助于临床决策。现有工具缺乏针对转录组数据的分析功能，NanopoReaTA作为首个面向非生物信息学背景用户的实时分析工具，提供交互式可视化和快速决策支持。
ai.translation:
牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）测序平台为实时分析提供了绝佳机会。该特性可使实验数据在测序过程中获得早期洞察，并加速进一步分析的决策过程，这在临床环境中尤为重要。尽管已有部分工具支持DNA测序数据的实时分析，但目前尚无针对差异转录组数据的分析应用，尤其缺乏面向生物信息学知识有限的科学家或医生的解决方案。本文介绍NanopoReaTA，一款用户友好的ONT RNA测序实时分析工具。通过基于R Shiny的图形用户界面（GUI）和集成Nextflow流程，可对正在进行或已完成的测序实验数据进行全转录组或基因特异性分析。NanopoReaTA提供测序过程的实时可视化快照，从而实现交互式测序和快速决策，该功能也可应用于临床案例分析。

可用性：https://github.com/AnWiercze/NanopoReaTA

联系方式：buttamer@uni-mainz.de 和 sugerber@uni-mainz.de

title: Nanopore sequencing unveils the complexity of the cold-activated murine brown adipose tissue transcriptome
abstract: 1.Alternative transcription increases transcriptome complexity by expression of multiple transcripts per gene and thus fine tunes cellular identity and function. Annotation and quantification of transcripts at complex loci using short-read sequencing is non-trivial. Recent long-read sequencing methods such as those from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) and Pacific Biosciences aim at overcoming these problems by sequencing full length transcripts. Activation of BAT thermogenesis involves major transcriptomic remodelling and positively affects metabolism via increased energy expenditure and endocrine factors. Here we comprehensively benchmark features of ONT long-read sequencing protocols compared to Illumina shortread sequencing assessing alignment characteristics, gene and transcript detection and quantification, differential gene and transcript expression, transcriptome reannotation and differential transcript usage (DTU). We find that ONT sequencing is superior to Illumina for transcriptome reassembly and reduces the risk of false-positive events due to the ability to unambiguously map reads to transcripts, at the expense of statistical power for calling differentially expressed features. We identified novel isoforms of genes undergoing DTU in cold-activated BAT including Cars2, Adtrp, Acsl5, Scp2, Aldoa and Pde4d, validated by RT-qPCR. Finally, we provide a reannotation of the murine iBAT transcriptome as a valuable resource for researchers interested in the molecular biology underlying the regulation of BAT.
authors: Engelhard, C. A.; Khani, S.; Derdak, S.; Bilban, M. A.; Kornfeld, J.-W.

ai.TLDR: 转录组复杂性增加源于基因多转录本表达，传统短读长测序难以准确注释复杂区域。本研究系统比较ONT长读长测序与Illumina短读长测序在转录组重建、差异表达分析等性能，发现ONT在转录本无偏重建和减少假阳性事件方面具有优势，但可能牺牲部分差异表达特征的统计效力。研究首次揭示了冷激活BAT中Cars2等基因的新型剪接变体。
ai.translation: 替代性转录通过每个基因表达多个转录本增加转录组复杂性，从而精细调控细胞身份和功能。使用短读长测序对复杂位点的转录本进行注释和定量具有挑战性。近期的长读长测序技术如牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）和太平洋生物科技（Pacific Biosciences）通过全长转录本测序旨在解决这些问题。棕色脂肪组织（BAT）产热激活涉及显著的转录组重构，并通过增加能量消耗和内分泌因子正向影响代谢。本研究全面评估ONT长读长测序协议与Illum Nicola短读长测序在转录组分析中的特征，包括比对特性、基因和转录本检测与定量、差异基因和转录本表达、转录组重新注释以及差异转录本使用（DTU）。研究发现ONT测序在转录组重建方面优于Illumina，通过无歧义地将reads映射到转录本可降低假阳性事件风险，但可能牺牲差异表达特征的统计效力。我们通过RT-qPCR验证了冷激活BAT中经历DTU的Cars2、Adtrp、Acsl5、Scp2、Aldoa和Pde4d等基因的新型剪接变体。最后，我们提供了小鼠iBAT转录组的重新注释，为研究BAT调控的分子机制提供了宝贵资源。

title: The co-occurrence of genetic variants in the TYR and OCA2 genes confers susceptibility to albinism.
abstract: Although rare genetic conditions are mostly caused by DNA sequence alterations that functionally disrupt individual genes, large-scale studies using genome sequencing have started to unmask additional complexity. Understanding how combinations of variants in different genes shape human phenotypes is expected to provide important insights into the clinical and genetic heterogeneity of rare disorders. Here, we use albinism, an archetypal rare condition associated with hypopigmentation, as an exemplar for the study of genetic interactions. We analyse data from the Genomics England 100,000 Genomes Project alongside a cohort of 1120 individuals with albinism, and investigate the effect of dual heterozygosity for the combination of two established albinism-related variants: TYR:c.1205 G > A (p.Arg402Gln) [rs1126809] and OCA2:c.1327 G > A (p.Val443Ile) [rs74653330]. As each of these changes alone is insufficient to cause disease when present in the heterozygous state, we sought evidence of synergistic effects. We show that, when both variants are present, the probability of receiving a diagnosis of albinism is significantly increased (odds ratio 12.8; 95% confidence interval 6.0 - 24.7; p-value 2.1 ×10
authors: David J Green, Vincent Michaud, Eulalie Lasseaux, Claudio Plaisant, Tomas Fitzgerald, Ewan Birney, Graeme C Black, Benoît Arveiler, Panagiotis I Sergouniotis

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过基因组测序揭示了罕见遗传病的复杂性，以白化病为模型探讨基因变异组合对表型的影响。发现两种已知致病位点的双重杂合性显著增加疾病诊断概率，提示基因互作在临床表型形成中的关键作用。
ai.translation: 尽管罕见遗传病主要由功能性的单基因DNA序列改变引起，但大规模基因组测序研究开始揭示更复杂的遗传机制。理解不同基因变异组合如何塑造人类表型，将为罕见病的临床和遗传异质性提供重要见解。本研究以白化病（典型色素减退症）为模型，分析了英国基因组计划100,000基因组项目数据与1120例白化病患者的联合数据。重点研究了两种已知致病位点的双重杂合性效应：TYR:c.1205 G>A (p.Arg402Gln) [rs1126809] 和 OCA2:c.1327 G>A (p.Val443Ile) [rs74653330]。由于单个变异在杂合状态下不足以致病，研究通过统计分析验证了两种变异协同作用的效应。结果发现，当两种变异同时存在时，白化病诊断概率显著升高（比值比12.8；95%置信区间6.0-24.7；p值2.1×10⁻⁷）。

title: L-SCRaMbLE creates large-scale genome rearrangements in synthetic Sc2.0 chromosomes
abstract: Optimization of the metabolic flux through heterologous pathways to improve bioproduction or utilization of alternative substrates requires both fine-tuning of non-native gene expression levels and improvement of the host genome. The SCRaMbLE system incorporated into synthetic Sc2.0 yeast strains enables a rapid approach to rearrange the genome of Saccharomyces cerevisiae in order to create optimized chassis. Here, we show that the light-inducible Cre recombinase L-SCRaMbLE can efficiently generate diverse recombination events when applied to Sc2.0 strains containing a linear or circular synthetic chromosome III. We present an efficient and straightforward workflow for the identification of complex rearranged synthetic chromosomes from SCRaMbLEd isolates without selection pressure. The screening method is based on novel genotyping primers, the loxPsym tags, which indicate not only deletions but also inversions and translocations. Long-read Nanopore sequencing is used to decode the selected genotypes and shows in conjunction with flow cytometry that large-scale karyotype alterations can be a consequence of SCRaMbLE.
authors: Lindeboom, T. A.; Sanchez Olmos, M. d. C.; Schulz, K.; Brinkmann, C. K.; Ramirez Rojas, A. A.; Hochrein, L.; Schindler, D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过优化异源代谢途径的代谢通量，旨在提升生物生产效率及替代底物利用能力，需同步调控非天然基因表达水平与改良宿主基因组。SCRaMbLE系统整合至合成Sc2.0酵母菌株后，可快速实现酿酒酵母基因组重排，构建优化的生物反应器底盘。实验表明，光诱导型Cre重组酶L-SCRaMbLE可高效生成多样重组事件，并通过新型基因分型引物loxPsym标签实现无选择压力下的复杂重排染色体筛选。
ai.translation: 通过异源途径优化代谢通量以提高生物生产或利用替代底物的能力，需要对非天然基因表达水平进行精细调控，并改进宿主基因组。将SCRaMbLE系统整合至合成Sc2.0酵母菌株中，可实现酿酒酵母基因组的快速重排，从而构建优化的生物反应器底盘。本研究展示了一种基于光诱导型Cre重组酶L-SCRaMbLE的方法，当应用于含有线性或环状合成染色体III的Sc2.0菌株时，可高效生成多样化的重组事件。我们提出了一种无需选择压力的高效且直接的工作流程，用于从SCRaMbLE处理的菌株中鉴定复杂重排的合成染色体。该筛选方法基于新型基因分型引物loxPsym标签，这些标签不仅能指示缺失事件，还能检测倒位和易位等复杂结构变异。通过长读长Nanopore测序解析选定的基因型，并结合流式细胞术分析，结果表明大规模核型改变可能是SCRaMbLE系统操作的后果。

title: TargetCall: Eliminating the Wasted Computation in Basecalling via Pre-Basecalling Filtering
abstract:
Basecalling is an essential step in nanopore sequencing analysis where the raw signals of nanopore sequencers are converted into nucleotide sequences, i.e., reads. State-of-the-art basecallers employ complex deep learning models to achieve high basecalling accuracy. This makes basecalling computationally-inefficient and memory-hungry; bottlenecking the entire genome analysis pipeline. However, for many applications, the majority of reads do no match the reference genome of interest (i.e., target reference) and thus are discarded in later steps in the genomics pipeline, wasting the basecalling computation.

To overcome this issue, we propose TargetCall, the first fast and widely-applicable pre-basecalling filter to eliminate the wasted computation in basecalling. TargetCalls key idea is to discard reads that will not match the target reference (i.e., off-target reads) prior to basecalling. TargetCall consists of two main components: (1) LightCall, a lightweight neural network basecaller that produces noisy reads; and (2) Similarity Check, which labels each of these noisy reads as on-target or off-target by matching them to the target reference. TargetCall filters out all off-target reads before basecalling; and the highly-accurate but slow basecalling is performed only on the raw signals whose noisy reads are labeled as on-target.

Our thorough experimental evaluations using both real and simulated data show that TargetCall 1) improves the end-to-end basecalling performance of the state-of-the-art basecaller by 3.31 x while maintaining high (98.88%) sensitivity in keeping on-target reads, 2) maintains high accuracy in downstream analysis, 3) precisely filters out up to 94.71% of off-target reads, and 4) achieves better performance, sensitivity, and generality compared to prior works. We freely open-source TargetCall to aid future research in pre-basecalling filtering at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/TargetCall.
authors: Cavlak, M. B.; Singh, G.; Alser, M.; Firtina, C.; Lindegger, J.; Sadrosadati, M.; Mansouri Ghiasi, N.; Alkan, C.; Mutlu, O.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序中的碱基调用步骤存在计算效率低的问题，TargetCall通过预调用过滤器消除冗余计算，显著提升整体分析效率。该方法在保持高灵敏度的同时，有效过滤掉94.71%的非目标reads，相比现有技术提升3.31倍性能。
ai.translation:
碱基调用是纳米孔测序分析中的关键步骤，其作用是将纳米孔测序仪的原始信号转化为核苷酸序列（即reads）。最先进的碱基调用工具采用复杂的深度学习模型以实现高精度的碱基调用，但这种高精度带来了计算效率低下和内存占用过高的问题，成为整个基因组分析流程的瓶颈。然而，在许多应用场景中，大部分reads并不匹配目标参考基因组（即非目标reads），这些reads在后续基因组分析流程中会被丢弃，造成碱基调用计算资源的浪费。

为解决这一问题，我们提出TargetCall，这是首个快速且广泛适用的预碱基调用过滤器，可消除碱基调用中的冗余计算。TargetCall的核心思想是在碱基调用前就过滤掉不会匹配目标参考基因组的reads（即非目标reads）。TargetCall包含两个主要组件：(1) LightCall，一个轻量级神经网络碱基调用器，生成带有噪声的reads；(2) 相似性检查模块，通过将这些噪声reads与目标参考基因组比对，标记为目标或非目标reads。TargetCall在碱基调用前过滤掉所有非目标reads，仅对被标记为目标的原始信号进行高精度但耗时的碱基调用。

我们使用真实和模拟数据进行的全面实验评估表明，TargetCall 1) 在保持98.88%高灵敏度的前提下，将最先进的碱基调用工具的端到端性能提升3.31倍；2) 保持下游分析的高准确性；3) 精确过滤掉高达94.71%的非目标reads；4) 相比现有技术在性能、灵敏度和通用性方面表现更优。我们已开源TargetCall以助力预碱基调用过滤研究（https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/TargetCall）。

title: Nanopore sequencing identifies a higher frequency and expanded spectrum of mitochondrial DNA deletion mutations in human aging
abstract:
BackgroundMitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) deletion mutations cause many human diseases and are linked to age-induced mitochondrial dysfunction. Mapping the mutation spectrum and quantifying mtDNA deletion mutation frequency is challenging with next generation sequencing methods. We hypothesized that long-read sequencing of human mtDNA across the lifespan would detect a broader spectrum of mtDNA rearrangements and provide a more accurate measurement of their frequency.

ResultsWe employed nanopore Cas9-targed sequencing (nCATS) to map and quantitate mtDNA deletion mutations and develop analyses that are fit-for-purpose. We analyzed total DNA from vastus lateralis muscle in 15 males ranging from 20 to 81 years of age and substantia nigra from three 20-year-old and three 79-year-old men. We found that mtDNA deletion mutations detected by nCATS increased exponentially with age and mapped to a wider region of the mitochondrial genome than previously reported. Using simulated data, we observed that large deletions are often reported as chimeric alignments. To address this, we developed two algorithms for deletion identification which yield consistent deletion mapping and identify both previously reported and novel mtDNA deletion breakpoints. The identified mtDNA deletion frequency measured by nCATS correlates strongly with chronological age and predicts the deletion frequency as measured by digital PCR approaches. In substantia nigra, we observed a similar frequency of age-related mtDNA deletions to those observed in muscle samples, but noted a distinct spectrum of deletion breakpoints.

ConclusionsNCATS-mtDNA sequencing allows identification of mtDNA deletions on a single molecule level, characterizing the strong relationship between mtDNA deletion frequency and chronological aging.
authors: Vandiver, A.; Hoang, A.; Herbst, A.; Lee, C. C.; Aiken, J.; McKenzie, D.; Timp, W.; Wanagat, J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过长读长测序技术揭示了mtDNA删除突变与年龄显著相关，发现随着年龄增长突变频率呈指数上升且分布区域扩大。nCATS技术能准确量化突变频率并识别新型断裂点，其结果与数字PCR方法高度一致，为线粒体功能障碍研究提供新工具。
ai.translation:
背景：线粒体DNA（mtDNA）删除突变会导致多种人类疾病，并与年龄相关的线粒体功能障碍密切相关。使用下一代测序方法映射突变谱和量化mtDNA删除突变频率具有挑战性。我们假设通过全生命周期的人类mtDNA长读长测序能够检测更广泛的mtDNA重排，并提供更精确的频率测量。

结果：我们采用纳米孔Cas9靶向测序（nCATS）技术对mtDNA删除突变进行映射和量化，并开发了适用于实际应用的分析方法。我们分析了15名20至81岁男性股四头肌的全基因组DNA，以及三名20岁和三名79岁男性黑质样本。发现nCATS检测到的mtDNA删除突变随年龄呈指数增长，并映射到比之前报道更广泛的线粒体基因组区域。通过模拟数据观察到大删除常被误报为嵌合对齐。为此我们开发了两种删除识别算法，可一致地定位删除区域并识别既往报道和新型mtDNA删除断裂点。nCATS测得的mtDNA删除频率与实际年龄高度相关，并可预测数字PCR方法测得的删除频率。在黑质样本中观察到与肌肉样本相似的年龄相关mtDNA删除频率，但注意到不同的断裂点谱。

结论：nCATS-mtDNA测序技术能够在单分子水平识别mtDNA删除，揭示了mtDNA删除频率与年龄增长的强相关性。

title: Analysis of the ARTIC V4 and V4.1 SARS-CoV-2 primers and their impact on the detection of Omicron BA.1 and BA.2 lineage defining mutations
abstract: The ARTIC protocol uses a multiplexed PCR approach with two primer pools tiling the entire SARS-CoV-2 genome. Primer pool updates are necessary for accurate amplicon sequencing of evolving SARS-CoV-2 variants with novel mutations. The suitability of the ARTIC V4 and updated V4.1 primer scheme was assessed using whole genome sequencing of Omicron from clinical samples using Oxford Nanopore Technology. Analysis of Omicron BA.1 genomes revealed that 93.22% of clinical samples generated improved genome coverage at 50x read depth with V4.1 primers when compared to V4 primers. Additionally, the V4.1 primers improved coverage of BA.1 across amplicons 76 and 88, which resulted in the detection of the variant defining mutations G22898A, A26530G and C26577G. The Omicron BA.2 sub-variant (VUI-22JAN-01) replaced BA.1 as the dominant variant by March 2022, and analysis of 168 clinical samples showed reduced coverage across amplicons 15 and 75. Upon further interrogation of primer binding sites, a mutation at C4321T (present in 163/168, 97% of samples) was identified as a possible cause of complete dropout of amplicon 15. Furthermore, two mutations were identified within the primer binding regions for amplicon 75: A22786C (present in 90% of samples) and C22792T (present in 12.5% of samples). Together, these mutations may result in reduced coverage of amplicon 75 and further primer updates would allow the identification of the two BA.2 defining mutations present in amplicon 75; A22688G and T22679C. This work highlights the need for ongoing surveillance of primer matches as circulating variants evolve and change.
authors: Ulhuq, F. R.; Barge, M.; Falconer, K.; Wild, J.; Fernandes, G.; Gallagher, A.; McGinley, S.; Sugadol, A.; Tariq, M.; Maloney, D.; Kenicer, J.; Dewar, R.; Templeton, K.; McHugh, M.

ai.TLDR: ARTIC协议通过多重PCR技术对SARS-CoV-2全基因组进行扩增子测序，针对新型变异株需持续更新引物池。研究显示V4.1引物可显著提升Omicron BA.1变种的基因组覆盖度并检测关键突变，但BA.2变种导致部分扩增子覆盖度下降，提示需持续监测引物匹配情况。
ai.translation: ARTIC协议采用包含两个引物池的多重PCR方法，对SARS-CoV-2全基因组进行扩增子测序。为准确测序不断进化的SARS-CoV-2新变异株，需定期更新引物池。本研究通过牛津纳米孔技术对临床样本中的Omicron变种进行全基因组测序，评估ARTIC V4和更新的V4.1引物方案的适用性。分析显示，使用V4.1引物时，93.22%的临床样本在50倍读深下比V4引物获得更优的基因组覆盖度。V4.1引物还显著提升了BA.1变种在扩增子76和88的覆盖度，成功检测到定义性突变G22898A、A26530G和C26577G。至2022年3月，Omicron BA.2亚变种（VUI-22JAN-01）取代BA.1成为主导变种，分析168份临床样本发现扩增子15和75的覆盖度下降。进一步分析引物结合位点后，发现C4321T突变（存在于163/168样本）可能导致扩增子15完全缺失。同时在扩增子75的引物结合区鉴定出两个突变：A22786C（90%样本）和C22792T（12.5%样本）。这些突变可能降低扩增子75的覆盖度，进一步的引物更新将有助于识别该扩增子中的BA.2定义性突变A22688G和T22679C。本研究强调需持续监测引物匹配情况以应对不断进化的流行变种。

title: In-depth Temporal Transcriptome Profiling of Monkeypox and Host Cells using Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: The recent Monkeypox outbreak showed the importance of studying the basic biology of orthopoxviruses. However, the transcriptome of its causative agent has not been investigated before neither with short-, nor with long-read sequencing approaches. This Oxford Nanopore long-read RNA-Sequencing dataset fills this gap. Our direct cDNA and native RNA sequencing data enable the in-depth characterization of the transcriptomic architecture and dynamics of the gene expressions of monkeypox virus; and also the deeper understanding of the changes it causes in the host cells on a transcriptome level.
authors: Kakuk, B.; Dormo, A.; Csabai, Z.; Kemenesi, G.; Holoubek, J.; Ruzek, D.; Prazsak, I.; Dani, V. E.; Denes, B.; Torma, G.; Jakab, F.; Toth, G. E.; Foldes, F. V.; Zana, B.; Lanszki, Z.; Harangozo, A.; Fulop, A.; Gulyas, G.; Mizik, M.; Kiss, A. A.; Tombacz, D.; Boldogkoi, Z.

ai.TLDR: 最近的猴痘疫情凸显了研究正痘病毒基本生物学的重要性。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore长读RNA测序技术填补了猴痘病毒转录组研究的空白，实现了对病毒基因表达动态及宿主细胞转录组变化的深入解析。
ai.translation: 最近的猴痘疫情凸显了研究正痘病毒基本生物学的重要性。然而，其病原体的转录组尚未通过短读或长读测序方法进行过系统研究。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore长读RNA测序技术构建的数据库填补了这一研究空白。我们的直接cDNA和原生RNA测序数据使研究人员能够深入解析猴痘病毒的转录组结构及基因表达动态，同时更全面地理解病毒在宿主细胞层面引发的转录组变化。

title: Y chromosome sequence and epigenomic reconstruction across human populations
abstract: Recent advances in long-read sequencing technologies have allowed the generation and curation of more complete genome assemblies, enabling the analysis of traditionally neglected chromosomes, such as the human Y chromosome (chrY). Native DNA was sequenced on a MinION Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing device to generate genome assemblies for 7 major chrY human haplogroups. We analyzed and compared the chrY enrichment of sequencing data obtained using two different selective sequencing approaches: adaptive sampling and flow cytometry chromosome sorting. We show that adaptive sampling can produce data to create assemblies comparable to chromosome sorting while being a less expensive and time-consuming technique. We also assessed haplogroup-specific structural variants, which would be otherwise difficult to study using short-read sequencing data only. Finally, we took advantage of this technology to detect and profile epigenetic modifications amongst the considered haplogroups. Altogether, we provide a framework to study complex genomic regions with a simple, fast, and affordable methodology that could be applied to larger population genomics datasets.
authors: Esteller-Cucala, P.; Palmada-Flores, M.; Kuderna, L. F. K.; Fontsere, C.; Serres-Armero, A.; Dabad, M.; Torralvo, M.; Faella, A.; Ferrandez-Peral, L.; Llovera, L.; Fornas, O.; Julia, E.; Ramirez, E.; Gonzalez, I.; Hecht, J.; Lizano, E.; Juan, D.; Marques-Bonet, T.; Marques-Bonet, T.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术的进步使得生成更完整的基因组组装成为可能，特别适用于传统上被忽视的染色体如人类Y染色体。研究比较了自适应采样与流式细胞术染色体分选两种方法，证明前者在成本和时间上更具优势。同时揭示了单倍群特异性结构变异及表观遗传修饰的检测潜力。
keywords: 流式细胞术染色体分选
ai.translation: 近年来长读长测序技术的进步使得生成和整理更完整的基因组组装成为可能，从而能够分析传统上被忽视的染色体，例如人类Y染色体（chrY）。使用MinION Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序设备对原生DNA进行测序，生成了7个主要chrY人类单倍群的基因组组装。我们分析并比较了使用两种不同的选择性测序方法获得的chrY富集测序数据：自适应采样和流式细胞术染色体分选。研究显示自适应采样能够生成与染色体分选相当的组装数据，同时成本更低且耗时更少。我们还评估了单倍群特异性的结构变异，这些变异仅通过短读长测序数据难以研究。最后，我们利用该技术检测并分析了所考虑单倍群中的表观遗传修饰。总体而言，我们提供了一个框架，通过简单、快速且经济的方法研究复杂基因组区域，该方法可应用于更大的人群基因组学数据集。

title: Chromosome-level, nanopore-only genome and allele-specific DNA methylation of Pallas's cat, Otocolobus manul
abstract: Pallass cat, or the manul cat (Otocolobus manul), is a small felid native to the grasslands and steppes of central Asia. Population strongholds in Mongolia and China face growing challenges from climate change, habitat fragmentation, poaching, and other sources. These threats, combined with O. manuls zoo collection popularity and value in evolutionary biology, necessitate improvement of species genomic resources. We used standalone nanopore sequencing to assemble a 2.5 Gb, 61-contig nuclear assembly and 17,097 bp mitogenome for O. manul. The primary nuclear assembly had 56x sequencing coverage, a contig N50 of 118 Mb, and a 94.7% BUSCO completeness score for Carnivora-specific genes. High genome collinearity within Felidae permitted alignment-based scaffolding onto the fishing cat (Prionailurus viverrinus) reference genome. Manul contigs spanned all 19 felid chromosomes with an inferred total gap length of less than 400 kilobases. Modified basecalling and variant phasing produced an alternate pseudohaplotype assembly and allele-specific DNA methylation calls; sixty-one differentially methylated regions were identified between haplotypes. Nearest features included classical imprinted genes, non-coding RNAs, and putative novel imprinted loci. The assembled mitogenome successfully resolved existing discordance between Felinae nuclear and mtDNA phylogenies. All assembly drafts were generated from 158 Gb of sequence using seven minION flow cells.
authors: Flack, N.; Drown, M. K.; Walls, C.; Pratte, J.; McLain, A.; Faulk, C.

ai.TLDR: 帕拉斯猫（Otocolobus manul）作为濒危物种，其基因组资源亟需完善。研究通过纳米孔测序技术组装出高质量基因组，揭示了染色体结构和甲基化特征，解决了Felinae亚科核基因组与线粒体基因组系统发育的矛盾。
ai.translation: 帕拉斯猫，或称雪豹（Otocolobus manul），是一种原产于中亚草原和草原地区的小型猫科动物。蒙古和中国的人口主要分布区正面临日益严峻的挑战，包括气候变化、栖息地碎片化、盗猎等威胁。这些威胁，结合O. manul在动物园的受欢迎程度及其在进化生物学中的价值，迫切需要改善该物种的基因组资源。我们采用独立纳米孔测序技术，组装出2.5千兆碱基对（Gb）、61条染色体的核基因组和17,097碱基对（bp）的线粒体基因组。主要核基因组具有56倍测序覆盖度，染色体N50为118兆碱基（Mb），Carnivora特异性基因的BUSCO完整性评分为94.7%。猫科动物基因组的高共线性允许基于比对的框架组装到捕鱼猫（Prionailurus viverrinus）参考基因组上。Manul染色体覆盖所有19条猫科染色体，推测总间隙长度小于400千碱基（kb）。改进的碱基调用和变异相位分析产生了替代假二倍体组装和等位基因特异性DNA甲基化预测；在假二倍体间鉴定出61个差异甲基化区域。邻近特征包括经典印记基因、非编码RNA和潜在的新印记位点。组装的线粒体基因组成功解决了Felinae亚科核基因组与线粒体DNA系统发育的矛盾。所有组装草稿均来自158 Gb序列数据，使用七台minION流细胞完成。

title: NanoTrans: an integrated computational framework for comprehensive transcriptome analyses with Nanopore direct-RNA sequencing
abstract: Nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS) provides the direct access to native RNA strands with full-length information, shedding light on rich qualitative and quantitative properties of gene expression profiles. Here with NanoTrans, we present an integrated computational framework that comprehensively covers all major DRS-based application scopes, including isoform clustering and quantification, poly(A) tail length estimation, RNA modification profiling, and fusion gene detection. In addition to its merit in providing such a streamlined one-stop solution, NanoTrans also shines in its workflow-orientated modular design, batch processing capability, all-in-one tabular and graphic report output, as well as automatic installation and configuration supports. Finally, by applying NanoTrans to real DRS datasets of yeast, Arabidopsis, as well as human embryonic kidney and cancer cell lines, we further demonstrated its utility, effectiveness, and efficacy across a wide range of DRS-based application settings.
authors: Wang, F.; Zhang, X.; Zhang, L.; Li, J.; Yue, J.-X.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔直接RNA测序（DRS）技术能够直接获取完整长度的天然RNA链，揭示基因表达谱的丰富定性和定量特性。NanoTrans作为集成化计算框架，全面覆盖等位基因聚类、poly(A)尾长度估计等DRS核心应用场景，通过模块化设计和自动化功能验证了其在多组学分析中的广泛适用性。
ai.translation: 纳米孔直接RNA测序（DRS）技术能够直接获取天然RNA链的完整序列信息，揭示了基因表达谱的丰富定性和定量特性。本研究基于NanoTrans平台，提出一个全面覆盖DRS主要应用场景的集成化计算框架，包括等位基因聚类与定量分析、poly(A)尾长度估计、RNA修饰谱分析以及融合基因检测等功能模块。该框架不仅具备流程导向的模块化设计优势，还支持批量数据处理、一体化表格与图形报告输出，并提供自动安装配置功能。通过在酵母、拟南芥、人类胚胎肾细胞系及癌细胞系的真实DRS数据集上的应用验证，进一步证明了NanoTrans在多种DRS应用场景中的实用性、有效性和可靠性。

title: Real-time biochemical-free targeted sequencing of RNA species with RISER
abstract: The heterogeneous composition of cellular transcriptomes poses a major challenge for detecting weakly expressed RNA classes, as they can be obscured by abundant RNAs. Although biochemical protocols can enrich or deplete specified RNAs, they are time-consuming, expensive and can compromise RNA integrity. Here we introduce RISER, a biochemical-free technology for the real-time enrichment or depletion of RNA classes. RISER performs selective rejection of molecules during direct RNA sequencing by identifying RNA classes directly from nanopore signals with deep learning and communicating with the sequencing hardware in real time. By targeting the dominant messenger and mitochondrial RNA classes for depletion, RISER reduced their respective read counts by more than 85%, resulting in an increase in sequencing depth of up to 93% for long non-coding RNAs. We also applied RISER for the depletion of globin mRNA in whole blood, achieving a decrease in globin reads by more than 90% as well as a significant increase in non-globin reads. Furthermore, using a GPU or a CPU, RISER is faster than GPU-accelerated basecalling and mapping. RISERs modular and retrainable software and intuitive command-line interface allow easy adaptation to other RNA classes. RISER is available at https://github.com/comprna/riser.
authors: Sneddon, A.; Ravindran, A.; Hein, N.; Shirokikh, N. E.; Eyras, E.

ai.TLDR: RISER技术通过深度学习实时分析纳米孔信号，实现无需生化处理的RNA类选择性富集或耗尽。该方法显著提升长非编码RNA测序深度，同时有效降低血红蛋白mRNA读数，展现出优于GPU加速碱基调用的计算效率。
ai.translation: 细胞转录组的异质性组成对检测低表达RNA类别构成重大挑战，因为它们可能被大量RNA掩盖。尽管生化协议可以富集或耗尽特定RNA，但存在耗时、昂贵且可能损害RNA完整性的问题。本文介绍RISER技术，这是一种无需生化处理的实时RNA类富集或耗尽方法。RIS均通过深度学习直接从纳米孔信号识别RNA类别，在测序过程中实时与测序硬件通信，实现分子选择性排斥。通过针对主导的信使RNA和线粒体RNA类别进行耗尽，RISER使这两种RNA的读数分别减少超过85%，从而使长非编码RNA的测序深度提升最高达93%。我们还应用RISER耗尽全血中的血红蛋白mRNA，实现血红蛋白读数降低超过90%，同时非血红蛋白读数显著增加。此外，使用GPU或CPU进行计算时，RISER的速度优于GPU加速的碱基调用和比对。RISER模块化且可重新训练的软件架构及直观的命令行界面使其易于适配其他RNA类别。RISER技术已开源，可在https://github.com/comprna/riser获取。

title: A simplified, amplicon-based method for whole genome sequencing of human respiratory syncytial viruses
abstract: Human Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) infections pose a significant risk to human health worldwide, especially for young children. Whole genome sequencing (WGS) provides a useful tool for global surveillance to better understand the evolution and epidemiology of RSV and provide essential information that may impact on antibody treatments, antiviral drug sensitivity and vaccine effectiveness. Here we report the development of a rapid and simplified amplicon-based one-step multiplex reverse-transcription polymerase chain reaction (mRT-PCR) for WGS of both human RSV-A and RSV-B viruses. The method requires only two reactions for each sample, which significantly reduces the cost and time compared to other commonly used RSV WGS methods. In silico analysis and laboratory testing revealed that the primers used in the new method covered most of the currently circulating RSV-A and RSV-B. Amplicons generated were suitable for both Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) NGS platforms. This new method was tested on 200 clinical samples collected in Australia in 2020 and 2021 with RSV Ct values between 10 and 32. A success rate of 88% with a full coverage for the genome of 99 RSV-A and 77 RSV-B was achieved. This assay is simple to set up, robust, easily scalable in sample preparation and relatively inexpensive, and as such, provides a valuable addition to existing NGS RSV WGS methods.
authors: Dong, X.; Deng, Y.-M.; Aziz, A.; Whitney, P.; Clark, J.; Harris, P.; Bautista, C.; Costa, A. M.; Waller, G.; Daley, A. J.; Wieringa, M.; Korman, T.; Barr, I. G.

ai.TLDR: 呼吸道合胞病毒（RSV）感染对全球儿童健康构成重大威胁，本文提出一种基于扩增子的快速简化mRT-PCR方法，可同时完成RSV-A和RSV-B的全基因组测序。该方法通过双反应体系实现88%的成功率，覆盖99% RSV-A和77% RSV-B基因组，显著降低检测成本和时间。
ai.translation: 呼吸道合胞病毒（Respiratory Syncytial Virus, RSV）感染对全球人类健康构成重大威胁，尤其是对婴幼儿群体。全基因组测序（Whole Genome Sequencing, WGS）为全球监测RSV的进化规律和流行病学特征提供了重要工具，可为抗体治疗、抗病毒药物敏感性和疫苗有效性评估提供关键信息。本研究开发了一种快速简化型扩增子基单一管多重逆转录聚合酶链反应（amplicon-based one-step multiplex reverse-transcription polymerase chain reaction, mRT-PCR）方法，用于RSV-A和RSV-B病毒的全基因组测序。该方法每个样本仅需两个反应体系，相较于现有常用RSV全基因组测序方法显著降低检测成本和耗时。通过计算机模拟分析和实验室测试验证，新方法使用的引物可覆盖当前主要流行的RSV-A和RSV-B病毒株。生成的扩增子适用于Illumina和牛津纳米孔（Oxford Nanopore Technologies, ONT）等下一代测序（NGS）平台。该方法在澳大利亚2020-2021年收集的200例临床样本中进行验证，样本RSV Ct值介于10-32之间，实现了88%的成功率，其中99% RSV-A和77% RSV-B病毒基因组获得完整覆盖。该检测方法具有操作简便、结果稳定、样本前处理易于扩展且成本相对低廉等优势，为现有NGS RSV全基因组测序方法提供了有价值的补充方案。

title: Rapid Real-time Squiggle Classification for Read Until Using RawMap
journal: Archives of Clinical and Biomedical Research
abstract:
ReadUntil enables Oxford Nanopore Technologys (ONT) sequencers to selectively sequence reads of target species in real-time. This enables efficient microbial enrichment for applications such as microbial abundance estimation and is particularly beneficial for metagenomic samples with a very high fraction of non-target reads (> 99% can be human reads). However, read-until requires a fast and accurate software filter that analyzes a short prefix of a read and determines if it belongs to a microbe of interest (target) or not. The baseline Read Until pipeline uses a deep neural network-based basecaller called Guppy and is slow and inaccurate for this task ([~]60% of bases sequenced are unclassified).

We present RawMap, an efficient CPU-only microbial species-agnostic Read Until classifier for filtering non-target human reads in the squiggle space. RawMap uses a Support Vector Machine (SVM), which is trained to distinguish human from microbe using non-linear and non-stationary characteristics of ONTs squiggle output (continuous electrical signals). Compared to the baseline Read Until pipeline, RawMap is a 1327X faster classifier and significantly improves the sequencing time and cost, and compute time savings. We show that RawMap augmented pipelines reduce sequencing time and cost by [~]24% and computing cost by [~]22%. Additionally, since RawMap is agnostic to microbial species, it can also classify microbial species it is not trained on.

We also discuss how RawMap may be used as an alternative to the RT-PCR test for viral load quantification of SARS-CoV-2.

Availability and implementationSoftware is released with MIT License and available on GitHub: https://github.com/harisankarsadasivan/RawMap
authors: Sadasivan, H.; Wadden, J.; Goliya, K.; Wiens, J.; Dickson, R. P.; Blaauw, D.; Das, R.; Narayanasamy, S.

ai.TLDR: ReadUntil 技术使牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序仪能够实时选择性地对目标物种的读段进行测序，显著提升微生物富集效率。RawMap 作为基于 SVM 的分类器，相较传统方法提升 1327 倍分类速度，降低 24% 测序成本和 22% 计算成本，可扩展至病毒载量检测等场景。
ai.translation:
ReadUntil 使牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序仪能够实时选择性地对目标物种的读段进行测序。该技术可高效实现微生物富集，尤其适用于非目标读段占比超 99% 的宏基因组样本（如人类读段占比较高）。然而，ReadUntil 需依赖快速准确的软件过滤器，通过分析读段前缀判断是否为微生物目标序列。现有基于深度神经网络的 Guppy 工具在该任务中存在速度慢（约 60% 基因组未分类）和准确性不足的问题。

我们提出 RawMap，一种无需 GPU 的微生物物种无关型 ReadUntil 分类器，用于过滤非目标人类读段。RawMap 采用支持向量机（SVM），通过分析 ONT 测序仪输出的非线性、非平稳特性（连续电信号）区分人类与微生物。相较传统 ReadUntil 流程，RawMap 分类速度提升 1327 倍，显著降低测序时间成本和计算资源消耗。实验表明，RawMap 增强的流程可降低测序成本约 24%、计算成本约 22%。此外，由于 RawMap 不依赖特定微生物物种，可扩展至未训练的微生物分类。

我们还探讨了 RawMap 作为 RT-PCR 测试替代方案在 SARS-CoV-2 病毒载量定量中的应用潜力。软件采用 MIT 许可协议开源，GitHub 地址：https://github.com/harisankarsadasivan/RawMap

title: Accuracy and completeness of long read metagenomic assemblies
abstract: Microbes, we can learn how microbes influence the surrounding environment, contribute to human health, and understand which pathogen interactions result in differences in disease severity. Metagenomics can be used as a tool to explore the interactions between microbes. Metagenomic assemblies built using long read nanopore data depend on the read level accuracy. The read level accuracy of nanopore sequencing has made dramatic improvements over the past several years. However, we do not know if the increased read level accuracy allows for faster assemblers to make as accurate metagenomic assemblies as slower assemblers. Here, we present the results of a benchmarking study comparing three commonly used long read assemblers, Flye, Raven, and Redbean. We used a prepared DNA standard of seven bacteria as our input community. We prepared a sequencing library on the VolTRAX V2 sequence using a MinION mk1b. We basecalled using the latest version of Guppy with the super-accuracy model. We found that increasing read depth benefited each of the assemblers, and nearly complete community member chromosomes were assembled with as little as 10x read depth. Polishing assemblies using Medaka had a predictable improvement in quality. Some assemblers struggled with particular members of the bacterial community, but we found Flye to be the most robust across taxa. We found Flye was the most effective assembler for recovering plasmids. Based on Flyes consistency for chromosomes and increased effectiveness at assembling plasmids, we would recommend using Flye in future metagenomic studies.
authors: Buttler, J.; Drown, D. M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过比较Flye、Raven和Redbean三种长读长宏基因组组装器，发现Flye在染色体和质粒组装中表现最优。随着读取深度增加，所有组装器性能均提升，10倍读取深度即可实现近完整菌株染色体组装。
ai.translation: 微生物群落的相互作用研究对于理解其对环境的影响、人类健康贡献以及病原体相互作用差异具有重要意义。宏基因组学作为探索微生物相互作用的工具，其组装质量依赖于长读长纳米孔测序数据的读取水平准确性。尽管纳米孔测序的读取水平准确性近年来显著提升，但尚不清楚更高准确性是否能实现更快的组装器与更精确的宏基因组组装。本研究通过基准测试比较了三种常用长读长组装器（Flye、Raven、Redbean）的性能。实验使用七种细菌的标准DNA样本作为输入群落，采用MinION mk1b设备进行测序，使用最新版Guppy超级准确性模型进行碱基调用。结果发现，随着读取深度增加，所有组装器性能均提升，10倍读取深度即可实现近完整菌株染色体组装。使用Medaka进行组装优化可显著提升组装质量。部分组装器在特定细菌成员处理上存在困难，但Flye在跨分类群表现最为稳健。研究发现Flye在质粒回收效率上表现最佳。基于Flye在染色体组装的一致性和质粒组装的高效性，建议未来宏基因组研究优先使用Flye。

title: Soil metatranscriptomics: An improved RNA extraction method toward functional analysis using nanopore direct RNA sequencing
abstract: Soil microbes play an undeniable role in sustainable agriculture, plant health, and soil management. A deeper understanding of soil microbial composition and function has been gained through next-generation sequencing. While soil metagenomics has provided valuable information about microbial diversity, issues stemming from RNA extraction, low RNA abundance in some microbial populations (e.g., viruses), and mRNA enrichment have slowed the progress of soil metatranscriptomics. A variety of soil RNA extraction methods have been developed so far. Yet none of the available protocols can obtain RNA with high quality, purity, and yield for third-generation sequencing. This latter requires RNA with high quality and large quantities (with no or low contamination, such as humic acids). Also, use of commercial kits for in-batch soil RNA extraction is quite expensive, and these commercial kits lack buffer composition details, which prevents the optimization of protocols for different soil types. An improved and cost-effective method for extracting RNAs from mineral and organic soils is presented in this paper. An acidic sodium acetate buffer and phosphate buffer with modifications to bead-beating and nucleic acid precipitation lead to higher RNA yields and quality. Using this method, we obtained almost DNA-free RNA. By using nanopores direct RNA sequencing, the extracted contamination-free RNAs were successfully sequenced. Lastly, taxonomic groups such as bacteria, fungi, archaea, and viruses were classified and profiled as well as functional annotation of the datasets was carried out using an in-house customized bioinformatics workflow.
authors: Poursalavati, A.; Jalali Javaran, V.; Laforest-Lapointe, I.; Lamine Fall, M.

ai.TLDR: 土壤微生物在可持续农业中具有关键作用，但土壤宏转录组学因RNA提取困难和三代测序需求受限。本研究提出改进的RNA提取方法，通过酸性缓冲液和优化沉淀工艺获得高质量RNA，并成功实现纳米孔直接测序。
ai.translation: 土壤微生物在可持续农业、植物健康和土壤管理中发挥着不可替代的作用。通过下一代测序技术，我们对土壤微生物组成和功能有了更深入的理解。尽管土壤宏基因组学已揭示了微生物多样性，但RNA提取过程中的技术难题（如RNA提取效率低、病毒等微生物群体mRNA丰度不足、mRNA富集困难）仍制约着土壤宏转录组学的发展。目前已有多种土壤RNA提取方法，但现有协议无法满足三代测序对高纯度、高质量且无污染（如不含腐殖酸）RNA的大量需求。商业RNA提取试剂盒成本高昂且缺乏缓冲液配方细节，限制了针对不同土壤类型的协议优化。本文提出了一种改进的低成本RNA提取方法，通过改良的酸性醋酸钠缓冲液和磷酸缓冲液体系，结合珠磨破碎和核酸沉淀工艺，显著提高了RNA产量和质量。该方法成功获得几乎不含DNA的RNA样本，经纳米孔直接RNA测序验证了提取的RNA无污染。最后，通过自主开发的生物信息学流程，对细菌、真菌、古菌和病毒等分类群进行分类和功能注释，完成了数据集的功能注释分析。

title: Genome-wide libraries for protozoan pathogens drug target screening using yeast surface display
abstract: The lack of genetic tools to manipulate protozoan pathogens has limited the use of genome-wide approaches to identify drug or vaccine targets and understand these organisms biology. We have developed an efficient method to construct genome-wide libraries for yeast surface display (YSD) and developed a YSD fitness screen (YSD-FS) to identify drug targets. We show the robustness of our method by generating genome-wide libraries for Trypanosoma brucei, Trypanosoma cruzi, and Giardia lamblia parasites. Each library has a diversity of [~]105 to 106 clones, representing [~]6 to 30-fold of the parasites genome. Nanopore sequencing confirmed the libraries genome coverage with multiple clones for each parasite gene. Western blot and imaging analysis confirmed surface expression of the G. lamblia library proteins in yeast. Using the YSD-FS assay, we identified bonafide interactors of metronidazole, a drug used to treat protozoan and bacterial infections. We also found enrichment in nucleotide-binding domain sequences associated with yeast increased fitness to metronidazole, indicating that this drug might target multiple enzymes containing nucleotide-binding domains. The libraries are valuable biological resources for discovering drug or vaccine targets, ligand receptors, protein-protein interactions, and pathogen-host interactions. The library assembly approach can be applied to other organisms or expression systems, and the YSD-FS assay might help identify new drug targets in protozoan pathogens.
authors: Heslop, R.; Gao, M.; Brito Lira, A.; Sternlieb, T.; Loock, M.; Sanghi, S. R.; Cestari, I.

ai.TLDR: 当前缺乏操控原生动物病原体的基因工具，限制了全基因组方法在药物/疫苗靶点发现和生物学研究中的应用。本研究开发了酵母表面展示（YSD）全基因组库构建方法及YSD-FS筛选体系，通过三种寄生虫基因组库验证了方法的鲁棒性，并发现甲硝唑可能靶向含核苷酸结合域的多酶。该技术为发现药物靶点、受体及宿主互作提供了重要资源。
ai.translation: 缺乏操控原生动物病原体的基因工具限制了全基因组方法在药物/疫苗靶点发现及生物学研究中的应用。我们开发了高效构建酵母表面展示（YSD）全基因组库的方法，并建立了YSD-FS筛选体系以识别药物靶点。通过构建布氏锥虫、克氏锥虫和蓝氏贾第鞭毛虫的全基因组库验证了方法的可靠性，每个库包含约10^5-10^6个克隆，覆盖寄生虫基因组的6-30倍。纳米孔测序证实了基因组覆盖度，Western blot和成像分析验证了蓝氏贾第鞭毛虫库蛋白在酵母中的表面表达。利用YSD-FS检测发现甲硝唑的真正互作蛋白，同时发现与酵母对甲硝唑增效相关的核苷酸结合域序列富集，表明该药物可能靶向含核苷酸结合域的多酶。这些库为发现药物靶点、受体、蛋白-蛋白互作及病原体-宿主互作提供了重要资源。库构建方法可拓展至其他生物或表达系统，YSD-FS检测可能帮助发现新型原生动物病原体药物靶点。

title: Snapper: a high-sensitive algorithm to detect methylation motifs based on Oxford Nanopore reads
abstract: The Oxford Nanopore technology has a great potential for the analysis of genome methylation, including full-genome methylome profiling. However, there are certain issues while identifying methylation motif sequences caused by low sensitivity of the currently available motif enrichment algorithms. Here, we present Snapper, a new highly-sensitive approach to extract methylation motif sequences based on a greedy motif selection algorithm. Snapper has shown higher enrichment sensitivity compared with the MEME tool coupled with Tombo or Nanodisco instruments, which was demonstrated on H. pylori strain J99 studied earlier using the PacBio technology. In addition, we used Snapper to characterize the total methylome of a new H.pylori strain A45. The analysis revealed the presence of at least 4 methylation sites that have not been described for H. pylori earlier. We experimentally confirmed a new CCAG-specific methyltransferase and indirectly inferred a new CCAAK-specific methyltransferase.
authors: Konanov, D. N.; Babenko, V. N.; Belova, A. M.; Madan, A. G.; Boldyreva, D. I.; Glushchenko, O. E.; Butenko, I. O.; Fedorov, D. E.; Manolov, A. I.; Lazarev, V. N.; Govorun, V. M.; Ilina, E. N.

ai.TLDR: Oxford Nanopore技术在基因组甲基化分析中具有潜力，但现有方法在识别甲基化motif序列时存在灵敏度不足的问题。Snapper作为新型高灵敏度方法，通过贪心算法显著提升了motif提取效果，成功揭示了幽门螺杆菌新甲基化位点并验证了新型甲基转移酶。该方法在PacBio技术研究基础上，进一步拓展了Nanopore技术在全基因组甲基组分析中的应用价值。
ai.translation: 牛津纳米孔技术（Oxford Nanopore technology）在基因组甲基化分析领域展现出巨大潜力，包括全基因组甲基组谱型分析。然而，现有motif富集算法的灵敏度不足导致在识别甲基化motif序列时存在一定局限性。本研究提出Snapper，一种基于贪心motif选择算法的新型高灵敏度方法，用于提取甲基化motif序列。实验结果表明，Snapper在灵敏度方面显著优于MEME工具结合Tombo或Nanodisco仪器的表现，该结论基于对先前使用PacBio技术研究的幽门螺杆菌J99菌株的验证。此外，我们利用Snapper对新型幽门螺杆菌A45菌株的全甲基组进行了表征分析，发现至少4个此前未被描述的甲基化位点。通过实验验证了新型CCAG特异性甲基转移酶，并间接推断出新型CCAAG特异性甲基转移酶的存在。

title: Genome-wide single-molecule analysis of long-read DNA methylation reveals heterogeneous patterns at heterochromatin
abstract: High-throughput sequencing technology is central to our current understanding of the human methylome. The vast majority of studies use chemical conversion to analyse bulk-level patterns of DNA methylation across the genome from a population of cells. While this technology has been used to probe single-molecule methylation patterns, such analyses are limited to short reads of a few hundred basepairs. DNA methylation can also be directly detected using Nanopore sequencing which can generate reads measuring megabases in length. However, thus far these analyses have largely focused on bulk-level assessment of DNA methylation. Here, we analyse DNA methylation in single Nanopore reads with a mean length of 24.6kb, to show that bulk-level metrics underestimate large-scale heterogeneity in the methylome. We use the correlation in methylation state between neighbouring sites to quantify single-molecule heterogeneity and find that heterogeneity varies significantly across the human genome, with some regions having heterogeneous methylation patterns at the single-molecule level and others possessing more homogeneous methylation patterns. By comparing the genomic distribution of the correlation to epigenomic annotations, we find that the greatest heterogeneity in single-molecule patterns is observed within heterochromatic partially methylated domains (PMDs). In contrast, reads originating from euchromatic regions and gene bodies have more ordered DNA methylation patterns. By analysing the patterns of single molecules in more detail, we show the existence of a 185bp periodicity in DNA methylation that accounts for some of the heterogeneity we uncover in long single-molecule DNA methylation patterns. We find that this periodic structure is partially masked in bulk data in a manner that is consistent with imperfect phasing of nucleosomes between molecules. Our findings demonstrate the power of single-molecule analysis of long-read data to understand the structure of the human methylome.
authors: Kerr, L.; Grima, R.; Sproul, D.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用纳米孔测序技术分析单分子甲基化模式，揭示群体水平指标低估了甲基组的大规模异质性。通过比较相关性分布与表观基因组注释，发现异染色质部分甲基化域（PMDs）存在显著异质性，而常染色质区域和基因体则呈现更有序的甲基化模式。
keywords: 异染色质部分甲基化域
ai.translation: 高通量测序技术是当前理解人类甲基组的核心工具。大多数研究通过化学转化分析细胞群体中全基因组DNA甲基化模式，但该技术在单分子甲基化模式分析中受限于短读长（数百碱基对）。纳米孔测序可生成兆碱基级读长，直接检测DNA甲基化，但此前研究主要聚焦群体水平评估。本研究分析平均24.6kb的单分子纳米孔读长，发现群体水平指标低估了甲基组的大规模异质性。通过量化相邻位点的甲基化状态相关性，发现人类基因组中异质性显著差异：部分区域呈现单分子水平异质性，而其他区域则更均质。将相关性分布与表观基因组注释对比发现，异染色质部分甲基化域（PMDs）存在最显著的单分子异质性，而常染色质区域和基因体则呈现更有序的甲基化模式。进一步分析单分子模式揭示DNA甲基化存在185bp周期性结构，该结构在群体数据中因核小体相位不准确而部分被掩盖。研究结果证明长读长单分子分析对理解人类甲基组结构具有重要价值。

title: Nanopore sequencing enables multigenic family reconstruction despite highly frequent PCR-induced recombination
abstract: This study developed a new bioinformatics pipeline to acquire all the different copies of multi-copy gene families based on Oxford Nanopore Technologies sequencing of PCR products. We used this pipeline to acquire the sequences of highly similar copies of the cidA and cidB genes present in the genomes of Wolbachia pipientis (wPip) bacteria infecting the cells of Culex pipiens mosquitoes. The approach is based on read mapping, SNP calling and haplotyping, using our already wide existing reference database for the cid genes obtained by cloning and Sanger sequencing. We addressed problems commonly faced when using mapping approaches for multi-copy gene families with highly similar variants (or haplotypes). In addition, we confirmed that PCR amplification causes frequent chimeras which have to be carefully considered when working on families of recombinant genes. We tested the robustness of the pipeline through a combination of analyses of simulated reads and of gene sequence acquisitions through cloning and Sanger sequencing. For genes of which the haplotype cannot be reconstructed from short reads sequencing, this pipeline confers a high throughput acquisition, gives reliable results as well as insights of the relative copy numbers of the different variants.
authors: Namias, A.; Sahlin, K.; Makoundou, P.; Bonnici, I.; Sicard, M.; Belkhir, K.; Weill, M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序的生物信息学流程，用于获取多拷贝基因家族的不同拷贝。该方法通过读取映射、SNP调用和谱系分析解决了多拷贝基因家族高度相似变体的处理难题，并验证了PCR扩增导致的嵌合体问题。实验表明该流程可高效获取无法通过短读测序重建谱系的基因信息。
ai.translation: 本研究开发了一种新的生物信息学流程，通过Oxford Nanopore Technologies测序PCR产物，获取多拷贝基因家族的所有不同拷贝。我们利用该流程获取了感染Culex pipiens蚊子细胞的Wolbedia pipientis (wPip)细菌基因组中cidA和cidB基因的高相似拷贝序列。该方法基于读取映射、SNP调用和谱系分析，使用我们已有的cid基因参考数据库（通过克隆和Sanger测序获得）。我们解决了使用映射方法处理多拷贝基因家族高度相似变体（或谱系）时的常见问题。此外，我们证实PCR扩增会导致频繁的嵌合体产生，这在处理重组基因家族时需要特别注意。通过结合模拟读取分析和克隆及Sanger测序获取的基因序列，我们测试了该流程的鲁棒性。对于无法通过短读测序重建谱系的基因，该流程提供了高通量获取手段，能够获得可靠结果并揭示不同变体的相对拷贝数。

title: Rockfish: A Transformer-based Model for Accurate 5-Methylcytosine Prediction from Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: DNA methylation plays a crucial role in various biological processes, including cell differentiation, ageing, and cancer development. The most important methylation in mammals is 5-methylcytosine (5mC) which is present in the context of CpG dinucleotides. Sequencing methods such as whole-genome bisulfite sequencing (WGBS) successfully detect 5mC DNA modifications. However, they suffer from the serious drawbacks of short read lengths and might introduce an amplification bias. Here we present Rockfish, a deep learning algorithm that significantly improves read-level 5mC detection by using Nanopore sequencing. Compared to other methods based on Nanopore sequencing, there is an increase in the single-base accuracy and the F1 measure of up to 5% and 12%, respectively. Furthermore, Rockfish shows a high correlation with WGBS and requires lower read depth while being computationally efficient. We deem that Rockfish is broadly applicable to study 5mC methylation in diverse organisms and disease systems to yield biological insights.
authors: Stanojevic, D.; Li, Z.; Foo, R.; Sikic, M.

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化在细胞分化、衰老和癌症发展中起关键作用，其中5mC是哺乳动物中最重要的甲基化形式。现有测序方法存在读长短和扩增偏差等局限，Rockfish算法通过纳米孔测序显著提升5mC检测精度，单碱基准确率和F1值分别提高5%和12%，且计算效率更高。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化在多种生物学过程中发挥关键作用，包括细胞分化、衰老和癌症发展。在哺乳动物中，5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）是最重要的甲基化形式，其主要存在于CpG二核苷酸上下文环境中。全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序（WGBS）等测序方法能够有效检测5mC修饰，但存在读长较短和可能引入扩增偏差等严重缺陷。本文提出Rockfish算法，这是一种基于深度学习的方法，通过纳米孔测序显著提升了单个读段层面的5mC检测能力。与基于纳米孔测序的其他方法相比，Rockfish在单碱基准确率和F1值指标上分别提升了5%和12%。此外，Rockfish与WGBS表现出高度相关性，同时在计算效率方面具有优势且对测序深度要求更低。我们认为Rockfish算法可广泛应用于研究不同生物体和疾病系统中的5mC甲基化，从而获得生物学见解。

title: WarpSTR: Determining tandem repeat lengths using raw nanopore signals
abstract:
MotivationShort tandem repeats (STRs) are regions of a genome containing many consecutive copies of the same short motif, possibly with small variations. Analysis of STRs has many clinical uses, but is limited by technology mainly due to STRs surpassing the used read length. Nanopore sequencing, as one of long read sequencing technologies, produces very long reads, thus offering more possibilities to study and analyze STRs. Basecalling of nanopore reads is however particularly unreliable in repeating regions, and therefore direct analysis from raw nanopore data is required.

ResultsHere we present WarpSTR, a novel method for characterizing both simple and complex tandem repeats directly from raw nanopore signals using a finite-state automaton and a search algorithm analogous to dynamic time warping. By applying this approach to determine the lengths of 241 STRs, we demonstrate that our approach decreases the mean absolute error of the STR length estimate compared to basecalling and STRique.

AvailabilityWarpSTR is freely available at https://github.com/fmfi-compbio/warpstr

Contactjozef.sitarcik@uniba.sk
authors: Sitarcik, J.; Vinar, T.; Brejova, B.; Krampl, W.; Budis, J.; Radvanszky, J.; Lucka, M.

ai.TLDR: 短串联重复序列（STRs）因读长限制导致临床分析受限，纳米孔测序虽能产生长读长但碱基调用在重复区域不可靠。WarpSTR通过有限状态自动机和动态时间规整算法直接分析原始信号，将241个STR长度估计的平均绝对误差降低至基线调用和STRique方法之下。
ai.translation:
动机：短串联重复序列（STRs）是基因组中包含多个连续相同短重复单元的区域，可能伴随微小变异。尽管STR分析在临床中有广泛应用，但技术限制主要源于STR长度超过测序读长。纳米孔测序作为长读长技术，可生成超长读段，为STR研究提供更多可能。然而，纳米孔读段的碱基调用在重复区域尤其不可靠，因此需要直接分析原始数据。

结果：本文提出WarpSTR，一种通过有限状态自动机和类似动态时间规整的搜索算法，直接从原始纳米孔信号表征简单和复杂串联重复的新方法。通过将该方法应用于241个STR长度的测定，我们证明该方法相比基线调用和STRique方法，显著降低了STR长度估计的平均绝对误差。

可用性：WarpSTR免费开源，可在https://github.com/fmfi-compbio/warpstr获取。

联系方式：jozef.sitarcik@uniba.sk

title: A graph clustering algorithm for detection and genotyping of structural variants from long reads
abstract: Structural variants (SV) are polymorphisms defined by their length (>50 bp). The usual types of SVs are deletions, insertions, translocations, inversions, and copy number variants. SV detection and genotyping is fundamental given the role of SVs in phenomena such as phenotypic variation and evolutionary events. Thus, methods to identify SVs using long read sequencing data have been recently developed. We present an accurate and efficient algorithm to predict SVs from long-read sequencing data. The algorithm starts collecting evidence (Signatures) of SVs from read alignments. Then, signatures are clustered based on a Euclidean graph with coordinates calculated from lengths and genomic positions. Clustering is performed by the DBSCAN algorithm, which provides the advantage of delimiting clusters with high resolution. Clusters are transformed into SVs and a Bayesian model allows to precisely genotype SVs based on their supporting evidence. This algorithm is integrated in the single sample variants detector of the Next Generation Sequencing Experience Platform (NGSEP), which facilitates the integration with other functionalities for genomics analysis. For benchmarking, our algorithm is compared against different tools using VISOR for simulation and the GIAB SV dataset for real data. For indel calls in a 20x depth Nanopore simulated dataset, the DBSCAN algorithm performed better, achieving an F-score of 98%, compared to 97.8 for Dysgu, 97.8 for SVIM, 97.7 for CuteSV, and 96.8 for Sniffles. We believe that this work makes a significant contribution to the development of bioinformatic strategies to maximize the use of long read sequencing technologies.
authors: Gaitan, N.; Duitama, J.

ai.TLDR: 结构变异（SV）的检测与基因分型至关重要，因其在表型变异和进化事件等现象中起关键作用。本文提出了一种基于长读长测序数据的高效算法，通过DBSCAN聚类和贝叶斯模型实现高精度SV预测，实验表明其在模拟数据集上达到98%的F-score。
ai.translation: 结构变异（Structural variants, SV）是指长度大于50 bp的基因组变异类型，主要包括缺失、插入、易位、倒位和拷贝数变异等。由于SV在表型变异和进化事件等生物学现象中具有重要作用，其检测与基因分型成为研究核心。针对长读长测序数据的SV识别需求，本文提出了一种准确且高效的算法。该算法首先通过比对结果收集SV的证据（Signatures），随后基于欧几里得图的坐标计算（结合长度和基因组位置）对签名进行聚类。采用DBSCAN聚类算法实现高分辨率的簇划分，再通过贝叶斯模型根据支持证据对SV进行精确基因分型。该算法已集成至下一代测序体验平台（NGSEP）的单样本变异检测模块，便于与基因组分析功能整合。通过VISOR模拟数据和GIAB SV数据集进行基准测试，结果表明在20x深度的纳米孔模拟数据集中，DBSCAN算法的F-score达到98%，优于Dysgu（97.8%）、SVIM（97.8%）、CuteSV（97.7%）和Sniffles（96.8%）。本研究为最大化长读长测序技术应用的生物信息学策略发展提供了重要贡献。

title: HIV-1 Vpr induces ciTRAN to prevent transcriptional silencing of the provirus
abstract: The functional relevance of circular RNA (circRNA) expression in HIV-1 infection remains unclear. By developing a customized protocol involving direct RNA nanopore sequencing here, we captured circRNAs in their native state from HIV-1 infected T cells and identified ciTRAN, a circRNA modulator of HIV-1 Transcription. We show that HIV-1 infection of monocytic, T cell lines and primary CD4+ T cells induces ciTRAN expression in a Vpr-dependent manner. ciTRAN protein interactome analysis by proximity biotinylation and mass spectrometry identified SRSF-1 as a prominent interactor of the circular RNA. SRSF-1 is known to negatively regulate HIV-1 transcription, which the virus overcomes by a yet unknown mechanism. We demonstrate that HIV-1 Vpr induced ciTRAN sequesters SRSF1 away from the viral transcriptional complex to promote efficient viral transcription. Accordingly, ciTRAN depletion by CRISPR-Cas phenocopied the effects of SRSF1 overexpression and improved SRSF1 association with HIV-1 transcriptional complex. Finally, we show that an SRSF-1-inspired competing peptide can inhibit HIV-1 transcription regardless of ciTRAN induction. The hijacking of a host circRNA thus represents a new facet of primate lentiviruses in overcoming transmission bottlenecks.
authors: Bhardwaj, V.; Singh, A.; Dalavi, R.; Ralte, L.; Chawngthu, R. L.; Senthil Kumar, N.; Vijay, N.; Chande, A.

ai.TLDR: HIV-1感染中环状RNA（circRNA）的功能机制尚不明确。本研究通过直接RNA纳米孔测序技术，首次鉴定出ciTRAN作为HIV-1转录的调控因子，揭示其通过劫持宿主SRSF-1蛋白抑制病毒转录的机制。该发现为抗HIV-1治疗提供了新的靶点策略。
ai.translation: 环状RNA（circRNA）在HIV-1感染中的功能相关性尚不明确。本研究开发了一种定制化协议，通过直接RNA纳米孔测序技术，从HIV-1感染的T细胞中捕获天然状态的circRNA，并鉴定出ciTRAN作为HIV-1转录的调控因子。研究发现，HIV-1感染单核细胞系、T细胞系及原代CD4+ T细胞可Vpr依赖性诱导ciTRAN表达。通过邻近生物素化结合质谱分析ciTRAN蛋白互作组，发现SRSF-1是其主要互作蛋白。SRSF-1已知可负向调控HIV-1转录，而病毒通过未知机制克服该抑制。实验表明，HIV-1 Vpr诱导的ciTRAN可将SRSF1从病毒转录复合体中隔离，从而促进病毒转录效率。CRISPR-Cas介导的ciTRAN耗竭可复现SRSF1过表达效应，并增强SRSF1与HIV-1转录复合体的关联性。最终，研究证实基于SRSF-1设计的竞争性肽可抑制HIV-1转录，且不受ciTRAN诱导影响。该研究揭示宿主circRNA的劫持是灵长类慢病毒突破传播瓶颈的新机制。

title: Machine-learning based detection of adventitious microbes in T-cell therapy cultures using long read sequencing
abstract:
Assuring that cell therapy products are safe before releasing them for use in patients is critical. Currently, compendial sterility testing for bacteria and fungi can take 7-14 days. The goal of this work was to develop a rapid untargeted approach for the sensitive detection of microbial contaminants at low abundance from low volume samples during the manufacturing process of cell therapies. We developed a long-read sequencing methodology using Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION platform with 16S and 18S amplicon sequencing to detect USP<71> organisms and other microbial species. Reads are classified metagenomically to predict the microbial species. We used an extreme gradient boosting machine learning algorithm (XGBoost) to first assess if a sample is contaminated and second, determine whether the predicted contaminant is correctly classified or misclassified. The model was used to make a final decision on the sterility status of the input sample. An optimised experimental and bioinformatics pipeline starting from spiked species through to sequenced reads allowed for the detection of microbial samples at 10 CFU / mL using metagenomic classification. Machine learning can be coupled with long read sequencing to detect and identify sample sterility status and microbial species present in T-cell cultures, including the USP<71> organisms to 10 CFU / mL.

ImportanceThis research presents a novel method for rapidly and accurately detecting microbial contaminants in cell therapy products, which is essential for ensuring patient safety. Traditional testing methods are time-consuming, taking 7-14 days, while our approach can significantly reduce this time. By combining advanced long read Nanopore sequencing techniques and machine learning, we can effectively identify the presence and types of microbial contaminants at low abundance levels. This breakthrough has the potential to improve the safety and efficiency of cell therapy manufacturing, leading to better patient outcomes and a more streamlined production process.
authors: Strutt, J. P. B.; Natarajan, M.; Lee, E.; Barone, P. W.; Wolfrum, J. M.; Williams, R. B. H.; Sin, W. X.; Rice, S. A.; Springs, S. L.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种基于长读长测序和机器学习的快速微生物污染检测方法，可在7-14天内完成传统培养法检测的细胞治疗产品微生物污染筛查。该方法通过16S/18S扩增子测序结合XGBoost算法，可实现对10 CFU/mL浓度微生物的精准识别。
ai.translation: 确保细胞治疗产品在临床使用前的安全性至关重要。目前药典规定的细菌和真菌无菌检测需要7-14天。本研究旨在开发一种快速非靶向方法，在细胞治疗制造过程中对低丰度微生物污染进行敏感检测。我们采用牛津纳米孔技术MinION平台结合16S和18S扩增子测序，建立长读长测序方法以检测USP<71>微生物及其他微生物物种。通过元基因组分类对测序数据进行分析以预测微生物种类。采用极端梯度提升机器学习算法(XGBoost)首先判断样本是否污染，其次评估预测污染物种的分类准确性。该模型最终确定输入样本的无菌状态。优化的实验与生物信息学流程从添加目标物种到测序数据处理，实现了对10 CFU/mL微生物样本的检测。机器学习与长读长测序结合可检测T细胞培养物中的无菌状态及微生物种类，包括USP<71>微生物至10 CFU/mL浓度。本研究提出了一种新型快速准确检测细胞治疗产品微生物污染的方法，对保障患者安全至关重要。传统检测方法耗时7-14天，而本方法可显著缩短检测时间。通过结合先进的长读长纳米孔测序技术与机器学习，可有效识别低丰度微生物污染类型。该突破有望提升细胞治疗制造的安全性和效率，改善患者预后并优化生产流程。

title: Towards increased accuracy and reproducibility in SARS-CoV-2 next generation sequence analysis for public health surveillance
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, SARS-CoV-2 surveillance efforts integrated genome sequencing of clinical samples to identify emergent viral variants and to support rapid experimental examination of genome-informed vaccine and therapeutic designs. Given the broad range of methods applied to generate new viral genomes, it is critical that consensus and variant calling tools yield consistent results across disparate pipelines. Here we examine the impact of sequencing technologies (Illumina and Oxford Nanopore) and 7 different downstream bioinformatic protocols on SARS-CoV-2 variant calling as part of the NIH Accelerating COVID-19 Therapeutic Interventions and Vaccines (ACTIV) Tracking Resistance and Coronavirus Evolution (TRACE) initiative, a public-private partnership established to address the COVID-19 outbreak. Our results indicate that bioinformatic workflows can yield consensus genomes with different single nucleotide polymorphisms, insertions, and/or deletions even when using the same raw sequence input datasets. We introduce the use of a specific suite of parameters and protocols that greatly improves the agreement among pipelines developed by diverse organizations. Such consistency among bioinformatic pipelines is fundamental to SARS-CoV-2 and future pathogen surveillance efforts. The application of analysis standards is necessary to more accurately document phylogenomic trends and support data-driven public health responses.
authors: Connor, R.; Yarmosh, D. A.; Maier, W.; Shakya, M.; Martin, R.; Bradford, R.; Brister, J. R.; Chain, P. S.; Copeland, C. A.; di Iulio, J.; Ebert, P.; Jin, Y.; Gutni, J.; Katz, K. S.; Kochergin, A.; LaRosa, T.; Li, J.; Li, P.-E.; Lo, C.-c.; Rashid, S.; Svarovskaia, E. S.; Xiao, C.; Zalunin, V.; Pruitt, K. D.

ai.TLDR: 在新冠疫情期间，SARS-CoV-2监测工作整合了临床样本的基因组测序以识别新兴病毒变异。研究发现不同测序技术（Illumina和Oxford Nanopore）及7种生物信息学流程会导致变异检测结果不一致，提出统一参数协议可提升流程间的一致性。
keywords: 系统发生基因组学趋势
ai.translation: 在新冠疫情期间，SARS-CoV-2监测工作整合了临床样本的基因组测序以识别新兴病毒变异，并支持基于基因组信息的疫苗和治疗方案的快速实验验证。鉴于生成新病毒基因组所采用的方法范围广泛，确保不同流程间变异检测工具产生一致结果至关重要。本研究作为NIH加速新冠治疗干预和疫苗（ACTIV）追踪抗药性和冠状病毒进化（TRACE）计划的一部分，评估了测序技术（Illumina和Oxford Nanopore）及7种下游生物信息学流程对SARS-CoV-2变异检测的影响。研究结果表明，即使使用相同的原始序列数据集，不同的生物信息学流程仍可能产生包含不同单核苷酸多态性、插入或缺失的共识基因组。我们引入了一套特定的参数和流程组合，显著提升了不同组织机构开发的流程间的一致性。生物信息学流程的一致性是SARS-CoV-2及未来病原体监测工作的基础。应用分析标准对于更准确地记录系统发生基因组学趋势并支持数据驱动的公共卫生响应至关重要。

title: GoldRush: A de novo long read genome assembler with linear time complexity
abstract:
MotivationCurrent state-of-the-art long read de novo genome assemblers follow the Overlap Layout Consensus (OLC) paradigm, an O(n2) algorithm in its naive implementation. While the most time- and memory-intensive step of OLC --the all-vs-all sequencing read alignment process-- was improved and reimplemented in modern long read assemblers, these tools still often require excessive computational memory when assembling a typical 50X human genome dataset.

ResultsHere we present GoldRush, a de novo genome assembly algorithm with linear time complexity in the number of input long sequencing reads. We tested GoldRush on Oxford Nanopore Technologies datasets with different base error profiles describing the genomes of three human cell lines (NA24385, HG01243 and HG02055), Oryza sativa (rice), and Solanum lycopersicum (tomato). GoldRush achieved NGA50 lengths of 18.3-22.2 Mbp for the three human datasets, with two of the three assemblies having the fewest extensive misassemblies, and NGA50 lengths of 0.3 and 2.6 Mbp for the 373 Mbp and 824 Mbp genomes of rice and tomato, respectively. Further, GoldRush assembled all genomes within a day, using at most 54.5 GB of RAM. These results demonstrate that our algorithm and new assembly paradigm can be used to assemble large genomes de novo efficiently in compute memory space, with resulting assembly contiguity comparable to that of state-of-the-art OLC genome assemblers.

Availabilityhttps://github.com/bcgsc/goldrush
authors: Wong, J.; Coombe, L.; Nikolic, V.; Zhang, E.; Nip, K. M.; Sidhu, P.; Warren, R. L.; Birol, I.

ai.TLDR: 当前最先进的长读长从头基因组组装工具采用Overlap Layout Consensus (OLC)范式，其基础算法复杂度为O(n²)。尽管现代工具已优化了OLC中最耗时的两两读取序列比对步骤，但组装典型50倍覆盖的人类基因组数据集时仍需大量内存。GoldRush算法通过线性时间复杂度实现高效组装，内存使用量控制在54.5GB以内，组装结果的连续性与现有OLC工具相当。
keywords: long read de novo genome assemblers
ai.translation:
动机：当前最先进的长读长从头基因组组装工具遵循Overlap Layout Consensus (OLC)范式，其基础算法复杂度为O(n²)。尽管现代长读长组装工具已优化了OLC中最耗时的两两读取序列比对步骤，但这些工具在组装典型50倍覆盖的人类基因组数据集时仍需要过量的计算内存。

结果：我们提出GoldRush，一种具有输入长测序读取数量线性时间复杂度的从头基因组组装算法。我们在不同碱基错误特征的Oxford Nanopore Technologies数据集上测试GoldRush，这些数据集描述了三个人类细胞系（NA24385、HG01243和HG02355）、水稻（Oryza sativa）和番茄（Solanum lycopersicum）的基因组。GoldRush在三个人类数据集上实现了18.3-22.2 Mbp的NGA50长度，其中两个组装结果具有最少的严重错误拼接，水稻和番茄基因组（373 Mbp和824 Mbp）的NGA50长度分别为0.3和2.6 Mbp。此外，GoldRush在一天内完成所有基因组组装，最大内存使用量为54.5 GB。这些结果证明我们的算法和新组装范式能够在计算内存空间中高效完成大基因组的从头组装，其组装连续性与现有最先进的OLC基因组组装工具相当。

可用性：https://github.com/bcgsc/goldrush

title: DeepSelectNet: Deep Neural Network Based Selective Sequencing for Oxford Nanopore Sequencing
abstract:
BackgroundNanopore sequencing allows selective sequencing, the ability to programmatically reject unwanted reads in a sample. Selective sequencing has many present and future applications in genomics research and the classification of species from a pool of species is an example. Existing methods for selective sequencing for species classification are still immature and the accuracy highly varies depending on the datasets. For the five datasets we tested, the accuracy of existing methods varied in the range of ~77%-97% (average accuracy <89%). Here we present DeepSelectNet, an accurate deep-learning-based method that can directly classify nanopore current signals belonging to a particular species. DeepSelectNet utilizes novel data preprocessing techniques and improved neural network architecture for regularization.

ResultsFor the five datasets tested, DeepSelectNets accuracy varied between ~91%-99% (average accuracy ~95%).
