At its best performance, DeepSelectNet achieved a nearly 12% accuracy increase compared to its deep learning-based predecessor SquiggleNet. Furthermore, precision and recall evaluated for DeepSelectNet on average were always >89% (average ~95%). In terms of execution performance, DeepSelectNet outperformed SquiggleNet by ~13% on average. Thus, DeepSelectNet is a practically viable method to improve the effectiveness of selective sequencing.

ConclusionsCompared to base alignment and deep learning predecessors, DeepSelectNet can significantly improve the accuracy to enable real-time species classification using selective sequencing. The source code of DeepSelectNet is available at https://github.com/AnjanaSenanayake/DeepSelectNet.
authors: Senanayake, A.; Gamaarachchi, H.; Herath, D.; Ragel, R.

ai.TLDR: DeepSelectNet是一种基于深度学习的选择性测序方法，可直接分类纳米孔电流信号。该方法在五个数据集上准确率提升至91%-99%，执行效率比SquiggleNet提高13%，显著提升了物种分类的实时性。
ai.translation:
背景：纳米孔测序允许选择性测序，能够通过程序化方式拒绝样本中的不需要读段。选择性测序在基因组学研究和物种分类中具有广泛的应用前景，例如从物种池中分类特定物种。现有用于物种分类的选择性测序方法仍不成熟，准确率高度依赖于数据集。在我们测试的五个数据集中，现有方法的准确率范围在约77%-97%（平均准确率<89%）。本文提出DeepSelectNet，这是一种准确的基于深度学习的方法，可直接分类属于特定物种的纳米孔电流信号。DeepSelectNet采用新颖的数据预处理技术及改进的神经网络架构进行正则化。

结果：在测试的五个数据集中，DeepSelectNet的准确率范围在约91%-99%（平均准确率约95%）。在最佳性能下，DeepSelectNet相比其深度学习前身SquiggleNet的准确率提升了近12%。此外，DeepSelectNet的精确度和召回率平均均>89%（平均约95%）。在执行性能方面，DeepSelectNet平均比SquiggleNet提高约13%。因此，DeepSelectNet是一种切实可行的方法，可提升选择性测序的有效性。

结论：与基础比对和深度学习前身方法相比，DeepSelectNet能显著提升准确率，实现选择性测序的实时物种分类。DeepSelectNet的源代码可在https://github.com/AnjanaSenanayake/DeepSelectNet获取。

title: High-resolution Nanopore methylome-maps reveal random hyper-methylation at CpG-poor regions as driver of chemoresistance in leukemias.
abstract: Aberrant DNA methylation at CpG dinucleotides is a hallmark of cancer and is associated with the emergence of resistance to anti cancer treatment, though molecular mechanisms and biological significance remain elusive. Genome scale methylation maps by currently used methods are based on chemical modification of DNA and are best suited for analyses of methylation at CpG rich regions (CpG islands). We report the first high coverage whole genome map in cancer using the long read nanopore technology, which allows simultaneous DNA-sequence and -methylation analyses on native DNA. We analyzed clonal epigenomic/genomic evolution in Acute Myeloid Leukemias (AMLs) at diagnosis and relapse, after chemotherapy. Long read sequencing coupled to a novel computational method allowed definition of differential methylation at unprecedented resolution, and showed that the relapse methylome is characterized by hypermethylation at both CpG islands and sparse CpGs regions. Most differentially methylated genes, however, were not differentially expressed nor enriched for chemoresistance genes. A small fraction of under-expressed and hyper-methylated genes at sparse CpGs, in the gene body, was significantly enriched in transcription factors (TFs). Remarkably, these few TFs supported large gene-regulatory networks including 50% of all differentially expressed genes in the relapsed AMLs and highly-enriched in chemoresistance genes. Notably, hypermethylated regions at sparse CpGs were poorly conserved in the relapsed AMLs, under-represented at their genomic positions and showed higher methylation entropy, as compared to CpG islands. Relapsed AMLs carried few patient specific structural variants and DNA mutations, apparently not involved in drug resistance. Thus, drug resistance in AMLs can be mainly ascribed to the selection of random epigenetic alterations at sparse CpGs of a few transcription factors, which then induce reprogramming of the relapsing phenotype, independently of clonal genomic evolution.
authors: Magi, A.; Mattei, G.; Mingrino, A.; Caprioli, C.; Ronchini, C.; Frige, G.; Semeraro, R.; Bolognini, D.; Rambaldi, A.; Candoni, A.; Colombo, E.; Mazzarella, L.; Pelicci, P. G.

ai.TLDR: 癌症中CpG二核苷酸的异常DNA甲基化是肿瘤标志物，与抗肿瘤治疗耐药性相关。本研究首次利用纳米孔长读长测序技术构建全基因组甲基化图谱，揭示复发性AML中稀疏CpG位点的超甲基化特征。研究发现特定转录因子的表观遗传改变主导了耐药表型重编程，而非克隆基因组演化。
ai.translation: CpG二核苷酸位点的异常DNA甲基化是癌症的标志性特征，并与抗肿瘤治疗耐药性的产生密切相关。尽管如此，分子机制和生物学意义仍不明确。目前主流的全基因组甲基化图谱技术基于化学修饰DNA，最适合分析CpG岛（CpG islands）区域的甲基化情况。本研究首次利用长读长纳米孔技术构建癌症全基因组甲基化图谱，该技术可同时对天然DNA进行序列和甲基化分析。我们分析了急性髓系白血病（AML）在诊断和化疗后复发时的克隆表观基因组/基因组演化特征。结合长读长测序与新型计算方法，我们首次以超分辨率定义差异甲基化位点，发现复发性AML的甲基组特征为CpG岛和稀疏CpG区域的超甲基化。然而，大多数差异甲基化基因既无差异表达也未富集化疗耐药基因。在基因体内稀疏CpG位点的少数低表达且超甲基化基因显著富集转录因子（TFs）。值得注意的是，这些少数TFs支持包含50%复发AML差异表达基因的大型基因调控网络，并高度富集化疗耐药基因。复发AML中稀疏CpG位点的超甲基化区域在基因组中保守性差，其基因组位置代表性不足且甲基化熵更高。复发AML携带的患者特异性结构变异和DNA突变极少，似乎与药物耐药无关。因此，AML的药物耐药性主要归因于少数转录因子稀疏CpG位点的随机表观遗传改变，这些改变独立于克隆基因组演化，诱导了复发表型的重编程。

title: Spatially Multiplexed Single-molecule Translocations through a Nanopore at Controlled Speeds
abstract: Nanopores are one of the most successful label-free single-molecule techniques with several sensing applications such as biological screening, diagnostics, DNA and protein sequencing1-4. In current nanopore technologies, stochastic processes influence both the selection of the translocating molecule, translocation rate and translocation velocity5,6. As a result, single-molecule translocations are difficult to control spatially and temporally. Here we present a novel method where we engineer precise spatial and temporal control into the single-molecule experiment. We use a glass nanopore mounted on a 3D nanopositioner to spatially select molecules, deterministically tethered on a glass surface, for controlled translocations. By controlling the distance between the nanopore and the glass surface, we can actively select the region of interest on the molecule and scan it a controlled number of times and at controlled velocity. Decreasing the velocity and averaging thousands of consecutive readings of the same molecule increases the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) by two orders of magnitude compared to free translocations. We applied our method to various DNA constructs, achieving down to single nucleotide gap resolution. The spatial multiplexing combined with the sub-nanometer resolution could be used in conjunction with micro-array technologies to enable screening of DNA, improving point of care devices, or enabling high-density, addressable DNA data storage.
authors: Leitao, S. M.; Navikas, V.; Miljkovic, H.; Drake, B.; Marion, S.; Pistoletti, G.; Chen, K.; Mayer, S.; Keyser, U. F.; Kuhn, A.; Fantner, G. E.; Radenovic, A.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术作为无标记单分子检测的代表方法，在生物筛选和DNA测序等领域广泛应用。本研究通过空间定位和速度控制技术，显著提升了单分子迁移的信号质量。该方法实现了单碱基分辨率的DNA检测，为高密度DNA数据存储和便携式诊断设备提供了新思路。
ai.translation: 纳米孔技术是目前最成功的无标记单分子检测技术之一，已应用于生物筛选、诊断、DNA和蛋白质测序等领域。在现有纳米孔技术中，随机过程会影响分子迁移的选择、迁移速率和迁移速度。因此，单分子迁移在时空控制上存在困难。本研究提出了一种新型方法，通过工程化手段实现单分子实验中的精确时空控制。我们使用安装在三维纳米定位器上的玻璃纳米孔，对固定在玻璃表面的分子进行空间选择和确定性锚定，实现受控迁移。通过调节纳米孔与玻璃表面的距离，可主动选择分子感兴趣区域并以可控速度进行多次扫描。降低迁移速度并平均数千次连续读数，使信号噪声比（SNR）相比自由迁移提升了两个数量级。我们将该方法应用于多种DNA结构，实现了单碱基间隙分辨率。结合空间复用和亚纳米级分辨率的技术，可与微阵列技术结合用于DNA筛选，提升便携式诊断设备性能，或实现高密度可寻址DNA数据存储。

title: Identification and characterization of two DMD pedigrees with large inversion mutations based on a long-read sequencing pipeline
abstract: Pathogenic large inversions are rarely reported on *DMD* gene due to the lack of effective detection methods. Here we report two DMD pedigrees and proposed a reliable pipeline to define large inversions in DMD patients. In the first pedigree, conventional approaches including multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification, and whole-exome sequencing by next generation sequencing were failed to detect any pathologic variant. Then an advanced analysis pipeline which consists of RNA-seq, cDNA array capture sequencing, optical mapping, long-read sequencing was built. RNA-seq and cDNA capture sequencing showed a complete absence of transcripts of exons 3–55. Optical mapping identified a 55 Mb pericentric inversion between Xp21 and Xq21. Subsequently, long-read sequencing and Sanger sequencing determined the inversion breakpoints at 32,915,769 and 87,989,324 of the X chromosomes. In the second pedigree, long-read sequencing was directly conducted and Sanger sequencing was performed to verify the mutation. Long-read sequencing and Sanger sequencing found breakpoints at 32,581,576 and 127,797,236 on *DMD* gene directly. In conclusion, large inversion might be a rare but important mutation type in *DMD* gene. An effective pipeline was built in detecting large inversion mutations based on long-read sequencing platforms.
authors: Chang Geng, Ciliu Zhang, ... Yi Dai
citation: Geng, C., Zhang, C., Li, P. et al. Identification and characterization of two DMD pedigrees with large inversion mutations based on a long-read sequencing pipeline. Eur J Hum Genet 31 , 504–511 (2023). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41431-022-01190-y
description: Pathogenic large inversions are rarely reported onDMDgene due to the lack of effective detection methods. Here we report two DMD pedigrees and...

ai.TLDR: DMD基因中的大倒位因缺乏有效检测方法而罕见报道。本研究通过构建基于长读长测序的分析流程，成功识别了两个家系的大型倒位变异，证实了此类突变在DMD基因中的重要性。
keywords: 多重连接依赖探针扩增
ai.translation: 由于缺乏有效的检测方法，DMD基因中的致病性大倒位报道极少。本文报道了两个DMD家系，并提出了一种可靠的流程以定义DMD患者的大型倒位。在第一个家系中，常规方法包括多重连接依赖探针扩增（MLPA）和下一代测序的全外显子组测序均未能检测到致病性变异。随后构建了包含RNA-seq、cDNA阵列捕获测序、光学图谱和长读长测序的先进分析流程。RNA-seq和cDNA捕获测序显示外显子3-55完全缺失转录本。光学图谱鉴定出Xp21与Xq21之间的55兆碱基近着丝粒倒位。随后，长读长测序和桑格测序确定了X染色体上的倒位断点位于32,915,769和87,989,324位点。在第二个家系中，直接进行长读长测序并采用桑格测序验证突变，发现DMD基因上的断点位于32,581,576和127,797,236位点。结论表明，大倒位可能是DMD基因中罕见但重要的突变类型。基于长读长测序平台构建了检测大倒位突变的有效流程。

title: In-silico enrichment of bacterial plasmids by chromosomal depletion using nanopore adaptive sampling
abstract: Bacterial plasmids play a major role in the spread of antibiotic resistance genes. However, their characterization via DNA sequencing suffers from the low abundance of plasmid DNA in those samples. Although sample preparation methods can enrich the proportion of plasmid DNA before sequencing, these methods are expensive and laborious, and they might introduce a bias by enriching only for specific plasmid DNA sequences. Nanopore adaptive sampling could overcome these issues by rejecting uninteresting DNA molecules during the sequencing process. In this study, we assess the application of adaptive sampling for the enrichment of low-abundant plasmids in known bacterial isolates using two different adaptive sampling tools. We show that a significant enrichment can be achieved even on expired flow cells. By applying adaptive sampling, we also improve the quality of de novo plasmid assemblies and reduce the sequencing time. However, our experiments also highlight issues with adaptive sampling if target and non-target sequences span similar regions.
authors: Ulrich, J.-U.; Epping, L.; Pilz, T.; Walther, B.; Stingl, K.; Semmler, T.; Renard, B. Y.

ai.TLDR: 质粒DNA在抗生素耐药基因传播中起关键作用，但其测序面临低丰度挑战。本研究通过纳米孔自适应采样技术，成功实现低丰度质粒的富集，提升从头组装质量并缩短测序时间，但需注意目标与非目标序列重叠区域的潜在偏差。
ai.translation: 细菌质粒在抗生素耐药基因的传播中起着主要作用。然而，通过DNA测序对质粒进行表征时，会受到质粒DNA在样本中低丰度的限制。尽管样本制备方法可以在测序前富集质粒DNA的比例，但这些方法成本高且操作繁琐，且可能通过仅富集特定质粒DNA序列而引入偏差。纳米孔自适应采样技术可通过在测序过程中拒绝无趣的DNA分子来克服这些问题。本研究评估了两种不同的自适应采样工具在已知细菌分离株中富集低丰度质粒的应用。我们展示了即使在过期的流动池上也能实现显著的质粒富集。通过应用自适应采样，我们还提高了从头组装质粒的质量并减少了测序时间。然而，我们的实验也突显了当目标序列和非目标序列跨越相似区域时自适应采样可能存在的问题。

title: de novo diploid genome assembly using long noisy reads via haplotype-aware error correction and inconsistent overlap identification
abstract: The high sequencing error rate has impeded the application of long noisy reads for diploid genome assembly. Most existing assemblers failed to generate high-quality phased assemblies using long noisy reads. Here, we present PECAT, a Phased Error Correction and Assembly Tool, for reconstructing diploid genomes from long noisy reads. We design a haplotype-aware error correction method that can retain heterozygote alleles while correcting sequencing errors. We combine a corrected read SNP caller and a raw read SNP caller to further improve the identification of inconsistent overlaps in the string graph. We use a grouping method to assign reads to different haplotype groups. PECAT efficiently assembles diploid genomes using Nanopore R9, PacBio CLR or Nanopore R10 reads only. PECAT generates more contiguous haplotype-specific contigs compared to other assemblers. Especially, PECAT achieves nearly haplotype-resolved assembly on B. taurus (BisonxSimmental) using Nanopore R9 reads and phase block NG50 with 59.4/58.0 Mb for HG002 using Nanopore R10 reads.
authors: Nie, F.; Huang, N.; Zhang, J.; Ni, P.; Wang, Z.; Xiao, C.-L.; Luo, F.; Wang, J.

ai.TLDR: 高测序错误率阻碍了长噪声读段在二倍体基因组组装中的应用，现有工具难以生成高质量相位组装。PECAT通过等位基因感知的错误校正方法和分组策略，实现了基于Nanopore/R10读段的高精度二倍体基因组组装，尤其在B. taurus和HG002样本中达到接近等位基因解析水平。
ai.translation: 高测序错误率阻碍了长噪声读段在二倍体基因组组装中的应用。现有大多数组装工具无法利用长噪声读段生成高质量的相位组装。本文提出PECAT（Phased Error Correction and Assembly Tool），一种用于从长噪声读段中重建二倍体基因组的工具。我们设计了一种等位基因感知的错误校正方法，能够在校正测序错误的同时保留杂合子等位基因。通过结合校正后的读段SNP调用器和原始读段SNP调用器，进一步提高了字符串图中不一致重叠的识别能力。采用分组方法将读段分配到不同的等位基因组。PECAT仅使用Nanopore R9、PacBio CLR或Nanopore R10读段即可高效组装二倍体基因组。与其它组装工具相比，PECAT生成了更多连续的等位基因特异性contigs。尤其在使用Nanopore R9读段对B. taurus（BisonxSimmental）进行组装时，PECAT实现了接近等位基因解析的组装效果，其相位块NG50达到59.4/58.0 Mb（使用Nanopore R10读段对HG002的组装结果）。

title: Nanopore-based technologies beyond DNA sequencing
abstract: Inspired by the biological processes of molecular recognition and transportation across membranes, nanopore techniques have evolved in recent decades as ultrasensitive analytical tools for individual molecules. In particular, nanopore-based single-molecule DNA/RNA sequencing has advanced genomic and transcriptomic research due to the portability, lower costs and long reads of these methods. Nanopore applications, however, extend far beyond nucleic acid sequencing. In this Review, we present an overview of the broad applications of nanopores in molecular sensing and sequencing, chemical catalysis and biophysical characterization. We highlight the prospects of applying nanopores for single-protein analysis and sequencing, single-molecule covalent chemistry, clinical sensing applications for single-molecule liquid biopsy, and the use of synthetic biomimetic nanopores as experimental models for natural systems. We suggest that nanopore technologies will continue to be explored to address a number of scientific challenges as control over pore design improves.
authors: Yi-Lun Ying, Zheng-Li Hu, ... Yi-Tao Long
citation: Ying, YL., Hu, ZL., Zhang, S. et al. Nanopore-based technologies beyond DNA sequencing. Nat. Nanotechnol. 17 , 1136–1146 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41565-022-01193-2
description: Inspired by the biological processes of molecular recognition and transportation across membranes, nanopore techniques have evolved in recent decades...

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔技术受生物分子识别与跨膜运输过程启发，已成为超灵敏单分子分析工具。该技术在基因组学和转录组学研究中因便携性、低成本和长读长优势推动单分子DNA/RNA测序发展，其应用已拓展至分子传感、化学催化和生物物理表征等领域。
ai.translation: 受生物分子识别与跨膜运输过程的启发，纳米孔技术在过去几十年中发展成为一种超灵敏的单分子分析工具。特别是基于纳米孔的单分子DNA/RNA测序技术，因其便携性、较低成本和长读长优势，显著推动了基因组学和转录组学研究。然而，纳米孔技术的应用远不止于核酸测序领域。本文综述了纳米孔在分子传感与测序、化学催化及生物物理表征等领域的广泛应用。重点探讨了纳米孔在单分子蛋白质分析与测序、单分子共价化学、临床液态活检传感应用，以及合成生物模拟纳米孔作为天然系统的实验模型的前景。我们建议，随着对纳米孔设计控制能力的提升，该技术将持续被探索以解决诸多科学挑战。

title: Consideration of within-patient diversity highlights transmission pathways and antimicrobial resistance gene variability in vancomycin resistant Enterococcus faecium
abstract:
Synopsis BackgroundWhole genome sequencing (WGS) is increasingly applied to healthcare-associated vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus faecium (VREfm) outbreaks. Within-patient diversity could complicate transmission resolution if single colonies are sequenced from identified cases.

ObjectivesDetermine the impact of within-patient diversity on transmission resolution of VREfm

MethodsFourteen colonies were collected from VREfm positive rectal screens, single colonies were collected from clinical samples, and Illumina WGS performed. Two isolates were selected for Oxford Nanopore sequencing and hybrid genome assembly to generate lineage-specific reference genomes. Mapping to closely related references was used to identify genetic variations and closely related genomes. A transmission network was inferred for the entire genome set using Phyloscanner.

ResultsIn total, 229 isolates from 11 patients were sequenced. Carriage of 2-3 sequence types was detected in 27% of patients. Presence of antimicrobial resistance genes and plasmids was variable within genomes from the same patient and sequence type. We identified two dominant sequence types (ST80 and ST1424), with two putative transmission clusters of two patients within ST80, and a single cluster of six patients within ST1424. We found transmission resolution was impaired using fewer than 14 colonies.

ConclusionsPatients can carry multiple sequence types of VREfm, and even within related lineages the presence of mobile genetic elements and antimicrobial resistance genes can vary. VREfm within-patient diversity should be considered to ensure accurate resolution of transmission networks.
authors: McHugh, M. P.; Pettigrew, K. A.; Taori, S.; Evans, T. J.; Leanord, A.; Gillespie, S. H.; Templeton, K. E.; Holden, M. T.

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）在医疗相关耐万古霉素肠球菌（VREfm）爆发溯源中应用日益广泛，但患者体内菌株多样性可能影响传播网络解析。研究发现，单菌落测序可能导致传播关系误判，需通过多菌落分析提升溯源准确性。
ai.translation:
摘要：背景：全基因组测序（WGS）在医疗相关耐万古霉素肠球菌（VREfm）爆发溯源中应用日益广泛。但若仅对已识别病例的单菌落进行测序，患者体内菌株多样性可能干扰传播关系解析。

目标：确定患者体内菌株多样性对VREfm传播解析的影响。

方法：从VREfm阳性直肠筛查样本中收集14株菌落，临床样本中分离单菌落并进行Illumina全基因组测序。选取2株菌进行Oxford Nanopore测序和混合基因组组装，构建谱系特异性参考基因组。通过与近缘参考基因组比对识别遗传变异和近缘基因组。使用Phyloscanner对全基因组数据集推断传播网络。

结果：共测序11名患者的229株菌。27%的患者携带2-3种序列类型（sequence types）。同一名患者同序列类型基因组中，抗生素抗性基因和质粒存在差异。鉴定出两种优势序列类型（ST80和ST1424），其中ST80内存在两个患者传播簇，ST1324内存在6名患者单簇。发现使用少于14株菌落进行传播解析时，解析效果受损。

结论：患者可携带多种VREfm序列类型，即使在近缘谱系中，移动遗传元件和抗性基因的存在也可能存在差异。需考虑患者体内多样性以确保传播网络解析的准确性。

title: Benchmarking Oxford Nanopore Read Alignment-Based Structural Variant Detection Tools in Crop Plant Genomes
abstract: Structural variations (SVs) are larger polymorphisms (>50 bp in length), which consist of insertions, deletions, inversions, duplications, and translocations. They can have a strong impact on agronomical traits and play an important role in environmental adaptation. The development of long-read sequencing technologies, including Oxford Nanopore, allows for comprehensive SV discovery and characterization even in complex polyploid crop genomes. However, many of the SV discovery pipeline benchmarks do not include complex plant genome datasets. In this study, we benchmarked popular long-read alignment-based SV detection tools for crop plant genomes. We used real and simulated Oxford Nanopore reads for two crops, allotetraploid Brassica napus (oilseed rape) and diploid Solanum lycopersicum (tomato), and evaluated several read aligners and SV callers across 5x, 10x, and 20x coverages typically used in re-sequencing studies. Our benchmarks provide a useful guide for designing Oxford Nanopore re-sequencing projects and SV discovery pipelines for crop plants.
authors: Yildiz, G.; Zanini, S. F.; Afsharyan, N. P.; Obermeier, C.; Snowdon, R. J.; Golicz, A. A.

ai.TLDR: 结构变异（SVs）作为大尺度基因组变异，对作物性状和环境适应性具有重要影响。本研究通过真实与模拟数据评估了长读长测序技术在复杂作物基因组中的SV检测效果，为重测序项目设计提供参考。
ai.translation: 结构变异（SVs）是长度超过50 bp的大尺度基因组变异，包括插入、缺失、倒位、重复和易位等类型。这类变异对农艺性状具有显著影响，并在环境适应性中发挥关键作用。随着长读长测序技术（如Oxford Nanopore）的发展，复杂多倍体作物基因组的SV发现与表征成为可能。然而现有SV检测流程的基准测试数据中缺乏复杂植物基因组样本。本研究针对作物基因组，对主流的长读长比对型SV检测工具进行基准测试。我们使用真实和模拟的Oxford Nanopore测序数据，针对二倍体番茄（Solanum lycopersicum）和异源四倍体油菜（Brassica napus）两种作物，评估了多个比对工具和SV检测器在5x、10x和20x覆盖度下的性能表现。研究结果为设计Oxford Nanopore重测序项目和作物SV检测流程提供了实用指南。

title: Sequencing of Monkeypox virus from infected patients reveals viral genomes with APOBEC3-like editing, gene inactivation, and bacterial agents of skin superinfection
abstract: An epidemic of Monkeypox virus (MPX virus) infections has arisen in May 2022 in non-endemic countries particularly in Europe among men having sex with men, whose extent is unprecedented. Since May 2022 we implemented MPX virus diagnosis by real-time PCR at university hospitals of Marseille, southern France. Here, we performed DNA metagenomic analyses of clinical samples from MPX virus-infected patients between June and July 2022, using next-generation sequencing with Illumina or Nanopore technologies. Twenty-five samples from 25 patients were studied. This allowed obtaining a MPX virus genome for 18 patients, essentially from genital skin lesions and rectal swabbing. All 18 genomes were classified in the MPX virus B.1 lineage, and we delineated five sublineages (A-E). We detected a high number of mutations (66-73) scattered along the MPX virus genomes relatively to the genome obtained from a human in Nigeria in 2018. Some non-synonymous mutations occurred in genes encoding central proteins, among which transcription factors and core and envelope proteins. They included two mutations that truncate RNA polymerase subunit RPO132 and a phospholipase D-like protein, which suggests gene inactivation. In addition, we identified that a large majority of nucleotide substitutions (94%) in the 18 MPX virus genomes were G>A or C>T, suggesting the action of human APOBEC3 enzymes. Finally, while we did not detect reads matching with main bacterial agents of sexually transmitted infections, >1,000 reads identified Staphylococcus aureus and Streptococcus pyogenes for 7 and 17 samples, respectively. These findings warrant a close genomic monitoring of MPX virus to get a better picture of this virus genetic evolution and mutational patterns, and they point out the common presence in monkeypox lesions of bacterial agents of skin superinfection, which warrants a close clinical monitoring in monkeypox patients.
authors: Colson, P.; Penant, G.; Delerce, J.; Boschi, C.; Wurtz, N.; Branger, S.; Lagier, J.-C.; Cassir, N.; Tissot-Dupont, H.; Million, M.; Aherfi, S.; La Scola, B.

ai.TLDR: 2022年5月，猴痘病毒（MPX病毒）在非流行地区（尤其是欧洲男男性行为者中）爆发，规模空前。研究通过实时PCR和下一代测序技术分析25名患者的临床样本，发现MPX病毒基因组存在66-73个突变，且94%的核苷酸替换为G>A或C>T，提示APOBEC3酶作用。同时检测到7例和17例样本中存在金黄色葡萄球菌和化脓性链球菌的共感染。
ai.translation: 2022年5月，猴痘病毒（MPX病毒）感染在非流行地区（尤其是欧洲男男性行为者中）爆发，规模前所未见。自2022年5月起，我们已在法国马赛大学医院采用实时PCR技术进行MPX病毒诊断。本研究于2022年6月至7月期间，对25名MPX病毒感染患者的临床样本进行DNA宏基因组分析，采用Illumina或Nanopore技术进行下一代测序。共分析了25例患者的25份样本，成功获得18例患者的MPX病毒基因组，主要来源于生殖器皮肤病变和直肠拭子。所有18个基因组均被归类为MPX病毒B.1谱系，并进一步划分为五个亚谱系（A-E）。与2018年尼日利亚人类样本的基因组相比，检测到大量（66-73个）分散分布的突变。部分非同义突变发生在编码核心蛋白的基因中，包括转录因子和核心/包膜蛋白，其中包含两个截断RNA聚合酶亚基RPO132和磷脂酶D样蛋白的突变，提示基因失活。此外，18个MPX病毒基因组中94%的核苷酸替换为G>A或C>T，提示人类APOBEC3酶的作用。最后，尽管未检测到主要性传播病原体的reads，但7例和17例样本中分别鉴定出金黄色葡萄球菌和化脓性链球菌的reads超过1000条。这些发现表明需要密切监测MPX病毒的基因组以更全面了解其遗传进化和突变模式，并提示猴痘病变中普遍存在皮肤继发感染的细菌病原体，需对猴痘患者进行密切临床监测。

title: Construction of a trio-based structural variation panel utilizing activated T lymphocytes and long-read sequencing technology
abstract: Long-read sequencing technology enable better characterization of structural variants (SVs). To adapt the technology to population-scale analyses, one critical issue is to obtain sufficient amount of high-molecular-weight genomic DNA. Here, we propose utilizing activated T lymphocytes, which can be established efficiently in a biobank to stably supply high-grade genomic DNA sufficiently. We conducted nanopore sequencing of 333 individuals constituting 111 trios with high-coverage long-read sequencing data (depth 22.2x, N50 of 25.8 kb) and identified 74,201 SVs. Our trio-based analysis revealed that more than 95% of the SVs were concordant with Mendelian inheritance. We also identified SVs associated with clinical phenotypes, all of which appear to be stably transmitted from parents to offspring. Our data provide a catalog of SVs in the general Japanese population, and the applied approach using the activated T-lymphocyte resource will contribute to biobank-based human genetic studies focusing on SVs at the population scale.
authors: Akihito Otsuki, Yasunobu Okamura, ... Masayuki Yamamoto
citation: Otsuki, A., Okamura, Y., Ishida, N. et al. Construction of a trio-based structural variation panel utilizing activated T lymphocytes and long-read sequencing technology. Commun Biol 5 , 991 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s42003-022-03953-1
description: Long-read sequencing technology enable better characterization of structural variants (SVs). To adapt the technology to population-scale analyses,...

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术可更精确地表征结构变异(SVs)。本研究通过生物样本库中激活的T淋巴细胞稳定获取高分子量DNA，对333名个体(含111个三元组)进行纳米孔测序，发现74,201个SVs且95%以上符合孟德尔遗传规律。该方法为日本人群SVs数据库提供了重要资源，可推动大规模人群遗传研究。
ai.translation: 长读长测序技术能够更精确地表征结构变异(SVs)。为适应大规模人群分析需求，获取足量高分子量基因组DNA是关键挑战。本研究提出利用生物样本库中可高效建立的激活T淋巴细胞，稳定供应高质量基因组DNA。我们对333名个体（包含111个三元组）进行了纳米孔测序，获得高覆盖度长读长数据（深度22.2倍，N50为25.8 kb），共鉴定出74,201个SVs。基于三元组的分析显示，超过95%的SVs符合孟德尔遗传规律。同时发现与临床表型相关的SVs，所有变异均表现出从父母稳定遗传至子代的特性。本研究为日本人群提供了SVs的参考目录，所采用的激活T淋巴细胞资源方法将促进基于生物样本库的大规模人群SVs遗传研究。

title: 3-hour genome sequencing and targeted analysis to rapidly assess genetic risk
abstract: Rapid genetic testing in the critical care setting enables targeted evaluations, directs therapies, and helps families and care providers make informed decisions about goals of care. We tested whether we could perform ultra-rapid assessment of genetic risk for a Mendelian condition, based on information from an affected sibling, in a newborn via whole-genome sequencing using the Oxford Nanopore platform. By optimization of the DNA extraction and library preparation steps paired with targeted analysis, we were able to demonstrate within three hours of birth that the newborn was neither affected nor a carrier for variants underlying acrodermatitis enteropathica. This proof-of-concept experiment demonstrates how prior knowledge of familial variants can be used to rapidly evaluate an individual at-risk for a genetic disease.
authors: Galey, M.; Reed, P.; Wenger, T.; Beckman, E.; Chang, I. J.; Paschal, C. R.; Buchan, J. G.; Lockwood, C. M.; Puia-Dumitrescu, M.; Garalde, D. R.; Guillory, J.; Markham, A. J.; Stergachis, A. B.; Bamshad, M. J.; Eichler, E. E.; Miller, D. E.

ai.TLDR: 在重症监护环境中，快速基因检测可实现针对性评估和治疗指导。本研究通过牛津纳米孔平台全基因组测序，在新生儿出生3小时内完成遗传风险评估，证明受影响兄弟姐妹信息可快速判断遗传病风险。
ai.translation: 在重症监护环境中，快速基因检测能够实现针对性评估、指导治疗方案，并帮助家属和医疗团队做出关于治疗目标的知情决策。我们测试了通过受影响兄弟姐妹的信息，利用牛津纳米孔平台全基因组测序技术，在新生儿中进行常染色体隐性遗传病的超快速遗传风险评估方法。通过优化DNA提取和文库制备步骤并结合靶向分析，在新生儿出生后3小时内即证明其既未患病也非肠性肢端皮炎相关变异的携带者。这项概念验证实验展示了如何利用家族变异的先验知识，快速评估遗传病高风险个体的遗传状态。

title: Haplotype-resolved assemblies and variant benchmark of a Chinese Quartet
abstract: As the state-of-the-art sequencing technologies and computational methods enable investigation of challenging regions in the human genome, an update variant benchmark is demanded. Herein, we sequenced a Chinese Quartet, consisting of two monozygotic twin daughters and their biological parents, with multiple advanced sequencing platforms, including Illumina, BGI, PacBio, and Oxford Nanopore Technology. We phased the long reads of the monozygotic twin daughters into paternal and maternal haplotypes using the parent-child genetic map. For each haplotype, we utilized advanced long reads to generate haplotype-resolved assemblies (HRAs) with high accuracy, completeness, and continuity. Based on the ingenious quartet samples, novel computational methods, high-quality sequencing reads, and HRAs, we established a comprehensive variant benchmark, including 3,883,283 SNVs, 859,256 Indels, 9,678 large deletions, 15,324 large insertions, 40 inversions, and 31 complex structural variants shared between the monozygotic twin daughters. In particular, the preciously excluded regions, such as repeat regions and the human leukocyte antigen (HLA) region, were systematically examined. Finally, we illustrated how the sequencing depth correlated with the de novo assembly and variant detection, from which we learned that 30 x HiFi is a balance between performance and cost. In summary, this study provides high-quality haplotype-resolved assemblies and a variant benchmark for two Chinese monozygotic twin samples. The benchmark expanded the regions of the previous report and adapted to the evolving sequencing technologies and computational methods.
authors: Jia, P.; Dong, L.; Yang, X.; Wang, B.; Wang, T.; Lin, J.; Wang, S.; Zhao, X.; Xu, T.; Che, Y.; Dang, N.; Ren, L.; Zhang, Y.; Wang, X.; Liang, F.; Wang, Y.; Ruan, J.; The Quartet Project Team,  ; Zheng, Y.; Shi, L.; Wang, J.; Ye, K.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用多平台测序技术对同卵双胞胎及其父母进行全基因组分析，构建了包含388万SNV等变异的基准数据库。通过高精度单倍型解析组装技术，首次系统覆盖了重复区域和HLA区域等复杂区域，揭示了30x HiFi测序深度在性能与成本间的最佳平衡点。
ai.translation: 随着新一代测序技术和计算方法的发展，人类基因组中复杂区域的解析成为可能，亟需更新变异基准。本研究对包含两名同卵双胞胎及其父母的中国四元组样本进行了多平台测序，采用Illumina、BGI、PacBio和Oxford Nanopore Technology等技术。通过父系-子系遗传图谱将同卵双胞胎的长读长数据分型为父系和母系单倍型，利用先进长读长技术生成高精度、完整且连续的单倍型解析组装（HRAs）。基于创新的四元组样本、新型计算方法和高质量测序数据，构建了包含3,883,283个SNV、859,256个Indel、9,678个大片段缺失、15,324个大片段插入、40个倒位和31个复杂结构变异的变异基准。特别针对此前被排除的重复区域和人类白细胞抗原（HLA）区域进行了系统分析。最终通过测序深度与从头组装及变异检测的相关性分析，发现30x HiFi测序深度在性能与成本间达到最佳平衡。本研究为两例中国同卵双胞胎样本提供了高质量的单倍型解析组装和变异基准，拓展了前序报告的覆盖区域，并适配了测序技术与计算方法的演进。

title: New algorithms for accurate and efficient de-novo genome assembly from long DNA sequencing reads
abstract: Producing de-novo genome assemblies for complex genomes is possible thanks to long-read DNA sequencing technologies. However, maximizing the quality of assemblies based on long reads is a challenging task that requires the development of specialized data analysis techniques. In this paper, we present new algorithms for assembling long-DNA sequencing reads from haploid and diploid organisms. The assembly algorithm builds an undirected graph with two vertices for each read based on minimizers selected by a hash function derived from the k-mers distribution. Statistics collected during the graph construction are used as features to build layout paths by selecting edges, ranked by a likelihood function that is calculated from the inferred distributions of features on a subset of safe edges. For diploid samples, we integrated a reimplementation of the ReFHap algorithm to perform molecular phasing. The phasing procedure is used to remove edges connecting reads assigned to different haplotypes and to obtain a phased assembly by running the layout algorithm on the filtered graph. We ran the implemented algorithms on PacBio HiFi and Nanopore sequencing data taken from bacteria, yeast, Drosophila, rice, maize, and human samples. Our algorithms showed competitive efficiency and contiguity of assemblies, as well as superior accuracy in some cases, as compared to other currently used software. We expect that this new development will be useful for researchers building genome assemblies for different species.
authors: Gonzalez-Garcia, L. N.; Guevara-Barrientos, D.; Lozano-Arce, D.; Gil, J.; Diaz-Riano, J.; Duarte, E.; Andrade, G.; Bojaca, J. C.; Hoyos, M. C.; Chavarro, C.; Guayazan, N.; Chica, L. A.; Buitrago Acosta, M. C.; Bautista, E.; Trujillo, M.; Duitama, J.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术使复杂基因组从头组装成为可能，但优化组装质量仍具挑战。本文提出基于minimizer和统计信息的新算法，结合分子相位分析提升二倍体组装准确性，实验表明该方法在效率和准确性上优于现有软件。
ai.translation: 利用长读长DNA测序技术，从头组装复杂基因组已成为可能。然而，基于长读长数据最大化组装质量仍是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要开发专门的数据分析技术。本文提出用于单倍体和二倍体生物长DNA测序读段组装的新算法。该算法通过哈希函数（基于k-mer分布）选择的minimizer，为每个读段构建无向图，包含两个顶点。在图构建过程中收集的统计信息被用作特征，通过选择边构建布局路径，这些边按基于特征在安全边子集上的推断分布计算的似然函数进行排序。对于二倍体样本，我们整合了ReFHap算法的重实现以执行分子相位分析。相位过程用于移除连接不同等位基因分配读段的边，并通过在过滤后的图上运行布局算法获得相位组装。我们使用PacBio HiFi和Nanopore测序数据（来自细菌、酵母、果蝇、水稻、玉米和人类样本）测试了实现的算法。与现有软件相比，我们的算法在组装效率和连续性方面表现出竞争力，并在某些情况下展现出更高的准确性。我们预计这一新进展将对不同物种基因组组装的研究者具有实用价值。

title: Assembling highly repetitive Xanthomonas TALomes using Oxford Nanopore sequencing
abstract: Most plant-pathogenic Xanthomonas bacteria harbor transcription activator-like effector (TALE) genes, which function as transcriptional activators of host plant genes and support infection. The entire repertoire of up to 29 TALE genes of a Xanthomonas strain is also referred to as TALome. The DNA-binding domain of TALEs is comprised of highly conserved repeats and TALE genes often occur in gene clusters, which precludes the assembly of TALE-carrying Xanthomonas genomes based on standard sequencing approaches. Here, we report the successful assembly of the 5 Mbp genomes of five Xanthomonas strains from Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing data. For one of these strains, Xanthomonas oryzae pv. oryzae (Xoo) PXO35, we illustrate why Illumina short reads and longer PacBio reads are insufficient to fully resolve the genome. While ONT reads are perfectly suited to yield highly contiguous genomes, they suffer from a specific error profile within homopolymers. To still yield complete and correct TALomes from ONT assemblies, we present a computational correction pipeline specifically tailored to TALE genes, which yields at least comparable accuracy as Illumina-based polishing. We further systematically assess the ONT-based pipeline for its multiplexing capacity and find that, combined with computational correction, the complete TALome of Xoo PXO35 could have been reconstructed from less than 20,000 ONT reads. Our results indicate that multiplexed ONT sequencing combined with a computational correction of TALE genes constitutes a highly capable tool for characterizing the TALomes of huge collections of Xanthomonas strains in the future.
authors: Erkes, A.; Grove, R.; Zarkovic, M.; Krautwurst, S.; Koebnik, R.; Morgan, R. D.; Wilson, G. G.; Hölzer, M.; Marz, M.; Boch, J.; Grau, J.

ai.TLDR: Xanthomonas菌株中的TALE基因（转录激活因子样效应物）通过调控宿主基因支持感染，其完整集合称为TALome。传统测序方法难以组装TALE携带的基因组，本文通过ONT测序结合计算校正流程成功重建了Xoo PXO35的TALome，证明该方法可高效解析大规模菌株的TALome特征。
ai.translation: 大多数植物病原性Xanthomonas细菌携带转录激活因子样效应物（TALE）基因，这些基因作为宿主植物基因的转录激活因子并支持感染过程。Xanthomonas菌株最多可携带29个TALE基因，这些基因的集合被称为TALome。TALE的DNA结合域由高度保守的重复序列组成，且TALE基因常以基因簇形式存在，这使得基于标准测序方法的TALE携带菌株基因组组装面临挑战。本文报告了通过牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序数据成功组装五株Xanthomonas菌株5 Mbp基因组的成果。以稻瘟病菌Xanthomonas oryzae pv. oryzae（Xoo）PXO35为例，我们阐明了Illumina短读长和PacBio长读长测序技术无法完全解析基因组的原因。尽管ONT读长能生成高度连续的基因组，但其在同聚物区域存在特定错误模式。为仍能从ONT组装数据中获得完整且正确的TALome，我们开发了专门针对TALE基因的计算校正流程，其准确性至少与基于Illumina的 polishing方法相当。进一步系统评估ONT流程的多路复用能力发现，结合计算校正后，Xoo PXO35的完整TALome可从不到20,000个ONT读长中重建。研究结果表明，结合TALE基因计算校正的多路复用ONT测序，将成为未来解析大规模Xanthomonas菌株TALome特征的高效工具。

title: Haplogenomes of Eucalyptus urophylla and E. grandis
abstract:
De novo phased (haplo)genome assembly using long-read DNA sequencing data has improved the detection and characterization of structural variants (SVs) in plant and animal genomes. Able to span across haplotypes, long reads allow phased, haplogenome assembly in highly outbred organisms such as forest trees. Eucalyptus tree species and interspecific hybrids are the most widely planted hardwood trees with F1 hybrids of Eucalyptus grandis and E. urophylla forming the bulk of fast-growing pulpwood plantations in subtropical regions. The extent of structural variation and its effect on interspecific hybridization is unknown in these trees. As a first step towards elucidating the extent of structural variation between the genomes of E. grandis and E. urophylla, we sequenced and assembled the haplogenomes contained in an F1 hybrid of the two species. Using Nanopore sequencing and a trio-binning approach, we assembled the separate haplogenomes (567 Mb and 545 Mb) to 98.8% BUSCO completion. High-density SNP genetic linkage maps of both parents allowed scaffolding of 88% of the haplogenome contigs into 11 pseudo-chromosomes (scaffold N50 of 43.82 Mb and 42.45 Mb for the E. grandis and E. urophylla haplogenomes, respectively). We identify 48,729 SVs between the two haplogenomes providing the first detailed insight into genome structural rearrangement in these species. The two haplogenomes have similar gene content, 35,572 and 33,915 functionally annotated genes, of which 34% are contained in genome rearrangements. Knowledge of SV and haplotype diversity in the two species will form the basis for understanding the genetic basis of hybrid superiority in these trees.

Significance statementWe have produced phased, haplogenome assemblies of an interspecific F1 hybrid using a trio-binning approach and performed the first genome-wide analysis of genome synteny between a subtropical Eucalyptus tree species, E. grandis, and a tropical eucalypt, E. urophylla. This revealed a large number of previously undescribed genome structural variants as a step towards understanding genome structural evolution in this iconic genus of fast-growing woody perennials.
authors: Lötter, A.; Duong, T.; Candotti, J.; Mizrachi, E.; Wegrzyn, J. L.; Myburg, A. A.

ai.TLDR: 利用长读长测序技术对桉树杂交种进行相位化基因组组装，首次揭示了E. grandis与E. urophylla间结构变异的全貌。研究通过Nanopore测序和三元分箱方法，成功组装出两个相位化基因组，发现48,729个结构变异，为理解快速生长木本植物的基因组进化提供了关键数据。
ai.translation:
利用长读长DNA测序数据进行从头相位化（haplo）基因组组装，已显著提升植物和动物基因组中结构变异（SVs）的检测与表征能力。长读长序列能够跨越不同相位，使得在高度杂交的物种如森林树木中实现相位化基因组组装。桉树（Eucalyptus）物种及其种间杂交种是广泛种植的硬木树种，其中E. grandis与E. urophylla的F1杂交种构成了亚热带地区速生纸浆林的主要种植类型。目前尚不清楚这些树木中结构变异的范围及其对种间杂交的影响。为初步阐明E. grandis与E. urophylla基因组间的结构变异程度，我们对这两个物种的F1杂交种中包含的相位化基因组进行了测序和组装。通过Nanopore测序和三元分箱方法，成功将两个相位化基因组（567 Mb和545 Mb）组装至98.8%的BUSCO完整性。两个亲本的高密度SNP遗传连锁图谱使88%的相位化基因组contigs被 scaffold 成11条伪染色体（E. grandis和E. urophylla相位化基因组的scaffold N50分别为43.82 Mb和42.45 Mb）。我们鉴定出两个相位化基因组间存在48,729个结构变异，首次详细揭示了这两个物种的基因组结构重排特征。两个相位化基因组具有相似的基因内容，分别包含35,572和33,915个功能注释基因，其中34%的基因位于基因组重排区域。了解这两个物种的结构变异和相位多样性将为理解这些树木杂交优势的遗传基础奠定基础。

重要意义声明：我们采用三元分箱方法对种间F1杂交种进行了相位化基因组组装，并首次对亚热带桉树物种E. grandis与热带桉树E. urophylla进行了全基因组共线性分析。该研究揭示了大量此前未被描述的基因组结构变异，为理解这一标志性速生木本植物属的基因组结构进化提供了重要步骤。

title: Identification of cell barcodes from long-read single-cell RNA-seq with BLAZE
abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) has revolutionised our ability to profile gene expression. However, short-read (SR) scRNAseq methodologies such as 10x are restricted to sequencing the 3 or 5 ends of transcripts, providing accurate gene expression but little information on the RNA isoforms expressed in each cell. Newly developed long-read (LR) scRNA-seq enables the quantification of RNA isoforms in individual cells but LR scRNA-seq using the Oxford Nanopore platform has largely relied upon matched short-read data to identify cell barcodes and allow single cell analysis. Here we introduce BLAZE (Barcode identification from long-reads for AnalyZing single-cell gene Expression), which accurately and efficiently identifies 10x cell barcodes using only nanopore LR scRNA-seq data. We compared BLAZE to existing tools, including cell barcodes identified from matched SR scRNA-seq, on differentiating stem cells and 5 cancer cell lines. BLAZE outperforms existing tools and provides a more accurate representation of the cells present in LR scRNA-seq than using matched short-reads. BLAZE provides accurate cell barcodes over a wide range of experimental read depths and sequencing accuracies, while other methodologies commonly identify false-positive barcodes and cell clusters, disrupting biological interpretation of LR scRNA-seq results. In conclusion, BLAZE eliminates the requirement for matched SR scRNA-seq to interpret LR scRNA-seq, simplifying procedures and decreasing costs while also improving LR scRNA-seq results. BLAZE is compatible with downstream tools accepting a cell barcode whitelist file and is available at https://github.com/shimlab/BLAZE.
authors: You, Y.; Prawer, Y. D. J.; Paoli-Iseppi, R. D.; Hunt, C. P. J.; Parish, C. L.; Shim, H.; Clark, M. B.

ai.TLDR: 单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）技术革新了基因表达分析能力，但短读长（SR）方法仅能捕获转录本的3'或5'端，无法全面解析RNA异构体。新开发的长读长（LR）scRNA-seq技术虽可量化单细胞RNA异构体，但依赖短读长数据进行细胞条码识别。BLAZE工具通过仅使用纳米孔长读长数据即可准确识别10x细胞条码，显著提升分析效率与准确性。
ai.translation: 单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）技术革新了我们对基因表达谱的分析能力。然而，短读长（SR）scRNA-seq方法如10x Genomics仅能对转录本的3'或5'端进行测序，虽然能准确反映基因表达水平，但无法提供单细胞中RNA异构体的详细信息。新开发的长读长（LR）scRNA-seq技术能够量化单细胞中的RNA异构体，但目前基于Oxford Nanopore平台的LR scRNA-seq方法大多依赖匹配的短读长数据来识别细胞条码并实现单细胞分析。本文介绍了一种名为BLAZE（基于长读长识别细胞条码用于单细胞基因表达分析）的新工具，该工具仅需纳米孔长读长scRNA-seq数据即可准确高效地识别10x细胞条码。我们对比了BLAZE与现有工具（包括通过匹配短读长scRNA-seq识别的细胞条码）在分化干细胞和5种癌症细胞系中的表现。结果表明，BLAZE在准确性上优于现有工具，能够更精确地反映长读长scRNA-seq中细胞的组成情况。BLAZE在广泛的实验读取深度和测序准确性范围内均能提供准确的细胞条码，而其他方法常会产生假阳性条码和细胞簇，干扰长读长scRNA-seq结果的生物学解释。总之，BLAZE消除了对匹配短读长scRNA-seq数据的依赖，简化了实验流程并降低成本，同时提升了长读长scRNA-seq结果的质量。BLAZE兼容接受细胞条码白名单文件的下游工具，项目代码已开源至https://github.com/shimlab/BLAZE。

title: Nanopore Translocation of Topologically Linked DNA Catenanes
abstract: The electrical signal associated with a biopolymer translocating through a nanoscale pore depends depends on the size, topology, and configuration of each molecule. Building upon recent interest in using solid-state nanopores for studying the topology of knotted and supercoiled DNA, we present the first experimental observations of topologically linked catenanes translocating through a solid-state nanopore. Using restriction enzymes, linked circular molecules were isolated from the mitochondrial DNA of Crithidia fasciculata, a structure known as a kinetoplast that is comprised of thousands of topologically interlocked minicircles. Digested kinetoplasts produce a spectrum of catenane topologies, which are identified from their nanopore translocation signals by spikes in the blockade current associated with the topological linkages. We identify the translocation signatures of 2-catenanes, linear and triangular 3-catenanes, and several types of 4- and 5-catenanes as well as more complex structures. Measurements of the translocation time of 2- and 3-catenanes suggest that topological friction between the linkages and the pore slows the translocation time of these structures, as predicted in recent simulations.
authors: Rheaume, S.; Klotz, A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用固态纳米孔技术首次观测到拓扑链接的猫烯烷结构，通过限制性内切酶处理线粒体DNA分离出拓扑互锁的minicircle结构，发现不同拓扑链接的阻塞电流信号特征。测量结果表明拓扑摩擦显著影响猫烯烷的跨膜时间，与近期模拟预测一致。
ai.translation: 与生物聚合物通过纳米尺度孔道的电信号相关的因素取决于分子的大小、拓扑结构和构型。基于近期利用固态纳米孔研究打结和超螺旋DNA拓扑结构的兴趣，我们首次实验观测到拓扑链接的猫烯烷结构通过固态纳米孔的传输现象。通过限制性内切酶处理，从Crithidia fasciculata的线粒体DNA中分离出被称为kinetoplast的结构，该结构由数千个拓扑互锁的minicircle组成。消化后的kinetoplast产生多种猫烯烷拓扑结构，这些结构通过纳米孔传输信号中与拓扑链接相关的阻塞电流尖峰被识别。我们鉴定了2-猫烯烷、线性及三角形3-猫烯烷以及多种4-和5-猫烯烷结构的传输特征，还包括更复杂的结构。测量2-和3-猫烯烷的传输时间表明，链接间的拓扑摩擦显著减缓了这些结构的传输速度，这与近期模拟预测结果一致。

title: Mouse L1s fade with age: a methylation-enforced mechanism for attenuation of L1 retrotransposition potential
abstract: Mice harbor [~]2,800 intact copies of the retrotransposon Long Interspersed Element 1 (L1). The in vivo retrotransposition capacity of an L1 copy is defined by both its sequence integrity and epigenetic status, including DNA methylation of the monomeric units constituting young mouse L1 promoters. Locus-specific L1 methylation dynamics during development may therefore elucidate and explain spatiotemporal niches of endogenous retrotransposition, but remain unresolved. Here, we interrogate the retrotransposition efficiency and epigenetic fate of source (donor) L1s, identified as mobile in vivo. We demonstrate that promoter monomer loss consistently attenuates the relative retrotransposition potential of their offspring (daughter) L1 insertions. We also observe that most donor/daughter L1 pairs are efficiently methylated upon differentiation in vivo and in vitro. We employ Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-read sequencing to resolve L1 methylation genome-wide and with locus-specific resolution, revealing a distinctive "smile" pattern in methylation levels across the L1 promoter region and thereby elucidating a molecular mechanism potentially underpinning L1 promoter shortening. Together, our results offer a novel perspective on the interplay between epigenetic repression, L1 evolution, and genome stability.
authors: Gerdes, P.; Chan, D.; Lundberg, M.; Sanchez-Luque, F. J.; Bodea, G. O.; Ewing, A. D.; Faulkner, G. J.; Richardson, S. R.

ai.TLDR: 小鼠体内携带约2800个完整的L1逆转录转座子，其体内逆转录转座能力由序列完整性和表观遗传状态共同决定。研究通过ONT技术揭示了L1启动子区域甲基化水平呈现独特的'smile'模式，阐明了L1启动子缩短的分子机制，为表观遗传调控与基因组稳定性之间的关系提供了新视角。
ai.translation: 小鼠体内携带约2800个完整的长散在元件1（L1）逆转录转座子。L1拷贝的体内逆转录转座能力由其序列完整性及表观遗传状态共同定义，包括构成年轻小鼠L1启动子的单体单元的DNA甲基化状态。因此，L1位点特异性甲基化动态变化可能阐明内源性逆转录转座的空间时间特异性微环境，但这一机制尚未明确。本研究通过鉴定体内可移动的源（供体）L1，探讨其逆转录转座效率及表观遗传命运。结果表明，启动子单体丢失会持续降低其子代（女儿）L1插入的相对逆转录转座潜力。同时观察到大多数供体/女儿L1对在体内外分化过程中均能被高效甲基化。我们采用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序，实现了全基因组范围内位点特异性L1甲基化解析，揭示L1启动子区域甲基化水平呈现独特的'smile'模式，从而阐明了可能支撑L1启动子缩短的分子机制。研究结果为表观遗传抑制、L1进化与基因组稳定性之间的相互作用提供了新的视角。

title: Profiling genome-wide methylation in two maples: fine-scale approaches to detection with nanopore technology
abstract: DNA methylation is critical to the regulation of transposable elements and gene expression, and can play an important role in the adaptation of stress response mechanisms in plants. Traditional methods of methylation quantification rely on bisulfite conversion that can compromise accuracy. Recent advances in long-read sequencing technologies allow for methylation detection in real time. The associated algorithms that interpret these modifications have evolved from strictly statistical approaches to Hidden Markov Models and, recently, deep learning approaches. Much of the existing software focuses on methylation in the CG context, but methylation in other contexts is important to quantify, as it is extensively leveraged in plants. Here, we present methylation profiles for two maple species across the full range of 5mC sequence contexts using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) long-reads. Hybrid and reference-guided assemblies were generated for two new Acer accessions: Acer negundo (65x ONT and 111X Illumina) and Acer saccharum (93x ONT and 148X Illumina). The ONT reads generated for these assemblies were re-basecalled, and methylation detection was conducted in a custom pipeline with the published Acer references (PacBio assemblies) and hybrid assemblies reported herein to generate four epigenomes. Examination of the transposable element landscape revealed the dominance of LTR Copia elements and patterns of methylation associated with different classes of TEs. Methylation distributions were examined at high resolution across gene and repeat density and described within the broader angiosperm context, and more narrowly in the context of gene family dynamics and candidate nutrient stress genes.
authors: McEvoy, S. L.; Grady, P. G. S.; Pauloski, N.; Wegrzyn, J. L.

ai.TLDR: DNA甲基化在植物应激响应机制适应性中起关键作用，但传统亚硫酸氢盐转化方法存在准确性问题。本研究利用ONT长读长测序技术，结合隐马尔可夫模型和深度学习算法，首次对两种槭树物种的全5mC序列上下文甲基化图谱进行解析，构建了四个表观基因组。研究揭示了LTR Copia转座子的主导地位及不同转座子类别的甲基化模式。
ai.translation: DNA甲基化在调控转座子元件和基因表达中起关键作用，并在植物应激响应机制的适应性中发挥重要功能。传统甲基化定量方法依赖亚硫酸氢盐转化，可能影响检测准确性。近年来长读长测序技术的发展实现了甲基化实时检测，相关算法已从纯统计方法演进到隐马尔可夫模型，近期更引入深度学习方法。现有软件多聚焦于CG上下文甲基化，但其他上下文的甲基化在植物中具有重要生物学意义。本研究利用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）长读长测序，对两种槭树物种（Acer negundo和Acer saccharum）全范围5mC序列上下文的甲基化图谱进行解析。通过结合ONT（65x和93x）与Illumina（111X和148X）数据生成混合组装和参考引导组装，使用已发表的Acer参考基因组（PacBio组装）和本研究报道的混合组装构建四个表观基因组。转座子元件景观分析显示LTR Copia元件占主导地位，并揭示不同转座子类别相关的甲基化模式。在基因和重复密度高分辨率分析中，甲基化分布被描述在被子植物整体背景中，同时更聚焦于基因家族动态和候选营养胁迫基因的上下文。

title: Transcriptome variation in human tissues revealed by long-read sequencing
abstract: Regulation of transcript structure generates transcript diversity and plays an important role in human disease[1](#ref-CR1 "Park, E., Pan, Z., Zhang, Z., Lin, L. & Xing, Y. The expanding landscape of alternative splicing variation in human populations. Am. J. Hum. Genet. 102, 11–26 (2018)."),[2](#ref-CR2 "Nicolae, D. L. et al. Trait-associated SNPs are more likely to be eQTLs: annotation to enhance discovery from GWAS. PLoS Genet. 6, e1000888 (2010)."),[3](#ref-CR3 "Li, Y. I. et al. RNA splicing is a primary link between genetic variation and disease. Science 352, 600–604 (2016)."),[4](#ref-CR4 "GTEx Consortium. The GTEx Consortium atlas of genetic regulatory effects across human tissues. Science 369, 1318–1330 (2020)."),[5](#ref-CR5 "Cummings, B. B. et al. Improving genetic diagnosis in Mendelian disease with transcriptome sequencing. Sci. Transl. Med. 9, eaal5209 (2017)."),[6](#ref-CR6 "Kremer, L. S. et al. Genetic diagnosis of Mendelian disorders via RNA sequencing. Nat. Commun. 8, 15824 (2017)."),[7](/article/10.1038/s41586-022-05035-y#ref-CR7 "Gonorazky, H. D. et al. Expanding the boundaries of RNA sequencing as a diagnostic tool for rare Mendelian disease. Am. J. Hum. Genet. 104, 466–483 (2019)."). The advent of long-read sequencing technologies offers the opportunity to study the role of genetic variation in transcript structure[8](#ref-CR8 "Sedlazeck, F. J., Lee, H., Darby, C. A. & Schatz, M. C. Piercing the dark matter: bioinformatics of long-range sequencing and mapping. Nat. Rev. Genet. 19, 329–346 (2018)."),[9](#ref-CR9 "Amarasinghe, S. L. et al. Opportunities and challenges in long-read sequencing data analysis. Genome Biol. 21, 30 (2020)."),[10](#ref-CR10 "Oikonomopoulos, S., Wang, Y. C., Djambazian, H., Badescu, D. & Ragoussis, J. Benchmarking of the Oxford Nanopore MinION sequencing for quantitative and qualitative assessment of cDNA populations. Sci Rep. 6, 31602 (2016)."),[11](#ref-CR11 "Weirather, J. L. et al. Comprehensive comparison of Pacific Biosciences and Oxford Nanopore Technologies and their applications to transcriptome analysis. F1000Res. 6, 100 (2017)."),[12](#ref-CR12 "Anvar, S. Y. et al. Full-length mRNA sequencing uncovers a widespread coupling between transcription initiation and mRNA processing. Genome Biol. 19, 46 (2018)."),[13](#ref-CR13 "Tardaguila, M. et al. SQANTI: extensive characterization of long-read transcript sequences for quality control in full-length transcriptome identification and quantification. Genome Res. 28, 396–411 (2018)."),[14](#ref-CR14 "Workman, R. E. et al. Nanopore native RNA sequencing of a human poly(A) transcriptome. Nat. Methods 16, 1297–1305 (2019)."),[15](#ref-CR15 "Tilgner, H., Grubert, F., Sharon, D. & Snyder, M. P. Defining a personal, allele-specific, and single-molecule long-read transcriptome. Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA 111, 9869–9874 (2014)."),[16](/article/10.1038/s41586-022-05035-y#ref-CR16 "Tilgner, H. et al. Comprehensive transcriptome analysis using synthetic long-read sequencing reveals molecular co-association of distant splicing events. Nat. Biotechnol. 33, 736–742 (2015)."). In this Article, we present a large human long-read RNA-seq dataset using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies platform from 88 samples from Genotype-Tissue Expression (GTEx) tissues and cell lines, complementing the GTEx resource. We identified just over 70,000 novel transcripts for annotated genes, and validated the protein expression of 10% of novel transcripts. We developed a new computational package, LORALS, to analyse the genetic effects of rare and common variants on the transcriptome by allele-specific analysis of long reads. We characterized allele-specific expression and transcript structure events, providing new insights into the specific transcript alterations caused by common and rare genetic variants and highlighting the resolution gained from long-read data. We were able to perturb the transcript structure upon knockdown of PTBP1, an RNA binding protein that mediates splicing, thereby finding genetic regulatory effects that are modified by the cellular environment. Finally, we used this dataset to enhance variant interpretation and study rare variants leading to aberrant splicing patterns.
authors: Dafni A. Glinos, Garrett Garborcauskas, ... Beryl B. Cummings

title: Development of an amplicon nanopore sequencing strategy for detection of mutations conferring intermediate resistance to vancomycin in Staphylococcus aureus strains
abstract:
Staphylococcus aureus is a major cause of bacteremia and other hospital-acquired infections. The cell-wall active antibiotic vancomycin is commonly used to treat both methicillin-resistant (MRSA) and sensitive (MSSA) infections, but vancomycin intermediate S. aureus (VISA) variants can arise through de novo mutations. Here we performed pilot experiments to develop a combined PCR/long-read sequencing-based method for detection of previously known VISA-causing mutations. We amplified 16 genes (walR, walK, rpoB, graR, graS, vraF, vraG, stpI, vraR, vraS, agrA, sarA, clpP, ccpA, prsA, and yvqF) known from prior studies to be associated with mutations responsible for VISA as 10 amplicons and sequenced amplicon pools as long-reads with Oxford Nanopore adapter ligation on Flongle flow cells. We then detected mutations by mapping reads against a parental consensus or known reference sequence and comparing called variants against a database of known VISA mutations from laboratory selection. There was high (>1000x) coverage of each amplicon in the pool, no relationship between amplicon length and coverage, and the ability to detect the causative mutation (walK 646C>G) in a VISA mutant derived from the USA300 strain (N384-3 from parental strain N384). Mixing mutant (N384-3) and parental (N384) DNA at various ratios from 0 to 1 mutant suggested a mutation detection threshold of roughly the average minor allele frequency of 6.5% at 95% confidence (two standard errors above mean mutation frequency). The study lays the groundwork for direct S. aureus antibiotic phenotype inference using rapid nanopore sequencing from clinical samples.

ImportanceBacteremia mortality is known to increase rapidly with time after infection, making rapid diagnostics and treatment necessary. Successful treatment depends on correct administration of antibiotics based on knowledge of strain antibiotic susceptibility. Staphylococcus aureus is a major causative agent of bacteremia and is also increasingly antibiotic resistant. In this work, we develop a method to improve detection of a complex, polygenic antibiotic resistance phenotype in S. aureus, vancomycin-intermediate resistance (VISA) through long-read genomic sequencing of amplicons representing genes most commonly mutated in VISA selection. This method both speeds up VISA determination relative to purely culture-based detection and incorporates the most comprehensive database of VISA genetic determinants known to date.
authors: Moller, A. G.; Petit, R. A.; Davis, M. H.; Read, T. D.

ai.TLDR: 金黄色葡萄球菌（S. aureus）是败血症等医院感染的主要病原体，万古霉素是治疗耐药菌株的常用药物，但万古霉素中介型耐药（VISA）变异体可能通过新发突变产生。本研究开发了一种结合PCR与长读长测序的检测方法，成功识别出VISA相关突变（如walK 646C>G），并建立检测阈值，为临床快速诊断提供新思路。
ai.translation: 金黄色葡萄球菌（Staphylococcus aureus）是败血症及其他医院获得性感染的主要致病菌。细胞壁作用类抗生素万古霉素（vancomycin）常用于治疗耐甲氧西林（MRSA）和敏感（MSSA）感染，但万古霉素中介型金黄色葡萄球菌（VISA）变异体可能通过新发突变产生。本研究通过试点实验开发了一种结合PCR与长读长测序的联合检测方法，用于识别已知的VISA致病突变。我们扩增了16个已知与VISA相关突变相关的基因（walR, walK, rpoB, graR, graS, vraF, vraG, stpI, vraR, vraS, agrA, sarA, clpP, ccpA, prsA, yvqF），将其分为10个扩增子，并通过Oxford Nanopore技术在Flongle流细胞上进行长读长测序。通过将测序结果与母体共识序列或已知参考序列比对，并与实验室筛选的VISA突变数据库进行比对，成功检测到VISA突变（如来自USA300菌株N384-3的walK 646C>G突变）。混合不同比例的突变株（N384-3）与母体株（N384）DNA后，检测阈值约为95%置信度下平均次要等位基因频率的6.5%。该研究为通过临床样本的快速纳米孔测序直接推断S. aureus抗生素表型奠定了基础。重要性：败血症死亡率随感染时间迅速上升，亟需快速诊断和治疗。成功治疗依赖于基于菌株抗生素敏感性知识的正确抗生素使用。S. aureus是败血症的主要致病菌且抗生素耐药性日益增加。本研究开发了一种通过长读长测序扩增子基因组的方法，用于改进S. aureus复杂多基因抗生素耐药表型（VISA）的检测，该方法相比纯培养检测显著提升速度，并整合了目前最全面的VISA遗传决定因子数据库。

title: Polishing de novo nanopore assemblies of bacteria and eukaryotes with FMLRC2
abstract: As accuracy and throughput of nanopore sequencing improves, it is increasingly common to perform long-read-first de novo genome assemblies followed by polishing with accurate short reads (Kim et al. 2021). We briefly introduce FMLRC2, the successor to the original FM-index Long Read Corrector (FMLRC), and illustrate its performance as a fast and accurate de novo assembly polisher for both microbial and eukaryotic genomes.
authors: Mak, Q. C.; Wick, R. R.; Holt, J. M.; Wang, J. R.

ai.TLDR: 随着纳米孔测序技术的准确性与通量提升，以长读段优先的从头基因组组装后使用高精度短读段进行校正已成为常见策略。FMLRC2作为FM-index Long Read Corrector的升级版，展现出对微生物和真核生物基因组的快速准确校正能力。
ai.translation: 随着纳米孔测序技术的准确性与通量持续提升，采用以长读段优先的从头基因组组装策略，并结合高精度短读段进行校正已成为研究热点（Kim等，2021）。本文简要介绍FMLRC2——作为原始FM-index Long Read Corrector（FMLRC）的继任者，并通过实验展示其作为快速且精准的从头组装校正工具在微生物和真核生物基因组中的应用效果。

title: Lokatt: A hybrid DNA nanopore basecaller with an explicit duration hidden Markov model and a residual LSTM network
abstract:
BackgroundBasecalling long DNA sequences is a crucial step in nanopore-based DNA sequencing protocols. In recent years, the CTC-RNN model has become the leading basecalling model, supplanting preceding hidden Markov models (HMMs) that relied on pre-segmenting ion current measurements. However, the CTC-RNN model operates independently of prior biological and physical insights.

ResultsWe present a novel basecaller named Lokatt: explicit duration Markov model and residual-LSTM network. It leverages an explicit duration HMM (EDHMM) designed to model the nanopore sequencing processes. Trained on a newly generated library with methylation-free Ecoli samples and MinION R9.4.1 chemistry, the Lokatt basecaller achieves basecalling performances with a median single read identity score of 0.930, a genome coverage ratio of 99.750%, on par with existing state-of-the-art structure when trained on the same datasets.

ConclusionOur research underlines the potential of incorporating prior knowledge into the basecalling processes, particularly through integrating HMMs and recurrent neural networks. The Lokatt basecaller showcases the efficacy of a hybrid approach, emphasizing its capacity to achieve high-quality basecalling performance while accommodating the nuances of nanopore sequencing. These outcomes pave the way for advanced basecalling methodologies, with potential implications for enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of nanopore-based DNA sequencing protocols.

Supplementary informationSupplementary data are available online.
authors: Xu, X.; Bhalla, N.; Stahl, P.; Jalden, J.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序中的碱基调用是关键步骤，Lokatt模型通过整合显式持续时间隐马尔可夫模型和残差LSTM网络，实现了与现有最先进方法相当的性能。该模型在无甲基化大肠杆菌样本和MinION R9.4.1化学体系数据集上训练，单读身份得分中位数达0.930，基因组覆盖率达99.75%。
keywords: 显式持续时间隐马尔可夫模型
ai.translation:
背景：碱基调用长DNA序列是基于纳米孔的DNA测序协议中的关键步骤。近年来，CTC-RNN模型已成为领先的碱基调用模型，取代了依赖预分割离子电流测量的先前隐马尔可夫模型（HMMs）。然而，CTC-RNN模型独立于先验的生物学和物理洞察。

结果：我们提出了一种新型碱基调用器Lokatt：显式持续时间隐马尔可夫模型和残差-LSTM网络。它利用了专门设计用于建模纳米孔测序过程的显式持续时间隐马尔可夫模型（EDHMM）。在新生成的无甲基化大肠杆菌样本和MinION R9.4.1化学体系数据集上训练后，Lokatt碱基调用器实现了单读身份得分中位数为0.930、基因组覆盖率为99.75%的碱基调用性能，与在相同数据集上训练的现有最先进方法表现相当。

结论：我们的研究强调了将先验知识整合到碱基调用过程中的潜力，特别是通过结合隐马尔可夫模型和循环神经网络。Lokatt碱基调用器展示了混合方法的有效性，突显了其在实现高质量碱基调用性能的同时，适应纳米孔测序细微差异的能力。这些成果为先进的碱基调用方法奠定了基础，可能对提升基于纳米孔的DNA测序协议的准确性和效率产生潜在影响。

补充信息：补充数据可在线获取。

title: Comprehensive short and long read sequencing analysis for the Gaucher and Parkinson’s disease-associatedGBAgene
abstract: *GBA* variants carriers are at increased risk of Parkinson’s disease (PD) and Lewy body dementia (LBD). The presence of pseudogene *GBAP1* predisposes to structural variants, complicating genetic analysis. We present two methods to resolve recombinant alleles and other variants in *GBA*: Gauchian, a tool for short-read, whole-genome sequencing data analysis, and Oxford Nanopore sequencing after PCR enrichment. Both methods were concordant for 42 samples carrying a range of recombinants and *GBAP1*-related mutations, and Gauchian outperformed the GATK Best Practices pipeline. Applying Gauchian to sequencing of over 10,000 individuals shows that copy number variants (CNVs) spanning *GBAP1* are relatively common in Africans. CNV frequencies in PD and LBD are similar to controls. Gains may coexist with other mutations in patients, and a modifying effect cannot be excluded. Gauchian detects more *GBA* variants in LBD than PD, especially severe ones. These findings highlight the importance of accurate *GBA* analysis in these patients.
authors: Marco Toffoli, Xiao Chen, ... Christos Proukakis
citation: Toffoli, M., Chen, X., Sedlazeck, F.J. et al. Comprehensive short and long read sequencing analysis for the Gaucher and Parkinson’s disease-associated GBA gene. Commun Biol 5 , 670 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s42003-022-03610-7

ai.TLDR: GBA变异携带者患帕金森病和路易体痴呆风险增加，但假基因GBAP1导致的结构变异干扰遗传分析。研究提出Gauchian工具和Oxford Nanopore测序两种方法，可准确识别重组等位基因及变异。结果显示Gauchian在检测GBA变异方面优于GATK流程，且非洲人群中GBAP1拷贝数变异较常见，但疾病组与对照组频率相似。
ai.translation: GBA变异携带者患帕金森病（PD）和路易体痴呆（LBD）的风险增加。假基因GBAP1的存在易导致结构变异，从而复杂化遗传分析。本研究提出两种解决GBA重组等位基因及其他变异的方法：Gauchian工具用于短读长全基因组测序数据分析，以及PCR富集后的Oxford Nanopore测序。两种方法在42个携带多种重组等位基因及GBAP1相关突变的样本中结果一致，且Gauchian在检测准确性上优于GATK最佳实践流程。将Gauchian应用于超过10,000例个体的测序分析显示，GBAP1跨度的拷贝数变异（CNVs）在非洲人群中相对常见。PD和LBD患者的CNV频率与对照组相似，可能与其他突变共存，且修饰效应无法排除。Gauchian在LBD中检测到比PD更多的GBA变异，尤其是严重类型。这些发现强调了对这些患者进行准确GBA分析的重要性。

title: Mapping protein-DNA interactions with DiMeLo-seq
abstract:
We recently developed Directed Methylation with Long-read sequencing (DiMeLo-seq) to map protein-DNA interactions genome wide. DiMeLo-seq is capable of mapping multiple interaction sites on single DNA molecules, profiling protein binding in the context of endogenous DNA methylation, identifying haplotype specific protein-DNA interactions, and mapping protein-DNA interactions in repetitive regions of the genome that are difficult to study with short-read methods. With DiMeLo-seq, adenines in the vicinity of a protein of interest are methylated in situ by tethering the Hia5 methyltransferase to an antibody using protein A. Protein-DNA interactions are then detected by direct readout of adenine methylation with long-read, single-molecule, DNA sequencing platforms such as Nanopore sequencing. Here, we present a detailed protocol and practical guidance for performing DiMeLo-seq. This protocol can be run on nuclei from fresh, lightly fixed, or frozen cells. The protocol requires 1-2 days for performing in situ targeted methylation, 1-5 days for library preparation depending on desired fragment length, and 1-3 days for Nanopore sequencing depending on desired sequencing depth. The protocol requires basic molecular biology skills and equipment, as well as access to a Nanopore sequencer. We also provide a Python package, dimelo, for analysis of DiMeLo-seq data.

Key papersAltemose, N., Maslan, A., Smith, O.K., Sundararajan, K., Brown, R.R., Mishra, R., Detweiler, A.M., Neff, N., Miga, K.H., Straight, A.F. and Streets, A., 2022. DiMeLo-seq: a long-read, single-molecule method for mapping protein-DNA interactions genome wide. Nature Methods, pp.1-13. (https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-022-01475-6)
authors: Maslan, A.; Altemose, N.; Mishra, R.; Marcus, J.; Brennan, L. D.; Sundararajan, K.; Karpen, G.; Straight, A. F.; Streets, A. M.

ai.TLDR: DiMeLo-seq是一种结合长读长测序技术的新型方法，可实现全基因组范围的蛋白-DNA相互作用高精度映射。该技术通过原位甲基化标记目标蛋白邻近区域，结合Nanopore测序平台，解决了短读长测序在重复区域研究的局限性。
ai.translation: 我们最近开发了一种结合定向甲基化与长读长测序技术（DiMeLo-seq），用于全基因组范围的蛋白-DNA相互作用图谱绘制。DiMeLo-seq具备以下优势：1) 可在单条DNA分子上定位多个相互作用位点；2) 能在内源性DNA甲基化背景下分析蛋白结合特征；3) 可识别等位基因特异性的蛋白-DNA相互作用；4) 能解析短读长测序难以研究的基因组重复区域。该技术通过将Hia5甲基转移酶通过蛋白A连接到目标蛋白抗体上，实现对感兴趣蛋白邻近腺嘌呤的原位甲基化。随后利用长读长、单分子DNA测序平台（如Nanopore测序）直接读取腺嘌呤甲基化信号以检测蛋白-DNA相互作用。本文提供了完整的DiMeLo-seq实验方案及实践指南，该方案适用于新鲜细胞、轻度固定细胞或冷冻细胞的细胞核样本。实验流程包含：1-2天的原位靶向甲基化处理，1-5天的文库制备（取决于目标片段长度），以及1-3天的Nanopore测序（取决于测序深度）。实验需具备基础分子生物学技能及设备，以及Nanopore测序仪的访问权限。我们同时提供了用于DiMeLo-seq数据分析的Python工具包dimelo。

title: Exploring Taxonomic and Functional Microbiome of Hawaiian Stream and Spring Irrigation Water Systems Using Illumina and Oxford Nanopore Sequencing Platforms
abstract: Irrigation water is a potential source of contamination that carries plant and foodborne human pathogens and provides a niche for survival and proliferation of microbes in agricultural settings. This project investigated bacterial communities and their functions in the irrigation water from wetland taro farms on Oahu, Hawaii using different DNA sequencing platforms. Irrigation water samples (stream, spring, and tank stored water) were collected from North, East, and West sides of Oahu and subjected to high quality DNA isolation, library preparation and sequencing of the V3-V4 region, full length 16S rRNA, and shotgun metagenome sequencing using Illumina iSeq100, Oxford Nanopore MinION and Illumina NovaSeq, respectively. Illumina reads provided the most comprehensive taxonomic classification at the phylum level where Proteobacteria was identified as the most abundant phyla in river stream source and associated wet taro field water samples. Cyanobacteria was also a dominant phylum from tank and spring water, whereas Bacteroidetes were most abundant in wetland taro fields irrigated with spring water. However, over 50% of the valid short amplicon reads remained unclassified and inconclusive at the species level. Whereas samples sequenced for full length 16S rRNA and shotgun metagenome, clearly illustrated that Oxford Nanopore MinION is a better choice to classify the microbes to the genus and species levels. In terms of functional analyses, only 12% of the genes were shared by two consortia. Total 95 antibiotic resistant genes (ARGs) were detected with variable relative abundance. Description of microbial communities and their functions are essential for the development of better water management strategies to produce safer fresh produce and to protect plant, animal, human and environmental health. This project identified analytical tools to study microbiome of irrigation water.
authors: Klair, D.; Dobhal, S.; Ahmed, A.; Hassan, Z. U.; Uyeda, J.; Silva, J.; Wang, K.-H.; Kim, S.; Alvarez, A. M.; Arif, M.

ai.TLDR: 本研究揭示了灌溉水作为植物和食源性病原体潜在污染源的微生物群落特征，通过多组学技术解析了不同水源的微生物组成与功能差异。研究发现Oahu湿地田灌溉水存在显著的微生物群落异质性，Oxford Nanopore MinION在物种分类上优于短片段测序技术。
ai.translation: 灌溉水是潜在的污染源，可能携带植物和食源性人类病原体，并为农业环境中微生物的生存和增殖提供生态位。本项目利用不同DNA测序平台，研究了夏威夷欧胡岛湿地田灌溉水中的细菌群落及其功能。从欧胡岛北、东、西三侧采集了溪流、泉眼和储水池水源样本，经过高质量DNA提取、文库制备，对V3-V4区域、全长16S rRNA和宏基因组进行测序（Illumina iSeq100、Oxford Nanopore MinION和Illumina NovaSeq）。Illumina测序在门级别提供了最全面的分类信息，其中变形菌门（Proteobacteria）在河流源水和相关湿地田样本中最为丰富。蓝藻门（Cyanobacteria）在储水池和泉眼水样本中占主导地位，而变形菌门（Bacteroidetes）在使用泉眼水灌溉的湿地田中最为丰富。然而，超过50%的有效短片段扩增子测序结果在物种级别无法分类。而全长16S rRNA和宏基因组测序样本清晰显示，Oxford Nanopore MinION在属和种级别微生物分类上更具优势。功能分析显示，仅12%的基因在两个菌群间共享，共检测到95个抗性基因（ARGs），相对丰度存在差异。微生物群落及其功能的解析对开发更有效的灌溉水管理策略至关重要，以生产更安全的鲜切农产品并保护植物、动物、人类和环境健康。本项目鉴定了研究灌溉水微生物组的分析工具。

title: Nanopore-only assemblies for genomic surveillance of the global priority drug-resistant pathogen, Klebsiella pneumoniae
abstract:
BackgroundOxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing has rich potential for genomic epidemiology and public health investigations of bacterial pathogens, particularly in low-resource settings and at the point of care, due to its portability and affordability. However, low base-call accuracy has limited the reliability of ONT data for critical tasks such as antimicrobial resistance (AMR) and virulence gene detection and typing, serotype prediction and cluster identification. Thus, Illumina sequencing remains the standard for genomic surveillance despite higher capital and running costs.

MethodsWe tested the accuracy of ONT-only assemblies for common applied bacterial genomics tasks (genotyping and cluster detection, implemented via Kleborate, Kaptive and Pathogenwatch), using data from 54 unique Klebsiella pneumoniae isolates. ONT reads generated via MinION with R9.4 flowcells were basecalled using three alternative models (Fast, High-accuracy (HAC) and Super-accuracy (SUP), available within ONTs Guppy software), assembled with Flye and polished using Medaka. Accuracy of typing using ONT-only assemblies was compared with that of Illumina-only and hybrid ONT+Illumina assemblies, constructed from the same isolates as reference standards.

ResultsThe most resource-intensive ONT-assembly approach (SUP basecalling, with or without Medaka polishing) performed best, yielding reliable capsule (K) type calls for all strains (100% exact or best matching locus), reliable multi-locus sequence type (MLST) assignment (98.3% exact match or single-locus variants), and good detection of acquired AMR genes and mutations (88% - 100% correct identification across the various drug classes). Distance-based trees generated from SUP+Medaka assemblies accurately reflected overall genetic relationships between isolates; however, the definition of outbreak clusters from ONT-only assemblies was problematic. HAC basecalling + Medaka polishing performed similarly to SUP basecalling without polishing, and polishing introduced errors into HAC- or Fast-basecalled assemblies. Therefore, we recommend investing compute resources into basecalling (SUP model) over polishing, where compute resources and/or time are limiting.

ConclusionsOverall, our results show that MLST, K type and AMR determinants can be reliably identified with ONT-only data. However, cluster detection remains challenging with this technology.
authors: Foster-Nyarko, E.; Cottingham, H.; Wick, R. R.; Judd, L. M.; Lam, M. M. C.; Wyres, K. L.; Stanton, T. D.; Tsang, K. K.; David, S.; Aanensen, D. M.; Brisse, S.; Holt, K. E.

ai.TLDR: ONT测序在细菌基因组流行病学中具有应用潜力，但其碱基调用准确性限制了关键任务的可靠性。本研究通过比较不同ONT组装策略，发现SUP模型在抗药性基因检测和MLST分型中表现最佳，但聚类检测仍具挑战。
ai.translation:
背景：牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序因其便携性和经济性，在资源匮乏地区和现场检测中具有丰富的基因组流行病学和公共卫生研究潜力。然而，其较低的碱基调用准确性限制了其在抗微生物耐药性（AMR）和毒力基因检测、分型、血清型预测及聚类识别等关键任务中的可靠性。因此，尽管成本较高，Illumina测序仍是基因组监测的标准方法。

方法：我们使用54株肺炎克雷伯菌分离株的数据，测试ONT-only组装在常见细菌基因组学任务（基因分型和聚类检测，通过Kleborate、Kaptive和Pathogenwatch实现）中的准确性。通过MinION R9.4流细胞生成ONT读段，使用Guppy软件的三种替代模型（Fast、高准确性（HAC）和超准确性（SUP））进行碱基调用，使用Flye进行组装，并通过Medaka进行校正。比较ONT-only组装在分型准确性方面与Illumina-only和混合ONT+Illumina组装（以相同分离株为参考标准）的结果。

结果：资源消耗最大的ONT组装方法（SUP碱基调用，带或不带Medaka校正）表现最佳，可可靠地识别所有菌株的荚膜（K）型（100%精确匹配或最佳匹配位点），可靠地分配多位点序列分型（MLST）（98.3%精确匹配或单位点变异），并良好检测获得性AMR基因和突变（各类药物中88%-100%正确识别）。基于距离的树状图显示SUP+Medaka组装准确反映了分离株间的总体遗传关系；然而，ONT-only组装的聚类定义存在困难。HAC碱基调用+Medaka校正与SUP碱基调用无校正表现相似，而校正过程引入了HAC或Fast碱基调用组装的错误。因此，建议在计算资源和/或时间受限时，优先投资于SUP模型的碱基调用而非校正。

结论：总体而言，我们的结果表明，ONT-only数据可可靠识别MLST、K型和AMR决定因子。然而，该技术在聚类检测方面仍面临挑战。

title: Single molecule methylation profiles of cell-free DNA in cancer with nanopore sequencing
abstract: Epigenetic characterization of cell-free DNA (cfDNA) is an emerging approach for characterizing diseases. We developed a strategy using nanopore-based single-molecule sequencing to measure cfDNA methylomes. This approach generated up to hundreds of millions of reads per cfDNA sample from cancer patients, an order of magnitude improvement over existing nanopore methods. Leveraging methylomes of matched tumors and immune cells, we characterized cfDNA methylomes of cancer patients for longitudinal monitoring during treatment.
authors: Lau, B. T.; Almeda, A.; Schauer, M.; McNamara, M.; Bai, X.; Meng, Q.; Partha, M.; Grimes, S. M.; Lee, H.; Heestand, G. M.; Ji, H. P.

ai.TLDR: 无细胞DNA (cfDNA) 的表观遗传学分析是疾病研究的新方法。本研究通过基于纳米孔的单分子测序技术，实现了癌症患者cfDNA甲基组的高通量测序，读数量较现有方法提升十倍，可支持治疗期间的纵向监测。
ai.translation: 无细胞DNA（cfDNA）的表观遗传学特征分析是疾病研究的新兴技术手段。我们开发了一种基于纳米孔单分子测序的策略，用于测量cfDNA的甲基组。该方法可从癌症患者样本中生成高达数亿条读数，相比现有纳米孔技术提升了十倍的测序通量。通过整合匹配肿瘤组织和免疫细胞的甲基组数据，我们实现了对癌症患者cfDNA甲基组的动态监测，为治疗过程中的纵向追踪提供了技术支撑。

title: Verkko: telomere-to-telomere assembly of diploid chromosomes
abstract: The Telomere-to-Telomere consortium recently assembled the first truly complete sequence of a human genome. To resolve the most complex repeats, this project relied on manual integration of ultra-long Oxford Nanopore sequencing reads with a high-resolution assembly graph built from long, accurate PacBio HiFi reads. We have improved and automated this strategy in Verkko, an iterative, graph-based pipeline for assembling complete, diploid genomes. Verkko begins with a multiplex de Bruijn graph built from long, accurate reads and progressively simplifies this graph via the integration of ultra-long reads and haplotype-specific markers. The result is a phased, diploid assembly of both haplotypes, with many chromosomes automatically assembled from telomere to telomere. Running Verkko on the HG002 human genome resulted in 20 of 46 diploid chromosomes assembled without gaps at 99.9997% accuracy. The complete assembly of diploid genomes is a critical step towards the construction of comprehensive pangenome databases and chromosome-scale comparative genomics.
authors: Rautiainen, M.; Nurk, S.; Walenz, B. P.; Logsdon, G. A.; Porubsky, D.; Rhie, A.; Eichler, E. E.; Phillippy, A. M.; Koren, S.

ai.TLDR: Telomere-to-Telomere联盟首次完成人类基因组的完整序列，通过整合超长读长与高精度测序数据解决复杂重复区域。Verkko工具通过自动化图谱构建实现了双等位基因基因组的高精度组装，其中46条染色体中有20条实现无间隙组装。
ai.translation: 端粒到端粒联盟最近完成了首个真正完整的人类基因组序列。为解决最复杂的重复区域，该项目依赖于手动整合超长Oxford Nanopore测序读长与由长准确PacBio HiFi读长构建的高分辨率组装图谱。我们改进并自动化了这一策略，开发了Verkko工具——一个迭代式的图谱基组装管道，用于构建完整的双等位基因基因组。Verkko首先基于长准确读长构建多重de Bruijn图，再通过整合超长读长和等位基因特异性标记逐步简化该图谱。最终得到双等位基因的分相组装，许多染色体可自动从端粒到端粒完成组装。在HG002人类基因组上运行Verkko，实现了46条双等位基因染色体中20条无间隙组装，准确率达99.9997%。完整双等位基因基因组的组装是构建全面泛基因组数据库和染色体尺度比较基因组学的关键步骤。

title: Flexible and efficient handling of nanopore sequencing signal data with slow5tools
abstract:
BackgroundNanopore sequencing is an emerging technology that is being rapidly adopted in research and clinical genomics. We recently developed SLOW5, a new file format for storage and analysis of raw data from nanopore sequencing experiments. SLOW5 is a community-centric, open source format that offers considerable performance benefits over the existing nanopore data format, known as FAST5. Here we introduce slow5tools, a simple, intuitive toolkit for handling nanopore raw signal data in SLOW5 format.

ResultsSlow5tools enables lossless FAST5-to-SLOW5 and SLOW5-to-FAST5 data conversion, and a range of tools for structuring, indexing, viewing and querying SLOW5 files. Slow5tools uses multi-threading, multi-processing and other engineering strategies to achieve fast data conversion and manipulation, including live FAST5-to-SLOW5 conversion during sequencing. We outline a series of examples and benchmarking experiments to illustrate slow5tools usage, and describe the engineering principles underpinning its high performance.

ConclusionSlow5tools is an essential toolkit for handling nanopore signal data, which was developed to support adoption of SLOW5 by the nanopore community. Slow5tools is written in C/C++ with minimal dependencies and is freely available as an open-source program under an MIT licence: https://github.com/hasindu2008/slow5tools.
authors: Samarakoon, H.; Ferguson, J. M.; Jenner, S. P.; Amos, T. G.; Parameswaran, S.; Gamaarachchi, H.; Deveson, I. W.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序技术正在快速应用于基因组学研究和临床领域，SLOW5作为新型开源文件格式显著提升了数据处理性能。slow5tools工具集实现了无损格式转换和高效数据操作，支持实时测序数据转换，为纳米孔社区提供了关键的技术支持。
ai.translation:
背景：纳米孔测序是一种新兴技术，正在被快速应用于研究和临床基因组学领域。我们最近开发了SLOW5，这是一种用于存储和分析纳米孔测序实验原始数据的新文件格式。SLOW和FAST5是社区驱动的开源格式，相比现有的纳米孔数据格式FAST5具有显著的性能优势。本文介绍了slow5tools，一个简单直观的工具集，用于处理SLOW5格式的纳米孔原始信号数据。

结果：slow5tools实现了无损的FAST5到SLOW5及SLOW5到FAST5数据转换，并提供了多种工具用于SLOW5文件的结构化、索引、查看和查询。slow5tools采用多线程、多进程等工程策略，实现了快速的数据转换和操作，包括测序过程中的实时FAST5到SLOW5转换。我们通过一系列示例和基准测试实验展示了slow5tools的使用方法，并描述了其高性能的工程原理。

结论：slow5tools是处理纳米孔信号数据的关键工具集，旨在支持纳米孔社区对SLOW5格式的采用。slow5tools采用C/C++编写，依赖项极少，作为开源程序在MIT许可下免费提供：https://github.com/hasindu2008/slow5tools。

title: Altered sequencing success at non-B-DNA motifs
abstract: Modern sequencing technologies are not error-free, and might have elevated error rates at some locations of the genome. A potential cause for such elevated error rates is the formation of alternative DNA structures (non-B DNA), such as G-quadruplexes (G4s), Z-DNA, or cruciform structures, during sequencing. Approximately 13% of the human genome has the potential to form such structures, which have been previously shown to affect the activity of DNA polymerases and helicases. Here we tested whether motifs with the potential to form non-B DNA (non-B motifs) influence the sequencing success of three major sequencing technologies--Illumina, Pacific Biosciences (PacBio) HiFi, and Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT). We estimated sequencing success by computing the rates of single-nucleotide, insertion, and deletion errors, as well as by evaluating mean read depth and mean base quality. Overall, all technologies exhibited altered sequencing success for most non-B motif types. Single-nucleotide error rates were generally increased for G-quadruplexes (G4s) and Z-DNA motifs in all three technologies. Illumina and PacBio HiFi deletion error rates were also increased for all non-B types except for Z-DNA motifs, while in ONT they were increased substantially only for G4 motifs. Insertion error rates for non-B motifs were highly elevated in Illumina, moderately elevated in PacBio HiFi, and only slightly elevated in ONT. Using Poisson regression modeling, we evaluated how non-B DNA motifs and other factors influence sequencing error profiles. Using the error rates at non-B motifs, we developed a probabilistic approach to determine the number of false-positive single-nucleotide variants (SNVs) in different sample size and variant frequency cutoff scenarios, as well as in previously generated sequencing data sets (1000Genomes, Simons Genome Diversity Project, and gnomAD). Overall, the effect of non-B DNA on sequencing should be considered in downstream analyses, particularly in studies with limited read depth--e.g., single-cell and ancient DNA sequencing, as well as sequencing of pooled population samples--and when scoring variants with low frequency (e.g., singletons). Because each sequencing technology analyzed has a unique error profile at non-B motifs, a combination of different technologies should be considered in future sequencing studies of such motifs, to maximize accuracy.
authors: Weissensteiner, M. H.; Cremona, M. A.; Guiblet, W.; Stoler, N.; Harris, R. S.; Cechova, M.; Chiaromonte, F.; Huang, Y.-F.; Makova, K. D.

ai.TLDR: 现代测序技术在非B DNA结构区域存在显著错误率差异。研究发现，G4结构和Z-DNA等非B DNA基序会显著影响Illumina、PacBio HiFi和ONT三种测序技术的错误率表现。不同技术对非B DNA的错误率响应存在显著差异，需在分析中考虑非B DNA的影响，特别是在低覆盖度测序场景中。
ai.translation: 现代测序技术并非完全无误，在基因组某些区域存在升高的错误率。这种错误率升高的潜在原因是测序过程中形成替代DNA结构（非B DNA），如G-四联体（G4s）、Z-DNA或十字形结构。约13%的人类基因组具有形成此类结构的潜力，此前研究表明这些结构会影响DNA聚合酶和解旋酶的活性。本研究测试了具有形成非B DNA潜力的基序（非B基序）是否影响三种主要测序技术（Illumina、Pacific Biosciences PacBio HiFi和Oxford Nanopore Technologies ONT）的测序成功率。通过计算单核苷酸、插入和缺失错误率，以及评估平均读段深度和平均碱基质量来估计测序成功率。总体而言，所有技术在大多数非B基序类型中均表现出测序成功率的差异。G-四联体（G4s）和Z-DNA基序在三种技术中均表现出单核苷酸错误率显著升高。Illumina和Pac-Bio HiFi的删除错误率在所有非B基序类型中均升高（除Z-DNA基序外），而ONT仅在G4基序中显著升高。非B基序的插入错误率在Illumina中高度升高，在PacBio HiFi中中度升高，在ONT中仅轻微升高。通过泊松回归模型评估非B DNA基序和其他因素对测序错误谱的影响。利用非B基序的错误率，我们开发了概率方法来确定不同样本量和变异频率截断场景下的假阳性单核苷酸变异（SNVs）数量，以及在先前生成的测序数据集（1000Genomes、Simons Genome Diversity Project和gnomAD）中的表现。总体而言，非B DNA对测序的影响应在下游分析中考虑，特别是在读段深度有限的研究中（如单细胞和古DNA测序，以及群体样本测序），以及在评分低频变异（如单倍体）时。由于每种分析的测序技术在非B基序中具有独特的错误谱，未来针对此类基序的测序研究应考虑结合不同技术以最大化准确性。

title: Nanopore sequencing for N1-methylpseudouridine in RNA reveals sequence-dependent discrimination of the modified nucleotide triphosphate during transcription
abstract: Direct RNA sequencing with a commercial nanopore platform was used to sequence RNA containing uridine (U), pseudouridine ({Psi}), or N1-methylpseudouridine (m1{Psi}) generated by in vitro transcription (IVT). The base calling data as well as the ionic currents and dwell times for U, {Psi}, or m1{Psi} as they translocated through the helicase and nanopore proteins identified diagnostic signatures for {Psi} and m1{Psi}; however, the two modifications yielded similar patterns although both were different from U. Understanding the nanopore signatures for {Psi} and m1{Psi} enabled a running start T7 RNA polymerase assay to study how competing mixtures of UTP with {Psi}TP or m1{Psi}TP lead to nucleotide selection in all possible adjacent sequence contexts. For UTP vs. {Psi}TP, {Psi}TP was favorably incorporated in singly-modified contexts, while doubly-modified contexts found high yields of {Psi}TP insertion on the 5' side and lower yields on the 3' side. For UTP vs. m1{Psi}TP, UTP was favorably selected except in 5'-XA (X = U or m1{Psi}) where the ratio was determined by their relative NTP concentrations. Experiments with chemically-modified triphosphates and DNA templates designed based on the structure of T7 RNA polymerase provide a model to explain the observations. These results may aid in future efforts that employ IVT to make therapeutic mRNAs with sub-stochiometric amounts of m1{Psi}.
authors: Fleming, A. M.; Burrows, C. J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用商业纳米孔平台对体外转录生成的含尿苷(U)、假尿苷(Ψ)和N1-甲基假尿苷(m1Ψ)的RNA进行直接测序，发现Ψ和m1Ψ的纳米孔信号特征相似但不同于U。通过竞争性核苷酸选择实验揭示了不同修饰核苷酸在序列上下文中的插入偏好，为优化治疗性mRNA合成提供理论依据。
ai.translation: 使用商业纳米孔平台对含有尿苷(U)、假尿苷(Ψ)或N1-甲基假尿苷(m1Ψ)的RNA进行直接测序，这些RNA由体外转录(IVT)生成。通过分析U、Ψ或m1Ψ在螺旋酶和纳米孔蛋白中迁移时的碱基调用数据、离子电流和驻留时间，识别出Ψ和m1Ψ的诊断特征；尽管两种修饰产生相似的信号模式，但均与U的特征不同。理解Ψ和m1Ψ的纳米孔信号特征，使研究者能够开展运行起始T7 RNA聚合酶实验，探讨UTP与ΨTP或m1ΨTP的竞争混合物在所有可能的相邻序列上下文中对核苷酸选择的影响。在UTP与ΨTP对比中，ΨTP在单修饰上下文中被优先掺入，而双修饰上下文中5'侧ΨTP插入量高但3'侧较低。在UTP与m1ΨTP对比中，UTP被优先选择，除非在5'-XA（X=U或m1Ψ）序列中，其比例由相对NTP浓度决定。通过化学修饰的三磷酸盐和基于T7 RNA聚合酶结构设计的DNA模板实验，为观察结果提供了模型。这些结果可能有助于未来利用IVT制备含亚化学计量比m1Ψ的治疗性mRNA的研究。

title: Shallow nanopore RNA sequencing enables transcriptome profiling for precision cancer medicine
