abstract: Transcriptome profiling is a mainstay of translational cancer research and is increasingly finding its way into precision oncology. While bulk RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) is widely available, high costs and long data return time are limiting factors for clinical applications. We investigated a portable nanopore long-read sequencing device (MinION, Oxford Nanopore Technologies) for transcriptome profiling of tumors. In particular, we investigated the impact of lower coverage than that of larger sequencing devices by comparing shallow nanopore RNA-seq data with short-read RNA-seq data generated using reversible dye terminator technology (Illumina) for ten samples representing four cancer types. Coupled with ShaNTi (Shallow Nanopore Sequencing for Transcriptomics), a newly developed data processing pipeline, a turnaround time of five days was achieved. The correlation of normalized gene-level counts between nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq was high for MinION but not for very low-throughput Flongle flow cells (r = 0.89 and r = 0.24, respectively). A cost-saving approach based on multiplexing of four samples per MinION flow cell maintained a high correlation with Illumina data (r = 0.56 - 0.86). In addition, we compared the utility of nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq data for analysis tools commonly applied in translational oncology: (i) Shallow nanopore and Illumina RNA-seq were equally useful for inferring signaling pathway activities with PROGENy. (ii) Highly expressed genes encoding kinases targeted by clinically approved small-molecule inhibitors were reliably identified by shallow nanopore RNA-seq. (iii) In tumor microenvironment composition analysis, quanTIseq performed better than CIBERSORT, likely due to higher average expression of the gene set used for deconvolution. (iv) Shallow nanopore RNA-seq was successfully applied to validate known gene fusions by breakpoint analysis. These findings suggest that shallow nanopore RNA-seq enables rapid, cost-effective, and biologically meaningful transcriptome profiling of tumors and warrants further exploration in precision cancer medicine studies.
authors: Mock, A.; Braun, M.; Scholl, C.; Fröhling, S.; Erkut, C.

ai.TLDR: 转录组分析是转化癌症研究的核心，但传统RNA-seq成本高且耗时。本研究验证了便携式纳米孔测序设备MinION在肿瘤转录组分析中的应用潜力，通过对比浅层纳米孔测序与Illumina短读长测序数据，发现其在成本控制和分析效率方面具有优势，尤其在信号通路分析和基因融合验证中表现良好。
ai.translation: 转录组分析是转化癌症研究的核心，并越来越多地应用于精准肿瘤学。尽管批量RNA测序（RNA-seq）技术广泛可用，但高昂的成本和漫长的数据显示周期限制了其临床应用。我们研究了便携式纳米孔长读长测序设备（MinION，Oxford Nanopore Technologies）在肿瘤转录组分析中的应用。特别地，我们通过比较浅层纳米孔RNA-seq数据与使用可逆染料终止技术（Illumina）生成的短读长RNA-seq数据，分析了低于大型测序设备覆盖度的影响，研究对象包括代表四种癌症类型的十个样本。结合新开发的数据处理流程ShaNTi（Shallow Nanopore Sequencing for Transcriptomics），实现了五天的周转时间。纳米孔与Illumina RNA-seq的归一化基因水平计数相关性在MinION中较高（r=0.89），但在低通量Flongle流细胞中相关性较低（r=0.24）。基于每MinION流细胞复用四个样本的成本节约方法，仍能保持与Illumina数据的高相关性（r=0.56-0.86）。此外，我们比较了纳米孔与Illumina RNA-seq数据在转化肿瘤学常用分析工具中的应用价值：（i）浅层纳米孔与Illumina RNA-seq在通过PROGENy推断信号通路活性方面具有同等效用；（ii）高度表达的编码临床批准的小分子激酶抑制剂靶点的基因，可通过浅层纳米孔RNA-seq可靠识别；（iii）在肿瘤微环境组成分析中，quanTIseq表现优于CIBERSORT，可能由于用于解卷积的基因集平均表达水平更高；（iv）浅层纳米孔RNA-seq成功应用于通过断点分析验证已知的基因融合。这些发现表明，浅层纳米孔RNA-seq能够实现肿瘤转录组分析的快速、经济且具有生物学意义的检测，值得在精准癌症医学研究中进一步探索。

title: Benchmarking de novo assembly methods on metagenomic sequencing data
abstract: Metagenome assembly is an efficient approach to deciphering the "microbial dark matter" in the microbiota based on metagenomic sequencing, due to the technical challenges involved in isolating and culturing all microbes in vitro. Although short-read sequencing has been widely used for metagenome assembly, linked- and long-read sequencing have shown their advancements by providing long-range DNA connectedness in assembly. Many metagenome assembly tools use dedicated algorithms to simplify the assembly graphs and resolve the repetitive sequences in microbial genomes. However, there remains no comprehensive evaluation of the pros and cons of various metagenomic sequencing technologies in metagenome assembly, and there is a lack of practical guidance on selecting the appropriate metagenome assembly tools. Therefore, this paper presents a comprehensive benchmark of 15 de novo assembly tools applied to 32 metagenomic sequencing datasets obtained from simulation, mock communities, or human stool samples. These datasets were generated using mainstream sequencing platforms, such as Illumina and BGISEQ short-read sequencing, 10x Genomics linked-read sequencing, and PacBio and Oxford Nanopore long-read sequencing. The assembly tools were extensively evaluated against many criteria, which revealed that compared with the other sequencing technologies, long-read assemblers generated the highest contig continuity but failed to reveal some medium- and high-quality metagenome-assembled genomes (MAGs). In addition, hybrid assemblers using both short- and long-read sequencing were promising tools to both improve contig continuity and increase the number of near-complete MAGs. This paper also discussed the running time and peak memory consumption of these tools and provided practical guidance on selecting them.
authors: Zhang, Z.; Yang, C.; Fang, X.; Zhang, L.

ai.TLDR: 宏基因组组装是解析微生物群落中'微生物暗物质'的有效方法，但不同测序技术存在优劣。本研究系统评估了15种从头组装工具在32个模拟/人工/粪便样本数据集中的表现，发现长读长测序工具在contig连续性上最优，但无法揭示部分高质量MAGs，而混合测序工具在提升连续性和增加近完整MAGs数量方面表现突出。
ai.translation: 宏基因组组装是基于宏基因组测序解析微生物群落中'微生物暗物质'的有效方法，由于体外分离培养所有微生物的技术挑战。尽管短读长测序已被广泛用于宏基因组组装，但链接读长和长读长测序通过提供长程DNA连接性展现出技术优势。许多宏基因组组装工具采用专用算法简化组装图谱并解析微生物基因组中的重复序列。然而，目前尚缺乏对各种宏基因组测序技术在宏基因组组装中的优劣势的全面评估，也缺乏选择合适组装工具的实践指导。因此，本文对15种从头组装工具在32个宏基因组测序数据集中的表现进行了系统基准测试，这些数据集来源于模拟、人工菌群或人类粪便样本，使用主流测序平台如Illumina和BGISEQ短读长测序、10x Genomics链接读长测序以及PacBio和Oxford Nanopore长读长测序生成。组装工具在多个指标上进行了广泛评估，结果表明与其它测序技术相比，长读长组装工具生成的contig连续性最高，但未能揭示部分中等和高质量的宏基因组组装基因组(MAGs)。此外，结合短读长和长读长测序的混合组装工具在提升contig连续性和增加近完整MAGs数量方面表现出巨大潜力。本文还讨论了这些工具的运行时间和峰值内存消耗，并提供了选择工具的实践指导。

title: Prion protein gene mutation detection using long-read Nanopore sequencing
abstract: Prion diseases are fatal neurodegenerative conditions that affect humans and animals. Rapid and accurate sequencing of the prion gene *PRNP* is paramount to human prion disease diagnosis and for animal surveillance programmes. Current methods for *PRNP* genotyping involve sequencing of small fragments within the protein-coding region. The contribution of variants in the non-coding regions of *PRNP* including large structural changes is poorly understood. Here, we used long-range PCR and Nanopore sequencing to sequence the full length of *PRNP*, including its regulatory region, in 25 samples from blood and brain of individuals with inherited or sporadic prion diseases. Nanopore sequencing detected the same variants as identified by Sanger sequencing, including repeat expansions/deletions. Nanopore identified additional single-nucleotide variants in the non-coding regions of *PRNP*, but no novel structural variants were discovered. Finally, we explored somatic mosaicism of *PRNP*’s octapeptide repeat region, which is a hypothetical cause of sporadic prion disease. While we found changes consistent with somatic mutations, we demonstrate that they may have been generated by the PCR. Our study illustrates the accuracy of Nanopore sequencing for rapid and field prion disease diagnosis and highlights the need for single-molecule sequencing methods for the detection of somatic mutations.
authors: François Kroll, Athanasios Dimitriadis, ... Emmanuelle Vire
citation: Kroll, F., Dimitriadis, A., Campbell, T. et al. Prion protein gene mutation detection using long-read Nanopore sequencing. Sci Rep 12 , 8284 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-022-12130-7
description: Prion diseases are fatal neurodegenerative conditions that affect humans and animals. Rapid and accurate sequencing of the prion genePRNPis...

ai.TLDR: 朊病毒疾病是影响人类和动物的致命神经退行性疾病，快速准确的PRNP基因测序对诊断和动物监测至关重要。本研究通过长距离PCR和Nanopore测序技术，首次完整解析了25例患者血液和脑组织样本的PRNP全基因序列，验证了Nanopore测序在检测重复扩展/缺失变异的准确性，并揭示了非编码区单核苷酸变异的潜在价值。
ai.translation: 朊病毒疾病是影响人类和动物的致命神经退行性疾病。快速且准确的朊病毒基因PRNP测序对于人类朊病毒疾病诊断和动物监测计划至关重要。目前PRNP基因分型方法主要依赖于蛋白质编码区小片段测序，但非编码区变异（包括大结构变化）的贡献仍不清楚。本研究通过长距离PCR和Nanopore测序技术，对25例遗传性或散发性朊病毒疾病患者血液和脑组织样本的PRNP全长序列（包括调控区域）进行了完整解析。Nanopore测序检测到与Sanger测序相同的变异，包括重复扩展/缺失。Nanopore还发现了PRNP非编码区的额外单核苷酸变异，但未发现新的结构变异。最后，我们探讨了PRNP八肽重复区的体细胞嵌合现象，这被认为是散发性朊病毒疾病的潜在病因。尽管发现与体细胞突变一致的变化，但实验结果表明这些变异可能由PCR过程产生。本研究展示了Nanopore测序在快速现场朊病毒疾病诊断中的准确性，并强调了单分子测序方法在检测体细胞突变中的必要性。

title: Comprehensive and standardized benchmarking of deep learning architectures for basecalling nanopore sequencing data
abstract: AO_SCPLOWBSTRACTC_SCPLOWNanopore-based DNA sequencing relies on basecalling the electric current signal. Basecalling requires neural networks to achieve competitive accuracies. To improve sequencing accuracy further, new models are continuously proposed. However, benchmarking is currently not standardized, and evaluation metrics and datasets used are defined on a per publication basis, impeding progress in the field. To standardize the process of benchmarking, we unified existing benchmarking datasets and defined a rigorous set of evaluation metrics. We benchmarked the latest seven basecaller models and analyzed their deep learning architectures. Our results show that overall Bonito has the best architecture for basecalling. We find, however, that species bias in training can have a large impact on performance. Our comprehensive evaluation of 90 novel architecture demonstrates that different models excel at reducing different types of errors and using RNNs (LSTM) and a CRF decoder are the main drivers of high performing models.
authors: Pages-Gallego, M.; de Ridder, J.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔DNA测序依赖电流信号的碱基调用，神经网络是实现高准确性的关键。当前基准测试缺乏标准化，评价指标和数据集定义不统一，阻碍了领域进展。本研究统一基准数据集和评价指标，评估七种最新碱基调用模型，发现Bonito架构整体表现最佳，但训练物种偏差显著影响性能，不同模型在减少特定错误类型上各有优势，RNN(LSTM)和CRF解码器是高性能模型的核心驱动因素。
ai.translation: 基于纳米孔的DNA测序技术依赖于对电流信号的碱基调用。碱基调用需要神经网络实现具有竞争力的准确性。为进一步提升测序准确性，持续提出新的模型。然而目前基准测试尚未标准化，评价指标和数据集的定义基于每篇论文的独立设定，阻碍了领域进展。为标准化基准测试流程，我们统一了现有基准数据集并定义了严谨的评价指标体系。我们对最新七种碱基调用模型进行了基准测试，并分析了其深度学习架构。结果表明，Bonito架构在整体碱基调用中表现最佳。然而我们发现训练中的物种偏差会对性能产生显著影响。对90种新型架构的全面评估显示，不同模型在减少特定类型的错误方面各有优势，使用RNN(LSTM)和CRF解码器是高性能模型的主要驱动因素。

title: Comparison of R9.4.1/Kit10 and R10/Kit12 Oxford Nanopore flowcells and chemistries in bacterial genome reconstruction
abstract:
2.Complete, accurate, cost-effective, and high-throughput reconstruction of bacterial genomes for large-scale genomic epidemiological studies is currently only possible with hybrid assembly, combining long- (typically using nanopore sequencing) and short-read (Illumina) datasets. Being able to utilise nanopore-only data would be a significant advance. Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) have recently released a new flowcell (R10.4) and chemistry (Kit12), which reportedly generate per-read accuracies rivalling those of Illumina data. To evaluate this, we sequenced DNA extracts from four commonly studied bacterial pathogens, namely Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Pseudomonas aeruginosa and Staphylococcus aureus, using Illumina and ONTs R9.4.1/Kit10, R10.3/Kit12, R10.4/Kit12 flowcells/chemistries. We compared raw read accuracy and assembly accuracy for each modality, considering the impact of different nanopore basecalling models, commonly used assemblers, sequencing depth, and the use of duplex versus simplex reads. "Super accuracy" (sup) basecalled R10.4 reads - in particular duplex reads - have high per-read accuracies and could be used to robustly reconstruct bacterial genomes without the use of Illumina data. However, the per-run yield of duplex reads generated in our hands with standard sequencing protocols was low (typically <10%), with substantial implications for cost and throughput if relying on nanopore data only to enable bacterial genome reconstruction. In addition, recovery of small plasmids with the best-performing long-read assembler (Flye) was inconsistent. R10.4/Kit12 combined with sup basecalling holds promise as a singular sequencing technology in the reconstruction of commonly studied bacterial genomes, but hybrid assembly (Illumina+R9.4.1 hac) currently remains the highest throughput, most robust, and cost-effective approach to fully reconstruct these bacterial genomes.

3. Impact statementOur understanding of microbes has been greatly enhanced by the capacity to evaluate their genetic make-up using a technology known as whole genome sequencing. Sequencers represent microbial genomes as stretches of shorter sequence known as  reads, which are then assembled using computational algorithms. Different types of sequencing approach have advantages and disadvantages with respect to the accuracy and length of the reads they generate; this in turn affects how reliably genomes can be assembled.

Currently, to completely reconstruct bacterial genomes in a high-throughput and cost-effective manner, researchers tend to use two different types of sequencing data, namely Illumina (short-read) and nanopore (long-read) data. Illumina data are highly accurate; nanopore data are much longer, and this combination facilitates accurate and complete bacterial genomes in a so-called "hybrid assembly". However, new developments in nanopore sequencing have reportedly greatly improved the accuracy of nanopore data, hinting at the possibility of requiring only a single sequencing approach for bacterial genomics.

Here we evaluate these improvements in nanopore sequencing in the reconstruction of four bacterial reference strains, where the true sequence is already known. We show that although these improvements are extremely promising, for high-throughput, low-cost complete reconstruction of bacterial genomes hybrid assembly currently remains the optimal approach.

4. Data summaryThe authors confirm all supporting data, code and protocols have been provided within the article, through supplementary data files, or in publicly accessible repositories.

Nanopore fast5 and fastq data are available in the ENA under project accession: PRJEB51164.

Assemblies have been made available at: https://figshare.com/articles/online_resource/q20_comparison_genome_assemblies/196838 67.

Code and analysis outputs are available at: https://gitlab.com/ModernisingMedicalMicrobiology/assembly_comparison_analysis/-/tree/main (tagged version v0.5.5).
authors: Sanderson, N. D.; Kapel, N.; Rodger, G.; Webster, H.; Lipworth, S.; Street, T. L.; Peto, T. E.; Crook, D. W.; Stoesser, N.

ai.TLDR: 当前高通量、低成本的细菌基因组重建依赖混合组装技术，结合长读长（纳米孔）和短读长（Illumina）数据。新纳米孔技术（R10.4/Kit12）的单技术组装潜力显著，但实际应用中仍面临读长产量低、小质粒组装不稳定的挑战，混合组装仍是目前最优方案。
ai.translation:
2. 完整、准确、成本效益高且高通量的细菌基因组重建目前仅能通过混合组装实现，该方法结合长读长（通常使用纳米孔测序）和短读长（Illumina）数据集。若能仅利用纳米孔数据将是一项重大进展。牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）近期发布了新型流细胞（R10.4）和化学试剂（Kit12），据报道其单条读长准确性可与Illumina数据媲美。为评估这一技术，我们使用Illumina和ONT的R9.4.1/Kit10、R10.3/Kit12、R10.4/Kit12流细胞/化学试剂对四种常见细菌病原体（大肠杆菌、肺炎克雷伯菌、铜绿假单胞菌和金黄色葡萄球菌）的DNA提取物进行测序。我们比较了不同测序模式的原始读长准确性及组装准确性，考虑了不同纳米孔碱基调用模型、常用拼接工具、测序深度以及双链与单链读长的使用影响。采用'Super accuracy'（sup）碱基调用的R10.4双链读长具有高单条读长准确性，可无需Illumina数据稳健重建细菌基因组。然而，使用标准测序协议时，我们获得的双链读长产量较低（通常<10%），若仅依赖纳米孔数据进行基因组重建将显著影响成本和通量。此外，最佳长读长拼接工具（Flye）在小质粒回收方面表现不稳定。R10.4/Kit12结合sup碱基调用在常见细菌基因组重建中展现出单技术测序的潜力，但混合组装（Illumina+R9.4.1 hac）仍是当前最高通量、最稳健且成本效益最高的完整基因组重建方案。

3. 影响声明：全基因组测序技术使我们对微生物的理解得到极大提升。测序仪将微生物基因组表示为短序列片段（称为读长），并通过计算算法进行拼接。不同测序方法在读长准确性和长度方面各有优劣，这影响了基因组拼接的可靠性。

目前，为高通量、低成本地完全重建细菌基因组，研究人员倾向于使用两种测序数据：Illumina（短读长）和纳米孔（长读长）数据。Illumina数据准确性高，纳米孔数据读长更长，这种组合实现了所谓的'混合组装'，可准确完整地重建细菌基因组。然而，纳米孔测序的新进展据报道显著提高了数据准确性，暗示可能仅需单一测序方法即可进行细菌基因组学研究。

在此，我们评估了纳米孔测序在四种已知真序列细菌参考菌株的基因组重建中的改进效果。我们显示尽管这些改进极具前景，但混合组装仍是当前高通量、低成本完整重建细菌基因组的最优方案。

4. 数据摘要：作者确认所有支持数据、代码和协议均已在文章中通过补充数据文件或公开存储库提供。

纳米孔fast5和fastq数据可在ENA的项目编号PRJEB51164下获取。

组装结果已发布于：https://figshare.com/articles/online_resource/q20_comparison_genome_assemblies/19683867。

代码和分析结果可在：https://gitlab.com/ModernisingMedicalMicrobiology/assembly_comparison_analysis/-/tree/main（标记版本v0.5.5）获取。

title: New insights from short and long reads sequencing to explore cytochrome b variants of Plasmopara viticola populations collected in vineyard and related to resistance to complex III inhibitors
abstract: Downy mildew is caused by Plasmopara viticola, an obligate oomycete plant pathogen, a devasting disease for grapevine. To preserve plants from the disease, complex III inhibitors are among the widely used fungicides that specifically target the mitochondrial cytochrome b (cytb) of the pathogen to block cellular respiration mechanisms. In French vineyard, P. viticola developed resistance against a first category of these fungicides, the Quinone outside inhibitors, by exhibiting a single amino acid substitution G143A in its cytb mitochondrial sequence. Their usage was restricted and another kind of fungicides, Quinone inside inhibitors, targeting the same gene and highly effective against oomycetes, were used instead. Recently however, less sensitive P. viticola populations were detected after treatments with some inhibitors, in particular ametoctradin and cyazofamid. By isolating resistant single-sporangia strains of P. viticola to these fungicides, we characterized new variants in cytb sequences associated with cyazofamid resistance: a point mutation (L201S) and more strikingly, two insertions (E203-DE-V204, E203-VE-V204). In parallel with classical tools, pyrosequencing and RT-PCR, we then benchmarked both short and long-reads NGS technologies (Ion Torrent, Illumina, Oxford Nanopore Technologies) to sequence the complete cytb with the prospect to detect and assess the proportion of resistant variants of P. viticola at a natural population scale. Eighteen populations collected from French vineyard fields in 2020 were analysed: 12 show a variable proportion of G143A, 11 of E203-DE-V204 and 7 populations of the S34L variant that confers resistance to ametoctradin. Interestingly, long reads were able to identify variants, including SNPs, with confidence and detect a small proportion of P. viticola showing several variants along the same cytb sequence. Altogether, NGS appear promising methods to evaluate pathogen resistance towards fungicides related to cytb modifications at a population scale in the field. This approach could be rapidly a robust decision-support management tool for vineyard in future.
authors: Cherrad, S.; Gillet, B.; Dellinger, J.; Bellaton, L.; Roux, P.; Hernandez, C.; Steva, H.; Perrier, L.; Vacher, S.; Hughes, S.

ai.TLDR: 葡萄霜霉病由专性卵菌Plasmopara viticola引起，其对复合体III抑制剂类杀菌剂产生抗性，通过cytb基因突变（如G143A）实现。最新研究发现，长读长测序技术（如Oxford Nanopore）可有效检测到多个cytb变异位点，为田间病原体抗药性评估提供新方法。
ai.translation: 霜霉病是由专性卵菌Plasmopara viticola引起的毁灭性葡萄病害。为防控该病害，复合体III抑制剂类杀菌剂被广泛用于靶向病原体线粒体细胞色素b（cytb）以阻断细胞呼吸。在法国葡萄园中，P. viticola通过cytb基因中单个氨基酸替换G143A对第一类杀菌剂（醌外抑制剂）产生抗性，导致该类杀菌剂使用受限。随后改用第二类杀菌剂（醌内抑制剂），但近期发现部分P. viticola群体对某些抑制剂（如ametoctradin和cyazofamid）表现出较低敏感性。通过分离对这些杀菌剂耐药的单孢子菌株，我们鉴定出与cyazofamid抗性相关的cytb序列新变异：点突变（L201S）及更显著的两个插入（E203-DE-V204和E203-VE-V204）。结合传统工具（pyrosequencing和RT-PCR），我们比较了短读长和长读长NGS技术（Ion Torrent、Illumina、Oxford Nanopore Technologies）在完整cytb测序中的应用，旨在自然群体尺度检测和评估P. viticola抗性变异比例。分析了2020年法国葡萄园采集的18个群体：12个显示G143A变异比例变化，11个显示E203-DE-V204变异，7个群体显示S34L变异（对ametoctradin耐药）。值得注意的是，长读长测序能可靠识别包括SNP在内的变异，并检测到少量同时携带多个cytb变异的P. viticola个体。总体而言，NGS技术在田间尺度评估与cytb修饰相关的杀菌剂抗性具有前景，未来可成为葡萄园抗药性管理的快速决策支持工具。

title: Complete sequences of six Major Histocompatibility Complex haplotypes, including all the major MHC class II structures
abstract: Accurate and comprehensive immunogenetic reference panels are key to the successful implementation of population-scale immunogenomics. The 5Mbp Major Histocompatibility Complex (MHC) is the most polymorphic region of the human genome and associated with multiple immune-mediated diseases, transplant matching and therapy responses. Analysis of MHC genetic variation is severely complicated by complex patterns of sequence variation, linkage disequilibrium and a lack of fully resolved MHC reference haplotypes, increasing the risk of spurious findings on analyzing this medically important region. Integrating Illumina and ultra-long Nanopore sequencing as well as bespoke bioinformatics, we completed five of the alternative MHC reference haplotypes of the current (B38) build of the human reference genome and added one other. The six assembled MHC haplotypes encompass the DR1 and DR4 haplotype structures in addition to the previously completed DR2 and DR3, as well as six distinct classes of the structurally variable C4 region. Analysis of the assembled haplotypes showed that MHC class II sequence structures, including repeat element positions, are generally conserved within the DR haplotype supergroups, and that sequence diversity peaks in three regions around HLA-A, HLA-B+C, and the HLA class II genes. Demonstrating the potential for improved short-read analysis, the number of proper read pairs recruited to the MHC was found to be increased by 0.32% - 0.69% in a 1000 Genomes Project read re-mapping experiment with seven diverse samples. Furthermore, the assembled haplotypes can serve as references for the community and provide the basis of a structurally accurate genotyping graph of the complete MHC region.
authors: Houwaart, T.; Scholz, S.; Pollock, N.; Palmer, W. H.; Kichula, K.; Strelow, D.; Le, D. B.; Belick, D.; Lautwein, T.; Wachtmeister, T.; Henrich, B.; Köhrer, K.; Parham, P.; Guethlein, L. A.; Norman, P.; Dilthey, A. T.

title: Optimal gap-affine alignment in O(s) space
abstract:
MotivationPairwise sequence alignment remains a fundamental problem in computational biology and bioinformatics. Recent advances in genomics and sequencing technologies demand faster and scalable algorithms that can cope with the ever-increasing sequence lengths. Classical pairwise alignment algorithms based on dynamic programming are strongly limited by quadratic requirements in time and memory. The recently proposed wavefront alignment algorithm (WFA) introduced an efficient algorithm to perform exact gap-affine alignment in O(ns) time, where s is the optimal score and n is the sequence length. Notwithstanding these bounds, WFAs O(s2) memory requirements become computationally impractical for genome-scale alignments, leading to a need for further improvement.

ResultsIn this paper, we present the bidirectional WFA algorithm (BiWFA), the first gap-affine algorithm capable of computing optimal alignments in O(s) memory while retaining WFAs time complexity of O(ns). As a result, this work improves the lowest known memory bound O(n) to compute gap-affine alignments. In practice, our implementation never requires more than a few hundred MBs aligning noisy Oxford Nanopore Technologies reads up to 1 Mbp long while maintaining competitive execution times.

AvailabilityAll code is publicly available at https://github.com/smarco/BiWFA-paper

Contactsantiagomsola@gmail.com
authors: Marco-Sola, S.; Eizenga, J. M.; Guarracino, A.; Paten, B.; Garrison, E.; Moreto, M.

ai.TLDR: 波前比对算法（WFA）在时间复杂度上实现了线性提升，但内存需求仍限制其应用。本文提出的双向WFA（BiWFA）首次在保持O(ns)时间复杂度的同时，将内存需求降至O(s)，显著提升了基因组尺度比对的可行性。
ai.translation:
动机：成对序列比对仍是计算生物学和生物信息学的核心问题。随着基因组学和测序技术的发展，需要更快速且可扩展的算法来处理日益增长的序列长度。基于动态规划的传统成对比对算法在时间和内存需求上存在二次复杂度限制。最近提出的波前比对算法（WFA）通过O(ns)时间复杂度实现了精确的间隙-仿射比对，但其O(s²)内存需求在基因组尺度比对中变得计算上不可行，亟需进一步优化。

结果：本文提出双向波前比对算法（BiWFA），首次实现以O(s)内存计算最优比对，同时保持WFA的O(ns)时间复杂度。该工作将已知最低内存复杂度O(n)的间隙-仿射比对提升至O(s)。实际应用中，我们的实现处理噪声Oxford Nanopore Technologies读取数据（长达1 Mbp）时，内存需求不超过数百MB，同时保持竞争力的执行时间。

可用性：所有代码公开在https://github.com/smarco/BiWFA-paper

联系方式：antiagomsola@gmail.com

title: Quantitative analysis of C. elegans transcripts by Nanopore direct-cDNA sequencing reveals terminal hairpins in non trans-spliced mRNAs
abstract:
Nematode mRNA processing involves a trans-splicing step through which a 21nt sequence from a snRNP replaces the original 5 end of the primary transcript. It has long been held that 70% of C. elegans mRNAs are submitted to trans-splicing. Our recent work suggested that the mechanism is more pervasive but not fully captured by mainstream transcriptome sequencing methods.

In this study, we used Oxford Nanopores long-read amplification-free sequencing technology to perform a comprehensive analysis of trans-splicing in worms.

We demonstrated that spliced leader (SL) sequences presence at the 5 end of the messengers affected library preparation and generated sequencing artefacts due to their self-complementarity. Consistent with our previous observations, we found evidence of trans-splicing for most genes. However, a subset of genes appears to be only marginally trans-spliced. These messengers all share the capacity to generate a 5 terminal hairpin structure mimicking the SL structure providing a mechanistic explanation for their non conformity. Altogether, our data provides the most comprehensive quantitative analysis of SL usage to date in C. elegans.
authors: Bernard, F.; Dargere, D.; Rechavi, O.; Dupuy, D.

ai.TLDR: 线虫mRNA加工涉及通过snRNP的21nt序列替换原始5'端的转接步骤。研究发现主流测序方法未能全面捕捉转接机制，通过Oxford Nanopores长读长测序技术揭示了剪接引导序列（SL）对文库制备的影响及部分基因的轻微转接现象。
ai.translation: 线虫mRNA加工过程涉及一个通过snRNP替换原始5'端的转接步骤，其中21nt序列取代原始转录本的5'端。长期以来认为70%的C. elegans mRNA经历转接，但近期研究显示该机制更为普遍，而主流转录组测序方法未能完全捕捉这一现象。本研究采用Oxford Nanopores长读长无扩增测序技术对线虫转接进行全面分析。我们发现，剪接引导序列（SL）在mRNA 5'端的存在会影响文库制备，并因自互补性产生测序伪影。与之前观察结果一致，大多数基因均显示转接证据，但部分基因仅轻微转接。这些mRNA均具备生成模拟SL结构的5'端发夹结构的能力，为非符合性现象提供了机制解释。综上，我们的数据提供了迄今为止最全面的C. elegans SL使用定量分析。

title: Accelerated identification of disease-causing variants with ultra-rapid nanopore genome sequencing
abstract: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) can identify variants that cause genetic disease, but the time required for sequencing and analysis has been a barrier to its use in acutely ill patients. In the present study, we develop an approach for ultra-rapid nanopore WGS that combines an optimized sample preparation protocol, distributing sequencing over 48 flow cells, near real-time base calling and alignment, accelerated variant calling and fast variant filtration for efficient manual review. Application to two example clinical cases identified a candidate variant in <8 h from sample preparation to variant identification. We show that this framework provides accurate variant calls and efficient prioritization, and accelerates diagnostic clinical genome sequencing twofold compared with previous approaches.
authors: Sneha D. Goenka, John E. Gorzynski, ... Euan A. Ashley
citation: Goenka, S.D., Gorzynski, J.E., Shafin, K. et al. Accelerated identification of disease-causing variants with ultra-rapid nanopore genome sequencing. Nat Biotechnol 40 , 1035–1041 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-022-01221-5
description: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) can identify variants that cause genetic disease, but the time required for sequencing and analysis has been a barrier...

ai.TLDR: 全基因组测序（WGS）在急性病患者中的应用受限于测序分析时间，本研究开发了超快速纳米孔WGS方法，通过优化样本制备、多流细胞测序、近实时分析等技术，将变异检测时间缩短至8小时内。该框架在保持准确性的同时，使临床基因组诊断效率提升一倍。
keywords: 超快速纳米孔全基因组测序
ai.translation: 全基因组测序（Whole-genome sequencing, WGS）能够识别导致遗传疾病的变异，但测序和分析所需时间一直是其在急性病患者中应用的障碍。本研究开发了一种超快速纳米孔全基因组测序方法，该方法结合了优化的样本制备协议、将测序分布到48个流细胞上、近实时碱基调用和比对、加速变异检测以及快速变异过滤以实现高效人工复核。将该方法应用于两个临床案例，从样本制备到变异识别的全过程在8小时内即可完成候选变异的鉴定。我们证明该框架能够提供准确的变异检测结果，并实现高效的变异优先级排序，与以往方法相比，使临床基因组诊断速度提升一倍。

title: Revealing within-species diversity in uncultured human gut bacteria with single-cell long-read sequencing
abstract: Bacterial genome structure changes dynamically, and structural variants can change bacterial phenotype; However, obtaining the complete genome and analyzing genome structure of uncultured bacteria has been challenging. We aimed to develop a single-cell amplified genome long-read assembly (scALA) workflow to construct circular single-cell amplified genomes (cSAGs) from long-read single-cell sequencing data of targeted uncultured bacteria. In particular, scALA generated cSAGs from nanopore long-read sequencing data of SAGs by producing contiguous sequences with repeated bias reduction and assembly processes. From 12 human fecal samples, scALA generated 16 cSAGs of three specifically targeted bacterial species, Anaerostipes hadrus, Agathobacter rectalis, and Ruminococcus gnavus. A. hadrus cSAGs exhibited large, ten kbp-long, phage insertions, saccharide metabolic capacity, and frequent genomic recombination with related strains from cohabitant hosts. Noteworthy, cSAGs constructed using this method could expand bacterial genome databases and our understanding of within-species diversities in uncultured bacteria.
authors: Kogawa, M.; Nishikawa, Y.; Saeki, T.; Yoda, T.; Arikawa, K.; Takeyama, H.; Hosokawa, M.

ai.TLDR: 细菌基因组结构动态变化，结构变异可改变细菌表型；但获取未培养细菌的完整基因组并分析其基因组结构一直具有挑战性。本研究开发了单细胞扩增基因组长读长组装（scALA）流程，通过纳米孔长读长测序数据构建环状单细胞扩增基因组（cSAGs），成功揭示了目标菌种的噬菌体插入、糖代谢能力及基因重组特征。
keywords: 单细胞扩增基因组长读长组装
环状单细胞扩增基因组
ai.translation: 细菌基因组结构具有动态变化特性，结构变异可改变细菌表型；然而，获取未培养细菌的完整基因组并分析其基因组结构一直具有挑战性。本研究旨在开发单细胞扩增基因组长读长组装（scALA）工作流程，通过长读长单细胞测序数据构建环状单细胞扩增基因组（cSAGs）。特别地，scALA通过生成连续序列并减少重复偏差及组装过程，从纳米孔长读长测序数据中生成cSAGs。从12个人类粪便样本中，scALA成功生成了三种特定目标细菌物种（Anaerostipes hadrus、Agathobacter rectalis和Ruminococcus gnavus）的16个cSAGs。A. hadrus的cSAGs表现出大尺寸、长达10 kb的噬菌体插入、糖代谢能力及与共宿主相关菌株的频繁基因组重组现象。值得注意的是，通过该方法构建的cSAGs可扩展细菌基因组数据库，并深化对未培养细菌种内多样性的理解。

title: Coverage-preserving sparsification of overlap graphs for long-read assembly
abstract:
Read-overlap-based graph data structures play a central role in computing de novo genome assembly using long reads. Many assembly tools use the string graph model [Myers, Bioinformatics 2005] to sparsify overlap graphs. Graph sparsification improves accuracy by removing spurious and redundant connections. However, a graph model must be coverage-preserving, i.e., it must ensure that each chromosome can be spelled as a walk in the graph, given sufficient sequencing coverage. This property becomes even more important for diploid genomes, polyploid genomes and metagenomes where there is a risk of losing haplotype-specific information.

We develop a novel theoretical framework under which the coverage-preserving properties of a graph model can be analysed. We first prove that de Bruijn graph and overlap graph models are guaranteed to be coverage-preserving. We also show that the standard string graph model lacks this guarantee. The latter result is consistent with the observation made in [Hui et al. ISIT16] that removal of contained reads during string graph construction can lead to coverage gaps. To remedy this, we propose practical heuristics that are well-supported by our theoretical results to sparsify overlap graphs. In our experiments conducted by using simulated long reads from HG002 human diploid genome, we find that 50 coverage gaps are introduced on average by ignoring contained reads from nanopore datasets. We tested the proposed heuristics for deciding which contained reads should be retained to avoid the coverage gaps. The proposed method retains a small fraction of contained reads (1 - 2%) and closes majority of the coverage gaps.
authors: Jain, C.

ai.TLDR: 基于读取重叠的图数据结构在长读长从头基因组组装中起核心作用。研究提出了一种理论框架，证明de Bruijn图和重叠图模型具有覆盖性保持特性，而标准字符串图模型缺乏此保证。实验表明，忽略纳米孔数据集中的包含读长会导致平均50个覆盖缺口，所提启发式方法通过保留1-2%包含读长可有效关闭大部分缺口。
ai.translation:
基于读取重叠的图数据结构在利用长读长进行从头基因组组装中扮演核心角色。许多组装工具采用字符串图模型[Myers, Bioinformatics 2005]对重叠图进行稀疏化处理。图稀疏化通过移除虚假和冗余连接来提升组装准确性。然而，图模型必须具备覆盖性保持特性，即在足够测序覆盖下，每个染色体必须能通过图中的路径表示。该特性对二倍体基因组、多倍体基因组和宏基因组尤为重要，因为存在丢失等位基因特异性信息的风险。

我们开发了一种理论框架，用于分析图模型的覆盖性保持特性。首先证明de Bruijn图和重叠图模型具有覆盖性保持保证。同时表明标准字符串图模型缺乏此保证，这与[Hui et al. ISIT16]的观察结果一致，即字符串图构建过程中移除包含读长可能导致覆盖缺口。为解决此问题，我们提出基于理论结果的实用启发式方法对重叠图进行稀疏化。在使用HG002人类二倍体基因组模拟长读长的实验中，发现忽略纳米孔数据集中的包含读长平均引入50个覆盖缺口。我们测试了所提启发式方法，用于决定哪些包含读长应保留以避免覆盖缺口。所提方法保留少量包含读长（1-2%），并关闭了大部分覆盖缺口。

title: On-Ramp: a tool for rapid, multiplexed validation of plasmids using nanopore sequencing
abstract: Recombinant plasmid vectors are versatile tools which have facilitated discoveries in molecular biology, genetics, proteomics, and many other fields. As the enzymatic and bacterial processes used to create recombinant DNA can introduce errors, sequence validation is an essential step in plasmid assembly. Sanger sequencing is the current standard for plasmid validation, however this method is limited by an inability to sequence through complex secondary structure and lacks scalability when applied to full-plasmid sequencing of multiple plasmids due to read-length limits. While next-generation sequencing (NGS) does provide full-plasmid sequencing at scale, it is impractical and costly when utilized outside of library-scale validation. Here we present OnRamp (Oxford nanopore-based Rapid Analysis of Multiplexed Plasmids), an alternative method for routine plasmid validation which combines the advantages of NGSs full plasmid coverage and scalability with Sangers affordability and accessibility by leveraging nanopores novel long-read sequencing technology. We include customized wet-lab protocols for plasmid preparation along with a pipeline designed for analysis of read data obtained using these protocols. This analysis pipeline is built into the OnRamp webapp (http://OnRamp.BoyleLab.org), which generates alignments between actual and predicted plasmid sequences, quality scores, and read-level views in a user-friendly manner, precluding the need for programming experience in analyzing nanopore results. Here we describe the OnRamp protocols and pipeline, and demonstrate our ability to obtain full sequences from pooled plasmids while detecting sequence variation even in regions of high secondary structure, at less than half the cost of equivalent Sanger sequencing.
authors: Mumm, C.; Drexel, M. L.; McDonald, T. L.; Diehl, A.; Switzenberg, J. A.; Boyle, A. P.

ai.TLDR: 重组质粒载体是分子生物学等领域的关键工具，但传统序列验证方法存在局限。OnRamp技术结合纳米孔长读长测序与Sanger测序优势，实现了成本降低50%的全质粒序列分析，可检测复杂二级结构区域的序列变异。
keywords: 纳米孔长读长测序技术
ai.translation: 重组质粒载体是分子生物学、遗传学、蛋白质组学等领域的多功能工具，推动了多项重要发现。由于酶促反应和细菌过程可能引入错误，质粒组装必须进行序列验证。Sanger测序目前是质粒验证的标准方法，但其局限性在于无法穿透复杂二级结构且在全质粒测序时因读长限制缺乏可扩展性。虽然下一代测序(NGS)可实现大规模全质粒测序，但超出库规模验证时成本高昂且不切实际。本文提出OnRamp(基于牛津纳米孔技术的多重质粒快速分析)，这是一种替代常规质粒验证的方法，结合NGS的全质粒覆盖和可扩展性优势，同时保留Sanger测序的经济性与易用性，通过纳米孔新型长读长测序技术实现。我们提供了定制的湿实验质粒制备协议，并设计了用于分析采用这些协议获得的读取数据的流程。该分析流程集成在OnRamp网络应用(https://OnRamp.BoyleLab.org)中，以用户友好的方式生成实际与预测质粒序列比对、质量评分和读取级视图，无需编程经验即可分析纳米孔结果。本文描述了OnRamp协议和流程，并演示了从混合质粒中获取完整序列的能力，即使在高二级结构区域也能检测序列变异，成本仅为等效Sanger测序的一半以下。

title: Hemin availability induces coordinated DNA methylation and gene expression changes in Porphyromonas gingivalis
abstract:
Periodontal disease is a common chronic inflammatory disease. Porphyromonas gingivalis is an important bacterium in the development of the disease and expresses a variety of virulence determinants. Hemin (iron [III] protopotphyrin IX), an essential nutrient of this organism, whose concentration increases with increasing inflammation, is a global regulator of virulence in P. gingivalis: high hemin levels increase expression of several virulence determinants. However, the mechanism through which hemin influences bacterial gene expression is poorly understood. Bacterial DNA methylation has the potential to fulfil this mechanistic role. Here, we characterised the methylome of P. gingivalis, and compared its variation to transcriptomic changes in response to changes in hemin concentration.

Gene expression and DNA methylation profiling of P. gingivalis W50 was performed, following continuous culture in chemostats with excess or limited hemin, using Illumina RNA-Seq and Nanopore DNA sequencing. DNA methylation quantification was carried out for Dam/Dcm motifs and all-context N6-methyladenine (6mA) and 5-methylcytosine (5mC) base pair modifications. Differential expression and methylation in response to excess hemin availability are presented after multiple testing correction (FDR 5%).

In excess hemin there were 161 over- and 268 under-expressed genes compared to limited hemin. Genes under-expressed in excess hemin were involved in iron recruitment (the hemophore HmuY) and transport (TonB-dependent receptors), and those over-expressed were involved in iron-sulphur cluster binding. Hemin-dependent differentially methylation was observed for the Dam  GATC motif and all-context 6mA and 5mC, with 36, 49 and 47 signals, respectively. Coordinated genome-wide differential expression and methylation effects were observed in 6 genes encoding a Ppx/GppA family phosphatase, a lactate utilization protein, a 4-alpha-glucanotransferase, two ABC transporter proteins, and a hypothetical protein HMPREF1322_RS00730. The findings indicate that altered genome methylation occurs in response to the availability of hemin and give insights into the molecular mechanisms of regulation of virulence in this bacterium.

Author SummaryDNA methylation has important roles in bacteria, including in the regulation of transcription. Porphyromonas gingivalis, an oral pathogen in periodontitis, exhibits well-established gene expression changes in response to hemin availability. However, the gene regulatory processes underlying these effects remain unknown. To this end, we profiled the novel P. gingivalis epigenome, and assessed epigenetic and transcriptome variation under limited and excess hemin conditions. As expected, multiple gene expression changes were detected in response to limited and excess hemin conditions that reflect conditions associated with health and disease, respectively. Notably, we also detected differential DNA methylation signatures for the Dam  GATC motif and both all-context N6-methyladenine (6mA) and 5-methylcytosine (5mC) in response to hemin availability. Joint analyses identified a subset of coordinated changes in gene expression, 6mA, and 5mC methylation that target genes involved in lactate utilization and ABC transporters. The results identify novel regulatory processes underlying the mechanism of hemin regulated gene expression in P. gingivalis, with phenotypic impacts on its virulence in periodontal disease.
authors: Costeira, R.; Aduse-Opoku, J.; Vernon, J. J.; Rodriguez-Algarra, F.; Joseph, S.; Devine, D. A.; Marsh, P. D.; Rakyan, V.; Curtis, M. A.; Bell, J. T.

ai.TLDR: 牙周病是一种常见的慢性炎症性疾病，牙龈卟啉单胞菌（P. gingivalis）是其发展的重要病原体，血红素浓度变化影响其毒力基因表达。研究通过高通量测序分析发现，血红素调控的DNA甲基化与基因表达变化存在协同效应，揭示了血红素介导的毒力调控分子机制。
ai.translation:
牙周病是一种常见的慢性炎症性疾病。牙龈卟啉单胞菌（Porphyromonas gingivalis）是该疾病发展的重要病原体，其表达多种毒力因子。血红素（铁[III]原卟啉IX）作为该菌的必需营养物质，其浓度随炎症程度增加而升高，是P. gingivalis毒力的全球性调控因子：高血红素水平会增强多种毒力因子的表达。然而，血红素如何影响细菌基因表达的机制尚不明确。细菌DNA甲基化可能在这一过程中发挥关键作用。本研究通过分析P. gingivalis的甲基组特征，比较其在血红素浓度变化下的转录组变化。

对P. gingivalis W50菌株进行连续培养，使用Illumina RNA-Seq和Nanopore DNA测序技术，分析在过量或限制性血红素条件下的基因表达和DNA甲基化谱型。对Dam/Dcm基序及全上下文N6-甲基腺嘌呤（6mA）和5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）修饰进行甲基化定量分析。经多重检验校正（FDR 5%）后，呈现血红素过量条件下的差异表达和甲基化结果。

在血红素过量条件下，与限制性血红素相比，有161个基因过度表达和268个基因低表达。血红素过量条件下低表达的基因涉及铁摄取（血红素受体HmuY）和运输（TonB依赖受体），而高表达的基因涉及铁硫簇结合。血红素依赖的差异甲基化在Dam GATC基序和全上下文6mA、5mC中观察到，分别有36、49和47个信号。6个基因（编码Ppx/GppA家族磷酸酶、乳酸利用蛋白、4-α-葡聚糖转移酶、两个ABC转运蛋白和一个假基因HMPREF1322_RS00730）表现出全基因组范围的差异表达和甲基化协同效应。研究结果表明，血红素可用性变化会导致基因组甲基化改变，并揭示了该菌毒力调控的分子机制。

作者摘要：DNA甲基化在细菌中具有重要功能，包括转录调控。作为牙周炎的口腔病原体，P. gingivalis在血红素可用性变化下表现出明确的基因表达变化。然而，这些效应背后的基因调控过程仍不清楚。为此，我们分析了P. gingivalis的新型表观基因组，并评估了在血红素限制和过量条件下的表观遗传和转录组变化。如预期，检测到与健康和疾病相关条件对应的多种基因表达变化。值得注意的是，我们还检测到血红素可用性变化下Dam GATC基序及全上下文N6-甲基腺嘌呤（6mA）和5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）的差异DNA甲基化信号。联合分析识别出一组协调变化的基因表达、6mA和5mC甲基化，靶向乳酸利用和ABC转运蛋白相关基因。结果揭示了P. gingivalis血红素调控基因表达的新颖调控机制，并对其在牙周病中的毒力表型产生影响。

title: DNA 5-methylcytosine detection and methylation phasing using PacBio circular consensus sequencing
abstract: Long single-molecular sequencing, such as PacBio circular consensus sequencing (CCS) and nanopore sequencing, is advantageous in detecting DNA 5-methylcytosine (5mC) in CpGs, especially in repetitive genomic regions. However, existing methods for detecting 5mCpGs using PacBio CCS are less accurate and robust. Here, we present ccsmeth, a deep-learning method to detect DNA 5mCpGs using CCS reads. We sequence PCR-treated and M.SssI-treated DNA of one human sample using PacBio CCS for training ccsmeth. Using long ([≥]10Kb) CCS reads, ccsmeth achieves 0.90 accuracy and 0.97 AUC on 5mCpG detection at single-molecule resolution. At the genome-wide site level, ccsmeth achieves >0.90 correlations with bisulfite sequencing and nanopore sequencing using only 10x reads. Furthermore, we develop a Nextflow pipeline, ccsmethphase, to detect haplotype-aware methylation using CCS reads, and then sequence a Chinese family trio to validate it. ccsmeth and ccsmethphase can be robust and accurate tools for detecting DNA 5mCs using PacBio CCS.
authors: Ni, P.; Xu, J.; Zhong, Z.; Zhang, J.; Huang, N.; Nie, F.; Luo, F.; Wang, J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究提出ccsmeth深度学习方法，利用PacBio CCS数据实现高精度5mCpG检测。该方法在单分子分辨率下达到0.90准确率和0.93 AUC值，且仅需10x数据即可实现全基因组位点水平的高相关性。
ai.translation: 长单分子测序技术如PacBio环形共识测序（CCS）和纳米孔测序在检测CpG位点的DNA 5-甲基胞嘧啶（5mC）方面具有优势，尤其在重复基因组区域。然而现有基于PacBio CCS检测5mCpG的方法在准确性和稳健性方面存在不足。本研究提出ccsmeth，一种基于深度学习的5mCpG检测方法，利用CCS数据进行训练。我们采用PacBio CCS对经PCR处理和M.SssI处理的人类样本进行测序以训练ccsmeth。使用长（≥10Kb）CCS数据，ccsmeth在单分子分辨率下实现0.90准确率和0.93 AUC值。在全基因组位点水平，仅需10x数据即可达到与亚硫酸氢盐测序和纳米孔测序>0.90的相关性。进一步开发了Nextflow流程ccsmethphase，用于基于CCS数据的等位基因感知甲基化检测，并通过中国三口之家样本验证。ccsmeth和ccsmethphase可作为基于PacBio CCS检测DNA 5mC的稳健准确工具。

title: Long-read sequencing of diagnosis and post-therapy medulloblastoma reveals complex rearrangement patterns and epigenetic signatures
abstract:
Cancer genomes harbor a broad spectrum of structural variants (SV) driving tumorigenesis, a relevant subset of which are likely to escape discovery in short reads. We employed Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing in a paired diagnostic and post-therapy medulloblastoma to unravel the haplotype-resolved somatic genetic and epigenetic landscape. We assemble complex rearrangements and such associated with telomeric sequences, including a 1.55 Megabasepair chromothripsis event. We uncover a complex SV pattern termed  templated insertion thread, characterized by short (mostly <1kb) insertions showing prevalent self-concatenation into highly amplified structures of up to 50kbp in size. Templated insertion threads occur in 3% of cancers, with a prevalence ranging to 74% in liposarcoma, and frequent colocalization with chromothripsis. We also perform long-read based methylome profiling and discover allele-specific methylation (ASM) effects, complex rearrangements exhibiting differential methylation, and differential promoter methylation in seven cancer-driver genes. Our study shows the potential of long-read sequencing in cancer.

Graphical abstract O_FIG_DISPLAY_L [Figure 1] M_FIG_DISPLAY I) We investigate a single patient with chromothriptic sonic hedgehog medulloblastoma (Li-Fraumeni syndrome), with tissue samples taken from blood, the primary tumor at diagnosis, and a post-treatment (relapse) tumor. II) Data on the three samples has been collected from four sources, 1) Illumina whole-genome, 2) Illumina transcriptome sequencing, 3) Illumina Infinium HumanMethylation450k, as well as 4) long-read whole-genome sequencing using Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT) sequencing. III) An integrative analysis combines genomic, epigenomic as well as transcriptomic data to provide a comprehensive analysis of this heavily rearranged tumor sample. Long and short read sequencing data is used to inform the analysis of complex structural genomic variants and methylation called from haplotyped ONT reads and validated through the methylation array data allows for a haplotype-resolved study of genomic and epigenomic variation, which can then be examined for transcriptional effect. IV) This integrative analysis allows us to identify a large number of inter- and intra-chromosomal genomic rearrangements (A) including a complex rearrangement pattern we term templated insertion threads (B), as well as sample-specific and haplotype specific methylation patterns of known cancer genes (C).

C_FIG_DISPLAY
authors: Rausch, T.; Snajder, R.; Leger, A.; Simovic, M.; Stegle, O.; Birney, E.; Bonder, M. J.; Ernst, A.; Korbel, J. O.

ai.TLDR: 本研究利用长读长测序技术揭示了髓母细胞瘤中复杂的结构变异和表观遗传特征，发现染色体碎裂事件和模板插入线等新型变异模式。通过整合多组学数据，首次实现等位基因解析水平的基因组与表观遗传变异分析，为癌症精准诊疗提供新思路。
ai.translation: 癌症基因组中存在广泛的结构变异（SV）驱动肿瘤发生，其中部分变异可能在短读长测序中被遗漏。本研究采用牛津纳米孔技术（ONT）测序，在诊断与治疗后的髓母细胞瘤样本中解析了等位基因解析的体细胞遗传与表观遗传景观。我们组装了复杂的重排事件，包括与端粒序列相关的1.55兆碱基染色体碎裂事件。发现了一种新型的结构变异模式——模板插入线，表现为短（多小于1kb）插入片段通过自我连接形成高达50kb的高扩增结构。该变异在3%癌症中存在，脂肉瘤中可达74%并常与染色体碎裂共存。通过长读长甲基组分析，揭示了7个癌症驱动基因的等位基因特异性甲基化（ASM）效应及差异甲基化特征。研究证明长读长测序在癌症研究中的潜力。图示：I) 研究单例染色体碎裂型 sonic hedgehog 髓母细胞瘤（Li-Fraumeni综合征）患者，采集血液、初诊原发肿瘤及治疗后（复发）肿瘤样本。II) 三份样本数据来自四个来源：1) Illumina全基因组测序，2) Illumina转录组测序，3) Illumina Infinium HumanMethylation450k甲基化芯片，4) Oxford Nanopore Technologies长读长测序。III) 整合分析结合基因组、表观组及转录组数据，全面解析高度重排的肿瘤样本。通过长/短读长测序数据解析复杂结构变异，利用haplotyped ONT读长推断甲基化状态，并通过甲基化芯片验证，实现等位基因解析的基因组与表观遗传变异研究，进一步分析转录效应。IV) 整合分析识别大量染色体间/内重排（A），包括新型复杂重排模式——模板插入线（B），以及已知癌症基因的样本特异性及等位基因特异性甲基化模式（C）。

title: Genome Enrichment of Rare, Unknown Species from Complicated Microbiome by Nanopore Selective Sequencing
abstract: Rare species are vital members of a microbial community, but retrieving their genomes is difficult due to their low abundance. The ReadUntil (RU) approach allows nanopore devices to sequence specific DNA molecules selectively in real-time, which provides an opportunity for enriching rare species. However, there is still a gap in RU-based enriching of rare and unknown species in environmental samples whose community composition is unclear, and many species lack corresponding reference in public databases. Here we present metaRUpore to overcome this challenge. We applied metaRUpore to a thermophilic anaerobic digester (TAD) community, it successfully redirected the sequencing throughput from high-abundance populations to rare species while facilitating the recovery of 41 high-quality metagenome-assembled genomes (MAGs) at low sequencing effort. The simplicity and robustness of the approach make it accessible for labs with moderate computational resources and hold the potential to become the standard practice in future metagenomic sequencing of complicated microbiomes.
authors: Xia, Y.; SUN, Y.; Li, X.; Yang, Q.; Zhao, B.; Wu, Z.

ai.TLDR: 稀有微生物物种在微生物群落中至关重要，但其低丰度导致基因组回收困难。ReadUntil（RU）方法通过纳米孔设备实现特定DNA分子的实时选择性测序，为富集稀有物种提供机会。metaRUpore技术成功将测序通量从高丰度群体转向稀有物种，以低测序成本回收41个高质量宏基因组组装基因组（MAGs）。
ai.translation: 稀有物种是微生物群落的重要成员，但由于其低丰度，基因组回收面临困难。ReadUntil（RU）方法使纳米孔设备能够实时选择性地对特定DNA分子进行测序，这为富集稀有物种提供了机会。然而，基于RU的稀有和未知物种富集方法在环境样本中仍存在不足，特别是当群落组成不明且许多物种缺乏公共数据库参考时。本文提出metaRUpore技术以克服这一挑战。我们将metaRUpore应用于嗜热厌氧消化器（TAD）群落，成功将测序通量从高丰度群体转向稀有物种，同时以低测序成本回收了41个高质量的宏基因组组装基因组（MAGs）。该方法的简单性和鲁棒性使其适用于计算资源有限的实验室，并有望成为未来复杂微生物组宏基因组测序的标准实践。

title: Single-molecule nanopore dielectrophoretic trapping of α-Synuclein with lipid membranes
abstract: The lipid--Synuclein (-Syn) interaction plays a crucial role in the pathogenesis of Parkinsons disease. Here, we trap -Syn at a conjunction of an -hemolysin (HL) single nanopore-lipid to investigate the folding and unfolding kinetics of -Syn in a lipidic environment. The hybridized -Syn is generated through a reaction between a 5-thiol-modified nucleotide oligo (dC30) and the -Syn mutant (A140C). Owing to an applied voltage, single-molecule hybridized -Syn can be trapped at the single nanopore. The trapping events are associated with dielectrophoretic force. The folding and unfolding events of -Syn can be observed at the pore-membrane junction through interpretation of blockade current amplitudes and dwell time. This can be related to the protein quaternary structure influenced by the -Syn-membrane interaction, allowing further analysis of -Syn conformational dynamics. We studied how disease associated metal ions (Cu2+, Zn2+) modulate folding and unfolding of -Syn at the interface of the membranes and pore, and how -helical peptidomimetics stabilize the helical conformation of -Syn in the presence of a membrane. These studies aid our understanding of the complexity of the interaction of -Syn, lipid membranes and metal ions, and in using peptidomimetics, a new strategy against -Syn toxicity and aggregation is advanced.
authors: Wu, J.; Yamashita, T.; Hamilton, A. D.; Thompson, S.; Luo, J.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过单纳米孔技术探究α-突触核蛋白（α-Syn）在脂质环境中的折叠与展开动力学，揭示其与膜界面金属离子的相互作用机制。研究发现肽模拟物可稳定α-Syn螺旋构象，为对抗α-Syn毒性提供了新策略。
ai.translation: 脂质-α-突触核蛋白（α-Syn）相互作用在帕金森病的发病机制中起关键作用。本研究通过将α-Syn突变体（A140C）与5-硫醇修饰的核苷酸寡聚体（dC30）反应生成杂化α-Syn，利用单纳米孔技术在脂质-孔界面研究其折叠与展开动力学。施加电压后，单分子杂化α-Syn可被纳米孔捕获，其折叠/展开事件通过阻断电流振幅和驻留时间分析在孔膜连接处被观测。该现象与α-Syn-膜相互作用影响的四级结构相关，可进一步分析其构象动力学。研究探讨了疾病相关金属离子（Cu2+、Zn2+）如何调控膜-孔界面的α-Syn折叠/展开过程，以及肽模拟物如何在膜存在下稳定α-Syn的螺旋构象。这些研究加深了对α-Syn、脂质膜和金属离子相互作用复杂性的理解，并提出了利用肽模拟物对抗α-Syn毒性聚集的新策略。

title: North and East African mitochondrial genetic variation needs further characterization towards precision medicine
abstract:
IntroductionMitochondria are maternally inherited cell organelles with their own genome, and perform various functions in eukaryotic cells such as energy production and cellular homeostasis. Due to their inheritance and manifold biological roles in health and disease, mitochondrial genetics serves a dual purpose of tracing the history as well as disease susceptibility of human populations across the globe. This work requires a comprehensive catalogue of commonly observed genetic variations in the mitochondrial DNAs for all regions throughout the world. So far, however, certain regions, such as North and East Africa have been understudied.

ObjectivesTo address this shortcoming, we have created the most comprehensive quality-controlled North and East African mitochondrial dataset to date and use it for characterizing mitochondrial genetic variation in this region.

MethodsWe compiled 11 published cohorts with novel data for mitochondrial genomes from 159 Sudanese individuals. We combined these 641 mitochondrial sequences with sequences from the 1000 Genomes (n=2,504) and the Human Genome Diversity Project (n=828) and used the tool haplocheck for extensive quality control and detection of in-sample contamination, as well as Nanopore long read sequencing for haplogroup validation of 18 samples.

ResultsUsing a subset of high-coverage mitochondrial sequences, we predict 15 potentially novel haplogroups in North and East African subjects and observe likely phylogenetic deviations from the established PhyloTree reference for haplogroups L0a1 and L2a1.

ConclusionOur findings demonstrate common hitherto unexplored variants in mitochondrial genomes of North and East Africa that lead to novel phylogenetic relationships between haplogroups present in these regions. These observations call for further in-depth population genetic studies in that region to enable the prospective use of mitochondrial genetic variation for precision medicine.
authors: Fähnrich, A.; Stephan, I.; Hirose, M.; Awadelkareem, M. A.; Ibrahim, S.; Busch, H.; Wohlers, I.

ai.TLDR: 本研究聚焦线粒体遗传学在追踪全球人群历史与疾病易感性中的双重作用，发现北非和东非地区存在未被探索的线粒体基因组变异。通过整合多组学数据并结合长读长测序技术，研究人员识别出15个潜在新单倍群，揭示了该地区单倍群间的新型系统发育关系。
ai.translation:
引言：线粒体作为母系遗传的细胞器，拥有自身基因组，在真核细胞中执行能量生产与细胞稳态等多重功能。由于其遗传方式和在健康与疾病中的多重生物学作用，线粒体遗传学在追踪全球人群历史及疾病易感性方面具有双重价值。本研究需要建立全球各地区常见线粒体DNA遗传变异的全面目录，但目前北非和东非等地区仍存在研究不足。

目标：为解决这一缺陷，我们创建了迄今为止最全面的北非和东非线粒体基因组数据集，并用于表征该地区的线粒体遗传变异。

方法：我们整合了159名苏丹个体的11个已发表队列及新型数据，共获得641条线粒体序列。结合1000 Genomes项目（n=2,504）和人类基因组多样性计划（n=828）的序列数据，采用haplocheck工具进行质量控制和样本污染检测，并通过Nanopore长读长测序验证18个样本的单倍群分类。

结果：利用高覆盖度的线粒体序列子集，我们预测北非和东非受试者中存在15个潜在新单倍群，并观察到L0a1和L2a1单倍群在已建立的PhyloTree参考树中出现可能的系统发育偏离。

结论：研究结果揭示了北非和东非线粒体基因组中尚未探索的常见变异，这些变异导致该地区单倍群间出现新型系统发育关系。这些发现呼吁对该地区开展更深入的群体遗传学研究，以实现线粒体遗传变异在精准医学中的前瞻性应用。

title: RPL3L-containing ribosomes modulate mitochondrial activity in the mammalian heart
abstract: The existence of naturally occurring ribosome heterogeneity is now a well-acknowledged phenomenon. However, whether this heterogeneity leads to functionally diverse  specialized ribosomes is still a controversial topic. Here, we explore the biological function of RPL3L (uL3L), a ribosomal protein (RP) paralog of RPL3 (uL3) that is exclusively expressed in muscle and heart tissues, by generating a viable homozygous Rpl3l knockout mouse strain. We identify a rescue mechanism in which, upon RPL3L depletion, RPL3 becomes upregulated, yielding RPL3-containing ribosomes instead of RPL3L-containing ribosomes that are typically found in cardiomyocytes. Using both ribosome profiling (Ribo-Seq) and a novel orthogonal approach consisting of ribosome pulldown coupled to nanopore sequencing (Nano-TRAP), we find that RPL3L neither modulates translational efficiency nor ribosome affinity towards a specific subset of transcripts. By contrast, we show that depletion of RPL3L leads to increased ribosome-mitochondria interactions in cardiomyocytes, which is accompanied by a significant increase in ATP levels, potentially as a result of mitochondrial activity fine-tuning. Our results demonstrate that the existence of tissue-specific RP paralogs does not necessarily lead to enhanced translation of specific transcripts or modulation of translational output. Instead, we reveal a complex cellular scenario in which RPL3L modulates the expression of RPL3, which in turn affects ribosomal subcellular localization and, ultimately, mitochondrial activity.
authors: Milenkovic, I.; Santos Vieira, H. G.; Lucas, M. C.; Ruiz-Orera, J.; Patone, G.; Kesteven, S.; Wu, J.; Feneley, M.; Espadas, G.; Sabido, E.; Hubner, N.; van Heesch, S.; Voelkers, M.; Novoa, E. M.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了RPL3L在心脏肌细胞中通过调控RPL3表达影响线粒体活性的作用机制。通过构建Rpl3l敲除小鼠，发现RPL3L缺乏会导致核糖体-线粒体互作增强及ATP水平显著上升，表明组织特异性RP同源蛋白并不直接增强特定转录本翻译效率。
ai.translation: 天然存在的核糖体异质性现象已被广泛认可，但其是否导致功能多样的特化核糖体仍存在争议。本研究通过构建可存活的Rpl3l基因敲除小鼠株，探索RPL3L（uL3L）这一仅在肌肉和心脏组织中特异性表达的核糖体蛋白（RP）同源蛋白的生物学功能。研究发现当RPL3L水平下降时，RPL3表达量显著上升，形成含RPL3的核糖体替代原本含RPL3L的核糖体（通常存在于心肌细胞中）。结合核糖体图谱分析（Ribo-Seq）和新型正交方法（核糖体pull-down联合纳米孔测序Nano-TRAP），证实RPL3L既不调控特定转录本的翻译效率，也不影响核糖体对特定转录本的亲和力。相反，RPL3L缺乏会导致心肌细胞中核糖体-线粒体互作显著增强，伴随ATP水平显著上升，这可能源于线粒体活性的精细调控。研究结果表明，组织特异性RP同源蛋白的存在并不必然导致特定转录本的翻译增强或翻译输出的调控，而是揭示了RPL3L通过调控RPL3表达，进而影响核糖体亚细胞定位，最终调控线粒体活性的复杂细胞机制。

title: High resolution species detection: accurate long read eDNA metabarcoding of North Sea fish using Oxford Nanopore sequencing
abstract: To monitor the effect of nature restoration projects in North Sea ecosystems, accurate and intensive biodiversity assessments are vital. DNA based techniques and especially environmental DNA (eDNA) metabarcoding is becoming a powerful monitoring tool. However, current approaches are based on genetic target regions <500 nucleotides, which offer limited taxonomic resolution. We developed a method for eDNA metabarcoding, based on nanopore sequencing of a longer amplicon, enabling improved identification of fish species. We designed a universal primer pair targeting a 2kb region of fish mitochondria, and compared it to the commonly used MiFish primer pair that targets only [~]170bp. In sillico and mock community testing showed that the 2kb fragments improved the accurate identification of genetically closely related species. eDNA was amplified, and sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore MinION in combination with the sequence read processing pipeline Decona. Analyzing eDNA from a North Sea aquarium showed that sequences from both primer pairs could be assigned to most species, but both approaches also identified unique species in the aquarium eDNA. Next, both primer pairs were used on multiple eDNA samples from the North Sea. Here, similar location specific fish communities were obtained from both approaches. More species were identified through the MiFish approach in the field samples. Interestingly, this difference was not observed in the aquarium, suggesting that 2kb fragment based metabarcoding potentially detects more recent occurrences of animals. This new method has the potential to improve and expand the molecular toolbox for eDNA based monitoring approaches.
authors: Doorenspleet, K.; Jansen, L.; Oosterbroek, S.; Bos, O.; Kamermans, P.; Janse, M.; Wurz, E.; Murk, A.; Nijland, R.

ai.TLDR: 为监测北海生态系统的自然恢复项目效果，需精准评估生物多样性。现有eDNA元条形码测序方法因基因片段长度限制（<500nt）导致分类分辨率不足。本研究开发基于纳米孔测序的2kb鱼线粒体片段方法，通过模拟实验和水族馆样本验证，发现2kb片段能更准确识别近缘物种，且在实际样本中检测到更多近期动物存在。
ai.translation: 为监测北海生态系统自然恢复项目的生态效应，需要准确且密集的生物多样性评估。基于DNA的检测技术，特别是环境DNA (eDNA) 元条形码测序，正逐渐成为强大的监测工具。然而，现有方法依赖于<500核苷酸的遗传靶向区域，导致分类分辨率有限。我们开发了一种基于纳米孔测序的eDNA元条形码测序方法，通过扩增更长的扩增子片段，提高了鱼类物种的鉴定能力。设计了一对针对鱼类线粒体2kb区域的通用引物，并与常用的MiFish引物（仅靶向约170bp）进行比较。通过计算机模拟和假社区测试显示，2kb片段显著提升了遗传近缘物种的准确鉴定能力。eDNA通过Oxford Nanopore MinION平台进行扩增和测序，并结合Decona序列读取处理流程。分析北海水族馆的eDNA样本发现，两种引物对均能将序列分配至大多数物种，但两种方法均检测到独特的物种。随后，两种引物对均用于多个北海eDNA样本分析，两种方法均获得相似的地点特异性鱼类群落。在野外样本中，MiFish方法识别出更多物种，但水族馆样本中未观察到该差异，表明基于2kb片段的元条形码测序可能更易检测近期动物存在。该新方法有望提升和扩展基于eDNA的监测技术工具箱。

title: Characterization and simulation of metagenomic nanopore sequencing data with Meta-NanoSim
abstract: Nanopore sequencing is crucial to metagenomic studies as its kilobase-long reads can contribute to resolving genomic structural differences among microbes. However, platform-specific challenges, including high base-call error rate, non-uniform read lengths, and the presence of chimeric artifacts, necessitate specifically designed analytical tools. Here, we present Meta-NanoSim, a fast and versatile utility that characterizes and simulates the unique properties of nanopore metagenomic reads. Further, Meta-NanoSim improves upon state-of-the-art methods on microbial abundance estimation through a base-level quantification algorithm. We demonstrate that Meta-NanoSim simulated data can facilitate the development of metagenomic algorithms and guide experimental design through a metagenomic assembly benchmarking task.
authors: Yang, C.; Lo, T.; Nip, K. M.; Hafezqorani, S.; Warren, R. L.; Birol, I.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔测序因其千碱基长度的读段在宏基因组研究中具有关键作用，但平台特有的挑战需要专门分析工具。Meta-NanoSim作为快速多功能工具，通过基础级量化算法改进微生物丰度估计方法，其模拟数据可助力宏基因组算法开发与实验设计。
ai.translation: 纳米孔测序在宏基因组研究中具有关键作用，因其千碱基长度的读段能够帮助解析微生物间的基因组结构差异。然而，平台特有的挑战，包括高碱基调用错误率、读段长度不均匀以及嵌合体伪影的存在，需要专门设计的分析工具。本文提出Meta-NanoSim，这是一种快速且多功能的工具，可表征和模拟纳米孔宏基因组读段的独特特性。进一步地，Meta-NanoSim通过基础级量化算法改进了现有微生物丰度估计方法。我们证明Meta-NanoSim的模拟数据可通过宏基因组组装基准测试任务，助力宏基因组算法开发并指导实验设计。

title: Nanopore adaptive sampling for mitogenome sequencing and bloodmeal identification in hematophagous insects
abstract: Blood-feeding insects are important vectors for an array of zoonotic pathogens. Despite significant research focused on well-documented insect vectors of One Health importance, resources for molecular species identification of a large number of hematophagous arthropods are limited. Advancements in next-generation sequencing technologies provide opportunities for targeting mitochondrial genomes of blood-feeding insects, as well as their bloodmeal hosts. This dual approach holds great promise for elucidating complex disease transmission pathways and enhancing the molecular resources for the identification of cryptic insect species. To this end, we leveraged the newly developed Oxford Nanopore Adaptive Sampling (NAS) pipeline to dually sequence the mitogenomes of hematophagous insects and their bloodmeals. Using NAS, we sequenced the entire mitogenomes of Aedes vexans, Culex restuans, Culex territans, and Chrysops niger and successfully identified bloodmeal hosts of Chrysops niger, Culex restuans, and Aedes trivittatus. We show that NAS has the utility to simultaneously molecularly identify blood-feeding insects and characterize disease transmission pathways through bloodmeal host identification. Moreover, our data indicate NAS can facilitate a wide array of molecular systematic studies through novel  phylogenetic capture methods. We conclude the NAS approach has great potential for informing global One Health initiatives centered on the mitigation of vector-borne disease through dual vector and bloodmeal identification.
authors: Kipp, E. J.; Lindsey, L. L.; Blanco, C. M.; Baker, J.; Milstein, M. S.; Faulk, C.; Oliver, J. D.; Larsen, P. A.

ai.TLDR: 血液吸食昆虫是多种人畜共患病原体的重要传播媒介。现有针对大量血吸虫类节肢动物的分子物种鉴定资源有限，而下一代测序技术为同时解析昆虫及其宿主的线粒体基因组提供了新机遇。本研究通过Oxford Nanopore NAS技术实现了血吸虫类昆虫及其血液宿主的双线粒体基因组测序，成功揭示了疾病传播路径并拓展了分子系统学研究方法。
ai.translation: 血液吸食昆虫是多种人畜共患病原体的重要传播媒介。尽管已有大量研究聚焦于已知的One Health重要昆虫传播媒介，但针对大量血吸虫类节肢动物的分子物种鉴定资源仍显不足。下一代测序技术的进步为靶向血吸虫类昆虫及其血液宿主的线粒体基因组提供了新机遇。这种双靶向策略对于解析复杂疾病传播路径和增强隐匿昆虫物种的分子鉴定资源具有巨大潜力。为此，我们采用新开发的Oxford Nanopore Adaptive Sampling (NAS)流程，同时对血吸虫类昆虫及其血液宿主进行线粒体基因组测序。通过NAS技术，我们完成了Aedes vexans、Culex restuans、Culex territans和Chrysops niger的完整线粒体基因组测序，并成功鉴定了Chrysops niger、Culex restuans和Aedes trivittatus的血液宿主。研究显示NAS技术能够同时实现血吸虫类昆虫的分子鉴定并通过血液宿主鉴定解析疾病传播路径。此外，我们的数据表明NAS技术可通过新型系统发育捕获方法促进广泛的分子系统学研究。我们得出结论，NAS方法在通过双靶向鉴定（血吸虫和血液宿主）推动全球One Health倡议以防控媒介传播疾病方面具有巨大潜力。

title: Detection of pseudouridine modifications and type I/II hypermodifications in human mRNAs using direct, long-read sequencing
abstract: We developed and applied a semi-quantitative method for high-confidence identification of pseudouridylated sites on mammalian mRNAs via direct long-read nanopore sequencing. A comparative analysis of a modification-free transcriptome reveals that the depth of coverage and specific k-mer sequences are critical parameters for accurate basecalling. By adjusting these parameters for high-confidence U-to-C basecalling errors, we identified many known sites of pseudouridylation and uncovered new uridine-modified sites, many of which fall in k-mers that are known targets of pseudouridine synthases. Identified sites were validated using 1,000-mer synthetic RNA controls bearing a single pseudouridine in the center position which demonstrate systematical under-calling using our approach. We identify mRNAs with up to 7 unique modification sites. Our pipeline allows direct detection of low-, medium-, and high-occupancy pseudouridine modifications on native RNA molecules from nanopore sequencing data as well as multiple modifications on the same strand.
authors: Tavakoli, S.; Nabizadehmashhadtoroghi, M.; Makhamreh, A.; Gamper, H.; Rezapour, N.; Hou, Y.-M.; Wanunu, M.; Rouhanifard, S. H.

ai.TLDR: 本研究开发了一种半定量方法，通过直接长读长纳米孔测序实现哺乳动物mRNA假尿苷化位点的高置信度鉴定。通过优化覆盖深度和k-mer序列参数，成功识别了已知位点并发现新修饰位点，验证结果表明该方法可准确检测低至高占有率的假尿苷化修饰。
ai.translation: 我们开发并应用了一种半定量方法，通过直接长读长纳米孔测序实现哺乳动物mRNA中假尿苷化位点的高置信度鉴定。通过比较无修饰转录组的分析发现，覆盖深度和特定k-mer序列是准确碱基调用的关键参数。通过调整这些参数以减少高置信度U-to-C碱基调用错误，我们识别了大量已知假尿苷化位点，并发现了新的尿苷修饰位点，其中许多位于已知假尿苷合成酶靶向的k-mer序列中。使用携带中心位置单个假尿苷的1,000-mer合成RNA对照验证识别位点，结果表明我们的方法存在系统性低估。我们鉴定出包含多达7个独特修饰位点的mRNA。该流程可直接从纳米孔测序数据中检测天然RNA分子上低、中、高占有率的假尿苷化修饰，并可识别同一条链上的多重修饰。

title: Two-speed genome expansion drives the evolution of pathogenicity in animal fungal pathogens
journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
abstract: The origins of virulence in amphibian-infecting chytrids Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis (Bd) and Batrachochytrium salamandrivorans (Bsal) are largely unknown. Here, we use deep nanopore sequencing of Bsal and comparative genomics against 21 high-quality genome assemblies that span the fungal Chytridiomycota. Bsal has the most repeat-rich genome, comprising 40.9% repetitive elements, which has expanded to more than 3X the length of its conspecific Bd. M36 metalloprotease virulence factors are highly expanded in Bsal and 53% of the 177 unique genes are flanked by transposable elements, suggesting repeat-driven expansion. The largest M36 sub-family are mostly (84%) flanked upstream by a novel LINE element, a repeat superfamily implicated with gene copy number variations. We find that Bsal has a highly compartmentalized genome architecture, with virulence factors enriched in gene-sparse/repeat-rich compartments, while core conserved genes occur in gene-rich/repeat-poor compartments. This is a hallmark of two-speed genome evolution. Furthermore, genes with signatures of positive selection in Bd are enriched in repeat-rich regions, suggesting they are a cradle for chytrid pathogenicity evolution, and Bd also has a two-speed genome. This is the first evidence of two-speed genomes in any animal pathogen, and sheds new light on the evolution of fungal pathogens of vertebrates driving global declines and extinctions.
authors: Wacker, T.; Helmstetter, N.; Wilson, D.; Fisher, M. C.; Studholme, D. J.; Farrer, R. A.

ai.TLDR: 研究揭示了两栖动物感染真菌Bsal和Bd的致病性起源，通过深度纳米孔测序和比较基因组学发现其基因组存在双速进化特征。Bsal基因组重复元素占比高达40.9%，M36金属蛋白酶毒力因子扩张显著，表明重复序列驱动的基因组进化机制。
ai.translation: Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis (Bd)和Batrachochytrium salamandrivorans (Bsal)感染两栖动物的致病性起源尚不明确。本研究通过深度纳米孔测序结合21个高质量真菌Chytridiomycota基因组的比较基因组学分析，发现Bsal基因组具有最丰富的重复序列，包含40.9%的重复元件，其基因组长度超过同源Bd的3倍。M36金属蛋白酶毒力因子在Bsal中显著扩张，其中53%的177个独特基因被转座子元件包围，表明重复驱动的扩张机制。最大的M36亚家族中84%的基因上游存在新型LINE元件，该重复超家族与基因拷贝数变异相关。研究发现Bsal基因组呈现高度分隔的结构，毒力因子富集于基因稀疏/重复丰富的区域，而核心保守基因则位于基因密集/重复贫乏区域，这是双速基因组进化的典型特征。此外，Bd中正选择信号基因在重复丰富区域富集，表明其是真菌致病性进化的温床，Bd同样存在双速基因组。这是首次在动物病原体中发现双速基因组，为理解驱动全球两栖动物衰退和灭绝的真菌病原体进化提供了新视角。

title: Genomic analysis of extended-spectrum beta-lactamase (ESBL) producing Escherichia coli colonising adults in Blantyre, Malawi reveals previously undescribed diversity.
abstract:
Escherichia coli is a ubiquitous bacterium and one of the most prevalent Gram-negative species associated with drug resistant infections. The large number of sequenced genomes available have provided us with a consistently growing knowledge base to further understand pathogenesis and epidemiology of this organism. However, data from sub-Saharan Africa (sSA) are underrepresented in global sequencing efforts and E. coli genetic diversity from this region is poorly described. To reduce this gap, we investigated extended-spectrum beta-lactamase (ESBL)-producing E. coli colonising adults in Blantyre, Malawi to assess the bacterial diversity and AMR determinants and to place these isolates in the context of the wider population structure. We performed short-read whole-genome sequencing of 473 colonising ESBL E. coli isolated from human stool and contextualised the genomes with a previously curated multi-country species wide collection of 10,146 genomes. The most frequently identified sequence types (STs) in our collection were the globally successful ST131, ST410 and ST167, and the dominant ESBL genes were blaCTX-M, mirroring global trends. However, 37% of Malawian isolates did not cluster with any isolates in the curated multicountry collection and a core gene phylogeny was consistent with locally spreading subclades within globally dominant clones, including in ST410 and ST167. We also found Carbapenemase genes in our collection at low frequency; we used long read sequencing to characterise selected ESBL and carbapenemase-associated plasmids, demonstrating the presence of globally distributed carbapenemase carrying plasmids. Increased genomic surveillance of E. coli from Malawi and sSA is necessary to understand local, regional and global transmission of both E. coli and the AMR genes they commonly carry.

Impact StatementDrug-resistant Escherichia coli producing extended-spectrum beta lactamase (ESBL) or carbapenemase enzymes have been identified by the World Health Organisation as priority pathogens of global concern, and whole genome sequencing has provided insight into mechanisms of virulence, antimicrobial resistance, and the spread of high-risk clones. However, studies analysing large numbers of E. coli using whole-genome data often focus on opportunistic use of hospital diagnostic collections in high-income settings. Understanding how the genomic epidemiology of E. coli in low- and middle-income countries (including many of the nations of sub-Saharan Africa) differs is essential to provide insight into local, and global drivers of transmission. We therefore sequenced 473 ESBL-producing E. coli genomes colonising adults in Blantyre, Malawi. We analyse determinants of antimicrobial resistance and virulence and place the isolates in wider context using a previously published global E. coli collection that was generated to represent the whole species diversity of sequences publicly available at the time of generation. We find that there is diversity in Malawian isolates not reflected in the curated global collection: widely successful antimicrobial-resistance associated E. coli sequence types are represented in Blantyre, but locally circulating subclades are apparent. Furthermore, given the high number of ESBL producing pathogens causing infections there is an unmet need for carbapenem antimicrobials which are still active against ESBL-producers but are not yet widely available in our setting. We find that carbapenemases (enzymes that can render bacteria resistant to carbapenems) in our collection are unusual but present and carried on globally disseminated plasmids. So too are globally successful, stably carbapenemase-associated E. coli lineages. Although the Malawian isolates analysed typically lacked carbapenemases, carbapenem use is increasing in Malawi and their unstewarded use will accelerate selection for carbapememases in E. coli in the future. Our study highlights the need for robust stewardship protocols and ongoing genomic surveillance as these agents are introduced.

Data SummaryAll data and code to replicate this analysis are available as the blantyreESBL v1.3 R package (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5554081) available at https://github.com/joelewis101/blantyreESBL. Reads from all isolates sequenced as part of this study have been deposited in the European Nucleotide Archive, under PRJEB26677, PRJEB28522 and PRJEB36486 (short reads) and PRJNA869071 (Nanopore reads and hybrid assemblies). Accession numbers (as well as accession numbers of publicly available genomes used in this analysis) linked to sample metadata are provided in the R package and as supplementary data to this manuscript.
authors: Lewis, J. M.; Mphasa, M.; Banda, R.; Beale, M. A.; Mallewa, J.; Roberts, A. P.; Heinz, E.; Thomson, N. R.; Feasey, N. A.

ai.TLDR: 本研究通过基因组测序分析了马拉维布兰特里地区成人肠道中广谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）产生大肠杆菌的多样性及耐药基因特征，发现当地菌株与全球数据库存在显著差异，且部分菌株携带全球传播的碳青霉烯酶基因。研究强调了加强撒哈拉以南非洲地区大肠杆菌基因组监测的必要性，以应对耐药基因的区域传播风险。
ai.translation:
大肠杆菌（Escherichia coli）是一种广泛存在的细菌，是与耐药感染相关的最常见的革兰氏阴性菌之一。大量已测序的基因组数据为深入理解该菌的致病机制和流行病学提供了持续增长的知识库。然而，撒哈拉以南非洲（sSA）地区的数据在全球测序项目中代表性不足，该地区大肠杆菌的遗传多样性描述尚不充分。为缩小这一差距，我们研究了马拉维布兰特里地区成人肠道中广谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）产生大肠杆菌的细菌多样性、耐药基因决定因子，并将其置于更广泛的群体结构背景下。我们对473株来自人类粪便的ESBL大肠杆菌进行了短读长全基因组测序，并将其基因组与之前整理的多国大肠杆菌基因组集合（共10,146株）进行比对。我们的集合中最常见的序列类型（STs）是全球成功传播的ST131、ST410和ST167，主导的ESBL基因是blaCTX-M，与全球趋势一致。然而，37%的马拉维菌株未与多国集合中的任何菌株聚类，核心基因系统发育树显示这些菌株属于全球优势克隆中的本地传播亚克隆，包括ST410和ST167。我们还在集合中发现低频率的碳青霉烯酶基因，通过长读长测序对部分ESBL和碳青霉烯酶相关质粒进行了表征，证实了全球传播的碳青霉烯酶携带质粒的存在。加强马拉维及撒哈拉以南非洲地区大肠杆菌的基因组监测对于理解该菌及其携带的耐药基因的本地、区域和全球传播至关重要。

影响声明：世界卫生组织将产生广谱β-内酰胺酶（ESBL）或碳青霉烯酶的耐药大肠杆菌列为全球关注的优先病原体，全基因组测序揭示了致病性、抗菌耐药性和高风险克隆传播的机制。然而，使用全基因组数据分析大量大肠杆菌的研究常聚焦于高收入国家医院诊断样本的偶然使用。理解低收入和中等收入国家（包括许多撒哈拉以南非洲国家）大肠杆菌的基因组流行病学差异对于揭示本地和全球传播驱动因素至关重要。因此，我们测序了马拉维布兰特里地区成人肠道中473株ESBL产生大肠杆菌的基因组。我们分析了抗菌耐药性和毒力决定因子，并利用之前发表的全球大肠杆菌集合（代表当时公开可用序列的整个物种多样性）将菌株置于更广泛的背景中。研究发现，马拉维菌株的多样性未在整理的全球集合中体现：布兰特里地区存在广泛成功的抗菌耐药相关大肠杆菌序列类型，但本地循环亚克隆也明显存在。此外，鉴于该地区ESBL产生病原体感染数量众多，亟需碳青霉烯类抗菌药物（仍对ESBL产生菌有效但尚未广泛可用）。我们发现集合中碳青霉烯酶（可使细菌对碳青霉烯类耐药的酶）虽罕见但存在，且携带全球传播的质粒。同样，全球成功且稳定携带碳青霉烯酶的大肠杆菌谱系也存在。尽管分析的马拉维菌株通常缺乏碳青霉烯酶，但马拉维碳青霉烯类药物使用正在增加，其无监管使用将加速未来大肠杆菌中碳青霉烯酶的选择。本研究强调了引入这些药物时需要制定严格的监管协议和持续的基因组监测的必要性。

数据摘要：所有数据和代码可通过blantyreESBL v1.3 R包（https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5554081）复现，该包可在https://github.com/joelewis101/blantyreESBL获取。本研究中所有菌株的测序数据已存入欧洲核苷酸档案库，编号为PRJEB26677、PRJEB28522和PRJEB36486（短读长数据）以及PRJNA869071（Nanopore读长和混合组装数据）。与样本元数据关联的登录号（以及本分析中使用的公开可用基因组的登录号）已包含在R包中，并作为本文的补充数据提供。

title: SARS-CoV-2 genome sequences from Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India by Nanopore Sequencing
abstract: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) has emerged as a significant challenge worldwide. Rapid genome sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 is going on across the globe to detect mutations and genomic modifications in SARS-CoV-2. In this study, we have sequenced twenty-three SARS-CoV-2 positive samples collected during the first pandemic from the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. We observed a range of already reported mutations (2-22), including; D614G, L452R, Q613H, Q677H, T1027I in the S gene; S194L in the N gene; Q57H, L106F, T175I in the ORF3. Few unreported mutations such as P309S in the ORF1ab gene; T379I in the N gene; and L52F, V77I in the ORF3a gene were also detected. Phylogenetic genome analysis showed similarity with other SARS-CoV-2 viruses reported from Uttar Pradesh. The observed mutations may be associated with SARS-CoV-2 virus pathogenicity or disease severity.
authors: Sahoo, B.; Maurya, P. K.; Tripathi, R. K.; Agarwal, J.; Tiwari, S.

ai.TLDR: 本研究分析了印度北方邦首次疫情中23例SARS-CoV-2样本的基因组变异，发现包括D614G在内的多种已知突变及部分未报道的变异，提示这些基因组改变可能影响病毒致病性或疾病严重程度。研究通过系统发育分析证实了与印度其他地区病毒的相似性。
ai.translation: 严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒2（SARS-CoV-2）已成为全球性重大挑战。目前全球正在进行SARS-CoV-2基因组的快速测序，以检测病毒的突变和基因组修饰。本研究对印度北方邦首次疫情期间收集的23例SARS-CoV-2阳性样本进行了基因组测序。我们观察到多种已报道的突变（2-22个），包括S基因中的D614G、L452R、Q613H、Q677H、T1027I；N基因中的S194L；ORF3基因中的Q57H、L106F、T175I。还检测到一些未报道的突变，如ORF1ab基因中的P309S、N基因中的T379I以及ORF3a基因中的L52F、V77I。系统发育基因组分析显示这些病毒与印度其他地区报道的SARS-CoV-2病毒具有相似性。观察到的突变可能与SARS-CoV-2病毒的致病性或疾病严重程度相关。

title: Unidirectional Single-File Transport of Full-Length Proteins Through a Nanopore
abstract: Nanopore sensors could revolutionize single-molecule proteomics by providing a means for identification of known proteins through fingerprinting or by de novo sequencing. However, the complex chemical and physical properties of proteins present multiple challenges to the conventional nanopore sensing method, predominantly, the single-file threading of a protein chain into a nanopore and its transport through it. Herein we describe a general approach for realizing unidirectional transport of full-length proteins through nanopores. We show that the combination of a chemically resistant biological nanopore platform and a high concentration guanidinium chloride buffer enables protein unfolding and unidirectional transport through a pore, propelled by an electroosmotic effect that largely owes to the guanidinium chloride presence. The uniform and slow (~10 {micro}s/amino acid) single-file transport, when combined with supervised machine learning of the electrical current signatures obtained, allows us to use to discern the protein threading orientation and identity. In conjunction with a method for tail-modification of native proteins and higher-resolution nanopores, our approach could offer a path towards direct single-molecule protein fingerprinting without the requirement of a motor enzyme.
authors: Yu, L.; Kang, X.; Li, F.; Mehrafrooz, B.; Makhamreh, A.; Fallahi, A.; Aksimentiev, A.; Chen, M.; Wanunu, M.

ai.TLDR: 纳米孔传感器通过指纹识别或从头测序可能革新单分子蛋白质组学，但蛋白质的复杂性质导致传统方法面临挑战。本研究提出结合化学耐受纳米孔平台与高浓度胍盐缓冲液的方法，利用电渗效应实现蛋白质展开和单向运输，结合机器学习可识别蛋白质取向与身份。
ai.translation: 纳米孔传感器可能通过指纹识别已知蛋白质或通过从头测序革新单分子蛋白质组学。然而，蛋白质复杂的化学和物理特性对传统纳米孔传感方法构成多重挑战，尤其是蛋白质链在纳米孔中的单列式穿行及其运输过程。本文提出一种实现全长蛋白质单向运输的通用方法。研究显示，化学耐受性生物纳米孔平台与高浓度胍盐缓冲液的结合可使蛋白质展开并借助电渗效应实现单向运输。均匀且缓慢（~10 微秒/氨基酸）的单列式运输，结合对电流信号的监督机器学习分析，可辨别蛋白质穿行方向与身份。结合原生蛋白质尾部修饰方法和更高分辨率纳米孔，该方法或为无需依赖驱动酶的直接单分子蛋白质指纹识别提供路径。

title: Adaptive nanopore sequencing on miniature flow cell detects extensive antimicrobial resistence
abstract: Rapid screening of hospital admissions to detect asymptomatic carriers of resistant bacteria can prevent pathogen outbreaks. However, the resulting isolates rarely have their genome sequenced due to cost constraints and long turn-around times to get and process the data, limiting their usefulness to the practitioner. Here we use real-time, on-device target enrichment ("adaptive") sequencing as a highly multiplexed assay covering 1,147 antimicrobial resistance genes. We compare its utility against standard and metagenomic sequencing, focusing on an isolate of Raoultella ornithinolytica harbouring three carbapenemases (NDM, KPC, VIM). Based on this experimental data, we then model the influence of several variables on the enrichment results and predict a large effect of nucleotide identity (higher is better) and read length (shorter is better). Lastly, we show how all relevant resistance genes are detected using adaptive sequencing on a miniature ("Flongle") flow cell, motivating its use in a clinical setting to monitor similar cases and their surroundings.
authors: Viehweger, A.; Marquet, M.; Hölzer, M.; Dietze, N.; Pletz, M.; Brandt, C.

ai.TLDR: 医院入院快速筛查无症状耐药菌携带者可预防病原体爆发，但传统全基因组测序因成本和处理时间限制应用受限。本研究通过自适应测序技术实现1147个耐药基因的高通量检测，验证其在Raoultella ornithinolytica分离株中对三种碳青霉烯酶的检测效果，并建立变量对富集结果的影响模型。
ai.translation: 快速筛查医院入院患者以检测无症状耐药菌携带者可有效预防病原体爆发。然而，由于成本限制和数据处理周期长，获得的分离株基因组测序率极低，限制了其临床应用价值。本研究采用实时、设备端目标富集的'自适应'测序技术，开发了一种覆盖1,147个抗菌药物耐药基因的高通量检测方法。通过对比标准测序和宏基因组测序，重点分析了携带三种碳青霉烯酶（NDM、KPC、VIM）的Raoultella ornithinolytica分离株的检测效果。基于实验数据，建立变量对富集结果的影响模型，发现核苷酸同源性（越高越好）和读长（越短越好）对结果有显著影响。最后展示通过微型'Flongle'流细胞实现的自适应测序可全面检测所有相关耐药基因，推动其在临床环境中用于监测类似病例及环境样本。

title: Benchmarking long-read genome sequence alignment tools for human genomics applications
abstract:
BackgroundThe utility of long-read genome sequencing platforms has been shown in many fields including whole genome assembly, metagenomics, and amplicon sequencing. Less clear is the applicability of long reads to reference-guided human genomics, the foundation of genomic medicine. Here, we benchmark available platform-agnostic alignment tools on datasets from nanopore and single-molecule real-time platforms to understand their suitability in producing a genome representation.

ResultsFor this study, we leveraged publicly-available data from sample NA12878 generated on Oxford Nanopore and sample NA24385 on Pacific Biosciences platforms. Each tool that was benchmarked, including GraphMap2, LRA, Minimap2, NGMLR, and Winnowmap2 produced the same alignment file each time. However, the different tools widely disagreed on which reads to leave unaligned, affecting the end genome coverage and the number of discoverable breakpoints. Minimap2 and winnowmap2 were computationally lightweight enough for use at scale. No alignment from one tool independently resolved all large structural variants (10,000-100,000 basepairs) present in the Database of Genome Variants (DGV) for sample NA12878 or the truthset for NA24385.

ConclusionsIt should be best practice to use an analysis pipeline that generates alignments with both minimap2 and winnowmap2 as both are lightweight and yield different views of the genome. If computational resources and time are not a factor for a given case or experiment, a third representation from NGMLR will provide another view, and another chance to resolve a case. LRA, while fast, did not work on the nanopore data for our cluster, but PacBio results were promising in that those computations completed faster than Mininmap2. Graphmap2 is not an ideal tool for exploration of a whole human genome generated on a long-read sequencing platform.
authors: LoTempio, J. E.; Delot, E.; Vilain, E.

ai.TLDR: 长读长测序技术在基因组组装和宏基因组学等领域已展现应用价值，但其在参考引导人类基因组学中的适用性尚不明确。本研究通过对比GraphMap2、LRA、Minimap2等工具在纳米孔和PacBio数据上的表现，发现不同工具在未比对读段的判定上存在显著差异，影响基因组覆盖度和断点发现。Minimap2和Winnowmap2因计算效率高适合大规模应用，但均无法独立解析所有大型结构变异。
ai.translation:
背景：长读长基因组测序平台在全基因组组装、宏基因组学和扩增子测序等领域已展现重要应用价值。然而，其在参考引导人类基因组学（基因组医学的基础）中的适用性仍存在疑问。本研究通过基准测试平台无关的比对工具，分析其在纳米孔和单分子实时测序平台数据集上的表现，以评估其生成基因组表征的适用性。

结果：本研究利用公开的NA12878样本（Oxford Nanopore平台）和NA24385样本（Pacific Biosciences平台）数据进行分析。所有被基准测试的工具（包括GraphMap2、LRA、Minimap2、NGMLR和Winnowmap2）均能生成一致的比对文件，但不同工具对未比对读段的判定存在显著差异，影响最终基因组覆盖度和可发现的断点数量。Minimap2和Winnowmap2因计算开销较低适合大规模应用。但没有任何工具的比对结果能独立解析Database of Genome Variants（DGV）数据库中NA12878样本的所有大型结构变异（10,000-100,000碱基对），或NA24385样本的真值集。

结论：建议采用同时使用Minimap2和Winnowmap2的分析流程，因为两者均为轻量级工具且能提供不同的基因组视角。若计算资源和时间不受限制，可进一步使用NGMLR生成第三种表征以增加解析机会。LRA虽速度快，但未在本集群的纳米孔数据上运行成功，而PacBio结果显示出计算速度优于Minimap2。GraphMap2不适用于长读长测序平台生成的全人类基因组探索。

title: Construction of a new chromosome-scale, long-read reference genome assembly of the Syrian hamster, Mesocricetus auratus
abstract:
BackgroundThe Syrian hamster (Mesocricetus auratus) has been suggested as a useful mammalian model for a variety of diseases and infections, including infection with respiratory viruses such as SARS-CoV-2. The MesAur1.0 genome assembly was generated in 2013 using whole-genome shotgun sequencing with short-read sequence data. Current more advanced sequencing technologies and assembly methods now permit the generation of near-complete genome assemblies with higher quality and greater continuity.

FindingsHere, we report an improved assembly of the M. auratus genome (BCM_Maur_2.0) using Oxford Nanopore Technologies long-read sequencing to produce a chromosome-scale assembly. The total length of the new assembly is 2.46 Gbp, similar to the 2.50 Gbp length of a previous assembly of this genome, MesAur1.0.
